śrī durgādevyai namaḥ
śrīmaddevībhāgavatamāhātmyam
sṛṣṭau yā sargarūpā jagadavanavidhau pālinī yā ca raudrī
saṃhāre cāpi yasyā jagadidamakhilaṃ krīḍanaṃ yā'parākhyā |
paśyantī madhyamā'tho tadanu bhagavatī vaikharīvarṇarūpā
sā'smadvācaṃ prasannā vidhiharigiriśārādhitā'laṅkarotu || 1 ||
nārāyaṇaṃ namaskṛtya naraṃ caiva narottamam |
devīṃ sarasvatīṃ vyāsaṃ tato jayamudīrayet || 2 ||
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
sūta jīva samā bahvīryastvaṃ śrāvayasīha naḥ |
kathā manoharāḥ puṇyā vyāsaśiṣya mahāmate || 3||
sarvapāpaharaṃ puṇyaṃ viṣṇoścaritamadbhutam |
avatārakathopetamasmābhirbhaktitaḥ śrutam ||4||
śivasya caritaṃ divyaṃ bhasmarudrākṣayostathā |
setihāsaṃ ca māhātmyaṃ śrutaṃ tava mukhāmbujāt ||5||
adhunā śrotumicchāmaḥ pāvanātpāvanaṃ param |
bhuktimuktipradaṃ nṛṇāmanāyāsena sarvaśaḥ || 6 ||
tattvaṃ brūhi mahābhāga yena siddhayanti mānavāḥ |
kalāvapi varaṃ tvatto na vidyaḥ saṃśayacchidam ||7|
sūta uvāca
sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ mahābhāgā lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā |
sarvaśāstrasya yatsāraṃ taho vakṣyāmyaśeṣataḥ ||8
tāvadgarjanti tīrthāni purāṇāni vratāni ca |
yāvanna śrūyate samyagdevībhāgavataṃ naraiḥ ||9||
tāvatpāpāṭavī nṛṇāṃ kleśadā'dabhrakaṇṭakā |
yāvanna paraśuḥ prāpto devībhāgavatābhidhaḥ || 10||
tāvatkleśāvahaṃ nṛṇāmupasargamahātamaḥ |
yāvannaivodayaṃ prāpto devībhāgavatoṣṇaguḥ || 11||
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
sūta sūta mahābhāga vada no vadatāṃvara |
kīdṛśaṃ tatpurāyaṇaṃ hi vidhistacchuvaṇe ca kaḥ || 12||
katibhirvāsarairetacchotavyaṃ kiṃ ca pūjanam |
kairmānavaiḥ śrutaṃ pūrvaṃ kānkānkāmānavāpnuyuḥ || 13||

sūta uvāca
viṣṇoraṃśo munirjātaḥ satyavatyāṃ parāśarāt |
vibhajya vedāṃścaturaḥ śipyānadhyāpayatpurā || 14 ||
vrātyānāṃ dvijabandhūnāṃ vedeṣvanadhikāriṇām |
strīṇāṃ durmedhasāṃ nṛṇāṃ dharmajñānaṃ kathaṃ bhavet ||15||
vicāryaitattu manasā bhagavānvādarāyaṇaḥ |
purāṇaṃ saṃhitāṃ dadhyau teṣāṃ dharmavidhitsayā || 16 ||
aṣṭādaśa purāṇāni sa kṛtvā bhagavānmuniḥ |
māmevādhyāpayāmāsa bhāratākhyānameva ca || 17||
devībhāgavataṃ tatra purāṇaṃ bhogamokṣadam |
svayaṃ tu śrāvayāmāsa janamejayabhūpatim || 18 ||
pūrvaṃ yasya pitā rājā parīkṣittakṣakāhinā |
saṃdaṣṭastasya saṃśuddha rājñā bhāgavataṃ śrutam ||19||
navabhirdivasai: śrīmadredavyāsamukhāmbujāt |
trailokyamātaraṃ devīṃ pūjayitvā vidhānataḥ || 20 ||
navāha yajñe sampūrṇe parīkṣidapi bhūpatiḥ |
divyarūpadharo devyāḥ sālokyaṃ tatkṣaṇādagāt ||21||
piturdivyāṃ gatiṃ rājā vilokya janamejayaḥ |
vyāsaṃ muniṃ samabhyarcya parāṃ mudamavāpa ha ||22||
aṣṭādaśapurāṇānāṃ madhye sarvottamaṃ param |
devībhāgavataṃ nāma dharmakāmārthamokṣadam ||23||
ye śṛṇvanti sadā bhaktyā devyā bhāgavatīṃ kathām |
teṣāṃ siddhirna dūrasthā tasmātsavyā sadā nṛbhiḥ || 24 ||
dinamarddha tadarthaṃ vā muhūttaṃ kṣaṇameva vā |
ye śṛṇvanti narā bhaktyā na teṣāṃ durgatiḥ kvacit ||
sarvayajñeṣu tīrtheṣu sarvadāneṣu yatphalam |
sakṛtpurāṇaśravaṇāttatphalaṃ labhate naraḥ || 26 ||
kṛtā do bahavo dharmāḥ kalau dharmastu kevalam |
purāṇaśravaṇādanyo vidyate nāparo nṛṇām || 27||
dharmācāravihīnānāṃ kalāvalpāyuṣāṃ nṛṇām |
vyāso hitāya vidadhe purāṇākhyaṃ sudhārasam ||28||
sudhāṃ pivanneka eva naraḥ syādajarāmaraḥ |
devyāḥ kathāmṛtaṃ kuryātkulamebājarāmaram ||29||
māsānāṃ niyamo nātra dinānāṃ niyamo'pi na |
sadā mevyaṃ sadā sevyaṃ devībhāgavataṃ naraiḥ ||30||
āśvine madhumāse vā tapomāme śucau tathā |
caturṣu navarātreṣu viśeṣātphaladāyakam ||31||
ato navāhayajño'yaṃ sarvasmātpuṇyakarmaṇaḥ |
phalādhikapradānena proktaḥ puṇyaprado nṛṇām || 32||
ye durhṛdaḥ pāparatā vimūḍhā mitraho vedaviniṃdakāśca |
hisāratā nāstikamārgasaktā navāhayajñena punaṃti te kalo || 33 ||
parasvadā rāhaṇe ti'lubdhā ye vai narāḥ kalpabhārabhājaḥ |
godevatā brāhmaṇabhaktihīnā navāhajñena bhavanti śuddhāḥ || 34 ||
tapobhirugraivratatīrtha sevanaidarniranekainiyamairmakhaiśva
hutarjapairyacca phalena labhyate navāhayajena tadāpyate nṛṇām || 35 ||

tathā na gaṅgā na gayā na kāśī na naimiṣaṃ no mathurā na puṣkaram |
punāti sadyo badarīvanaṃ no yathā hi devīmakha eṣa viprāḥ || 36 ||
ato bhāgavataṃ devyāḥ purāṇaṃ parataḥ param |
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāmuttamaṃ sādhanaṃ matam ||37||
āśvinasya site pakṣe kanyārāśigate ravau |
mahāṣṭamyāṃ samabhyarcya haika siṃhāsana sthitam ||38||
devīprītipadaṃ bhaktyā śrībhāgavatapustakam |
dadyādviprāya yogyāya sa devyāḥ padavīṃ labhet || 39 ||
devī bhāgavatasyāpi ślokaṃ ślokārddhameva vā |
bhaktyā yaśca paṭhennityaṃ sa devyāḥ prītibhāgbhavet ||
upasargabhavaṃ ghoraṃ mahāmārīsamudbhavam |
utpātānakhilāṃścāpi haṃti śravaṇamātrataḥ ||41||
bālagrahakṛtaṃ yacca bhūtapretakṛtaṃ bhayam |
devībhāgavatasyāsya śravaṇādyāti dūrataḥ ||42 ||
yastu bhāgavataṃ devyāḥ paṭhedbhaktyā śṛṇoti vā |
dharmamarthaṃ ca kāmaṃ ca mokṣaṃ ca labhate naraḥ || 43 ||
śravaṇādvasudevo'sya prasenānveṣaṇe gatam |
cirāyitaṃ priyaṃ putraṃ kṛṣṇaṃ labdhvā mumoda ha ||44||
ya etāṃ śṛṇuyādbhaktyā śrīmadbhāgavata kathām |
bhukti mukti sa labhate bhaktyā yaśva paṭhedimām ||
aputro labhate putraṃ daridro dhanavānbhavet |
rogī rogātpramucyeta śrutvā bhāgavatāmṛtam ||46 ||
vaṃdhyā vā kākavaṃdhyā vā mṛtavatsā ca yāṅganā |
devībhāgavataṃ śrutvā labhetputraṃ cirāyuṣam ||47 ||
pūjitaṃ yadgṛhe nityaṃ śrībhāgavatapustakam |
tadgṛhaṃ tīrthaṃbhūtaṃ hi vasatāṃ pāpanāśakam ||48 ||
aṣṭamyāṃ vā caturdaśyāṃ navamyāṃ bhaktisaṃyutaḥ |
yaḥ paṭhecchṛṇuyādvāpi sa siddhiṃ labhate parām ||49||
paṭhandvijo vedavidagraṇīrbhavedvāhuprajāto dharaṇīpatiḥ syāt |
vaiśyaḥ paṭhanvittasamṛddhimeti śūdro'pi śṛṇvansvakṛtottamaḥ syāt || 50 ||
iti śrīskanda purāṇe mānasakhaṇḍe devībhāgavatamāhātmye prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 ||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
vasudevo mahābhāgaḥ kathaṃ putramavāptavān |
prasenaḥ kutra kṛṣṇena bhramatā'nveṣitaḥ katham ||1||
vidhinā kena kasmācca devībhāgavataṃ śrutam |
vasudevena sumate vada sūta kathāmimām ||2||
sūta uvāca
satrājindbhojavaṃśīyo dvāravatyāṃ sukhaṃ vasan |
sūryasyārādhane yukto bhaktaśca paramaḥ sakhā ||3||
atha kālena kiyatā prasannaḥ savitā'bhavat |
svalokaṃ darśayāmāsa tadbhaktyā praṇayena ca ||4||

tasmai pratītasya bhagavānsyamaṃtakarmāṇa dadau |
sa taṃ bibhranmaṇi kaṇṭhe dvārakāmājagāma ha ||5||
dṛṣṭvā taṃ tejasā bhrāntā matvādityaṃ puraukasaḥ |
kṛṣṇamūcūḥ samabhyetya sudharmāyāmavasthitam ||6||
eṣa āyāti savitā didṛkṣustvāṃ jagatpate |
śrutvā kṛṣṇastu tadvācaṃ prahasyovāca saṃsadi || 7 |
savitā naiṣa bho bālāḥ satrājinmaṇinā jvalan |
syamantakena cāyāti bhāsvaddattena bhāsvatā || 8 ||
viprānsamāhūya svastivācanapūrvakam |
prāveśayatsamabhyarcya satrājitsvagṛhe maṇim ||9||
atha na tatra mārī durbhikṣaṃ nopasargabhayaṃ kvacit |
yatrāste sa maṇinityamaṣṭabhāra suvarṇadaḥ || 10 ||
atha satrājito bhrātā praseno nāma karhicit |
kaṇṭhe baddhvā maṇi samro hayamāruhya saiṃdhavam || 11 ||
mṛgayārthaṃ vanaṃ yātastamadrākṣīnmṛgādhipaḥ |
prasenaṃ sahayaṃ hatvā siṃho jagrāha taṃ maṇim ||12||
jāmbavānṛkṣarājo'tha dṛṣṭvā maṇidharaṃ harim |
hatvā na taṃ bilahāri maṇi jagrāha vīryavān || 13||
sa taṃ maṇi svaputrāya krīḍanārthamadātprabhuḥ |
atha cikrīḍa bālo'pi maṇi saṃprāpya bhāsvaram || 14 |
prasene'nāgate cātha satrājitparyatapyata |
na jāne kena nihataḥ prarono maṇimicchatā || 15 ||
atha lokamukhodgīrṇā kiṃvadantī pure'bhavat |
kṛṣṇena nihato nūnaṃ praseno maṇilipsunā || 16 ||
sa taṃ śuśrāva kṛṣṇopi duryaśo liptamātmani |
māṭuṃ tattasya padavīṃ puraukobhiḥ sahāgamat ||17||
gatvā sa vipine'paśyatprasevaṃ hariṇā hatam |
yayau mṛgendramanviṣyannasṛgbi kitādhvanā || 18 ||
atha kṛṣṇo hataṃ siṃhaṃ biladvāri vilokya ca |
uvāca bhagavānvācaṃ kṛpayā puravāsinaḥ || 19||
tiṣṭhadhvaṃ yūyamatraiva yāvadāgamanaṃ mama |
praviśāmi bilaṃ tvetanmaṇihārakalabdhaye ||20||
tathetyuktvā tu te tasthustatraiva dvārakaukasaḥ |
jagāmāṃtavilaṃ kṛṣṇo yatra jāmbavato gṛham ||21||
ṛkṣarājasutaṃ dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇo maṇidharaṃ tadā |
hartumaicchanrmāṇi tāvaddhātrī cukrośa bhītavat ||22||
śrutvā dhātrīṃravaṃ sadyaḥ samāgatyarthakṣarāṭ tadā |
yuyudhe svāminā sākamaviśrāma maharniśam ||23||
evaṃ trinavarātraṃ tu mahadyuddhamabhūttayoḥ |
kṛṣṇāgamapratīkṣāste tasthurdvāri purokasaḥ ||24||
dvādaśāhaṃ tato bhītyā pratijagmurnijālayam |
tatra te kathayāmāsurvṛttāṃtaṃ sarvamāditaḥ || 25||
satrājitaṃ śapaṃtaste sarve śokākulā bhṛśam |
vāsudevo mahābhāgaḥ śrutvā putrasya tāṃ kathām ||26|
mumoha saparīvārastadā paramayā śucā |
cintayāmāsa bahudhā kathaṃ śreyo bhavenmama ||27|
athājagāma bhagavāndevarṣirbrahmalokataḥ |
utthāya taṃ praṇamyāsau vasudevo'bhyapūjayat ||28|
nārado'nāmayaṃ pṛṣṭvā vāsudevaṃ mahāmatim |
prapaccha ca yaduśreṣṭhaṃ kiṃ citayasi tadvada || 29||

vasudeva uvāca
putro me'tipriyaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ prasenānveṣaṇāya tu |
pauraiḥ sākaṃ vanaṃ gatvā nihataṃ taṃ tadaikṣata || 30 ||
prasenaghātakaṃ dṛṣṭvā biladvāre mṛtaṃ harim |
dvāri paurānadhiṣṭhāya bilāṃtargatavānsvayam ||31||
bahavo divasā yātā nāyātyadyāpi me sutaḥ |
ataḥ śocāmi tad brūhi yena lapsye sutaṃ mune || 32 ||
nārada uvāca
putraprāptyai yaduśreṣṭha devomārādhayāṃbikām |
tasthā ārādhanenaiva sadyaḥ śreyo hyatrāpsyasi ||33||
vasudeva uvāca
bhagavankā hi sā devī kiṃprabhāvā maheśvarī |
kathamārādhanaṃ tasyā devarṣe kṛpayā vada ||34||
nārada uvāca
vasudeva mahābhāga śṛṇu saṃkṣepato mama |
devyā māhātmyamatulaṃ ko vaktuṃ vistarāttamaḥ || 35 ||
yā sā bhagavatī nityā saccidānandarūpiṇī |
parātparatarā devī yayā vyāptamidaṃ jagat ||36||
yadārādhanato brahmā sṛjatīdaṃ carācaram |
yāṃ ca stutvā vinirmukto madhukaiṭabhajādbhayāt || 37||
viṣṇuryatkṛpayā viśvaṃ vibharti bhagavānidam |
rudraḥ saṃharate yasyāḥ kṛpāpāṃganirīkṣaṇāt || 38||
saṃtārabaṃdhaheturyā saiva muktipradāyinī |
sā vidyā paramā devī saiva sarveśvareśvarī ||39||
navarātravidhānena sampūjya jagadaṃbikām |
navāhobhiḥ purāṇaṃ ca devyā bhāgavataṃ śṛṇu ||40||
yasya śravaṇamātreṇa sadyaḥ putramavāpsyasi |
bhuktirmuktirna dūrasthā paṭhatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ nṛṇām ||41||
ityukto nāradenāsau vasudevaḥ praṇamya tam |
uvāca parayā prītyā nāradaṃ munisattamam || 42 ||
vasudeva uvāca
bhagavaṃstava vākyena saṃsmṛtaṃ vṛttamātmanaḥ |
śrayatāṃ tacca vakṣyāmi devīmāhātmyasaṃbhavam ||43||
purā nabhogirā kaṃso devakyaṣṭamagarbhataḥ |
jñātvātmamṛtyuṃ pāpo māṃ sabhāryāṃ nyaruṇadbhiyā 44 ||
kārāgāre'hamavasaṃ devakyā saha bhāryayā |
jātaṃ jātaṃ samavadhītputraṃ kaṃso'pi pāpakṛt || 45 ||
ṣaṭ putrā nihatāstena tadā śokākulā bhṛśam |
atapyaddevakī devī naktaṃdivamaninditā || 46 ||
tadā'haṃ gargamāhūya muniṃ natvā'bhipūjya ca |
nivedya devakīduḥkhamavocaṃ putrakāmyayā ||47 ||
bhagavankaruṇāsindho yādavānāṃ gururbhavān |
āyuṣmatputrasaṃprāptisādhanaṃ vada |
me mune || 48 ||

tato gargaḥ prasannātmā māmuvāca dayānidhiḥ |
vasudeva mahābhāga śṛṇu tatsādhanaṃ param || 49 ||
yā sā bhagavatī durgā bhaktadurgatihāriṇī |
tāmārādhaya kalyāṇīṃ sadyaḥ śreyo hyavāpsyasi 50 ||
yadārādhanataḥ sarve sarvānkāmānavāpnuyuḥ |
na kiṃcidurlabhaṃ loke durgārcanavatāṃ nṛṇām || 51 ||
ityukto'haṃ mudā yuktaḥ sabhāryo munipuṅgavam |
praṇamya parayā bhaktyā prāvocaṃ vihitāṃjaliḥ || 52 ||
vasudeva uvāca
yadyasti bhagavanprītirmayi te karuṇānidhe |
tadā purā madarthe tvaṃ samārādhaya caṇḍikām ||53 ||
niruddhaḥ kaṃsagehe'haṃ na kiṃcitkartumutsahe |
atastvameva duḥkhābdhermāmuddhara mahāmate || 54 ||
ityuktastu mayā prītaḥ provāca munipuṅgavaḥ |
vasudeva tava prītyā kariṣyāmi hitaṃ tava || 55 ||
atha gargamuniḥ prītyā mayā saṃprārthito'gamat |
ārirādhayiṣurdurgāṃ vidhyādri brāhmaṇaiḥ saha || 56 ||
tatra gatvā jagaddhātrīṃ bhaktābhīṣṭapradāyinīm |
ārādhayāmāsa munirjapapāṭhaparāyaṇaḥ || 57||
yataḥ samāpte niyame vāguvācāśarīriṇī |
prasannā'haṃ mune kāryasiddhistava bhaviṣyati || 58 ||
bhūbhāraharaṇārthāya mayā saṃpreṣito hariḥ |
vasudevasya devakyāṃ svāṃśenāvatariṣyati || 59 ||
kaṃsabhītyā tamādāya bālamānakaduṃdubhiḥ |
prāpayiṣyati sadyastu gokule nandaveśmani || 60 ||
yaśodātanayāṃ nītvā svagṛhe kaṃsabhūbhuje |
dāsyatyatha ca tāṃ haṃtuṃ kaṃsa ākṣepsyati kṣitī 69 ||
sā taddhastādvinirgatya sadyo- divyavapurddharā |
madaṃśabhūtā vidhyādrī kariṣyati jagaddhitam ||62||
iti tadvacanaṃ śrutvā praṇamya jagadambikām |
gargo muniḥ prasannātmā mathurāmagamatpurīm ||63 ||
varadānaṃ mahādevyā gargācāryasukhāvaham |
śrutvā sabhāryaḥ saṃprītaḥ paraṃ mudamathāgamat || 64 ||
tadārabhya paraṃ jāne devīmāhātmyamuttamam |
adhunāpi hi devarpe śrutaṃ tava mukhāṃbujāt || 65||
ato bhāgavataṃ devyāratvameva śrāvaya prabho |
madbhāgyādeva devarṣe saṃprāpto'si dayānidhe || 66 ||
vasudevavacaḥ śrutvā nāradaḥ prītamānasaḥ |
sudine śubha nakṣatre kathāraṃbha mathākarot ||67||
kathāvighnavighātārthaṃ dvijā jepurnavākṣaram |
mārkaṇḍeyapurāṇoktaṃ peṭhurdevyāḥ stavaṃ tathā ||68 ||
prathamaskaṃdhamārabhya śrīnāradamukhodgatam |
śuśrāva vasudevaśca bhaktyā bhāgavatāmṛtam ||69||
navame kathāpūrtī pustakaṃ vācakaṃ tathā |
prasanna : pūjayāmāsa vasudevo mahāmanāḥ || 70 || navame'hni |
atha tatra bilasyāṃtaḥ kṛṣṇajāṃbavatormṛdhe |
kṛṣṇamuṣṭiviniṣpātaślathāṅgī jāṃbavānabhūt ||71 ||
athāgatasmṛtiḥ so hi bhagavaṃtaṃ praṇamya ca |
uvāca parayā bhaktyā svāparādhaṃ kṣamāpayan ||72||
jñāto'si raghuvaryastvaṃ yadroṣātsaritāṃ patiḥ |
kṣobhaṃ jagāma laṃkāṃ ca rāvaṇaḥ sānugo hataḥ ||73||

sa evāsi bhavānkṛṣṇa maddaurātmyaṃ kṣamasva bhoḥ |
brūhi yatkaraṇīyaṃ me bhṛtyo'haṃ tava sarvathā ||74 ||
śrutvā jāṃbavato vācamabravījjagadīśvaraḥ |
maṇihetoriha prāptā vayamṛkṣapate bilam ||75 ||
ṛkṣarājastataḥ prītyā kanyāṃ jāmbavatīṃ nijām |
dadī kṛṣṇāya saṃpūjya syamaṃtakarmāṇi tathā || 76 ||
satāṃ patnī samādāya maṇi kaṃṭhe tathā dadhat |
abhimaṃtryarkṣarājañca pratasthe dvārakāṃ prati || 77||
kathāsamāptidivase vasudeva udāradhīḥ |
brāhmaṇānbhojayāmāsa dakṣiṇābhiratoṣayat || 78 ||
āśīrvādaṃ prayuānā dvijā yatsamaye hariḥ |
ājagāma kṣaṇe tasminpalyā saha maṇi dadhat || 79 ||
bhāryayā sahitaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ vasudevapurogamāḥ |
dṛṣṭvā harṣāśrupūrṇākṣāḥ samavāpuḥ parāṃ mudam ||80||
devarṣirnāradaśvātha kṛṣṇāgamanaharṣitaḥ |
āmaṃtrya vasudevaṃ ca kṛṣṇo brahmasabhāṃ yayau || 81 ||
haricaritamidaṃ yatkīrtitaṃ duryaśoghnaṃ paṭhati vimalabhaktyā śuddhacittaḥ śṛṇoti |
sa bhavati sukhapūrṇaḥ sarvadā siddhikāmo jagati ca vapuṣo'nte muktimārga labhecca ||82||
iti śrīskandapurāṇe mānasakhaṇḍe devībhāgavatamāhātmyaṃ dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
athetihāsamanyacca śṛṇudhvaṃ munisattamāḥ |
devībhāgavatasyāsya māhātmyaṃ yatra gīyate || 1 ||
ekadā kuṃbhayonistu lopāmudrāpatirmuniḥ |
gatvā kumāramabhyarcya papraccha vividhāḥ kathāḥ ||2||
sa tasmai bhagavānskandaḥ kathayāmāsa bhūriśaḥ |
dānatīrthavratādīnāṃ māhātmyopacitāḥ kathāḥ ||3||
vārāṇasyāśca māhātmyaṃ maṇikarṇībhavaṃ tathā |
gaṃgāyāścāpi tīrthānāṃ varṇitaṃ bahuvistaram ||4||
śrutvātha sa muniḥ prītaḥ kumāraṃ bhūrivarcasam |
punaḥ papraccha lokānāṃ hitārtha kuṃbhasaṃbhavaḥ ||5||
agastya uvāca
bhagavaṃstārakārāte devībhāgavatasya tu |
māhātmyaśravaṇe tasya vidhi cāpi vada prabho || 6 ||
devībhāgavataṃ nāma purāṇaṃ paramottamam |
trailokyajananī sākṣādgīyate yatra śāśvatī ||7||
skanda uvāca
śrībhāgavatamāhātmyaṃ ko vaktuṃ vistarātkṣamaḥ |
śṛṇu saṃkṣepato brahmankathayiṣyāmi sāṃpratam || 8||
yā nityā saccidānandarūpiṇī jagadambikā |
sākṣātsamāśritā yatra bhuktimuktipradāyinī || 9||
atastadvāṅmayī mūrtirdevībhāgavate mune |
paṭhanācchravaṇādyasya na kiṃcidiha durlabham ||10||

āsīdvivasvataḥ putraḥ śrāddhadeva iti śrutaḥ |
so'napatyo'karodiṣṭiṃ vasiṣṭhānumato nṛpaḥ || 11 ||
hotāraṃ prārthayāmāsa śraddhā'tha dayitā manoḥ |
kanyā bhavatu me brahmaṃstathopāyo vidhīyatām || 12 ||
manasā cintayanhotā kanyāmevājuhoddhaviḥ |
tatastadvayabhicāreṇa kanyelā nāma cābhavat || 13 ||
atha rājā sutāṃ dṛṣṭvā provāca vimanā gurum |
kathaṃ saṅkalpavaipamyamiha jātaṃ prabho tava || 14||
tacchrutvā sa munirdadhyau jñātvā hoturvyatikramam |
īśvaraṃ śaraṇaṃ yāta ilāyāḥ puṃstvakāmyayā ||15||
munestapaḥprabhāvācca pareśānugrahāttathā |
paśyatāṃ sarvalokānāmilā puruṣatāmagāt || 16 ||
guruṇā kṛtasaṃskāraḥ sudyumno'tha manoḥ sutaḥ |
nidhirvabhūva vidyānāṃ saritāmiva sāgaraḥ || 17 ||
atha kālena sudyumnastāruṇyaṃ samavāpya ca |
mṛgayārthaṃ vanaṃ yāto hayamāruhya saindhavam || 18||
vanādvanāṃtaraṃ gacchanbahu babhrāma sānugaḥ |
daivādadhastāddhemādreḥ sa kumāro vanaṃ yayau || 19 ||
kasmiścitsamaye yatra bhāryayā'parṇayā saha |
aramaddevadevastu śaṅkaro bhagavānmudā ||20||
tadā tu munayastatra śivadarśanalālasāḥ |
ājagmuratha tāndṛṣṭvā girijā vrīḍitā'bhavat ||21||
ramamāṇau tu tau dṛṣṭvā giriśau saṃśitavratāḥ |
nivṛttā munayo jammurvekuṇṭhanilayaṃ tadā || 22 ||
priyāyāḥ priyamanvicchañchivo'raṇyaṃ śaśāpa hra |
adyārabhya vidyo'tra pumān yoṣidbhavediti || 23 ||
tata ārabhya taṃ deśaṃ puruṣā varjayaṃti hi |
tatra praviṣṭaḥ sudyumno babhūva pramadottamā ||24||
strībhūtānugānaśvaṃ vaḍavāṃ vīkṣya vismitaḥ |
atha sā sundarī yoṣā vicacāra vane vane || 25 ||
ekadā sā jagāmātha budhaṃsyāśramasannidhau |
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ cārusarvāṅgīṃ pīnonnatapayodharām ||26||
biboṣṭhī kundadaśanāṃ sumukhīṃmutpalekṣaṇām |
anaṅgaśaravidvāṃgaśvakame bhagavānbudhaḥ || 27||
sāpi taṃ cakame subhrūḥ kumāraṃ somanaṃdanam |
tatastasyāśrame'vātsīdramamāṇā budhena sā || 28 ||
atha kālena kiyatā purūravasamātmajam |
sa tasyāṃ janayāmāsa mitrāvaruṇasaṃbhavaḥ ||29||
atha varṣeṣu yāteṣu kadācitsā budhāśrame |
smṛtvā svaṃ pūrvavṛttāntaṃ duḥkhitā nirjagāma ha || 30 ||
gurorathāśramaṃ gatvā vasiṣṭhasya praṇamya tam |
nivedya vṛttaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayau puṃstvamabhīpsatī || 31||
vasiṣṭho jñātavṛttāṃto gatvā kailāsa parvatam |
saṃpūjya śaṃbhu tuṣṭāva bhaktyā paramayā yutaḥ ||32||
vasiṣṭha uvāca
namo namaḥ śivāyāstu śaṃkarāya kapardine |
girijārddhāṅgadehāya namaste caṃdramaulaye || 33||
mṛḍāya sukhadātre te namaḥ kailāsavāsine |
nīlakaṇṭhāya bhaktānāṃ bhuktimuktipradāyine ||34||
śivāya śivarūpāya prapannabhayahāriṇe |
namo vṛṣabhavāhāya śaraṇyāya parātmane ||35||
brahmaviṣṇvīśarūpāya sargasthitilayeṣu ca |
namo devādhidevāya varadāya purāraye ||36||

yajñarūpāya yajatāṃ phaladātre namo namaḥ |
gaṃgādharāya sūryenduśikhinetrāya te namaḥ ||37||
evaṃ stutaḥ sa bhagavānprādurāsījjagatpatiḥ |
vṛṣārūḍho'mbikopetaḥ koṭisūryasamaprabhaḥ ||38||
rajatācalasaṃkāśastrinetraścaṃdraśekharaḥ |
praṇataṃ parituṣṭātmā provāca munisattamam ||39||
śrībhagavānuvāca
varaṃ varaya viprarṣe yatte manasi vartate |
ityuktastaṃ praṇamyelā puṃstvamabhyarthayanmuniḥ || 40 ||
atha prasanno bhagavānuvāca munisattamam |
māsaṃ pumānsa bhavitā māsaṃ nārī bhaviṣyati || 41 ||
iti prāpya varaṃ śaṃbhormaharṣirjagadambikām |
varadānonmukhīṃ devīṃ praṇanāma maheśvarīm ||42 |
koṭicaṃdrakalākānti susmitāṃ paripūjya ca |
tuṣṭāva bhaktyā satatamilāyāḥ puṃstvakāmyayā 43 ||
jaya devi mahādevi bhaktānugrahakāriṇi |
jaya sarvasurārādhye jayānaṃtaguṇālaye || 44 ||
namo namaste deveśi śaraṇāgatavatsale |
jaya durge du:khahaṃtri duṣṭadaityanipūdini || 45 ||
bhaktigamye mahāmāye namaste jagadambike | saṃsārasāgarottā rapotī bhūtapadāmbuje 118911
brahmādayo'pi vibudhāstvatpādāṃbujasevayā |
viśvasargasthitilayaprabhutvaṃ samavāpnuyuḥ || 47||
prasannā bhava deveśi caturvargapradāyini |
kastvāṃ stotuṃ kṣamo devi kevalaṃ praṇato'smyaham 48||
evaṃ stutā bhagavatī durgā nārāyaṇī parā |
bhaktyā vasiṣṭhamuninā prasannā tatkṣaṇādabhūt ||49 ||
tadovāca mahādevī praṇatārtiharī munim |
sudyumnabhavanaṃ gatvā kuru bhaktyā madarcanam ||50||
sudhumnaṃ śrāvaya prītyā purāṇaṃ matpriyaṃkaram |
devībhāgavataṃ nāma navāhobhirdvijottama || 51 ||
śravaṇādeva satataṃ puṃstvamasya bhaviṣyati |
ityuktvā ca tirodhānaṃ gacchataḥ sma śiveśvarau || 52 ||
vasiṣṭhastāṃ diśaṃ natvā samāgatyāśramaṃ nijam |
samāhūya ca sudyumnaṃ devyā rādhanamādiśat || 53 ||
āśvinasya site pakṣe saṃpūjya jagadaṃbikām |
navarātravidhānena śrāvayāmāsa bhūpatim ||54 ||
śrutvā bhaktyāpi sudyumnaḥ śrīmadbhāgavatāmṛtam |
praṇamyābhyarcya ca guruṃ lebhe puṃstvaṃ niraṃtaram 55 ||
rājyāsane'bhiṣiktastu vasiṣṭhena maharṣiṇā |
bhuvaṃ śaśāsa dharmeṇa prajāścaivānuraṃjayan ||56||
īje ca vividhairyajñaḥ saṃpūrṇavaradakṣiṇaḥ |
putreṣu rājyaṃ saṃdiśya prāpa devyāḥ salokatām || 57 ||
iti kathitamaśeṣaṃ setihāsaṃ ca viprā yadi paṭhati subhaktayā mānavo vā śṛṇoti |
sa iha sakalakāmānprāpya devyāḥ prasādātparamamṛtamathānte yāti devyāḥ salokam ||58 ||
iti śrīskandapurāṇe mānasakhaṇḍe devībhāgavatamāhātmye tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 3||

atha caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā kathāṃ divyāṃ vicitrāṃ kuṃbhasaṃbhavaḥ |
śuśrūṣuḥ punarāhedaṃ viśākhaṃ vinayānvitaḥ || 1||
agastya uvāca
devasenāpate . deva vicitreyaṃ śrutā kathā |
punaranyacca māhātmyaṃ vada bhāgavatasya me ||2||
skanda uvāca
mitrāvaruṇasaṃbhūta mune śṛṇu kathāmimām |
yatraikadeśamahimā prokto bhāgavatasya tu || 3 ||
varṇyate dharmavistāro gāyatrīmadhikṛtya ca |
gāyatryā mahimā yatra tadbhāgavatamiṣyate || 4 ||
bhagavatyā idaṃ yasmāttasmādbhāgavataṃ viduḥ |
brahmaviṣṇuśivārādhyā parā bhagavatī hi sā ||5||
ṛtavāgiti vikhyāto munirāsīnmahāmatiḥ |
tasya putro'bhavatkāle gaṇḍānte pauṣṇabhāntime || 6||
sa tasya jātakarmādi kriyāśvakre yathāvidhi |
cūḍopanayanādīṃśca saṃskārānapi so'karot || 7||
yata ārabhya jāto'sau putrastasya mahātmanaḥ |
tata evātha sa muniḥ śokarogākulo'bhavat ||8||
roṣalobhaparītātmā tathā mātāpi tasya ca |
bahurāgāditā nityaṃ śucaḥ duḥkhīkṛtā bhṛśam ||9||
ṛtavāksa muniścintāmavāpa bhṛśaduḥkhitaḥ |
kimetatatkāraṇaṃ jātaṃ putro me'tyaṃtadurmatiḥ || 10||
kasyacinmuniputrasya balātpatnoṃ jahāra ca |
mene śikṣāṃ piturnāsau na ca māturvimūḍhadhīḥ || 11 ||
tato viṣaṇṇacittastu ṛtavāgabravīdidam |
aputratā varaṃ nṛṇāṃ na kadācitkuputratā ||12||
pitṝnkuputraḥ svaryātānniraye pātayatyapi |
yāvajjīvetsadā pitroḥ kevalaṃ duḥkhadāyakaḥ || 13 ||
pitrorduḥkhāya dhigjanma kuputrasya ca pāpinaḥ |
suhṛdāṃ nopakārāya nāpakārāya vairiṇām || 14 ||
dhanyāste mānavā loke suputro yadgṛhe sthitaḥ |
paropakāraśīlaśca piturmātuḥ sukhāvahaḥ || 15||
kuputreṇa kulaṃ naṣṭaṃ kuputreṇa hataṃ yaśaḥ |
kuputreṇeha cāmutra duḥkhaṃ nirayayātanāḥ || 16 ||
kuputreṇānvayo naṣṭo janma naṣṭaṃ kubhāryayā |
kubhojanena divasaḥ kumitreṇa sukhaṃ kutaḥ || 17||
skanda uvāca
putrasya duṣṭairācaraṇairmuniḥ |
tapyamāno'niśaṃ kāle gatvā gargamapṛcchata || 18 |
evaṃ duṣṭasya
ṛtavāguvāca
bhagavaṃstvāmahaṃ praṣṭumicchāmi vada tatprabho |
jyotiḥśāstrasya cācārya putradauḥ śīlyakāraṇam || 19 ||
adhītā vidhivanmayā |
brahmacārivrataṃ tīrtvā vivāho vidhivatkṛtaḥ ||20||
guruśuśrūṣayā vedā

bhāryayā saha gārhasthyadharmaścānuṣṭhito'niśam |
paṃcayajñavidhānaṃ ca mayā'kāri yathāvidhi || 21 ||
narakādvibhyatā vipra na tu kāmasukhecchayā |
garbhādhānaṃ ca vidhivatputraprāptyai mayā kṛtam ||22||
putro'yaṃ mama doṣeṇa māturdoṣeṇa vā mune |
jāto duḥkhāvahaḥ pitrorduḥśīlo baṃdhuśokadaḥ ||23||
etanniśamya vacanaṃ gargācāryo munestadā |
vicārya sarvaṃ taddhetuṃ jyotirvidvācamabravīt ||24||
garga uvāca
mune naivāparādhaste na māturna kulasya ca |
revatyaṃtaṃ tu gaṇḍāntaṃ putradāḥ śīlyakāraṇam || 25||
duṣṭe kāle yato janma putrasya tava bho mune |
tenaiva tava duḥkhāya nānyo heturmanāgapi ||26||
taduḥkhaśāṃtaye brahmañjagatāṃ mātaraṃ śivām |
samārādhaya yatnena durgā durgatināśinīm ||27||
gargasya vacanaṃ śrutvā ṛtavāk krodhamūrcchitaḥ |
revatīṃ tu śaśāpāsī vyomnaḥ patatu revatī ||28||
datte śāpe tu tenātha pūṣṇo bhaṃ ca papāta khāt |
kumudādro bhāsamānaṃ sarvalokasya paśyataḥ ||29||
khyāto raivatakaścābhūttatpātātkumudācala: |
atīva ramaṇīyaśca tataḥ prabhṛti so'pyabhūt || 30 ||
dattvā śāpaṃ ca revatyai gargoktavidhinā muniḥ |
samārādhyāṃbikāṃ devīṃ sukhasaubhāgyabhāgabhṛt ||31||
skanda uvāca
revatyṛkṣasya yattejastasmājjātā tu kanyakā |
rūpeṇāpratimā loke dvitīyā śrīrivābhavat ||32||
atha tāṃ pramucaḥ kanyāṃ revatīkāṃtisaṃbhavām |
dṛṣṭvā nāma cakārāsyā revatīti mudā muniḥ ||33||
ninye'tha svāśrame caināṃ poṣayāmāsa dharmataḥ |
brahmarṣiḥ pramuco nāma kumudādrau sutāmiva ||34||
atha kālena ca prauḍhāṃ dṛṣṭvā tāṃ rūpaśālinīm |
sa muniścintayāmāsa ko'syā yogyo varo bhavet ||35||
bahudhā'nveṣayaṃstasyā nāsasādocitaṃ patim |
tatogniśālāṃ saṃviśya munistuṣṭāva pāvakam ||36||
kanyāvaraṃ tadāśaṃsatprītastamapi havyavāṭ |
dharmiṣṭho balavānvīraḥ priyavāgaparājitaḥ ||37||
durdamo bhavitā bhartā mune'syāḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ |
iti śrutvā vaco vahneḥ prasannobhūnmunistadā ||38||
daivādākheṭa kavyājāttatkṣaṇādāgato nṛpaḥ |
durdamo nāma medhāvī tasyāśramapadaṃ muneḥ ||39||
putro vikramaśīlasya balavān vīryavattaraḥ |
kālindījaṭhare jātaḥ priyavratakulodbhavaḥ ||40||
munerāśramamāviśya tamadṛṣṭvā mahāmunim |
āmaṃtrya tāṃ priye ceti revatīṃ pṛṣṭavānnṛpaḥ || 41 ||
rājīvāṃca
maharṣirbhagavānasmādāśramātvava gataḥ priye |
tatpādau draṣṭumicchāmi vada kalyāṇi tattvataḥ || 42 ||

kanyovāca
agniśālāmupagato mahārāja mahāmuniḥ |
niścakrāmāśramāttūrṇaṃ rājāpyākarṇya tadvacaḥ ||43||
tathā'gniśālādvārasthaṃ rājānaṃ durdamaṃ muniḥ | rājalakṣaṇasaṃyuktamapaśyatpraśrayānatam 118811
praṇanāma ca taṃ rājā muniḥ śiṣyamuvāca ha |
gautamānīyatāmarghya marghya yogyo'sti bhūpatiḥ || 45 ||
āgataścirakālena jāmāteti viśeṣataḥ |
ityuktvārdhyaṃ dadau tasmai sopi jagrāha cintayan || 46 ||
munirāsanamāsīnaṃ gṛhītādhyaṃ ca bhūpatim |
āśābhirabhinaṃdyātha kuśalaṃ cāpyapṛcchata || 47 ||
api te'nāmayaṃ rājanbale kośe suhṛtsu ca |
bhṛtye'mātye pure deśe tathātmani janādhipa ||48 ||
bhāryā'sti te kuśalinī yataḥ sātraiva tiṣṭhati |
ato na pūcchāmyasyāste cānyāsāṃ kuśalaṃ vada ||
rājovāca
bhagavaṃstvatprasādena sarvatrānāmayaṃ mama |
etatkutūhalaṃ brahmanmadbhāryā kāstra vidyate ||50||
ṛṣiruvāca
revatī nāma te bhāryā rūpeṇāpratimā bhuvi |
vidyataṃtra kathaṃ patnīṃ tāṃ na vetsi mahīpate || 51 ||
rājovāca
subhadrādyāstu yā bhāryā mama santi gṛhe vibho |
jānāmi tāstu bhagavanna vai jānāmi revatīm ||52||
ṛṣiruvāca
priyeti sāṃprataṃ rājaṃstvayoktā yā mahāmate |
sā vismṛtā kṣaṇādeva yā te ślāghyatamā priyā ||
rājovāca
tvayoktaṃ yanmṛṣā tanno tathaivāmantritā mayā |
mune duṣṭo na me bhāva kopaṃ mā kartumarhasi || 54 ||
ṛṣiruvāca
rājanuktaṃ tvayā satyaṃ na bhāvo dūṣitastava |
vahninā preritenetthaṃ bhavatā 'vyāhṛtaṃ vacaḥ ||55||
adya pṛṣṭo mayā vahniḥ ko'syā bharttā bhaviṣyati |
tenoktaṃ durdamo rājā bhavitā'syāḥ patirdhruvam ||56 ||
tadādatsva mayā dattāmimāṃ kanyāṃ mahīpate |
priyetyāmaṃtritā pūrvaṃ mā vicāraṃ kuruṣva bhoḥ ||57||
śrutvetatso'bhavattūṣṇīṃ citayanmunibhāṣitam |
vaivāhikaṃ vidhiṃ tasya muniḥ kartuṃ samudyataḥ || 58 ||
athodyataṃ vivāhāya dṛṣṭvā kanyā'bravīnmunim |
revatyṛkṣe vivāho me tāta kartuṃ tvamarhasi || 59 ||
ṛṣiruvāca
vatse vivāhayogyāni satyanyarkṣāṇi bhūriśaḥ |
revatyāṃ kathamudvāhaḥ pauṣṇabhaṃ na divi sthitam || 60 ||

kanyovāca
revatyṛkṣaṃ vinā kālo mamodvāhocito na hi |
ataḥ saṃprārthayāmyetadvivāhaṃ pauṣṇabhe kuru || 61 ||
ṛṣiruvāca
ṛtavāṅmuninā pūrvaṃ revatībhaṃ nipātitam |
bhāntare cenna te prītirbivāhaḥ syātkathaṃ tava || 62 ||
kanyovāca
tapaḥ kiṃ taptavāneka ṛtavāgeva kevalam |
bhavatā kiṃ tapo nedṛktaptaṃ vākkāyamānasaḥ || 63||
jagatsraṣṭuṃ samarthastvaṃ vedyayahaṃ te tapobalam |
revatyṛkṣaṃ divi sthāpya mamodvāhaṃ pitaḥ kuru || 64 ||
ṛṣiruvāca
evaṃ bhavatu bhadraṃ te yathaiva tvaṃ bravīṣi mām |
tvatkṛte somamārge'haṃ sthāpayāmyadya pauṣṇabham 65 ||
skanda uvāca
evamuktvā munistūrṇaṃ pauṣṇabhaṃ svatapobalāt |
yathāpūrvaṃ tathā cakre somamārge ghaṭodbhava ||66 ||
revatīnāmni nakṣatre vivāhavidhinā muniḥ |
revatīṃ pradadau rājñe durddamāya mahātmane ||67 ||
kṛtvā vivāhaṃ kanyāyā munī rājānamabravīt |
kiṃ te'bhilaṣitaṃ vīra vada tatpūrayāmyaham || 68||
rājovāca
manoḥ svāyaṃbhuvasyāhaṃ vaṃśe jāto'smi he mune |
manvantarādhipaṃ putraṃ tvatprasādācca kāmaye ||69||
muniruvāca
yadyeṣa kāmanā te'sti devyā ārādhanaṃ kuru |
bhaviṣyatyeva te putro manurmanvaṃtarādhipaḥ || 70 ||
devībhāgavataṃ nāma purāṇaṃ yattu paṃcamam |
paṃcakṛtvastu tacchrutvā lapsyase'bhimataṃ sutam || 71 ||
revatyā raivato nāma paṃcamo bhavitā manuḥ |
vedavicchāstratattvajño dharmavānaparājitaḥ ||72||
ityukto muninā rājā praṇamya mudito munim |
bhāryayā saha medhāvī jagāma nagaraṃ nijam || 3 ||
pitṛpaitāmahaṃ rājyaṃ cakāra sa mahāmatiḥ |
pālayāmāsa dharmātmā prajāḥ putrānivorasān ||74||
ekadā lomaśo nāma mahātmā munirāgataḥ |
praṇipatya tamabhyarcya prāṃjalicābravīnnṛpaḥ || 75 ||
rājovāca
bhagavaṃstvatprasādena śrotumicchāmi bho mune |
devī bhāgavataṃ nāma purāṇaṃ putralipsayā || 76 ||
śrutvā vācaṃ prajābhartuḥ prītaḥ provāca lomaśa: |
dhanyo'si rājaṃste bhaktirjātā trailokya mātari 77 ||
surāsuranarārādhyā yā parā jagadambikā |
tasyāṃ cedbhaktirutpannā kāryasiddhirbhaviṣyati || 78 ||
atastvāṃ śrāvayiṣyāmi śrīmadbhāgavataṃ nṛpa |
yasya śravaṇamātreṇa na kiṃcidapi durlabham ||79||
ityuktvā sudine brahmankathāraṃbha mathākarot |
paṃcakṛtvaḥ sa śuśrāva vidhivadbhāryayā saha || 80 ||

samāptidivase rājā purāṇaṃ ca muniṃ tathā |
pūjayāmāsa dharmātmā mudā paramayā yutaḥ || 81 ||
hutvā navārṇa maṃtreṇa bhojayitvā kumārikāḥ |
vāḍavāṃśca sapatnīkāndakṣiṇābhiratoṣayat ||82||
atha kālena kiyatā bhagavatyāḥ prasādataḥ |
garbhaṃ dadhāra sā rājñī lokakalyāṇakārakam || 83 ||
puṇye'tha samaye prāpte grahaiḥ susthānasaṃgataiḥ |
sarvamaṃgalasaṃpanne revatī suṣuve sutam ||84||
śrutvā putrasya jananaṃ snātvā rājā mudānvitaḥ |
sa suvarṇābhasā cakre jātakarmādikāḥ kriyāḥ || 85||
yathāvidhi ca dānāni dattvā viprānatoṣayat |
kṛtopanayanaṃ rājā sāṃgānvedānapāṭhayat ||86 ||
sarvavidyānidhirjātau dharmiṣṭho'stravidāṃ varaḥ |
dharmasya vaktā karttā ca raivato nāma vīryavān || 87||
niyuktavānatha brahmā raivataṃ mānave pade |
manvantarādhipaḥ śrīmāngāṃ śaśāsa sa dharmataḥ || 88 ||
itthaṃ devyāḥ prabhāvo'yaṃ saṃkṣepeṇoparvāṇataḥ |
purāṇasya ca māhātmyaṃ ko vaktuṃ vistarātkṣamaḥ || 89 ||
sūta uvāca
kuṃbhayonistu māhātmyaṃ vidhiṃ bhāgavatasya ca |
śrutvā kumāraṃ cābhyarcya svāśramaṃ punarāyayau || 90 ||
idaṃ mayā bhāgavatasya viprā māhātmyamuktaṃ bhavatāṃ samakṣam |
śṛṇoti bhaktyā paṭhatīha bhogānbhuktvā'khilānmuktimupaiti cāṃte || 91 ||
iti śrīskandapurāṇe mānasakhaṇḍe śrīdevībhāgavatamāhātmye caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
sūta sūta mahābhāga śrutaṃ māhātmyamuttamam |
adhunā śrotumicchāmaḥ purāṇaśravaṇe vidhim || 1 ||
sūta uvāca
śrūyatāṃ munayaḥ sarve purāṇaśravaṇe vidhim |
narāṇāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ yena siddhiḥ syātsārvakāmikī || 2 ||
ādī devajñamāhūya muhūrtaṃ kalpayetsudhīḥ |
ārabhya śutrimāsaṃ tu māsaṣaṭkaṃ śubhāvaham ||3||
hastāśvimūlapuṣyarkṣe brahmamaṃtrenduvaiṣṇave |
sattitho śubhavāre ca purāṇaśravaṇaṃ śubham ||4||
gurubhādveda4vedā4bja 1śarāṃ5 gā6bdhi 4 guṇaiḥ4kramāt |
dharmāptirindirāprāptiḥ kathāsiddhiḥ paraṃ sukham || 5 ||
pīḍā'tha bhūpatibhayaṃ jñānaprāptiḥ kramātphalam |
purāṇaśravaṇe cakraṃ śodhayecchivabhāṣitam || 6 ||
athavā prītaye devyā navarātracatuṣṭaye |
śṛṇuyādanyamāse'pi tithivārarkṣaśodhite ||7||
saṃbhāraṃ tādṛśaṃ kāryaṃ vivāhādau ca yādṛśam |
navāhyajñe cāpyasminvidheyaṃ yatnato budhaiḥ || 8 ||
sahāyā bahavaḥ kāryā dambhalobhavivarjitāḥ |
caturāśca vadānyāśca devībhaktiparā narāḥ ||9||

preṣyā yatnena vārteyaṃ deśe deśe jane jane |
āgantavyamihāvaśyaṃ kathā devyā bhaviṣyati || 10 ||
sorāśca gāṇapatyāśca śaivāḥ śāktāśca vaiṣṇavāḥ |
sarveṣāmapi sevyeyaṃ yato devāḥ saśaktayaḥ || 11||
śrīmaddevībhāgavatapīyūṣarasalolupaiḥ |
āgaṃtavyaṃ viśeṣeṇa kathārthaṃ prematatparaiḥ || 12 ||
brāhmaṇādyāśca ye varṇāḥ striyaśvāśramiṇastathā |
sakāmāścāpi niṣkāmāḥ pātavyaṃ taiḥ kathāmṛtam ||13||
nāvakāśaḥ kadācitsyānnavāhaśravaṇe'pi taiḥ |
āgaṃtavyaṃ yathākālaṃ yajñe puṇyā kṣaṇasthitiḥ || 14||
vinayenaiva karttavyamevamākāraṇaṃ nṛṇām |
āgatānāṃ ca karttavyaṃ vāsasthānaṃ yathocitam 15 ||
kathāsthānaṃ prakarttavyaṃ bhūmau mārjanapūrvakam |
lepanaṃ gomayenātha viśālāyāṃ manoramam ||16||
kāryastu maṇḍapo ramyo raṃbhāstaṃbhopaśobhitaḥ |
vitānamupariṣṭhāttu patākādhvaja rājitaḥ || 17||
vaktuścaivāsanaṃ divyaṃ sukhāstaraṇasaṃyutam |
racitavyaṃ prayatnena prāṅmukhaṃ vāpyudaṅmukham ||18||
yathocitāni kurvīta śrotṝṇāmāsanāni ca |
nṛṇāṃ caivātha nārīṇāṃ kathāśravaṇahetave || 19 ||
vāgmī dāṃtaśca śāstrajño devyārādhanatatparaḥ |
dayālunispṛho dakṣo dhīro vaktottamo mataḥ || 20 ||
brahmaṇyo devatābhaktaḥ kathārasaparāyaṇaḥ |
udāro'lolupo namraḥ śrotā hiṃsādivarjitaḥ || 21 ||
pākhaṇḍanirato lubdhaḥ streṇo dharmadhvajastathā |
nidhuraḥ krodhano vaktā devīyajñe na śasyate ||22||
saṃśayacchedanāyaikaḥ paṇḍitaśca tathāguṇaḥ |
śrotṛbodhakṛdavyagraḥ kāryyo vaktuḥ sahāyakṛt ||23||
muhūttaṃ divasādarvāgvaktṛśrotādibhirjanaiḥ |
karttavyaṃ kṣorakarmādi tato niyamakalpanam ||24||
maruṇodayavelāyāṃ snāyācchocaṃ vidhāya ca |
saṃdhyā tarpaṇakāryaṃ ca nityaṃ saṃkṣepataśvaret ||25||
kathāśravaṇayogyatvasiddhaye gāśva dāpayet |
samastavighnahartāramādau gaṇapati yajet || 26 ||
kalaśāṃścāpi saṃsthāpya pūjayettatra digbhavān |
vaṭukaṃ kṣetrapālaṃ ca yoginīrmātṛkāstathā || 27||
tulasīṃ cāpi saṃpūjya grahānviṣṇuṃ ca śaṃkaram |
navākṣareṇa manunā pūjayejjagadambikām ||28||
sarvopacāraiḥ saṃpūjya śrībhāgavatapustakam |
śrīdevyā vāṅmayīṃ mūrti yathāvacchobhanākṣaram 29||
kathāvighnopaśāṃtyarthaṃ vṛṇuyāttaṃ ca vāḍavān |
jāpyo navārṇa maṃtrastaḥ pāṭhyaḥ saptaśatīstavaḥ 30 ||
pradakṣiṇanamaskārānkṛtvāṃte stutimācaret |
kātyāyani mahāmāye bhavāni bhuvaneśvari || 31 ||
saṃsārasāgare magnaṃ māmuddhara kṛpāmaye |
brahmaviṣṇuśivārādhye prasīda jagadaṃbike || 32||
manobhilaṣitaṃ devi varaṃ dehi namo'stu te |
iti saṃprārthyaṃ śṛṇuyātkathāṃ niyatamānasaḥ ||33||
vaktāraṃ cāpi saṃpūjya vyāsabuddhadhā tadātmavān |
mālyālaṃkāravastrādyaiḥ saṃbhūṣya' prārthayecca tam ||34||
sarvaśāstretihāsajña vyāsarūpa namo'stu te |
kathācaṃdrodayenāṃtastamaḥ stomaṃ nirākuru || 351

tadagre tu navāhāntaṃ karttavyā niyamāstadā |
viprādīnupaveśyādo saṃpūjyopaviśetsvayam ||36||
ca || 37||
śrotavyaṃ sāvadhānena caturvargaphalāptaye | gṛhaputrakalatrāptadhanacintāmapāsya
kiṃcitsūrye'vaśeṣite |
muhūrtamātraṃ viśramya madhyāhne vācayetsudhīḥ || 38 ||

haviṣyānnaṃ varaṃ bhojyaṃ sakṛdeva kathārthinā || 39||
malamūtra jayāyaiṣāṃ
athavā syātphalāhārī payobhugvā ghṛtāśanaḥ |
yathā syātra kathāvighnastathā kāryaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ 40||
kathāśravaṇaniṣṭhānāṃ vakṣyāmi niyamaṃ dvijāḥ |
brahmaviṣṇumaheśānāṃ madhye ye bhedadarśinaḥ || 41||
devībhaktivihīnā ye pākhaṇḍā hiṃsakāḥ khalāḥ |
vipradruho nāstikā ye na te yogyāḥ kathāśrave ||42||
kathāśrave ||43||
brahmasvaharaṇe lubdhāḥ paradāradhaneṣu ca | devasvaharaṇe teṣāṃ nādhikāraḥ
brahmacārī ca bhūśāyī satyavaktā jitendriyaḥ |
kathāsamāptau bhuṃjīta patrāvalyāṃ yatātmavān 44||
vṛṃtākaṃ ca kalindaṃ ca tailaṃ ca dvidalaṃ madhu |
dagdhamannaṃ paryuṣitaṃ bhāvaduṣṭaṃ tyajedvratī ||45||
āmiṣaṃ ca masūrānnamudakyā dṛṣṭameva ca |
rasonaṃ mūlakaṃ hiṃguṃ palāṃḍuṃ gṛñjanaṃ tathā ||46 ||
kūṣmāṃḍanalikāśākaṃ na bhuṃjīta kathāvratī |
kāmaṃ krodhaṃ madaṃ lobhaṃ daṃbhaṃ mānaṃ ca varjayet ||47||
udakyayā vedabārna vadedyaḥ kathāvratī ||48||
vipradhruvapatitavrātyaśvapākayavanāṃtyajaḥ
vedagoguruviprāṇāṃ strīrājñāṃ mahatāṃ tathā |
devānāṃ devabhaktānāṃ na niṃdāṃ śṛṇuyādapi || 49 ||
vinayaṃ cārjavaṃ śaucaṃ dayāṃ ca mitabhāṣaṇam |
udāraṃ mānasaṃ caiva kuryādyastu kathāvratī || 50 ||
vaṃdhyā vā kākavaṃdhyā vā durbhagā vā mṛtābhaṃkā |
daridraścānapatyaśca bhakta māṃ śṛṇuyātkathām ||51||
vaṃdhyā vā kākavaṃdhyā vā durbhagā vā mṛtārbhakā |
patagarbhāṃganā yā ca tābhiḥ śrāvyā tathā kathā 52 ||
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṃśca yo vāṃchati vinā śramam |
bhagavatyā bhāgavataṃ śrotavyaṃ tena yatnataḥ || 53 ||
kathā dināni caitāni nayayajñaḥ samāni hi |
teṣu dattaṃ hutaṃ japtamanantaphaladaṃ bhavet ||54||
evaṃ vrataṃ navāhaṃ tu kṛtvodyāpanamācaret |
mahāṣṭamīvrataṃ yadvattathā kāryaṃ phalepsubhiḥ || 55 ||
niṣkāmāḥ śravaṇenaiva pūtā mukti vrajanti hi |
bhogamokṣapradā nṝṇāṃ yato bhagavatī parā || 56 ||
pustakasya ca vaktuśca pūjā kāryā tu nityaśaḥ |
vaktrā dattaṃ prasādaṃ tu gṛhṇādbhaktipūrvakam ||57||
kumārīḥ pūjayennityaṃ bhojayetprārthayecca yaḥ |
suvāsinīśca viprāṃśca tasya siddhirna saṃśayaḥ || 58 ||
yatryā nāmasāhasraṃ samāptāvatha vā paṭhet |
viṣṇornāmasahasraṃ ca sarvadoṣopaśāntaye ||59||
yasya satyā ca nāmoktayā tapoyajñakriyādiṣu |
nyūnaṃ saṃpūrṇatāṃ yāti tasmādviṣṇuṃ ca kīrtayet 60 ||
devyāḥ saptaśatīmaṃtraḥ samāptī homamācaret |
devīmāhātmyamūlena navārṇamanunā'thavā || 61||

gāyatryā tvathavā homaḥ pāyasena sasarpiṣā |
yato bhāgavataṃ tvetadgāyatrīmayamīritam ||62||
vācaka toṣayetsamyagvastrabhūṣāghanādibhiḥ |
prasanne vācake sarvāḥ prasannā tasya devatāḥ || 63 ||
brāhmaṇānbhojayedbhaktyā dakṣiṇābhiśca toṣayet |
pṛthivyāṃ devarūpāste tuṣṭeṣveṣvīpsitaṃ phalam || 64||
suvāsinī: kumārīśca devībhaktayā ca bhojayet |
tābhyo'pi dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā prārthayetsiddhimātmanaḥ || 65 ||
dadyāddānāni cānyāni suvarṇaṃ gāḥ payasvinīḥ |
hayānibhānmedinīṃ ca tasya syādakṣayaṃ phalam ||66||
devībhāgavataṃ caitallikhitaṃ śobhanākṣaram |
hemasiṃhāsane sthāpyaṃ paṭṭavastreṇa veṣṭitam ||67 ||
ahamyāṃ vā navamyāṃ ca vācakāyācitāya ca |
dadyātsa bhogānbhuktveha durlabhaṃ mokṣamāpnuyāt 68 ||
daridro durbalo bālastaruṇo jaraṭho'pi vā |
purāṇavettā vaidyaḥ syātpūjyo mānyaśca sarvadā || 69 ||
santi lokasya bahavo guravo guṇajanmataḥ |
sarveṣāmapi teṣāṃ ca purāṇajaḥ paro guruḥ || 70 ||
paurāṇiko brāhmaṇastu vyāsāsanasamāśritaḥ |
asamāpte prasaṃge tu namaskuryānna kasyacit || 71 ||
paurāṇika kathāṃ divyāṃ ye'pi śṛṇvaṃtya bhaktitaḥ |
teṣāṃ puṇyaphalaṃ nāsti duḥkhadāridrghabhāginām ||72||
asaṃpūjya purāṇaṃ tu tāmbūlakusumādibhiḥ |
ye śṛṇvaṃti kathāṃ devyāste daridrā bhavaṃti hi 73 ||
kīrtyamānāṃ kathāṃ tyaktvā ye vrajaṃtyanyato narāḥ |
bhogāntare praṇaśyaṃti teṣāṃ dārāśca sampadaḥ ||74 || .
ye ca tuṃgāsanārūḍhāḥ kathāṃ śṛṇvaṃti dāṃbhikāḥ |
te vāyasā bhavatyatra bhuktvā nirayayātanām ||75||
'ye cāḍhaghāsanasaṃsthāśca ye vīrāsanasaṃsthitāḥ |
śṛṇvaṃti ca kathāṃ divyāṃ te syurarjunaśākhinaḥ 76 ||
kaṣāyāṃ kīrtyamānāyāṃ ye vadaṃti duruttaram |
rāsabhāste bhavaṃtīha kṛkalāsāstataḥ param ||77||
nirdati ye purāṇajñānkathāṃ vā pāpahāriṇīm |
te tu janmaśataṃ duṣṭāḥ śunakāḥ syurna saṃśayaḥ || 78 ||
ye puṇvaṃti kathāṃ vaktuḥ samānāsanasaṃsthitāḥ |
gurutalpasamaṃ pāpaṃ labhaṃte narakālayāḥ ||79||
ye cāpraṇamya śṛṇvaṃti te bhavanti viṣadrumāḥ |
śayānā ye'pi śṛṇvaṃti bhavaṃtyajagarāhayaḥ || 80 ||
ye kadācana paurāṇī na śṛṇvaṃti kathāṃ narāḥ |
te ghoraṃ narakaṃ bhuktvā bhavanti grāmasūkarāḥ || 81 ||
ye kathāṃ nānumodate vighnaṃ kurvanti ye śaṭhāḥ |
koṭyabdaṃ nirayaṃ bhuktvā bhavaṃti grāmasūkarāḥ 82 ||
āsanaṃ bhājanaṃ dravyaṃ phalaṃ vastrāṇi kambalam |
purāṇajñāya yacchanti te vrajanti hareḥ padam ||83 ||
purāṇapustakasyāpi ye paṭṭavasanaṃ navam |
prayacchanti śubhaṃ sūtraṃ te narā. sukhabhāginaḥ || 84 ||
purāṇānāṃ tu sarveṣāṃ śravaṇādyatphalaṃ labhet |
tasmācchataguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ devībhāgavatāllabhet || 85 ||

yathā saritsu pravarā gaṃgā deveṣu śaṃkaraḥ |
kāvye rāmāyaṇaṃ yadvajjyotiṣmatsu yathā raviḥ || 86||
āhlādakānāṃ candraśca dhanānāṃ ca yathā yaśaḥ |
kṣamāvatāṃ yathā bhūmirgāmbhīrye sāgaro yathā || 87 |!
maṃtrāṇāṃ caiva sāvitrī pāpanāśe harismṛtiḥ |
aṣṭādaśapurāṇānāṃ devībhāgavataṃ tathā || 88 ||
yena kenāpyupāyena navakṛtvaḥ śṛṇoti cet |
na śakyaṃ tatphalaṃ vaktuṃ jīvanmuktaḥ sa eva ha || 89 ||
rājaśatrubhaye prāpte mahāmārībhaye tathā |
durbhikṣe rāṣṭrabhaṃge ca tacchāṃtyai śṛṇuyādidam ||10||
bhūtapretavināśāya rājyalābhāya śatrutaḥ |
putralābhāya śṛṇuyāddevībhāgavataṃ dvijāḥ || 91 ||
śrīmadbhāgavataṃ yastu paṭhedvā śṛṇuyādapi |
ślokārddha ślokapādaṃ vā saṃyāti paramāṃ gatim || 92 ||
bhagavatyā svayaṃ devyā ślokārthyena prakāśitam |
śiṣyapraśiṣyadvāreṇa tadeva vipulīkṛtam || 93 ||
na gāyatryāḥ paro dharmo na gāyatryāḥ paraṃ tapaḥ |
na gāyatryāḥ samo devo na gāyatryāḥ paro manuḥ || 94 ||
gātāraṃ trāyate yasmādgāyatrī tena socyate |
sā'tra bhāgavate devī sarahasyā pratiṣṭhitā || 95 ||
ato bhāgavatasyāsya devyāḥ prītikarasya ca |
mahāṃtyapi purāṇāni kalāṃ nārhati ṣoḍaśīm || 96 ||
śrīmadbhāgavataṃ purāṇamamalaṃ yadbrāhmaṇānāṃ dhanaṃ
dharmo dharmasutena yatra gadito nārāyaṇenāmalaḥ |
gāyatryāśva rahasyamatra ca maṇidvīpaśca saṃvarṇitaḥ
śrīdevyā himabhūbhṛte bhagavatī gītā ca gītā svayam ||17||
tasmānnāsya purāṇasya loke'nyatsadṛśaṃ param |
ataḥ sadaiva saṃsevyaṃ devībhāgavataṃ dvijāḥ || 98||
yasyāḥ prabhāvamakhilaṃ na hi veda dhātā no vā harirna giriśo na hi cāpyanantaḥ |
aṃśāṃśakā api ca te kimutānyadevāstasyai namo'stu satataṃ jagadambikāyai || 99 ||
yatpādapaṃkajarajaḥ samavāpya viśvaṃ brahmā sṛjanyanudinaṃ ca birbhāta viṣṇuḥ |
rudraśca saṃharati netarathā samarthāstasyai namo'stu satataṃ jagadambikāyai || 100||
sudhākūpārāṃta stridaśataruvāṭīvilasite maṇidrīpe cintāmaṇimayagṛhe citrarucire |
virājantīmambāṃ para śivahṛdi smeravadanāṃ naro dhyātvā bhogaṃ bhajati khalu mokṣaṃ ca labhate || 101 ||
brahmeśācyutaśakrādyairmaharṣibhirupāsitā |
jagataḥ śreyase sāsstu maṇidvīpādhidevatā || 102 ||
iti śrīskandapurāṇe mānasakhaṇḍe devībhāgavatamāhātmye
śravaṇavidhivarṇanaṃ nāma pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5 ||
samāptamidaṃ skāndīyaṃ śrīmaddevībhāgavatamāhātmyam |

śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ
śrīmaddevībhāgavatam
prathamaḥ skandhaḥ
―
prathamo'dhyāyaḥ
oṃ sarvacaitanyarūpāṃ tāmādyāṃ devīṃ ca dhīmahi |
buddhi yā naḥ pracodayāt || 1||
śaunaka uvāca
sūta sūta mahābhāga dhanyo'si puruṣarṣabha |
yadadhītāstvayā satyakpurāṇasaṃhitāḥ śubhāḥ ||2||
aṣṭādaśa purāṇāni kṛṣṇena muninā'nagha |
kathitāni sudivyāni paṭhitāni tvayā'nagha || 3 ||
paṃcalakṣaṇayuktāni sarahasyāni mānada |
tvayā jñātāni sarvāṇi vyāsātsatyavatīsutāt ||4||
asmākaṃ puṇyayogena prāptastvaṃ kṣetramuttamam |
divyaṃ viśvasamaṃ puṇyaṃ kalidoṣavivarjitam ||5||
samājo'yaṃ munīnāṃhiśrotukāmo'stipuṇyadām |
purāṇasaṃhitāṃ sūta brūhi tvaṃ naḥ samāhitaḥ || 6 ||
dīrghāyurbhava sarvatra tāpatrayavivarjitaḥ |
kathayādya mahābhāga purāṇaṃ brahmasaṃmitam ||7||
śrotrendriyayutāḥ sūta narāḥ svādavicakṣaṇāḥ |
na śṛṇvanti purāṇāni vaṃcitā vidhinā hi te ||8||
yathā jihvendriyāhlādaḥ ṣaḍrasaiḥ pratipadyate |
tathā śrotreṃdriyāhlādo vacobhiḥ sudhiyāṃ smṛtaḥ || 9 ||
aśrotrāḥ phaṇinaḥ kāmaṃ muhyaṃti hi nabhoguṇaiḥ |
sakarṇā yena śṛṇvaṃti tepyakarṇāḥ kathaṃ na ca || 10 ||
aṃtaḥ sarve dvijāḥ saumya śrotukāmāḥ samāhitāḥ |
vartate naimiṣāraṇye kṣetre kalibhayārditāḥ || 11 ||
yena kenāpyupāyena kālātivāhanaṃ smṛtam |
vyasanairiha mūrkhāṇāṃ budhānāṃ śāstracitanaiḥ ||12||
śāstrāṇyapi vicitrāṇi jalpavādayutāni ca |
( trividhāni purāṇāni śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca ||
vitaṃḍācchalayuktāni garvāmarṣa karāṇi ca || 1 || ) nānārthavādayuktāni hetumaṃti bṛhaṃti ca || 13 ||

sāttvikaṃ tatra vedāntaṃ mīmāṃsā rājasaṃ matam |
tāmasaṃ nyāyaśāstraṃ ca hetuvādābhiyaṃtritam ||14||
tathaiva ca purāṇāni triguṇāni kathānakaiḥ |
kathitāni tvayā saumya paṃcalakṣaṇavaṃti ca || 15||
tatra bhāgavataṃ puṇyaṃ paṃcamaṃ vedasaṃmitam |
kathitaṃ yattvayā pūrvaṃ sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutam || 16 ||
uddeśamātreṇa tadā kīrtitaṃ paramādbhutam |
muktipradaṃ mumukṣūṇāṃ kāmadaṃ dharmadaṃ tathā || 17 ||
vistareṇa tadākhyāhi purāṇottamamādarāt |
śrotukāmā dvijāḥ sarve divyaṃ bhāgavataṃ śubham ||18||
tvaṃ tu jānāsi dharmajña paurāṇī saṃhitāṃ kila |
kṛṣṇoktāṃ gurubhaktatvātsamyaksattvaguṇādayaḥ || 19 || tu
śrutānyanyāni sarvajña tvanmukhānniḥsṛtāni ca |
naiva tṛpti vrajāmo'dya sudhāpāne'marā yathā ||20||
dhivasudhāṃ pibatāṃ sūta muktirnaiva kadācana |
pibanbhāgavataṃ sadyo naro mucyeta saṃkaṭāt || 21||
sudhāpānanimittaṃ yatkṛtā yajñā. sahasraśaḥ |
na śāntimadhigacchāmaḥ sūta sarvātmanā vayam ||22||
makhānāṃ hi phalaṃ svargaḥ svargātpracyavanaṃ punaḥ |
evaṃ saṃsāracakre'sminbhramaṇaṃ ca niraṃtaram || 23||
vinā jñānena sarvajña naiva muktiḥ kadācana |
bhramatāṃ kālacakre'tra narāṇāṃ triguṇātmake ||24||
ataḥ sarvarasopetaṃ puṇyaṃ bhāgavataṃ vada |
pāvanaṃ muktidaṃ guhyaṃ mumukṣūṇāṃ sadā priyam ||25||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe śaunakapraśno nāma prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 ||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīsūta uvāca
dhanyo'hamatibhāgyo'haṃ pāvito'haṃ mahātmabhiḥ |
yatpṛṣṭaṃ sumahatpuṇyaṃ purāṇaṃ vedaviśrutam ||1||
tadahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi sarvaśrutyarthasaṃmatam |
rahasyaṃ sarvaśāstrāṇāmāgamānāmanuttamam ||2||
natvā tatpadapaṅkajaṃ sulalitaṃ muktipradaṃ yogināṃ
brahmādyairapi sevitaṃ stutiparaidhyeyaṃ munīndraiḥ sadā |
vakṣyāmyadya savistaraṃ bahurasaṃ śrīmatpurāṇāttamaṃ
bhaktyā sarvarasālayaṃ bhagavatīnāmnā prasiddhaṃ dvijāḥ ||3||
yā vidyetyabhidhīyate śrutipathe śaktiḥ sadā''dyā parā
sarvajñā bhavabandha chittinipuṇā sarvāśaye saṃsthitā |
durjñeyā sudurātmabhiśca munibhirdhyānāspadaṃ prāpitā
pratyakṣā bhavatīha sā bhagavatī siddhipradā syātsadā ||4||
sṛṣṭvā'khilaṃ jagadidaṃ sadasatsvarūpaṃ śaktayā svayā triguṇayā paripāti viśvam |
saṃhṛtya kalpasamaye ramate tathaikā tāṃ sarvaviśvajananoṃ manasā smarāmi ||5||

brahmā sṛjatyakhilametaditi prasiddhaṃ paurāṇikaiśca kathitaṃ khalu vedavidbhiḥ |
viṣṇostu nābhikamale kila tasya janma tairuktameva sṛjate na hi sa svataṃtraḥ ||6||
viṣṇustu śeṣaśayane svapatīti kāle tannābhipadmamukule khalu tasya janma |
ādhāratāṃ kila gato'tra sahasramauliḥ sambodhyatāṃ sa bhagavān hi kathaṃ murāriḥ ||7||
ekārṇavasya salilaṃ rasarūpameva pātraṃ vinā na hi rasasthitirasti kaccit |
yā sarvabhūtaviṣaye kila śaktirūpā tāṃ sarvabhūtajananīṃ śaraṇaṃ gato'smi || 2 ||
yoganidrāmīlitākṣaṃ viṣṇuṃ dṛṣṭvāṃbuje sthitaḥ |
ajastuṣṭāva yāṃ devīṃ tāmahaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraje ||9||
tāṃ dhyātvā saguṇāṃ māyāṃ muktidāṃ nirguṇāṃ tathā |
vakṣye purāṇamakhilaṃ śṛṇvaṃtu munayastviha || 10 ||
purāṇamuttamaṃ puṇyaṃ śrīmadbhāgavatābhidham |
aṣṭādaśa sahasrāṇi ślokāstatra tu saṃskṛtāḥ || 11 ||
skandhā dvādaśa caivātra kṛṣṇena vihitāḥ śubhāḥ |
triśataṃ pūrṇamadhyāyā aṣṭādaśayutāḥ smṛtāḥ ||12||
viṃśati prathame tatra dvitīye dvādaśaiva tu |
triṃśaccaiva tṛtīye tu caturthe paṃcaviṃśatiḥ || 13 ||
paṃcatriṃśattathā'dhyāyāḥ paṃcame parikīrtitāḥ |
ekatriṃśattathā ṣaṣṭhe catvāriṃśacca saptame ||14||
aṣṭame tattvasaṃkhyāśca paṃcāśannava me tathā |
trayodaśa tu saṃproktā daśame muninā kila || 15||
tathā caikādaśaskandhe caturviṃśatirīritā |
caturdaśaiva cādhyāyā dvādaśe munisattamāḥ || 16 ||
evaṃ saṃkhyā samākhyātā purāṇe'sminmahātmanā |
aṣṭādaśasahasrīyā saṃkhyā ca parikīrtitā || 17||
sargaśca pratisargaśca vaṃśo manvaṃtarāṇi ca |
vaṃśānucaritaṃ caiva purāṇaṃ paṃcalakṣaṇam ||18||
nirguṇā yā sadā nityā vyāpikā vikṛtā śivā |
yogagamyā'khilādhārā turīyā yā ca saṃsthitā ||19||
tasyāstu sāttvikī śaktī rājasī tāmasī tathā |
mahālakṣmī sarasvatī mahākālīti tāḥ striyaḥ ||20||
tāsāṃ tisṛṇāṃ śaktīnāṃ devāṃgīkāralakṣaṇaḥ |
sṛṣṭyarthaṃ ca samākhyātaḥ sargaḥ śāstraviśāradaiḥ ||21||
haridruhiṇarudrāṇāṃ samutpattistataḥ smṛtā ! pālanotpattināśārthaṃ pratisargaḥ smṛto hi saḥ || 22||
somasūryodbhavānāṃ ca rājñāṃ vaṃśaprakīrtanam |
hiraṇyakaśipvādīnāṃ vaṃśāmte parikīrtitāḥ ||23||
svāyaṃbhuvamukhānāṃ ca manūnāṃ parivarṇanam |
kālasaṃkhyā tathā teṣāṃ tattanmanvaṃtarāṇi ca || 24 ||
teṣāṃ vaṃśānukathanaṃ vaṃśānucaritaṃ smṛtam |
paṃcalakṣaṇayuktāni bhavaṃti munisattamāḥ || 25 ||
sapādalakṣaṇaṃ ca tathā bhārataṃ muninā kṛtam |
itihāsa iti proktaṃ pañcamaṃ vedasaṃmatam ||26||
śaunaka uvāca
kāni tāni purāṇāni brūhi sūta savistaram |
katisaṃkhyāni sarvajña śrotukāmā vayaṃ tviha ||27||
kalikālavibhītāḥ smo naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ |
brahmaṇā'tra samādiṣṭāścakraṃ dattvā manomayam ||28||

kathitaṃ tena naḥ sarvāngachaṃtyetasya pṛṣṭhataḥ |
nemiḥ saṃśīryate yatra sa deśaḥ pāvanaḥ smṛtaḥ || 29 ||
kalestatra praveśo na kadācitsaṃbhaviṣyati |
tāvattiṣṭhatu tatraiva yāvatsatyayugaṃ punaḥ ||30||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya gṛhītvā tatkathānakam |
cālayannirgatastūrṇaṃ sarvadeśadidṛkṣayā || 31 ||
pretyātra cālayaṃścakraṃ nemiḥ śīrṇo'tra paśyataḥ |
tenedaṃ naimiṣaṃ proktaṃ kṣetraṃ paramapāvanam ||32||
kalipraveśo naivātra tasmātsyānaṃ kṛtaṃ mayā |
munibhiḥ siddhasaṃghaśca kalibhītairmahātmabhiḥ ||33||
paśuhīnāḥ kṛtā yajñāḥ puroḍāsādibhiḥ kila |
kālātivāhanaṃ kāryaṃ yāvatsatyayugāgamaḥ ||34||
bhāgyayogena saṃprāptaḥ sūta tvaṃ cātra sarvathā |
kathayādya purāṇaṃ hi pāvanaṃ brahmasaṃmatam || 35 ||
sūta śuśrūṣavaḥ sarve vaktā tvaṃ matimānatha |
nirvyāpārā vayaṃ nūnamekacittāstathaiva ca || 36 ||
tvaṃ sūta bhava dīrghāyustāpatrayavivarjitaḥ |
kathaṃyādya purāṇaṃ hi puṇyaṃ bhāgavataṃ śivam ||37||
yatra dharmārthakāmānāṃ varṇanaṃ vidhipūrvakam |
vidyāṃ prāpya tayā mokṣaḥ kathito muninā kila 38 ||
dvaipāyanena muninā kathitaṃ yacca pāvanam |
na tṛpyāmo vayaṃ sūta kathāṃ śrutvā manoramām ||39||
sakalaguṇagaṇānāmekapātraṃ pavitramakhilabhuvanamāturnāṭayavadya dvicitram |
nikhilamalagaṇānāṃ nāśakṛtkāmakaṃdaṃ prakaṭaya bhagavatyā nāmayuktaṃ purāṇam ||40||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ ||2||
atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
śṛṇvaṃtu saṃpravakṣyāmi purāṇāni munīśvarāḥ |
yathāśrutāni tattvena vyāsātsatyavatīsutāt || 1||
mahayaṃ bhadvayaṃ caiva vratrayaṃ vacatuṣṭayam |
anāmaliṃgakūskāni purāṇāni pṛthakpṛthak ||2||
caturdaśasahasraṃ ca matsyamādyaṃ prakīrtitam |
tathā grahasahasraṃ tu mārkaṇḍeyaṃ mahādbhutam ||3||
caturdaśa sahasrāṇi tathā paṃcaśatāni ca |
bhaviṣyaṃ parisaṃkhyātaṃ munibhistattvadarśibhiḥ || 4 ||
aṣṭādaśasahasraṃ vai puṇyaṃ bhāgavataṃ kila |
tathā cāyutasaṃkhyākaṃ purāṇaṃ brahmasaṃjñakam ||5||
dvādaśaiva sahasrāṇi brahmāṃḍaṃ ca śatādhikam |
tathāṣṭādaśasāhasraṃ brahmavaivartameva ca || 6||
ayutaṃ vāmanākhyaṃ ca vāyavyaṃ ṣaṭśatāni ca |
caturviṃśatisaṃkhyātaḥ sahasrāṇi tu śaunaka ||7||
trayoviṃśatisāhasraṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ paramādbhutam |
caturviṃśatisāhasraṃ vārāhaṃ paramādbhutam ||8||
ṣoḍaśaiva sahasrāṇi purāṇaṃ cāgnisaṃjñitam |
paṃcaviṃśatisāhasraṃ nāradaṃ paramaṃ matam || 9 ||
pañcapañcāśatsāhasraṃ pādmākhyaṃ vipulaṃ matam |
ekādaśasahasrāṇi liṃgākhyaṃ cātivistṛtam ||10||
ekonaviṃśatsāhasraṃ gāruḍaṃ hariṃbhāṣitam |
saptadaśasahasraṃ ca purāṇaṃ. kūrmabhāṣitam || 11 ||
ekāśītisahasrāṇi skaṃdākhyaṃ paramādbhutam |
purāṇākhyā ca saṃkhyā ca vistareṇa mayānaghāḥ 12 ||

tathaivopapurāṇāni śṛṇvaṃtu ṛṣisattamāḥ |
sanatkumāraṃ prathamaṃ nārasiṃhaṃ tataḥ param ||13||
nāradīyaṃ śivaṃ caiva daurvāsasamanuttamam |
kāpilaṃ mānavaṃ caiva tathā cauśanasaṃ smṛtam || 14||
vāruṇaṃ kālikākhyaṃ ca sāṃbaṃ naṃdikṛtaṃ śubham |
sauraṃ pārāśara proktamādityaṃ cātivistaram || 15||
māheśvaraṃ bhāgavataṃ vāsiṣṭhaṃ ca savistaram |
etānyupapurāṇāni kathitāni mahātmabhiḥ || 16||
aṣṭādaśa purāṇāni kṛtvā satyavatīsutaḥ |
bhāratākhyānamatulaṃ cakre tadupabṛṃhitam ||17||
manvantareṣu sarveṣu dvāpare dvāpare yuge |
prāduḥ karoti dharmārthī purāṇāni yathāvidhi || 18 ||
dvāpare dvāpare viṣṇurvyāsarūpeṇa sarvadā |
vedamekaṃ sa bahudhā kurute hitakāmyayā ||19|
alpāyuṣo'lpabuddhīṃśca viprāñjñātvā kalāvatha |
purāṇasaṃhitāṃ puṇyāṃ kurute'sau yuge yuge ||20||
strīśūdradvijabaṃdhūnāṃ |
na vedaśravaṇa matam |
tepāmeva hitārthāya purāṇāni kṛtāni ca || 21||
manvantare saptame'tra śubhe vaivasvatābhidhe |
aṣṭāviṃśatime prāpte dvāpare munisattamāḥ ||22||
vyāsaḥ satyavatīsūnurgurumeṃ dharmavittamaḥ |
ekonatriṃśatsaṃprāpte drauṇirvyāso bhaviṣyati ||23||
atītāstu tathā vyāsāḥ saptaviṃśatireva ca |
purāṇasaṃhitāstaistu kathitāstu yuge yuge ||24|
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
brūhi sūta mahābhāga vyāsāḥ pūrvayugodbhavāḥ |
vaktārastu purāṇānāṃ dvāpare dvāpare yuge ||25|| .
sūta uvāca
dvāpare prathame vyastāḥ svayaṃ vedā: svayaṃbhuvā |
prajāpatidvitīye tu dvāpare vyāsakāryakṛt || 26||
tṛtīye cośanaḥ vyāsaścaturthe tu bṛhaspatiḥ |
paṃcamai savitā vyāsaḥ ṣaṣṭhe mṛtyustathāpare ||27||
maghavā saptame prāpte vasiṣṭhastvaṣṭame smṛtaḥ |
sārasvatastu navame tridhāmā daśame tathā ||28|
ekādaśe'tha trivṛṣo bharadvājastataḥ param |
trayodaśe cāṃtarikṣo dharmaścāpi caturdaśe ||29||
tramyāruṇiḥ paṃcadaśe ṣoḍaśe tu dhanaṃjayaḥ |
medhātithiḥ saptadaśe vratī hyaṣṭādaśe tathā ||30|
atrirekonaviṃśe'tha gautamastu tataḥ param |
uttamacaikaviśe'tha haryātmā parikīrtitaḥ || 31||
beno vājaśravaścaiva somo'muṣyāyaṇastathā |
tṛṇabiṃdustathā vyāso bhārgavastu tataḥ param ||32|
tataḥ śaktirjātukarṇyaḥ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanastataḥ |
aṣṭāviṃśatisaṃkhyeyaṃ kathitā yā mayā śrutā || 33 ||
kṛṣṇadvaipāyanātproktaṃ purāṇaṃ ca mayā śrutam |
śrīmadbhāgavataṃ puṇyaṃ sarvaduḥkhaughanāśanam ||34|| /
kāmadaṃ mokṣadaṃ caiva vedārtha parivṛṃhitam |
sarvāgamarasārāmaṃ mumukṣūṇāṃ sadā priyam ||35||
vyāsena kṛtvā'tiśubhaṃ purāṇaṃ śukāya putrāya mahātmane yat |
vairāgyayuktāya ca pāṭhitaṃ vai vijñāya caivāraṇisaṃbhavāya || 36 ||
śrutaṃ mayā tatra tathā gṛhītaṃ yarthārthavadvayāsamukhānmunīdrāḥ |

purāṇaguhyaṃ sakalaṃ sametaṃ guroḥ prasādātkaruṇānidheśca ||37||
sūtena pṛṣṭaḥ sakalaṃ jagāda dvaipāyanastatra purāṇaguhyam |
ayonijenādbhutabuddhinā vai śrutaṃ mayā tatra mahāprabhāvam ||38||
śrīmadbhāgavatāmarāṃghripaphalāsvādāharaḥ sattamaḥ
saṃsārārṇavadurvigāhyasalilaṃ saṃhartukāmaḥ śukaḥ |
nānākhyānarasālayaṃ śrutipuṭa: premṇā'śṛṇodadbhutaṃ
tacchrutvā na vimucyate kalibhayādevaṃvidhaḥ kaḥ kṣitau || 39 ||
pāpīyānapi vedadharmarahitaḥ svācārahīnāśayo vyājenāpi śṛṇoti yaḥ paramidaṃ śrīmatpurāṇottamam |
bhuktvā bhogakalāpamatra vipulaṃ dehāvasāne'calaṃ yogiprāpyamavāpnuyādbhagavatīnāmāṃkitaṃ suṃdaram ||
yā nirguṇā hariharādibhirapyalabhyā vidyā satāṃ priyatamā'tha samādhigamyā |
sā tasya cittakuhare prakaroti bhāvaṃ yaḥ saṃśṛṇoti satataṃ tu satīpurāṇam || 41 ||
saṃprāpya mānuṣabhavaṃ sakalāṅgayuktaṃ potaṃ bhavārṇavajalottaraṇāya kāmam |
saṃprāpya vācakamaho na śṛṇoti mūḍhaḥ so vacito'tra vidhinā sukhadaṃ purāṇam ||42||
yaḥ prāpya karṇayugalaṃ paṭumānuṣatve 'rāgī śṛṇoti satataṃ ca parāpavādān |
sarvārthadaṃ rasanidhi vimalaṃ purāṇaṃ naṣṭaḥ kuto na śṛṇute bhuvi maṃdabuddhiḥ ||43||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskaṃdhe tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 3 ||
caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
saumya vyāsasya bhāryāyāṃ kasyāṃ jātaḥ sutaḥ śukaḥ |
kathaṃ vā kīdṛśo yena paṭhiteyaṃ susaṃhitā || 1||
ayonijastvayā proktastathā cāraṇijaḥ śukaḥ |
saṃdeho'sti mahāṃstatra kathayādya mahāmate ||2||
garmayogī śrutaḥ pūrvaṃ śuko nāma mahātapāḥ |
kathaṃ ca paṭhitaṃ tena purāṇaṃ bahuvistaram || 3 ||
sūta uvāca
purā sarasvatītīre vyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ |
āśrame kalaviko tu dṛṣṭvā vismayamāgataḥ || 4 ||
jātamātraṃ śiśuṃ nīḍe muktamaṇḍaṃ manoharam |
tāmrāsyaṃ śubhasarvāṅgaṃ picchāṃkuravivarjitam ||5||
to tu bhakṣyārthamatyaṃtaṃ ratauṃ śramaparāyaṇau |
śiśośrañcupuṭe bhakṣyaṃ kṣipaṃtī ca punaḥ punaḥ ||6||
aṃgenāṃgāni bālasya gharṣayaṃto mudānvito |
cuṃbato ca mukhaṃ premṇā kalaviko śiśoḥ śubham 7 ||
vīkya premādbhutaṃ tatra bāle caṭakayostadā |
vyāsaścitāturaḥ kāmaṃ manasā samacitayat ||8||
tiraśvāmani yatprema putre samabhilakṣyate |
kiṃ citraṃ yanmanuṣyāṇāṃ sevāphalamabhīpsatām ||9||

kimetau caṭakī cāsya vivāhaṃ sukhasādhanam |
viracya sukhino syātāṃ dṛṣṭvā vadhvā mukhaṃ śubham ||
athavā vārdhake prāpte paricaryāṃ kariṣyati |
putraḥ paramadharmiṣṭhaḥ puṇyārthaṃ kalavikayoḥ || 11 ||
arjayitvā'thavā dravyaṃ pitarau tarpayiṣyati |
athavā pretakāryāṇi kariṣyati yathāvidhi || 12 ||
athavā kiṃ gayāśrāddhaṃ gatvā saṃvitariṣyati |
nīlotsargaṃ ca vidhivatprakariṣyati bālakaḥ || 13||
saṃsāre'tra samākhyātaṃ sukhānāmuttamaṃ sukham |
putragātrapariṣvaṃgo lālanaṃ ca viśeṣataḥ || 14 ||
aputrasya gatirnāsti svargo naiva ca naiva ca |
putrādanyatarannāsti paralokasya sādhanam ||15||
manvādibhiśca munibhirdharmaśāstreṣu bhāṣitam |
putravānsvargamāpnoti nāputrastu kathaṃcana || 16 ||
dṛśyate'tra samakṣaṃ tannānumānena sādhyate |
putravānmucyate pāpādāptavākyaṃ ca śāśvatam ||17||
āturo mṛtyukāle'pi bhūmiśayyāgato naraḥ |
karoti manasā ciṃtāṃ dukhitaḥ putravarjitaḥ || 18 |
dhamaṃ me vipulaṃ gehe pātrāṇi vividhāni ca |
maṃdiraṃ suṃdaraṃ caitatko'sya svāmī bhaviṣyati || 19 ||
mṛtyukāle manastasya duḥkhena bhramate yataḥ |
ato'sya durgatirnūnaṃ bhrāṃtacittasya sarvathā ||20||
evaṃ bahuvidhāṃ cintāṃ kṛtvā satyavatīsutaḥ |
niḥśvasya bahudhā coṣṇaṃ vimanāḥ sambabhūva ha || 21 ||
vicārya manasā'tyarthaṃ kṛtvā manasi niścayam |
jagāma ca tapastaptuṃ meruparvatasannidhau ||22||
manasā cintayāmāsa kaṃ devaṃ samupāsmahe |
varapradānanipuṇaṃ vāñchitārthapradaṃ tathā || 23 |
viṣṇuṃ rudraṃ surendraṃ vā brahmāṇaṃ vā divākaram |
gaṇeśaṃ kārtikeyaṃ ca pāvakaṃ vāruṇaṃ tathā ||24||
evaṃ cintayatastasya nārado munisattamaḥ |
yadṛcchayā samāyāto vīṇāpāṇiḥ samāhitaḥ || 25||
taṃ dṛṣṭrā paramaprīto vyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ |
kṛtvā'rghyamāsanaṃ dattvā papraccha kuśalaṃ munim ||26|
śrutvā'tha kuśalapraśnaṃ papraccha munisattamaḥ |
ciṃtāturo'si kasmāttvaṃ dvaipāyana vadasva me ||27|
vyāsa uvāca
aputrasya gatirnāsti na sukhaṃ mānase tataḥ |
tadarthaṃ duḥkhitaścāhaṃ citayāmi punaḥ punaḥ ||28|| .
tapasā toṣayāmyadya kaṃ devaṃ vāṃchitārthadam |
iti ciṃtāturo'smyadya tvāmahaṃ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ ||29||
sarvajño'si maharṣe tvaṃ kathayāśu kṛpānidhe |
kaṃ devaṃ śaraṇaṃ yāmi yo me putraṃ pradāsyati || 30 ||
sūta uvāca
iti vyāsena pṛṣṭastu nārado vedavinmuniḥ |
uvāca parayā prītyā kṛṣṇaṃ prati mahāmanāḥ || 31 ||
nārada uvāca
pārāśarya mahābhāga yattvaṃ pṛcchasi māmiha |
tamevārthaṃ purā pṛṣṭaḥ pitrā me madhusūdanaḥ ||32||
dhyānasthaṃ ca hari dṛṣṭvā pitā me vismayaṃ gataḥ |
paryapṛcchata deveśaṃ śrīnāthaṃ jagataḥ patim ||33|
kaustubhodbhāsitaṃ divyaṃ śaṃkhacakragadādharam |
pītāmbaraṃ caturbāhuṃ śrīvatsāṃkitavakṣasam ||34||

kāraṇaṃ sarvalokānāṃ devadevaṃ jagadgurum |
vāsudevaṃ jagannāthaṃ tapyamānaṃ mahattapaḥ ||35||
brahmovāca
devadeva jagannātha bhūtabhavyabhavatprabho |
tapaścarasi kasmāttvaṃ kiṃ dhyāyasi janārdana || 36 |
vismayo'yaṃ mamātyarthaṃ tvaṃ sarvajagatāṃ prabhuḥ |
dhyānayukto'si deveśa kiñca citramataḥ param ||37||
tvannābhikamalājjātaḥ kartā'hamakhilasya ha |
tvattaḥ ko'pyadhiko'styatra taṃ devaṃ brūhi māpate ||38||
jānāmyahaṃ jagannātha tvamādiḥ sarvakāraṇam |
kartā pālayitā hartā samarthaḥ sarvakāryakṛt || 39||
icchayā te mahārāja sṛjāmyahamidaṃ jagat |
haraḥ saṃharate kāle so'pi te vacane sadā ||40||
sūryo bhramati cākāśe vāyurvāti śubhāśubhaḥ |
agnistapati parjanyo varṣatīśa tvadājñayā || 41 ||
tvaṃ tu dhyāyasi kaṃ devaṃ saṃśayo'yaṃ mahānmama |
tvattaḥ paraṃ na paśyāmi devaṃ vai bhuvanatraye ||42 ||
kṛpāṃ kṛtvā vadasvādya bhakto'smi tava suvrata |
mahatāṃ naiva gopyaṃ hi prāyaḥ kiñciditi smṛtiḥ || 43 ||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya harirāha prajāpatim |
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā brahmaṃstvāṃ bravīmi manogatam ||44||
yadyapi tvāṃ śivaṃ māṃ ca sthitisṛṣṭayaṃtakāraṇam |
te jānaṃti janāḥ sarve sadevāsuramānuṣāḥ || 45||
sraṣṭā tvaṃ pālakaścāhaṃ haraḥ saṃhārakārakaḥ |
kṛtāḥ śaktyeti saṃtarkaḥ kriyate vedapāragaiḥ ||46 ||
jagatsañjanane śaktistvayi tiṣṭhati rājasī |
sāttvikī mayi rudraṃ ca tāmasī parikīrtitā ||47 ||
tayā virahitastvaṃ na tatkarmakaraṇe prabhuḥ |
nāhaṃ pālayituṃ śaktaḥ saṃhatuṃ nāpi śaṃkaraḥ || 48 ||
tadadhīnā vayaṃ sarve vartāmiḥ satataṃ vibho |
pratyakṣe ca parokṣe ca dṛṣṭāṃtaṃ śṛṇu suvrata ||49||
śeṣe svapimi paryaṃke paratantro na saṃśayaḥ |
tadadhīnaḥ sadottiṣṭhe kāle kālavaśaṃ gataḥ || 50 ||
tapaścarāmi satataṃ tadadhīno'smyahaṃ sadā |
kadācitsaha lakṣmyā ca viharāmi yathāsukham || 51 ||
kadāciddānavaiḥ sārddha saṃgrāmaṃ prakaromyaham |
dāruṇaṃ dehadamanaṃ sarvalokabhayaṃkaram || 52||
pratyakṣaṃ tava dharmajña tasminekārṇave purā |
pañcavarṣasahasrāṇi bāhuyuddhaṃ mayā kṛtam || 53||
tau karṇamalajo duṣṭau dānavo madagarvitau |
deva devyāḥ prasādena nihato madhukaiṭabha || 54 || |
tadā tvayā na kiṃ jñātaṃ kāraṇaṃ tu parātparam |
śaktirūpaṃ mahābhāga kiṃ pṛcchasi punaḥ punaḥ || 55 ||
yadicchaḥ puruṣo bhūtvā vicarāmi mahārṇave |
kacchapaḥ kolasiṃhaśca vāmanaśca yuge yuge || 56 ||
na kasyāpi priyo loke tiryagyoniṣu saṃbhavaḥ |
nābhavaṃ svecchayā vāmavarāhādiṣu yoniṣu || 57||
vihāya lakṣmyā saha saṃvihāraṃ ko yāti matsyādiṣu hīnayoniṣu |
śayyāṃ ca muktvā garuḍāsanasthaḥ karomi yuddhaṃ vipulaṃ svataṃtraḥ || 58||
purā puraste'ja śiro madīyaṃ gataṃ dhanurjyāskhalanātkva cāpi |
tvayā tadā vājiśiro gṛhītvā saṃyojitaṃ śilpivareṇa bhūyaḥ || 59||

hayānano'haṃ parikīrtitaśca pratyakṣametattava lokakarta: |
viḍaṃbaneyaṃ kila lokamadhye kathaṃ bhavedātmaparo yadi syāt || 60 ||
tasmānnāhaṃ svataṃtro'smi sarvathā |
tāmeva śakti satataṃ vyāyāmi ca niraṃtaram || 61||
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiṃcijjānāmi kamalodbhava |
nārada uvāca
ityuktaṃ viṣṇunā tena padmayostu sannidhau ||62||
tena cāpyahamukto'smi tathaiva munipuṃgava |
tasmāttvamapi kalyāṇa puruṣārthātihetave || 63 ||
asaṃśayaṃ hṛdaṃbhojeṃ bhaja devīpadāṃbujam |
sarvaṃ dāsyati sā devī yadyadiṣṭaṃ bhavettava ||64 ||
sūta uvāca
nāradenaivamuktastu vyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ |
devīpādābjaniṣṇātastapase prayayau girau || 65 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskaṃdhe caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
sūtāsmākaṃ manaḥ kāmaṃ magnaṃ saṃśayasāgare |
yathoktaṃ mahadāścaryaṃ jagadvismayakārakam || 1 ||
yanmūrddhā mādhavasyāpi gato dehātpunaḥ param |
hayagrīvastato jātaḥ sarvakartā janārdanaḥ || 2 ||
vedo'pi stauti yaṃ nityaṃ devāḥ sarve yadāśrayāḥ |
ādidevo jagannāthaḥ sarvakāraṇakāraṇaḥ || 3 ||
tasyāpi vadanaṃ chinnaṃ daivayogātkathaṃ tadā |
tatsarvaṃ kathayāśu tvaṃ vistareṇa mahāmate || 4 ||
sūta uvāca
śṛṇvaṃtu munayaḥ sarve sāvadhānāḥ samaṃtataḥ |
caritaṃ devadevasya viṣṇoḥ paramatejasaḥ || 5 ||
kadāciddāruṇaṃ yuddhaṃ kṛtvā devaḥ sanātanaḥ |
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi pariśrāṃto janārdanaḥ || 6 ||
same deśe śubhe sthāne kṛtvā padmāsanaṃ vibhuḥ |
avalaṃbya dhanuḥ sajyaṃ kaṃṭhadeśe dharāsthitam || 7 ||
dattvā bhāraṃ dhanuṣkoṭayāṃ nidrāmāpa ramāpatiḥ |
śrāṃtatvāddaivayogācca jātastatrātinidritaḥ || 8 ||
tadā kālena kiyatā devāḥ sarve savāsavāḥ |
brahmeśasahitāḥ sarve yajñaṃ kartuṃ samudyatāḥ || 9 ||
gatāḥ sarve'tha vaikuṃṭhaṃ draṣṭuṃ devaṃ janārdanam |
devakāryārthasiddhyarthaṃ makhānāmadhipaṃ prabhum || 10 ||
adṛṣṭvā tu tadā tatra jñānadṛṣṭyā vilokya te |
yatrāste bhagavānviṣṇurjagmustatra tadā surāḥ ||11||
dadṛśuste tadeśānaṃ yoganidrāvaśaṃ gatam |
vicetanaṃ vibhuṃ viṣṇuṃ tatrāsāṃcakrire surāḥ || 12||
sthiteṣu sarvadeveṣu nidrāsupte jagatpatī |
ciṃtāmāpuḥ surāḥ sarve brahmarudrapurogamāḥ || 13||

tānuvāca tataḥ śakraḥ kiṃ kartavyaṃ surottamāḥ |
nidrābhaṃgaḥ kathaṃ kāryaścitayaṃtu surottamāḥ || 14 ||
tamuvāca tadā śaṃbhunidrābhaṃge'sti dūṣaṇam |
kāryaṃ caiva prakartavyaṃ yajñasya surasattamāḥ || 15 ||
utpāditā tadā vamrī brahmaṇā parameṣṭhinā |
tayā bhakṣayituṃ tatra dhanuṣo'graṃ dharāsthitam ||16||
bhakṣite'gre tadā'nimnaṃ gamiṣyati śarāsanam |
tadā nidrāvimukto'sau devadevo bhaviṣyati ||17||
devakāryaṃ tadā sarvaṃ bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ |
sa vatrīṃ saṃdideśātha devadevaḥ sanātanaḥ || 18 ||
tamuvāca tadā vamrī devadevasya māpateḥ |
nidrābhaṃgaḥ kathaṃ kāryo devasya jagatāṃ guroḥ ||19||
nidrābhaṃga: kathāchedo daṃpatyoḥ prītibhedanam |
śiśumātṛvibhedaśca brahmahatyāsamaṃ smṛtam ||20||
tatkathaṃ devadevasya karomi sukhanāśanam |
kiṃ phalaṃ bhakṣaṇāddeva yena pāpaṃ karomyaham || 21||
sarvaḥ svārthavaśo lokaḥ kurute pātakaṃ kila |
tasmādahaṃ kariṣyāmi svārthameva prabhakṣaṇam ||22||
brahmovāca
tava bhāgaṃ kariṣyāmo makhamadhye yathā śṛṇu | tena tvaṃ kuru kāryaṃ no viṣṇuṃ bodhaya māciram 23
homakarmaṇi pārśve ca havirdānātpatiṣyati |
tatte bhāgaṃ vijānīhi kuru kāryaṃ tvarānvitā || 24||
sūta uvāca
ityuktā brahmaṇā vamrī dhanuṣo'yaṃ tvarānvitā |
cakhāda saṃsthitaṃ bhūmau vimuktā jyā tadā'bhavat ||
pratyaṃcāyāṃ vimuktāyāṃ muktā koṭistathottarā |
śabdaḥ samabhavadghorastena trastāḥ surāstadā || 26||
brahmāṃḍaṃ kṣubhitaṃ sarvaṃ vasudhā kaṃpitā tadā |
samudrāśva samudvignāstresuśca jalajaṃtavaḥ ||27||
vavurvātāstathā cogrāḥ parvatāśca cakaṃpire |
ulkāpātā mahotpātā babhūvurduḥ khaśaṃsinaḥ || 28||
diśo ghoratarāśvāsansūryo'pyastaṃgato'bhavat |
citāmāpuḥ surāḥ sarve ki bhaviṣyati durdine || 29 ||
evaṃ citayatāṃ teṣāṃ mūrdhā viṣṇoḥ sakuṃḍala: |
gataḥ samukuṭaḥ kvāpi devadevasya tāpasāḥ || 30 ||
aṃdhakāre tadā ghore śāṃte brahmaharau tadā |
śirohīnaṃ śarīraṃ tu dadṛśāte vilakṣaṇam || 31 ||
dṛṣṭvā kabaṃdhaṃ viṣṇoste vismitāḥ surasattamāḥ |
citāsāgaramagnāśca ruruduḥ śokakarśitāḥ ||32||
hā nātha kiṃ prabho jātamatyadbhutamamānuṣam |
vaiśasaṃ sarvadevānāṃ devadeva sanātana ||33||
māyeyaṃ kasya devasya yayā te'dya śiro hṛtam |
acchedyastvamabhedyo'si apradāhyo'si sarvadā ||34||
evaṃ gate tvayi vibho mariṣyanti ca devatāḥ |
kīdṛśastvayi naḥ snehaḥ svārthenaiva rudāmahe ||35||
nāyaṃ vighnaḥ kṛto daityairna yakṣarna ca rākṣasaiḥ |
devaireva kṛtaḥ kasya dūṣaṇaṃ ca ramāpate ||36||
parādhīnāḥ surāḥ sarve kiṃ kurmaḥ kva vrajāma ca |
śaraṇaṃ naiva deveśa surāṇāṃ mūḍhacetasām ||37||
na caiṣā sāttvikī māyā rājasī na ca tāmasī |
yayā chinnaṃ śiraste'dya māyeśasya jagadguroḥ 38 ||
aṃdamānāṃstadā dṛṣṭvā devāñchivapurogamān |
bṛhaspatistadovāca śamayanvedavittamaḥ || 39||

ruvitena mahābhāgāḥ kraṃditena tathāpi kim |
upāyaścātra kartavyaḥ sarvathā buddhigocaraḥ || 40 ||
devaṃ puruṣakāraśca deveśasadṛśāvubhau |
upāyaśva vidhātavyo daivātphalati sarvathā || 41 ||
indra uvāca
daivameva paraṃ manye dhikpauruṣamanarthakam |
viṣṇorapi śiraśchinnaṃ surāṇāṃ caiva paśyatām 42 ||
brahmovāca
avaśyameva bhoktavyaṃ kālenāpāditaṃ ca yat |
śubhaṃ vāpyaśubhaṃ vāpi daivaṃ ko'tikrametpunaḥ ||43||
dehavānsukhaduḥkhānāṃ bhoktā naivātra saṃśayaḥ |
yathā kālavaśātkṛttaṃ śiro me śaṃbhunā purā || 44 ||
tathaiva liṃgapātaśca mahādevasya śāpataḥ |
tathaivādya harermūrdhā patito lavaṇāṃbhasi ||45 ||
sahasrabhagasaṃprāptirduḥkhaṃ caiva śacīpateḥ |
svargātraṃśastathā vāsaḥ kamale mānase sare ||46 ||
ete duḥkhasya bhoktāraḥ kena duḥkhaṃ na bhujyate |
saṃsāre'sminmahābhāgāstasmācchokaṃ tyajaṃtu vai ||
citayaṃtu mahāmāyāṃ vidyādevīṃ sanātanīm |
sā vidhāsyati naḥ kāryaṃ nirguṇā prakṛtiḥ parā ||
brahmavidyāṃ jagaddhātrīṃ sarveṣāṃ jananīṃ tathā |
yayā sarvamidaṃ vyāptaṃ trailokyaṃ sacarācaram ||49||
sūta uvāca
ityuktvā vai surān vedhā nigamānādideśa ha |
dehayuktānsthitānagre surakāryārthasiddhaye || 50 ||
brahmovāca
stuvaṃtu paramāṃ devīṃ brahmavidyāṃ sanātanīm |
gūḍhāṅgīṃ ca mahāmāyāṃ sarvakāryārthasādhanīm ||51||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya vedāḥ sarvāṅgasundarāḥ |
tuṣṭuvurjñānagamyāṃ tāṃ mahāmāyāṃ jagatsthitām ||52||
vedā ūcuḥ
namo devi mahāmāye viśvotpattikare śive |
nirguṇe sarvabhūteśi mātaḥ śaṃkarakāmaṃde || 53 ||
tvaṃ bhūmiḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ prāṇaḥ prāṇavatāṃ tathā |
dhīḥ śrīḥ kāṃtiḥ kṣamā śāṃtiḥ śraddhā medhā dhṛtiḥ smṛtiḥ || 54 ||
tvamudgīthe'rdhamātrā'si gāyatrī vyāhṛtistathā |
jayā ca vijayā dhātrī lajjā kīrtiḥ spṛhā dayā ||
tvāṃ saṃstumo'mba bhuvanatrayasaṃvidhānadakṣāṃ dayārasayutāṃ jananīṃ janānām |
vidyāṃ śivāṃ sakalalokahitāṃ vareṇyāṃ vāgbījavāsanipuṇāṃ bhavanāśakartrīm ||56||
brahmā haraḥ śaurisahasranetravāgvahnisūryā bhuvanādhināthāḥ |
te tvatkṛtāḥ saṃti tato na mukhyā mātā yatastvaṃ sthirajaṃgamānām ||57||
sakalabhuvanametatkartukāmā yadā tvaṃ sṛjasi janani devānviṣṇurudrājamukhyān | 5
sthitilayajananaṃ taiḥ kārayasyekarūpā na khalu tava kathaṃciddevi saṃsāraleśaḥ || 58 ||

na te rūpaṃ vettuṃ sakalabhuvane ko'pi nipuṇo na nāmnāṃ saṃkhyā te kathitumiha yogyo'sti puruṣaḥ |
yadalpaṃ kīlālaṃ kalayitumaśaktaḥ sa tu naraḥ kathaṃ pārāvārākalana caturaḥ syādṛtamatiḥ || 59 ||
na devānāṃ madhye bhagavati tavāṃnaṃtavibhavaṃ vijānātyeko'pi tvamiha bhuvanaikāsi jananī |
kathaṃ mithyā viśvaṃ sakalamapi caikā racayasi pramāṇaṃ tvetasminnigamavacanaṃ devi vihitam || 60||
nirīhevāsi tvaṃ nikhilajagatāṃ kāraṇamaho caritraṃ te citraṃ bhagavati mano no vyathayati |
kathaṃkāraṃ vācyaḥ sakalanigamāgocaraguṇaprabhāvaḥ svaṃ yasmātsvayamapi na jānāsi paramam || 61 ||
na ki jānāsi tvaṃ janani madhujinmaulipatanaṃ śive kiṃ vā jñātvā vividiṣasi śakti madhujitaḥ |
hareḥ kiṃvā mātarduritatatireṣā balavatī bhavatyāḥ pādābje bhajananipuṇe kvāsti duritam || 62 ||
upekṣā kā ceyaṃ tava surasamūhe 'tiviṣamā harermūnoṃ nāśo matamiha mahāścaryajanakam |
mahadduḥkhaṃ mātastvamasi jananacchedakuśalā na jānīmo maulevighaṭanavilaṃbaḥ kathamabhūt || 63 ||
jñātvā doṣaṃ sakalasuratāpāditaṃ devi citte kiṃvā viṣṇāvamarajanitaṃ duṣkṛtaṃ pātitaṃ te |
viṣṇorvā kiṃ samarajanitaḥ kopavargo'tivegācchettuṃ mātastava vilasitaṃ naiva vidmo'tra bhāvam || 64 ||
kiṃ vā daityaiḥ samaravijitaistīrthadeśe suramye ghoraṃ taptvā bhagavati varaṃ labdhavadbhirbhavatyā |
antardhānaṃ gamitamadhunā viṣṇuśīrṣaṃ bhavāni draṣṭuṃ kiṃvā vigataśirasaṃ vāsudevaṃ vinodaḥ || 65 ||
siṃdhoḥ putryā roṣitā kiṃ tvamādye kasmādenāṃ prekṣase nāthahīnām |
kṣaṃtavyaste svāṃśajātāparādho vyutthāpyainaṃ moditāṃ tāṃ kuruṣva || 66 |
ete surāstvāṃ satataṃ narmati kāryeṣu mukhyāḥ prathitaprabhāvāḥ |
śokārṇavāttāraya devi devānutthāpya devaṃ sakalādhinātham || 67||
mūrdhāgataḥ kvāmba harerna vidmo nānyo'styupāyaḥ khalu jīvane'dya |
yathā sudhā jīvanakarmadakṣā tathā jagajjīvitadā'si devi || 68 ||
sūta uvāca
evaṃ stutā tadā devī guṇātītā maheśvarī |
prasannā paramā māyā vedaiḥ sāṃgaiśca sāmagaiḥ ||69||
tānuvāca tadā vāṇī cākāśasthā śarīriṇī |
devānprati sukhaiḥ śabdairjanānaṃdakarī śubhā || 70 ||
mā kuruṣvaṃ surāścitāṃ svasthāstiṣṭaṃtu cāmarāḥ |
stutā'haṃ nigamaiḥ kāmaṃ saṃtuṣṭā'smi na saṃśayaḥ ||
yaḥ pumānmānuṣe loke stotyetāṃ māmakī stutim |
paṭhiṣyati sadā bhaktayā sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt ||
śṛṇoti vā stotramidaṃ madīyaṃ bhaktaghā trikālaṃ satataṃ naro yaḥ |
vimuktaduḥkhaḥ sa bhavetsukhī ca vedoktametannanu 6 vedatulyam ||73||
śṛṇvaṃtu kāraṇaṃ cādya yadgataṃ vadanaṃ hareḥ |
akāraṇaṃ kathaṃ kāryaṃ saṃsāre'tra bhaviṣyati || 74 ||

udadhestanayāṃ viṣṇuḥ saṃsthitāmaṃtike priyām |
jahāsa vadanaṃ vīkṣya tasyāstatra manoramam ||75 ||
tayā jātaṃ harirnūnaṃ kathaṃ māṃ hasati prabhuḥ |
virūpaṃ hariṇā dṛṣṭaṃ mukhaṃ me kena hetunā || 76 ||
vināpi kāraṇenādya kathaṃ hāsyasya sambhavaḥ |
sapatnīva kṛtā tena manyenyā varavarṇinī || 77 ||
tataḥ kopayutā jātā mahālakṣmī tamoguṇā |
tāmasī tu tadā śaktistasyā dehe samāviśat ||78||
kenacitkālayogena devakāryārthasiddhaye |
praviṣṭā tāmasī śaktistasyā dehetidāruṇā || 79 ||
tāmasyāviṣṭadehā sā cukopātiśayaṃ tadā |
śanakaiḥ samuvācedamidaṃ patatu te śiraḥ || 80 ||
strīsvabhāvācca bhāvitvātkālayogādvinirgataḥ |
avicārya tadā dattaḥ śāpaḥ svasukhanāśanaḥ || 81 ||
sapatnīsambhavaṃ duḥkhaṃ vaidhavyādadhikaṃ tviti |
vicitya manasetyuktaṃ tāmasī śaktiyogataḥ || 82||
anṛtaṃ sāhasaṃ māyā mūrkhatvamatilobhatā |
aśaucaṃ nirdayatvaṃ ca strīṇāṃ doṣāḥ svabhāvajāḥ || 83 ||
saśīṣaṃ vāsudevaṃ taṃ karomyadya yathā purā |
śiro'sya śāpayogena nimagnaṃ lavaṇāṃbudhau || 84 ||
anyacca kāraṇaṃ kiñcidvartate surasattamāḥ |
bhavatāṃ ca mahatkāryaṃ bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ || 85 ||
purā daityo mahābāhurhayagrīvo'tiviśrutaḥ |
tapaścakre sarasvatyāstīre paramadāruṇam ||86||
japannekākṣaraṃ mantraṃ māyābījātmakaṃ mama |
nirāhāro jitātmā ca sarvabhogavivarjitaḥ ||87||
dhyāyanmāṃ tāmasī śakti sarvabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām |
evaṃ varṣasahasraṃ ca tapaścakre'tidāruṇam ||88||
tadāhaṃ tāmasaṃ rūpaṃ kṛtvā tatra samāgatā |
darśane puratastasya dhyātaṃ tattena yādṛśam ||89 ||
siṃhopari sthitā tatra tamavocaṃ dayānvitā |
varaṃ brūhi mahābhāga dadāmi tava suvrata || 90||
iti śrutvā vaco devyā dānavaḥ premapūritaḥ |
pradakṣiṇāṃ praṇāmaṃ ca cakāra tvaritastadā ||11||
dṛṣṭvā rūpaṃ madīyaṃ sa premotphullavilocanaḥ |
harṣāśrupūrṇanayanastuṣṭāva sa ca māṃ tadā || 92 ||
hayagrīva uvāca
namo devyai mahāmāye sṛṣṭisthityantakāriṇi |
bhaktānugrahacature kāmade mokṣade śive ||93 ||
dharāmbutejaḥpavanakhapañcānāṃ ca kāraṇam |
tvaṃ gandharasarūpāṇāṃ kāraṇaṃ sparśaśabdayoḥ || 14 ||
ghrāṇaṃ ca rasanā cakṣustvakśrotramidriyāṇi ca |
karmendriyāṇi cānyāni tvattaḥ sarvaṃ maheśvari || 95 ||
śrīdevyuvāca
ki te'bhīṣṭaṃ varaṃ brūhi vāṃchitaṃ yaddadāmi tat |
parituṣṭā'smi bhaktayā te tapasā cādbhutena ca || 96 ||
hayagrīva uvāca
yathā me maraṇaṃ mātarna bhavettattathā kuru |
bhaveyamamaro yogī tathā'jeyaḥ surāsuraiḥ ||97 ||
śrīdevyuvāca
jātasya hi dhruvaṃ mṛtyurdhruvaṃ janma mṛtasya ca |
maryādā cedṛśī loke bhavecca kathamanyathā || 98||

evaṃ tvaṃ niścayaṃ kṛtvā maraṇe rākṣasottama |
varaṃ varaya ceṣṭaṃ te vicārya manasā kila ||99||
hayagrīva uvāca
hayagrīvācca me mṛtyurnānyasmājjagadambike |
iti me vāṃchitaṃ kāmaṃ pūrayasva manogatam || 100 ||
śrīdevyuvāca
gṛhaṃ gaccha mahābhāga kuru rājyaṃ yathāsukham |
hayagrīvādṛte mṛtyurna te nūnaṃ bhaviṣyati || 101 ||
iti dattvā varaṃ tasmā antardhānaṃ gatā tathā |
mudaṃ paramikāṃ prāpya sopi svabhavanaṃ gataḥ ||102||
sa pīḍayati duṣṭātmā munīnvedāṃśca sarvaśaḥ |
na ko'pi vidyate tasya haṃtā'dya bhuvanatraye || 103 ||
tasmācchīrṣaṃ hayasyāsya samuddhṛtya manoharam |
dehe'tra viśiro viṣṇostvaṣṭā saṃyojayiṣyati 104 ||
hayagrīvo'tha bhagavānhaniṣyati tamāsuram |
pāpiṣṭhaṃ dānavaṃ krūraṃ devānāṃ hitakāmyayā || 105 ||
sūta uvāca
evaṃ surāṃstadābhāṣya śarvāṇī virarāma ha |
devāstadātisaṃtuṣṭāstamūcurdevaśilpinam ||106||
devā ūcuḥ
kuru kāryaṃ surāṇāṃ vai viṣṇoḥ śīrṣābhiyojanam |
dānavapravaraṃ daityaṃ hayagrīvo haniṣyati || 107 ||
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā vacasteṣāṃ tvaṣṭā cātitvarānvitaḥ |
vājiśīrṣaṃ cakartāśu khaḍgena surasannidhau || 108 ||
viṣṇoḥ śarīre tenāśu yojitaṃ vājimastakam |
hayagrīvo harirjāto mahāmāyāprasādataḥ || 109 ||
kiyatā tena kaॉlena dānavo madadarpitaḥ |
nihatastarasā saṃkhye devānāṃ ripurojasā || 110 ||
ya idaṃ śubhamākhyānaṃ śṛṇvanti bhuvi mānavāḥ |
sarvaduḥkhavinirmuktāste bhavaṃti na saṃśayaḥ || 111 ||
mahāmāyācaritrañca pavitraṃ pāpanāśanam |
paṭhatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ caiva sarvasaṃpattikārakam || 112 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate prathamaskaṃdhe hayagrīvāvatārakathanaṃ nāma pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5 ||
atha ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
saumya yacca tvayā proktaṃ śaureryuddhaṃ mahārṇave |
madhukaiṭabhayoḥ sārddhaṃ pañcavarṣasahasrakam || 1 ||
kasmāttau dānavau jātau tasminnekārṇave jale |
mahāvīryau durādharṣo devairapi sudurjayau || 2 ||
kathaṃ tāvasurau jātau kathaṃ ca hariṇā hatau |
tadācakṣva mahāprājña caritaṃ paramādbhutam || 3 ||
śrotukāmā vayaṃ sarve tvaṃ vaktā ca bahuśrutaḥ |
devāccātraiva sañjātaḥ saṃyogaśca tathāvayoḥ || 4 ||
mūrkheṇa saha saṃyogo viṣādapi sudurjaraḥ |
vijñena saha saṃyogaḥ sudhārasasamaḥ smṛtaḥ || 5 |
jīvanti paśavaḥ sarve khādanti mehayanti ca |
jānanti vipayākāraṃ vyavāyasukhamadbhutam || 6 ||

na teṣāṃ sadasajjñānaṃ viveko na ca mokṣadaḥ |
paśubhiste samā aisā yeṣāṃ na śravaṇādaraḥ ||7|
mṛgādyāḥ paśavaḥ kecijjānaṃti śrāvaṇaṃ sukham |
aśrotrāḥ pharminaścaiva mumuhurnādapānataḥ ||8||
paṃcānāmidriyāṇāṃ ve śubhe śravaṇadarśane |
śravaṇādvastuvijñānaṃ darśanāccittaraṃjanam || 9||
śravaṇaṃ trividhaṃ proktaṃ sāttvikaṃ rājasaṃ tathā |
tāmasaṃ ca mahābhāgāḥ sujñoktaṃ niścayānvitam 10 ||
sāttvikaṃ vedaśāstrādi sāhityaṃ caiva rājasam |
tāmasaṃ yuddhavārtā ca paradoṣa prakāśanam || 11 ||
sāttvikaṃ trividhaṃ proktaṃ prajñāvadbhiśva paṇḍitaiḥ |
uttamaṃ madhyamaṃ caiva tathaivādhamamityuta || 12 ||
uttamaṃ mokṣaphaladaṃ svargadaṃ madhyamaṃ tathā |
adhamaṃ bhogadaṃ proktaṃ nirṇīya viditaṃ budhaiḥ || 13 ||
sāhityaṃ caṃtha trividhaṃ svīyāyāṃ cottamaṃ smṛtam |
madhyamaṃ vārayoṣāyāṃ paroḍhāyāṃ tathā'dhamam ||14||
tāmasaṃ trividhaṃ jñeyaṃ vidvadbhiḥ śāstradarśibhiḥ |
ātatāyiniyuddhaṃ yattaduttamamudāhṛtam || 15 ||
madhyamaṃ cāpi vidveṣātpāṃḍavānāṃ tathāribhiḥ |
adhamaṃ nirnimittaṃ tu vivāde kalahe tathā || 16||
tadatra śravaṇaṃ mukhyaṃ purāṇasya mahāmate |
buddhipravardhanaṃ puṇyaṃ tataḥ pāpapraṇāśanam ||17||
tadākhyāhi mahābuddhe kathāṃ paurāṇikīṃ śubhām |
śrutāṃ dvaipāyanātpūrvaṃ sarvārthasya prasādhinīm ||18||
sūta uvāca
yūyaṃ dhanyā mahābhāgā dhanyo'haṃ pṛthivītale |
yeṣāṃ śravaṇabuddhiśca mamāpi kathane kila ||19||
purā caikārṇave jāte vilīne bhuvanatraye |
śeṣaparyaṃkasupte ca devadeve janārdane ||20||
viṣṇu karṇamalodbhūto dānavo madhukaiṭabho |
mahābalau ca to daityau vivṛddhau sāgare jale ||21||
krīḍamānau sthitau tatra vicaraṃtāvitastataḥ |
tāvekadā mahākāyau krīḍāsaktau mahārṇave || 22||
citāmavāpatuścitte bhrātarāviva saṃsthitau |
nākāraṇaṃ bhavetkāryaṃ sarvatraiṣā paraṃparā ||23||
ādheyaṃ tu vinādhāraṃ na tiṣṭati kathaṃcana |
ādhārādheyabhāvastu bhāti no cittagocaraḥ ||24||
kva tiṣṭati jalaṃ cedaṃ sukharūpaṃ suvistaram |
kena sṛṣṭaṃ kathaṃ jātaṃ magnāvāvāñjale sthitau ||25|
āvāṃ vā kathamutpanna kena votpāditāvubhau |
pitarau kveti vijñānaṃ nāsti kāmaṃ tathāvayoḥ || 26 ||
sūta uvāca
evaṃ kāmayamāno to jagmaturna viniścayam |
uvāca kaiṭabhastatra madhuṃ pārśve sthitaṃ jale ||27||
kaiṭabha uvāca
madho vāmatra salile sthātuṃ śaktirmahābalā |
vartate bhrātaracalā kāraṇaṃ sā hi me matā || 28 ||
tayā tatamidaṃ toyaṃ tadādhāraṃ ca tiṣṭhati |
sā eva paramā devī kāraṇaṃ na tathāvayoḥ || 29||
evaṃ vibudhyamānau tau citāviṣṭau yadā'surau |
tadākāśe śrutaṃ tābhyāṃ vāgvījaṃ sumanoharam ||30||
gṛhītaṃ ca tatastāmyāṃ tasyābhyāso dṛr̤haḥ kṛtaḥ |
tadā saudāmanī dṛṣṭā tābhyāṃ khe cotthitā śubhā ||

tābhyāṃ vicāritaṃ tatra maṃtro'yaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ |
tathā dhyānamidaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ gagane saguṇaṃ kila || 32 ||
nirāhārī jitātmāno tanmanastrī samāhito |
babhūvaturvicityaivaṃ japadhyānaparāyaṇau || 33||
evaṃ varṣasahasraṃ tu tābhyāṃ taptaṃ mahattapaḥ |
prasannā paramā śaktirjātā sā paramā tayoḥ || 34||
khinno to dānavo dṛṣṭvā tapase kṛtaniścayau |
tayoranugrahārthāya vāguvācāśarīriṇī || 35||
varaṃ vāṃ vāṃchitaṃ daityo brūtaṃ paramasaṃmatam |
dadāmi parituṣṭā'smi yuvayostapasā kila ||36||
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā tu tāṃ vāṇīṃ dānavāḥ catustadā |
svecchayā maraṇaṃ devi varaṃ nau dehi suvrate ||37|
vāguvāca
vāṃchitaṃ maraṇaṃ daityo bhavedvāṃ matprasādataḥ |
ajeyau devadaityaiśca bhrātarau nātra saṃśayaḥ ||38||
sūta uvāca
iti dattavaro devyā dānavo madadarpito |
cakratuḥ sāgare krīḍāṃ yādogaṇasamanvitau ||39||
kālena kiyatā viprā dānavābhyāṃ yadṛcchayā |
dṛṣṭaḥ prajāpatirbrahmā padmāsanagataḥ prabhuḥ || 40||
dṛṣṭvā tu muditāvāstāṃ yuddhakāmau mahābalau |
tamūcatustadā tatra yuddhaṃ nau dehi suvrata || 41 ||
nocetpadmaṃ parityajya yatheṣṭaṃ gaccha māciram |
yadi tvaṃ nirbalaścāsi kva yogyaṃ śubhamāsanam 42 ||
vīrabhogyamidaṃ sthānaṃ kātaro'si tyajāśu vai |
tayoriti vacaḥ śrutvā citāmāpa prajāpatiḥ ||43||
dṛṣṭvā ca balino vīrau ki karomīti tāpasaḥ |
citāviṣṭastadā tasthau citayanmanasā tadā ||44 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe prathamaskaṃdhe ṣaṣṭo'dhyāyaḥ || 6 ||
atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
to vīkṣya balino brahmā tadopāyānaciṃtayat |
sāmadānabhidādīṃśca yuddhāṃ tānsarva taṃtravit || 1 ||
na jāne'haṃ balaṃ nūnanametayorvā yathātatham |
ajñāte tu bale kāmaṃ naiva yuddhaṃ praśasyate || 2||
stuti karomi cedadya duṣṭayormadamattayoḥ |
prakāśitaṃ bhavennūnaṃ nirbalatvaṃ mayā svayam ||3||
vadhiṣyati tadeko'pi nirbalatve prakāśite |
dānaṃ naivādya yogyaṃ vā bheda: kāryo mayā katham ||4||
viṣṇuṃ prabodhayāmyadya ṭope suptaṃ janārdanam |
caturbhujaṃ mahāvīraṃ duḥkhahā sa bhaviṣyati ||5||
iti saṃcitya manasā padmanālagato'bjajaḥ |
jagāma śaraṇaṃ viṣṇuṃ manasā duḥkhanāśakam || 6 ||
tuṣṭāva bodhanārtha taṃ śubhaiḥ samvodhanaṃrharim |
nārāyaṇaṃ jagannāthaṃ nispaṃde yoganidrayā || 7 ||
brahmovāca
dīnānātha hare viṣṇo vāmanottiṣṭha mādhava |
bhaktātihṛddṛṣīkeśa sarvāvāsa jagatpate ||8||

antaryāmitrameyātman vāsudeva jagatpate |
duṣṭārināśanaikāgracitta cakragadādhara || 9||
sarvajña sarvalokeśa sarvaśaktisamanvita |
uttiṣṭhottiṣṭha deveśa duḥkhanāśana pāhi mām || 10 |
viśvambhara viśālākṣa puṇyaśravaṇakīrtana |
jagadyone nirākāra sargasthityaṃtakāraka ||11||
imo daityau mahārāja haṃtukāmoṃ madoddhatau |
na jānāsyakhilādhāra kathaṃ māṃ sakaṭe gatam ||12||
upekṣase'tiduḥkhārtaṃ yadi māṃ śaraṇaṃ gatam |
pālakatvaṃ mahāviṣṇo nirādhāraṃ bhavettataḥ || 13 ||
evaṃ stuto'pi bhagavānna bubodha yadā hariḥ |
yoganidrāsamākrāṃtastadā brahmā hyacitayat || 14 ||
nūnaṃ śaktisamātrāṃto viṣṇurnidrāvaśaṃ gataḥ |
jajāgāra. na dharmātmā kiṃ karomyadya duḥkhitaḥ || 15 |
'
haṃtukāmāvubhau prāptau dānava madagarvitau |
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi nāsti me śaraṇaṃ kvacit ||
iti saṃcitya manasā niścayaṃ pratipadya ca |
tuṣṭāva yoganidrāṃ tāmekāgra hṛdayasthitaḥ || 17|| ||17||
vicārya manasā'pyevaṃ śaktirme rakṣaṇe kṣamā |
yayā hyacetano viṣṇuḥ kṛto'sti spaṃdavajitaḥ || 18 ||
vyasuryathā na jānāti guṇāñchandādikāniha |
tathā harirna jānāti nidrāmolitalocanaḥ || 19 ||
na jahāti yato nidrāṃ bahudhā saṃstuto'pyasī |
manye nāsya vaśe nidrā nidrayā'yaṃ vaśīkṛtaḥ || 20 ||
yo yasya vaśamāpannaḥ sa tasya kiṃkaraḥ kila |
tasmācca yoganidreyaṃ svāminī māpaterhareḥ || 21||
siṃdhujāyā api vaśe yayā svāmī vaśīkṛtaḥ |
nūnaṃ jagadidaṃ sarvaṃ bhagavatyā vaśīkṛtam || 22 ||
ahaṃ viṣṇustathā śambhuḥ sāvitrī ca ramāpyumā |
sarve vayaṃ vaśe yasyā nātra kiṃcidvicāraṇā ||23||
harirapyavaśaḥ śete yathā'nyaḥ prākṛto janaḥ |
yayābhibhūtaḥ kā vārtā linyeṣāṃ mahātmanām 24 ||
stomyadya yoganidrāṃ vai yayā mukto janārdanaḥ |
ghaṭayiṣpati yuddhaṃ ca vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ ||25||
iti kṛtvā mati brahmā padmanālasthitastadā |
tuṣṭāva yoganidrāṃ tāṃ viṣṇoraṃgeṣu saṃsthitām || 26||
brahmovāca
devi tvamasya jagataḥ kila kāraṇaṃ hi jñātaṃ mayā sakalaṃvedavacobhiramba |
yadviṣṇurapyakhilalokavivekakartā nidrāvaśaṃ ca gamitaḥ puruṣottamo'dya || 27 ||
ko veda te janani mohavilāsalīlāṃ mūḍho'smyahaṃ harirayaṃ vivaśaśva śete | |
īduktayā sakalabhūtamanonivāse vidvattamo vibudhakoṭipu nirguṇāyāḥ ||28||
sāṃkhyā vadaṃti puruṣaṃ prakṛti ca yāṃ tāṃ caitanyabhāvarahitāṃ jagataśca kartrīm |
kiṃ tādṛśā'si kathamatra jagannivāsa caitanyatāvirahito vihitastvayā'dya ||29||
nāṭayaṃ tanoṣi saguṇā vividhaprakāraṃ no vetti ko'pi tava kṛtyavidhānayogam |
dhyāyaṃti yāṃ munigaṇā niyataṃ trikālaṃ saṃdhyeti nāma parikalpya guṇānbhavāni || 30||
buddhiha bodhakaraṇā jagatāṃ sadā tvaṃ śrīścāsi devi satataṃ sukhadā surāṇām |

་་ śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 7
kīrtistathā matimṛtī kila kāṃtireva śraddhā ratiśva sakaleṣu janeṣu mātaḥ || 31 ||
nātaḥ paraṃ kila vitarkaśataiḥ pramāṇaṃ prāptaṃ mayā yadiha duḥkhagati gatena |
tvaṃ cātra sarvajagatāṃ jananīti satyaṃ nidrālutāṃ vitaratā hariṇā'tra dṛṣṭam ||32||
tvaṃ devi vedaviduṣāmapi durvibhāvyā vedo'pi nūnamakhilārthatayā na veda |
yasmāttvadudbhavamasau śrutirāpnuvānā pratyakṣameva sakalaṃ tava kāryametat || 33 ||
kaste caritramakhilaṃ bhuvi veda dhīmānnāhaṃ harirna ca bhavo na surāstathā'mye |
jñātuṃ kṣamāśca munayo na mamātmajāśca durvācya eva mahimā tava sarvaloke ||34||
yajñeṣu devi yadi nāma na te vadaṃti svāheti vedaviduṣo havane kṛte'pi |
na prāpnuvaṃti satataṃ makhabhāgadheyaṃ devāstvameva vibudheṣvapi vṛttidā'si ||35||
trātā vayaṃ bhagavati prathamaṃ tvayā vai devārisaṃbhavabhayādadhunā tathaiva |
bhīto'smi devi varade śaraṇaṃ gato'smi ghoraṃ nirīkṣya madhunā saha kaiṭabhaṃ ca ||36||
no vetti viṣṇuradhunā mama duḥkhametajjāne tvayātmavivaśīkṛta dehayaṣṭiḥ |
muṃcādidevamathavā jahi dānaveṃdro yadrocate tatra kuruṣva mahānubhāve ||37||
