jānaṃti ye na tava devi paraṃ prabhāvaṃ ghyāyaṃti te hariharāvapi maṃdacittāḥ |
jñātaṃ mayā'dya janani prakaṭaṃ pramāṇaṃ yadviṣṇuratyatitarāṃ vivaśo'tha śete ||38||
sindhūdbhavāpi na hari pratibodhituṃ vai śaktā pati tava vaśānugamadya śaktyā |
manye tvayā bhagavati prasabhaṃ ramāpi prasvāpitā na bubudhe vivaśīkṛteva ||39||
dhanyāsta eva bhuvi bhaktiparāstavāṃghrau tyaktvā'nyadevabhajanaṃ tvayi līnabhāvāḥ |
kurvati devi bhajanaṃ sakalaṃ nikāmaṃ jñātvā samastajananīṃ kila kāmadhenum ||40||
ghīkāṃti kīrtiśubhavṛttiguṇādayaste viṣṇorguṇāstu parihṛtya gatāḥ kva cādya |
baṃdīkṛto harirasau nanu nidrayātra śaktyā tavaiva bhagavatyatimānavatyāḥ || 41 ||
tvaṃ śaktireva jagatāmakhilaprabhāvā tvanirmitaṃ ca sakalaṃ khalu bhāvamātram |
tvaṃ krīḍase nijavinirmitamohajāle nāṭaye yathā viharate svakṛto naṭo vai ||42 ||
viṣṇustvayā prakaṭitaḥ prathamaṃ yugādī dattā ca śaktiramalā khalu pālanāya |
trātaṃ ca sarvamakhilaṃ vivaśīkṛto'dya yadrocate tava tathā'mba karopi nūnam ||43||
sṛṣṭvā'tra māṃ bhagavati pravināśituṃ cetrecchāsti te kuru dayāṃ parihṛtya maunam |
kasmādimo prakaṭito kila kālarūpī yadvā bhavāni hasituṃ nu kimicchase mām ||44||
jñātaṃ mayā tava viceṣṭitamadbhutaṃ ve kṛtvā'khilaṃ jagadidaṃ ramase svataṃtrā |

līnaṃ karoṣi sakala kila māṃ tathaiva haṃtuṃ tvamicchasi bhavāni kimatra citram ||45||
kāmaṃ kuruṣva vadhamadya mamaiva mātarduḥkhaṃ na me maraṇajaṃ jagadambike'tra |
kartā tvayaiva vihitaḥ prathamaṃ sa cāyaṃ daityāhato'tha mṛta ityayaśo gariṣṭham ||46 ||
uttiṣṭha devi kuru rūpamihādbhutaṃ tvaṃ māṃ vā tvimo jahi yathecchasi bālalīle |
nocetprabodhaya hariṃ nihanedimau yastvatsādhyametadakhilaṃ kila kāryajātam ||47||
sūta uvāca
evaṃ stutā tadā devī tāmasī tatra vedhasā |
niḥsṛtya haridehāttu saṃsthitā pārśvatastadā || 48 ||
tyaktvā'gāni ca sarvāṇi viṣṇoratulatejasaḥ |
nirgatā yoganidrā sā nāśāya ca tayostadā ||49|| '
vispaṃditaśarīro'sau yadā jāto janārdanaḥ |
dhātā paramikāṃ prāpto mudaṃ dṛṣṭvā hari tataḥ || 50 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe viṣṇuprabodho nāma saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 ||
atha aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
saṃdeho'tra mahābhāga kathāyāṃ tu mahādbhūtaḥ |
vedaśāstrapurāṇaśca niścitaṃ tu sadā budhaiḥ || 1 ||
brahmā viṣṇuśva rudraśva trayo devāḥ sanātanāḥ |
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiṃcidbrahmāṇḍe'sminmahāmate || 2 ||
brahmā sṛjati lokānvai viṣṇuḥ pātyakhilaṃ jagat |
rudraḥ saṃharate kāle traya ete'tra kāraṇam || 3 ||
ekā mūrtistrayo devā brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ |
rajaḥ sattvatamobhiśca saṃyutāḥ kāryakārakāḥ || 4 |
teṣāṃ madhye hariḥ śreṣṭho mādhavaḥ puruṣottamaḥ |
ādidevo jagannāthaḥ samarthaḥ sarvakarmasu || 5 ||
mānyaḥ ko'pi samartho'sti viṣṇoratulatejasaḥ |
sa kathaṃ svāpitaḥ svāmī vivaśo yogamāyayā || 6 ||
kva gataṃ tasya vijñānaṃ jīvataśceṣṭitaṃ kutaḥ |
saṃdeho'yaṃ mahābhāga kathayasva yathāśubham || 7 |
kāsā śaktiḥ purā proktā yayā viṣṇurjitaḥ prabhuḥ |
kuto jātā kathaṃ śaktā kā śaktirveda suvrata || 8 ||
yastu sarveśvaro viṣṇurvāsudevo jagadguruḥ |
paramātmā parānandaḥ saccidānandavigrahaḥ || 9 |
sarvakṛtsarvabhṛtsraṣṭā virajaḥ sarvagaḥ śuciḥ |
sa kathaṃ nidrayā nītaḥ paratantraḥ parātparaḥ || 10||
etadāścaryabhūto hi sandeho naḥ paraṃtapa |
chiṃdhi jñānāsinā sūta vyāsa śiṣya mahāmate || 11||
sūta uvāca
kaḥ sandehaṃ bhinattyenaṃ trailokye sarācare |
muhyaṃti munayaḥ kāmaṃ brahmaputrāḥ sanātanāḥ || 12||
nāradaḥ kapilacaiva praśne'sminmunisattamāḥ |
kiṃ bravīmi mahābhāgā durghaṭe'sminvimarśane || 13||
deveṣu viṣṇuḥ kathitaḥ sarvagaḥ sarvapālakaḥ |
yato virāḍidaṃ sarvamutpannaṃ sacarācaram ||14||

te sarve samupāsante natvā devaṃ parātparam |
nārāyaṇaṃ hṛṣīkeśaṃ vāsudevaṃ janārdanam || 15||
tathā kecinmahādevaṃ śaṃkaraṃ śaśiśekharam |
trinetraṃ pañcavaktraṃ ca śūlapāṇi vṛṣadhvajam || 16||
tathā vedeṣu sarveṣu gītaṃ nāmnā triyambakam |
kapardinaṃ pañcavaktraṃ gaurīdehārdhadhāriṇam ||17||
kailāsavāsanirataṃ sarvaśaktisamanvitam |
bhūtavṛndayutaṃ devaṃ dakṣayajñavighātakam ||18||
tathā sūryaṃ vedavidaḥ sāyaṃprātadine dine |
madhyāhne tu mahābhāgā stuti vividhaiḥ stavaiḥ ||19||
yathā vedeṣu sarveṣu sūryopāsanamuttamam |
paramātmeti vikhyātaṃ nāma tasya mahātmanaḥ ||20|
agniḥ sarvatra vedeṣu saṃstuto vedavittamaiḥ |
indraścāpi trilokeśo varuṇa tathāparaḥ ||21||
yathā gaṃgā pravāhaiśca bahubhiḥ parivartate |
tathaiva sarvadeveṣu viṣṇuḥ prokto maharṣibhiḥ ||22||
trīṇyeva hi pramāṇāni paṭhitāni supaṇḍitaiḥ |
pratyakṣaṃ cānumānaṃ ca śābdaṃ caiva tṛtīyakam ||23||
'catvāryevetare prārupamānayutāni ca |
arthāpattiyutānyanye pañca prāhurmahādhiyaḥ ||24||
sapta paurāṇikācaiva pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ |
etaiḥ pramāṇairdurjñeyaṃ yadbrahma paramaṃ ca tat || 25 |
vitarkaścātra kartavyo buddhayā caivāgamena ca |
niścayātmikayā yuktyā vicārya ca punaḥ punaḥ ||26||
pratyakṣatastu vijñānacityaṃ matimatāṃ sadā |
dṛṣṭāntenāpi satataṃ śiṣṭamārgānusāriṇā ||27||
vidvāṃso'pi vadantyevaṃ purāṇaiḥ parigīyate |
druhiṇe sṛṣṭiśaktiśca harau pālanaśaktitā || 28 ||
hare saṃhāraśakti sūrye śakti: prakāśikā |
dharādharaṇaśaktiśca śeṣe kūrme tathaiva ca || 29 || ||29||
sā'dyā śaktiḥ pariṇatā sarvasminyā pratiṣṭhitā |
dāhaśaktistathā vahnau samīre preraṇātmikā || 30 || '
śivo'pi śavatāṃ yāṃti kuṃḍalinyā vivarjitaḥ |
śaktihīnastu yaḥ kaścidasamarthaḥ smṛto budhaiḥ ||31|
evaṃ sarvatra bhūteṣu sthāvareṣu careṣu ca |
brahmādistaṃbaparyantaṃ brahmāṃḍe'sminmahātapāḥ ||32||
śaktihīnaṃ tu nidyaṃ syādvastumātraṃ carācaram |
aśaktaḥ śatruvijaye gamane bhojane tathā || 33 ||
evaṃ sarvagatā śaktiḥ sā brahmeti vivicyate |
sopāsyā vividhaiḥ samyagvicāryā sudhiyā sadā 34 ||
viṣṇau ca sāttvikī śaktistayā hīno'pyakarmakṛt |
druhiṇe rājasīṃ śaktiryayā hīno hyasṛṣṭikṛt 35||
śive ca tāmasī śaktistayā saṃhārakārakaḥ |
ityūhyaṃ manasā sarvaṃ vicārya ca punaḥ punaḥ || 36 ||
śaktiḥ karoti brahmāṃḍaṃ sā vai pālayate'khilam |
icchayā saṃharatyeṣā jagadetaccarācaram ||37||
na viṣṇurna haraḥ śakro na brahmā na ca pāvakaḥ |
na sūryo varuṇaḥ śaktaḥ sve sve kārye kathaṃcana ||38||
tathā yuktā hi kurvati svāni kāryāṇi te surāḥ |
saiva kāraṇakāryeṣu pratyakṣeṇāvagamyate ||39||
saguṇā nirguṇā sā tu dvidhā proktā manīṣibhiḥ |
saguṇā rāgibhiḥ sevyā nirguṇā tu virāgibhiḥ ||
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ svāminī sā nirākulā |
dadāti vāṃchitānkāmānpūjitā vidhipūrvakam 41 ||
na jānaṃti janā mūḍhāstāṃ sadā māyayāvṛtāḥ |
jānanto'pi narāḥ kecinmohayaṃti parānapi ||42 ||

paṃḍitā: svodarārthaṃ vai pākhaṃḍāni pṛthakpṛthak |
pravartayaṃti kalinā preritā maṃdacetasaḥ || 43 ||
kalāvasminmahābhāga nānābhedasamutthitāḥ |
nānye yuge tathā dharmā vedavāhyāḥ kathaṃcana || 44||
viṣṇuśvaratyasāvugraṃ tapo varṣāṇyanekaśaḥ |
brahmā harastrayo devā dhyāyaṃta: kamapi dhruvam ||45||
kāmayānāḥ sadā kāmaṃ te trayaḥ sarvadaiva hi |
yajaṃti yajñānvividhānbrahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ ||46 ||
te vai śakti parāṃ devīṃ brahmākhyāṃ paramātmikām |
dhyāyaṃti manasā nityaṃ nityāṃ matvā sanātanīm 47||
tasmācchaktiḥ sadā sevyā vidvadbhiḥ kṛtaniśvayaiḥ |
niśvayaḥ sarvaśāstrāṇāṃ jñātavyo munisattamāḥ || 48||
kṛṣṇācchrutaṃ mayā caitattena jñātaṃ tu nāradāt |
pituḥ sakāśāttenāpi brahmaṇā viṣṇuvākyataḥ || 49||
na śrotavyaṃ na maṃtavyamanyeṣāṃ vacanaṃ budhaiḥ |
śaktireva sadā sevyā vidbhiḥ kṛtaniścayaiḥ || 50||
pratyakṣamapi draṣṭavyamaśaktasya viceṣṭitam |
ataḥ sarveṣu bhūteṣu jñātavyā śaktireva hi || 51 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe'ṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||
atha navamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
yadā vinirgatā nidrā dehāttasya jagadguroḥ | netrāsyanāsikā bāhu hṛdayebhyastayorasaḥ +11311
niḥsṛtya gagane tasthau tāmasī śaktiruttamā |
udatiṣṭhajjagannātha jṛmbhamāṇaḥ punaḥ punaḥ ||2||
tadā'paśyatsthitaṃ tatra bhayatrastaṃ prajāpatim |
uvāca ca mahātejā meghagaṃbhīrayā girā ||3||
viṣṇuruvāca
kimāgato'si bhagavaṃstapastyaktvā'tra padmaja |
kasmāccitāturo'si tvaṃ bhayākulitamānasaḥ || 4 ||
'brahmovāca
tvatkarṇamalajī deva detyo ca madhukaiṭabhau |
haṃtuṃ māṃ samugayātau ghorarūpau mahābalau ||5||
bhayāttayoḥ samāyātastvatsamīpaṃ jagatpate |
trāhi māṃ vāsudevādya bhayatrastaṃ vicetanam ||6||
viṣṇuruvāca
tiṣṭhādya nirbhayo jātastau haniṣyāmyahaṃ kilaṃ |
yuddhāyājagmaturmū dau matsamīpaṃ gatāyuṣī ||7||
sūta uvāca
evaṃ vadati deveśe dānavo to mahābalau |
vicinvavānāvajaṃ cobhau saṃprāptau madagavito || 8||
nirādhārī jale tatra saṃsthitau vigatajvarau |
tāvūcaturmadonmattī brahmāṇaṃ munisaptamāḥ || 9 ||
palāyitvā samāyātaḥ sannidhāvasya kiṃ tataḥ |
yuddhaṃ kuru haniṣyāvaḥ paśyato'syaiva sanniva || 10 ||
paścādenaṃ haniṣyāvaḥ sarpabhogopari sthitam |
tvamadya kuru saṃgrāmaṃ dāso'smīti ca vā vada || 11||

sūta uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ viṣṇustāvuvāca janārdanaḥ |
kurutāṃ samaraṃ kāmaṃ mayā dānavapuṅgavī ||12||
hariṣyāmi madaṃ cāhaṃ yuvayormattayoḥ kila |
āgacchataṃ mahābhāgo śraddhā cedvāṃ mahābalau ||13||
sūta uvāca
śrutvā tadvacanaṃ cobho krodhavyākulalocano |
nirādhārau jalasthau ca yuddhodyuktau babhūvatuḥ || 14 ||
madhuśca kupitastatra hariṇā saha saṃyugam |
kartuṃ pracalitastūrṇaṃ kaiṭabhastu tathā sthitaḥ || 15 ||
bāhuyuddhaṃ tayorāsīnmallayoriva mattayoḥ |
śrānte madhau kaiṭabhastu saṃgrāmamakarottadā || 16 ||
punarmadhuḥ kaiṭabhaśva yuyudhāte punaḥ punaḥ |
bāhuyuddhena rāgāndhau viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā ||17||
prekṣakastu tadā brahmā devī caivātarikṣagā |
na mamlatustadā tau tu viṣṇustu glānimāptavān ||
pañcavarṣasahasrāṇi yadā jātāni yuddhayatā |
hariṇā ciṃtitaṃ tatra kāraṇaṃ maraṇaṃ tayoḥ || 19 ||
pañcavarṣasahasrāṇi mayā yuddhaṃ kṛtaṃ kile |
naśrāṃtī dānavo ghorau śrāṃto'haṃ caṃtadadbhutam ||20||
kva gataṃ me balaṃ śauryaṃ kasmāccemāvanāmayau |
kimatra kāraṇaṃ cityaṃ vicārya manasā tviha || 21 ||
iti ciṃtāparaṃ dṛṣṭvā hari harmaparāvubhau |
ūcatustau madonmattau meghagaṃbhīraniḥsvanau ||22||
tava nocedvalaṃ viṣṇo yadi śrāṃto'si yuddhataḥ |
brūhi dāso'smi vā nūnaṃ kṛtvā śirasi cāṃjalim ||
nocedyuddhaṃ kuruṣvādya samartho'si mahāmate |
hatvā tvāṃ nihaniṣyāvaḥ puruṣaṃ ca caturmukham ||24||
sūta uvāca
śrutvā tadbhāṣitaṃ viṣṇustayostasminmahodadhau |
uvāca vacanaṃ ślakṣṇaṃ sāmapūrvaṃ mahāmanāḥ ||25||
hariruvāca
śrāṃte bhīte tyaktaśastre patite bālake tathā |
praharaṃti na vīrāste dharma eṣa sanātanaḥ || 26 ||
pañcavarṣasahasrāṇi kṛtaṃ yuddhaṃ mayā tviha |
eko'haṃ bhrātarau vāṃ ca balino sadṛśau tathā || 27||
kṛtaṃ viśramaṇaṃ madhye yuvābhyāṃ ca punaḥ punaḥ |
tathā viśramaṇaṃ kṛtvā yudhye'haṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ ||28|
tiṣṭhatā hi yuvāṃ tāvadbalavaṃtī madotkaṭau |
viśramyāhaṃ kariṣyāmi yuddhaṃ vā nyāyamārgataḥ || 29||
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā vacastasya viśrabdhau dānavottamī |
saṃsthitau dūratastatra saṃgrāme kṛtaniścayo || 30||
atidūre ca to dṛṣṭvā vāsudevaścaturbhujaḥ |
dadhyau ca manasā tatra kāraṇaṃ maraṇe tayoḥ ||31||
citanājjñānamutpannaṃ devīdattavarāvubhau |
kāmaṃ vāṃchitamaraṇau na mamlaturatastvimau ||32||
vṛthā mayā kṛtaṃ yuddhaṃ śramo'yaṃ me vṛthā gataḥ |
karomi ca kathaṃ yuddhamevaṃ jñātvā viniścayam || 33 ||
akṛte ca tathā yuddhe kathameto gamiṣyataḥ |
vināśaṃ duḥkhado nityaṃ dānavī varadarpitau 94 ||

bhagavatyā varo dattastayā so'pi ca durghaṭaḥ |
maraṇaṃ cecchayā kāmaṃ duḥkhito'pi na vāṃchati || 35 ||
rogagrasto'pi dīno'pi na mumūrṣati kaścana |
kathaṃ cemau madonmatto martukāmo bhaviṣyataḥ || 36 ||
nanvadya śaraṇaṃ yāmi vidyāṃ śakti sukāmadām |
vinā tayā na siddhyanti kāmāḥ samyakprasannayā ||
evaṃ saṃcityamānastu gagane saṃsthitāṃ śivām |
apaśyadbhagavānviṣṇuryoganidrāṃ manoharām ||38||
kṛtāñjalirameyātmā tāṃ ca tuṣṭāva yogavit |
vināśāra tayostatra varadāṃ bhuvaneśvarīm ||39||
viṣṇuruvāca
namo devi mahāmāye sṛṣṭisaṃhārakāriṇi |
anādinidhane caṃḍi bhuktimuktiprade śive ||40||
na te rūpaṃ vijānāmi saguṇaṃ nirguṇaṃ tathā |
caritrāṇi kuto devi saṃkhyātītāni yāni te || 41 ||
anubhūto mayā te'dya prabhāvaścātidurghaṭaḥ |
yadahaṃ nidrayā līnaḥ saṃjāto'smi vicetanaḥ ||42||
brahmaṇā cātiyatnena bodhito'pi punaḥ punaḥ |
na prabuddhaḥ sarvathā'haṃ saṅkocitaṣaḍidriyaḥ ||43|||
acenatvaṃ samprāptaḥ prabhāvāttava cāmbike |
tvayā muktaḥ prabuddho'haṃ yuddhañca bahudhā kṛtam ||44||
śrāṃto'haṃ na ca tau śrāṃto tvayā dattavarī varī |
brahmāṇaṃ haṃtumāyāto dānavo madagavito ||45 ||
āhūtau ca mayā kāmaṃ dvandvayuddhāya mānade |
kṛtaṃ yuddhaṃ mahāghoraṃ mayā tābhyāṃ mahārṇave ||46 ||
maraṇaṃ varadānaṃ te tato jñātaṃ mahādbhutam |
jñātvāhaṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptastvāmadya śaraṇapradām ||47||
sāhāyyaṃ kuru me mātaḥ khinno'haṃ yuddhakarmaṇā |
dṛptau to varadānena tava devārtināśane ||48 ||
haṃtuṃ māmudyato pāpau kiṃ karomi kva yāmi ca |
ityuktā sā tadā devī smitapūrvamuvāca ha || 49||
praṇamantaṃ jagannāthaṃ vāsudevaṃ sanātanam |
devadeva hare viṣṇo kuru yuddhaṃ punaḥ svayam ||50 ||
vaṃcayitvā tvimau śūro haṃtavyau ca vimohitau |
mohayiṣyāmyahaṃ nūnaṃ dānavī vakrayā dṛśā || 51 ||
jahi nārāyaṇāśu tvaṃ mama māyāvimohitau |
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ viṣṇustasyāḥ prītirasānvitam ||.
saṃgrāmasthalamāsādya tasthau tatra mahārṇave |
tadāyātau ca tau vīrau yuddhakāmau mahābalau ||53||
vīkṣya viṣṇuṃ sthitaṃ tatra harṣayuktau babhūvatuḥ |
tiṣṭha tiṣṭha mahākāya kuru yuddhaṃ caturbhuja || 54 ||
daivādhīnī viditvā'dya nūnaṃ jayaparājayau |
sabalo jayamāpnoti daivājjayati durbalaḥ || 55 ||
sarvathaiva na kartavyo harṣaśoko mahātmanā |
purā vai bahavo daityā jitā dānavavairiṇā || 56 ||
adhunā cānayoḥ sārdhaṃ yudhyamānaḥ parājitaḥ |
sūta uvāca
ityuktvā tau mahābāhū yuddhāya samupasthitī ||57||
vīkṣya viṣṇurjaghānāśu muṣṭinādbhutakarmaṇā |
tāvapyatibalonmatto jaghnaturmuṣṭinā harim ||58||
evaṃ parasparaṃ jātaṃ yuddhaṃ paramadāruṇam |
yudhyamānau mahāvīryo dṛṣṭavā nārāyaṇastadā || 59||

sūta uvāca
apaśyatsammukhaṃ devyāḥ kṛtvā dīnāṃ dṛśaṃ hariḥ |
taṃ vīkṣya tādṛśaṃ viṣṇuṃ viṣṇuṃ karuṇārasasaṃyutam || 60 ||
jahāsātīva tāmrākṣī vīkṣamāṇā tadāsurī |
to jaghāna kaṭākṣaiśca kāmabāṇairivāparaḥ || 61||
mandasmitayutaiḥ kāmaṃ premabhāvayutairanu |
dṛṣṭvā mumuhatuḥ pāpau devyā vaktraṃ vilokayan || 62||
viśeṣamiti manvānau kāmabāṇātipīḍitau |
vīkṣamāṇau sthitau tatra tāṃ devīṃ viśadaprabhām ||
hariṇā'pi ca taddṛṣṭaṃ devyāstatra cikīrṣitam |
mohitau tau parijñāya bhagavānkāryavittamaḥ ||64||
uvāca tau hasan ślakṣṇaṃ meghagambhīrayā girā |
varaṃ varayatāṃ vīro yuvayoryo'bhivāṃchitaḥ || 65||
dadāmi paramaprīto yuddhena yuvayoḥ kila |
dānavā bahavo dṛṣṭā yudhyamānā mayā purā ||66||
yuvayoḥ sadṛśaḥ ko'pi na dṛṣṭo na ca vai śrutaḥ |
tasmāttuṣṭo'smi kāmaṃ vai nistulena balena ca || 67||
bhrātrova vāṃchitaṃ kāmaṃ prayacchāmi mahābalau |
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ viṣṇoḥ sābhimānau smarāturau ||
sūta uvāca
vīkṣamāṇo mahāmāyāṃ jagadānandakāriṇīm |
tamūcatuśca kāmāta viṣṇuṃ kamalalocanau ||69||
hare'nayā ca kāvā vāṃ tvaṃ kiṃ dātumihecchasi |
dadāvatulyaṃ deveśa dātārī nau na yācakau || 70 ||
prārthaya tvaṃ hṛṣīkeśa mano'bhilaṣitaṃ varam |
tuṣṭau svastava yuddhena vāsudevādbhutena ca || 71 ||
tayostadvacanaṃ śrutvā pratyuvāca janārdanaḥ |
bhavetāmadya me tuṣṭau mama vadhyāvubhāvapi || 72 ||
sūta uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ viṣṇordānavau cātivismitau |
vaṃcitāviti manvānau tasthatuḥ śokasaṃyutau || 73 ||
vicārya manasā tau tu dānavī viṣṇumūcatuḥ |
prekṣya sarvaṃ jalamayaṃ bhūmi sthalavivarjitām ||74 ||
hare yo'yaṃ varo dattastvayā pūrva janārdana |
satyavāgasi deveśa dehi taṃ vāṃchitaṃ varam || 75 ||
nirjale vipule deśe hanasva madhusūdana |
vadhyāvāvāṃ tu bhavataḥ satyavāgbhava mādhava || 76 ||
smṛtvā cakraṃ tadā viṣṇustāvuvāca hasanhariḥ |
hanmyadya vāṃ mahābhāgī nirjale vipule sthale || 77 ||
ityuktvā devadeveśa ūrū kṛtvā'tivistarau |
darśayāmāsa tau tatra nirjalaṃ ca jalopari ||78 ||
nāstya dānavī vāri śirasī muñcatāmiha |
satyavāgahamadyaiva bhaviṣyāmi ca vāṃ tathā || 79 ||
tadākarṇya vacastathyaṃ vicitya manasā ca tau |
vardhayāmāsaturdehaṃ yojanānāṃ sahasrakam ||80||
bhagavādviguṇaṃ cakre jaghanaṃ vismitau tadā |
śīrṣe sandadhatāṃ tatra jaghane paramādbhute || 1 ||
rathāṃgena tadā chinne viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā |
jaghanopari vegena prakṛṣṭe śirasī tayoḥ || 82 ||
gataprāṇī tadā jāto dānavo madhukaiṭabhī |
sāgaraḥ sakalo vyāptastadā vai medasā tayoḥ || 83 ||

medinīti tato jātaṃ nāma pṛthvyāḥ samaṃtataḥ |
abhakṣyā mṛttikā tena kāraṇena munīśvarāḥ || 84 |
iti vaḥ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ yatpṛṣṭo'smi suniścitam |
mahāvidyā mahāmāyā sevanīyā sadā budhaiḥ || 85 ||
ārādhyā paramā śaktiḥ sarvairapi surāsuraiḥ |
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiṃcidadhikaṃ bhuvanatraye || 86 ||
satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ satyaṃ vedaśāstrārthanirṇayaḥ |
pūjanīyā parā śaktinirguṇā saguṇā'thavā ||87 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskaṃdhe navamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 ||
atha daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
sūta pūrva tvayā proktaṃ vyāsenāmitatejasā |
kṛtvā purāṇamakhilaṃ śukāyādhyāpitaṃ śubham || 1 ||
vyāsena tu tapastaptvā kathamutpāditaḥ śukaḥ |
vistaraṃ brūhi sakalaṃ yacchutaṃ kṛṣṇatastvayā || 2 ||
sūta uvāca
pravakṣyāmi śukotpatti vyāsātsatyavatīsutāt |
mathotpannaḥ śukaḥ sākṣādyogināṃ pravaro muniḥ ||3||
meruśṛṃge mahāramye vyāsa: satyavatīsutaḥ |
tapaścacāra soḍatyugraṃ putrārthaṃ kṛtaniścayaḥ || 4 ||
japannekākṣaraṃ maṃtraṃ vāgbījaṃ nāradācchrutam |
dhyāyanparāṃ mahāmāyāṃ putrakāmastaponidhiḥ ||5||
agnerbhūmestathā vāyoraṃtarikṣasya cāpyayam |
voryeṇa saṃmitaḥ putro mama bhūyāditi sma ha || 6 ||
atiṣṭhatsa gatāhāraḥ śatasaṃvatsaraṃ prabhuḥ |
ārādhayanmahādevaṃ tathaiva ca sadāśivam ||7||
śaktiḥ sarvatra pūjyeti vicārya ca punaḥ punaḥ |
aśakto nidyate loke śaktastu paripūjyate ||8||
yatra parvataśrṛṃge vaikarṇikāravanādbhute |
krīḍaṃti devatāḥ sarve munayaśca tapo'dhikāḥ || 9 ||
ādityā vasavo rudrā marutaśvāśvinau tathā |
vasaṃti munayo yatra ye cānye brahmavittamāḥ || 10 |
tatra hemagireḥ śṛṃge saṃgītadhvaninādite |
tapaścacāra dharmātmā vyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ || 11 ||
tato'sya tejasā vyāptaṃ viśvaṃ sarva carācaram |
agnivarṇā jaṭā jātā pārāśaryasya dhīmataḥ || 12||
tato'sya teja ālakṣya bhayamāpa śacīpatiḥ |
turāsāhaṃ tadā dṛṣṭvā bhayatrastaṃ śramāturam || 13 ||
uvāca bhagavān rudro maghavaṃtaṃ tathāsthitam |
kathamiṃdrādya bhīto'si kiṃ duḥkhaṃ te sureśvara || 14 |
śaṃkara uvāca
amarṣo naiva kartavyastāpaseṣu kadācana |
tapaścaraṃti munayo jñātvā māṃ śaktisaṃyutam ||15||
na tvete'hitamicchati tāpasāḥ sarvathaiva hi |
ityuktavacanaḥ śakrastamuvāca vṛpadhvajam || 16 ||
kasmāttapasyati vyāsaḥ ko'rthastasya manogataḥ |
śiva uvāca
pārāśaryastu putrārthī tapaścarati duścaram ||17||

pūrṇavarṣaśataṃ jātaṃ dadāmyadya sutaṃ śubham |
mṛtyuktvā vāsava rudro dayāninaḥ ||18||
sūta uvāca
gatvā ṛṣisamīpaṃ tu tamuvāca jagadguruḥ |
uttiṣṭha vāsavīputra putraste bhavitā śubhaḥ || 19||
sarvatejomayo jñānī kīrtikartā tavānaghaḥ |
akhilasya janasyātra vallabhaste sutaḥ sadā ||20||
bhaviṣyati guṇaḥ pūrṇaḥ sāttvikaiḥ satyavikramaḥ |
tadākarṇya vacaḥ ślakṣṇaṃ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanastadā ||21||
sūta uvāca
śūlapāṇiṃ namaskṛtya jagāmāśramamātmanaḥ |
sa gatvā''śramamevāśu bahuvarṣaśramāturaḥ ||22||
araṇīsahitaṃ guhyaṃ mamathāgni cikīrṣayā |
maṃthanaṃ kurvatastasya citte ciṃtābharastadā ||23||
prādurbabhūva sahasā sutotpattau mahātmanaḥ |
maṃthānāraṇisaṃyogānmaṃthanācca samudbhavaḥ ||24||
pāvakasya yathā tadvatkathaṃ me syātsukhodbhavaḥ |
putrāraṇistu vyākhyātā sā mamādya na vidyate ||25||
taruṇī rūpasampannā kulotpannā pativratā |
kathaṃ karomi kāṃtāṃ ca pādayoḥ śrṛṃkhalāsamām ||26||
putrotpādanadakṣāṃ ca pātivratye sadā sthitām |
pativratā'pi dakṣā'pi rūpavatyapi kāminī ||27||
sadā baṃdhanarūpā ca svecchāsukhavidhāyanī |
śivo'pi parvate nityaṃ kāminīpāśasaṃyutaḥ ||28||
kathaṃ karomyahaṃ cātra durghaṭaṃ ca gṛhāśramam |
evaṃ citayatastasya ghṛtācī divyarūpiṇī ||29||
prāptā dṛṣṭipathaṃ tatra samīpe gagane sthitā |
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā cañcalāpāṃgīṃ samīpasthāṃ varāpsarām ||30||
pañcavāṇaparītāṃgastūrṇamāsīddhṛtavrataḥ |
ciṃtayāmāsa ca tadā kiṃ karomyadya saṃkaṭe ||31||
dharmasya purataḥ prāpte 'kāmabhāve durāsade |
aṅgīkaromi yadyenāṃ vaṃcanārthamihāgatām || 32||
hasiṣyati mahātmānastāpasā māṃ tu vihvalam |
tapastaptvā mahāghoraṃ pūrṇavarṣaśataṃ tviha ||33||
dṛṣṭvā'psarāṃ ca vivaśa: kathaṃ jāto mahātapāḥ |
kāmaṃ niṃdāpi bhavatu yadi syādatulaṃ sukham ||34||
gṛhasthāśramasaṃbhūtaṃ sukhadaṃ putrakāmadam |
svargadaṃ ca tathā proktaṃ jñānināṃ mokṣadaṃ tathā ||35||
na bhaviṣyati tannūnamanayā devakanyayā |
nāradācca mayā pūrvaṃ śrutamasti kathānakam ||
yathorvaśīvaśo rājā parābhūtaḥ purūravāḥ || 36||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathama skandhe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ || 11||
atha ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
ko'sau purūravā rājā korvaśī devakanyakā |
kathaṃ kaṣṭaṃ ca saṃprāptaṃ tena rājñā mahātmanā || 1||
sarvaṃ kathānakaṃ brūhi lomaharṣaṇajādhunā |
śrotukāmā vayaṃ sarve tvanmukhābjacyutaṃ rasam ||2||
amṛtādapi miṣṭā te vāṇī sūta rasātmikā |
na tṛpyāmo vayaṃ sarve sudhayā ca yathā'marāḥ ||3||

sūta uvāca
munayaḥ sarve kathāṃ divyāṃ manoramām |
vakṣyāmyahaṃ yathābuddhayā śrutāṃ vyāsavarottamāt 4||
gurostu dayitā bhāryā tārā nāmeti viśrutā |
rūpayauvanayuktā sā cārvaṃgī madavihvalā ||5||
gartekadā vidhorghāma yajamā nasya bhāminī |
dṛṣṭā ca śaśinā'tyarthaṃ rūpayauvanaśālinī || 6 ||
kāmāturastadā jātaḥ śaśī śaśimukhīṃ prati |
sā'pi vīkṣya vidhuṃ kāmaṃ jātā madanapīḍitā || 7 ||
tājyā premayuktau smarārtī ca babhūvatuḥ |
tārāśaśī madonmattī kāmavāṇaprapīḍitā ||8||
deto to parasparaspṛhāndito |
dināni katicittatra jātāni ramamāṇayoḥ || 9 ||
bṛhatpati duḥkhārtastārāmānayituṃ gṛham |
preṣayāmāsa śiṣyaṃ tu nāyātā sā vaśīkṛtā 10 ||
yaṃdā śiṣyaṃ parāvartata candramāḥ |
bṛhaspatistadā kruddho jagāma svayameva hi ||11||
gatvā sonagṛhaṃ tatra vācaspatirudāradhīḥ |
uvāca śaśinaṃ kruddhaḥ smayamānaṃ madānvitam ||12|| puna:
kiṃ kṛtaṃ dilīaist karma dharmavigarhitam |
rakṣitā mama bhāryeyaṃ sundarī kena hetunā || 13 ||
tava deva guruśvāhaṃ yajamāno'si sarvathā |
gurubhāryā kathaṃ mūḍha bhuktā kiṃ rakṣitā'thavā || 14 ||
brahmahā hemahārī ca surāpo gurutalpagaḥ |
mahāpātakino hyete tatsaṃsargī ca pañcamaḥ || 15 ||
mahāpātakayuktastvaṃ durācāro'tigarhitaḥ |
na devasadanārho'si yadi bhukteyamaṅganā || 16 ||
muñcemāmasitāpāṅgoṃ nayāmi sadanaṃ mama |
nocedvakṣyāmi duṣṭātman gurudārāpahāriṇam ||17||
ityevaṃ bhāṣamāṇaṃ tamuvāca rohiṇīpatiḥ |
guruṃ krodhasamāyuktaṃ kāntāvirahaduḥkhitam || 18 ||
induruvāca
krodhātte tu durārādhyā brāhmaṇāḥ krodhavarjitāḥ |
pūjārhā dharmaśāstrajñā varjanīyāstato'nyathā ||19|
āgamiṣyati sā kāmaṃ gṛhaṃ te varavarṇinī |
atraiva saṃsthitā bālā kā te hānirihānagha ||20||
icchayā saṃsthitā cātra sukhakāmārthinī hi sā |
dināni katicitsthitvā svecchayā cāgamiṣyati ||21||
tvayaivodāhṛtaṃ pūrvaṃ dharmaśāstramataṃ tathā |
na strī duṣyati cāreṇa na vipro vedakarmaṇā ||22||
ityuktaḥ śaśinā tatra gururatyantaduḥkhitaḥ |
jagāma svagṛhaṃ tūrṇaṃ cintāviṣṭaḥ smarāturaḥ ||23||
dināni katicittatra sthitvā cintāturo guruḥ |
yathāvatha gṛhaṃ tasya tvari cauṣadhīpateḥ ||24||
sthitaḥ kṣatrā niṣiddho'sau dvāradeśe ruṣā'nvitaḥ |
nājagāma śaśī tatra cukopāti bṛhaspatiḥ ||25||
ayaṃ me śiṣyatāṃ yāto gurupatnīṃ tu mātaram |
jagrāha balato'dharmī śikṣaṇīyo mayā'dhunā || 26||
uvāca vācaṃ kopāttu dvāradeśasthito bahiḥ |
kiṃ śeṣe bhavane maṃda pāpācāra surādhama || 27||
dehi me kāminīṃ śīghraṃ nocecchāpaṃ dadāmyaham |
karomi bhasmasānnūnaṃ na dadāsi priyāṃ mama ||28||

sūta uvāca
krūrāṇi caivamādīni bhāṣaṇāni bṛhaspateḥ |
śrutvā dvijapatiḥ śīghraṃ nirgataḥ sadanādvahiḥ 29 ||
tamuvāca hasansomaḥ kimidaṃ bahu bhāṣate |
na te yogyā'sitāpāṃgī sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutā ||30||
kurūpāṃ ca svasadṛśīṃ gṛhāṇānyāṃ striyaṃ dvija |
bhikṣukasya gṛhe yogyā nedṛśī varavarṇinī || 31 ||
ratiḥ svasadṛśe kāṃte nāryāḥ kila nigadyate |
tvaṃ na jānāsi maṃdātmankāmaśāstravinirṇayam ||
yatheṣṭaṃ gaccha durbuddhe nāhaṃ dāsyāmi kāminīm |
yacchakyaṃ kuru tatkāmaṃ na deyā varavarṇinī 33 ||
kāmārtasya ca te śāpo na māṃ bādhitumarhati |
nāhaṃ dade guro kāṃtāṃ yathecchasi tathā kuru 34||
sūta uvāca
ityuktaḥ śaśinā cejyaścitāmāpa ruṣānvitaḥ |
jagāma tarasā sadma krodhayuktaḥ śacīpateḥ ||35||
dṛṣṭvā śatakratustatra guruṃ duḥkhāturaṃ sthitam |
pādyārthyācamanīyādyaiḥ pūjayitvā susaṃsthitaḥ 36 ||
papraccha paramodārastaṃ tathāvasthitaṃ gurum |
kā ciṃtā te mahābhāga śokārto'si mahāmune ||
kenāpamānito'si tvaṃ mama rājye guruśca me |
tvadadhīnamidaṃ sarvaṃ sainyaṃ lokādhipaiḥ saha ||38||
brahmā viṣṇustathā śaṃbhurye cānye devasattamāḥ |
kariṣyati ca sāhāyyaṃ kā ciṃtā vada sāṃpratam ||
gururuvāca
śaśinā'pahṛtā bhāryā tārā mama sulocanā |
na dadāti sa duṣṭātmā prārthito'pi punaḥ punaḥ 40 ||
kiṃ karomi sureśāna tvameva śaraṇaṃ mama |
sāhāyyaṃ kuru deveśa duḥkhitosmi śatakrato || 41||
iṃdra uvāca
mā śokaṃ kṛru dharmajña dāso'smi tava suvrata |
ānayipyāmyahaṃ nūnaṃ bhāryāṃ tava mahāmate || 42||
preṣite cenmayā dūte na dāsyati madākula: |
tato yuddhaṃ kariṣyāmi devasainyaiḥ samāvṛtaḥ ||43|
ityāśvāsya guruṃ śakro dūtaṃ vaktṛvicakṣaṇam |
prepayāmāsa somāya vātaśiṃsinamadbhutam ||44||
sa gatvā śaśilokaṃ tu tvaritaḥ suvicakṣaṇaḥ |
uvāca vacanenaiva vacanaṃ rohiṇīpatim ||45 ||
preṣito'haṃ mahābhāga śakreṇa tvāṃ vivakṣayā |
kathitaṃ prabhuṇā yacca tadbravīmi mahāmate ||46 ||
dharmajño'si mahābhāga nīti jānāsi suvrata |
atriḥ pitā taṃ dharmātman na nidyaṃ kartumarhasi ||
bhāryā rakṣyā sarvabhūtairyathāśakti hyataṃdritaiḥ |
tadarthe kalahaḥ kāmaṃ bhavitā nātra saṃśayaḥ || 48 ||
yathā tava tathā tasya yatnaḥ syāddārarakṣaṇe |
ātmavatsarvabhūtāni citaya tvaṃ sudhānidhe ||49 ||
aṣṭāviṃśati saṃkhyāste kāminyo dakṣajāḥ śubhāḥ |
gurupatnī kathaṃ bhoktuṃ tvamicchasi sudhānidhe ||
svarge sadā vasaṃtyetā menakādyā manoramāḥ |
bhaṃkṣva tāḥ svecchayā kāmaṃ maṃca patnī gurorapi ||
īśvarā yadi kurvanti jugupsitamahaṃtayā |
ajñāstadanuvartante tadā dharmakṣayo bhavet || 52 ||

tasmānmuṃca mahābhāga guroḥ patnīṃ manoramām |
kalahastvannimitto'dya surāṇāṃ na bhavedyathā || 53 ||
sūta uvāca
somaḥ śakravacaḥ śrutvā kiṃcitkrodhasamākulaḥ |
bhaṃgyā prativacaḥ prāha śakradūtaṃ tadā śaśī || 54 ||
iṃduruvāca
dharmajño'si mahābāho devānāmadhipaḥ svayam |
purodhāpi ca te tādṛgyuvayoḥ sadṛśī matiḥ || 55 ||
paropadeśe kuśalā bhavaṃti bahavo janāḥ |
durlabhastu svayaṃ kartā prāpte karmaṇi sarvathā || 56 ||
bārhaspatyapraṇītaṃ ca śāstraṃ gṛhṇanti mānavāḥ |
ko virodho'tra deveśa kāmayānāṃ bhajastriyam ||
svakīyaṃ balināṃ sarva durbalānāṃ na kiṃcana |
svīyā ca parakīyā ca bhramo'yaṃ maṃdacetasām 58 ||
tārā mayyanuraktā ca yathā na tu tathā gurau |
anuraktā kathaṃ tyājyā dharmato nyāyatastathā 59 ||
gṛhāraṃbhastu raktāyāṃ viraktāyāṃ kathaṃ bhavet |
virakteyaṃ yadā jātā cakame'nujakāminīm 60||
na dāsye'haṃ varārohāṃ gaccha dūta vada svayam |
īśvaro'pi sahasrākṣa yadicchasi kuruṣva tat || 61 ||
sūta uvāca
ityuktaḥ śaśinā dūtaḥ prayayau śakrasannidhim |
iṃdrāyācaṣṭa tatsarvaṃ yaduktaṃ śītaraśminā || 62 ||
turāṣāḍapi tacchrutvā krodhayukto babhūva ha |
senodyogaṃ tathā cakre sāhāyyārthaṃ gurorvibhuḥ ||63 || .
śukrastu vigrahaṃ śrutvā gurudveṣāttato yayau |
mā dadasveti taṃ vākyamuvāca śaśinaṃ prati ||64 ||
sāhāyyaṃ te kariṣyāmi maṃtraśaktyā mahāmate |
bhavitā yadi saṃgrāmastava ceṃdreṇa māriṣa || 65 ||
śaṃkarastu tadākarṇya gurudārābhimarśanam |
guruśatruṃ bhṛguṃ matvā sāhāyyamakarottadā ||66||
saṃgrāmastu tadā vṛtto devadānavayordrutam |
bahūni tatra varṣāṇi tārakāsuravatkila || 67 ||
debāsurakṛtaṃ yuddhaṃ dṛṣṭvā tatra pitāmahaḥ |
haṃsārūḍho jagāmāśu pitāmahaḥ |
haṃsārūḍho jagāmāśu taṃ deśaṃ kleśaśāṃtaye ||68||
rākāpati tadā prāha maṃca bhāryāṃ guroriti |
nocedviṣṇuṃ samāhūya kariṣyāmi tu saṃkṣayam || 69 ||
bhṛguṃ nivārayāmāsa brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ |
kimanyāyamatirjātā saṃgadoṣānmahāmate || 70 ||
niṣedhayāmāsa tato bhṛgustaṃ cauṣadhīpatim |
maṃca bhāryāṃ guroradya pitrā'haṃ prepitastava || 71 ||
sūta uvāca
dvijarājastu tacchrutvā bhṛgorvacanamadbhutam |
dadau ca tatpriyāṃ bhāryāṃ gurorgarbhavatīṃ śubhām || 72 ||
prāpya kāṃtāṃ gururhṛṣṭaḥ svagṛhaṃ mudito yayau |
tato devāstato daityā yayuḥ svānsvāngṛhānprati 73 ||
brahmā svasadanaṃ prāptaḥ kailāsaṃ cāpi śaṅkaraḥ |
bṛhaspatistu saṃtuṣṭaḥ prāpya bhāryāṃ manoramām || 74||
tataḥ kālena kiyatā tārā'sūta sutaṃ śubham |
sudine śubhanakṣatre tārāpatisamaṃ guṇaiḥ || 75 ||
dṛṣṭvā putraṃ gururjātaṃ cakāra vidhipūrvakam |
jātakarmādikaṃ sarvaṃ prahṛṣṭenāṃtarātmanā || 76 ||

śrutaṃ caṃdramasā janma putrasya munisattamāḥ |
dūtaṃ ca preṣayāmāsa guruṃ prati mahāmatiḥ || 77 ||
na cāyaṃ tava putro'sti mana vīryasamudbhavaḥ |
kathaṃ tvaṃ kṛtavānkāmaṃ jātakarmādikaṃ vidhim ||78||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya dūtasya ca bṛhaspatiḥ |
uvāca mama putro me sadṛśo nātra saṃśayaḥ || 79 ||
punarvivādaḥ saṃjāto militā devadānavāḥ |
yuddhārthamāgatāsteṣāṃ samājaḥ samajāyata ||80 ||
tatrāgataḥ svayaṃ brahmā śāṃtikāmaḥ prajāpatiḥ |
nivārayāmāsa mukhe saṃsthitān yuddhadurmadān ||81||
tārāṃ papraccha dharmātmā kasyāyaṃ tanayaḥ śubhe |
satyaṃ dada varārohe yathā kleśaḥ praśāmyati || 82 ||
tamuvācāsitāpāṅgī lajjamānā'pyadhomukhī |
candrasyeti śanairantarjagāma varavarṇinī || 83 ||
jagrāha taṃ sutaṃ somaḥ prahṛṣṭenāṃtarātmanā |
nāma cakre budha iti jagāma svagṛhaṃ punaḥ || 84||
yayau brahmā svakaṃ dhāma sarve devāḥ savāsavāḥ |
yathāgataṃ gataṃ sarvaiḥ sarvaśaḥ prekṣakairjanaiḥ ||85 ||
kathiteyaṃ budhotpattirgurukṣetre va somataḥ |
yathā śrutā mayā pūrvaṃ vyāsātsatyavatīsutāt ||86||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate prathamaskandhe budhotpattirnāmaikādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 11 ||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
tataḥ purūravā jajñe ilāyāṃ kathayāmi vaḥ |
budhaputro'tidharmātmā yajñakṛddānatatparaḥ || 1 ||
sudyumno nāma bhūpālaḥ satyavādī jitendriyaḥ |
saiṃdhavaṃ hayamāruhya cacāra mṛgayāṃ vane || 2 ||
katipayāmātyai darśitaścārukuṃḍala: |
dhanurājagavaṃ baddhvā bāṇasaṃghaṃ tathādbhutam || 3 ||
yutaḥ saṃ bhramaṃstadvanoddeśe hanyamāno rurūnmṛgān |
śaśāṃśva sūkarāṃcaiva khaḍgāṃśca gavayāṃstathā || 4 ||
bhānmahiṣāṃścaiva sāmbharānvanakukkuṭān |
nighnanmedhyānpaśūtrājā kumāravanamāviśat || 5 ||
meroradhastale divyaṃ maṃdāradrumarājitam |
aśokalatikākīrṇaṃ 1 |
bakulairadhivāsitam || 6 || ||
sārlastālaistamālaiśca caṃpakaiḥ panasaistathā |
āmranapairmadhūśva mādhavīmaṇḍapāvṛtam || 7 ||
dāḍimairnārikelaiśca kadalīkhaṃḍamaṇḍitam |
yūthikāmālatīkuṃdapuṣpavallīsamāvṛtam || 8 ||
haṃsakāraṃḍavākīrṇaṃ kīcakadhvanināditam |
bhramarālirutārāmaṃ vanaṃ sarva sukhāvaham || 9 ||
dṛṣṭvā pramudito rājā sudyumnaḥ sevakairvṛtaḥ |
vṛkṣānsupuṣpitānvīkṣya kokilārāvamaṃḍitān 10 ||
praviṣṭastatra rājarṣiḥ strītvamāpa kṣaṇāttataḥ |
aśvo'pi vaḍhavā jātaścitāviṣṭaḥ sa bhūpatiḥ || 11 ||
kimetaditi citārtaścityamānaḥ punaḥ punaḥ |
duḥkhaṃ bahutaraṃ prāptaḥ sudyumno lajjayānvitaḥ || 12||
kiṃ karomi kathaṃ yāmi gṛhaṃ strībhāvasaṃyutaḥ |
kathaṃ rājyaṃ kariṣyāmi kena vā vaṃcito hyaham || 13 ||
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
sūtāścaryamidaṃ proktaṃ tvayā yallomaharṣaṇa |
sudyumnaḥ strītvamāpanno bhūpatirdevasannibhaḥ || 14 ||

kiṃ tatkāraṇamācakṣva vane tatra manohare |
kiṃ kṛtaṃ tena rājñā ca vistaraṃ vada suvrata ||15||
sūta uvāca
ekadā giriśaṃ draṣṭumṛṣayaḥ sanakādayaḥ diśo vitimirābhāsāḥ kurvantaḥ samupāgaman ||
tasmiśca samaye tatra śaṅkaraḥ pramadāyutaḥ |
krīḍāsaktā mahādevī vivastra kāminī śivā ||
utsaṃge saṃsthitā bhartṛ ramamāṇā manoramā |
tānvilokyāṃbikā devī vivastrā vrīḍitā bhṛśam ||
bharturaṅkātsamutthāya vastramādāya paryadhāt |
lajjāviṣṭā sthitā tatra vepamānātimāninī || 19 ||
ṛṣayo'pi tayorvīkṣya prasaṃgaṃ ramamāṇayoḥ |
parivṛtya yayustūrṇaṃ naranārāyaṇāśramam ||20||
hīyutāṃ kāminīṃ vīkṣya provāca bhagavān haraḥ |
kathaṃ lajjāturāsi tvaṃ sukhaṃ te prakaromyaham ||21||
adyaprabhṛti yo mohātpumānko'pi varānane |
vanaṃ ca praviśedetatsa vai yoṣidbhaviṣyati || 22 ||
iti śaptaṃ vanaṃ tena ye jānaṃti janāḥ kvacit |
varjayaṃtīha te kāmaṃ vanaṃ doṣasamṛddhimat ||23||
sudyumnastu tadajñānātpraviṣṭaḥ sacivaiḥ saha |
tathaiva strītvamāpannastaiḥ saheti na saṃśayaḥ ||24||
citāviṣṭaḥ sa rājarṣirna jagāma guhaṃ hiyā |
vicacāra bahistasmādvanadeśāditastataḥ || 25 ||
ileti nāma saṃprāptaṃ strītve tena mahātmanā |
vicaraṃstatra saṃprāpto budhaḥ somasuto yuvā ||26||
strībhiḥ parivṛtāṃ tāṃ tu dṛṣṭvā kāṃtāṃ manoramām |
hāvabhāvakalāyuktāṃ cakame bhagavān budhaḥ ||27|
sā'pi taṃ cakamekāṃtaṃ budhaṃ somasutaṃ patim |
saṃyogastatra saṃjātastayoḥ premṇā parasparam ||28|||
sa tasyāṃ janayāmāsa purūravasamātmajam ||29||
sāiprasūtasutaṃ bālā citāviṣṭā vane sthitā |
sasmāra svakulācārya vasiṣṭhaṃ munisattamam ||30||
sa tadā'sya daśāṃ dṛṣṭvā sudyumnasya kṛpānvitaḥ |
atoṣayanmahādevaṃ śaṃkaraṃ lokaśaṃkaram ||31||
tasmai sa bhagavāṃstuṣṭaḥ pradadau vāṃchitaṃ varam |
vasiṣṭhaḥ prārthayāmāsa puṃstvaṃ rājñaḥ priyasya ca || 32||
śaṅkarastu nijāṃ vācamṛtāṃ kurvannuvāca ha |
māsaṃ pumāṃstu bhavitā māsaṃ strī bhūpatiḥ kila 33 ||
itthaṃ prāpya varaṃ rājā jagāma svagṛhaṃ punaḥ |
cakre rājyaṃ sa dharmātmā vasiṣṭhasyāpyanugrahāt || 34 ||
strītve tiṣṭhati harmyeṣu puṃstve rājyaṃ praśāsti ca |
prajāstasminsamudvignā nābhyanandanmahīpatim || 35||
kāle tu yauvanaṃ prāptaḥ putraḥ purūravāstadā |
pratiṣṭhāṃ nṛpatistasmai dattvā rājyaṃ vanaṃ yayau || 36 ||
gatvā tasminvane ramye nānādrumasamākule |
nāradānmaṃtra māsādya navākṣaramanuttamam ||37||
jajāpa maṃtramatyarthaṃ premapūritamānasa: |
parituṣṭā tadā devī saguṇā tāriṇī śivā || 38||
siṃhārūḍhā sthitā cāgre divyarūpā manoramā |
bāruṇīpānasaṃmattā madāghūrṇitalocanā || 39 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ divyarūpāṃ ca premākulitalocanaḥ |
praṇamya śirasā prītyā tuṣṭāva jagadambikām ||40||

ilovāca
divyaṃ ca te bhagavati prathitaṃ svarūpaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ mayā sakalalokahitānurūpam |
vaṃde tvadaṃghrikamalaṃ surasaṃghasevyaṃ kāmapradaṃ janani cāpi vimuktidaṃ ca || 41 ||
ko vetti te'mba bhuvi martyatanunikāmaṃ muhyaṃti yatra munayaśca surāśca sarve |
aiśvaryametadakhilaṃ kṛpaṇe dayāṃ ca dṛṣṭuṃva devi sakalaṃ kila vismayo me ||42 ||
śaṃbhurhariḥ kamalajo maghavā raviśva vitteśavahnivaruṇāḥ pavanaśca somaḥ |
jānaṃti naiva vasavo'pi hi te prabhāvaṃ budhyetkathaṃ tava guṇānaguṇo manuṣyaḥ || 43 ||
jānāti viṣṇuramitadyutiramba sākṣāttvāṃ sāttvikīmudadhijāṃ sakalārthadāṃ ca |
ko rājasī hara umā kila tāmasīṃ tvāṃ vedāṃbike na tu punaḥ khalu nirguṇāṃ tvām ||44 ||
kvāhaṃ sumaṃdamatirapratimaprabhāvaḥ vavāyaṃ tavātinipuṇo mayi suprasādaḥ |
jāne bhavāni caritaṃ karuṇāsameta yatsevakāṃśca dayase tvayi bhāvayuktān || 45 ||
vṛttastvayā harirasau vanajeśayāpi naivācaratyapi mudaṃ madhusūdanaśca |
pādau tatrādipuruṣaḥ kila pāvakena kṛtvā karoti ca kareṇa śubhau pavitrī ||46 ||
vāṃchatyaho hariraśoka ivātikāmaṃ pādāhati pramuditaḥ puruṣaḥ purāṇaḥ |
tāṃ tvaṃ karoṣi rupitā praṇataṃ ca pāde dṛṣṭvā pati sakaladevanutaṃ smarārtam ||47||
vakṣaḥsthale vasasi devi sadaiva tasya paryaṃka vatsucarite tasya paryaṃkavatsucarite vipule'tiśāṃte |
saudāmanīva sughane suvibhūṣite ca kiṃ te na vāhanamasau jagadīśvaro'pi || 48 ||
tvaṃ cejjahāsi madhusūdanamaṃba kopānnavārcito'pi sa bhavetkila śaktihīnaḥ |
pratyakṣameva puruṣaṃ svajanāstyajaṃti śāntaṃ śriyojjhitamatīvaguṇaiviyuktam ||49 ||
brahmādayaḥ suragaṇā na tu ki yuvatyāṃ ye tvatpadāmbujamaharniśamāśrayanti |
manye tvayaiva vihitāḥ khalu te pumāṃsaḥ kiṃ varṇayāmi tatra śaktimanantavīrye ||50||
tvaṃ nāpumānna ca pumāniti me vikalpo yā kā'si devi saguṇā nanu nirguṇā vā |
tāṃ nvā namāmi satataṃ kila bhāvayukto vāṃchāmi bhaktimacalāṃ tvayi mātaraṃ tu || 51 ||
sūta uvāca
iti stutvā mahīpālo jagāma śaraṇaṃ tadā |
parituṣṭā dardā devī tatra sāyujyamātmani || 52 ||
sudyumnastu tataḥ prāpa padaṃ paramakaṃ sthiram |
tasyā devyāḥ prasādena munīnāmapi durlabham ||53||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate prathamaskandhe sudyumnastutirnāma dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12 ||

atha trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
sudyumne tu divaṃ yāte rājyaṃ cakre purūravāḥ |
saguṇaśca surūpaśca prajāraṃjanatatparaḥ || 1||
pratiṣṭhāne pure ramye rājyaṃ sarvanamaskṛtam |
cakāra sarvadharmajñaḥ prajārakṣaṇatatparaḥ ||2||
maṃtra: suguptastasyāsītparatrābhijñatā tathā |
sadaivotsāhaśaktiśca prabhuśaktistathottamā ||3||
sāmadānādayaḥ sarve vaśagāstasya bhūpateḥ |
va rgāśramānsvadharmasthānkurvatrājyaṃ śaśāsa ha || 4 ||
yajñāṃśca vividhāṃścakre sa rājā bahudakṣiṇān |
dānāni ca pavitrāṇi dadāvatha narādhipaḥ || 5 ||
tasya rūpaguṇaudāryaśīla draviṇavikramān |
śrutvorvaśī vaśībhūtā cakame taṃ narādhipam || 6 ||
brahmaśāpābhitaptā sā mānuṣaṃ lokamāsthitā |
guṇinaṃ taṃ nṛpaṃ matvā varayāmāsa māninī || 7 ||
samayaṃ cedṛśaṃ kṛtvā sthitā tatra varāṅganā |
etāvaraṇakau rājanyastī rakṣasva mānada ||8||
ghṛtaṃ me bhakṣaṇaṃ nityaṃ nānyatkicinnṛpāśanam |
nekṣe tvāṃ ca mahārāja nagnamanyatra maithunāt || 9||
bhāṣābaṃdhastvayaṃ rājan yadi bhagno bhaviṣyati |
tadā tyaktvā gamiṣyāmi satyametadbravīmyaham 10 ||
aṅgīkṛtaṃ ca tadrājñā kāminyā bhāṣitaṃ tu yat |
sthitā bhāṣaṇabaṃdhena śāpānugrahakāmyayā || 11 ||
reme tadā sa bhūpālo līno varṣagaṇānbahūn |
dharmakarmādikaṃ tyaktvā corvaśyā madamohitaḥ || 12 ||
ekacittastu saṃjātastanmanasko mahīpatiḥ |
na śaśāka tayā hīnaḥ kṣaṇamapyatimohitaḥ || 13 ||
evaṃ varṣagaṇānte tu svargasthaḥ pākaśāsanaḥ |
urvaśīṃ nāgatāṃ dṛṣṭvā gaṃdharvānāha devarāṭ || 14 ||
urvaśomānayadhvaṃ bho gaṃdharvāḥ sarva eva hi |
hatvoraṇī gṛhāttasya bhūpateḥ samaye kila || 15||
urvaśīrahitaṃ sthānaṃ madīyaṃ nātiśobhate |
yena kenāpyupāyena tāmānayata kāminīm || 16 ||
ityuktāste'tha gaṃdharvā viśvāvasupurogamāḥ |
tato gatvā mahāgāṃḍhe tamasi pratyupasthite || 17 |
jahastāvaraṇau devā ramamāṇaṃ vilokya tam |
cakraṃdatustadā tau tu hriyamāṇau vihāyasā || 18 ||
urvaśī tadupākarṇya kaṃditaṃ sutayoriva |
kupitovāca rājānaṃ samayo'yaṃ kṛto mayā || 19 ||
naṣṭā'haṃ tava viśvāsāddhṛtau caurairmamāraṇau |
rājanputrasamāvetau tvaṃ kiṃ śeṣa striyā samaḥ || 20 ||
hatā'smyahaṃ kunāthena napuṃsā vīramāninā |
uraṇau me gatau cādya sadā prāṇapriya mama ||21||
evaṃ vilapyamānāṃ tāṃ dṛṣṭvā rājā vimohitaḥ |
nagna eva yayau tūrṇaṃ pṛṣṭhataḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ ||22||
vidyutprakāśita tatra gaṃdharvairnṛpaveśmani |
nagnabhūtastayā dṛṣṭo bhūpatirgantukāmayā ||23||
tyaktvoraṇau gatāḥ sarve gaṃdharvāḥ pathi pārthivaḥ |
naṃgno jagrāha tau śrāṃto jagāma svagṛhaṃ prati || 24||
tadorvaśoṃ gatāṃ dṛṣṭvā vilalāpātiduḥkhinaḥ |
nagnaṃ vīkṣya patiṃ nāro gatā sā varavarṇino || 25 |

krandan sa deśadeśeṣu babhrāma nṛpatiḥ svayam |
taccitto vihvalaḥ śocanvivaśa: kāmamohitaḥ 26 ||
bhramanvai satāṃ pṛthvīṃ kurukṣetre dadarśa tām |
dṛṣṭvā saṃhṛṣṭavadanaḥ prāha sūktaṃ nṛpottamaḥ ||27||
aye jāye tiṣṭha tiṣṭha ghore na tyaktumarhasi |
māṃ tvaṃ tvanmanasaṃ kāṃtaṃ vaśagaṃ cāpyanāgasam || 28||
sa deho'yaṃ patatyatra devi dūraṃ hṛtastvayā |
khādaṃtyenaṃ vṛkā: kākāstvayā tyaktaṃ varoru yat 29||
evaṃ vilapamānaṃ taṃ rājānaṃ prāha corvaśī |
duḥkhitaṃ kṛpaṇaṃ śrāṃtaṃ kāmārtaṃ vivaśaṃ bhṛśam ||30||
urvaśyuvāca
mūrkho'si nṛpaśārdūla jñānaṃ kutra gataṃ tava |
kvāpi sakhyaṃ na ca strīṇāṃ bṛkāṇāmiva pārthiva ||31||
na viśvāso hi kartavyaḥ strīṣu caureṣu pārthivaiḥ |
gṛhaṃ gaccha sukhaṃ bhuṃkṣva mā viṣāde manaḥ kṛthāḥ || 32||
ityevaṃ bodhito rājā na vivedātimohitaḥ |
duḥkhaṃ ca paramaṃ prāptaḥ svairiṇīsnehayaṃtritaḥ ||33||
sūta uvāca
iti sarva samākhyātamurvaśīcaritaṃ mahat |
vede vistāritaṃ caitatsaṃkṣepātkathitaṃ mayā ||34||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 13||
atha caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
dṛṣṭvā tāmasitāpāṃgī vyāsaścitāparo'bhavat |
kiṃ karomi na me yogyā devakanyeyamapsarāḥ || 1 ||
evaṃ citayamānaṃ tu dṛṣṭvā vyāsaṃ tadāpsarāḥ |
bhayabhītā hi saṃjātā śāpaṃ māṃ visṛjedayam ||2||
sā kṛtvā'tha śukīrūpaṃ nirgatā bhayavihvalā |
kṛṣṇastu vismayaṃ prāpto vihaṃgī tāṃ vilokayan || 3 ||
kāmastu dehe vyāsasya darśanādeva saṃgataḥ |
mano'tivismitaṃ jātaṃ sarvagātreṣu vismitaḥ || 4 ||
sa tu dhairyeṇa mahatā nigṛhṇanmānasaṃ muniḥ |
na śaśāka niyaṃtuṃ ca sa vyāsaḥ prasṛtaṃ manaḥ || 5 ||
bahuśo gṛhyamāṇaṃ ca ghṛtācyā mohitaṃ manaḥ |
bhāvitvānnaiva vidhṛtaṃ vyāsasyāmitatejasaḥ ||6||
mathanaṃ kurvatastasya muneragnicikīrṣayā |
araṇyāmeva sahasā tasya śukramathāpatat ||7|| .
so'vicitya tathā pātaṃ mamanthāraṇimeva ca |
tasmācchukaḥ samudbhūto sākṛtimanoharaḥ ||8||
vismayaṃ janayanbāla: saṃjātastadaraṇyajaḥ |
yathādhvare samiddho'gnirbhāti havyena dīptimān ||9||
vyāsastu sutamālokya vismayaṃ paramaṃ gataḥ |
kimetaditi saṃcitya varadānācchivasya vai || 10 ||
tejorūpī śuko jāto'pyaraṇīgarbhasaṃbhavaḥ |
dvitīyagnirivātyarthaṃ dīpyamānaḥ svatejasā || 11 ||
vilokayāmāsa tadā vyāsastu muditaṃ sutaṃm |
divyena tejasā yuktaṃ gārhapatyamivāparam ||12||
gaṅgāṃta: snāpayāmāsa samāgatya girestadā |
puṣpavṛṣstui khājjātā śiśorupari tāpasa || 13||

jātakarmādikaṃ cakre vyāsastasya mahātmanaḥ |
devaduṃdubhayo nedurnanṛtuśvāpsarogaṇāḥ || 14 ||
jagurgandharvapatayo muditāste didbhavaḥ |
viśvāvasurnāradaśva taṃburuḥ śukasaṃbhave || 15 ||
tuṣṭuvurmuditāḥ sarve devā vidyādharāstathā |
dṛṣṭvā vyāsasutaṃ divyamaraṇīgarbhasaṃbhavam || 16 ||
aṃtarikṣātpapātorvyāṃ daṃḍa: kṛṣṇājinaṃ śubham |
kamaṃḍalustathā divyaḥ śukrasyārthe dvijottamaḥ ||17||
sadyaḥ sa vabudhe bālo jātamātro'tidīptimān |
tasyopanayanaṃ cakre vyāso vidyāvidhānavit ||18||
utpannamātraṃ taṃ vedāḥ sarahasyāḥ saṃsaṃgrahāḥ |
upatasthurmahātmānaṃ yathā'sya pitaraṃ tathā || 19 ||
yato dṛṣṭaṃ śukīrūpaṃ ghṛtācyāḥ saṃbhave tadā |
śuketi nāma putrasya cakāra munisattamaḥ || 20 |
bṛhaspatimupādhyāyaṃ kṛtvā vyāsasutastadā |
vratāni brahmacaryasya cakāra vidhipūrvakam ||21||
so'dhītya nikhilānvedānsa rahasyānsasaṃgrahān |
dharmaśāstrāṇi sarvāṇi kṛtvā gurukule śukaḥ ||22||
gurave dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā samāvṛtto munistadā |
ājagāma pituḥ pārśva kṛṣṇadvaipāyanasya ca || 23 ||
dṛṣṭvā vyāsaḥ śukaṃ prāptaṃ premṇotthāya sasaṃbhramam |
āliliṃga muhurbhrāṇaṃ mūrdhni tasya cakāra ha ||25||
papraccha kuśalaṃ vyāsastasthau cādhyayanaṃ śuciḥ |
āśvāsya sthāpayāmāsa śukaṃ tatrāśrame śubhe || 25||
dārakarma tato vyāsaḥ śukasya paryacitayat |
kanyāṃ munisunāṃ kāṃtāmapṛcchadativegavān ||26||
śukaṃ prāha sutaṃ vyāso vedo'dhītastvayā'nava |
dharmaśāstrāṇi sarvāṇi kuru bhāryāṃ mahāmate ||27||
gārhasthyaṃ ca samāsādya yaja devānpitanatha |
ṛṇānmocaya māṃ putra prāpya dārānmanoramān ||
aputrasya gatirnāsti svarge naiva ca naiva ca |
tasmātputra mahābhāga kuruṣvādya gṛhāśramam || 29||
kṛtvā gṛhāśramaṃ putra sukhinaṃ kuru māṃ śuka |
āśā me mahatī putra pūrayasva mahāmate || 30 ||
tapastaptvā mahāghoraṃ prāpto'si tvamayonijaḥ |
devarūpī mahāprājña pāhi māṃ pitaraṃ śuka ||31||
sūta uvāca
iti vādinamabhyāśe prāptaḥ prāha śukastadā |
viraktaḥ so'tiraktaṃ taṃ sākṣātpitaramātmanaḥ || 32 ||
śukra uvāca
kiṃ tvaṃ vadasi dharmajña vedavyāsa mahāmate |
tattvena śādhi śiṣyaṃ māṃ tvadājñāṃ karavāṇyalam ||
vyāsa uvāca
tvadarthe yattapastaptaṃ mayā putra śataṃ samāḥ |
prāptastvaṃ cātiduḥkhena śivasyārādhanena ca ||34||
dadāmi tava vittaṃ tu prārthayitvā bhūpatim |
sukhaṃ bhuṃkṣva mahāprājña prāpya yauvanamuttamam || 35 ||
śuka uvāca
kiṃ sukhaṃ mānuṣe loke brūhi tāta 'nirāmayam |
duḥkhaviddhaṃ sukhaṃ prājñā na vadaṃti sukhaṃ kila || 36 ||
striyaṃ kṛtvā mahābhāga bhavāmi tadṛśānugaḥ |
sukhaṃ kiṃ parataṃtrasya svojitasya viśeṣataḥ ||37|

kadācidapi mucyeta loha kāṣṭhādiyantritaḥ |
putradārairnibaddhastu na vimucyeta karhicit ||38||
viṇmūtrasambhavo deho nārīṇāṃ tanmayastathā |
kaḥ prītiṃ tatra viprendra vibudhaḥ kartumicchati ||39||
ayonijo'haṃ viprarṣe yonau me kīdṛśī matiḥ |
na vāṃchāmyahamagre'pi yonāveva samudbhavam ||40||
viṭsukhaṃ kimu vāṃchāmi tyaktvātmasukhamadbhutam |
ātmārāmaśca bhūyo'pi na bhavatyatilolupaḥ || 41 ||
prathamaṃ paṭhitā vedā mayā vistāritāśca te |
hiṃsāmayāste paṭhitāḥ karmamārgapravartakāḥ || 42||
bṛhaspatirguruḥ prāptaḥ so'pi magno gṛhārṇave |
avidyāgrastahṛdayaḥ kathaṃ tārayituṃ kṣamaḥ ||43||
rogagrasto yathā vaidyaḥ pararogacikitsakaḥ |
tathā gururmumukṣorme gṛhastho'yaṃ viḍambanā || 44 ||
kṛtvā praṇāmaṃ gurave tvatsamīpamupāgataḥ |
śrāhi māṃ tattvabodhena bhītaṃ saṃsārasarpataḥ || 45 ||
saṃsāre'sminmahāghore bhramaṇaṃ nabhacatravat |
na ca viśramaṇaṃ kvāpi sūryasyeva divāniśi || 46||
kiṃ sukhaṃ tāta saṃsāre nidhanatvavicāraṇāt |
mūḍhānāṃ sukhabuddhistu viṭsu kīṭasukhaṃ yathā ||47 ||
aghītya vedaśāstrāṇi saṃsāre rāgiṇaśca ye |
tebhyaḥ paro na mūrkho'sti sadharmāśvāśvasūkaraḥ || 48 ||
mānuṣyaṃ durlabhaṃ prāpya vedaśāstrāṇyadhītya ca |
badhyate yadi saṃsāre ko vimucyeta mānavaḥ || 49||
nātaḥ parataraṃ loke kvacidāścaryamadbhutam |
putradāragṛhāsaktaḥ paṇḍitaḥ parigīyate || 50 ||
na bādhyate yaḥ saṃsāre naro māyāguṇaistribhiḥ |
sa vidvānsa ca medhāvī śāstrapāraṃ gato hi saḥ ||
kiṃ vṛthā'dhyayananenātra dṛḍhabaṃdhaka reṇa ca |
paṭhitavyaṃ tadevāśu mocayedbhavabandhanāt || 52 ||
gṛhṇāti puruṣaṃ yasmādgṛhaṃ tena prakīrtitam |
kva sukhaṃ baṃdhanāgāre tena bhīto'smyahaṃ pitaḥ ||53||
yesbudhā mandamatayo vidhinā muṣitāśca ye |
te prāpya mānuṣaṃ janma punarbaṃdhaṃ viśaṃtyuta || 54 ||
vyāsa uvāca
na gṛhaṃ baṃdhanāgāraṃ baṃdhane na ca kāraṇam |
manasā yo vinirmukto gṛhastho'pi vimucyate ||55||
nyāyāgatadhanaḥ kurvanvedoktaṃ vidhivatkramāt |
gṛhastho'pi vimucyeta śrāddha kṛtsatyavākśuciḥ 56 ||
brahmacārī yatiścaiva vānaprastho vratasthitaḥ |
gṛhasthaṃ samupāsante madhyāhnātikrame sadā || 57 ||
śraddhayā cānnadānena vācā sūnṛtayā tathā |
upakurvanti dharmasthā gṛhāśramanivāsinaḥ || 8 ||
gṛhāśramātparo dharmo na dṛṣṭo na ca vai śrutaḥ |
vasiṣṭhādibhirācāryairjñānibhiḥ samupāśritaḥ || 59 ||
kimasādhyaṃ mahābhāga vedoktāni ca kurvataḥ |
svargaṃ mokṣaṃ ca sajjanma yadyadvāṃchati tadbhavet ||60||
bāśramādāśramaṃ gacchediti dharmavido viduḥ |
tasmādagni samādhāya kuru karmāṇyatandritaḥ || 61 ||
devānpitṝnmanuṣyāṃśca santarpya vidhivatsuta |
putramutpādya dharmajña saṃyojya ca gṛhāśrame ||62|| .
tyaktvā gṛhaṃ vanaṃ gatvā kartā'si vratamuttamam |
vānaprasthāśramaṃ kṛtvā saṃnyāsaṃ ca tataḥ param || 63 ||
indriyāṇi mahābhāga mādaka ni suniśritam |
adārasya durantāni paṃcaiva manasā saha || 64 ||

mahāmate |
vārdhake tapa ātiṣṭhediti śāstroditaṃ vacaḥ || 65||
tasmāddārānprakurvīta tajjayāya
viśvāmitro mahābhāgastapaḥ kṛtvā'tiduśvaram |
trīṇi varṣasahasrāṇi nirāhāro jitendriyaḥ || 66 ||
mohitaśca mahātejā vane menakayā sthitaḥ |
śakuntalā samutpannā putrī tadvīryajā śubhā || 67 ||
dṛṣṭvā dāśasutāṃ kālī pitā mama parāśaraḥ |
kāmabāṇāditaḥ kanyāṃ tāṃ jagrāhoḍupe sthitaḥ || 68 ||
brahmā'pi svasutāṃ dṛṣṭvā paṃcabāṇaprapīḍitaḥ |
dhāvamānaṃśca rudreṇa mūrcchitaśva nivāritaḥ || 69 ||
tasmāttvamapi kalyāṇa kuru me vacanaṃ hitam |
kulajāṃ kanyakāṃ vṛtvā vedamārga samāśraya ||70 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 14 ||
atha pañcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīśuka uvāca
nāhaṃ gṛhaṃ kariṣyāmi duḥkhadaṃ sarvathā pitaḥ |
vāgurāsadṛśaṃ nityaṃ baṃdhanaṃ sarvadehinām || 1 ||
dhanacatāturāṇāṃ hi kva sukhaṃ tāta dṛśyate |
svajanaiḥ khalu pīḍayante nirdhanā lolupā janāḥ ||2||
indro'pi na sukhī tādṛgyādṛśo bhikṣunispṛhaḥ |
ko'nyaḥ syādiha saṃsāre trilokīvibhave sati ||3||
tarpataṃ tāpasaṃ dṛṣṭvā maghavā duḥkhito'bhavat |
vighnānbahuvidhānasya karoti ca divaspatiḥ || 4 || +
brahmā'pi sukhī viṣṇurlakṣmīṃ prāpya manoramām |
khedaṃ prāpnoti satataṃ saṃgrāmairasuraiḥ saha ||5|| na |
karoti vipulān yatnāṃstapaścarati duśvaram |
ramāpatirapi śrīmānkasyāsti vipulaṃ sukham ||6||
śaṃkaro'pi sadā duḥkhī bhavatyeva ca vedmayaham |
tapaścaryāṃ prakurvāṇo daityayuddhakaraḥ sadā || 7 |
kadācitra sukhī śete dhanavānapi lolupaḥ |
nirdhanastu kathaṃ tāta sukhaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ ||8||
jānannapi mahābhāga putraṃ vā vīryasaṃbhavam |
niyokṣyasi mahāghore saṃsāre duḥkhade sadā || 9||
janmaduḥkhaṃ jarāduḥkhaṃ duḥkhaṃ ca maraṇe tathā |
garbhavāse punarduḥkhaṃ viṣṭhāmūtramaye pitaḥ || 10 ||
tasmādatiśayaṃ duḥkhaṃ tṛṣṇā lobhasamudbhavam |
yāñcāyāṃ paramaṃ duḥkhaṃ maraṇādapi mānada || 11 |
pratigrahadhanā viprā na buddhibalajīvanāḥ |
parāśā paramaṃ duḥkhaṃ maraṇaṃ ca dine dine || 12 ||
paṭhitvā sakalānvedāñchāstrāṇi ca samaṃtataḥ |
gatvā ca dhanināṃ kāryā stutiḥ sarvātmanā budhaiḥ ||
ekodarasya kā cintā patramūlaphalādibhiḥ |
yena kenāpyupāyena saṃtuṣṭyā ca prapūryate || 14 ||
bhāryā putrāstathā pautrā: kuṭumbe vipule sati |
pūraṇārthaṃ mahadduḥkhaṃ vava sukhaṃ pitaradbhutam ||15||
yogaśāstraṃ vada mama jñānaśāstraṃ sukhākaram |
karmakāṃḍe'khile tāta na rame'haṃ kadācana || 16 |
vada karmakṣayopāyaṃ prārabdhaṃ saṃcitaṃ tathā |
vartamānaṃ yathā naśyettrividhaṃ karma mūlajam || 17 ||
jalaukeva sadā nārī rudhiraṃ pibatīti vai |
mūrkhastu na vijānāti mohito bhāvaceṣṭitaiḥ || 18 |

śrībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 15
bhogairvīryaṃ dhanaṃ pūrṇaṃ manaḥ kuṭilabhāṣaṇaiḥ |
kāṃtā harati sarvasvaṃ kaḥ stenastādṛśo'paraḥ || 19||
nidrāsukhavināśārthaṃ mūrkhastu dārasaṃgraham |
karoti vaṃcito dhātrā duḥkhāya na sukhāya ca ||20||
sūta uvāca
evaṃvidhāni vākyāni śrutvā vyāsaḥ śukasya ca |
saṃprāpa mahatīṃ citāṃ kiṃ karomītyasaṃśayam ||21||
tasya susruvuraśrūṇi locanādaduḥkhajāni ca |
vepathuśca śarīre'bhūdglāniṃ prāpa manastathā || 22 ||
śocaṃtaṃ pitaraṃ dṛṣṭvā dīnaṃ śokapariplutam |
uvāca pitaraṃ vyāsaṃ vismayotphullalocanaḥ ||23||
aho māyābalaṃ cograṃ yanmohayati paṃḍitam |
vedāṃtasya ca kartāraṃ sarvajñaṃ vedasaṃmitam ||24||
na jāne kā ca sā māyā kiṃsvitsā'tīva duṣkarā |
yā mohayati vidvāṃsaṃ vyāsaṃ satyavatīsutam || 25 ||
purāṇānāṃ ca vaktā yo nirmātā bhāratasya ca |
vibhāgakartā vedānāṃ so'pi mohamupāgataḥ || 26||
tāṃ yāmi śaraṇaṃ devīṃ yā mohayati vai jagat |
brahmaviṣṇuharādīṃśca kathā'nyeṣāṃ ca kīdṛśī ||27||
ko'pyasti triṣu lokeṣu yo na muhyati māyayā |
yanmohaṃ gamitāḥ pūrve brahmaviṣṇuharādayaḥ ||28||
aho balamaho vīryaṃ devyā khalu vinirmitam |
māyayaiva vaśaṃ nītaḥ sarvajña īśvaraḥ prabhuḥ ||29||
viṣṇvaṃśasaṃbhavo vyāsa iti paurāṇikā jaguḥ |
so'pi mohārṇave magno bhagnapoto vaṇigyathā || 30||
aśrupātaṃ karotyadya vivaśa: prākṛto yathā |
aho māyābalaṃ caitaddustyajaṃ paṃḍitairapi || 31 ||
ko'yaṃ ko'haṃ kathaṃ ceha kīdṛśo'yaṃ bhramaḥ kila |
paṃcabhūtātmake dehe pitāputreti vāsanā ||32||
baliṣṭhā khalu māyeyaṃ māyināmapi mohinī |
yayā'bhibhūtaḥ kṛṣṇo'pi karoti rodanaṃ dvijaḥ ||33||
tāṃ natvā manasā devīṃ sarvakāraṇakāraṇām |
jananīṃ sarvadevānāṃ brahmādīnāṃ tatheśvarīm ||34||
pitaraṃ prāha dīnaṃ taṃ śokārṇavaprariplutam |
araṇīsaṃbhavo vyāsaṃ hetumadvacana śubham ||35||
śrīśuka uvāca
pārāśarya mahābhāga sarveṣāṃ bodhadaḥ svayam |
kiṃ śokaṃ kuruṣe svāmin yathā'jñaḥ prākṛto naraḥ || 36||
adyāhaṃ tava putro'smi na jāne pūrvajanmani |
ko'haṃ kastvaṃ mahābhāga vibhramo'yaṃ mahātmani ||37||
kuru dhairyaṃ prabudhyasva mā viṣāde manaḥ kṛthāḥ |
mohajālamimaṃ matvā maṃca śokaṃ mahāmate ||38||
kṣughānivṛttirbhakṣyeṇa na putradarśanena ca |
pipāsā jalapānena yāti naivātmajekṣaṇāt || 39||
ghrāṇaṃ sukhaṃ sugaṃdhena karṇajaṃ śravaṇena ca |
strīsukhaṃ tu striyāṃ nūnaṃ putro'haṃ kiṃ karomi te || 40 ||
ajīgartena putro'pi hariścaṃdrāya bhūbhuje |
paśukāmāya yajñārthaṃ datto maulyena sarvathā ||41 ||
sukhānāṃ sādhanaṃ dravyaṃ dhanātsukhasamuccayaḥ |
dhanamarjaya lobhaścetputro'haṃ kiṃ karomyaham ||42 ||
māṃ prabodhaya buddhayā tvaṃ daivajño'si mahāmate |
yathā mucyeyamatyaṃtaṃ garbhavāsabhayānmune ||43||

durlabhaṃ 'mānuṣaṃ janma karmabhūmāvihānagha |
tatrāpi brāhmaṇatvaṃ vai durlabhaṃ cottame kule ||44 ||
maddho'hamiti me buddhirnāpasarpati cittata |
saṃsāravāsanājāle niviṣṭā vṛddhagāminī || 45||
sūta uvāca
ityuktastu tadā vyāsaḥ putreṇāmitabuddhinā |
pratyuvāca śukaṃ śāṃtaṃ caturthāśramamānasam ||46 ||
vyāsa uvāca
paṭha putra mahābhāga mayā bhāgavataṃ kṛtam |
śubhaṃ na cātivistīrṇaṃ purāṇaṃ brahmasaṃmitam ||47 ||
skandhā dvādaśa tatraiva pañcalakṣaṇasaṃyutam |
sarveṣāṃ ca purāṇānāṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ mama saṃmatam ||48||
sadasajjñānavijñānaṃ śrutamātreṇa jāyate |
yena bhāgavateneha tatpaṭha tvaṃ mahāmate || 49||
vaṭapatraśayānāya vive bālarūpiṇe |
kenāsmi bālabhāvena nirmito'haṃ cidātmanā ||50||
kimarthaṃ kena dravyeṇa kathaṃ jānāmi cākhilam |
ityevaṃ cityamānāyaṃ mukuṃdāya mahātmane || 51 ||
ślokārthena tathā proktaṃ bhagavatyā'khilārthadam |
sarvaṃ khalvidamevāhaṃ nānyadasti sanātanam ||52||
tadvaco viṣṇunā pūrva saṃvijñātaṃ manasyapi |
kenoktā vāgiyaṃ satyā citayāmāsa cetasā ||53||
kathaṃ vedmi pravaktāraṃ strīpuṃmī yā napuṃsakam |
iti citāprapannena dhṛtaṃ bhāgavataṃ hṛdi || 54||
punaḥ punaḥ kṛtoccārastasminnevāsta cetasā |
vaṭapatre śayānaḥ sannabhūccintāsamanvitaḥ || 55 ||
tadā śāṃtā bhagavatī prādurāsa caturbhujā |
śaṃkhacakragadāpadma varāyudhadharā śivā ||56 ||
divyāṃbaradharā devī divyabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā |
saṃyutā sadṛśībhiśva sakhībhiḥ svavibhūtibhiḥ || 57||
prādurbabhūva tasyāgre viṣṇoramitatejasaḥ |
maṃdahāsyaṃ prayuānā mahālakṣmīḥ śubhānanā || 58 ||
sūta uvāca
tāṃ tathā saṃsthitāṃ dṛṣṭvā hṛdaye kamalekṣaṇaḥ |
vismitaḥ salile tasminnirādhārāṃ manoramām 59 ||
ratirbhūtistathā buddhirmatiḥ kīrtiḥ smṛtirdhṛtiḥ |
śraddhā meghāsvadhā svāhā kṣudhā nidrā dayā gatiḥ ||
tuṣṭiḥ puṣṭiḥ kṣamā lajjā jṛmbhā taṃdrā ca śaktayaḥ |
saṃsthitāḥ sarvataḥ pārśva mahādevyāḥ pṛthak pṛthak ||
barāyudhadharāḥ sarvā nānābhūṣaṇabhūṣitāḥ |
maṃdāramālākulitā muktāhāravirājitāḥ ||62||
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā tāśca saṃvīkṣya tasminnanekārṇave jale |
vismayāviṣṭahṛdayaḥ saṃbabhūva janārdanaḥ || 63 ||
citayāmāsa sarvātmā dṛṣṭamāyo'tivismitaḥ |
kutobhavāḥ striyaḥ sarvāḥ kuto'haṃ vaṭatalpagaḥ ||64 ||
asminekārṇave ghore nyagrodhaḥ kathamutthitaḥ |
kenāhaṃ sthāpito'smyatra śiśuṃ kṛtvā śubhākṛtim ||
mameyaṃ jananī no vā māyā vā kāpi durghaṭā |
darśanaṃ kenacitvadya dattaṃ vā kena hetunā || 66 ||
kiṃ mayā cātra vaktavyaṃ gaṃtavyaṃ vā na vā kvacit |
maunamāsthāya tiṣṭheyaṃ bālabhāvādataṃdritaḥ || 67 ||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe pañcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 15 ||

atha ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
dṛṣṭavā taṃ vismitaṃ devaṃ śayānaṃ vaṭapatrake |
uvāca sasmitaṃ vākyaṃ viṣṇo kiṃ vismito hyasi || 1 ||
mahāśaktyāḥ prabhāveṇa tvaṃ māṃ vismṛtavānpurā |
prabhave pralaye jāte bhūtvā bhūtvā punaḥ punaḥ ||2||
nirguṇā sā parā śaktiḥ saguṇastvaṃ tathā'pyaham | |
sāttvikī kila yā śaktistāṃ śakti viddhi māmikām ||3||
tvannābhikamalādbrahmā bhaviṣyati prajāpatiḥ |
sa kartā sarvalokasya rajoguṇasamanvitaḥ ||4||
sa tadā tapa āsthāya prāpya śaktimanuttamām |
rajasā raktavarṇañca kariṣyati jagattrayam ||5|
saguṇānpañcabhūtā~śca samutpādya mahāmatiḥ |
indriyāṇīṃdriyeśāṃśca manaḥ pūrvānsamaṃtataḥ ||6||
kariṣyati tataḥ sargaṃ tena kartā sa ucyate |
viśvasyāsya mahābhāga tvaṃ vai pālayitā tathā || 7 ||
taddhruvormadhyadeśācca krodhādudro bhaviṣyati |
tapaḥ kṛtvā mahāghoraṃ prāpya śakti tu tāmasīm 8||
kalpāṃte so'pi saṃhartā bhaviṣyati mahāmate |
tenāhaṃ tvāmupāyātā sāttvikīṃ tvamavehi mām 9||
sthāsye'haṃ tvatsamīpasthā sadā'haṃ madhusūdana |
hṛdaye te kṛtāvāsā bhavāmi satataṃ kila || 10 ||
viṣṇuruvāca
ślokasyārdhaṃ mayā pūrvaṃ śrutaṃ devi sphuṭākṣaram |
tatkenoktaṃ varārohe rahasyaṃ paramaṃ śivam || 11 |
tanme brūhi varārohe saṃśayo'yaṃ varānane |
nirdhano hi yathā dravyaṃ tatsmarāmi punaḥ punaḥ || 12 |
vyāsa uvāca
viṣṇostadvacanaṃ śrutvā mahālakṣmīḥ smitānanā |
uvāca parayā prītyā vacanaṃ cāruhāsinī || 13 ||
mahālakṣmīruvāca
śṛṇu śaure vaco me'dya saguṇā'haṃ caturbhujā |
māṃ jānāsi na jānāsi nirguṇāṃ saguṇālayām || 14||
tvaṃ jānīhi mahābhāga tayā tatprakaṭīkṛtam |
puṇyaṃ bhāgavataṃ viddhi vedasāraṃ śubhāvaham ||15||
kṛpāṃ ca mahatīṃ manye devyāḥ śatruniṣūdana |
yayā proktaṃ paraṃ guhyaṃ hitāya tava suvrata ||16||
rakṣaṇīyaṃ sadā citte na vismāyaṃ kadācana |
sāraṃ hi sarvaśāstrāṇāṃ mahāvidyāprakāśitam 17 ||
nātaḥ paraṃ veditavyaṃ vartate bhuvanatraye |
priyosi khalu devyāstvaṃ tena te vyāhṛtaṃ vacaḥ 18 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti śrutvā vaco devyā mahālakṣmyāścaturbhujaḥ |
dadhāra hṛdaye nityaṃ mattvā maṃtramanuttamam || 19 ||

kālena kiyatā tatra tannābhikamalodbhavaḥ |
brahmā daityabhayāttrasto jagāma śaraṇaṃ hareḥ || 20||
tataḥ kṛtvā mahāyuddhaṃ hattvā to madhukaiṭabho |
jajāpa bhagavānviṣṇuḥ ślokārthaṃ viśadākṣaram 21 ||,
japantaṃ vāsudevaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā devaḥ prajāpatiḥ |
prapaccha paramaprītaḥ kañjajaḥ kamalāpatim ||22|| .
kiṃ tvaṃ japasi deveśa tvattaḥ ko'pyadhikosti vai |
yatsmṛtvā puṃḍarīkākṣa prītosi jagadīśvara ||23||
hariruvāca
mayi tvayi ca yā śaktiḥ kriyākāraṇalakṣaṇā |
vicāraya mahābhāga yā sā bhagavatī śivā ||24||
yasyādhāre jagatsavaṃ tiṣṭhatyatra mahārṇave |
sākārā yā mahāśaktirameyā ca sanātanī || 25 ||
mayā visṛjyate viśvaṃ jagadetaccarācaram |
saiṣā prasannā varadā nṛṇāṃ bhavati muktaye ||26||
sā vidyā paramā mukterhetubhūtā sanātanī |
saṃsārabandhahetuśca saiva sarveśvareśvarī || 27||
ahaṃ ca tvakhilaṃ viśvaṃ tasyāścicchaktisaṃbhavam |
viddhi brahmannasaṃdehaḥ kartavyaḥ sarvadā'nagha || 28||
ślokārthena tayā proktaṃ tadvai bhāgavataṃ kila |
vistaro bhavitā tasya dvāparādau yuge tathā ||29||
vyāsa uvāca
brahmaṇā saṃgṛhītaṃ ca viṣṇostu nābhipaṅkaje |
nāradāya ca tenoktaṃ putrāyāmitabuddhaye ||30||
nāradena tathā mahyaṃ dattaṃ hi muninā purā |
mayā kṛtamidaṃ pūrṇaṃ dvādaśaskandhavistaram ||31||
tatpaṭhasva mahābhāga purāṇaṃ brahmasaṃmitam |
pañcalakṣaṇayuktaṃ ca devyāścaritamuttamam ||32||
tattvajñānarasopetaṃ sarveṣāmuttamottamam |
dharmaśāstrasamaṃ puṇyaṃ vedārthenopabṛṃhitam || 33||
vṛtrāsuravadhopetaṃ nānākhyānakathāyutam |
brahmavidyānidhānaṃ tu saṃsārārṇavatārakam ||34||
gṛhāṇa tvaṃ mahābhāga yogyo'si matimattaraḥ |
puṇyaṃ bhāgavataṃ nāma purāṇaṃ puruṣarṣabha || 35 ||
aṣṭādaśasahasrāṇāṃ lokānāṃ kuru saṃgraham |
ajñānanāśanaṃ divyaṃ jñānabhāskarabodhakam ||36||
sukhadaṃ śāṃtidaṃ dhanyaṃ dīrghāyuṣyakaraṃ śivam |
śṛṇvatāṃ paṭhatāṃ cedaṃ putrapautravivardhanam ||37||
śiṣyo'yaṃ mama dharmātmā lomaharṣaṇasambhavaḥ |
paṭhiṣyati tvayā sārdhaṃ purāṇīṃ saṃhitāṃ śubhām || 38||
sūta uvāca
ityuktaṃ tena putrāya mahyaṃ ca kathitaṃ kila |
mayā gṛhītaṃ tatsarvaṃ purāṇaṃ cātivistaram ||39||
śuko'dhītya purāṇaṃ tu sthito vyāsāśrame śubhe |
na lebhe śarma dharmātmā brahmātmaja ivāparaḥ ||40||
ekāṃtasevī vikalaḥ sa śūnya iva lakṣyate |
nātyantabhojanāsakto nopavāsaratastathā || 41 || .
citāviṣṭaṃ śukaṃ dṛṣṭvā vyāsaḥ prāha sutaṃ prati |
kiṃ putra cityate nityaṃ kasmādvayagro'si mānada 42 ||
āsse dhyānaparo nityamṛṇagrasta ivādhanaḥ |
kā ciṃtā vartate putra mayi tāte tu tiṣṭhati ||43||
sukhaṃ bhuṃkṣva yathākāmaṃ muñca śokaṃ manogatam |
jñānaṃ citaya śāstroktaṃ vijñāne ca matiṃ kuru || 44 ||

na cenmanasi te śāṃtirvacasā mama suvrata |
gaccha tvaṃ mithilāṃ putra pālitāṃ janakena ha || 45|
sa te mohaṃ mahābhāga nāśayiṣyati bhūpatiḥ |
janako nāma dharmātmā videhaḥ satyasāgaraḥ ||46|
taṃ gatvā nṛpati putra sandehaṃ svaṃ nivartaya |
varṇāśramāṇāṃ dharmāṃstvaṃ pṛccha putra yathātatham ||47 ||
jīvanmuktaḥ sa rājarṣirbrahmajñānamatiḥ śuciḥ |
tathyavaktātiśāṃtaśca yogī yogapriyaḥ sadā || 48 ||
sūta uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya vyāsasyāmitatejasaḥ |
pratyuvāca mahātejāḥ śukavāraṇisaṃbhavaḥ || 49||
daṃbho'yaṃ kila dharmātmanbhāti citte mamādhunā |
jīvanmukto videhaśva rājyaṃ śāsti mudānvita: 50 ||
vaṃdhyāputra ivābhāti rājā'sau janakaḥ pitaḥ |
kurvan rājyaṃ videhaḥ kiṃ saṃdeho'yaṃ mamādbhutaḥ || 51 ||
draṣṭumicchāmyahaṃ bhūpaṃ videhaṃ nṛpasattamam |
kathaṃ tiṣṭhati saṃsāre padmapatramivāṃbhasi ||52 ||
sandeho'yaṃ mahāṃstāta videhe parivartate |
mokṣaḥ kiṃ vadatāṃ śreṣṭha saugatānāmivāparaḥ ||53||
kathaṃ bhuktamabhuktaṃ syādakṛtaṃ ca kṛtaṃ katham |
vyavahāraḥ kathaṃ tyājya iṃdriyāṇāṃ mahāmate ||54||
mātā putrastathā bhāryā bhaginī kulaṭā tathā |
bhedābhedaḥ kathaṃ na syādyadyetanmuktatā katham ||55||
kaṭu kṣāraṃ tathā tīkṣṇaṃ kaṣāyaṃ miṣṭameva ca |
rasanā yadi jānāti bhuṃkte bhogānanuttamān || 56||
śītoṣṇasukhadaṃ khādiparijñānaṃ yadā bhavet |
muktatā kīdṛśī tāta saṃdeho'yaṃ mamādbhutaḥ || 57 ||
śatru mitraparijñānaṃ vairaṃ prītikaraṃ sadā |
vyavahāre pare tiṣṭhankathaṃ na kurute nṛpaḥ || 58 ||
cauraṃ vā tāpasaṃ vāpi samānaṃ manyate katham |
asamā yadi buddhiḥ syānmuktatā tarhi kīdṛśī 59 ||
dṛṣṭapūrvo na me kaścijjīvanmuktaśca bhūpatiḥ |
śaṃkeyaṃ mahatī tāta gṛhe muktaḥ kathaṃ nṛpaḥ || 60 ||
didṛkṣā mahatī jātā śrutvā taṃ bhūpati tathā |
saṃdehavinivṛttyarthaṃ gacchāmi mithilāṃ prati || 61||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 16 ||
atha saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
ityuktvā pitaraṃ putraḥ pādayoḥ patitaḥ śukaḥ |
baddhāñjaliruvācedaṃ gantukāmo mahāmanāḥ || 1 ||
āpṛcche tvāṃ mahābhāga grāhyaṃ te vacanaṃ mayā |
videhāndraṣṭumicchāmi pālitāñjanakena tu ||2||
binā daṃḍaṃ kathaṃ rājyaṃ karoti janakaḥ kila |
dharme na vartate loko daṃḍaścenna bhavedyadi || 3 ||
dharmasya kāraṇaṃ daṇḍo manvādiprahitaḥ sadā |
sa kathaṃ vartate tāta saṃśayo'yaṃ mahānmama ||4||
mama mātā tviyaṃ vaṃdhyā tadbhāti viceṣṭitam |
pṛcchāmi tvāṃ mahābhāga gacchāmi ca paraṃtapa ||5||

sūta uvāca
taṃ dṛṣṭrā gaṃtukāmaṃ ca śukaṃ satyavatīsutaḥ |
āligyovāca putraṃ taṃ jñāninaṃ niḥspṛhaṃ dṛḍham ||6||
vyāsa uvāca
svastyastu śuka dīrghāyurbhava putra mahāmate |
satyāṃ vācaṃ pradattvā me gaccha tāta yathāsukham 7 ||
āgaṃtavyaṃ punargatvā mamāśramamanuttamam |
na kutrāpi ca gaṃtavyaṃ tvayā putra kathaṃcana ||8||
jīvāmi putrāhaṃ dṛṣṭvā te mukhapaṃkajam |
apaśyanduḥkhamāpnomi prāṇastvamasi me suta ||9||
dṛṣṭvā tvaṃ janakaṃ putra saṃdehaṃ vinivartya ca |
atrāgatya sukhaṃ tiṣṭha vedādhyayanatatparaḥ || 10 |
sūta uvāca
ityuktaḥ so'bhivādyārya kṛtvā caiva pradakṣiṇām |
calitastarasā'tīva dhanurmuktaḥ śaro yathā || 11 ||
saṃpaśyanvividhāndeśā~llokāṃca vittadharmiṇaḥ |
vanāni pādapāṃścaiva kṣetrāṇi phalitāni ca || 12 ||
tāpasāṃstapyamānāṃśca yājakāndīkṣayānvitān |
yogābhyāsaratān yogivāna prasthānvanaukasaḥ ||13||
śaivānpāśupatāṃścaiva saurāñchāktāṃśca vaiṣṇavān |
vīkṣya nānāvidhāndharmāñjagāmātismayanmuniḥ 14 ||
varṣadvayena meruṃ ca samullaṃghya mahāmatiḥ |
himācalaṃ ca varṣeṇa jagāma mithilāṃ prati ||15||
praviṣṭo mithilā madhye paśyansarvaddhimuttamām |
prajāśca sukhitāḥ sarvāḥ sadācārāḥ susaṃsthitāḥ ||
kṣatrā nivāritastatra kastvamatra samāgataḥ |
kiṃ te kāryaṃ vadasveti pṛṣṭastena na cābravīt || 17||
niḥsṛtya nagaradvārātsthitaḥ sthāśurivācalaḥ |
vismito'tihasaṃstasthau vaco novāca kiṃcana 18 ||
pratāhāra uvāca
brūhi mūko'si kiṃ brahmankimarthaṃ tvamihāgataḥ | calanaṃ ca binā kāryaṃ na bhavediti me matiḥ 19 | | |
rājājñayā praveṣṭavyaṃ nagare'sminsadā dvija |
ajñātakulaśīlasya praveśo nātra sarvathā ||20||
tejasvī bhāsi no nūnaṃ brāhmaṇo vedavittamaḥ |
kulaṃ kāryaṃ ca me brūhi yatheṣṭaṃ gaccha mānada ||21|| .
śuka uvāca
yadarthamāgato'smyatra tatprāptaṃ vacanāttava |
videhanagaraṃ draṣṭuṃ praveśo yatra durlabhaḥ ||22||
moho'yaṃ mama durbuddheḥ samullaṃdhya giridrayam |
rājānaṃ draṣṭukāmo'haṃ paryaṭansamupāgataḥ ||23||
vaṃcito'haṃ svayaṃ pitrā dūṣaṇaṃ kasya dīyate |
bhrāmito'haṃ mahābhāga karmaṇā vā mahītale ||24||
dhanāśā puruṣasyeha paribhramaṇakāraṇam |
sā me nāsti tathāpyatra saṃprāptosmi bhramātkila ||
nirāśasya mukhaṃ nityaṃ yadi mohe na majjati |
nirāśo'haṃ mahābhāga magno'sminmohasāgare ||26||
kva mithilā kveyaṃ padyāṃ ca samupāgata |
pariśramaphalaṃ kiṃ me vaṃcito vidhinā kila ||27||

prārabdhaṃ kila bhoktavyaṃ śubhaṃ vāpyathavā'śubham |
udyamastadvaśe nityaṃ kārayatyeva sarvathā ||28||
na tīrthaṃ na ca vedo'tra yadarthamiha me śramaḥ |
apraveśaḥ pure jāto videho nāma bhūpatiḥ ||29||
ityuktvā virarāmāśu maunībhūta iva sthitaḥ |
jñāto hi pratihāreṇa jñānī kaścidvijottamaḥ ||30||
sāmapūrvamuvācāsau taṃ kṣattā saṃsthitaṃ munim |
gaccha bho yatra te kāryaṃ yatheṣṭaṃ dvijasattama ||31||
aparādho mama brahmanyannivāritavānaham |
tatkṣaṃtavyaṃ mahābhāga vimuktānāṃ kṣamābalam ||32||
śuka uvāca
'kiṃ te'tra dūṣaṇaṃ kṣattaḥ paratantro'si sarvathā |
prabhukāryaṃ prakartavyaṃ sevakena yathocitam ||33||
na bhūpadūṣaṇaṃ cātra yadahaṃ rakṣitastvayā |
coraśatruparijñānaṃ kartavyaṃ sarvathā budhaiḥ ||34||
mameva sarvathā doṣo yadahaṃ samupāgataḥ |
gamanaṃ paragehe yallaghutāyāśca kāraṇam ||35||
pratāhāra uvāca
kiṃ sukhaṃ dvija kiṃ duḥkhaṃ kiṃ kāryaṃ śubhamicchatā |
kaḥ śatrurhitakartā ko brūhi sarvaṃ mamādya vai || 36||
śuka uvāca
dvaividhyaṃ sarvalokeṣu sarvatra dvividho janaḥ |
rāgī caiva virāgī ca tayościttaṃ dvidhā punaḥ ||37||
virāgī trividhaḥ kāmaṃ jñāto'jñātaśca madhyamaḥ |
rāgī ca dvividhaḥ prokto mūrkhaśca caturastathā || 38 ||
cāturyaṃ dvividhaṃ proktaṃ śāstrajaṃ matijaṃ tathā |
matistu dvividhā loke yuktāyukteti sarvathā ||39||
pratīhāra uvāca
yaduktaṃ bhavatā vidvannārthajño'haṃ dvijottama |
tatsarvaṃ vistareṇādya yathārthaṃ vada sattama || 40 ||
śuka uvāca
rāgo yasyāsti saṃsāre sa rāgītyucyate dhrutram |
duḥkhaṃ bahuvidhaṃ tasya sukhaṃ ca vividhaṃ punaḥ || 41 ||
dhanaṃ prāpya sutāndārānmānaṃ ca vijayaṃ tathā |
tadaprāpya mahaṃduḥkhaṃ bhavatyeva kṣaṇe kṣaṇe || 42 ||
kāryaṃ tasya sukhopāyaḥ kartavyaṃ sukhasādhanam |
tasyārātiḥ sa vijñeyaḥ sukhavighnaṃ karoti yaḥ 43 ||
sukhotpādayitā mitra rāgayuktasya sarvathā |
caturo naiva muhyeta mūrkhaḥ sarvatra muhyati ||44 ||
viraktasyātmaraktasya sukhamekāṃtasevanam |
ātmānucitanaṃ caiva vedāṃtasya ca citanam ||45||
duḥkhaṃ tadetatsarvaṃ hi saṃsārakathanādikam |
śatravo bahavastasya vijñasya śubhamicchataḥ || 46||
kāmaḥ krodhaḥ pramādaśca śatravo vividhāḥ smṛtāḥ |
bandhuḥ saṃtoṣa evāsya nānyo'sti bhuvanatraye ||47 ||
sūta uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya mattvā taṃ jñāninaṃ dvijam |
kṣattā praveśayāmāsa kakṣāṃ cātimanoramām ||48||
nagaraṃ vīkṣamāṇaḥ saṃstraividhyajanasaṃkulam |
nānāvipaṇidravyāḍhyaṃ krayavikrayakārakam ||49||

rāgadveṣayutaṃ kāmalobhamohākulaṃ tathā |
vivadatsujanākīrṇaṃ vasupūrṇaṃ mahattaram ||50||
paśyansa trividhā~llokānprāsa radrājamaṃdiram |
prāptaḥ paramatejasvī dvitīya iva bhāskaraḥ || 51 ||
nivāritaśca tatraiva pratīhāreṇa kādhvat |
tatraiva ca sthito dvāri mokṣamevānucitayan || 52||
chāyāyāmātape caiva samadarśī mahātapāḥ |
dhyānaṃ kṛtvā tarthaṃkāṃte sthitaḥ sthāṇurivācalaḥ 53||
taṃ muhūrtādupāgatya rājño'mātyaḥ kṛtāṃjaliḥ |
prāveśayattataḥ kakṣāṃ dvitīyāṃ rājaveśmanaḥ ||54||
tatra divyaṃ manoramyaṃ puṣpitaṃ divyapādapam |
tadvanaṃ darśayitvā tu kṛtvā cātithisatkriyām 55 ||
vāramukhyaḥ striyastatra rājasevāparāyaṇāḥ |
gītavāditrakuśalāḥ kāmaśāstraviśāradāḥ || 56||
tā ādiśya ca sevārthaṃ śukasya maṃtrisattamaḥ |
nirgataḥ sadanāttasmādvayāsaputraḥ sthitastadā || 57||
pūjitaḥ parayā bhaktayā tābhiḥ strībhiryathāvidhi |
deśakālopapannena nānānnenātitoṣitaḥ || 58||
tato'ntaḥ puravāsinyastasyāṃtaḥpurakānanam |
ramyaṃ saṃdarśayāmāsu raṃganāḥ kāmamohitāḥ || 59||
sa yuvā rūpavānkāṃto mṛdubhāṣī manoramaḥ |
dṛṣṭvā tā mumuhuḥ sarvāstaṃ ca kāmamivāparam || 60 ||
jiteṃdriyaṃ muniṃ mattvā sarvāḥ paryacaraṃstadā |
āraṇeyastu śuddhātmā mātṛbhāvamakalpayat || 61||
ātmārāmoṃ jitakrodho na hṛṣyati na tapyati |
paśyaṃstāsāṃ vikārāṃśca svastha eva sa tasthivān ||
tasmai śayyāṃ suramyāṃ ca dadurnāryaḥ susaṃskṛtām |
parārdhyāstaraṇopetāṃ nānopaskarasaṃvṛtām ||63||
sa kṛtvā pādaśaucaṃ ca kuśapāṇirataṃdritaḥ |
upāsya paścimāṃ saṃdhyāṃ dhyānamevānvapadyata ||64||
yāmamekaṃ sthito dhyāne suṣvāpa tadanaṃtaram |
suptvā yāmadvayaṃ tatra codatiṣṭhattataḥ śukaḥ || 65 ||
pāścātyaṃ yāminīyāmaṃ dhyānamevānvapadyata |
snātvā prātaḥ kriyāḥ kṛtvā punarāste samāhitaḥ 66||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ ||17||
atha aṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
śrutvā tamāgataṃ rājā maṃtribhiḥ sahitaḥ śuciḥ |
puraḥ purohitaṃ kṛtvā guruputraṃ samabhyagāt || 1 ||
kṛtvā'rhaṇāṃ nṛpaḥ samyagdattāsanamanuttamam |
papraccha kuśalaṃ gāṃ ca vinivedya payasvinīm ||2||
saca tāṃ nṛpapūjāṃ vai pratyagṛhṇādyathāvidhi |
papraccha kuśalaṃ rājñe svaṃ nivedya nirāmayam ||3||
kṛtvā kugalasaṃ praśnamupaviṣṭaṃ sukhāsane |
śukaṃ vyāsasutaṃ śāṃtaṃ paryapṛcchata pārthivaḥ || 4 ||
ki nimittaṃ mahābhāga niḥspṛhasya ca māṃ prati |
jātaṃ hyāgamanaṃ brūhi kāryaṃ tanmunisattama ||5||
śuka uvāca
vyāsenokto mahārāja kuru dāraparigraham |
sarveṣāmāśramāṇāṃ ca gṛhasthāśrama uttamaḥ || 6 ||

mayā nāṃgīkṛtaṃ vākyaṃ matvā baṃdhaṃ gurorapi |
na baṃdho'stīti tenokto nāhaṃ tatkṛtavānpunaḥ ||7||
iti saṃdigdhamanasaṃ matvā sa sa munisattamaḥ |
uvāca vacanaṃ tathyaṃ mithilāṃ gaccha māśucaḥ ||8||
yājyo'sti janakastatra jīvanmukto narādhipaḥ |
videho lokaviditaḥ pāti rājyamakaṃṭakam ||9||
kurvan rājyaṃ tathā rājā māyāpāśairna badhyate |
tvaṃ bibheti kathaṃ putra vanavṛttiḥ paraṃtapa || 10 ||
paśya taṃ nṛpaśārdūlaṃ tyaja mohaṃ manogatam |
kuru dārānmahābhāga pṛccha vā bhūpati ca tam || 11||
saṃdehaṃ te manojātaṃ kathayiṣyati pārthivaḥ |
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya māmehi tarasā suta ||12||
saṃprokto'haṃ mahārāja tatpure ca tadājñayā |
mokṣakāmo'smi rājeṃdra brūhi kṛtyaṃ mamānagha || 13||
tapastīrthavrate jyāṃca svādhyāyastīrthasevanam |
jñānaṃ vā vada rājeṃdra mokṣaṃ prati ca kāraṇam ||14||
janaka uvāca
śṛṇu vipreṇa kartavyaṃ mokṣamārgāśritena yat |
upanīto vasedādī vedābhyāsāya vai gurau || 15 ||
adhītya vedavedāṃtāndattvā ca gurudakṣiṇām |
samāvṛttastu gārhasthye sadāro nivasenmuniḥ || 16 ||
nānyavṛttistu saṃtoṣī nirāśīrgatakalmaṣaḥ |
agnihotrādikarmāṇi kurvāṇaḥ satyavākśuciḥ 17||
putraṃ pītraṃ samāsādya vānaprasthāśrame vaset |
tapasā ṣaḍripūñjitvā bhāryāṃ putre niveśya ca || 18 ||
sarvānagnīnyathānyāyamātmanyāropya dharmavit |
vasettaryāśrame śrāṃtaḥ śuddhe vairāgyasambhave ||19|| ||19||
viraktasyādhikā rosti saṃnyāse nānyathā kvacit |
vedavākyamidaṃ tathyaṃ nānyatheti matirmama ||20||
śukāṣṭacatvāriṃśadvai saṃskārā vedabodhitāḥ |
catvāriṃśadgṛhasthasya proktāstatra mahātmabhiḥ 21 ||
aṣṭau ca muktikāmasya proktāḥ śamadamādayaḥ ! āśramādāśramaṃ gacchediti śiṣṭānuśāsanam ||22||
śrīśuka uvāca
utpanne hṛdi vairāgye jñānavijñānasaṃbhave |
avaśyameva vastavyamāśrameṣu vaneṣunā || 23 ||
janaka uvāca
indriyāṇi baliṣṭāni na niyuktāni mānada |
apakvasya prakurvati vikārāṃstānanekaśaḥ ||24||
bhojanecchāṃ sukhecchāṃ ca śayyecchāmātmajasya ca |
yatī bhūtvā kathaṃ kuryādvikāre samupasthite ||25||
durjaraṃ vāsanājālaṃ na śāṃtimupayāti vai |
atastacchamanārthāya krameṇa ca parityajet || 26||
ūrdhva suptaḥ patatyeva na śayānaḥ patatyadhaḥ |
parivrajya paribhraṣṭo na mārgaṃ labhate punaḥ ||27||
yathā pipīlikā mūlācchākhāyāmadhirohati |
śanaiḥ śanaiḥ phalaṃ yāti sukhana padagāminī || 28 ||
vihaṃgastarasāyāti vighnaśaṃkāmudasya vai |
bhrāṃto bhavati viśramya sukhaṃ yāti pipīlikā ||29||
manastu prabalaṃ kāmamajeyamakṛtātmabhiḥ |
ataḥ krameṇa jetavyamāśramānukrameṇa ca || 30||
gahasthāśramasaṃstho'pi śāṃtaḥ sumatirātmavān |
na ca hṛṣyenna ca tapellābhālābhe samo bhavet || 31||

vihitaṃ karma kurvāṇastyajaścitānvitaṃ ca yat |
ātmalābhena santuṣṭo mucyate mātra saṃśayaḥ ||32||
paśyāhaṃ rājyasaṃstho'pi jīvanmukto yathānuṣa |
vicarāmi yathākāmaṃ na me kiṃcitprajāyate || 33 ||
bhuṃjāno vividhānbhogānkurvankāryābhyanekaśaḥ |
bhaviṣyāmi yathā'haṃ tvaṃ tathā mukto bhavānagha ||34||
kathyate khalu yadvaśyamavaśyaṃ badhyate kutaḥ |
dṛśyāni paṃcabhūtāni guṇāsteṣāṃ tathā punaḥ || 35 ||
ātmā gamyo'numānena pratyakṣo na kadācana |
sa kathaṃ badhyate brahmanirvikāro nirañjanaḥ || 36 ||
manastu sukhaduḥkhānāṃ mahatāṃ kāraṇaṃ dvija |
jāte tu nirmale hyasminsarvaṃ bhavati nirmalam ||37||
bhramansarveṣu tīrtheṣu snātvā snātvā punaḥ punaḥ |
nirmalaṃ na mano yāvattāvatsarvaṃ nirarthakam ||38||
na deho na ca jīvātmā neṃdriyāṇi paraṃtapa |
mana eva manuṣyāṇāṃ kāraṇaṃ baṃdhamokṣayoḥ || 39 ||
śuddho muktaḥ sadaivātmā na vai badhyeta karhicit |
baṃdhamokṣī manaḥsaṃstho tasmiñchāṃte praśāmyati 40||
śatrumitramudāsīno bhedāḥ sarve manogatāḥ |
ekātmatve kathaṃ bhedaḥ saṃbhavedvaitadarśanāt ||41||
jīvo brahma sadaivāhaṃ nātra kāryā vicāraṇā |
bhedabuddhistu saṃsāre vartamānā pravartate || 42 ||
avidyeyaṃ mahābhāga vidyā caitannivartanam |
vidyāvidye ca vijñeye sarvadeva vicakṣaṇaḥ || 43 ||
vinā''tapaṃ hi chāyāyā jñāyate ca kathaṃ sukham |
avidyayā vinā tadvatkathaṃ vidyāṃ ca vetti vai || 44 ||
guṇā guṇeṣu vartate bhūtāni ca tathaiva ca |
indriyāṇīndriyārtheṣu ko doṣastaṃtra cātmanaḥ ||45||
maryādā sarvarakṣārthaṃ kṛtā vedeṣu sarvaśaḥ |
anyathā dharmanāśa: syāt saugatānāmivānagha || 46 ||
dharmanāśe vinaṣṭaḥ syādvarṇācāro'tivartitaḥ |
ato vedapradiṣṭena mārgeṇa gacchatāṃ śubham ||47 ||
śrīśuka uvāca
saṃdeho vartate rājanna nivartati me kvacit |
bhavatā kathitaṃ yattacchruvato me narādhipa || 48||
vedadharmeṣu hiṃsā syādadharmabahulā hi sā |
kathaṃ muktiprado 3 dharmo vedokto mata bhūpate || 49||
pratyakṣeṇa tvanācāraḥ somapānaṃ narādhipa |
paśūnāṃ hiṃsanaṃ . tadukṣaṇaṃ cāmiṣasya ca || 50 ||

sautrāmaṇī tathā proktaḥ pratyakṣeṇa surāgrahaḥ |
dyūtakrīḍā tathā proktā bratāni vividhāni ca || 51 ||
śrūyatesma purā hyāsīcchābidurnṛpottamaḥ |
yajvā dharmaparo nityaṃ vadānyaḥ satyasaṃgaraḥ ||52 |
goptā ca dharmasetūnāṃ śāstā cotpathagāminām |
yajñāśva vihitāstena bahavo bhūridakṣiṇāḥ || 53||
carmaṇāṃ parvato jāto viṃdhyācalasamaḥ punaḥ |
meghāṃbuplāvanājjātā nadī carmaṇvatī śubhāḥ || 54 ||
so'pi rājā divaṃ yātaḥ kīrtirasyācalā bhuvi |
evaṃ dharmeṣu vedeṣu na me buddhiḥ pravartate ||55||
strīsaṃgena sadā bhoge sukhamāpnoti mānavaḥ |
alābhe duḥkhamatyaṃtaṃ jīvanmuktaḥ kathaṃ bhavet ||56||
janaka uvāca
hiṃsā yajñeṣu pratyakṣā sā'hiṃsā parikīrtitā |
upādhiyogato hiṃsā nānyatheti vinirṇayaḥ || 57 ||
yathā ceṃdhanasaṃyogādagno dhūmaḥ pravartate |
taṭṭiyogāttathā tasminnirdhūmatvaṃ vibhāti vai || 58 ||
ahiṃsā ca tathā viddhi vedoktāṃ munisattama |
rāgiṇāṃ sāpi hisaiva niḥspṛhāṇāṃ na sā matā || 59 ||
arāgeṇa ca yatkarma tathā'haṃkāravajitam |
akṛtaṃ veda vidvāṃsaḥ pravadaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ || 60 ||
gṛhasthānāṃ tu hisaiva yā yajñe dvijasattama |
arāgeṇa ca yatkarma tathā'haṃkāravarjitam || 61||
sāhimaiva mahābhāga mumukṣūṇāṃ jitātmanām || 62||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe'ṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 18 ||
atha ekonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīśuka uvāca
saṃdeho'yaṃ mahārāja vartate hṛdaye mama |
māyāmadhye vartamānaḥ sa kathaṃ nispṛho bhavet ||1||
śāstrajñānaṃ ca saṃprāpya nityānityavicāraṇam |
tyajate na mano mohaṃ sa kathaṃ mucyate naraḥ || 2 ||
aṃtargataṃ tamaśchettu śāstrādbodhā hi na kṣamaḥ |
yathā na naśyati tamaḥ kṛtayā dīpavartiyā || 3 ||
adrohaḥ sarvabhūteṣu kartavyaḥ sarvadā budhaiḥ |
ma kathaṃ rājaśārdūla gṛhasthasya bhavettathā ||4||
cittaiṣaṇā na te śāṃtā tathā rājyasukhaṃṣaṇā |
jayaṃpaṇā ca saṃgrāme jīvanmuktaḥ kathaṃ bhaveḥ || 5 |
coreṣu caurabuddhiste sādhubuddhistu tāpase |
svaparatvaṃ tavāpyasti videhastvaṃ kathaṃ nṛpa || 6 ||
kaṭutīkṣṇakaṣāyāmlarasānvetsi śubhāśubhān |
śubheṣu ramate cittaṃ nāśubheṣu tathā nṛpa ||7||
jāgratsvapnasuṣuptiśca tava rājanbhavati hi |
avasthāstu yathākālaṃ turīyā tu kathaṃ nṛpa ||8||

padātyaśvarathebhāśca sarve vai vaśagā mama |
svāmyahaṃ caiva sarveṣāṃ manyase tvaṃ na manyase || 9 ||
miṣṭamatsi sadā rājanmudito vimanāstathā |
mālāyāṃ ca tathā sarve samadṛkkva nṛpottama || 10 ||
vimuktastu bhavedrājansamaloṣṭāśmakāṃcana: |
ekātmabuddhiḥ sarvatra hitakṛtsarvajaṃtuṣu ||11||
na me'dya ramate cittaṃ gṛhadārādiṣu kvacit |
ekākī niḥspṛho'tyarthaṃ careyamiti me matiḥ || 12 ||
niḥsaṅgo nirmamaḥ śāntaḥ patra mūlaphalāśanaḥ |
mṛgavadvicariṣyāmi nirdvandvo niṣparigrahaḥ || 13 ||
kiṃ me gṛheṇa vittena bhāryayā ca surūpayā |
virāgamanasaḥ kāmaṃ guṇātītasya pārthiva || 14 ||
cityase vividhākāraṃ nānārāgasamākulam |
daṃbho'yaṃ kila te bhāti vimukto'smīti bhāṣase || 15 || ||15||
kadācicchatrajā ciṃtā dhanajā ca kadācana |
kadācitsainyajā ciṃtā niścito'si kadā nṛpa || 16 ||
vaikhānasā ye munayo mitāhārā jitavratāḥ |
te'pi muhyaṃti saṃsāre jānaṃ topi hyasatyatām || 17 |
tava vaṃśasamutthānāṃ videhā iti bhūpate |
kuṭilaṃ nāma jānīhi nānyatheti kadācana ||18||
vidyādharo yathā mūrkhoṃ janmāṃdhastu divākaraḥ |
lakṣmīdharo daridraśva nāma teṣāṃ nirarthakam || 19 ||
tava vaṃśodbhavā ye ye śrutāḥ pūrve mayā nṛpāḥ |
videhā iti vikhyātā nāmataḥ karmato na te || 20 ||
nimināmā'bhavadrājā pūrvaṃ tava kule nṛpa |
yajñārthaṃ sa tu rājarṣirvasiṣṭhaṃ svaguruṃ munim || 21 ||
nimaṃtrayāmāsa tadā tamuvācaṃ nṛpaṃ muniḥ |
nimaṃtritosmi yajñārthaṃ devendreṇādhunā kila ||22||
kṛtvā tasya makhaṃ pūrṇaṃ kariṣyāmi tavāpi vai |
tāvatkuruṣva rājeṃdra saṃbhāraṃ tu śanaiḥ śanaiḥ ||23||
ityuktvā niryayau so'tha maheṃdrayajane muniḥ |
nimiranyaṃ guruṃ kṛtvā cakāra makhamuttamam ||24||
tacchrutvā kupito'tyarthaṃ vasiṣṭho nṛpatiṃ punaḥ |
śaśāpa ca patatvadya dehaste gurulopaka ||25||
rājāpi taṃ śaśāpātha tavāpi na patatvayam |
anyonyaśāpātpatitau tāveva ca mayā śrutam || 26||
videhena ca rājeṃdra kathaṃ śapto guruḥ svayam |
vinoda iva me citte vibhāti napasattama ||27| .
janaka uvāca
satyamaktaṃ tvayā nātra mithyā kiṃcididaṃ matam |
tathāpi śṛṇu viprendra gururmama supūjitaḥ || 28 ||
pituḥ saṃgaṃ parityajya tvaṃ vanaṃ gantumicchasi |
mṛgaiḥ saha susaṃbaṃdho bhavitā te na saṃśayaḥ || 29 ||
mahābhūtāni sarvatra niḥsaṃga: kva bhaviṣyasi |
āhārārthaṃ sadā citā niścitaḥ syāḥ kathaṃ mane || 30 ||
daṃḍājinakṛtā ciṃtā yathā tava vane'pi ca |
tathaiva rājyaciṃtā me cintayānasya vā na vā 31 ||

bikalpopahatastvaṃ ve dūradeśamupāgataḥ |
na me vikalpasaṃdeho nirvikalposmi sarvathā ||32||
sukhaṃ svapimi viprāhaṃ sukhaṃ bhuṃjāmi sarvadā |
na baddhosmīti buddhayāhaṃ sarvadaiva sukhī mune ||33||
tvaṃ tu duḥkhī sadaivāsi baddho'hamiti śaṃkayā |
iti śaṃkāṃ parityajya sukhī bhava samāhitaḥ ||34||
deho'yaṃ mama baṃdho'sti na mameti ca muktatā |
tathā dhanaṃ gṛhaṃ rājyaṃ na mameti ca niśvayaḥ ||35||
sūta uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya śukaḥ prītamanā'bhavat |
āpṛcchaya taṃ jagāmāśu vyāsasyāśramamuttamam || 36 |
āgacchaṃtaṃ sutaṃ dṛṣṭvā vyāsopi sukhamāptavān |
āliṃgyāghrāya mūrdhānaṃ papraccha kuśalaṃ punaḥ ||37||
sthitastatrāśrame ramye pituḥ pārśve samāhitaḥ |
vedādhyayanasaṃpannaḥ sarvaśāstraviśāradaḥ ||38||
janakasya daśāṃ dṛṣṭvā rājyasthasya mahātmanaḥ |
sa nivṛtti parāṃ prāpya piturāśramasaṃsthitaḥ ||39||
pitṝṇāṃ subhagā kanyā pīvarī nāma sundarī |
śukaścakāra patnīṃ tāṃ yogamārgasthitopi hi || 40 ||
sa tasyāṃ janayāmāsa putrāṃścatura eva hi |
kṛṣṇaṃ gauraprabhaṃ caiva bhūri devaśrutaṃ tathā ||41||
kanyāṃ kīrti samutpādya vyāsaputraḥ pratāpavān |
dadau vibhrājaputrāya tvaṇuhāya mahātmane || 82 ||
aṇuhasya sutaḥ śrīmānbrahmadattaḥ pratāpavān |
brahmajaḥ pṛthivīpālaḥ śukakanyāsamudbhavaḥ ||43||
kālena kiyatā tatra nāradasyopadeśataḥ |
jñānaṃ paramakaṃ prāpya yogamārgamanuttamam ||44 ||
putre rājyaṃ nidhāyātha gato badarikāśramam |
māyābījopadeśena tasya jñānaṃ nirargalam ||45||
nāradasya pramādena jñātaṃ sadyo vimuktidam |
kailāsaśikhare ramye tyaktvā saṃgaṃ pituḥ śukaḥ ||46||
dhyānamāsthāya vipulaṃ sthitaḥ saṃgaparāṅmukhaḥ |
utpapāta gireḥ śṛṃgātsiddhiṃ ca paramāṃ gataḥ || 47||
ākāśago mahātejā virarāja yathā raviḥ |
gireḥ śṛṅgaṃ dvidhā jātaṃ śukasyotpatane tadā || 48 ||
utpātā bahavo jātā: śukaśrākāśago'bhavat |
antarikṣe yathā vāyuḥ stūyamānaḥ surarṣibhiḥ || 49||
tejasā'tivirājanvai dvitīya iva bhāskaraḥ |
vyāsastu virahākrāṃta: kraṃdanputreti cāsakṛt ||50||
gireḥ śṛṅge gatastatra śuko yatra sthito'bhavat |
kraṃdamānaṃ tadā dīnaṃ vyāsaṃ matvā śramākulam ||51||
sarvabhūtagataḥ sākṣī pratiśabdamadāttadā |
tatrādyāpi gireḥ śṛṅge pratiśabdaḥ sphuṭobhavet ||52||
rudaṃtaṃ taṃ samālakṣya vyāsaṃ śākasamanvitam |
putra putreti bhāṣantaṃ viraheṇa pariplutam ||53||

REVET samāgatya pārāśaryamabodhayat |
vyāsa śokaṃ mā kuru tvaṃ putraste yogavittamaḥ ||54 ||
paramāṃ gatimāpanno durlabhā cākṛtātmabhiḥ |
tasya śoko na kartavyastvayā śokaṃ vijānatā || 55||
kīrtiste vipulā jātā tena putreṇa cānagha |
vyāsa uvāca
na śoko yāti deveśa kiṃ karomi jagatpate || 56||
atṛpte locane me'dya putradarśanalālase |
mahādeva uvāca
chāyāṃ drakṣyasi drakṣyasi putrasya pārśvasthāṃ sumanoharām ||57||
tāṃ vīkṣya muniśārdula śokaṃ jahi paraṃtapa |
sūta uvāca
tadā dadarśa vyāsastu chāyāṃ putrasya suprabhām ||58||
dattvā varaṃ harastasmai tatraivāṃtaradhīyata |
antarhite mahādeve vyāsaḥ svāśramamabhyagāt ||59||
śukasya viraheṇāpi tataḥ paramaduḥkhitaḥ ||60 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe prathamaskandhe ekānaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 19 ||
atha viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
śukastu paramāṃ siddhimāptavāndevasattama |
kiṃ cakāra tato vyāsastanna brūhi savistaram ||1||
sūta uvāce
śiṣyā vyāsasya ye'pyāsanvedābhyāsaparāyaṇāḥ |
ājñāmādāya te sarve gatāḥ pūrvaṃ mahītale ||2||
asito devalaścaiva vaiśaṃpāyana eva ca |
jaiminiśca sumaṃtuśca gatāḥ sarve tapodhanāḥ || 3 ||
vānetānvīkṣya putraṃ ca lokāṃtaritamapyuta |
vyāsaḥ śokasamākrāṃto gamanāyākaronmatim ||4||
sasmāra manasā vyāsastāṃ niṣādasutāṃ śubhām |
mātaraṃ jāhnavītīre muktāṃ śokasamanvitām ||5|
smṛtvā satyavatīṃ vyāsastyaktvā taṃ parvatottamam |
ājagāma mahātejā janmasthānaṃ svakaṃ muniḥ || 6 |
dvīpaṃ prāpyātha papraccha kva gatā sā varānanā |
nipādāstaṃ samācakhyurdattā rājñe tu kanyakā ||7||

dāsarājo'pi saṃpūjya vyāsaṃ prītipuraḥsaram |
svāgatenābhisatkṛtya provāca vihitāṃjaliḥ ||8||
dāsarāja uvāca
adya me saphalaṃ janma pāvitaṃ naḥ kulaṃ mune |
devānāmapi durdarśa yajjātaṃ tava darśanam || 9 ||
yadarthamāgato'si tvaṃ tadabrūhi dvijasattama |
api dārā dhanaṃ putrāstvadāyattamidaṃ vibho || 10 ||
sarasvatyāstaṭe ramye cakārāśramamaṃḍalam |
nyāsastapaḥ samāyuktastatraivāsa samāhitaḥ || 11 ||
satyavatyāḥ suto jāto śaṃtanoramitadyuteḥ |
matvā tau bhrātarau vyāsaḥ sukhamāpa vane sthitaḥ 12 ||
citrāṃgadaḥ prathamajo rūpavākchatrutāpanaḥ |
babhūva nṛpateḥ putraḥ sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutaḥ || 13||
vicitravīryanāmāsau dvitīyaḥ samajāyata |
so'pi sarvaguṇopetaḥ śaṃtanoḥ sukhavardhanaḥ || 14||
gāṃgeyaḥ prathamastasya mahāvīro balādhikaḥ |
tathaiva to sutau jāto satyavatyāṃ mahābalau || 15 ||
śaṃtanustānsutān vīkṣya sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutān |
amaṃstājayyamātmānaṃ devādīnāṃ mahāmanāḥ || 16 ||
atha kālena kiyatā śaṃtanuḥ kālaparyayāt |
tatyāja dehaṃ dharmātmā dehī jīrṇamivāṃvaram || 17 ||
kālagharmagate rājñi bhīṣmaścakre vidhānataḥ |
pretakāryāṇi sarvāṇi dānāni vividhāni ca || 18 ||
citrāṃgadaṃ tato rājye sthāpayāmāsa vīryavān |
svayaṃ na kṛtavān rājyaṃ tasmādevavrato'bhavat || 19||
citrāṃgadastu kīryeṇa pramattaḥ paraduḥkhadaḥ |
babhūva valavān vīraḥ satyavatyātmajaḥ śuciḥ ||20||
arthakadā mahābāhuḥ sainyena mahatā vṛtaḥ |
pracacāra vanoddeśānpaśyanvadhyānnṛgān rurūn ||21||
citrāṃgadastu gaṃdharvo dṛṣṭvā taṃ mārgagaṃ nṛpam |
uttattārāṃtika bhūmervimānavaramāsthitaḥ ||22||
tatrābhūcca mahadyuddhaṃ tayoḥ sadṛśabīryayoḥ |
kurukṣetre mahāsthāne trīṇi varṣāṇi tāpasāḥ ||23||
indralokamavāpāśu gaṃdharveṇa hato raṇe |
bhīṣmaḥ śrutvā cakārāśu tasyaurdhvadaihikaṃ tadā ||24||
gāṃgeyaḥ kṛtaśokastu maṃtribhiḥ parivāritaḥ |
vicitravīryanāmānaṃ rājyeśaṃ ca cakāra ha ||25||
maṃtribhirbodhitā paścādgurubhiśca mahātmabhiḥ |
svaputraṃ rājyagaṃ dṛṣṭvā putraśokahatā'pi ca ||26||
