pitṝṇāṃ cākṣayaḥ svargaḥ purāṇaśravaṇādbhavet ||64||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvitīyaskandhe śrotṛpravaktṛprasaṃgo nāma dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12||
dvāviṃśatyadhikasaṃkhyaiḥ padyaiḥ saptaśataiḥ śubhaiḥ |
śrīmadryāsa mukhodgīrtedvitīyaḥ skandha īritaḥ || 1 ||
samāpto'yaṃ dvitīyaḥ skandhaḥ

śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ
śrīmaddevībhāgavatam
tṛtīyaḥ skandhaḥ
prathamo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
bhagavanbhavatā proktaṃ yajñamaṃbābhidhaṃ mahat |
sā kā kathaṃ samutpannā kutra kasmācca kiṃguṇā || 1 |
kīdṛśaśca makhastasyāḥ svarūpaṃ kīdṛśaṃ tathā |
vidhānaṃ vidhivaddbrūhi sarvajño'si dayānidhe ||2||
brahmāṇḍasya tathotpatti vada vistaratastathā |
yathoktaṃ yādṛśaṃ brahmannakhilaṃ vetsi bhūsura ||3||
brahmā viṣṇuśca rudraśca trayo devā mayā śrutāḥ |
sṛṣṭipālanasaṃhārakārakāḥ saguṇāstvamī ||4||
svataṃtrāste mahātmānaḥ pārāśarya vadasva me |
āhosvitparataṃtrāste śrotumicchāmi sāṃpratam ||5||
mṛtyudharmāśca te no vā saccidānandarūpiṇaḥ |
adhibhūtādibhiryuktā na vā duḥkhaistridhātmakaiḥ || 6 ||
kālasya vaśagā no vā te sureṃdrā mahābalāḥ |
kathaṃ te vai samutpannā kasmāditi ca saṃśayaḥ || 7 |
harṣaśokayutā te vai nidrālasyasamanvitāḥ |
saptadhātumayāsteṣāṃ dehāḥ kiṃ vā'nyathā mune || 8||
kairdravyanirmitāste vai kairguṇairidriyaistathā |
bhogaśca kīdṛśasteṣāṃ pramāṇamāyuṣastathā || 9 ||
nivāsasthānamapyeṣāṃ vibhūti ca vadasva me |
śrotumicchāmyahaṃ brahmanvistareṇa kathāmimām ||10||
vyāsa uvāca.
durgamaḥ praśnabhāro'yaṃ kṛto rājaṃstvayā'dhunā |
brahmādīnāṃ samutpattiḥ kasmāditi mahāmate || 11||
etadeva mayā putra pṛṣṭo'sau nārado muniḥ |
vismitaḥ pratyuvācedamutthitaḥ śṛṇu bhūpate ||12||
kasmiśca samaye cāhaṃ gaṃgātīre sthitaṃ munim |
apaśyaṃ nāradaṃ śāntaṃ sarvajñaṃ vedavittamam || 13 ||

dṛṣṭvā'haṃ mudito bhūtvā pādayorapataṃ muneḥ |
tenājñaptaḥ samīpe'sya saṃviṣṭaśca varāsane ||14||
śrutvā kuśalavārtāṃ vai tamapṛcchaṃ vidheḥ sutam |
nirviṣṭaṃ jāhnavītīre nirjane sūkṣmabāluke ||15||
mune'tivitatasyāsya brahmāṃsya mahāmate |
kaḥ kartā paramaḥ proktastanme brūhi vidhānataḥ || 16||
kasmādetatsamutpannaṃ brahmāṇḍaṃ munisattama |
anityaṃ vā tathā nityaṃ tadācakṣva dvijottama ||17||
ekakartṛkametadvā bahukartṛkamanyathā |
akartṛkaṃ na kāryaṃ syādvirodho'yaṃ vibhāti me || 18 ||
iti saṃdehasaṃdohe magnaṃ māṃ tārayādhunā |
vikalpakoṭīḥ kurvāṇaṃ saṃsāre'smin pravistare 19 ||
bruvaṃti śaṃkaraṃ kecinmatvā kāraṇakāraṇam |
sadāśivaṃ mahādevaṃ pralayotpattivarjitam || 20||
ātmārāmaṃ sureśaṃ ca triguṇaṃ nirmalaṃ haram |
saṃsāratārakaṃ nityaṃ sṛṣṭisthityaṃtakāraṇam ||21||
anye viṣṇuṃ stuvaṃtyenaṃ sarveṣāṃ prabhumīśvaram |
paramātmānamavyaktaṃ sarvaśaktisamanvitam ||22||
bhuktidaṃ muktidaṃ śāṃtaṃ sarvādi sarvatomukham |
vyāpakaṃ viśvaśaraṇamanādinidhanaṃ harim || 23 ||
dhātāraṃ ca tathā cānye bruvaṃti sṛṣṭikāraṇam |
tameva sarvavettāraṃ sarvabhūtapravartakam ||24||
caturmukhaṃ sureśānaṃ nābhipadmabhavaṃ vibhum |
sraṣṭāraṃ sarvalokānāṃ satyalokanivāsinam ||25||
dineśaṃ pravadatyanye sarveśaṃ vedavādina: |
stuvaṃti caiva gāyaṃti sāyaṃprātarataṃdritāḥ ||26||
yajñaṃti ca tathā yajñe vāsavaṃ ca śatakratum |
sahasrākṣaṃ devadevaṃ sarveṣāṃ prabhumulbaṇam ||27||
yajñādhīśaṃ surādhīśaṃ trilokeśaṃ śacīpatim |
yajñānāṃ caiva bhoktāraṃ somapaṃ somapapriyam ||28||
varuṇaṃ ca tathā somaṃ pāvakaṃ pavanaṃ tathā |
yamaṃ kuberaṃ dhanadaṃ gaṇādhīśaṃ tathāpare || 29||
heraṃbaṃ gajavaktraṃ ca sarvakārya prasādhakam |
smaraṇātsiddhidaṃ kāryakāmadaṃ kāmagaṃ param ||30||
bhavānīṃ kecanācāryāḥ pravadatyakhilārthadām |
ādimāyāṃ mahāśakti prakṛti puruṣānugām ||31||
brahmakatāsamāpannāṃ sṛṣṭisthityantakāriṇīm |
mātaraṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ devatānāṃ tathaiva ca || 32 ||
anādinidhanāṃ pūrṇāṃ vyāpikāṃ sarvajaṃtuṣu |
iśvarī sarvalokānāṃ nirguṇāṃ saguṇāṃ śivām ||33||
vaiṣṇavī śāṃkarī brāhmī vāsavīṃ vāruṇīṃ tathā |
vārāhīṃ nārasiṃhīṃ ca mahālakṣmīṃ tathā'dbhutām 34||
vedamātaramekāṃ ca vidyāṃ bhavataroḥ sthirām |
sarvaduḥkhanitrī ca smaraṇātsarvakāmadām ||35||
mokṣadāṃ ca mumukṣūṇāṃ kāmadāṃ ca phalārthinām |
triguṇātītarūpāṃ ca guṇavistārakārakām ||36||
nirguṇāṃ saguṇāṃ tasmāttāṃ dhyāyaṃti phalārthinaḥ |
niraṃjanaṃ nirākāraṃ nirlepaṃ nirguṇaṃ kila || 37 ||
arūpaṃ vyāpakaṃ brahma pravadaṃti munīśvarāḥ |
vedopaniṣadi proktastejomaya iti kvacit ||38||
sahasraśīrṣā puruṣaḥ sahasranayanastathā |
sahasrakarakarṇaśca sahasrāsyaḥ sahasrapāt ||39||
viṣṇoḥ pādamathākāyaṃ paramaṃ samudāhṛtam |
virājaṃ virajaṃ śāṃtaṃ pravadaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ || 40||
puruṣottamaṃ tathā cānye pravadaṃti purāvidaḥ |
naikopīti vadaṃtyanye prabhurīśaḥ kadācana || 41||

anīśvaramidaṃ sarvaṃ brahmāṇḍamiti kecana |
na kadāpīśajanyaṃ yajjagadetadacititam || 42 ||
sadaivedamanīśaṃ ca svabhāvotthaṃ sadedṛśam |
akartāsau pumānproktaḥ prakṛtistu tathā ca sā 43 ||
evaṃ vadaṃti sāṃkhyāśca munayaḥ kapilādayaḥ |
ete sandehasandohāḥ prabhavanti tathā'pare || 44 |
vikalpopahataṃ cetaḥ kiṃ karomi munīśvara |
dharmādharmavivakṣāyāṃ na mano meṃ sthiraṃ bhavet ||45||
ko dharmaḥ kīdṛśo'dharmacihnaṃ naivopalabhyate |
devāḥ sattvaguṇotpannāḥ satyadharmavyavasthitāḥ || 46 ||
pīḍyante dānavaiḥ pāpaiḥ kutra dharmavyavasthitiḥ |
dharmasthitāḥ sadācārāḥ pāṃḍavā mama vaṃśajāḥ || 47||
duḥkhaṃ bahuvidhaṃ prāptāstatra dharmasya kā sthitiḥ |
ato me hṛdayaṃ tāta vepate'tīva saṃśaye || 48||
kuru me saṃśayaṃ cetaḥ samartho'si mahāmune |
trāhi saṃsāravāryaistvaṃ jñānapotena māṃ mune || 49 ||
majjaṃtaṃ cotpatantaṃ ca magnaṃ mohajalāvile || 50||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe janamejayapraśne prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 ||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
yattvayā ca mahābāho pṛṣṭo'haṃ kurusattama |
tānpraśnānnāradaḥ prāha mayā pṛṣṭo munīśvaraḥ || 1 ||3
nārada uvāca
vyāsa kiṃ te bravīmyadya purājyaṃ saṃśayo mama |
utpanno hṛdaye'tyarthaṃ saṃdehāsārapīḍitaḥ || 2 ||
gatvā'haṃ pitaraṃ sthāne brahmāṇamamitaujasam |
apṛcchaṃ yattvayā pṛṣṭaṃ vyāsādya praśnamuttamam ||3||
pitaḥ kutaḥ samutpannaṃ brahmāṇḍamakhilaṃ vibho |
bhavatkṛtena vā samyakki vā viṣṇukṛtaṃ tvidam ||4||
rudrakṛtaṃ vā viśvātmanbrūhi satyaṃ jagatpate |
ārādhanīyaḥ kaḥ kāmaṃ sarvotkṛṣṭaśca kaḥ prabhuḥ || 5 ||
tatsarvaṃ vada me brahmansandehāṃ richadhi cānagha |
nimagno hyasmi saṃsāre duḥkharūpe'nṛtopamaṃ || 6 ||
sandehāṃdolitaṃ ceto na praśāmyati kutracit |
na tīrtheṣu na deveṣu sādhaneṣvitareṣu ca ||7||
avijñāya paraṃ tattvaṃ kutaḥ śāṃtiḥ parantapa |
vikīrṇa bahudhā cittaṃ naikatra sthiratāṃ vrajet ||8||
kaṃ smarāmi yuge kaṃ vā kaṃ vrajāmyarcayāmi kam |
staumi kaṃ nābhijānāmi deva sarveśvareśvaram || 9 ||
tato māṃ pratyuvācedaṃ brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ |
mayā satyavatīsūno kṛte praśne sudustare ||10||
brahmovāca
kiṃ bravīmi sutāgrāhaṃ durbodhaṃ praśnamuttamam |
tvayā śakyaṃ mahābhāga viṣṇorapi suniścayāt || 11 ||
rogī ko'pi na jānāti saṃsāre'sminmahāmate |
viraktaśca vijānāti nirīho yo vimatsaraḥ || 12 ||
ekārṇave purā jāte naṣṭe sthāvarajaṅgame |
bhūtamātre samutpanne saṃjajñe kamalādaham ||13||
nāpaśyaṃ taṇi somaṃ na vṛkṣānna ca parvatān |
kaṇikāyāṃ samāviṣṭaśritāmakaravaṃ tadā || 14 ||

kasmādahaṃ samudbhūtaḥ salile'sminmahārṇave |
ko me trātā prabhuḥ kartā saṃhartā vā yugātyaye 15 ||
na ca bhūrvidyate spaṣṭā yadādhāraṃ jalaṃ tvidam |
paṃkajaṃ kathamutpannaṃ prasiddhaṃ rūḍhiyogayoḥ || 16 ||
paśyāmyadyāsya paṃkaṃ taṃ mūlaṃ vai paṃkajasya ca |
bhaviṣyati dharā tatra mūlaṃ nāstyatra saṃśayaḥ ||17||
yāvadvarṣasahasrakam |
anveṣamāṇo dharaṇīṃ nāvāpa tāṃ yadā tadā || 18 ||
uttaransalile tatra vāgabhūdaśarīriṇī |
tato mayā tapastaptaṃ padme varṣasahasrakam ||19||
tapastapeti cākāśe |
sṛjeti punarudbhūtā vāṇī tatra śrutā mayā |
vimūढ़āhaṃ tadākarṇya kaṃ sṛjāmi karomi kim 20 ||
tadā daityāvapi prāptau dāruṇo madhukaiṭabho |
tābhyāṃ vibhīṣitaścāhaṃ yuddhāya makarālaye || 21 ||
tato'haṃ nālamālaṃbya vārimadhyamavātaram |
tadā tatra mayā dṛṣṭaḥ puruṣaḥ paramādbhutaḥ ||22||
meghaśyāmaśarīrastu pītavāsāśvaturbhujaḥ |
śeṣaśāyī jagannātho vanamālāvibhūṣitaḥ ||23||
śaṃkhacakragadāpadmādyāyudhaiḥ suvirājitaḥ |
śayānaṃ taṃ samālokya bhogibhogopari sthitam || 25 ||
citā mamādbhutā jātā kiṃ karomīti nārada |
mayā smṛtā tadā devī stutā nidrāsvarūpiṇī ||26||
dehānnirgatya sā devī gagane saṃsthitā śivā |
avitayaṃśarīrā sā divyābharaṇamaṃḍitā ||27||
viṣṇodehaṃ vihāyāśu virarāja nabhaḥ sthitā |
udatiṣṭhadameyātmā tayā mukto janārdana ||28||
paṃcavarṣasahasrāṇi kṛtavān yuddhamuttamam |
tadā vilokitau daityau hariṇā vinipātitau ||29||
utsaṃgaṃ vimalaṃ kṛtvā tatraiva nihatau ca tau |
rudrastatraiva saṃprāpto yatrāvāṃ saṃsthitāvubhau ||30||
tribhiḥ saṃvīkṣitāsmāmiḥ svasthā devī manoharā |
saṃstutā paramā śaktiruvācāsmānavasthitān ||31||
kṛpāvalokanaiḥ kṛtvā pāvanairmuditānatha |
devyuvāca
kājeśāḥ svāni kāryāṇi kurudhvaṃ samatandritāḥ ||32||
sṛṣṭisthitiviśiṣṭāni hatāvetau mahāsurau | kṛtvā svāni niketāni vasadhvaṃ vigatajvarāḥ 33
prajāścaturvidhāḥ sarvā: sṛjadhvaṃ svavibhūtibhiḥ |
brahmovāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasyāḥ peśalaṃ sukhadaṃ mṛdu ||34||
abrūma tāmaśaktāḥ smaḥ kathaṃ kurmastvimāḥ prajāḥ |
na mahī vitatā mātaḥ sarvatra vitataṃ jalam ||35||
na bhūtāni guṇāścāpi tanmātrāṇīndriyāṇi ca |
tadākarṇya vaco'smākaṃ śivā jātā smitānanā || 36||
jhaṭityevāgataṃ tatra vimānaṃ gaganācchubham |
sovācāsminsurāḥ kāmaṃ viśadhvaṃ gatasādhvasāḥ ||

vimāne brahmaviṣṇvīśā darśayāmyadya cādbhutam |
taniśamya vacastasyā omityuktvā punarvayam 38 ||
samāruhyopaviṣṭāḥ smo vimāne ratnamaṃḍite |
muktādāmasusaṃvīte kiṃkiṇījālaśabdite || 39 ||
surasadmanibhe ramye trayastatrāviśaṃkitāḥ |
sopaviṣṭāṃstato dṛṣṭvā devyaṃsmānvijiteṃdriyān 40 ||
svaśaktathā tadvimānaṃ vai nodayāmāsa cāṃbare ||41||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
brahmovāca
vimānaṃ tanmanovegaṃ yatra sthānāṃtare gatam |
na jalaṃ tatra paśyāmo vismitāḥ smo vayaṃ tadā ||1||
vṛkṣā: sarvaphalā ramyā : kokilārāvamaṃḍitā: |
mahī mahīdharāḥ kāmaṃ vanānyupavanāni ca || 2 ||
nāryaśva puruṣāścaiva paśavaśva saridvarāḥ |
vāpyaḥ kūpāstaḍāgāśca palvalāni ca nirjharāḥ || 3 ||
purato nagaraṃ ramyaṃ divya prākāramaṃḍitam |
yajñaśālāsamāyuktaṃ nānāharmyavirājitam ||4||
pratyabhijñā tadā jātā'pyasmākaṃ prekṣya tatpuram |
svargīyamiti kenāsau nirmitosti mahādbhutam ||5||
rājānaṃ devasaṃkāśaṃ vrajaṃtaṃ mṛgayāṃ vane |
asmābhiḥ saṃsthitā dṛṣṭā vimānopari cāṃbikā 6 ||
kṣaṇāccacāla gagane vimānaṃ pavaneritam |
muhūrtādvā tataḥ prāptaṃ deśe cānye manohare ||7||
naṃdanaṃ ca vanaṃ tatra dṛṣṭamasmābhiruttamam |
pārijātatarucchāyāsaṃśritā surabhiḥ sthitā ||8||
caturdanto gajastasyāḥ samīpe samavasthitaḥ |
apsarasāṃ tatra vṛṃdāni menakāprabhṛtīni ca || 9 ||
krīḍaṃti vividhairbhāvairgānanṛtyasamanvitaiḥ |
gaṃdharvāḥ śataśastaṃtra yajñā vidyādharāstathā || 10 ||
maṃdāravāṭikāmadhye gāyaṃti ca ramaṃti ca |
dṛṣṭaḥ śatakratustatra paulomyā sahitaḥ prabhuḥ || 11 ||
vayaṃ tu vismitāścāsma dṛṣṭvā traiviṣṭapaṃ tadā |
yāda:pati kuberaṃ ca yamaṃ sūrya vibhāvasum || 12 |
vilokya vismitāścāsma vayaṃ tatra surānsthitān |
tadā vinirgatorājā purāttasmātsumaṃḍitāt || 13 ||
devarāja ivākṣobhyo naravāhyāvanau sthitaḥ |
vimānasthā vayaṃ tuccacāla tarasāgatam ||14||
brahmalokaṃ tadā divyaṃ sarvadevanamaskṛtam |
tatra brahmāṇamālokya vismitau harakeśavau || 15 |
sabhāyāṃ tatra vedāśca sarve sāṃgāḥ svarūpiṇaḥ |
sāgarāḥ saritaścaiva parvatāḥ pannagoragāḥ || 16 ||
māmūcatuścaturvaktraḥ ko'yaṃ brahmā sanātanaḥ |
tāvavocamahaṃ naiva jāne sṛṣṭipatiṃ patim ||17||
ko'haṃ ko'yaṃ kimarthaṃ vā bhramo'yaṃ mama ceśvarī |
kṣaṇādatha vimānaṃ taccacālāśu manojavam || 18 |
kailāsaśikhare prāptaṃ ramye yakṣagaṇānvite |
maṃdāravāṭikāramye kī kokilakūjite || 19||
vīṇāmurajabādyaiśca nādite sukhade śive |
yadā prāptaṃ vimānaṃ tattadaiva sadanācchubhāt || 20 |!

nirgato bhagavāñchaṃbhurvṛṣārūḍhastrilocanaḥ |
paṃcānano daśabhujaḥ kṛtasomārdhaśekharaḥ ||21||
vyāghracarmaparīdhāno gajacarmottarīyakaḥ |
pāṇirakṣo mahāvīrau gajānanaṣaḍānanau ||22||
śivena saha putrau dvau vrajamānau virejatuḥ |
naṃdiprabhṛtayaḥ sarve gaṇapāśca varāśca te ||23|
jayaśabdaṃ prayuṃjānā vrajanti śivapṛṣṭhagāḥ |
taṃ vīkṣya śaṃkaraṃ cānyaṃ vismitāstatra nārada || 24 ||
mātṛbhiḥ saṃśayāviṣṭastatrāhaṃ nyavasaṃ mune |
kṣaṇāttasmādvireḥ śṛṃgādvimānaṃ vātaraṃhasā ||25||
vaikuṃṭhasadanaṃ prāptaṃ ramāramaṇamaṃdiram |
asaṃbhāvyā vibhūtiśca tatra dṛṣṭā mayā suta ||26||
visiṣmiye tadā viṣṇurdṛṣṭvā tatpuramuttamam |
sadanāgre yayau tāvaddhariḥ kamalalocanaḥ || 27 ||
atasīkusumābhāsaḥ pītavāsāścaturbhujaḥ |
dvijarājādhirūḍhaśca divyābharaṇabhūṣitaḥ || 28||
vījyamānastadā lakṣmyā kāminyā cāmaraiḥ śubhaiḥ |
taṃ vīkṣya vismitāḥ sarve vayaṃ viṣṇuṃ sanātanam 29 ||
parasparaṃ nirīkṣaṃtaḥ sthitāstasmin varāsane |
tataścacāla tarasā vimānaṃ vātaraṃhasā ||30||
sudhāsamudraḥ saṃprāpto miṣṭavārimahormimān |
yādogaṇasamākīrṇaścaladvīcivirājitaḥ ||31||
pādapairatiśobhitaḥ |
nānāstaraṇasaṃyukto nānācitravicitritaḥ || 32||
maṃdārapārijātādyaiḥ
nānādāmavirājitaḥ |
aśokabakulākhyaiśva vṛkṣaiḥ kurabakādibhiḥ ||33||
muktādāmaparikliṣṭo
saṃvṛtaḥ sarvataḥ saumyaiḥ ketakīcaṃpakairvṛtaḥ |
kokilārāvasaṃghuṣṭo divyagaṃdhasamanvitaḥ ||34||
dvirephātiraṇatkārairaṃjitaḥ paramādbhutaḥ |
tasmindvīpe śivākāraḥ paryaṅkaḥ sumanoharaḥ ||35||
ratnālikhacito'tyarthaṃ nānāratnavirājitaḥ |
dṛṣṭo'smābhivimānasthairdūrataḥ parimaṃḍitaḥ || 36 ||
iṃdracāpasamanvitaḥ |
paryaṅkapravare tasminnupaviṣṭā varāṃganā ||37||
nānāstaraṇasaṃchanna raktamālyāṃbaradharā raktagaṃdhānulepanā |
suraktanayanā kāṃtā vidyutkoṭisamaprabhā ||38||
raktadaṃtacchadavirājitā |
ramākoṭaghadhikā kāṃtyā sūryabiṃbanibhākhilā || 39||
sucāruvadanā śrībhuvaneśvarī |
adṛṣṭapūrvā dṛṣṭā sā suṃdarī smitabhūṣaṇā ||40||
varapāśāṃkuśābhīṣṭadharā pakṣivṛṃdaniṣevitā |
aruṇā karuṇāmūrtiḥ kumārī navayauvanā || 41 ||
hrīṃkārajapaniṣṭaistu maṃdasmitamukhāṃbujā |
udyatpīnakucadvaṃdvanirjitāṃbhojakuḍmalā ||42||
sarvaśṛṅgāraveṣāḍhyā |
kanakāṃgadakeyūrakirīṭapariśobhitā ||43||
nānāmaṇigaṇākīrṇabhūṣaṇairupaśobhitā |
hṛllekhā bhuvaneśīti nāmajāpaparāyaṇaiḥ || 44||
kanakacchrīcakratāṭaṃkaviṭaṃkavadanāṃbujā
sakhīvṛṃdaiḥ stutā nityaṃ bhuvaneśī maheśvarī |
hullekhādyābhiramarakanyābhiḥ pariveṣṭitā || 45||
pariveṣṭitā |
devī paṭkoṇamadhyasthā yaṃtrarājopari sthitā ||46 ||
anaṃgakusumādyābhirdevībhiḥ
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ vismitāḥ sarve vayaṃ tatra sthitā'bhavan |
keyaṃ kāṃtā ca kiṃ nāma na jānīmo'tra saṃsthitāḥ 47||
sahasrakarasaṃyutā |
sahasravadanā ramyā bhāti dūrādasaṃśayam ||48 ||
sahasranayanā rāmā

bhāsata nāpi gaṃdharvī neyaṃ devāṃganā kila |
iti saṃśayamāpannāstatra nārada saṃsthitāḥ || 49||
tavāsī bhagavānviṣṇurdaṣvā tāṃ cāruhāsinīm |
uvācāṃbāṃ svavijñānātkṛtvā manasi niśvayam ||50||
eṣā bhagavatī devī sarveṣāṃ kāraṇaṃ hi naḥ |
mahāvidyā mahāmāyā pūrṇā prakṛtiravyayā ||51||
buyā'lpadhiyāṃ devī yogagamyā durāśayā |
icchā parātmanaḥ kāmaṃ nityānityasvarūpiṇī ||52||
hurārādhyā'lpabhāgyaiśva devī viśveśvarī śivā |
vedagarbhā viśālākṣī sarvaṣāmādirīśvarī || 13 ||
evā saṃhṛtya sakalaṃ viśvaṃ krīḍati saṃkṣaye |
liṃgāni sarvajīvānāṃ svaśarīre niveśya ca || 54 ||
sarvabījamayī hyeṣā rājate sāmprataṃ surī |
vibhūtayaḥ sthitāḥ pārśve paśyatāṃ koṭiśaḥ kramāt ||
divyābharaṇabhūṣāḍhayā divyagaṃdhānulepanāḥ |
paricaryāparāḥ sarvāḥ paśyatāṃ brahmaśaṃkarau || 56 ||
dhanyā vayaṃ mahābhāgāḥ kṛtakṛtyāḥ sma sāṃpratam |
yadatra darśanaṃ prāptaṃ bhagavatyāḥ svayaṃ tvidam ||17||
tapastaptaṃ purā yatnāttasyedaṃ phalamuttamam |
anyathā darśanaṃ kutra bhavedasmākamādarāt ||18||
paśyaṃti puṇyapuṃjā ye ye vadānyāstapasvinaḥ |
rāgiṇo naiva paśyaṃti devī bhagavatīṃ śivām ||59 ||
mūlaprakṛtirevaiṣā sadā puruṣasaṃgatā |
brahmāṃḍaṃ darśayatyeṣāṃ kṛtvā vai paramātmane || 60 ||
draṣṭā'sau dṛśyamakhilaṃ brahmāṃḍaṃ devatāḥ surau |
tasyaiṣā kāraṇaṃ sarvā māyā sarveśvarī śivā || 69 ||
kvāhaṃ vā kva surāḥ sarve rambhādyāḥ surayoṣitaḥ |
lakṣāṃśena tulāmasyā na bhavāmaḥ kathaṃcana || 62 ||
saivā varāṃganā nāma yā vai dṛṣṭā mahārṇave |
bālabhāve mahādevī dolayaṃtīva māṃ mudā || 63 ||
śayanaṃ vaṭapatre ca paryake susthire dṛḍhe |
pādāṃguṣṭhaṃ kare kṛtvā niveśya mukhapaṃkaje ||64||
lelihaṃtaṃ ca krīḍaṃtamane kaiba liceṣṭitaiḥ |
ramamāṇaṃ komalāṃgaṃ vaṭapatrapuṭe sthitam || 65||
gāyaṃtī dolayaṃtī ca bālabhāvānmayi sthite |
seyaṃ suniścitaṃ jñātaṃ jātaṃ me darśanādiva || 66 ||
kāmaṃ no jananī sa~ṣā śṛṇu taṃ pravadāmyaham |
anubhūtaṃ mayā pūrva pratyabhijñā samutthitā || 67 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskaṃdhe tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 3 ||
atha caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
brahmovāca
ityuktvā bhagavānviṣṇuḥ punarāha janārdanaḥ |
vayaṃ gacchema pārśve'syāḥ praṇamaṃtaḥ punaḥ punaḥ || 1 ||
seyaṃ varā mahāmāyā dāsyatyeṣā varānhi naḥ |
stuvāpaḥ saṃnidhi prāpya nirbhayāścaraṇāṃtike ||2||
yadi no vārayiṣyati dvārasthāḥ paricārakāḥ |
paṭhiṣyāmaśca tatrasthāḥ stutiṃ devyāḥ samāhitāḥ || 3||
brahmovāca
ityukte hariṇā vākye suprahṛṣṭo susaṃsthitoṃ |
jātau pramuditau kāmaṃ nikaṭe gamanāya ca || 4 || ||

omityuktvā hari sarve vimānāttvaritāstrayaḥ |
uttīrya nirgatā dvāri śaṃkamānā manasyalam ||5||
dvārasthānvīkṣya tānsarvāndevī bhagavatī tadā |
smitaṃ kṛtvā cakārāśu tāṃstrīnstrīrūpadhāriṇaḥ || 6 ||
vayaṃ yuvatayo jātāḥ surūpāścārubhūṣaṇāḥ |
vismayaṃ paramaṃ prāptā gatāstatsaṃnidhi punaḥ ||7|
sā dṛṣṭvā naḥ sthitāṃstatra strīrūpāṃścaraṇāṃtike |
vyalokayata cāvaṃgī premasaṃpūrṇa yā dṛśā ||8|
praṇamya tāṃ mahādevīṃ purataḥ saṃsthitā vayam |
parasparaṃ lokayaṃta: strīrūpāścārubhūṣaṇāḥ ||9||
pādapīṭhaṃ prekṣamāṇā nānāmaṇivibhūṣitam |
sūryakoṭipratīkāśaṃ sthitāstatra vayaṃ trayaḥ || 10 ||
kāścidraktāṃbarāstatra sahacarya : sahacaryaḥ sahasraśaḥ |
kāśvinīlāṃbarā nāryastathā pītāṃbarāḥ śubhāḥ || 11||
devyaḥ sarvāḥ śubhākārā vicitrāmbarabhūṣaṇāḥ |
virejuḥ pārśvatastasyāḥ paricaryāparāḥ kila || 12||
jaguśca nanṛtuścānyāḥ paryupāsaṃta tāḥ striyaḥ |
vīṇāmārutavādyāni vādayaṃto mudānvitāḥ ||14||
brahmāṃḍamakhilaṃ sarva tatra sthāvarajaṃgamam |
ahaṃ viṣṇuśca rudraśca vāyuragniryamo raviḥ || 15||
varuṇaḥ śītagustvaṣṭā kuberaḥ pākaśāsanaḥ |
parvatāḥ sāgarā nadyo gaṃdharvāpsarasastathā ||16||
viśvāvasuśvitraketuḥ śvetaścitrāṃgadastathā |
nāradastuṃburuścaiva hāhāhūhūstathaiva ca || 17||
aśvinau vasavaḥ sādhyāḥ siddhāśca pitarastathā |
nāgāḥ śeṣādayaḥ sarve kinnaroragarākṣasāḥ || 18||
vaikuṃṭho brahmalokaśca kailāsaḥ parvatottamaḥ |
sarvaṃ tadakhilaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ nakha madhyasthitaṃ ca tat ||19||
majjanmapaṃkajaṃ tatra sthito'haṃ caturānanaḥ |
śeṣaśāyī jagannāthastathā ca madhukaiṭabhau ||20||
śrībhagavānuvāca
evaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ mayā tatra pādapadmanakhe sthitam |
vismato'haṃ tato vīkṣya kimetadini yaśaṃkitaḥ ||21||
viṣṇuśca vismayāviṣṭaḥ śaṃkaraśca tathā sthitaḥ |
tāṃ tadā menire devīṃ vayaṃ viśvasya mātaram ||22||
tato varṣaśataṃ pūrṇa vyatikrāṃtaṃ prapaśyataḥ |
sudhāmaye śive dvīpe vihāraṃ vividhaṃ tadā || 23 ||
sakhya iva tadā tatra menire'mmānavasthitān |
devyaḥ pramuditākārā nānābharaṇamaṃḍitāḥ || 24||
vayamapyatiramyatvādbabhūvima vimohitāḥ |
pranaṣṭamanasaḥ sarve payyanbhāvānmanoramān ||25||
ekaṭā tāṃ mahādevīṃ devīṃ śrībhuvaneśvarīm |
tuṣṭāva bhagavānviṣṇuryavatībhāvasaṃsthitaḥ ||26||
śrībhagavānuvāca
namo devyaṃ prakṛtyai ca vidhātryai satataṃ namaḥ |
kalyāṇyai kāmadāyai ca vṛddhisiddhayai namonamaḥ ||27||
saccidānaṃdarū piṇyai saṃsārāraṇayaṃ namaḥ |
paṃcakṛtyavidhātryai te bhuvanasyai namonamaḥ ||28||
sarvādhiṣṭānarūpāya kūṭasthāyai namonamaḥ |
ardhamātrārthabhṛtāyai hullekhāyai namonamaḥ ||29||
jñātaṃ mayā'khilamidaṃ tvayi sanniviṣṭaṃ tvatto'sya saṃbhavalayāvapi mātara |

śaktiśca te'sya karaṇe vitataprabhāvā jñātā'dhunā sakalalokamayīti nūnam || 30 ||
vistārya sarvamakhilaṃ sadasadvikāra saṃdarśayasyavikalaṃ puruṣāya kāle |
tattvaiśca ṣoḍaśabhireva ca saptabhiśca bhāsīṃdrajālamiva naḥ kila raṃjanāya || 31||
na tvāmṛte kimapi vastugataṃ vibhāti vyāpyaiva vyāpyaiva sarvamakhilaṃ tvamavasthitā'si |
śakti vinā vyavahṛtau puruṣo'pyaśakto baṃbhaṇyate janani buddhimatā janena ||32||
prīṇāsi viśvamakhilaṃ satataṃ prabhāvaḥ svaistejasā ca sakalaṃ prakaṭīkaroṣi |
atsyeva devi tarasā kila kalpakāle ko veda devi caritaṃ tava vai bhavasya ||33||
trātā vayaṃ janani te madhukaiṭabhābhyāṃ lokāśca te suvitatāḥ khalu darśitā vai |
nītāḥ sukhasya bhavane paramāṃ ca koṭiṃ yaddarśanaṃ tava bhavāni mahāprabhāvam ||34||
nāhaṃ bhavo na ca viriṃci viveda mātaḥ ko'nyo hi vetti caritaṃ tava durvibhāvyam |
kānīha saṃti bhuvanāni mahāprabhāve hyasminbhavāni racite racanākalāpe || 35 ||
asmābhiratra bhuvane hariranya eva dṛṣṭaḥ śivaḥ kamalajaḥ prathitaprabhāvaḥ |
anyeṣu devi bhuvaneṣu na saṃti kiṃ te kiṃ vidma devi vitataṃ tava suprabhāvam ||36||
yāce'mba teṃ'trikamalaṃ praṇipatya kāmaṃ citte sadā vasatu rūpamidaṃ tavaitat |
nāmāpi vaktrakuhare satataṃ tavaiva saṃdarśanaṃ tava padāṃbujayoḥ sadaiva || 37||
bhṛtyo'yamasti satataṃ mayi bhāvanīyaṃ tvāṃ svāminīti manasā nanu ciṃtayāmi |
eṣā''vayoraviratā kila devi bhūyādvayāptiḥ sadaiva jananī sutayorivārthe || 38||
tvaṃ vetsi sarvamakhilaṃ bhuvanaprapaṃcaṃ sarvajñatā parisamāptinitāntabhūmiḥ |
kiṃ pāmareṇa jagadaṃba nivedanīyaṃ yadyuktamācara bhavāni taveṃgitaṃ syāt || 39||
brahmā sṛjatyavati viṣṇurumāpatiśca saṃhārakāraka iyaṃ tu jane prasiddhiḥ |
kiṃ satyametadapi detri tavecchayā vai kartuṃ kṣamā vayamaje tava śaktiyuktāḥ || 40 ||
dhātrī gharādharasute na jagadrirbhāta ādhāraśaktirakhilaṃ tava vai bibharti |
sūryo'pi bhāti varade prabhayo yutaste tvaṃ sarvametadakhilaṃ virajā vibhāsi || 41 ||
brahmā'hamīśvaravaraḥ kila te prabhāvātsarve vayaṃ janitrutā na yadā tu nityāḥ |
ke'nye surāḥ śatamakhapramukhāśca nityā nityā tvameva jananī prakṛtiḥ purāṇā ||42 ||
tvaṃ cedbhavāni dayase puruṣaṃ purāṇaṃ jāne'hamadya tava saṃnidhigaḥ sadaiva |
nīcedahaṃ vibhuranādiranīha īśo viśvātmadhīriti tamaḥ prakṛtiḥ sadaiva ||43||
vidyā tvameva nanu buddhimatāṃ narāṇāṃ śaktistvameva kila śaktimatāṃ sadaiva |

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 5
tvaṃ kīrtikāṃtikamalāmalatuṣṭirūpā muktipradā viratireva manuṣyaloke || 44 ||
gāyatryasi prathamavedakalā tvameva svāhā svadhā bhagavatī saguṇārdhamātrā |
āmnāya eva vihito nigamo bhavatyai saṃjīvanāya satataṃ surapūrvajānām || 45||
mokṣārthameva racayasyakhilaṃ prapañcaṃ teṣāṃ gatāḥ khalu yato nanu jīvabhāvam !
aśā anādinidhanasya kilānaghasya pūrṇārṇavasya vitatā hi yathā taraṃgāḥ || 46 ||
jīvo yadā tu parivetti tavaiva kṛtyaṃ tvaṃ saṃharasyakhilametaditi prasiddham |
nāṭaghaṃ naṭena racitaṃ vitathe'ntaraṃge kārye kṛte viramase prathitaprabhāvā ||47||
tvameva mama mohamayādbhavāndhestvāmaṃbike satatamemi mahātide ca |
trātā rāgādibhiviracite vitathe kilānte māmeva pāhi bahuduḥkhakare ca kāle || 48 ||
namo devi mahāvidye namāmi caraṇau tava |
sadā jñānaprakāśaṃ me dehi sarvārthade śive ||49||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe caturtho'dhyāyaḥ ||4||
atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
brahmovāca
ityuktvā virate viṣṇoṃ devadeve janārdane |
uvāca śaṃkaraḥ śarvaḥ praṇataḥ purataḥ sthitaḥ || 1||
śiva uvāca
yadi haristava devi vibhāvajastadanu padmaja eva tavodbhavaḥ |
kimahamatra tavāpi na sadguṇaḥ sakalalokavidhau caturā śive || 2 ||
tvamasi bhūḥ salilaṃ pavanastathā khamapi vahniguṇaśca tathā punaḥ |
janani tāni punaḥ karaṇāni ca tvamasi buddhimano'pyatha haṃkṛtiḥ || 3 ||
na ca vidaṃti vadati ca ye'nyathā hariharājakṛtaṃ nikhilaṃ jagat |
tava kṛtāstraya eva sadaiva te viracayaṃti jagatsacarācaram || 4 ||
vyavanivāyukhavahnijalādibhiḥ saviṣayaiḥ saguṇaiśca jagadbhavet |
yadi tadā kathamadya ca tatsphuṭaṃ prabhavatīti tavāṃba kalāmṛte || 5 ||
bhavasi sarvamidaṃ sacarācaraṃ tvamajaviṣṇuśivākṛtikalpitam |
vividhaveṣavilāsa kutūhalaṃ viramase ramase'mba yathāruci || 6 ||
sakalaloka sisṛkṣurahaṃ hariḥ kamalabhūśca bhavāma yadā'mbike |
tava padāmbujapāṃsuparigrahaṃ samadhigamya tadā nanu cakrima || 7 ||

yadi dayārdramanā na sadāṃbike kathamahaṃ vihitaśca tamoguṇaḥ |
kamalajaśca rajoguṇasaṃbhavaḥ suvihitaḥ kimu sattvaguṇo hariḥ ||8||
yadi na te viṣamā matiraṃbike kathamidaṃ bahudhā vihitaṃ jagat |
sacivabhūpatibhṛtyajanāvṛtaṃ bahudhanairadhanaiśca samākulam ||9||
tava guṇāstraya eva sadā kṣamāḥ prakaṭanāvana saṃharaṇeṣu vai
hariharaguhiṇāśca kramāttvayā viracitāstrijagat kila kāraṇam ||10||
paricitāni mayā hariṇā tathā kamalajena vimānagatena vai |
pathigatairbhuvanāni kṛtāni vā kathaya kena bhavāni navāni ca || 11 ||
sṛjasi pāsi jagajjagadaṃbike svakalayā kiyadicchasi nāśitum |
ramayase svapati puruṣaṃ sadā tava gati na hi vidma vayaṃ śive ||12||
janani dehi padāmbujasevanaṃ bhavati bhāgavatānapi naḥ sadā |
puruṣatāmadhigamya padāṃbujādvirahitāḥ kva labhe na sukhaṃ sphuṭam ||13||
na rucirasti mamāṃba padāṃbujaṃ tava vihāya śive bhuvaneṣvalam |
nivasituṃ naradehamavāpya ca tribhuvanasya patitvamavāpya vai || 14||
sudati nāsti manāgapi me ratiryuvatibhāvamavāpya tavāntike |
puruṣatā kva sukhāya bhavatyalaṃ tava padaṃ na yadīkṣaṇagocaram ||15||
tribhuvaneṣu bhavatviyamaṃ bike mama sadaiva hi kīrtiranābilā |
yuvatibhāvamavāpya padāṃbujaṃ paricitaṃ tava saṃsṛtināśanam || 16 ||
bhuvi vihāya tavāntikasevanaṃ ka iha vāṃchati rājyamakaṃṭakam |
truṭirasa kila yāti yugātmatāṃ na nikaṭaṃ yadi te'ghrisaroruham ||17||
tapasi ye niratā munayo'malāstava vihāya padāmbujapūjanam | 2
janani te vidhinā kila vaṃcitāḥ paribhavo vibhave parikalpitaḥ || 18 ||
na tapasā na damena samādhinā na ca tathā vihitaiḥ kratubhiryathā |
tava padābjaparāganiṣevaṇādbhavati muktiraje bhavasāgarāt ||19||
kuru dayāṃ dayase yadi devi māṃ kathaya maṃtramanāvilamadbhutam |
samabhavaṃ prajapansukhito hyahaṃ suviśadaṃ ca navārṇamanuttamam ||20||
prathamajanmani cādhigato mayā tadadhunā na vibhāti navākṣaraḥ |
kathaya māṃ manumadya bhavārṇavājjanani tāraya tāraya tārake ||22||

śrīmaddevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 5
ityuktā sā tadā devī śivenādbhutatejasā |
uccacārāṃbikā maṃtra prasphuṭaṃ ca navākṣaram ||22||
taṃ gṛhītvā mahādevaḥ parāṃ sudamavāpa ha| praṇamya caraṇau devyāstatraivāvasthitaḥ śivaḥ ||23||
japannavākṣaraṃ maṃtra kāmadaṃ mokṣadaṃ tathā |
bījayuktaṃ śubhoccāraṃ śaṃkarastasthivāṃstadā ||24||
taṃ tathā'vasthitaṃ dṛṣṭvā śaṃkaraṃ lokaśaṃkaram |
avocaṃ tāṃ mahāmāyāṃ saṃsthito'haṃ padāṃtike ||25||
na vedāstvāmevaṃ kalayitumihāsannapaṭavo
yataste nocustvāṃ sakaladhanadhātrī mavikalām |
svadhābhūtā devī sakalamakhahomeṣu vihitā
tadā tvaṃ sarvajñā janani khalu jātā tribhuvane ||26||
kartā'haṃ prakaromi sarvamakhilaṃ brahmāṃḍamatyadbhutaṃ
ko'nyostīha carācare tribhuvane mattaḥ samarthaḥ pumān |
dhanyo'smyatra na saṃśayaḥ kila yadā brahmā'smi lokātigo
magno'haṃ bhavasāgare pravitate garvābhiveśāditi ||27||
adyāhaṃ tava pādapaṅkajaparāgādānagarveṇa vaṃ
dhanyo'smīti yathārthavādanipuṇo jātaḥ prasādācca te |
yāce tvāṃ bhavabhītināśacaturāṃ muktipradāṃ ceśvarīṃ
hitvā mohakṛtaṃ mahātinigaḍaṃ tvadbhaktiyuktaṃ kuru ||28||
ato'haṃ ca jāto vimuktaḥ kathaṃ syāṃ sarojādameyāttvadāviṣkṛtādvai |
tavājñākaraḥ kiṃkaro'smīti nūnaṃ śive pāhi māṃ mohamagnaṃ bhavāndho ||29||
na jānaṃti ye mānavāste vadanti prabhuṃ māṃ tavādyaṃ caritraṃ pavitram |
yajaṃtīha ye yājakāḥ svargakāmā na te te prabhāvaṃ vidaṃtyeva kāmam ||30||
tvayā nirmito'haṃ vidhitve vihāraṃ vikartuṃ caturdhā vidhāyādisargam |
ahaṃ vedmi ko'nyoṃ vivedātimāye kṣamasvāparādhaṃ tvahaṅkāraṃjaṃ me || 31 ||
śramaṃ ye'ṣṭadhā yogamārge pravṛttāḥ prakurvati mūḍhāḥ samādhau sthitā vai |
na jānaṃti te nāma mokṣapradaṃ vā samuccāritaṃ jātu mātamiṣeṇa ||32||
vicāre pare tattvasaṃkhyāvidhāne pade mohitā nāma te saṃvihāya |
na kiṃ te vimūḍhā bhavābdhau bhavāni tvamevāsi saṃsāramuktipradā vai ||33||
paraṃ tattvavijñānamādyairjanairyeraje cānubhūtaṃ tyajatyeva te kim |
nimeṣārdhamātraṃ pavitraṃ caritraṃ śivā cāṃbikā śaktirośeti nāma ||34||

na kiṃ tvaṃ samarthā'si viśvaṃ vidhātuṃ dṛśaivāśu sarva caturdhā vibhaktam |
vinodārthamevaṃvidhaṃ māṃ vidhāyādisarge kiledaṃ karoṣīti kāmam ||35||
hariḥ pālakaḥ kiṃ tvayā'sau madhorvā tathā kaiṭabhādrakṣitaḥ siṃdhumadhye |
haraḥ saṃhṛtaḥ kiṃ tvayā'sau na kāle kathaṃ me bhruvormadhyadeśātsa jātaḥ || 36 ||
na te janma kutrāpi dṛṣṭaṃ śrutaṃ vā kutaḥ saṃbhavaste na ko'pīha veda |
kilādyāsi śaktistvamekā bhavāni svataṃtraḥ samastairato bodhitā'si ||37||
tvayā saṃyuto'haṃ vikatuṃ samartho haristrātumaṃba tvayā saṃyutaśca |
haraḥ saprahatuṃ tvayaiveha yuktaḥ kṣamā nādya sarve tvayā viprayuktāḥ ||38||
yathā'haṃ hariḥ śaṃkaraḥ kiṃ tathā'nye na jātā na saṃtoha no vā'bhaviṣyan |
na muhyanti ke'smiṃstavātyaṃtacitre vinode vivādāspade'lpāśayānām ||39||
akartā guṇaspaṣṭa evādya devo devo nirīho'nupādhiḥ sadaivākalaśca |
tathāpīśvaraste vitīrṇaṃ vinodaṃ susaṃpaśyatītyāhurevaṃ vidhijñāḥ ||40||
dṛṣṭādṛṣṭavibhede'sminprāktvatto vai pumānparaḥ |
nānyaḥ ko'pi tṛtīyo'sti prameye suvicārite || 41 ||
na mithyā vedavākyaṃ vai kalpanīyaṃ kadācana |
virodho'yaṃ mayā'tyaṃtaṃ hṛdaye tu viśaṃkitaḥ || 42||
ekamevādvitīyaṃ yadbrahma vedā vadati vai |
sā kiṃ tvaṃ vāpyasau vā kiṃ saṃdehaṃ vinivartaya || 43 ||
niḥsaṃśayaṃ na me cetaḥ prabhavatyaviśaṅkitam |
dvitvaikatvavicāre'sminnimagnaṃ kṣullakaṃ manaḥ || 44 ||
svamukhenāpi saṃdehaṃ chettumarhasi māmakam |
puṇyabhogācca me prāptā saṃgatistava pādayoḥ ||45||
pumānasi tvaṃ strī vā'si vada vistarato mama |
jñātvā'haṃ paramāṃ śakti muktaḥ syāṃ bhavasāgarāt 46 ||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5||
atha ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
brahmovāca
iti pṛṣṭā mayā devī vinayāvanatena ca |
uvāca vacanaṃ lakṣṇamāyā bhagavatī hi sā ||1||
devyuvāca
sadaikatvaṃ na bhedo'sti sarvadaiva mamāsya ca |
yo'sau sāhamahaṃ yosī bhedo'sti mativibhramāt ||2||
bāvayoraṃtaraṃ sūkṣmaṃ yo veda matimānhi saḥ |
vimuktaḥ sa tu saṃsārānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 3 ||
ekamevādvitīyaṃ vai brahma nityaṃ sanātanam |
dvaitabhāvaṃ punaryāti kāla utpitsusaṃjñake ||4||

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe a yāyaḥ 6
yathā dīpastathopādhayagātsaṃjāyate dvidhā |
chāyevādarśamadhye vā pratibiṃbaṃ tathā''vayoḥ ||5||
bheda utpattikāle vai sugarthi prabhavatyaja |
daśyādṛśya vibhedo'yaṃ dvaividhye sati sarvathā ||6||
nāhaṃ strī na pumāṃścāhaṃ na klībaṃ sargasaṃkṣaye |
sarge sati vibhedaḥ syātkalpito'yaṃ dhiyā punaḥ||7||
ahaṃ buddhirahaṃ śrīśca dhṛtiḥ kīrtiḥ smṛtistathā |
śraddhā medhā dayā lajjā kṣudhā tṛṣṇā tathā kṣamā ||8|
kāṃtiḥ śāṃtiḥ pipāsā ca nidrā taṃdrā jarā'jarā |
vidyāvidyā spṛhā bāṃchā śaktiśvāśaktireva ca ||9|
vasā majjā ca tvakvāhaṃ dṛṣṭirvāganṛtānṛtā |
parā madhyā ca paśyaṃtī nāṭagho'haṃ vividhāśca yāḥ ||
kiṃ nāhaṃ paśya saṃsāre madviyuktaṃ kimasti hi |
sarvamevāhamityevaṃ niśvayaṃ viddhi padmaja || 11||
etairme niścita rūpairvihīnaṃ kiṃ vadasva me |
tasmādahaṃ vidhe cāsminsarge vai vitatā'bhavam ||12||
nūnaṃ sarveṣu deveṣu nānānāmadharā hyaham |
bhavāmi śaktirūpeṇa karomi ca parākramam ||13|
gaurī brāhmī tathā raudrī vārāhī vaiṣṇavī śivā |
vāruṇī cātha kauberī nārasiṃhī ca vāsavī || 14 |
utpanneṣu samasteṣu kāryeṣu praviśāmi tān |
karomi sarvakāryāṇi nimittaṃ taṃ vidhāya vai || 15 ||
jale śītaṃ tathā vahnāvauṣṇyaṃ jyotidivākare |
niśānāthe himā kāmaṃ prabhavāmi yathā tathā || 16 ||
mayā tyaktaṃ vidhe nūnaṃ spandituṃ na kṣama bhavet |
jīvajātaṃ ca saṃsāre niścayo'yaṃ bruve tvayi || 17 ||
aśaktaḥ śaṅkaro haṃtuṃ daityānkila mayojjhitaḥ |
śaktihīnaṃ naraṃ brūte loka vātidurbalam ||18||
rudrahīnaṃ viṣṇuhīnaṃ na vadaṃti janāḥ kila |
śaktihīnaṃ yathā sarve pravadaṃti narādhamam ||19||
patitaḥ skhalito bhītaḥ śāṃtaḥ śatruvaśaṃ gataḥ |
aśaktaḥ procyate loke nārudraḥ kopi kathyate ||20||
tadviddhi kāraṇaṃ śaktiryathā tvaṃ ca sisṛkṣasi |
bhavitā ca yadā yuktaḥ śaktyā kartā tadā'khilam ||
tathā haristathā śaṃbhustatheṃdro'tha vibhāvasuḥ |
śaśī sūryo yamastvaṣṭā varuṇaḥ pavanastathā || 22||
gharā sthirā tadā dhartuṃ śaktiyuktā yadā bhavet |
anyathā cedaśaktā syātparamāṇośca dhāraṇe || 23||
tathā śeṣastathā kūrmo ye'nye sarve ca diggajā: |
madyuktā va samarthāśca svāni kāryāṇi sādhitam ||
jalaṃ pibāmi sakalaṃ saṃharāmi vibhāvasum |
pavanaṃ staṃbhayāmyadya yadicchāmi tathācaram ||25||
tattvānāṃ caiva sarveṣāṃ kadāpi kamalodbhava |
asatāṃ bhāvasaṃdehaḥ kartavyo na kadācana ||26||
kadācitprāgabhāvaḥ syātpradhvaṃsābhāva eva vā |
mṛtpiḍeṣu kapāleṣu ghaṭābhāve yathā tathā || 27||
adyatra pṛthivī nāsti kva gateti vicāraṇe |
saṃjātā iti vijñeyā asyāstu paramāṇavaḥ ||28||
śāśvataṃ kṣaṇikaṃ śūnyaṃ nityānityaṃ sakartṛkam |
ahaṃkārāgrimaṃ caiva saptabhedaivivakṣitam ||29||
gṛhāṇāja mahattattvamahaṅkārastadudbhavaḥ |
tataḥ sarvāṇi bhūtāni racayasva yathā purā ||30||
vrajantu svāni dhiṣṇyāni viracya nivasaṃtu vaḥ |
svāni svāni ca kāryāṇi kurvaṃtu daivabhāvitāḥ 31 ||
gṛhāṇemāṃ vidhe śakti surūpāṃ cāruhāsinīm |
mahāsarasvatīṃ nāmnā rajoguṇayutāṃ varām ||32||

śvetāṃbaradharāṃ divyāṃ divyabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām |
varāsanasamārūḍhāṃ krīḍārthaṃ sahacāriṇīm ||33||
eṣā sahacarī nityaṃ bhaviṣyati varāṃganā |
mā'vamaṃsthā vibhūti me matvā pūjyatamāṃ priyām ||
gaccha tvamanayā sārdhaṃ satyalokaṃ batāśu vai |
bījāccaturvidhaṃ sarva samutpādaya sāṃpratam || 35||
liṃgakośāśca jīrvaistaiḥ sahitāḥ karmabhistathā | vartante saṃsthitāḥ kāle tānkuru tvaṃ yathā purā |
pūrvavatsacarācaram ||37|
kālakarmasvabhāvākhyaiḥ kāraṇaiḥ sakalaṃ jagat | svabhāvasvaguṇairyuktaṃ
mānanīyastvayā viṣṇuḥ pūjanīyaśca sarvadā |
sattvaguṇapradhānatvādadhikaḥ sarvataḥ sadā || 38 ||
yadā yadā hi kāryaṃ vo bhaviṣyati duratyayam |
kariṣyati pṛthivyāṃ vai avatāraṃ tadā hariḥ ||39||
tiryagyonāvathānyatra mānuṣīṃ tanumāśritaḥ |
dānavānāṃ vināśaṃ vai kariṣyati janārdanaḥ ||40||
bhavo'yaṃ te sahāyaśca bhaviṣyati mahābalaḥ |
samutpādya surānsarvānviharasva yathāsukham ||41 ||
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyā nānāyajñaḥ sadakṣiṇaiḥ |
yajiṣyanti vidhānena sarvānvaḥ susamāhitāḥ 42 ||
mannāmoccāraṇātsarve makheṣu sakaleṣu ca |
sadā tṛptāśca saṃtuṣṭā bhaviṣyadhvaṃ surāḥ kila || 43 ||
śivaśca mānanīyo vai sarvathā yattamoguṇaḥ |
yajñakāryeṣu sarveṣu pūjanīyaḥ prayatnataḥ || 44 ||
yadā punaḥ surāṇāṃ vai bhayaṃ daityādbhaviṣyati |
śaktayo me tadotpannā hariṣyaṃti suvigrahāḥ 45 ||
vārāhī vaiṣṇavī gaurī nārasiṃhī sadāśivā |
etāścānyāśca kāryāṇi kuru tvaṃ kamalodbhava ||
navākṣaramimaṃ maṃtraṃ bījadhyānayutaṃ sadā |
japansarvāṇi kāryāṇi kuru tvaṃ kamalodbhava 47||
maṃtrāṇāmuttamo'yaṃ vai tvaṃ jānīhi mahāmate |
hṛdaye te sadā dhāryaḥ sarvakāmārthasiddhaye ||48 |
ityuktvā māṃ jaganmātā hari prāha śucismitā |
viṣṇo vraja gṛhāṇemāṃ mahālakṣmī manoharām 49 ||
sadā vakṣaḥsthale sthāne bhavitā nātra saṃśayaḥ |
krīḍārthaṃ te mayā dattā śaktiḥ sarvārthadā śivā ||
tvayeyaṃ nāvamantavyā mānanīyā ca sarvadā |
lakṣmīnārāyaṇākhyo'yaṃ yogo vai vihito mayā || 51 ||
jīvanārthaṃ kṛtā yajñā devānāṃ sarvathā mayā |
avirodhena saṃgena vartitavyaṃ tribhiḥ sadā || 52 ||
tvaṃ ca vedhāḥ śivastvete devā madguṇasaṃbhavāḥ |
mānyāḥ pūjyāśca sarveṣāṃ bhaviṣyanti na saṃśayaḥ || 53 ||
ye vibhedaṃ kariṣyati mānavā mūḍhacetasaḥ |
nirayaṃ te gamiṣyaṃti vibhedānnātra saṃśayaḥ || 54 ||
bhavennaraḥ ||55||
hariḥ sa śivaḥ sākṣādyaḥ śivaḥ sa svayaṃ hariḥ | etayorbhedamātiṣṭhannarakāya
tathaiva druhiṇo jñeyo nātra kāryā vicāraṇā |
aparo guṇabhedo'sti śṛṇu viṣṇo bravīmi te || 56 ||
mukhyaḥ sattvaguṇaste'stu varamātmavicitane |
gauṇatve'pi parau khyātī rajoguṇatamoguṇau || 57 ||
lakṣmyā saha vikāreṣu nānābhedeṣu sarvadā |
rajoguṇayuto bhūtvā viharasvānayā saha || 58 ||
vāgbījaṃ kāmarājaṃ ca māyābījaṃ tṛtīyakam |
maṃtro'yaṃ tvaṃ ramākāṃta maddattaḥ paramārthadaḥ || 59 ||
gṛhītvā japa taṃ nityaṃ viharasva yathāsukham |
na te mṛtyubhayaṃ viṣṇo na kālaprabhavaṃ bhayam || 60 ||

yāvadeṣa vihāro me bhaviṣyati suniścayaḥ |
saṃhariṣyāmyahaṃ sarvaṃ yadā viśvaṃ carācaram || 61 ||
bhavato'pi tadā nūnaṃ mayi līnā bhaviṣyatha |
smartavyo'yaṃ sadā maṃtraḥ kāmado mokṣadastathā || 62||
udgīthena ca saṃyuktaḥ kartavyaḥ śubhamicchatā |
kārayitvā'tha vaikuṃṭhaṃ vastavyaṃ puruṣottama || 63 ||
viharasva yathākāmaṃ citayanmāṃ sanātanīm |
brahmovāca
ityuktvā vāsudevaṃ sā triguṇā prakṛtiḥ parā ||64 ||
nirguṇā śaṃkaraṃ devamavocadamṛtaṃ vacaḥ |
devyuvāca
gṛhāṇa haragaurīṃ tvaṃ mahākālī manoharām ||65 ||
kailāsaṃ kārayitvā ca viharasva yathāsukham |
mukhyastamoguṇaste'stu gauṇau sattvarajoguṇī 66 ||
viharāsuranāśārthaṃ rajoguṇatamoguṇau |
tapastaptaṃ tathā kartuṃ smaraṇaṃ paramātmanaḥ || 67 ||
sarvasattvaguṇaḥ śānto gṛhītavyaḥ sadā'nagha |
sarvathā triguṇā yūyaṃ sṛṣṭisthityaṃtakārakāḥ ||68||
ebhirvihīnaṃ saṃsāre vastu naivātra kutracit |
vastumātraṃ tu yaddṛśyaṃ saṃsāre triguṇaṃ hi tat ||69||
dṛśyaṃ ca nirguṇaṃ loke na bhūtaṃ no bhaviṣyati |
nirguṇaḥ paramātmā'sau na tu dṛśyaḥ kadācana || 70 ||
saguṇā nirguṇā cāhaṃ samaye śaṃkarottamā |
sadā'haṃ kāraṇaṃ śaṃbho na ca kāryaṃ kadācana || 71 ||
saguṇā kāraṇatvādvai nirguṇā puruṣāṃtike |
mahattattvamahaṃkāro guṇāḥ śabdādayastathā ||72 ||
kāryakāraṇarūpeṇa saṃsaste tvaharniśam |
sadudbhūtastvahaṃkārastenāhaṃ kāraṇaṃ śivā || 73 ||
ahaṃkāraśca me kāryaṃ triguṇo'sau pratiṣṭhitaḥ |
ahaṃkārānmahattattvaṃ buddhiḥ sā parikīrtitā || 74 ||
mahattattvaṃ hi kāryaṃ syādahaṃkāro hi kāraṇam |
tanmātrāṇi tvahaṃkārādutpadyate sadaiva hi || 75 ||
kāraṇaṃ pañcabhūtānāṃ tāni sarvasamudbhave |
karmendriyāṇi paṃcaiva pañca jñāneṃdriyāṇi ca || 76 ||
mahābhūtāni paṃcaiva manaḥ poḍaśameva ca |
kārya ca kāraṇaṃ caiva guṇa'yaṃ ṣoḍaśātmakaḥ || 77 ||
paramātmā pumānādyo na kāryaṃ na ca kāraṇam |
evaṃ samudbhavaḥ śaṃbho sarveṣāmādisaṃbhave ||78 ||
saṃkṣepeṇa mayā proktastava tatra samudbhavaḥ |
vrajaṃtvadya vimānena kāryārthaṃ mama sattamāḥ ||79 ||
smaraṇāddarśanaṃ tubhyaṃ dāsye'haṃ viṣame sthite |
smartavyā'haṃ sadā devāḥ paramātmā sanātanaḥ || 80 ||
ubhayo: smaraṇādeva kāryasiddhirasaṃśayam |
brahmovāca
ityuktvā visasarjāsmāndattvā śaktīḥ susaṃskṛtāḥ || 81 ||
viṣṇave'tha mahālakṣmīṃ mahākālīṃ śivāya ca |
mahāsarasvatīṃ mahyaṃ sthānāttāsmādvisarjitāḥ || 82 ||

sthalāṃtaraṃ samāsādya te jātāḥ puruṣā vayam |
ciṃtayaṃtaḥ svarūpaṃ tatprabhāvaṃ paramādbhutam ||83||
vimānaṃ tatsamāsādya saṃrūḍhāstatra vai trayaḥ |
na dvīpo'sau na sā devī sudhāsiṃdhustathaiva ca ||
punardṛṣṭaṃ vimānaṃ vai tatrāsmābhirna cānyathā || 84||
āsādya tasminvitate vimāne prāptā vayaṃ paṃkajasannidhau ca |
mahārṇave yatra hato duratyayau murāriṇā to madhukaiṭabhākhyo || 85 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe ṣaṣṭo'dhyāyaḥ || 6 ||
atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
brahmovāca
evaṃprabhāvā sā devī mayā dṛṣṭā'tha viṣṇunā |
śivenāpi mahābhāga tāstā devyaḥ pṛthakpṛthak ||1||
vyāsa uvāca
ityākarṇya piturvākyaṃ nārado munisattamaḥ |
papraccha paramaprītaḥ prajāpatimidaṃ vacaḥ ||2||
nārada uvāca
tadvadasva pitāmaha ||3||
pumānādyo'vināśī yo nirguṇo'cyutiravyayaḥ | dṛṣṭaścaivānubhūtaśca
triguṇā vīkṣitā śaktirnirguṇā kīdṛśī pitaḥ |
tasyāḥ svarūpaṃ me brūhi puruṣasya ca padmaja || 4 ||
yadarthaṃ ca mayā taptaṃ śvetadvīpe mahattapaḥ |
dṛṣṭāḥ siddhā mahātmānastāpasā gatamanyavaḥ ||5||
paramātmā na saṃprāpto mayā'sau dṛṣṭigocaraḥ |
punaḥ punastapastīvraṃ kṛtaṃ tatra prajāpate || 6 ||
bhavatā saguṇā śaktirdṛṣṭā tāta manoramā |
nirguṇā nirguṇāścaiva kīdṛśau tau vadasva me || 7 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti pṛṣṭhaḥ pitā tena nāradena prajāpatiḥ |
uvāca vacanaṃ tathyaṃ smitapūrva pitāmahaḥ || 8 ||
brahmovāca
nirguṇasya mune rūpaṃ na bhaveddṛṣṭigocaram |
dṛśyaṃ ca naśvaraṃ yasmādarūpaṃ dṛśyate katham ||9||
nirguṇā durgamā śaktirnirguṇaśca tathā pumān |
jñānagamyau munīnāṃ tu bhāvanīyau tathā punaḥ || 10 ||
anādinidhano viddhi sadā prakṛtipūrupau |
viśvāsenābhigamyau tau nāviśvāsana karhicit || 11||
caitanyaṃ sarvabhūteṣu yattadviddhi parātmakam |
tejaḥ sarvatragaṃ nityaṃ nānābhāveṣu nārada ||12||
taṃ ca tāṃ ca mahābhāga vyāpaka viddhi sarvagau |
tābhyāṃ vihīnaṃ saṃsāre na kiṃcidvastu vidyate || 13 ||
to vicityau sadā dehe miśrībhūto sadā'vyayau |
ekarūpau cidātmānau niguṇau nirmalābha || 14 ||
yā śaktiḥ paramātmā'sau sā yo'sau paramā matā |
aṃtaraṃ naitayoḥ ko'pi sūkṣmaṃ veda ca nārada ||15||

adhītya sarvaśāstrāṇi vedānsāṃgāṃśca nārada |
na jānāti tayoḥ sūkṣmamaṃtaraṃ virati vinā ||1|
ahaṃkārakṛtaṃ sarva viśvaṃ sthāvarajaṅgamam |
kathaṃ tadrahitaṃ putra bhavetkalpaśatairapi || 1||
nirguṇaṃ saguṇaḥ putra kathaṃ paśyati cakṣuṣā |
saguṇaṃ ca mahābuddhe cetasā saṃvicāraya || 1
pittenācchāditā jihvā cakṣuśca munisattama |
kaṭu pittaṃ vijānāti rasaṃ rūpaṃ na tattathā || 1
guṇaiḥ samāvṛtaṃ cetaḥ kathaṃ jānāti nirguṇam |
ahaṃkārodbhavaṃ tacca tadvihīnaṃ kathaṃ bhavet || 2
yāvanna guṇavicchedastāvattaddarśanaṃ kutaḥ |
taṃ paśyati tadā citte yadā'haṃkāravarjitaḥ ||2
nārada uvāca
svarūpaṃ devadeveśa trayāṇāmeva vistarāt |
guṇānāṃ yatsvarūpo'sti hyahaṃkārastrirūpakaḥ ||2
sāttviko rājasaścaiva tāmasaśca tathāparaḥ |
vibhedena svarūpāṇi vadasva puruṣottama ||2
yajjñātvā vipramucye'haṃ jñānaṃ tadvada me prabho |
guṇānāṃ lakṣaṇānyeva vitatāni vibhāgaśaḥ ||2
brahmovāca
trayāṇāṃ śaktayastisrastadbravīmi tavānagha |
jñānaśaktiḥ kriyāśaktirarthaśaktistathāparā ||25|
sāttvikasya jñānaśaktī rājasasya kriyātmikā |
dravyaśaktistāmasasya tisraśca kathitāstava ||26|
teṣāṃ kāryāṇi vakṣyāmi śṛṇu nārada tattvataḥ |
tāmasyā dravyaśakteśva śabdasparśasamudbhavaḥ ||27|
rūpaṃ rasaśca gaṃdhaśca tanmātrāṇi pracakṣate |
śabdakaguṇamākāśaṃ vāyuḥ sparśaguṇastathā || 28
surūpaikaguṇo'gniśca jalaṃ rasaguṇātmakam |
pṛthvī gaṃdhaguṇā jñeyā sūkṣmāṇyetāni nārada || 29
daśaitāni militvā tu dravyaśaktiyutāni vai |
tāmasāhaṅkārajaḥ sa syātsargastadanuvṛttikaḥ || 30||
rājasyāśca kriyāśakterutpannāni śṛṇuṣva me |
śrotraṃ tvagrasanā cakṣurbrāṇaṃ caiva ca pañcamam ||31||
jñāneṃdriyāṇi caitāni tathā karmendriyāṇi ca |
vākpāṇipādapāyuśca guhyāṃtāni ca pañca vai ||32||
prāṇo'pānaśca dhyānaśca samānodānavāyavaḥ |
pañcadaśa militvaiva rājasaḥ sarga ucyate ||33||
sādhanāni kilaitāni kriyāśaktimayāni ca |
upādānaṃ kilaiteṣāṃ ciṃdanuvṛttirucyate ||34||
jñānaśaktisamāyuktāḥ sāttvikācca samudbhavāḥ |
diśo vāyuśca sūryaśca varuṇaśvāśvināvapi || 35||
jñāneṃdriyāṇāṃ pañcānāṃ pañcādhiṣṭhātṛdevatāḥ |
caṃdro brahmā tathā rudraḥ kṣetrajaśca caturthakaḥ ||36||
ityaṃtaḥkaraṇākhyasya buddhyādevādhidaivatam |
catvāryeva tathā proktāḥ kilādhiṣṭhātṛdevatāḥ ||37||
manasā saha caṃtāni nūnaṃ pañcadaśaiva tu |
sāttvikasya tu sargo'yaṃ sāttvikākhyaḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||
sthūlasūkṣmādibhedena dve rūpe paramātmanaḥ |
jñānarūpaṃ nirākāraṃ nidānaṃ tatpracakṣate || 39 ||
sādhakasya tu dhyānādau sthūlarūpaṃ pracakṣate |
śarīraṃ sūkṣmamevedaṃ puruṣasya prakīrtitam ||40||
mama caiva śarīraṃ vai sūtramityabhidhīyate |
sthūlaṃ śarīraṃ vakṣyāmi brahmaṇaḥ paramātmanaḥ || 41 ||

śṛṇu nārada yatnena yacchrutvā vipramucyate |
tanmātrāṇi puroktāni bhūtasūkṣmāṇi yāni vai || 42 ||
paṃcīkṛtya tu tānyeva paṃcabhūtasamudbhavaḥ |
paṃcīkaraṇabhedo'yaṃ śṛṇu saṃvadataḥ kila ||43||
prathamaṃ rasatanmātrāmupādāya manasyapi |
kalpayecca tathā tadvai yathā bhavati codakam ||44 ||
śiṣṭānāṃ caiva bhūtānāmaṃśānkṛtvā pṛthakpṛthak |
udake miśrayeccāṃśānkṛte rasamaye tataḥ || 45 ||
tadā bhūtavibhāge ca caitanye ca prakāśite |
caitanyasya praveśāttu tadā'hamiti saṃśayaḥ || 46 ||
pratīyamāne tenaiva viśeṣeṇābhimānataḥ |
ādinārāyaṇo devo bhagavāniti cocyate ||47 ||
ghanībhūte'tha bhūtānāṃ vibhāge spaṣṭatāṃ gate |
vṛddhi prāpya guṇaiścetthamekaikaguṇavṛddhitaḥ ||48 ||
ākāśasya guṇaścaikaḥ śabda eva na cāparaḥ |
śabdasparśī ca vāyośca dvau guṇau parikīrtitau 49 ||
agneḥ śabdaśca sparśaśca rūpamete trayo guṇāḥ |
śabdasparśarūparasāścatvāro vai jalasya ca ||50||
sparśaśabdarasā rūpaṃ gaṃdhaśca pṛthivīguṇāḥ |
evaṃ militayogaiśca brahmāṃḍotpattirucyate || 51 ||
sarve jīvā militvaiva brahmāṃḍāṃśasamudbhavāḥ |
caturaśītilakṣāśca proktā vai jīvajātayaḥ || 52 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 ||
atha aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
brahmovāca
sargo'yaṃ kathitastāta yatpṛṣṭo'haṃ tvayā'dhunā |
guṇānāṃ rūpasaṃsthāṃ vai śṛṇuṣvaikāgramānasaḥ || 1 ||
sattvaṃ prītyātmakaṃ jñeyaṃ sukhātprītisamudbhavaḥ |
ārjavaṃ ca tathā satyaṃ śaucaṃ śraddhā kṣamā dhṛtiḥ ||2||
anukaṃpā tathā lajjā śāṃtiḥ saṃtoṣa eva ca |
etaiḥ sattvapratītiśca jāyate niścalā sadā ||3|
śvetavarṇa tathā sattvaṃ dharme prītikaraḥ sadā |
sacchraddhotpādakaṃ nityamasacchraddhānivārakam ||4||
sāttvikī rājasī caiva tāmasī ca tathāparā |
śraddhā tu trividhā proktā munibhistattvadarśibhiḥ ||5||
raktavarṇa rajaḥ proktamaprītikaramadbhutam |
aprītirduḥkhayogatvādbhavatyeva suniścitā || 6 ||
pradveṣo'tha tathā droho matsaraḥ staṃbha eva ca |
utkaṃṭhā ca tathā nidrā śraddhā tava ca rājasī || ||
māno madastathā garyo rajasā kila jāyate |
pratyetavyaṃ rajastvaṃtairlakṣaṇaiśca vicakṣaṇaḥ ||8||
kṛṣṇavarṇa tamaḥ proktaṃ mohanaṃ ca viṣādakṛt |
ālasyaṃ ca tathā'jñānaṃ nidrā dainyaṃ bhayaṃ tathā ||9||
vivādaścaiva kārpaṇyaṃ kauṭilyaṃ ropa eva ca |
vaiṣamyaṃ vātināstikyaṃ paradoṣānudarśanam ||10||
pratyetavyaṃ tamastvetairlakṣaṇaiḥ sarvathā budhaiḥ |
tāmasyā śraddhayā yuktaṃ paratāpopapādakam ||11 ||
sattvaṃ prakāśayitavyaṃ niyaṃtavyaṃ rajaḥ sadā |
saṃhartavyaṃ tamaḥ kāmaṃ janena śubhamicchatā ||12||
anyonyābhibhavāccate virudhyaṃti parasparam |
tathā'nyonyāśrayāḥ sarve na tiṣṭhati nirāśrayā || 13 ||
sattvaṃ na kevalaṃ kvāpi na rajo na tamastathā |
militāśca sadā sarve tenānyonyāśrayāḥ smṛtāḥ 14 ||

anyonyamithunāccaiva vistāraṃ kathayāmyaham |
śṛṇu nārada yajjñātvā mucyate bhavabaṃdhanāt ||15
saṃdeho'tra na kartavyo jñātvetyuktaṃ mayā vacaḥ |
jñātaṃ tadanubhūtaṃ yatparijñātaṃ phale sati || 196||
śravaṇādarśanāccaiva sapadyeva mahāmate |
saṃskārānubhavāccaiva parijñātaṃ na jāyate ||17|
śrutaṃ tīrthaṃ pavitraṃ ca śraddhotpannā ca rājasī |
nirgatastatra tīrthe vai dṛṣṭaṃ caiva yathāśrutam || 18
snātastatra kṛtaṃ kṛtyaṃ dattaṃ dānaṃ ca rājasam |
sthitastatra kiyatkālaṃ rajoguṇasamāvṛtaḥ || 19
rāgadveṣānna nirmuktaḥ kāmakrodhasamāvṛtaḥ |
punareva gṛhaṃ prāpto yathāpūrvaṃ tathā sthitaḥ || 20
śrutaṃ ca nānubhūtaṃ vai tena tīrthaṃ munīśvara |
na prāptaṃ ca phalaṃ yasmādaśrutaṃ viddhi nārada ||21|
niṣpāpatvaṃ balaṃ viddhi tīrthasya munisattama | kṛṣeḥ phalaṃ yathā loke niṣpannānnasya bhakṣaṇam 22
pāpadehavikārā ye kāmakrodhādayaḥ pare |
lobho mohastathā tṛṣṇā dveṣo rāgastathā madaḥ ||23
asūyerṣyā kṣamā śāṃtiḥ pāpānyetāni nārada |
na nirgatāni dehāttu tāvatpāpayuto naraḥ ||24||
kṛte tīrthe yadvaitāni dehānna nirgatāni cet |
niṣphalaḥ śrama evaikaḥ karṣakasya yathā tathā || 25||
śrameṇāpīḍitaṃ kṣetraṃ kṛṣṭā bhūmiḥ sudurghaṭā |
uptaṃ bījaṃ maharṣaṃ ca hitā vṛttirudāhṛtā ||26||
ahorātraṃ parikliṣṭo rakṣaṇārthaṃ phalotsukaḥ |
kāle suptastu hemaṃte vane vyāghrādibhirbhṛśam ||27||
bhakṣitaṃ śalabhaiḥ sarvaṃ nirāśaśca kṛtaḥ punaḥ |
tadvattīrthaśramaḥ putra kaṣṭado na phalapradaḥ ||28||
sattvaṃ samutkaṭaṃ jātaṃ pravṛddhaṃ śāstradarśanāt |
vairāgyaṃ tatphalaṃ jātaṃ tāmasārtheṣu nāradaḥ || 29||
prasahyābhibhavatyeva tadrajastamasī ubhe |
rajaḥ samutkaṭaṃ jātaṃ pravṛttaṃ lobhayogataḥ ||30||
tattathābhibhavatyeva tamaḥ sattve tathā ubhe |
tamastathotkaṭaṃ bhūtvā pravṛddhaṃ mohayogataḥ ||31||
tatsattvarajasī cobhe saṃgamyābhibhavatyapi |
vistaraṃ kathayāmyadya yathābhibhavatīti vai || 32 ||
yadā sattvaṃ pravṛddhaṃ vai matirdha meṃ sthitā tadā |
na citayati bāhyārtha rajastamaḥsamudbhavam ||33|||
arthasattvasamudbhūtaṃ gṛhṇāti ca na cānyathā |
anāyāsakṛtaṃ cārthaṃ dharmaṃ yajñaṃ ca vāṃchati || 34 ||
sāttvikeṣveva bhogeṣu kāmaṃ vai kurute tadā |
rājasepu na mokṣārthaṃ tāmaseṣu punaḥ kutaḥ ||35||
evaṃ jitvā rajaḥ pūrvaṃ tataśca tamaso jayaḥ |
sattvaṃ ca kevalaṃ putra tadā bhavati nirmalam ||36||
yadā rajaḥ pravṛddhaṃ vai tyaktvā dharmānsanātanān |
anyathākurute dharmācchrāṃ prāpya tu rājasīm ||37||
rājasādarthasaṃvṛddhistathā bhogastu rājasaḥ |
sattvaṃ vinirgataṃ tena tamaṃsacāpi nigrahaḥ ||38||
yadā tamo vivṛddhaṃ syādutkaṭaṃ saṃbabhūva ha |
tadā vede na viśvāsī dharmaśāstre tathaiva ca || 39||
śraddhāṃ ca tāmasīṃ prāpyaṃ karoti ca dhanātyayam |
drohaṃ sarvatra kurute na śāṃtimadhigacchati ||40||
jitvā sattvarajaścaiva krodhano durmatiḥ śaṭhaḥ |
vartate kāmacāreṇa bhāveṣu vitateṣu ca || 41 ||
ekaṃ sattvaṃ na bhavati rajaścaikaṃ tamastathā |
sahaivāśritya vartate guṇā mithunadharmiṇaḥ || 42 ||

rajo vinā na sattvaṃ syādrajaḥ sattvaṃ vinā kvacit |
tamo vinā na caivaite vartante puruṣarṣabha ||43||
tamastābhyāṃ vihīnaṃ tu kevalaṃ na kadācana |
sarve mithunadharmāṇo guṇāḥ kāryāntareṣu vai || 44 ||
anyonyasaṃśritāḥ sarve tiṣṭhati na viyojitāḥ |
anyonyajanakācaiva yataḥ prasavadharmiṇaḥ || 45||
sattvaṃ kadācicca rajastamasī janayatyuta |
kadācittu rajaḥ sattvatamasī janayatyapi || 46||
kadācittu tamaḥ sattvarajasī janayatyubhe |
janayatyevamanyonyaṃ mṛtpiṅaśca ghaṭaṃ yathā ||47 ||
buddhisthāste guṇāḥ kāmānbodhayaṃti parasparam |
devadattaviṣṇumitra yajñadattādayo yathā ||48 ||
yathā strīṣu puruṣaścaiva mithunau ca parasparam |
tathā guṇāḥ samāyāṃti yugmabhāvaṃ parasparam ||49||
rajaso mithune sattvaṃ sattvasya mithune rajaḥ |
ubhe te sattvarajasī tamaso mithune viduḥ ||50 ||
nārada uvāca
ityetatkathitaṃ pitrā guṇarūpamanuttamam |
śrutvāpyetatsa evāhaṃ tato'pṛcchaṃ pitāmaham || 51 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||
atha navamo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
guṇānāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ tāta bhavatā kathitaṃ kila |
na tṛpto'smi pibanmiṣṭaṃ tvanmukhātpracyutaṃ rasam || 1 ||
guṇānāṃ tu parijñānaṃ yathāvadanuvarṇaya |
yenāhaṃ paramāṃ śāṃtimadhigacchāmi cetasi ||2||
vyāsa uvāca
iti pṛṣṭastu putreṇa nāradena mahātmanā |
uvāca ca jagatkartā rajoguṇasamudbhavaḥ || 3 || ||3||
brahmovāca
śṛṇu nārada vakṣyāmi guṇānāṃ parivarṇanam |
samyaṅ nāhaṃ vijānāmi yathāmati vadāmi te ||4|
sattvaṃ tu kevalaṃ naiva kutrāpi parilakṣyate |
miśrībhāvāttu teṣāṃ vai miśratvaṃ pratibhāti vai ||5||
yathā kācidvarā nārī sarvabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā |
hāvabhāvayutā kāmaṃ bhartuḥ prītikarī bhavet || 6 ||
mātāpitrostathā saiva baṃdhuvargasya prītidā |
duḥkhaṃ mohaṃ sapatnīṣu janayatyapi maiva hi || 7 |
evaṃ sattvena tenaiva strītvamāpāditena ca |
rajasastamasaścaiva janitā vṛttiranyathā ||8||
rajasā strīkṛtenaiva tamasā ca tathā punaḥ |
anyonyasya samāyogādanyathā prītibhāti vai ||9||
avasthānātsvabhāveṣu na vai jātyaṃtarāṇi ca |
lakṣyate viparītāni yogānnārada kutracit || 10 |
yathā rūpavatī nārī yauvanena vibhūṣitā |
lajjāmādhuryayuktā ca tathā vinayasaṃyutā || 11 ||
kāmaśāstravidhijñā ca dharmaśāstre'pi saṃmatā |
bhartuḥ prītikarī bhūtvā sapatnīnāṃ ca duḥkhadā ||12||

mohaduḥkhasvabhāvasthā sattvasthetyucyate janaiḥ |
tathā sattvaṃ vikurvāṇamanyabhāvaṃ vibhāti vai || 13 ||
caurairupadrutānāṃ hi sādhūnāṃ sukhadā bhavet |
duḥkhā mūḍhā ca dasyūnāṃ saiva senā tathāguṇā || 14 ||
viparītapratīti vai varjayanti svabhāvataḥ |
yathā ca durdinaṃ jātaṃ mahāmeghaghanāvṛtam ||15||
vidyutstanitasaṃyuktaṃ timireṇāvaguṃṭhitam |
siṃcadbhūmiṃ pravarṣadvai tamorūpamudāhṛtam ||16||
yadetatkarṣakāṇāṃ vai tadevātīvadṛdinam |
bījopaskarayuktānāṃ sukhadaṃ prabhavatyuta || 17 ||
apracchannagṛhāṇāṃ ca durbhagānāṃ viśeṣataḥ |
tṛṇakāṣṭa gṛhītānāṃ duḥkhadaṃ gṛhamedhinām || 18 ||
proṣitabhartṛkāṇāṃ vai mohadaṃ pravadatyapi |
svabhāvasthā guṇāḥ sarve viparītā vibhāṃti vai || 19 ||
lakṣaṇāni punasteṣāṃ śṛṇu putra bravīmyaham |
laghuprakāśakaṃ sattvaṃ nirmalaṃ viśadaṃ sadā ||20||
yadā'ṅgāni laghūnyeva netrādīnīṃdriyāṇi ca |
nirmalaṃ ca tathā ceto gṛhṇāti vipayāna tān 21||
tadā sattvaṃ śarīre vaṃ maṃtavya ca samutkaṭam |
jubhāṃ staṃbhaṃ ca taṃdrāṃ ca calaṃ caiva rajaḥ punaḥ || 22 ||
yadā tadutkaṭaṃ jātaṃ dehe yasya ca kasyacit |
kali mṛgayate kartuṃ gaṃtuṃ grāmāṃtaraṃ tathā ||23||
calacittasya so'tyarthaṃ vivāde codyatastathā |
gurumāvaraṇaṃ kāmaṃ tamo bhavati tadyadā ||24|
tadā'ṅgāni gurūṇyāśu prabhavatyāvṛtāni ca |
iṃdriyāṇi manaḥ śūnyaṃ nidrāṃ naivābhivāṃchati || 25 ||
guṇānāṃ lakṣaṇānyevaṃ vijñeyānīha nārada |
nārada uvāca
vibhinnalakṣaṇāḥ proktāḥ pitāmaha guṇāstrayaḥ ||26||
kathamekatra saṃsthāne kārya kurvanti śāśvatam |
parasparaṃ militvā hi vibhinnāḥ śatravaḥ kila ||27||
ekatrasthāḥ kathaṃ kāryaṃ kurvatīti vadasva me |
brahmovāca
śṛṇu putra pravakṣyāmi guṇāste dīpavṛttayaḥ ||28||
pradīpaśca yathā kāryaṃ prakarotyarthadarśanam |
vartistailaṃ yathāciśva viruddhāśca parasparam ||29||
viruddhaṃ hi tathā tailamagninā saha saṃgatam |
tailaṃ vartivirodhyeva pāvako'pi parasparam ||30||
ekatrasthāḥ padārthānāṃ prakurvati pradarśanam |
nārada uvāca
evaṃ prakṛtijāḥ proktā guṇāḥ satyavatīsuta ||31||
viśvasya kāraṇaṃ te vai mayā pūrvaṃ yathā śrutam |
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktaṃ nāradenātha mama sarva savistaram ||32||

guṇānāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ sarvaṃ kāryaṃ caiva vibhāgaśaḥ |
ārāvyā paramā śaktiryayā sarvamidaṃ tatam ||33||
saguṇā nirguṇā caiva kāryabhede sadaiva hi |
akartā puruṣa: pūrṇo nirīhaḥ paramo'vyayaḥ || 34 ||
karotyeṣā mahāmāyā viśvaṃ sadasadātmakam brahmā viṣṇustathā rudraḥ sūryaścandraḥ śacīpatiḥ ||35||
aśvino vasavastvaṣṭā kubero yādasāṃ patiḥ |
vahnirvāyustathā pūṣā senānīśva vināyakaḥ || 36||
sarve śaktiyutāḥ śaktāḥ kartuṃ kāryāṇi svāni ca |
anyathā te'pyaśaktā vai praspaṃditumanīśvarāḥ ||37||
sā caiva kāraṇaṃ rājañjagataḥ parameśvarī |
samārādhaya tāṃ bhūpa kuru yajñaṃ janādhipa ||38||
pūjanaṃ parayā bhaktyā tasyā eva vidhānataḥ |
mahālakṣmī mahākālī tathā mahāsarasvatī ||39||
īśvaro sarvabhūlānāṃ sarvakāraṇakāraṇam |
sarvakāmārthadā śāṃtā sukhasevyā dayānvitā ||40||
nāmoccāraṇamātreṇa vāṃchitārtha phalapradā |
devairārādhitā pūrvaṃ brahāviṣṇumaheśvaraiḥ || 41||
mokṣakāmaiśva vividhaistāpasaṃ vijitātmabhiḥ |
aspaṣṭamapi yannāma prasaṃgenāpi bhāṣitam ||42 ||
dadāti vāṃchitānarthāndurlabhānapi sarvathā |
aiai iti bhayārtena dṛṣṭvā vyāghrādikaṃ vane ||43||
biduhīnamapītyuktaṃ vāṃchitaṃ pradadāti vai |
tatra satyavratasyaiva dṛṣṭānto nṛpasattama ||44 ||
pratyakṣa eva cāsmākaṃ munīnāṃ bhāvitātmanām |
brāhmaṇānāṃ samājeṣu tasyodāharaṇaṃ budhaiḥ || 45 ||
kathyamānaṃ mayā rājañcchrataṃ sarva savistaram |
anakṣaro mahāmūrkho nāmnā satyavrato dvijaḥ ||46
śrutvā'kṣaraṃ kolam khātsamuccārya svayaṃ tataḥ |
binduhīnaṃ prasaṃgena jāto'sau vibudhottamaḥ || 47||
aikāroccāraṇāddevī tuṣṭā bhagavatī tadā |
cakāra kavirājaṃ taṃ dayārdrā parameśvarī ||4||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe navamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 ||
atha daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
ko satyavrato nāma brāhmaṇo dvijasattamaḥ |
kasmindeśe samutpannaḥ kīdṛśaśca vadasva me ||1||
kathaṃ tena śrutaḥ śabdaḥ kathamuccāritaḥ punaḥ |
siddhiśva kīdṛśī jātā tasya viprasya tatkṣaṇāt ||
kathaṃ tuṣṭā bhavānī sā sarvajñā sarvasaṃsthitā |
vistareṇa vadasvādya kathāmetāṃ manoramām || 3 |
sūta uvāca
iti pṛṣṭastadā rājñā vyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ |
uvāca paramodāraṃ vacana rasavacchuci || 4 ||
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi kathāṃ paurāṇikī śubhām |
śrutā munisamājeṣu mayā pūrva kurūdvaha ||5||
ekadā'haṃ kuruśreṣṭha kurvastīrthāṭanaṃ śuci |
saṃprāpto naimivāraṇyaṃ pāvanaṃ munisevitam ||6||

praṇamyāyaṃ munīnsarvān sthitastatra varāśrame |
vidhiputrāstu yatrāsañjīvanmuktā mahāvratāḥ ||7||
kathāprasaṃga evāsīttatra viprasamāgame |
jamadagnistu papraccha munīnevaṃ samāsthitaḥ ||8||
jamadagniruvāca
saṃdeho'sti mahābhāga mama cetasi tāpasāḥ |
samājeṣu munīnāṃ vai niḥsaṃdeho bhavāmyaham || 9 ||
brahmā viṣṇustathā rudro maghavā varuṇo'nalaḥ |
kuberaḥ pavanastvaṣṭā senānīśca gaṇādhipaḥ || 10 ||
sūryo'śvinau bhagaḥ pūṣā niśānātho grahāstathā |
ārādhanīyatamaḥ ko'tra vāṃchitārthaṃ phalapradaḥ || 11|
sukhasevyaśca satataṃ cāśutoṣaśca mānadaḥ |
bruvantu munayaḥ śīghraṃ sarvajñāḥ saṃśitavratāḥ || 12 |
evaṃ praśne kṛte tatra lomaśo vākyamabravīt |
jamadagne śṛṇuṣvaitadyatpṛṣṭaṃ vai tvayā'dhunā || 13 ||
sevanīyatamā śaktiḥ sarveṣāṃ śubhamicchatām |
parā prakṛtirādyā ca sarvagā sarvadā śivā || 14 ||
devānāṃ jananī saiva brahmādīnāṃ mahātmanām |
ādiprakṛtimūlaṃ sā saṃsārapādapasya vai || 15 |
smṛtā coccāritā devī dadāti kila vāṃchitam |
sarvadaivārdracittā sā varadānāya sevitā || 16 ||
itihāsaṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇvaṃtu munayaḥ śubham |
akṣaroccāraṇādeva yathā prāptaṃ dvijena me ||17||
kosaleṣu dvijaḥ kaściddevadatteti viśrutaḥ |
anapatyaścakāreṣṭi putrāya vidhipūrvakam || 18 ||
tamasātīramāsthāya kṛtvā maṃḍapamuttamam |
dvijānāhūya vedajñānsatrakarma viśāradān || 19||
kṛtvā vedoṃ vidhānena sthāpayitvā vibhāvasūn |
putreṣṭi vidhivattatra cakāra dvijasattamaḥ || 20||
brahmāṇaṃ kalpayāmāsa suhotraṃ munisattamam |
adhvaryuṃ yājñavalkyaṃ ca hotāraṃ ca bṛhaspatim ||21||
prastotāraṃ tathā pailamudgātāraṃ ca gobhilam |
sabhyānanyānmunīnkṛtvā vidhivatpradadau vasu || 22 ||
udgātā sāmagaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ saptasvarasamanvitam |
rathantaramagāyattu svaritena samanvitam || 23 ||
tadā'sya svarabhaṅgo'bhūtkṛte śvāse muhurmuhuḥ |
devadattaścukopāśu gobhilaṃ pratyuvāca ha ||24||
mūrkho'si muni mukhyādya svarabhaṃgastvayā kṛtaḥ |
kāmyakarmaṇi saṃjāte putrārthaṃ yajataśca me ||25||
gobhilastu tadovāca devadattaṃ sukopitaḥ |
mūrkhaste bhavitā putraḥ śaṭhaḥ śabdavivarjitaḥ ||26||
sarvaprāṇiśarīre tu śvāsocchvāsaḥ sudurgrahaḥ |
na me'tra dūṣaṇaṃ kiṃcitsvarabhaṃge mahāmate ||27||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya gobhilasya mahātmanaḥ |
śāpādbhīto devadattastamuvācātiduḥkhitaḥ ||28||
kathaṃ kruddho'si tripreṃdra vṛthā mayi nirāgasi |
akrodhanā hi munayo bhavaṃti sukhadāḥ sadā ||29|
svalpe'parādhe vipreṃdra kathaṃ śaptastvayā hyaham |
aputro'haṃ sutaptaḥ prāktāpayuktaḥ punaḥ kṛtaḥ || 30 ||
mūrkhaputrādaputratvaṃ varaṃ vedavido viduḥ |
tathāpi brāhmaṇo mūrkhaḥ sarveṣāṃ nidya eva hi || 31 ||
paśuvacchūdravaccaiva na yogyaḥ sarvakarmasu |
kiṃ karomoha mūrkheṇa putreṇa dvijasattama ||32|
yathā śūdrastathā mūrkho brāhmaṇo nātra saṃśayaḥ |
na pūjārho na dānārho nidyaśca sarvakarmasu ||33|

deśe vai vasamānaśva brāhmaṇo vedavarjitaḥ |
karavaḥ śūdravaccaiva maṃtavyaḥ sa ca bhūbhujā ||34||
nāsane pitṛkāryeṣu devakāryeṣu sa dvijaḥ |
mūrkhaḥ samupaveśyaśca kāryaśca phalamicchatā ||35||
rājñā śūdrasamo jñeyo na yojyaḥ sarvakarmasu |
astu dvijaḥ kāryo brāhmaṇoṃ vedavarjitaḥ || 36 ||
vinā vitreṇa kartavyaṃ śrāddhaṃ kuśacaṭena vai |
na tu vipreṇa mūrkheṇa śrāddhaṃ kārya kadācana ||37||
āhārādadhikaṃ cānnaṃ na dātavyamapaṃḍite |
dātā narakamāpnoti grahītā tu viśeṣataḥ || 38 ||
ghigrājyaṃ tasya rājño vai yamya deśe'budhā janāḥ |
pūjyante brāhmaṇā mūrkhā dānamānādikairapi || 39 ||
āsane pūjane dāne yatra bhedo na cākhapi |
murkha paṃḍitayorbhedo jñātavyo vibudhena vai || 40 ||
mūrkhā yatra mugaviṣṭhā dānamānaparigrahaiḥ |
tasmindeśe na vastatryaṃ paṃḍitena kathaṃcana || 41 ||
asatāmupakārāya durjanānāṃ vibhūtayaḥ |
pitrumaṃdaḥ phalāḍhyo'pi kā kairevopabhujyate ||42||
bhuktvānaṃ vedavidiyo vedābhyāsaṃ karoti vai |
krīḍati pūrvajāstasya svarge pramuditāḥ kila || 43 ||
gobhilātaḥ kimuktaṃ vai tvayā vedavittama |
saṃsāre mūrkhaputratvaṃ maraṇādatigarhitam ||44||
kṛpāṃ kuru mahābhāga vāpasyānugrahaṃ prati |
dīnovāraṇaśakto'si patāmi tava pādayoḥ || 45 || i
lomaśa uvāca
ityukvā devadattastu patitastasya pādayoḥ |
stuvandīnahṛdatyarthaṃ kṛpaṇaḥ sāśrulocanaḥ || 46 ||
gobhilastu tadā tatra dṛṣṭvā taṃ dīnacetasam |
kṣaṇakopā mahāṃto vai pāpiṣṭhāḥ kalpakopanāḥ || 47 ||
jalaṃ svabhāvataḥ śītaṃ pāvakātapayogataḥ |
uṣṇaṃ bhavati tacchīghraṃ tadvinā śiśiraṃ bhavet || 48 ||
dayāvāngobhilastvāha devadattaṃ suduḥkhitam |
mūrkho bhūtvā sutaste vai vidvānapi bhaviṣyati || 49 ||
iti dattavaraḥ so'tha mudito'bhūdvijarṣabhaḥ |
dṛṣṭi samāpya viprānvai visasarja yathāvidhi || 50 ||
kālena kiyatā tasya bhāryā rūpamatī satī |
garbhaṃ dadhāra kāle sā rohiṇī rohiṇīsamā || 51 ||
garbhādhānādikaṃ karma cakāra vidhivadvijaḥ |
puṃsavanavidhānaṃ ca śṛṅgārakaraṇaṃ tathā ||52||
sīmaṃtonnayanaṃ caiva kṛtaṃ vedavidhānataḥ |
dadau dānāni mudito matveṣṭi saphalāṃ tathā || 53||
śubhe'hni suṣuve putraṃ rohiṇī rohiṇīyute |
dine lagne śubhe'tyarthaṃ jātakarma cakāra saḥ || 54 ||
putradarśanakaṃ kṛtvā nāmakarma cakāra ca |
utathya iti putrasya kṛtaṃ nāma purāvidā || 55 ||
sa cāṣṭame tathā varṣe śubhe vai śubhavāsare |
tasyopanayanaṃ karma cakāra vidhivatpitā || 56 ||
vedamadhyāpayāmāsa gurustaṃ vai vrate sthitam |
noccacāra tathotathyaḥ saṃsthito mugdhavattadā || 57||
bahudhā pāṭitaḥ pitrā na dadhāra mati śaṭhaḥ |
mūḍhavattiṣṭhate'tyarthaṃ taṃ śuśoca pitā tadā || 58 ||
evaṃ kurvansadā'bhyāsa jāto dvādaśavārṣikaḥ |
na veda vidhivatkartuṃ saṃdhyāvaṃdanakaṃ vidhim ||59||
mūrkho'bhūdatilokeṣu gatā vārtā'tivistarā |
brāhmaṇeṣu ca sarveṣu tārateṣviṃtareṣu ca || 60 ||

ર śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 11
bahāsa lokastaṃ vipraṃ yatra tatra gataṃ mune |
pitā mātā niniṃdātha mūrkha tamatibhartsayan || 61||
nidito'tha janaiḥ kāmaṃ pitṛbhyāmatha bāṃdhavaiḥ |
vairāgyamagamadvipro jagāma vanamapyasau ||62||
aṃgho varastathā paṃgurna murkhastu varaḥ sutaḥ |
ityukto'so pitṛbhyāṃ vai viveśa kānanaṃ prati || 63 ||
gaṃgātīre śubhe sthāne kṛtvoṭajamanuttamam |
vanyāṃ vṛttiṃ ca saṃkalpya sthitastatra samāhitaḥ 64 ||
niyamaṃ ca paraṃ kṛtvā nāsatyaṃ prabravīmyaham |
sthitastatrāśrame ramye brahmacaryavrato hi saḥ || 65 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīya skandhe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ || 10 ||
atha ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
lomaśa uvāca
na vedādhyayanaṃ kiṃcijjānāti na japaṃ tathā |
dhyānaṃ na devatānāṃ ca na caivārādhanaṃ tathā ||1||
nāsanaṃ baṃda vipro'sau prāṇāyāmaṃ tathā punaḥ |
pratyāhāraṃ tu no veda bhūtaśuddhiṃ ca kāraṇam ||2||
na maṃtra kīlakaṃ jāpyaṃ gāyatrī ca na veda saḥ |
śaucaṃ snānavidhi caiva tathācamanakaṃ punaḥ || 3||
prāṇāgnihotraṃ no veda validānaṃ ya cātithim |
na saṃdhyāṃ samidho homaṃ viveda ca tathā muniḥ || 4 ||
so'karotprātarutthāya yatkiciddaṃtadhāvanam |
snānaṃ ca śūdravattatra gaṃgāyāṃ maṃtravarjitam ||5||
phalānyādāya vanyāni madhyāhne'pi yadṛcchayā |
bhakṣyābhakṣyaparijñānaṃ na jānāti śaṭhastathā || 6 ||
satyaṃ brūte sthitastatra nānṛtaṃ vadate punaḥ |
janaiḥ satyatapānāma kṛtamasya dvijasya vai ||7||
nāhitaṃ kasyacitkuryānna tathā'vihitaṃ kvacit |
sukhaṃ svapiti tatraiva nirbhayaścintayanniti || 8 ||
kadā me maraṇaṃ bhāvi duḥkhaṃ jīvāmi kānane |
jīvitaṃ dhikca mūrkhasya tarasā maraṇaṃ dhruvam ||9||
daivenāhaṃ kṛto mūrkho 'nānyo'tra kāraṇaṃ mama |
prāpya caivottamaṃ janma vṛthā jātaṃ mamādhunā || 10 ||
yathā vaṃdhyā surūpā ca yathā vā niṣphalo drumaḥ |
adugdhadohā dhenudaca tathā'haṃ niṣphalaḥ kṛtaḥ || 11||
kiṃ nu nidāmyahaṃ daivaṃ nūnaṃ karma mamedṛśam |
na dattaṃ pustakaṃ kṛtvā brāhmaṇāya mahātmane || 12 ||
na vai vidyā mayā dattā pūrvajanmani nirmalā |
tenāhaṃ karmayogena śaṭho'smi ca dvijādhamaḥ || 13 |
na ca tīrthe tapastaptaṃ sevitā na ca sādhavaḥ |
na dvijāḥ pūjitā dravyaistena jāto'smi duṣṭadhīḥ || 14 ||
vartante muniputrāśca vedaśāstrārthapāragāḥ |
ahaṃ sumūḍhaḥ sañjāto daivayogena kenacit || 15 ||
na jānāmi tapastaptuṃ kiṃ karomi susādhanam |
midhyāyaṃ me'tra saṃkalpo na me bhāgyaṃ śubhaṃ kila 16 ||
daivameva paraṃ manye dhikpauruṣamanarthakam |
vṛthā śramakṛtaṃ kāryaṃ daivādbhavati sarvathā || 17||
brahmā viṣṇuśva rudraśca śakrādyāḥ kila devatāḥ |
kālasya vaśagāḥ sarve kālo hi duratikramaḥ || 18 |

evaṃvidhānvitastu kurvāṇo'haniśaṃ dvijaḥ |
sthitastatrāśrame tīre jāhnavyāḥ pāvane sthale ||19||
viraktaḥ sa tu saṃjātaḥ sthitastatrāśrame dvijaḥ |
kālātivāhanaṃ śāṃtaścakāra vijane vane || 20 ||
evaṃ sthitasya tu vane vimalodake vai varṣāṇi tatra navapaṃca gatāni kāmam |
nārādhanaṃ na ca japaṃ na viveda maṃtra kālātivāhanamaso kṛtavān vane vai ||21||
jānāti tasya vitataṃ vratameva lokaḥ satyaṃ vadatyapi muniḥ kila nāmajātam |
jātaṃ yaśaśca sakaleṣu janeṣu kāmaṃ satyavrato'yamaniśaṃ na mṛṣābhibhāṣī ||22||
tatraikadā tu mṛgayāṃ ramamāṇa eva prāpto niṣādaniśaṭho dhṛtacāpabāṇaḥ |
krīḍan vane'tivipule yamatulyadehaḥ krūrākṛtirhananakarmaṇi cātidakṣaḥ ||23|
tenātikṛṣṭena śareṇa viddhaḥ kolaḥ kirātena dhanurdhareṇa |
palāyamāno bhayavihvalaśca muneḥ samīpaṃ vidruto jagāma ||24||
vikaṃpamāno rudhirārdradeho yadā jagāmāśramamaṃḍalaṃ vai |
kālastadātīva dayārdrabhāvaṃ prāpto munistatra samīkṣya dīnam || 25 ||
agre vrajaṃtaṃ rudhirārdradehaṃ dṛṣṭvā muniḥ sūkaramāśu viddham |
dayābhiveśādatikaṃpamānaḥ sārasvataṃ bījamathoccacāra || 26||
ajñātapūrva ca tathā śrutaṃ ca devānmukhe vai samupāgataṃ ca |
na jñātavānbījamasau vimūḍho mamajja śoke sa munirmahātmā ||27|
kolaḥ praviśyāśramamaṃḍalaṃ tadgato nikuṃje pravilīya gūḍham |
aprāptamārge dṛḍhanirviṇṇacetā pravepamānaḥ śarapīḍitatvāt || 28||
tataḥ kṣaṇādākaraṇāṃtakṛṣṭaṃ cāpaṃ dadhāno'tikarāladehaḥ |
prāptastadaṃte sa ca mṛgyamāṇo niṣādarājaḥ kila kāla eva ||29||
dṛṣṭvā muniṃ tatra kuśāsane sthitaṃ nāmnā tu satyavratamadvitīyam |
vyādhaḥ praṇamya pramukhe sthito'sau papraccha kolaḥ kva gato dvijeśa || 30||
jānāmi te'haṃ suvrataṃ prasiddhaṃ tenādya pṛcche mama bāṇaviddhaḥ |
kṣudhārditaṃ me sakalaṃ kuṭuṃbaṃ vibhartukāmaḥ kila āgato'smi ||31||
vṛttirmamaiṣā vihitā vidhātrā nānyā'sti viprendra ṛtaṃ bravīmi |
bhartavyameveha kuṭumbamaṃjasā kenāpyupāyena kenāpyupāyena śubhāśubhena ||32||
satyaṃ bravītvadya satyavrato'si kṣudhāturo vartate poṣyavargaḥ |
kvāsī gataḥ sūkaro bāṇaviddhaḥ pṛcchāmyahaṃ vāḍava brūhi tūrṇam ||33||

teneti pṛṣṭaḥ sa munirmahātmā vitarkamagnaḥ prababhūva kāmam |
satyavrataṃ me'dya bhavenna bhagnaṃ na dṛṣṭa ityuccaritena kiṃ vai || 34 ||
gato'tra kolaḥ śaraviddhadehaḥ kathaṃ bravīmyadya mṛṣā'mṛṣā vā |
kṣudhādito'yaṃ paripṛcchatīva dṛṣṭvā haniṣyatyapi sūkaraṃ vai ||35||
satyaṃ na satyaṃ khalu yatra hiṃsā dayānvitaṃ cānṛtameva satyam |
hitaṃ narāṇāṃ bhavatīha yena tadeva satyaṃ na tathā'nyarthava ||36||
hitaṃ kathaṃ syādubhayorviruddhayostaduttaraṃ kiṃ na yathā mṛṣā vacaḥ |
vicārayanvāḍava dharmasaṃkaṭe na prāpa vaktuṃ vacanaṃ yathocitam ||37||
bāṇāhataṃ vīkṣya dayānvitaṃ ca kolaṃ tadaṃte samudāhṛtaṃ vacaḥ |
tena prasannā nijabījataḥ śivā vidyāṃ durāpāṃ pradadau ca tasmai ||38||
bījoccāraṇato devyā vidyā prasphuritākhilā |
vālmīkeśca yathāpūrva tathā sahyabhavatkaviḥ ||39||
tamuvāca dvijā vyādhaṃ saṃmukhasthaṃ dhanurdharam |
satyakāmastu dharmātmā ślokamekaṃ dayāparaḥ || 40|
yā paśyati na sā brūte yā brūte sā na paśyati |
aho vyādha svakāryārthinika pṛcchasi punaḥ punaḥ ||
ityuktastu tadā tena gato'sau paśuhā punaḥ |
nirāśaḥ sūkaraṃ tasminparāvṛtto nijālaye ||42||
brāhmaṇastu kavirjātaḥ prācetasa ivāparaḥ |
prasiddhaḥ sarvalokeṣu nāmnā satyavrato dvijaḥ ||43||
sārasvataṃ tato bījaṃ jajāpa vidhipūrvakam |
paṃḍitaścātivikhyāto dvijo'sī dharaṇītale ||44 ||
pratiparvasu gāyaṃti brāhmaṇā yadyaśaḥ sadā |
ākhyānaṃ cātivistīrṇa stubaṃti munayaḥ kila ||
tacchrutvā sadanaṃ tasya samāgamya tadāśrame |
yena tyaktaḥ purā tena gṛhaṃ nīto'timānitaḥ 46 ||
tasmādrājansadā senyā pūjanīyā ca bhaktitaḥ |
ādiśaktiḥ parā devī jagatāṃ kāraṇaṃ hi sā ||
tasyā yajñaṃ mahārāja kuru vedavidhānataḥ |
sarvakāmapradaṃ nityaṃ niścayaṃ kathitaṃ purā || 48 ||
smṛtā saṃpūjitā bhaktyā dhyātā concāritā stutā |
dadāti vāṃchitānarthānkāryadā tena kīrtyate ||49||
anubhāvamidaṃ rājankartavyaṃ sarvadhā budhaiḥ |
dṛṣṭvā rogayutāndīnānkṣudhitānnirdhanāñchaṭhān ||50||
janānātastithā mūrkhānpīḍitān vairibhiḥ sadā |
dāsānāśāka rānkṣudrānvikalāvihvalānatha ||51||
atṛtāmbhojane bhoge sadārtāna jiteṃdriyān |
tṛṣṇādhikānaśaktāṃśca sadādhiparipīḍitān ||52||
tathā vibhavasaṃpannānputrapautravivardhanān |
puṣṭadehāṃśca saṃbhogaiḥ saṃyutānvedavādinaḥ || 53 ||
rājalakṣmyā yutāñchūrānvaśīkṛtajanānatha |
svajanaraviyuktāṃśca sarvalakṣaṇalakṣitān ||54||
vyatirekānyayābhyāṃ ca vicetavyaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ |
ebhirna pūjitā devī sarvārthaphaladā śivā || 55 ||

samārādhitā ca tathā nṛbhirebhiḥ sadā'mbikā |
yato'mī sukhinaḥ sarve saṃsāre'sminna saṃśayaḥ || 56 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti rājañchrataṃ tatra mayā munisamāgame |
lomaśasya mukhātkāmaṃ devīmāhātmyamuttamam ||57 ||
iti saṃcitya rājendra kartatryaṃ ca sadā'rcanam |
bhaktyā paramayā devyāḥ prītyā ca puruṣarṣabha || 58 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 11 ||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
rājovāca
vada yajñavidhiṃ samyagdevyāstasyāḥ samaṃtataḥ |
śrutvā karomyahaṃ svāminyathāśakti hyataṃdritaḥ || 1 ||
pūjāvidhi ca maṃtrāṃśca homadravyamasaṃśayam |
brāhmaṇāḥ katisaṃkhyāśva dakṣiṇā tathā punaḥ ||2||
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi devyā yajñaṃ vidhānataḥ |
trividhaṃ tu sadā jñeyaṃ vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā || 3 ||
sātvikaṃ rājasaṃ caiva tāmasaṃ ca tathāparam |
munīnāṃ sāttvikaṃ proktaṃ nṛpāṇāṃ rājasaṃ smṛtam ||
tāmasaṃ rākṣasānāṃ vai jñānināṃ tu guṇojjhitam |
vimuktānāṃ jñānamayaṃ vistarātyabravīmi te ||5||
deśa: kālastathā dravyaṃ maṃtrāśca brāhmaṇāstathā |
śraddhā ca sāttvakī yatra taṃ yajñaṃ sāttvikaṃ viduḥ 6 ||
dravyaśuddhiḥ kriyāśuddhirmatraśuciśca bhūmipa| bhavedyadi tadā pūrṇa phalaṃ bhavati nānyathā ||7||
anyāyopārjitenaiva kartavyaṃ sukṛtaṃ kṛtam |
na kīrtiriha loke ca paraloke na tatphalam ||8||
tasmānnyāyājitenaiva kartavyaṃ sukṛtaṃ sadā |
yaśase paralokāya bhavatyeva sukhāya ca || 9 ||
pratyakṣaṃ taba rājeṃdra pāṃḍavastu makhaḥ kṛtaḥ |
rājasūyaḥ kratuvaraḥ samāptavaradakṣiṇaḥ || 10 ||
yatra sākṣāddhariḥ kṛṣṇo yādaveṃdro mahāmanāḥ |
brāhmaṇāḥ pūrṇavidyādaca bhāradvājādayastathā || 11||
kṛtvā yajñaṃ susaṃpūrṇa māsamātreṇa pāṃḍavaiḥ |
prāptaṃ mahattaraṃ kaṣṭaṃ vanavāsaśca dāruṇaḥ || 12 ||
pīḍanaṃ caiva pāṃcālyāstathā dyūte parājayaḥ |
vanavāso mahatkaṣṭaṃ kva gataṃ makhajaṃ phalam ||13||
dāsatvaṃ ca virāṭasya kṛtaṃ sarvairmahātmabhiḥ |
kīcakena parikliṣṭā draupadī ca pramārā || 14 ||
āśīrvādāṃ dvijātīnāṃ kva gatāḥ śuddhacetasām |
bhatirvā vāsudevasya kva gatā tatra saṃkaṭe || 15 ||
ma rakṣitā tadā bālā kenāpi drupadātmajā |
prāptakeśagrahā kāle sādhvī ca varavarṇinī || 16 ||
kimatra ciṃtanīyaṃ vai dharmavaiguṇyakāraṇam |
keśave sati deveśe dharmaputre yudhiṣṭhire || 17 ||
bhavitavyamiti prota niṣphalaḥ syāttadāgamaḥ |
vedamaṃtrāstathā'nyaṃ ca vitathāḥ syurasaṃśayam || 18 ||
sādhanaṃ niṣphalaṃ sarvamupāyaśca nirarthakaḥ |
bhavitavyaṃ bhavatyeva vacane pratipādake || 19||

āgamo'pyarthavādaḥ syātkriyāḥ sarvā nirarthakāḥ |
svargārthaṃ ca tapo vyarthaṃ varṇadharmaśca vai tathā ||20||
sarva prabhāgaṃ vyartha syādbhavitavye kṛte hṛdi |
ubhayaṃ cāpi maṃtavyaṃ daivaṃ copāya eva ca || 21 ||
kṛte karmaṇi cetsiddhiviparītā yadā bhavet |
vaiguṇyaṃ kalpanīyaṃ syātprājñaiḥ paṃḍitamaulibhi: 22||
tatkarma bahudhā proktaṃ vidvadbhiḥ karmakāribhiḥ |
kartṛbhedānmaṃtrabhedāddravyabhedāttathā punaḥ ||23||
yathā maghavatā pūrva viśvarūpo vṛto guruḥ |
viparītaṃ kṛtaṃ tena karma mātṛhitāya vai || 24||
devebhyo dānavebhyastu svaratītyuktvā punaḥ punaḥ |
asurā mātṛpakṣīyāḥ kṛtaṃ teṣāṃ ca rakṣaṇam ||25|
daityān dṛṣṭavātisaṃpuṣṭāṃścukopa maghavā tadā |
śirāṃsi tasya vajreṇa ciścheda tarasā hariḥ ||26||
kriyāvaiguṇya patrava kartṛbhedādasaṃśayam |
nocetpaṃcālarājena ropeṇāpi kṛtā kriyā ||27||
bhāradvājavināśāya putrasyotpādanāya ca |
dhṛṣṭadyumnaḥ samutpanno vedimadhyācca draupadī ||28||
purā daśarathenāpi putreṣṭistu kṛtā yadā |
aputrasya sutāstasya catvāraḥ saṃprajajñire ||29||
ataḥ kriyā kṛtā yuktyā siddhidā sarvathā bhavet |
ayuktyā viparītā syātsarvathā nṛpasattama ||30||
pāṃḍavānāṃ yathā yajñe kiṃcidvaiguṇyayogataḥ |
viparītaṃ phalaṃ prāptaṃ nirjitāste durodare ||31|
satyavādī tathā rājandharmaputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ |
draupadī ca tathā sādhvī tathānyepyanujāḥ śubhāḥ 32 || |
kudravyayogādvaiguṇyaṃ samutpannaṃ makhe'thavā |
sābhimānaiḥ kṛtādvāpi dūṣaṇaṃ samupasthitam || 33 ||
sāttvikastu mahārāja durlabho vai makhaḥ smṛtaḥ |
vaikhānasamunīnāṃ hi vihito'sau mahāmakhaḥ ||34||
sāttvikaṃ bhojanaṃ ye vai nityaṃ kurvati tāpasāḥ |
nyāyārjitaṃ ca vanyaṃ ca tathā ṛṣyaṃ susaṃskṛtam 35 ||
puroḍāśaparā nityaṃ viyūpā maṃtrapūrvakāḥ |
śraddhādhikā makhā rājansāttvikāḥ paramāḥ smṛtāḥ 36||
rājasā dravyabahulā : ruyūpāśca susaṃskṛtāḥ |
kṣatriyāṇāṃ viśāṃ caiva sābhimānāśca vai makhāḥ 37 ||
tāmasā dānavānāṃ vai sakrodhā madavardhakāḥ |
sāmarpāḥ saṃskṛtāḥ krūrā makhāḥ proktā mahātmabhiḥ 38 ||
munīnāṃ mokṣakāmānāṃ viraktānāṃ mahātmanām |
mānasastu smṛto yāgaḥ sarvasādhanasaṃyutaḥ ||39||
anyeṣu sarvayajñeṣu kiṃcinnyūnaṃ bhavedapi |
dravyeṇa śraddhayā vā'pi kriyayā brāhmaṇaistathā ||40||
deśakālapṛthagdravyasādhanaiḥ sakalaistathā |
nānyo bhavati pūrṇe vai tathā bhavati mānasaḥ || 41||
prathamaṃ tu manaḥ śodhyaṃ kartavyaṃ guṇavarjitam |
śuddhe manasi deho vai śuddha eva na saṃśayaḥ || 42 ||
iṃdriyārthaparityaktaṃ yadā jātaṃ manaḥ śuci |
tadā tasya makhasyāsau prabhavedadhikāravān ||43||
sau maṃḍapaṃ kṛtvā bahuyojanavistṛtam |
stavaiśca vipulaiḥ ślakṣṇairyajñiyadrumasaṃbhavaḥ || 44 ||
vedoṃ ca viśadāṃ tatra manasā parikalpayet |
agnayo'pi tathā sthāpya vidhivanmanasā kila ||45||
brāhmaṇānāṃ ca varaṇaṃ tathaiva pratipādya ca |
brahmā'dhvaryustathā hotā prastotā vidhipūrvakam ||46||
udgātā pratihartā ca sabhyāścānye yathāvidhi |
pūjanīyāḥ prayatnena manasaiva dvijottamāḥ || 47 ||

prāṇo'pānastathā vyānaḥ samānodāna eva ca |
pāvakāḥ paṃca evaite sthāpyā vedyāṃ vidhānataḥ || 48 ||
gārhapatyastadā prāṇo'pānaścāhavanīyakaḥ |
dakṣiṇāgnistathā vyānaḥ samānaścāvasathyakaḥ || 49 ||
samyodānaḥ smṛtā hyete pāvakāḥ paramotkaṭāḥ |
dravyaṃ ca manasā bhāvyaṃ nirguṇaṃ paramaṃ śuci || 50 ||
mana eva tadā hotā yajamānastathaiva tat |
yajñādhidevatā brahma nirguṇaṃ ca sanātanam || 51 ||
phaladā nirguṇā śaktiḥ sadā nirvedadā śivā |
brahmavidyā'khilādhārā vyāpya sarvatra saṃsthitā || 52 ||
taduddeśena tadravyaṃ hunetprāṇāgniṣu dvijaḥ |
paścāccittaṃ nirālaṃbaṃ kṛtvā prāṇānapi prabho || 53 ||
kuṇḍalīmukhamārgeṇa huned brahmaṇi śāśvate |
svānubhūtasthamātmānaṃ sarvabhūtāni cātmani ||54 ||
samādhinaiva yogena dhyāyeccetasyanākulaḥ |
sarvabhūtasthamātmānaṃ sarvabhūtāni cātmani || 55 ||
yadā paryāta bhūtātmā tadā paśyati tāṃ śivām |
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ brahmavidbhūyātsaccidānaṃdarūpiṇīm ||56||
tadā māyādikaṃ sarva dagdhaṃ bhavati bhūmipa |
prārabdhaṃ karmamātraṃ tu yāvaddehaṃ ca tiṣṭhati || 57 ||
jīvanmuktastadā jāto mṛto mokṣamavāpnuyāt |
kṛtakṛtyo bhavettāta yo bhajejagadambikām ||58 ||
tasmātsarvayatnena dhyeyā śrībhuvaneśvarī |
śrotavyā caiva maṃtavyā guruvākyānusārataḥ || 59||
rājannevaṃ kṛto yajño mokṣado nātra saṃśayaḥ |
anye yajñāḥ sakāmāstu prabhavaṃti kṣayonmukhāḥ || 60||
agniṣṭomena vidhivatsvargakāmo yajediti |
vedānuśāsanaṃ caitatpravadaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ || 61 ||
kṣīṇe puṇye mṛtyulokaṃ viśaṃti ca yathāmati |
tasmāttu mānasaḥ śreṣṭho yajño'yakṣaya eva saḥ || 62 ||
na rājñā sādhituṃ yogyo makho'sau jayamicchatā |
tāmasastu kṛtaḥ pūrvaṃ sarpayajñastvayā'dhunā || 63 ||
vairaṃ nirvāhitaṃ rājaṃstakṣakasya durātmanaḥ |
yatkṛte nihatāḥ sarpāstvayā'gnau koṭiśaḥ pare || 64||
devīyajñaṃ kuruṣvādya vitataṃ tridhipūrvakam |
viṣṇunā yaḥ kṛtaḥ pūrva sṛṣṭyādau nṛpasattama ||65 ||
tathā tvaṃ kuru rājendra vidhi te prabravīmyaham |
brāhmaṇāḥ saṃti rājeṃdra vidhijñā vedavittamāḥ || 66 ||
devībījavidhānajñā mantra mārgavicakṣaṇāḥ |
yājakāste bhaviṣyanti yajamānastvameva hi ||67 ||
kṛtvā yajñaṃ vidhānena dattvā puṇyaṃ makhārjitam |
samuddhara mahārāja pitaraṃ durgatiṃ gatam ||68 ||
viprāvamānajaṃ pāpaṃ durghaṭaṃ narakapradam |
tathaiva śāpajo doṣaḥ prāptaḥ pitrā tavānagha || 69 ||
tathā durmaraṇaṃ prāptaṃ sarpadaṃśena bhūbhujā |
antarāle tathā mṛtyurna bhūmau kuśasaṃstare ||70 || bhūbhujā |
antarāle tathā
na saṃgrāme na gaṃgāyāṃ snānadānādivarjitam |
maraṇaṃ te pitustatra sodhe jātaṃ kurūdvaha ||71 ||
kṛpaṇāni ca sarvāṇi narakasya nṛpottama |
tatraikaṃ kāraṇaṃ tasya na jātaṃ cātidurlabham ||72 ||
yatra yatra sthitaḥ prāṇo jñātvā kālaṃ samāgatam |
sādhanānāmabhāve'pi hyavaśaścātisaṃkaṭe ||73||
yadā nirvedamāyāti manasā nirmalena vai |
paṃcabhūtātmako deho mama kiṃ cātra du:khadam ||74 ||
patatvadya yathākāmaṃ mukto'haṃ nirguṇo'vyayaḥ |
nāśātmakāni tattvāni tatra kā paridevanā || 75 ||

brahmaivāhaṃ na saṃsārī sadā muktaḥ sanātanaḥ |
dehena mama saṃbaṃdha: karmaṇā pratipāditaḥ || 76 ||
tāni sarvāṇi muktāni śubhāni cetarāṇi ca |
manuṣya dehayogena sukhaduḥkhānusādhanāt || 77||
vimukto'tibhayādghorādasmātsaṃsārasaṃkaṭāt |
ityevaṃ cityamānastu snādānavivarjitaḥ || 78 ||
maraṇaṃ cedavāpnoti sa mucyejjanmaduḥkhataḥ |
eṣā kāṣṭhā parā proktā yogināmapi durlabhā || 79 ||
pitā te nṛpaśārdūla śrutvā śāpaṃ dvijoditam |
dehe mamatvaṃ kṛtabāna nirvedamavāptavān ||80||
nīrogo mama deho'yaṃ rājyaṃ nihatakaṃṭakam |
kathaṃ jīvāmyahaṃ kāmaṃ maṃtrajñānānayaṃtu vai || 81 ||
auṣadhaṃ maṇimantraṃ ca yaṃtraṃ paramakaṃ tathā |
ārohaṇaṃ tathā sodhe kṛtavānnṛpatistadā || 82 ||
na snānaṃ na kṛtaṃ dānaṃ na devyāḥ smaraṇaṃ kṛtam |
na bhūmau śayanaṃ caiba debaṃ matvā paraṃ tathā || 83 ||
magno mohārṇave dhore mṛtaḥ saudhe'hinā hataḥ |
kṛtvā pāpaṃ kaleryogāttāpasasyābamānajam ||84||
avaśyameva narakaṃ etairācaraṇairbhavet |
tasmāttaṃ pitaraṃ pāpātsamuddhara nṛpottama || 85 ||
sūta uvāca
iti śrutvā vacastasya vyāsasyāmitatejasaḥ |
sāśrukaṇṭho'tiduḥkhārto babhūva janamejayaḥ || 86 ||
dhigidaṃ jīvitaṃ me'dya pitā me narake sthitaḥ |
tatkaromi yathaivādya svargaṃ yātyuttarāsutaḥ || 87||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12 ||
atha trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
rājovāca
hariṇā tu kathaṃ yajñaḥ kṛtaḥ pūrvaṃ pitāmaha |
jagatkāraṇarūpeṇa viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā ||1||
ke sahāyāstu tatrāsanbrāhmaṇāḥ ke mahāmate |
ṛtvijo vedatattvajñāstanme brūhi paraṃtapa || 2 ||
paścātkaromyahaṃ yajñaṃ vidhidṛṣṭena karmaṇā |
śrutvā viṣṇukṛtaṃ yāgamaṃbikāyāḥ samāhitaḥ || 3||
vyāsa uvāca
rājañchṛṇu mahābhāga vistaraṃ paramādbhutam |
yathā bhagavatā yajñaḥ kṛtaśca vidhipūrvakaḥ || 4 ||
visarjitā yadā devyā dattvā śaktīśca tāstrayaḥ |
kājeśāḥ puruṣā jātā vimānabaramāsthitāḥ ||5||
prāptā mahārṇavaṃ ghoraṃ trayaste vibudhottamāḥ |
cakruḥ snānāni bāsārthaṃ samutpādya dharāṃ sthitāḥ || 6 ||
ādhāraśaktiracalā muktā devyā svayaṃ tataḥ |
tadādhārā sthitā jātā dharā medaḥ samanvitā ||7||
madhukaiṭabhayormedaḥ saṃyogānmedinī smṛtā |
dhāraṇācca dharā proktā pṛthvī vistārayogataḥ ||8||
mahī cāpi mahīyastvāddhṛtā sā śeṣamastake |
girayaśca kṛtāḥ sarve dhāraṇārthaṃ pravistarāḥ || 9 ||
lohakīlaṃ yathā kāṣṭe tathā te girayaḥ kṛtāḥ |
mahīdharo mahārāja procyate vibudhairjanaiḥ || 10 ||

jātarūpamayo merurbahuyojanavistaraḥ |
kṛto maṇimayaiḥ śṛṃgaiḥ śobhitaḥ paramādbhutaḥ || 11 ||
marīcirnārado'triśca pulastyaḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ |
dakṣo vasiṣṭha ityete brahmaṇaḥ prathitāḥ sutāḥ || 12 ||
marīceḥ kaśyapo jāto dakṣakanyāstrayodaśa |
tābhyo devāśca daityāśca samutpannā hyanekaśaḥ || 13 ||
tatastu kāśyapī sṛṣṭiḥ pravṛttā cātivistarā | manuṣyapaśusarpādijātibhedairanekadhā 113811
brahmaṇaścārdhadehāttu manuḥ svāyaṃbhuvo'bhavat |
śatarūpā tathā nārī saṃjātā vāmabhāgataḥ || 15 ||
priyavratottānapādau sutau tasyā babhūvatuḥ |
tisraḥ kanyā varārohā hyabhavannatisundarīḥ || 16 ||
evaṃ sṛṣṭiṃ samutpādya bhagavānkamalodbhavaḥ |
cakāra brahmalokaṃ ca meruśṛṃge manoharam ||17||
baikuṃṭhaṃ bhagavānviṣṇū ramāramaṇamuttamam |
krīḍāsthānaṃ suramyaṃ ca sarvalokopari sthitam || 18 ||
śivo'pi paramaṃ sthānaṃ kailāsākhyaṃ cakāra ha |
samāsādya bhūtagaṇaṃ vijahāra yathāruci || 19||
svargastriviṣṭapo meruśikharopari kalpitaḥ |
tacca sthānaṃ surendrasya nānāratnavirājitam ||20||
samudramathanātprāptaḥ pārijātastaruttamaḥ |
caturdatastathā nāgaḥ kāmadhenuśca kāmadā || 21 ||
uḥ śravāstathā'śvo vai raṃbhādyaprasastathā |
iṃdraṇopāttamakhilaṃ jātaṃ vai svargabhūṣaṇam ||22||
dhanvaṃtariścaṃdramāśca sāgarācca samudbabhau |
svargasthitau virājete devau bahugaṇairvṛtau ||23||
evaṃ sṛṣṭiḥ samutpannā trividhā nṛpasattama |
devatiryaṅmanuṣyādibhedaivividhakalpitā ||24||
aṃḍajāḥ svedajāścaiva codbhijjāśca jarāyujāḥ |
caturbhedaiḥ samutpannā jīvāḥ karmayutāḥ kila || 25 ||
evaṃ sṛṣṭiṃ samāsādya brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ |
vihāraṃ sveṣu sthāneṣu cakruḥ sarve yathepsitam ||26||
evaṃ pravartite sarge bhagavānprabhuracyutaḥ |
mahālakṣmyā samaṃ tatra cikrīḍa bhuvane svake ||27||
ekasminsamaye viṣṇurvaikuṇṭhe saṃsthitaḥ purā |
sudhāsiṃdhusthitaṃ dvīpaṃ sasmāra maṇimaṃḍitam ||28||
yatra dṛṣṭā mahāmāyāṃ maṃtra ścāsāditaḥ śubhaḥ |
smṛtvā tāṃ paramāṃ śakti strībhāvaṃ gamito yathā ||
yajñaṃ kartuṃ manaścakre amvikāyā ramāpatiḥ |
uttīrya bhuvanāttasmātsamāhūya maheśvaram ||30||
brahmāṇaṃ varuṇaṃ śakraṃ kuberaṃ pāvakaṃ yamam |
vasiṣṭhaṃ kaśyapaṃ devaṃ vāmadevaṃ bṛhaspatim ||31||
saṃbhāraṃ kalpayāmāsa yajñārthaṃ cātivistaram |
mahāvibhavasaṃyuktaṃ sāttvikaṃ ca manoharam ||32||
maṃḍapaṃ vitataṃ tatra kārayāmāsa śilpibhiḥ |
ṛtvijo varayāmāsa saptaviṃśati suvratān ||33||
citiṃ ca kārayāmāsa vedīścaiva suvistarāḥ |
prajepurbrāhmaṇā maṃtrāndevyā bījasamanvitān ||34||
juhuvuste haviḥ kāmaṃ vidhivatparikalpite |
kṛte tu vitate home vāguvācāśarīriṇī ||35||
viṣṇuṃ tadā samābhāṣya susvarā madhurākṣarā |
viṣṇo tvaṃ bhava devānāṃ hare śreṣṭhatamaḥ sadā ||36||
mānyaśca pūjanīyaśca samarthaśca sureṣvapi |
sarve tvāmarcayiṣyaṃti brahmādyāśca savāsavāḥ ||37||
prabhaviṣyati bho bhaktayā mānavā bhuvi sarvataḥ |
varadastvaṃ ca sarveṣāṃ bhavitā mānaveṣu vai ||38||

kāmadaḥ sarvadevānāṃ paramaḥ parameśvaraḥ |
sarvayajñeṣu mukhyastvaṃ pūjyaḥ sarveśca yājñikaḥ || 37
tvāṃ janāḥ pūjayiṣyati varadastvaṃ bhaviṣyasi |
śrayiṣyaṃti ca devāstvāṃ dānavairatipīḍitāḥ || 40
śaraṇastvaṃ ca sarveṣāṃ bhavitā puruṣottama |
purāṇeṣu ca sarveṣu vedeṣu vitateṣu ca ||41||
tvaṃ vai pūjyatamaḥ kāmaṃ kīrtistava bhaviṣyati |
yadā yadā hi dharmasya glānirbhavati bhūtale ||42||
tadāṃśenāvatīryāśu kartavyaṃ dharmarakṣaṇam | avatārāḥ suvikhyātāḥ pṛthivyāṃ tava bhāgaśaḥ 43 |,
bhaviṣyaṃti dharāyāṃ vai mānanīyā mahātmanām |
avatāreṣu sarveṣu nānāyoniṣu mādhava || 44 ||
vikhyātaḥ sarvalokeṣu bhavitā madhusūdana |
avatāreṣu sarveṣu śaktiste sahacāriṇī || 45 ||
bhaviṣyati mamāṃśena sarvakārya prasādhinī |
vārāhī nārasiṃhī ca nānābhedairanekadhā || 46 |
nānāyudhāḥ śubhākārāḥ sarvābharaṇamaṃḍitāḥ |
tābhiryuktaḥ sadā viṣṇo surakāryāṇi mādhava || 47||
sādhayiṣyasi tatsarvaṃ maddattavaradānataḥ |
tāstvayā nāvamaṃtavyāḥ sarvadā garvaleśataḥ || 48 ||
pūjanīyāḥ prayatnena mānanīyāśca sarvathā |
nūnaṃ tā bhārate khaṃḍe śaktayaḥ sarvakāmadāḥ || 49 ||
bhaviṣyanti manuṣyāṇāṃ pūjitāḥ pratimāsu ca |
tāsāṃ tava ca deveśa kīrtiḥ syādakhileṣvapi || 50 ||
dvīpeṣu saptasvapi ca vikhyātā bhuvi maṃḍale |
tāśca tvāṃ vai mahābhāga mānavā bhuvi maṃḍale || 51 ||
arcayiṣyaṃti vāṃchārthaṃ sakāmāḥ satataṃ hare |
arcāsu copahāraiśca nānābhāvasamanvitāḥ || 52 ||
pūjayiṣyaṃti vedoktaṃrmatrairnāmajapaistathā |
mahimā tava bhūrloke svarge ca madhusūdana || 53||
pūjanāddevadeveśa vṛddhimeṣyati mānavaiḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
iti dattvā varānvāṇī virarāma khasaṃbhavā || 54 ||
bhagavānapi prītātmā hyabhavacchravaṇādiva |
