brāhmaṇairbrahmajāḥ pūjyā rājanyairbrahmavaṃśajāḥ |
vaiśyaistrivargajāḥ pūjyā catasraḥ pādasaṃbhavaḥ || 6 ||

kārubhiścaiva vaṃśotthā yathāyogyaṃ prapūjayet |
navarātravidhānena bhaktipūrvaṃ sadaiva hi ||7||
aśakto niyataṃ pūjāṃ kartuṃ cennavarātrake |
aṣṭamyāṃ ca viśeṣeṇa kartavyaṃ pūjanaṃ sadā ||8||
dakṣayajñavināśinī |
prādurbhūtā mahāghorā yoginī koṭibhiḥ saha || 9 ||
purā'ṣṭamyāṃ bhadrakālī ato'ṣṭamyāṃ viśeṣeṇa kartavyaṃ pūjanaṃ sadā |
nānāvidhopahāraiśca gaṃdhamālyānulepanaiḥ || 10 ||

pāyasairāmiṣairhomairbrāhmaṇānāṃ ca bhojanaiḥ |
phalapuṣpopahāraiśva toṣayejjagadaṃbikām || 11||
upavāse hyaśaktānāṃ navarātravrate punaḥ |
upoṣaṇatrayaṃ proktaṃ yathoktaphaladaṃ nṛpa ||12||
saptamyāṃ ca tathā'ṣṭamyāṃ navamyāṃ bhaktibhāvataḥ |
trirātrakaraṇātsarvaṃ phalaṃ bhavati pūjanāt || 13 ||
pūjābhiścaiva homaiśva kumā śrīṣū janastathā |
saṃpūrṇa tadvrataṃ proktaṃ viprāṇāṃ caiva bhojanaiḥ || 14 ||
vratāni yāni cānyāni dānāni vividhāni ca |
navarātravratasyāsya naiva tulyāni bhūtale || 15 ||
dhanadhānyapradaṃ nityaṃ sukhasaṃtāghavṛddhidaṃm |
āyurārogyadaṃ caiva svargadaṃ mokṣadaṃ tathā || 16||
vidyārthī vā dhanārthī vā putrārthī vā bhavennaraḥ |
tadainaṃ vidhivatkāryaṃ vrataṃ saubhāgyadaṃ śivam || 17 || 、
vidyārthī sarvavidyāṃ vai prāpnoti vratasādhanāt |
rājabhraṣṭo nṛpo rājyaṃ samavāpnoti sarvadā || 18 |
pūrvajanmani yairnūnaṃ na kṛtaṃ vratamuttamam |
te vyādhino daridrāśca bhavaṃti putravarjitāḥ ||19||
baṃdhyā ca yā bhavennārī vidhavā dhanavarjitā |
anumā tatra kartavyā neyaṃ kṛtavatī vratam ||20|| .
navarātravrataṃ proktaṃ naṃ kṛtaṃ yena bhūtale |
sa kathaṃ vibhavaṃ prāpya modate ca tathā divi || 21||
raktacaṃdanasaṃmiśraḥ komalaibilvapatrakaiḥ |
bhavānī pūjitā yena sa bhavennṛpatiḥ kṣitau ||22||
nārādhitā yena śivā sanātanī duḥkhārtihā siddhikarī jagadvarā |
duḥkhāvṛtaḥ śatruyutaśca bhūtale nūnaṃ daridro bhavatīha mānavaḥ ||23|| i
yāṃ viṣṇuriṃdro harapadmajo tathā vahniḥ kubero varuṇo divākaraḥ |
dhyāyaṃti sarvārthasamāptinaṃditāstāṃ kiṃ manuṣyā na bhajaṃti caṃḍikām ||24||
svāhā svadhā nāma manuprabhāvaistṛpyaṃti devāḥ pitarastathaiva |
yajñeṣu sarveṣu mudā haraṃti yannāma yugmaśrutibhirmunīṃdrāḥ || 25||
yasyecchyā sṛjati viśvamidaṃ prajeśo nānāvatārakalanaṃ kurute hariśva |
nūnaṃ karoti jagataḥ kila bhasma śaṃbhustāṃ śarmaṃdā na bhajate nu kathaṃ manuṣyaḥ || 26||
naiko'sti sarvabhuvaneṣu tayā vihīno devo naro'tha vihagaḥ kila pannago vā |
gaṃdharva rākṣasa piśācanageṣu tūnaṃ yaḥ spaṃdituṃ bhavati śaktiyuto yatheccham ||27||
tāṃ na seveta kaścaṇḍīṃ sarvakāmārthadāṃ śivām |
vrataṃ tasyā na kaḥ kuryādvāṃchatrarthacatuṣṭayam ||28||
mahāpātakasaṃyukto navarātravrataṃ caret |
mucyate sarvapāpebhyo nātra kāryā vicāraṇā ||29||
purā kaścidvaṇigdīno dhanahīnaḥ suduḥkhitaḥ |
kuṭuṃbī cābhavatkaścitkosale nṛpasattama ||30||
apatyāni bahūnyasyābhavankṣutpīḍitāni ca |
bhakṣyaṃ kiṃcittu sāyāhne prāpustasya ca bālakāḥ 31 ||
bhuṃktesma kāryakartā'sau parasyātha bubhukṣitaḥ |
kuṭuṃbabharaṇaṃ tatra cakārātinirākulaḥ ||32||
sadā dharmarataḥ śāṃtaḥ sadācāraśca satyavāk |
akrodhanaśca dhṛtimānnirmadaścānasūyakaḥ ||33||

saṃpūjya devatā nityaṃ pitṛnapyatithīṃstathā |
bhuṃjāne poṣyavarge'tha kṛtavānbhojanaṃ vaṇik ||34||
evaṃ gacchati kāle vai suśīlo nāmato guṇaiḥ |
dāridrayārto dvijaṃ śāntaṃ papracchātibubhukṣitaḥ ||35||
suśola uvāca
bho bhūdeva kṛpāṃ kṛtvā vadasvādya mahāmate |
kathaṃ dāridryanāśaḥ syāditi me niśvayena vai || 36||
dhanaṃṣaṇā me naivāsti dhanī syāmiti mānada |
kuṭuṃbabharaṇārthaṃ vai pṛcchāmi tvāṃ dvijottama ||37||
putrī sutastu me bālo bhakṣārthī rodate bhṛśam |
tāvanmātraṃ gṛhe nānnaṃ muṣṭimekāṃ dadāmyaham ||38||
visarjito yato gehādvato bālo rudanmayā |
ato me dahyate'tyarthaṃ kiṃ karomi dhanaṃ vinā ||39||
vivāho'sti sutāyā me nāsti vittaṃkaromikim |
daśavarṣādhikāyāstu dānakālo'pi yātyalam ||40||
tena śocāmi vipreṃdra sarvajño'si dayānidhe |
tapo dānaṃ vrataṃ kiṃcidbrūhi maṃtrajapaṃ tathā ||41 ||
yenāhaṃ poṣyavargasya karomi dvija poṣaṇam |
tāvanme syādanaprāptirnādhikaṃ prārthaye kila || 42||
tvatprasādātkuṭumbaṃ me sukhitaṃ sukhitaṃ prabhavediha |
tatkuruṣva mahābhāga jñānena paricitya ca || 43 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti pṛṣṭastathā tena brāhmaṇaḥ saṃśitavrataḥ |
uvāca paramaprītastaṃ vaiśyaṃ nṛpasattama ||44 ||
pūjanaṃ bhagavatyāśca havanaṃ bhojanaṃ tathā || 45 ||
vedapārāyaṇaṃ śaktijapahomādikaṃ tathā |
kuruṣvādya yathāśakti tava kāryaṃ bhaviṣyati || 46 ||
etasmādaparaṃ kiṃcid vrataṃ nāsti dharātale |
navarātrābhidhaṃ vaiśya pāvanaṃ sukhadaṃ tathā ||47 ||
jñānadaṃ mokṣadaṃ caiva sukhasaṃtānavardhanam |
śatrunāśakaraṃ kāmaṃ navarātravrataṃ sadā ||48 ||
rājyabhraṣṭena rāmeṇa sītāvirahitena ca |
kiṣkiṃdhāyāṃ vrataṃ caitatkṛtaṃ duḥkhātureṇa vai || 49||
prataptenāpi rāmeṇa sītāvirahavahninā |
vidhivatpūjitā devī navarātravratena vai || 50 ||
tena prāptā'tha vaidehī kṛtvā setuṃ mahārṇave |
hatvā maṃdodarīnāthaṃ kuṃbhakarṇaṃ mahābalam ||51||
meghanādaṃ sutaṃ hatvā kṛtvā bhūpaṃ vibhīṣaṇam |
paścādayodhyāmāgatya prāptaṃ rājyamakaṃṭakam ||52||
navarātra vratasyāsya prabhāveṇa viśāṃvara |
sukhaṃ bhūmitale prāptaṃ rāmeṇāmitatejasā || 53 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti vipravacaḥ śrutvā sa vaiśyastaṃ dvijaṃ gurum |
kṛtvā jagrāha sanmaṃtraṃ māyābījābhidhaṃ nṛpa || 54 ||
jajāpa parayā bhaktyā navarātramataṃdritā |
nānāvidhopahāraiśca pūjayāmāsa sādaram ||55 ||
navasaṃtsaraṃ caiva māyābīzaparāyaṇaḥ |
navame vatsarāṃte tu mahāṣṭamyāṃ maheśvarī || 56||
ardharātre tu saṃjātaṃ pratyakṣaṃ darśanaṃ dadau |
nānāvarapradānaiśca kṛtakṛtyaṃ cakāra tam ||57 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe saptaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||27||

ર śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 28 177
atha aṣṭāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
kathaṃ rāmeṇa taccīrṇaṃ vrataṃ devyāḥ sukhapradam |
rājya bhraṣṭaḥ kathaṃ so'tha kathaṃ sītā hṛtā punaḥ || 1||
vyāsa uvāca
rājā daśarathaḥ śrīmānayodhyādhipatiḥ purā | sūryavaṃśadharaśvāsīddevabrāhmaṇapūjakaḥ 11211
catvāro jajñire tasya putrā lokeṣu viśrutāḥ |
rāmalakṣmaṇaśatrughnā bharataśceti nāmataḥ || 3 ||
rājñaḥ priyakarāḥ sarve sadṛśā guṇarūpataḥ |
kausalyāyāḥ suto rāmaḥ kaikeyyā bharataḥ smṛtaḥ ||4||
sumitrātanayau jātau yamalau dvau manoharī |
te jātā vai kiśorāśca dhanurbāṇadharāḥ kila || 5 ||
sunayaḥ kṛtasaṃskārā bhūpateḥ sukhavardhakāḥ |
kauśikena tadā''gatya prārthito raghunandanaḥ || 6 ||
rāghavaṃ makharakṣārthaṃ sūnuṃ ṣoḍaśavārṣikam |
tasmai so'yaṃ dadau rāmaṃ kauśikāya salakṣmaṇam ||7||
to sametya muniṃ mārge jagmatuścārudarśanī |
tāṭakā nihatā mārge rākṣasī ghoradarśanā || 8 ||
rāmeṇaikena vāṇena munīnāṃ duḥkhadā sadā |
yajñarakṣā kṛtā tatra subāhunihataḥ śaṭhaḥ || 9 ||
mārīco'tha bhūtaprāyo nikṣipto bāṇavegataḥ |
evaṃ kṛtvā mahatkarma yajñasya parirakṣaṇam ||10||
gatāste mithilāṃ sarve rāmalakṣmaṇa kauśikā: |
ahalyā kavitā śāpāniṣpāpā sā kṛtā'balā ||
videha nagare tau tu jagmaturmuninā saha |
babhaṃja śivacāpaṃ ca janakena paṇīkṛtam || 12 ||
upayeme tataḥ sītāṃ jānakīṃ caramāṃśaṃjām |
lakṣmaṇāya dadau rājā putrīmekāṃ tathomilām 13 ||
kuśadhvajasute kanye prāpaturbhrātarāvubhau |
tathā bharanaśatrughno suśīlau śubhalakṣaṇī || 14 ||
evaṃ dārakriyāsteṣāṃ bhrātṝṇāṃ cābhavannṛpa |
caturṇāṃ mithilāyāṃ tu yathāvidhi vidhānataḥ || 15 ||
rājyayogyaṃ sutaṃ dṛṣṭvā rājā daśarathastadā |
rāghavāya dhuraṃ dātuṃ manaścakre nijāya vai || 16 ||
saṃbhāraṃ vihitaṃ dṛṣṭrā kaikeyī pūrvakalpitau |
varau saṃprārthayāmāsa / bhartāraṃ vaśavartinam ||17||
rājyaṃ sutāya caikena bharatāya mahātmane |
rāmāya vanavāsaṃ ca caturdaśa samāstathā || 18 ||
rāmastu vacanāttasyāḥ sītālakṣmaṇasaṃyutaḥ |
jagāma daṃḍakāraṇyaṃ rākṣasairupasevitam ||19||
rājā daśarathaḥ putraviraheṇa prapīḍitaḥ |
jahau prāṇānameyātmā pūrvaśāpamanusmaran || 20 ||
bharataḥ pitaraṃ dṛṣṭvā mṛtaṃ mātṛkṛtena vai |
rājyamṛddhaṃ na jagrāha bhrātuḥ priyacikīrṣayā || 21 |
paṃcavaṭayāṃ vasan rāmo rāvaṇāvarajāṃ vane |
śūrpaṇakhāṃ virūpāṃ vai cakārātismarāturām ||22|
kharādayastu tāṃ dṛṣṭṭhā chivanāsāṃ niśācarāḥ |
cakruḥ saṃgrāmamatulaṃ rāmeṇāmitatejasā ||23||
sa jaghāna kharādīṃśca daityānatibalānvitān |
munīnāṃ hitamanvicchan rāmaḥ satyaparākramaḥ || 24||

gatvā śūrpaṇakhā laṃkāṃ kharadūṣaṇaghātanam |
dūṣitā kathayāmāsa rāvaṇāya ca rāghavāt ||25||
sopi śrutvā vināśaṃ taṃ jātaḥ krodhavaśaḥ khalaḥ |
jagāma rathamāruhya mārīcasyāśramaṃ tadā ||26||
kṛtvā hemamṛgaṃ netuṃ preṣayāmāsa rāvaṇaḥ |
sītāpralobhanārthāya māyāvinamasaṃbhavam ||27||
so'tha hemamṛgo bhūtvā sītādṛṣṭipathaṃ gataḥ |
māyāvī cāticitrāṃgaśca ranprabalamaṃtike ||28||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā jānakī prāha rāghavaṃ daivanoditā |
carmānayasva kānteti svādhīnapatikā yathā ||29||
avicāryātha rāmo'pi tatra saṃsthāpya lakṣmaṇam |
saśaraṃ dhanurādāya yayau mṛgapadānugaḥ ||30||
sāraṅgo'pi hariṃ dṛṣṭvā māyākoṭiviśāradaḥ |
dṛśyādṛśyo babhūvātha jagāma ca vanāṃtaram ||31||
matvā hastagataṃ rāmaḥ krodhākṛṣṭadhanuḥ punaḥ |
jaghāna cātitīkṣṇena śareṇa kṛtrimaṃ mṛgam ||32||
sa hato'tibalāttena cukrośa bhṛśaduḥkhitaḥ |
hā lakṣmaṇa hato'smīti māyāvī naśvaraḥ khalaḥ ||33|
sa śabdastumulastāvajjānakyā saṃśrutastadā |
rāghavasyeti sā matvā dīnā devaramabravīt ||34||
gaccha lakṣmaṇa tūrṇaṃ tvaṃ hato'sau raghunandanaḥ |
tvāmāhvayati saumitre sāhāyyaṃ kuru satvaram ||35|
tatrāha lakṣmaṇaḥ sītāmaṃba rāmavadhādapi |
nāhaṃ gacche'dya muktvā tvāmasahāyāmihāśrame ||36||
ājñā me rāghavasyātra tiṣṭheti janakātmaje |
tadatikramabhīto'haṃ na tyajāmi tavāṃtikam ||37|
dūraṃ vai rāghavaṃ dṛṣṭvā vane māyāvinā kila |
tyaktvā tvāṃ nādhigacchāmi padamekaṃ śucismite ||
kuru dhairyaṃ na manye'dya rāmaṃ haṃtuṃ kṣamaṃ kṣiptau |
nāhaṃ tyaktvā gamiṣyāmi vilaṃghya rāmabhāṣitam ||
vyāsa uvāca
rudatī sudatī graha taṃ tadā vidhinoditā |
akrūrā vacanaṃ krūraṃ lakṣmaṇaṃ śubhalakṣaṇam ||40|
ahaṃ jānāmi saumitre sānurāgaṃ ca māṃ prati |
preritaṃ bharatenaiva madarthamiha saṃgatam ||41 ||
nāhaṃ tathāvidhā nārī svairiṇī kuhakādhama |
mṛte rāme pati tvāṃ na kartumicchāmi kāmataḥ || 42 ||
nāgamiṣyati cedrāmo jīvitaṃ saṃtyajāmyaham |
vinā tena na jīvāmi vidhurā duḥkhitā bhṛśam 43 ||
gaccha vā tiṣṭha saumitre na jāne'haṃ tavepsitam |
kva gataṃ te'dya sauhārda jyeṣṭhe dharmarate kila || 44||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasyā lakṣmaṇo dīnamānasaḥ |
provāca rudrakaṇṭhastu tāṃ tadā janakātmajām ||45||
kimātya kṣitije vākyaṃ mayi krūrataraṃ kila |
kiṃ vadasyatyaniṣṭaṃ te bhāvi jāne dhiyā hyaham ||
ityuktvā niryayau vīrastāṃ tyaktvā prarudanbhṛśam |
agrajasya yayau paśyañchokārtaḥ pṛthivīpate ||47 ||
gate'tha lakṣmaṇe tatra rāvaṇaḥ kapaṭākṛtiḥ |
bhikṣuveṣaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā praviveśa tadāśrame || 48 ||
jānakī taṃ yati matvā dattvārdhaṃ vanyamādarāt |
bhaikṣyaṃ samarpayāmāsa rāvaṇāya durātmane ||49 ||
tāṃ papracchasa duṣṭātmā namraevaṃ madasvaram |
kā'si padmapalāśākṣi bane naikaye || 50||
pitā kaste'tha vāmora bhrātā kaḥ kaḥ patistava |
yaḍhe vaikākinī cātra sthitā'si varavarṇinī ||51||

nirjane vipine kiṃ tvaṃ saudhārhā tvamasi priye |
uṭaje munipatnīvaddevakanyāsamaprabhā ||52||
vyāsa uvāca
iti tadvacanaṃ śrutvā pratyuvāca videhajā |
divyaṃ diṣṭayā yatiṃ jñātvā maṃdodaryāḥ patiṃ tadā ||
rājā daśarathaḥ śrīmāṃścatvārastasya vai sutāḥ |
teṣāṃ jyeṣṭhaḥ patirme'sti rāmanāmeti viśrutaḥ || 54 ||
vivāsito'tha kaikeyyā kṛte bhūpatinā vare |
caturdaśa samā rāmo vasate'tra salakṣmaṇaḥ || 55 ||
janakasya sutā cāhaṃ sītānāmnīti viśrutā |
bhaktvā śaivaṃ dhanuḥ kāmaṃ rāmeṇāhaṃ vivāhitā || 56 ||
rāmabāhubalenātra vasāmo nirbhayā vane |
kāṃcanaṃ mṛgamālokya haṃtuṃ me nirgataḥ patiḥ || 57 ||
lakṣmaṇo'pi punaḥ śrutvā ravaṃ bhrāturgato'dhunā |
tayorbāhubalādatra nirbhayā'haṃ vasāmi vai || 58 ||
mayedaṃ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ vṛttāntaṃ vanavāsa ke |
te'trāgatyārhaṇāṃ te vai kariṣyati yathāvidhi || 59 |
yativiṣṇusvarūpo'si tasmāttvaṃ pūjito mayā |
āśramo vipine ghore kṛto'sti rakṣasāṃ kule || 60 ||
tasmāttvāṃ paripṛcchāmi satyaṃ brūhi mamāgrataḥ |
ko'si tridaṃḍirūpeṇa vipine tvaṃ samāgataḥ || 61 ||
rāvaṇa udyāca
laṃkeśo'haṃ marālākṣi śrīmānmandodarīpatiḥ |
tvatkṛte tu kṛtaṃ rūpaṃ mayetthaṃ śobhanākṛte || 62 ||
āgato'haṃ varārohe bhaginyā prerito'tra vai |
janasthāne hatī śrutvā bhrātarī kharadūṣaṇau || 63 ||
aṅgīkuru nṛpaṃ mātvaṃ tyaktvā taṃ mānuṣaṃ patim |
hṛtarājyaṃ gataśrīkaṃ nirvalaṃ vanavāsinam ||64 ||
paṭṭarājñī bhava tvaṃ me mandodaryupari sphuṭam |
dāso'smi tava tatvaṅgi svāminī bhava bhāmini ||
jetā'haṃ lokapālānāṃ patāmi tava pādayoḥ |
karaṃ gṛhāṇa me'dya tvaṃ sanāthaṃ kuru jānaki || 66||
pitā te yācitaḥ pūrvaṃ mayā vai tvatkṛte'vale |
janako māmuvācetthaṃ pagabaṃdho mayā kṛtaḥ || 67 ||
rudracāpabhayānnāhaṃ saṃprāptastu svayaṃvare |
mano me saṃsthitaṃ tāvannimagnaṃ virahāturam ||68||
vane'tra saṃsthitāṃ śrutvā pūrvānurāgamohitaḥ |
āgato'smyasitāpāṃgi saphalaṃ kuru me śramam ||69||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe aṣṭāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 28||
atha ekonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tadākarṇya vaco duṣṭaṃ jānakī bhayavihvalā |
vepamānā sthiraṃ kṛtvā mano vācamuvāca ha ||1||
paulastya kimasadvākyaṃ tvamāttha smaramohitaḥ |
nāhaṃ vai svairiṇī kiṃtu janakasya kulodbhavā ||2|
gaccha laṃkāṃ daśāsya tvaṃ rāma tvāṃ vai haniṣyati |
matkṛte maraṇaṃ tatra bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ ||3||
ityuktvā parṇaśālāyāṃ gatā sā vahnisannidhau |
gaccha gaccheti vadatī rāvaṇaṃ loka rāvaṇam ||4||

so'tha kṛtvā nijaṃ rūpaṃ jagāmoṭajamaṃtikam |
balājjagrāha tāṃ bālāṃ rudatā bhayavihvalām ||5||
rāmarāmeti kraṃdatī lakṣmaṇeti muhurmuhuḥ |
gṛhītvā nirgataḥ pāpo rathamāropya satvaraḥ || 6 ||
gacchannaruṇaputreṇa mārge ruddho jaṭāyuṣā |
saṃgrāmo'bhūnmahāraudrastayostatra vanāntare ||7||
hatvā taṃ tāṃ gṛhītvā ca gato'sau rākṣasādhipaḥ |
laṃkāyāṃ kraṃdatī tāta kurarīva durātmanaḥ ||8||
aśokavanikāyāṃ sā sthāpitā rākṣasīyutā |
svavṛttānnaiva calitā sāmadānādibhiḥ kila || 9 ||
rāmo'pi taṃ mṛgaṃ hatvā jagāmādāya nirvṛtaḥ |
āyāṃtaṃ lakṣmaṇaṃ vīkṣya kiṃ kṛtaṃ te'nujāsamam 10 ||
ekākinīṃ priyāṃ hitvā kimarthaṃ tvamihāgataḥ |
śrutvā svanaṃ tu rāmasya rāghavastvavravīdidam ||11||
saumitristvabravīdvākyaṃ sītāvāgbāṇapīḍitaḥ |
prabho'trāhaṃ samāyātaḥ kālayogānna saṃśayaḥ || 12 ||
tadā tau parṇaśālāyāṃ gatvā vīkṣyātiduḥkhito |
jānakyanveṣaṇe yatnamubhau kartuṃ samudyatau ||13||
mārgamāṇī tu saṃprāptau yatrāsau patitaḥ khagaḥ |
jaṭāyuḥ prāṇaśeṣastu patitaḥ pṛthivītale || 14 ||
tenoktaṃ rāvaṇenādya hṛtā'sau janakātmajā |
mayā niruddha. pāpātmā pātito'haṃ mṛdhe punaḥ || 15||
ityuktvā'sau gataprāṇaḥ saṃskṛto rāghaveṇa vai |
kṛtvordhvadaihikaṃ rāmalakṣmaṇau nirgaptau tataḥ || 16||
kabaṃdhaṃ dhātayitvā'sau śāpāccāmocayatprabhuḥ |
vacanāttasya hariṇā sakhyaṃ cakre'tha rāghavaḥ || 17||
hatvā ca bālinaṃ vīraṃ kiṣkiṃdhārājyamuttamam |
sugrīvāya dadau rāmaḥ kṛtasakhyāya kāryataḥ || 18||
tatraiva vārṣikānmāsāṃstasthau lakṣmaṇasaṃyutaḥ |
citayañjanakī citte daśānanahṛtāṃ priyām || 19||
lakṣmaṇaṃ prāha rāmastu sītāvirahapīḍitaḥ |
saumitre kaikayasutā jātā pūrṇamanorathā ||20||
na prāptā jānakī nūnaṃ nāhaṃ jīvāmi tāṃ vinā |
nāgamiṣyāmyayodhyāyāmṛte janakanandinīm ||21||
gataṃ rājyaṃ vane vāso mṛtastāto hṛtā priyā |
pīḍayanmāṃ sa duṣṭātmā daivo'gre kiṃ kariṣyati || 22||
durjeyaṃ bhavitavyaṃ hi prāṇināṃ bharatānuja |
āvayoḥ kā gatistāta bhaviṣyati suduḥ khaṭā ||23||
prāpya janma manovaṃśe rājaputrāvubhau kila |
vane'tiduḥkhabhoktāro jātau pūrvakṛtena ca || 24 ||
tyaktvā tvamapi bhogāṃstu mayā saha vinirgataḥ |
daivayogācca saumitre bhuṃkṣva duḥkhaṃ duratyayam || 25 ||
na kopyasmatkule pūrvaṃ matsamo duḥkhabhāṅnaraḥ |
akiṃcano'kṣamaḥ kliṣṭo na bhūto na bhaviṣyati || 23||
kiṃ karomyadya saumitre magno'smi duḥkhasāgare |
na cāsti taraṇopāyo hyasahāyasya meṃ kila ||27|
na vittaṃ na balaṃ vīra tvamekaḥ sahacārakaḥ |
kopaṃ kasminkaromyadya bhogesminsvakṛte'nuja ||28||
gataṃ hastagataṃ rājyaṃ kṣaṇādidrāsanopamam |
vane vāsastu saṃprāptaḥ ko veda vidhinirmitam ||29||
bālabhāvācca vaidehī calitā cāvayoḥ saha |
nītā daivena duṣṭena śyāmā duḥkhatarāṃ daśām ||30||
laṃkeśasya gṛhe śyāmā kathaṃ duḥkhaṃ bhaviṣyati |
pativratā suśīlā ca mayi prītiyutā bhṛśam ||31|
na ca lakṣmaṇa vaidehī sā tasya vaśagā bhavet |
svairiṇīva varārohā kathaṃ syājjanakātmajā ||32||

tyajetprāṇānniyaṃtṛtve maithilī bharatānuja |
na rāvaṇasya vaśagā bhavediti suniścitam ||33||
mṛtā cejjānakī vīra prāṇāṃstyakṣyāmyasaṃśayam |
mṛtā cedasitāpāṃgī kiṃ me dehena lakṣmaṇa || 34 ||
evaṃ vilapamānaṃ taṃ rāmaḥ kamalalocanam |
lakṣmaṇaḥ prāha dharmātmā sāṃtvayanṛtayā girā ||35||
dhairyaṃ kuru mahābāho tyaktvā kātaratāmiha |
ānayiṣyāmi vaidehīṃ hatvā taṃ rākṣasādhamam ||36||
āpadi saṃpadi tulyā dhairyādbhavaṃti te dhīrāḥ |
alpadhiyastu nimagnāḥ kaṣṭe bhavaṃti vibhave'pi 37 ||
saṃyogo viprayogaśva daivādhīnāvubhāvapi |
śokastu kī dṛśastatra dehenātmani ca kvacit || 38 ||
rājyādyathā vane vāso vaidehyā haraṇaṃ yathā |
tathā kāle samīcīne saṃyogo'pi bhaviṣyati ||39||
prāptavyaṃ sukhaduḥkhānāṃ bhogānnirvartanaṃ kvacit |
nānyathā jānakījāne tasmācchokaṃ tyajādhunā 40 ||
vānarāḥ santi bhūyāṃso gamiṣyeti caturdiśam |
śuddhi janakanandinyā ānayiṣyati te kila || 41 ||
jñātvā mārgasthiti tatra gatvā kṛtvā parākramam |
hatvā taṃ pāpakarmāṇamānayiṣyāmi maithilīm ||42||
sasainyaṃ bharataṃ vā'pi samāhūya sahānujam |
haniṣyāmo vayaṃ śatru kiṃ śocasi vṛthāgraja ||43||
raghuṇakarathenaiva jitāḥ sarvā diśaḥ purā |
tadvaṃśajaḥ kathaṃ śokaṃ kartumarhasi rāghava || 44 ||
eko'haṃ sakalānetuṃ samartho'smi surāsurān |
kiṃ punaḥ sasahāyo vai rāvaṇaṃ kulapāṃsanam ||45 ||
janakaṃ vā samānīya sāhāyye raghunandana |
haniṣyāmi durācāraṃ rāvaṇaṃ surakaṃṭakam ||46||
sukhaduḥkhasamudbhave |
sa śokasāgare magno na sukhī syātkadācana ||47||
sukhasyānaṃtaraṃ yasya
indreṇa vyasanaṃ prāptaṃ purā vai raghunandana |
nahuṣaḥ sthāpito 'devaiḥ sarvairmaghavataḥ pade ||48 ||
sthitaḥ paṃkajamadhye ca bahuvarṣagaṇānapi |
ajñātavāsaṃ maghavā bhītastyaktvā nijaṃ padam 49||
punaḥ prāptaṃ nijasthānaṃ kāle viparivartite |
nahupaḥ patito bhūmau śāpādajagarākṛtiḥ || 50 ||
indrāṇī kāmayānastu brāhmaṇānavamanya ca |
agastikopātsaṃjātaḥ sarpadeho |
mahīpatiḥ || 51 ||
tasmācchoko na kartavyo vyasane sati rāghava |
udyame cittamāsthāya sthātavyaṃ vai vipaścitā || 52 ||
sarvajño'si mahābhāga samartho'si jagatpate |
kiṃ prākṛta ivātyarthaṃ kurupe śokamātmani || 53 ||
vyāsa uva ca
iti lakṣmaṇavākyena bodhito raghunandanaḥ |
tyaktvā śokaṃ tathā'tyartha babhūva vigatajvaraḥ || 54||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe tṛtīyaskandhe ekonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||29||
atha triṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ tau saṃvidaṃ kṛtvā yāvattūṣṇīṃ babhūvatuḥ |
ājagāma tadākāśānnārado bhagavānṛṣiḥ || 1 ||

raṇayanmahartī vīṇāṃ svaragrāmavibhūṣitām |
gāṃyevahadrathaṃ sāma tadā tamupatasthivān || 2||
dṛṣṭvā taṃ rāma utthāya dadāvatha vṛṣaṃ śubham |
āsanaṃ cārghyaṃ pādyaṃ ca kṛtavānamitadyutiḥ || 3||
pūjāṃ paramikāṃ kṛtvā kṛtāṃjalirupasthitaḥ |
upaviṣṭaḥ samīpe tu kṛtājño muninā hariḥ ||4||
upaviṣṭaṃ tadā rāmaṃ sānujaṃ duḥkhamānasam |
papraccha nāradaḥ prītyā kuśala munisattamaḥ ||5||
kathaṃ rāghava śokārto yathā vai prākṛto naraḥ |
hṛtāṃ sītāṃ ca jānāmi rāvaṇena durātmanā || 6 |
surasadmagataścāhaṃ śrutavāñjanakātmajām |
paulastyena hṛtāṃ mohānmaraṇaṃ svamajānatā ||7||
tava janma ca kākutstha paulastyanidhanāya vai |
maithilīharaṇaṃ jātametadarthaṃ narādhipa ||8||
pūrvajanmani vaidehī muniputrī tapasvinī |
rāvaṇena vane dṛṣṭā tapasyaṃtī śucismitā ||9||
prārthitā rāvaṇenāsau bhava bhāryeti rāghava |
tiraskṛtastayā'sau vai jagrāha kabaraṃ balāt || 10 ||
śaśāpa tatkṣaṇaṃ rāma rāvaṇaṃ tāpasī bhṛśam |
kupitā tyaktumicchaṃtī dehaṃ saṃsparśadūṣitam ||11||
durātmaṃstava nāśārthaṃ bhaviṣyāmi dharātale |
ayonijā varā nārī tyaktvā dehaṃ jahāvapi || 12 ||
seyaṃ ramāṃśasaṃbhūtā gṛhītā tena rakṣasā |
vināśārthaṃ kulasyaiva vyālī sragiva saṃbhramāt || 13 ||
tava janma ca kākutstha tasya nāśāya cāmaraiḥ |
prārthitasya hare raṃśādajavaṃśe'pyajanmanaḥ || 14 ||
kuru dhairyaṃ mahābāho tatra sā vartate'vaśā |
satī dharmaratā sītā tvāṃ dhyāyaṃtī divāniśam || 15 ||
kāmadhenupayaḥ pātre kṛtvā maghavatā svayam |
pānārthaṃ preṣitaṃ tasyāḥ pītaṃ caivāmṛtaṃ yathā || 16 ||
surabhī dugdhapānātsā kṣuttṛdu:khavivarjitā |
jātā kamalapatrākṣī vartate vīkṣitā mayā || 17||
upāyaṃ kathayāmyadya tasya nāśāya rāghava |
vrataṃ kuruṣva śraddhāvānāśvine māsi sāṃpratam ||18||
navarātropavāsaṃ ca bhagavatyāḥ prapūjanam |
sarvasiddhikaraṃ rāma japahomavidhānataḥ || 19||
medhyaiśva paśubhirdevyā baliṃ dattvā viśaṃsitaḥ |
daśāṃśa havanaṃ kṛtvā saśaktastvaṃ bhaviṣyasi ||20||
viṣṇunā''caritaṃ pūrva mahādevena brahmaṇā |
tathā maghavatā cīrṇaṃ svargamadhyasthitena trai || 2 ||
sukhinā rāma kartavyaṃ navarātravrataṃ śubham ! viśeṣeṇa ca kartavyaṃ puṃsā kaṣṭagatena vai ||22||
viśvāmitreṇa kākutstha kṛtametanna saṃśayaḥ |
bhṛguṇā'tha vasiṣṭhena kaśyapena tathaiva ca || 23 ||
guruṇā hṛtadāreṇa kṛtametanmahāvratam |
tasmāttvaṃ kuru rājendra rāvaṇasya vadhāya ca ||24||
indreṇa vṛtranāśāya kṛlaṃ. vratamanuttamam |
tripurasya vināśāya śivenāpi purā kṛtam ||25||
hariṇā madhunāśāya kṛtaṃ merau mahāmate |
vidhivatkuru kākutstha vratametadataṃdritaḥ ||26||
śrīrāma uvāca
kā devī kiprabhāvā sā kuto jātā kimākṛtiḥ |
vrataṃ kiṃ vidhivadbrūhi sarvajñosi dayānidhe ||27||
nārada uvāca
śṛṇu rāma sadā nityā śaktirādyā sanātanī |
sarvakāmapradā devī pūjitā duḥkhanāśinī || 28 ||

kāraṇaṃ sarvajaṃtūnāṃ brahmādīnāṃ raghūdvaha |
tasyāḥ śakti vinā ko'pi spaṃdituṃ na kṣamo bhavet ||
viṣṇoḥ pālanaśaktiḥ sā kartṛśaktiḥ piturmama |
rudrasya nāśaśaktiḥ sā tvanyaśaktiḥ parā śivā 30 ||
yacca kiṃcitkvacidvastu sadasadbhuvanatraye |
tasya sarvasya yā śaktistadutpattiḥ kuto bhavet 3 1 ||
na brahmā na yadā viṣṇurna rudro na divākaraḥ |
na cendrādyāḥ surāḥ sarve na dharā na dharādharāḥ || 32 ||
tadā sā prakṛtiḥ pūrṇā puruṣeṇa pareṇa vai |
saṃyutā viharatyeva yugādo nirguṇā śivā || 33||
sā bhūtvā saguṇā paścātkaroti bhuvanatrayam |
pūrvaṃ saṃsṛjya brahmādīndattvā śaktīśca sarvaśaḥ ||34||
tāṃ jñātvā mucyate jaṃturjanmasaṃsārabaṃdhanāt |
sā vidyā paramā jñeyā vedādyā vedakāriṇī || 35 ||
asaṃkhyātāni nāmāni tasyā brahmādibhiḥ kila |
guṇakarmavidhānaistu kalpitāni ca kiṃ bruve ||36||
akārādikṣakārāṃtaiḥ svarairvarṇaistu yojitaiḥ |
asaṃkhyeyāni nāmāni bhavaṃti raghunandana ||37||
rāma uvāca
vidhi me brūhi viprarṣe vratasyāsya samāsataḥ |
karomyadyaiva śraddhāvāñchrīdevyāḥ pūjanaṃ tathā ||38||
nārada uvāca
pīṭhaṃ kṛtvā same sthāne saṃsthāpya jagadambikām |
upavāsānnavaiva tvaṃ kuru rāma vidhānataḥ || 39||
ācāryo'haṃ bhaviṣyāmi karmaṇyasminmahīpate |
devakāryavidhānārthamutsāhaṃ prakaromyaham ||40||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ satyaṃ matvā rāmaḥ pratāpavān |
kārayitvā śubhaṃ pīṭhaṃ sthāpayitvāṃvikāṃ śivām ||
vidhivatpūjanaṃ tasyāścakāra vratavān hariḥ |
saṃprāpte cāśvine māsi tasmingirivare tadā ||42||
upavāsaparo rāmaḥ kṛtavānvratamuttamam |
homaṃ ca vidhivattatra balidānaṃ ca pūjanam ||43||
bhrātarau cakratuḥ premṇā vrataṃ nāradasaṃmatam |
aṣṭamyāṃ madhyarātre tu devī bhagavatī hi sā || 44 ||
siṃhārūḍhā dadau tatra darśanaṃ pratipūjitā |
giriśṛṅge sthitovāca rādhavaṃ sānujaṃ girā || 45 ||
meghagambhīrayā cedaṃ bhaktibhāvena toṣitā |
devyuvāca
rāma rāma mahābāho tuṣṭā'smyadma vratena te ||46||
prārthayasva varaṃ kāmaṃ yatte manasi vartate |
nārāyaṇāṃśasaṃbhūtastvaṃ viṃśe mānave'naghe || 47||
vadhāyaiva prārthitastvamarairasi |
purā matsyatanuṃ kṛtvā hatvā ghoraṃ ca rākṣasam ||48||
rāvaṇasya tvayā vai rakṣitā vedāḥ surāṇāṃ hitamicchatā |
bhūtvā kacchapa rūpastu dhṛtavānmandaraṃ girim ||49||
akūpāraṃ pramandhānaṃ kṛtvā devānapoṣayaḥ |
kolarūpaṃ paraṃ kṛtvā daśanāgreṇa medinīm ||50||
dhṛtavānasi yadrāma hiraṇyākṣaṃ jaghāna ca |
nārasiṃhīṃ tanuṃṃ kṛtvā hiraṇyakaśipuṃ purā ||51||

prahlādaṃ rāma rakṣitvā hatavānasi rāghava |
vāmanaṃ vapurāsthāya purā chalitavānbalim ||52||
bhūtveṃdrasyānujaḥ kāmaṃ devakārya prasādhakaḥ |
jamadagnisutastvaṃ me viṣṇoraṃśena saṃgataḥ || 53 ||
kutvāṃtaṃ kṣatriyāṇāṃ tu dānaṃ bhūmeradādvije |
tathedānīṃ tu kākutstha jāto dārathātmaja || 54 ||
prārthitastu suraiḥ sarve rāvaṇenātipīḍitaiḥ |
kapayaste sahāyā vai devāṃśā balavattarāḥ ||55 ||
bhaviṣyanti naravyāghra macchaktisaṃyutā mī |
śeṣāṃśo'pyanujaste'yaṃ rāvaṇātmajanāśakaḥ ||56 ||
bhaviṣyati na saṃdehaḥ kartavyo'tra tvayā'nagha |
vasaṃte sevanaṃ kāryaṃ tvayā tatrātiśraddhayā || 57||
hatvā'tha rāvaṇaṃ pāpaṃ kuru rājyaṃ yathāsukham |
ekādaśa sahasrāṇi varṣāṇi pṛthivītale || 58 ||
kṛtvā rājyaṃ raghuśreṣṭha gaṃtā'si tridivaṃ punaḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvāṃtardadhe devī rāmastu prītamānasaḥ || 59 ||
samāpya tadvrataṃ cakre prayāṇaṃ daśamīdine |
vijayāpūjanaṃ kṛtvā dattvā dānānyanekaśaḥ || 60 ||
kapipatibalayuktaḥ sānujaḥ śrīpatiśca prakaṭaparamaśaktyā preritaḥ pūrṇakāmaḥ |
udadhitaṭagato'sau setubandhaṃ vidhāyāpyahanadamaraśatruṃ rāvaṇaṃ gītakīrtiḥ || 61 ||
yaḥ śṛṇoti naro bhaktyā devyāśvaritamuttamam |
sa bhuktvā vipulānbhogānprāpnoti paramaṃ padam 62 ||
saṃtyanyāni purāṇāni vistarāṇi bahūni ca |
śrīmadbhāgavatasyāsya na tulyānīti me matiḥ || 63 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭādaśasāhastrayāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ tṛtīyaskandhe triṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 30 ||
samāpto'yaṃ tṛtīyaḥ skandhaḥ

śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ
śrīmaddevībhāgavatam
caturthaḥ skandhaḥ
prathamo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
vāsaveya muniśreṣṭha sarvajñānanidhe'nagha |
praṣṭumicchāmyahaṃ svāminnasmākaṃ kulavardhana || 1 ||
śūrasenasutaḥ śrīmānvasudevaḥ pratāpavān |
śrutaṃ mayā hariryasya putrabhāvamavāptavān ||2||
devānāmapi pūjyo'bhūnnāmnāṃ cānakaduṃdubhiḥ |
kārāgāre kathaṃ baddhaḥ kaṃsasya dharmatatparaḥ || 3 ||
devakyā bhāryayā sārdhaṃ kimāgaḥ kṛtavānasau |
devakyā bālaṣaṭkasya vināśaśca kṛtaḥ punaḥ ||4||
tena kaṃsena kasmādvai yayātikulajena ca |
kārāgāre kathaṃ janma vāsudevasya vai hareḥ || 5 ||
gokule ca kathaṃ nīto bhagavānsātvatāṃ patiḥ |
gato janmāṃtaraṃ kasmātpitarau nigaḍe sthitau ||6||
devakīvasudevo ca kṛṣṇasyāmitatejasaḥ |
kathaṃ na mocito vṛddhau pitarau hariṇā'munā || 7||
jagatkartuṃ samarthena sthitena janakodare |
prāktanaṃ kiṃ tayoḥ karma durvijñeyaṃ mahātmabhiḥ ||8||
janma vai vāsudevasya yatrāsītparamātmanaḥ |
ke te putrāśva kā bālā yā kaṃsena vipothitā || 9 ||
śilāyā nirgatā vyomni jātā tvaṣṭabhujā punaḥ |
gārhasthyaṃ ca harebrūhi bahubhāryasya cānagha || 10 ||
kāryāṇi tatra tānyeva dehatyāgaṃ ca tasya vai |
kivadantyā śrutaṃ yattanmano mohayatība me || 11||
caritaṃ vāsudevasya tvamākhyāhi yathātatham |
naranārāyaṇo devī purāṇāvṛṣisattamau || 12 ||
dharmaputrī mahātmāno tapaśceraturuttamam |
yo munī bahuvarṣāṇi puṇye badarikāśrame || 13 ||
nirāhārī jitātmānau niḥspṛhau jitaṣaḍguṇau |
viṣṇoraṃśo jagatsthemne tapaśceraturuttamam ||14||

tayoraṃśāvatārī hi jiṣṇukṛṣṇo mahābalau |
prasiddho munibhiḥ proktī sarvajñairnāradādibhiḥ ||15||
vidyamānaśarīrau tau kathaṃ dehāṃtaraṃ gatau |
naranārāyaṇī devo punaḥ kṛṣṇārjunau katham ||16||
yau cakratustapaścagraṃ muktyarthaṃ munisattamī |
to kathaṃ prāpaturdeho prāptayogau mahātapau || 17 ||
śūdraḥ svadharmaniṣṭhastu dehānte kṣatriyastu saḥ |
śubhācāro mṛto yo vai sa śūdro brāhmaṇo bhavet 18 ||
brāhmaṇo niḥspṛhaḥ śāṃto bhavarogādvimucyate |
viparītamidaṃ bhāti naranārāyaṇau ca tau || 19 ||
tapasā śoṣitātmānau kṣatriyo to babhūvatuḥ |
kena to karmaṇā śāṃtau jātau śāpena vā punaḥ ||20||
brāhmaṇo kṣatriyau jātau kāraṇaṃ tanmune vada |
yādavānāṃ vināśaśca brahmaśāpāditi śrutaḥ ||21||
kṛṣṇasyāpi hi gāṃdhāryāḥ śāpenaiva kulakṣayaḥ |
pradyumnaharaṇaṃ caiva śaṃbareṇa kathaṃ kṛtam ||22||
vartamāne vāsudeve devadeve janārdane |
putrasya sūtikāgehāddharaṇaṃ cātidurghaṭam ||23||
dvārakā durgamadhyā hariveśmādduratyayāt |
na jñātaṃ vāsudevena tatkathaṃ divyacakṣuṣā ||24||
saṃdeho'yaṃ mahānbrahmanniḥsaṃdehaṃ kuru prabho |
yatpatnyo vāsudevasya dasyubhiluṃṭhitā hṛtāḥ || 25||
svargate devadeve tu tatkathaṃ munisattama |
saṃśayo jāyate brahmaṃścittāṃdolanakārakaḥ ||26||
viṣṇoraṃśaḥ samudbhūtaḥ śaurirbhūbhārahārakṛt |
sa kathaṃ mathurārājyaṃ bhayāttyaktvā janārdanaḥ ||27||
dvāravatyāṃ gataḥ sādho sasainyaḥ sasuhṛdgaṇaḥ |
avatāro hareḥ prokto bhūbhāraharaṇāya vai ||28||
pāpātmanāṃ vināśāya dharmasaṃsthāpanāya ca |
tatkathaṃ vāsudevena caurāste na nipātitāḥ || 29||
yairhṛtā vāsudevasya patnyaḥ saṃluṃṭhitāśca tāḥ |
stenāste kiṃ na vijñātāḥ sarvajñena satā punaḥ 30 ||
bhīṣmadroṇavadhaḥ kāmaṃ bhūbhāraharaṇe mataḥ |
arcitāśca mahātmānaḥ pāṃḍavā dharmatatparāḥ ||31||
kṛṣṇabhaktāḥ sadācārā yudhiṣṭhirapurogamāḥ |
te kṛtvā rājasūyaṃ ca yajñarājaṃ vidhānataḥ ||32||
dakṣiṇā vividhā dattvā brāhmaṇebhyo'tibhāvataḥ |
pāṃḍuputrāstu devāṃśā vāsudevāśritā mune ||33||
ghoraṃ duḥkhaṃ kathaṃ prāptāḥ kva gataṃ sukṛtaṃ ca tat |
kiṃ tatpāpaṃ mahāraudraṃ yena te pīḍitāḥ sadā ||34||
draupadī ca mahābhāgā bedīmadhyātsamutthitā |
ramāṃśajā ca sādhvī ca kṛṣṇabhaktiyutā tathā 35||
sā kathaṃ duḥkhamatulaṃ prāpa ghoraṃ punaḥ punaḥ |
duḥśāsanena sā keśe gṛhītā pīḍitā bhṛśam 36 ||
rajasvalā sabhāyāṃ tu nītā bhītaikavāsasā |
virāṭanagare dāsī jātā matsyasya sā punaḥ ||37|
gharṣitā kīcakenātha rudatī kurarī yathā |
hṛtā jayadrathenātha kraṃdamānā'tiduḥkhitā ||38||
mocitā pāṃḍavaiḥ paścādbalavadbhirmahātmabhiḥ |
pūrvajanmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ kiṃ tadyena ca pīḍitāḥ || 39||
duḥkhānyanekānyāptāste kathayādya mahāmate |
rājasūyaṃ kratuvaraṃ kṛtvā te mama pūrvajāḥ ||40||
duḥkhaṃ mahattaraṃ prāptāḥ pūrvajanmakṛtena vai |
devāṃśānāṃ kathaṃ teṣāṃ saṃśayo'yaṃ mahānhi me || 41 ||
sadācāraistu kauṃteyairbhīṣmadroṇādayo kauṃteyairbhīṣmadroṇādayo hatāḥ |
chalane dhanalobhārthaṃ jānānairnaśvaraṃ jagat ||42||

preritā vāsudevena pāpe ghore mahātmanā |
kulaṃ kṣayitavaṃtaste haripra. paramātmanā || 43 ||
varaṃ bhikṣāṭanaṃ sādho nīvārairjīvanaṃ varam |
yodhānna hatvā lo| śilpena jīvanaṃ varam || 44 ||
vicchinnastu tvayā vaṃśo rakṣito munisattama |
samutpādya sutānāśu golakāñchatrunāśanān ||45||
so'lpenaiva tu kālena virāṭatanayāsutaḥ |
tāpasasya gale sarpa nyastavānkathamadbhutam ||46|| |
na ko'pi brāhmaṇaṃ dveṣṭi kṣatriyasya kulodbhavaḥ |
tāpasaṃ maunasaṃyuktaṃ pitrā kiṃ tatkṛtaṃ mune || 47 |
etairanyaiśca saṃdeśairvikalaṃ me mano'dhunā |
sthiraṃ kuru pitaḥ sādho sarvajño'si dayānidhe || 48 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate caturthaskandhe janamejayapraśno nāma prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 ||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
evaṃ pṛṣṭaḥ purāṇajño vyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ |
parīkṣitasutaṃ śāṃtaṃ tato vai janamejayam ||1||
uvāca saṃśayacchettṛ vākyaṃ vākyaviśāradaḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
kimetadaktavyaṃ karmaṇo gahanā gatiḥ ||2||
durjñeyā kila devānāṃ mānavānāṃ ca kā kathā |
yadā samutthitaṃ cetadbrahmāṇḍaṃ triguṇātmakam ||3||
karmaṇaiva samutpattiḥ sarveṣāṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ |
anādinidhanā jīvāḥ karmabījasamudbhavāḥ ||4||
nānāyoniṣu jāyate mriyaṃ ca punaḥ punaḥ |
karmaṇā rahito dehasaṃyogo na kadācana ||5||
śubhāśubhaistathā miśraḥ karmabhirveṣṭitaṃ tvidam |
trividhāni hi tānyāhurbudhāstattvavidaśca ye || 6 ||
saṃcitāni bhaviṣyanti prārabdhāni tathā punaḥ |
vartamānāni dehe'smiṃstraividhyaṃ karmaṇāṃ kila || 7 |
brahmādīnāṃ tu sarveṣāṃ tadvaśatvaṃ narādhipa |
sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ jarāmṛtyuharṣaśokādayastathā ||8||
kāmakrodhau ca lobhaśca sarve dehagatā guṇāḥ |
daivāghīnāśca sarveṣāṃ prabhavaṃti narādhipa || 9 ||
rāgadveṣādayo bhāvāḥ svarge'pi prabhavaṃti hi |
devānāṃ mānavānāṃ ca tiraścāṃ ca tathā punaḥ || 10||
vikārāḥ sarva evaite dehena saha saṃgatāḥ |
pūrvavairānuyogena snehayogena vai punaḥ || 11 ||
utpattiḥ sarvajaṃtūnāṃ vinā karma na vidyate |
karmaṇā bhramate sūryaḥ śaśāṃka: kṣayarogavān || 12||
kapālī ca tathā rudraḥ karmaṇaiva na saṃśayaḥ |
anādinidhanaṃ caitatkāraṇaṃ karma vidyate ||13||
teneha śāśvataṃ sarvaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṃgamam |
nityānityavicāre'tra nimagnā munayaḥ sadā || 14 ||
na jānaṃti kimetadvai nityaṃ vā'nityameva ca |
māyāyāṃ vidyamānāyāṃ jagannityaṃ pratīyate || 15 ||
kāryābhāvaḥ kathaṃ vācyaḥ kāraṇe sati sarvathā |
māyā nityā kāraṇaṃ ca sarveṣāṃ sarvadā kila || 16 ||

karmabojaṃ tato nityaṃ ciṃtanīyaṃ sadā budhaiḥ |
bhramatyeva jagatsarvaṃ rājankarmaniyaṃtritam ||17||
nānāyoniṣu rājeṃdra nānādharmamayeṣu ca |
icchayā va bhavejjanma viṣṇoramitatejasaḥ || 18||
yugeyugeṣvanekāsu nīcayoniṣu tatkatham |
tyaktvā vaikuṃṭhasaṃvāsaṃ sukhabhogānanekaśaḥ ||19||
viṇmūtramaṃdire vāsaṃ saṃtrastaḥ ko'bhivāṃchati |
puṣpāvacayalīlā ca jalakeliḥ sukhāsanam ||20||
tyaktvā garbhagṛhe vāsaṃ ko'bhivāṃchati buddhimān |
tūlikāṃ mṛdusaṃyuktāṃ divyāṃ śayyāṃ vinirmitām ||21||
tyaktvā'dhomukhavāsaṃ ca ko'bhivāṃchati paṃḍitaḥ |
gītaṃ nṛtyaṃ ca vādyaṃ ca nānābhāvasamanvitam || 22||
muktvā ko narake vāsaṃ manasāpi vicitayet |
siṃdhujodbhūtabhāvānāṃ rasaṃ tyaktvā sudustyajam || 23||
viṇmūtrarasapānaṃ ca ka icchenmatimānnaraḥ |
garbhavāsātparo nāsti narako bhuvanatraye ||24||
tadbhītāśca prakurvanti munayo dustaraṃ tapaḥ |
hitvā bhogaṃ ca rājyaṃ ca vane yāṃti manasvinaḥ 25 ||
tadbhītastu vimūḍhātmā kastaṃ sevitumicchati |
garbhe tudaṃti kṛmayo jaṭharāgnistapatyadhaḥ ||26||
vapāsaṃveṣṭanaṃ krūraṃ kiṃ sukhaṃ tatra bhūpate |
varaṃ kārāgṛhe vāso bandhanaṃ nigaḍairvaram ||27||
alpamātraṃ kṣaṇaṃ naiva garbhavāsaḥ kvacicchubhaḥ |
garbhavāse mahaduḥkhaṃ daśamāsanivāsanam ||28||
tathā niḥsaraṇe duḥkhaṃ yoniyaṃtre'tidāruṇe |
bālabhāveṃ sadā duḥkhaṃ mūkājñabhāvasaṃyutam || 29||
kṣuttṛḍā vedanā'śaktaḥ parataṃtro'tikātaraḥ |
kṣudhite rudite bāle mātā ciṃtāturā tadā ||30||
nānāvidhāni duḥkhāni bālabhāve bhavaṃti vai ||31||
kiṃ sukhaṃ vibudhā dṛṣṭvā janma vāṃchaṃti cecchayā |
saṃgrāmamamaraiḥ sārdhaṃ sukhaṃ tyaktvā niraṃtaram ||32||
kartumicchecca ko mūḍhaḥ śramadaṃ sukhanāśanam |
sarvathaiva nṛpaśreṣṭha sarve brahmādayaḥ surāḥ ||33||
kṛtakarma vipākena prāpnuvaṃti sukhāsukhe |
avaśyameva bhoktavyaṃ kṛtaṃ karma śubhāśubham ||
dehavadbhirnṛbhirdevaistiryagbhiśva nṛpottama ||34||
tapasā dānayajñaiśca mānavaśvendratāṃ vrajet |
kṣīṇe puṇye'tha śakro'pi patatyeva na saṃśayaḥ || 35 || |
rāmāvatārayogena devā vānaratāṃ gatāḥ |
tathā kṛṣṇasahāyārthaṃ devā yādavatāṃ gatāḥ || 36 ||
evaṃ yuge yuge viṣṇuravatārānanekaśaḥ |
karoti dharmarakṣārthaṃ brahmaṇā prerito bhṛśam ||37||
punaḥ punarharerevaṃ nānāyoniṣu pārthiva |
avatārāṃ bhavatyanye rathanakravadadbhutāḥ ||38||
daityānāṃ hananaṃ karma kartavyaṃ hariṇā svayam |
aṃśāṃśena pṛthivyāṃ vai kṛtvā janma mahātmanā || 39 ||
tadahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi kṛṣṇajanmakathāṃ śubhām |
sa evaṃ bhagavānviṣṇuravatorṇo yadoḥ kule ||40||
kaśyapasya muneraṃśo vasudevaḥ pratāpavān |
govṛttirabhavadrājanpūrvaśāpānubhāvataḥ ||41||
kaśyapasya ca dve patnyo śāpādatra mahīpate |
aditiḥ surasā caivamāsatuḥ pṛthivīpate || 42||

devakī rohiṇī cobhe bhaginyo bharatarṣabha |
varuṇena mahāñchāpo dattaḥ kopāditi śrutam ||43||
rājovāca
kiṃ kṛtaṃ kaśyapenāgo yena śapto mahānṛṣiḥ |
sabhāryaḥ sa kathaṃ jātastadvadasva mahāmate ||44 ||
kathaṃ ca bhagavānviṣṇustatra jāto'sti gokule |
vāsī vaikuṇṭhanilaye ramāpatirakhaṃḍitaḥ || 45 ||
nideśātkasya bhagavānvartate prabhuravyayaḥ |
nārāyaṇaḥ suraśreṣṭho yugādiḥ sarvadhārakaḥ || 46 ||
sa kathaṃ sadanaṃ tyaktvā karmavāniva mānuṣe |
karoti jananaṃ kasmādatra me saṃśayo mahān ||47 ||
prāpya mānuṣadehaṃ tu karoti ca viḍaṃbanam |
bhāvānnānāvidhāṃstatra mānuṣe duṣṭajanmani || 48 ||
kāmaḥ krodho'marṣaśoko varaṃ prītiśca karhicit |
sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ bhayaṃ nṛṇāṃ dainyamārjavameva ca || 49 ||
duṣkṛtaṃ sukṛtaṃ caiva vacanaṃ hananaṃ tathā |
poṣaṇaṃ calanaṃ tāpo vimarśaśca vikatthanam ||50 ||
lobho daṃbhastathā mohaḥ kapaṭaḥ śocanaṃ tathā |
ete cānye tathā bhāvā mānuṣye saṃbhavaṃti hi || 51||
sa kathaṃ bhagavānviṣṇustyaktvā sukhamanaśvaram |
karoti mānuṣaṃ janma bhāvaistaistairabhidrutam ||52||
kiṃ sukhaṃ mānuṣaṃ prāpya bhuvi janma munīśvara |
kiṃ nimittaṃ hariḥ sākṣādgarbhavāsaṃ karoti vai || 53 ||
garbhaduḥkhaṃ janmaduḥkhaṃ bālabhāve tathā punaḥ |
yauvane kāmajaṃ duḥkhaṃ gārhasthye'timahattaram ||54||
duḥkhānyetānyavāpnoti mānuṣe dvijasattama |
kathaṃ sa bhagavānviṣṇuravatārānpunaḥ punaḥ || 55 ||
prāpya rāmāvatāraṃ hi hariṇā brahmayoninā |
duḥkhaṃ mahattaraṃ prāptaṃ vanavāse'tidāruṇe || 56 ||
sītāvirahajaṃ duḥkhaṃ saṃgrāmaśca punaḥ punaḥ |
kāṃtātyāgo'pyanenaivamanubhūto mahātmanā || 57 ||
tathā kṛṣṇāvatāre'pi janma rakṣāgṛhe punaḥ |
gokule gamanaṃ caiva gavāṃ caraṇamityuta || 58 ||
kaṃsasya hananaṃ kaṣṭādvārakāgamanaṃ punaḥ |
nānāsaṃsāraduḥkhāni bhuktavānbhagavānkatham ||59||
svecchayā kaḥ pratīkṣeta yukto duḥkhāni jñānavān |
saṃśayaṃ chidhi sarvajña mama cittapraśāṃtayeṃ || 60 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskaṃdhe dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
kāraṇāni bahūnyatrāpyavatāre hareḥ kila |
sarveṣāṃ caiva devānāmaṃśāvataraṇeṣvapi || 1||
vasudevāvatārasya kāraṇaṃ śṛṇu tattvataḥ |
devakyāścaiva rohiṇyā avatārasya kāraṇam ||2||
ekadā kaśyapaḥ śrīmānyajñārthaṃ dhenumāharat |
yācito'yaṃ bahuvidhaṃ na dadau dhenumuttamām ||3||
varuṇastu tato gatvā brahmāṇaṃ jagataḥ prabhum |
praṇamyovāca dīnātmā svaduḥkhaṃ vinayānvitaḥ || 4 ||
kiṃ karomi mahābhāga matto'sau na dadāti gām |
śāpo gayā visṛṣṭo'smai gopālo bhava ma ||5|| 6 ve

bhārye dve api tatraiva bhavetāṃ cātiduḥkhite |
tato vatsā rudaṃtyatra mātṛhīnāḥ suduḥkhitāḥ ||6||
mṛtavatsā'ditistasmādbhaviṣyati dharātale |
kārāgāranivāsā ca tenāpi bahuduḥkhitā ||7||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya yādonāthasya padmabhūḥ |
samāhūya muni tatra tamuvāca prajāpatiḥ ||8||
kasmāttvayā mahābhāga lokapālasya dhenavaḥ |
hṛtāḥ punarna dattāśca kimanyāyaṃ karoṣi ca || 9 ||
jānannyāyaṃ mahābhāga paravittāpahāraṇam |
kṛtavānkathamanyāyaṃ sarvajño'si mahāmate ||10||
aho lobhasya mahimā mahato'pi na muṃcati |
lobhaṃ narakadaṃ nūna pāpākaramasaṃmatam ||11| "
kaśyapo'pi na taṃ tyaktuṃ samarthaḥ kiṃ karomyaham |
sarvadaivādhikastasmāllobho vai kalito mayā || 12 ||
dhanyāste munayaḥ śāṃtā jito yairlobha eva ca |
vaikhānasaḥ śamaparaiḥ pratigrahaparāṅmukhaiḥ || 13 ||
saṃsāre balavāñchatrurlobho'medhyo'varaḥ sadā |
kaśyapo'pi durācāraḥ kṛtasneho durātmanā ||14||
brahmāpi taṃ śaśāpātha kaśyapaṃ munisattamam |
maryādārakṣaṇārthaṃ hi pautraṃ paramavallabham ||15||
aṃśena tvaṃ pṛthivyāṃ vai prāpya janma yadoḥ kule |
bhāryayā saṃyutastatra gopālatvaṃ kariṣyasi || 16 ||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ śaptaḥ kaśyapo'sau varuṇena ca brahmaṇā |
aṃśāvataraṇārthāya bhūbhāraharaṇāya ca || 17||
tathādityāditiḥ śaptā śokasaṃtaptayā bhṛśam |
jātā jātā vinaśyeraṃstava putrāstu sapta vai || 18 ||
janamejaya uvāca
kasmāddityā ca bhagino śapteṃdra jananī mune |
kāraṇaṃ vada śāpe ca śokastu munisattama ||19||
sūta uvāca
pārīkṣitena pṛṣṭastu vyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ |
rājānaṃ pratyuvācedaṃ kāraṇaṃ susamāhitaḥ ||20||
vyāsa uvāca
rājandakṣasute dve ditiścāditiruttame |
kaśyapasya priye bhārye babhūvatururukrame ||21|| tu
adityāṃ maghavā putro yadā'bhūdativīryavān |
tadā tu tādṛśaṃ putraṃ cakame ditirojasā ||22||
pitāmahāsitāpāṃgī putraṃ me dehi mānada |
iṃdratulyaṃ balaṃ vīraṃ dharmiṣṭaṃ vīryavattamam || 23||
tāmuvāca muniḥ kānte svasthā bhava mayodite |
vratāṃte bhavitā tubhyaṃ śatakratusamaḥ sutaḥ ||24||
sā tatheti pratiśrutya cakāra vratamuttamam |
niṣiktaṃ muninā garbha vibhrāṇā sumanoharam ||25||
bhūmau cakāra śayanaṃ payovrataparāyaṇā |
pavitrā dhāraṇāyuktā vabhūva varavarṇinī || 26 ||
evaṃ jātaḥ susaṃpūrṇo yadā garbho'pi vīryavān |
śubhrāṃśumatidīptāṃgoṃ ditiṃ dṛṣṭvā tu duḥkhitā ||27||
maghavatsadṛśa: putro bhaviṣyati mahābalaḥ |
dityāstadā mama sutastejohīno bhavetkila ||28||

iti ciṃtāparā putramiṃdra covāca māninī |
śatruste'dya samutpanno ditigarbhe'tivīryavān ||29||
upāyaṃ kuru nāśāya śatroradya vicitya ca |
utpattireva haṃtavyā dityā garbhasya śobhana || 30||
vīkṣya tāmasitāpāṃgoṃ sapatnībhāvamāsthitām |
dunoti hṛdaye ciṃtā sukhamarma vināśinī || 31 ||
rājayakṣmeva saṃvṛddho naṣṭo naiva bhavedripuḥ |
tasmādaṃkuritaṃ hanyādbuddhimānahitaṃ kila ||32||
lohaśaṃkuriva kṣipto garbho vai hṛdaye mama |
yena kenāpyupāyena pātayādya śatakrato ||33||
sāmadānabalenāpi hiṃsanīyastvayā sutaḥ |
dityā garbho mahābhāga mama cedicchasi priyam 34||
vyāsa uvāca
śrutvā mātṛvacaḥ śakro vicitya manasā tataḥ |
jagāmāparamātuḥ sa samīpamamarādhipaḥ ||35||
vavaṃde vinayātpādau dityā pāpamatirnṛpa |
provāca vinayenāsau madhuraṃ viṣagabhitam || 36 || '
indra uvāca
mātastvaṃ vratayuktā'si kṣīṇadehā'tidurbalā |
sevārthamiha saṃprāptaḥ kiṃ kartavyaṃ vadasva me || 37 ||
pādasaṃvāhanaṃ te'haṃ kariṣyāmi pativrate |
guruśuśrūṣaṇātpuṇyaṃ labhate gatimakṣayām ||38||
na me kimapi bhedo'sti tathādityā śape kila |
ityuktvā caraṇau spṛṣṭvā saṃvāhanaparo'bhavat || 39||
saṃvāhanasukhaṃ prāpya nidrāmāpa sulocanā |
śrāṃtā vratakṛśā suptā viśvastā paramā satī ||40||
tāṃ nidrāvaśamāpannāṃ vilokya prāviśattanum |
rūpaṃ kṛtvā'tisūkṣmaṃ ca śastrapāṇiḥ samāhitaḥ || 41 ||
udaraṃ praviveśāśu tasyā yogabalena vai |
garbhaṃ cakarta vajreṇa saptadhā vināyakaḥ || 42 ||
ruroda ca tadā vālo vatreṇābhihatastathā |
mā rudeti śanairvākyamuvāca maghavānamum ||43 ||
śakalāni punaḥ sapta saptadhā kartitāni ca |
tadā caikonapaṃcāśanmarutacābhavannṛpa || 44 ||
tadā prabuddhā sudatī jñātvā garbha tathā kṛtam |
indreṇa chalarūpeṇa cukopa bhṛśaduḥkhitā || 45 ||
bhaginīkṛta tu sā buddhvā śaśāpa kupitā tadā |
aditi maghavaṃtaṃ ca ' satyavrataparāyaṇā || 46 ||
yathā me kanito garbhastava putreṇa chadmanā |
tathā tannāśamāyātu rājyaṃ vibhuvanasya tu || 47||
yathā guptena pāpena mama garbho nipātitaḥ |
adityā pāpacāriṇyā yathā me ghātitaḥ sutaḥ || 48 ||
tasyāḥ putrāstu naśyaṃtu jātā jātāḥ punaḥ punaḥ |
kārāgāre vasatveṣā putraśokāpurā bhṛśam ||49 ||
anya janmani cāpyeva mṛtāpatyā bhaviṣyati |
vyāsa uvāca
ityutsṛṣṭaṃ tadā śrutvā śāpaṃ marīcinaṃdanaḥ || 50 ||
uvāca praṇayopeto vacanaṃ śamayanniva |
mā kopaṃ kuru kalyāṇi putrāste balavattarāḥ ||51||
bhaviṣyaṃti surāḥ sarve maruto maghavatsakhāḥ |
śāpo'yaṃ tava vāmoru tvaṣṭāviṃśe'tha dvā ||52||

aṃśena mānuṣaṃ janma prāpya bhokṣyati bhāminī |
varuṇenāpi datto'sti śāpaḥ saṃtāpitena ca ||53||
ubhayoḥ śāpayogena mānuṣīyaṃ bhaviṣyati ||
vyāsa uvāca
patinā''śvāsitā devī saṃtuṣṭā sā'bhavattadā || 54 ||
novāca bipriyaṃ kiṃcittataḥ sā varavarṇinī |
iti te kethitaṃ rājanpūrvaśāpasya kāraṇam ||
aditirdevakī jātā svāṃśena narpasattama ||55||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 3 ||
atha caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
rājovāca
vismito'smi mahābhāga śrutvā''khyānaṃ mahāmate |
saṃsāro'yaṃ pāparūpaḥ kathaṃ mucyeta baṃdhanāt || 1 ||
kaśyapasyāpi dāyādastrilokavibhave sati |
kṛtavānīdṛśaṃ karma ko na kuryājjugupsitam ||2||
garbhe praviśya bālasya hananaṃ dāruṇaṃ kila |
sevāmiṣeṇa mātuśca kṛtvā śapathamadbhutam ||3||
śāstā dharmasya goptā ca trilokyāḥ patirapyuta |
kṛtavānīdṛśaṃ karma ko na kuryādasāṃpratam ||4||
pitāmahā me saṃgrāme kurukṣetre'tidāruṇam |
kṛtavaṃtastathā''śvaryaṃ duṣṭaṃ karma jagadguro ||5||
viruddhadharmeṇa vāsudevena noditāḥ || 6 ||
bhīṣmo droṇaḥ kṛpaḥ karṇo dharmāṃśo'pi yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | sarve
asāratāṃ vijānaṃtaḥ saṃsārasya sumedhasaḥ |
devāṃśāśca kathaṃ cakruninditaṃ dharmatatparāḥ || 7 ||
nāsthā dharmasya vipreṃdra pramāṇaṃ kiṃ viniścitam |
calacitto'smi saṃjāta: śrutvā caitatkathānakam ||8||
āptavākyaṃ pramāṇaṃ cedāptaḥ kaḥ paradehavān |
puruṣo viṣayāsakto rāgī bhavati sarvathā ||9||
bhavennūnamarthanāśādasaṃśayam |
dvepādasatyavacanaṃ vaktavyaṃ svārthasiddhaye || 10 ||
rāgo dveṣo
jarāsaṃdha vighātārthaṃ hariṇā sattvamūrtinā |
chalena racitaṃ rūpaṃ brāhmaṇasya vijānatā || 11||
tadāptaḥ kaḥ pramāṇaṃ kiṃ sattvamūrtirapīdṛśa: |
arjuno'pi tathaivātra kārye yajñavinirmite || 12 ||
kīdṛśo'yaṃ kṛto yajñaḥ kimartha śamavarjitaḥ |
paralokapadārthaṃ vā yaśase vā'nyathā kila || 13 ||
dharmasya prathamaḥ pādaḥ satyametacchrutervacaḥ |
dvitīyastu tathā śaucaṃ dayā pādastṛtīyakaḥ || 14 ||
dānaṃ pādaścaturthaśca purāṇajñā vadanti vai |
tairvihīnaḥ kathaṃ dharmastiṣṭhediha susaṃmataḥ ||15||
dharmahīnaṃ kṛtaṃ karma kathaṃ tatphaladaṃ bhavet |
dharme sthirā matiḥ kvāpi na kasyāpi pratīyate || 16||

chalārthaṃ ca tadā viṣṇurvāmano'bhūjjagatprabhuḥ |
yena vāmanarūpeṇa vaṃcito'so balirnṛpaḥ || 17 ||
vihartā śatayajñasya vedānāṃ paripālakaḥ |
dharmiṣṭho dānaśīlaśca satyavādī jiteṃdriyaḥ || 18 ||
sthānātprabhraṃśito'kasmādviṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā |
jitaṃ kena tayoḥ kṛṣṇa balinā vāmanena vā || 19 ||
chalakarmavidā cāpaṃ saṃdeho'tra mahānmama |
vaṃcayitvā vaṃcitena satyaṃ vada dvijottama ||20||
purāṇakartā tvamasi dharmajñaśca mahāmatiḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
jitaṃ vai balinā rājandattā yena ca medinī || 21 ||
trivikramo'pi nāmnā yaḥ prathito vāmano'bhavat |
chalanārthamidaṃ rājan vāmanatvaṃ narādhipa ||22||
saṃprāptaṃ hariṇā bhūyoṃ dvārapālatvameva ca |
satyādanyatarannāsti mūlaṃ dharmasya pārthiva || 23 ||
duḥsādhyaṃ dehināṃ rājansatyaṃ sarvātmanā kila |
māyā balavatī bhūpa triguṇā bahurūpiṇī ||24||
yayedaṃ nirmitaṃ viśvaṃ guṇaiḥ śabalitaṃ tribhiḥ |
tasmācchalavatāṃ satyaṃ kuto'viddhaṃ bhavennṛpa || 25 ||
miśreṇa nanitaścaiva sthitireṣā sanātanī |
vaikhānasāśca munayo niḥsaṃgā niṣpratigrahāḥ || 26 ||
satyayuktā bhavantyatra vītarāgā gatatṛṣaḥ |
dṛṣṭāṃtadarśanārthāya nirmitāste ca tādṛśāḥ || 27||
anyatsarvaṃ śabalitaṃ guṇairebhistribhirnṛpa |
naikaṃ vākyaṃ purāṇeṣu vedeṣu nṛpasattama || 28 ||
dharmaśāstreṣu cāṃgeṣu saguṇa raciteṣviha |
saguṇaḥ saguṇaṃ kuryānnirguṇaṃ na karoti vai || 29 ||
guṇāste miśritāḥ sarve na pṛthagbhāvasaṃgatāḥ |
nirvyalīke sthire dharme matiḥ kasyāpi na sthirā ||
bhavodbhave mahārāja māyayā mohitasya vai |
iṃdriyāṇi pramāthīni tadāsaktaṃ manastathā || 31||
karoti vividhānbhāvānguṇaistaiḥ prerito bhṛśam |
brahmādistaṃbaparyaṃtāḥ prāṇinaḥ sthirajaṃgamāḥ ||32||
sarve māyāvaśā rājansā'nukrīḍati tairiha |
sarvānvaṃ mohayatyeṣā vikurvatyaniśaṃ jagat || 33 ||
asatyo jāyate rājankāryavānprathamaṃ naraḥ |
indriyārthāṃścitayāno na prāpnoti yadā naraḥ ||34||
tadarthaṃ chalamādatte chalātpāpe pravartate |
kāmaḥ krodhaśva lobhacaṃ vairiṇo balavattarāḥ ||35||
kṛtākṛtaṃ na jānaṃti prāṇinastadṛśaṃ gatāḥ |
vibhave satyahaṃkāraḥ prabala: prabhavatyapi || 36 ||
ahaṃkārādbhavenmoho mohānmaraṇameva ca |
saṃkalpā bahmastatra vikalpāḥ prabhavaṃti ca ||37||
īrṣyāsūyā tathā dveṣaḥ prādurbhavati cetasi |
āśā tṛṣṇā tathā dainyaṃ daṃbho'dharmamatistathā ||38||
prāṇināṃ prabhavatyete bhāvā mohasamudbhavāḥ |
yajñadānāni tīrthāni vratāni niyamāstathā || 39 ||
ahaṃkārābhibhūtastu karoti puruṣo'nvaham |
ahaṃbhāvakṛtaṃ sarvaṃ prabhavedvai na śocavat ||40||
rāgalobhātkṛtaṃ karma sarvāṃgaṃ śuddhivajitam |
prathamaṃ dravyaśuddhiśca draṣṭavyā vibudhaiḥ kila || 41 ||
adroheṇārjitaṃ dravyaṃ praśastaṃ dharmakarmaṇi johājitena dramyeṇa yatkaroti śubhaṃ naraḥ || 42 ||

viparītaṃ bhavettattu phalakāle nṛpottama |
mano'ti nirmalaṃ yasya sa samyakphalabhāgbhavet ||43||
tasminvikārayuktaṃ tu na yathārthaphalaṃ labhet |
kartāraḥ karmaṇāṃ sarve ācārya ṛtvijādayaḥ ||44||
syuste viśuddha manasastadā pūrṇaṃ bhavetphalam |
deśakālakriyādravyakartā'ṇāṃ śuddhatā yadi || 45 ||
maṃtrāṇāṃ ca tadā pūrṇaṃ karmaṇāṃ phalamaśnute |
śatrūṇāṃ nāgamuddiśya svavṛddhi paramāṃ tathā || 46||
karoti sukṛtaṃ tadvadviparītaṃ bhavetkila |
svārthāsaktaḥ pumānnityaṃ na jānāti śubhāśubham ||47 ||
daivādhīnaḥ sadā kuryyātpāpameva na satkṛtam |
prājāpatyāḥ surāḥ sarve hyasurāśca tadudbhavāḥ ||48||
sarve te svārthaniratāḥ parasparavirodhinaḥ |
sattvodbhavāḥ surāḥ sarve'pyuktā vedeṣu mānuṣāḥ 49||
rajodbhavāstāmasāstu tiryacaḥ parikīrtitāḥ |
sattvodbhavānāṃ tairvairaṃ parasparamanāratam ||50||
tiraśvāmatra kiṃ citraṃ jātivairasamudbhave |
sadā drohaparā devāstapovighnakarāstathā ||51||
asantuṣṭā dveṣaparāḥ parasparavirodhinaḥ |
ahaṃkārasamudbhūtaḥ saṃsāro'yaṃ yato nṛpa ||
rāgavihīnastu sa kathaṃ jāyate nṛpa || 52 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe caturthamkandhe caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
atha ki yadunoktena saṃsāre'sminnṛpottama |
dharmātmā'drohabuddhistu kaścidbhavati karhicit || 1||
rāgadveṣāvṛtaṃ viśvaṃ sarva sthāvarajaṃgamam |
ādye yuge'pi rājeṃdra kimadya kalidūṣite || 2 ||
devāḥ serṣyāśca sadrohārachalaka maratāḥ sadā |
mānuṣāṇāṃ tiravāṃ ca kā vārtā nṛpa gaṇyate || 3 ||
drohapare drohaparo bhavediti samānatā |
adrohiṇi tathā śāṃte vidveṣaḥ khalatā smṛtā ||4||
yaḥ kaścittāpasaḥ śāṃto japadhyānaparāyaṇaḥ |
bhavettasya jape vighnakarttā va maghavā param ||5||
satāṃ satyayugaṃ sākṣātsarvadaivāvatāṃ kaliḥ |
madhyamo madhyamānāṃ tu kriyāyogī yuge smṛtī || 6 |
kaścitkadācidbhavati satyadharmānuvartakaḥ |
anyathā'nyayugānāṃ vaṃ sarve dharmaparāyaṇāḥ ||7||
vāsanā kāraṇaṃ rājansarvatra dharmasaṃsthitau |
tasyāṃ vai malināyāṃ tu dharmo'pi malino bhavet ||8||
malinā vāsanā satyaṃ vināśāyeti sarvathā |
brāhmaṇo hṛdayājjātaḥ putro dharma iti smṛtaḥ || 9 ||
brāhmaṇaḥ satyasaṃpanno vedadharmarataḥ sadā |
dakṣasya dṛhitāro hi vṛtā daśa mahātmanā || 10 ||
vivāhavidhinā samyaṅ muninā gṛhadharmiṇā |
tāsvajījanayatputrāndharmaḥ satyavatāṃ varaḥ || 11 ||
hari kṛṣṇaṃ naraṃ caitra tathā nārāyaṇaṃ nṛpa |
yogābhyāsarato nityaṃ hariḥ kṛṣṇo vabhūva ha || 12||
naranārāyaṇau caiva ceratustapa uttamam |
prāleyādri samāgatya tīrthe vadarikāśrame || 13 ||

tapasviṣu dhurīṇau tau purāṇau munisattamau |
gṛṇaṃtī tatparaṃ brahma gaṃgāyā vipule taṭe || 14 ||
hareraṃśau sthito tatra naranārāyaṇāvṛṣī |
pūrṇaṃ varṣasahasraṃ tu cakrāte tapa 'uttamam || 15||
tāpitaṃ ca jagatsarvaṃ tapasā sacarācaram |
naranārāyaṇābhyāṃ ca śakraḥ kṣobhaṃ tadā yayau || 16 ||
cintāviṣṭaḥ sahasrākṣo manasā samakalpayat |
kiṃ kartavyaṃ dharmaputrau tāpasau dhyānasaṃyutau || 17 ||
siddhārtho subhṛśaṃ śreṣṭhamāsanaṃ no grahīṣyataḥ |
vighnaḥ kathaṃ prakartavyastapo yena bhavenna hi || 18 ||
utpādya kāmaṃ krodhaṃ ca lobhaṃ vāpyatidāruṇam |
ityuddiśya sahasrākṣaḥ samāruhya gajottamam || 19||
vighnakāmastu tarasā jagāma gandhamādanam |
gatvā tatrāśrame puṇye tāvapaśyacchatakratuḥ ||20||
tapasā dīptadeha tu bhāskarāviva coditau |
brahmaviṣṇū kimatī va prakaṭī vā vibhāvasu || 21 ||
dharmaputrāvṛṣī etau tapasā kiṃ kariṣyataḥ |
iti saṃcitya tau dṛṣṭvā tadovāca śacīpatiḥ ||22||
kiṃ vāṃ kāryaṃ mahābhāgo brūtaṃ dharmasutau kila |
dadāmi vāṃ varaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ dātuṃ yāto'smyahamṛṣī ||23||
adeyamapi dāsyāmi tuṣṭo'smi tapasā kila |
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ punaḥ punaḥ śakrastāvuvāca puraḥ sthitaḥ ||24||
nocatustāvṛṣī dhyānasaṃsthito dṛḍhacetasau |
tato vai mohinīṃ māyāṃ cakāra bhayadāṃ vṛṣaḥ ||25||
vṛkānsihāṃśca vyāghrāṃśca samutpādyāvibhīṣayat |
varṣaṃ vātaṃ tathā vahni samutpādya punaḥ punaḥ || 26 ||
bhīṣayāmāsa tau śakro māyāṃ kṛtvā vimohinīm |
bhayato'pi vaśaṃ nīto na tau dharmasutau munī || 27 ||
naranārāyaṇau dṛṣṭvā śakraḥ svabhavanaṃ gataḥ |
varadāne pralubdhau na na bhītau vahnivāyutaḥ || 28 ||
vyāghrasiṃhādibhiḥ krāṃtau calito nāśramātsvakāt |
na tayordhyānabhaṃgaṃ vai kartuṃ ko'pi kṣamo'bhavat ||29||
indro'pi sadanaṃ gatvā citayāmāsa duḥkhitaḥ |
calitau bhayalobhābhyāṃ nemo munivarottamī ||30||
citayaṃtī mahāvidyāmādiśakti sanātanīm |
īśvarī sarvalokānāṃ parāṃ prakṛtimadbhutām ||31||
dhyāyatāṃ kaḥ kṣamo loke vahumāyāvidapyuta |
yanmūlāḥ sakalā māyā devāsurakṛtāḥ kila || 32||
te kathaṃ bādhituṃ śaktā dhyāyaṃti gatakalmaṣāḥ |
vāgbījaṃ kāmabījaṃ ca māyābījaṃ tathaiva ca ||33||
citte yasya bhavettaṃ tu bādhituṃ ko'pi na kṣamaḥ |
māyayā mohitaḥ śakro bhūyastasya pratikriyām ||34||
kartu kāmavasaṃtau tu namāhūyābravīdvacaḥ |
manobhavavasaṃtena rakhyā yukto vrajādhutā || 35 ||
apsarobhiḥ samāyuktastarasā gaṃdhamādanam |
naranārāyaṇī tatra purāṇāvṛṣisattama || 33||
kurutastapa ekāṃte sthitau badarikāśrame |
gatvā tatra samīpe tu tayormanmatha mārgaṇaiḥ ||37||
cittaṃ kāmāturaṃ kāryaṃ kuru kāryaṃ mamādhunā |
mohayitvoccāṭayitvā viśikhaistāḍayāśu ca 38 ||

vaśīkuru mahābhāga munī dharmasutāvapi |
ko hyasminsarvasaṃsāre devo daityo'tha mānavaḥ || 39 ||
yaste bāṇavaśaṃ prāpto na yāti bhṛśatāḍitaḥ |
brahmā'haṃ girijānāthaścaṃdro vahnirvimohitaḥ ||40||
gaṇanā kā'nayoḥ kāma tvadvāṇānāṃ parākrame |
vārāṃganāgaṇo'yaṃ te sahāyārthaṃ mayeritaḥ || 41 ||
āgamiṣyati tatraiva raṃbhādīnāṃ manoramaḥ |
ekā tilottamā raṃbhā kāryaṃ sādhayituṃ kṣamā || 42||
tvamevaikaḥ kṣamaḥ kāmaṃ militaiḥ kastu saṃśayaḥ kuru kāryaṃ mahābhāga dadāmi tava vāṃchitam ||43||
pralobhito mayā'tyarthaṃ varadānaistapasvinau |
sthānānna calitau śāṃtī vṛthā'yaṃ me gataḥ śramaḥ 44||
tathā vaṃ māyayā kṛtvā bhīṣitau tāpasau bhṛśam |
tathāpi notthitau sthānāddeharakṣāparau na tau || 45||
vyāsa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā śakraṃ prāha manobhavaḥ |
vāsavādya kariṣyāmi kāryaṃ te manasepsitam || 46 ||
yadi viṣṇuṃ maheśaṃ vā brahmāṇaṃ vā divākaram |
dhyāyaṃtau tau tadā'smākaṃ bhavitārau vaśau munī 47 ||
kathaṃcana |
kāmarājaṃ mahābījaṃ citayaṃtaṃ manasyalam ||48 ||
devībhaktaṃ vaśīkartuṃ nāhaṃ śaktaḥ
tāṃ devīṃ cenmahāśakti saṃśrito bhaktibhāvataḥ |
na tadā mama bāṇānāṃ gocarī tāpasau kila || 49||
indra uvāca
gaccha tvaṃ ca mahābhāga sarvaistatra samudyataiḥ |
kārya mamātiduḥsādhyaṃ kartā hitamanuttamam ||50 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti tena samādiṣṭā yayuḥ sarve samudyatāḥ |
yatra to dharmaputrau dvau tepāte duṣkaraṃ tapaḥ || 51 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskaṃdhe pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5 ||
atha ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
prathamaṃ tatra saṃprāpto vasaṃtaḥ parvatottame |
puṣpitāḥ pādapāḥ sarve dvirephālivirājitāḥ || 1||
āmrā bakulā ramyāstilakāḥ kiṃśukāḥ śubhāḥ |
sālāstālāstamālāśca madhūkāḥ puṣpitā babhuḥ 2 ||
babhūvuḥ kokilālāpā vṛkṣāgreṣu manoharāḥ |
vallyo'pi puṣpitāḥ sarvā āliliṃgurnagottamān 3 ||
prāṇinaḥ svāsu bhāryāsu premayuktāḥ smarāturāḥ |
vabhuvuścātimattāśca krīḍāsaktāḥ parasparam ||4||
vavurmadāḥ sugaṃdhāśca susparśā dakṣiṇānilāḥ |
indriyāṇi pramāthīni munīnāmapi cābhavan ||5||
ratiyuktastataḥ kāmaḥ pūrayanpaca mārgaṇān |
cakāra tvaritastatra vāsaṃ badarikāśrame || 6 ||
raṃbhā tilottamādyāśca gatvā tatra varāśrame |
gānaṃ cakruḥ sugītajñāḥ svaratānasamanvitam ||7|
tacchrutvā madhurodgītaṃ kokilānāṃ ca kūjitam |
bhramarālivirāvaṃ ca prabuddho to munīśvarau ||8||

ṛturājamakāle tu dṛṣṭā to puṣpitaṃ vanam |
jātau citāparī tatra naranārāyaṇāvṛṣī ||9||
kimadya śiśirāpāyaḥ saṃvṛtaḥ samayaṃ vinā |
prāṇino vilāḥ sarve lakṣyaṃ te'tismarāturāḥ|| 10 ||
kāladharmaviparyāsaḥ kathamadya durāsadaḥ |
naraṃ nārāyaṇaḥ prāha vismayotphullalocanaḥ || 11 ||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
paśya bhrātarime vṛkṣāḥ puṣpitāḥ pratibhāṃti vai |
kokilālāpasaṃghuṣṭā bhramarālivirājitāḥ ||12||
śiśiraṃ bhīmamātaṃgaṃ dārayansvakharairnakhaiḥ |
vasaṃta kesarī prāpta: palāśakusumaṃrmune ||13||
raktāśokakarā' tanvī devarṣe kiṃśukāṃghrikā |
nīlāśokakacā śyāmā vikāsikamalānanā ||14||
nīleṃdīvaranetrā sā bilvavṛkṣa phalastanī |
protphullakuṃdaradanā maṃjarī karṇaśobhitā ||15||
baṃdhujīvadharā śubhrā siṃdhuvāranakhodbhavā |
puṃskokilasvarā puṇyā kadambavasanā śubhā || 16 ||
barhivṛndakalāpā ca sārasasvananūpurā |
vāsaṃto baddharaśanā mattahaṃsagatistathā || 17 |
putrajīvāṃśukanyasta romarājivirājitā |
vasaṃtalakṣmīḥ saṃprāptā brahmanbadarikāśrame || 18 ||
akāle kimiyaṃ prāptā vismayo'yaṃ mamādhunā |
tapovighnakarā nūnaṃ devarṣe paricitaya || 19 ||
śrūyate suranārīṇāṃ gānaṃ dhyānavināśanam |
āvayostapibhaṃgāya kṛtaṃ maghavatā kila || 20 ||
ṛturājanyathā kāle proti saṃjanayetkatham |
vighno'yaṃ vihito bhāti bhītenāsuraśatruṇā || 21||
vātā: sugaṃdhāḥ śītāśca samāyāṃti manoharāḥ |
nānyatkāraṇamastoha śatakratukṛti vinā ||22||
iti bruvati viprāye deve nārāyaṇe vibhau |
sarve dṛṣṭipathaṃ ' prāptā manmathapramukhāstadā ||23||
dadarśa bhagavānsarvānnaro nārāyaṇastathā |
vismayāviṣmanasau babhūvaturubhāvapi || 24||
manmathaṃ menakāṃ caiva raṃbhāṃ caiva tilottamām |
puṣpagaṃdhāṃ sukeśīṃ ca mahāśvetāṃ manoramām ||25||
pramadvarāṃ ghṛtācīṃ va gītajñāṃ cāruhāsinīm |
caṃdraprabhāṃ ca somāṃca kokilālāpamaṃḍitām || 26 ||
vidyunmālāṃbujākṣīṃ ca tathā kāṃcanamālinīm |
etāścānyā varārohā daṣṭāstābhyāṃ tadā'ntike 27||
tāsāṃ drṣṭasahasrāṇi paṃcāśadādhakāni ca |
vīkṣya to vismitau jātau kāmasainyaṃ suvistaram 28 ||
praṇamyāgre sthitāḥ sarvā devavārāṃganāstadā |
divyābharaṇabhūṣāḍhyā divyamālyopaśobhitāḥ || 29 ||
jaguśchalena tāḥ sarvāḥ pṛthivyāmatidurlabham |
tattathā'vasthitaṃ divyaṃ manmathādivivardhanam ||30|
śuśrāva bhagavānviṣṇurnaro nārāyaṇastadā |
śrutvā provāca tāstatra prītyā nārāyaṇo muniḥ 31 ||
āsyatāṃ sukhamatraiva karomyātithyamadbhutam |
bhavaṃtyo'tithidharmeṇa prāptāḥ svargātsumadhyamāḥ || 32 ||
vyāsa uvāca
sābhimānastu saṃjātastadā nārāyaṇo muniḥ |
indreṇa preṣitā nūnaṃ tathā vighnacikorpayā || 33||
varākyaḥ kā imāḥ sarvāḥ sṛjāmyadya navāḥ kila |
etābhyo divyarūpāśca darśayāmi tapobalam || 34||

iti saṃcitya manasā kareṇoruṃ pratāya vai |
tarasotpādayāmāsa nārī sarvāṅgasuṃdarīm ||35||
nārāyaṇorusaṃbhūtā hyarvaśīti tataḥ śubhā |
dadṛśustāḥ sthitāstatra vismayaṃ paramaṃ yayuḥ || 36||
tāsāṃ ca paricayathaṃ tāvatīśvātisundarīḥ |
prāduścakāra tarasā tadā munirasaṃbhramaḥ ||37||
gāyaṃ tyaśva hasaṃtyaśca nānopāyanapāṇayaḥ |
praṇemustā munī sarvāḥ sthitāḥ kṛtvāṃjali puraḥ 38 ||
tāṃ vīkṣya vibhramakaroṃ tapaso vibhūti devāṃganā hi mumuhuḥ pravimohayaṃ tyaḥ |
ūcuśca to pramuditānanapadmaśobhā romodgamollasitacārunijāṃgavallyaḥ ||39||
kuryuḥ kathaṃ stutimaho tapaso mahattvaṃ dhairyaṃ tathaiva bhavatāmabhivīkṣya bālāḥ |
asmatkaṭākṣaviṣadigdhaśareṇa dagdhaḥ ko vā na tatrabhavatāṃ manaso vyathā naḥ ||40||
jñātau yuvāṃ narahare: paramāṃśabhūtau devau munī śamadamādinidhī sadaiva |
sevānimittamiha no gamanaṃ na kāmaṃ kāryaṃ hareḥ śatamakhasya vidhātumeva || 41 ||
bhāgyena kena yuvayoḥ kila darśanaṃ naḥ saṃpāditaṃ na viditaṃ khalu saṃcitaṃ tat |
cittaṃ kṣamaṃ nijajane vihitaṃ yuvābhyāmasmadvidhe kila kṛtāgasi tāpamuktam ||42||
kurvati naiva vibudhāstapaso vyayaṃ vai śāpena tucchaphaladena mahānubhāvāḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
itthaṃ niśamya vacanaṃ surakāminīnāṃ tāvūcaturmunivarī vinayānatānām ||43||
prīto prasannavadano jitakāmalobhau dharmātmajī nijataporuciśobhitāṃgau |
naranārāyaṇāvūcatuḥ
vāṃchitānkāmāndadāvastuṣṭamānasau || 44 ||
bruvantu
yāṃtu svargaṃ gṛhītvemāmurvaśīṃ cārulocanām |
upāyanamiyaṃ bālā gacchatvadya manoharā || 45 ||
dattā''vābhyāṃ ughavataḥ prīṇanāyorusaṃbhavā |
svastyastu sarvadevebhyo yatheṣṭaṃ pravrajaṃtu ca || 46 ||
" na kasyāpi tapovighnaṃ prakartavyamataḥ param" |
devya ūcuḥ
kva gacchāmo mahābhāga prāptāste pādapaṅkajam
nārāyaṇa suraśreṣṭha bhaktyā paramayā mudā ||47 ||
vāṃchitaṃ cedvaraṃ nātha dadāsi madhusūdana |
tuṣṭaḥ kamalapatrākṣa bravīmo manasepsitam ||48||
patistvaṃ bhava deveśa varamenaṃ paraṃtapa |
bhavāmaḥ prītiyuktāstvāṃ sevituṃ jagadīśvara ||49||
tvayā cotpāditā nāryaḥ saṃtyanyāścārulocanāḥ |
urvaśyādyāstathā yāṃtu svargaṃ vai bhavadājñayā || 50 ||
strīṇāṃ ṣoḍaśasāhasraṃ tiṣṭatvatra śatārdhakam |
sevāṃ te'tra kariṣyāmo yuvayostāpasottamau ||51||

vāṃchitaṃ dehi deveśa satyavāgbhava mādhava |
āśābhaṃgo hi nārīṇāṃ hiṃsanaṃ parikīrtitam ||52||
kāmārtānāṃ ca munibhirdharmajñaistattvadarśibhiḥ |
bhāgyayogādiha prāptāḥ svargātpremapariplutāḥ ||53||
tyaktuṃ nārhasi deveśa samartho'si jagatpate |
nārāyaṇa uvāca
pūrṇa varṣasahasraṃ tu tapastaptaṃ mayātra vai || 54||
jitendriyeṇa cārvagyaḥ kathaṃ bhaṃgaṃ karomyataḥ |
necchā kāme sukhe kācitsukhadharmavināśake || 55 ||
paśūnāmapi sādharmye rameta matimānkatham |
apsarasa ūcuḥ
śabdādīnāṃ ca paṃcānāṃ madhye sparśasukhaṃ varam ||56 ||
ānaṃdarasamūlaṃ vai nānyadasti sukhaṃ kila |
ato'smākaṃ mahārāja vacanaṃ kuru sarvathā || 57 ||
nirbharaṃ sukhamāsādya carasva gaṃdhamādane |
yadi vāṃchasi nākaṃ tvaṃ nādhiko gaṃdhamādanāt ||
ramasvātra śubhe sthāne prāpya sarvāḥ surāṃganāḥ || 58 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ || 6 ||
atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
ityākarṇya vacastāsāṃ dharmaputraḥ pratāpavān |
vimarśamakaroñcitte kiṃ kartavyaṃ mayā'dhunā || 1 ||
hāsyo'haṃ munivṛndeṣu bhaviṣyāmyadya saṃgamāt |
ahaṃkārādidaṃ prātaṃ duḥkhaṃ nātra vicāraṇā ||2||
mūlaṃ saṃsāravṛkṣasya yataḥ prokto mahātmaniḥ |
dṛṣṭvā maunaṃ samādhāya na sthito'haṃ samāgatam ||3||
vārāṃganāgaṇaṃ juṣṭaṃ tenāsaṃ duḥkhabhājanam |
utpāditāstathā māryo mayā dharmavyayena vai || 4||
tāstu māṃ bādhituṃ vṛttāḥ kāmārtāḥ pramadottamā |
ūrṇanābhirivādyāhaṃ jālena svakṛtena vai ||5||
baddho'smi sudṛḍhenātra kiṃ kartavyamataḥ param |
yadi citāṃ samutsṛjya saṃtyajāmyabalā imāḥ ||6||
śaptvā bhraṣṭā vrajiṣyaṃti sarvā bhagnamanorathāḥ |
mukto'haṃ saṃcariṣyāmi vijane paramaṃ tapaḥ || 7 |
tasmātkrodhaṃ samutpādya tyakṣyāmi sundarīgaṇam |
vyāsa uvāca
iti saṃcitya manasā munirnārāyaṇastadā ||8||
vimarśamakaroccine sukhotpādanasādhane |
dvitīyo'yaṃ mahāśatruḥ krodhaḥ saṃtāpakārakaḥ || 9 ||
kāmādapyadhiko loke lobhādapi ca dāruṇaḥ |
krodhābhibhūtaḥ kurute hiṃsāṃ prāṇavighātinīm ||10|

duḥkhadāṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ narakārāmadīdhikām |
yathā'gnirdharṣaṇājjātaḥ pādapaṃ pradahettathā || 11 ||
dehotpannastathā krodho dehaṃ dahati dāruṇa: |
vyāsa uvāca
iti saṃcityamānaṃ taṃ bhrātaraṃ dīnamānasam ||12||
uvāca vacanaṃ tathyaṃ naro dharmasuto'nujaḥ |
nara uvāca
nārāyaṇa mahābhāga kopaṃ yaccha mahāmate || 13 ||
śāṃtaṃ bhāvaṃ samāśritya nāśayāhaṃkṛti parām |
purā'haṃkāradoṣeṇa tapo naṣṭaṃ kilāvayoḥ || 14||
saṃgrāmaścābhavattābhyāṃ bhāvābhyāmasureṇa ha |
divyavarṣasahasraṃ tu prahlādena mahādbhutam || 15 ||
duḥkhaṃ bahutaraṃ prāptaṃ tatrāvābhyāṃ surottama |
tasmātkrodhaṃ parityajya śāṃto bhava munīśvara || 16 ||
"śāṃtatvaṃ tapaso mūlaṃ munibhiḥ parikīrtitam |"
vyāsa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā śāṃto'bhūddharmanandanaḥ |
janamejaya uvāca
saṃśayo'yaṃ muniśreṣṭha prahlādena mahātmanā || 17 |
viṣṇubhaktena śāṃtena kathaṃ yuddhaṃ kṛtaṃ purā |
kṛtavaṃtau kathaṃ yuddhaṃ naranārāyaṇāvṛṣī || 18 ||
tāpasau dharmaputrau dvau suśāṃtamānasāvubhau |
samāgamaḥ kathaṃ jātastayordaityasutasya ca ||19||
saṃgrāmastu kathaṃ tābhyāṃ kṛtastena mahātmanā |
prahlādo'pyatidharmātmā jñānavānviṣṇutatparaḥ || 20 ||
naranārāyaṇau tadvattāpasau sattvasaṃsthitau |
tena tābhyāṃ samudbhūtaṃ vairaṃ yadi parasparam ||21||
tadā tapasi dharme ca śrama eva hi kevalam |
kva japaḥ kva tapaścaryā purā satyayuge'pi ca ||22||
tādṛśairna jitaṃ cittaṃ krodhāhaṃkārasaṃbṛtam |
na krodho na ca mātsaryamahaṅkārāṃkuraṃ vinā ||23||
ahaṅkārātsamutpannāḥ kāmakrodhādayaḥ kila |
varṣakoṭisahasraṃ tu tapaḥ kṛtvā'tidāruṇam ||24||
ahaṅkārāṃkure jāte vyarthaṃ bhavati sarvathā |
yathā sūryodaye jāte tamorūpaṃ na tiṣṭhati || 25||
ahaṅkārāṃkurasyāgre tathā puṇyaṃ na tiṣṭhati |
prahlādo'pi mahābhāga hariṇā samayudhyata || 26 ||
tadā vyarthaṃ kṛtaṃ sarvaṃ sukṛtaṃ kila bhūtale |
naranārāyaṇau śāntau vihāya paramaṃ tapaḥ ||27||
kṛtavantau yadā yuddhaṃ kva śamaḥ sukṛtaṃ punaḥ |
īdṛgmyāṃ sattvayuktābhyāmajeyā yadyahaṃkṛtiḥ || 28 ||
mādṛśānāṃ ca kā vārtā mune'haṅkārasaṃkṣaye |
ahaṃkāraparityaktaḥ ko'pyasti bhuvanatraye ||29||
na bhūto bhavitā naiva yastyaktastena sarvathā |
mucyate lohanigaḍairbaddhaḥ kāṣṭhamayaistathā ||30||

ahaṃkāranibaddhastu na kadācidvimucyate |
ahaṃkārāvṛtaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṃgamam ||31||
bhramatyeva hi saṃsāre viṣṭhāmūtrapradūṣite |
brahmajñānaṃ kutastāvatsaṃsāre mohasaṃvṛte || 32 || viṣṭhāmūtra pradūṣite |
brahmajñānaṃ
mataṃ mīmāṃsakānāṃ vai saṃmataṃ bhāti suvrata |
mahāṃto'pi sadā yuktāḥ kāmakrodhādibhirmune ||33||
mādṛśānāṃ kalāvasminkā kathā munisattama |
vyāsa uvāca
kāryaṃ vai kāraṇādbhinnaṃ kathaṃ bhavati bhārata ||34||
kaṭakaṃ kuṃḍalaṃ caiva suvarṇasadṛśaṃ bhavet |
ahaṃkārodbhavaṃ sarvaṃ brahmāṃḍaṃ sacarācaram ||35||
paṭastaṃtuvaśa: proktastadviyuktaḥ kathaṃ bhavet |
māyāguṇaistribhiḥ sarva racitaṃ sthirajaṃgamam ||36||
satṛṇaṃ staṃbaparyaṃtaṃ kā tatra paridevanā |
brahmā viṣṇustathā rudraste cāhaṃkāramohitāḥ ||37||
bhramatyasminmahāgādhe saṃsāre nṛpasattama |
vasiṣṭhanāradādyāśca munayo jñāninaḥ param ||38||
te'bhibhūtāḥ saṃsarati saṃsāre'sminpunaḥ punaḥ |
na ko'pyasti nṛpaśreṣṭha triṣu lokeṣu dehabhṛt || 39||
ebhirmāyāguṇairmuktaḥ śāṃta ātmasukhe sthitaḥ |
kāmakrodhoṃ tathā lobhī moho'haṃkārasaṃbhavaḥ ||40||
na muṃcati naraṃ sarvaṃ dehavaṃtaṃ nṛpottama |
adhītya vedaśāstrāṇi purāṇāni vicitya ca 41 ||
kṛtvā tīrthāṭanaṃ dānaṃ dhyānaṃ caiva surārcanam |
karoti viṣayāsaktaḥ sarva karma ca cauravat ||42 ||
vicārayati no pūrvaṃ kāmamohamadānvitaḥ |
kṛte yuge'pi tretāyāṃ dvāpare kurunandana ||43||
viddho'trāsti ca dharmo'pi kā kathāsdya kalau punaḥ |
spardhā sadaiva sadrohā lobhāmarṣo ca sarvadā ||44 ||
evaṃvidho'sti saṃsāro nātra kāryā vicāraṇā |
sādhavo viralā loke bhavaṃti gatamatsarāḥ ||45||
jitakrodhā jitāmarṣā dṛṣṭāṃtārthaṃ vyavasthitāḥ |
rājovāca
te dhanyāḥ kṛtapuṇyāste madamohavivarjitāḥ ||46||
jiteṃdriyāḥ sadācārā jitaṃ tairbhuvanatrayam |
dunomi pātakaṃ smṛtvā piturmama mahātmanaḥ || 47||
kṛtastapasvinaḥ kaṃṭhe mṛtasarpo hyaghaṃ vinā |
atastasya muniśreṣṭha bhavitā kiṃ mamāgrataḥ || 48||
na jāne buddhisaṃmohāki vā kāryaṃ bhaviṣyati |
madhu paśyati mūḍhātmā prapātaṃ naiva paśyati || 49||
karoti niṃditaṃ karma narakānna bibheti ca |
kathaṃ yuddhaṃ purā vṛttaṃ vistarāttadvadasva me || 50 ||
prahlādena yathā cograṃ naranārāyaṇasya vai |
prahlādastu kathaṃ yātaḥ pātālāttadvadasva me || 51 ||
sārasvate mahātīrthe puṇye badarikāśrame |
naranārāyaṇau śāṃtau tāpasau munisattamau || 52 ||
kṛtavaṃtī tathā yuddhaṃ hetunā kena mānada |
vairaṃ bhavati vittārthaṃ dārārthaṃ vā parasparam ||53||

eṣaṇārahitau kasmāccakratuḥ pradhanaṃ mahat |
prahlādo'pi ca dharmātmā jñātvā devau sanātanau 54 ||
kṛtavānsa kathaṃ yuddhaṃ naranārāyaṇo munī |
etadvistarato brahmotumicchāmi kāraṇam 55 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 ||
atha aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
iti pṛṣṭastadā vipro rājñā pārīkṣitena vai |
uvāca vistarātsarvaṃ vyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ || 1 ||
janamejayo'pi dharmātmā nirvedaṃ paramaṃ gataḥ |
cittaṃ duścaritaṃ matvā vairāṭītanayasya vai ||2||
tasyaivoddharaṇārthāya cakāra satataṃ manaḥ |
viprāvamānapāpena yamalokaṃ gatasya vai || 3||
punnāmanarakādyasmāttrāyate pitaraṃ svakam |
putreti nāma sārthaṃ syāttena tasya munīśvarāḥ ||4||
sarpadaṣṭaṃ nṛpaṃ śrutvā haryopari mṛtaṃ tathā |
vipraśāpādauttareyaṃ snānadānavivarjitam ||5||
piturgati niśamyāso nirvedaṃ gatavānnṛpaḥ |
pārīkṣito mahābhāgaḥ saṃtapto bhayavihvalaḥ ||6||
papracchātha muniṃ vyāsaṃ gṛhāgatamaniṃditaḥ |
naranārāyaṇasyemāṃ kathāṃ paramavistṛtām ||7||
vyāsa uvāca
sa yadā nihato raudro hiraṇyakaśipurnṛpa |
abhiṣiktastadā rājye prahlādo nāma tatsutaḥ ||8||
tasmiñchāsati daityeṃdre devabrāhmaṇapūjake |
makhairbhūmyāṃ nṛpatayo yajaṃtaḥ śraddhayānvitāḥ || 9 ||
brāhmaṇāśca tapodharmatīrthayātrāśca kurvate |
vaiśyāśca svasvavṛttisthāḥ śūdrāḥ śuśrūṣaṇe ratāḥ 10 ||
nṛsiṃhena ca pātāle sthāpitaḥ so'tha daityarāṭ |
rājyaṃ cakāra tatraiva prajāpālanatatparaḥ ||11||
kadācidbhṛguputro'tha cyavanākhyo mahātapāḥ |
jagāma narmadā snātuṃ tīrthaṃ vai vyāhṛtīśvaram ||12||
revāṃ mahānadīṃ dṛṣṭvā tatastasyāmavātarat |
uttaraṃtaṃ prajagrāha nāgī viṣabhayaṃkaraḥ || 13||
gṛhīto bhayabhītastu pātāle munisattamaḥ |
sasmāra manasā viṣṇuṃ devadevaṃ janārdanam || 14 ||
saṃsmṛte puṇḍarīkākṣe nirviṣo'bhūnmahoragaḥ |
na prāpa cyavano duḥkhaṃ nīyamāno rasātalam ||15||
dvijihvena munistyakto nirviṇṇenātiśaṃkinā |
māṃ śapeta muniḥ kruddhastāpaso'yaṃ mahāniti || 16 ||
cacāra nāgakanyābhiḥ pūjito munisattamaḥ |
viveśāpyatha nāgānāṃ dānavānāṃ mahatpuram ||17||
kadācidbhṛguputraṃ taṃ vicaraṃta purottame |
dadarśa daityarājo'sau prahlādo dharmavatsalaḥ || 18 ||
dṛṣṭvā taṃ pūjayāmāsa muniṃ daityapatistadā |
papraccha kāraṇaṃ kiṃ te pātālāgamane vada ||19||
preṣito'si kimidreṇa satyaṃ brūhi dvijottama |
daityavidveṣayuktena mama rājyadidṛkṣayā ||20||

cyavana uvāca
kiṃ me maghavatā rājan yadahaṃ preṣitaḥ punaḥ |
dūtakārya prakurvāṇaḥ prāptavānnagare tava || 21||
viddhi māṃ bhṛguputraṃ taṃ svanetraṃ dharmatatparam |
mā śaṃkāṃ kuru daityeṃdra vāsavapreṣitasya vai || 22 ||
snānārthaṃ narmadāṃ prāptaḥ puṇyatīrthe nṛpottama |
nadyāmevāvatīrṇo'haṃ gṛhītaca mahāhinā || 23 ||
jāto'sau nirviṣaḥ sarpo viṣṇoḥ saṃsmaraṇādiva |
mukto'haṃ tena nāgena prabhāvātsmaraṇasya veṃ ||24||
atrāgatena rājeṃdra mayā''ptaṃ tava darśanam |
viṣṇubhaktosi daityeṃdra tadbhaktaṃ māṃ vicintaya || 25 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tanniśamya vacaḥ ślakṣṇaṃ hiraṇyakaśipoḥ sutaḥ |
papraccha parayā prītyā tīrthāni vividhāni ca || 26 ||
prahlāda uvāca
pṛthivyāṃ kāni tīrthāni puṇyāni munisattama |
pātāle ca tathā''kāśe tāni no vada vistarāt 27 ||
cyavana uvāca
mānovākkāyaśuddhānāṃ rājaṃstīrthaṃ pade pade |
tathā malinacittānāṃ gaṃgāpi kīkaṭāvikā ||28||
prathamaṃ cenmanaḥ śuddhaṃ jātaṃ pāpavivarjitam |
tadā tīrthāni sarvāṇi pāvanāni bhavaṃti vai ||29||
gaṃgātīre hi sarvatra vasaṃti nagarāṇi ca |
vrajācaivākarā grāmāḥ sarve kheṭāstathāpare ||30||
niṣādānāṃ nivāsāśca kaivartānāṃ tathāpare |
hūṇavaṃgakhasānāṃ ca mlecchānāṃ daityasattama || 31||
pibaṃti sarvadā gāṃgaṃ jalaṃ brahmopamaṃ sadā |
snānaṃ kurvati daityeṃdra trikālaṃ svecchayā janāḥ || 32 ||
tatraiko'pi viśuddhātmā na bhavatyeva māriṣa |
kiṃ phalaṃ tarhi tīrthasya viṣayopahatātmasu || 33 ||
kāraṇaṃ mana evātra nānyadrājanvicintaya |
manaḥ śuddhiḥ prakartavyā satataṃ śuddhimicchatā ||34||
tīrthavāsī mahāpāpo bhavettatrātmavacanāt |
tatraivācaritaṃ pāpamānatyāya prakalpate ||35||
yatheṃdravāruṇaṃ pakvaṃ miṣṭaṃ naivopajāyate ! bhāvastathā tīrthe koṭisnāto na śuṣyati ||36||
prathamaṃ manasaḥ śuddhiḥ kartavyā śubhamicchatā |
śuddhe manasi dravyasya śuddhirbhavati nānyathā || 37||
tathaivācāraśuddhi: syāttatastīrthaṃ prasidhyati |
anyathā tu kṛtaṃ sarvaṃ vyartha bhavati tatkṣaṇāt 38 ||
i " hīnavarṇasya saṃsarga tīrthe gatvā sadā tyajet | "
bhūtānukaṃpanaṃ caiva kartavyaṃ karmaṇā dhiyā |
yadi pṛcchasi rājeṃdra tīrthaṃ vakṣyāmyanuttamam ||39||
prathamaṃ naimiṣaṃ puṇyaṃ cakratīrthaṃ ca puṣkaram |
anyeṣāṃ caiva tīrthānāṃ saṃkhyā nāsti mahītale ||40|
pāvanāni ca sthānāni bahūni nṛpasattama |
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ rājā naimiṣaṃ gaṃtumudyataḥ || 41 ||

nodayāmāsa daityānva harṣanirbhara mānasaḥ |
prahlāda uvāca
uttiṣṭhatu mahābhāgā gamiṣyāmo'dya naimiṣam ||42 ||
drakṣyāmaḥ puṃḍarīkākṣaṃ pītavāsasamacyutam |
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktā viṣṇubhaktena sarve te dānavāstadā ||43||
tenaiva saha pātālānniryayuḥ parayā mudā |
te sametya ca daiteyā dānavāśca mahābalāḥ ||44||
naimiṣāraṇyamāsādya snānaṃ cakrurmudānvitāḥ |
prahlādastatra tīrtheṣu carandaityaiḥ samanvitaḥ || 45 ||
sarasvatoṃ mahāpuṇyāṃ dadarśa vimalodakām |
tīrthe tatra nṛpaśreṣṭha prahlādasya mahātmanaḥ ||46||
manaḥ prasannaṃ saṃjātaṃ snātvā sārasvate jale |
vidhivattatra daityeṃdraḥ snānadānādikaṃ śubhe ||
cakārāpi prasannātmā tīrthe paramapāvane ||47||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe'ṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||
atha navamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
kuvaṃstīrthavidhi tatra hiraṇyakaśipoḥ sutaḥ |
nyagrodhaṃ sumahacchāyamapaśyatpuratastadā || 1 ||
dadarśa bāṇānaparānnānājātīyakāṃstadā |
gṛdhrapakṣayutāṃstīvrāñchilādhautānmahojjvalān||2||
citayāmāsa manasā yasyeme viśikhāstviha |
ṛṣīṇāmāśrame puṇye tīrthe paramapāvane ||3||
evaṃ ciṃtayatā'nena kṛṣṇājinadharau munī |
samunnatajaṭābhārī dṛṣṭau dharmasutau tadā ||4||
tayoragre ghṛte śubhre dhanuṣī lakṣaṇānvite |
śārṅgamājagavaṃ caiva tathā'kṣayyo maheṣudhī || 5 ||
dhyānasthoṃ to mahābhāgau naranārāyaṇāvṛṣī |
dṛṣṭvā dharmasutau tatra daityānāmadhipastadā || 6 ||
krodharaktekṣaṇastau tu provācāsurapālakaḥ |
kiṃ bhavadbhayāṃ samārabdho daṃbho dharmavināśanaḥ ||7||
na śrutaṃ naiva dṛṣṭaṃ hi saṃsāre'sminkadāpi hi |
tapasaścaraṇaṃ tīvraṃ tathā cāpasya dhāraṇam ||8||
virodho'yaṃ yuge cādya kathaṃ yuktaṃ kalipriyam |
brāhmaṇasya tapo yuktaṃ tatra kiṃ cāpadhāraṇam ||9||
kva jaṭādhāraṇaṃ dehe kveṣudhī ca viḍaṃbano |
dharmasyācaraṇaṃ yuktaṃ yuvayordivyabhāvayoḥ || 10 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā naraḥ provāca bhārata |
kā te citā'tra daityeṃdra vṛthā tapasi cāvayoḥ 11||
sāmarthye sati yatkuryāttatsaṃpadyeta tasya hi |
āvāṃ kāryadvaye maṃda samartho lokaviśrutau || 12 ||

yuddhe tapasi sāmarthyaṃ tvaṃ punaḥ kiṃ kariṣyasi |
gaccha mārge yathākāmaṃ kasmādatra vikatthase || 13 |
brahmatejo durārādhyaṃ na tvaṃ veda vimohitaḥ |
vipracarcā na kartavyā prāṇibhiḥ sukhamīpsubhiḥ 14 ||
prahrāda uvāca
tāpasī mandabuddhī stho mṛṣā vāṃ garvamohitau |
mayi tiṣṭhati daityendre dharmasetupravartake || 15 ||
na yuktametattīrthe'sminna dharmācaraṇaṃ punaḥ |
kā śaktistava yuddhe'sti darśayādya tapodhana || 16 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tadākarṇya vacastasya narastaṃ pratyuvāca ha |
yudhyasvādya mayā sārdhaṃ yadi te matirīdṛśī ||17||
adya te sphoṭayiṣyāmi mūrdhānamasurādhama | " yuddhe śraddhā na te paścādbhaviṣyati kadācana" |
vyāsa uvāca
tanniśamya vacastasya daityeṃdraḥ kupitastadā || 18 ||
prahlādo balavānatra pratijñāmāruroha saḥ |
yena kenāpyupāyena jeṣyāmi tāvubhāvapi ||19||
naranārāyaṇī dāṃtāvṛṣī tapisamanvitau |
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā vacanaṃ daityaḥ pratigṛhya śarāsanam ||20||
ākṛṣya tarasā cāpaṃ jyāśabdaṃ ca cakāra ha |
naro'pi dhanurādāya śarāṃstīvrāñchilāśitān 21 ||
mumoca bahuśaḥ krodhātprahlādopari pārthiva ||22||
tāndaityarājastapanīyapuṃkhaiściccheda bāṇaistarasā sametya |
samīkṣya chinnāṃśca naraḥ svasṛṣṭānanyānmumocāśu ruṣānvito vai || 23 ||
daityādhipastānapi tīvravegaiśchittvā jaghānorasi taṃ munīndram |
naro'pi taṃ pañcabhirāśugaiśca kruddho'hanaddaityapati bāhudeśe ||24||
seṃdrāḥ surāstatra tayorhi yuddhaṃ draṣṭuṃ vimānairgagana sthitāśca |
narasya vīryaṃ yudhi saṃsthitasya te tuṣṭuvurdaityapateśca bhūyaḥ || 25 ||
vavarṣa daityādhipa āttacāpaḥ śilīmukhānaṃbudharo yathāpaḥ |
ādāya śāṅga dhanuraprameyaṃ mumoca bāṇāñchita hemapuṃkhān ||26||
babhūva yuddhaṃ tumulaṃ tayostu jayaiṣiṇoḥ pārthivadevadaityayoḥ |
vavarṣurākāśapathe sthitāste puṣpāṇi divyāni prahṛṣṭacittāḥ ||27||
cukopa daityādhipatirharau sa mumoca bāṇānatitīvravegān |
ciccheda tāndharmasutaḥ sutīkṣṇairdhanuvimuktavaśikhaistadāśu || 28 ||

tato nārāyaṇaṃ vāṇaiḥ prahlādaścātikarṣitaiḥ |
vavarṣa susthitaṃ vīraṃ dharmaputraṃ sanātanam ||
nārāyaṇo'pi taṃ vegānmuktairbāṇaiḥ śilāśitaiḥ || 29||
tutodātīva purato daityānāmadhipaṃ sthitam |
sannipāto'mbare tatra didṛkṣūṇāṃ babhūva ha ||30||
devānāṃ dānavānāṃ ca kurvatāṃ jayaghoṣaṇam |
ubhayoḥ śaravarṣeṇa chādite gagane yadā || 31||
divā'pi rātrisadṛśaṃ babhūva timiraṃ mahat |
ūcuḥ parasparaṃ devā daityā vātīva vismitāḥ || 32||
adṛṣṭapūrvaṃ yuddhaṃ |
vaṃ vartate'dya sudāruṇam |
devarṣayo'tha gaṃdharvā yakṣakinnarapannagāḥ ||33||
vidyādharāścāraṇāśca vismayaṃ paramaṃ yayuḥ |
nāradaḥ parvataścaiva prekṣaṇārthaṃ sthitau munī ||34||
nāradaḥ parvataṃ prāha nedṛśaṃ cābhavatpurā |
tārakāsurayuddhaṃ ca tathā vṛtrāsurasya ca || 35||
madhukaiṭabhayoryuddhaṃ hariṇā cedṛśaṃ kṛtam |
prahlādaḥ prabalaḥ śūro yasmānnārāyaṇena ca ||36||
karoti sadṛśaṃ yuddhaṃ siddhenādbhutakarmaṇā |
vyāsa uvāca
dine dine tathā rātrau kṛtvā kṛtvā punaḥ punaḥ ||37||
cakratuḥ paramaṃ yuddhaṃ tau tadā daityatāpasau |
nārāyaṇastu ciccheda prahlādasya śarāsanam ||38||
tarasaikaina bāṇena ga cānyaddhanurādade |
nārāyaṇastu tarasā muktvānyaṃ ca śilīmukham ||39||
tadaiva madhyataścāpaṃ ciccheda laghuhastakaḥ |
chinnaṃ chinnaṃ punardetyo dhanuranyatsamādade ||40||
nārāyaṇastu ciccheda viśikhairāśu kopitaḥ |
chinne dhanuṣi daityeṃdraḥ paridhaṃ tu samādade ||41 ||
jaghāna dharmajaṃ tūrṇaṃ bāhormadhye'tikopanaḥ |
tamāyāṃtaṃ sa balavānmārgaṇairnavabhirmuniḥ || 42||
ciccheda parighaṃ ghoraṃ daśabhistamatāḍayat |
gadāmādāya daityedraḥ sarvāyasamayīṃ dṛḍhām ||43|
jānudeśe jaghānāśu devaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ ruṣā |
gadayā cāpi girivatsaṃsthitaḥ sthiramānasaḥ || 44||
dharmaputro'tibalavānmumocāśu śilīmukhān |
gadāṃ ciccheda bhagavāṃstadā daityapaterdṛḍhām ||45 ||
vismayaṃ paramaṃ jagmuḥ prekṣakā gagane sthitāḥ |
sa tu śakti samādāya prahlādaḥ paravīrahā ||46||
cikṣepa tarasā kruddho balānnārāyaṇorasi |
tāmāpatatī saṃvīkṣya bāṇenaikena līlayā || 47||
saptadhā kṛtavānāśu saptabhistaṃ jaghāna ha| divyavarṣasahasraṃ tu tadyuddhaṃ paramaṃ tayoḥ || 48 ||
jātaṃ vismayadaṃ rājansarveṣāṃ tatra cāśrame |
tadājagāma tarasā pītavāsāścaturbhujaḥ || 49||
prahlādasyāśrama tatra jagāda ca gadādharaḥ |
caturbhujo ramākāṃto rathāṃgadarapadmabhṛt ||50||
dṛṣṭvā tamāganaṃ tatra hiraṇyakaśipoḥ sutaḥ | praṇamya parayā bhaktayā prāṃjali: pratyuvāca ha |
prahlāda uvāca
devadeva jagannātha bhaktavatsala mādhava || 51 ||

kathaṃ na jitavānājāvahametau tapasvino |
saṃgrāmastu mayā deva kṛtaḥ pūrṇaṃ śataṃ samāḥ || 52 ||
surāṇāṃ na jito kasmāditi me vismayo mahān |
viṣṇuruvāca
siddhāvimau madaṃśau ca vismayaḥ ko'tra māriṣa || 53 ||
tāpasau na jitātmānau naranārāyaṇo jito |
gaccha tvaṃ vitalaṃ rājankuru bhakti mamācalām 54 || ||
nābhyāṃ kuru virādhaṃ tvaṃ tāpasābhyāṃ mahāmate |
vyāsa uvāca
ityājñapto daityarājo niryayāvasuraiḥ saha |
naranārāyaṇau bhūyastapoyuktī babhūvatuḥ ||55||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe navamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 ||
atha daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
saṃdeho'yaṃ mahānatra parāśarya kathānake |
naranārāyaṇau śāṃtī vaiṣṇavāṃśī tapodhano || 1 ||
tīrthāśramī sattvayuktau vanyāśanaparī sadā |
dharmaputrau mahātmānau tāpasau satyasaṃsthitau || 2||
kathaṃ rāgasamāyukto jāto yuddhe parasparam |
saṃgrāmaṃ cakratuḥ kasmāttyaktvā tapimanuttamām ||3||
prahlādena samaṃ pūrṇaṃ divyavarṣaśataṃ kila |
hitvā śāṃtisukhaṃ yuddhaṃ kṛtavantau kathaṃ munī ||4||
kathaṃ to cakraturyuddhaṃ prahlādena samaṃ munī |
kathayasva mahābhāga kāraṇaṃ vigrahasya vai || 5 ||
kāminī kanakaṃ kāryaṃ kāraṇaṃ vigrahasya vai |
yuddhabuddhiḥ kathaṃ jātā tayośca tadviraktayoḥ ||6||
tathāvidhaṃ tapastaptaṃ tābhyāṃ ca kena hetunā |
mohāthaṃ sukhabhogādhaṃ svargārthaṃ vā parantapa |
kṛtamatyutkaṭaṃ tābhyāṃ tapaḥ sarvaphalapradam ||7||
munibhyāṃ śāṃtacittābhyāṃ prāptaṃ kiṃ phalamadbhutam |
tapasā pīḍito dehaḥ saṃgrāmeṇa punaḥ punaḥ ||8||
divyavarṣaśataṃ pūrṇa śrameṇa paripīḍitau |
na rājyārthe dhane vā'pi na dāreṣu gṛheṣu ca || 9 ||
kimarthaṃ tu kṛtaṃ yuddhaṃ tābhyāṃ tena mahātmanā |
nirīhaḥ puruṣaḥ kasmātprakuryādyuddhamīdṛśam ||10||
duḥkhadaṃ sarvathā dehe jānandharmaṃ sanātanam |
subuddhi: sukhadānīha karmāṇi kurute sadā || 11 ||
na duḥkhadāni dharmajña sthitireṣā sanātanī |
dharmaputro hareraṃśī sarvajño sarvabhūṣitau || 12 ||
kṛtavaṃtau kathaṃ yuddhaṃ duḥkhaṃ dharmavināśakam |
tyaktvā tataḥ samānītaṃ sukhārāmaṃ mahatphalam || 13 ||
saṃyugaṃ dāruṇaṃ kṛṣṇa naiva mūrkho'pi vāṃchati |
śruto mayā yayātistu cyutaḥ svargānmahīpatiḥ || 14 ||

ahaṃkārabhavātpāpātpātitaḥ pṛthivītale |
yajñakṛddānakartā ca dhārmikaḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ || 15 ||
śabdoccāraṇamātreṇa pātito vajrapāṇinā |
ahaṃkāramṛte yuddhaṃ na bhavatyeva niśvayaḥ ||16||
kiṃ phalañcāsya yuddhasya muneḥ puṇyavināśanam |
vyāsa uvāca
rājansaṃsāramūlaṃ hi trividhaṃ parikīrtitam ||17||
sarvajñairmunibhirdharmaniścaye |
sa kathaṃ muninātyuktaṃ yogyo dehabhṛtāṃ kila || 18 ||
ahaṃkārastu
kāraṇena vinā kāryaṃ na bhavatyeva niścayaḥ |
tapo dānaṃ tathā yajñāḥ sāttvikātprabhavaṃti te || 19 ||
rājasādvā mahābhāga tāmasātkalahastathā |
kriyā svalpā'pi rājeṃdra nāhaṃkāraṃ vinā kvacit ||20||
śubhā vā'pyaśubhā vā'pi prabhavatyapi niścayaḥ |
ahaṃkārādvaṃdhakārī nānyo'sti jagatītale || 21 ||
yenedaṃ racitaṃ viśvaṃ kathaṃ tadrahitaṃ bhavet |
brahmā rudrastathā viṣṇurahakārayutāstvamī || 22||
anyeṣāṃ caiva kā vārtā munīnāṃ vasudhādhipa |
ahaṃkārāvṛtaṃ viśvaṃ bhramatīdaṃ carācaram || 23||
punarjanma punarmṛtyuḥ sarvaṃ karmavaśānugam |
devatiryaṅmanuṣyāṇāṃ saṃsāre'sminmahīpate ||24||
rathāṃgabadasarvāthaṃ bhramaṇaṃ sarvadā smṛtam |
viṣṇorapyavatārāṇāṃ saṃkhyāṃ jānāti kaḥ pumān 25||
bitate'smiṃstu saṃsāra uttamādhamayoniṣu |
nārāyaṇo hariḥ sākṣānmātsyaṃ vapurupāśritaḥ ||26||
kāmaṭhaṃ saukaraṃ caiva nārasiṃhaṃ ca vāmanam |
yuge yuge jagannātho vāsudevo janārdanaḥ ||27||
avatārāna saṃkhyātānkaroti vidhiyaṃtritaḥ |
vaivasvate mahārāja saptame bhagavān hariḥ ||28||
manvaṃtare'vatārānvai cakre tāñchṛṇu tattvataḥ |
bhṛguśāpānmahārāja viṣṇurdevavaraḥ prabhuḥ ||29||
avatārānane kāṃstu kṛtavānakhileśvaraḥ |
rājovāca
saṃdeho'yaṃ mahābhāga hṛdaye mama jāyate || 30 ||
bhṛguṇā bhagavānviṣṇuḥ kathaṃ śaptaḥ pitāmaha |
hariṇā ca munestasya vipriyaṃ kiṃ kṛtaṃ mune ||31||
yadroṣādbhṛguṇā śapto viṣṇurdevanamaskṛtaḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi bhṛgoḥ śāpasya kāraṇam ||32||
purā kaśyapadāyādo hiraṇyakaśipurnṛpaḥ |
yadā tadā suraiḥ sārdhaṃ kṛtaṃ saṃkhyaṃ parasparam ||33|
kṛte saṃkhye jagatsarvaṃ vyākulaṃ samajāyata |
hate tasminnṛpe rājā prahlādaḥ samajāyata ||34||
devānsa pīḍayāmāsa prahlādaḥ śatrukarṣaṇaḥ |
saṃgrāmo hyabhavaddhoraḥ śakraprahlādayostadā ||35||

pūrṇaṃ varṣaśataṃ rāja~llokavismayakārakam |
devairyuddhaṃ kṛtaṃ cograṃ prahlādastu parājitaḥ || 36 ||
nirvedaṃ paramaṃ prāpto jñātvā dharmaṃ sanātanam |
virācanasutaṃ rājye pratiṣṭhāpya bali nṛpa || 37 ||
jagāma saṃ tapastaptuṃ parvate gandhamādane |
prāpya rājyaṃ baliḥ śrīmānsurairvairaṃ cakāra ha ||38||
tataḥ parasparaṃ yuddhaṃ jātaṃ paramadāruṇam |
tataḥ surajitā daityā indreṇāmitatejasā ||39|
viṣṇunā ca sahāyena rājyabhraṣṭāḥ kṛtā nṛpa |
tataḥ parājitā daityāḥ kāvyasya śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ ||40||
kiṃ tvaṃ na kuruṣe brahman sāhāyyaṃ naḥ pratāpavān |
sthātuṃ na śaknumo hyatra praviśāmo rasātalam ||41||
yadi tvaṃ na sahāyo'si jñātuṃ mantraviduttamaḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktaḥ so'bravīddaityānkāvyaḥ kāruṇiko muniḥ ||42||
mā bhaiṣṭa dhārayiṣyāmi tejamā svena bhoḥ surāḥ |
maṃtraistathauṣadhībhiśva sāhāyyaṃ vaḥ sadaiva hi || 43||
kariṣyāmi kṛtotsāhā bhavantu vigatajvarāḥ |
vyāsa utrāca
tataste nirbhayā jātā daityāḥ kāvyasya saṃśrayāt ||44||
devaiḥ śrutastu vṛttāntaḥ sarvaścāramukhātkila |
tatra saṃmaṃtrya te devāḥ śakreṇa ca parasparam ||45||
mantraṃ cakruḥ susaṃvignāḥ kāvyamantraprabhāvataḥ |
yoddhuṃ gacchāmahe tūrṇaṃ yāvanna cyāvayanti vai || 46 ||
prasahya hatvā śiṣṭāṃstu pātālaṃ prāpayāmahe |
daityāñjagmustato devāḥ saṃruṣṭāḥ śastrapāṇayaḥ || 47||
jagmustānviṣṇusahitā dānavā hariṇoditāḥ |
vadhyamānāstu te daityāḥ saṃtrastā bhayapīḍitāḥ || 48 ||
kāvyasya śaraṇaṃ jagmū rakṣa rakṣeti cābruvan |
tāñchukraḥ pīḍitāndṛṣṭvā devairdaityānmahābalān ||49 |
mā bhaiṣṭeti vacaḥ prāha mantrauṣadhibalādvibhuḥ |
dṛṣṭvā kāvyaṃ surāḥ sarve tyaktvā tānprayayuḥ kila 50 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ || 10 ||
atha ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tāgateṣu deveṣu kāvyastānpratyuvāca ha |
brahmaṇā pūrvamuktaṃ yacchṛṇudhvaṃ dānavottamāḥ || 1 ||
viṣṇurdaityavadhe yukto haniṣyati janārdana: |
vārāharūpaṃ saṃsthāya hiraṇyākṣo yathā hataḥ || 2 ||
yathā nṛsiṃha rūpeṇa hiraṇyakaśipurhataḥ |
tathā sarvānkṛtotsāho haniṣyati na cānyathā || 3 ||
