mantrabalaṃ samyakpratibhāti yathā harim |
jeta yūyaṃ samarthāḥ stha mayā vātāḥ surānaya ||4||
tasmātkālaṃ pratīkṣadhvaṃ kiyantaṃ dānavottamāḥ |
ahamadya mahādevaṃ mantrārthaṃ pravrajāmi vai ||5||

prāpya maṃtrānmahādevādāgamiṣyāmi sāṃpratam |
yuṣmabhyaṃ tānpradāsyāmi yathārthaṃ dānavottamāḥ ||6 ||
daityā ūcuḥ
parājitāḥ kathaṃ sthātuṃ pṛthivyāṃ munisattama |
śaktā bhavāmo'pyaṃbalāstāvatkālaṃ pratīkṣitum ||7||
nihatā balinaḥ sarve kecicchiṣṭāśva dānavāḥ |
nādya yuktāśca saṃgrāme syātumevaṃ sukhāvahāḥ ||8||
śukra uvāca
yāvadahaṃ mantravidyāmānayiṣyāmi śaṃkarāt |
tāvadbhavadbhiḥ sthātavyaṃ tapoyuktaḥ śamanvitaiḥ || 9 ||
sāmadānādayaḥ proktā vidvadbhiḥ samayocitāḥ |
deśaṃ kālaṃ balaṃ vīraṃrjñātvā śakti balaṃ budhaiḥ ||10||
sevā'tha samaye kāryā śatrūṇāṃ śubhakāmyayā |
svaśaktyupacaye kāle haṃtavyāste manīṣibhiḥ || 11||
tadadya vinayaṃ kṛtvā sāmapūrvaṃ chalena vai |
tiṣṭhadhvaṃ svaniketeṣu madāgamanakāṃkṣayā ||12||
prāpya maṃtrānmahādevādāgamiṣyāmi dānavāḥ |
yudhyāmahe punardevānmantramāsthāya vai balam || 13||
ityuktvā'tha bhṛgustebhyo jagāma kṛtaniścayaḥ |
mahādevaṃ mahārājaṃ mantrārthaṃ munisattamaḥ || 14 ||
dānavāḥ preṣayāmāsuḥ prahlādaṃ surasannidhau |
satyavādinamavyayaṃ surāṇāṃ pratyayapradam ||15||
prahlādastu surānprāha praśrayāvanato nṛpaḥ |
asuraiḥ sahitastatra vacanaṃ namratāyutam ||16||
nyastaśastrā vayaṃ sarve niḥ sannāhāstathaiva ca |
devaistapaścariṣyāmaḥ saṃvṛtā balkalairyutāḥ || 17 ||
prahlādasya vacaḥ śrutvā satyābhivyāhṛtaṃ tu tat |
tato devā nyavartanta vijvarā muditāśca te || 18 ||
nyastaśastreṣu daityeṣu vinivṛttāstadā surāḥ |
viśrabdhāḥ svagṛhāngatvā krīḍāsaktāḥ susaṃsthitāḥ ||
daityā dambhaṃ sabhālambya tāpasāstapisaṃyutāḥ |
kaśyapasyāśrame vāsaṃ cakruḥ kāvyāgamecchayā ||20||
kāvyo gatvā'tha kailāsaṃ mahādevaṃ praṇamya ca |
uvāca vibhunā pṛṣṭaḥ kiṃ te kāryamiti prabhuḥ ||21||
mantrānicchāmyahaṃ deva ye na santi bṛhaspatau |
parājayāya devānāmasurāṇāṃ jayāya ca ||22||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya sarvajñaḥ śaṃkaraḥ śivaḥ |
citayāmāsa manasā ki kartavyamataḥ param || 23 ||
sureṣu drohabuddhayā'sau mantrārthamiha sāmpratam |
prāptaḥ kāvyo gurusteṣāṃ daityānāṃ vijayāya ca ||24||
rakṣaṇīyā mayā devā iti saṃcintya śaṃkaraḥ |
duṣkaraṃ vratamatyugraṃ tamuvāca maheśvaraḥ || 25 ||
pūrṇaṃ varṣasahasraṃ tu kaṇadhūmamavākśirāḥ |
yadi pāsyasi bhadraṃ te tato maṃtrānavāpsyasi ||26||
ityukto'sau praṇamyeśaṃ vāḍhamityabravīdvacaḥ |
vrataṃ carāmyahaṃ deva tvayā''jñaptaḥ sureśvara ||27||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā śaṃkaraṃ kāvyaścakāra vratamuttamam |
dhūmapānarataḥ śānto mantrārthakṛtaniścayaḥ || 28 ||
tato devāḥ parijñātvā kāvyaṃ vratarataṃ tadā |
daityāndambharatāṃścaiva babhūvurmantratatparāḥ ||29||

vicārya manasā sarve saṃgrāmāyodyatā nṛpa |
yayurdhṛtāyudhāstatra yatra te dānavottamāḥ || 30 ||
tānāgatānsamīkṣyātha sāyudhāndaṃśitāṃstathā |
āsaṃste bhayasaṃvignā daityā devānsamaṃtataḥ || 31 ||
utpetuḥ sahasā te vai sannaddhānbhayakaśitāḥ |
abruvanvacanaṃ tathyaṃ te devānbaladarpitān ||32||
nyastaśastre bhagavati ācārya vratamāsthite |
dattvābhayaṃ purā devāḥ saṃprāptā no jighāṃsayā || 33||
satyaṃ vaḥ kva gataṃ devā dharmaśca śrutinoditaḥ |
nyastaśastrā na haṃtavyā bhītāśca śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ || 34 ||
devā ūcuḥ
bhavadbhiḥ preṣitaḥ kāvyo maṃtrārthaṃ kuhakena ca |
tapo jñānaṃ hi yuṣmākaṃ tena yudhyāma eva hi || 35 ||
sajjā bhavaṃtu yuddhāya saṃrabdhāḥ śastrapāṇayaḥ |
śatrucchidreṇa haṃtavya eṣa dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ || 36 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ daityā vicārya ca parasparam |
palāyanaparāḥ sarve nirgatā bhayavihvalāḥ ||37||
śaraṇaṃ dānavā jagmurbhītāste kāvyamātaram |
dṛṣṭvā tānatisaṃtaptānabhayaṃ ca dadāvatha ||38||
kāvya mātovāca
na bhetavyaṃ na bhetavyaṃ bhayaṃ tyajata dānavāḥ |
matsannidhau vartamānānna bhorbhavitumarhati || 39 ||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ daityāḥ sthitāstatra gatavyathāḥ |
nirāyudhā hyasaṃbhrāṃtāstatrāśramavare'surāḥ || 40 ||
devāstānvitānvīkṣya dānavāṃste padānugāḥ |
abhijagmuḥ prasahya tānavicārya balābalam ||41 ||
tatrāgatāḥ surāḥ sarve haṃtuṃ daityānsamudyatāḥ |
vāritāḥ kāvyamātrā'pi jaghnustānāśramasthitān ||
hanyamānānsurairdṛṣṭvā kāvyamātā'tivepitā |
uvāca sarvānsanidrāṃstapasā vai karomyaham ||43||
ityuktvā preritā nitrā tānāgatya papāta ca |
seṃdrā nidrāvaśaṃ yātā devā mūkavadāsthitāḥ || 44 ||
indraṃ nidrājitaṃ dṛṣṭvā dīnaṃ viṣṇurabhāṣata |
māṃ tvaṃ praviśa bhadraṃ te naye tvāṃ ca surottama || 45 ||
evamuktastato viṣṇuṃ praviveśa purandaraḥ |
nirbhayo gatanidraśca babhūva harirakṣitaḥ || 46 ||
rakṣitaṃ hariṇā dṛṣṭvā śakraṃ tatra gatavyatham |
kāvyamātā tataḥ kruddhā vacanaṃ cedamabravīt ||47 ||
maghavaṃstvāṃ bhakṣayāmi saviṣṇuṃ vai tapobalāt |
paśyatāṃ sarvadevānāmīdṛśaṃ me tapobalam ||48||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktau tu tayā devī viṣṇivaṃdrau yogavidyayā |
abhibhūtī mahātmānau stabdhau to saṃbabhūvatuḥ || 49||
vismitāṃstu tadā devā dṛṣṭvā tāvativādhitau |
cakruḥ kilakilāśabdaṃ tataste dīnamānasāḥ || 50 ||
krośamānānsurāndṛṣṭvā viṣṇuṃ prāha śacīpatiḥ |
viśeṣeṇābhibhūto'smi tvatto'haṃ madhusūdana || 51 ||
jahyenāṃ tarasā viṣṇo yāvannau na dahetprabho |
tapasā darpitāṃ duṣṭāṃ mā vicāraya mādhava || 52 ||
ityukto bhagavānviṣṇuḥ śakreṇa prathitena ca |
cakraṃ sasmāra tarasā ghṛṇāṃ tyaktvātha mādhavaḥ ||53||

smṛtamātraṃ tu saṃprāptaṃ cakraṃ viṣṇuvaśānugam |
dadhāra ca kare kruddho vadhārthaṃ śakranoditaḥ || 54 ||
gṛhītvā tatkare catraṃ śiraśviccheda raṃhasā |
hatāṃ dṛṣṭvā tu tāṃ śakro muditaścābhavattadā || 55 ||
devāśvātīva saṃtuṣṭā hari jaya jayeti ca |
tuṣṭuvurmuditāḥ sarve saṃjātā vigatajvarāḥ || 56 ||
iṃdraviṣṇū tu saṃjāto tatkṣaṇāddhṛdayavyatho |
strīvadhācchaṃkamānau tu bhṛgoḥ śāpaṃ duratyayam ||57||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe caturthaskaṃdhe ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 11||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
taṃ dṛṣṭvā tu vadhaṃ ghoraṃ cukrodha bhagavānbhṛguḥ |
vepamāno'tiduḥkhārtaḥ provāca madhusūdanam ||1||
bhṛguruvāca
akṛtaṃ te kṛtaṃ viṣṇo jānanpāpaṃ mahāmate |
vadho'yaṃ viprajātāyā manasā kartumakṣamaḥ ||2||
ākhyātastvaṃ sattvaguṇaḥ smṛto brahmā ca rājasaḥ |
tathā'sau tāmasaḥ śaṃbhurviparītaṃ kathaṃ smṛtam ||3||
tāmasastvaṃ kathaṃ jātaḥ kṛtaṃ karmātininditam |
avadhyā strī tvayā viṣṇo hatā kasmānnirāgasā ||4||
śapāmi tvāṃ durācāraṃ kimanyatprakaromi taṃ |
vidhuro'haṃ kṛtaḥ pāpa tvayā'haṃ śakrakāraṇāt ||5||
ma śape'haṃ tathā śakraṃ śape tvā madhusūdana |
sadā chalaparo'si tvaṃ kīṭayonirdurāśayaḥ ||6||
ye ca tvāṃ sāttvikaṃ prāhuste mūrkhā munayaḥ kila |
tāmasastvaṃ durācāraḥ pratyakṣaṃ me janārdana || 7||
avatārā mṛtyuloke saṃtu macchāpasaṃbhavāḥ |
prāyo garbhabhavaṃ duḥkhaṃ bhuṃkṣva pāpājjanārdana ||8||
vyāsa uvāca
tatastenātha śāpena naṣṭe dharma punaḥ punaḥ |
lokasya ca hitārthāya jāyate mānuṣeṣviha || 9 ||
rājovāca
bhṛgubhāryā hatā tatra cakreṇāmitatejasā |
gārhasthyaṃ ca punastasya kathaṃ jātaṃ mahātmanaḥ || 10 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti śaptvā hari ropāttadādāya śirastvaran |
kārya saṃyojya tarasā bhṛguḥ provāca kāryavit || 11 ||
aca svāṃ viṣṇunā devi htāṃ saṃjīvayāmyaham |
yadi kṛtsno mayā dharmo jñāyate carito'pi vā || 12||
tena satyena jīveta yadi satyaṃ bravīmyaham |
payyaṃtu devatāḥ sarvā mama tejovalaṃ mahat || 13||
adbhistāṃ prokṣya śītābhirjīvayāmi tapobalāt |
satyaṃ śaucaṃ tathā vaṃdā yadi me tapaso balam ||14||
vyāsa uvāca
adbhiḥ saṃprokṣitā devī sadyaḥ saṃjīvitā tadā |
utthitā paramaprītā bhṛgorbhāryā śucismitā || 15||

tatastāṃ sarvabhūtāni dṛṣṭvā suptosthitāmiva |
sādhu sādhviti taṃ tāṃ tu tuṣṭuvuḥ sarvato diśam 16 ||
evaṃ saṃjīvitā tena bhṛguṇā varavarṇinī |
vismayaṃ paramaṃ jagmurdevāḥ seṃdrā trilokya tat 17 ||
iṃdraḥ surānathovāca muninā jīvitā satī |
kāvyastaptvā tapo ghoraṃ kiṃ kariṣyati maṃtravit ||
vyāsa uvāca
gatā nidrā surendrasya dehe'kṣemamabhūnnṛpa |
smṛtvā kāvyasya vṛttāṃtaṃ maṃtrārthamatidāruṇam ||19||
vimṛśya manasā śakro jayaṃtī svasutāṃ tadā |
uvāca kanyāṃ cāvaṃgī smitapūrvamidaṃ vacaḥ || 20||
gaccha putri mayā dattā kāvyāya tvaṃ tapasvine |
samārādhaya tanvaṃgi matkṛte taṃ vaśaṃ kuru || 21 ||
upacārairmunistaistaiḥ samārādhya manaḥ priyaiḥ |
bhayaṃ me tarasā gatvā hara tatra varāśrame || 22 ||
sā piturvacanaṃ śrutvā tatrāgacchanmanoramā |
tamapaśyaviśālākṣī pitaṃ dhūmamāśrame ||23||
tasya dehaṃ samālokya smṛtvā vākyaṃ pitustadā |
kadalīdalamādāya vījayāmāsa taṃ munim ||24||
nirmalaṃ śītalaṃ vāri samānīya suvāsitam |
pānāya kalpayāmāsa bhaktyā paramayā laghu ||25|
chāyāṃ vastrātapatreṇa bhāskare madhyage sati |
racayāmāsa tanvaṃgo svayaṃ dharme sthitā satī ||26||
phalānyānīya divyāni pakvāni madhurāṇi ca |
mumocāgre munestasya bhakṣyārthaṃ vihitāni ca ||27||
kuśāḥ prādeśamātrā hi haritāḥ śukasannibhāḥ |
dadhārāgre'tha puṣpāṇi nityakarmasamṛddhaye || 28 ||
nidrārthaṃ kalpayāmāsa saṃstaraṃ pallavānvitam |
tasminmunau 'cādarasthā cakāra vyajanaṃ śanaiḥ ||29||
hāvabhāvādikaṃ kiṃcidvikārajananaṃ ca tat |
na cakāra jayaṃtī sā śāpabhītā munestadā ||30||
stutiṃ cakāra tanvaṃgī gobhistasya mahātmanaḥ |
subhāṣiṇyanukūlābhiḥ prītikartrībhirapta || 31||
prabuddhe jalamādāya dadhārācamanāya ca |
mano'nukūlaṃ satataṃ kurvantī vyacarattadā ||32||
iṃdro'pi sevakāṃstatra preṣayāmāsa cāturaḥ |
pravṛttiṃ jñātukāmo vai munestasya jitātmanaḥ ||33||
evaṃ bahūni varṣāṇi paricaryāparā'bhavat |
nirvikārā jitakrodhā brahmacaryaparā satī ||34||
pūrṇe varṣasahasre tu parituṣṭo maheśvaraḥ |
vareṇa chaṃdayāmāsa kāvyaṃ prati manoharaḥ || 35 ||
īśvara uvāca
yacca kiṃcidapi brahmanvidyate bhṛgunaṃdana |
pratipaśyasi yatsarvaṃ tacca vācyaṃ na kasyacit 36||
sarvābhibhāvakatvena bhaviṣyasi na saṃśayaḥ |
avaṣyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ prajeśaśca dvijottama ||37||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ dattvā varāñchaṃbhustatraivāṃtaradhīyata |
kāvyastāmatha saṃvīkṣya jayaṃtīṃ vākyamabravīt ||38||
kā'si kasyāsi suśroṇi brūhi kiṃ te cikoṣitam |
kimarthamiha saṃprāptā kāryaṃ vada varo me || 39||
kiṃ vāṃchasi karomyadya duṣkaraṃ cetsulocane |
prīto'smi tvatkṛtenādya varaṃ varaya suvrate ||40||

tataḥ sā tu muniṃ prāha jayaṃtī muditānanā |
cikīrṣitaṃ me bhagavaṃstapasā jñātumarhasi || 41 ||
vyāsa uvāca
jñātaṃ mayā tathāpi tvaṃ brūhi yanmanasepsitam |
karomi sarvathā bhadraṃ prīto'smi paricaryayā || 42 ||
jayaṃtyuvāca
śatrasyāhaṃ sutā brahmanpitrā tubhyaṃ samarpitā |
jayaṃtī nāmataścāhaṃ jayaṃtāvarajā mune || 43 ||
sakāmā'smi tvayi vibho vāṃchitaṃ kuru me'dhunā |
raṃsye tvayā mahābhāga dharmataḥ prītipūrvakam ||44 ||
śukra uvāca
mayā saha tvaṃ suśroṇi daśa varṣāṇi bhāmini |
sarvairbhūtairadṛśyā ca ramasveha yadṛcchayā || 45 ||
vyāsa uvāca
evamuktā gṛhaṃ gatvā jayaṃtyāḥ pāṇimudrahan |
tayā sahāvasa devyā daśa varṣāṇi bhārgavaḥ || 46 ||
adṛśyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ māyayā saṃvṛtaḥ prabhuḥ |
daityāstamāgataṃ śrutvā kṛtārthaṃ maṃtrasaṃyutam ||47 ||
abhijagmurgṛhe tasya muditāste didṛkṣavaḥ |
nāpaśyatramamāṇaṃ te jayaṃtyā saha saṃyutam ||48||
tadā vimanasaḥ sarve jātā bhagnodyamāśca te |
ciṃtāparātidīnāśca vīkṣamāṇāḥ punaḥ punaḥ ||49||
adṛṣṭvā taṃ tu saṃvṛttaṃ pratijagmuryathāgatam |
svagṛhāndaityavaryāste citāviṣṭā bhayāturāḥ || 50 ||
ramamāṇaṃ tathā jñātvā śakraḥ provāca taṃ gurum |
bṛhaspatiṃ mahābhāgaṃ kiṃ kartavyamataḥ param ||51||
gacchādya dānavānbrahmanmāyayā tvaṃ pralobhaya |
asmākaṃ kuru kāryaṃ tvaṃ buddhayā saṃcitya mānada 52 ||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ kāvyaṃ ramamāṇaṃ susaṃvṛtam |
jñātvā tadrūpamāsthāya daityānprati yayau guruḥ || 53 ||
gatvā tatrātibhaktyā'sau dānavānsamupāhvayat |
āgatāste'surāḥ sarve dadṛśuḥ kāvyamagrataḥ || 54 ||
praṇamya saṃsthitāḥ sarve kāvyaṃ matvā'timohitāḥ |
na viduste gurormāyāṃ kāvyarūpavibhāvinīm 55 ||
tānuvāca guru: kāvyarūpaḥ pracchannamāyayā |
svāgataṃ mama yājyānāṃ prāpto'haṃ vo hitāya vai 56 ||
ahaṃ vo bodhayiṣyāmi vidyāṃ prāptāmamāyayā |
tapasā toṣitaḥ śaṃbhuryuṣmatkalyāṇahetave ||57 ||
tacchrutvā prītamanaso jātāste dānavottamāḥ |
kṛtakāryaṃ guruṃ matvā jahṛpuste vimohitāḥ || 58 ||
praṇemuste mudā yuktā nirātaṃkā gatavyathāḥ |
devebhyaśca bhayaṃ tyaktvā tasthuḥ sarve nirāmayāḥ 59||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12 ||
atha trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
rājovāca
kiṃ kṛtaṃ guruṇā paścādbhṛgurūpeṇa vartatā |
chalenaiva hi daityānāṃ paurohityena dhīmatā || 1 ||

guruḥ surāṇāmaniśaṃ sarvavidyāniṣistathā |
sutāṃgirasa evāsau sa kathaṃ chalakṛnmuniḥ || 2 ||
dharmaśāstreṣu sarveṣu satyadharmasya kāraṇam |
kathitaṃ munibhiryena paramātmā'pi labhyate || 3 ||
vācaspatistathā mithyā vaktā ceddānavānprati |
kaḥ satyavaktā saṃsāre bhaviṣyati gṛhāśramī || 4 ||
āhārādadhikaṃ bhojyaṃ brahmāṇḍavibhave'pi na |
tadarthaṃ munayo mithyā pravartante kathaṃ mune ||5||
śabdapramāṇamucchedaṃ śiṣṭābhāve gataṃ na kim |
chalakarmapravṛtte vā'vigītatvaṃ gurau katham || 6 ||
devāḥ sattvasamudbhūtā rājasā mānavāḥ smṛtāḥ |
tiryacastāmasāḥ proktā utpattau munibhiḥ kila 7 ||
amarāṇāṃ guruḥ sākṣānmithyāvādī svayaṃ yadi |
tadā kaḥ satyavaktā syādrājasastāmasaḥ punaḥ ||8||
kva sthitistasya dharmasya saṃdeho'yaṃ mamātmanaḥ |
kā gatiḥ sarvajantūnāṃ - mithyābhūte jagattraye ||9||
harirbrahmā śacīkāntastathā'nye surasattamāḥ |
sarve chalavidhau dakṣā manuṣyāṇāṃ ca kā kathā || 10 ||
kāmakrodhābhisantaptā lobhopahatacetasaḥ |
chale dakṣāḥ surāḥ sarve munayaśca tapodhanāḥ || 11||
vasiṣṭho vāmadevaśca viśvāmitro gurustathā |
ete pāparatāḥ kā'tra gatirdharmasya mānada || 12 ||
indro'gniścandramā vedhāḥ paradārābhilampaṭāḥ |
āryatvaṃ bhuvaneṣveṣu sthitaṃ kutra mune vada || 13 ||
vacanaṃ kasya mantavyamupadeśadhiyā'nagha |
sarve lobhābhibhūtāste devāśca munayastathā || 14||
vyāsa uvāca
kiṃ viṣṇuḥ kiṃ śivo brahmā maghavā ki bṛhaspatiḥ |
dehavān prabhavatyeva vikāraiḥ saṃyutaḥ sadā || 15 ||
rāgī viṣṇuḥ śivo rāgī brahmā'pi rāgasaṃyutaḥ |
" rāgavānkimakṛtyaṃ vai na karoti narādhipa " ||
rāgavānapi cāturyādvideha iva lakṣyate || 16 ||
samprāpte saṃkaṭe so'pi guṇaiḥ sambādhyate kila |
kāraṇādvahitaṃ kāryaṃ kathaṃ bhavitumarhati || 17 ||
brahmādīnāṃ ca sarveṣāṃ guṇā eva hi kāraṇam |
pañcaviṃśatsamudbhūtā dehāsteṣāṃ na cānyathā || 18 ||
kāle maraṇadharmāste sandehaḥ ko'tra te nṛpa |
paropadeśe vispaṣṭaṃ śiṣṭāḥ sarve bhavanti ca || 19 ||
viplutirhyaviśeṣeṇa svakārye samupasthite |
kāmaḥ krodhastathā lobhadrohāhaṃkāramatsarāḥ ||20||
dehavānka: parityaktumīśo bhavati tānpunaḥ |
saṃsāro'yaṃ mahārāja sadaivaivaṃvidhaḥ smṛtaḥ || 21 ||
nānyathā prabhavatyeva śubhāśubhamayaḥ kila |
kadācidbhagavānviṣṇustapaścarati dāruṇam ||22||
kadācidvividhānyajñānvitanoti surādhipaḥ |
kadācittu ramāraṅgarañjitaḥ parameśvaraḥ ||23||
ramate kila vaikuṇṭhe tastaruṇo vibhuḥ |
kadāciddānavaiḥ sārdhaṃ yuddhaṃ paramadāruṇam ||24||
karoti karuṇāsindhustadvāṇāpīḍito bhṛśam |
kadācijjayamāpnoti devātso'pi parājayam 25||
sukhaduḥkhābhibhūto'sau bhavatyeva na saṃśayaḥ |
śeṣe hote kadāci yoganidrāsamāvṛtaḥ || 26||
kāle jāgata viśvātmā svabhāvapratibodhitaḥ |
śarvo brahmā hariśceti indrādyā ye surāstathā ||27|| '

munayaśca vinirmāṇaḥ svāyuṣo vicaranti hi |
niśāvasāne saṃjāte jagatsthāvarajaṃgamam ||28||
mriyate nātra sandeho nṛpa kiñcitkadāpi ca |
svāyuṣo'nte padmajādyāḥ kṣayamṛcchaṃti pārthiva ||29||
prabhavanti punarviṣṇuharaśakrādaya: surāḥ |
tasmātkāmādikānbhāvāndehavānpratipadyate ||30||
nātra te vismayaḥ kāryaḥ kadācidapi pārthiva |
saṃsāro'yaṃ tu saṃdigdhaḥ kāmakrodhādibhirnṛpa ||31||
durlabhastadvinirmuktaḥ puruṣa: paramārthavit |
yo bibhetīha saṃsāre sa dārānna karotyapi || 32||
vimukta: sarvasaṃgebhyo vicaratyaviśaṃkataḥ |
tasmādbṛhaspaterbhāryā śaśinālaṃbhitā punaḥ ||33||
guruṇālambhitā bhāryā tathā bhrāturyavīyasaḥ |
evaṃ saṃsāracakre'sminrāgalobhādibhirvṛtaḥ ||34||
gārhasthyaṃ ca samāsthāya kathaṃ mukto bhavennaraḥ |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena hitvā saṃsārasāratām ||35||
ārādhayenmaheśānī saccidānandarūpiṇīm |
tanmāyāguṇataśchannaṃ jagadetaccarācaram ||36|
bhramatyunmattavatsarvaṃ madirāmattavannanṛpa |
tasyā ārādhanenaiva guṇānsarvānvimṛdya ca ||37|
muktiṃ bhajeta matimānnānyaḥ paṃthāstvitaḥ paraḥ |
ārādhitā maheśānī na yāvatkurute kṛpām ||38||
tāvadbhavetsukhaṃ kasmātkonyo'sti dayayā yutaḥ |
karuṇāsāgarāmetāṃ bhajettasmādamāyayā ||39||
yasyāstu bhajanenaiva jīvanmuktatvamanute |
mānuṣyaṃ durlabhaṃ prāpya sevitā na maheśvarī ||40||
niḥśreṇikāgrātpatitā atha ityeva vidmahe |
ahaṃkārāvṛtaṃ ityeva vidmahe |
ahaṃkārāvṛtaṃ viśvaṃ guṇatraya manvitam ||41||
asatyenāpi sambaddhaṃ mucyate kathamanyathā |
hitvā sarvaṃ tataḥ sarvaiḥ saṃsevyā bhuvaneśvarī || 42 ||
rājovāca
kiṃ kṛtaṃ guruṇā tatra kāvyarūpadhareṇa ca |
kadā śukraḥ samāyātastanme brūhi pitāmaha || 43 ||
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi yatkṛtaṃ guruṇā tadā |
kṛtvā kāvyasvarūpaṃ ca pracchannena mahātmanā || 44 ||
guruṇā bodhitā daityā matvā kāvyaṃ svakaṃ gurum |
viśvāsa paramaṃ kṛtvā babhūvustanmayāstadā ||45 ||
vidyārthaṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptā bhṛguṃ matvā'timohitāḥ |
guruṇā vipralabdhāste lobhātko vā na muhyati 46 ||
darśavarṣātmake kāle sampūrṇasamaye tadā |
jayaṃtyāsaha krīḍitvā kāvyo yājyānaciṃtayat 47||
āśayā mama mārgaṃ te paśyantaḥ saṃsthitāḥ kila |
gatvā tānvai prapaśye'haṃ yājyānatibhayāturān ||48||
mā devebhyo bhayaṃ teṣāṃ madbhaktānāṃ bhavedāva : saṃcitya buddhimāsthāya jayaṃtīṃ pratyuvāca ha || 49||
devānevopasaṃyānti putrā me cārulocane |
samayaste'dya saṃpūrṇo jāto'yaṃ daśavārṣikaḥ || 50 ||
tasmādgacchāmyahaṃ devi draṣṭuṃ yājyānsumadhyame |
punarevāgamiṣyāmi tavāntikamanudrutaḥ || 51 ||
tatheti tamuvācātha jayantī dharmavittamā |
yatheṣṭaṃ gaccha dharmajña na te dharmaṃ vilopaye ||52||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ kāvyo jagāma tvaritastataḥ |
apaśyaddānavānāṃ ca pārśve vācaspati tadā ||53||

chadmarūpadharaṃ saumyaṃ bodhayaṃtaṃ chalena tān |
jainaṃ dharmaṃ kṛtaṃ svena yajñaniṃdāparaṃ tathā || 54 ||
bho devaripavaḥ satyaṃ bravīmi bhavatāṃ hitam |
ahiṃsā paramo dharmo haṃtavyā hyātatāyinaḥ || 55 ||
dvijairbhogaratairvede darśitaṃ hiṃsanaṃ paśo: |
jihvāsvādaparaiḥ kāmamahisaiva parā matā || 56 ||
evaṃvidhāni vākyāni vedaśāstraparāṇi ca |
bruvāṇaṃ gurumākarṇya vismito'sau bhṛgoḥ sutaḥ || 57||
citayāmāsa manasā mama dveṣyo guruḥ kila |
vaṃcitāḥ kila dhūrtena yājyā me nātra saṃśayaḥ || 58 ||
ghiglobhaṃ pāpabījaṃ vai narakadvāramūrjitam |
gururapyanṛtaṃ brūte prerito yena pāpmanā || 59 ||
pramāṇaṃ vacanaṃ yasya so'pi pākhaṃḍadhārakaḥ |
guruḥ surāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ dharmaśāstrapravartakaḥ ||60 ||
kiṃ kiṃ na labhate lobhānmalinīkṛtamānasaḥ |
anyo'pi gururapyevaṃ jātaḥ pākhaṃḍapaṃḍitaḥ ||61||
śailūṣaceṣṭitaṃ sarvaṃ parigṛhya dvijottamaḥ |
vaṃcayatyatisaṃmūḍhāndaityān yājyānmamāpyasau ||62||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 13||
atha caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
iti saṃcitya manasā tānuvāca hasanniva |
vaṃcitā matsvarūpeṇa daityāḥ kiṃ guruṇā kila ||1||
ahaṃ kāvyo guruścāyaṃ devakārya prasādhaka: |
anena baṃcitā yūyaṃ madyājyā nātra saṃśayaḥ || 2 ||
mā śraddhadhvaṃ vaco'syāryā dāṃbhiko'yaṃ madākṛtiḥ |
anugacchata māṃ yājyāstyajatainaṃ bṛhaspatim ||3||
ityākarṇya vacastasya dṛṣṭvā tau sadṛśau punaḥ |
vismayaṃ paramaṃ jagmaḥ kāvyo'yamiti niścitāḥ || 4 |
sa tānvīkṣya susaṃbhrāṃtāngururvākyamuvāca ha |
gururvī vaṃcayatyeva madrūpo'yaṃ bṛhaspatiḥ ||5||
prāpto vaṃcayituṃ yuṣmāndevakāryārthasiddhaye |
mā viśvāsaṃ vacasyasya kurudhvaṃ daityasattamāḥ ||6 ||
prāptā vidyā mayā śambhoryuṣmānadhyāpayāmi tām |
devebhyo vijayaṃ nūnaṃ kariṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ ||7|| 3
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ kāvyarūpadharasya te |
viśvāsaṃ paramaṃ jagmuḥ kāvyo'yamiti niścayāt ||8||
kāvyena bahudhā tatra bodhitāḥ kila dānavāḥ |
bubudhurna gurormāyā mohitāḥ kālaparyayāt || 9||
evaṃ te niścayaṃ kṛtvā tato bhārgavamabruvan |
ayaṃ gururno dharmātmā buddhiśca hite rataḥ || 10 ||
daśa varṣāṇi satatamayaṃ naḥ śāsti bhārgavaḥ |
gaccha tvaṃ kuhako bhāsi nāsmākaṃ gururapyuta ||11||
ityuktvā bhārgava mūḍhā nirbhartsya ca punaḥ punaḥ |
jagṛhustaṃ guruṃ prītyā praṇipatyābhivādya ca || 12 ||
kāvyastu tanmayāndṛṣṭvā cukopātha śaśāpa ca |
daityānvibodhitānmatvā guruṇā cātivaṃcitān 13||
yasmānmayā bodhitā vai gṛhṇīyurna ca me vacaḥ |
tasmātpranaṣṭasaṃjñā vai parābhavamavāpsyatha || 14 ||
madavajñāphalaṃ kāmaṃ svalpe kāle hyavāpsyatha |
tadā'sya kapaṭaṃ sarvaṃ parijñātaṃ bhaviṣyati || 15 ||

ityuktvā'sau jagāmāśu bhārgavaḥ krodhasaṃyutaḥ |
bṛhaspatirmudaṃ prāpya tasthau tatra samāhitaḥ ||16||
tataḥ śaptāngururjñātvā daityāṃstānbhārgaveṇa hi |
jagāma tarasā tyaktvā svarūpaṃ svaṃ vidhāya ca 17||
gatvovāca tadā śakraṃ kṛtaṃ kāryaṃ mayā dhruvam |
śaptāḥ śukreṇa te daityā mayā tyaktāḥ punaḥ kila ||
nirādhārāḥ kṛtā nūnaṃ yatadhvaṃ surasattamāḥ |
saṃgrāmāya mahābhāga śāpadagdhā mayā kṛtāḥ || 19||
iti śrutvā gurorvākyaṃ maghavā mudamāptavān |
jahṛṣuśca surāḥ sarve pratipūjya bṛhaspatim ||20||
saṃgrāmāya matiṃ cakruḥ saṃvicārya mithaḥ punaḥ |
niryayumilitāḥ sarve dānavābhimukhāḥ surāḥ || 21 ||
surānsamudyatājñātvā kṛtodyogānmahābalān |
antarhitaṃ guruṃ caiva babhūvuścitayānvitāḥ ||22||
parasparamathocuste mohitāstasya māyayā |
saṃprasādyo mahātmā ca yāto'sau naṣṭamānasaḥ ||23|
vaṃcayitvā gataḥ pāpo guruḥ kapaṭapaṃḍitaḥ |
bhrātṛstrīlaṃbhanaḥ prāyo malino'ntarbahiḥ śuciḥ 24||
kiṃ kurmaḥ kva ca gacchāmaḥ kathaṃ kāvyaṃ prakopitam |
kurvīmahi sahāyārthaṃ prasannaṃ hṛṣṭamānasam || 25||
iti saṃcitya te sarve militā bhayakaṃpitāḥ |
prahlādaṃ purataḥ kṛtvā jagmuste bhārgavaṃ punaḥ ||26||
praṇemuścaraṇau tasya munirmonabhṛtastadā |
bhārgavastānuvācātha roṣasaṃraktalocanaḥ ||27||
mayā prabodhitā yūyaṃ mohitā gurumāyayā |
na gṛhītaṃ vaco yogyaṃ tadā yājyā hitaṃ śuci 28 ||
tadā'vagaṇitaścāhaṃ bhavadbhistadvaśaṃ gataiḥ |
prāptaṃ nūnaṃ madonmattairmamāvamānajaṃ phalam ||29||
tatra gacchata sadbhraṣṭā yatrāsau kapaṭākṛtiḥ |
vaṃcaka: surakāryārthī nāhaṃ tadvaddhi vaṃcakaḥ ||30||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ bruvaṃtaṃ śukraṃ tu vākyasaṃdigdhayā girā |
prahlādastaṃ tadovāca gṛhītvā caraṇau tataḥ || 31 ||
prahlāda uvāca
bhārgavādya samāyātānyājyānasmāṃstathāturān |
tyaktuṃ nārhasi sarvajña tvaddhitāṃstanayānhi naḥ 32||
gate tvayi tu maṃtrārthaṃ śailūṣeṇa durātmanā |
tvadveṣamadhurālāpairvayaṃ tena pravaṃcitāḥ ||33||
ajñānakṛtadoṣeṇa naivaṃ kupyati śāṃtimān ! sarvajñastvaṃ vijānāsi cittaṃ naḥ pravaṇaṃ tvati || 34 ||
jñātvā nastapasā bhāvaṃ tyaja kopaṃ mahāmate |
bruvaṃti munayaḥ sarve kṣaṇakopā hi sādhavaḥ || 35||
jalaṃ svabhāvataḥ śītaṃ vahnyātapasamāgamāt |
bhavatyuṣṇaṃ viyogācca śītatvamanugacchati || 36 ||
krodhaścāṃḍālarūpo vai tyaktavyaḥ sarvathā budhaiḥ |
tasmādroṣaṃ parityajya prasādaṃ kuru suvrata ||37||
yadi na tyajasi krodhaṃ tyajasyasmānsuduḥkhitān |
tvayā tyaktā mahābhāga gamiṣyāmo rasātalam 38||
vyāsa uvāca
prahlādasya vacaḥ śrutvā bhārgavo jñānacakṣuṣā |
vilokya sumanā bhūtvā tānuvāca hasanniva || 39 ||

na bhetavyaṃ na gaṃtavyaṃ dānavā vā rasātalam |
rakṣayiṣyāmi vo yājyānmaṃtrairavitathaḥ kila ||40||
hitaṃ satyaṃ bravīmyadya śṛṇudhvaṃ tattu niścayam |
vacanaṃ mama dharmajñāḥ śrutaṃ yadbrahmaṇaḥ purā || 41 ||
avaśyaṃbhāvino bhāvāḥ prabhavaṃti śubhāśubhāḥ |
daivaṃ na cānyathā kartuṃ kṣamaḥ ko'pi dharātale ||42||
adya maṃdabalā yūyaṃ kālayogādasaṃśayam |
devairjitāḥ sakṛccāpi pātālaṃ pratipatsyatha ||43||
prāptaḥ paryāyakālo va iti brahmā'bhyabhāṣata |
bhuktaṃ rājyaṃ bhavadbhiśca pūrṇaṃ sarvaṃ samṛddhimat ||44||
yugāni daśa pūrṇāni devānākramya mūrdhani |
daivayogācca yuṣmābhirbhuktaṃ trailokyamūrjitam ||45||
sārvāṇake mano rājyaṃ punastattu bhaviṣyati |
pautrastrailokyavijayī rājyaṃ prāpsyati te baliḥ 46 ||
yadā vāmanarūpeṇa hṛtaṃ devena viṣṇunā |
tadaiva ca bhavatpautraḥ prokto devena jiṣṇunā ||47 ||
hṛtaṃ yena bale rājyaṃ devavāṃchārthasiddhaye |
tvamindro bhavitā cāgre sthite sāvarṇike manau 48 ||
bhāgava uvāca
ityukto hariṇā pautrastava prahlāda sāṃpratam |
adṛśyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ guptaścarati bhītavat || 49||
ekatā vāsavenāsau balirgardabharūpabhāk |
śūnye gṛhe sthitaḥ kāmaṃ bhayabhītaḥ śatakratoḥ || 50 ||
dṛṣṭaśca bahudhā tena vāsavena balistadā |
kimarthaṃ gārdabhaṃ rūpaṃ kṛtavāndaityapuṃgava || 51 || ||51||
bhoktā tvaṃ sarvalokasya daityānāṃ ca praśāsitā |
" na lajjā khararūpeṇa tava rākṣasasattama || "
tasya tadvacanaṃ śrutvā daityarājo balistadā ||52 ||
provāca vacanaṃ śakraṃ ko'tra śokaḥ śatakrato |
yathā viṣṇurmahātejā matsyakacchapatāṃ gataḥ || 53||
tathā'haṃ khararūpeṇa saṃsthitaḥ kālayogataḥ |
yathā tvaṃ kamale līnaḥ saṃsthito brahmahatyayā ||54||
pīḍitaśca tathā hyadya sthito'haṃ khararūpadhṛk |
daivādhīnasya kiṃ duḥkhaṃ kiṃ sukhaṃ pākaśāsana || 55||
kālaḥ karoti vai nūnaṃ yadicchati yathā tathā |
bhārgava uvāca
iti tau balideveśau kṛtvā saṃvidamuttamām ||56||
prabodhaṃ prāpatuḥ kāmaṃ yathāsthānaṃ ca jagmatuḥ |
ityetatte samākhyātā mayā daivabaliṣṭhatā ||
daivādhīnaṃ jagatsarvaṃ sadevāsuramānuṣam ||57||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskaṃdhe caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 14 ||
atha pañcaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā bhārgavasya mahātmanaḥ |
prahlādastu susaṃhṛṣṭo babhūva nṛpanandana || 1 ||

jñātvā daivaṃ baliṣṭhaṃ ca prahlādastānuvāca ha |
kṛte'pi yuddhe na jayo aviṣyati kadācana ||2||
tadā te jayinaḥ procurdānavā madagarvitāḥ |
saṃgrāmastu prakartavyo daivaṃ kiṃ na vidāmahe || 3 ||
nirudyamānāṃ daivaṃ hi pradhānamasurādhipa |
kena dṛṣṭaṃ kva vā dṛṣṭaṃ kīdṛśaṃ kena nirmitam ||4||
tasmādyuddhaṃ kariṣyāmo balamāsthāya sāṃpratam |
bhavāgre devavarya tvaṃ sarvajño'si mahāmate || 5||
ityuktastaistadā rājanprahlādaḥ prabalāri |
senānī tadā bhūtvā devān yuddhe samāhvayat ||6||
te'pi tatrāsurāndṛṣṭvā saṃgrāme samupasthitān |
sarve saṃbhūtasaṃbhārā devāstānpamayodhayan ||7||
saṃgrāmastu tadā dhoraḥ śakraprahlādayorabhūt |
pūrṇaṃ varṣaśataṃ tatra munīnāṃ vismayāvahaḥ ||8||
vartamāne mahāyuddhe śakreṇa pratipālitāḥ |
jayamāpustadā daityāḥ prahlādapramukhā nṛpa || 9 ||
tadaivendro gurorvākyātsarvaduḥkhavināśinīm |
sasmāra manasā devīṃ muktidāṃ paramāṃ śivām ||10|
indra uvāca
jaya devi mahāmāye śūladhāriṇi cāṃbike |
śaṃkhacakragadāpadmakhaḍgahaste'bhayaprade ||11||
namaste bhuvaneśāni śaktidarśananāyike |
daśatattvātmike mātarmahābindusvarūpiṇi || 12 ||
mahākuṇḍalinīrūpe saccidānandarūpiṇi |
prāṇāgnihotravidye te namo dīpaśikhātmike ||13||
pañcakośāṃtaragate tucche brahmasvarūpiṇi |
ānandakalike mātaḥ sarvopaniṣadacite || 14 ||
mātaḥ prasīda sumukhī bhava hīnasattvāṃstrāyasva no janani daityaparājitān vai |
tvaṃ devi naḥ śaraṇadā bhavane pramāṇā śaktā'si duḥkhaśamane'khilavīryayukte || 15 ||
dhyāyaṃti yespi sukhino nitarāṃ bhavaṃti duḥkhānvitā vigataśokabhayāstathā'nye |
mokṣārthino vigatamānavimuktasaṃgāḥ saṃsāravāridhijalaṃ prataraṃti saṃtaḥ ||16||
tvaṃ devi viśvajanani prathitaprabhāvā saṃrakṣaṇārthamuditā''tiharapratāpā |
saṃhartumetadakhilaṃ kila kālarūpā ko vetti te'mba caritaṃ nanu maṃdabuddhiḥ || 17||
brahmā haraśca haridaśvaratho hariśva indro yamo'tha varuṇo'gnisamīraṇau ca |
jñātuṃ kṣamā na munayo'pi mahānubhāvā yasyāḥ prabhāvamatulaṃ nigamāgamāśca || 18 ||
dhanyāsta eva tava bhaktiparā mahāṃta: saṃsāraduḥkharahitāḥ sukhasiṃdhumagnāḥ |
ye bhaktibhāvarahitā na kadāpi duḥkhāṃbhodhi janikṣayataraṃgamume taraṃti ||19||
ye vījyamānāḥ sitacāmaraiśca krīḍaṃti dhanyāḥ śivikādhirūḍhāḥ |
taiḥ pūjitā tvaṃ kila pūrvadehe nānopahārairiti cintayāmi ||20||
ye pūjyamānā varavāraṇasthā vilāsino vṛṃdavilāsayuktāḥ |
sāmāntakaiśvopanatairvrajanti manye hi taistvaṃ kila pūjitā'si ||21||

vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ stutā maghavatā devī viśveśvarī tadā |
prādurbabhūva tarasā siṃhārūḍhā caturbhujā ||22||
śaṃkhacakragadāpadmānbibhratī cārulocanā |
raktāṃbaradharā devī divyamālyavibhūṣaṇā ||23||
tānuvāca surāndevā prasannavadanā girā |
bhayaṃ tyajaṃtu bho devāḥ śaṃ vidhāsye kilādhunā ||24||
ityuktvā sā tadā devī siṃhārūḍhātisundarī |
jagāma tarasā tatra yatra daityā madānvitāḥ ||25||
prahlādapramukhāḥ sarve dṛṣṭvā devīṃ puraḥ sthitām |
ūcuḥ parasparaṃ bhītāḥ kiṃ kartavyamitastadā ||26||
devaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ cātra saṃprāptā caṃḍikā kila |
mahiṣāṃtakarī nūnaṃ caṃḍamuṃḍavināśinī || 27 ||
nihaniṣyati naḥ sarvānaṃbikā nātra saṃśayaḥ |
vakradṛṣṭayā yayā pūrvaṃ nihatau madhukaiṭabhau ||28||
evaṃ cintāturān vīkṣya prahlādastānuvāca ha |
yoddhavyaṃ nātha gaṃtavyaṃ palāyya dānavottamāḥ ||29||
palāyanaparāniha |
haniṣyati jaganmātā ruṣitā kila hetibhiḥ || 30||
namucistānuvācātha
tathā kuru mahābhāga yathā duḥkhaṃ na jāyate |
vrajāmo'dyaiva pātālaṃ tāṃ stutvā tadanujñayā || 31||
prahlāda uvāca
staumi devī mahāmāyāṃ sṛṣṭisthityantakāriṇīm |
sarveṣā jananīṃ śakti bhaktānāmabhayaṃkarīm || 32||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā viṣṇubhaktastu prahlādaḥ paramārthavit |
tuṣṭāva jagatāṃ dhātrīṃ kṛtāñjalipuṭastadā ||33||
mālā sarpavadābhāti yasyāṃ sarvaṃ carācaram |
sarvādhiṣṭhānarūpāyai tasyai hrīṃmūrtaye namaḥ || 34||
tvattaḥ sarvamidaṃ viśvaṃ sthāvaraṃ jaṃgamaṃ tathā |
anye nimittamātrāstaṃ kartārastava nirmitāḥ ||35||
namo devi mahāmāye sarveṣāṃ jananī smṛtā |
ko bhedastava deveṣu daityeṣu svakṛteṣu ca || 36 ||
mātuḥ putreṣu ko bhedo'pyaśubheṣu śubheṣu ca |
tathaiva deveṣvasmāsu na kartavyastvayā'dhunā ||37||
yādṛśāstādṛśā mātaḥ sutāste dānavāḥ kila |
yatastvaṃ viśvajananī purāṇeṣu prakīrtitā ||38||
te'pi svārthaparā nūnaṃ tathaiva vayamapyuta |
nāṃtaraṃ daityasurayorbhedo'yaṃ mohasaṃbhavaḥ ||39||
dhanadārādibhogeṣu vayaṃ saktā divāniśam |
tathaiva devā deveśi ko bhedo'suradevayoḥ ||40||
te'pi kaśyapadāyādā vayaṃ tatsaṃbhavāḥ kila |
kuto virodhasaṃbhūtirjātā mātastavādhunā || 41 ||
na tathā vihitaṃ mātastvayi sarvasamudbhavaṃ |
sāmyataiva tvayā sthāpyā deveṣvasmāsu caiva hi ||42||
guṇavyatikarātsarve samṛtpannāḥ surāsurāḥ |
guṇānvitā bhaveyuste kathaṃ dehabhṛto'marāḥ ||43||
kāmaḥ krodhaśca lobhaśca sarvadeheṣu saṃsthitāḥ |
vartante sarvadā tasmātko'virodhī bhavejjanaḥ ||44||
tvayā mitho virodho'yaṃ kalpitaḥ kila kautukāt |
manyāmahe vibhedena nūnaṃ yuddhadidṛkṣa || 45 ||
anyathā khalu bhrātṝṇāṃ virodhaḥ kīdṛśo'nadhe |
tvaṃ cenecchasi cāmuṃḍe vīkṣituṃ kalahaṃ kila || 46 ||

jānāmi dharmaṃ dharmajñe vedmi cāhaṃ śatakratum |
tathāpi kalaho'smākaṃ bhogārthaṃ devi sarvadā || 47||
eka: ko'pi na śāstā'sti saṃsāre tvāṃ vinā'mbike |
spṛhāvatastu kaḥ kartuṃ kṣamate vacanaṃ budhaḥ || 48 ||
devāsurairayaṃ siṃdhurmathitaḥ samaye kvacit |
viṣṇunā vihito bhedaḥ sudhāratnacchalena vai ||49||
tvayā'sau kalpitaḥ śauriḥ pālakatve jagadguruḥ |
tena lakṣmīḥ svayaṃ lobhādgṛhītā'marasundarī || 50 ||
airāvatastathendreṇa pārijāto'tha kāmadhuk |
surairuccaiḥśravāḥ sarvaṃ gṛhītaṃ vaiṣṇavecchayā || 51 ||
anayaṃ tādṛśaṃ kṛtvā jātā devāstu sādhavaḥ |
" anyāyinaḥ surā nūnaṃ paśya tvaṃ dharmalakṣaṇam ||"
saṃsthāpitāḥ surā nūnaṃ viṣṇunā bahumāninā || 52 ||
nūnaṃ daityāḥ parābhūvanpaśya tvaṃ dharmalakṣaṇam |
kva dharmaḥ kīdṛśo dharmaḥ kva kāryaṃ kva ca sādhutā ||
kathayāmi ca kasyāgre siddhaṃ maimāṃsikaṃ matam |
tārkikā yuktivādajñā vidhijñā vedavādakāḥ || 54 ||
uktāḥ sakartṛkaṃ viśvaṃ vivadate jaḍātmakāḥ |
kartā bhavati cedasminsaṃsāre vitate kila || 55 ||
virodhaḥ kīdṛśastatra caikakarmaṇi vaṃ mithaḥ |
vedenaikamatiḥ kasmācchāstreṣvapi tathā punaḥ || 56||
naikavākyaṃ vacasteṣāmapi vedavidāṃ punaḥ |
yataḥ svārthaparaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsthāvarajaṃgamam ||57||
niḥspṛhaḥ ko'pi saṃsāre na bhavenna bhaviṣyati |
śaśinātha gurorbhāryā hṛtā jñātvā balādapi || 58 ||
gautamasya tathendreṇa jānatā dharmaniścayam |
guruṇā'nujabhāryā ca bhuktā garbhavatī balāt || 59||
śapto garbhagato bālaḥ kṛtāṃdhastathā punaḥ |
viṣṇunā ca śiraśchinnaṃ rāhoścakreṇa vai balāt || 60||
aparādhaṃ binā kāmaṃ tadā sattvavatāmbike |
pautro dharmavatāṃ śūraḥ satyavataparāyaṇaḥ || 61||
yajvā dānapatiḥ śāṃtaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarvapūjakaḥ |
kṛtvā'tha vāmanaṃ rūpaṃ hariṇā chalavedinā || 62 ||
vaṃcito'sau baliḥ sarvaṃ hṛtaṃ rājyaṃ purā kila |
tathāpi devāndharmasthānpravadati manīṣiṇaḥ ||63||
vadaṃti cāṭuvādāṃśca dharmavādāayaṃ gatāḥ |
evaṃ jñātvā jaganmātaryathecchasi tathā kuru ||64||
śaraṇā dānavāḥ sarve jahi vā rakṣa vā punaḥ |
śrīdevyuvāca
sarve gacchata pātālaṃ tatra vāsaṃ yathepsitam || 65 ||
kurudhvaṃ dānavāḥ sarve nirbhayā gatamanyavaḥ |
kālaḥ pratīkṣyo yuṣmābhiḥ kāraṇaṃ sa śubhe'śubhe ||
sunirvedaparāṇāṃ hi sukhaṃ sarvatra sarvadā |
trailokyasya ca rājye'pi na sukhaṃ lobhacetasām ||
kṛte'pi na sukhaṃ pūrṇaṃ saspṛhāṇāṃ phalairapi |
tasmāttyaktvā mahīmetāṃ prayātvadya mahītalam || 68 ||
mamājñāṃ purataḥ kṛtvā sarve vigatakalmaṣāḥ |

vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ devyāstathetyuktvā rasātalam || 69||
praṇamya dānavāḥ sarve gatāḥ śaktyā'bhirakṣitāḥ |
antardadhe tato devī devā: svabhuvanaṃ gatāḥ || 70 ||
tyaktvā vairaṃ sthitāḥ sarve te tadā devadānavāḥ |
etadākhyānamakhilaṃ yaḥ śṛṇoti vadatyatha ||
sarvaduḥkhavinirmuktaḥ prayāti padamuttamam ||71||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskaṃdhe pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 15 ||
atha ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
bhṛguśāpānmuniśreṣṭha hareradbhutakarmaṇaḥ |
avatārāḥ kathaṃ jātāḥ kasminmanvantare vibho ||1||
vistarādvadva dharmajña avatārakathāṃ hareḥ |
pāpanāśakarīṃ brahmañchrutāṃ sarvasukhāvahām ||2||
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi avatārān hareryathā |
yasminmanvantare jātā yuge yasminnarādhipa || 3||
yena rūpeṇa yatkāryaṃ kṛtaṃ nārāyaṇena vai |
tatsarvaṃ nṛpa vakṣyāmi saṃkṣepeṇa tavādhunā ||4||
dharmasyaivāvatāro'bhūccākṣuṣe manusaṃbhave |
naranārāyaṇī dharmaputro khyātau mahītale ||5||
atha vaivasvatākhye'smindvitīye tu yuge punaḥ |
dattātreyo'vatāro'treḥ putratvamagamaddhariḥ ||6||
brahmā viṣṇustathā rudrastrayo'mī devasattamāḥ |
putratvamagamandevāstasyātrerbhāryayā vṛtāḥ ||7||
anasūyā'tripatnī ca satīnāmuttamā satī |
yayā saṃprārthitā devāḥ putratvamagamaṃstrayaḥ || 8 ||
brahmā'bhūtsomarūpastu dattātreyo hariḥ svayam |
durvāsā rudrarūpo'sau putratvaṃ te prapedire ||9||
nṛsiṃhasyāvatārastu devakāryārthasiddhaye |
caturthe tu yuge jāto dvidhārūpo manoharaḥ ||10||
hiraṇyakaśipoḥ samyagvadhāya bhagavān hariḥ |
cakre rūpaṃ nārasiṃhaṃ devānāṃ vismayapradam ||11||
balerniyamanārthāya śreṣṭhe tretāyuge tathā |
cakāra rūpaṃ bhagavān vāmanaṃ kaśyapānmuneḥ ||12||
chalayitvā makhe bhūpaṃ rājyaṃ tasya jahāra ha |
pātāle sthāpayāmāsa baliṃ vāmanarūpadhṛk || 13||
yuge caikonaviṃśe'tha tretākhye bhagavān hariḥ |
jamadagnisuto jāto rāmo nāma mahābalaḥ || 14 ||
kṣatriyāṃtakaraḥ śrīmānsatyavādī jiteṃdriyaḥ |
dattavānmedinīṃ kṛtsnāṃ kaśyapāya mahātmane ||15||
yo vai paraśurāmākhyo hareradbhutakarmaṇaḥ |
avatārastu rājeṃdra kathitaḥ pāpanāśanaḥ || 16 ||
tretāyuge raghovaṃśe rāmo daśarathātmajaḥ |
naranārāyaṇāṃśau dvau jāto bhuvi mahābalau || 17 ||

aṣṭāviṃśe yuge śasto dvāpare'rjunaśauriṇī |
dharābhārāvatārārthaṃ jāto kṛṣṇārjunau bhuvi || 18 ||
kṛtavaṃtau mahāyuddhaṃ kurukṣetre'tidāruṇam |
evaṃ yuge yuge rājannavatārā hareḥ kila || 19||
bhavaṃti bahavaḥ kāmaṃ prakṛteranurūpataḥ |
prakṛterakhilaṃ sarvaṃ vaśametajjagattrayam ||20||
yathecchati tadaiveyaṃ bhrāmayatyaniśaṃ jagat |
puruṣasya niyārtha sā racayatyakhilaṃ jagat ||21||
dṛṣṭvā purā hi bhagavāñjagadetaccarācaram |
sarvādiḥ sarvagaśvāsau durjeyaḥ paramo'vyayaḥ || 22 ||
nirālaṃbo nirākāro niḥspṛhaśca parātparaḥ |
upādhitastridhā bhāti yasyāḥ sā prakṛtiḥ parā ||23||
utpattikālayogātmā bhinnā bhāti śivā tadā |
sā viśvaṃ kurute kāmaṃ sā pālayati kāmadā || 24||
kalpānte saṃharatyeva trirūpā viśvamohinī |
tayā yukto'sṛjadbrahmā viṣṇuḥ pāti tayānvitaḥ 25||
rudraḥ saṃharate kāmaṃ tayā saṃmilitaḥ śivaḥ |
sā caivotpādya kākutsthaṃ purā vai nṛpasattamam ||26||
kutracitsthāpayāmāsa dānavānāṃ jayāya ca |
evamasmina saṃsāre sukhaduḥkhāditāḥ kila ||
bhavaṃti prāṇinaḥ sarve vidhitaṃtraniyaṃtritāḥ ||27||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskaṃdhe ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 16 ||
atha saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
vārāṃganāstvayā khyātā naranārāyaṇāśrame |
ekaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ śāṃtaṃ kāmayānāḥ smarāturāḥ || 1||
śaptukāmastadā jāto munirnārāyaṇaśca tāḥ |
nivārito nareṇātha bhrātrā dharmavidā nṛpa ||2||
kiṃ kṛtaṃ muninā tena vyasane samupasthite |
tābhiḥ saṃkalpitenātha kāmārthābhirbhṛśaṃ mune || 3 ||
śakreṇotpāditābhiśca bahuprārthanayā punaḥ |
yācitena vivāhārthaṃ kiṃ kṛtaṃ tena jiṣṇunā ||4|
ityetacchrotumicchāmi caritaṃ tasya mokṣadam |
nārāyaṇasya me brūhi vistareṇa pitāmaha ||5||
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi yathā tasya mahātmanaḥ |
dharmaputrasya dharmajña vistareṇa vadāmi te || 6 |
śaptukāmastu saṃdṛṣṭo nareṇātha yadā hariḥ |
vārito'sau samāśvāsya munirnārāyaṇastadā ||7||
śāṃtakopastadovāca tāstapasvī mahāmuniḥ |
smitapūrvamidaṃ vākyaṃ madhuraṃ dharmanandanaḥ || 8||
asmiñjanmani cāvaṃgyaḥ kṛtasaṃkalpavānaham |
āvābhyāṃ ca na kartavyaḥ sarvathā dārasaṃgrahaḥ ||9||
tasmādgacchaṃtu tridivaṃ kṛpāṃ kṛtvā mamopari |
dharmajñā na prakurvanti vratabhaṃgaṃ parasya vai || 10||
śṛṃgāre'sminra se nūnaṃ sthāyībhāvo ratiḥ smṛtaḥ |
kathaṃ karomi saṃbaṃdhaṃ tadabhāve sulocanāḥ || 11 ||
kāraṇena vinā kāryaṃ na bhavediti niścayaḥ |
kavibhiḥ kathitaṃ śāstre sthāyībhāvo rasaḥ kila 12 ||

dhanyaḥ sucārusarvāṃgaḥ sabhāgyo'haṃ dharātale |
prītipātraṃ yato jāto bhavatīnāmakṛtrimam ||13||
bhavatībhiḥ kṛpāṃ kṛtvā rakṣaṇīyaṃ vrataṃ mama |
bhaviṣyāmi mahābhāgāḥ patirapyanyajanmani || 14 ||
aṣṭāviṃśe viśālākṣyo dvāpare'smindharātale |
devānāṃ kāryasiddhayarthaṃ prabhaviṣyāmi sarvathā || 15 ||
tadā bhavatyo maddārāḥ prāpya janma pṛthakpṛthak |
bhūpatīnāṃ sutā bhūtvā patnībhāvaṃ gamiṣyatha || 16 ||
ityāśvāsya haristāstu pratiśrutya parigraham |
vyasarjayatsa bhagavāñjagmuśva vigatajvarāḥ ||17||
evaṃ visarjitāstena gatāḥ svargaṃ tadāṃganāḥ |
śakrāya kathayāmāsuḥ kāraṇaṃ sakalaṃ punaḥ || 18 ||
āśrutya maghavā tābhyo vṛttāṃtaṃ tasya vistarāt |
tuṣṭāva taṃ mahātmānaṃ nārīrdaṣṭā tathorvaśīḥ || 19||
indra uvāca
aho dhairyaṃ muneḥ kāmaṃ tathaiva ca tapobalam |
yenorvaśyaḥ svatapasā tādugrūpāḥ prakalpitāḥ ||20||
iti stutvā prasannātmā babhūva surarāṭ tataḥ |
nārāyaṇo'pi dharmātmā tapasyabhirato'bhavat ||21||
ityetatsarvamākhyātaṃ munervṛttāṃtamadbhutam |
nārāyaṇasya sakalaṃ narasya ca mahāmune ||22||
tau hi kṛṣṇārjunau vīrau bhūbhāraharaṇāya ca |
jātau to bharataśreṣṭha bhṛgoḥ śāpavaśādiha || 23||
rājovāca
kṛṣṇāvatāracaritaṃ vistareṇa vadasva me |
saṃdeho mama citte'sti taṃ nivāraya mānada ||24||
yayoḥ putratvamāpannau haryaṃnaṃtau mahābalau |
devakīvasudevo to duḥkhabhājau kathaṃ mune || 25 ||
kaṃsena nigaḍe baddho pīḍito bahubatsarān |
yayoḥ putro hariḥ sākṣāttapasā toṣito'bhavat 26 ||
jāto'sau mathurāyāṃ tu gokule sa kathaṃ gataḥ |
kaṃsaṃ hatvā dvāravatyāṃ nivāsaṃ kṛtavānkatham || 27||
pitrādisevitaṃ deśaṃ samṛddhaṃ pāvanaṃ kila |
tyaktvā deśāṃtare'nārya gatavānsa kathaṃ hariḥ || 28 ||
kulaṃ ca dvijaśāpena kathamutsāditaṃ hareḥ |
bhārāvatāraṇaṃ kṛtvā vāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ ||29||
dehaṃ mumoca tarasā jagāma ca divaṃ hariḥ |
pāpiṣṭhānāṃ va bhāreṇa vyākulā'bhūcca medinī 30 ||
te hatā vāsudevena pārthenāmitakarmaṇā |
luṃṭhitā yairhareḥ patnyaste kathaṃ na nipātitāḥ ||31||
bhīṣmī droṇastathā karṇo bāhlīkopyatha pārthivaḥ |
vairāṭo'tha vikarṇaśca dhṛṣṭadyumnaśca pārthivaḥ || 32||
somadattādayaḥ sarve nihatāḥ samare nṛpa |
teṣāmuttārito bhāravīrāgāṃ na hṛtaḥ katham ||33||
kṛṣṇapatnyaḥ kathaṃ duḥkhaṃ prāptāḥ prāṃte patitratāḥ |
saṃdeho'yaṃ muniśreṣṭha citte me parivartate || 34||
vasudevastu dharmātmā putraduḥkhena tāpitaḥ |
tyaktavānsa kathaṃ prāṇānapamṛtyuṃ jagāma ha || 35 ||
pāṃḍavā dharmasaṃyuktāḥ kṛṣṇe ca niratāḥ sadā |
te kathaṃ duḥkhabhoktāro hyabhavanmunisattama ||36||
draupadī ca mahābhāgā kathaṃ duḥkhasya bhāginī |
vedīmadhyācca saṃjātā lakṣmyaṃśasaṃbhavā kila || 37||
sabhāyāṃ ca samānītā rajodoṣasamanvitā |
bālā duḥśāsanenātha keśagrahaṇakaśitā ||38||

pīḍitā siṃdhurājñā'tha vanamadhyagatā satī |
tathaiva kocakenāpi pīḍitā rudatī bhṛśam || 39||
putrāḥ paṃcaiva tasyāstu nihatā drauṇinā gṛhe |
subhadrāyāḥ suto yuddhe bāla eva nipātitaḥ || 40 ||
tathā ca devakīputrāḥ ṣaṭ kaṃsena niṣūditāḥ |
samarthenāpi hariṇā daivena kṛtamanyathā || 41||
yādavānāṃ tathā śāpaḥ prabhāse nidhanaṃ punaḥ |
kulakṣayastathā tīvrastatpatnīnāṃ ca luṃṭhanam ||42||
viṣṇunā ceśvareṇāpi sākṣānnārāyaṇena ca |
ugrasenasya sevā vai dāsavatsatataṃ kṛtā ||43||
saṃdeho'yaṃ mahābhāga tatra nārāyaṇe munau |
sarva jaṃtusamānatvaṃ vyavahāre niraṃtaram ||44 ||
harṣaśokādayo bhāvāḥ sarveṣāṃ sadṛśāḥ katham |
īśvarasya harerjātā kathamapyanyathā matiḥ || 45 ||
tasmādvistarato brūhi kṛṣṇasya caritaṃ mahat |
alaukikena hariṇā kṛtaṃ karma mahītale ||46||
hatā āyuḥ kṣaye daityāḥ kleśena mahatā punaḥ |
kvaiśvaryaśaktiḥ prathitā hariṇā munisattama || 47||
rukmiṇīharaṇe nūnaṃ gṛhītvā'tha palāyanam |
kṛtaṃ hi vāsudevena cauravaccaritaṃ tadā ||48 ||
mathurāmaṃḍalaṃ tyaktvā samṛddhaṃ kulasaṃmatam |
jarāsaṃdhabhayāttena dvārakāgamanaṃ kṛtam ||49||
tadā kenāpi na jñāto bhagavānharirīśvaraḥ |
kiṃcitprabrūhi me brahmakāraṇaṃ vrajagopanam ||50 ||
ete cānye ca bahavaḥ saṃdehā vāsavīsuta |
nāśayādya mahābhāga sarvajño'si dvijottama || 51 ||
gopyastathaikaḥ saṃdeho hṛdayānna nivartate |
pāṃcālyā: paṃcabhartṛtvaṃ loke kiṃ na jugupsitam 52 ||
sadācāraṃ pramāṇaṃ hi pravadaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ |
paśudharmaḥ kathaṃ taistu samarthairapi saṃśritaḥ || 53 ||
bhīṣmeṇāpi kṛtaṃ kiṃ vā devarūpeṇa bhūtale |
golakau tau samutpādya yattu vaṃśasya rakṣaṇam ||54||
dhigdharmanirṇayaḥ kāmaṃ munibhiḥ paridarśitaḥ |
yena kenāpyupāyena putrotpādanalakṣaṇaḥ || 55||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 17 ||
atha aṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi kṛṣṇasya caritaṃ mahat |
avatārakāraṇaṃ caiva devyāścaritamadbhutam || 1 ||
dharaikadā bharākrāṃtā rudatī cātikaśitā |
gorūpadhāriṇī dīnā bhītā'gacchattriviṣṭapam ||2||
pṛṣṭā śakreṇa kiṃ te'dya vartate bhayamityatha |
kena vai pīḍitā'si tvaṃ kiṃ te duḥkhaṃ vasuṃdhare || 3 |
tacchrutvelā tadovāca śṛṇu deveśa me'khilam |
duḥkhaṃ pṛcchasi yattvaṃ me bhārākrāṃtā'smi mānada ||4||
jarāsaṃdha mahāpāpī māgadheṣu patirmama |
śiśupālastathā caidyaḥ kāśirājaḥ pratāpavān ||5||
rukmī ca balavānkaṃso narakaśca mahābalaḥ |
śālvaḥ saubhapatiḥ krūraḥ keśī dhenukavatsakau || 6||
sarve dharmavihīnāśca parasparavirodhina: |
pāpācārā madonmattāḥ kālarūpāśca pārthivāḥ ||7||

tairahaṃ pīḍitā śakra bhārākrāṃtā'kṣamā vibho |
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi ciṃtā me mahatī sthitā || 8||
pīḍitā'haṃ varāheṇa viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā |
śakra jānīhi hariṇā duḥkhāduḥkhataraṃ gatā || 9 ||
yātā'haṃ duṣṭadaityena kaśyapasyātmajena vai |
hṛtā'haṃ hiraṇyākṣeṇa magnā tasminmahārṇave || 10 ||
tadā sūkararūpeṇa viṣṇunā nihato'pyasau |
uddhṛtā'haṃ varāheṇa sthāpitā hi sthirā kṛtā || 11 ||
nocedrasātale svasthā sthitā syāṃ sukhaśāyinī |
na śaktā'smyadya deveśa bhāraṃ voḍhuṃ durātmanām ||12||
agre dṛṣṭaḥ samāyāti hyaṣṭāviṃśastathā kaliḥ |
tadā'haṃ pīḍitā śakra gaṃtā'smyāśu rasātalam ||13||
tasmāttvaṃ devadeveśa duḥkharūpārṇavasya ca |
pārado bhava bhāraṃ me hara pādo namāmi te || 14 ||
indra uvāca
ile ki te karomyadya brahmāṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja |
ahaṃ tatrāgamiṣyāmi sa te duḥkhaṃ hariṣyati || 15||
tacchrutvā tvaritā pṛthvī brahmalokaṃ gatā tadā |
śakro'pi pṛṣṭhataḥ prāptaḥ sarvadevapuraḥsaraḥ || 16 ||
surabhīmāgatāṃ tatra dṛṣvovāca prajāpatiḥ |
mahīṃ jñātvā mahārāja dhyānena samupasthitām || 17||
kasmādrudasi kalyāṇi kiṃ te duḥkhaṃ vadādhunā |
pīḍitā'si ca kena tvaṃ pāpācāreṇa bhūrvada || 18 ||
dharovāca
kalirāyāti dṛṣṭo'yaṃ bibhemi tadbhayādaham |
pāpācārāḥ prajāstatra bhaviṣyanti jagatpate || 19||
rājānaśca durācārāḥ parasparavirodhinaḥ |
caurakarmaratāḥ sarva rākṣasāḥ pūrṇavairiṇaḥ ||20||
tānhatvā nṛpatīnbhāraṃ hara me'dya pitāmaha |
pīḍitā'smi mahārāja sainyabhāreṇa bhūbhṛtām ||21||
brahmovāca
nāhaṃ śaktastathā devi bhārāvataraṇe tava |
gacchāvaḥ sadanaṃ viṣṇordevadevasya cakriṇaḥ ||22||
sa te bhārāpanodaṃ vai kariṣyati janārdanaḥ |
pūrvaṃ mayāpi te kāryaṃ cintitaṃ suvicārya ca ||23||
tatra gacchaṃ suraśreṣṭha yatra devo janārdanaḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā vedakartā'sau puraskṛtya surāṃca gām ||24||
jagāma viṣṇu sadanaṃ haṃsārūḍhaścaturmukhaḥ |
tuṣṭāva vedavākyaiśca bhaktipravaṇamānasaḥ || 25 ||
brahmovāca
sahasraśīrṣāstvamasi sahasrākṣaḥ sahasrapāt |
tvaṃ vedapuruṣaḥ pūrvaṃ devadevaḥ sanātanaḥ || 26 ||
bhūtapūrvaṃ bhaviṣyacca vartamānaṃ ca yadvibho |
amaratvaṃ tvayā dattamasmākaṃ ca ramāpate ||27||
etāvānmahimā te'sti ko na vetti jagattraye |
tvaṃ kartā'pyavitā hartā tvaṃ sarvagatirīśvaraḥ || 28||

vyāsa uvāca
itīḍitaḥ prabhurviṣṇuḥ prasanno garuḍadhvajaḥ |
darśanaṃ ca dadau tebhyo brahmādibhyo'malāśayaḥ ||29||
papraccha svāgataṃ devānprasannavadano hariḥ |
tatastvāgamane teṣāṃ kāraṇaṃ ca savistaram ||30||
tamuvācānjajo natvā dharāduḥkhaṃ ca saṃsmaran |
bhārāvataraṇaṃ viṣṇo kartavyaṃ te janārdana ||31||
bhuvi dhṛtvā'vatāraṃ tvaṃ dvāparānte samāgate |
hatvā duṣṭānnṛpānurvyā hara bhāraṃ dayānidhe || 32 ||
viṣṇuruvāca
nāhaṃ svatantra evātra nana śivastathā |
nendro'gnirna yamastvaṣṭā na sūryo varuṇastathā || 33||
yogamāyāvaśe sarvamidaṃ sthāvarajaṅgamam |
brahmādistamva paryantaṃ grathitaṃ guṇasūtrataḥ ||34||
yathā sā svacchayā pūrvaṃ kartumicchati suvrata |
tathā karoti sahitā vayaṃ sarve'pi tadṛśāḥ ||35||
yadyahaṃ syāṃ svatantro vai citayantu dhiyā kila |
kuto'bhavaṃ matsyavapuḥ kacchapo vā mahārṇave || 36 ||
tiryagyoniṣu ko bhogaḥ kā kīrtiḥ kiṃ sukhaṃ punaḥ |
ki puṇyaṃ kiṃ phalaṃ tatra kṣudrayonigatasya me ||37||
kolo vā'tha nṛsiṃho vā vāmano vā'bhavaṃ kutaḥ |
jamadagnisutaḥ kasmātsambhaveyaṃ pitāmaha || 38 ||
nṛśaṃsaṃ vā kathaṃ karma kṛtavānasmi bhūtale |
kṣatajaistu hradānsarvānpūrayeyaṃ kathaṃ punaḥ ||39||
tatkathaṃ jamadagneśca putro bhūtvā dvijottamaḥ |
kṣatriyānhatavānājī nirdayo garbhagānapi || 40 ||
rāmo bhūtvā'tha devendra prāviśadaṃḍakaṃ vanam |
padātivīra vāsāśra jaṭāvalkalavānpunaḥ || 41 ||
asahāyo hyapātheyo bhīpaṇe nirjana vane |
kurvannākheṭakaṃ tatra vyacaraṃ vigatatrapaḥ || 42 ||
jñātavānmṛgaṃ haimaṃ māyayā pihitastadā |
uṭaje jānakīṃ tyaktvā nirgatastatpadānugaḥ || 43 ||
lakṣmaṇo'pi ca tāṃ tyaktvā nirgato matpadānugaḥ |
vārito'pi mayā'tyarthaṃ mohitaḥ prākṛtairguṇaiḥ || 44||
bhikṣurūpaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā rāvaṇaḥ kapaṭākṛtiḥ |
jahāra tarasā rakṣo jānakī śokakarśitām ||45||
dukhārtena mayā tatra ruditaṃ ca vane vane |
sugrīveṇa ca mitratvaṃ kṛtaṃ kāryavānmayā ||46 ||
anyāyena hato vālā śāpāccaiva nivāritaḥ |
sahāyānvānarānkṛtvā laṃkāyāṃ calitaṃ punaḥ || 47 ||
baddho'haṃ nāgapāśaiśca lakṣmaṇaśca mamānujaḥ |
visaṃjñau patitau dṛṣṭvā vānarā vismayaṃ gatāḥ ||48||
garuḍena tadā''gatya mocitau bhrātarau kila |
citā me mahatī jātā daivaṃ ki vā kariṣyati || 49||
hṛtaṃ rājyaṃ vane vāso mṛtaḥ tātaḥ priyā hṛtā |
yuddhaṃ kaṣṭaṃ dadātyevamagre kiṃ vā kariṣyati || 50||
prathamaṃ tu mahāduḥ khamarājyasya vanāśrayam |
rājaputryā'nvitasyaiva dhanahīnaśca nirgataḥ || 51 ||
varāṭikā'pi pitrā me na dattā vananirgame |
padātirasahāyo'haṃ dhanahīnaśca nirgataḥ || 52||
caturdaśaiva varṣāṇi nītāni ca tadā mayā |
kṣātraṃ dharmaṃ parityajya vyādhavṛttyā mahāvane ||53||
daivādyuddhe jayaḥ prāpto nihato'sau mahāsuraḥ |
ānītā ca punaḥ sītā prāptā'yodhyā mayā tathā 54||

varṣāṇi katicittatra sukhaṃ saṃsārasaṃbhavam |
prāptaṃ rājyaṃ ca sampūrṇa kosalānavitiṣṭatā || 55 ||
puraiva vartamānena prāptarājyena vai tadā |
lokāpavādabhītena tyaktā sītā vane mayā || 56 ||
kāṃtāvirahajaṃ duḥkhaṃ punaḥ prāptaṃ durāsadam |
pātālaṃ sā gatā paścāddharāṃ bhittvā dharātmajā 57||
evaṃ rāmāvatāre'pi duḥkhaṃ prāptaṃ niraṃtaram |
parataṃtreṇa me nūnaṃ svatantraḥ ko bhavettadā || 58 ||
paścātkālavaśātprāptaḥ svargo me bhrātṛbhiḥ saha |
parataṃtrasya kā vārtā vaktavyā vibudhena vai || 59 ||
paratantro'smyahaṃ nūnaṃ padmayone niśāmaya |
tathā tvamapi rudraśca sarve cānye surottamāḥ || 50 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe'ṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 18 ||
atha ekonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā bhagavānviṣṇuḥ punarāha prajāpatim |
yanmāyāmohitaḥ sarvastattvaṃ jānāti no janaḥ ||1||
vayaṃ māyāvṛtāḥ kāmaṃ na smarāmo jagadgurum |
paramaṃ puruṣaṃ śāṃtaṃ saccidānandamavyayam ||2||
ahaṃ viṣṇurahaṃ brahmā śivo'hamiti mohitāḥ |
na jānīmo vayaṃ dhātaḥ paraṃ vastu sanātanam ||3||
yanmāyāmohitaścāhaṃ sadā varte parātmanaḥ |
paravān dārupāṃcālī māyikasya yathā vaśe ||4||
bhavatā'pi tathā dṛṣṭā vibhūtistasya cādbhutā |
kalpādī bhavayuktena mayā'pi ca sutrārṇave ||5||
maṇidvīpe'tha mandāraviṭape rāsamaṇḍale |
samāje tatra sā dṛṣṭā śrutā na vacasāpi ca || 6 ||
tasmāttāṃ paramāṃ śakti smaraṃtvadya surāḥ śivām |
sarvakāmapradāṃ māyāmādyāṃ śakti parātmanaḥ ||7||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktā hariṇā devā brahmādyā bhuvaneśvarīm |
sasmarmanasā devoṃ yogamāyāṃ sanātanam ||8||
smṛtamātrā tadā devī pratyakṣaṃ darśanaṃ dadau |
pāśāṅkuśavarābhītidharā devī napāruṇā ||
dṛṣṭvā pramuditā devāstuṣṭuvustāṃ sudarśanā || 2 ||
devā ūcuḥ
ūrṇanābhādyathā tanturvisphuliṃgā vibhāvasoḥ |
tathā jagadyadetasyā nirgataṃ tāṃ natā vayam || 10 ||
yanmāyāśaktisaṃklṛptaṃ jagatsarvaṃ carācaram |
tāṃ citaṃ bhuvanādhīśāṃ smarāmaḥ karuṇārṇavām || 11||
yadajñānādbhavotpattiryajjñānādbhavanāśanam |
saṃvidrūpāṃ ca tāṃ devīṃ smarāmaḥ sā pracodayāt || 12 ||
mahālakṣmyai ca vidmahe sarvaśaktyai ca dhīmahi |
tanno devī pracodayāt ||13||
mātanatāḥ sma bhuvanātihare prasīda śaṃ no vidhehi kuru kāryamidaṃ dayārdre |
bhāraṃ harasva vinihatya surārivargaṃ mahyā maheśvari satāṃ kuru gaṃ bhavāni ||14||

yadyaṃbujākṣa dayase na surānkadācitki te kṣamā raṇamukhe'siśaraiḥ prahartum |
etattvayaiva gaditaṃ nanu yakṣarūpaṃ dhṛtvā tṛṇaṃ daha hutāśapadābhilāṣaiḥ || 15 ||
kaṃsaḥ kujo'tha yavanendrasutaśca keśī bārhadratho bakabakīkharaśālvamukhyāḥ |
ye'nye tathā nṛpatayo bhuvi saṃti tāṃstvaṃ hatvā harasva jagato bharamāśu mātaḥ || 16 ||
ye viṣṇunā na nihatāḥ mila śaṃkareṇa ye vā vigṛhya jalajākṣi purandareṇa |
te te mukhaṃ sukhakaraṃ susamīkṣamāṇāḥ saṃkhye śarairvinihatā nijalīlayā te || 17||
śakti vinā hariharapramukhāḥ surāśca naiveśvarā vicalituṃ tava devadevi |
kiṃ dhāraṇāvirahitaḥ prabhurapyananto dhartuṃ dharāṃ ca rajanīśakalāvataṃse || 18 || ||18||
indra uvāca
vācā vinā vidhiralaṃ bhavatīha viśvaṃ kartuṃ hariḥ kimu ramārahito'tha pātum |
saṃhartumīśa umayojjhita īśvaraḥ kiṃ te tābhireva sahitāḥ prabhavaḥ prajeśāḥ || 19 ||
viṣṇuruvāca
kartuṃ prabhurna druhiṇo na kadācanāhaṃ nāpīśvarastava kalārahita strilokyā: |
kartuṃ prabhutvamanaghe'tra tathā vihatuṃ tvaṃ vai samastavibhaveśvari bhāsi nūnam ||20||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ studā tadā devī. tānāha vibudheśvarān |
kiṃ tatkāryaṃ vadatvadya karomi vigatajvarāḥ || 21||
asādhyamapi loke'smistatkaromi surepsitam |
śaṃsaṃtu bhavatāṃ duḥkhaṃ dharāyāśca surottamāḥ || 22||
devā ūcuḥ
vasudheyaṃ bhayākrāṃtā samprāptā vibudhānprati |
rudatī vepamānā ca pīḍitā duṣṭabhūbhujaiḥ ||23||
bhārāpaharaṇaṃ cāsyāḥ kartavyaṃ bhuvaneśvari |
devānāmīpsitaṃ kāryametadevādhunā śive || 24 ||
ghātitastu purā mātastvayā mahiṣarūpabhṛt |
dānavo'tibalākrāṃtastatsahāyāśca koṭiśaḥ ||25||
tathā śumbho niśumbhaśva raktavījastathāparaḥ |
caṇḍamuṇḍau mahāvīryau tathaiva dhūmralocanaḥ ||26||
durmukho duḥsahaścaiva karālaścātivīryavān |
anye ca bahavaḥ krūrāstvayaiva ca nipātitāḥ ||27||
tathaiva ca surārīṃva jahi sarvānmahīśvarān |
"bhāraṃ hara dharāyāśca durdharaṃ duṣṭabhūbhujām” ||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktā sā tadā devī devānāhāmbikā śivā ||28||
samprahasyāsitāpāṅgī meghagambhīrayā girā |

śrīdevyuvāca
mayedaṃ ciṃtitaṃ pūrva maṃśāvataraṇaṃ surāḥ || 29 ||
bhārāvataraṇaṃ caiva yathā syāddṛṣṭabhūbhujām |
mayā sarve nihaṃtavyā daityeśā ye mahībhujāḥ ||30||
māgadhādyā mahābhāgāḥ svaśaktyā maṃdatejasaḥ |
bhavadbhirapi svairaṃśairavatīryaṃ dharātale ||31||
macchaktiyuktaḥ kartavyaṃ bhārāvataraṇaṃ surāḥ |
kaśyapo bhāryayā sārdhaṃ divijānāṃ prajāpatiḥ ||32||
yādavānāṃ kule pūrvaṃ bhavitā''nakaduṃdubhiḥ |
tathaiva bhṛguśāpā bhagavānviṣṇuravyayaḥ ||33||
aṃśena bhavitā tatra vasudevasuto hariḥ |
tadā'haṃ prabhaviṣyāmi yaśodāyāṃ ca gokule ||34||
kāryaṃ sarvaṃ kariṣyāmi surāṇāṃ surasattamāḥ |
kārāgāre gataṃ viṣṇuṃ prāpayiṣyāmi gokule || 35 ||
śeṣaṃ ca devakīgarbhātprāpayiṣyāmi rohiṇīm |
macchaktyopacitau tau ca kartārau duṣṭasaṃkṣayam || 36||
duṣṭānāṃ bhūbhujāṃ kāmaṃ dvāparāṃte suniścitam |
iṃdrāṃśo'pyarjunaḥ sākṣātkariṣyati valayam ||37||
dharmāṃśo'pi mahārājo bhaviṣyati yudhiṣṭhiraḥ |
vāyvaṃśo bhīmasenaścāśvinyaṃśau ca yamāvapi || 38 ||
vasoraṃśo'tha gāṃgeyaḥ kariṣyati balakṣayam |
vrajaṃtu ca bhavato'dya dharā bhavatu susthirā ||39||
bhārāvataraṇaṃ nūnaṃ kariṣyāmi surottamāḥ |
kṛtvā nimittamānāṃstānsvaśaktyā'haṃ na saṃśayaḥ ||
kurukṣetre kariṣyāmi kṣatriyāṇāṃ ca saṃkṣayam |
asūyerṣyā matistṛṣṇā mamatābhimatā spṛhā ||41 ||
jigīpā madano moho doṣairnakṣyanti yādavāḥ |
brāhmaṇasya ca śāpena vaṃśanāśī bhaviṣyati ||42||
bhagavānapi śāpena tyakṣyatyetatkalevaram |
bhavanto'pi nijāṃgeva sahāyāḥ śārṅgadhanvanaḥ 43||
prabhavantu sanārīkā mathurāyāṃ ca gokule |
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvāṃtardadhe devī yogamāyā parātmanaḥ || 44 ||
sadharā vai surāḥ sarve jagmuḥ svānyālavāni ca |
dharā'pi susthirā jātā tasyā vākyena toṣitā ||
oṣadhīvarudhopetā babhūva janamejaya |
prajāśca sukhino jātā dvijāśrāpurmahodayam ||
santuṣṭā munayaḥ sarve vabhūvurdharmatatparāḥ ||46||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe ekonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 19 ||
atha viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu bhārata vakṣyāmi bhārāvataraṇaṃ tathā |
kurukṣetre prabhāse ca kṣapitaṃ yogamāyayā ||1||
yaduvaṃśe samutpattirviṣṇoramitatejasaḥ |
bhṛguśāpapratāpena mahāmāyābalena ca ||2||

kṣatibhārasamuttāranimittamiti me matiḥ |
māyayā vihito yogo viṣṇorjanma dharātale || 3 ||
ke citra nṛpa devī sā brahmaviṣṇusurānapi |
nartayatyaniśaṃ māyā triguṇā naṃ parānkim ||4||
garbhavāsodbhavaṃ duḥkhaṃ viṇmūtrasnāyusaṃyutam |
viṣṇorāpāditaṃ samyagyayā vigatalīlayā ||5||
purā rāmāvatāre'pi nirjarā vānarāḥ kṛtāḥ |
viditaṃ te yathā viṣṇurduḥ khapāśena mohitaḥ || 6 ||
ahaṃ mameti pāśena sudṛḍhena narādhipa |
yogino muktasaṃgāśca muktikāmā mumukṣavaḥ ||7||
tāmeva samupāsante devī viśveśvarīṃ śivām |
tadbhatileśaleśāṃśaṃ leśaleśalavāṃśakam ||8||
labdhvā mukto bhavejjaṃtustāṃ na seveta ko janaḥ |
bhuvaneśītyeva vaktre dadāti bhuvanatrayam ||9||
māṃ pāhītyasya vacaso deyābhāvādṛṇānvitā |
vidyā'vidyeti tasyāṭṭhe rūpe jānīhi pārthiva || 10 ||
vidyayā mucyate janturbadhyate'vidyayā punaḥ |
brahmā viṣṇuśca rudraśca sarve tasthā vaśānugāḥ || 11||
avatārāḥ sarva eva yantritā iva dāmabhiḥ |
kadācicca sukhaṃ bhakta vaikuṇṭhe kṣīrasāgare ||12||
kadācitkurute yuddhaṃ dānavairvavattaraiḥ |
hariḥ kadācidyajñānvaṃ vitatānprakaroti ca || 13 ||
kadācicca tapastīvraṃ tīrthe carati suvrata |
kadācicchayane śete yoganidrāmupāśritaḥ ||14||
na svatantraḥ kadācicca bhagavānmadhusūdanaḥ |
tathā brahmā tathā rudrastathendro varuṇo yamaḥ || 15 ||
kubero'gnī ravīndū ca tathā'nye surasattamāḥ |
munayaḥ sanakādyāśva vasiṣṭhādyāstathāpare || 16||
sarve'mbāvaśagā nityaṃ pāñcālīva narasya ca |
nasi protā yathā gātro vicaraṃti vaśānugāḥ || 17 ||
tathaiva devatāḥ sarvāḥ kālapāśaniyaṃtritāḥ |
harṣaśokādayo bhāvā nidrātandrāsādayaḥ || 18 ||
sarveṣāṃ sarvadā rājandehināṃ dehasaṃśritāḥ |
amarā nirjarāḥ proktā devāśca graṃthakārakaiḥ ||19||
abhidhānataścārthato na te nūnaṃ tādṛśāḥ kvacit |
utpattisthitināśākhyā bhāvā yeṣāṃ niraṃtaram || 20 ||
amarāste kathaṃ vācyā nirjarāśca kathaṃ punaḥ |
kathaṃ duḥkhābhibhūtā vā jāyante vibudhottamāḥ ||21||
kathaṃ devāśca vaktavyā vyasane kroḍanaṃ katham |
kṣaṇādutpattināśaśca dṛśyate'sminna saṃśayaḥ || 22||
jalajānāṃ ca kīṭānāṃ maśakānāṃ tathā punaḥ |
upamā na kathaṃ caiṣāmāyuṣo'nte marāḥ smṛtāḥ || 23||
tato varṣāyuṣaścāpi śatavarṣāyuṣastathā |
manuṣyā hyamarā devāstastasmād brahmā paraḥ smṛtaḥ ||
rudrastathā tathā viṣṇuḥ kramaśaśca bhavaṃti hi |
naśyanti kramaśaścaiva varddhante cottarottaram ||25||
nūnaṃ dehavatāṃ nāyo mṛtasyotpattireva ca |
cakravadbhramaṇaṃ rājansarveṣāṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ ||26||
mohajālāvṛto janturmucyate na kadācana |
māyāyāṃ vidyamānāyāṃ mohajālaṃ na naśyati ||27||
utpitsukāla utpattiḥ sarveṣāṃ nṛpa jāyate |
tathaiva nāśaḥ kalpāṃte brahmādīnāṃ yathākramam ||28||
nimittaṃ yastu pannāśe sa ghātayati taṃ nṛpa |
nānyathā tadbhavennūnaṃ vidhinā nirmitaṃ tu yat || 29 ||
janmamṛtyujarāvyādhiduḥkhaṃ vā sukhameva vā |
tattathaiva bhavetkāmaṃ nānyatheha vinirṇayaḥ ||30||

sarveṣāṃ sukhado devī pratyakṣau śaśibhāskarau |
na naśyati tayoḥ pīḍā kvacittadvairisaṃbhavā ||31||
bhāskarasya suto maṃdaḥ kṣayī caṃdra: kalaṃkavān |
paśya rājanvidheḥ sūtraṃ durvāraṃ mahatāmapi || 32 ||
vedakartā jagaddhartā buddhidastu caturmukhaḥ |
so'pi viklavatāṃ prāpto dṛṣṭvā putrīṃ sarasvatīm 33 ||
śivasyāpi mṛtā bhāryā satī dagdhvā kalevaram |
so'bhavaduḥkhasaṃtaptaḥ kāmārtaśca janātihā || 34 |
kāmāgnidagdhadehastu kālidyāṃ patitaḥ śivaḥ |
sā'pi śyāmajalā jātā tannidāghavaśānnṛpa ||35||
kāmārto ramamāṇastu nagnaḥ so'pi bhṛgorvanam |
gataḥ prāpto'tha bhṛguṇā śaptaḥ kāmāturo bhṛśam 36 ||
patatvadyaiva te liṃgaṃ nirlajjeti bhṛśaṃ kila |
papau cāmṛtavāpīṃ ca dānavairnirmitāṃ mude ||37||
indro'pi ca vṛṣo bhūtvā vāhanatvaṃ gataḥ kṣitau |
ādyasya sarvalokasya viṣṇoreva vivekinaḥ || 38 ||
sarvajñatvaṃ gataṃ kutra prabhuśaktiḥ kuto gatā |
yaddhemamṛgavijñānaṃ na jñātaṃ hariṇā kila || 39 ||
rājanmāyābalaṃ paśya rāmo hi kāmamohitaḥ |
rāmo virahasaṃtapto ruroda bhṛśamāturaḥ || 40 ||
yo'pṛcchatpādapānmūḍhaḥ kva gatā janakātmajā |
bhakṣitā vā hṛtā kena rudannuccataraṃ tataḥ || 41 ||
lakṣmaṇāhaṃ mariṣyāmi kāṃtāvirahaduḥkhitaḥ |
tvaṃ cāpi mama duḥkhena mariṣyasi vane'nuja || 42||
āvayormaraṇaṃ jñātvā mātā mama mariṣyati |
śatrughno'pyatiduḥkhārtaḥ kathaṃ jīvitumarhati || 4 ||
sumitrā jīvitaṃ jahyātputravyasana karśitā |
pūrṇakāmā'tha kaikeyī bhavetputrasamanvitā ||44 ||
hā sīte kva gatā'si tvaṃ māṃ vihāya smarāturā |
ehyehi mṛgavāśāvākṣi māṃ jīvaya kṛśodari || 45 ||
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi tvadadhīnaṃ ca jīvitam |
samāśvāsaya dīnaṃ māṃ priyaṃ janakanandini || 46 ||
evaṃ vilapatā tena rāmeṇāmitatejasā |
vane vane ca bhramatā nekṣitā janakātmajā || 47||
śaraṇyaḥ sarvalokānāṃ rāmaḥ kamalalocanaḥ |
śaraṇaṃ vānarāṇāṃ sa gato māyāvimohitaḥ || 48||
sahāyān vānarānkṛtvā babandha varuṇālayam |
jaghāna rāvaṇaṃ vīraṃ kuṃbhakarṇaṃ mahodaram ||49 ||
ānīya ca tataḥ sītāṃ rāmo divyamakārayat |
sarvajño'pi hṛtāṃ matvā rāvaṇena durātmanā || 50 ||
kiṃ bravīmi mahārāja yogamāyābalaṃ mahat |
yayā viśvamidaṃ sarvaṃ bhrāmitaṃ bhramate kila ||51||
evaṃ nānāvatāre'tra viṣṇuḥ śāpavaśaṃ gataḥ |
karoti vividhāśceṣṭā daivādhīnaḥ sadaiva hi || 52||
tavāhaṃ kathayiṣyāmi kṛṣṇasyāpi viceṣṭitam |
prabhavaṃ mānuṣe loke devakāryārthasiddhaye || 53||
kālindīpuline ramye hyāsīnmadhuvanaṃ purā |
lavaṇo madhuputrastu tatrāsīddānavo balī || 54 ||
dvijānāṃ duḥkhadaḥ pāpī varadānena garvitaḥ |
nihato'sau mahābhāga lakṣmaṇasyānujena vai || 55 ||
śatrughnenātha saṃgrāme taṃ nihatya madotkaṭam |
vāsitā mathurā nāmnī purī paramaśobhanā ||56||
sa tatra puṣkarākṣo dvau putro śatruniṣūdanaḥ |
niveśya rājye matimānkāle prāpte divaṃ gataḥ ||57|| |
-
sūryavaṃśakṣaye tāṃ tu yādavāḥ pratipedire |
mathurāṃ muktidāṃ rājan yayātitanayāḥ purā ||58||

śūrasenābhidhaḥ śūrastatrābhūnmedinīpatiḥ |
māthurāñchūrasenāṃśca bubhuje viṣayānnṛpa || 59 ||
tatrotpannaḥ kaśyapāṃśaḥ śāpācca varuṇasya vai |
vasudevo'tivikhyātaḥ śūrasenasutastadā || 60 ||
vaiśyavṛttirataḥ so'bhūnmṛte pitari mādhavaḥ |
ugraseno babhūvātha kaṃsastasyātmajo mahān || 61 ||
aditirdevako jātā devakasya sutā tadā |
śāpādvai varuṇasyātha kaśyapānugatā kila || 62 ||
dattā sā vāsudevāya devakena mahātmanā |
vivāhe racite tatra vāgabhūdgagane tadā || 63 ||
kaṃsa kaṃsa mahābhāga devakīgarbhasaṃbhavaḥ |
aṭamastu sutaḥ śrīmāṃstava haṃtā bhaviṣyati || 64 ||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ kaṃso vismito'bhūnmahābalaḥ |
devavācaṃ tutāṃ matvā satyāṃ cintāmavāpa saḥ || 65 ||
kiṃ karomīti saṃcintya vimarśamakarottadā |
nihatyaināṃ na me mṛtyurbhavedadyaiva satvaram ||63 ||
upāyo nānyathā cāsminkārye mṛtyubhayāvahe |
iyaṃ pitṛṣvasā pūjyā kathaṃ hanmītyacintayat || 67 ||
punarvicārayāmāsa maraṇaṃ me'styaho svasā |
pāpenāpi prakartavyā deharakṣā vipaścitā ||68 ||
prāyaścittena pāpasya śuddhirbhavati sarvathā |
prāṇarakṣā prakartavyā budhairapyenasā tathā || 69||
vicintya manasā kaṃsaḥ khaḍgamādāya satvaraḥ |
jagrāha tāṃ varārohāṃ keśeṣvākṛṣya pāpakṛt || 30 ||
kośātkhaṅgamupākṛṣya hetukābho durāśayaḥ |
paśyatāṃ sarvalokānāṃ navohāṃ tāṃ cakarṣa ha || 71 ||
hanyamānāṃ ca tāṃ dṛṣṭvā hāhākārī mahānabhūt |
vasudevānugā vīrā yuddhāyodyatakārmukāḥ || 72 ||
muñca ceti pocustaṃ te dānasāhasāḥ |
kṛpayā mocayāmāsurdevakīṃ devamātaram || 73 ||
tadyaddhamabhavadghoraṃ vīrāṇāṃ ca parasparam |
vasudevasahāyānāṃ kaṃsena ca mahātmanā || 74 ||
vartamāne tathā thuddhe dāruṇe lomaharṣaṇe |
kaṃsaṃ nivārayāmāsurvṛddhā ye yadusattamāḥ || 75 ||
pitṛṣvaseyaṃ te vīra pūjanīyā ca bāliśā |
na haṃtavyā tvayā vīra vivāhotsava saṃgame || 76||
strīhatyā duḥsahā vīra kīrtighnī pāpakṛttamā |
bhūtabhāṣitamātreṇa na kartavyā vijānatā || 77 ||
antarhitena kenāpi śatruṇā tava cāsya vā |
udineti kuto na syādrāganarthakarī vibho || 78 ||
yaśasaste vighātāya vasudevagṛhasya ca |
ariṇā racitā vāṇī guṇamāyāvidā nṛpa || 79 ||
vibheṣi vīrastvaṃ bhūtvā bhūtabhāṣitabhāṣayā |
yaśomūlavighātārthamupāyastvariṇā kṛtaḥ || 80 ||
pitṛṣvasā na haṃtavyā vivāhasamaye punaḥ |
bhavitavyaṃ mahārāja bhavecca kathamanyathā || 81 ||
evaṃ tairbodhyamāno'sau nivṛtto nābhavadyadā |
tadā taṃ vasudevo'pi nītijñaḥ pratyabhāṣata || 82||
kaṃsa satyaṃ bravīmyadya satyādhāraṃ jagattrayam |
dāsyāmi devakīputrānutpannāṃstava sarvaśaḥ || 83 ||
jātaṃ jātaṃ sutaṃ tubhyaṃ na dāsyāmi yadi prabho |
kumbhīpāke tadā ghore pataṃtu mama pūrvajāḥ || 84 ||
śrutvā'tha vacanaṃ satyaṃ pauravā ye puraḥ sthitāḥ |
ūcuste tvaritāḥ kaṃsaṃ sādhu sādhu punaḥ punaḥ || 85 ||
na mithyā bhāpate kvāpi vasudevo mahāmanāḥ |
keśaṃ maṃca mahābhāga strīhatyāpātakaṃ tathā || 86 ||

evaṃ prabodhitaḥ kaṃso yaduvṛddhermahātmabhiḥ |
krodhaṃ tyaktvā sthitastatra satyavākyāmoditaḥ ||
tato duṃdubhayo nedurvāditrāṇi ca sasvanuḥ || 87 ||
" jayaśabdastu sarveṣāmutpannastatra saṃsadi | "
prasādya kaṃsaṃ pratimocya devakīṃ mahāyaśāḥ śūrasutastadānīm |
jagāma gehaṃ svajanānuvṛtto navoḍhayā vītabhayastarasvī ||88||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 20 ||
atha ekaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
atha kāle tu saṃprāpte devakī devarūpiṇī |
garbhaṃ dadhāra vidhivadvasudevena saṃgatā || 1||
pūrṇe'tha daśame māse suṣuve sutamuttamam |
rūpāvayavasaṃpannaṃ devakī prathamaṃ yadā || 2||
tadā''ha vasudevastāṃ satyavākyānumoditaḥ |
bhāvitvācca mahābhāgo devakīṃ devamātaram ||3||
varoru samayaṃ me tvaṃ jānāsi svasutārpaṇe |
mocitā tvaṃ mahābhāge śapathena mayā tadā || 4 ||
imaṃ putraṃ sukeśāṃte dāsyāmi bhrātṛsūnave |
“khale kaṃse vināśārthaṃ daive kiṃ vā kariṣyasi ||"
vicitrakarmaṇāṃ pāko durjñeyo hyakṛtātmabhiḥ ||5||
sarveṣāṃ kila jīvānāṃ kālapāśānuvartinām |
bhoktavyaṃ svakṛtaṃ karma śubhaṃ vā yadi vā'śubham ||
prārabdhaṃ sarvathaivātra jīvasya vidhinirmitam ||6||
devakyuvāca
svāminpūrvaṃ kṛtaṃ karma bhoktavyaṃ sarvathā nṛbhiḥ || 7 ||
tīrthaistapobhirdānairvā kiṃ na yāti kṣayaṃ hi tat |
likhito dharmaśāstreṣu prāyaścittavidhirnṛpa ||8||
pūrvājitānāṃ pāpānāṃ vināśāya mahātmabhiḥ |
brahmahā hemahārī ca surāpo gurutalpagaḥ || 9 ||
dvādaśābdatrate cīrṇe śuddhi yāti yatastataḥ |
manvādibhiryathoddiṣṭaṃ prāyaścittaṃ vidhānataḥ || 10 ||
tathā kṛtvā naraḥ pāpānmucyate vā na vā'nagha |
vigītavacanāste kiṃ munayastattvadarśinaḥ ||11||
yājñavalkyādayaḥ sarve dharmaśāstrapravartakāḥ |
bhavitavyaṃ bhavatyeva yadyevaṃ niścayaḥ prabho || 12 ||
āyurvedaḥ sa mithyaiva maṃtravādāstathā'khilāḥ |
udyamastu vṛthā sarvamevaṃ ceddaivanirmitam || 13 ||
bhavitavyaṃ bhavatyeva pravṛttistu nirarthikā |
agniṣṭomādikaṃ vyarthaṃ niyataṃ svargasādhanam || 14 ||
yadā tadā pramāṇaṃ hi vṛthaiva paribhāṣitam |
vitathe tatpramāṇe tu dharmocchedaḥ kuto na hi || 15||

udyame ca kṛte siddhi: pratyakṣeṇaiva sādhyate |
tasmādatra prakartavyaḥ prapaṃcaścittakalpitaḥ || 16||
yathāyaṃ bālakaḥ kṣemaṃ prāpnoti mama putrakaḥ |
mithyā yadi prakartavyaṃ vacanaṃ śubhamicchatā || 17 ||
na tatra dūṣaṇaṃ kiṃcitpravadaṃti manoṣiṇaḥ |
vasudeva uvāca
niśāmaya mahābhāge satyametadbravīmi te ||18||
udyamaḥ khalu kartavyaḥ phalaṃ daivavaśānugam |
trividhānīha karmāṇi saṃsāre'tra purāvidaḥ || 19||
pravadaṃtīha jīvānāṃ purāṇeṣvāgameṣu ca |
saṃcitāni ca jīrṇāni prārabdhāni sumadhyame || 20 ||
vartamānāni vāmoru trividhānīha dehinām |
śubhāśubhāni karmāṇi bījabhūtāni yāni ca || 21||
bahujanmasamutthāni kāle tiṣṭhati sarvathā |
pūrvadehaṃ parityajya jīvaḥ karmavaśānugaḥ || 22 ||
svargaṃ vā narakaṃ vā'pi prāpnoti svakṛtena vai |
divyaṃ dehaṃ ca saṃprāpya yātanādehamarthajam || 23||
bhunakti vividhānbhogānsvarge vā narake'thavā |
bhogāṃte ca yadotpatteḥ samayastasya jāyate ||24||
liṃgadehena sahitaṃ jāyate jīvasaṃjñitam |
tadaiva saṃcitebhyaśca karmabhyaḥ karmabhiḥ punaḥ || 25||
yojayatyeva taṃ kālaṃ karmāṇi prākṛtāni ca |
dehenānena bhāvyāni śubhāni cāśubhāni ca ||26||
prārabdhāni ca jīvena bhoktavyāni sulocane |
prāyaścittena naśyaṃti vartamānāni bhāmini || 27||
saṃcitāni tathaivāśu yathārthaṃ vihitena ca |
prārabdhakarmaṇāṃ bhogātsaṃkṣayo nānyathā bhavet ||28||
tenāyaṃ te kumāro vai deyaḥ kaṃsāya sarvathā |
na mithyāvacanaṃ me'sti lokaniṃdābhidūṣitam || 29||
anitye'smistu saṃsāre dharmasāre mahātmanām |
daivādhīnaṃ hi sarveṣāṃ maraṇaṃ jananaṃ tathā || 30 ||
tasmācchoko na kartavyo dehināṃ hi nirarthakaḥ |
satyaṃ yasya gataṃ kāṃte vṛthā tasyaiva jīvitam ||31||
iha loko gato yasmātparalokaḥ kutastataḥ |
ato dehi sutaṃ subhru kaṃsāya pradadāmyaham ||32||
satyasaṃstaraṇāddevi śubhamagre bhaviṣyati |
kartavyaṃ sukṛtaṃ puṃbhiḥ sukhe duḥkhe sati priye ||33||
"satyasaṃrakṣaṇāddevi śubhameva bhaviṣyati | "
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktavati kāṃte sā devakī śokasaṃyutā |
dadau putraṃ prasūtaṃ ca vepamānā manasvinī ||34||
vasudevo'pi dharmātmā ādāya svasutaṃ śiśum |
jagāma kaṃsasadanaṃ mārge lokairabhiṣṭutaḥ ||35||
lokā ūcuḥ
paśyaṃtu vasudevaṃ bho lokā evaṃ manasvinam |
svavākyamanurudhyaiva bālamādāya yātyasau || 36||
mṛtyave dātukāmo'dya satyavāganasūyakaḥ |
saphalaṃ jīvitaṃ cāsya dharmaṃ paśyaṃtu cādbhutam || 37 ||
yaḥ putraṃ yāti kaṃsāya dātuṃ kālātmane'pi hi |

vyāsa uvāca
iti saṃstūyamānastu prāptaḥ kaṃsālayaṃ nṛpa ||38||
dadāvasmai kumāraṃ taṃ jātamātramamānuṣam |
kaṃso'pi vismayaṃ prāpto dṛṣṭvā dhairyaṃ mahātmanaḥ || 39 ||
gṛhītvā bālakaṃ prāha smitapūrvamidaṃ vacaḥ |
dhanyastvaṃ śūraputrādya jñātaḥ putrasamarpaṇāt || 40 ||
mama mṛtyurna cāyaṃ vai girā proktastu cāṣṭamaḥ |
na haṃtavyo mayā kāmaṃ bālo'yaṃ yātu te gṛham ||
aṣṭamastu pradātavyastvayā putro mahāmate |
ityuktvā vasudevāya dadāvāśu khalaḥ śiśum ||42||
gacchatvayaṃ gṛhe bālaḥ kṣemaṃ vyāhṛtavānnṛpaḥ |
tamādāya tadā śaurirjagāma svagṛhaṃ mudā ||43||
kaṃso'pi sacivānāha vṛthā kiṃ ghātaye śiśum |
aṣṭamāddevakīputrānmama mṛtyurudāhṛtaḥ ||44||
ataḥ kiṃ prathamaṃ bālaṃ hatvā pāpaṃ karomyaham |
sādhu sādhviti te'pyuktvā saṃsthitā maṃtrisattamāḥ ||
visarjitāstu kaṃsena jagmuste svagṛhānprati |
gateṣu teṣu saṃprāpto nārado munisattamaḥ || 46 ||
abhyutthānāyaṃ pādyādi cakārogra sutastadā |
papraccha kuśalaṃ rājā tatrāgamanakāraṇam ||47||
nāradastaṃ tadovāca smitapūrvamidaṃ vacaḥ |
kaṃsa kaṃsa mahābhāga gato'haṃ hemaparvatam ||48 ||
tatra brahmādayo devā maṃtraṃ cakruḥ samāhitāḥ |
devakyāṃ vasudevasya bhāryāyāṃ surasattamaḥ || 49||
vadhārthaṃ tava viṣṇuśca janme cātra kariṣyati |
tatkathaṃ na hataḥ putrastvayā nītiṃ vijānatā || 50 ||
kaṃsa uvāca
aṣṭamaṃ ca haniṣye'haṃ mṛtyuṃ me devabhāṣitam |
nārada uvāca
na jānāsi nṛpaśreṣṭha rājanīti śubhāśubhām ||51||
māyābalaṃ ca devānāṃ na tvaṃ vetsi vadāmi kim |
ripuralpo'pi śūreṇa nopekṣyaḥ śubhamicchatā ||52||
saṃmelanakriyāyāṃ tu sarve te hyaṣṭamāḥ smṛtāḥ |
mūrkhastvamarisaṃtyāgaḥ kṛto'yaṃ jānatā tvayā ||53|| +
ityuktvā''śu gataḥ śrīmānnārado devadarśanaḥ |
gate'tha nārade kaṃsaḥ samāhūyātha bālakam ||
pāṣāṇe pothayāmāsa sukhaṃ prāpa ca maṃdadhīḥ || 54 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe ekonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 21||
atha dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
kiṃ kṛtaṃ pātakaṃ tena bālakena pitāmaha |
yajjātamātrī nihatastathā tena durātmanā || 1 ||
nārado'pi muniśreṣṭho jñānavāndharmatatparaḥ |
kathamevaṃvidhaṃ pāpaṃ kṛtavānbrahmavittamaḥ ||2||

kartā kārayitā pāpe tulyapāpī smṛtī budhaiḥ |
sa kathaṃ prerayāmāsa muniḥ kaṃsaṃ khalaṃ tadā ||3||
saṃśayo'yaṃ mahānme'tra brūhi sarvaṃ savistaram |
yena karmavipākena bālako nidhanaṃ gataḥ ||4||
vyāsa uvāca
nārada: kautukaprekṣī sarvadā kalahapriyaḥ |
devakāryārthamāgatya sarvametaccakāra ha ||5||
na mithyābhāṣaṇe buddhirmunestasya kadācana |
satyavaktā surāṇāṃ sa kartavye nirataḥ śuciḥ || 6||
evaṃ ṣaḍ bālakāstena jātā jātā nipātitāḥ |
ṣaḍ garbhā śāpayogena saṃbhūya maraṇaṃ gatāḥ ||7||
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi teṣāṃ śāpasya kāraṇam |
svāyaṃbhuve'ntare putrā marīceḥ paṇmahābalāḥ ||8||
ūrṇāyāṃ caiva bhāryāyāmāsandharmavicakṣaṇāḥ |
brahmāṇaṃ jahasurvīkṣya sutāṃ yabhitumudyatam ||9||
śaśāpa tāṃstadā brahmā daityayoni viśaṃtvadhaḥ |
kālanemisutā jātāste ṣaḍgarbhā viśāṃpate ||10||
avatāre pare te tu hiraṇyakaśipoḥ sutāḥ |
jātāste jñānasaṃyuktāḥ pūrvaśāpabhayānnṛpa || 11 ||
tasmiñjanmani śāṃtāśca tapaścakruḥ samāhitāḥ |
teṣāṃ prīto'bhavadbrahmā ṣaḍgarbhāṇāṃ varāndadau || 12||
brahmovāca
śaptā yūyaṃ mayā pūrvaṃ krodhayuktena putrakāḥ |
tuṣṭo'smi vo mahābhāgā bruvaṃ vāṃchitaṃ varam ||13||
vyāsa uvāca
te tu śrutvā vacastasya brahmaṇa: prītamānasāḥ |
brahmāṇamabruvankāmaṃ sarve kāryārthatatparāḥ || 14 ||
garbhā ūcuḥ
pitāmahādya tuṣṭo'si dehi no vāṃchitaṃ varam |
avadhyā daivataiḥ sarvairmānavaiśca mahoragaiḥ || 15||
gaṃdharvaṃ siddhapatibhirvadho mābhūtpitāmaha |
vyāsa uvāca
tānuvāca tato brahmā sarvametadbhaviṣyati || 16||
gacchaṃtu vo mahābhāgāḥ satyameva na saṃśayaḥ |
dattvā varaṃ tato brahmā muditāste tadā'bhavan || 17 ||
hiraṇyakaśipuḥ kruddhastānuvāca kurūdvaha |
yasmādvihāya māṃ putrāstoṣito vai pitāmahaḥ || 18 ||
vareṇa prārthito'tyathaṃ balavanto yato'bhavan |
yuṣmābhirhapitaḥ snehastato yuṣmāṃstyajāmyaham ||
yūyaṃ vrajaṃtu pātāle ṣaḍgarbhā viśrutā bhuvi |
pātāle nidrayāviṣṭāstiṣṭhaṃtu bahuvatsarān ||20||
tatastu devakīgarbhe varṣe varṣe punaḥ punaḥ |
pitā vaḥ kālena tatra viṣyati ||21||
sa eva jātamātrān vo vadhiṣyati sudāruṇaḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ śaptastadā tena garbhe jātānpunaḥ punaḥ || 22||

jaghāna devakīputrānṣaḍgarbhāñchāpanoditaḥ |
śeṣāṃśaḥ saptamastatra devakīgarbhasaṃsthitaḥ ||23||
visraṃsitaśca garbho'sau yogena yogamāyayā |
nītaśca rohiṇīgarbhe kṛtvā saṃkarṣaṇaṃ balāt ||24||
patitaḥ paṃcame māsi lokakhyātiṃ gatastadā |
kaṃso'pi jñātavāṃstatra devakīgarbhapātanam || 25||
mudaṃ prāpa sa duṣṭātmā śrutvā vārtāṃ sukhāvahām |
aṣṭame devakīgarbhe bhagavānsātvatāṃ patiḥ ||26|
uvāsa devakāryārthaṃ bhārāvataraṇāya ca |
rājovāca
vasudevaḥ kaśyapāṃśa: śeṣāṃśaśca tadā'bhavat ||27||
hareraṃśastathā prokto bhavatā munisattama |
anye ca yeṃ'śā devānāṃ yatra jātāstu tān vada ||28||
bhārāvataraṇārthaṃ vai kṣiteḥ prārthanayā'nagha |
vyāsa uvāca
surāṇāmasurāṇāṃ ca ye ye'śā bhuvi viśrutāḥ ||29||
tānahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi saṃkṣepeṇa śṛṇuṣva tān |
vasudevaḥ kaśyapāṃśo devakī ca tathā'ditiḥ || 30||
baladevastvanaṃtāśo vartamāneṣu teṣu ca |
yo'sau dharmasutaḥ śrīmānnārāyaṇa iti śrutaḥ || 31 ||
tasyāṃśo vāsudevastu vidyamāne munau tadā |
narastasyānujo yastu tasyāṃśo'rjuna eva ca || 32 ||
yudhiṣṭhirastu dharmāṃśo vāyvaṃśo bhīma ityuta |
aśvinyaṃśau tataḥ proktau mādrīputrau mahābalau ||33||
sūryāṃśaḥ karṇa ākhyāto dharmāṃśo viduraḥ smṛtaḥ |
droṇo bṛhaspateraṃśastatsutastu śivāṃśajaḥ || 34 ||
samudraḥ śaṃtanuḥ prokto gaṃgā bhāryā matā budhaiḥ |
devakastu samākhyāto gaṃdharvapatirāgame || 35||
vasurbhīṣmo virāṭastu marudgaṇa iti smṛtaḥ |
ariṣṭasya suto haṃso dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 36 ||
marudgaṇaḥ kṛpaḥ proktaḥ kṛtavarmā tathāparaḥ |
duryodhanaḥ kaleraṃśaḥ śakuniṃ viddhi dvāparam ||37||
somaputraḥ suvarcākhyaḥ somaprarurudāhṛtaḥ |
pāvakāṃśī dhṛṣṭadyumnaḥ śikhaṃḍī rākṣasastathā ||38||
sanatkumārasyāṃśastu pradyumnaḥ parikīrtitaḥ |
drupado varuṇāsyāṃśo draupadī ca ramāṃśajā || 39||
draupadītanayāḥ paṃca viśvedevāṃśajāḥ smṛtāḥ |
kuṃtiḥ siddhirvṛtirmādrī matirgāṃdhārarājajā || 40 ||
kṛṣṇa patnyastathā sarvā devavārāṃganāḥ smṛtāḥ |
rājānaśca tathā sarve asurāḥ śakranoditāḥ || 41||
hiraṇyakaśiporaṃśaḥ śiśupāla udāhṛtaḥ |
vipracittirjarāsaṃdhaḥ śalyaḥ prahlāda ityapi ||42||
kālanemistathā kaṃsaḥ keśī hayaśirāstathā |
ariṣṭo baliputrastu kakudmī gokule hataḥ || 43||
anuhādo dhṛṣṭaketurbhagadatto'tha bāṣkalaḥ |
laṃbaḥ pralaṃbaḥ saṃjātaḥ kharo'sau dhenuko'bhavat || 44 ||
vārāhaśca kiśoraśva daityo paramadāruṇau |
mallau tāveva saṃjātī khyātau cāṇūramuṣṭiko || 45||
ditiputrastathā'riṣṭo gajaḥ kuvalayābhidhaḥ |
baliputrī bakī khyātā bakastadanujaḥ smṛtaḥ ||46||

yamo rudrastathā kāmaḥ krodhaścaiva caturthakaḥ |
teṣāmaṃśaistu saṃjāto droṇaputro mahābalaḥ || 47||
aṃśāvataraṇe pūrvadaiteyā rākṣasāstathā |
jātāḥ sarve surāṃśāste kṣitibhārāvatāraṇe ||48||
eteṣāṃ kathitaṃ rājannaṃśāvataraṇaṃ nṛpa |
surāṇāṃ cāsurāṇāṃ ca purāṇeṣu prakīrtitam ||49||
yadā brahmādayo devāḥ prārthanārthaṃ hariṃ gatāḥ |
hariṇā ca tadā datto keśau khalu sitāsitī || 50||
śyāmavarṇastataḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śvetaḥ saṃkarṣaṇastathā |
bhārāvatāraṇārthaṃ to jātau devāṃśasaṃbhava ||51||
aṃśāvataraṇaṃ caitacchṛṇoti bhaktibhāvataḥ |
sarvapāpavinirmukto modate svajanairvṛtaḥ ||52||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 22 ||
atha trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
hateṣu ṣaṭsu putreṣu devakyā augraseninā |
saptame patite garbhe vacanānnāradasya ca || 1||
aṣṭamasya ca garbhasya rakṣaṇārthamataṃdritaḥ |
prayatnamakarodrājā maraṇaṃ svaṃ vicitayan ||2||
samaye devakīgarbhe praveśamakaroddhariḥ |
aṃśena vasudeve tu samāgatya yathākramam ||3||
tadeyaṃ yogamāyā ca yaśodāyāṃ yathecchayā |
praveśamakarodevī devakāryārthasiddhaye ||4||
rohiṇyāstanayo rāmo gokule samajāyata |
yataḥ kaṃsabhayodvignā saṃsthitā sā ca kāminī ||5||
kārāgāre tataḥ kaṃso devakīṃ devasaṃstutām |
sthāpayāmāsa rakṣārtha sevakānsamakalpayat ||6||
vasudevastu kāminyā: premataḥ tuniyantritaḥ |
putrotpatti ca saṃcintya praviṣṭaḥ saha bhāryayā || 7 ||
devakīgarbhago viṣṇurdevakāryārthasiddhaye |
saṃstuto'marasaṃdhaiśca vyavardhata yathākramam ||8||
saṃjāte daśame tatra māse'tha śrāvaṇe śubhe |
prājāpatyarkṣasaṃyukte kṛṣṇapakṣe'ṣṭamīdina ||9||
kaṃsastu dānavānsarvānuvāca bhayavihvalaḥ |
rakṣaṇīyā bhavadbhiśca devakī garbhamandire || 10 ||
aṣṭamo devakīgarbhaḥ śatrurme prabhaviṣyati |
rakṣaṇīyaḥ prayatnena mṛtyurūpaḥ sa bālakaḥ || 11||
hatyenaṃ bālakaṃ daityāḥ sukhaṃ svapsyāmi mandire |
nirvṛttivarjite duḥkhe nāśite cāṣṭame sute || 12 ||
khaḍgaprāsadharāḥ sarve titu dhṛtakārmukāḥ |
nidrātandrāvihīnāśca sarvatra nihitekṣaṇāḥ || 13 ||
vyāsa uvāca
ityādiśyāsuragaṇān kaṃso'tibhayavihvalaḥ |
maṃdiraṃ svaṃ jagāmāśu na lebhe dānavaḥ sukham || 14 ||
niśīthe devakī tatra vasudevamuvāca ha |
kiṃ karomi mahārāja prasavāvasaro mama || 15 |
bahavo rakṣapālāśca tiṣṭhatyatra bhayānakāḥ |
nandapalyā mayā sārdhaṃ kṛto'sti samayaḥ purā || 16 ||
preṣitavyastvayā putro mandire mama mānini |
pālayiṣyāmyahaṃ tatra tavātimanasā kila || 17 ||

apatyaṃ te pradāsyāmi kaṃsasya pratyayāya vai |
kiṃ kartavyaṃ prabho cādya viṣame samupasthite || 18 ||
vyatyayaḥ saṃtateḥ śaure kathaṃ kartuṃ kṣamo bhaveḥ |
dūre tiṣṭhasva kāṃtādya lajjā me'tiduratyayā || 19 ||
parāvṛtya mukhaṃ svāminnanyathā kiṃ karomyaham |
ityuktvā taṃ mahābhāgaṃ devakī devasaṃmatam ||20||
bālakaṃ suṣuve tatra niśīthe paramādbhutam |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā vismayaṃ prāpa devakī bālakaṃ śubham ||21||
pati prāha mahābhāgā harṣotphullakalevarā |
paśya putramukhaṃ kāṃta durlabhaṃ hi tava prabho ||22||
adyainaṃ kālarūpo'sau ghātayiṣyati bhrātṛjaḥ |
vasudevastathetyuktvā tamādāya kare sutam || 23||
apaśyaccānanaṃ tasya sutasyādbhutakarmaṇaḥ |
vīkṣya putramukhaṃ śoriśritāviṣṭo babhūva ha ||24||
kiṃ karomi kathaṃ na syāduḥkhamasya kṛte mama |
evaṃ ciṃtāture tasminvāguvācāśarīriṇī ||25||
vasudevaṃ samābhāṣya gagane viśadākṣarā |
vasudeva gṛhītvaṃnaṃ gokulaṃ naya satvaraḥ || 26 || -
rakṣapālāstathā sarve mayā nidrāvimohitāḥ |
vivṛtāni kṛtānyaṣṭau kapāṭāni ca śṛṃkhalāḥ ||27||
muktvainaṃ naṃdagehe tvaṃ yogamāyāṃ samānaya |
śrutvaivaṃ vasudevastu tasminkārāgṛhe gataḥ || 28 ||
vivṛtaṃ dvāramālokya babhūva tarasā nṛpa |
tamādāya yayāvāśu dvārapālairalakṣitaḥ ||29||
kālindītaṭamāsādya pūraṃ dṛṣṭvā suniścitam |
tadaiva kaṭidaghnī sā babhūvāśu saridvarā || 30||
yogamāyāprabhāveṇa tatārānakadundubhiḥ |
gatvā tu gokulaṃ śauriniśīthe nirjane pathi || 31 ||
nandadvāre sthitaḥ paśyanvibhūti paśusaṃjñitām |
tadaiva tatra saṃjātā yaśodā garbhasaṃbhavā ||32||
yogamāyāṃśajā devī triguṇā divyarūpiṇī |
jātāṃ tāṃ bālikāṃ divyāṃ gṛhītvā karapaṃkaje 33 ||
tatrāgatya dadau devī sairaṃdhrīrūpadhāriṇī |
vasudevaḥ sutaṃ dattvā sairaṃdhrīkarapaṃkaje || 34 ||
tāmādāya yayau śīghraṃ bālikāṃ muditāśayaḥ |
kārāgāre tato gatvā devakyāḥ śayane sutām 35 ||
niḥkṣipya saṃsthitaḥ pārśve cintāviṣṭo bhayāturaḥ |
ruroda susvaraṃ kanyā tadaivāgatasaṃjñakāḥ || 36 ||
uttasthuḥ sevakā rājñaḥ śrutvā tadbuditaṃ niśi |
tamūcurbhūpatiṃ gatvā tvaritāste'tivihvalāḥ ||37||
devakyāśca suto jātaḥ śīghramehi mahāmate |
tadākarṇya vacasteṣāṃ śīghraṃ bhojapatiryayau || 38||
prāvṛtaṃ dvāramālokya vasudevamathāhvayata |
kaṃsa uvāca
sutamānaya devakyā vasudeva mahāmate ||39|| mṛtyurme cāṣṭamo garbhastaṃ nihanmi ripuṃ harim ||
vyāsa uvāca
śrutvā kaṃsavacaḥ śaurirbhayatrastavilocanaḥ ||40|
tāmādāya sutāṃ pāṇau dadau cāśu rudanniva |
dṛṣṭvā'tha dārikāṃ rājā vismayaṃ paramaṃ gataḥ || 41 ||
devavāṇī vṛthā jātā nāradasya ca bhāṣitam |
vasudevaḥ kathaṃ kuryādanṛtaṃ saṃkaṭe sthitaḥ || 42 ||

rakṣapālāśca me sarve sāvadhānā na saṃśayaḥ |
kuto'tra kanyakā kāmaṃ kva gataḥ sa sutaḥ kila ||
saṃdeho'tra na kartavyaḥ kālasya viṣamā gatiḥ |
iti saṃcitya tāṃ bālāṃ gṛhītvā pādayoḥ khalaḥ ||
pothayāmāsa pāṣāṇe nirghṛṇaḥ kulapāṃsanaḥ |
sā karānniḥsṛtā bālā yayāvākāśamaṃḍalam || 45||
divyarūpā tadā bhūtvā tamuvāca mṛdusvanā |
kiṃ mayā hatayā pāpa jātaste balavātripuḥ ||46||
haniṣyati durārādhyaḥ sarvathā tvāṃ narādhamam |
ityuktvā sā gatā kanyā gaganaṃ kāmagā śivā ||
kaṃsastu vismayāviṣṭo gato nijagṛhaṃ tadā |
ānāyya dānavānsarvānidaṃ vacanamabravīt ||48||
bakadhenukavatsādīnkrodhāviṣṭo bhayāturaḥ |
gacchantu dānavāḥ sarve mama kāryārthasiddhaye ||49||
jātamātrā haṃtavyā bālakā yatra kutracit |
pūtanaiṣā vrajatvadya bālaghnī naṃdagokulam ||50||
jātamātrānvinighnaṃtī śiśūṃstatra mamājñayā |
dhenuko vatsakaḥ keśī pralaṃbo vaka eva ca ||51||
sarve tiṣṭhaṃtu tatraiva mama kāryacikīrṣayā |
ityājñāpyāsurānkaṃso yayau nijagṛhaṃ khalaḥ ||
citāviṣṭo'tidīnātmā citayitvaiva taṃ punaḥ ||52||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 23 ||
atha caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
prātarnandagṛhe jātaḥ putrajanmamahotsavaḥ |
kivadaṃtyatha kaṃsena śrutā cāramukhādapi || 1 ||
jānāti vasudevasya dārāstatra vasati hi |
paśavo dāsavargaśca sarve te naṃdagokule ||2||
tena śaṃkāsamāviṣṭo gokulaṃ prati bhārata |
nāradenāpi tatsarvaṃ kathitaṃ kāraṇaṃ purā ||3||
gokule ye ca naṃdādyāstatpatnyaśca surāṃśajāḥ |
devakīvasudevādyāḥ sarve te śatravaḥ kila || 4 ||
iti nāradavākyena bodhito'so kulādhamaḥ |
jātaḥ kopamanā rājankaṃsaḥ paramapāpakṛt ||5|
pūtanā nihatā tatra kṛṣṇenāmitatejasā |
bako vatsāsuraścāpi dhenukaśca mahābalaḥ || 6 ||
pralaṃbo nihatastena tathā govardhano ghṛtaḥ |
śrutvaitatkarma kaṃsastu mene maraṇamātmanaḥ || 7 ||
tathā vinihataḥ keśī jñātvā kaṃso'tidurmanāḥ |
dhanuryāgamiṣeṇāśu tāvānetuṃ pracakrame ||8||
akrūraṃ preṣayāmāsa krūraḥ pāpamatistadā |
ānetuṃ rāmakṛṣṇau ca vadhāyāmitavikramī || 2 ||
rathamāropya gopālo gokulādnāṃdinīsutaḥ |
āgato mathurāyāṃ tu kaṃsādeśe sthitaḥ kila || 10 ||
tābāgatya tadā tatra dhanubhaṃgaṃ ca cakratuḥ |
hatvā'tha rajakaṃ kāmaṃ gajaṃ cāṇūramuṣṭikam ||11||
śalaṃ ca tośalaṃ caiva nijaghāna haristadā |
jaghāna kaṃsaṃ deveśaḥ keśeṣvākṛṣya līlayā ||12||
pitarau mocayitvā'tha gataduḥkhau cakāra ha |
ugrasenāya rājyaṃ taddadāvariniṣūdanaḥ || 13 ||
vasudevastayostatra mauṃjībandhanapūrvakam |
kārayāmāsa vidhivad vratabaṃdhaṃ mahāmanāḥ || 14 ||

upanītī tadā tau tu gatau sāṃdīpanālaya |
vidyāḥ sarvāḥ samabhyasya mathurāmāgatau punaḥ || 15 ||
jātau dvādaśavarṣīyo kṛtavidyau mahābalau |
mathurāyāṃ sthito vīrau sutāvānakaduṃdubheḥ || 16 ||
māgadhastu jarāsaṃdho jāmātṛvadhaduḥkhitaḥ |
kṛtvā sainyasamājaṃ sa mathurāmāgataḥ purīm ||17||
sa saptadaśavāraṃ tu kṛṣṇena kṛtabuddhinā |
jitaḥ saṃgrāmamāsādya madhupuryā nivāsinā || 18 ||
paścācca preritastena sa sa kālayavanābhidhaḥ |
sarvamlecchādhipaḥ śūro yādavānāṃ bhayaṃkaraḥ || 19||
śrutvā yavanamāyāṃtaṃ kṛṣṇaḥ sarvān yadūttamān |
ānāyya va tathā rāmamuvāca madhusūdanaḥ ||20||
bhayaṃ no'tra samutpannaṃ jarāsaṃdhānmahābalāt |
kiṃ kartavyaṃ mahābhāga yavanaḥ samupaiti vai || 21 ||
prāṇatrāṇaṃ prakartavyaṃ tyaktvā gehaṃ balaṃ dhanam |
sukhena sthīyate yatra sa deśaḥ khalu paitṛkaḥ ||22||
sadodvegakaraḥ kāmaṃ kiṃ kartavyaṃ kulocitam |
śailasāgarasānnidhye sthātavyaṃ sukhamicchatā || 23 ||
yatra vairibhayaṃ na syātsthātavyaṃ tatra paṃḍitaiḥ |
śeṣaśayyāṃ samāśritya hariḥ svapiti sāgare ||24||
tathaiva ca bhayādbhītaḥ kailāse tripurārdanaḥ |
tasmānnātraiva sthātavyamasmābhiḥ śatrutāpitaiḥ 25 ||
dvāravatyāṃ gamiṣyāmaḥ sahitāḥ sarva eva vai |
kathitā garuḍenādya ramyā dvāravatī purī ||26||
raivatācalasāṃnidhye siṃdhukūle manoharā |
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tathyaṃ sarve yādavapuṅgavāḥ ||27||
gamanāya matiṃ cakruḥ sakuṭumbāḥ savāhanāḥ |
śakaṭāni tathoṣṭrāśca vāmyaśva mahiṣāstathā ||28||
dhanapūrṇāni kṛtvā te niryayurnagarādvahiḥ |
rāmakṛṣṇī puraskṛtya sarve te saparicchadāḥ ||29||
agre kṛtvā prajāḥ sarvāścilaḥ sarve yadūttamāḥ |
katiciddivasaiḥ prāpuḥ purīṃ dvāravatīṃ kila ||30||
śilpibhiḥ kārayāmāsa jīrṇoddhāraṃ hi mādhavaḥ |
saṃsthāpya yādavāṃstatra tāvetau balakeśavī ||31||
tarasā mathurāmetya saṃsthitau nirjanāṃ purīm |
tadā tatraiva saṃprāpto balavān yavanādhipaḥ || 32 ||
jñātvainamāgataṃ kṛṣṇo niryayau nagarādahiḥ |
padātiragre tasyābhūdya vanasya janārdanaḥ ||33||
pītāmbaradharaḥ śrīmānprahasanmadhusūdanaḥ |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā purato yāṃtaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ kamalalocanam ||34||
yavano'pi padātiḥ sanpṛṣṭhato'nugataḥ khalaḥ |
prasupto yaha rājarṣirmukuṃdo mahābalaḥ ||35||
prayayau bhagavāṃstatra sakālayavano hariḥ |
tatraivāṃtardadhe viṣṇurmucukuṃdaṃ sabhīkṣya ca || 36 ||
tatraiva yavanaḥ prāptaḥ suptabhūtamapaśyat |
