matvā vāsudevaṃ sa pādenātāḍayannṛpam || 37 ||
prabuddhaḥ krodharaktākṣastaṃ dadāha mahābalaḥ |
taṃ dagdhvā mucukuṃdo'tha dadarśa kamalekṣaṇam ||38||
vāsudevaṃ sudeveśaṃ praṇamya prasthito vanam |
jagāma dvārakāṃ kṛṣṇo baladevasamanvitaḥ || 39||
ugrasenaṃ nṛpaṃ kṛtvā vijahāra yathāruci |
aharadukmiṇī kāmaṃ śiśupālasvayaṃvarāt ||40||

rākṣasena vivāhena cakre dāravidhi hariḥ |
tato jāṃbavatī satyāṃ mitravidāṃ ca bhāminīm ||
kālindīṃ lakṣmaṇāṃ bhadrāṃ tathā nāgnajitoṃ śubhām |
pṛthakpṛthaksamānīyāpyupaye me janārdanaḥ || 42||
aṣṭāveva mahīpāla palya: paramaśobhanāḥ |
prāsūta rukmiṇī putraṃ pradyumnaṃ cārudarśanam ||43||
jātakarmādikaṃ tasya cakāra madhusūdanaḥ |
hṛto'sau sūtikā gehācchaṃbareṇa balīyasā || 44||
nītaśca svapurī bālo māyāvatyai samarpitaḥ |
vāsudevo hṛtaṃ dṛṣṭvā putraṃ śokasamanvitaḥ || 45 ||
jagāma śaraṇaṃ devīṃ bhaktiyutena cetasā |
vṛtrāsurādayo daityā līlayaiva yayā hatāḥ || 46 ||
tato'sau yogamāyāyāścakāra paramāṃ smṛtim |
vacobhiḥ paramodārairakṣaraḥ stavanaiḥ śubhaiḥ ||47||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
mātarmayātitapasā paritoṣitā tvaṃ prāgjanmani prasumanādibhiracitā'si |
dharmātmajena vadarīvanakhaṇḍamadhye kiṃ vismṛto janani te tvayi bhaktibhāvaḥ || 48 ||
sūtīgṛhādapahṛtaḥ kimu bālako me kenāpi duṣṭamanasā'pyatha kautukādvā |
mānāpahārakaraṇāya mamādya nūnaṃ lajjā tavāmba khalu bhaktajanasya yuktā ||49 ||
durge mahānatitarāṃ nagarī suguptā tatrāpi me'sti sadanaṃ kila madhyabhāge |
antaḥpure ca pihitaṃ nanu sūtigehaṃ bālo hṛtaḥ khalu tathāpi mamaiva doṣāt ||50||
nāhaṃ gataḥ parapuraṃ na ca yādavāśca rakṣāvatī ca nagarī kila vīravayaiḥ |
māyā tavaiva janani prakaṭaprabhāvā me bālakaḥ parihṛtaḥ kuhakena kena || 51||
no vedyayahaṃ janani te caritaṃ sugutaṃ ko veda maṃdamatiralpavideva dehī |
kvāsāṃ gato mama bhaṭainaṃ ca vīkṣito vā hartā'mbike javanikā tava kalpiteyam ||52||
citraṃ na te'tra purato mama mātṛgarbho nītastvayā'rdhasamaye kila māyayā'sau |
yaṃ rohiṇī haladharaṃ suṣuve prasiddhaṃ dūre sthitā patiparā mithunaṃ vinā'pi || 53 ||
sṛṣṭi karoṣi jagatāmanupālanaṃ ca nāśaṃ tathaiva punarapyaniśaṃ guṇaistvam |
ko veda te'mba caritaṃ duritāṃtakāri prāyeṇa sarvamakhilaṃ vihitaṃ tvayaitat || 54||
utpādya putrajananaprabhavaṃ pramodaṃ dattvā punavirahajaṃ kila duḥkhabhāram |
tvaṃ krīḍase sulalitaiḥ khalu taivihārainoṃ cetkathaṃ mama sutāptiratirvṛthā syāt ||55||
mātā'sya roditi bhṛśaṃ kurarīva bālā duḥkhaṃ tanoti mama sannidhigā sadaiva |
kaṣṭaṃ na vetsi lalite'pramitaprabhāvā mātastvameva śaraṇaṃ bhavapīḍitānām || 56 ||
sīmā sukhasya sutajanma tadīyanāśo duḥkhasya devi bhavane vibudhā vadanti |
tatki karomi janani prathame pranaṣṭe putre mamādya hṛdayaṃ sphuṭatīva mātaḥ || 57 ||

yajñaṃ karomi tava tuṣṭikaraṃ vrataṃ vā daivaṃ ca pūjanamadhākhiladuḥkhahā tvam |
prātaḥ suto'tra yadi jīvati darśayāśu tvaṃ vai kṣamā sakalaśokavināśanāya || 58 ||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ stutā tadā devī kṛṣṇenākliṣṭakarmaṇā |
pratyakṣadarśanā bhūtvā tamuvāca jagadgurum ||59 || i
śrīdevyuvāca
śokaṃ mā kuru deveśa śāpo'yaṃ te purātanaḥ |
tasya yogena putraste śaṃbareṇa hṛto balāt || 60 ||
ataste ṣoḍaśe varṣe hatvā taṃ śaṃbaraṃ balāt |
gamiṣyati putraste matprasādānna saṃśayaḥ || 61||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā'ntardadhe devī caṃḍikā caṃḍavikramā |
bhagavānapi putrasya śokaṃ tyaktvābhavatsukhī || 62||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 24 ||
patha pañcaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
rājovāca
saṃdeho me muniśreṣṭha jāyate vacanāttava |
vaiṣṇavāṃśe bhagavati duḥkhotpattiṃ vilokya ca || 1 ||
nārāyaṇāṃśasaṃbhūto vāsudeva: pratāpavān |
kathaṃ sa mūtikāgārāddhṛto bālo harerapi || 2 ||
suguptanagare ramye gupte'tha sūtikāgṛhe |
praviśya tena' daityena gṛhīto'sau kathaṃ śiśuḥ || 3 ||
na jñāto vāsudevena citrametanmamādbhutam |
jāyate mahadāścaryaṃ citte satyavatīsuta || 4 ||
brūhi tatkāraṇaṃ brahmannajñātaṃ keśavena yat |
haraṇaṃ tatra saṃsthena śiśorvā sutikāgṛhāt || 5 ||
vyāsa uvāca
māyā balavatī rājannarāṇāṃ buddhimohinī |
śāṃbhavī viśrutā loke ko vā mohaṃ na gacchati || 6 ||
mānuṣaṃ janma saṃprāpya guṇāḥ sarve'pi mānuṣāḥ |
bhavaṃti dehajāḥ kāmaṃ na devā nāsurāstathā || 7 ||
kṣusṛnidrā bhayaṃ taṃdrā vyāmohaḥ śokasaṃśayaḥ | harṣaścaivābhimānaśca jarāmaraṇameva 711611
ajñānaṃ glāniraprītirīrṣyāsūyā madaḥ śramaḥ |
ete dehabhavā bhāvāḥ prabhavaṃti narādhipa |
yathā hemamṛgaṃ rāmo na bubodha purogatam |
jānakyā haraṇaṃ caiva jaṭāyumaraṇaṃ tathā || 10 ||
abhiṣekadine rāmo vanavāsaṃ na veda ca |
tathā na jñātavātrāmaḥ svaśokānmaraṇaṃ pituḥ || 11||
ajñavadvicārāsau paśyamāno vane vane |
jānakī na vivedātha rāvaṇena hṛtāṃ balāt || 12||
sahāyānvānarānkṛtvā hatvā śakrasutaṃ balāt |
sāgare setubaṃdhaṃ ca kṛtvottīryaṃ saritpatim || 13||
preṣayāmāsa sarvāsu dikṣu tānkapikuñjarān |
saṃgrāmaṃ kṛtavānghoraṃ duḥkhaṃ prāpa raṇājire || 14||

baṃdhana nāgapāśena prāpa rāmo mahābalaḥ |
garuḍānmokṣarṇa paścādanvabhūdraghunandanaḥ || 15 ||
ahanadrāvaṇaṃ saṃkhye kumbhakarṇa mahābalam |
meghanādaṃ nikuṃbhaṃ ca kupito raghunandanaḥ || 16 ||
adūṣyatvaṃ ca jānakyā na viveda janārdanaḥ |
divyaṃ ca kārayānāsa jvalite'gnau pradeśanam || 17||
lokāpavādācca paraṃ tatastatyāja tāṃ priyān |
adūṣyāṃ dūṣitāṃ matvā sītāṃ daśarathātmajaḥ || 18||
na jñātī svasutau tena rāmeṇa ca kuśīlavo |
muninā kathitau tau tu tasya putrau mahābalau || 19 ||
pātālagamanaṃ caiva jānavayā jñātavānna ca |
rāghavaḥ kopasaṃyukto bhrātaraṃ hantumudyataḥ || 20 ||
kālasyāgamanaṃ caiva na viveda kharāntakaḥ |
mānuṣaṃ dehamāśritya cakre mānupaceṣṭitam ||21||
tathaiva mānuṣānbhāvānātra kāryā vicāraṇā |
pūrvaṃ kaṃsabhayātprāpto gokule yadunandanaḥ || 22||
jarāsaṃdhabhayātpaśrāddvāravatyāṃ gatī hariḥ |
adharmaṃ kṛtavānkṛṣṇo rukmiṇyā haraṇaṃ ca yat ||23||
śiśupālahṛtāyāśca jānandharmaṃ sanātanam |
śuśoca vālakaṃ kṛṣṇaḥ śaṃvareṇa hṛtaṃ valāt || 24||
mumoda jānanpucaṃ taṃ jānanputraṃ taṃ harpaśīkayutastataḥ |
satyabhāmājñayā yattu yuyudhe svargataḥ kila ||25||
indreṇa pādapārthaṃ tu strījitatvaṃ prakārā |
jahāra kalpavṛkṣaṃ yaḥ parābhūya śatakratum || 26||
māninīmānarakṣārthaṃ harivivaghara prabhuḥ |
baddhvā vṛkṣe hari satyā nāradāya dadau patim ||27||
dattvā'tha kāna kṛṣṇaṃ moca nāminī |
putrānpuruguṇānpradyumnapramukhānatha ||28||
kṛṣṇaṃ jāṃbavatī dīnā yavāne prati rānām |
sa yayau parvataṃ kṛṣṇastapasyākṛtaniścayaḥ ||29||
upamanyurmuniryatra śivabhakta: paraṃtapaḥ |
upamanyuṃ guruṃ kṛtvā dīkṣāṃ pāśupatī hariḥ ||30||
jagrāha putrakāmastu muṇḍī daṇḍī babhūva ha |
ugraṃ tatra tapastepe māsamekaṃ phalāśanaḥ ||31||
jajāpa śivamaṃtra tu śivadhyānaparī hariḥ |
dvitīye tu jalāhāra stiṣṭhanekapadā hariḥ ||32||
tṛtīye vāyubhakṣastu pādāṅgāgrasaṃsthitaḥ |
ṣaṣṭhe tu bhagavādraḥ prasanno bhaktibhāvataḥ ||33||
darśanaṃ ca dadarśa tatra somaḥ somakalādharaḥ |
ājagāma vṛṣārūḍhaḥ surairidrādibhirvṛtaḥ ||34||
brahmaviṣṇuyutaḥ sākṣādyakṣagandharvaseditaḥ |
sambodhayan vāsudevaṃ gaṅkarastamuvāca ha || 35||
suṣṭo'smi kṛṣṇa tapasā tavogreṇa mahāmate |
dadāmi vāṃchitānkāmānbrūhi yādavanandana || 36||
mathi dṛṣṭe kāmapūre kāmaśeṣo na sambhavet |
vyāsa uvāca
taṃ dṛṣṭvā śaṅkaraṃ tuṣṭaṃ bhagavāndevakīsutaḥ ||37|
papāta pādayostasya daṇḍavatpremasaṃyutaḥ |
stutiṃ cakāra deveśo meghagambhīrayā girā ||
sthitastu purataḥ śambhorvāsudevaḥ sanātanaḥ || 38 ||

kṛṣṇa vāca
jagannātha sarvabhūtānāśana ||39||
viśvayone surārighna namastrailokyakāraka |
nīlakaṃṭha namastubhyaṃ śūline ne namonamaḥ ||40|
śailajāvallabhāyātha yajñaghnāya namo'stu te |
baddho'kṛtakṛtyo'haṃ tava suvrata ||41||
janma meṃ saphalaṃ jātaṃ natyā te pādapaṃkajam |
baddho'haṃ strīmayaiḥ pāśaiḥ saṃsāre'smiñjagadguro ||42 ||
śaraṇaṃ te'dya saṃprāpto rakṣaṇārthaṃ trilocana |
saṃprāpya mānyaṃ janma khinno'haṃ duḥkhanāśana || 43 ||
trāhi māṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptaṃ navabhītaṃ bhavādhunā |
garbhavāse mahadduḥkhaṃ prāptaṃ madanadāhaka ||48||
janmataḥ kaṃsabhayajamanubhūtaṃ ca gokule |
jāto'haṃ naṃdagopālo ballavājākarastathā ||45||
gorajaḥ kīrṇakeśastu bhūmanvṛṃdāvane vane |
sleccharājabhayatrasto gato dvāravatīṃ punaḥ ||46 ||
tyaktvā pitryaṃ śubhaṃ deśaṃ māthuraṃ durlabhaṃ vibho |
yayātiśāpavaḍena tasmai dattaṃ bhayādibho || 47|| }
rājyaṃ supuṣṭamapi ca dharmarakṣāpareṇa ca |
ugrasenasya dāsatvaṃ kṛtaṃ vai sarvadā mayā || 48||
rājā'sau yādavānāṃ vai kṛto naḥ pūrvajaiḥ kila |
gārhasthyaṃ duḥkhayaṃ bhī strīvasvaṃ dharmakhaṃḍanam ||
pārataṃtryaṃ sadā baṃdho mokṣavārtā durlabhā |
rukmiṇyāstatāndṛṣṭvā bhāvī jāṃbavatī mama || 50 ||
prerayāmāsa putrārthaṃ tapase madanāṃtaka |
sakāmena mayā taptaṃ tapaḥ putrārthamadya vai || 51||
lajjā bhavati deveśa prārthanāyāṃ jagadaguro |
kastvāmarājya deveśaṃ muktidaṃ bhaktavatsalam ||52||
prasannaṃ yācate mūḍhaḥ phalaṃ tucchaṃ vināśi yat |
so'yaṃ māyāvimūḍhātmā yāṃce putra vibho ||53 ||
kāminyā preritaḥ śaṃbho muktidaṃ tvāṃ jagatpate |
jānāmi duḥkhadaṃ gaṃbho saṃsāraṃ duḥkhanāvanam ||54||
anityaṃ nāśadharmāṇaṃ tathāpi viratirna me |
śāpānnārāyaṇāṃśo'haṃ jāto'sminkṣitimaṃḍale ||55||
bhoktuṃ bahutaraṃ duḥkhaṃ māyāpāśena yaṃtritaḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktavaṃ taṃ goviṃdaṃ pratyuvāca maheśvaraḥ ||56||
bahavaste bhaviṣyaṃti putrāḥ śatrunipūdana |
strīṇāṃ ṣoḍaśasāhasraṃ bhaviṣyati yatārdhakam ||57 ||
tāsu putrā daśa daśa bhaviṣyati mahābalāḥ |
ityuktvopararāmāśu śaṃkaraḥ priyadarśanaḥ || 58 ||
uvāca girijā devī praṇataṃ madhusūdanam |
kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahābāho saṃsāre'sminnarādhipa || 59 ||
gṛhasthapravaro loke bhaviṣyati bhavāniha |
tato varṣaśatāṃte tu dvijaśāpājjanārdana || 60 ||
gāṃdhāryāśca tathā śāpādbhavitā te kulakṣayaḥ |
parasparaṃ nihatyājī putrāste śāpamohitāḥ ||66ḥ||
gamiṣyaṃti kṣayaṃ sarve yādavāśca tathāpare |
sānujastvaṃ tathā dehaṃ tyaktvā yāsyasi vai divam ||
śokastatra na kartavyo bhavitavyaṃ prati prabho |
avaśyaṃbhāvibhāvānāṃ pratīkāro na vidyate || 63 ||

tatra śoko na kartavyo nūnaṃ mama mataṃ sadā |
aṣṭāvakrasya śāpena bhāryāsta madhusūdana || 64||
cau grahaṇaṃ kṛṣṇa gamiṣyaṃti mṛte tvayi |
ityuktvā'ntardadhe śaṃbhuḥ somaḥ sasuramaṃḍalaḥ ||65||
upamantaṃ praṇamyātha kṛṣṇo'pi dvārakāṃ yayau |
yasmād brahmādayo rājansaṃti yadyapyadhīśvarāḥ ||66||
tamā māyākallola yogasaṃkṣubhitāṃtarāḥ |
tadadhīnāḥ sthitāḥ sarve kāyuttalikopamāḥ ||67 ||
yathā yathā pūrvamahaṃ karma teṣāṃ tathā tathā |
prerayatyaniśaṃ māyā parabrahmasvarūpiṇī || 68||
na vaiṣamyaṃ na nairghṛṇyaṃ bhagavatyāṃ kadācana |
kevalaṃ jīvamokṣārthaṃ yatate bhuvaneśvarī || 69 ||
yadi sā naiva sṛjyeta jagadetaccarācaram |
tadā māyāṃ vinā bhūtaṃ jaḍaṃ syādeva nityaśaḥ 70 ||
sahamātkāruṇyamāśritya jagajjīvādikaṃ ca yat |
karoti satataṃ devī prerayatyaniśaṃ ca tat || 71 ||
tasmādbrahmādimohe'sminkartavyaḥ saṃśayo na hi |
māyāṃtaḥpātinaḥ sarve māyādhīnāḥ surāsurāḥ || 72 ||
svataṃtrā saiva deveśī svecchācāravihāriṇī |
tasmātsarvātmanā rājansevanīyā maheśvarī ||73||
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiṃcidadhikaṃ bhuvanatraye |
etaddhi janmasāphalyaṃ parāśakteḥ padasmṛtiḥ || 74||
mābhūttatra kule janma yatra devī na daivatam |
ahaṃ devī na cānyo'smi brahmavāhaṃ na śokabhāk ||
ityabhedena tāṃ nityāṃ citayejjagadaṃbikām |
jñātvā gurumukhādenāṃ vedāṃtaśravaṇādibhiḥ ||76 ||
nityamekāgramanasā bhāvayedātmarūpiṇīm |
mukto bhavati tenāśu nānyathā karmakoṭibhiḥ ||77||
śvetāśvatarādayaḥ sarve ṛṣayo nirmalāśayāḥ |
ātmarūpāṃ hṛdā jñātvā vimuktā bhavabaṃdhanāt || 78 ||
brahmaviṣṇvādayastadvadgaurīlakṣmyādayastathā |
tāmeva samupāsate saccidānaṃdarūpiṇīm ||79||
iti te kathitaṃ rājan yadyadyatpṛṣṭaṃ tvayā'nagha |
prapaṃcapāpatrastena kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 80 ||
etatte kathitaṃ rājanmayā''khyānamanuttamam |
sarvapāpaharaṃ puṇyaṃ purāṇaṃ paramādbhutam ||81||
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyānnityaṃ purāṇaṃ vedasaṃmitam |
sarvapāpavinirmukto devīloke mahīyate || 82 ||
sūta uvāca .
etanmayā śrutaṃ vyāsātkathyamānaṃ savistaram |
purāṇaṃ paṃcamaṃ nūnaṃ śrīmadbhāgavatābhidham || 83 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe caturthaskaṃdhe paṃcaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 25 ||
ardhādhikairvasuvidhuyugaviśvaṃbharā ( 1418 || ) bhiṣaiḥ |
padyaiścaturthaskandho'yaṃ kathito vyāsanirmitaiḥ ||
samāpto'yaṃ caturthaḥ skandhaḥ |

bhogaṇeśāya namaḥ
śrīmaddevībhāgavatam
pañcamaḥ skandhaḥ
prathamo'dhyāyaḥ
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
bhavatā kathitaṃ sūta mahadākhyānamuttamam |
kṛṣṇasya caritaṃ divyaṃ sarvapātakanāśanam || 1 ||
vāsudevakathānake |
jāyate naḥ procyamāne vistareṇa mahāmate || 2 ||
saṃdeho'tra mahābhāga
vane gatvā tapastaptaṃ vāsudevena duṣkaram |
viṣṇoraṃśāvatāreṇa śivasyārādhanaṃ kṛtam || 3 ||
varapradānaṃ devyā ca pārvatyāḥ yatkṛtaṃ punaḥ |
jaganmātuśca pūrṇāyāḥ śrīdevyā aṃśabhūtayā ||4||
īśvareṇāpi kṛṣṇena kutastau saṃprapūjitau |
nyūnatā vā kimastyasya tadevaṃ saṃśayo mama || 5 ||
sūta uvāca
śṛṇudhvaṃ kāraṇaṃ tatra mayā vyāsa śrutaṃ ca yat |
prabravīmi mahābhāgāḥ kathāṃ kṛṣṇaguṇānvitām || 6 ||
vṛttāntaṃ vyāsataḥ śrutvā vairāṭīsutajastadā |
punaḥ papraccha medhāvī saṃdehaṃ paramaṃ gataḥ ||7||
janamejaya uvāca
samyaksatyavatī sūno śrutaṃ paramakāraṇam |
tathāpi manaso bṛttiḥ saṃśayaṃ na vimuṃcati ||8||
kṛṣṇenārādhitaḥ śaṃbhustapastaptvā'tidāruṇam |
vismayo'yaṃ mahābhāga devadevena viṣṇunā || 9 ||
yaḥ sarvātmā'pi sarveśaḥ sarvasiddhipradaḥ prabhuḥ |
sa kathaṃ kṛtavānghoraṃ tapaḥ prākṛtabaddhariḥ || 10 ||
jagatkartuṃ kṣamaḥ kṛṣṇastathā pālayituṃ kṣamaḥ |
saṃhartumapi kasmātsa dāruṇaṃ tapa ācarat || 11||
vyāsa uvāca
satyamuktaṃ tvayā rājanvāsudevo janārdanaḥ |
kṣamaḥ sarveṣu kāryeṣu devānāṃ daityasūdanaḥ || 12 ||

tathāpi mānuṣaṃ dehamāśritaḥ parameśvaraḥ |
kṛtavānmānuṣānbhāvānvarṇāśramasamāśritān || 13 ||
bṛddhānāṃ pūjanaṃ caiva gurupādābhivaṃdanam |
brāhmaṇānāṃ tathā sevā devatārādhanaṃ tathā || 14 ||
śoke śokābhiyogaśca harṣe harṣasamunnatiḥ |
dainyaṃ nānā'pavādāśva strīṣu kāmopasevanam ||15||
krāmaḥ krodhastathā lobhaḥ kāle kāle bhavaṃti hi |
tathā guṇamaye dehe nirguṇatvaṃ kathaṃ bhavet ||16||
saubalīśāpajāddoṣāttathā bāhmaṇaśāpajāt |
nidhanaṃ yādavānāṃ tu kṛṣṇadehasya mocanam ||17||
haraṇaṃ luṃṭhanaṃ tadvattatpatnīnāṃ narādhipa |
arjunasyāstramokṣe ca klībatvaṃ taskareṣu ca || 18 ||
ajñatvaṃ haraṇe gehāttatpradyumnāniruddhayoḥ |
evaṃ mānupadehe'sminmānuṣaṃ khalu ceṣṭitam ||19||
viṣṇoraṃśāvatāre'sminnārāyaṇa munestathā |
aṃśaje vāsudeve'tra kiṃ citraṃ śivasevane ||20||
sa hi sarveśvaro devo viṣṇorapi ca kāraṇam |
suṣuptasthānanāthaḥ sa viṣṇunā ca prapūjitaḥ || 21 ||
tadaṃśabhūtāḥ kṛṣṇādyāstaiḥ kathaṃ na sa pūjyate |
akāro bhagavānbrahmāpyukāraḥ syāddhariḥ svayam ||
makāro bhagavānrudro'pyardhamātrā maheśvarī |
uttarottarabhāvenāpyuttamatvaṃ smṛtaṃ budhaiḥ || 23 ||
ataḥ sarveṣu śāstreṣu devī sarvottamā smṛtā |
ardhamātrā sthitā nityā yānuccāryā viśeṣataḥ 24||
viṣṇorapyadhiko rudro viṣṇustu brahmaṇo'dhikaḥ |
tasmānna saṃśayaḥ kāryaḥ kṛṣṇena śivapūjane || 25 ||
icchayā brahmaṇo vaktrādvaradānārthamudvabhau |
mūlarudrasyāṃśabhūto rudranāmā dvitīyakaḥ ||26||
so'pi pūjyo'sti sarveṣāṃ mūlarudrasya kā kathā |
devītattvasya sānnidhyāduttamatvaṃ smṛtaṃ śive || 27||
avatārā harerevaṃ prabhavaṃti yuge yuge |
yogamāyāprabhāveṇa nātra kāryā vicāraṇā ||28||
yā netrupakṣmaparisaṃcalanena samyagviśvaṃ sṛjatyavati hanti nigūḍhabhāvā |
saiṣā karoti satataṃ druhiṇācyuteśānnānāvatārakalane paribhūyamānān ||29||
sūtīgṛhādvrajanamapyanayā niyuktaṃ saṃgopitaśca bhavane paśupālarājñaḥ |
saṃprāpitaśca mathurāṃ viniyojitaśca śrīdvārakāpraṇayane nanu bhītacittaḥ ||30||
nirmāya ṣoḍaśasahasraśatārdhakāstā nāryo'ṣṭa saṃmatatarāḥ svakalāṃsamutthāḥ |
tāsāṃ vilāsavaśagaṃ tu vidhāya kāmaṃ dāsīkṛto hi bhagavānanayāpyanaṃtaḥ || 31 ||
ekāspi baṃdhanavidhau yuvatī samarthā puṃso yathā sudṛḍhalohamayaṃ tu dāma |
kiṃ nāma ṣoḍaśasahasraśatārdhakāca taṃ svīkṛtaṃ śukamivātinibaṃdhayaṃti || 32 ||
sātrājitīvaśagatena mudānvitena prāptaṃ sureṃdrabhavanaṃ hariṇā tadānīm |
kṛtvā mṛdhaṃ maghavatā vihṛtastarūṇāmīśaḥ priyāsadanabhūṣaṇatāṃ ya āpa || 33 ||
yo bhīmajāṃ hi hṛtavāñchiśupālakādīñjitvā vidhi nikhiladharmakṛto vidhitsuḥ |
jagrāha tāṃ nijabalena ca dharmapatnoṃ ko'sau vidhiḥ parakalatrahṛtau vijātaḥ ||34||

nahaṃkāravaśaḥ prāṇī karoti ca śubhāśubham |
vimūḍho mohajālena tatkṛtenātipātinā ||35|
ahaṃkārāddhi saṃjātamidaṃ sthāvarajaṃgamam |
mūlāddharihasadīnāmugrātprakṛtisaṃbhavāt ||36||
ahaṃkāraparityakto yadā bhavati padmajaḥ |
tadā vimukto bhavati nocetsaṃsārakarmakṛt ||37||
tanmuktastu vimukto hi baddhastadvaśatāṃ gataḥ |
na nārī na dhanaṃ gehaṃ na putrā na sahodarāḥ ||38||
baṃdhanaṃ prāṇināṃ rājannahaṃkārastu baṃdhaka: |
ahaṃ kartā mayā cedaṃ kṛtaṃ kāryaṃ balīyasā || 39||
kariṣyāmi karomyevaṃ svayaṃ badhnāti prāṇabhṛt |
kāraṇena vinā kāryaṃ na saṃbhavati karhicit ||40||
mathā na dṛśyate jāto mṛtpiḍena vinā ghaṭaḥ |
viṣṇu: pālayitā viśvasyāhaṃkārasamanvitaḥ || 41 ||
anyathā sarvadā citāṃbudhī magnaḥ kathaṃ bhavet |
ahaṃkāravimuktastu yadā bhavati mānavaḥ ||42 ||
avatārapravāheṣu kathaṃ majjecchubhāśayaḥ |
mohamūlamahaṃkāraḥ . saṃsārastatsamudbhavaḥ ||43||
ahaṃkārāvihīnānāṃ na moho na ca saṃsṛtiḥ |
trividhaḥ puruṣaḥ proktaḥ sāttviko rājasastathā 44 ||
mahārāja brahmaviṣṇuśivādiṣu |
trividhastriṣu rājeṃdra kājeśa diṣu sarvadā || 45 ||
tāmasastu
ahaṃkāraḥ sadā prokto munibhistattvadarśibhiḥ |
ahaṃkāreṇa tenaiva baddhā ete na saṃśayaḥ || 46 ||
māyāvimohitā maṃdā: pravadati manīṣiṇaḥ |
karoti svecchayā viṣṇuravatā rānanekaśaḥ ||47||
maṃdo'pi duḥkhagahane garbhavāse'tisaṃkaṭe |
na karoti matiṃ vidvānkathaṃ kuryātsa cakrabhṛt || 48 ||
kausalyādevakīgarbhe viṣṭhāmalasamākule |
svecchayā pravadatyaddhā gato hi madhusudanaḥ || 49||
baikuṃṭhasadanaṃ tyaktvā garbhavāse sukhaṃ nu kim |
ciṃtākoṭisamutthāne duḥkhade viṣasaṃmite || 50 ||
tapastaptvā kratūnkṛtvā dattvā dānānyanekaśaḥ |
na vāṃchati yato lokā garbhavāsaṃ suduḥkhadam ||51 ||
sa kathaṃ bhagavānviṣṇuḥ svavaśa jjanārdanaḥ |
garbhavāsarucirbhūyādbhavetsvavaśatā yadi ||52||
jānīhi tvaṃ mahārāja yogamāyāvaśe jagata |
brahmādistaṃbaparyantaṃ devamānuṣatiryagam ||53 ||
māyātaṃtrī nibaddhā ye brahmaviṣṇuharādayaḥ |
bhramaṃti baṃdhamāyāṃti līlayā corṇanābhavat || 54||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
yogeśvaryāḥ prabhāvo'yaṃ kathitaścātivistarāt |
brūhi taccaritaṃ svāmiñchrotuṃ kautūhalaṃ mama || 1 ||
mahādevī prabhāvaṃ vai śrotuṃ ko nābhivāṃchati |
yo jānāti jagatsarvaṃ tadutpannaṃ carācaram ||2||
rājovāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi vistareṇa mahāmate |
śraddadhānāya śāṃtāya na brūyātsa tu maṃdadhīḥ ||3|| .

purā yuddhamabhūdghoraṃ devadānavasenayoḥ |
pṛthivyāṃ pṛthivīpāla mahiṣākhye mahīpatau ||4||
mahiṣo nāma rājeṃdra cakāra tapa uttamam |
gatvā hemamirī conaṃ devavismayakārakam ||5||
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ pūrṇaṃ citayanhṛdi devatām |
tasya tuṣṭo mahārāja brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ || 6 ||
tatrāgatyābravīdvākyaṃ haṃsārūḍhaścaturmukhaḥ |
varaṃ varaya dharmātmandadāmi tava vāṃchitam ||7||
mahiṣa uvāca
amaratvaṃ devadeva vāṃchāmi druhiṇa prabho |
yathā mṛtyubhayaṃ na syāttathā kuru pitāmaha ||8||
brahmovāca
utpannasya dhruvaṃ mṛtyurdhruvaṃ janma mṛtasya ca |
sarvathā maraṇotpattī sarveṣāṃ prāṇināṃ kila || 9 ||
nāśaḥ kālena sarveṣāṃ prāṇināṃ daityapuṃgava |
mahāmahīdharāṇāṃ ca samudrāṇāṃ ca sarvathā || 10 ||
ekaṃ sthānaṃ parityajya maraṇasya mahīpate |
prabrūhi taṃ baraṃ sādho yaste manasi vartate || 11 ||
mahiṣa uvāca
na devānmānuṣāddaityānmaraṇaṃ me pitāmaha |
puruṣānna ca me mṛtyuryoṣā māṃ kā haniṣyati || 12 ||
tasmānme maraṇaṃ nūnaṃ kāminyā: kuru padmaja |
abalā haṃta māṃ haṃtuṃ kathaṃ śaktā bhaviṣyati || 13 ||
brahmovāca
yadā kadāpi daityendra nāryāsta maraṇaṃ dhruvam |
na narebhyo mahābhāga mṛtiste mahiṣāsura || 14 ||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ dattvā varaṃ tasmai yayau brahmā nijālayam |
so'pi daityabaraḥ prāpa nijaṃ sthānaṃ mudānvitaḥ || 15 ||
rājobāca
mahiṣaḥ kasya putro'sau kathaṃ jāto mahābalī |
kathaṃ ca māhiṣaṃ rūpaṃ prāptaṃ tena mahātmanā || 16 ||
vyāsa uvāca
danoḥ putrau mahārāja bikhyāto kṣitimaṃḍale || 17||
tāvaputrau mahārāja mahārāja putrārthaṃ tepatustapaḥ |
bahūnvarṣagaṇānkāmaṃ puṇye paṃcanade jale ||18||
karaṃbhastu jale magnaścakāra paramaṃ tapaḥ |
vṛkṣaṃ rasāvaṭaṃ prāpya raṃbho'gnimasevayat || 19||
paṃcāgnisādhanāsaktaḥ sa raṃbhastu yadā'bhavat |
jñātvā śacīpatirduḥkhamudyayo dānavī prati || 20||
gatvā paṃcanade tatra grāharūpaṃ cakāra ha |
vāsavastu karaṃbhaṃ taṃ tadā jagrāha pādayoḥ ||21||
nijaghāna ca taṃ duṣṭaṃ karaṃbhaṃ vṛtrasūdanaḥ |
bhrātaraṃ nihataṃ śrutvā raṃbhaḥ kopaṃ paraṃ gataḥ ||22||

svaśīrṣaṃ pāvake hotumaicchacchitvā kareṇa ha |
keśapāśe gṛhītvā''śu samena krodhasaṃyutaḥ ||23||
dakṣiṇena kareṇānaṃ gṛhītvā khaḍgamuttamam |
chinatti śīrṣaṃ tattāvadvahninā pratibodhitaḥ ||24||
uktaśva daitya mūrkho'si svaśīrṣaṃ chettumicchasi |
ātmahatyā'tiduḥsādhyā kathaṃ tvaṃ kartumudyataḥ || 25 ||
varaṃ varaya bhadraṃ te yaste manasi vartate |
mā mriyasva mṛtenādya kiṃ te kāryaṃ bhaviṣyati || 26||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ raṃbhaḥ pāvakasya subhāṣitam |
tato'bravīdvaco raṃbhastyaktvā keśakalāpakam ||27||
yadi tuṣṭo'si deveśa dehi me vāṃchitaṃ varam |
trailokyavijayī putraḥ syānnaḥ parabalārdanaḥ ||28||
ajeyaḥ sarvathā sa syāddevadānavamānavaiḥ |
kāmarūpī mahāvīryaḥ sarvalokābhivaṃditaḥ ||29||
pāvakastaṃ tathetyāha bhaviṣyati tavepsitam |
putrastava mahābhāga maraṇādviramādhunā ||30||
yasyāṃ cittaṃ tu raṃbha tvaṃ pramadāttaṃ kariṣyasi |
tasyāṃ putro mahābhāga bhaviṣyati balādhikaḥ ||31||
vyāsa uvāca
ityukto vahninā raṃbho vacanaṃ cittaraṃjanam |
śrutvā praṇamya prayayau vahni taṃ dānavottamaḥ ||32||
yakṣaḥ parivṛtaṃ sthānaṃ ramaṇīyaṃ śriyānvitam |
dṛṣṭvā cakre tadā bhāvaṃ mahiṣyāṃ dānavottamaḥ ||33||
mattāyāṃ rūpapūrṇāyāṃ vihāyānyāṃ ca yoṣitam |
sā samāgācca tarasā kāmayaṃtī mudānvitā ||34||
raṃbho'pi gamanaṃ cakre bhavitavyapraṇoditaḥ |
sā tu garbhavatī jātā mahiṣī tasya vīryaṃtaḥ || 35 ||
tāṃ gṛhītvā'tha pātālaṃ praviveśa manoharam |
mahiṣebhyaśca tāṃ rakṣanpriyāmanumatāṃ kila || 36 ||
kadācinmahiṣaśvānyaḥ kāmārtastāmupādravat |
svayamāgatya taṃ haṃtuṃ dānavaḥ samupādravat ||37||
svarakṣārthaṃ samāgatya mahiṣaṃ samatāḍayat |
so'pi naṃ nijaghānāśu śṛṃgābhyāṃ kāmamohitaḥ 38 ||
tāḍitastena tīkṣṇābhyāṃ śṛṃgābhyāṃ hṛdaye bhṛśam |
bhūmau papāta tarasā mamāra ca vimūrcchitaḥ || 39||
mṛte bhartari sā dīnā bhayārtā vidrutā bhṛśam |
sā vegāttaṃ varaṃ prāmya yakṣāṇāṃ śaraṇaṃ gatā || 40 ||
pṛṣṭhatastu gatastatra mahiṣaḥ kāmapīḍitaḥ |
kāmayānastu tāṃ kāmī balavīryamadoddhataḥ || 41 ||
rudatī sā bhūśaṃ dīnā dṛṣṭā yakṣairbhayāturā |
dhāvamānaṃ ca taṃ vīkṣya yakṣāstrātuṃ samāyayuḥ || 42||
yuddhaṃ samabhavaddhoraṃ yakṣāṇāṃ ca hayāriṇā |
śareṇa tāḍitastūrṇaṃ papāta dharaṇītale ||43||
mṛtaṃ raṃbhaṃ samānīya yakṣāste paramaṃ priyam |
citāyāṃ ropayāmāsustasya dehasya śuddhaye ||44||
mahiṣī sā pati dṛṣṭvā citāyāṃ ropitaṃ tadā |
praveṣṭuṃ sā mati cakre patinā saha pāvakam ||45 ||
vāryamāṇā'pi yakṣaḥ sā praviveśa hutāśanam |
jvālamālākulaṃ sādhvī patimādāya vallabham ||
mahiṣastu citāmadhyātsamuttasthau mahābalaḥ |
rambhopyanyadvapuḥ kṛtvā niḥsṛtḥ putravatsalaḥ ||47||
raktabījo'pyasau jāto mahiṣo'pi mahābalaḥ |
abhiṣiktastu rājye'sau hayārirasurottamaḥ ||48 ||

evaṃ sa mahiṣo jāto raktabījaśca vīryavān |
avaṣyastu surairdaityairmānavaiśva nṛpottama || 49 ||
ityetatkathitaṃ rājanma tasya mahātmanaḥ |
varapradānaṃ ca tathā proktaṃ sarvaṃ savistaram ||50 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe paṃcamaskandhe mahiṣāsurotpattirnāma dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ sa mahiṣo nāma dānavo varadarpitaḥ |
prāpya rājyaṃ jagatsavaṃ vaśe cakre mahābalaḥ || 1 ||
pṛthivīṃ pālayāmāsa sāgarāṃtāṃ bhujārjitām |
ekacchatrāṃ nirātaṃkāṃ vairivargavivarjitām ||2||
senānīścikṣurastasya mahāvīryo madotkaṭaḥ |
dhanādhyakṣastathā tāmraḥ senā'yutasamāvṛtaḥ || 2 ||
asilomā tathodarko biḍālākhyaśca bāṣkalaḥ |
trinetro'tha tathā kālabaṃdhako baladarpita ||4||
ete sainyayutāḥ sarve dānavā medinīṃ tadā |
āvṛtya saṃsthitāḥ kāmamṛddhāṃ sāgaramekhalām ||5||
karadāśca kṛtāḥ sarve bhūmipālāḥ purātanāḥ |
nihatā ye balodagrāḥ kṣātradharmavyavasthitāḥ || 6 ||
brāhmaṇā barāgā jātā yajñabhāgasamarpakāḥ |
mahiṣasya mahārāja nikhile kṣitimaṃḍale ||7||
ekātapatraṃ tadrājyaṃ kṛtvā sa mahiṣāsuraḥ |
svargaṃ jetuṃ manaścakre varadānena garvitaḥ || 8 ||
praṇidhi preṣayāmāsa hayāristu śacīpatim |
sa saṃdeśaharaṃ śīghra māhūyobāca daityarāṭ || 9 ||
gaccha vīra mahābāho dūtatvaṃ kuru me'nagha |
brūhi śakraṃ divaṃ gatvā niḥśaṃkaḥ surasannidhau || 10 ||
muñca svagaṃ sahasrākṣa, yatheṣṭaṃ gaccha māciram |
sevāṃ vā kuru deveśa mahiṣasya mahātmanaḥ || 11 ||
sa tvāṃ saṃrakṣayennūnaṃ rājā śaraṇamāgatam |
tasmāttvaṃ śaraṇaṃ yāhi mahiṣasya śacīpate ||12||
nocedvajñaṃ gṛhāṇāśu yuddhāya balasūdana |
pūrvejito'si cāsmākaṃ jānāmi tava pauruṣam 13 ||
ahalyājāra vijñātaṃ balaṃ te surasaṃghapa |
yudhyasva vraja vā kāmaṃ yatra te ramate manaḥ || 14 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya śakraḥ krodhasamanvitaḥ |
uvāca taṃ nṛpaśreṣṭha smitapūrvaṃ vacastadā || 15 ||
na jāne'haṃ sumaṃdātman yatastvaṃ madadarpitaḥ |
cikitsāṃ saṃkariṣyāmi rogasyāsya prabhostava ||
ataḥ paraṃ kariṣyāmi mūlasyāsya nikṛntanam |
gaccha dūta tathā brūhi tasyāgre mama bhāṣitam ||17||
śiṣṭatā na haṃtavyāstasmāttvāṃ visṛjāmyaham |
yuddhecchā cetsamāgaccha tvarito mahiṣīsuta || 18 ||
hayāre tvadvalaṃ jñātaṃ tṛṇāsastvaṃ jaḍākṛtiḥ |
śṛṃgayoste kariṣyāmi sudṛḍhaṃ ca śarāsanam ||19||
darpa: śṛṃgabalātte'sti viditaṃ kāraṇaṃ mayā |
viṣāṇe te paricchittvā saṃhariṣyāmi tadvalam ||20||
yadvalenātipūrṇastvaṃ jāto'si baladarpitaḥ |
kuśalastvaṃ tadāghāte na yuddhe mahiṣādhama ||21||

vyāsa uvāca
ityukto'sau surendreṇa sa dūtastvarito gataḥ |
jagāma mahiṣaṃ mattaṃ praṇamya pratyuvāca ha ||22||
dūta uvāca
rājandevādhipaḥ kāmaṃ na tvāṃ vigaṇayatyasau |
manyate svabalaṃ pūrṇaṃ devasainyasamāvṛtaḥ || 23||
yaduktaṃ tena mūrkheṇa kathamanyadbravīmyaham |
priyaṃ satyaṃ ca vaktavyaṃ bhṛtyena purataḥ prabhoḥ ||24||
priyaṃ satyaṃ ca vaktavyaṃ prabhoragre śubhecchunā |
iti nītirmahārāja jāgarti śubhakāriṇī ||25||
kevalaṃ cetpriyaṃ brūyānna te kāryaṃ bhaviṣyati |
paruṣaṃ ca na vaktavyaṃ kadācicchubhamicchatā ||26||
yathā ripumukhādvācaḥ prasaranti viṣopamāḥ |
tathā bhṛtyamukhānnātha niḥsaraṃti kathaṃ giraḥ ||27||
yādṛśānīha vākyāni tenoktāni mahīpate |
tādṛśāni na me jihvā vaktumarhati karhicit ||28||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya hetugarbhaṃ tṛṇāśanaḥ |
bhṛśaṃ kopaparītātmā babhūva mahiṣāsuraḥ ||29||
samāhūyānravīddaityānkrodhasaṃraktalocanaḥ |
lāṃgūlaṃ pṛṣṭhadeśe ca kṛtvā mūtraṃ parityajan ||30||
bho bho daityāḥ sureṃdro'sau yuddhakāmo'sti sarvathā |
balodyogaṃ kurudhvaṃ vai jetavyo'sau surādhamaḥ ||31||
madagre ko bhavecchūraḥ koṭiśaśvattathāvidhāḥ |
na bibhemyekataḥ kāmaṃ haniṣyāmyadya sarvathā ||32||
śūraḥ śānteṣvasau nūnaṃ tapasviṣu balādhikaḥ |
balakartā hi kuhako laṃpaṭa : paradārahṛt ||33||
apsarobalasaṃmattastapovighnakaraḥ khalaḥ |
chidrapraharaṇaḥ pāpo nityaṃ viśvāsaghātakaḥ || 34 ||
namucirnihato yena kṛtvā saṃdhi durātmanā |
śapathānvividhānādau kṛtvā bhītena chadmanā || 35 ||
viṣṇustu kapaṭācāryaḥ kuhakaḥ śapathākaraḥ |
nānārūpadharaḥ kāmaṃ balakṛddaṃbha paṃḍitaḥ || 36 ||
kṛtvā kolākṛti yena hiraṇyākṣo nipātitaḥ |
hiraṇyakaśipuryena nṛsiṃhena ca ghātitaḥ ||37|| 1 |
nāhaṃ tadvaśago nūnaṃ bhaveyaṃ danunaṃdanāḥ |
viśvāsaṃ naiva gacchāmi devānāṃ kutra karhicit ||38||
kiṃ kariṣyati me viṣṇuriṃdro vā balavattaraḥ |
rudro vāpi na me śaktaḥ pratikartuṃ raṇāṃgaṇe || 39 ||
triviṣṭapaṃ grahīṣyāmi jitvendraṃ varuṇaṃ yamam |
dhanadaṃ pāvakaṃ caiva candrasūryau vijitya ca ||40||
yajñabhāgabhujaḥ sarve bhaviṣyāmo'dya somapāḥ |
jitvā devasamūhaṃ ca vihariṣyāmi dānavaiḥ || 41 ||
na me bhayaṃ surebhyaśca varadānena dānavāḥ |
maraṇaṃ na narebhyaśca nārī kiṃ me kariṣyati ||42 ||
pātālaparvatebhyaśca samāhūya varānvarān |
dānavānmama sainyeśānkurvaṃtu tvaritāścarāḥ ||43||
eko'haṃ sarvadeveśānvijetuṃ dānavāḥ kṣamaḥ |
śobhārthaṃ vaḥ samāhūya nayāmi surasaṅgame ||44||
śṛṃgābhyāṃ ca khurābhyāṃ ca haniṣye'haṃ surānkila |
na me bhayaṃ surebhyaśca varadāna prabhāvataḥ || 45||
avadhyo'haṃ suragaṇairasurairmānavaistathā |
tasmātsajjā bhavantvadya devalokajayāya vai ||46 ||

jitvā surālayaṃ daityā vihariṣyāmi nandane |
maṃdārakusumāpīḍā devayoṣitsamanvitāḥ || 47||
kāmadhenupayotsiktāḥ sudhāpāna pramoditāḥ |
devagaṃdharvagītādinṛtyalāsyasamanvitāḥ ||48||
urvaśī menakā raṃbhā ghṛtācī ca tilottamā |
pramadvarā mahāsenā miśrakeśī madotkaṭā ||49||
vipracittiprabhṛtayo nṛtyagītaviśāradāḥ |
raṃjayiṣyaṃti vaḥ sarvānnānāsavaniṣevarṇaḥ ||50 ||
sarve sajjā bhavatvadya rocatāṃ gamanaṃ divi |
saṃgrāmārthaṃ suraiḥ sārdhaṃ kṛtvā maṅgalamuttamam || 51 ||
rakṣaṇārthaṃ ca sarveṣāṃ bhārgavaṃ munisattamam |
samāhūya ca saṃpūjya sthāpya yajñe guruṃ param ||52||
vyāsa udyāca
iti saṃdiśya daityendrānmahiṣaḥ pāpaghīstadā |
jagāma tvarito rājanbhavanaṃ svaṃ mudānvitaḥ || 53 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe caturthaskandhe daityasainyodyogo nāma tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
atha caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
gate dūte surendro'pi samāhūya surānatha |
yamavāyudhanādhyakṣa varuṇānidamūcivān ||1||
mahiṣo nāma daityendro raṃbhaputro mahābalaḥ |
varadarpamadonmatto māyāśatavicakṣaṇaḥ ||2||
tasya dūto'dya saṃprāptaḥ preṣitastena bhoḥ surāḥ |
svargakāmena lubdhena māmuvācedṛśaṃ vacaḥ || 3 ||
tyaja devālayaṃ śakra yathecchaṃ vraja vāsava |
sevāṃ vā kuru daityasya mahiṣasya mahātmanaḥ || 4 ||
dayāvāndānaveṃdro'sau sa te yukti vidhāsyati |
sa teṣu bhṛtyabhūteṣu na kupyati kadācana ||5||
nocedyuddhāya deveśa senodyogaṃ kuru svayam |
gate mayi sa daityendrastvaritaḥ samupeṣyati || 6 ||
ityuktvā sa gato dūto dānavasya durātmanaḥ |
kiṃ kartavyamataḥ kāryaṃ citayadhvaṃ surottamāḥ ||7||
durbalo'pi na copekṣyaḥ śatrurbalavatā surāḥ |
viśeṣeṇa sadodyogī balavānbaladarpitaḥ || 8||
udyamaḥ kila kartavyo yathā buddhiryathā balam |
daivādhīno bhavennūnaṃ jayo vā'tha parājayaḥ || 9 ||
saṃghiyogo na cātrāsti khale saṃdhirnirarthakaḥ |
sarvathā sādhubhiḥ kāryaṃ vicārya ca punaḥ punaḥ || 10 |
yānamapyadhunā naiva kartavyaṃ sahasā punaḥ |
prekṣakā: prepaṇīyāśca śīghragāḥ supraveśakāḥ || 11||
iṅgitajñāśca niḥsaṅgā niḥspṛhāḥ satyavādinaḥ |
senābhiyogaṃ prasthānaṃ balasaṃkhyāṃ yathārthataḥ || 12 ||
vīrāṇāṃ ca parijñānaṃ kṛtvā yāṃtu tvarānvitāḥ |
jñātvā daityapatestasya sainyasya ca balābalam 13 ||
kariṣyāmi tatastūrṇaṃ yānaṃ vā durgasaṃgraham |
"vicārya khalu kartavyaṃ kāryaṃ buddhimatā sadā || "
sahasā vihitaṃ kāryaṃ duḥkhadaṃ sarvathā bhavet || 14 ||
tasmādvimṛśya kartavyaṃ sukhadaṃ sarvathā budhaiḥ |
nātra bhedavidhirnyāyyo dānaveṣu ca sarvathā || 15 ||

ekacitteṣu kārye'smistasmāccārā vrajaṃtu vai |
jñātvā balābalaṃ teṣāṃ paścānnīti vicārya ca || 16 ||
vidheyā vidhivattajjñaisteṣu kāryapareṣu ca |
anyathā vihitaṃ kāryaṃ viparīta phalapradam || 17 ||
sarvathā tadbhavennūnamajñātamauṣadhaṃ yathā |
vyāsa uvāca
iti saṃcitya taiḥ sarvaiḥ praṇidhi kāryavedinam ||18||
preṣayāmāsa devendraḥ parijñānāya pārthivaḥ |
dūtastu tvarito gatvā samāgamya surādhipam || 19||
nivedayāmāsa tadā sarva sainyabalābalam |
jñātvā tadbalamudyogaṃ turāṣāḍativismitaḥ || 20 ||
devānacodayattūrṇaṃ samāhūya purohitam |
mantraṃ maṃtravidāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ cakāra tridaśeśvaraḥ || 21 ||
uvācāṃgirasaśreṣṭaṃ samāsīnaṃ barāsane |
indra uvāca
bho bho devaguro vidvaki kartavyaṃ vadasva naḥ || 22||
sarvajño'si samutpanne kārye tvaṃ gatiradya naḥ |
dānavo mahiṣo nāma mahāvīryo madānvitaḥ || 23||||
yoddhukāmaḥ samāyāti samāyāti bahubhirdānavairvṛtaḥ |
tatra pratikriyā kāryā tvayā maṃtravidā'dhunā || 24 ||
teṣāṃ śukrastathā tvaṃ me vighnahartā susaṃyataḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ prāha turāsāhaṃ bṛhaspatiḥ || 25 ||
vicitya manasā kāmaṃ kāryasādhanatatparaḥ |
gururuvāca
svastho bhava surendra tvaṃ dhairyamālaṃbya māriṣa ||26|
vyasane ca samutpanne na tyājyaṃ dhairyamāśu vai |
jayājayau surādhyakṣa daivādhīnau sadaiva hi ||27||
sthātavyaṃ dhairya mālaṃbya tasmādbuddhimatā sadā |
bhavitavyaṃ bhavatyeva jānanneva śatakrato ||28||
udyamaḥ sarvathā kāryo yathāpauruṣamātmanaḥ |
munayo'pi hi muktyarthamudyamaikaratāḥ sadā ||29||
daivādhīnaṃ ca jānanto yogadhyānaparāyaṇāḥ |
tasmātsadaiva kartavyo kṣyahāroditodyamaḥ || 30||
sukhaṃ bhavatu vā mā vā daive kā paridevanā |
binā puruṣakāreṇa kadācitsiddhimāpnuyāt ||31||
aṃdhavatpaṃguvatkāmaṃ na tathā mudamāvahet |
kṛte puruṣakāre'pi yadi siddhirna jāyate || 32||
na tatra dūṣaṇaṃ tasya daivādhīne śarīriṇi |
kāryasiddhirna sainye'sti na maṃtre na ca maṃtraṇe ||33||
na rathe nāyudhe nūnaṃ daivādhīnāsurādhipa |
balavānkleśamāpnoti nirbalaḥ sukhamaśnute ||34||
buddhimānkṣudhitaḥ śete nirbuddhirbhogavānbhavet |
kātaro jayamāpnoti śūro yāti parājayam ||35||

daivādhīne tu saṃsāre kāmaṃ kā paridevanā |
udyame yojayennūnaṃ bhavitavyaṃ surādhipa || 36 ||
duḥkhade sukhade vā'pi tatra to na vicitayet |
duḥkhe duḥkhādhikānpaśyetsukhe paśyetsukhādhikam ||37||
ātmānaṃ harṣaśokābhyāṃ śatrubhyāmiva nārpayet |
dhairyamevāvagantavyaṃ nārpayet |
dhairyamevāvagantavyaṃ harṣaśokodbhave budhaiḥ || 38 ||
adhairyādyādṛśaṃ duḥkhaṃ na tu dhairye'sti tādṛśam |
durlabhaṃ sahanatvaṃ vai samaye sukhaduḥkhayoḥ ||39||
harṣaśokodbhavo yatra na bhavedbuddhiniśvayāt |
kiṃ duḥkhaṃ kasya vā duḥkhaṃ nirguṇo'haṃ sadā'vyayaḥ ||
caturviṃśātirikto'smi ki me duḥkhaṃ sukhaṃ ca kim |
prāṇasya kṣutpipāse dve manasaḥ śokamūrcchane ||41||
jarāmṛtyuśarīrasya paḍūmirahitaḥ śivaḥ |
śokamohau śarīrasya guṇau kiṃ me'tra citane ||42||
śarīraṃ nāhamathavā tatsaṃbaṃdhī na cāpyaham |
saptaikaṣoḍaśādibhyo vibhinno'haṃ sadā sukhī || 43 ||
prakṛtivikṛtirnāhaṃ ki me duḥkhaṃ sadā punaḥ |
iti matvā sureśa tvaṃ manasā bhava nirmamaḥ || 44||
upāya: prathamo'yaṃ te duḥkhanāśe śatakrato |
mamatā paramaṃ duḥkhaṃ nirmamatvaṃ paraṃ sukham ||45 ||
saṃtoṣādaparaṃ nāsti sukhasthānaṃ śacīpate |
athavā yadi na jñānaṃ mamatvanāśane kila || 46 ||
tato vivekaḥ kartavyo bhavitavye surādhipa |
prārabdhakarmaṇāṃ nāśo nābhogāllakṣyate kila ||47||
yadbhāvi tadbhavatyeva kā citā sukhaduḥkhayo: |
suraiḥ sarvaiḥ sahāyairvā buddhayā vā tava sattama ||48||
sukhaṃ kṣayāya puṇyasya duḥkhaṃ pāpasya māriṣa |
tasmātsukhakṣaye harṣaḥ kartavyaḥ sarvathā budhaiḥ || 49||
athavā maṃtratviā'dya kuru yatnaṃ yathāvidhi |
kṛte yatne mahārāja bhavitavyaṃ bhaviṣyati || 50 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
iti śrutvā sahasrākṣaḥ punarāha bṛhaspatim |
yuddhodyogaṃ kariṣyāmi hayārernāśanāya vai || 1 || ||
nodyamena vinā rājyaṃ na sukhaṃ na ca vai yaśaḥ |
nirudyamaṃ na śaṃsati kātarā na ca sodyamāḥ ||2||
yatīnāṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ jñānaṃ saṃtopo hi dvijanmanām |
udyamaḥ śatruhananaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ bhūtimicchatām ||3||
udyamena hatastvāṣṭro namucirbala eva ca |
tathainaṃ nihaniṣyāmi mahiṣaṃ munisattama ||4||
balaṃ devagurustvaṃ me vajramāyudhamuttamam |
mahāyastu harirnūnaṃ tathomāpatiratryayaḥ || 5 ||
rakṣoghnānpaṭha me sādho karomyadya samudyamam |
svasainyābhiniveśaṃ ca mahipaṃ prati mānada || 6||
vyāsa uvāca
ityukto vebarājena bācaspatiruvāca ha |
surendraṃ yuddhasaṃraktaṃ smitapūrvaṃ vacastadā ||7||

bṛhaspatiruvāca
prerayāmi na cāhaṃ tvāṃ na ca nirvārayāmyaham |
saṃdigdhe'tra jaye kāmaṃ yudhyataśca parājaye ||8||
na te'tra dūṣaṇaṃ kiṃcidbhavitavye śacīpate |
sukhaṃ vā yadi vā duḥkhaṃ vihitaṃ ca bhaviṣyati ||9||
ma mayā yatparijñātaṃ bhāvi duḥkhaṃ sukhaṃ tathā |
yadbhāryāharaṇe prāptaṃ purā vāsava vetsi hi || 10 ||
śaśinā me hṛtā bhāryā mitreṇāmitrakarśana |
svāśramasthena saṃprāptaṃ duḥkhaṃ sarvasukhāpaham ||11||
buddhimānsarvalokeṣu vidito'haṃ surādhipa |
kva me gatā tadā buddhiryadā bhāryā hṛtā balāt ||
tasmādupāyaḥ kartavyo buddhimadbhiḥ sadā naraiḥ |
kāryasiddhiḥ sadā nūnaṃ daivādhīnā surādhipa || 13 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ satyaṃ guroḥ sārdhaṃ śacīpatiḥ |
brahmāṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ gatvā natvā vacanamabravīt || 14 ||
pitāmahaṃ surādhyakṣa daityo mahiṣasaṃjñakaḥ |
grahītukāmaḥ svargaṃ me balodyogaṃ karotyalam || 15||
anye ca dānavāḥ sarve tatsainyaṃ samupasthitā |
yoddhukāmā mahāvīryāḥ sarve yuddhaviśāradāḥ || 16 ||
tenāhaṃ bhītabhīto'smi tvatsakāśamihāgataḥ |
sarvajño'si mahāprājña sāhāyyaṃ kartumarhasi || 17||
brahmovāca
gacchāmaḥ sarva evādya kailāsaṃ tvaritā vayam |
śaṃkaraṃ purataḥ kṛtvā viṣṇuṃ ca balināṃ varam || 18 ||
tato yuddhaṃ prakartavyaṃ sarveḥ suragaṇaiḥ saha |
militvā maṃtramādhāya deśaṃ kālaṃ vicitya ca || 19 ||
balābalamavijñātaṃ vivekamapahāya ca |
sāhasaṃ tu prakurvāṇo naraḥ patanamṛcchati || 20 ||
vyāsa uvāca
taniśamya sahasrākṣaḥ kailāsaṃ nirjagāma ha |
brahmāṇaṃ purataḥ kṛtvā lokapālasamanvitaḥ || 21 ||
tuṣṭāva śaṅkaraṃ gatvā vedamaṃtrairmaheśvaram |
prasannaṃ parataḥ kṛtvā yayau viṣṇupuraṃ prati || 22||
stutvā taṃ devadeveśaṃ kāryaṃ provāca cātmanaḥ |
mahiṣāttadbhayaṃ cograṃ varadānamadoddhatāt || 23||
tadākarṇya bhayaṃ tasya viṣṇurdevānuvāca ha |
kariṣyāmo vayaṃ yuddhaṃ haniṣyāmastu durjayam ||24||
vyāsa uvāca
iti te niścayaṃ kṛtvā brahmaviṣṇuharīśvarāḥ |
svāni svāni samārudya vāhanāni yayuḥ surāḥ || 25 ||
brahmā haṃsasamārūḍho viṣṇurgaruḍavāhanaḥ |
śaṃkaro vṛṣabhārūḍho vṛtrahā gajasaṃsthitaḥ || 26 ||
mayūravāhanaḥ skando yamo mahiṣavāhanaḥ |
kṛtvā sainyasamāyogaṃ yāvatte niryayuḥ surāḥ || 27||
tāvaddaityabalaṃ prāptaṃ dṛptaṃ mahiṣapālitam |
tatrābhūttumulaṃ yuddhaṃ devadānavasainyayoḥ || 28 ||
vāṇaiḥ khaḍgaistathā prāsairmumalaiśca paraśvadhaiḥ |
gadābhiḥ paṭṭiśaiḥ śūlaiścakreśca śaktitomaraiḥ ||29||
mudgarairbhindipālaiśca halaiścaivātidāruṇaḥ |
anyaiśca vividhairastranijaghnuste parasparam ||30||

senānīścikṣurastasya gajārūḍho mahābalaḥ |
maghavaṃtaṃ pañcabhistaiḥ sāyakaiḥ samatāḍayat || 31 ||
turāṣāḍapi sāṃśchitvā bāṇairbāṇāṃstvarānvitaḥ |
hṛdaye cārdhacandreṇa tāḍayāmāsa taṃ kṛtī ||32||
bāṇāhatastu senānīḥ prāpa mūccha gajopari |
varuṇaṃ vajraghātena sa jaghāna kare tataḥ || 33||
tadvaṣvābhihato nāgo bhagnaḥ sainyaṃ jagāma ha |
dṛṣṭvā taṃ daityarāṭ kruddho viḍālākhyamathābravīt ||34||
gaccha vīra mahābāho jahīṃdra madagarvitam |
varuṇādīnparāndevānhatvā''gaccha mamāṃtikam ||35||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya viḍālākhyo mahābala: |
āruhya vāruṇaṃ mattaṃ jagāma tridaśādhipam ||36||
vāsavastaṃ samāyāntaṃ dṛṣṭvā krodhasamanvitaḥ |
jaghāna viśikhaistīkṣṇairāśīviṣasamaprabhaiḥ ||37||
sa tu chittvā śarāṃstūrṇaṃ svaśaraiścāpaniḥsṛtaiḥ |
pañcāśadbhirjaghānāśu vāsavaṃ ca śilīmukhaiḥ ||38||
tarthedro'pi ca tānbāṇāṃśchitvā kopasamanvitaḥ |
jaghāna viśikhaistīkṣṇairāśīviṣasamaprabhaiḥ ||39||
sa tu cchitvā śarāṃstūrṇaṃ svaśaraiścāpaniḥsṛtaiḥ |
gadayā tāḍayāmāsa gajaṃ tasya karopari || 40 ||
svakare nihato nāgaścakārārtasvaraṃ muhuḥ |
parivṛtya jaghānāśu daityasainyaṃ bhayāturam ||41||
dānavastu gajaṃ vīkṣya parāvṛtya gataṃ raṇāt |
samāvidhya rathe ramye jagāmāśu surān raṇe ||42||
turāṣāḍapi taṃ vīkṣya rathasthaṃ punarāgatam | ahanadviśikhaistīkṣṇairāśīviṣasamaprabhaḥ 118311
so'pi kruddhaścakārogrāṃ vāṇavṛṣṭi mahābalaḥ |
babhūva tumulaṃ yuddhaṃ tayostatra jayaiṣiṇoḥ || 44 ||
indrastu balinaṃ dṛṣṭvā kopenākuliteṃdriyaḥ |
jayantamagrataḥ kṛtvā yuyudhe tena saṃyutaḥ || 45 ||
jayantastu śitairbāṇaistaṃ jaghāna stanāṃtare |
pañcabhiḥ prabalākṛṣṭairasuraṃ madagarvitam ||46 ||
vāṇābhihatastāvannipapāta rathorapi |
ativāhya rathaṃ sūto nirjagāma raṇājirāt ||47||
tasminvinirgate daitye viḍālākhye'tha mūrcchite |
jayaśabdo mahānāsīdundubhīnāṃ ca niḥsvanaḥ 48 ||
surāḥ pramuditāḥ sarve tuṣṭuvustaṃ śacīpatim |
jagurgaṃdharvapatayo nanṛtuścāpsarogaṇāḥ || 49||
cukopa mahiṣaḥ śrutvā jayaśabdaṃ suraiḥ kṛtam |
preṣayāmāsa tatraiva tāmraṃ paramadāpaham || 50 ||
tāmrastu bahubhiḥ sārdhaṃ samāgatya raṇājire |
śaravṛṣṭiṃ cakārāśu taḍitvāniva sāgare || 51 ||
varuṇaḥ pāśamudyamya jagāma tvaritastadā |
yamaśva mahiṣārūḍho daṃḍamādāya niyayo ||52||
tatra yuddhamabhūddhogaṃ devadānavayomithaḥ |
bāṇaḥ kharddhaśca musalaṃ : śaktibhiśca paraśvadhaiḥ || 53 ||
daṇḍena nihatastāmro yamahastodyatena ca |
na cacāla mahābāhuḥ saṃgrāmāṃgaṇatastadā || 54 ||
cāpamākṛṣya vegena muktvā tībrāñchilīmukhān |
indrādīnahanattūrṇaṃ tāmrastasminraṇājire ||55||

se'pi devāḥ śarairdivyairniśitaiśca śilāśitaiḥ |
nijaghnurdānavānkuddhāṃstiṣṭha tiṣṭheti cukuśuḥ ||56||
nihatastaiḥ surairdaityo mūrcchāmāpa raṇāṃgaṇe |
hāhākāro mahānāsīddaityasainye bhayāture || 57 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate paṃcamaskaṃdhe daityasainyaparājayo nāma pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5||
atha ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca.
vā'tha mūrcchite daitye mahiṣaḥ krodhasaṃyutaḥ |
samudyamya gadāṃ gurvī devānupajagāma ha ||1||
titvadya surāḥ sarve hanmyahaṃ gadayā kila |
sarve balibhujaḥ kāmaṃ balahonāḥ sadaiva hi ||2||
ityuktvā'sī gajārūḍhaṃ saṃprāpya madavitaḥ |
javāna gadayā tūrgaṃ bāhumūle mahābhujaḥ || 3||
so'pi vajreṇa ghoreṇa cicchedāśu gadāṃ ca tām |
prahartukāmastvarito jagāma mahiṣaṃ prati || 4 ||
hayārirapi kopena khaḍgamādāya suprabham |
yayāvidaṃ mahāvoryaṃ prahariṣyannivāṃtikam ||5||
babhūva ca tayoryuddhaṃ narvalokabhayāvaham |
āyuṣaivividhaistatra munivismayakārakam ||6||
cakārāśu tadā daityo māyāṃ mohakaroṃ kila |
śāṃbarīṃ sarvalokaghnīṃ munonāmapi mohinīm ||7||
koṭiśo mahiṣāstatra tadrūpāstatparākramāḥ |
dadṛśuḥ sāyudhāḥ sarve nighnaṃ to devavāhinīm ||8||
maghavā vismitastatra dṛṣṭvā tāṃ daityanirmitām |
babhūvātibhayodvigno māyāṃ mohakaroṃ kila || 9 ||
baruṇo'pi susaṃtrastastathaiva ghananāyakaḥ |
yamo hutāśanaḥ sūryaḥ śotaraśmirbhayāturaḥ || 10 ||
palāyanaparāḥ sarve babhūvurmohitāḥ surāḥ |
brahmaviṣṇumaheśānāṃ smaraṇaṃ cakrurudyatāḥ || 11||
satrājagmuśca kājeśāḥ smṛtamātrāḥ surottamāḥ |
haṃsatārkṣyavṛṣārūḍhāstrātukāmā varāyudhāḥ || 12 ||
śauristāṃ mohinīṃ dṛṣṭṭā sudarśanamathojjvalam |
mumoca tattejasaiva māyā sā vilayaṃ gatā || 13 ||
vīkṣya tānmahiṣastatra sṛṣṭisthityaṃtakāriṇaḥ |
yoddhukāmaḥ samādāya parighaṃ samupādravat || 14 ||
mahiṣākhyo mahābīra: senānīścikṣurastathā |
ugrāsyaścogravīryaśca dudruvuryuddhakāmukāḥ ||15||
asilomā trinetraśca bāṣkalāṃdhaka eva ca |
ete cānye ca bahavo yoddhukāmā viniryayuḥ || 16 ||
sannaddhā dhṛtacāpāste rathārūḍhā madoddhatāḥ |
parivatruḥ surānsarvānvṛkā iva suvatsakān ||17||
bāṇavṛṣṭi tataścakrardānavā madagarvitāḥ |
surāścāpi tathā cakruḥ parasparajighāṃsavaḥ || 18 ||
saṃghako harimāsādya pañcavāṇāñchilāśitān |
mumoca viṣasaṃdigdhānkarṇākṛṣṭānmahābalān ||19||
bāsudevo'pyasaṃprāptānviśikhānāśugaistadā |
ciccheda tānpunaḥ pañca mumoca ripunāśanaḥ || 20||
taboḥ parasparaṃ yuddhaṃ babhūva haridaityayoḥ |
bāṇāsi cakramusalaṃgadāśaktiparaśvaṣaiḥ ||21||
maheśāṃcakayoryuddhaṃ tumulaṃ lomaharṣaṇam |
pañcāśaddinaparyaṃtaṃ babhūva ca parasparam || 22||

indrabāṣkalayo tadvanmahiṣāsura rudrayoḥ |
yama trinetrayostadvanmahāhanu dhaneśayoḥ ||23||
asilomāvaruṇayoryuddhaṃ paramadāruṇam |
garuḍaṃ gadayā daityo jaghāna harivāhanam ||24||
sa gadāpātakhinnāṅgo niḥśvasannavatiṣṭhati |
śauristaṃ dakṣiṇenāśu hastena parisāṃtvayan ||25||
sthiraṃ cakāra deveśo vainateyaṃ mahābalam |
samākṛṣya dhanuḥ śāṅgaṃ mumoca viśikhānbahūn ||26||
aṃdhakopari kopena haṃtukāmo janārdanaḥ |
dānavo'pi ca tānbāṇāṃściccheda svaśaraiḥ śitaiḥ 27 ||
pañcāśadbhirhari kopājjadhāna ca śilāśitaiḥ |
vāsudevo'pi tāṃstūrṇaṃ vaṃcayitvā śarottamān || 28||
cakraṃ mumoca vegena sahasrāraṃ sudarśanam |
tyaktaṃ sudarśanaṃ dūrātsvacakreṇa nyavārayat || 29 ||
nanādra ca mahārāja devānsaṃmohayanniva |
dṛṣṭvā tu viphalaṃ jātaṃ cakraṃ devasya śāṅgiṇaḥ ||30||
jagmuḥ śokaṃ surāḥ sarve jaharṣurdānavāstathā |
vāsudevo'pi tarasā dṛṣṭvā devāñchucā''vṛtān || 31 ||
gadāṃ kaumodakīṃ dhṛtvā dānavaṃ samupādravat |
taṃ jaghānātivegena mūrdhni māyāvinaṃ hariḥ || 32||
sa gadā'bhihato bhūmau nipapātātimūcchitaḥ |
taṃ tathā patitaṃ vīkṣya hayāriratikopanaḥ ||33||
ājagāma ramānāthaṃ trāsayannatigarjitaiḥ |
vāsudevo'pi taṃ dṛṣṭvā samāyāṃtaṃ krudhānvitam ||34||
cāpajyāninadaṃ cograṃ cakāra naṃdayansurān |
śaravṛṣṭi cakārāśu bhagavānmahiṣopari || 35||
so'pi ciccheda bāṇaughaistāñcharā ganeritān |
tayoryuddhamabhūdrājanparasparabhayāvaham ||36||
gadayā tāḍayāmāsa keśavo mastakopari |
sa gadābhihato mūrdhni papātorvyāṃ sumūrcchitaḥ || 37 |
hāhākāro mahānāsītsainye tasya sudāruṇaḥ |
sa vihāya vyathāṃ daityo muhūrtādutthitaḥ punaḥ || 38||
gṛhītvā parighaṃ śīrṣe, jaghāna madhusūdanam |
parigheṇāhatastena mūrchāmāpa janārdanaḥ ||39||
mūcchitaṃ tamuvāhāśu jagāma - garuḍo raṇāt |
parāvṛtte jagannāthe devā indrapurogamāḥ ||40||
bhayaṃ prāpuḥ suduḥkhārtāścukruśuśca raṇājire |
kaṃdamānānsurān vīkṣya śaṃkaraḥ śūlabhṛttadā || 41 ||
mahiṣaṃ tarasā'bhyetya prāharadroṣasaṃyutaḥ |
so'pi śakti mumocātha śaṃkarasyorasi sphuṭam 42 ||
jagarja sa ca duṣṭātmā vaṃcayitvā triśūlakam |
śaṃkaro'pi tadā pīḍāṃ na prāporasi tāḍitaḥ 43 ||
taṃ jaghāna triśūlena kopādaruṇalocanaḥ |
saṃlagnaṃ śaṃkaraṃ dṛṣṭvā mahiṣeṇa durātmanā || 44 ||
ājagāma haristāva tyaktvā mūrchā prahārajām |
mahiṣastu tadā vīkṣya saṃprāptau hariśaṃkarī || 45||
yuddhakāmau mahāvīryo cakraśūladharo varo |
kopayukto babhūvāsau dṛṣṭvā tau samupāgato ||46||
jagāma saṃmukhastāvatsaṃgrāmārthaṃ mahābhujaḥ |
māhiṣaṃ vapurāsthāya dhanvanpucchaṃ samutkaṭam ||47||
cakāra bhairavaṃ nādaṃ trāsayannamarānapi |
dhunvañchregaṃ mahākāyo dāruṇo jalado yathā || 48 ||
śṛṃgābhyāṃ pārvatāñchṛṅgāṃścikṣepa bhṛśamutkaṭān |
dṛṣṭvā to tu mahāvīryau dānavaṃ devasattama || 49 ||
cakraturbāṇavṛṣṭi ca dānavopari ca dānavopari dāruṇam |
kurvāṇo bāṇavṛṣṭi to dṛṣṭvā hariharau hariḥ ||50||

cikṣepa giriśṛṃgaṃ tu pucchenāvṛtya dāruṇam |
āpataṃtaṃ giriṃ vīkṣya bhagavānsātvatāṃ patiḥ ||51||
viśikhaiḥ śatadhā cakre cakreṇāśu jaghāna tam |
haricakrāhataḥ saṃkhye mūrcchāmāpa sa daityarāṭ ||52||
uttasthau ca kṣaṇānnūnaṃ mānuṣaṃ vapurāsthitaḥ |
gadāpāṇirmahāghoro dānavaḥ parvatopamaḥ || 53 ||
meghanādaṃ nanādoccairbhīṣayannamarānapi |
tacchrutvā bhagavānviṣṇuḥ pāṃcajanyaṃ samujjvalam54||
pūrayāmāsa tarasā śabdaṃ kartuṃ kharasvaram |
tena śabdena śaṃkhasya bhayatrastāśca dānavāḥ ||
babhūvurmuditā devā ṛṣayaśca tapodhanāḥ || 55 ||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskaṃdhe ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ ||6||
atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
asurānmahiṣo dṛṣṭvā viṣaṇṇamanasastadā |
tyaktvā tanmāhiṣaṃ rūpaṃ babhūva mṛgarāḍasī ||1|| surasenāyāṃ trāsayannakhadarśanaiḥ ||2||
kṛtvā nādaṃ mahāghoraṃ vistāyaṃ ca mahāsaṭām | papāta
garuḍaṃ ca nakhāghātaiḥ kṛtvā rudhiraviplutam |
jadhāna ca bhuje viṣṇuṃ nakhāghātena kesarī ||3||
vāsudevo'pi taṃ dṛṣṭvā cakramudyamya vegavān |
haṃtukāmo hariḥ kāmamavāpāśu krudhānvitaḥ || 4 ||
yāvaddhayaripuṃ vegāccakreṇābhijaghāna tam |
tāvatso'tibalaḥ śṛṅgī śṛṃgābhyāṃ nyahanaddharim 5 ||
vāsudevo viṣāṇābhyāṃ tāḍitorasi vihvalaḥ |
palāyanaparo vegājjagāma bhuvanaṃ nijam ||6||
gataṃ dṛṣṭvā hariṃ kāmaṃ śaṃkaro'bi bhayānvitaḥ |
avadhyaṃ taṃ paraṃ mattvā yayau kailāsaparvatam ||7||
brahmā'pi ca nijaṃ dhāma tvaritaḥ prayayau bhayāt |
maghavā vajramālaṃbya tasthāvājī mahābalaḥ || 8 ||
varuṇaḥ śaktimālaṃbya dhairyamālaṃbya saṃsthitaḥ |
yamo'pi daṃḍamādāya yattaḥ samaratatparaḥ ||9||
tato yakṣādhipaḥ kāmaṃ babhūva raṇatatparaḥ |
pāvakaḥ śaktimādāya tatrābhūdyuddhamānasaḥ || 10 ||
nakṣatrādhipatiḥ sūryaḥ samaveto sthitāvubhau |
vīkṣya taṃ dānavaśreṣṭhaṃ yuddhāya kṛtaniścayau || 11 ||
etasminnaṃtare kruddhaṃ daityasainyaṃ samabhyagāt |
visṛjanbāṇajālāni kūrāhisadṛśīni ca || 12 ||
kṛtvā hi māhiṣaṃ rūpaṃ bhūpatiḥ saṃsthitastadā |
devadānavayodhānāṃ ninādastumulo'bhavat ||13||
jyāghātaśca talāghāto meghanādasamo'bhavat |
saṃgrāme sumahāghore devadānavasenayoḥ || 14 ||
śṛṃgāmyāṃ pārvatāñchṛgāṃvikṣepa ca mahābalaḥ |
jaghāna surasaṃghāṃśca dānavo madagarvitaḥ || 15 ||
khurāghātaistathā devānpucchasya bhrāmaṇena ca |
sa jaghāna ruṣāviṣṭo mahipaḥ paramādbhutaḥ || 16 ||
tato devāḥ sagaṃdharvā bhayamājagmurudyatāḥ |
maghavā mahiṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā palāyanaparo'bhavat || 17|| °
saṃgaraṃ saṃparityajya gate śakre śacīpatau |
yamo dhanādhipaḥ pāśī jagmuḥ sarve bhayāturāḥ || 18||

mahiṣo'pi jayaṃ bhatvā jagāma svagṛhaṃ tataḥ |
airāvataṃ gajaṃ prāpya tyaktamidreṇa gacchatā || 19 ||
tathoccaiḥśravasaṃ bhānoḥ kāmadhenuṃ payasvinam |
svasainyasaṃvṛtastūrṇaṃ svargaṃ gaṃtuṃ mano dadhe || 20 ||
tarasā devasadanaṃ gatvā sa mahiṣāsuraḥ |
jagrāha surarājyaṃ vai tyaktaṃ devairbhayāturaiḥ ||21||
indrāsane tadā ramye dānavaḥ samupāviśat |
dānavānsthāpayāmāsa devānāṃ sthānakeṣu saḥ ||22||
evaṃ varṣaśataṃ pūrṇaṃ kṛtvā yuddhaṃ sudāruṇam |
atrādrapadaṃ kāmaṃ dānavo madagarvitaḥ || 23||
nirjarā nirgatā nākāttena sarve'tipīḍitāḥ |
evaṃ bahūni varṣāṇi babhramurgirigahvare ||24||
śrāṃtāḥ sarve tadā rājanbrahmāṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayuḥ |
prajāpati jagannāthaṃ rajorūpaṃ caturmukham || 25||
padmāsanaṃ vedagarbha sevitaṃ munibhiḥ svajaiḥ |
marīcipramukhaḥ śāṃtairvedavedāṅgapāragaiḥ ||26||
kinnaraiḥ siddhagaṃdharvaiśvāraṇoragapannagaiḥ |
tuṣṭuvurbhayabhītāste devadevaṃ jagadgurum ||27||
devā ūcuḥ
ghātaḥ kimetadakhilātiharāṃbujanma janmābhivīkṣya na dayāṃ kuruṣe surān yat |
saṃpīḍitānraṇajitānasurādhipena sthānacyutāngiriguhākṛtasannivāsān ||28||
putrampitā kimaparādhaśataiḥ sametānsaṃtyajya lobharahitaḥ kurute'tiduḥsthān |
yastvaṃ surāṃstava padāṃbujabhaktiyuktāndaityāditāṃśca kṛpaṇān yadupekṣase'dya ||29||
amarabhuvanarājyaṃ tena bhuktaṃ nitāṃtaṃ makhahavirapi yogyaṃ brāhmaṇaṃrādadāti |
surataruvarapuṣpaṃ sevate'sau durātmā jalanidhinidhibhūtāṃ gāmasau sevate tām ||30||
ki vāṃ gṛṇīmaḥ surakāryamadbhutaṃ jānāsi deveśa surāriceṣṭitam |
jñānena sarvaṃ tvamaśeṣakāryavittasmātprabho te praṇatāḥ sma pādayoḥ ||31||
yatrāpi kutrāpi gatānsurānasau nānācaritraḥ khalu pāpamānasaḥ |
pīḍāṃ karotyeva sa dṛṣṭaceṣṭitastrātā'si deveśa vidhehi śaṃ vibho ||32||
no ceṭṭayaṃ dāvamahāgnipīḍitāḥ kaṃ śāṃtikartāramanaṃtatejasam |
yāmaḥ prajeśaṃ śaraṇaṃ sureṣṭaṃ dhātāramādyaṃ parimucya kaṃ śivam ||33||
iti stutvā surāḥ sarve praṇemustaṃ prajāpatim |
baddhāṃjalipuṭāḥ sarve viṣaṇṇavadanā bhṛśam ||34||
tāṃstathā pīḍitāndṛṣṭvā tadā lokapitāmahaḥ |
uvāca ślakṣṇayā vācā sukhaṃ saṃjanayanniva ||35||
brahmovāca
kiṃ karomi surāḥ kāmaṃ dānavo varadarpitaḥ |
strīvadhyo'sau na puṃvadhyo vidheyaṃ tatra kiṃ punaḥ ||36||
brajāmo'dya surāḥ sarve kailāsaṃ parvatottamam |
śaṃkaraṃ purataḥ kṛtvā sarvakāryaviśāradam ||37||

tato vrajāma vaikuṃṭhaṃ yatra devo janārdanaḥ |
militvā devakāryaṃ ca vimṛśāmo viśeṣataḥ || 38 ||
ityuktvā haṃsamāruhya brahmā kāryasamuccaye |
devāṃśca pṛṣṭhataḥ kṛtvā kailāsābhimukho yayau ||39||
tāvacchivo'pi tarasā jñātvā dhyānena padmajam |
āgacchaṃtaṃ suraiḥ sārdhaṃ nirgataḥ svagṛhādvahiḥ || 40 ||
dṛṣṭvā parasparaṃ tau tu kṛtābhivādano bhṛśam |
praṇato ca suraiḥ sarve saṃtuṣṭau saṃbabhūvatuḥ || 41 ||
āsanāni pṛthagdattvā devebhyo girijāpatiḥ |
upaviṣṭeṣu teṣveva niṣasādāsane svake ||42||
kṛtvā tu kuśalapraśnaṃ brahmāṇaṃ vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ |
papraccha kāraṇaṃ devānkailāsāgamane vibhuḥ || 43 ||
śiva uvāca
kimatrāgamanaṃ brahmankṛtaṃ devaiḥ savāsavaiḥ |
bhavatā ca mahābhāga brūhi tatkāraṇaṃ kila || 44 ||
brahmovāca
mahiṣeṇa sureśāna pīḍitāḥ svarnivāsinaḥ |
bhramanti giridurgeṣu bhayatrastāḥ savāsavāḥ || 45 ||
yajñabhumahiṣo jātastathā'nye suraśatravaḥ |
pīḍitā lokapālāśca tvāmadya śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ || 46 ||
mayā te bhavanaṃ śaṃbho prāpitāḥ kāryagauravāt |
yadyuktaṃ tadvidhatsvādya surakāryaṃ sureśvara ||47||
tvayi bhāro'sti sarveṣāṃ devānāṃ bhūtabhāvana |
vyāsa uvāca
iti tadvacanaṃ śrutvā śaṃkaraḥ prahasannidam ||48||
vacanaṃ ślakṣṇayā vācā provāca padmajaṃ prati |
śiva uvāca
bhavataiva kṛtaṃ kāryaṃ varadānātpurā vibho ||49 ||
anarthadaṃ ca devānāṃ kiṃ kartavyamataḥ param |
īdṛśo balavāñchūra: sarvadevabhayapradaḥ || 50||
kā samarthā varā nārī taṃ haṃtuṃ madadarpitam |
na me bhāryā na te bhāryā saṃgrāmaṃ gaṃtumarhati || 51 ||
gatyaiva te mahābhāge yuyudhāte kathaṃ punaḥ |
indrāṇī ca mahābhāgā na yuddhakuśalāsti hi ||52||
kānyā haṃtuṃ sāmarthā'sti taṃ pāpaṃ madadarpitam |
mamedaṃ matamadyaiva gatvā devaṃ janārdanam || 53 ||
taṃ devakāryāya prerayāmaḥ susatvaram |
so'tibuddhimatāṃ śreṣṭho viṣṇuḥ sarvārthasādhane || 54 ||
stutvā
militvā vāsudevaṃ vai kartavyaṃ kāryocatanam |
prapañcena ca buddhayā sa saṃvidhāsyati sādhanam ||55||
vyāsa uvāca
iti rudravacaḥ śrutvā brahmādyāḥ surasattamāḥ |
upatthitāste tathetyuktvā śivena saha satvarāḥ ||56||
svakīyairvāhanaiḥ sarve yayurviṣṇupuraṃ prati |
mudritāñchakunāndṛṣṭvā kāryasiddhikarāñchubhān ||57||

vavurvātāḥ śubhāḥ śāṃtāḥ sugaṃdhāḥ śubhaśaṃsinaḥ |
pakṣiṇaśca śivā vācastatrocuḥ pathi sarvaśaḥ || 58||
nirmalaṃ cābhavadvayoma diśaśca vimalāstathā |
gamane tatra devānāṃ sarvaṃ śubhamivābhavat || 59 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 ||
atha aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tarasā te'tha saṃprāpya vaikuṃṭhaṃ viṣṇuvallabham |
dadṛśuḥ sarvaśobhāḍhyaṃ divya gṛhavirājitam ||1||
sarovāpīsaridbhiśca saṃyutaṃ sukhadaṃ śubham |
haṃsasārasacakrāhvaḥ kūjadbhiśca virājitam ||2||
caṃpakāśoka kahlāramaṃdāravakulāvṛtaiḥ |
mallikātilakāprātayutaiḥ kurabakādibhiḥ ||3||
kokilā rāvasannādaiḥ śikhaṃḍairnṛtya rañjitaiḥ |
bhramarārāvaramyaiśca divyairupavanairyutam ||4||
sunaṃdanaṃdanādyaiśva pārṣadairbhaktitatparaiḥ |
saṃsturvā dbharyutaṃ bhaktairananyabhavavṛttibhiḥ || 5 ||
prāsādai ratnakhacitaiḥ kāṃcanaiścitramaṇḍitaiḥ |
abhraṃlihaivirājadbhiḥ saṃyutaṃ śubhasadmakaiḥ ||6||
gāyadbhirdevagaṃdharvairnṛtyadbhirapsarogaṇaiḥ |
rañjitaṃ kinnaraiḥ śaśvadraktakaṃṭhairmanoharaiḥ ||7||
munibhiśca tathā śāntairvedapāṭhakṛtādaraiḥ |
stuvadbhiḥ śrutisūktaśca maṃḍitaṃ sadanaṃ hareḥ ||8||
te ca viṣṇugṛhaṃ prāpya dvārapāla śubhākṛtī |
vīkṣyocurjaya vijayo hemayaṣṭidharau sthitau || 9 ||
gatvaiko'pyubhayormadhye nivedayatu saṃgatān |
dvārasthānbrahmarudrādīnviṣṇudarśanalālasān ||10||
vyāsa uvāca
vijayastadvacaḥ śrutvā gatvā'tha viṣṇusannidhau |
sarvānsamāgatāndevānpraṇamyovāca satvaraḥ || 11||
vijaya uvāca
devadeva mahārāja ramākāṃta surārihan |
samāgatāḥ surāḥ sarve dvāri tiṣṭhati vai vibho || 12||
brahmā rudrastatheṃdraśca varuṇaḥ pāvako yamaḥ |
stuvanti vedavākyaistvāmamarā darśanārthinaḥ || 13 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ viṣṇurvijayasya ramāpatiḥ |
nirjagāma gṛhāttūrṇaṃ surānsamadhikotsavaḥ || 14||
gatvā vīkṣya harirdevāndvārasthāñchramarkāśitān |
prītipravaṇayā dṛṣṭayā prīṇayāmāsa duḥkhitān || 15||
praṇemuste surāḥ sarve devadevaṃ janārdanam |
tuṣṭuvuśca surārighnaṃ vāgbhirvedaviniśvitam || 16||
devā ūcuḥ
devadeva jagannātha sṛṣṭisthityaṃtakāraka |
dayasiṃdho mahārāja |
trāhi naḥ śaraṇāgatān ||17||

viṣṇuruvāca
viśaṃtu nirjarāḥ sarve kuśalaṃ kathayaṃtu vaḥ |
āsaneṣu kimarthaṃ ve militāḥ samupāgatāḥ || 18 ||
ciṃtāturāḥ kathaṃ jātā viṣaṇṇā dīnamānasāḥ |
brahmarudreṇa sahitāḥ kāryaṃ prabrūta satvaram ||19||
devā ūcuḥ
mahiṣeṇa mahārāja pīḍitāḥ pāpakarmaṇā |
asādhyenātiduṣṭena varadṛtena pāpinā ||20||
yajñabhāgānasau bhuṃkte brāhmaṇaiḥ pratipāditān |
amarā giridurgeṣu bhramanti ca bhayāturāḥ || 21 ||
varadānena dhātuḥ sa durjayo madhusūdana |
tasmāttvāṃ śaraṇaṃ prāptā jñātvā tatkāryagauravam ||
samartho'si samuddhatuṃ daityamāyāviśārada |
kuru kṛṣṇa vadhopāyaṃ tasya dānavamardana || 23 ||
dhātrā tasmai varo datto hyavadhyo'si naraiḥ kila |
kā strī tvevaṃvidhā bālā yā hanyāttaṃ śaṭhaṃ raṇe 24 ||
umā māvā śacī vidyā kā samarthā'sya ghātane |
mahiṣasyātiduṣṭasya varadānabalādapi || 25||
vicintya buddhayā yatsarvaṃ maraṇasyāsya kāraṇam |
kuru kāryaṃ ca devānāṃ bhaktavatsala bhūdhara || 26||
vyāsa uvāca
śrutvā tadvacanaṃ viṣṇustānuvāca hasanniva |
yuddhaṃ kṛtaṃ purā'smābhistathāpi na mṛto sau || 27 ||
adya sarvasurāṇāṃ vai tejobhī rūpasampadā |
utpannā cedvarārohā sā hanyāttaṃ raṇe balāt ||28||
hayāri varadṛptaṃ ca māyāśataviśāradam |
haṃtuṃ yogyā bhavennārī saktyaṃśanirmitā hi naḥ || 29 ||
prārthayaṃtu ca tejaśāstriyo'smākaṃ tathā punaḥ |
utpannastaiśca tejoṃśaistejorāśirbhavedyathā ||30||
āyudhāni vayaṃ dadmaḥ sarve rudrapurogamāḥ |
tasyai sarvāṇi divyāni triśūlādīni yāni ca ||
sarvāyudhadharā nārī sarvatejaḥ samanvitā |
haniṣyati durātmānaṃ taṃ pāpaṃ madargāvitam ||32||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktavati deveśe brahmaṇo vadanāttataḥ |
svayamevodbabhau tejorāśicātīva duḥsahaḥ ||33||
raktavarṇaṃ śubhākāraṃ padmarāgamaṇiprabham |
kiṃcicchītaṃ tathācoṣṇaṃ marīcijālamaṃḍitam ||34||
niḥsṛtaṃ hariṇā dṛṣṭaṃ hareṇa ca mahātmanā |
vismitau tau mahārāja babhūvatururukramī ||35||
śaṃkarasya śarīrāttu niḥsṛtaṃ mahadadbhutam |
raupyavarṇamabhūttīvraṃ durdarśaṃ dāruṇaṃ mahat || 36 ||
bhayaṃkaraṃ ca daityānāṃ devānāṃ vismayapradam |
ghorarūpaṃ giriprakhyaṃ tamoguṇamivāparam ||37||
tato viṣṇuśarīrāttu tejorāśibhivāparam |
nīlaṃ sattvaguṇopetaṃ prādurāsa mahādyuti || 38 ||
tataceṃdraśarīrātu citrarūpaṃ durāsadam |
āvirāsītsusaṃvṛttaṃ tejaḥ sarvaguṇātmakam ||39||
kuberayamavahnīnāṃ śarīrebhyaḥ samaṃtataḥ |
niśvakāma mahattejo varuṇasya tathaiva ca || 40 ||
anyeṣāṃ caiva devānāṃ śarīrebhyo'tibhāsvaram |
nirgataṃ tanmahattejo rāśirāsīnmahojjvalaḥ || 41 ||

taṃ dṛṣṭvā vismitāḥ sarve devā viṣṇupurogamāḥ |
tejorāśi mahādivyaṃ himācalamivāparam ||42||
paśyatāṃ tatra devānāṃ tejaḥpukhasamudbhavā |
babhūvātivarā nārī sundarī vismayapradā ||43||
triguṇā sā mahālakṣmīḥ sarvadevaśarīrajā |
aṣṭādaśabhujā ramyā trivarṇā viśvamohinī || 44||
śvetānanā kṛṣṇanetrā saṃraktādharapallavā |
tāmrapāṇitalā kāṃtā divyabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā || 45 ||
aṣṭādaśabhujā devī sahasrabhuja maṃḍitā |
saṃbhūtā'suranāśāya tejorāśisamudbhavā ||46||
janamejaya uvāca
kṛṣṇa deva mahābhāga sarvajña munisattama |
vistaraṃ brūhi tasyāstvaṃ śarīrasya samudbhavam ||47||
ekībhūtaṃ ca sarveṣāṃ tejaḥ kiṃ vā pṛthaksthitam |
aṅgāni caiva tasyāstu sarvatejomayāni vā ||48 ||
bhinnabhāgavibhāgena jātānyaṃgāni yāni tu |
mukhanāsākṣibhedena sarvatraikabhavāni ca ||49||
brūhi tadvistaraṃ vyāsa śarīrāṅgasamudbhavam |
babhūva yasya devasya tejaso'ṅgaṃ yadadbhutam ||50||
āyudhābharaṇādīni dattāni yairyathā yathā |
satsarvaṃ śrotukāmo'smi tvanmukhāṃbujanirgatam ||51||
na hi tṛpyāmyahaṃ brahmansudhāmayarasaṃ piban |
caritaṃ ca mahālakṣmyāstvanmukhāṃbhoja niḥsṛtam || 52||
sūta uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā rājñaḥ satyavatīsuta |
uvāca madhuraṃ vākyaṃ prīṇayanniva bhūṣitam ||53||
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanmahābhāga vistareṇa bravīmi te |
yathāmati kuruśreṣṭha tasyā dehasamudbhavam ||54||
na brahmā na hariḥ sākṣānna rudro na ca vāsatraḥ |
yāthātathyena tadrūpaṃ vaktumīśaḥ kadācana ||55||
kathaṃ jānāmyahaṃ devyā yadrūpaṃ yādṛśaṃ yataḥ |
vācāraṃbhaṇamātraṃ tadutpanneti bravīmiṃ yat || 56 ||
sā nityā sarvadaivāste devakāryārthasiddhaye |
nānārūpā tvekarūpā jāyate kāryagauravāt || 57 ||
yathā naṭo raṃgagato nānārūpo bhavatyasau |
ekarūpasvabhāvo'pi lokaraṃjanahetave ||58||
tathaiṣā devakāryārthamarūpā'pi svalīlayā |
karoti bahurūpāṇi nirguṇā saguṇāni ca || 59||
kāryakarmānusāreṇa nāmāni pravadaṃti hi |
dhātvarthaguṇayuktāni gauṇāni subahūnyapi || 60 ||
ta buddhayanusāreṇa prabravīmi narādhipa |
yathā tejaḥ samudbhūtaṃ rupaṃ tasyā manoharam ||61||
śaṃkarasya |
ca yattejastena tanmukhapaṃkajam |
śvetavarṇaṃ śubhākāramajāyata mahattaram ||62||
keśāstasyāstathā snigdhāyāmyenatejasā'bhavan |
vakrāgrāścātidīrghā vai meghavarṇā manoharāḥ || 63||
nayanatritayaṃ tasyā jajñe pāvakatejasā |
kṛṣṇaṃ raktaṃ tathā śvetaṃ varṇatrayavibhūṣitam || 64 ||
cakre snigdhe kṛṣṇavarṇe saṃdhyayostejasā bhruvau |
jāte devyāḥ sutejaske kāmasya dhanuṣīva te || 65||
vāyośca tejasā śastau śravaṇī saṃbabhūvatuḥ |
nāti dīrgho nātihrasvo dolāviva manobhuvaḥ || 66 ||

tilapuṣpasamākārā nāsikā sumanoharā |
saṃjātā snigdhavarṇā vai dhanadasya ca tejasā || 67 ||
daṃtā: śikhariṇaḥ ślakṣṇāḥ kundāgrasadṛśāḥ samāḥ |
saṃjātāḥ suprabhā rājanprājāpatyena tejasā || 68 ||
adharaśvātirakto'syāḥ saṃjāto'ruṇatejasā |
uttaroṣṭhastathā ramyaḥ kārtikeyasya tejasā ||69||
aṣṭādaśabhujākārā bāhavo viṣṇutejasā |
vasūnāṃ tejasāṃgulyo raktavarṇāstathā'bhavan || 70 ||
saumyena tejasā jātaṃ stanayoryugmamuttamam |
aindreṇāsyāstathā madhyaṃ jātaṃ tribalisaṃyutam || 71 ||
jaṃghorū varuṇasyātha tejasā saṃbabhūvatuḥ |
nitaṃbaḥ sa tu saṃjāto vipulastejasā bhuvaḥ || 72||
evaṃ nārī śubhākārā sarūpā susvarā bhṛśam |
samutpannā tathā rājaṃstejorāśisamudbhavā || 73 ||
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā suṣṭhu sarvāṃgī sudatīṃ cārulocanām |
mudaṃ prāpuḥ surāḥ sarve mahiṣeṇa prapīḍitāḥ ||74 ||
viṣṇustvāha surānsarvānbhūṣaṇānyāyudhāni ca |
prayacchaṃtu śubhānyasyai devāḥ sarvāṇi sāṃpratam ||75 ||
svāyudhebhyaḥ samutpādya tejoyuktāni satvarāḥ |
samarpayaṃtu sarve'dya devyai nānāyudhāni vai || 76 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe paṃcamaskandhe devyāḥ svarūpodbhavo nāmāṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||
atha navamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
devā viṣṇuvacaḥ śrutvā sarve pramuditāstadā |
daduśca bhūṣaṇānyāśu vastrāṇi svāyudhāni ca || 1 ||
kṣīrodaścāṃbare divye rakte sūkṣme tathā'jare |
nirmalaṃ ca tathā hāraṃ prītastasyai sumaṃḍitam ||2||
dadau cūr̤āmaṇi divyaṃ sūryakoṭisamaprabham |
kuṇḍale ca tathā śubhre kaṭakāni bhujeṣu vai || 3||
keyūrānkaṃkaṇāndivyānnānāratnavirājitān |
dadau tasyai viśvakarmā prasanneṃdriyamānasaḥ || 4|
nūpūrī susvarī kāṃtī nirmalo ratnabhūpitau |
dadau sūryapratīkāśī tvaṣṭā tasyai supādayoḥ ||5||
tathā graiveyakaṃ ramyaṃ dadau tasyai mahārṇavaḥ |
aṃgulīyakaratnāni tejovanti ca sarvaśaḥ ||6||
amlānapaṃkajāṃ mālāṃ gaṃdhāḍhyāṃ bhramarānugām |
tathaiva vaijayantīṃ ca varuṇaḥ saṃprayacchata || 7 |
himavānatha saṃtuṣṭo ratnāni vividhāni ca |
dadau ca vāhanaṃ siṃhaṃ kanakābhaṃ manoharam || 8||
bhūṣaṇairbhūpitā divyaiḥ sā rarāja varā śubhā |
siṃhārūḍhā varārohā sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutā || 9||
viṣṇuścakrātsamutpādya dadāvasyai rathāṃgakam |
sahasrāraṃ sudīptaṃ ca devāriśirasāṃ haram ||10||
svatriśūlātsamutpādya śaṃkaraḥ śūlamuttamam |
dadau devyai surārīṇāṃ kṛṃtanaṃ bhayanāśanam ||11||
varuṇaśca prasannātmā dadau śaṃkhaṃ samujjvalam |
ghoṣavaṃtaṃ svaśaṃkhāttu samutpādya sumaṃgalam ||12||
hutāśanastathā śakti śataghnīṃ sumanojavām |
prāyacchattu prasannātmā tasyai daityavināśinīm || 13||

iṣudhi bāṇapūrṇaṃ ca cāpaṃ cādbhutadarśanam |
māruto dattavāṃstasyai durākarṣaṃ kharasvaram ||14||
svavapatrādvajramutpādya dadāvindro'tidāruṇam |
ghaṃṭāmairāvatāttūrṇaṃ suśabdāṃ cātisundarām || 15 ||
dadau daṃḍaṃ yamaḥ kāmaṃ kāladaṃḍasamudbhavam |
yenāṃtaṃ sarvabhūtānāmakarotkāla āgate || 16 ||
brahmā kamaṃḍaluṃ divyaṃ gaṃgāvāriprapūritam |
dadāvasyai mudāyukto varuṇaḥ pāśameva ca || 17||
kāla: khaḍgaṃ tathā carma prāyacchattu narādhipa |
paraśuṃ viśvakarmā ca tīkṣṇamasyai dadāvatha || 18 |
dhanadastu surāpūrṇaṃ pānapātraṃ suvarṇajam |
paṃkajaṃ varuṇaścādāddevyaṃ divyaṃ manoharam || 19 || |
gadāṃ kaumodakīṃ tvaṣṭā ghaṃṭāśataninādinīm |
adāttasyai prasannātmā suraśatruvināśinīm ||20||
astrāṇyanekarūpāṇi tathā'bhedyaṃ ca daṃśanam |
dadau tvaṣṭā jaganmātre nijaraśmīndivākaraḥ ||21||
sāyudhāṃ bhūṣaṇairyuktāṃ dṛṣṭvā te vismayaṃ gatāḥ |
tuṣṭuvustāṃ surā devīṃ trailokyamohinoṃ śivām ||22||
devā ūcuḥ
namaḥ śivāyai kalyāṇyaṃ śāṃtyaṃ puṣṭayai namonamaḥ |
bhagavatyai namo devyai rudrāṇyai satataṃ namaḥ || 23||
kālarātryaṃ tathāṃbāyai iṃdrāṇyai te namonamaḥ |
siddhayai buddhayaṃ tathā vṛdvadhaṃ vaiṣṇavyaṃ te namonamaḥ ||24||
pṛthivyāṃ yā sthitā pṛthvyā na jñātā pṛthivī ca yā |
antaḥ sthitā yamayati vaṃde tāmīśvarīṃ parām || 25 ||
māyāyāṃ yā sthitā jñātā māyayā na ca tāmajām |
antaḥ sthitā prerayati prerayitrīṃ numaḥ śivām ||26||
kalyāṇaṃ kuru bho mātastrāhi naḥ śatrutāpitān |
jahi pāpaṃ hayāri tvaṃ tejasā svena mohitam ||27||
khalaṃ māyāvinaṃ ghoraṃ strīvadhyaṃ varadarpitam |
duḥkhadaṃ sarvadevānāṃ nānārūpadharaṃ śaṭham ||28||
tvamekā sarvadevānāṃ śaraṇaṃ bhaktavatsale |
pīḍitāndānavenādya trāhi devi namo'stu te || 29||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ stutā tadā devī suraiḥ sarvasukhapradā |
tānuvāca mahādevī smitapūrvaṃ śubhaṃ vacaḥ || 30 || |
devyuvāca
bhayaṃ tyajaṃtu gīrvāṇā mahiṣānmandacetasaḥ |
haniṣyāmi raṇe'dyaiva varadṛptaṃ vimohitam || 31 || "
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā sā surāndevī jahāsātīva susvaram |
citrametacca saṃsāre bhramamohayutaṃ jagat ||32||
brahmaviṣṇumaheśādyāḥ seṃdrāśvānye surāstathā |
kaṃpayuktā bhayatrastā vartante mahiṣātkila || 33||
maho daivabalaṃ ghoraṃ durjayaṃ surasattamāḥ |
kālaḥ kartā'sti duḥkhānāṃ sukhānāṃ prabhurīśvaraḥ 34||

sṛṣṭipālanasaṃhāre samarthā api te yadā |
muhyaṃti kleśasantaptā mahiṣeṇa prapīḍitāḥ ||35||
iti kṛtvā smitaṃ devī sā'ṭṭahāsaṃ cakāra ha |
uccaiḥ śabdaṃ mahāghoraṃ dānavānāṃ bhayapradam || 36 ||
cakampe vasudhā tatra śrutvā tacchabdamadbhutam |
celuśca parvatāḥ sarve cukṣobhābdhiśca vīryavān ||37||
meruśvacāla śabdena diśaḥ sarvāḥ prapūritāḥ |
bhayaṃ jagmustadā śrutvā dānavāstatsvanaṃ mahat ||38||
jaya pāhīti devāstāmūcuḥ paramaharṣitāḥ |
mahiṣo'pi svanaṃ śrutvā cukopa madagarvitaḥ || 39 || |
kimetaditi tāndaityānpapraccha svanaśaṃkitaḥ |
gacchaṃtu tvaritā dūtā jñātuṃ śabdasamudbhavam ||40||
kṛtaḥ kenāyamatyugraḥ śabdaḥ karṇavyathākaraḥ |
devo vā dānavo vā'pi yo bhavetsvanakārakaḥ ||41||
gṛhītvā taṃ durātmānaṃ matsamīpaṃ nayaṃtviha |
haniṣyāmi durācāraṃ garjantaṃ smayadurmadam ||42 ||
kṣīṇāyuṣyaṃ mandamati nayāmi yamasādanam |
parājitāḥ surāḥ kāmaṃ na garjanti bhayāturāḥ || 43 ||
nāsurā mama vaśyāste kasyedaṃ mūḍhaceṣṭitam |
tvaritā māmupāyāṃtu jñātvā śabdasya kāraṇam ||44||
ahaṃ gatvā haniṣyāmi taṃ pāpaṃ vitathaśramam |
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktāstena te dūtā devīṃ sarvāṅgasundarīm ||45||
aṣṭādaśabhujāṃ divyāṃ sarvābharaṇabhūṣitām |
sarvalakṣaṇasampannāṃ varāyudhadharāṃ śubhām ||46||
dadhatīṃ caṣakaṃ haste pibantīṃ ca muhurmadhu |
saṃvīkṣya bhayabhītāste jagmustrastāḥ suśaṃkitāḥ ||47||
sakāśaṃ mahiṣasyāśu tamūcuḥ svanakāraṇam |
dūtā ūcuḥ
devī daityeśvara prauḍhā dṛśyate kācidaṃganā || 48||
sarvāṅgabhūṣaṇā nārī sarvaratnopaśobhitā |
na mānuṣī nāsurī sā divyarūpā manoharā || 49 ||
siṃhārūḍhā''yudhadharā cāṣṭādaśakarā varā |
sā nādaṃ kurute nārī lakṣyate madagarvitā ||50||
surāpānaratā kāmaṃ jānīmo na sabhartṛkā |
antarikṣasthitā devāstāṃ stuvaṃti mudānvitāḥ ||51||
jayeti pāhi naśceti jahi śatrumiti prabho |
na jāne kā varārohā kasya vā sā parigrahaḥ || 52||
kimarthamāgatā cātra kiṃ cikīrṣati sundarī |
draṣṭuṃ naiva samarthāḥ sma tattejaḥ paridharṣitāḥ || 53||
śṛṃgāravīrahāsāḍhyā raudrādbhutarasānvitā |
dṛṣṭavaṃvidhāṃ nārīmasambhāṣya samāgatāḥ || 54 ||
vayaṃ tvadājñayā rājanika kartavyamataḥ param |
mahiṣa uvāca
gaccha vīra mayādiṣṭo maṃtriśreṣṭha balānvitaḥ || 55 ||

sāmādibhirupāyaistvaṃ samānaya śubhānanām |
nāyāti yadi sā nārī tribhiḥ sāmādibhistviha || 56 ||
ahatvā tāṃ varārohāṃ tvamānaya mamāntikam |
karomi paṭṭamahiṣīṃ tāṃ marālabhruvaṃ mudā || 57 ||
prītiyuktā samāyāti yadā sā mṛgalocanā |
rasabhaṃgo yathā na syāttathā kuru mamepsitam ||58||
śravaṇānmo hito'smyadya tasyā rūpasya sampadā |
vyāsa uvāca
mahiṣasya vacaḥ śrutvā peśalaṃ mantrisattamaḥ ||59||
jagāma tarasā kāmaṃ gajāśvarathasaṃyutaḥ |
gatvā dūrataraṃ sthitvā tāmuvāca manasvinīm ||60||
vinayāvanataḥ ślakṣṇaṃ mantrī madhurayā girā |
pradhāna uvāca
kāṃsi tvaṃ madhurālāpe kimatrāgamanaṃ kṛtam || 61||
pṛcchati tvāṃ mahābhāge manmukhena mama prabhuḥ |
sa jetā sarvadevānāmavadhyastu naraiḥ kila || 62 ||
brahmaṇo varadānena garvitaścārulocane |
daityeśvaro'sau balavānkāmarūpadharaḥ sadā ||63||
śrutvā tvāṃ samupāyātāṃ cāruveṣāṃ manoharām |
praṣṭumicchati rājā me mahiṣo nāma pārthivaḥ ||64||
mānuṣaṃ rūpamādāya tvatsamīpaṃ sameṣyati |
yathā rucyeta cārvaṅgi tathā manyāmahe vayam || 65 ||
tarhyehi mṛgaśāvākṣi samīpaṃ tasya dhīmataḥ |
no cedihānayāmyenaṃ rājānaṃ bhaktitatparam ||66||
tathā karomi deveśi yathā te manasepsitam |
vagago'sau tavātyarthaṃ rūpasaṃśravaṇāttava || 67||
karabhoru vadāśu tvaṃ saṃvidheyaṃ mayā tathā || 68 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe devīmāhātmye navamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 ||
atha daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā prahasya pramadottamā |
tamuvāca mahārāja meghagambhīrayā girā || 1||
devyuvāca
mantrivarya surāṇāṃ vai jananīṃ viddhi māṃ kila |
mahālakṣmīmiti khyātāṃ sarvadaityanipūdinīm ||2||
prārthitā'haṃ suraiḥ sarvairmahiṣasya vadhāya ca |
pīḍiteṃdra nivendreṇa yajñabhāga bahiṣkṛtaiḥ ||3||
tasmādihāgatā'smyadya tadvadhārthaṃ kṛtodyamā |
ekākinī na sainyena saṃyutā mantrisattama ||4||
yattvayā'haṃ sāmapūrvaṃ kṛtvā svāgatamādarāt |
uktā madhurayā vācā tena tuṣṭā'smi te'nagha ||5||

moceddhanmi dṛṇā tvāṃ vai kālāgnisamayā kila |
kasya prītikaraṃ na syānmādhuryavaṃcanaṃ khalu || 6 ||
gaccha taṃ mahiṣaṃ pāpaṃ vada madvacanādidam |
gaccha pātālamadhunā jīvitecchā yadasti te ||7||
nocetkṛtāgasaṃ duṣṭaṃ haniṣyāmi raṇāṅgaṇe |
madvāṇakṣuṇṇa dehastvaṃ gaṃtā'si yamasādanam ||8||
dayālutvaṃ mamedaṃ tvaṃ viditvā gaccha satvaram |
hate tvayi surā mūḍha svargaṃ prāpsyati satvaram ||9||
tasmādgacchasva tyaktvaiko medinīṃ ca sasāgarām |
pātālaṃ taranā maṃda yāvadvāṇā na me'patan || 10 ||
yuddhecchā cenmanasi te toṃhi tvarito'sura |
vīrairmahābalaiḥ sarvairnayāmi yamasādanam ||11||
yuge yuge mahāmūḍha hatāstvatsadṛśāḥ kila |
asaṃkhyātāstathā tvāṃ vai haniṣyāmi raṇāṃgaṇe || 12 |
sāphalyaṃ kuru śastrāṇāṃ dhāraṇe tu śramo'nyathā |
tadyuddhayasva mayā sārdhaṃ samare smarapīḍitaḥ || 13 ||
mā gavaṃ kuru duṣṭātman yanme'sti brahmaṇo varaḥ |
stravadhyatve tvayā mūḍha pīḍitāḥ surasattamāḥ || 14 ||
kartavyaṃ vacanaṃ dhātustenāhaṃ tvāmupāgatā |
strīrūpamatulaṃ kṛtvā satyaṃ haṃtuṃ kṛtāgasam ||15||
yathecchaṃ gaccha vā mūḍha pātālaṃ pannagāvṛtam |
hitvā bhūsurasadmādya jīvitecchā yadasti te || 16 ||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktaḥ sa tato devyā maṃtriśreṣṭho balānvitaḥ |
pratyuvāca niśamyāsau vacanaṃ hetugarbhitam || 17 ||
devi strīsadṛśaṃ vākyaṃ khūpe tvaṃ madagarvitā |
kvāsau kva tvaṃ kathaṃ yuddhamasaṃbhāvyamidaṃ kila || 18 ||
ekākinī punarvālā prārabdhayauvanā mṛduḥ |
mahiṣo'sau mahākāyo duvibhāvyaṃ hi saṃgaram ||49||
sainyaṃ vahuvidhaṃ tasya hastyaśvarathasaṃkulam |
padātigaṇasaṃviddhaṃ nānādhavirājitam || 20 ||
kaḥ śramaḥ karirājasya mālatīpuṣpamardane |
māraṇe tava vāmoru mahipasya tathā raṇe || 21 ||
yadi tvāṃ paruṣaṃ vākyaṃ bravīmi svalpamapyaham |
śṛṃgāre tadviruddhaṃ hi rasabhaṅgādvibhemyaham ||22||
rājā'smākaṃ suraripurvartate tvayi bhaktimān |
sāmameva mayā vācyaṃ dānayuktaṃ tathā vacaḥ || 23 ||
noceddhanmyahamadyaiva vāṇena tvāṃ mṛpāvadām |
mithyā'bhimānacaturāṃ rūpayauvana garvitām || 24 ||
svāmī me mohitaḥ śrutvā rūpaṃ te bhuvanātigam |
tatpriyārthaṃ priyaṃ kāmaṃ vaktavyaṃ tvayi yanmayā || 29||
rājyaṃ tava janaṃ sarva dāsaste mahiṣaḥ kila |
kuru bhāvaṃ viśālākṣi tyaktvā roṣaṃ mṛtipradam ||
patāmi pādayoste'haṃ bhaktibhāvena bhāmini |
paṭṭarājñī mahārājño bhava śīghraṃ śucismite ||27||
trailokyavibhavaṃ savaṃ prāpsyasi tvamanāvilam |
sukhaṃ saṃsārajaṃ sarva mahipasya parigrahāt ||28||
devyuvāca
śṛṇu mantrinpravakṣyāmi vākyānāṃ sāramuttamam |
śāstradṛṣṭena mārgeṇa cāturyamanucitya ca ||25||
mahiṣasya pradhānastvaṃ mayā jñātaṃ dhiyā kila |
paśubuddhisvabhāvo'si vacanāttava sāṃpratam ||30||

maṃtriṇastvādṛśā yasya sa kathaṃ buddhimānbhavet |
ubhayoḥ sadṛśo yogaḥ kṛto'yaṃ vidhinā kila ||31||
yaduktaṃ strīsvabhāvā'si tadvicāraya mūḍha kim |
pumānnāhaṃ tatsvabhāvā'bhavaṃ strīveṣadhāriṇī ||32||
yāvitaṃ maraṇaṃ pūrvaṃ striyā tvatprabhuṇā yathā |
tasmānmanye'timūrkho'so na vīrarasavittamaḥ ||33||
kāminyā maraṇaṃ klībaratidaṃ śūraduḥkhadam |
prārthitaṃ prabhuṇā tena mahiṣeṇātmabuddhinā ||34||
tasmātstrīrūpamādhāya kāryaṃ kartumupāgatā |
kathaṃ bibhemi tvadvākyairdharmaśāstravirodhakaiḥ || 35||
viparītaṃ yadā devaṃ tṛṇaṃ vajrasamaṃ bhavet |
vidhiścetsumukhaḥ kāmaṃ kuliśaṃ tūlavattadā || 36 ||
kiṃ sainyairāyudhaiḥ kiṃ vā prapañcairdurgasevanaiḥ |
maraṇaṃ sāṃprataṃ yasya tasya sainyaistu kiṃ phalam ||37||
yadā'yaṃ dehasaṃbaṃdho jīvasya kālayogataḥ |
tadeva likhitaṃ sarvaṃ sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ tathā mṛtiḥ ||38||
yasya yena prakāreṇa maraṇaṃ daivanirmitam |
tasya tenaiva jāyeta nānyatheti viniścayaḥ || 39||
brahmādīnāṃ yathā kāle nāśotpattī vinirmite |
tathaiva bhavataḥ kāmaṃ kimanyeṣāṃ vicāryate ||40||
ye mṛtyudharmiṇasteṣāṃ varadānena darpitāḥ |
mariṣyāmo na manyaṃte te mūḍhā maṃdacetasaḥ ||41||
tasmādgaccha nṛpaṃ brūhi vacanaṃ mama satvaram |
yadājñāpayate bhūpastatkartavyaṃ tvayā kila ||42||
maghavā svargamāpnotu devāḥ saṃtu havirbhujaḥ |
yūyaṃ prayāta pātālaṃ yadi jīvitumicchatha ||43||
anyathā cenmatimaṃda mahipasya durātmanaḥ |
tadyadhyasva mayā sārdhaṃ maraṇāya kṛnādaraḥ || 44||
manyase saṃgare bhagnā devā viṣṇupurogamāḥ |
daivaṃ hi kāraṇaṃ tatra varadānaṃ prajāpateḥ || 45||
vyāsa uvāca
iti devyā vacaḥ śrutvā citayāmāsa dānavaḥ |
ki kartavyaṃ bhayā yuddhaṃ gaṃtavyaṃ vā nṛpaṃ prati || 46||
vivāhārthamihājñaptoṃ rājñā kāmātureṇa vai |
tatkathaṃ virasaṃ kṛtvā gaccheyaṃ nṛpasannidhau ||47||
iyaṃ buddhiḥ samīcīnā yadvajāmi kāla vinā |
yathā''gataṃ tathā gīnaṃ rājñe saṃvedayāmyaham ||48 ||
sa pramāṇaṃ punaḥ kārye rājā matimatāṃ baraḥ |
kariṣyati vicāryeva sacivainipuṇaiḥ saha ||49||
sahasā na mayā yuddhaṃ kartavyamanayā saha |
jayaṃ parājayaṃ vāṣi bhūpataṃrapriyaṃ bhavet || 50 ||
yadi mā suṃdarī hanyādahaṃ vā hanmi tāṃ punaḥ |
yena kenāpyupāyena sa kuṣyetpārthivaḥ kila ||51||
tasmāttatraiva gatvā'haṃ bodhayiṣyāmi taṃ nṛpam |
yathā'dyābhihitaṃ devyā yathāruci karotu saḥ || 52 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti saṃcitya medhāvī jagāma nṛpasannidhau |
praṇamya tamuvācedaṃ kṛtāṃjalirasātyakaḥ || 50||
mantryuvāca
rājandevī varārohā siṃhasyopari saṃsthitā |
aṣṭādaśabhujā ramyā varāyudhadharā parā ||54 ||
sā mayoktā mahārāja mahiṣaṃ bhaja bhāmini |
mahiṣī bhava rājñastvaṃ trailokyādhipateḥ priyā ||55||

paṭṭarājñī tvamevāsya bhavitā nātra saṃśayaḥ |
sa tavājñākaro jāto vaśavartī bhaviṣyati || 56 ||
trailokyavibhavaṃ bhuktvā cirakālaṃ varānane |
mahiṣaṃ patimāsādya yoṣitāṃ subhagā bhava ||57||
iti madvacanaṃ śrutvā sā smayāveśamohitā |
māmuvāca viśālākṣī smitapūrvamidaṃ vacaḥ || 58 ||
mahiṣīgarbhasaṃbhūtaṃ paśūnāmadhamaṃ kila |
bali dāsyāmyahaṃ daivyai surāṇāṃ hitakāmyayā ||59||
kā mūḍhā kāminī loke mahiṣaṃ vai patiṃ bhajet |
mādṛśī maṃdabuddhe kiṃ paśubhāvaṃ bhajediha || 60 ||
mahiṣī mahiṣaṃ nāthaṃ saśṛṃgā śṛṃgasaṃyutam |
kurute kaṃdamānā vai nāhaṃ tatsadṛśī śaṭhā || 61||
kariṣye'haṃ mṛdhe yuddhaṃ haniṣye tvāṃ surāpriyam |
gaccha vā duṣṭa pātālaṃ jīvitecchā yadasti te || 62 ||
paruṣaṃ tu tathā vākyamityuktaṃ nṛpa mattayā |
tacchrutvā'haṃ samāyātaḥ pravicitya punaḥ punaḥ || 63 ||
rasabhaṃgaṃ vicityaiva na yuddhaṃ tu mayā kṛtam |
ājñāṃ vinā tavātyaṃtaṃ kathaṃ kuryāṃ vṛthodyamam ||64 ||
sā'tīva ca balonmattā vartate bhūpa bhāminī |
bhavitavyaṃ na jānāmi kiṃ vā bhāvi bhaviṣyati ||
kārye'smistvaṃ pramāṇaṃ no maṃtro'tīva durāsadaḥ |
yuddhaṃ palāyanaṃ śreyo na jāne'haṃ viniścayam ||66 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe paṃcamaskandhe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ || 10 ||
atha ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā mahiṣo madavihvalaḥ |
maṃtrivṛddhān samāhūya rājā vacanamabravīt || 1||
kārya'sminnipuṇā yūyamupāyaiṣu vicakṣaṇāḥ |
sāmādiṣu ca kartavyaṃ viśrabdhaṃ brūta mā ciram ||2||
āgatā devavihitā māyeyaṃ śāṃbarīva kim |
sāmādiṣu ca kartavyaḥ ko'tra mahyaṃ bruvatu ca || 3 ||
bhantriṇa ūcuḥ
satyaṃ sadaiva vaktavyaṃ priyaṃ ca nṛpasattama |
kārya hitakaraṃ nūnaṃ vicārya vibudhaiḥ kila || 4 ||
satyaṃ ca hitakṛdrājanpriyaṃ cātikṛdbhavet |
yathaṣatraṃ nṛṇāṃ loke hyapriyaṃ roganāśanam ||5||
satyasya śrotā maṃtā ca durlabhaḥ pṛthivīpate |
vaktā'pi durlabhaḥ kāmaṃ bahvavābhāṣakāḥ || 6||
kathaṃ brūmo'tra nṛpate vicāre gahane tviha śubhaṃ vā'pyaśubhaṃ vā'pi ko vetti bhuvanatraye || 7 ||
rājovāca
svasvanatyanusāreṇa tuvatvā pṛthakpṛthak |
yeṣāṃ hi yādṛśo bhāvastacchrutvā cintayāmyaham ||
bahūnāṃ matamājñāya vicārya ca punaḥ punaḥ |
yacchreyastaddhi kartavyaṃ kārya kāryavicakṣaṇaḥ || 9 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tasyaivaṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā virūpākṣo mahābalaḥ |
uvāca tarasā vākyaṃ raṃjayanpṛthivīpatim ||10||

virūpākṣa uvāca
rājannārī varākīyaṃ sā brūte madargāvatā |
vibhīṣakāmātramidaṃ jñātavyaṃ vacanaṃ tvayā || 11 ||
ko bibheti striyo vākyairduruktaṃ raṇadurmadaiḥ |
anṛtaṃ sāhasaṃ ceti jānannārīviceṣṭitam || 12 || |
jitvā tribhuvanaṃ rājannadya kāṃtābhayena vai |
dīnatve'pyayaśo nūnaṃ vīrasya bhuvane bhavet || 13||
tasmādyāmyahamekākī yuddhāya caṃḍikāṃ prati |
haniṣye tāṃ mahārāja nirbhayo bhava sāṃpratam || 14||
senāvṛto'haṃ gatvā tāṃ śastrāstravividhaiḥ kila |
nipūdayāmi durmapa caṃḍikāṃ caṃḍavikramām ||15||
baddhvā sarpamayaiḥ pāśaiganayiṣye tavāṃtikam |
vaśagā tu sadā taṃ syātpaśya rājanvalaṃ mama || 16 ||
vyāsa uvāca
virūpākṣavacaḥ śrutvā durdharo vākyamabravīt |
satyamuktaṃ vaco rājanvirūpākṣeṇa dhīmatā || 17 ||
mamāpi vacanaṃ iṇaṃ śrotavyaṃ dhīmatā tvayā |
kāmāturapā sudatī lakṣyate'pyanumānataḥ || 18||
bhavatyevaṃvidhā kāmaṃ nāyikā rūpagarvitā |
bhīṣayitvā varārāhā tvāṃ vaśe kartumicchati ||19||
hāvo'yaṃ māninīnāṃ vai taṃ vetti rasavittamaḥ |
vakroktirepā kāminyāḥ priyaṃ prati parāyaṇam ||20||
veti ko'pi naraḥ kāmaṃ kāmaśāstravicakṣaṇaḥ |
yaduktaṃ nāma bāṇastvāṃ vadhiṣye raṇamūrdhani || 21 ||
hetugarbhamidaṃ vākyaṃ jñātavyaṃ hetuvittamaiḥ |
bāṇāstu māninīnāṃ vai kaṭākṣā eva viśrutāḥ ||22||
puṣpāṃjali mayā śrānye vyaṃgyāni vacanāni ca |
kā śaktiranyavāṇānāṃ preraṇe tvayi pārthiva || 23 ||
tādṛśīnāṃ na sā śaktirbrahmaviṣṇuharādiṣu |
yathoktaṃ netravārṇaistvāṃ haniṣyaṃ manda pārthivam ||24||
viparītaṃ parijñātaṃ tenārasavidā kila |
pātayiṣyāmi śayyāyāṃ raṇamayyāṃ pati tava || 25 ||
viparītaratikrīḍābhāṣaṇaṃ jñeyameva tat |
kariṣye vigataprāṇaṃ yaduktaṃ vacanaṃ tayā ||26||
vīyaṃ prāṇā iti proktaṃ tadvihīnaṃ na cānyathā |
vyaṃgyādhikyena vākyena varayatyuttamā nṛpa ||27||
sarva vicārato jñeyaṃ rasagranthavicakṣaṇaḥ |
iti jñātvā mahārāja kartavyaṃ rasasaṃyutam || 28||
sāmadānadvayaṃ tasyāṃ nānyopāyo'sti bhūpate |
ruṣṭā vā gavitā vā'pi vaśagā māninī bhavet || 29 ||
tādṛśairmadhurairvākyairānayiṣye tavāntikam |
kiṃ bahutena me rājankartavyā vaśavartinī || 30 ||
gatvā mayā'dhunaiveyaṃ kiṃkarīva sadaiva te |
vyāsa uvāca
itthaṃ niśamya tadākyaṃ tāmrastattvavicakṣaṇaḥ ||31||
uvāca vacanaṃ rājanniśāmaya mayoditam |
hetumaddharmasahitaṃ ramayuktaṃ navānvitam ||32||
naiṣā kāmāturā bālā nānuraktā vicakṣaṇā |
vyaṃgyāni naiva vākyāni tayoktāni tu mānada ||33||
citramatra mahābāho yadekā varṇinī |
nirālaṃbā samāyāti citrarūpā manoharā ||34||

aṣṭādaśabhujā nārī na śrutā na ca vīkṣitā |
kenāpi triṣu lokeṣu parākramavatī śubhā ||35|
māyudhānyapi tāvaṃti dhṛtāni balavaṃti ca |
viparītamidaṃ manye sarvaṃ kālakṛtaṃ nṛpa || 36 ||
svapnāni durnimittāni mayā dṛṣṭāni vai niśi |
tena jānāmyahaṃ nūnaṃ vaiśasaṃ samupāgatam ||37||
kṛṣṇāṃbaradharā nārī rudatī ca gṛhāṃgaṇe |
dṛṣṭā svapnepyupaḥkāle cititavyastadatyayaḥ || 38 ||
vikṛtāḥ pakṣiṇo rātrī roruvaṃti gṛhe gṛhe |
utpātā vividhā rājanprabhavaṃti gṛhe gṛhe || 39 ||
tena jānāmyahaṃ nūnaṃ kāraṇaṃ kiṃcideva hi |
yattvāṃ prārthayate bālā yuddhāya kṛtaniścayā ||40|
naiṣā'sti mānuṣī no vā gāṃdharvo na tathāsurī |
devaḥ kṛteyaṃ jñātavyā māyāmohakaro vibho || 41 ||
kātaratvaṃ na kartavyaṃ mamaitanmatamityalam |
kartatryaṃ sarvathā yuddhaṃ yadbhāvyaṃ tadbhaviṣyati ||42 ||
ko veda daivakartavyaṃ śubhaṃ vā'pyaśubhaṃ tathā |
avalaṃbya dhiyā dhairyaṃ sthātavyaṃ vaṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ || 43 ||
jīvitaṃ maraṇaṃ puṃsāṃ daivādhīnaṃ narādhipa |
ko'pi naivānyathā kartuṃ samartho bhuvanatraye ||44||
mahiṣa uvāca
gaccha tāmra mahābhāga yuddhāya kṛtaniścayaḥ |
tāmānaya varārohāṃ jitvā dharmeṇa māninīm ||45 ||
na bhavedvaśagā nārī saṃgrāme yadi sā tava |
haṃtavyā nānyathā kāmaṃ mānanīyā prayatnataḥ || 46 ||
vīrastvamasi sarvajña kāmaśāstraviśāradaḥ |
yena kenāpyupāyena jetavyā varavarṇinī ||47 ||
tvaran vīra mahābāho sainyena mahatā vṛtaḥ |
tatra gatvā tvayā jñeyā vicārya ca punaḥ punaḥ || 48 ||
kimarthamāgatā ceyaṃ jñātavyaṃ taddhi kāraṇam |
kāmādvā varaṃbhāvācca māyā kasyeyamityuta || 49||
ādau tanniścayaṃ kṛtvā jñātavyaṃ saccikīrpitam |
paścādyuddhaṃ prakartavyaṃ yathāyogyaṃ yathābalam ||50||
kātaratvaṃ na kartavyaṃ nirdayatvaṃ tathā na ca |
yādṛśaṃ hi manastasyāḥ kartavyaṃ tādaśaṃ tvayā || 51 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti tadbhāṣitaṃ śrutvā tāmraḥ kālavaśaṃ gataḥ |
nirgataḥ sainyasaṃyuktaḥ praṇamya mahiṣaṃ nṛpam || 52 ||
gacchanmārge durātmā'sau śakunānvīkṣya dāruṇān |
vismayaṃ ca bhayaṃ prāpa yamamārgapradarśakān ||53||
sa gatvā tāṃ samālokya devīṃ siṃhopari sthitām |
stūyamānāṃ suraiḥ sarvaiḥ sarvāyudhavibhūṣitām ||54 ||
tāmuvāca vinītaḥ san vākyaṃ madhurayā girā |
sāmabhāvaṃ samāśritya vinayāvanataḥ sthitaḥ ||55||
devi daityeśvaraḥ śrṛṃgī tvadrūpaguṇamohitaḥ |
spṛhāṃ karoti mahiṣastvatpāṇigrahaṇāya ca || 56 ||
bhāvaṃ kuru viśālākṣi tasminnamaradurjaye |
pati taṃ prāpya mṛhaṃgi naṃdane viharādbhute || 57 ||
sarvāṃgasundaraṃ dehaṃ prāpya sarvasukhāspadam |
sukhaṃ sarvātmanā grāhyaṃ duḥkhaṃ heyamiti sthitiḥ || 58||
karabhoru kimarthaṃ te gṛhītānyāyudhānyalam |
puṣpakaṃdukayogyāste karāḥ kamalakomalāḥ ||59||
bhrūcāpe vidyamāne'ṇi dhanuṣā ki prayojanam |
kaṭākṣā viśikhāḥ saṃti ki bāṇairniṣprayojanaiḥ || 60 ||

saṃsāre duḥkhadaṃ yuddhaṃ na kartavyaṃ vijānatā |
lobhāsaktāḥ prakurvaṃti saṃgrāmaṃ ca parasparam ||61||
puṣpairapi na yoddhavyaṃ kiṃ punarniśitaiḥ śaraiḥ |
bhedanaṃ nijagātrāṇāṃ kasya tajjāyate mude || 62 ||
tasmāttvamapi tanvaṃgi prasādaṃ kartumarhasi |
bhartāraṃ bhaja me nāthaṃ devadānavapūjitam || 63 ||
sa te'tra vāṃchitaṃ sarvaṃ kariṣyati manoratham |
tvaṃ paṭṭamahiṣī rājñaḥ sarvathā nātra saṃśayaḥ || 64||
vacanaṃ kuru me devi prāpsyase sukhamuttamam |
saṃgrāme jayasaṃdeha: kaṣṭaṃ prāpya na saṃśayaḥ || 65 ||
jānāsi rājanīti tvaṃ yathāvadvaravarṇini |
bhuṃkṣva rājyasukhaṃ pūrṇa varṣāṇāmayutāyutam || 66 ||
putraste bhavitā kāṃtaḥ so'pi rājā bhaviṣyati |
yauvane krīḍayitvānte vārdhakye sukhamāpsyasi || 67 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 ||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tanniśamya vacastasya tāmrasya jagadambikā |
meghagambhīrayā vācā hasaṃtī tamuvāca ha ||1||
devyuvāca
gaccha tāmra pati brūhi mumūrṣu mandacetasam |
mahipaṃ cātikāmārtaṃ mūḍhaṃ jñānavivarjitam ||2||
yathā te mahiṣī mātā prauḍhā yavasabhakṣiṇī |
nāhaṃ tathā śrṛṃgavatī laṃbapucchā mahodarī ||3||
na kāmaye'haṃ deveśaṃ naiva viṣṇuṃ na śaṃkaram |
dhanadaṃ varuṇaṃ naiva brahmāṇaṃ na ca pāvakam ||4||
etāndevagaṇānhitvā paśuṃ kena guṇena vai |
vṛṇomyahaṃ vṛthā ke garhaṇā me bhavediti || 5 ||
nāhaṃ patiṃvarā nārī vartate me patiḥ prabhuḥ |
sarvakartā sarvasākṣī hyakartā niḥspṛhaḥ sthiraḥ || 6 ||
nirguṇo nirmamo'naṃto nirālaṃbo nirāśrayaḥ |
sarvaśaḥ sarvagaḥ sākṣī pūrṇaḥ pūrṇāśayaḥ śivaḥ ||7||
sarvāvāsaḥ kṣamaḥ śāṃta sarvadṛksavabhāvanaḥ |
taṃ tyaktvā mahiṣaṃ maṃdaṃ kathaṃ sevitumutsahe ||8||
prabudhya yudhyatāṃ kāmaṃ karomi yamavāhanam |
