athavā manujānāṃ vai kariṣye jalavāhakam ||9||
jīvitecchā'sti cetpāpa gaccha pātālamāśu vai |
samastairdānavairyuktastvanyathā hanmi saṃgare || 10 ||
kāmaṃ sadṛśayoryogaḥ saṃsāreṃ sukhado bhavet |
anyathā duḥkhado bhūyādajñānādyadi kalpitaḥ || 11 ||
mūrkhastvamasi yadrūṣe pati me bhaja bhāmini |
kvāhaṃ kva mahiṣaḥ śṛṃgī sambandhaḥ kīdṛśo dvayoḥ ||
gaccha yudhyasva vā kāmaṃ haniṣye'haṃ sabāṃdhavam |
yajñabhāgaṃ devalokaṃ nocet tyaktvā sukhī bhava || 13||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā sā tadā devo jagarja bhṛśamadbhutam |
kalpāṃtasadṛśaṃ nādaṃ cakre daityabhayāvaham ||14||
cakaṃpe vasudhā celustena śabdena bhūdharāḥ |
garbhāśca daityapatnīnāṃ sasraṃsurgajitasvanāt || 15 ||

tāmraḥ śrutvā ca taṃ śabdaṃ bhayatrastamanāstadā |
palāyanaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā jagāma mahiṣāṃtikam ||16||
nagare tasya ye daityāste'pi citāmavāpnuvan |
badhirīkṛta karṇāśca palāyanaparā nṛpa || 17 ||
tadā krodhena siṃho'pi nanāda bhṛśamutsaṭaḥ |
tena nādena daiteyā bhayaṃ jagmurūpi sphuṭam ||18||
sānaṃ samāgataṃ dṛṣṭvā hayārirapi mohitaḥ |
citayāmāsa sacivaiḥ kiṃ kartavyamataḥ param || 19 || tāmraṃ
durgagraho vā kartavyo yuddhaṃ nirgatya vā punaḥ |
palāyane kṛte śreyo bhavedrā dānavottamāḥ ||20||
buddhimaṃto durādharṣāḥ sarve śāstraviśāradāḥ |
maṃtraḥ khalu prakartavyaḥ suguptaḥ kāryasiddhaye || 21 ||
maṃtramūlaṃ smṛtaṃ rājyaṃ yadi sa syātsurakṣitaḥ |
maṃtribhiśca sadācārairvidheyaḥ sarvathā budhaiḥ ||22||
mantrabhede vināśaḥ syādrājyasya bhūpatestathā |
tasmādbhedabhayādguptaḥ kartavyo bhūtimicchatā 23 ||
tadatra maṃtribhirvācyaṃ vacanaṃ hetumaddhitam |
kāladeśānusāreṇa vicitya nītinirṇayam ||24||
yā yoṣā'tra samāyātā prabalā devanirmitā |
ekākinī nirālaṃbā kāraṇaṃ tadvicityatām 25 ||
yuddhaṃ prārthayate bālā kimāścaryamataḥ param |
śreyo'tra viparītaṃ vā ko vetti bhuvanatraye || 26 ||
na bahūnāṃ jayo'pyasti naikasya ca parājayaḥ |
daivādhīno sadā jñeyo yuddhe jayaparājaya ||27||
upāyavādinaḥ prāhurdevaṃ ki kena vīkṣitam |
adṛṣṭamiti yannāma pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ || 28||
tatsattve'pi pramāṇaṃ kiṃ kātarāśāvalaṃbanam |
na samarthajanānāṃ hi devaṃ kutrāpi lakṣyate || 29||
udyamo daivameto hi śūrakātarayormatam |
vicityādya dhiyā sarva kartavyaṃ kāryamādarāt || 30 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti rājño vacaḥ śrutvā hetugarbhaṃ mahāyagāḥ |
viḍālākhyo mahārājamityuvāca kṛtāṃjaliḥ || 31 ||
rājaneṣā viśālākṣī jñātavyā yatnataḥ punaḥ |
kimarthamiha saṃprāptā kutaḥ kasya parigrahaḥ || 32||
maraṇaṃ taṃ parijñāya striyāḥ sarvātmanā suraiḥ |
preṣitā padmapatrākṣī samutpādya svatejasā ||33 ||
te'pi channāḥ sthitāḥ khe'tra sarve yuddhadidṛkṣavaḥ |
samaye'syāḥ sahāyāste bhaviṣyati yuyutsavaḥ ||34||
purataḥ kāminīṃ kṛtvā te vai viṣṇupurogamāḥ |
vadhiṣyanti ca naḥ sarvānsā tvāṃ yuddhe haniṣyati 35 ||
etaccikīrṣitaṃ teṣāṃ mayā jñātaṃ narādhipa |
bhavitavyasya na jñānaṃ vartate mama sarvathā || 36 ||
yoddhavyaṃ na tvayā'dyeti nāhaṃ vaktu kṣamaḥ prabho |
pramāṇaṃ tvaṃ mahārāja kārye'tra daivanirmite ||37||
tvadarthe'smābhiraniśaṃ martavyaṃ kāryagauravāt |
vihartavyaṃ tvayā sārdhameṣa dharmo'nujīvinām || 38 ||
vicāro'tra mahānasti yadekā kāminī nṛpa |
yuddhaṃ prārthayate'smābhiḥ sasainyairbaladarpitaiḥ || 39 ||
durmukha uvāca
rājan yuddhe jayaṃ no'dya bhavitā vedmayahaṃ kila |
palāyanaṃ na kartavyaṃ yaśohānikaraṃ nṛṇām ||40||
indrādīnāṃ saṃyuge'pi na kṛtaṃ yajjugupsitam |
ekākinīṃ striyaṃ prāpya ko hi kuryātpalāyanam 41 ||

tasmādyuddhaṃ prakartavyaṃ maraṇaṃ vā raṇe jayaḥ |
yadbhāvi tadbhavatyeva kātra ciṃtā vipaśyataḥ ||42||
maraṇe'tra yaśaḥ prāptirjīvane ca tathā sukham |
ubhayaṃ manasā kṛtvā kartavyaṃ yuddhamadya vai || 43 ||
palāyane yaśohānirbharaṇaṃ cāyuṣaḥ kṣaye |
tasmācchoko na kartavyo jīvite maraṇe vṛthā ||44 ||
vyāma uvāca
durmukhasya vacaḥ śrutvā bāṣkalo vākyamabravīt |
praṇataḥ prāṃjalirbhūmyā rājānaṃ vākya kovidaḥ || 45 ||
bāikala uvāca
rājaścitā na kartavyā kārye'sminkālarapriye |
ahameko haniṣyāmi caṃḍī caṃcalalocanām ||46 ||
utsāhastu prakartavyaḥ sthāyībhāvo rasasya ca |
bhayānako bhaberī vīrasya nṛpamattama ||47 ||
tasmāttyaktvā bhayaṃ bhūpa kariṣye yuddhamadbhutam |
nayiṣyāmi narendrāhaṃ caṃḍikāṃ yamasādanam ||48||
na bibhemi yamādidrātkuberāvaruṇādapi |
vāyorvastathā viṣṇoḥ śaṅkarācchaśino raveḥ 49 ||
ekākinī tathā nārī kiṃ punarmadagavitā |
ahaṃ tāṃ nihaniṣyāmi viśikhaiśva śilāśitaiḥ || 50 ||
paśya bāhubalaṃ me'dya viharasva yathāsukham |
bhavatā'tra na gaṃtavyaṃ saṃgrāme'pyanayā mamam ||51||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ bruvati rājendraṃ vākale madagarvite |
praṇamya nṛpati tatra durdharo vākyamabravīt ||52||
dudhara uvāca
mahiṣāhaṃ vijeṣyāmi devīṃ devavinirmitām |
aṣṭādaśabhujāṃ ramyāṃ kāraṇānva samāgatām ||53||
rājanbhīṣayituṃ tvāṃ vai prāyaiṣā nirmitā suraiḥ |
vibhīṣikeyaṃ vijñāya tyaja mohaṃ manogatam ||54||
rājanītiriyaṃ rājanmaṃnikṛtyaṃ tathā śṛṇu |
māttvikā rājasāḥ kecittāmasāśca tathāpare || 55||
mantriṇastrividhā loke bhavati dānavādhipa |
sāttvikāḥ prabhukāryāṇi sādhayaṃti svaśaktibhiḥ 56 ||
ātmakṛtyaṃ prakurvanti svāmikāryāvirodhata: |
ekacittā dharmaparā maṃtraśāstraviśāradāḥ || 57 ||
rājasā bhinnacittāśca svakāryaniratāḥ sadā |
kadācitsvāmikāryaṃ te prakurvanti yadṛcchayā || 58 ||
tāmasā lobhaniratāḥ svakāryaniratāḥ sadā |
prabhukāyaṃ vināśyaiva svakāryaṃ sādhayanti te || 59||
samayaṃ te vibhidyante paraṃstu parivaṃcitāḥ |
svacchidraṃ śatrupakṣīyānidiśati gṛhasthitāḥ || 60 ||
kāryabhedakarā nityaṃ kośaguptāsivatsadā |
saṃgrāme'tha samutpanne bhīpayanti prabhuṃ sadā || 61 ||
viśvāsastu na kartavyasteṣāṃ rājankadācana |
viśvāse kāryahāniḥ syānmaṃtra hāniḥ sadaiva hi || 62 ||
khalāḥ kiṃ kiṃ na kurvanti viśvastā lobhatatparāḥ |
tāmasāḥ pāpaniratā buddhihīnā: śaṭhāstathā || 63 ||
tasmātkāryaṃ kariṣyāmi gatvā'haṃ raṇamastake |
ciṃtā tvayā na kartavyā sarvathā nṛpasattama ||64 ||
gṛhītvā tāṃ durācārāmāgamiṣyāmi satvaraḥ |
paśya me'dya balaṃ dhairyaṃ prabhukāryaṃ svaśaktitaḥ || 65 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12 ||

atha trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā to mahābāhū daityau bāṣkaladurmukhau |
jagmaturmadadigdhāṃgī sarvaśastrāstrako vidau || 1 ||
to gatvā samare devīmūcaturvacanaṃ tadā |
dānavau ca madonmatto meghagaṃbhīrayā girā || 2 ||
debi devā jitā yena mahiṣeṇa mahātmanā |
varaya tvaṃ varārohe sarvadaityādhipaṃ nṛpam || 3 ||
sa kṛtvā mānuṣaṃ rūpaṃ sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutam |
bhūṣitaṃ bhūṣaṇaidivyaistvāmeṣyati rahaḥ kila || 4 ||
trailokyavibhavaṃ kāmaṃ tvameṣyasi śucismite |
mahiṣe paramaṃ bhāvaṃ kuru kāṃte manogatam ||5||
kṛtvā pati mahābīraṃ saṃsārasukhamadbhutam |
tvaṃ prāpsyasi pikālāpe yoṣitāṃ khalu vāṃchitam ||6||
śrīdevyuvāca
jālma tvaṃ kiṃ vijānāsi nārīyaṃ kāmamohitā |
maṃdabuddhibalātyarthaṃ bhajeyaṃ mahiṣaṃ śaṭham ||7|
kulaśīlaguṇaistulyaṃ taṃ bhajaṃti kulastriyaḥ |
adhikaṃ rūpacāturya buddhiśolakṣabhādibhiḥ || 8 ||
kā nu kāmāturā nārī bhajecca paśurūpiṇam |
paśūnāmadhamaṃ nūnaṃ mahiṣaṃ deva - piṇī || 9 ||
gaccha taṃ mahiṣaṃ tūrṇaṃ bhūpaṃ bāṣkaladurmado |
vadataṃ tadvaco daityaṃ gadatulyaṃ viṣāṇinam ||10||
pātālaṃ gaccha vā'bhyetya saṃgrāmaṃ kuru vā mayā |
raṇe jāte sahasrākṣo nirbhayaḥ syāditi dhruvam || 11||
hatvāhaṃ tvāṃ gamiṣyāmi nānyathā gamanaṃ mama |
itthaṃ jñātvā sudurbuddhe yathecchasi tathā kuru || 12||
māmanirjitya bhūbhāge na sthānaṃ te kadācana |
bhaviṣyati catuṣpāda divi vā girikandare || 13 ||
vyāsa uvāca
ityukto to tayā daityo kopākulitalocano |
dhanurbāṇadharo vīro yuddhakāmau babhūvatuḥ || 14 ||
kṛtvā suvipulaṃ nādaṃ devī sā nirbhayā sthitā |
ubhau ca cakratustīvrāṃ bāṇavṛṣṭi kurūdraha || 15 ||
bhagavatyapi bāṇaughānmumoca dānavo prati |
kṛtvā'timadhuraṃ nādaṃ devakāryārthasiddhaye ||16||
tayostu bāṣkalastūrṇaṃ saṃmukho'bhūdraṇāṃgaṇe |
durmukhaḥ prekṣakastatra devīmabhimukhaḥ sthitaḥ || 17 ||
tayoryuddhamabhūdghoraṃ hatarusoyostadā |
bāṇāsiparighāghātairbhayadaṃ maṃdacetasām || 18 ||
tataḥ kruddhā jaganmātā dṛṣṭvā taṃ yuddhadurmadam |
jaghāna paṃcabhirbāṇaiḥ karṇākṛṣṭaḥ śilāśitaiḥ || 19 ||
dānavo'pi śarāndevyāściccheda niśitaiḥ śaraiḥ |
saptabhistāḍayāmāsa devī siṃhopari sthitām 20||
sā'pi taṃ daśabhistīkṣṇaiḥ supītaiḥ sāyakaiḥ salam |
jaghāna taccharāṃśchittvā jahāsa ca muhurmuhuḥ || 29 ||
ardhacandreṇa bāṇena ciccheda ca śarāsanam |
bāṣkalo'pi gadāṃ gṛhya devīṃ haṃtumupāyayo ||22||
māgacchataṃ gadāpāṇi dānavaṃ madargāvitam |
caṃḍikā svagadāghātaiḥ pātayāmāsa bhūtale ||23||

bāṣkalaḥ patito bhūmau muhurtādutthitaḥ punaḥ |
cikṣepa ca gadāṃ so'pi caṃḍikāṃ caṃḍavikramaḥ || 24||
tamāgacchaṃtamālokya devī śūlena vakṣasi |
jaghāna bāṣkalaṃ kruddhā papāta ca mamāra saḥ || 25 ||
patite bāṣkale sainyaṃ bhagnaṃ tasya durātmanaḥ |
jayeti ca mudā devānukruśurgagane sthitāḥ || 26 ||
tasmiva nihate daitye durmukho'tivalānvitaḥ |
ājagāma raṇe devīṃ krodhasaṃraktalocanaḥ || 27||
tiṣṭha tiṣṭhābale so'pi bhāṣamāṇaḥ punaḥ punaḥ |
dhanrvāṇidharaḥ śrīmātrathasthaḥ kavacāvṛtaḥ ||28||
tamāgacchaṃtamālokya devī śaṃkhamavādayat |
kopayaṃtī dānavaṃ taṃ jyāghopaṃ ca cakāra ha ||29||
so'pi bāṇānmumotrāśu tīkṣṇānāśīviṣopamān |
svabāṇaistānmahāmāyā ciccheda ca nanāda ca ||30||
tayoḥ parasparaṃ yuddhaṃ babhūva tumulaṃ nṛpa |
vāṇaśaktigadāghātairmusa laistomaraistathā ||31 ||
raṇabhūmau tadā jātā rudhiraughavahā nadī |
patitāni tadā tīre śirāṃsi prababhustadā ||32||
yathā saṃtaraṇārthāya yamakiṃkara nāyakaiḥ |
taṃvīphalāni nītāni navaśikṣāparairgudā ||33||
raṇabhūmistadā dhorā babhūvātīva durgamā |
śarīraiḥ patitairbhūmau khādyamānairvṛkādibhiḥ ||34||
gomāsārameyāśca kākā: kaṃkā ayomukhāḥ | gṛdhrāḥ śyenāśva khādati śarīrāṇi durātmanām 35 |
va yu durgandho mṛtānāṃ dehasaṃgataḥ |
abhūtkilakilāśabdaḥ khagānāṃ palabhakṣiṇām ||36||
tadā cukopa duṣṭātmā dukha. kālamohitaḥ |
devāmuvāca garveṇa kṛtvā cordhvakaraṃ śubham ||37||
gaccha caṃḍi haniṣyāmi tvāmacaiva subāliśe |
daityaṃ vā bhaja vāmoru mahiṣa madagarvitam ||38||
devyuvāca
āsatra maraṇaḥ kāmaṃ pralapasyadya mohitaḥ |
adyaiva tvāṃ haniṣyāmi yathā'yaṃ bāṣkalī hataḥ || 39 ||
gaccha vā tiṣṭha vā maṃda maraṇaṃ yadi rocate |
hatvā tvāṃ vai vadhiṣyāmi bāliśaṃ mahiṣīsutam 40||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasyā durmukho martumudyataḥ |
mumoca bāṇavṛṣṭiṃ tu caṃḍikāṃ prati dāruṇām ||41||
sā'pi tāṃ tarasā chittvā bāṇavṛṣṭi śitaiḥ śaraiḥ |
jaghāna dānavaṃ kruddhā traṃ vajradharo yathā || 42||
tayoḥ parasparaṃ yuddhaṃ sañjātaṃ cātikarkaśam |
bhayadaṃ kātarāṇāṃ ca śūrāṇāṃ balavardhanam ||43||
devī ciccheda tarasā dhanurasya kare sthitam |
tathaiva pañcabhirbāṇairbabhañja rathamuttamam ||44||
rathe bhagne mahābāhuḥ padātirdurmukhastadā |
gadāṃ gṛhītvā durdharpā jagāma caṇḍikāṃ prati || 45 || |
cakāra sa gadāghātaṃ siṃhamolau mahābalāt |
na cacāla hariḥ sthānāttāḍito'pi mahābalaḥ ||46||
aṃbikā taṃ samālokya gadāpāṇi puraḥ sthitam |
khaḍgena śitadhāreṇa śiraściccheda maulimat ||47||
chinne ca mastake bhūmau papāta durmukho mṛtaḥ |
jayaśabdaṃ tadā cakrurmuditā nirjarā bhṛśam ||48||
tuṣṭuvustāṃ tadā devīṃ durmukhe nihate'marāḥ |
puṣpavṛṣṭi tathā cakrurjayaśabdaṃ nabhaḥ sthitāḥ || 49 ||

ṛṣayaḥ siddhagaṃdharvāḥ vidyādharakinnarāḥ |
jahṛṣustaṃ hataṃ dṛṣṭvā dānavaṃ raṇamastake || 50 ||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe paṃcamaskandhe trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 13 ||
atha caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
durmukhaṃ nihataṃ śrutvā mahiṣaḥ krodhamūrcchitaḥ |
uvāca dānavānsarvānki jātamiti cāsakṛt ||1||
nihato dānavau śūrau raṇe durmukhabāṣkalo |
tanvyā tatparamāścaryaṃ paśyaṃtu devaceṣṭitam ||2||
kālo hi balavānkartā satataṃ sukhaduḥkhayo |
narāṇāṃ parataṃtrāṇāṃ puṇyapāpānuyogataḥ || 3 ||
nihatau dānavaśreṣṭha kiṃ kartavyamataḥ param |
bruvaṃtu militāḥ sarve yadyuktaṃ kāryasaṃkaṭe || 4 ||
evaṃ bruvati rājeṃdra mahiṣe'tibalānvite |
cikṣurākhyastu senānostamuvāca mahārathaḥ ||5||
rājannahaṃ haniṣyāmi kā citā strīvihiṃsane |
ityuktvā svabalairmuktaḥ prayayau rathasaṃvṛtaḥ ||6||
dvitīyaṃ pāṇinaṃ tu kṛtvā tāmraṃ mahābalam |
mahatā sainyaghoṣeṇa pūrayannaganaṃ diśaḥ ||7||
tamāgacchaṃtamālokya devī bhagavatī śivā |
cakāra śaṃkhajyāghoṣaṃ ghaṭānādaṃ mahādbhutam || 8||
tatrasustena śabdena te ca sarve surārayaḥ |
kimetaditi bhāṣaṃto dudruvurbhayakaṃpitāḥ ||1||
trikṣurākhyastu tāndṛṣṭvā palāyanaparāyaṇān |
uvācātīva saṃkruddhaḥ kiṃ bhayaṃ vaḥ samāgatam ||10||
adyaivāhaṃ haniṣyāmi vāṇairbālāṃ madonnatām |
tiṣṭhatvatra bhayaṃ tyaktvā daityāḥ samaramūrdhani || 11 ||
ityuktvā dānavaśreṣṭhaścāpapāṇirbalānvitaḥ |
āgatya saṃgare devīmityuvāca gatavyathaḥ || 12 ||
ki garjasi viśālākṣi bhīṣayantītarānnarān |
nāhaṃ bibhemi tatvaṃgi śrutvā te'dya viceṣṭitam || 13 ||
strīvadhe dūṣaṇaṃ jñātvā tathaivākīrtisaṃbhavam |
upekṣāṃ kurute cittaṃ madīyaṃ vāmalocane || 14 ||
strīṇāṃ yuddhaṃ kaṭākṣaiśca tathā hāvaiśva sundari |
na śastravihitaṃ kvāpi tvādṛśīnāṃ kadācana ||15||
puṣpairapi na yoddhavyaṃ kiṃ punarniśitaiḥ śaraiḥ |
bhavādṛśīnāṃ deheṣu dunoti mālatīdalam ||16||
dhigjanma mānuṣe loke kṣātradharmānujīvinām |
lālito'yaṃ priyo dehaḥ kṛntanīyaḥ śitaiḥ śaraiḥ || 17||
tailābhyaṃgaiḥ puṣpavātastathā miṣṭānnabhojanaiḥ |
poṣito'yaṃ priyo deho ghātanīyaḥ pareṣubhiḥ || 18 ||
dehaṃ chitvā'sidhārābhirdhanabhṛjjāyate naraḥ |
dhigdhanaṃ duḥkhadaṃ pūrvaṃ paścātki sukhadaṃ bhavet || 19 ||
svamapyajñaiva vāmoru yuddhamākāṃkṣase yataḥ |
sukhaṃ saṃbhogajaṃ tyaktvā kaṃ guṇaṃ vetsi saṃgare ||20||
khaḍgapātaṃ gadāghātaṃ bhedanaṃ ca śilīmukhaiḥ |
maraṇāṃte tu saṃskāro gomāyumukhakarṣaṇam ||21||
tasyaiva kavibhirdhūrteḥ kṛtaṃ cātīva śaṃsanam |
raṇe mṛtānāṃ svaḥ prāptirarthavādo'sti kevalaḥ || 22 ||
tasmādgaccha varārohe yatra te ramate manaḥ |
bhaja vā bhūpati nāthaṃ hayāri suramardanam ||23||

evaṃ bruvāṇaṃ taṃ daityaṃ provāca jagadaṃbikā |
kiṃ mṛṣā bhāṣase mṛḍha buddhimāniva paṃḍitaḥ ||24||
nītiśāstraṃ na jānāsi vidyāṃ cānvīkṣikīṃ tathā |
na sevitāstvayā vṛddhā na dharme matirasti te || 25||
mūrkhasevāparo yasmāttasmāttvaṃ mūrkha eva hi |
rājadharma na jānāsi kiṃ bravīpi mamāgrataḥ || 26||
saṃgrāme mahiṣaṃ hatvā kṛtvā rudhirakardamam |
yaśaḥ stambhaṃ sthiraṃ kṛtvā gamiṣyāmi yathāsukham ||
devānāṃ duḥkhadātāraṃ dānavaṃ madagarvitam |
haniṣye'haṃ durācāraṃ yuddhaṃ kuru sthiro bhava ||28||
jīvitecchā'sti cenmūढ़ mahiṣasya tathā tava |
tadā gacchaṃtu pātālaṃ dānavāḥ sarva eva te ||29||
mumūrṣā yadi vaścitte yuddhaṃ kurvaṃtu satvarāḥ |
sarvāneva vadhiṣyāmi niśvayo'yaṃ mamādhunā || 30 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya dānavo baladarpitaḥ |
mumoca vāṇavṛṣṭi tāṃ ghanavṛṣṭimivāparām ||31||
ciccheda tasya sā vāṇānsvabāṇairniśitaistadā |
jaghāna taṃ tathā ghorairāśīviṣasamaḥ śaraiḥ ||32||
yuddhaṃ parasparaṃ tatra babhūva vismayapradam |
gadayā ghātayāmāsa taṃ rathājjagadaṃbikā ||33||
mūcha prāpa sa duṣṭātmā gadayā'bhihato bhṛśam |
mahūrtadvayamātraṃ tu rathopastha ivācalaḥ ||34||
taṃ tathā mūchitaṃ dṛṣṭrā tāmraḥ parabalārdanaḥ |
ājagāma raṇe yoddhuṃ caṃḍikāṃ prati cāpalāt ||35||
āgacchaṃtaṃ tu taṃ vīkṣya hasaṃtī prāha caṃḍikā |
ehyehi dānavaśreṣṭha yamalokaṃ nayāmyaham ||36||
kiṃ bhavadbhiḥ samāyātairabalaiśca gatāyuṣaḥ |
mahiṣaḥ kiṃ gṛhe mūḍhaḥ karoti jovanodyamam ||37||
kiṃ bhavadbhirhatairmarmamāpi viphala: śramaḥ |
ahate mahiṣe pāpe suraśatrau durātmani || 38 ||
tasmādyayaṃ gṛhaṃ gatvā mahiṣaṃ preṣayatviha |
paśyenmāṃ so'pi maṃdātmā yādṛśīṃ tādṛśīṃ sthitām ||
tāmrastadvacanaṃ śrutvā vāṇavṛṣṭi cakāra ha |
caṃḍikāṃ prati kopena karṇākṛṣṭaśarāsanaḥ || 40 ||
bhagavatyapi tāmrākṣī samākṛṣya śarāsanam |
bāṇānmumoca tarasā haṃtukāmā surāhitam ||41 ||
cikṣurākhyo'pi balavānmūrchā tyaktvotthitaḥ punaḥ |
gṛhītvā saśaraṃ cāpaṃ tasthau tatsaṃmukhaḥ kṣaṇāt ||42 ||
cikṣurākhyaśca tāmraśva drāvapyatibalotkaṭau |
yuyudhāte mahāvīrau saha devyā raṇāṃgaṇe || 43||
kupitā ca mahāmāyā vavarṣa śarasaṃtatim |
cakāra dānavānsarvānvāṇakṣatatanucchadān ||44||
asurāḥ krodhasaṃmūḍhā babhūvuḥ śaratāḍitā: |
cikṣuipuḥ śarajālāni devīṃ prati ruṣānvitāḥ || 45||
babhuste rākṣasāstatra kiṃśukā iva puṣpiṇaḥ |
śilīmukhakṣatāḥ sarve vasaṃte ca vane raṇe ||46 ||
babhūva tumulaṃ yuddhaṃ tāmreṇa saha saṃyuge |
vismayaṃ paramaṃ jagmurdevā ye prekṣakāḥ sthitāḥ || 47||
tāmro musalamādāya lohajaṃ dāruṇaṃ dṛḍham |
jaghāna mastake siṃhaṃ jahāsa ca nadarda ca || 48 ||
nardamānaṃ tadā taṃ tu dṛṣṭvā devī ruṣānvitā |
khaḍgena śitadhāreṇa śiraściccheda satvarā || 49||

chinne śirasi tāmrastu viśīrṣo musalī balī |
babhrāma kṣaṇamātraṃ tu papāta raṇamastake || 50||
patitaṃ tāmramālokya cikṣurākhyo mahābalaḥ |
khaḍgamādāya tarasā dudrāva caṃḍikāṃ prati || 51 ||
bhagavatyapi taṃ dṛṣṭvā khaḍgapāṇimupāgatam |
dānavaṃ paṃcabhirbāṇairjaghāna tarasā raṇe ||52||
ekena patitaṃ khaḍgaṃ dvitīyena tu tatkaraḥ |
kaṃṭhācca mastakaṃ tasya kṛtitaṃ cāparaḥ śaraiḥ || 53 ||
evaṃ tau nihato karo rākṣasau raṇadumaṃdau |
bhagnaṃ sainyaṃ tayostūrṇa dikṣu saṃtrastamānasam ||54 ||
devāśca muditāḥ sarve dṛṣṭvā tau nihato raṇe |
puṣpavṛṣṭi mudā cakrurjayaśabdaṃ nabhaḥ sthitāḥ || 55 ||
ṛṣayo devagaṃdharvā vetālāḥ siddhacāraṇāḥ |
ūcuste jaya devīti cāṃviketi punaḥ punaḥ || 56||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 14 ||
atha pañcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tau tayā nihato śrutvā mahiṣo vismayānvitaḥ |
preṣayāmāsa daiteyāṃstadvadhārthaṃ mahābalān ||1||
asilomaviḍālākhyapramukhān yuddhadurmadān |
sainyena mahatā yuktānsāyudhānsaparicchadān ||2||
te tatra dadṛśurdevīṃ siṃhasyopari saṃsthitām |
aṣṭādaśabhujāṃ divyāṃ khaḍgakheṭakadhāriṇīm ||3||
asilomā'grato gatvā tāmuvāca hasanniva |
vinayāvanataḥ śāṃto devīṃ daityavadhodyatām ||4||
asilomovāca
devi brūhi vacaḥ satyaṃ kimarthamiha sundari |
āgatā'si kimarthaṃ vā haṃsi datyānnirāgasaḥ ||5||
kāraṇaṃ kathayādya tvaṃ tvayā saṃdhi karomyaham |
kāṃcanaṃ maṇiratnāni bhājanāni varāṇi ca ||6||
yānīcchasi varārohe gṛhītvā gaccha māciram |
kimarthaṃ yuddhakāmā'si duḥkhasaṃtāpavardhanam ||7||
kathayati mahātmāno yuddhaṃ sarvasukhāpaham |
komale'tīva taṃ deheṃ puṣpāghātāsa he bhṛśam ||8||
kimarthaṃ śastrasaṃpātānsahasīti visismiye |
cāturyasya phalaṃ śāṃtiḥ satataṃ sukhasevanam || 9 ||
tatkimarthaṃ duḥkhahetuṃ saṃgrāmaṃ kartumicchasi |
saṃsāre'tra sukhaṃ grāhyaṃ duḥkhaṃ heyamiti sthitiḥ || 10 ||
tatsukhaṃ dvividhaṃ proktaṃ nityānityaprabhedataḥ |
ātmajñānaṃ sukhaṃ nityamanityaṃ bhogajaṃ smṛtam || 11 ||
nāśātmakaṃ tu tattyājyaṃ vedaśāstrārthacitakaiḥ |
saugatānāṃ mataṃ cettvaṃ tvīkaroṣi varānane || 12 ||
tathāpi yovanaṃ prāpya bhuṅkṣva bhogānanuttamān |
paralokasya saṃdeho yadi te'sti kṛśodari ||13||
svargabhogaparā nityaṃ bhava bhāmini bhūtale |
anityaṃ yauvanaṃ dehe jñātveti sukṛtaṃ caret || 14 |
paropatāpanaṃ kāryaṃ varjanīyaṃ sadā budhaiḥ |
avirodhena kartavyaṃ dharmārthakāmasevanam ||15||
tasmāttvamapi kalyāṇi mati dharme sadā kuru |
aparādha vinā daityānkasmānmārayaseṃ bike || 16||

dayā dharmo'sya deho'sti satye prāṇāḥ prakīrtitāḥ |
tasmāddayā tathā satyaṃ rakṣaṇīyaṃ sadā budhaiḥ || 17 |
kāraṇaṃ vada suśroṇi dānavānāṃ vadhe tava |
devyuvāca
tvayā pṛṣṭaṃ mahābāho kimarthamiha cāgatā || 18 ||
tadahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi hanane ca prayojanam |
vicarāmi sadā daitya sarvalokeṣu sarvadā || || 19||
nyāyānyāyau ca bhūtānāṃ paśyatī sākṣirūpiṇī |
na me kadāpi bhogecchā na lobho na ca vairitā || 20 ||
dharmārthaṃ vicarāmyatra saṃsāre sādhurakṣaṇam |
vratametattu niyataṃ pālayāmi nijaṃ sadā || 21 ||
sādhūnāṃ rakṣaṇaṃ kāryaṃ hantavyā ye'pyasādhavaḥ |
vedasaṃrakṣaṇaṃ kāryamavatārairanekaśaḥ ||22||
yuge yuge |
tāne vāhamavatārānbibharmi ca |
mahiṣastu durācāro devānvai haṃtumudyataḥ || 23 ||
jñātvā'haṃ tadvadhārthaṃ bhoḥ prāptā'smi rākṣasādhunā |
taṃ haniṣye durācāraṃ suraśatruṃ mahābalam ||24||
gaccha vā tiṣṭha kāmaṃ tvaṃ satyametadudāhṛtam |
brūhi vā taṃ durātmānaṃ rājānaṃ mahiṣīsutam ||25||
kimanyānpreṣayasyatra svayaṃ yuddhaṃ kuruṣva ha |
saṃdhiścetkartumicchā'sti rājñastava mayā saha ||26||
sarve gacchantu pātālaṃ vairaṃ tyaktvā yathāsukham |
devadravyaṃ tu yatkiciddhṛtaṃ jitvā raṇe surān || 27||
taddattvā yāṃtu pātālaṃ prahlādo yatra tiṣṭhati |
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ devyā asilomā puraḥ sthitaḥ ||28||
biḍālākhyaṃ mahāvīraṃ papraccha prītipūrvakam |
asilomovāca
śrutaṃ te biḍālākhya bhavānyā kathitaṃ ca yat ||29||
evaṃ gate kiṃ kartavyo vigrahaḥ sandhireva vā |
viḍālākhya uvāca
na sandhikāmo'sti nṛpo'bhimānī yuddhe ca mṛtyuṃ niyataṃ hi jānan |
dṛṣṭvā hatānprerayate tathā'smāndaivaṃ hi ko'tikramituṃ samarthaḥ || 30 ||
duḥsādhya evāstviha sevakānāṃ dharma: sadā mānavivarjitānām |
ājñāparāṇāṃ vaśavartikānāṃ pāṃcālikānāmiva sūtrabhedāt || 1|| "
gatvā kathaṃ tasya purastvayā ca ca mayā'pi vaktavyamidaṃ kaṭhoram || 31 ||
gacchantu pātālamitaśca sarve dasvā'tha ratnāni dhanaṃ surāṇām |
"priyaṃ hi vaktavyamasatyameva na priyaṃ syāddhitakṛttu bhāṣitam ||

satyaṃ priyaṃ no bhavatīha kāmaṃ monaṃ tato buddhimatāṃ pratiṣṭhitam ||2||"
na phalguvākyaiḥ pratibodhanīyo rājā tu vīrairiti nītiśāstram ||32||
na nūnaṃ tatra gaṃtavyaṃ hitaṃ vā vaktumādarāt |
praṣṭuṃ vā'pi gate rājā kopayukto bhaviṣyati 33 ||
iti saṃcitya kartavyaṃ yuddhaṃ prāṇasya saṃśaye |
svāmikāryaṃ paraṃ matvā maraṇaṃ tṛṇavattathā ||34||
vyāsa uvāca
iti saṃcitya tau vīrau saṃsthito yuddhatatparoṃ |
dhanurbāṇadharo tatra sannaddho rathasaṅgatī ||35||
prathamaṃ tu biḍālākhyaḥ sapta vāṇānmumoca ha |
asilomā sthito dūre prekṣakaḥ paramāstravit ||36||
ciccheda tāṃstathā prāptānaṃbikā svaśaraiḥ śarān |
biḍālākhyaṃ tribhirbāṇairjaghāna ca śilāśitaiḥ ||37||
prāpya vāṇavyathāṃ daityaḥ papāta samarāṃgaṇe |
mūrcchito'tha mamārāśu dānavo daivayogataḥ !! 38 ||
biḍālākhyaṃ hataṃ dṛṣṭvā raṇe śaktiśarotkaraiḥ |
asilomā dhanuṣpāṇiḥ saṃsthito yuddhatatparaḥ || 39 ||
ūdhvaṃ savyaṃ karaṃ kṛtvā tāmuvāca mitaṃ vacaḥ |
devi jānāmi maraṇaṃ dānavānāṃ durātmanām ||40||
tathāpi yuddhaṃ kartavyaṃ parādhīnena vai mayā |
mahiṣo maṃdabuddhiśca na jānāti priyāpriye || 41 ||
tadagre naiva vaktavyaṃ hitaṃ caivāpriyaṃ mayā |
martavyaṃ vīradharmeṇa śubhaṃ vā'pyaśubhaṃ bhavet ||42||
daivameva paraṃ manye dhikpauruṣamanarthakam |
patanti dānavāstūrṇaṃ tatra bāṇahatā bhuvi ||43||
ityuktvā śaravṛṣṭi sa cakāra dānavottamaḥ |
devī ciccheda tānbāṇairaprāptāṃstu nijāṃtike || 44||
anyavivyādha taṃ tūrṇamasilomānagāśugaiḥ |
vokṣitā'marasaṃdhaiśva kopapūrṇānanā tadā ||45 ||
śuśubhe dānavaḥ kāmaṃ bāṇaividdhatanuḥ kila |
sravadrudhiradhāraḥ sa praphullaḥ kiṃśuko yathā ||46 ||
amilomā gadāṃ gurvī lauhī mudyamya vegataḥ |
dudrāva caṃḍikāṃ kopātsihaṃ mūni jaghāna ha || 47 ||
siṃho'pi nakharādhātaistaṃ dadāra bhujāṃtare |
agaṇayya gadāghātaṃ kṛtaṃ tena balīyasā ||48||
utpatya tarasā daityo gadāpāṇiḥ sudāruṇaḥ |
siṃhamūrdhni samāruhya jaghāna gadayāṃbikām ||49||
kṛtaṃ tena prahāraṃ tu vañcayitvā viśāṃpate |
khaḍgena śitadhāreṇa śiraściccheda kaṇṭhataḥ ||50||
chinne śirasi daityendraḥ papāta tarasā kṣitau |
hāhākārī mahānāsītsainye tasya durātmanaḥ || 151 ||
jaya devīti devāstāṃ tuṣṭuvurjagadambikām |
devadundubhayo nedurjaguśca nṛpa kinnarāḥ || 52 ||
nihato dānavo vīkṣya patitau ca raṇāṃgaṇe |
nihatāḥ sainikāḥ sarve tatra kesariṇā balāt || 53 ||
bhakṣitāśca tathā kecinniḥśeṣaṃ tadgaṇaṃ kṛtam |
bhagnāḥ kecidgatā maṃdā mahiṣaṃ prati duḥkhitāḥ || 54||
cukruśū ruruduścaiva trāhi trāhīti bhāṣaṇaiḥ |
asilomaviḍālākhyoṃ nihatau nṛpasattama || 55 ||
anye ye sainikā rājansihena bhakṣitāśca te |
evaṃ bruvanto rājānaṃ tadā cakruśca vaiśasam ||56||

tacchrutvā vacanaṃ teṣāṃ mahiṣo durmanāstadā |
babhūva cintākulito bignā duḥkhasaṃyutaḥ || 57 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe pañcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 15||
atha ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
teṣāṃ tadvacanaṃ śrutvā krodhayukto narādhipaḥ |
dārukaṃ prāha tarasā rathamānaya me'dbhutam || 1 ||
sahasrakharasaṃyuktaṃ patākādhvajabhūṣitam |
āyudhaiḥ saṃyutaṃ śubhraṃ sucakraṃ cārukūbaram ||2||
sūto'pi rathamānīya tamuvāca tvarānvitaḥ |
rājanratho'yamānīto dvāri tiṣṭhati bhūṣitaḥ || 3||
sarvāyudhasamāyukto varāstaraṇasaṃyutaḥ |
ānītaṃ taṃ rathaṃ jñātvā dānaveṃdro mahābalaḥ || 4 ||
mānuṣaṃ dehamāsthāya saṃgrāmaṃ gantumudyataḥ |
vicārya manasā ceti devī māṃ prekṣya durmukham ||5||
śṛṅgiṇaṃ mahiṣaṃ nūnaṃ vimanā sā bhaviṣyati |
nārīṇā ca priyaṃ rūpaṃ tathā cāturyamityapi || 6 ||
tasmādrūpaṃ na cāturyaṃ kṛtvā yāsyāmitāṃ prati |
yathā māṃ vīkṣya sā bālā premayuktā bhaviṣyati ||7||
mamāpi ca tadaiva syātsukhaṃ nānyasvarūpataḥ |
iti saṃcitya manasā dānaveṃdro mahābalaḥ ||8||
tyaktvā tanmāhipaṃ rūpaṃ babhūva puruṣaḥ śubhaḥ |
sarvāyudhadharaḥ śrīmāṃścārubhūṣaṇabhūṣitaḥ || 9 ||
divyāṃvaradharaḥ kāṃtaḥ puṣpabāṇa ivāparaḥ |
rathopaviṣṭaḥ keyūrasragvī bāgadhanurdharaḥ || 10||
senāparivṛto devoṃ jagāma madagarvitaḥ |
manojñaṃ rūpamāsthāya māninānāṃ manoharam ||11||
tamāgataṃ samālokya daityānāmadhipaṃ tadā |
bahubhiḥ saṃvṛtaṃ vīrairdevī śaṅkhamavādayat || 12||
sa śaṅkhaninadaṃ śrutvā janavismayakārakam |
samopametya devyāstu tāmuvāca hasanniva || 13 ||
devi saṃsāracakre'sminvartamāno janaḥ kila |
naroṃ vā'tha tathā nārī sukhaṃ vāṃchati sarvathā || 14 ||
sukhaṃ saṃyogajaṃ nṛṇāṃ nāsaṃyoge bhavediha |
saṃyogo bahudhā bhinnastāntravīmi śṛṇuṣva ha || 15 ||
bhedānsuprīti hetūtthānsvabhāvotthānanekaśaḥ |
tatra prītibhavānādau kathayāmi yathāmati || 16 ||
mātāpitrostu putreṇa saṃyogastuttamaḥ smṛtaḥ |
bhrāturbhrātrā tathā yogaḥ kāraṇānmadhyamo mataḥ || 17 ||
uttamasya sukhasyaiva dātṛtvāduttamaḥ smṛtaḥ |
tasmādalpasukhasyaiva pradātṛtvācca madhyamaḥ ||18||
nāvikānāṃ tu saṃyogaḥ smṛtaḥ svābhāviko budhaiḥ |
vividhāvṛtacittānāṃ prasaṅgaparivartinām || 19 ||
atyalpasukhadātṛtvātkaniṣṭho'yaṃ smṛto budhaiḥ |
atyuttamastu saṃyogaḥ saṃsāre sukhaduḥkhadaḥ ||20||
nārīpuruṣayoḥ kānte samānavayasoḥ sadā |
saṃyogo yaḥ samākhyātaḥ sa evātyuttamaḥ smṛtaḥ || 21 ||
atyuttamasukhasyaiva dātṛtvātsa tathāvidhaḥ |
cāturya rūpaveṣādyaḥ kulaśīlaguṇaistathā || 22||
parasparasamutkarṣaḥ kathyate hi parasparam |
taṃ cetkaroṣi saṃyogaṃ vīreṇa ca mayā saha || 23 ||

atyuttama sukhasyaiva prāptiḥ syātte na saṃśayaḥ |
nānāvidhāni rūpāṇi karomi svecchayā priye ||24||
iṃdrādayaḥ surāḥ sarve saṃgrāme vijitā mayā |
ratnāni yāni divyāni bhavane'sminmamādhunā || 25 ||
bhuṃkṣva tvaṃ tāni sarvāṇi yatheṣṭa dehi vā yathā |
paṭṭarājño bhavādya tvaṃ dāso'smi tava sundari || 26 ||
beraṃ tyaje'haṃ devastu tava vākyānna saṃśayaḥ |
yathā tvaṃ sukhamāpnopi tathā'haṃ karavāṇi vai ||27||
ājñāpaya viśālākṣi tathā'haṃ prakaromyatha |
cittaṃ me tava rūpeṇa mohitaṃ cārubhāṣiṇi ||28||
māturo'smi varārohe prāptaste śaraṇaṃ kila |
prapannaṃ pāhi raṃbhīru kāmabāṇaiḥ prapīḍitam ||29||
dharmāṇāmuttamo dharmaḥ śaraṇāgatarakṣaṇam |
tvadīyo'smyasitāpāṃgi sevako'haṃ kṛśodari ||30||
maraṇāṃtaṃ vacaḥ satyaṃ nānyathā prakaromyaham |
pādau nato'smi tatvaṃgi tyaktvā nānāyudhāni te ||
dayāṃ kuru viśālākṣi tapto'smi kāmamārgaṇaiḥ |
janmaprabhṛti cārvagi dainyaṃ nācaritaṃ mayā ||32||
brahmādīnīśvarānprāpya tvayi tadvidadhāmyaham |
caritaṃ mama jānaṃti raṇe brahmādayaḥ surāḥ ||33||
so'pyahaṃ tatra dāso'smi manmukhaṃ paśya bhāmini |
vyāsa uvāca
iti bruvāṇaṃ taṃ daityaṃ devī bhāgavatī hi sā ||34||
prahasya sasmitaṃ vākyamuvāca varavarṇinī |
devyuvāca
nāhaṃ puruṣamicchāmi paramaṃ puruṣaṃ vinā || 35 || 華
tasya cecchāsmyahaṃ daitya sṛjāmi sakalaṃ jagat |
sa māṃ paśyati viśvātmā tasyāhaṃ prakṛtiḥ śivā ||
tatsānnidhyavaśādeva caitanyaṃ mayi śāśvatam |
jaḍā'haṃ tasya saṃyogātprabhavāmi sacetanā ||37||
ayaskāṃtasya sānnidhyādayasaścetanā yathā |
na grāmyasukhaṃvāṃchā me kadācidapi jāyate || 38 ||
mūrkhastvamami maṃdātman yatstrīsaṃgaṃ cikīrṣasi |
narasya baṃdhanārthāya śṛṃkhalā strī prakīrtitā || 39 ||
lauhabaddho'pi mucyeta strībaddho naiva mucyate |
kimicchasi ca maṃdātmanmūtrāgārasya sevanam ||40 ||
śarma kuru sukhāya tvaṃ śamātsukhamavāpsyasi |
nārīsaṃge mahadduḥkhaṃ jānanki tvaṃ vimuhyasi || 41 ||
tyaja vairaṃ suraiḥ sārdhaṃ yatheṣṭaṃ vicarāvano |
pātālaṃ gaccha vā kāmaṃ jīvitecchā yadasti te 42 ||
athavā kuru saṃgrāmaṃ balavatyasmi sāṃpratam |
preṣitā'haṃ suraiḥ sarvaistavaḥ nāśāya dānava || 43 ||
satyaṃ bravīmi yenādya tvayā vacanasauhṛdam |
darśitaṃ tena tuṣṭā'smi jīvangacha yathāsukham ||44 ||
satāṃ saptapadī maitrī tena mucāmi jīvitam |
maraṇecchā'sti cedyuddhaṃ kuru vīra yathāsukham 45 ||
haniṣyāmi mahābāho tvāmahaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ |

vyāsa uvāca
iti tasyā vacaḥ śrutvā dānavaḥ kāmamohitaḥ ||46||
uvāca ślakṣṇayā vācā madhuraṃ vacanaṃ tataḥ |
bibhemyahaṃ varārohe tvāṃ prahatuṃ varānane ||47||
komalāṃ cārusarvāṃgīṃ nāroṃ naravimohinīm |
jitvā hariharādīṃśca lokapālāṃśca sarvaśaḥ || 48 ||
kiṃ tvayā saha yuddhaṃ me yuktaṃ kamalalocane |
rocate yadi cāva~gi vivāhaṃ kuru māṃ bhaja || 49||
nocedgaccha yatheṣṭaṃ taṃ deśaṃ yasmātsamāgatā |
nāhaṃ tvāṃ prahariṣyāmi yato maitrī kṛtā tvayā || 50 ||
hitamuktaṃ śubhaṃ vākyaṃ tasmādgaccha yathāsukham |
kā śobhā me bhavedaṃte hatvā tvāṃ cārulocanām ||
strī hatyā vālahatyā ca brahmahatyā duratyayā |
gṛhītvā tvāṃ gṛhaṃ nūnaṃ gacchāmyadya varānane || 52 ||
tathāpi me phalaṃ na syādvādbhogasukhaṃ kutaḥ |
prabravīmi sukeśi tvāṃ vinayāvanato yataḥ || 53 ||
puruṣasya sukhaṃ na syādṛte kāṃtāmukhāṃbujāt |
tattathaiva hi nārīṇāṃ tasmācca purupaṃ vinā || 54 ||
saṃyoge sukhasaṃbhūtiviyoge duḥkhasaṃbhavaḥ |
kāntā'si rūpasaṃpannā sarvābharaṇabhūṣitā || 55 ||
cāturyaṃ tvayi kiṃ nāsti yato māṃ na bhajasyaho |
tatropadiṣṭaṃ kenedaṃ bhogānāṃ parivarjanam || 56 ||
vaṃcitā'si priyālāpe vairiṇā kenacittviha |
muñcāgrahamimaṃ kāṃta kuru kārya suśobhanam ||57||
sukhaṃ tava mamāpi syādrivāha vihine kila |
viṣṇurlakṣmyā sahābhāti sāvitryā ca mahātmabhūḥ ||
rudro bhāti ca pārvatyāgacyā śatamakhastathā |
kā nārī patihīnā ca sukhaṃ prāpnoti gāśvatam ||
yena tvamasitāpāṃgi na karoṣi pati śubham |
kāmaḥ kvādya gataḥ kāṃte yastvāṃ vāṇaiḥ sukomalaiḥ ||
mādanaḥ pañcabhiḥ kāmaṃ na tāḍayati maṃdadhīḥ |
manye'hamiva kāmo'pi dayāvāṃstvayi sundari || 61 ||
abaleti ca manvāno na prerayati mārgaṇān |
manobhavasya vairaṃ vā kimapyasti mayā saha ||62 ||
tena ca tvayyarālākṣi na muñcati śilīmukhān |
athavā me'hitairdevairvārito'sau jhaṣadhvajaḥ || 63 ||
sukhavidhvaṃsibhistena tvayi na praharatyapi |
vyaktvā māṃ mṛgaśāvākṣi paścāttāpaṃ kariṣyasi ||
maṃdodarīva tanvaṃgi parityajya śubhaṃ nṛpam |
anukūlaṃ pati paścātsā cakāra śaṭhaṃ patim ||
kāmārtā ca yadā jānā mohana vyākulāntarā || 65 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe paṃcamaskandhaṃ devīcaritre poḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 16 ||
atha saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
iti śrutvā vacastasya devī papraccha dānavam |
kā sā maṃdodarī nārī ko'sau vyakto nṛpastayā || 1 ||
śaṭhaḥ ko vā nṛpaḥ paścāttanme brūhi kathānakam |
vistāreṇa yathā prāptaṃ duḥkhaṃ vanitayā punaḥ || 2||

mahiṣa uvāca
siṃhalo nāma deśo'sti vikhyātaḥ pṛthivītale |
vanapādapa saṃyukto dhanadhānyasamṛddhimān || 3||
caṃdrasenā'bhidhastatra rājā dharmaparāyaṇaḥ |
nyāyadaṃḍadharaḥ śāṃtaḥ prajāpālanatatparaḥ || 4 ||
satyavādī mṛduḥ śūrastitikṣurnītisāgaraḥ |
śāstravitsarvadharmajño dhanurvede'tiniṣṭhitaḥ || 5||
tasya bhāryā varārohā sundarī subhagā śubhā |
sadācārā'tisumakhī patibhaktiparāyaṇā ||6||
nāmnā guṇavatī kāṃtā sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutā |
suṣuve prathame garbhe putrīṃ sā cātisundarīm ||7||
pitā cātīva saṃtuṣṭaḥ putrīṃ prāpya manoramām |
mandodarīti nāmāsyāḥ pitā cakre mudānvitaḥ ||8||
indo: kaleva cātyarthaṃ vavṛdhe sā dine dine |
daśavarṣā yadā jātā kanyā cātimanoharā || 9 ||
varāthaṃ nṛpatiścintāmavāpa ca dine dine |
madradeśādhipaḥ śūraḥ sudhanvā nāma pārthivaḥ || 10 ||
tasya putro'timedhāvī kaṃbugrīvo'tiviśrutaḥ |
brāhmaṇaiḥ kathito rājñe saṃyukto'syā varaḥ śubhaḥ || 11 ||
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃpannaḥ sarvavidyārthapāragaḥ |
rājñā dṛṣṭā tadā rājñī nāmnā guṇavatī priyā || 12 ||
kaṃbugrīvāya kanyāṃ svāṃ dāsyāmi varavarṇinīm |
sā tu patyurvacaḥ śrutvā putrīṃ papraccha sādaram ||13||
vivāhaṃ te pitā kartuṃ kaṃbugrīveṇa vāṃchati |
tacchrutvā mātaraṃ prāha vākyaṃ mandodarī tadā || 14 ||
nāhaṃ patiṃ kariṣyāmi necchā me'sti parigrahe |
kaumāraṃ vratamāsthāya kālaṃ neṣyāmi sarvathā || 15 ||
svātantryeṇa cariṣyāmi tapastīvraṃ sadaiva hi |
pāratantryaṃ paraṃ duḥkhaṃ mātaḥ saṃsārasāgare || 16 ||
svātantryānmokṣamityāhaḥ paṇḍitāḥ śāstrako vidāḥ |
tasmānmukto bhaviṣyāmi patyā me na prayojanam || 17 ||
vivāhe vartamāne tu pāvakasya ca sannidhau |
vaktavyaṃ vacanaṃ samyaktvadadhīnā'smi sarvadā || 18||
śvaśrūdevaravargāṇāṃ dāsītvaṃ śvaśurāye |
paticittā'nuvartitvaṃ duḥkhāduḥkhataraṃ smṛtam || 19 ||
kadācitpatiranyāṃ kā kāminīṃ ca bhajedyadi |
tadā mahattaraṃ duḥkhaṃ sapatnīsaṃbhavaṃ bhavet || 20||
taderṣyā jāyate patyau kleśaścāpi bhavedatha |
saṃsāre kva sukhaṃ mātarnārīṇāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ || 21 ||
svabhāvātparatantrāṇāṃ saṃsāre svapnadharmiṇi |
śrutaṃ mayā purā mātastānacaraṇātmanaḥ ||22|| "
uttamaḥ sarvadharmajño dhruvādavarajo nṛpaḥ |
patnī dharmaparāṃ sādhvī pati paktiparāyaṇām ||23||
aparādhaṃ vinā kāṃtāṃ tyaktavānvipine priyām |
evaṃvidhāni duḥkhāni vidyamāne tu bhartari ||24||
kālayogānmṛte tasmintrārī syādduḥkhabhājanam |
vaidhavyaṃ paramaṃ duḥkhaṃ śokasaṃtāpakārakam ||25||
paroṣitapatitve'pi duḥkhaṃ syādadhikaṃ gṛhe |
madanāgnividagdhāyāḥ kiṃ sukhaṃ patisaṃgajam || 26||
tasmātpatirna kartavyaḥ sarvadheti matirmama |
evaṃ proktā tadā mātā pati prāha nṛpātmajā ||27||
na ca vāṃchati bhartāraṃ kaumāravratadhāriṇī |
vratajāpyaparā nityaṃ saṃsārādvimukhī sadā ||28||

na kāṃkṣati pā~ta kartuṃ bahudoṣavicakṣaṇa |
bhāryāyā bhāṣitaṃ śrutvā tathaiva saṃsthito nṛpaḥ || 29 ||
vivāho na kṛtaḥ putryā jñātvā bhāvavijitām |
vartamānā gṛheṣveva pitrā mātrā ca rakṣitā ||30||
yauvanasyāṃkurā jātā nārīṇāṃ kāmadīpakāḥ |
tathāpi sā vayasyābhiḥ preritā'pi punaḥ punaḥ ||31||
cakame na pati kartuṃ jñānārthapadabhāṣiṇī |
ekadodyānadeśaṃ sā vihatuṃ bahupādape || 32 ||
jagāma sumukhī premṇā sairaṃdhrīgaṇasevitā |
reme kṛśodarī tatrāpaśyatkusumitā latāḥ || 33 ||
puṣpāṇi cinvatī ramyā vayasyābhiḥ samāvṛtā |
kauśalādhipatistatra mārge daivavaśāttadā || 34 ||
ājagāma mahāvīro vīraseno'tiviśrutaḥ |
ekākī rathamārūḍhaḥ katicitsevakairvṛtaḥ ||35||
sainyaṃ ca pṛṣṭhatastasya samāyāti śanaiḥ śanaiḥ |
dṛṣṭastasyā vayasyābhirdūrataḥ pārthivastadā || 36||
mandodaryai tathā proktaṃ samāyāti naraḥ pathi |
rathārūḍho mahābāhū rūpavānmadano'paraḥ || 37||
manye'haṃ nṛpatiḥ kaścitprāpto bhāgyavaśādiha |
evaṃ bruvatyāṃ tatrāsau kośalendraḥ samāgataḥ ||38||
dṛṣṭvā tāmasitāpāṃgīṃ vismayaṃ prāpa bhūpatiḥ |
uttīrya sa rathāttūrṇaṃ papraccha paricārikām ||39||
keyaṃ bālā viśālākṣī kasya putrī vadāśu me |
evaṃ pṛṣṭā tu sairandhrī tamuvāca śucismitā ||40||
prathamaṃ brūhi me vīra pṛcchāmi tvāṃ sulocana |
ko'si tvaṃ kimihāyātaḥ kiṃ kāryaṃ vada sāṃpratam ||
iti pṛṣṭastu sairaṃdhrathā tāmuvāca mahīpatiḥ |
kośalo nāma deśo'sti pṛthivyāṃ paramādbhutaḥ||42||
tasya pālayitā cāhaṃ vīrasenābhidhaḥ priye |
vāhinī pṛṣṭhataḥ kāmaṃ samāyāti caturvidhā || 43 ||
mārgabhramādiha prāptaṃ viddhi māṃ kośalādhipam |
sairaṃdhyuvāca
caṃdrasenasutā rājannāmnā mandodarī kila || 44 ||
udyāne raṃtukāmeyaṃ prāptā kamalalocanā |
śrutvā tadbhāṣitaṃ rājā pratyuvāca prasādhikām 45 ||
sairaṃdhra caturā'si tvaṃ rājaputrīṃ prabodhaya |
kakutsthavaṃśajaścāhaṃ rājā'smi cārulocane || 46 ||
gāṃdharveṇa vivāhena pati māṃ kuru kāmini |
na me bhāryā'sti suśroṇi vayasodbhutayauvanā ||47 ||
vāṃchāmi rūpasaṃpannāṃ sukulāṃ kāminīṃ kila |
athavā te pitā mahyaṃ vidhinā dātumarhati || 48 ||
anukūlapatiścāhaṃ bhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ |
mahiṣa uvāca
ityākarṇya vacastasya sairaṃdhrī prāha tāṃ tadā ||49||
gṛhasya madhuraṃ vākyaṃ kāmaśāstraviśāradā |
mandodari nṛpaḥ prāptaḥ sūryavaṃśasamudbhavaḥ ||50 ||
rūpavānbalavānkānto vayasā tvatsamaḥ punaḥ |
prītimānnṛpatirjātastvayi sundari sarvathā || 51 ||
pitā'pi te viśālākṣi paritapyati sarvathā |
vivāhakāle te jñātvā tvāṃ ca vairāgyasaṃyutām 52 ||

ityāhāsmānsa nṛpatirviniḥśvasya punaḥ punaḥ |
putrīṃ prabodhayaṃtvetāṃ sairaṃdhyaḥ sevane ratāḥ ||53||
vaktuṃ śaktā vayaṃ na tvāṃ haṭhadharmaratāṃ punaḥ |
bhartuḥ śuśrūṣaṇaṃ strīṇāṃ paro dharmo'bravīnmanuḥ || 54 ||
bhartāraṃ sevamānā vai nārī svargamavāpnuyāt |
tasmātkuru viśālākṣi vivāhaṃ vidhipūrvakam || 55 ||
mandodaryuvāca
nāhaṃ patiṃ kariṣyāmi cariṣye tapa adbhutam |
nivāraya nṛpaṃ bāle ki māṃ paśyati nistrapaḥ || 56 ||
sairaṃdhyuvāca
durjayo devi kāmo'sau kālo'sau duratikramaḥ |
tasmānme vacanaṃ pathyaṃ kartumarhasi suṃdari ||57||
anyathā vyasanaṃ nūnamāpatediti niścayaḥ |
iti tasyā vacaḥ śrutvā kanyovācāthatāṃ sakhīm 58||
yadyadbhavettadbhavatu daivayogādasaṃśayam |
na vivāhaṃ kariṣye'haṃ sarvathā paricārike || 59||
mahiṣa uvāca
iti tasyāstu nirbaṃdhaṃ jñātvā prāha nṛpaṃ punaḥ |
gaccha rājanyathākāmaṃ neyamicchati satpatim || 60 ||
nṛpastu tadvacaḥ śrutvā nirgataḥ saha senayā |
kośalānthimanā bhūtvā kāminoṃ prati niḥspṛhaḥ 61 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 37||
atha aṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
mahiṣa uvāca
tasyāstu bhaginī kanyā nāmnā ceṃdumatī śubhā |
vivāhayogyā saṃjātā surūpāvarajā tadā || 1 ||
tasyā vivāhaḥ saṃvṛttaḥ saṃjātaśca svayaṃvaraḥ |
rājāno bahudeśīyāḥ saṃgatāstatra maṃḍape ||2||
tayā vṛtto nṛpaḥ kaścidbalavānūpasaṃyutaḥ |
kulaśīlasamāyuktaḥ sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutaḥ ||3||
tadā kāmāturā jātā viṭaṃ vīkṣya nṛpaṃ tu sā |
cakame daivayogāttuṃ śaṭhaṃ cāturyabhūṣitam ||4||
pitaraṃ prāha tanvaṃgī vivāhaṃ kuru me pitaḥ |
icchā me'dya samudbhūtā dṛṣṭvā madrādhipaṃ tviha || 5 ||
caṃdraseno'pi tacchrutvā putryāstadbhāṣitaṃ rahaḥ |
prasannena ca manasā tatkāyeṃ tatparo'bhavat || 6 ||
tamāhūya nṛpaṃ gehe vivāhavidhinā dadau |
kanyāṃ maṃdodarīṃ tasmai pārivahaṃ tathā bahu ||7||
cārudeṣṇo'pi tāṃ prāpya suṃdarīṃ mudito'bhavat |
jagāma svagṛhaṃ tuṣṭo rājā'pi sahitaḥ striyā ||8||
reme nṛpatiśārdūlaḥ kāminyā bahuvāsarān |
kadāciddāsapatnyā sa ramamāṇo rahaḥ kila || 9||
sairaṃdhyā kathitaṃ tasyai tayā dṛṣṭaḥ patistathā |
upālaṃbhaṃ dadau tasmai smitapūrvaṃ ruṣānvitā || 10 ||
kadācidapi sāmānyāṃ raho rūpavatīṃ nṛpaḥ |
krīḍayaṃtlālayandṛṣṭaḥ khedaṃ prāpa tadaiva sā || 11 ||
na jñāto'yaṃ śaṭhaḥ pūrvaṃ yadā dṛṣṭaḥ svayaṃvare |
kiṃ kṛtaṃ tu mayā mohāracitā'haṃ nṛpeṇa ha || 12 ||

kiṃ karomyadya saṃtāpaṃ nirlajje nirghṛṇe śaṭhe |
kā prītirīdaśe patyo dhigadya mama jīvitam || 13||
adyaprabhṛti saṃsāre sukhaṃ tyaktaṃ mayā khalu |
patisaṃbhogajaṃ sarvaṃ saṃtoṣo'dya mayā kṛtaḥ || 14 ||
akartavyaṃ kṛtaṃ kārya tajjātaṃ duḥkhadaṃ mama |
dehatyāgaḥ kriyate ceddhatyā'tīva duratyayā || 15||
pitṛgehaṃ brajāmyāśu tatrāpi na sukhaṃ bhavet |
hāsyayogyā sakhīnāṃ tu bhaveyaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ ||16||
tasmādatraiva saṃvāso vairāgyayutayā mayā |
kartavyaḥ kālayogena tyaktvā kāmasukhaṃ punaḥ || 17 ||
mahiṣa uvāca
iti saṃcitya sā nārī duḥkhaśokaparāyaṇā |
sthitā patigṛhaṃ tyaktvā sukhaṃ saṃsārajaṃ tataḥ || 18 ||
tasmāttvamapi kalyāṇi māmanādṛtya bhūpatim |
anyaṃ kāpuruṣaṃ maṃdaṃ kāmārtā saṃśrayiṣyasi ||19||
vacanaṃ kuru me tathyaṃ nārīṇāṃ paramaṃ hitam |
akṛtvā paramaṃ śokaṃ lapsyase nātra saṃśayaḥ ||20||
devyuvāca
maṃdātmannagaccha pātālaṃ yuddhaṃ vā kuru sāṃpratam |
hatvā tvāmasurānsarvāngamiṣyāmi yathāsukham || 21 ||
yadā yadā hi sādhūnāṃ duḥkhaṃ bhavati dānava |
tadā teṣāṃ ca rakṣārthaṃ dehaṃ saṃdhārayāmyaham ||22||
arūpāyāśca me rūpamajanmāyāśca janma ca |
surāṇāṃ rakṣaṇārthāya viddhi daitya viniśvitam ||23||
satyaṃ bravīmi jānīhi prārthitā'haṃ suraiḥ kila |
tvadvadhārthaṃ hayāre tvāṃ hatvā sthāsyāmi niścalā ||24||
tasmādyudhyasva vā gaccha pātālamasurālayam |
sarvathā tvāṃ haniṣyāmi satyametadvīmyaham ||25||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktaḥ sa tathā devyā dhanurādāya dānavaḥ |
yuddhakāmaḥ sthitastatra saṃgrāmāṃgaṇabhūmiṣu ||26||
mumoca tarasā bāṇānkarṇākṛṣṭāñchilāśitān |
devī ciccheda tānbāṇai: krodhānmuktairayomukhaiḥ ||27||
tayoḥ parasparaṃ yuddhaṃ saṃbabhūva bhayapradam |
devānāṃ dānavānāṃ ca parasparajayaiṣiṇām ||28||
madhye durdhara āgatya mumoca ca śilīmukhān |
devīṃ prati viṣāsaktānkopayannatidāruṇān ||29||
tato bhagavatī kruddhā taṃ jaghāna śitaiḥ śaraiḥ |
durdharastu papātorvyāṃ gatāsurgiriśṛṃgavat ||30|
taṃ tathā nihataṃ dṛṣṭrā trinetra: paramāstravit |
āgatya saptabhirbāṇairjaghāna parameśvarīm ||31||
anāgatāṃstu ciccheda devī tānviśikhaiḥ śarān |
triśūlena trinetraṃ tu jaghāna jagadaṃbikā || 32||
aṃdhakastvājagāmāśu hataṃ dṛṣṭvā trilocanam |
gadayā lohamayyāśu siṃhaṃ vivyādha mastake ||33||
siṃhastu nakhaghātena taṃ hatvā balavattaram |
cakhāda tarasā māṃsamaṃdhakasya ruṣānvitaḥ ||34||
tātraṇe nihatānvīkṣya dānavo vismayaṃ gataḥ |
cikṣepa tarasā bāṇānatitīkṣṇāñchilāśitān ||
dvidhā cakre śarāndevī tānaprāptāñchilīmukhaiḥ |
gadayā tāḍayāmāsa daityaṃ vakṣasi cāṃbikā ||36||
sa gadā'bhihato mūrchāmavāpāmarabādhakaḥ |
viṣahya pīḍāṃ pāpātmā punarāgatya satvaraḥ || 37||

jaghāna gadayā siṃhaṃ mūhinaṃ krodhasamanvitaḥ |
siṃho'pi nakhaghātena taṃ dadāra mahāsuram ||38||
vihāya pauruṣaṃ rūpaṃ so'pi siṃho vabhūva ha |
nakhaividārayāmāsa devīsiṃhaṃ madotkaṭam || 39||
taṃ ca kesariṇaṃ vīkṣya devī kruddhā hyayomukhaiḥ |
śarairavākirattīkṣṇaiḥ karairāśīviṣairiva || 40 ||
tyaktvā sa harirūpaṃ tu gajo bhūtvā madasravaḥ |
śailaśṛṅgaṃ kare kṛtvā cikṣepa caṇḍikāṃ prati || 41 ||
āgacchataṃ gireḥ śṛṅgaṃ devī bāṇaiḥ śilāśitaiḥ |
cakāra tilaśaḥ khaṇḍāahāsa jagadambikā ||42||
utpatya ca tadā siṃhastasya mūrdhni vyavasthitaḥ |
nakhairvidārayāmāsa mahiṣaṃ gajarūpiṇam ||43||
vihāya gajarūpaṃ ca babhūvāṣṭāpadī tathā |
hantukāmo hari kopāddāruṇo balavattaraḥ || 44 ||
taṃ vīkṣya śarabhaṃ devī khaḍgena saruṣānvitā |
uttamāṃge jadhānāśu so'pi tāṃ prāharattadā || 45 ||
tayoḥ parasparaṃ yuddhaṃ babhūvātibhayapradam |
māhiṣaṃ rūpamāsthāya śṛṅgābhyāṃ prāharattadā || 46 ||
pucchaprabhramaṇenāśu śṛṅgāghātairmahāsuraḥ |
tāḍayāmāsa tanvaṅgīṃ ghorarūpo bhayānakaḥ || 47 ||
pucchena parvatāñchṛṅge gṛhītvā bhrāmayanbalāt |
preṣayāmāsa pāpātmā prahasanparayā mudā ||48 ||
tāmuvāca balonmattastiṣṭha devi raṇāṃgaṇe |
adyāhaṃ tvāṃ haniṣyāmi rūpayauvanabhūṣitām ||49||
mūrkhā'si madamattā'dya yanmayā saha saṅgaram |
karoṣi mohitā'tīva mṛṣā balavatī kharā || 50 ||
hatvā tvāṃ nihaniṣyāmi devānkapaṭapaṇḍitān |
ye nārīṃ purataḥ kṛtvā jetumicchanti māṃ śaṭhāḥ || 51 ||
devyuvāca
mā gavaṃ kuru mandātmaṃstiṣṭha tiṣṭa raṇāṃgaṇe |
kariṣyāmi nirātaṃ kānhatvā tvāṃ surasattamān ||52||
pītvā'dya mādhavīṃ miṣṭāṃ śātayāmi raṇe'dhama |
devānāṃ duḥkhadaṃ pāpaṃ munīnāṃ bhayakārakam || 53 ||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā caṣakaṃ haimaṃ gṛhītvā surayā yutam |
papau punaḥ punaḥ krodhāddhantukāmā mahāsuram ||54||
pītvā drākṣāsavaṃ miṣṭaṃ śūlamādāya satvarā |
dudrāva dānavaṃ devī harpayandevatāgaṇān ||55||
devāstāṃ taṣṭuvuḥ premṇā cakruḥ kusumavarṣaṇam |
jaya jīveti te procurdundubhonāṃ ca niḥsvanaiḥ ||56||
ṛṣayaḥ siddhagandharvāḥ piśācoragacāraṇāḥ |
kinnarāḥ prekṣya saṃgrāmaṃ muditā gagane sthitāḥ || 57||
so'pi nānāvidhāndehānkṛtvā kṛtvā punaḥ punaḥ |
māyāmayā aghānājau devoṃ kapaṭapaṃḍitaḥ || 58 ||
caṃḍikā'pi ca taṃ pāpaṃ triśūlena balāddhṛdi |
tāḍayāmāsa tīkṣṇena krodhādaruṇalocanā || 59 ||
tāḍito'sau papātoya mūrcchāmāpa muhūrtakam |
punarutthāya cāmuṃḍā padbhayāṃ vegādatāḍayat || 60||
vinihatya padāghātairjahāsa ca padāghātairjahāsa ca muhurmuhuḥ |
rurāva dāruṇaṃ śabdaṃ devānāṃ bhayakārakam || 61 ||
tato devī sahasrāraṃ sunābhaṃ cakramuttamam |
qare kṛtvā jagādāccaḥ saṃsthitaṃ mahiṣāsuram || 62 ||
paśya cakraṃ madāṃdhādya tava kaṇṭanikṛntanam |
kṣaṇamātraṃ sthiro bhūtvā yamalokaṃ vrajādhunā || 63 ||

ityuktvā dāruṇaṃ cakraṃ mumoca jagadambikā |
śiraśchinnaṃ rathāṃgena dānavasya tadā raṇe || 64||
susrāva rudhiraṃ coṣṇaṃ kaṇṭhanālādvireryathā |
gairikādyaruṇaṃ prauḍhaṃ pravāhamiva nairjharam ||65 ||
kabandhastasya daityasya bhraman vai patitaḥ kṣitau |
jayaśabdaśca devānāṃ babhūva sukhavardhanaḥ || 66||
siṃhastvati balastatra palāyanaparānatha |
dānavānbhakṣayāmāsa kṣudhārta iva saṅgare ||67 ||
mṛte ca mahiṣe krūre dānavā bhayapīḍitāḥ |
mṛtaśepāśca ye kecitpātālaṃ te yayurnṛpa || 68 ||
ānandaṃ paramaṃ jagmurdevāstasminnipātite |
munayāṃ mānavāścaiva ye cānye sādhavaḥ kṣitau || 69 ||
caṇḍikā'pi raṇaṃ tyaktvā śubhe deśe'tha saṃsthitā |
devāstatrāyayuḥ śīghraṃ stotukāmāḥ sukhapradām ||70||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe mahiṣāsuravadho nāmāṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 18 ||
athaikonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
atha pramuditāḥ sarve devā indrapurogamāḥ |
mahiṣaṃ nihataṃ dṛṣṭvā tuṣṭuvurjagadambikām ||1||
devā ūcuḥ
brahmā sṛjatyavati viṣṇuridaṃ maheśaḥ śaktyā tavaiva harate nanu cāṃtakāle |
īśā na te'pi ca bhavanti tayā vihīnāstasmāttvameva jagataḥ sthitināśakartrī ||2||
kīrtitaḥ smṛtigatī karuṇā dayā tvaṃ śraddhā dhṛtiśva vasudhā kapalā jayā ca |
puṣṭi: kalā'tha bijayā girijā jayā tvaṃ tuṣṭiḥ pramā tvamasi buddhirumā ramā ca ||3||
vidyā kṣamā jagati kāṃtirapīha medhā sarva tvameva viditā bhuvanatraye'smin |
ābhivinā tava tu śaktibhirāśu kartuṃ ko vā kṣamaḥ sakalalokanivāsabhūme ||4|| "
tvaṃ dhāraṇā nanu na cedasi kūrmanāgo dhartuṃ kṣamo kathamilāmapi to bhavetām |
pṛthvī na cetvamasi vā gagane kathaṃ sthāsyatyetadamba nikhilaṃ bahubhārayuktam ||5||
ye vā stuvanti manujā amarānvimūḍhā māyāguṇaistava caturmukhaviṣṇurudrān |
śubhrāṃśurvāhnayamavāyu gaṇeśamukhyānki tvāmṛte janani te prabhavanti kārye || 6 ||
ye juhvati pravitate'lpadhiyo'mba yajñaṃ vāsī surānsamadhikṛtya haviḥ samṛddham |
svāhā na cettvamasi te kathamāpuraddhā tvāmeva ki na hi yajati tato hi mūḍhāḥ ||7||
bhogapradā'si bhavatīha carācarāṇāṃ svāṃśairdadāsi khalu jīvanameva nityam |
svīyānsurāñjanani poṣayasīha yadvattadvatparānapi ca pālayasīti hetoḥ ||8||

mātaḥ svayaṃ viracitānvipine vinodādvaṃghyānpalāśarahitāṃśca kaṭuṃśva vṛkṣān |
nocchedayaṃti puruṣā nipuṇāḥ kathaṃcittasmāttvamapyatitarāṃ paripāsi daityān ||9||
yattvaṃ tu haṃsi raṇamūrdhni śarairarātīndevāṃganāsuratakelimatīnviditvā |
dehāntare'pi karuṇārasamādadānā tatte caritramidamīpsitapūraṇāya || 10 ||
citraṃ tvamī yadasubhī rahitā na santi tvaccatitena danujāḥ prathitaprabhāvāḥ |
yeṣāṃ kṛte janani dehanibandhanaṃ te krīḍārasastava na cānyataro'tra hetuḥ || 11||
prāpte kalāvahaha duṣṭatare ca kāle na tvāṃ bhajanti manujā nanu vañcitāste |
dhūrteḥ purāṇacaturairhariśaṅkarāṇāṃ sevāparāśca vihitāstava nirmitānām ||12||
jñātvā surāṃstava vaśānasurāditāṃśca ye vaṃ bhajanti bhuvi bhāvayutā nimagnān |
dhṛtvā kare suvimalaṃ khalu dīpakaṃ te kūpe patanti manujā vijale'tighore ||13||
vidyā tvameva sukhadā'sukhadā'pyavidyā mātastvameva jananātiharā narāṇām |
mokṣārthabhistu kalitā kila maṃdadhībhirnārādhitā janani bhogaparaistathā'jñaiḥ || 14 ||
brahmā haraśca harirapyaniśa śaraṇyaṃ pādāṃbujaṃ tava bhajaṃti surāstathānye |
tadvai na ye'lpamatayo manasā bhajanti bhrāntāḥ patanti satataṃ bhavasāgare te || 15 ||
caṇḍi tvadaṃghrijalajottharajaḥ prasādairbrahmā karoti sakalaṃ bhuvanaṃ bhavādau |
śauriśca pāti khalu saṃharate harastu tvāṃ sevate na manujastviha durbhago'sau || 16 ||
vāgdevatā tvamasi devi surāsurāṇāṃ vaktuṃ na te'maravarāḥ prabhavanti śaktāḥ |
tvaṃ cenmukhe vasasi naiva yadaiva teṣāṃ yasmādbhavanti manujā na hi tadvihīnāḥ || 17 ||
śapto haristu bhṛguṇā kupitena kāmaṃ mīno babhūva kamaṭhaḥ khalū sūkarastu |
paśvānnṛsiṃha iti yaśchalakṛddharāyāṃ tānsevatāṃ janani mṛtyubhayaṃ na kiṃ syāt ||18||
śambhoḥ papāta bhuvi liṃgamidaṃ prasiddhaṃ śāpena tena ca bhṛgovipine gatasya |
taṃ. ye narā bhuvi bhajaṃti kapālinaṃ tu teṣāṃ sukhaṃ kathamihāpi paratra mātaḥ || 19||
yo'bhūdgajānana gaṇādhipatirmaheśāttaṃ ye bhajanti manujā vitathaprapannāḥ |
jānaṃti te na sakalārthaphalapradātrī tvāṃ devi viśvajananīṃ sukhasevanīyām ||20||
citraṃ tvayā'rijanatā'pi dayārdrabhāvāddhatvā raṇe śitaśarairgamitā dyulokam |
nocetsvakarmanicite niraye nitāntaṃ duḥkhātiduḥkhagati māpadamāpatetsā ||21||
brahmā haraśca harirapyuta garvabhāvājjānaṃti te'pi vibudhā na tava prabhāvam |
ke'nye bhavaṃti manujā vidituṃ samarthāḥ saṃmohitāstava guṇairamitaprabhāvaḥ ||22||

kliśyanti te'pi munayastava durvibhāvyaṃ pādāmbujaṃ na hi bhajanti vimūḍhacittāḥ |
sūryāgnisevanaparāḥ paramārthatattvaṃ jñātaṃ na taiḥ śrutiśatairapi vedasāram ||23||
manye guṇāstava bhuvi prathitaprabhāvāḥ kurvanti ye hi vimukhānnanu bhaktibhāvāt |
viṣṇvīśabhāskara gaṇeśaparānvidhāya || 24||
lokānsvabuddhiracitairvividhāgamaṃśca
kurvanti ye tava padādvimukhānnarāgrayānsvoktāgamairhariharārcanabhaktiyogaḥ |
teṣāṃ na kupyasi dayāṃ kuruṣe'mbike tvaṃ tānmohamantranipuṇānprayayasyalaṃ ca ||25||
turye yuge bhavati cātibalaṃ guṇasya turyasya tena mathitānyasadāgamāni |
tvāṃ gopayanti nipuṇāḥ kavayaḥ kalau vai tvatkalpitāsuragaṇānapi saṃstuvanti ||26||
dhyāyanti muktiphaladāṃ bhuvi yogasiddhāṃ vidyāṃ parāṃ ca munayo'tiviśuddhasattvāḥ |
te nāpnuvanti jananījaṭhare tu du:khaṃ dhanyāsta eva manujāstvayi ye trilīnāḥ ||27||
cicchantirasti paramātmani yena so'pi vyakto jagatsu vidito bhavakṛtyakartā |
ko'nyastvayā trirahitaḥ prabhavatyamuṣminkatuṃ vihartumapi sañcalitaṃ svaśaktyā ||28||
tattvāni cidvirahitāni jagavidhātuṃ kiṃ vā kṣamāṇi jagadamba yato jaḍāni |
kiṃ cendriyāṇi guṇakarmayutāni santi devi tvayā virahitāni phalaṃ pradātum ||29||
devā makheṣvapi hutaṃ munibhiḥ svabhāgaṃ gṛhṇīyuramba vidhivatpratipāditaṃ kim |
svāhā na cettvamasi tatra nimittabhūtā tasmāttvameva nanu pālayasīva viśvam ||30||
sarvaṃ tvayedamakhilaṃ vihitaṃ bhavādau tvaṃ pāsi vai hariharapramukhāndigīśān |
kāle'mi viśvamapi te caritaṃ bhavādyaṃ jānanti naiva manujāḥ kva nu mandabhāgyāḥ ||31||
hatvā'suraṃ mahiṣarūpadharaṃ mahograṃ mātastvayā suragaṇaḥ kila rakṣito'yam |
kāṃ te stuti janani mandadhiyo vidāmo vedā gati tava yathārthatayā na jagmuḥ ||32||
kāryaṃ kṛtaṃ jagati no yadasau durātmā vairī hato bhuvanakaṃṭakadurvibhāvyaḥ |
kīrtiḥ kṛtā nanu jagatsu kṛpā vidheyā'pyasmāṃśca pāhi janani prathitaprabhāve ||33||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ stutā surairdevī tānuvāca mṛdusvarā |
anyatkāryaṃ ca duḥsādhyaṃ bruvantu surasattamāḥ ||34||
yadā yadā hi devānāṃ kāryaṃ syādatidurghaṭam |
smartavyā'haṃ tadā śīghraṃ nāśayiṣyāmi cāpadam 35 ||
devā ūcuḥ
sarva kṛtaṃ tvayā devi kāryaṃ naḥ khalu sāmpratam |
yadayaṃ nihataḥ śatrarasmākaṃ mahiṣāsuraḥ ||36||
smariṣyāmo yathā te'mba sadaiva padapaṅkajam |
tathā kuru jaganmātarbhakti tvayyapyacañcalām ||37||

aparādhasahasrāṇi mātaiva sahate sadā |
iti jñātvā jagadyoniṃ na bhajaṃte kuto janāḥ ||38||
dvau suparṇī tu dehe'smiṃstayoḥ sakhyaṃ niraṃtaram |
nānyaḥ sakhā tṛtīyo'sti yo'parādhaṃ saheta hi || 39 ||
tasmājjīvaḥ sakhāyaṃ tvāṃ hitvā kiṃ nu kariṣyati |
pāpātmā mandabhāgyo'sau suramānuṣayoniṣu ||40||
prāpya dehaṃ suduṣprāpaṃ na smaretvāṃ narādhamaḥ |
manasā karmaṇā vācā brūmaḥ satyaṃ punaḥ punaḥ || 41 ||
sukhe vāpyatha vā duḥkhe tvaṃ naḥ śaraṇamadbhutam |
pāhi naḥ satataṃ devi sarvaistava varāyudhaiḥ || 42 ||
anyathā śaraṇaṃ nāsti tvatpadāṃbujareṇa॒taḥ |
evaṃ stutā surairdevī tatraivāṃtaradhīyata ||43||
vismayaṃ paramaṃ jagmurdevāstāṃ vīkṣya nirgatām ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe ekonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 19 ||
atha viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
athādbhutaṃ vīkṣya mune prabhāvaṃ devyā jagacchāṃtikaraṃ paraṃ ca |
na tṛptirasti dvijavarya śṛṇvataḥ kathāmṛtaṃ te mukhapadmajātam || 1 ||
antarhitāyāṃ ca tadā bhavānyāṃ cakruśca kiṃ devapurogamāste |
devyāśvaritraṃ paramaṃ pavitraṃ durāpamevālpapuṇyairnarāṇām || 2 ||
kastṛptimāpnoti kathāmṛtena bhinno'lpabhāgyātpaṭukarṇaraṃdhraḥ |
pītena yenāmaratā prayāti dhiktānnarān ye na pibaṃti sādaram || 3 ||
līlācaritraṃ jagadaṃbikāyā rakṣānvitaṃ devamahāmunīnām |
saṃsāravārdhestaraṇaṃ narāṇāṃ kathaṃ kṛtajñā hi parityajeyuḥ || 4 !!
muktāśca ye caiva mumukṣavaśca saṃsāriṇo rogayutāśca kecit |
teṣāṃ sadā śrotrapuṭaiśva peyaṃ sarvārthadaṃ vedavido vadanti || 5 ||
tathā viśeṣeṇa mune nṛpāṇāṃ dharmārthakāmeṣu sadā ratānām |
muktāśca yasmātkhalu tatpibaṃti kathaṃ na peyaṃ rahitaiśva tebhyaḥ || 6||
yaiḥ pūjitā pūrvabhave bhavānī satkundapuṣpairatha caṃpakaiśca |
baॅlvairdaste bhuvi bhogayuktā nṛpā bhavantītyanumeyameva || 7 ||
ye bhaktihīnāḥ samavāpya dehaṃ taṃ mānuṣaṃ bhāratabhūmibhāge |
yairnācitā te dhanadhānyahīnā rogānvitāḥ saṃtativarjitāśca || 8 ||

bhramaṃti nityaṃ kila dāsabhūtā ājñākarāḥ kevalabhāravāhāḥ |
divāniśaṃ svārthaparāḥ kadāpi naivāpnuvaṃtyodarapūrtimātram || 9 ||
anyāśca mūkā badhirāśca khaṃjāḥ kuṣṭhānvitā ye bhuvi duḥkhabhājaḥ |
tatrānumānaṃ kavibhirvidheyaṃ nārādhitā taiḥ satataṃ bhavānī || 10 ||
ye rājabhogānvitaṛddhipūrṇāḥ saṃsevyamānā bahubhirmanuṣyaiḥ |
dṛśyaṃti ye vā vibhavaiḥ sametāstaiḥ pūjitā'mbetyanumeyameva || 11 ||
tasmātsatyavatīsūno devyāścaritamuttamam |
kathayasva kṛpāṃ kṛtvā dayāvānasi sāṃpratam || 12||
hatvā taṃ mahiṣaṃ pāpaṃ stutā saṃpūjitā suraiḥ |
kva gatā sā mahālakṣmīḥ sarvatejaḥ samudbhavā || 13 ||
kathitaṃ te mahābhāga gatāṃtardhānamāśu sā |
svarge vā mṛtyuloke vā saṃsthitā bhuvaneśvarī || 14 ||
layaṃ gatā vā tatraiva vaikuṇṭhe vā samāśritā |
athavā hemaśaile sā tattvato me vadādhunā ||15||
vyāsa uvāca
pūrvaṃ mayā te kathitaṃ maṇidvīpaṃ manoharam |
krīḍāsthānaṃ sadā devyā vallabhaṃ paramaṃ smṛtam || 16||
yatra brahmā hariḥ sthāṇuḥ strībhāvaṃ te prapedire |
puruṣatvaṃ punaḥ prāpya svāni kāryāṇi cakrire || 17||
yaḥ sudhāsindhu madhye'sti dvīpaḥ paramaśobhanaḥ |
nānārūpaiḥ sadā tatra vihāraṃ kurute'mbikā || 18 ||
stutā saṃpūjitā devaiḥ sā tatraiva gatā śivā |
yatra saṃkrīḍate nityaṃ māyāśaktiḥ sanātanī ||19||
devāstāṃ nirgatāṃ vīkṣya devīṃ sarveśvarīṃ tathā |
ravivaṃśodbhavaṃ cakrurbhūmipālaṃ mahābalam ||20||
ayodhyādhipati vīraṃ śatrughnaṃ nāma pārthivam |
sarvalakṣaṇasaṃpannaṃ mahiṣasyāsane śubhe ||21||
dattvā rājyaṃ tadā tasmai devā indrapuro māḥ |
svakīya vāhanaiḥ sarve jagmuḥ svānyālayāni te || 22 ||
ganeṣu teṣu deveṣu pṛthivyāṃ pṛthivīpate |
dharmarājyaṃ babhūvātha prajāśca sukhitāstathā || 23 ||
parjanyaḥ kālavarṣī ca dharā dhānyaguṇāvṛtā |
pādapāḥ phalapuṣpāḍhyā babhūvuḥ sukhadāḥ sadā ||24||
gāvaśca kṣīrasaṃpannā ghaṭodhnyaḥ kāmadā nṛṇām |
nadyaḥ sumārgagāḥ svacchāḥ śītodāḥ khagasaṃyutāḥ 25 ||
brāhmaṇā vedatattvāśva yajñakarmaratāstathā |
kṣatriyā dharmasaṃyuktā dānādhyayanatatparāḥ ||26||
śastravidyāratā nityaṃ prajārakṣaṇatatparāḥ |
nyāyadaṇḍadharāḥ sarve rājānaḥ śamasaṃyutāḥ ||27||
avirodhastu bhūtānāṃ sarveṣāṃ saṃbabhūva ha |
ākarā dhanadātṛṇāṃ vrajā goyūthasaṃyutāḥ ||28||
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāḥ śūdrāśca nṛpasattama |
devībhaktiparāḥ sarve saṃbabhūvurdharātale ||29||
sarvatra yajñayūpāśca maṃḍapāśca manoharāḥ |
makhaiḥ pūrṇā dharāśvāsan brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyaiḥ kṛtaiḥ 30 ||
pativratadharā nāryaḥ suśīlāḥ satyasaṃyutāḥ |
pitṛbhaktiparāḥ putrā āsandharmaparāyaṇāḥ || 31|| .
na pākhaṇḍaṃ na vā'dharmaḥ kutrāpi pṛthivītale |
vedavādā: śāstravādā nānye vādāstathā'bhavan 32||

kalaho naiva keṣāṃcinna dainyaṃ nāśubhā matiḥ |
sarvatra sukhino lokāḥ kāle ca maraṇaṃ tathā ||33||
suhṛdāṃ na viyogaśca nāpadaśca kadācana |
nānāvṛṣṭirna durbhikṣaṃ na mārī duḥkhadā nṛṇām ||34||
na rogo na ca mātsaryaṃ na virodhaḥ parasparam |
sarvatra sukhasaṃpatrā narā nāryaḥ sukhānvitāḥ ||35||
krīḍati mānavāḥ sarve svarge devagaṇā iva |
na corā na ca pākhaṇḍā vaṃcakā daṃbhakāstathā ||36||
piśunā lampaṭāḥ stabdhā na babhūvustadā nṛpa |
na vedadveṣiṇaḥ pāpā mānavāḥ pṛthivīpate ||37||
sarve dharmaratā nityaṃ dvijasevāparāyaṇāḥ |
tridhātyātsṛṣṭidharmasya trividhā brāhmaṇāstataḥ 38||
sāttvikā rājasācaiva tāmasāśca tathāpare |
sarve vedavido dakṣāḥ sāttvikāḥ sattvavṛttayaḥ 39||
pratigrahavihīnāśca dayādamaparāyaṇāḥ |
yajñāṃste sāttvikairannaḥ kurvāṇā dharmatatparāḥ || 40 ||
puroḍāśavidhānaiśca paśubhirna kadācana |
dānamadhyayanaṃ caiva yajanaṃ tu tṛtīyakam ||41 ||
trikarma rasikāste vai sāttvikā brāhmaṇā nṛpa |
rājasā vedavidvāṃsaḥ kṣatriyāṇāṃ purohitāḥ || 42||
ṣaṭkarmaniratāḥ sarve vidhivanmāṃsabhakṣakāḥ |
yajanaṃ yājanaṃ dānaṃ tathaiva ca pratigrahaḥ || 43 ||
adhyayanaṃ tu vedānāṃ tathaivādhyāpanaṃ tu ṣaṭ |
tāmasāḥ krodhasaṃyuktā rāgadveṣaparāḥ punaḥ || 44 ||
rājñāṃ karmakarā nityaṃ kiṃcidadhyayane ratāḥ |
mahiṣe nihate sarve sukhino vedatatparāḥ || 45||
babhūvurvrataniṣṇātā dānadharmaparāstathā |
kṣatriyāḥ pālane yuktā vaiśyā vaṇijavṛttayaḥ || 46 ||
kṛṣivāṇijyagorakṣākusīdavṛttayaḥ pare |
evaṃ pramudito loko mahiṣe vinipātite || 47 ||
anudvegaḥ prajānāṃ vai saṃbabhūva dhanāgamaḥ |
bahukṣīrāḥ śubhā gāvo nadyaścaiva bahūdakāḥ || 48 ||
vṛkṣā bahuphalāśvāsanmānavā rogavarjitāḥ |
nādhayo netayaḥ kvāpi prajānāṃ duḥkhadāyakāḥ || 49 ||
na nidhanamupayānti prāṇinaste'pyakāle sakalavibhavayuktā rogahīnāḥ sadaiva |
nigamavihitadharme tatparāścaṃḍikāyāścaraṇasarasijānāṃ sevane dattacittāḥ ||50 ||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 20||
atha ekaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi devyāśraritamuttamam |
sukhadaṃ sarvajaṃtūnāṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam ||1||
yathā śuṃbha niśuṃbhaśva bhrātarau balavattarau |
vabhūvatumahāvīrau avaghyau puruṣaiḥ kila || 2 ||
bahumenāvṛtī śūro devānāṃ duḥkhadau sadā |
durācārī madotsikto bahudānavasaṃyutī ||3||
hatāvambikayā to tu saṃgrāme'tīva dāruṇa |
devānāṃ ca hitārthāya sarvaiḥ paricaraiḥ saha ||4||
caṃḍamuṃḍī mahābāhū raktabījo'tidāruṇaḥ |
dhūmralocananāmā ca nihatāste raṇāṃgaṇe ||5||

tānnihatya surāṇāṃ sā jahāra bhayamuttamam |
stutā saṃpūjitā devagirī mācale śubhe || 6 ||
rājovāca
kathitāvasurāvādī kathaṃ tau balināṃ varau |
kena saṃsthāpito ceha strīvadhyatvaṃ kuto gatau ||7||
tapasā varadānena kasya jātau mahābalau |
kathaṃ ca nihato sarvaṃ kathayasva savistaram || 8||
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājankathāṃ divyāṃ sarvapāpagṇāśinīm |
devyāścaritasaṃyuktāṃ sarvārthaphaladāṃ śubhām ||9||
purā śuṃbhaniśuṃbho dvāvasurau dvāvasurau bhūmimaṃḍale |
pātālataśca saṃprāptau bhrātarau śubhadarśanī || 10 ||
tau prāptayauvanau caiva ceratustapa uttamam |
annodakaṃ parityajya puṣkare lokapāvane || 11||
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ yāvadyogavidyā parāyaṇau |
ekatraivāsanaṃ kṛtvā tepāte paramaṃ tapaḥ ||12||
tayostuṣṭo'bhavad brahmā sarvalokapitāmahaḥ |
tatrāgataśca bhagavānāruhya varaṭāpatim ||13||
tāvubhau ca jagatsraṣṭā dṛṣṭvā dhyānaparau sthitau |
uttiṣṭhataṃ mahābhāgau tuṣṭo'haṃ tapasā kila || 14 ||
vyāsa uvāca
vāñchitaṃ vā varaṃ kāmaṃ dadāmi bruvatāmiha |
kāmado'haṃ samāyāto dṛṣṭvā vāṃ tapaso balam ||15||
iti śrutvā vacastasya prabuddhau tau samāhitau |
pradakṣiṇakriyāṃ kṛtvā praṇāmaṃ cakratustadā || 16 ||
daṃḍavatpraṇipātaṃ ca kṛtvā tau durbalākṛtī |
ūcaturmadhurāṃ vācaṃ donau gadgadayā girā || 17||
devadeva dayāsindho 'bhaktānāmabhayaprada |
amaratvaṃ ca no brahmandehi tuṣṭo'si ceṭṭibho || 18 ||
maraṇādaparaṃ kiñcidbhayaṃ nāsti dharātale |
tasmādbhayācca saṃtrastau yuṣmākaṃ śaraṇaṃ gatau || 19||
prāhi tvaṃ devadeveśa jagatkartaḥ kṣamānidhe |
parisphoṭaya viśvātmansadyo maraṇajaṃ bhayam || 20 |
brahmovāca
kimidaṃ prārthanīyaṃ vo viparītaṃ tu sarvathā |
adeyaṃ sarvathā sarvaiḥ sarvebhyo bhuvanatraye ||21|
jātasya hi dhruvo mṛtyurdhruvaṃ janma mṛtasya ca |
maryādā vihitā loke pūrva viśvakṛtā kila ||22||
martavyaṃ sarvathā sarveḥ prāṇibhirnātra saṃśayaḥ |
anyaṃ prārthayataṃ kāmaṃ dadāmi yacca vāṃchitam ||23||
vyāsa uvāca
tadākarṇya vacastasya suvimṛśya ca dānatrau |
ūcatuḥ praṇipatyātha brahmāṇaṃ purataḥ sthitam ||24||
puruṣairamarādyaiśva mānavairmṛgapakṣibhiḥ |
śravadhyatvaṃ kṛpāsiṃdho dehi nau vāṃchitaṃ varam ||25||
nārī balavatī kā'sti yā nau nāśaṃ kariṣyati |
na vibhovaḥ striyaḥ kāmaṃ trailokyeṃ sacarācare ||26||
avadhyau bhrātarau syātāṃ narebhya: paṃkajodbhava |
bhayaṃ na strījanebhyaśca svabhāvādabalā hisā ||27||

vyāsa uvāca
iti śrutvā tayorvākyaṃ pradadau vāṃchitaṃ varam |
brahmā prasannamanasā jagāmātha svamālayam ||28||
gate'tha bhavane tasmindānavo svagṛhaṃ gatau |
bhṛguṃ purohitaṃ kṛtvā cakratuḥ pūjanaṃ tadā ||29||
śubhe dine sunakṣatre jātarūpamayaṃ śubham |
kṛtvā siṃhāsanaṃ divyaṃ rājyārthaṃ pradadau muniḥ ||30||
śubhāya jyeṣṭhabhūtāya dadau rājyāsanaṃ śubham |
sevanārthaṃ tadaivāśu samprāptā dānavottamāḥ || 31 ||
caṇḍamuṇḍo mahāvīrau bhrātarau baladarpito |
samprāpto sainyasaṃyukto rathavājigajānvitau ||32||
dhūmralocananāmā tadrūpacaṇḍavikramaḥ |
śuṃbhaṃ ca bhūpatiṃ śrutvā tadā'gādvalasaṃyutaḥ ||33|| ca
raktabījastathā śūro śūro varadānabalādhikaḥ |
akṣauhiṇībhyāṃ saṃyuktastatraivāgatya saṃgata. ||34||
tasyaikaṃ kāraṇaṃ rājansaṃgrāme yudhyataḥ sadā |
dehādrudhirasampātastasya śastrāhatasya ca || 35 ||
jāyate ca yadā bhūmāvutpadyante hyanekaśaḥ |
tādṛśāḥ puruṣāḥ krūrā bahavaḥ śastrapāṇayaḥ || 36 ||
sambhavanti tadākārāstadrūpāstatparākramāḥ |
yuddhaṃ punaste kurvanti puruṣā raktasambhavāḥ ||37||
ataḥ so'pi mahāvīryaḥ saṃgrāme'tīva durjayaḥ |
avadhyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ raktabījo mahāsuraḥ ||38||
anye ca bahavaḥ śūrāścaturaṅgasamanvitāḥ |
śuṃbhaṃ ca nṛpatiṃ matvā babhūvustasya sevakāḥ ||39||
asaṃkhyātā tadā jātā senā śuṃbhaniśuṃbhayoḥ |
pṛthivyāḥ sakalaṃ rājyaṃ gṛhītaṃ balavattayā ||40||
senāyogaṃ tadā kṛtvā niśuṃbhaḥ paravīrahā |
jagāma tarasā svargaṃ śacīpatijayāya ca || 41 ||
cakārāso mahāyuddhaṃ lākapālaiḥ samantataḥ |
bṛtrahā vajrapātena tāḍayāmāsa vakṣasi || 42||
sa vajrābhihato bhūmau papāta dānavānujaḥ |
bhagnaṃ balaṃ tadā tasya niśuṃbhasya mahātmanaḥ || 43 ||
bhrātaraṃ mūrcchitaṃ śrutvā śuṃbha: parabalārdanaḥ |
tatrāgatya surānsarvāṃstāḍayāmāsa sāyakaiḥ || 44 ||
kṛtaṃ yuddhaṃ mahattena śuṃbhenākliṣṭakarmaṇā |
nirjitāstu surāḥ sarve seṃdrāḥ pālāśca sarvaśaḥ || 45 ||
aindraṃ padaṃ tadā tena gṛhītaṃ balavattayā |
kalpapādapa saṃyuktaṃ kāmadhenusamanvitam ||46||
trailokyaṃ yajñabhāgāśca hṛtāstena mahātmanā |
nandanaṃ ca vanaṃ prāpya mudito'bhūnmahāsuraḥ || 47||
sudhāyācaṃva pānena sukhamāpa mahāsuraḥ |
kuberaṃ sa ca nirjitya tasya rājyaṃ cakāra ha || 48||
adhikāraṃ tathā bhānoḥ śaśinaśca cakāra ha |
yamaṃ caiva vinirjitya jagrāha tatpadaṃ tathā || 49 ||
varuṇasya tathā rājyaṃ cakāra vahnikarma ca |
vāyoḥ kārya niśuṃbhaśca cakāra svabalānvitaḥ || 50||
tato devā vinirdhūtā hṛtarājyā hṛtaśriyaḥ |
saṃtyajya nandanaṃ sarve niryayugirigahvare || 51||
hṛtādhikārāste sarve babhramuvijane vane |
nirālaṃbā nirādhārā nistejaskā nirāyudhāḥ || 52||
viceruramarāḥ sarve parvatānāṃ guhāsu ca |
udyāneṣu ca śūnyeṣu nadīnāṃ gahvareṣu ca ||53||
na prāpuste sukhaṃ kvāpi sthānabhraṣṭā vicetasaḥ |
lokapālā mahārāja daivādhīnaṃ sukhaṃ kila ||54||

balavanto mahābhāgā bahujñā dhanasaṃyutāḥ |
kāle duḥkhaṃ tathā dainyamāpnuvanti narādhipa || 55||
citrametanmahārāja kālasyaiva kālasyaiva viceṣṭitam |
yaḥ karoti naraṃ tāvadrājānaṃ bhikṣukaṃ tataḥ || 56 ||
dātāraṃ yācakaṃ caiva balavantaṃ tathā'balam |
paṃḍitaṃ vikalaṃ kāmaṃ śūraṃ cātīva kātaram ||57||
makhānāṃ ca śataṃ kṛtvā prāpyendrāsanamuttamam |
punarduḥkhaṃ paraṃ prāptaṃ kālasya gatirīdṛśī || 58 ||
kālaḥ karoti dharmiṣṭhaṃ puruṣaṃ jñānasaṃyutam |
tamevātīva pāpiṣṭhaṃ jñānaleśavivarjitam ||59||
na vismayo'tra kartavyaḥ sarvathā kālaceṣṭite | brahmaviṣṇuharādīnāmapīdṛkkaṣṭaceṣṭitam 119011
viṣṇurjananamāpnoti sūkarādiṣu yoniṣu |
haraḥ kapālī sañjātaḥ kālenaiva balīyasā || 61||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe paṃcamaskandhe bhagavatīmāhātmye ekaviśo'dhyāyaḥ ||21||
atha dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
parājitāḥ surāḥ sarve rājyaṃ śuṃbhaḥ śaśāsa ha |
evaṃ varṣasahasraṃ tu jagāma nṛpasattama ||1||
bhraṣṭarājyāstato devāścintāmāpuḥ sudustarām |
guruṃ duḥkhāturāste tu papracchuridamādṛtāḥ || 2||
kiṃ kartavyaṃ guro brūhi sarvajñastvaṃ mahāmuniḥ |
upāvo'sti mahābhāga duḥkhasyāpi nivṛttaye || 3 ||
upacāraparā nūnaṃ nūnaṃ vedamantrāḥ sahasraśaḥ |
vāṃchitārthakarā nūnaṃ sūtra: saṃlakṣitāḥ kila || 4 ||
iṣṭayo vividhāḥ proktāḥ sarvakāmaphalapradāḥ |
tāḥ kuruṣva mune nūnaṃ tvaṃ jānāsi ca tatkriyāḥ || 5 ||
vidhiḥ śatruvināśāya yathoddiṣṭaḥ sadāgame |
taṃ kuruṣvādya vidhivadyathā no duḥkhasaṃkṣayaḥ || 6 ||
bhavedāṃgirasādyaiva tathā tvaṃ kartumarhasi |
dānavānāṃ vināśāya abhicāraṃ yathāmati ||7||
bṛhaspatiruvāca
sarve mantrāśca vedoktā daivādhīnaphalāśca te |
na svatantrāḥ surādhīśa tathaikāntaphalapradāḥ ||8||
mantrāṇāṃ devatā yūyaṃ te tu duḥkhaikabhājanam |
jātāḥ sma kālayogena kiṃ karomi prasādhanam || 9 ||
indrāgnivaruṇādīnāṃ yajanaṃ yajñakarmasu |
te yūyaṃ vipadaṃ prāptāḥ kariṣyanti kimiṣṭayaḥ ||10||
avaśyaṃbhāvibhāvānāṃ pratīkāro na vidyate |
upāyastvatha kartavya iti śiṣṭānuśāsanam || 11||
daivaṃ hi balavatkecitpravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ |
upāyavādino daivaṃ pravadanti nirarthakam || 12 ||
daivaṃ caivāpyupāyaśca dvāvevābhimatau nṛṇām |
kevalaṃ daivamāśritya na sthātavyaṃ kadācana || 13 ||
upāya: sarvathā kāryo vicārya svadhiyā punaḥ |
tasmādbravīmi vaḥ sarvānsaṃvicārya punaḥ punaḥ || 14 ||
purā bhagavatī tuṣṭā jaghāna mahipāsuram |
yuṣmābhistu stutā devī varadānaṃ dadāvatha || 15||
āpadaṃ nāśayiṣyāmi saṃsmṛtā vā sadaiva hi |
yadā yadā vo deveśā āpado devasambhavāḥ || 16||

prabhavaṃti tadā kāmaṃ smartavyā'haṃ suraiḥ sadā |
smṛtā'haṃ nāśayiṣyāmi yuṣmākaṃ paramāpadaḥ || 17 ||
tasmāddhimācale gatvā parvate sumanohare |
ārādhanaṃ caṃḍikāyāḥ kurudhvaṃ premapūrvakam || 18 || ||
māyābījavidhānajñāstatpuraścaraṇe ratāḥ |
jānāmyahaṃ yogabalātprasannā sā bhaviṣyati ||19||
duḥkhasyāṃto'dya yuṣmākaṃ dṛśyate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
tasmiñchele sadā devī tiṣṭhatīti mayā śrutam || 20 ||
stutā sampūjitā sadyo vāṃchitārthānpradāsyati |
niścayaṃ paramaṃ kṛtvā gacchadhvaṃ vai himālayam ||21||
surāḥ sarvāṇi kāryāṇi sā vaḥ kāmaṃ vidhāsyati |
vyāsa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā devāste prayayugirim ||22||
himālayaṃ mahārāja devīdhyānaparāyaṇā |
māyābījaṃ hṛdā nityaṃ japantaḥ sarva eva hi || 23 ||
namaścakrurmahāmāyāṃ bhaktānāmabhayapradām |
tuṣṭavuḥ stotramantraiśca bhaktyā paramayā yutāḥ || 24||
namo devi viśveśvari prāṇanāthe sadānandarūpe surānandade te |
namo dānavāntaprade mānavānāmanekārthade bhaktigamyasvarūpe || 25||
na te nāmasaṃkhyā na te rūpamīdṛktathā ko'pi vedādidevādirūpe |
tvamevāsi sarveṣu śaktisvarūpā prajāsṛṣṭisaṃhārakāle sadaiva ||26||
smṛtistvaṃ dhṛtistvaṃ tvamevāsi buddhirjarā puṣṭituṣṭī dhṛtiḥ kāṃtiśāṃtī |
suvidyā sulakṣmīrgatiḥ kīrtimedhe tvamevāsi viśvasya bījaṃ purāṇam ||27||
yadā yaiḥ svarūpaiḥ karoṣīha kāryaṃ surāṇāṃ ca tebhyo namāmo'dya śāṃtyai |
kṣamā yoganidrā dayā tvaṃ vivakṣā sthitā sarvabhūteṣu śastaiḥ svarūpaiḥ ||28||
kṛtaṃ kāryamādau tvayā yatsurāṇāṃ hato'sau mahārirmadāṃdho hyāriḥ |
dayā te sadā sarvadeveṣu devi prasiddhā purāṇeṣu vedeṣu gītā ||29|
kimatrāsti citraṃ yadambā sutaṃ svaṃ mudā pālayetpoṣayetsamyageva |
yatastvaṃ janitrī purāṇāṃ sahāyā kuruṣvaikacittena kārya samagram ||30||
na vā te guṇānāmiyattāṃ svarūpaṃ vayaṃ devi jānīmahe vivandye |
kṛpāpātramityeva matvā tathā'smānbhayebhyaḥ sadā pāhi pātuṃ samarthe || 31 ||
vinā vāṇapātabinā muṣṭighātavinā śūlakhaṅgaivinā śani daṇḍaiḥ |
ripunhantumevāsi śatā vinodāttathāpīha lokopakārāya līlā ||32||
idaṃ śāśvataṃ naiva jānanti mūḍhā na kāryaṃ vinā kāraṇaṃ sambhavedrā |
vayaṃ tarkayāmo'numānaṃ pramāṇaṃ tvamevāsi kartā'sya viśvasya ceti ||33||

ajaḥ sṛṣṭikartā mukundo'vitā'yaṃ haro nāśakṛdvā purāṇe prasiddha: |
na kiṃ tvatprasūtāstrayaste yugādau tvamevāsi sarvasya tenaiva mātā ||34||
tribhistvaṃ purārādhitā devi dattā tvayā śaktirugrā ca tebhyaḥ samagrā |
tvayā saṃyutāste prakurvaṃti kāmaṃ jagatpālanotpattisaṃhārameva || 35||
te kiṃ na maṃdamatayo yatayo vimūḍhāstvāṃ ye na viśvajananīṃ samupāśrayaṃti |
vidyāṃ parāṃ sakalakāmaphalapradāṃ tāṃ muktipradāṃ vibudhavṛṃdasuvaṃditādhim || 36||
ye vaiṣṇavāḥ pāśupatāśca saurā daṃbhāsta eva pratibhāṃti nūnam |
ghyāyaṃti na tvāṃ kamalāṃ ca lajjāṃ kāṃti sthiti kīrtimathāpi puṣṭim ||37||
hariharādibhirapyatha sevitā tvamiha devavarairasuraistathā |
bhuvi bhajaṃti na ye'lpadhiyo narā janani te vidhinā khalu vaṃcitāḥ ||38||
jaladhijāpadapaṃkaja raṃjanaṃ jaturasena karoti hariḥ svayam |
trinayano'pi dharādharajāṃghripaṃkajaparāganiṣevaṇatatparaḥ ||39||
kimaparasya narasya kathānakaistava padābjayugaṃ na bhajaṃti ke |
vigatarāgagṛhāśca dayāṃ kṣamāṃ kṛtadhiyo munayo'pi bhajaṃti te || 40 ||
devi tvadaṃghribhajane na janā ratā ye saṃsārakūpapatitāḥ patitāḥ kilāmī |
te kuṣṭhagulmaśira adhiyutā bhavaṃti dāridrya dainyasahitā rahitāḥ sukhaughaiḥ || 41 ||
ye kāṣṭabhāravahūne yavasāvahāre kārye bhavanti nipuṇā dhanadārahīnāḥ |
jānīmahe'lpamatibhirbhavadaṃghrisevā pūrve bhave janani tarna kṛtā kadāpi || 42 ||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ stutā suraiḥ sarverambikā karuṇānvitā |
prādurbabhūva tarasā rūpayauvanasaṃyutā || 43 ||
divyāṃbaradharā devī divyabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā |
divyamālyasamāyuktā divya caṃdanacarcitā ||44 ||
jaganmohanalāvaṇyā sarvalakṣaṇalakṣitā |
advitīyasvarūpā sā devānāṃ darśanaṃ gatā || 45||
jāhravyāṃ snātukāmā sā nirgatā girigahvarāt |
divyarūpadharā devī viśvamohanamohinī || 46 ||
devānstutiparānāha meghagaṃbhīrayā girā |
premapūrvaṃ smitaṃ kṛtvā kokilāmaṃjuvādinī ||47||
devyuvāca
bhoḥ suravarā kā bhavadbhiḥ stūyate bhṛśam |
kimarthaṃ brūta vaḥ kāryaṃ citāviṣṭāḥ kutaḥ punaḥ || 48 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā bhāṣitaṃ tasyā mohitā rūpasaṃpadā |
premapūrvaṃ hṛdutsāhāstāmūcuḥ surasattamāḥ ||49 ||

devā ūcuḥ
vivi stumastvāṃ viśveśi praṇatāḥ sma kṛpārṇave |
pāhi naḥ sarvaduḥkhebhyaḥ saṃvignāndaitya nāpitān ||50||
purā tvayā mahādevi nihatyā surakaṃṭakam |
mahipaṃ no varo dattaḥ smartavyā'haṃ sadāpadi || 51 ||
smaraṇāddaityajāṃ pīḍāṃ nāśayiṣyāmyasaṃśayam |
tena tvaṃ saṃsmṛtā devi nūnamasmābhirityapi || 52 ||
adya. śuṃbhaniśumbhau dvāvasurau ghoradarśanī |
utpanno vighnakartārāvahanyo puruṣaḥ kila || 53 || "
raktabījaśca balavāṃścaṃḍamuṃḍī tathā'surau |
etairanyaiśca devānāṃ hṛtaṃ rājyaṃ mahābalaiḥ || 54 ||
gatiranyā na cāsmākaṃ tvamevāsi mahābale |

tāṃ devi duḥkharahitāṃ kuru bhaktiyuktāṃ mātastvameva śaraṇaṃ bhava duḥkhitānām ||56||

iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe pañcamaskandhe dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 22 ||
atha trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ stutā tadā devī daivataiḥ śatrutāpitaiḥ |
svaśarīrātparaṃ rūpaṃ prādurbhūtaṃ cakāra ha || 1 ||
pārvatyāstu śarīrādvai niḥsṛtā cāṃbikā tadā |
kauśikīti samasteṣu tato lokeṣu paṭhyate ||2||
niḥsṛtāyāṃ tu tasyāṃ sā pārvatī tanuvyatyayāt |
kṛṣṇarūpā'tha sañjātā kālikā sā prakīrtitā || 3 ||
maṣīvarṇā mahāghorā daityānāṃ bhayavardhinī |
kālarātrīti sā proktā sarvakāmaphalapradā || 4 |
ambikāyāḥ paraṃ rūpaṃ virarāja manoharam |
sarvabhūṣaṇasaṃyuktaṃ lāvaṇyaguṇasaṃyutam ||5||
tato'mbikā tadā devānityuvāca ha sasmitā |
niṣṭhantu nirbhayā yūyaṃ haniṣyāmi ripuniha ||6||
kārya vaḥ sarvathā kāryaṃ vihariṣyāmyahaṃ raṇe |
niśuṃbhādīnvadhiṣyāmi yuṣmākaṃ sukhahetave || 7 ||
ityuktvā sā tadā devī siṃhārūḍhā madotkaṭā |
kālikā pārśvataḥ kṛtvā jagāma nagare ripoḥ ||8||
sāgatvopavane tasthāvambikā kālikānvitā |
jagāvatha kalaṃ tatra jaganmohanamohanam || 9 ||
śrutvā tanmadhuraṃ gānaṃ mohamīyuḥ khagā mṛgāḥ |
mudaṃ ca paramāmāpuramarā gagane sthitāḥ || 10||
tasminnavasare tatra dānavo śumbhasevako |
caṃḍamuṇḍābhidho dhorau ramamāṇau yadṛcchayā || 11 ||
āgatau dadṛśāte tu tau tadā divyarūpiṇīm |
aṃbikāṃ gānasaṃyuktāṃ kālikāṃ purataḥ sthitām 12 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ divyarūpāṃ ca dānavo vismayānvitau |
jagmatustarasā pāvaṃ śumbhasya nṛpasattama ||13||

to gatvā taṃ samāsīnaṃ daityānāmadhipaṃ gṛhe |
ūcaturmadhurāṃ vāṇīṃ praṇamya śirasā nṛpam ||14||
rājanhimālayātkāmaṃ kāminī kāmamohinī |

nedṛśī devaloke'sti na gaṃdharva pure tathā |
na dṛṣṭā na śrutā kvāpi pṛthivyāṃ pramadottamā || 16 ||

mṛgāstiṣṭhanti tatpārśve madhurasvaramohitāḥ || 17||
jñāyatāṃ kasya putrīyaṃ kimarthamiha cāgatā |
gṛhyatāṃ rājarśādūla tava yogyā'sti kāminī || 18 ||
jñātvā naya gṛhe bhāryāṃ kuru kalyāṇalocanām |
niścitaṃ nāsti saṃsāre nārī tvevaṃvidhā kila || 19 ||
devānāṃ sarvaratnāni gṛhītāni tvayā nṛpa |
kasmānnemāṃ varārohāṃ pragṛhṇāsi nṛpottama ||20|
indrasyairāvataḥ śrīmānpārijātatarustathā |
gṛhīto'śvaḥ saptamukhastvayā nṛpa balātkila || 21||

kuberasya nidhiḥ padmastvayā rājansamāhṛtaḥ |
chatraṃ jalapateḥ śubhraṃ gṛhītaṃ tattvayā balāt ||23||
pāśaścāpi niśumbhena bhrātrā tava nṛpottama |
gṛhīto'sti haṭhātkāmaṃ varuṇasya jitasya ca ||24||
amlānapaṃkajāṃ tubhyaṃ mālāṃ jalanidhirdadau |
bhayāttava mahārāja ratnāni vividhāni ca || 25||
mṛtyoḥ śaktiryamasyāpi daṃḍa: paramadāruṇaḥ |

vyāsa uvāca
iti śrutvā tayorvākyaṃ madhuraṃ madhurākṣaram |
prasannavadanaḥ prāha sugrīvaṃ sannidhau sthitam ||31||
gaccha sugrīva dūtatvaṃ kuru kārya vicakṣaṇa |
vaktavyaṃ ca tathā tatra yathā'bhyeti kṛśodarī || 32||
upāyo dvau prayoktavyo kāṃtāsu suvicakṣaṇaḥ |
sāmadāne iti prāhuḥ śṛṃgārarasakovidāḥ ||33||
bhede prayujyamāne'pi rasābhāsastu jāyate |

sāmadānamukhairvākyaiḥ lakṣṇairnarmayutaistathā |
kā na yāti vaśe dūta kāminī kāmapīḍitā ||35||
vyāsa uvāca
sugrīvastu vacaḥ śrutvā śumbhoktaṃ supriyaṃ paṭu |

so'paśyatsumukhīṃ kāṃtāṃ siṃhasyopari saṃsthitām |

dūta uvāca
varoru tridaśārātiḥ śumbhaḥ sarvāṅgasundaraḥ |
trailokyādhipatiḥ śūraḥ sarvajidrājate nṛpaḥ || 38 ||
