yuddhaṃ purā vāsavavṛtrayoryadvede prasiddhaṃ ca tathā purāṇe |
duḥkhaṃ surendreṇa tathaiva labdhaṃ hatvā ripuṃ tvāṣṭramapāpameva || 21||
citraṃ kimatra nṛpate harivajrabhṛdbhayāṃ yacchadmanā vinihatastriśiro'tha vṛtraḥ |
māyābalena munayo'pi vimohitāste cakruśca nidyamaniśaṃ kila pāpabhītāḥ ||22||
viṣṇuḥ sadaiva kapaṭena jaghāna daityānsattvātmamūrtirapi mohamavāpya kāmam |
konyo'sti tāṃ bhagavatīṃ manasā'pi jetuṃ śaktaḥ samastajanamohakaroṃ bhavānīm ||23||
matsyādiyoniṣu sahasrayugeṣu sadyaḥ sākṣādbhavatyapi yathā viniyojito'tra |
nārāyaṇo narasakho bhagavānanaṃtaḥ kāryaṃ karoti vihita taṃ kadācit ||24||
dehaṃ dhanaṃ gṛhamidaṃ svajanā madīyaṃ putrāḥ kalatramiti mohamupetya sarvaḥ |
puṇyaṃ karotyatha ca pāpacayaṃ karoti māyāguṇairatibalaivikalīkṛto yat ||25||
na jātu mohaṃ apituṃ naraḥ kṣamaḥ kaśvidbhavedbhūpa parāvarārthavit |
vimohitastaistribhirevaṃ mūlato vaśīkṛtātmā jagatītale bhṛśam ||26||
atha to māyayā viṣṇuvāsavau mohitau bhṛśam |
jaghnatuśchadmanā vṛtraṃ svārthasādhanatatparau ||27||
tadahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi vṛttāṃtamavanīpate |
kāraṇaṃ pūrvavairasya vṛtravāsavayomithaḥ ||28||
svaṣṭā prajāpatirhyāsīddevaśreṣṭho mahātapāḥ |
devānāṃ kāryakartā ca nipuṇo brāhmaṇapriyaḥ || 29 |
sa putraṃ vai triśirasamidradveṣātkilāsṛjat |
viśvarūpeti vikhyātaṃ nāmnā rūpeṇa mohanam ||30||

tribhiḥ sa badanaiḥ śreṣṭarvyarocata manoharaiḥ |
tribhirbhinnāni kāryāṇi mukhaiḥ samakaronmuniḥ 31 ||
vedānekena so'dhīte surāṃ caikena so'pivat |
tṛtīyena diśaḥ sarvā yugapacca nirīkṣate || 32||
triśirā bhogamutsṛjya tapaścakre suduṣkaram |
tapasvī sa mṛdurdāto dharmameva samāśritaḥ ||33||
cāgnisādhanaṃ kāle pādapāgra niveśanam |
jalamadhye nivāsaṃ ca hemaṃte śiśire tathā ||34||
mirāharo jitātmā'sau tyaktasarvaparigrahaḥ |
tapaśvacāra medhāvī duṣkaraṃ mandabuddhibhiḥ ||35||
taṃ ca dṛṣṭā tapasyantaṃ khedamāpa śacīpatiḥ |
viṣādamagamattatra śakro'yaṃ māsmabhūditi || 36 |
dṛṣṭvā tasya tapo bīryaṃ satyaṃ cāmitatejasaḥ |
citāṃ ca mahatīṃ prāpa hyaniśaṃ pākaśāsanaḥ || 37 ||
vivardhamānastriśirā māmayaṃ śātayiṣyati |
nopekṣyaḥ sarvathā śatrurvardhamānabalo budhaiḥ ||38||
sāṃpratam |
kāmastu tapatāṃ śatruḥ kāmānnaśyati vai tapaḥ ||39||
tasmādupāyaḥ kartavyasta ponāśāya
tayaṃbāca prakartavyaṃ bhogāsakto bhavedyathā |
iti saṃcitya manasā buddhimānbalamardanaḥ ||40||
mājñāpayatso'psarasastvāṣṭra putra pralobhane |
urvaśī menakāṃ rambhāṃ ghṛtācīṃ ca tilottamām 41 ||
samāhūyābravīcchakrastāstadā rūpagarvitāḥ |
priyaṃ kurudhvaṃ me sarvāḥ kārye'dya samupasthite ||42||
mato me'dya mahāñchatrustapastapati durjayaḥ |
kāryaṃ kuruta gacchadhvaṃ pralobhayata māciram ||43||
śṛṃgāravebavividhaihaṇairdehasamudbhavaiḥ |
pralobhayata bhadraṃ vaḥ śamayadhvaṃ jvaraṃ mama ||44 ||
asvasvo'haṃ mahābhāgāstasya jñātvā tapobalam |
balavānāsanaṃ me'dya grahīṣyatyavilaṃbita ||45 ||
kārye'dya samupasthite ||46 ||
bhayaṃ me samupāyātaṃ kṣipraṃ nāśayatābalāḥ | upakurvantu sahitāḥ
tacchutvā vacanaṃ nārya ūcustaṃ praṇatāḥ puraḥ |
mā bhayaṃ kuru deveśa yatiṣyāmaḥ pralobhane || 47|
vathā na syādbhayaṃ tasmāttathā kāryaṃ mahādyute |
nṛtyagītavihāraiśca munestasya pralobhane || 48 ||
kaṭākṣairaṅgabhedaiśva mohayitvā muniṃ vibho |
lolupaṃ vaśamasmākaṃ kariṣyāmo niyaṃtritam ||49 ||
vyāsa uvāca
ityābhāṣya hari nāryo yayustriśiraso'tikam |
kurvantyo vividhānbhāvānkāmaśāstrocitānapi 50 ||
gāyantyastālabhedaistā nṛtyantyaḥ purato. muneḥ |
taṃ pralobhayituṃ cakrurnānābhāvān varāṃganāḥ ||51||
nāpaśyatsa taporāśiraṃganānāṃ viḍambanam |
indriyāṇi vaśe kṛtvā mūkāndhabadhiraḥ sthitaḥ || 52 ||
dināni katicittasthurnāryastasyāśrame vare |
kurvatyo gānanṛtyādi prapañcānatimohadān ||53 ||
na cacāla yadā kāmaṃ dhyānācca triśirā muniḥ |
parāvṛtya tadā devyaḥ punaḥ śakramupasthitāḥ || 54 ||
kṛtāñjalipuṭāḥ sarvā |
devarājamathābruvan |
śrāṃtā dīnā bhayatrastā vivarṇavadanā bhṛśam ||55 ||
devadeva mahārāja yatnaśca parama: kṛtaḥ |
na sa śakyo durādharṣo dhairyāccālayituṃ vibho || 56 ||
upāyo'nyaḥ prakartavyaḥ sarvathā pākaśāsana |
nāsmākaṃ balametasmiṃstāpase vijitendriye ||57||

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 2
diṣṭayā vayaṃ na śaptāḥ sma yadanena mahātmanā |
muninā bahnitulyena tapasā dyotitena hi ||58||
visṛjyāpsarasaḥ śakraścintayāmāsa mandadhīḥ |
tasyaiva ca vaṣopāyaṃ pāpabuddhirasāmpratam ||59||
visṛjya lokalajjāṃ sa tathā pāpabhayaṃ bhṛśam |
cakāra pāpabuddhi tu tadvadhāma mahīpate || 60 ||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭaskandhe prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 ||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
atha sa lobhamupetya surādhipaḥ samadhigamya gajāsanasaṃsthitaḥ |
triśirasaṃ prati duṣṭamatistadā munimapaśyadameyaparākramam || 1 ||
tamabhivīkṣya dṛḍhāsanasaṃsthitaṃ jitagiraṃ susamādhivaśaṃ gatam |
ravivibhāvasusannibhamojasā surapatiḥ paramāpadamabhyagāt || 2 ||
kathamaso vinihantumaho mayā munirapāpamatiḥ kila sammataḥ |
ripurayaṃ susamiddhatapobalaḥ kathamupekṣya ihāsanakāmukaḥ || 3||
iti vicintya pavi paramāyudhaṃ pratimumoca muniṃ tapasi sthitam |
śaśidivākarasannibhamāśugaṃ triśirasaṃ surasaṃghapatiḥ svayam || 4 ||
tadabhighātahataḥ sa dharātale kila papāta mamāra ca tāpasaḥ |
śikhariṇaḥ śikharaṃ kuliśāditaṃ nipatitaṃ bhuvi cādbhutadarśanam || 5 ||
taṃ nihatya mudamāpa sureśaśvakraśuśca munayastu saṃsthitāḥ |
hā hateti bhṛśamārtanisvanāḥ kiṃ kṛtaṃ śatamakhena pāpinā || 6 ||
vināparādhaṃ tapasāṃ nidhirhataḥ śacīpatiḥ pāpamatirdurātmā |
phalaṃ kilāyaṃ tarasā kṛtasya prāpnotu pāpī hananodbhavasya || 7 ||
taṃ nihatya tarasā surarājo nirjagāma nijamandiramāśu |
sa hato'pi virarāja mahātmā jīvamāna iva tejasāṃ nidhiḥ || 8 ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā patitaṃ bhūmau jīvantamiva vṛtrahā |
cintāmāpātikhinnāṃgaḥ kiṃ vā jīvedayaṃ punaḥ || 9 ||
vimṛśya manasā'tīva takṣāṇaṃ purataḥ sthitam |
maghavā vīkṣya taṃ prāha svakāryasadṛśaṃ vacaḥ ||10||
takṣarichaghi śirāṃsyasya kuruṣva vacanaṃ mama |
mā jīvatu mahātejā bhāti jīvanniva svayam || 11||
ityākarṇya vacastasya takṣobāca vigarhayan |

takṣovāca
mahāskaṃdho bhūśaṃ bhāti paraśurna tariṣyati || 12 ||
tato nāhaṃ kariṣyāmi kāryametadvigarhitam |
tvayā vai niditaṃ karma kṛtaṃ sadbhirvigarhitam ||13||
mahaṃ bibhemi pāpādvai mṛtasyaiva ca māraṇe |
mṛto'yaṃ sunirastyeva śirasaḥ kṛtanena kim || 14 ||
bhayaṃ kiṃ te'tra saṃjātaṃ pākaśāsana kathyatām |
indra uvāca
sajīva iva deho'yamābhāti viśadākṛtiḥ || 15 ||
tasmādvibhemi mā jīvenmuniḥ śatrurayaṃ mama |
takṣobāca
nātra kiṃ trapase vidvankrūreṇānena karmaṇā || 16 ||
ṛṣiputramimaṃ hatvā brahmahatyābhayaṃ na kim |
indra uvāca
prāyaścittaṃ kariṣyāmi paścātpāpakṣayāya vai || 17 ||
śatrustu sarvathā are chalenāpi mahāmate |
takṣovāca
tvaṃ lobhābhihataḥ pāpaṃ karoṣi maghavanniha || 18 ||
taṃ vinā'haṃ kathaṃ pāpaṃ karomi vada me vibho |
indra uvāca
makheṣu khalu bhāgaṃ te kariṣyāmi sadaiva hi ||19||
śiraḥ paśostu te bhāgaṃ yajñe dāsyaṃti mānavāḥ |
śulkenānena chiṣi tvaṃ śirāṃsyasya kuru priyam 20 ||
vyāsa uvāca
etacchrutvā maheṃdrasya vacastakṣā mudānvitaḥ |
kuṭhāreṇa śirāṃsyasya cakarta sudṛḍhena hi || 21 ||
chinnāni trīṇi śīrṣāṇi patitāni yadā bhuvi |
tebhyastu pakṣiṇaḥ kṣipraṃ viniṣpetuḥ sahasraśaḥ || 22||
kalavikāstittirayastathaiva ca kapiṃjalāḥ |
pṛthakpṛthagvi niṣpeturmukhatastarasā tadā ||23||
yena vedānadhīte sma somaṃ ca pibate tathā |
tasmādvaktrātkilotpetuḥ sarva eva kapiṃjalāḥ || 24||
yena sarvā diśaḥ kāmaṃ pibatriva nirīkṣate |
tasmāttu tittirāstatra niḥsṛtāstigmatejasaḥ ||25||
yatsurāpaṃ tu tadvaktraṃ tasmāttu caṭakāḥ kila |
viniṣpetustriśirasa evaṃ te vihagā nṛpa || 26 ||
evaṃ viniḥsṛtāndṛṣṭvā tebhyaḥ śakrastadāṃḍajān |
mumoda manasā rājañjagāma tridivaṃ punaḥ ||27||

″ śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaḍaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 2
gate śakre tu takṣā'pi svagṛhaṃ tarasā yayau |
yajñabhāgaṃ paraṃ labdhvā mudamāpa mahīpate || 28 ||
indro'tha svagṛhaṃ gatvā hatvā śatruṃ mahābalam |
mene kṛtārthamātmānaṃ brahmahatyāmacitayan ||29|
taṃ śrutvā nihataṃ tvaṣṭā putraṃ paramadhārmikam |
cukopātīva manasā vacanaṃ cedamabravīt ||30||
anāgasaṃ muniṃ yasmātputraṃ nihatavānmama |
tasmādutpādayiṣyāmi tadvadhārthaṃ sutaṃ punaḥ || 31 ||
surāḥ paśyaṃtu me vīryaṃ tapasaśca balaṃ tathā |
jānātu sarvaṃ pāpātmā svakṛtasya phalaṃ mahat ||32||
ityuktvā'gni juhāvātha maṃtrairātharvaṇoditaiḥ |
putrasyotpādanārthāya tvaṣṭā krodhasamākulaḥ ||33||
kṛte home'ṣṭarātraṃ tu saṃdoptācca vibhāvasoḥ |
prādurbabhūva tarasā puruṣaḥ pāvakopamaḥ ||34||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā'gre sutaṃ tvaṣṭā tejobalasamanvitam |
begātprakaṭitaṃ vahnerdīpyamānamivānalam ||35||
uvāca vacanaṃ tvaṣṭā sutaṃ vīkṣya puraḥ sthitam |
indraśatro vivardhasva pratāpāttapaso mama || 36||
ityukte vacane tvaṣṭā krodhaprajvalitena ca |
so'vardhata divaṃ stabdhvā vaiśvānarasamadyutiḥ || 37 ||
jātaḥ sa parvatākāraḥ kālamṛtyusamaḥ svarāṭ |
kiṃ karomīti taṃ prāha pitaraṃ paramāturam ||38|
kuru me nāmakaṃ nātha kāryaṃ kathaya suvrata |
ciṃtātu ro'si kasmāttvaṃ brūhi me śokakāraṇam 39 ||
nāśayāmyadya te śokamiti me vratamāhitam |
tena jātena kiṃ bhūyaḥ pitā bhavati duḥkhitaḥ ||40||
pibāmi sāgaraṃ sadyaśvarṇayāmi dharādharān |
udyataṃ vārayāmyadya taraṇi tigmatejasam ||41||
hanmīndraṃ sasuraṃ sadyo yamaṃ vā devatāntaram |
kṣipāmi sāgare sarvānsamutpāṭaya ca medinīm || 42 ||
ityākarṇya vacastasya tvaṣṭā putrasya peśalam |
pratyuvācātimuditastaṃ sutaṃ parvatopamam || 43 ||
bṛjināttrātumadhunā yasmācchakto'si putraka |
tasmādvṛtra iti khyātaṃ tava nāma bhaviṣyati 44 ||
bhrātā taba mahābhāga triśirā nāma tāpasaḥ |
trīṇi tasya ca śīrṣāṇi hyabhavanvīryavaṃti ca 45 ||
vedavedāṃgatattvajñaḥ sarva vidyāviśāradaḥ |
saṃsthitastapasi prāyastrilokī vismaya prade ||46 ||
śakreṇa tu hataḥ so'dya vajraghātena sāṃpratam |
vinā'parādhaṃ sahasā chinnāni mastakāni ca ||47 |
tasmāttvaṃ puruṣavyāghra jahi śakraṃ kṛlāgasam |
brahmahatyāyutaṃ pāpaṃ nistrapaṃ durmati śaṭham ||48||
ityuktvā ca tadā tvaṣṭā putraśokasamākulaḥ |
āyudhāni ca divyāni cakāra vividhāni ca ||49||
dadāvasmai sahasrākṣavadhāya prabalāni ca |
khaḍgaśūlagadāśaktitomarapramukhāni vai ||50||
śāṅgaṃ dhanustathā bāṇaṃ parighaṃ paṭṭiśaṃ tathā |
cakraṃ divyaṃ sahasrāraṃ sudarśanasamaprabham || 51 ||
tūṇīro cākṣayo divyo kavacaṃ cātisuṃdaram |
rathaṃ meghapratīkāśaṃ dṛḍhaṃ bhārasahaṃ javam ||52 ||
yuddhopakaraṇaṃ sarvaṃ kṛtvā putrāya pārthiva |
dattvā'sau prerayāmāsa tvaṣṭā krodhasamanvitaḥ ||53||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭaskandhe dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||

atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
kṛtasvastyayano vṛtro brāhmaṇairvedapāragaiḥ |
nirjagāma rathārūḍho haṃtuṃ śakraṃ mahābalaḥ || 1 ||
tadaiva rākṣasāḥ krūrāḥ purā devaparājitāḥ |
samājagmukha sevārthaṃ vṛtraṃ jñātvā mahābalam ||2||
indradūtāstu taṃ dṛṣṭvā yuddhāya tu samāgatam |
vegādāgatya vṛttāṃtaṃ śaśaṃsustasya ceṣṭitam ||3||
vyāsa ubāca
svāmicchīghra mihāyāti vṛtro nāma ripustava |
balābānsyaṃdane rūḍhastvaṣṭrā cotpāditaḥ kila || 4 ||
abhicāreṇa nāśārthaṃ tava krodhānvitena vai |
putraghātābhitaptena duḥsaho rākṣasairyutaḥ || 5 ||
yatnaṃ kuru mahābhāga śīghramāyāti sāṃpratam |
merumaṃdarasaṃkāśo ghoraśabdo'tidāruṇaḥ || 6 ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra bhītā devagaṇā bhṛśam |
āgatyocuḥ surapatiṃ śṛṇvaṃtaṃ dūtabhāṣitam ||7||
gaṇā ūcuḥ
maghavandurnimittāni bhavaṃti tridaśālaye |
bahūni bhayaśaṃsīni pakṣiṇāṃ virutāni ca ||8||
kākagṛdhrāstathā śyenāḥ kaṃkācā dāruṇāḥ khagāḥ |
rudaṃti vivṛtaiḥ śabdairutkārairbhavanopari ||9||
cīcīkūcīti ninadānkurvati vihagā bhṛśam |
vāhanānāṃ ca netrebhyo jaladhārāḥ pataṃtyadhaḥ || 10 ||
śrūyate'timahāñchando rudatīnāṃ niśāsu ca |
rākṣasīnāṃ mahābhāga bhavanopari dāruṇaḥ ||11||
prapataṃti dhvajāstūrṇaṃ vinā vātena mānada |
prabhavaṃti mahotpātā divi bhūmyaṃtarikṣajāḥ || 12 ||
kṛṣṇāṃbaradharā nāryo bhramaṃti ca gṛhe gṛhe |
yāṃtu yāṃtu gṛhāttūrṇaṃ kurvatyo vikṛtānanāḥ || 13|
rātrī svapneṣu kāṃtānāṃ suptānāṃ nijamaṃdire |
keśāṃllunaṃti rākṣasyo bhīṣayantyo bhṛśāturāḥ || 14||
evaṃvidhāni deveśa bhūkaṃpolkādayastathā |
gomāyavo rudaṃtisma niśāyāṃ bhavanāṃgaṇe || 15 ||
saraṭānāṃ ca jālāni prabhavaṃti gṛhe gṛhe |
aṃgaprasphuraṇādīni durnimittāni sarvaśaḥ || 16||
vyāsa uvāca
iti teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā citāmāpa sureśvaraḥ |
bṛhaspati samāhūya papraccha ca manogatam ||17||
indra uvāca
brahmankimuta ghorāṇi nimittāni bhavaṃti vai |
vātāśca dāruṇā vāṃti prapataṃtyulakāḥ khataḥ || 18 ||
sarvajño'si mahābhāga samartho vighnanāśane |
buddhimāñchāstratattvajño devatānāṃ gurustathā || 19 ||
kuru śāṃti vidhānajña śatrukṣayavidhāyinīm |
yathā me na bhaveduḥkhaṃ tathā kāryaṃ vidhīyatām ||20||
bṛhaspatiruvāca
kiṃ karomi sahasrākṣa tvayā'dya duṣkṛtaṃ kṛtam |
anāgasaṃ muniṃ hatvā kiṃ phalaṃ samupārjitam || 21 ||

atyugraṃ puṇyapāpānāṃ phalaṃ bhavati satvaram |
vicārya khalu kartavyaṃ kāryaṃ tadbhūtimicchatā || 22 ||
paropatāpanaṃ karma na kartavyaṃ kadācana |
na sukhaṃ viṃdate prāṇī parapīḍāparāyaṇaḥ ||23||
mohāllobhādbrahmahatyā kṛtā śakra tvayā'dhunā |
tasya pāpasya sahasā phalametadupāgatam ||24||
avadhyaḥ sarvadevānāṃ jāto'sau vṛtrasaṃjñakaḥ |
haṃtuṃ tvāṃ sa samāyāti dānavairbahubhirvṛtaḥ ||25||
āyudhāni ca sarvāṇi vajratulyāni vāsava |
tvaṣṭrā dattāni divyāni gṛhītvā samupasthitaḥ 26 ||
samāgacchati durdharṣo rathārūḍhaḥ pratāpavān |
devendra pralayaṃ kurvannāsya mṛtyurbhaviṣyati ||27||
kolāhalastadā jātastathā bruvati vākpatī |
gaṃdharvāḥ kinnarā yakṣā munayaśca tapodhanāḥ ||28||
sadanāniṃ vihāyaivāmarāḥ sarve palāyitāḥ |
taddṛṣṭvā mahadāśrayaṃ śakraśritāparāyaṇaḥ || 29||
ājñāpayāmāsa tadā senodyogāya sevakān |
ānayadhvaṃ basūnudrānaśvinau ca divākaram || 30 ||
pūṣaṇaṃ ca bhagaṃ vāyuṃ kuberaṃ varuṇaṃ yamam |
vimāneṣu samāruhya sāyudhāḥ surasattamāḥ ||31||
samāgacchaṃtu tarasā śatrurāyāti sāṃpratam |
ityājñāpya surapatiḥ samāruhya gajottamam ||32||
bṛhaspati purodhāya nirgato nijamaṃdirāt |
tathaiva tridaśāḥ sarve svaṃ svaṃ vāhanamāsthitāḥ 33 ||
yuddhāya kṛtasaṃkalpā niryayuḥ śastrapāṇayaḥ |
vṛtro'tha dānavairyuktaḥ saṃprāpto mānasottaram ||34||
parvataṃ devatāvāsaṃ ramyaṃ pādapaśobhitam |
indro'pyāgatya saṃgrāmaṃ cakāra mānasottare ||35|
parvate devatāyukto vācaspatipuraḥsaraḥ |
tatrābhūddāruṇaṃ yuddhaṃ vṛtravāsavayostadā || 36 ||
gadā siparighaḥ pāśaibaṇiḥ śaktiparaśvadhaiḥ |
mānuṣeṇa pramāṇena saṃgrāmaḥ śaradāṃ śatam ||37||
baṃbhūva bhayado nṛṇāmṛṣīṇāṃ bhāvitātmanām |
varuṇaḥ prathamaṃ bhagnastato vāyugaṇaḥ kila || 38 ||
tato vibhāvasuḥ śakraḥ sarve te nirgatā raṇāt |
palāyanaparāndṛṣṭvā devānidrapurogamān || 39||
vṛtro'pi pitaraṃ prāgādāśramasthaṃ mudānvitam |
praṇamya prāha tvaṣṭāraṃ pituḥ kāryaṃ mayā kṛtam ||40||
devā vinirjitāḥ sarve seṃdrā: samarasaṃsthitāḥ |
vidrutāste gatāḥ sthānaṃ yathā siṃhānmṛgā gajāḥ 41 ||
indraḥ padātiragamanmayā''nīto gajottamaḥ |
airāvato'yaṃ bhagavangṛhāṇa dviradottamam ||42 ||
na hatāste mayā tasmādayuktaṃ bhītamāraṇam |
ājñāpaya punastāta kiṃ karomi tavepsitam || 43 ||
nirjarā nirgatāḥ sarve bhayabhītāḥ śramāturāḥ |
iṃdro'pyairāvataṃ tvaktvā bhayabhītaḥ palāyitaḥ || 44 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti putravacaḥ śrutvā tvaṣṭā prāha mudānvitaḥ |
putravānadya jāto'smi saphalaṃ mama jīvitam || 45 ||
tvayā'haṃ pāvitaḥ putra gato me mānaso jvaraḥ |
niścalaṃ me mano jātaṃ dṛṣṭvā vīrya tādbhutam || 46 || ||46||
śṛṇu vakṣyāmyahaṃ putra hitaṃ te'dya niśāmaya |
tapaḥ kuru mahābhāga sāvadhānaḥ sthirāsanaḥ || 47 || 2
viśvāso naiva kartavyaḥ keṣāṃcitpākaśāsanaḥ |
śatruste chalakartā'sti nānābhedaviśāradaḥ || 48 ||

tapasā prāpyate lakṣmīstapasā rājyamuttamam |
tapasā balavṛddhiḥ syātsaṃgrāme vijayastathā || 49 |
mārādhya druhiṇaṃ devaṃ labdhvā varamanuttamam |
jahi śakraṃ durācāraṃ brahmahatyāsamāvṛtam ||50||
sābadhāna: sthiro |
bhūtvā dātāraṃ bhaja śaṃkaram |
vāṃchitaṃ sa varaṃ dadyātsaṃtuṣṭaścaturānanaḥ || 51 ||
toṣayitvā viśvayoni brahmāṇamamitaujasam |
avināśitvamāsādya jahi śakraṃ kṛtāgasam || 52 ||
vairaṃ manasi me putra vartate sutaghātajam |
na śāṃtimanugacchāmi na svapāmi sukhena ha || 53 ||
tāpaso me hataḥ putro nirāgāḥ pāpmanā yataḥ |
na viṃdāmi sukhaṃ vṛtra tvaṃ māmuddhara duḥkhitam ||54||
vyāsa uvāca
tadākarṇya piturvākyaṃ vtraḥ krodhayutastadā |
ājñāmādāya ca piturjagāma tapase mudā || 55 ||
gaṃdhamādanamāsādya puṇyāṃ devadhunīṃ śubhām |
snātvā kuśāsanaṃ kṛtvā saṃsthitaśca sthirāsanaḥ 56 || |
tyaktvānnaṃ vāripānaṃ ca yogābhyāsaparāyaṇaḥ |
dhyāyanviśvasṛjaṃ citte sopaviṣṭaḥ sthirāsane || 57||
maghavā taṃ tapasyaṃtaṃ jñātvā ciṃtāturo hyabhūt |
gaṃdharvānpreṣayāmāsa vighnārthaṃ pākaśāsanaḥ || 58 ||
yakṣāṃca pannagānsarpānkinnarānamitaujasaḥ |
vidyādharānapsaraso devadūtānanekaśaḥ ||59||
upāyāstaiḥ kṛtāḥ samyaktapovighnāya māyibhiḥ |
na cacāla tato dhyānāttvāṣṭraḥ paramatāpasaḥ || 60 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 3 ||
atha caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
nirgatāste parāvṛttāstapovighnakarāḥ surāḥ |
nirāśāḥ kāryasaṃsiddhayai taṃ dṛṣṭvā dṛḍhacetasam ||1||
jāte varṣaśate pūrṇe brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ |
tatrājagāma tarasā haṃsārūḍhaścaturmukhaḥ ||2||
āgatya tamuvācedaṃ tvaṣṭuḥ putra sukhī bhava |
tyaktvā ghyānaṃ varaṃ brūhi dadāmi taba vāṃchitam ||3||
tapasā te'dya tuṣṭo'smi tvāṃ dṛṣṭvā cātikaśitam |
varaṃ varaya bhadraṃ te mano'bhilaṣitaṃ tava ||4||
vyāsa uvāca
vṛtrastadā'tiviśadāṃ purato niśamya vācaṃ sudhāsamarasāṃ jagadekakartuḥ |
saṃtyajya yogakalanāṃ sahasodatiṣṭhatsaṃjātaharṣanayanāśrukalākalāpaḥ ||5|
pādau praṇamya śirasā praṇayādvidhāturbaddhāṃjali: purata eva samāsasāda |
provāca taṃ suvaradaṃ tapasā prapannaṃ premṇā'tigadgadagirā vinayena namraḥ || 6 ||

prāptaṃ mayā sakaladevapadaṃ prabho'dya yaddarśanaṃ tava sudurlabhamāśu jātam |
vāñchā'sti nātha manasi pravaṇe durāpā tāṃ prabravīmi kamalāsana vetsi bhāvam || 7 ||
mṛtyuśca mā bhavatu me kila lohakā śuṣkārdravaṃśanicayairaparaiśca śastraḥ |
vṛddhi prayātu mama vīryamatīva yuddhe yasmādbhavāmi sabalairamarairajeyaḥ || 8 ||
vyāsa uvāca
itthaṃ samprārthito brahmā tamāha prahasanniva |
uttiṣṭha gaccha bhadraṃ te vāñchitaṃ saphalaṃ sadā || 9 ||
na śuṣkeṇa na cādreṇa na pāṣāṇena dāruṇā |
bhaviṣyati ca te mṛtyuriti satyaṃ bravīmyaham ||10||
iti dattvā varaṃ brahmā jagāma bhuvanaṃ param |
vṛtrastu taṃ varaṃ labdhvā muditaḥ svagṛhaṃ yayo || 11 ||
śaśaṃsa pituragre tadvaradānaṃ mahāmatiḥ |
tvaṣṭā tu muditaḥ prāptaṃ putraṃ prāptavaraṃ tadā || 12 ||
svasti te'stu mahābhāga jahi śakraṃ ripuṃ mama |
hatvā gaccha triśiraso hantāraṃ pāpasaṃyutam ||13||
bhava tvaṃ tridaśādhīśaḥ samprāpya vijayaṃ raṇe |
mamādhi chiṣi vipulaṃ putranāśasamudbhavam ||14||
jīvato vākyakaraṇātkṣayāhe bhūribhojanāt |
gayāyāṃ piṇḍadānācca tribhiḥ putrasya putratā ||15||
tasmātputra mamātyarthaṃ duḥkhaṃ nāśitumarhasi |
triśirā mama cittāttu nāpasarpati karhicit || 16 ||
suśīlaḥ satyavādī ca tāpaso vedavittamaḥ |
aparādhaṃ binā tena nihataḥ pāpabuddhinā ||17||
vyāsa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā vṛtraḥ paramadurjayaḥ |
rathamārudya tarasā nirjagāma piturgṛhāt || 18 ||
raṇadundubhinirghoṣaṃ śaṅkhanādaṃ mahābalam |
kārayitvā prayāṇaṃ sa cakāra madagarvitaḥ || 19 ||
niryayau nayasaṃyuktaḥ sevakāniti saṃvadan |
hatvā śakraṃ grahīṣyāmi surarājyamakaṃṭakam ||20||
ityuktvā nirjagāmāśu svasainyaparivāritaḥ |
mahatā sainyanādena bhīṣayannamarāvatīm ||21||
tamāgacchantamājñāya turāṣāḍapi satvaraḥ |
senodyogaṃ bhayatrastaḥ kārayāmāsa bhārata || 22|
sarvānāhūya tarasā lokapālānarindamaḥ |
yuddhārthaṃ prerayansarvānvyarocata mahādyutiḥ ||23||
gughravyūhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā saṃsthitaḥ pākaśāsanaḥ |
tatrājagāma vegāttu vṛtraḥ parabalārdanaḥ || 24 ||
devadānavayostāvatsaṃ grāmastumulo'bhavat |
vṛtravāsavayoḥ saṃkhye manasā vijayaiṣiṇoḥ ||25||
evaṃ parasparaṃ yuddhe sandīpte bhayade bhṛśam |
ākūtaṃ devatāḥ prāpurvetyāśca paramāṃ mudam ||26|
tomarairbhindipālaiśca khaḍgaiḥ paraśupaṭṭiśaiḥ |
jaghnuḥ parasparaṃ devadaityāḥ svasvavarāyudhaiḥ ||27|
evaṃ yuddhe vartamāne dāruṇe lomaharṣaṇe |
śakraṃ jagrāha sahasā vṛtraḥ krodhasamanvitaḥ ||28||
apāvṛtya mukhe kṣiptvā sthito vṛtraḥ śatakratum |
mudito'bhūnmahārāja pūrvavairamanusmaran ||29||
śakre graste'tha vṛtreṇa sambhrāntā nirjarāstadā |
cukruśuḥ paramārtāste hā śakreti muhurmuhuḥ ||30||

apāvṛte mukhe śakraṃ jñātvā sarve divaukasaḥ |
bṛhaspati praṇamyocurcīnā vyathitacetasaḥ ||31|
kiṃ kartavyaṃ dvijaśreṣṭha tvamasmākaṃ guruḥ paraḥ |
śakro grastastu vṛtreṇa rakṣito devatāṃtaraiḥ ||32||
vinā śakreṇa kiṃ kurmaḥ sarve hīnaparākramāḥ |
abhicāraṃ kuru vibho satvaraḥ śakramuktaye ||33||
bṛhaspatiruvāca
ki kartavyaṃ surāḥ kṣipto mukhamadhye'sti vāsavaḥ |
vṛtreṇotsādito jīvannasti koṣṭhāṃtare ripoḥ || 34 ||
vyāsa uvāca
devāściṃtāturāḥ sarve turāsāhaṃ tathākṛtam |
dṛṣṭvā vimṛśya tarasā cakruryatnaṃ vimuktaye || 35 ||
asṛjaṃta mahāsattvāṃ jṛmbhikāṃ ripunāśinīm |
tato vijṛmbhamāṇaḥ sa vyāvṛtāsyo babhūva ha 36||
vijṛmbhamāṇasya tato vṛtrasyāsyādavāpatat |
svānaṃgānyapi saṃkṣipya niṣkrāṃto balasūdanaḥ 37 ||
tataḥ prabhṛti lokeṣu jṛmbhikā prāṇisaṃsthitā |
jahṛṣuśca surāḥ sarve śakraṃ dṛṣṭā vinirgatam ||38||
tataḥ pravavṛte yuddhaṃ tayorlokabhayapradam |
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ yāvaddāruṇaṃ lomaharṣaṇam ||39||
ekataśca surāḥ sarve yuddhāya samupasthitāḥ |
ekato balavāṃstvāṣṭraḥ saṃgrāme samavartata ||40||
yadā vyavardhata raṇe vṛtro varamadāvṛtaḥ |
parājitastadā śakrastejasā tasya gharṣitaḥ || 41 ||
vivyathe maghavā yuddhe tataḥ prāpya parājayam |
viṣādamagamandevā dṛṣṭvā śakraṃ parājitam ||42 ||
jagmustyaktvā raṇaṃ sarve devā indrapurogamāḥ |
gṛhītaṃ devasavanaṃ vṛtreṇāgatya raṃhasā ||43||
devodyānāni sarvāṇi bhuṃkte'sau dānavo balāt |
airāvato'pi daityena gṛhīto'sau gajottamaḥ || 44 ||
vimānāni ca sarvāṇi gṛhītāni viśāṃpate |
uccaiḥśravā hayavaro jātastasya vaśe tadā ||45||
kāmadhenuḥ pārijāto gaṇaścāpsarasāṃ tathā |
gṛhītaṃ ratnamātraṃ tu tena tvaṣṭasutena ha ||46||
sthānabhraṣṭāḥ surāḥ sarve giridurgeṣu sthatāḥ |
duḥkhamāpuḥ paribhraṣṭā yajñabhāgātsurālayāt ||47||
vṛtraḥ surapadaṃ prāpya babhūja pradagarvitaḥ |
tvaṣṭā'tīva sukhaṃ prāpya mumoda sutasaṃyutaḥ || 48 ||
amaṃtrayanhitaṃ devā munibhiḥ saha bhārata| kiṃ kartavyamiti prāpte vicintya bhayamohitāḥ 49 ||
jagmuḥ kailāsamacalaṃ surāḥ śakrasamanvitāḥ |
mahādevaṃ praṇamyocuḥ prahvāḥ prāṃjalayo bhṛśam ||50 ||
devadeva mahādeva kṛpāsindho maheśvara |
rakṣā'smānbhayabhītāṃstu vṛtreṇātiparājitān || 51 ||
gṛhītaṃ devasadanaṃ tena deva balīyasā |
kiṃ kartavyamataḥ śaṃbho brūhi satyaṃ śivādya naḥ || 52 ||
kiṃ kurmaḥ kva ca gacchāmaḥ sthānabhraṣṭā maheśvara |
duḥkhasya nādhigacchāmo vināśopāyamīśvara ||13||
sāhāyyaṃ kuru bhūteśa vyathitāḥ sma kṛpānidhe |
vṛtraṃ jahi madotsiktaṃ varadānabalādvibho ||54 ||
śiva uvāca
brahmāṇaṃ purataḥ kṛtvā vayaṃ sarve hareḥ kṣayam |
gatvā sametya taṃ viṣṇuṃ citayāmo vadhodyamama 55||

sa śaktaśca chalajñaśca balavānbuddhimattaraḥ |
śaraṇyaśca dayābdhiśva vāsudevo janārdanaḥ || 56 ||
vinā taṃ devadeveśaṃ nārthaṃ siddhirbhaviṣyati |
tasmāttava ca gaṃtavyaṃ sarvakāryārthasiddhaye ||57||
vyāsa uvāca
iti saṃcitya te sarve brahmā śakraḥ saśaṃkaraḥ |
jagmurviṣṇoḥ kṣayaṃ devāḥ śaraṇyaṃ bhaktavatsalam 58||
gatvā viṣṇupadaṃ devāstuṣṭuvuḥ parameśvaram |
hari puruṣasūktena vedoktena jagadgurum ||59 ||
pratyakṣo'bhūjjagannāthasteṣāṃ sa kamalāpatiḥ |
saṃmānya ca surānsarvānityuvāca puraḥ sthitaḥ || 60 ||
kimāgatāḥ sma lokeśā harabrahma samanvitā |
kāraṇaṃ kathayadhvaṃ vaḥ sarveṣāṃ surasattamāḥ || 61 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti śrutvā harervākyaṃ nocurdevā ramāpatim |
cintāviṣṭāḥ sthitāḥ prāyaḥ sarve prāṃjalayastathā 62||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskaṃdhe caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tathā cintāturān vīkṣya sarvānsarvārthitattvavit |
prāha premabharodbhrāṃtānmādhavo medinīpate || 1 ||
viṣṇuruvāca
ki maunamāśritā yūyaṃ bruvaṃ tu kāraṇaṃ surāḥ |
sadasadvā'pi tacchrutvā yatiṣye tannivāraṇe ||2||
devā ūcuḥ
kimajñātaṃ tava vibho triṣu lokeṣu vartate |
sarvaṃ veda bhaṃvānkārye kiṃ pṛcchasi punaḥ punaḥ || 3 ||
svayā pūrvaṃ balirbaddhaḥ śakro devādhipaḥ kṛtaḥ |
vāmanaṃ vapurāsthāya krāṃtaṃ tribhuvanaṃ pade ||4||
amṛtaṃ tvāhṛtaṃ viṣṇo daityāśca vinipātitāḥ |
tvaṃ prabhuḥ sarvadevānāṃ sarvāpadvinivāraṇe || 5 ||
viṣṇuruvāca
na bhetavyaṃ suravarā vedmayupāyaṃ susaṃgatam |
tadvadhāya pravakṣyāmi yena saukhyaṃ bhaviṣyati || 6 ||
avaśyaṃ karaṇīyaṃ me bhavatāṃ hitamātmanā |
buddhadhā balena cārthena yena kena chalena vā ||7||
upāyāḥ khalu catvāraḥ kathitāstattvadarśibhiḥ |
sāmādayaḥ suhṛtsveva duhṛdeṣu viśeṣataḥ || 8 ||
brahmaṇā'sya varo dattastapasā''rādhitena ca |
durjayatvaṃ na saṃprāptaṃ varadānaprabhāvataḥ || 9||
ajeyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ tvaṣṭrā samupapāditaḥ |
tato balena vṛddhi sa prāptaḥ parapuraṃjayaḥ ||10||
duḥsādhyo'sau surāḥ śatruvinā sāmapratāraṇam |
pralobhya vaśamāneyo hantavyastu tataḥ param || 11 ||

gacchadhvaṃ sarvagaṃdharvā yatrāsti balavattaraḥ |
sāma tasya prayujadhvaṃ tata enaṃ vijeṣyatha || 12 ||
saṃgamya śapathānkṛtvā viśvāsya samayena hi |
mitratvaṃ ca samādhāya haṃtavyaḥ prabalo ripuḥ || 13||
adṛśyaḥ saṃpravekṣyāmi vajramasya varāyudham |
sāhāyyaṃ ca kariṣyāmi śakrasyāhaṃ surottamāḥ 14 ||
samayaṃ ca pratīkṣadhvaṃ sarvathaivāyuṣaḥ kṣaye |
maraṇaṃ vibudhāstasya nānyathā saṃbhaviṣyati || 15 ||
gacchadhvamṛṣibhiḥ sārdhaṃ gandharvāḥ kapaṭāvṛtāḥ |
indreṇa saha mitratvaṃ kurudhvaṃ vākyadānataḥ || 16 ||
yathā sa yāti viśvāsaṃ tathā kāryaṃ pratāraṇam |
gupto'haṃ saṃpravekṣyāmi pavi saṃchāditaṃ dṛḍham ||17||
viśvastaṃ maghavā śatruṃ haniṣyati na cānyathā |
viśvāsasya kṛte pāpaṃ kṛtvā śakrastu pṛṣṭhataḥ || 18 ||
matsahāyo'tha vajreṇa śātayiṣyati pāpinam |
na doṣo'tra śaṭhe śatrau śāṭhyameva prakurvataḥ || 19 ||
nānyathā balavān vadhyaḥ śūradharmeṇa jāyate |
vāmanaṃ rūpamādhāya mayā'yaṃ vaṃcito baliḥ ||20|| .
kṛtvā ca mohinīveṣaṃ daityāḥ sarve'pi vaṃcitāḥ |
bhavaṃtaḥ sahitāḥ sarve devīṃ bhagavatīṃ śivām || 21||
gacchadhvaṃ śaraṇaṃ bhāvaiḥ stotramaṃtraḥ surottamāḥ |
sāhāyyaṃ sā yogamāyā bhavatāṃ saṃvidhāsyati 22||
bandāmahe sadā devīṃ sāttvika prakṛti parām |
siddhidāṃ kāmadāṃ kāmāṃ durāpāmakṛtātmabhiḥ 23 ||
iṃdro'pi tāṃ samārādhya haniṣyati ripuṃ raṇe |
mohinī sā mahāmāyā mohayiṣyati dānavam 24 ||
mohito māyayā vṛtra: sukhasādhyo bhaviṣyati |
prasannāyāṃ parāṃbāyāṃ sarvaṃ sādhyaṃ bhaviṣyati || 25 |
nocenmanorathāvāptirna kasyāpi bhaviṣyati |
antaryāmisvarūpā sā sarvakāraṇakāraṇā ||26||
tasmāttāṃ viśvajananīṃ prakṛti paramādṛtāḥ |
bhajadhvaṃ sāttvikairbhāvaiḥ śatrunāśāya sattamāḥ || 27 ||
purā mayā'pi saṃgrāma kṛtvā paramadāruṇam |
paṃcavarṣasahasrāṇi nihato madhukaiṭabhau || 28 || ||28||
stutā mayā tadātyarthaṃ prasannā prakṛtiḥ parā |
mohitau tau tadā daityau chalena ca mayā hatau || 29 ||
vipralabdhau mahābāhū dānavo madagarvitau |
tathā kurudhvaṃ prakṛterbhajanaṃ bhāvasaṃyutāḥ || 30 ||
sarvathā kāryasiddhi sā kariṣyati surottamāḥ |
evaṃ te dattamatayo viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā || 31 ||
jagmuste meruśikharaṃ mandāradrumamaṇḍitam |
ekāṃte saṃsthitā devāḥ kṛtvā ghyānaṃ japaṃ tapaḥ ||32||
tuṣṭuvurjagatāṃ dhātrīṃ sṛṣṭisaṃhārakāriṇīm |
bhaktakāmadughāmaṃbāṃ saṃsārakleśanāśinīm ||33||
devā ūcuḥ
devi prasīda paripāhi surānprataptānvṛtrāsureṇa samare paripīḍitāṃśca |
dīnātināśanapare paramārthatatve prāptāṃstvadaṃghrikamalaṃ śaraṇaṃ sadaiva ||34||
tvaṃ sarvaviśvajananī paripālayāsmānputrānivātipatitātripusaṃkaṭe'smin |
mātarna te'styaviditaṃ bhuvanatraye'pi kasmādupekṣasi surānasuraprataptān ||35||
trailokyametadakhilaṃ vihitaṃ tvayaiva brahmā hariḥ paśupatistava vāsanotthā: |

kurvanti kāryamakhilaṃ svavaśā na te te bhrūbhaṃgacālanavaśādvihati kāmam ||36||
mātā sutānparibhavātparipāti dīnān rītistvayaiva racitā prakaṭāparādhān |
kasmānna pālayasi devi vināparādhānasmāṃstvadaṃghriśaraṇānkaruṇārasābdhe ||37||
nūnaṃ madaṃghribhajanāptapadāḥ kilaite bhakti vihāya vibhave sukhabhogalubdhāḥ |
neme kaṭākṣaviṣayā iti cenna caiṣā rītiḥ sute jananakartari cāpi dṛṣṭā ||38||
doṣo na no'tra janani pratibhāti citte yatte vihāya bhajanaṃ vibhave nimagnāḥ |
mohastvayā viracitaḥ prabhavatyaso nastasmātsvabhāvakaruṇe dayase kathaṃ na || 39||
pūrvaṃ tvayā janani daityapatirvaliṣṭho vyāpādito mahiṣarūpadharaḥ kilājī |
asmatkṛte sakalalokabhayā'sau vṛtraṃ kathaṃ na bhayadaṃ vidhunoṣi mātaḥ ||40||
śumbhastathā'tibalavānanujo niśumbhastau bhrātarau tadanugā nihatā hatau ca |
vṛtraṃ tathā jahi khalaṃ prabalaṃ dayārdre mattaṃ vimohaya tathā na bhavedyathā'sau ||41 ||
tvaṃ pālayādya vibudhānasureṇa mātaḥ saṃtāpitānatitarāṃ bhayavihvalāṃśca |
nānyo'sti ko'pi bhuvaneṣu surātihaṃtā yaḥ kleśajālamakhilaṃ nidahetsvaśaktyā ||42||
batre dayā tava yadi prathitā tathāpi jahyenamāśu janaduḥkhakaraṃ kharaṃ ca |
pāpātsamuddhara bhavāni śaraiḥ punānā nocetprayāsyati tamo nanu duṣṭabuddhiḥ || 43 ||
te prāpitāḥ suravanuṃ vibudhārayo ye hatvā raṇe'pi viśikhaiḥ kila pāvitāste |
jātā na ki nirayapātabhayāddayārdre yacchatravo'pi na hi kiṃ vinihaṃsi vṛtram ||44 ||
jānīmahe ripuraso tava sevako na prāyeṇa pīḍayati naḥ kila pāpabuddhiḥ |
yastāvaka stviha bhavedamarānasau kintvatpādapaṃkajaratānnanu pīḍayedvā ||45 ||
kurmaḥ kathaṃ janani pūjanamadya te'mba puṣpādikaṃ tava vinirmitameva yasmāt |
mantrā vayaṃ ca sakalaṃ paraśaktirūpaṃ tasmādbhavāni caraṇe praṇatāḥ sma nūnam ||46||
banyāsta eva manujā hi bhajaṃti bhavatyā pādāṃbujaṃ tava bhavāndhijale potam |
yaṃ yogino'pi manasā satataṃ smarati mokṣāthino vigatarāgavikāramohāḥ ||47||
ye yājñikāḥ sakalavedavido'pi nūnaṃ tvāṃ saṃsmarati satataṃ kila homakāle |
svāhāṃ tu tṛptijananī masureśvarāṇāṃ bhūyaḥ svadhāṃ pitṛgaṇasya ca tṛptihetum ||48||
meghā'si kāṃtirasi śāṃtirasi prasiddhā buddhistvameva viśadārthakarī narāṇām |
sarva tvameva vibhavaṃ bhuvanatraye'sminkṛtvā dadāsi bhajatāṃ kṛpayā sadaiva || 49 ||

vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ stutā surairdevo pratyakṣā sā'bhavattadā |
cārurūpaṃdharā tanvī sarvābharaṇabhūṣitā || 50 ||
pāśāṅkuśavarābhītilasadvāhucatuṣṭayā |
raṇatkiṇikājālaraśanābaddhasatkṛṭiḥ ||51||
kalakaṇṭhīravā kāntā kvaṇatkaṅkaṇanūpurā |
candrakhaṇḍasa mābaddharatna maulivirājitā ||52||
mandasmitā'ravindāsyā netratrayavibhūṣitā |
pārijāta prasūnācchanīlavarṇasamaprabhā ||53||
raktāmbaraparīdhānā raktacandanacarcitā |
prasādasumukhī devī karuṇā sasāgarā ||14||
sarvaśṛṅgāraveṣāḍhyā sarvadvaitāraṇiḥ parā |
sarvajñā sarvakartrī ca sarvādhiṣṭhānarūpiṇī ||55||
sarvavedānta saṃsiddhā saccidānandarūpiṇī |
praṇemustāṃ samālokya surā devīṃ puraḥ sthitām ||56||'
tānāha praṇatānandā kiṃ vaḥ kāryaṃ bruvantu mām |
devā ūcuḥ
mohayainaṃ ripuṃ vṛtraṃ devānāmatiduḥkhadam ||57||
yathā viśvasate devāṃstathā kuru vimohitam ! āyudhe ca balaṃ dehi hataḥ syādyena vā ripuḥ ||58||
vyāsa uvāca
tathetyuktvā bhagavatī tatraivāntaradhīyata |
svāni svāni niketāni jagmurdevā mudānvitāḥ 59 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe devīmāhātmye pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5 ||
atha ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ,
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ prāptavarā devā ṛṣayaśca tapodhanāḥ |
" jagmuḥ sarve ca saṃmaṃtrya vṛtrasyāśramamuttamam" |
dadṛśustatra taṃ vṛtraṃ jvalantamiva tejasā || 1 ||
vakṣyantamiva lokāṃstrīnprasantamiva cāmarān |
ṛṣayo'tha tato'bhyetya vṛtramūcuḥ priyaṃ vacaḥ || 2||
devakāryārthasiddhayarthaṃ sāmayuktaṃ rasātmakam |
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
vṛtra vṛtra mahābhāga sarvalokabhayaṅkara || 3 ||
vyāptaṃ tvayaitatsakalaṃ brahmāṇḍamakhilaṃ kila |
śakreṇa tava vairaṃ yattattu saukhyavighātakam ||4||
yuvayorduḥkhadaṃ kāmaṃ cintāvṛddhikaraṃ param |
na tvaṃ svapipi santuṣṭo na cāpi maghavā tathā || 5 ||
sukhaṃ svapiti cintārto dvayoryadvairijaṃ bhayam |
yuvayoryuvyatoḥ kālo vyatītastu mahāniha || 6 ||
poḍyante ca prajāḥ sarvāḥ sadevāsuramānavāḥ |
saṃsāre'tra sukhaṃ grāhyaṃ duḥkhaṃ heyamiti sthitiḥ || 7||

na sukhaṃ kṛtavairasya bhavatīti vinirṇayaḥ |
saṃgrāmarasikāḥ śūrānpraśaṃsanti na paṇḍitāḥ || 8||
yuddhaṃ śṛṅgāracaturā indriyārthavighātukam |
puṣpairapi na yoddhavyaṃ kiṃ punarniśitaiḥ śaraiḥ || 9 ||
yuddhe vijayasandeho niścayaṃ bāṇatāḍanam |
daivādhīnamidaṃ viśvaṃ tathā jayaparājayau || 10 ||
daivādhīnāviti jñātvā na yoddhavyaṃ kadācana |
kāle'tha bhojanaṃ snānaṃ śayyāyāṃ śayanaṃ tathā || 11 ||
paricaryāparā bhāryā saṃsāre sukhasādhanam |
kiṃ sukhaṃ yudhyataḥ saṃkhye bāṇavṛṣṭibhayaṅkare ||12||
khaḍgapātātiraudre ca tathā''rātisukhaprade |
saṃgrāme maraṇātsvargasukhaprāptiriti sphuṭam ||13||
pralobhanaparaṃ vākyaṃ nodanārthaṃ nirarthakam |
chittvā dehaṃ vyathāṃ prāpya śṛgālakaraṭādibhiḥ || 14||
paścātsvarga sukhāvāpti ko vā vāṃchati mandadhīḥ |
sakhyaṃ bhavatu te vṛtra śakreṇa saha nityadā || 15||
avāpsyasi sukhaṃ tvaṃ ca śakraścāpi nirantaram |
vayaṃ ca tāpasāḥ sarve gandharvāśca nijāśrame ||16||
sukhāvāsaṃ gamiṣyāmaḥ śānte vaire'dhunaiva vām |
saṃgrāme yuvayorvīra vartamāne divāniśam ||17||
pīḍayante munayaḥ sarve gandharvāḥ kinnarā narāḥ |
sarveṣāṃ śāṃtikāmānāṃ sakhyamicchāmahe vayam || 18||
munayastvaṃ ca śakraśca prāpnuvantu sukhaṃ kila |
madhyasthāśca vayaṃ vṛtra yuvayoḥ sakhyakāraṇe ||19||
śapathaṃ kārayitvā'tra yojayāmo mithaḥ priyam |
śakrastu śapathānkṛtvā yathoktāṃśca tavāgrataḥ || 20||
cittaṃ te prītisaṃyuktaṃ kariṣyati tu sāmpratam |
satyādhārā dharā nūnaṃ satyena ca divākaraḥ || 21||
tapatyayaṃ yathākālaṃ vāyuḥ satyena vātyatha |
udanvānapi maryādāṃ satyenaiva na muñcati || 22 ||
tasmātsatyena sakhyaṃ vāṃ bhavatvadya yathāsukham |
ekatra śayanakrīḍā jalakeliḥ sukhāsanam ||23||
yuvābhyāṃ sarvathā kārya kartavyaṃ sakhyametya ca |
vyāsa uvāca
maharṣivacanaṃ śrutvā tānuvāca mahāmatiḥ ||24||
avaśyaṃ bhagavaṃto me mānanīyāstapasvinaḥ |
bhavaṃto munayaḥ kvāpi na mithyāvādino bhṛśam || 25 ||
sadācārāḥ suśāṃtāśca na viduśchalakāraṇam |
kṛtavaire śaṭhe stabdhe kāmuke ca gatatviṣi ||26||
nirlajje naiva kartavyaṃ sakhyaṃ matimatā sadā |
nirlajjo'yaṃ durācāro brahmahā laṃpaṭaḥ śaṭhaḥ ||27|
na viśvāsastu kartavyaḥ kartavyaḥ sarvavedṛśe jane |
bhavaṃto nipuṇāḥ sarve na drohamatayaḥ sadā ||28||
anabhijñāstu śāntatvāccittānāmativādinām |
munaya ūcuḥ
jantuḥ kṛtasya bhoktā vai śubhasya tvaśubhasya ca ||29||
drohaṃ kutvā kutaḥ śāntimāpnuyānnaṣṭacetanaḥ |
viśvāsaghātakartāro narakaṃ yānti niścayam ||30||
duḥkhaṃ ca samavāpnoti nūnaṃ viśvāsaghātakaḥ |
niṣkṛtirbrahmahaṃtṝṇāṃ surāpānāṃ ca niṣkṛtiḥ || 31 ||

viśvāsaghātināṃ naiva mitradrohakṛtāmapi |
samayaṃ brūhi sarvajña yathā te cetasi dhruvam ||32||
tenaiva samayenādya saṃdhiḥ syādubhayoḥ kila |
vṛtra uvāca
na śuṣkeṇa na cādreṇa nāśmanā na ca dāruṇā ||33||
na vajreṇa mahābhāga na divā niśi naiva ca |
vadhyo bhaveyaṃ vipreṃdrāḥ śakrasya saha daivataiḥ ||34||
evaṃ me rocate saṃdhiḥ śakreṇa saha nānyathā |
vyāsa uvāca
ṛṣayastaṃ tadā prāhurbāḍhamityeva cādṛtāḥ ||35||
samayaṃ śrāvayāmāsustatrānīya sureśvaram |
iṃdro'pi śapathāṃstatra cakāra vigatajvaraḥ ||36||
sākṣiṇaṃ pāvakaṃ kṛtvā munīnāṃ sannidhau kila |
vṛtrastu vacanaistasya viśvāsamagamattadā ||37||
babhūva mitravacchakre sahacaryāparāyaṇaḥ |
kadācinnaṃdane cobhau kadācidgandhamādane || 38 ||
kadācidudadhestīre modamānau viceratuḥ |
evaṃ kṛte ca saṃghāne vṛtraḥ pramudito'bhavat ||39||
śakro'pi vadhakāmastu tadupāyānaciyat |
raṃdhrānveṣī samudvignastadāsīnmaghavā bhṛśam ||40||
evaṃ citayatastasya kāla: samabhivartata |
viśvāsaṃ paramaṃ prāpa vṛtraḥ śakre'tidāruṇe || 41 ||
evaṃ katicidandāni gatāni samaye kṛte |
vṛtrasya maraṇopāyānmanasīṃdro'pyacitayat ||42 ||
tvaṣṭaikadā sutaṃ prāha viśvastaṃ pākaśāsane |
putra vṛtra mahābhāga śrṛṇu me vacanaṃ hitam ||43||
na viśvāsastu kartavyaḥ kṛtavere kathaṃcana |
maghavā kṛtavaṃsste sadā'sūyāparaḥ paraḥ || 44||
lobhānmatto dveṣarataḥ paraduḥkhotsavānvitaḥ |
paradāralaṃpaṭa : |
sa pāpabuddhiḥ pratārakaḥ || 45 || sa
raṃdhrānveṣī drohaparo māyāvī madagarvitaḥ |
yaḥ praviśyodare māturgarbhacchedaṃ cakāra ha || 46 ||
saptakṛtvaḥ saptakṛtvaḥ kraṃdamānamanāturaḥ |
tasmātputra na kartavyo viśvāsastu kathaṃcana || 47 ||
kṛtapāpasya kā lajjā punaḥ putra prakurvataḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ prabodhitaḥ pitrā vacanairhatusaṃyutaḥ ||48|| pitrā
na bubodha tadā vṛtra āsannamaraṇaḥ kila |
sa kadācitsamudrānte tamapaśyanmahāsuram ||49||
saṃdhyākāla upāvṛtte muhūrte'tīva dāruṇe |
tataḥ saṃcitya maghavā varadānaṃ mahātmanām ||50||
saṃdhyeyaṃ vartate raudrā na rātriṃdivaso na ca |
haṃtavyo'yaṃ mayā cādya balenaiva na saṃśayaḥ || 51 ||
ekākī vijane cātra saṃprāptaḥ samayocitaḥ |
evaṃ vicārya manasā sasmāra harimavyayam ||52||
tatrājagāma bhagavānadṛśyaḥ puruṣottamaḥ |
vajramadhye praviśyāsau saṃsthito bhagavānhariḥ || 53 ||

indro buddhiṃ cakārāśu tadā vṛtravadhaṃ prati |
iti saṃcitya manasā kathaṃ hanyāṃ ripuṃ raṇe || 54||
ajeyaṃ sarvathā sarvadevaiśca dānavaistathā |
yadi vṛtraṃ na hanmyadya vañcayitvā mahābalam ||55||
na śreyo mama nūnaṃ syātsarvathā ripurakṣaṇāt |
apāṃ phenaṃ tadā'paśyatsamudre parvatopamam ||56 ||
nāyaṃ śuṣko na cārdo'yaṃ na ca śastramidaṃ tathā |
apāṃ phenaṃ tadā śakro jagrāha kila līlayā ||57||
parāṃ śakti ca sasmāra bhaktyā paramayā yutaḥ |
smṛtamātrā tadā devī svāṃśaṃ phene nyadhāpayat || 58 ||
vajraṃ tadāvṛtaṃ kṣipraṃ cakāra harisaṃyutam |
phenāvṛtaṃ pavi tatra śakraścikṣepa taṃ prati ||59||
sahasā nipapātāśu vajrāhata ivācala: |
vāsavastu prahṛṣṭātmā babhūva nihate tadā ||60 ||
ṛṣayaśca mahendraṃ tamastuvanvividhaiḥ stavaiḥ |
hataśatruḥ prahṛṣṭātmā vāsavaḥ saha daivataiḥ || 61 ||
devīṃ saṃpūjayāmāsa yatprasādādvato ripuḥ |
prasādayāmāsa tadā stotrarnārnāvidhairapi || 62 ||
devodyāne parāśakteḥ prāsādamakaroddhariḥ |
padmarāgamayīṃ mūrti sthāpayāmāsa vāsavaḥ || 63||
trikālaṃ mahatīṃ pūjāṃ cakruḥ sarve'pi nirjarāḥ |
tadāprabhṛti devānāṃ śrīdevī kuladaivatam ||64||
viṣṇuṃ tribhuvanaśreṣṭhaṃ pūjayāmāsa vāsavaḥ |
tato hate mahāvīrye vṛtra devabhayaṃkare || 65 ||
pravavau ca śivo vāyurjahṛṣurdevatāstathā |
hate tasminsagaṃdharvā yakṣarākṣasakinnarāḥ ||66||
itthaṃ vṛtraḥ parāśaktipraveśayutaphenataḥ |
tayā kṛtavimohācca śakreṇa sahasā hataḥ || 67||
tato vṛtranihaṃtrīti devī lokeṣu gīyate |
śakreṇa nihatatvācca śakreṇa hata ucyate ||68 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ || 6 ||
atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
atha taṃ patitaṃ dṛṣṭvā viṣṇurviṣṇupurīṃ yayau |
manasā śakamānastu tasya hatyākṛtaṃ bhayam || 1||
indro'pi bhayasaṃtrasto yayāvidrapurīṃ tataḥ |
munayo bhayasaṃvignā bhavannihate ripau ||2||
kimasmābhiḥ kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ yadasau vaṃcitaḥ kila |
muniśabdo vṛthā jātaḥ sureśasya ca saṃgamāt ||3||
asmākaṃ vacanādvṛtro viśvāsagamatkila |
viśvāsaghātinaḥ saṃgādvayaṃ viśvāsaghātakāḥ ||4||
ghigiyaṃ mamatā pāpamūlamevamanarthakṛt |
yadasmābhiśchalaṃ kṛtvā śapathaicito'suraḥ ||5||
maṃtra kṛdbuddhidātā ca prerakaḥ pāpakāriṇām |
pāpabhāksa bhavennūnaṃ pakṣakartā tathaiva ca || 6||
viṣṇunā'pi kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ yatsāhāyyamavāptavān |
vajre praviśya yenāsau pātitaḥ sattvamūrtinā ||7||
nūnaṃ svārthaparaḥ prāṇī na pāpāttrāsamaśnute |
hariṇā harisaṃgena sarvathā duṣkṛtaṃ kṛtam ||8||
dvāveva staḥ padārthānāṃ dvāveva nidhanaṃ gatau |
prathamaśca turīyaśca yo trilokyāṃ tu durlabho ||9||

arthakāmau praśastau dvau sarveṣāṃ saṃmato priyo |
dharmādharmeti vāgvādo dambho'yaṃ mahatāmapi || 10 ||
munayo'pi manastāpamevaṃ kṛtvā punaḥ punaḥ |
jagmuḥ svānāśramāneva vimanaskā hatodyamāḥ ||11||
tvaṣṭā tu nihataṃ śrutvā putramidreṇa bhārata |
ruroda duḥkhasaṃtapto nirvedamagamatpunaḥ || 12 ||
yatrāsau patitastatra gatvā vīkṣya tathā gatam |
saṃskāraṃ kārayāmāsa vidhivatpāralaukikam || 13 ||
snātvā'sya salilaṃ dattvā kṛtvā caivaurdhvadaihikam| śaśāpeṃdraṃ sa śokārtaḥ pāpiṣṭhaṃ mitraghātakam ||14||
yathā me nihataḥ putraḥ pralobhya śapathairbhṛśam |
tathedro'pi mahaduḥkhaṃ prāpnoti vidhinirmitam ||15||
iti śaptvā sureśānaṃ tvaṣṭā tāpasamanvitaḥ |
meroḥ śikharamāsthāya tapastepe suduṣkaram || 16 ||
janamejaya uvāca
hatvā tvāṣṭraṃ sureśo'tha kāmavasthāmavāptavān |
sukhaṃ vā duḥkhamevāgre' tanme brūhi pitāmaha || 17 ||
vyāsa uvāca
kiṃ pṛcchasi mahābhāga saṃdehaḥ kīdṛśastava |
avaśyameva bhoktavyaṃ kṛtaṃ karma śubhāśubham ||18||
baliṣṭhairdurbalairvā'pi svalpaṃ vā bahu vā kṛtam |
sarvathaiva hi bhoktavyaṃ sadevāsuramānuṣaiḥ ||19||
śakrāyetthaṃ matirdattā hariṇā vṛtraghātine |
praviṣṭo'tha pavi viṣṇuḥ sahāyaḥ pratyapadyata ||20||
na cāpadi sahāyo'bhūdvāsudevaḥ kathaṃcana |
samaye svajanaḥ sarvaḥ saṃsāre'sminnarādhipa ||21||
deve vimukhatāṃ prāpte na ko'pyasti sahāyavān |
pitā mātā tathā bhāryā bhrātā vā'tha sahodaraḥ || 22||
sevako vā'pi mitra vā putraścaiva tathaurasaḥ |
pratikūle gate daive na ko'pyeti sahāyatām ||23||
bhoktā pāpasya puṇyasya kartā bhavati sarvathā |
vṛtraṃ hatvā gatāḥ sarve nistejaskaḥ śacīpatiḥ ||24||
śepustaṃ tridaśāḥ sarve brahmahetya bruvañchanaiḥ |
ko nāma śapathānkṛtvā satyaṃ dattvā vacaḥ punaḥ || 25 ||
jighāṃsati suviśvastaṃ muniṃ mitratvamāgatam |
devagoṣṭyāṃ surodyāne gaṃdharvāṇāṃ samāgame || 26 ||
sarvatraiva kathā tasya vistāramagamatkila |
kiṃ kṛtaṃ duṣkṛtaṃ karma śakreṇādya jighāṃsatā ||27||
vṛtraṃ chalena viśvastaṃ munibhiśva pratāritam |
vedapramāṇamutsṛjya svīkṛtaṃ saugataṃ matam ||28||
yadayaṃ nihataḥ śatrurvacayitvā'tisāhasāt |
ko nāma vacanaṃ dattvā viparītamathācaret ||29||
binā śakraṃ hari vā'pi yathā'yaṃ vinipātitaḥ |
evaṃvidhāḥ kathāścānyāḥ samājeṣvabhavanbhṛśam ||30||
śuśrapi vividhāḥ svakīrterhānikārakāḥ |
yasya kīrtirhatā loke dhiktasyaiva kujīvitam ||31||
yaṃ dṛṣṭvā pathi gacchaṃtaṃ śatruḥ smeramukhī bhavet |
indradyumno'pi rājarṣiḥ patitaḥ kīrtisaṃkṣayāt || 32||
svargādikṛtapāpo'sau pāpakṛtika na pātyate |
svalpe'parādhe'pi nṛpo yayātiḥ patitaḥ kila ||33||
nṛpaḥ karkaṭatāṃ prāpto yugānaṣṭādaśaiva tu |
bhṛgupatniśiraśchedādbhagvānhariracyutaḥ ||34||
brahmaśāpātpaśoryonau saṃjāto makarādiṣu |
viṣṇuśca vāmano bhūtvā yācanārthaṃ balergṛhe ||35|

gataḥ kimaparaṃ duḥkhaṃ prāpnoti duṣkṛtī naraḥ |
rāmo'pi vanavāseṣu sītāvirahajaṃ bahu || 36 ||
duḥkhaṃ ca prāptavānghoraṃ bhṛguśāpena bhārata |
tathedro'pi brahmahatyākṛtaṃ prāpya mahadbhayam || 37||
na svāsthyaṃ prāpa gehe'sau sarvasiddhisamanvite |
paulomī taṃ sabhāhīnaṃ dṛṣṭvā provāca vāsavam ||38||
niḥśvasaṃtaṃ bhayatrastaṃ naṣṭasaṃjñaṃ vicetasam |
kiṃ prabho'dya bhayārto'si mṛtaste dāruṇo ripuḥ ||39||
kā ciṃtā vartate kāṃta tava śatruniṣūdana |
kasmācchocasi lokeśa niḥśvasanprākṛto yathā ||40||
nānyo'sti balavāñchatruryena citāparo bhavān |
indra uvāca
nārātirbalavānme'sti na śāṃtirna sukhaṃ tathā || 41 ||
brahmahatyābhayādrājñi bibhemi satataṃ gṛhe |
na naṃdanaṃ sukhakaraṃ nāmṛtaṃ na gṛhaṃ vanam ||42||
gaṃdharvāṇāṃ tathā geyaṃ nṛtyamapsarasāṃ punaḥ |
na tvaṃ sukhakarā nārī nānā ca surayoṣitaḥ || 43||
na tathā kāmadhenuśca devavṛkṣaḥ sukhapradaḥ |
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi kva śarma mama jāyate || 44 ||
iti ciṃtāparaḥ kānte na labhe sukhamātmani |
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā vacanaṃ śakraḥ priyāṃ paramakātarām ||45||
nirjagāma gṛhānmando mānasaṃ sara uttamam |
padmanāle praviṣṭo'sau bhayārtaḥ śokakarṣitaḥ || 46 ||
na prājñāyata devendrastvabhibhūtaśca kalmaṣaiḥ |
praticchanno vasatyapsu ceṣṭamāna ivoragaḥ || 47 ||
asahāyasturāṣāḍaiccāntārto vikalendriyaḥ |
tataḥ pranaṣṭe devendre brahmahatyābhayārdite || 48 ||
surāściṃtāturāścāsannutpātāścābhavannatha |
ṛṣayaḥ siddhagaṃdharvā bhayārtāścābhavanbhṛśam ||49||
arājakaṃ jagatsarvamabhibhūtamupadravaiḥ |
avarṣaṇaṃ tadā jātaṃ pṛthivī kṣīṇavaibhavā || 50 ||
vicchinna srotaso nadya: sarāṃsyanudakāni vai |
evaṃ tvarājake jāte devatā munayastathā || 51 ||
vicārya nahuṣaṃ cakruḥ śakraṃ sarve divaukasaḥ |
saṃprāpya nahuṣo rājā dharmiṣṭho'pi rajobalāt ||52||
babhūva viṣayāsakta: paṃcabāṇaśarāhataḥ |
apsarobhirvṛtaḥ krīḍandevodyāneṣu bhārata || 53 ||
śakrapatnīguṇāñchrutvā cakame tāṃ sa pārthivaḥ |
ṛṣīnāha kimidrāṇī nopagacchati māṃ kila || 54 ||
bhavadbhiścāmaraiḥ sarvaiḥ kṛto'haṃ vāsavastviha |
preṣayadhvaṃ surāḥ kāmaṃ sevārthaṃ mama vai śacīm ||55||
priyaṃ cenmama kartavyaṃ sarvathā munayo'marāḥ |
ahamidro'dya devānāṃ lokānāṃ ca tatheśvaraḥ ||56 |
āgacchatu śacī mahyaṃ kṣipramadya niveśanam |
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā devā devarṣayastathā || 57 ||
gatvā ciṃtāturāḥ procuḥ paulomī praṇatāstataḥ |
indrapatni durācārī nahuṣastvāmihecchati || 58||
kupito'smānuvācedaṃ preṣayadhvaṃ śacīmiha |
kiṃ kurmastadadhīnāḥ sma yeneṃdro'yaṃ kṛtaḥ kila || 59 ||

tacchrutvā durmanā devī bṛhaspatimuvāca ha |
rakṣa māṃ nahuṣādbrahmaṃstavāsmi śaraṇaṃ gatā || 60 ||
bṛhaspatiruvāca
na bhetavyaṃ tvayā devi nahuṣātpāpamohitāt |
na tvāṃ dāsyāmyahaṃ vatse tyaktvā dharmaṃ sanātanam 61||
śaraṇāgatamārtaṃ ca yo dadāti narādhamaḥ |
sa eva narakaṃ yāti yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam ||
svasthā bhava pṛthuśroṇi na tyakṣye tvāṃ kadācana || 62||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 ||
athāṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
nahuṣastvatha tāṃ śrutvā gurostu śaraṇaṃ gatām |
cukrodha smarabāṇārtastamāṃgirasamāśu vai || 1||
devānāhāṃgirāsūnurhantavyo'yaṃ mayā kila |
sa indrāṇī gṛhe gūḍho rakṣatīti mayā śrutam ||2||
iti taṃ kupitaṃ dṛṣṭvā devāḥ sarṣipurogamāḥ |
abruvannahuṣaṃ ghoraṃ sāmapūrvaṃ vacastadā || 3 ||
krodhaṃ saṃhara rājendra tyaja pāpamati prabho |
nidaṃti dharmaśāstreṣu paradārābhimarśanam ||4||
śakrapatnī sadā sādhvī jīvamāne pato punaḥ |
kathamanyaṃ patiṃ kuryātsubhagā'tipativratā || 5 ||
trilokīśastvamadhunā śāstā dharmasya vai vibho |
tvādṛśo'dharmamātiṣṭhettadā naśyetprajā dhruvam || 6 ||
sarvathā prabhuṇā kāryaṃ śiṣṭācārasya rakṣaṇam |
vāramukhyaśca śataśo vartate'tra śacīsamāḥ ||7||
ratistu kāraṇaṃ proktaṃ śṛṅgārasya mahātmabhiḥ |
rasahānirbalātkāre kṛte sati tu jāyate || 8||
ubhayoḥ sadṛśaṃ prema yadi pārthivasattama |
tadā vai sukhasaṃpattirubhayorupajāyate ||9||
tasmādbhāvamimaṃ muṃca paradārābhimarśane |
sadbhāvaṃ kuru devendra padaṃ prāpto'syanuttamam ||10||
ṛddhikṣayastu pāpena puṇyenātivivardhanam |
tasmātpāpaṃ parityajya sanmatiṃ kuru pārthiva || 11 ||
nahuṣa uvāca
gautamasya yadā bhuktā dārāḥ śakreṇa devatāḥ |
vācaspatestu somena kva yūyaṃ saṃsthitāstadā ||12||
paropadeśe kuśalāḥ prabhavaṃti narāḥ kila |
kartā caivopadeṣṭā ca durlabhaḥ puruṣo bhavet ||13||
māmāgacchatu sā devī hitaṃ syādadbhutaṃ hi vaḥ |
etasyāḥ paramaṃ devāḥ sukhamevaṃ bhaviṣyati || 14 ||
anyathā na hi tuṣye'haṃ satyametadbravīmi vaḥ |
vinayādvā balādvā'pi tāmāśu prāpayaṃtviha || 15 ||
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā devāca munayastathā |
tamūcuścātisaṃtrastā nahuṣaṃ madanāturam || 16 ||
indrāṇīmānayiṣyāmaḥ sāmapūrvaṃ tavāṃtikam |
ityuktvā te tadā jagmurbṛhaspatiniketanam || 17||
vyāsa uvāca
te gatvāṃgirasaḥ putraṃ procuḥ prāṃjalayaḥ surāḥ |
jānīmaḥ śaraṇaṃ prāptāmiṃdrāṇī tava veśmani || 18 ||

sā deyā nahuṣāyādya vāsavo'sau kṛto yataḥ |
vṛṇotviyaṃ varārohā patitve varavarṇinī ||19||
bṛhaspatiḥ surānāha tachrutvā dāruṇaṃ vacaḥ |
nāhaṃ tyakṣye tu paulomoṃ satīṃ ca śaraṇāgatām 20 ||
devā ūcuḥ
upāyo'nyaḥ prakartavyo yena so'dya prasīdati |
anyathā kopasaṃyukto durārādhyo bhaviṣyati || 21 ||
gururuvāca
tatra gatvā śacī bhūpaṃ pralobhya vacasā bhṛśam |
karotu samayaṃ bālā patiṃ jñātvā mṛtaṃ bhaje ||22||
indre jīvati me kāṃte kathamanyaṃ karomyaham |
anveṣaṇārthaṃ gaṃtavyaṃ mayā tasya mahātmanaḥ ||23||
iti sā samayaṃ kṛtvā vaṃcayitvā ca bhūpatim |
bharturānayane yatnaṃ karotu mama vākyataḥ ||24||
iti saṃcitya te sarve bṛhaspatipurogamāḥ |
nahuṣaṃ sahitā jagmuridrapatnyā divaukasaḥ ||25||
tānāgatānsamīkṣyāha tadā kṛtrimavāsavaḥ |
jaharṣa ca mudāyuktastāṃ vīkṣya mudito'bravīt ||26||
adyāsmi vāsavaḥ kāṃte bhaja māṃ cārulocane |
patitve sarvalokasya pūjyo'haṃ vihitaḥ suraiḥ || 27 ||
ityuktā sā nṛpaṃ prāha vepamānā trapāyutā |
varamicchāmyahaṃ rājaṃstvattaḥ prāptaṃ sureśvara || 28||
kiṃcitkālaṃ pratīkṣasva yāvatkurve vinirṇayam |
iṃdro'stīti na vā'stīti saṃdeho me hṛdi sthitaḥ ||
tatastvāṃ samupasthāsye kṛtvā niścayamātmani |
tāvatkṣamasva rājendra satyametadbravīmi te ||30||
na hi vijñāyate śakro naṣṭaḥ kiṃ vā kva vā gataḥ |
evamuktaḥ sa indrāṇyā nahuṣaḥ prītimānabhūt || 31 ||
vyasarjayatsa tāṃ devīṃ tathetyuktvā mudānvitaḥ |
sā visṛṣṭā nṛpeṇāśu gatvā prāha surānsatī ||32||
indrasyāgamane yatnaṃ kurutādya kṛtodyamāḥ |
śrutvā tadvacanaṃ devā indrāṇyā rasavacchuci ||33||
mantrayāmāsurekāgrāḥ śakrārthaṃ nṛpasattama |
te gatvā vaiṣṇavaṃ dhāma tuṣṭuvuḥ parameśvaram ||34||
ādidevaṃ jagannāthaṃ śaraṇāgatavatsalam |
ūcucainaṃ samudvignā vākyaṃ vākyaviśāradāḥ || 35 ||
deva deva: surapatirbrahmahatyāprapīḍitaḥ |
adṛśyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ kvāpi tiṣṭhati vāsavaḥ ||36||
tvadviyā nihate vipre brahmahatyāvṛtaḥ prabho |
tvaṃ gatistasya bhagavannasmākaṃ ca tathaiva hi ||37||
trāhi naḥ paramāpannānmokṣaṃ tasya vinirdiśa |
devānāṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā kātaraṃ viṣṇurabravīt ||38||
yajatābhaśvamedhena śakrapāpanivṛttaye |
puṇyena hayamedhena pāvitaḥ pākaśāsanaḥ ||39||
punareṣyati devānāmidratvamakutobhayaḥ |
hayamedhena saṃtuṣṭā devī śrījagadambikā || 40||
brahmahatyādipāpāni nāśayiṣyatyasaṃśayam |
yasyāḥ smaraṇamātreṇa pāpajālaṃ vinaśyati || 41 ||
kiṃ punarvājimedhena tatprītyarthaṃ kṛtena ca |
indrāṇī kurutānnityaṃ bhagavatyāḥ prapūjanam ||42||
ārādhanaṃ śivāyāstu sukhakāri bhaviṣyati |
nahuṣo'pi jaganmāturmāyayā mohitaḥ kila || 43 ||
vināśaṃ svakṛtenāśu gamiṣyatyenasā surāḥ |
pāvitaśvāśvamedhena turāṣāḍapi vaibhavam ||44||

prāpsyatyacirakālena svamāsanamanuttamam |
te tu śrutvā śubhāṃ vāṇīṃ viṣṇoramitatejasaḥ || 45||
jagmustaṃ deśamaniśaṃ yatrāste pākaśāsanaḥ |
tamāśvāsya surāḥ śakraṃ bṛhaspatipurogamāḥ ||46 ||
kārayāmāsurakhilaṃ hayamedhaṃ mahākratum |
vibhajya brahmahatyāṃ tu vṛkṣeṣu ca nadīṣu ca ||47||
parvateṣu pṛthivyāṃ ca strīṣu caivākṣipadvibhuḥ |
tāṃ visṛjya ca bhūteṣu vipāpaḥ pākaśāsanaḥ || 48||
vijvaraḥ samabhūdbhūyaḥ kālākāṃkṣī sthito jale |
adṛśyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ padmanāle vyatiṣṭata || 49 |
devāstu nirgatāḥ syāne kṛtvā kāryaṃ tadadbhutam |
paulomī tu guruṃ prāha duḥkhitā virahākulā ||50||
kṛtayajño'pi me bhartā kimadṛśyaḥ purandaraḥ |
kathaṃ drakṣye priyaṃ svāmistamupāyaṃ vadasva me || 51 ||
bṛhaspatiruvāca
tvamārādhaya paulomi devīṃ bhagavatīṃ śivām |
darśayiṣyati te nāthaṃ devī vigatakalmaṣam ||52||
ārādhitā jagaddhātrī nahuṣaṃ vāraviṣyati |
mohayitvā nṛpaṃ sthānātpātayiṣyati cāmbikā 53 ||
ityuktā sā tadā tena pulomatanayā nṛpa |
jagrāha maṃtraṃ vidhivadgurordevyāḥ sasādhanam ||54||
vidyāṃ prāpya gurordevī devīṃ śrībhuvaneśvarīm |
samyagārādhayāmāsa balipuṣpārcanaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 55 ||
tyaktānyabhogasaṃbhārā tāpasīveṣadhāriṇī |
cakāra pūjanaṃ devyāḥ priyadarśanalālasā ||56 ||
kālena kiyatā tuṣṭā pratyakṣaṃ darśanaṃ dadau |
saumyarūpadharā devī varadā haṃsavāhinī || 57 ||
koṭisūryapratīkāśā caṃdrakoṭisuśītalā |
vidyutkoṭisamānābhā caturvedasamanvitā || 58 ||
pāśāṃkuśābhayavarāndadhatī nijabāhubhiḥ |
āpādalaṃbinīṃ svacchāṃ muktāmālāṃ ca bibhratī 59 ||
prasannasmeravadanā locanatrayabhūṣitā |
ābrahmakīṭajananī karuṇāmṛtasāgarā || 60||
anaṃtakoṭibrahmāṃḍanāyikā parameśvarī | saumyānaṃtarasairyuktastanadvayavirājitā 119811
sarveśvarī ca sarvajñā kūṭasthākṣararūpiṇī |
tāmuvāca prasannā sā śakrapatnīṃ kṛtodyamām ||62||
meghagaṃbhīraśabdena mudamādadatī bhṛśam |
devyuvāca
varaṃ varaya suśroṇi vāṃchitaṃ śakravallabhe ||63|| ||
dadāmyadya prasannā'smi pūjitā subhṛśaṃ tvayā |
varadā'haṃ samāyātā darśanaṃ sahajaṃ na me || 64 ||
anekakoṭijanmotthapuṇyapuṃjaiha labhyate |
ityuktā sā tadā devī tāmāha praṇatā puraḥ ||65 ||
śakrapatnī bhagavatīṃ prasannāṃ parameśvarīm |
vāṃchāmi darśanaṃ mātaḥ patyuḥ paramadurlabham ||66 ||
nahupādbhayanāśaṃ ca svapadaprāpaṇaṃ tathā |
devyuvāca
gaccha tvamanayā dūtyā sārddha śrīmānasaṃ saraḥ || 67||

yatra me mūrtiracalā viśvakāmābhighā matā |
tatra paśyasi śakraṃ tvaṃ duḥkhitaṃ bhayavihvalam ||68 ||
mohayiṣyāmi rājānaṃ kālena kiyatā punaḥ |
svasthā bhava viśālākṣi karomi tava cepsitam ||69||
bhraṃśayiṣyāmi bhūpālaṃ mohitaṃ tridaśāsanāt |
vyāsa uvāca
devīdūtī tāṃ gṛhītvā śakrapatnīṃ tvarānvitā || 70 ||
prāpayāmāsa sānnidhyaṃ svapatyuḥ parameśvarīm |
sā dṛṣṭvā taṃ pati bālā sureśaṃ guptasaṃsthitam ||
muditā'bhūdvaraṃ vīkṣya bahukālābhivāṃchitam ||71||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭaskandhe śakradarśanaṃ nāmāṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||
atha navamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tāṃ vīkṣya vipulāpāṃgī rahaḥ śokasamanvitām |
ākhaṇḍala: priyāṃ bhāryāṃ vismitaścābravīttadā || 1||
kathamatrāgatā kānte kathaṃ jñātasvayā hyaham |
durjñeyaḥ sarvabhūtānāṃ saṃsthito'smi śubhānane ||2||
śatryuvāca
deva devyāḥ prasādena jñāto'syadya bhavāniha |
punastasyāḥ prasādena prāptā'smi tvāṃ divaspate || 3||
nahuṣo nāma rājarṣiḥ sthāpito bhavadāsane |
tridaśairmunibhiścaiva sa māṃ bādhati nityaśaḥ ||4||
pati māṃ kuru cārvaṅgi turāsāhaṃ surādhipam |
evaṃ vadati māṃ pāpmā kiṃ karomi balārdana || 5||
iṃdra uvāca
kālākāṃkṣī varārohe saṃsthito'smi yadṛcchayā |
tathā tvamapi kalyāṇi susthiraṃ svamanaḥ kuru || 6 ||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktā tena sā devī patinātipraśaṃsinā |
niḥśvasaṃtyāha taṃ śakraṃ vepamānā'tiduḥkhitaḥ ||7||
kathaṃ tiṣṭhe mahābhāga pāpātmā māṃ vaśānugām |
kariṣyati madonmatto baradānena garvitaḥ ||8||
devāśca munayaḥ sarve māmūcustadbhayākulāḥ |
taṃ bhajasva varārohe devarājaṃ smarāturam ||9||
bṛhaspatistu śatrughna vāḍavo balavarjitaḥ |
kathaṃ māṃ rakṣituṃ śakto bhaveddevānugaḥ sadā ||10||
tasmāccitā'sti mahatī nāryahaṃ vaśavartinī |
anāthā kiṃ kariṣyāmi viparīte vidhau vibho || 11 ||
nāryasmyahaṃ na kulaṭā tvaccintā'tipativratā |
nāsti me śaraṇaṃ tatra yo māṃ rakṣati duḥkhitām || 12 ||
indra uvāca
upāyaṃ prabravīmyadya taṃ kuruṣva varānane |
śīlaṃ te duḥkhite kāle paritrātaṃ bhaviṣyati || 13 ||

pareṇa rakṣitā nārī na bhavecca pativratā |
upāyaiḥ koṭibhiḥ kāmaṃ bhinnacittā'ticaṃcalā || 14 ||
śīlameva hi nārīṇāṃ sadā rakṣati pāpataḥ |
tasmāttvaṃ śīlamāsthāya sthirā bhava śucismite || 15||
yadā tvāṃ nahuṣo rājā balādākarṣayetkhalaḥ |
tadā tvaṃ samayaṃ kṛtvā guptaṃ vaṃcaya bhṛpatim || 16 ||
ekānte tatsamīpe tvaṃ gatvā vada madālase |
ṛṣiyānena divyena māmupaihi jagatpate || 17||
evaṃ prītā bhaviṣyāmīti meṃ vratam |
iti taṃ vada suśroṇi tadā tu parimohitaḥ || 18||
munī yā yojayiṣyati pārthivaḥ |
avaśyaṃ tāpaso bhūpaṃ śāpadagdhaṃ kariṣyati || 19 ||
sāhāyyaṃ jagadaṃbā se kariṣyati na saṃśayaḥ |
jagadaṃbāpadasmartuḥ saṃkaṭaṃ na kadācana ||20||
yadi jāyeta taccāpi jñeyaṃ tatsvastaye kila |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena maṇidvīpādhivāsinīm ||21||
bhaja tva bhuvaneśānī guruvākyānusārataḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
ityākhyātā śacī tena jagāma nahuṣaṃ prati ||22||
tathetyuktvā'tiviśvastā bhāvikārye kṛtodyamā |
nahuṣastāṃ samālokya mudito vākyamabravīt || 23 ||
svāgataṃ satyavacanaistvadadhīno'smi kāmini |
dāso'haṃ tava satyena pālitaṃ vacanaṃ tvayā ||24||
yadāgatā samīpe me tuṣṭo'smi mitabhāṣiṇi |
na ca vrīḍā tvayā kāryā bhaktaṃ māṃ bhaja susmite || 25||
kāryaṃ vada viśālākṣi kariṣyāmi tava priyam |
śacyuvāca
sarvaṃ kṛtaṃ tvayā kāryaṃ mama kṛtrimavāsava || 26 ||
manoratho'sti me deva śṛṇu cittai'dhunā vibho |
vāṃchitaṃ kuru kalyāṇa tvadvaśā'hamataḥ param ||27||
bravīmi mānasotsāhaṃ tvaṃ taṃ kartumihārhasi |
kāryaṃ tvaṃ brūhi caṃdrāsye karomi tava vāṃchitam 28||
alabhyamapi dāsyāmi tubhyaṃ subhru vadasva mām |
śacyuvāca
kathaṃ bravīmi rājendra pratyayo nāsti me tava || 29 ||
śapathaṃ kuru rājeṃdra yatkaromi priyaṃ tava |
rājānaḥ satyavacaso durlabhā eva bhūtale || 30||
paścādbravīmyahaṃ rājañjñātvā satyena yaṃtritam |
kṛte cedrāṃchite bhūpa sadā te vaśavartinī ||31||
bhaviṣyāmi turāṣāḍ vai satyametadvaco mama |
nahuṣa uvāca
avaśyameva kartavyaṃ vacanaṃ tava suṃdari ||32||
śapāmi sukṛtenāhaṃ yajñadānakṛtena vaṃ |

śacyuvāca
indrasya harayo vāhā gajaścaiva rathastathā || 33 ||
garuḍo vāsudevasya yamasya mahiṣastathā |
vṛṣabha: śaṃkarasyāpi brahmaṇo varaṭāpatiḥ || 34||
kārtikeyasya gajāsyasya tu mūṣakaḥ |
icchāmyahamapūrva ve vāhanaṃ te surādhipa ||35||
mayūraḥ
yanna viṣṇorna rudrasya nāsurāṇāṃ na rakṣasām |
vahaṃtu tvāṃ mahārāja munayaḥ saṃśitavratāḥ ||36||
sarve śibikayā rājannetaddhi mama vāṃchitam |
sarvadevādhikaṃ tvāṃ vai jānāmi vasudhādhipa || 37||
tena te tejaso vṛddhi vāṃchāmyahamataṃdritā |
vyāsa uvāca
tasyāstadvacanaṃ śrutvā prahasya jñānadurbalaḥ || 38||
mohitastu mahādevyā kṛtaṃ mohena tatkṣaṇam |
uvāca vacanaṃ bhūpaḥ saṃstuvan vāsavapriyām ||39||
nahuṣa uvāca
satyamuktaṃ tvayā tanvi vāhanaṃ ruciraṃ mama |
kariṣyāmi sukeśāṃte vacanaṃ tava sarvathā ||40||
na hyalpavīryo bhavati yo vāhānkurute munīn |
ahamāruhya yānena tvāmeṣyāmi śucismite ||41||
saptarṣayo māṃ vakṣyaṃti sarve devarṣayastathā |
samarthaṃ triṣu lokeṣu jñātvā māṃ tapasā'dhikam || 42||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā tāṃ susaṃtuṣṭo visasarja haripriyām |
munīnāhūya sarvāṃstānityuvāca smarānvitaḥ ||43||
nahuṣa uvāca
ahamidro'dya bho viprāḥ sarvaśaktisamanvitaḥ |
kāryamatra prakurvantu bhavato vigatasmayāḥ ||44||
indrāsanaṃ mayā prāptaṃ nendrāṇī māmupaiti ca |
ākāritā ca māṃ brūte premapūrvamidaṃ vacaḥ || 45 ||
muniyānena devendra māmupaihi surādhipa |
devadeva mahārāja matpriyaṃ kuru mānada || 46 ||
etatkāryaṃ muniśreṣṭhā mamātyaṃtaṃ durāsadam |
bhavadbhistu prakartavyaṃ sarvathaiva dayālubhiḥ ||47 ||
mano dahati me kāmaḥ śakrapatnyāṃ pravartitam |
bhavaṃtaḥ śaraṇaṃ me'dya kurudhvaṃ kāryamadbhutam ||48||
agastipramukhāstasya śrutvā vākyamasatkaram |
aṃgīcatruśca bhāvitvātkṛpayā paramarṣayaḥ || 49 ||
aṃgīkṛte'tha tadvākye munibhistattvadarśibhiḥ |
mudaṃ prāpa nṛpaḥ kāmaṃ paulomī kṛtamānasaḥ ||50 ||
āruhya śivikāṃ ramyāṃ saṃsthitastvarayānvitaḥ |
vāhānkṛtvā munīndivyānsarpa sarpeti cābravīt 51 ||
kāmārtaḥ so'spṛśanmūḍhaḥ pādena munimastakam |
agasti tāpasaśreṣṭhaṃ lopāmudrāpati tadā || 52 ||
vātāpibhakṣyakartāraṃ samudrasyāpi śoṣakam |
kaśayā tāḍayāmāsa paṃcabāṇaśarāhataḥ ||53||
indrāṇīhṛtacitto'sau sarpeti prabruvanmunim |
taṃ śaśāpa muniḥ kruddhaḥ kaśāghātamanusmaran ||54||

sarpo bhava durācāra vane ghoravapurmahān |
bahuvarṣasahasrāṇi yatra kleśo mahānbhavet ||55||
vicariṣyasi vīryeṇa punaḥ svargamavāpsyasi |
dṛṣṭvā yudhiṣṭhiraṃ nāma tava mokṣo bhaviṣyati || 56 ||
praśnānāmuttaraṃ śrutvā dharmaputramukhāttataḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ śaptaḥ sa rājarṣiḥ stutvā taṃ munisattamam ||57||
svargātpapāta sahasā sarparūpadharo'bhavat |
bṛhaspatistato gatvā tarasā mānasaṃ prati || 58 ||
iṃdrāya sarvavṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsa vistarāt |
tacchrutvā maghavā rājñaḥ svargātpracyavanādikam 59 ||
mudito'bhūnmahārāja sthitastatraiva vāsavaḥ |
devāśca munayo dṛṣṭvā nahuṣaṃ patitaṃ bhuvi || 60 ||
jagmuḥ sarve'pi tatraiva yatredraḥ sarasi sthitaḥ |
tamāśvāsya surāḥ sarve munibhiḥ sahitāstadā 61 ||
svarge samānayāmāsurmānapūrvaṃ śacīpatim |
samāgataṃ tataḥ śakraṃ sarve te munayaḥ surāḥ || 62 ||
sthāpayitvā''sane paścādabhiṣekaṃ dadhuḥ śivam |
indro'pi svāsanaṃ prāpya śacyā saha surālaye || 63 ||
cikroḍa naṃdane ramye kānane premayuktayā |
vyāsa uvāca
evamidreṇa saṃprāptaṃ saṃprāptaṃ duḥkhaṃ paramadāruṇam ||64|
hatvā'suraṃ kāmarūpaṃ viśvarūpaṃ mahāmunim |
punardevyāḥ prasādena svasthānaṃ prāptavānnṛpa || 65 ||
etatte sarvamākhyātaṃ vṛtrāsuravadhāśrayam |
yatpṛṣṭo'haṃ tvayā rājankathānakamanuttamam || 66||
yādṛśaṃ kurute karma tādṛśaṃ phalamāpnuyāt |
avaśyameva bhoktavyaṃ kṛtaṃ karma śubhāśubham ||67||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe vṛtravadho nāma navamo'dhyāyaḥ ||9||
atha daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
kathitaṃ caritaṃ brahmañchakrasyādbhutakarmaṇaḥ |
sthānabhraṃśastathā duḥkhaprāptiruktā viśeṣataḥ || 1 ||
yatra devadhidevyā mahimā'tīva varṇitaḥ |
saṃdeho'tra mamāpyasti yacchakro'pi mahātapāḥ ||2||
devādhipatyamāsādya duḥsahaṃ duḥkhamanvabhūt |
makhānāṃ tu śataṃ kṛtvā prāptaṃ sthānamanuttamam ||3||
deveśatvaṃ ca saṃprāpya bhraṣṭaḥ sthānādaso katham |
etatsarvaṃ samācakṣva kāraṇaṃ karuṇānidhe ||4||
sarvajño'si muniśreṣṭa purāṇānāṃ pravartakaḥ |
nāvācyaṃ mahatāṃ kiñcicchiṣye ca śraddhayā'nvite 5 ||
tasmātkuru mahābhāga matsaṃdehāpanodanam |

sūta uvāca
iti pṛṣṭaḥ sa rājñā vai tadā satyavatīsutaḥ || 6||
tamāhātiprasannātmā yathānukramamuttaram |
vyāsa uvāca
nibodha nṛpatiśreṣṭha kāraṇaṃ paramādbhutam || 7 ||
karmaṇastu tridhā proktā gatistattvavidāṃ varaiḥ |
saṃcitaṃ vartamānaṃ ca prārabdhamiti bhedataḥ ||8||
anekajanmasaṃjātaṃ prāktanaṃ saṃcitaṃ smṛtam |
sāttvikaṃ rājasaṃ karma tāmasaṃ trividhaṃ punaḥ || 9 ||
śubhaṃ vā'pyaśubhaṃ bhūpa saṃcitaṃ bahukālikam |
avaśyameva . bhoktavyaṃ sukṛtaṃ duṣkṛtaṃ tathā || 10 ||
janmajanmani jīvānāṃ saṃcitānāṃ ca karmaṇām |
niḥśeṣastu kṣayo nābhūtkalpakoṭiśatairapi ||11||
kriyamāṇaṃ ca yatkarma vartamānaṃ taducyate |
dehaṃ prāpya śubhaṃ vā'pi hya śubhaṃ vā samācaret ||12||
saṃcitānāṃ punarmadhyātsamāhṛtya kiyānkila |
dehāraṃbhe ca samaye kāla: prerayatīva tat || 13 ||
prārabdhaṃ karma vijñeyaṃ bhogāttasya kṣayaḥ smṛtaḥ |
prāṇibhiḥ khalu bhoktavyaṃ prārabdhaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 14 ||
purā kṛtāni rājeṃdra śubhāni śubhāni ca |
avaśyameva karmāṇi bhoktavyānīti niścayaḥ || 15 |
devairmanuṣyairasurairyakṣagaṃdharvakinnaraiḥ |
karmaiva hi mahārāja dehāraṃbhasya kāraṇam ||16||
karmakṣaye janmanāśaḥ prāṇināṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ |
brahmā viṣṇustathā rudra indrādyāśca surāstathā || 17 ||
dānavā yakṣagaṃdharvāḥ sarve karmavaśāḥ kila |
anyathā dehasambandhaḥ kathaṃ bhavati bhūpate || 18||
kāraṇaṃ yastu bhogasya dehinaḥ sukhaduḥkhayoḥ |
tasmādanekajanmotthasaṃcitānāṃ ca karmaṇām || 19||
madhye vegaḥ samāyāti kasyacitkālapākataḥ |
tatprārabdhavaśātpuṇyaṃ karoti ca yathā tathā || 20||
pāpaṃ karoti manujastathā devādayo'pi ca |
tathā nārāyaṇo rājannaraśca dharmajāvubhau || 21 ||
jāto kṛṣṇārjuno kāmamaṃśī nārāyaṇasya to |
purāṇapīṭhikeyaṃ vai munibhiḥ parikīrtitā || 22 ||
devāṃśaḥ sa tu vijñeyo yo bhavedvibhavādhikaḥ |
nānṛṣiḥ kurute kāvyaṃ nārudro rudramarcate ||23||
nādevāṃśo dadātyannaṃ nāviṣṇuḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ |
indrādagneryamādviṣṇordhanadāditi bhūpate ||24||
prabhutvaṃ ca prabhāvaṃ ca kopaṃ caiva parākramam |
ādāya kriyate nūnaṃ śarīramiti niśvayaḥ || 25 |
yaḥ kaścidbalavā~lloke bhāgyavānatha bhogavān |
vidyāvāndānavāna vā'pi sa devāṃśaḥ prapaṭhyate ||26||
tathaivètaṃ mamākhyātāḥ pāṃḍavāḥ pṛthivīpate |
devāṃśo vāsudevo'pi nārāyaṇasamadyutiḥ ||27||
śarīraṃ prāṇināṃ nūnaṃ bhājanaṃ sukhaduḥkhayoḥ |
śarīrī prāpnuyātkāmaṃ sukhaṃ duḥkhamanaṃtaram ||28||
dehī nāsti vaśaḥ ko'pi daivādhīnaḥ sadaiva hi |
jananaṃ maraṇaṃ duḥkhaṃ sukhaṃ prāpnoti cāvaśaḥ ||29||
pāṃḍavāste vane jātāḥ prāptāstu svagṛhaṃ punaḥ |
svavāṃhubalataḥ paścādrājasūyaṃ kratūttamam ||30||

banavāsaṃ punaḥ prāptā bahuduḥkhakaraṃ param |
arjunena tapastaptaṃ duṣkaraṃ hyajiteṃdriyaiḥ || 31 ||
saṃtuṣṭaistu surairdattaṃ varadānaṃ punaḥ śubham |
naradehakṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ kva gataṃ vanavāsajam ||32||
naradehe tapastaptaṃ cograṃ badarikāśrame |
nārjunasya śarīre tatphaladaṃ saṃbabhūva ha ||33||
prāṇināṃ dehasambandhe gahanā karmaṇo gatiḥ |
dujñeyā sarvathā devairmānavānāṃ tu kā kathā ||34||
vāsudevo'pi saṃjāta: kārāgāre'tisaṃkaṭe |
nīto'sau vasudevena naṃdagopasya gokulam ||35||
ekādaśaiva varṣāṇi saṃsthitastatra bhārata |
punaḥ sa mathurāṃ gatvā jaghānograsutaṃ balāt ||36||
mocayāmāsa pitarī baṃdhanādbhṛśaduḥkhitau |
ugrasenaṃ ca rājānaṃ cakāra mathurāpure || 37||
jagāma dvāravatyāṃ sa mleccharājabhayātpunaḥ |
sarvaṃ bhāvivaśātkṛṣṇaḥ kṛtavānpauruṣaṃ mahat || 38||
kṛtvā kāryāṇyanekāni dvāravatyāṃ janārdanaḥ |
dehaṃ tyaktvā prabhāse tu sakuṭumbo divaṃ gataḥ ||39|
putrāḥ pautrāśca suhṛdo bhrātaro jāmayastathā |
prabhāse yādavāḥ sarve vipraśāpatkṣayaṃ gatāḥ || 40 ||
evaṃ te kathitā rājankarmaṇo gahanā gatiḥ |
vāsudevo'pi vyādhasya bāṇena nidhanaṃ gataḥ || 41 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ || 10 ||
athaikādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
bhārāvataraṇārthāya kathitaṃ janma kṛṣṇayoḥ |
saṃśayo'yaṃ dvijaśreṣṭha hṛdaye mama tiṣṭati || 1 ||
pṛthivī gosvarūpeṇa brahmāṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ gatā |
dvāparāṃte'tidīnārtā gurubhāraprapīḍitā ||2||
vedhasā prārthito viṣṇuḥ kamalāpatirīśvaraḥ |
bhūbhārottaraṇārthāya sādhūnāṃ rakṣaṇāya ca ||3||
bhagavānbhārate khaṇḍe devaiḥ saha janārdanaḥ |
avatāraṃ gṛhāṇāśu vasudevagṛhe vibho ||4||
evaṃ saṃprārthito dhātrā bhagavāndevakīsutaḥ |
babhūva saha rāmeṇa bhūbhārottāraṇāya vai ||5||
kiyānuttārito bhāro hatvā duṣṭānanekaśaḥ |
jñātvā sarvāndurācānpāpabuddhinṛpāniha || 6 ||
hato bhīṣmo hato droṇo virāṭo drupadastathā |
bāhlīka: somadattaśca karṇo vaikartanastathā ||7||
yairlaṇṭhitaṃ dhanaṃ savaṃ hṛtāśca hariyoṣitaḥ |
kathaṃ na nāśitā duṣṭā ye sthitāḥ pṛthivītale ||8||
ābhīrāśca śakāmlecchāniṣādā koṭiśastathā |
bhārāvataraṇaṃ kintatkṛtaṃ kṛṣṇena dhīmatā || 9 ||
saṃdeho'yaṃ mahābhāga na nivartati cittataḥ |
kalāvasminprajāḥ sarvāḥ paśyataḥ pāpaniścayāḥ ||10||
vyāsa uvāca
rājan yasminyuge yādṛkprajā bharvāta kālataḥ |
nānyathā tadbhavennūnaṃ yugadharmo'tra kāraṇam ||11||
ye dharmarasikā jīvāste vai satyayuge'bhavan |
dharmārtharasikā ye tu te vai tretāyuge'bhavan ||12||

śrīmadevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe adhvānaḥ 11
dharmārthakāma rasikā dvāpare cābhavan yuge |
arthakāmaparāḥ sarve kalāvasminbhavanti hi || 13|| 3
yugadharmastu rājendra na yāti vyatyayaṃ punaḥ |
kālaḥ kartāsti dharmasya dharmasya ca vai punaḥ || 14||
rājobāca
te tu satyayuge jīvā bhavaṃti dharmatatparāḥ |
kutra te'dya mahābhāga tiṣṭhati puṇyabhāginaḥ || 15 ||
tretāyuge dvāpare vā ye dānavatakārakāḥ |
vartante munayaḥ śreṣṭhāḥ kutra brūhi pitāmaha || 16 ||
kalāvadya durācārā ye'tra santi gatatrapāḥ |
ādyaṃ yuge kva yāsyati pāpiṣṭhā debanindakāḥ || 17||
etatsavaṃ samācakṣva samācakṣva vistareṇa mahāmate |
sarvathā śrotukāmo'smi yadetaddharmanirṇayam || 18 || }
vyāsa uvāca
te vai kṛtayuge rājansaṃbhavatīha mānavāḥ |
kṛtvā te puṇyakarmāṇi devalokān vrajaṃti vai || 19 ||
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāḥ śūdrāśca nṛpasattama |
svadharmaniratā yāṃti lokānkarmajitānkila ||20||
satyaṃ dayā tathā dānaṃ svadāragamanaṃ tathā |
adrohaḥ sarvabhūteṣu samatā sarvajantuṣu ||21||
etatsādhāraṇaṃ dharmaṃ kṛtvā satyayuge punaḥ |
svarga yāṃtītare varṇā dharmato rajakādayaḥ || 22||
tathā tretāyuge rājandvāpare'tha yuge tathā |
kalāvasminyuge pāpā narakaṃ yāṃti mānavāḥ || 23 |
tāvattiṣṭhanti te tatra yāvatsyādyugaparyayaḥ |
punaśca mānuṣe loke bhavanti bhuvi mānavāḥ ||24||
yadā satyayugasyādiḥ kaleraṃtaśca pārthiva |
tadā svargātpuṇyakṛto jāyante kila mānavāḥ || 25 ||
yadā kaliyugasyādidvaparasya kṣayastathā |
narakātpāpinaḥ sarve bhavanti bhuvi mānavāḥ ||26||
evaṃ kālasamācāro nānyathā'bhūtkadācana |
tasmātkalirasatkartā tasmiṃstu tādṛśī prajā ||27||
kadāciddevayogāttu prāṇināṃ vyatyayo bhavet |
kalau ye sādhavaḥ kecidvāpare saṃbhavanti te || 28 ||
tathā tretāyuge kecitkecitsatyayuge tathā |
duṣṭāḥ satyayuge ye tu te bhavaṃti kalāvapi || 29 ||
kṛtakarmaprabhāveṇa prāptu tyasukhāni ca |
punaśca tādṛśaṃ karma kurvanti yugabhāvataḥ ||30||
janamejaya uvāca
yugadharmānmahābhāga brūhi sarvānaśeṣataḥ |
yasminvai yādṛśo dharmo jñātumicchāmi taṃ tathā || 31||
vyāsa uvāca
nibodha nṛpaśārdūla dṛṣṭāṃtaṃ te bravīmyaham |
sādhūnāmapi cetāṃsi yugabhāvādbhavati hi ||32||
pituryathā te rājendra buddhiviprāvahelane |
kṛtā vai kalinā rājandharmajñasya mahātmanaḥ ||33||
anyathā kṣatriyo rājā yathātikulasaṃbhavaḥ |
tāpasasya gale sarpa mṛtaṃ kasmādayojayat ||34|
sabaṃ yugabalaṃ rājan veditavyaṃ vijānatā |
prayatnena hi kartavyaṃ dharmakarma viśeṣataḥ || 35||
nūnaṃ satyayuge rājanbrāhmaṇā vedapāragāḥ |
parāśaktyacanaratā devīdarśanalālasāḥ || 36 ||

nāvatrīpraṇavāsaktā gāyatrīdhyānakāriṇaḥ |
gāyatrī japasaṃsaktā māyābījaikajāpinaḥ || 37 ||
grāme grāme parāmbāyāḥ prāsādakaraṇotsukāḥ |
svakarmaniratāḥ sarve satyaśaucadayānvitāḥ ||38||
śrayyuktakarmaniratāstattvajñānaviśāradāḥ |
abhavankṣatriyāstatra prajābharaṇatatparāḥ ||39||
vaiśyāstu kṛṣibāṇijyagosevāniratāstathā |
śūdrāḥ sevāparāstatra puṇye satyayuge nṛpa || 40 ||
parāmbāpūjanāsaktāḥ sarve varṇāḥ pare yuge |
tathā tretāyuge kiñcinnyūnā dharmasya saṃsthitiḥ ||41||
dvāpare ca viśeṣeṇa nyūnā satyayugasthitiḥ |
pūrvaṃ ye rākṣasā rājaṃste kalau brāhmaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ || 42 ||
pākhaṇḍaniratā: prāyo bhavanti janavañcakāḥ |
asatyavādinaḥ sarve vedadharmavivarjitāḥ || 43 ||
dāmbhikā lokacaturā mānino vedabajitāḥ |
śūdrasevāparāḥ kecinnānādharmapravartakāḥ || 44 ||
vedanindākarāḥ krūrā dharma bhraṣṭātibādukāḥ |
yathā yathā kalirvṛddhi yāti rājaṃstathā tathā ||45||
dharmasya satyamūlasya kṣayaḥ sarvātmanā bhavet |
tathaiva kṣatriyā vaiśyāḥ śūdrāśva dharmavarjitāḥ || 46 ||
basatyavādinaḥ pāpāstathā barṇetarāḥ kalau |
śūdradharmaratā viprāḥ pratigrahaparāyaṇāḥ || 47||
bhaviṣyanti kalau rājan yuge vṛddhiṃ gatāḥ kila |
kāmacārāḥ striyaḥ kāmalobhamohasamanvitāḥ || 48 ||
pāpā mithyābhivādinyaḥ sadā kleśaratā nṛpa |
svabhartṛvañcakā nityaṃ dharmabhāṣaṇapaṇḍitāḥ || 49 ||
bhavantyevaṃvidhā nāryaḥ pāpiṣṭhāśca kalau yuge |
āhāraśuddhayā nṛpate cittaśuddhistu jāyate || 50 ||
śuddhe citte prakāśaḥ syāddharmasya nṛpasattama |
vṛttasaṃkaradoṣeṇa jāyate dharmasaṃkaraḥ || 51 ||
dharmasya saṃkare jāte nūnaṃ syādvarṇasaṃkaraḥ |
evaṃ kaliyuge bhūpa sarvadharmavivarjite || 52 ||
svarṇadharmavārteṣā na kutrāpyupalabhyate |
mahānto'pi ca dharmaṃjñā aghamaṃ kurvate nṛpa ||53||
kalisvabhāva evaiṣa parihāryo na kenacit ||54 ||
niṣkṛtirna hi rājendra sāmānyopāyato bhavet |
janamejaya uvāca
bhagavansarvadharmajña sarvaśāstraviśārada ||55||
kalāvadharmabahule narāṇāṃ kā gatirbhavet |
yadyasti tadupāyaveyayā taṃ vadasva me ||56||
vyāsa uvāca
eka eva mahārāja tatropāyo'sti nāparaḥ |
sarvadoṣa nirāsārthaṃ vyāyedevīpadāmbujam ||57||
na saṃtyaghāni tāvaṃti yāvatī śaktirasti hi |
nāmni devyāḥ pāpadāhe tasmādbhītiḥ kuto nṛpa 58 ||
avaśenāpi yannāma līlayoccāritaṃ yadi |
kiṃ kiṃ dadāti tajjñātuṃ samarthā na harādayaḥ || 59 ||
prāyaścittaṃ tu pāpānāṃ śrīdevonāmasaṃsmṛtiḥ |
tasmātkalibhayādrājanpuṇyakṣetre vasannaraḥ || 60 ||
nirantaraṃ parāmbāyā nāmasaṃsmaraṇaṃ caret |
chittvā bhitvā ca bhūtāni hatvā sarvamidaṃ jagat ||

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 12
devīṃ namati bhaktyā yo na sa pāpairvilipyate |
rahasyaṃ sarvaśāstrāṇāṃ mayā rājannudīritam || 62||
vimṛśyaitadaśeṣeṇa bhaja devīpadāṃbujam |
ajapāṃ nāma gāyatrī japaṃti nikhilā janāḥ || 63||
mahimānaṃ na jānaṃti māyāyā vaibhavaṃ mahat |
gāyatrī brāhmaṇāḥ sarve japaṃti hṛdayāṃtare || 64||
mahimānaṃ na jānaṃti māyāyā vaibhavaṃ mahat | etatsarvaṃ samākhyātaṃ yatpṛṣṭaṃ tattvayā nṛpa |
yugadharmavyavasthāyāṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 65 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 11 ||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
rājovāca
tīrthāni bhuvi puṇyāni brūhi me munisattama |
gamyāni mānavairdevaiḥ kṣetrāṇi saritastathā || 1 ||
phalaṃ ca yādṛśaṃ yatra tīrtheṣu snānadānataḥ |
vidhi tu tīrthayātrāyāṃ niyamāśca viśeṣataḥ ||2||
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi tīrthāni vividhāni ca |
yeṣu tīrtheṣu devīnāṃ praśastānyayanāni ca || 3 ||
nadīnāṃ jāhnavī śreṣṭā yamunā ca sarasvatī |
narmadā gaṃḍako siṃdhurgomatī tamasā tathā ||4||
kāberī caṃdrabhāgā ca puṇyā vetravatī śubhā |
carmaṇvatī ca sarayūstāpī sābhramatī tathā || 5 ||
etāśca kathitā rājannanyāśca śataśaḥ punaḥ |
tāsāṃ samudragāḥ puṇyāḥ svalpapuṇyā hyanabdhigāḥ ||
samudragānāṃ tāḥ puṇyāḥ sarvadaughavahāstu yāḥ |
māsadvayaṃ śrāvaṇādau tāśca sarvā rajasvalāḥ || 7||
bhavaṃti vṛṣṭiyogena grāmyavārivahāstathā |
puṣkaraṃ ca kurukṣetraṃ dharmāraṇyaṃ supāvanam ||8||
prabhāsaṃ ca prayāgaṃ ca naimiṣāraṇyameva ca |
viśrutaṃ cārbudāraṇyaṃ śailā pāvanāstathā || 9||
śrīśailaśca sumeruśca parvato gaṃdhamādanaḥ |
sarāṃsi caiva puṇyāni mānasaṃ sarvaviśrutam ||10||
tathā vindusaraḥ śreṣṭhamacchodaṃ nāma pāvanam |
āśramāstu tathā puṇyā munīnāṃ bhāvitātmanām ||
viśrutastu sadā puṇyaḥ khyāto badarikāśramaḥ |
naranārāyaṇau yatra tepāte to munī tapaḥ ||12||
vāmanāśrama ākhyātaḥ śatayūpāśramastathā |
yena yatra tapastaptaṃ tasya nāmnā'tiviśrute || 13 ||
evaṃ puṇyāni sthānāni hyasaṃkhyātāni bhūtale |
munibhiḥ parigītāni pāvanāni mahīpate || 14||
eṣu sthāneṣu sarvatra devīsthānāni bhūpate |
darśanātpāpahārīṇi vasaṃti niyamena ca || 15 ||
kathayiṣyāmi tānyagre prasaṃgena ca kānicit |
tīrthāni nṛpa dānāni vratāni ca makhāstathā ||
tapāṃsi puṇyakarmāṇi sāpekṣāṇi mahīpate |
dravyaśuddhi kriyāśuddhi manaḥ śuddhimapekṣya ca || 17 ||
pāvanāni hi tīrthāni tapāṃsi ca vratāni ca |
kadā cidravyaśuddhiḥ syātkriyāśuddhiḥ kadācana 18 ||

durlabhā manasaḥ śuddhiḥ sarveṣāṃ sarvadā nṛpa |
manastu caṃcalaṃ rājannanekaviṣayāśritam ||19||
kathaṃ śuddhaṃ bhavedrājannānābhāvasamāśritam |
kāmakrodhau tathā lobho hyahaṃkāro madastathā || 20 ||
sarvavighnakarā hyete tapastīrthavrateṣu ca |
ahiṃsā satyamasteyaṃ śaucamidriyanigrahaḥ || 21||
svadharmapālanaṃ rājansarvatīrthaphalapradam |
nityakarmaparityāgānmārge saṃsargadoṣataḥ ||22||
vyartha tīrthādhigamanaṃ pāpamevāvaśiṣyate |
kṣālayaṃti hi tīrthāni sarvathā dehajaṃ malam ||23||
mānasaṃ kṣālituṃ tāni na samarthāni vai nṛpa |
śaktāni yadi cettāni gaṃgātīranivāsinaḥ ||24||
munayo drohasaṃyuktāḥ kathaṃ syurbhāviteśvarāḥ |
vasiṣṭhasadṛśāḥ prahvā viśvāmitrādayaḥ kila ||25||
rāgadveṣaratāḥ sarve kāmakrodhākulāḥ sadā |
cittaśuddhimayaṃ tīrthaṃ gaṃgādibhyo'tipāvanam ||26||
yadi syāddaivayogena kṣālayatyāṃtaraṃ malam |
viśeṣeṇa tu satsaṃgo jñānaniṣṭhasya bhūpate ||27||
na vedā na ca śāstrāṇi na vratāni tapāṃsi na |
na makhā na ca dānāni cittaśuddhestu kāraṇam ||28||
vasiṣṭho brahmaṇaḥ putro vedavidyāviśāradaḥ |
rāgadveṣānvitaḥ kāmaṃ gaṃgātīrasamāśritaḥ ||29|
āḍībakaṃ mahāyuddhaṃ viśvāmitravasiṣṭhayoḥ |
jātaṃ nirarthakaṃ dveṣāddevānāṃ vismayapradam ||30||
viśvāmitro bakastatra jātaḥ paramatāmasaḥ |
śaptaḥ sa tu vasiṣṭhena hariścaṃdrasya kāraṇāt ||31||
kauśikena vasiṣṭo'pi śaptvā''ḍī dehabhāvakṛtaḥ |
śāpādāḍībako jāto to munī viśadaprabho ||32||
nivāsaṃ prāpatustīre tāpasī dharmatatparī |
cakraturdāruṇaṃ yuddhaṃ nakhacaṃcupratāḍanaiḥ ||33||
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ yāvattāvṛṣī roṣasaṃyutau |
yuyudhāte madonmatto siṃhāviva parasparam || 34 ||
rājovāca
kathaṃ to muniśārdūlau tāpasau dharmatatparau |
parasparaṃ vairaparī saṃjātau kena hetunā || 35||
śāpaṃ parasparaṃ kena kāraṇena mahāmatī |
dattavaṃtau mithaḥ kleśakārakau duḥkhado nṛṇām ||36||
vyāsa uvāca
hariścaṃdro nṛpaśreṣṭhastriśaṃkutanayaḥ purāḥ |
babhūva ravivaṃśīyo rāmacaṃdrasya pūrvajaḥ ||37||
anapatyaḥ sa rājarṣirvaruṇāya mahākratum |
pratiyajñe putrakāmo naramedhaṃ durāsadam ||38||
varuṇastasya saṃtuṣṭo yajñasya niyame kṛte |
dadhāra garbha rājñastu bhāryā paramasuṃdarī ||39||
rājā babhūva saṃtuṣṭo dṛṣṭvā bhāryāṃ sadohadām |
cakāra vidhivatkarma garbhasaṃskārakārakam ||40||
suṣuve tanayaṃ nārī sarvalakṣaṇasaṃyutam |
mudaṃ prāpa nṛpastatra putre jāte viśāṃpate ||41 ||
kṛtavāñjatakarmādi saṃskāravidhimuttamam |
dadau hiraṇyaṃ gā dogdharbrāhmaṇebhyāṃ viśeṣataḥ || 42 ||
janmotsave'tisaṃvṛtte gehe vai yādasāṃ patiḥ |
ājagāma mahārāja vipraveṣadharastathā ||43||
pūjitaḥ pārthivenātha dattvā vidhivadāsanam |
kārye pṛṣṭe'bravīdvākyaṃ varuṇo'smīti bhūpatim ||44||

kuru yajñaṃ sutaṃ kṛtvā paśuṃ paramapāvanam |
satyavāgbhava rājeṃdra saṃkalpastu tvayā kṛtaḥ || 45 ||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ rājā vihvalo'tivyathākulaḥ |
saṃstabhyādhiṃ nṛpaḥ prāha varuṇaṃ satkṛtāṃjaliḥ||46 ||
svāminkaromi taṃ yajñaṃ sarvathā vidhipūrvakam |
mayā te yatpratijñātaṃ bhavāmi satyavāgaham ||47||
pūrṇe māse viśuddhayeta dharmapatnī surottama |
viśuddhāyāṃ tu bhāryāyāṃ kartavyaḥ sapaśurmakhaḥ || 48 ||
vyāsa uvāca
ityukte vacane rājñā varuṇaḥ svagṛhaṃ gataḥ |
rājā babhūva saṃtuṣṭaḥ kiṃciccitāturastathā ||49||
pūrṇe māsi punaḥ pāśo parīkṣārthaṃ nṛpālaye |
ājagāma dvijo bhūtvā suveṣaḥ suṣṭhubhāṣakaḥ ||50||
kṛtārhaṇaṃ sukhāsīnaṃ bhūpatistaṃ surottamam |
uvāca vinayopeto hetugarbhaṃ vacastadā || 51 ||
asaṃskṛtaṃ sutaṃ svāmin yūpe badhnāmi taṃ katham |
saṃskṛtya kṣatriyaṃ kṛtvā yaje'haṃ yajñamuttamam ||52||
dayase yadi deva tvaṃ jñātvā dīnaṃ svasevakam |
asaṃskṛtasya bālasya nādhikāro'sti kutracit ||
baruṇa uvāca
pratārayasi rājeṃdra kṛtvā samayamagrataḥ |
dustyajastava jānāmi sutasneho hyaputriṇaḥ || 54 ||
gṛhaṃ vrajāmi bhūpāla vacanāttava komalāt |
kiyatkālaṃ pratīkṣyāhabhāgamiṣyāmi te gṛham || 55 ||
bhavitavyaṃ tvayā tāta tadā satyavaco'nvitam ||56||
rājobāca
samāvartana karmānta sarvathā yādasāṃpate |
kṛtvā putrapaśuṃ yajñe yajiṣye vidhipūrvakam ||57||
vyāsa uvāca
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ rājño varuṇaḥ prītamānasaḥ |
tathetyuktvā yayau tūrṇaṃ nṛpastu susthito'bhavat ||58||
rohitākhya iti khyātaḥ sutastasya vivṛddhimān |
saṃjātaścaturaḥ sarvavidyānāṃ ca viśāradaḥ || 59 ||
yajñasya kāraṇaṃ tena jñātaṃ sarvaṃ savistaram |
bhayabhītastataḥ so'pi mattvā maraṇamātmanaḥ || 60||
kṛtvā palāyanaṃ vīro gato'sau girigahvare |
agamye nṛpatisthāne sthitastatra bhayāturaḥ || 61 ||
prāpte kāle'tha varuṇo yajñārthī nṛpatergṛham |
gatvā tamāha bhūpālaṃ kuru yajñaṃ viśāṃpate ||62 ||
pramlānavadano rājā tamāha vyathiteṃdriyaḥ |
kiṃ karomi gataḥ kvāpi suto me surasattama || 63 ||
śrutvā tadvacanaṃ rājñaḥ kupito yā sāṃpatiḥ |
śaśāpa taṃ nṛpaṃ kopādasatyavādinaṃ bhṛśam || 64 ||
jalodarābhidho vyādhirdehe bhavatu te nṛpa |
yataḥ pratāritaścāhaṃ kṛtvā kapaṭapaṃḍita || 65||
iti śaptvā yayo dhāma svakaṃ pāśaparastadā |
rājā ciṃtāturastasthau bhavane vyādhipīḍitaḥ ||66||
yadā'tivyādhito rājā rogeṇa śāpajena ha |
tadā śuśrāva putro'pi pitaraṃ vyādhipīḍitam || 67||
pāṃthikaḥ prāha putraṃ hi pitā te bhṛśaduḥkhitaḥ |
jalodara vikāreṇa śāpajena nṛpātmaja || 68 ||

vinaṣṭaṃ jīvitaṃ te'dya vṛthājātasya durmate |
yattyaktvā pitaraṃ duḥsthaṃ prāpto'si girigahvaram 69 ||
kimanena śarīreṇa prāptaṃ te janmanaḥ phalam |
dehadaṃ duḥkhitaṃ kṛtvā sthito'syatra sutādhama || 70 || |||70 ||
prāṇāstyājyāḥ pituḥ kārye satputreṇeti niścayaḥ |
tvadarthe duḥkhito rājā kaṃdati vyādhipīḍitaḥ || 71 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tadākarṇya vacastathyaṃ pāṃthikāddharmasaṃyutam |
yadā cakre mano gaṃtuṃ draṣṭuṃ tātaṃ vyathāturam ||72 ||
tadā vipravapurbhūtvā vāsavastamupāgamat |
rahaḥ prāha hitaṃ vākyaṃ dayāvāniva bhārata ||73||
mūrkho'si rājaputra tvaṃ gamanāya matiṃ vṛthā |
karoṣi pitaraṃ tvadya na jānāsi vyathāyutam || 74||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ṣaṣṭhaskandhe dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12 ||
atha trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
indra uvāca
sāhasaṃ kṛtavān rājā pūrvaṃ yatkathito makhaḥ |
varuṇāya pratijñātaḥ putraṃ kṛtvā paśuṃ priyam || 1||
gate tvayi pitā putraṃ baddhvā yūpe'ghṛṇaḥ punaḥ |
paśuṃ kṛtvā mahābuddhe vadhiṣyati vyathāturaḥ || 2||
itthaṃ niṣiddhastatputraḥ śakreṇāmitatejasā |
sthitastatraiva māyeśīmāyayā mohito bhṛśam ||3||
yadā punaḥ punaḥ śrutvā pitaraṃ rogapīḍitam |
gamanāya matiṃ cakre tadeṃdra: pratyaṣedhayat ||4||
hariścandro'tiduḥkhārtaḥ papraccha gurumaṃtike |
sthitaṃ vasiṣṭhamekānte sarvajñaṃ hitatatparam || 5 ||
rājovāca
bhagavankiṃ karomyadya kātaro'smi vyathākulaḥ |
trāhi māṃ duḥkhamanasaṃ mahāvyādhibhayāturam || 6||
vasiṣṭha uvāca
śṛṇu rājannupāyo'sti roganāśaṃ prati stutaḥ |
trayodaśavidhāḥ putrāḥ kathitā dharmasaṃgrahe || 7 ||
tasmātkrītaṃ sutaṃ kṛtvā yajasva makhamuttamam |
dravyaṃ dattvā yathoddiṣṭamānayasva dvijottamam ||8||
evaṃ kṛte makhe bhūpa roganāśo bhaviṣyati |
varuṇo'pi prasannātmā bhaviṣyati yathāsukham ||9||
vyāsa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā rājā provāca maṃtriṇam |
anveṣaya mahābuddhe viṣayeṣvatiyatnataḥ || 10 ||
kadācitko'pi lobhārthī dadāti svasutaṃ pitā |
samānaya dhanaṃ dattvā yāvatprārthayate'pyasī ||11||
sarvathaiva samāneyo yajñārthe dvijabālakaḥ |
na kāryā kṛpaṇā buddhistvayā matkāryahetave || 12 ||
prārthanīyastvayā putraḥ kasyaciddijavādinaḥ |
dravyeṇa dehi yajñārthaṃ kartavyo'sau paśuḥ kila ||13||
iti saṃcoditastena sacivaḥ kāryahetave |
anveṣayāmāsa pure grāme grāme gṛhe gṛhe || 14 ||

evamanveṣatastasya viṣaye kaśvidāturaḥ |
nirdhanastrisutaścāsīdajīgarteti nāmataḥ || 15||
tasya putraṃ śunaḥśepaṃ madhyamaṃ maṃtrisattamaḥ |
ānayāmāsa dattvārthaṃ prārthitaṃ taddhanaṃ tadā || 16||
samānīya śunaḥśepaṃ sacivaḥ kāryatatparaḥ |
rājñe nivedayāmāsa paśuyogyaṃ dvijātmajam ||17||
rājā'timuditastena viprānānīya sarvataḥ |
kārayāmāsa saṃbhārān yajñārthaṃ vedavittamān || 18 ||
prārabdhe tu makhe tatra viśvāmitro mahāmuniḥ |
baddhaṃ dṛṣṭvā śunaḥśepaṃ niṣiṣedha nṛpaṃ tadā || 19||
rājanmā sāhasaṃ kārṣīrmucainaṃ dvijabālakam |
prārthayāmyahamāyuṣmansukhaṃ te'dya bhaviṣyati ||20||
krandatyayaṃ śunaḥśepaḥ karuṇā māṃ dunotyapi |
dayāvānbhava rājeṃdra kuru me vacanaṃ nupa ||21||
paradehasya rakṣāyai svadehaṃ ye dayāparāḥ |
dadati kṣatriyāḥ pūrvaṃ svargakāmāḥ śucivratāḥ || 22||
taṃ svadehasya rakṣārthaṃ haṃsi dvijasutaṃ balāt |
pā mā kuru rājeṃdra dayāvānbhava bālake ||23||
sarveṣāṃ sadṛśī prītirdehe vetsi svayaṃ nṛpa |
muṃcainaṃ bālakaṃ tasmātpramāṇaṃ yadi me vacaḥ ||24||
vyāsa uvāca
anādṛtya ca tadrākyaṃ rājā duḥkhāturo bhṛśam |
na mumoca munistasmai cukopātīva tāpasaḥ || 25 ||
upadeśaṃ dadau tasmai śunaḥśepāya kauśikaḥ |
maṃtra pāśadharasyātha dayāvānvedavittamaḥ || 26||
śunaḥśepo'pi taṃ maṃtramasakṛdrdharkāśitaḥ |
plutasvareṇa cukrośa saṃsmaran varuṇaṃ bhuśam || 27||
stuvaṃtaṃ muniputraṃ taṃ jñātvā vai yādasāṃ patiḥ |
tatrāgatya śunaḥśeṣaṃ mumoca karuṇārṇavaḥ ||28||
rogahīnaṃ nṛpaṃ kṛtvā varuṇaḥ svagṛhaṃ yayau |
viśvāmitrastu taṃ putraṃ kṛtavānmocitaṃ mṛteḥ || 29||
na kṛtaṃ vacanaṃ rājñā kauśikasya mahātmanaḥ |
roṣaṃ dadhāra manavā rājopari sa gādhijaḥ ||30||
ekasminsamaye rājā hayārūḍho vanaṃ gataḥ |
sūkaraṃ hetukāmastu madhyāhne kauśikītaṭe ||31||
vṛddhabrāhmaṇaveṣeṇa viśvāmitreṇa vaṃcitaḥ |
sarvasvaṃ prārthitaṃ tasya gṛhītaṃ rājyamadbhutam ||32||
pīḍito'sau hariścandro yajamāno yato bhṛśam |
vasiṣṭhaḥ kauśikaṃ prāha vane prāptaṃ yadṛcchayā ||33||
kṣatriyādhama durbuddhe vṛthā brāhmaṇaveṣabhṛt |
bakadharma vṛthā kiṃ tvaṃ garva vahasi dāṃbhika ||34||
kasmāttvayā nṛpaśreṣṭho yajamāno mamāpyasau |
aparādhaṃ binā jālma gamito du:khamadbhutam ||35||
kaṣyānaparo yasmāttasmāttvaṃ vai vako bhava |
iti śapto vasiṣṭena kauśikaḥ prāha taṃ punaḥ || 36 ||
tvamapyāḍirbhavāyuṣmanbako'haṃ yāvadeva hi |
evaṃ parasparaṃ dattvā śāpaṃ to krodhapīḍitau ||37||
vyāsa uvāca
aṃḍajau tarasā jāto sarasyāḍobako munī |
ekasminpādape nīḍaṃ kṛtvā'sau bakarūpabhāk || 38||
viśvāmitraḥ sthitastatra divye sarasi mānase |
anyasminpādape kṛtvā vasiṣṭho nīḍamuttamam ||39||

āḍīrūpagharastasthāvanyonyaṃ dveṣatatparau |
dine dine to saṃgrāmaṃ cakratuḥ krodhasaṃyutī || 40 ||
duḥkhadaṃ sarvalokānāṃ kraṃdamānāvubhau bhṛśam |
caṃcupakṣaprahāraistu nakhāghātaiḥ parasparam ||41||
jaghnatu rūdhiraklinnau puṣpitāviva kiṃśukau |
evaṃ bahūni varṣāṇi pakṣirūpadharau munī ||42||
sthitau tatra mahārāja śāpapāśena yaṃtritau |
rājovāca
kathaṃ mukto muniśreṣṭhau śāpādvasiṣṭhakauśiko ||43||
tanmamācakṣva viprarṣe paraṃ kautūhalaṃ hi me |
vyāsa uvāca
yudhyamānāvubhau dṛṣṭvā brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ ||44||
tatrājagāmānimiṣairvṛtaḥ sarvairdayāparaiḥ |
tāvāśvāsya jagatkartā yuddhato vinivārya ca || 45 ||
śāpaṃ saṃmocayāmāsa tayoḥ kṣiptaṃ parasparam |
