mayā devī tu sā bhāryā vikrītā koṭisammitaiḥ ||47||
niṣkaiḥ putro rohitokhyo vikrīto'rbudasaṃkhyayā |
vipraikādaśa koṭyastvaṃ suvarṇasya gṛhāṇa me || 48 ||
sūta uvāca
tadvittaṃ svalpamālakṣya dāravikrayasaṃbhavam |
śokābhibhūtaṃ rājānaṃ kupitaḥ kauśiko'bravīt 49 ||
ṛṣiruvāca
rājasūyasya yajñasya naiṣā bhavati dakṣiṇā |
anyadutpādaya kṣipraṃ saṃpūrṇā yena sā bhavet || 50 ||
kṣatrabaṃdho mamemāṃ tvaṃ sadṛśīṃ yadi dakṣiṇām |
manyase tarhi tatkṣipraṃ paśya tvaṃ me paraṃ balam ||51||
tapaso'sya sutaptasya brāhmaṇasyāmalasya ca |
matprabhāvasya cograsya śuddhasyādhyayanasya ca ||52||
rājovāca
anyaddāsyāmi bhagavankālaḥ kaścitpratīkṣyatām |
adhunaivāsti vikrītā patnī putraśca bālakaḥ || 53||
viśvāmitra uvāca
caturbhāgaḥ sthito yo'yaṃ divasasya narāvipa |
eṣa eva pratīkṣyo me vaktavyaṃ nottaraṃ tvayā || 54 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 22||
atha trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tamevamuktvā rājānaṃ nirghṛṇaṃ niṣṭhuraṃ vacaḥ |
tadādāya dhanaṃ pūrṇa kupita kauśiko yathau ||1||

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 23
viśvāmitraṃ gate rājā tataḥ śokamupāgataḥ |
śvāsocchvāsaṃ muhuḥ kṛtvā provācoccairadhomukhaḥ 2 ||
vittakrītena yasyātirmayā pretena gacchati |
sa bravītu tvarāyukto yo me tiṣṭhati bhāskaraḥ || 3||
athājagāma tvarito dharmāṃḍālarūpadhṛk |
durgandho vikṛtoraska: maśrulo daṃturo'ghṛṇī ||4||
kṛṣṇo laṃbodaraḥ snigdhaḥ karālaḥ puruṣādhamaḥ |
hastajarjarayaṣṭiśva śavamālyairalaṃkṛtaḥ ||5||
cāṇḍāla uvāca
ahaṃ gṛhṇāmi dāsatve bhṛtyārthaḥ sumahānmama |
kṣipramācakṣva maulyaṃ kimetatte saṃpradīyate ||6||
vyāsa uvāca
taṃ tādṛśamathālakṣya krūradṛṣṭiṃ sunirghṛṇam |
vadantamatiduḥśīlaṃ kastvamityāha pārthivaḥ ||7||
cāṇḍāla uvāca
cāṃḍālo'hamiha khyātaḥ pravīreti nṛpottama |
śāsane sarvadā tiṣṭha mṛtacailāpahārakaḥ ||8||
evamuktastadā rājā vacanaṃ cedamabravīt |
brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyo vāpi gṛhṇātviti matirmama || 9 ||
uttamasyottamo dharmā madhyamasya ca madhyamaḥ |
adhamasyādhamaścaiva iti prāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ || 10 ||
cāṇḍāla utrāca
evameva tvayā dharmaḥ kathito nṛpasattama |
avicāryaṃ tvayā rājannadhunoktaṃ mamāgrataḥ || 11 ||
vicārayitvā yo brūte so'bhīṣṭaṃ labhate naraḥ |
sāmānyameva tatproktamavicārya tvayā'natha || 12 ||
yadi satyaṃ pramāṇaṃ te gṛhīto'si na saṃśayaḥ |
hariścaṃdra uvāca
asatyānnara ke gacchetsadyaḥ krūre narādhamaḥ || 13 ||
tataścāṃḍālatā sādhvī na barā me hyasatyatā |
vyāsa uvāca
tasyaivaṃ vadataḥ prāpto viśvāmitrastaponidhiḥ || 14 ||
krodhāmarṣavivṛttākṣaḥ prāha cedaṃ narādhipam |
cāṃḍālo'yaṃ manaḥsthaṃ te dātuṃ vittamupasthitaḥ || 15 ||
kasmānna dīyate mahyamaśeṣā yajñadakṣiṇāḥ |
rājovāca
bhagavansūryavaṃśotyamātmānaṃ vedmi kauśika ||16||
kathaṃ cāṃḍaladāsatvaṃ gamiṣye vittakāmataḥ |
viśvāmitra uvāca
yadi cāṃḍālavittaṃ tvamātmavikrayajaṃ mama || 17 ||

ma pradāsyasi sahi śapsyāmi tvāmasaṃśayam |
cāṃḍālādathavā viprāddehi me dakṣiṇādhanam || 18||
binā cāṃḍālamadhunā nānyaḥ kaśviddhanapradaḥ |
dhanenāhaṃ vinā rājaśna yāsyāmi na saṃśayaḥ || 19||
idānīmeva me vitaṃ na pradāsyasi cennṛpa |
dine ghaṭikāśeṣe tattvāṃ śāpāgninā dahe ||20||
vyāsa uvāca
hariścandrastato rājā mṛtavacchritajīvitaḥ |
prasīdeti vadanpādau ṛṣerjagrāha vihvalaḥ || 21 ||
hariścaṃdra uvāca
dāso'syārto'smi dono'smi tvadbhaktaśca viśeṣataḥ |
prasādaṃ kuru viprarṣe kaṣṭaścāṃḍālasaṃkaraḥ || 22||
bhaveyaṃ vittaśeṣeṇa tava karmakaro'vaśaḥ |
tavaiva muniśārdūla preṣyaścittānuvartakaḥ || 23 ||
viśvāmitra uvāca
evamastu mahārāja mamaiva bhava kiṃkaraḥ |
kiṃtu madacanaṃ kāryaṃ sarvadaiva narādhipa || 24 ||
vyāsa uvāca
evamukte'tha vacane rājā harṣasamanvitaḥ |
amanyata punarjātamātmānaṃ prāha kauśikam || 25||
tavādeśaṃ kariṣyāmi sadaivāhaṃ na saṃśayaḥ |
ādeśaya dvijaśreṣṭha kiṃ karomi tavānagha ||26||
viśvāmitra uvāca
cāṃḍālāgaccha maddāsamaulyaṃ ki me prayacchasi |
gṛhāṇa dāsaṃ molyena mayā dattaṃ tavādhunā || 27||
nāsti dāsena se kāryaṃ vittāśā vartate mama |
vyāsa uvāca
evamukte tadā tena śvapaco hṛṣṭamānasaḥ ||28|
āgatya sannigho tūrṇaṃ viśvāmitramabhāṣata |
cāṃḍāla uvāca
daśayojanavistīrṇe prayāgasya ca maṇḍale ||29||
bhūmi ratnamayīṃ kṛtvā dāsye te'haṃ dvijottama |
asya vikrayaṇeneyamātiśca prahatā tvayā || 30 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tato ratnasahasrāṇi suvarṇamaṇimauktikaiḥ |
cāṃḍālena pradattāni jagrāha dvijasattamaḥ ||31||
hariścaṃdrastadā rājā nirvikāra mukho'bhavat |
amanyata tathā dhairyādviśvāmitro hi me patiḥ || 32||
tattadeva mayā kāryaṃ yadayaṃ kārayiṣyati |
ayāṃtarikṣe sahasā vāguvācāśarīriṇī ||33||
anṛṇo'si mahābhāga dattā sā dakṣiṇā tvayā |
tato divaḥ puṣpavṛṣṭiḥ papāta nṛpamūrdhani ||34||
sādhu sādhviti taṃ devāḥ procuḥ seṃdrā mahaujasaḥ |
harṣeṇa mahatāviṣṭo rājā kauśikamabravīt || 35 ||

ર śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 24
rājovāca
tvaṃ hi mātā pitā caiva tvaṃ hi baṃdhurmahāmate |
yadarthaṃ mocito'haṃ te kṣaṇāccaivānṛṇī kṛtaḥ || 36 ||
kiṃ karomi mahābāho śreyo me vacanaṃ tava |
evamukte tu vacane nṛpaṃ munirabhāṣata ||37||
viśvāmitra uvāca
cāṃḍālavacanaṃ kāryamadyaprabhṛti te nṛpa |
svasti te'stviti taṃ procya tadādāya dhanaṃ yayau ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate saptamaskandhe hariścandropākhyāne trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 23 ||
atha caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śaunaka uvāca
tataḥ kimakarodrājā cāṃḍālasya gṛhe gataḥ |
tadbrūhi sūtavarya tvaṃ pṛcchataḥ satvaraṃ hi me || 1 ||
sūta uvāca
viśvāmitre gate vipre śvapaco hṛṣṭamānasaḥ |
viśvāmitrāya tadddravyaṃ dattvā baddhvā nareśvaram ||2||
basatyo yāsyasītyuktvā daṃḍenā tāḍayattadā | daṇḍaprahārasambhrāntamatīvavyākulendriyam 11311
iṣṭabaṃdhuviyogārtamānīya nijapakavaṇe |
nigaḍe sthāpayitvā taṃ svayaṃ suṣvāpa vijvaraḥ ||4||
nigaḍasthastato rājā vasaṃścāṃḍālapabavaṇe |
annapāne parityajya sadā vai tadaśocayat ||5||
tanvīṃ dīnamukhīṃ dṛṣṭvā bālaṃ dīnamukhaṃ puraḥ |
māṃ smaratyasukhāviṣṭā mokṣayiṣyati nau nṛpaḥ || 6 ||
upāttavitto viprāya dattvā vittaṃ pratiśrutam |
rodamānaṃ sutaṃ vīkṣya māṃ ca sambodhayiṣyati ||7||
vātapāśvaṃ vrajāmīti rudantaṃ bālakaṃ punaḥ |
tāta tāteti bhāṣaṃtaṃ tayā saṃbodhayiṣyati || 8 ||
ma sā māṃ mṛgaśāvākṣī vetti cāṃḍālatāṃ gatam |
rājyanāśaḥ suhṛttyāgo bhāryātanayavikrayaḥ ||9 ||
tataścāṃḍālatā ceyamaho duḥkhaparamparā |
evaṃ sa nivasanityaṃ smaraṃśca dayitāṃ sutam ||10||
mināya divasātrājā caturo vidhipīḍitaḥ |
athāhni pañcame tena nigaḍānmocito nṛpaḥ || 11 ||
cāṃḍālenānuśiṣṭaśva mṛtacaṃlāpahāraṇe |
kruddhena paruṣairvākyairnirbhartsya ca punaḥ punaḥ || 12 ||
kāśyāśca dakṣiṇe bhāge śmaśānaṃ vidyate mahat |
tadrakṣasvaṃ yathānyāyaṃ na tyājyaṃ tattvayā kvacit ||
imaṃ ca jarjaraṃ daṃḍaṃ gṛhītvā yāhi mā ciram |
vīrabāhorayaṃ daṃḍa iti ghoṣasva sarvataḥ || 14 ||
sūta uvāca
kasmiścidatha kāle tu mṛtacailāpahārakaḥ |
hariścaṃdro'bhavadrājā śmaśāne tadvaśānugaḥ || 15 ||
cāṃḍālenānuśiṣṭastu mṛta lāpahāriṇā |
rājā tena samādiṣṭo jagāma śavamandiram || 16 ||
purvāstu dakṣiṇe deśe vidyamānaṃ bhayānakam |
śavamātyasamākīrṇaṃ durgandhaṃ bahughūmakam ||17||

śmaśānaṃ ghorasannādaṃ śivāśatasamākulam |
gṛdhragomāyusaṃkīṇaṃ śvavṛndaparivāritam ||18||
asthisaṃghāta saṃkīrṇaṃ mahādurgaṃdha saṃkulam |
ardhadagdhaśavāsyāni mahādurgaṃdhasaṃkulam |
vikasaddaṃtapaṃktibhiḥ ||19||
hasaṃtīvāgnimadhyasthakāyasyaivaṃ vyavasthitiḥ |
nānāmṛtasuhunnādaṃ mahākolāhalākulam ||20||
hā putra mitra hā baṃdho bhrātarvatsa priyādya me |
hāpyate bhāgineyāhaṃ hā mātula pitāmaha ||21||
mātāmaha pitaḥ pautra kva gato'syehi vāṃdhava |
iti śabdaiḥ samākīrṇa bhairavaiḥ sarvadehinām ||22||
jvalanmāṃsavasāmedacchū miti dhvanisaṃkulam |
agneścaṭacaṭāśabdo bhairavo yatra jāyate || 23 || |
kalpāṃtasadṛśākāraṃ śmaśānaṃ tatsudāruṇam |
sa rājā tatra saṃprāpto duḥkhādevamaśocata ||24||
hā bhṛtyā maṃtriṇo yūyaṃ kva tadrājyaṃ kulocitam |
hā priye putra me bāla māṃ tyaktvā maṃdabhāgyakam || 25 ||
brāhmaṇasya ca kopena gatā yūyaṃ kva dūrataḥ |
vinā dharmaṃ manuṣyāṇāṃ jāyate na śubhaṃ kvacit || 26 ||
yatnato dhārayettasmātpuruṣo dharmameva hi |
ityevaṃ citayaṃstatra cāṃḍāloktaṃ pucaḥ punaḥ ||27||
malena digvasarvāṅgaḥ śavānāṃ darśane vrajan |
lakuṭākārakalpaśca dhāvaṃścāpi tatastataḥ || 28||
asmiñchava idaṃ maulyaṃ śataṃ prāpsyāmi cāgrataḥ |
idaṃ mama idaṃ rājña idaṃ cāṃḍālakasya ca || 29 ||
ityevaṃ cintayatrājā vyavasthāṃ dustarāṃ gataḥ |
jīrṇekapaṭasugraṃthikṛta kaṃthāparigrahaḥ ||30||
citābhasmarajī liptamukhabāhūdarāṃghrikaḥ |
nānāmedovasāmajjā liptapāṇyaṃguliḥ śvasan || 31||
tadīyamālyasaṃśleṣakṛtamastaka maṃḍala: ||32||
nānāśavaudana kṛtakṣunnivṛttiparāyaṇaḥ
na rātrau na divā śete hāheti pravadanmuhuḥ |
evaṃ dvādaśa māsāstu nītā varṣaśatopamāḥ ||33||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 24||
atha pañcaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
ekadā tu gato raṃtuṃ bālakaiḥ sahito bahiḥ |
vārāṇasyā nātidūre rohitākhyaḥ kumārakaḥ || 1 ||
krīḍāṃ kṛtvā tato darbhāngṛhītumupacakrame |
komalānalpamūlāṃśca sāgrāñchaktaghanusārataḥ ||2|
āryaprītyarthamityuktvā hastayugmena yatnataḥ |
salakṣaṇāśca samidho barhiriṣmaṃ salakṣaṇam ||3||
tvagnihomārthamādarāt |
mastake bhārakaṃ kṛtvā khidyamānaḥ pade pade ||4||
palāśakāṣṭhānyādāya
udakasthānamāsādya tadā bālastṛṣānvitaḥ |
bhuvi bhāraṃ vinikṣipya jalasthāne tadā śiśuḥ ||5||
kāmataḥ salilaṃ pītvā viśramya ca muhūrtakam |
valmīkopari vinyastabhāro hatuṃ pracakrame || 6 ||
viśvāmitrājñayā tāvatkṛṣṇasarpo bhayāvahaḥ |
mahāviṣo mahāghoro valmīkānnirgatastadā ||7||
tenāsī bālako daṣṭastadaiva ca mamāra ha |
rohitākhyaṃ mṛtaṃ dṛṣṭvā yayurbālā dvijālayam || 8

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 25
vāratā bhayasā vagnāḥ procustanmāturagrataḥ |
he vipradāsi te putraḥ krīḍāṃ kartuṃ bahirgataḥ || 9 ||
asmābhiḥ sahitastatra sarpadaṣṭo mṛtastataḥ |
iti sā tadvacaḥ śrutvā vajrapātopamaṃ tadā || 10 ||
papāta mūcchitā bhūmau chinneva kadalī yathā |
atha tāṃ brāhmaṇo ruṣṭaḥ pānīyenābhyaṣicata || 11 ||
muhūrtāccetanāṃ prāptā brāhmaṇastāmathābravīt |
brāhmaṇa uvāca
alakṣmīkārakaṃ nidyaṃ jānatī tvaṃ niśāmukhe || 12 ||
rodanaṃ kuruṣe duṣṭe lajjā te hṛdaye na kim |
brāhmaṇenaiva muktā sā na kiṃcidvākyamabravīt ||13||
ruroda karuṇaṃ dīnā putraśokena pīḍitā |
aśrupūrṇamukhī dīnā dhūsarā muktamūrddhajā || 14 ||
atha tāṃ kupito vipro rājapatnīmabhāṣata |
dhiktvāṃ duṣṭe krayaṃ gṛhya mama kāryaṃ viluṃsi || 15 ||
aśaktā cetkathaṃ tahiṃ gṛhītaṃ mama taddhanam |
evaṃ nirbhatsitā tena krūravākyaiḥ punaḥ punaḥ || 16 ||
ruditā kāraṇaṃ prāha vipraṃ gadgadayā girā |
svāminmama suto bālaḥ sarpadaṣṭo mṛto bahiḥ || 17 ||
anujñāṃ me prayacchasva draṣṭuṃ yāsyāmi bālakam |
durlabhaṃ darśanaṃ tena saṃjātaṃ mama suvrata || 18||
ityuktvā karuṇaṃ bālā punareva ruroda ha |
punastāṃ kupito vipro rājapatnīmabhāṣata ||19||
brāhmaṇa uvāca
śaṭhe duṣṭasamācāre kiṃ na jānāsi pātakam |
yatsvāmibetanaṃ gṛhya tasya kāryaṃ vilumpasi ||20||
narake pacyate so'tha mahārauravapūrvake |
uṣitvā narake kalpaṃ tato'sau kukkuṭo bhavet 21 ||
kimanenāthavā kāryaṃ dharmasaṃkīrtanena me |
vastu pāparato mūrkhaḥ krūro nīco'nṛtaḥ śaṭhaḥ ||22||
nadvākyaṃ niṣphalaṃ tasminbhavedvījamivoṣare |
ehi te vidyate kiṃcitparalokabhayaṃ yadi ||23||
evamuktā'tha sā vipraṃ vepamānā'bravīdvacaḥ |
kāruṇyaṃ kuru me nātha prasīda sumukho bhava || 24||
prasthāpaya muhūrtaṃ māṃ yāvaddrakṣyāmi bālakam |
evamuktvātha sā mūrdhnā nipatya dvijapādayoḥ ||25||
ruroda karuṇaṃ bālā putraśokena pīḍitā |
athāha kupito vipraḥ krodhasaṃraktalocanaḥ || 26 ||
vipra uvāca
ki te putreṇa me kāryaṃ gṛhakarma kuruṣva me |
kiṃ na jānāsi me krodhaṃ kaśāghātaphalapradam ||27||
evamuktā sthita dhairyādgṛhakarma cakāra ha |
ardharātro gatastasyāḥ pānābhyaṃgādikarmaṇā ||28||
brāhmaṇenātha sā proktā putrapāśvaṃ vrajādhunā |
tasya dāhādikaṃ kṛtvā punarāgaccha satvaram ||29||
na lupyeta yathā prātargṛhakarma mameti ca |
tatastvekākinī rātrī vilapatī jagāma ha ||30||
dṛṣṭvā mṛtaṃ nijaṃ putraṃ bhūśaṃ śokena pīḍitā |
yūṣabhraṣṭā kuraṃgīva vivatsā saurabha yathā || 31||
vārāṇasyā bahirgatvā kṣaṇādṛdṛṣṭvā nijaṃ sutam |
śayānaṃ raṃkabadbhūmī kāṣṭhadarbhatṛṇopari ||32||

vilalāpātiduḥkhārtā śabdaṃ kṛtvā suniṣṭhuram |
ehi me sammukhaṃ kasmādroṣito'si vadādhunā ||33||
āyāsyabhimukho nityamaṃ betyuktvā punaḥ punaḥ |
gatvā skhalatpadā tasya papātopari mūcchitā ||34||
punaḥ sā cetanāṃ prāpya dorbhyāmāliṃgya bālakam |
tanmukhe vadanaṃ nyasya rurodārtasvanaistadā ||35||
karābhyāṃ tāḍanaṃ cakre mastakasyodarasya ca |
hā bāla hā śiśo vatsa hā kumāraka sundara ||36||
hā rājankva gato'si tvaṃ paśyemaṃ bālakaṃ nijam |
prāṇebhyo'pi garīyāṃsaṃ bhūtale patitaṃ mṛtam ||37||
tathāpaśyanmukhaṃ tasya bhūyo jīvitaśaṃkayā |
nirjīvavadanaṃ jñātvā mūcchitā nipapāta ha || 38 ||
hastena vadanaṃ gṛhya punarevabhabhāṣata |
śayanaṃ tyaja he bāla śīghraṃ jāgṛhi bhīṣaṇam 39 ||
niśārdhaṃ bardhate cedaṃ śivāśatanināditam | bhūtapretapiśācādiḍākinīyūthanāditam 118011
mitrāṇi te gatānyāsaṃstvamekastu kutaḥ sthitaḥ |
sūta uvāca
evamuktvā punastanvī karuṇaṃ praruroda ha || 41 ||
hā śiśo bāla hā batsa rohitākhya kumāraka |
he putra pratiśabdaṃ me kasmāttvaṃ na prayacchasi || 42 ||
tavāhaṃ jananī vatsa kiṃ na jānāsi paśya mām |
deśatyāgādrājyanāśātputra bhatra svavikrayāt ||43||
yaddāsītvācca jīvāmi tvāṃ dṛṣṭvā putra kevalam |
te janmasamaye viprairādiṣṭaṃ yattvanāgatam ||44 ||
dīrghāyuḥ pṛthivīrājaḥ putrapautrasamanvitaḥ |
śauryadānaratiḥ sattvī gurudevadvijārcakaḥ || 45 ||
mātāpitrostu priyakṛtsatyavādī jitendriyaḥ |
ityādi sakalaṃ jātamasatyamadhunā sutaḥ ||46||
cakramatsyā vā''tapatraśrīvatsasvastikadhvajāḥ |
tava pāṇitale putra kalaśaścāmaraṃ tathā || 47||
lakṣaṇāni tathānyāni tvaddhaste yāni saṃti ca |
tāni sarvāṇi moghāni saṃjātānyadhunā suta ||48 ||
hā rājanpṛthivīnātha kva te rājyaṃ kva maṃtriṇaḥ |
kva te siṃhāsanaṃ chatraṃ kva te khaḍgaḥ kva taddhanam 49||
kva sāyodhyā kva harmyāṇi kva gajāśvarathaprajāḥ |
sarvametattathā putra māṃ tyaktvā kva gato'si re 50||
hā kāṃta hā nṛpāgaccha paramaṃ svasutaṃ priyam |
yena te riṃgatā vakṣaḥ kuṃkumenāvalepitam ||51||
svaśarīraraja: paṃkaiviśālaṃ malinīkṛtam |
yena te vālabhāvena mṛganābhirvilepitaḥ || 52 ||
bhraṃśito bhālatilakastavāṃkasthena bhūpate |
yasya vaktraṃ mṛdā liptaṃ snehādvai cumbitaṃ mayā 53 ||
tanmukhaṃ makṣikāliṃgyaṃ paśye kīvidūṣitam |
hā rājanpaśya taṃ putraṃ bhuvisthaṃ raṃkavanmṛtam ||54 ||
hā deva kiṃ mayā kṛtyaṃ kṛtaṃ pūrvabhavāntare |
tasya karmaphalasyeha na pāramupalakṣaye || 55 ||
hā putra hā śiśo vatsa hā kumāraka sundara |
evaṃ tasyā vilāpaṃ te śrutvā nagarapālakāḥ || 56 ||
jāgṛtāstvaritāstasyāḥ pārśvamīyuḥ suvismitāḥ |

janā ūcuḥ
kā tvaṃ bālaśca kasyāyaṃ patiste kutra tiṣṭhati ||57||
ekaiva nirbhayā rātrau kasmāttvamiha rodiṣi |
evamuktātha sā tanvī na kiṃcidvākyamabravīt || 58 ||
bhūyo'pi pṛṣṭā sā tūṣṇīṃ stabdhībhūtā babhūva ha |
vilalāpātiduḥkhārtā śokāśruplutalocanā || 59 ||
atha te śaṃkitāstasyāṃ romāṃcitatanūruhāḥ |
saṃtrastāḥ prāhuranyonyamuddhṛtāyudhapāṇayaḥ || 60 ||
nūnaṃ strī na bhavatyeṣā yataḥ kiṃcinna bhāṣate |
tasmādṛdhyā bhavedeṣā yatnato bālaghātinī || 61 ||
śubhā cettarhi kiṃ hyatra niśārdhe tiṣṭhate bahiḥ |
bhakṣārthamanayā nūnamānītaḥ kasyacicchiśuḥ || 62 ||
ityuktvā tairgṛhītā sā gāḍhaṃ keśeṣu satvaram |
bhujayoraparaiścaiva kaiścāpi galake tathā || 63 ||
khecarī yāsyatītyuktaṃ bahubhiḥ śastrapāṇibhiḥ |
ākṛṣya pakvaṇe nītā cāṃḍālāya samarpitā || 64 ||
he cāṃḍāla bahirdṛṣṭā hyasmābhirbālaghātinī |
vadhyatāṃ vadhyatāmevā śīghraṃ nītvā bahiḥsthale 65 ||
cāṃḍālaḥ prāha tāṃ dṛṣṭvā jñāteyaṃ lokaviśrutā |
na dṛṣṭapūrvā kenāpi lokaḍibhānyanekadhā || 66 ||
bhakṣitānyanayā bhūri bhavadbhiḥ puṇyamarjitam |
khyātirvaḥ śāśvatī loke gacchadhvaṃ ca yathāsukham ||
dvijastrībālagoghātī svarṇasteyī ca yo naraḥ |
agnido vartmaghātī ca madyapo gurutalpagaḥ ||68||
mahājanavirodhī ca tasya puṇyaprado vadhaḥ |
dvijasyāpi striyo vāpi na doṣo vidyate vadhe || 69 ||
asyā vadhaśca me yogya ityuktvā gāḍhabandhanaiḥ |
baddhvā keśeṣvathākṛṣya rajjubhistāmatāḍayat || 70 ||
hariścandramathovāca vācā paruṣayā tadā |
re dāsa vadhyatāmeṣā duṣṭātmā mā vicāraya ||71||
tadvākyaṃ bhūpatiḥ śrutvā vajrapātopamaṃ tadā |
vepamāno'tha cāṃḍālaṃ prāha strīvadhaśaṃkitaḥ || 72 ||
na śakto'hamidaṃ kartuṃ preṣyaṃ dehi mamāparam |
asādhyamapi yatkarma tatkariṣye tvayoditam ||73 ||
śrutvā taduktaṃ vacanaṃ śvapaco vākyamabravīt |
mābhaiṣīstvaṃ gṛhāṇāsi vadho'syāḥ puṇyado mataḥ ||
bālānāmeva bhayadā neyaṃ rakṣyā kadācana |
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya rājā vacanamabravīt ||75||
striyo rakṣyāḥ prayatnena na hantavyāḥ kadācana |
strīvadhe kīrtitaṃ pāpaṃ munibhirdharmatatparaḥ ||76 ||
puruṣo yaḥ striyaṃ hanyājjñānato'jñānato'pi vā |
narake pacyate so'tha mahārauravapūrvake || 77 ||
cāṇḍāla uvāca
mā vadāsi gṛhāṇanaṃ tīkṣṇaṃ vidyutsamaprabham |
yatraikasminvadhaṃ nīte bahūnāṃ tu sukhaṃ bhavet || 78 ||
tasya hiṃsā kṛtā nūnaṃ bahupuṇyapradā bhavet |
bhakṣitānyanayā bhūri loke ḍibhāni duṣṭayā || 79 ||
tatkṣipraṃ vadhyatāmeṣā lokaḥ svastho bhaviṣyati |
rājovāca
cāṃḍālādhipate tīvraṃ vrataṃ strīvadhatrarjunam ||80||

ājanmatastato yatnaṃ na kuryāṃ strīvadhe tava |
cāṇḍāla uvāca
svāmikāryaṃ vinā duṣṭa kiṃ kāryaṃ vidyate'param ||81 ||
gṛhītvā vetanaṃ me'dya kasmātkāryaṃ vilumpasi |
yaḥ svāmivetanaṃ gṛhya svāmikāryaṃ vilumpati || 82 ||
narakātriṣkṛtistasya nāsti kalpāyutairapi |
rājovāca
cāṃḍālanātha me dehi prāpyamanyatsudāruṇam ||83 ||
svaśatruṃ brūhi taṃ kṣipraṃ ghātayiṣyāmyasaṃśayam |
ghātayitvā tu taṃ śatruṃ tava dāsyāmi medinīm || 84||
saṃyutam |
devendramapi jeṣyāmi nihatya niśitaiḥ śaraiḥ || 85 ||
devadevoragaiḥ siddhagaṃdharvairapi
etacchrutvā tato vākyaṃ hariścandrasya bhūpateḥ |
cāṃḍālaḥ kupitaḥ prāha vepamānaṃ mahīpatim || 86 ||
cāṇḍāla uvāca
"naitadvākyaṃ sughaṭitaṃ yadvākyaṃ dāsakīrtitam |" cāṃḍāladāsatāṃ kṛtvā surāṇāṃ bhāṣase vacaḥ ||
dāsa kiṃ bahunā nūnaṃ śṛṇu me gadato vacaḥ || 87 ||
nirlajja tava cedasti kiṃcitpāpabhayaṃ hṛdi |
kimarthaṃ dāsatāṃ yātaścāṃḍālasya tu veśmani || 88||
gṛhāṇainaṃ tataḥ khaḍgamasyāśrichandhi śirombujam |
evamuktvātha cāṃḍālo rājñe khaḍgaṃ nyavedayat || 89 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe hariścaṃdropākhyāne pañcaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 25||
atha ṣaḍviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
tato'tha bhūpatiḥ prāha rājñīṃ sthitvā hyadhomukhaḥ |
atropaviśyatāṃ bāle pāpasya purato mama || 1 ||
śiraste chedayiṣyāmi haṃtuṃ śaknoti cetkaraḥ |
evamuktvā samudyamya khaḍgaṃ haṃtuṃ gato nṛpaḥ ||2||
na jānāti nṛpaḥ patnīṃ sā na jānāti bhūpatim |
abravīdbhṛśaduḥkhārtā svamṛtyumabhikāṃkṣatī ||3||
ssyuvāca
cāṃḍāla śṛṇu me vākyaṃ kiṃcittvaṃ yadi manyase |
mṛtastiṣṭhati me putro nātidūre bahiḥ purāt || 4 ||
taṃ dahāmi hataṃ yāvadānayitvā tavāṃtikam |
tāvatpratīkṣyatāṃ paścādasinā ghātayasva mām || 5||
tenātha bāḍhamityuktvā preṣitā bālakaṃ prati |
sā jagāmātiduḥkhārtā vilapatī sudāruṇam || 6 ||
bhāryā tasya narendrasya sarpadaṣṭaṃ hi bālakam |
hā putra hā vatsa śiśo ityevaṃ vadatī muhuḥ ||7||
kṛśā vivarṇā malinā pāṃsudhvastaśiroruhā |
śmaśānabhūmimāgatya bāleṃ svāpyāviśadbhuvi ||8||

"rājannadya svabālaṃ taṃ paśyasīha mahītale |
ramamāṇaṃ svasakhibhirdaṣṭaṃ duṣṭāhinā mṛtam ||”
tasyā vilāpaśabdaṃ tamākarṇya sa narādhipaḥ |
śavasannidhimāgatya vastramasyākṣipattadā || 9||
tāṃ tathā rudatīṃ bhāryāṃ nābhijānāti bhūmipaḥ |
cirapravāsa saṃtaptāṃ punarjātāmivābalām ||10||
sāpi taṃ cārukeśāṃtaṃ puro dṛṣṭvā jaṭālakam |
nābhyajānānnṛpabaraṃ śuṣkavṛkṣatvatropamam || 11||
bhūmau nipatitaṃ bālaṃ dṛṣṭvāśīviṣapīḍitam |
narendralakṣaṇopetamacitayadaso nṛpaḥ ||12||
asya pūrṇenduvadvatraṃ śubhamunnasamavraṇam |
darpaṇapratimottuṅga kapolayugaśobhitam ||13||
nīlānkeśānkucitāgrānsāndrāndīrghā staraṃgiṇaḥ |
rājīvasadṛśe netre oṣṭho bibaphalopamo || 14||
viśālavakṣā dīrghākṣo dīrghabāhūnnatāṃsakaḥ |
viśālapādo gaṃbhīraḥ sūkṣmāṃgulyavanīdharaḥ || 15 ||
mṛṇālapādo gambhīranābhirunnatakandharaḥ |
aho kaṣṭaṃ narendrasya kasyāpyeṣa kule śiśuḥ || 16||
jāto nītaḥ kṛtāṃtena kālapāśāddurātmanā |
evaṃ dṛṣṭvā'tha taṃ bālaṃ māturaṃke prasāritam ||17||
sūtauvāca
smṛtimabhyāgato rājā hāhetyaśrūṇyapātayat |
sopyuvāca ca vatso me daśāmetāmupāgataḥ || 18 ||
nīto yadi ca dhoreṇa kṛtāṃtenātmano vaśam |
vicārayitvā rājāsau hariścandrastathā sthitaḥ 19||
tato rājñī mahāduḥkhāveśādidamabhāṣata |
rājñyubāca
bā vatsa kasya pāpasya tvapadhyānādidaṃ mahat ||20||
duḥkhamāpatitaṃ ghoraṃ tadrūpaṃ nopalabhyate |
hā nātha rājanbhavatā māmapāsya suduḥkhitām 21 ||
kasminsaṃsthīyate sthāne viśrabdhaṃ kena hetunā |
rājyanāśaḥ suhṛttyāgo bhāryātanayavikrayaḥ || 22 ||
hariścandrasya rājarṣeḥ kiṃ vidhātaḥ kṛtaṃ tvayā |
iti tasmā vacaḥ śrutvā rājā sthānacyutastadā 23 ||
pratyabhijñāya devīṃ tāṃ putraṃ ca nidhanaṃ gatam |
kaṣṭaṃ mamaiva patnīyaṃ bālakaśvāpi me sutaḥ ||24||
śāyā sa pāpasaṃtapto mūrcchāmatijagāma ha |
sā ca taṃ pratyabhijñāya tāmavasthāmupāgatam ||25||
mūrcchitā nipapātārtā niśceṣṭā dharaṇītale |
cetanāṃ prāpya rājendro rājapatnī ca tau samam || 26 ||
vilepatuḥ susaṃtaptau śokabhāreṇa pīḍitau |
rājovāca
hā batsa sukumāraṃ te badanaṃ kuñcitālakam ||27||
paśyato me mukhaṃ dīnaṃ hṛdayaṃ kiṃ na dīryate |
tāta tāteti madhuraṃ bruvāṇaṃ svayamāgatam ||28||
upagu kadā vakṣye vatsa vatseti sauhṛdāt |
kasya jānupraṇītena piṃgena kṣitireṇunā ||29||

mamottarīyamutsaṃgaṃ tathāṃgaṃ malameṣyati |
na bā'laṃ mama saṃbhūtaṃ mano hṛdayanandana || 30 ||
" mayāsi pitṛmānpitrā vikrīto yena vastuvat |” gataṃ rājyamaśeṣaṃ me sabāṃdhavānaṃ mahat ||
" hīnadaivānnṛśaṃsena dṛṣṭo me tanayastataḥ |
" ahaṃ mahāhidaṣṭasya putrasyānapaṃkajam ||31||
nirīkṣannadya ghoreṇa viṣeṇādhikṛto'dhunā |
evamuktvā tamādāya bālakaṃ bā| gadgadaḥ ||32||
pariṣvajya ca niśśreṣṭo mūrcchayā nipapāta ha |
tatastaṃ patitaṃ dṛṣṭvā śainyā cainamacinayat || 33||
puruṣavyāghraḥ svareṇaivopalakṣyate |
vidvajjanamanaścandro hariścandro na saṃśayaḥ ||34||
ayaṃ sa
tathā'sya nāsikā tuṅgā tilapuṣpopamā śubhā |
dantāśca mukulaprasyāḥ khyātakīrtermahātmanaḥ || 35||
śmaśānamāgataḥ kasmādyadyevaṃ sa nareśvaraḥ |
vihāya putraśokaṃ sā paśyantī patitaṃ patin || 36 ||
prahṛṣṭā bismitā dīnā bhartṛputrātipīḍitā |
bīkṣantī sā tadā'patanmūrcchayā dharaṇītate ||37||
prāpya cetaśca śanakaiḥ sā gagadamabhāṣata |
dhiktvāṃ deva karuṇa nirmaryāda jugupsita ||38||
yenāyamamaraprakhyo nīto rājā śvapākatām |
rājyanāśaṃ suhṛsyānaṃ bhāryātanayavikrayam || 39||
prāpayitvāpi yenādya cāṃḍālo'yaṃ kṛto nṛpaḥ |
nādya paśyāmi te chatraṃ siṃhāsanamathāpi vā ||40||
cāmaravyajane vā'pi ko'yaṃ vidhiviparyayaḥ |
yasyāsya vrajataḥ pūrvaṃ rājāno bhūtyatāṃ gatāḥ || 41 ||
kapālasaṃlagne ghaṭīpaṭa nirantare ||42||
svottarīyaiḥ prakurvaṃti virajaskaṃ mahītalam | so'yaṃ
vasāniṣpaṃdasaṃ śuṣkamahāpaṭa lamaṇḍite 118311
mṛtanirmālyasūtrāṃtarlagnakeśasudāruṇe |
gṛdhragomāyunādārte puṣṭakṣudravihaṅgame ||44 ||
bhasmāṃgārārdha dagdhāsthimajjāsaṃghaṭṭabhīṣaṇe saṃprakṛṣṭaniśācare || 45 ||
citādhūmāyatapaṭe nīlīkṛtadigantare | kuṇapāsvādanamudā
caratyamedhye rājeṃdra : śmaśāne duḥkhapīḍitaḥ |
evamuktvā'tha saṃśliṣya kaṃṭhe rājño nṛpātmajā ||46||
kaṣṭaṃ śokasamāviṣṭā vilalāpārtayā girā |
rājansvapno'tha tathyaṃ vā madetanmanyate bhavān ||47||
tatkathyatāṃ mahābhāga mano meṃ muhyate mama |
yadyetadevaṃ dharmajña nāsti dharme sahāyatā || 48 ||
tathaiva vipradevādipūjane satyapālane |
nāsti dharmaṃ kutaḥ satyaṃ nārjavaṃ nānṛśaṃsatā || ." 1 |
yatra tvaṃ dharmaparamaḥ svarājyādavaropitaḥ |
sūta uvāca
iti tasyā vacaḥ śrutvā niḥśvasyoṣṇaṃ sagadgadaḥ || 50||
kathayāmāsa tanvaṃgyai yathā prāptaḥ śvapākatām |
ruditvā sā tu suciraṃ niḥśvasyoṣṇaṃ suduḥkhitā || 51 ||
bhīruryathāvattaṃ nyavedayat |
śrutvā rājā tathā vākyaṃ nipapāta mahītale ||52||
svaputramaraṇaṃ
mṛtaṃ putraṃ samānīya jihvayā vilihanmuhuḥ |
hariścandramatho prāha śaivyāṃ gadgadayā girā || 53 ||
kuruṣva svāminaḥ preṣyaṃ chedayitvā śiro mama |
svāmidroho na te'stvadya mā'satyo bhava bhūṣate || 54 ||

śramaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 26
māsatyaṃ tava rāje paradrohastu pātakam |
etadākarṇya rājā tu papāta bhuvi mūcchitaḥ || 55 ||
kṣaṇena cetanāṃ prāpya vilalāpātiduḥkhitaḥ |
rājovāca
kathaṃ priye tvayā proktaṃ vacanaṃ tvatiniṣṭhuram ||56||
yadaśakyaṃ bhavedvaktuṃ tatkarma kriyate katham |
patnyuvāca
mayā ca pūjitā gaurī devā viprāstathaiva ca ||57||
bhaviṣyasi pratistvaṃ me hyanyasmiñjanmani prabho |
śrutvā rājā tadā vākyaṃ nipapāta mahītale || 58 ||
mṛtasya putrasya tadā cucumba duḥkhito mukham |
rājovāca
priye na rocate dīrghaṃ kālaṃ kleśaṃ mayā'śitum || 59 ||
nātmāyatto'haṃ tanvaṃgi paśya me mandabhāgyatām |
cāṃḍālenānanujñātaḥ pravekṣye jvalanaṃ yadi || 60 ||
cāṃḍāladāsatāṃ yāsye punarapyanyajanmani |
narakaṃ ca varaṃ prāpya khedaṃ prāpsyāmi dāruṇam || 61||
tāpaṃ prāpsyāmi saṃprāpya mahārauravarorave |
magnasya duḥkhajaladho varaṃ prāṇairviyojanam || 62||
eko'pi bālako yo'yamāsīdvaṃśakaraḥ sutaḥ |
mama daivānuyogena mṛtaḥ so'pi balīyasā || 63 ||
kathaṃ prāṇānvimuṃcāmi parāyatto'smi durgataḥ |
tathāpi duḥkhabāhulyāttyakṣyāmi tu nijāṃ tanum || 64 ||
trailokye nāsti tadduḥkhaṃ nāsipatravane tathā |
vaitaraṇyāṃ kutastadvadyādṛśaṃ putraviplave || 65 ||
so'haṃ sutaśarīreṇa dīpyamāne hutāśane |
nipatiṣyāmi tanvaṅgi kṣantavyaṃ tanmamādhunā || 66 ||
na vaktavyaṃ tvayā kiṃcidataḥ kamalalocane |
mama vākyaṃ ca tanvaṅgi nibodhāhatamānasā || 67 ||
anujñātā'tha gaccha tvaṃ vipraveśma śucismite |
yadi dattaṃ yadi hutaṃ guravo yadi toṣitāḥ || 68 ||
saṃgamaḥ paraloke me nijaputreṇa cettvayā |
iha loke kutastvetadbhaviṣyati samīpsitam || 69||
yanmayā hasatā kiṃcidrahasi tvāṃ śucismite |
aśeṣamuktaṃ tatsarvaṃ kṣantavyaṃ mama yāsyataḥ || 70 ||
rājapatnīti garveṇa nāvajñeyaḥ sa me dvijaḥ |
sarvayatnena toṣyaḥ syātsvāmī daivatavacchubhe ||71||
rājñyuvāca
ahamapyatra rājarṣe nipatiṣye rājarṣe nipatiṣye hutāśane |
duḥkhabhārāsahā deva saha yāsyāmi vai tvayā || 72 ||
tvayā saha mama śreyo gamanaṃ nānyathā bhavet |
saha svargaṃ ca narakaṃ tvayā bhokṣyāmi mānada ||
śrutvā rājā tadovāca evamastu pativrate || 73 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇaṃ saptamaskandhe hariścandropākhyāne ṣaḍaviśo'dhyāyaḥ || 26 ||

atha saptaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
tataḥ kṛtvā citāṃ rājā āropya tanayaṃ svakam |
bhāryayā sahito rājā baddhāṃjalipuṭastadā || 1||
cintayanparameśānīṃ śatākṣīṃ jagadīśvarīm |
pañcakośāntaragatāṃ pucchabrahmasvarūpiṇīm ||2||
raktāmbaraparīdhānāṃ karuṇārasasāgarām |
nānāyudhadharāmambāṃ jagatpālanatatparām || 3||
tasya cintayamānasya sarve devāḥ savāsavāḥ |
dharmaṃ pramukhataḥ kṛtvā samājagmustvarānvitāḥ || 4||
āgatya sarve procuste rājañchṛṇu mahāprabho |
ahaṃ pitāmahaḥ sākṣāddharmaṃśca bhagavānsvayam ||5||
sādhyāḥ saviśvemaruto lokapālāḥ sacāraṇāḥ |
nāgāḥ siddhāḥ sagandharvā rudrāścaiva tathā'śvinau || 6 ||
ete cānye'tha bahavo viśvāmitrastathaiva ca |
viśvatrayeṇa yo maitrīṃ kartumicchati dharmataḥ || 7||
viśvāmitraḥ sa te'bhīṣṭamāhartuṃ samyagicchati |
dharma uvāca
mā rājansāhasaṃ kārṣīrdharmo'haṃ tvāmupāgataḥ ||8||
titikṣādamasattvādyastvadguṇaiḥ paritoṣitaḥ |
indra uvāca
hariścandra mahābhāga prāptaḥ śakro'smi te'ntikam ||9||
tvayā'dya bhāryāputreṇa jitā lokāḥ sanātanāḥ |
āroha tridivaṃ rājanbhāryāputrasamanvitaḥ || 10 ||
suduṣprāpaṃ narairanyairjitamātmīyakarmabhiḥ |
sūta uvāca
tato'mṛtamayaṃ varṣamapamṛtyu vināśanam ||11||

dharma uvāca
tavaivaṃ bhāvinaṃ kleśamavagamyātmamāyayā |
ātmā śvapacatāṃ nīto darśitaṃ tacca pakvaṇam || 18||

indra uvāca
prārthyate yatparaṃ sthānaṃ samastairmanujairbhuvi |

hariścandra uvāca
devarāja namastubhyaṃ vākyaṃ cedaṃ nibodha me |

sūta uvāca
etatte sarvamākhyātaṃ hariścandrasya ceṣṭitam |

atha aṣṭāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
vicitramidamākhyānaṃ hariścandrasya kīrtitam |
śatākṣīpādabhaktasya rājarṣerdhārmikasya ca ||1||
śatākṣī sā kuto jātā devī bhagavatī śivā |
tatkāraṇaṃ vada mune sārthakaṃ janma me kuru ||2||
ko hi devyā guṇāñchṛṇvaṃstṛpti yāsyati śuddhadhīḥ |
pade pade'śvamedhasya phalamakṣayyamanute ||3||
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi śatākṣīsaṃbhavaṃ śubham |
tavāvācyaṃ na me kiṃciddevībhaktasya vidyate ||4||
durgamākhyo mahādaityaḥ pūrvaṃ paramadāruṇaḥ |
hiraṇyākṣānvaye jāto ruruputro mahākhalaḥ || 5 ||
devānāṃ tu balaṃ vedo nāśe tasya surā api |
nakṣyaṃtyeva na saṃdeho vidheyaṃ tāvadeva tat || 6 ||
vimṛśyaitattapaścaryāṃ gataḥ kartuṃ himālaye |
brahmāṇaṃ manasā dhyātvā vāyubhakṣo vyatiṣṭata ||7||
sahasravarṣaparyantaṃ cakāra paramaṃ tapaḥ |
tejasā tasya lokāstu saṃtaptāḥ samurāsurāḥ || 8||
tataḥ prasanno bhagavānhaṃsāruḍhaścaturmukhaḥ |
yayau tasmai varaṃ dātuṃ prasannamukhapaṃkajaḥ || 9 ||
samādhisthaṃ mīlitākṣaṃ sphuṭamāha caturmukhaḥ |
varaṃ varaya bhadraṃ te yaste manasi vartate || 10 ||
tavādya tapasā tuṣṭo varadeśo'hamāgataḥ |
śrutvā brahmamukhādvāṇīṃ vyutthitaḥ sa samādhitaḥ 11 ||
pūjayitvā varaṃ vavre vedāndehi sureśvara |

balaṃ ca dehi yena syāddevānāṃ ca parājayaḥ || 13 ||

jagāma satyalokaṃ tu caturvededavaraḥ paraḥ || 14 ||
tataḥ prabhṛti vipraistu vismṛtā vedarāśayaḥ |
snānasaṃdhyānitya homaśrāddhayajñajapādayaḥ snānasaṃdhyānityahomaśrāddhayajñajapādayaḥ ||15||

rurodha sa tadā daityo nagarīmamarāvatīm || 18||
aśaktāstena te yoddhuṃ vajradehāsureṇa ca |

nirāhārāstadāsaktāstāmeva śaraṇaṃ yayuḥ || 25 ||
dayāṃ kuru maheśāni pāmareṣu janeṣu hi |

nānyā gatirjanasyāsya kiṃ paśyasi punaḥ punaḥ |
yathecchasi tathā kartuṃ samarthā'si maheśvari ||28|
samuddhara maheśāni saṃkaṭātparamotthitāt |
jīvanena vināsmākaṃ kathaṃ syātsthitiraṃbike 29||

darśayitvā jagaddhātrī sā'naṃtanayanodbhavā ||37||
mocayāmāsa lokeṣu vāridhārā: sahasraśaḥ |
navarātraṃ mahāvṛṣṭirabhūnnetrodbhavairjalaiḥ ||38||
duḥkhitānvīkṣya kalākṣetrāṇi vimuñcati |
tarpitāstena te lokā oṣavyaḥ sakalā api 39 ||
nadīnadapravāhāstairjalaiḥ samabhavannṛpa |
nilīya saṃsthitāḥ pūrva surāste nirgatā bahiḥ 40||
militvā sasurā viprā devīṃ samabhituṣṭuvuḥ |
namo vedāṃtavedye te namo brahmasvarūpiṇi || 41 ||
svamāyayā sarvajagadvidhātryai te namonamaḥ |
bhaktakalpame devi bhaktārthaṃ dadhāriṇi || 42 || |
nityatṛpte nirupame bhuvaneśvari te namaḥ |
asmacchāntyarthamatulaṃ locanānāṃ sahasrakam ||43||

tvayā yato dhṛta devi śatākṣī tvaṃ tato bhava |
kṣudhayā pīḍitā mātaḥ stotuṃ śaktirna cāsti naḥ44||
kṛpāṃ kuru maheśāni vedānapyāharāṃbike |
vyāsa uvāca
iti teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā śākānsvakarasaṃsthitān ||45||
svādūni phalamūlāni bhakṣaṇārthaṃ dadau śivā |
nānāvidhāni cānnāni paśubhojyāni yāni ca 46 ||
kāmyānaṃtarasairyuktānyānavīnodbhavaṃ dadau |
śākaṃbharīti nāmāpi taddinātsamabhūnnṛpa || 47 ||
tataḥ kolāhale jāte dūtavākyena bodhitaḥ |
sasainyaḥ sāyudho yoddhuṃ durgamākhyo'suro yayau || 48 ||
sahasrākṣauhiṇīyuktaḥ śarānmucaṃstvarānvitaḥ |
rurodha devasainyaṃ tadyaddevyagre sthitaṃ purā || 49 ||
tathā vipragaṇaṃ caiva rodhayāmāsa sarvataḥ |
tataḥ kilakilāśabdaḥ samabhūddevamaṃḍale || 50 ||
trāhi trāhīti vākyāni procuḥ sarve dvijāmarāḥ |
tatastejomayaṃ cakraṃ devānāṃ paritaḥ śivā || 51 ||
cakāra rakṣaṇārthāya svayaṃ tasmādbahiḥ sthitā |
tataḥ samabhavadyuddhaṃ devyā daityasya cobhayoḥ || 52||
śaravarṣasamācchannaṃ- sūryamaṃḍalamadbhutam |
parasparaśa roddharṣasamudbhūtāgnisuprabham ||53||
kaṭhorajyāṭaṇatkārabadhirīkṛtadiktaṭam |
tato devīśarīrāttu nirgatāstītraśaktayaḥ || 54||
kālikā tāriṇī bālā tripurā bhairavī ramā |
bagalā caiva mātaṃgī tathā tripurasundarī || 55 ||
kāmākṣī tulajā devī jaṃbhinī mohinī tathā |
chinnamastā guhyakālī daśasāhasrabāhukā || 56 ||
dvātriṃśacchaktayaścānyāścatuḥṣaṣṭimitāḥ parāḥ |
asaṃkhyātāstato devyaḥ samudbhūtāstu sāyudhāḥ || 57 ||
mṛdaṃgaśaṃkhavīṇādināditaṃ saṃgarasthalam |
śaktibhirdaityasainye tu nāśite'kṣauhiṇīśate || 58 ||
agresaraḥ samabhavadurgamo vāhinīpatiḥ |
śaktibhiḥ saha yuddhaṃ ca cakāra prathamaṃ ripuḥ || 59||
mahadyuddhaṃ samabhavadyatrābhūdraktavāhinī |
akṣauhiṇyastu tāḥ sarvā vinaṣṭā daśabhirdinaḥ || 60||
tata ekādaśe prāpte dine paramadāruṇe |
raktamālyāṃbaradharo raktagaṃdhānulepanaḥ || 61||
kṛtvotsavaṃ mahāṃtaṃ tu yuddhāya rathasaṃsthitaḥ |
saṃraṃbheṇaiva mahatā śaktoḥ sarvā vijitya ca || 62 ||
mahādevī rathāgre tu svarathaṃ sa nyaveśayat |
tato'bhavanmahadyuddhaṃ devyā daityasya cobhayoḥ ||63 ||
praharadrayapayataṃ hṛdayatrāsakārakam |
tataḥ paṃtradaśātyugrabāṇāndevī mumoca ca || 64 ||
catubhiścaturo vāhānvāṇenaikena sārathim |
dvābhyāṃ netre bhujau dvābhyāṃ dhvajamekena patriṇā ||65||
paṃcabhirhṛdayaṃ tasya vivyādha jagadaṃbikā |
tato vamansa rudhiraṃ mamāra pura īśituḥ || 66 ||
tasya tejastu nirgatya devīrūpe viveśa ha |
hate tasminmahāvīrye śāṃtamāsījjagattrayam ||67||
tato brahmādayaḥ sarve tuṣṭuvurjagadaṃbikām |
puraskṛtya harīśāno bhaktyā gadgadayā girā || 68 ||

devā ūcuḥ
jagadbhramavivarteka kāraṇe parameśvari |
namaḥ śākaṃbhari śive namaste śatalocane || 69 ||
sarvopaniṣadudghapṭe durgamāsuranāśini |
namo māyeśvari śive paṃcakośāṃta rasthite ||70 ||
cetasā nirvikalpena yāṃ dhyāyaṃti munīśvarāḥ |
praṇavārthasvarūpāṃ tāṃ bhajāmo bhuvaneśvarīm || 71 ||
anaṃtakoṭibrahmāṃḍajananīṃ divyavigrahām |
brahmaviṣṇvādijananīṃ sarvabhāvairnatā vayam || 72 ||
kaḥ kuryātpāmarāndṛṣṭvā rodanaṃ sakaleśvaraḥ |
sadayāṃ parameśānīṃ śatākṣīṃ mātaraṃ vinā ||73||
vyāsa uvāca
iti stutā surairdevī brahmaviṣṇvādibhirvaraiḥ |
pūjitā vividhairdravyaiḥ saṃtuṣṭā'bhūcca tatkṣaṇe ||74||
prasannā sā tadā devī vedānāhṛtya sā dadau |
brāhmaṇebhyo viśeṣeṇa provāca pikabhāṣiṇī || 75 ||
mameyaṃ tanurutkṛṣṭā pālanīyā viśeṣataḥ |
yayā vinānartha evaṃ jāto dṛṣṭo'dhunaiva hi || 76 ||
pūjyā'haṃ sarvadā saṃvyā yuṣmābhiḥ sarvadaiva hi |
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiṃcitkalyāṇāyopadiśyate || 77 ||
paṭhanīyaṃ mametaddhi māhātmyaṃ sarvadottamam |
tena tuṣṭā bhaviṣyāmi hariṣyāmi tathāpadaḥ || 78||
durgamāsurahaṃtrītvādurgeti mama nāma yaḥ |
gṛhṇāti ca śatākṣīti māyāṃ bhittvā vrajatyasau 79 ||
kimuktenātra bahunā sāraṃ vakṣyāmi tattvataḥ |
saṃsevyāhaṃ sadā devā sarvairapi surāsuraiḥ || 80 ||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvāṃtahitā devī devānāṃ caiva paśyatām |
saṃtoṣaṃ janayaṃtyevaṃ saccidānaṃdarūpiṇī ||81||
etatte sarvamākhyātaṃ rahasyaṃ paramaṃ mahat |
gopanīyaṃ prayatnena sarvakalyāṇakārakam ||82||
ya imaṃ śṛṇuyānnityamadhyāyaṃ bhaktitatparaḥ |
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti devīloke mahīyate || 83 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe'ṣṭāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 28 ||
atha ekonātraṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
ityeva sūryavaṃśyānāṃ rājñāṃ caritamuttamam |
somavaṃśodbhavānāṃ ca varṇanīyaṃ mayā kiyat || 1||
parāśakti prasādena mahattvaṃ pratipedire |
rājansuniśvitaṃ viddhi parāśaktiprasādataḥ ||2||
yadyadvibhūtimatsattvaṃ śrīmadūrjitameva vā |
tattadevāvagaccha tvaṃ parāśaktyaṃśasaṃbhavam ||3||
ete cānye ca rājānaḥ parāśaktaspāsakāḥ |
saṃsāratarumūlasya kuṭhārā abhavannṛpa ||4||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena saṃsevyā bhuvaneśvarī |
palālamiva dhānyārthī tyajedanyamaśeṣataḥ ||5||
āmathya vedadugdhābdhi prāptaṃ ratnaṃ mayā nṛpa |
parāśaktipadāṃbhojaṃ kṛtakṛtyo'smyahaṃ tataḥ || 6 ||

paṃcabrahmāsanārūḍhā nāstyanyā kāpi devatā |
tata eva mahādevyā paṃcabrahmāsanaṃ kṛtam ||7|
paṃcabhyastvadhikaṃ vastu vede vyaktamitīryate |
yasminnotaṃ ca protaṃ ca saiva śrībhuvaneśvarī ||8||
tāmavijñāya rājendra naitra mukto bhavennaraḥ |
yadā carmavadākāśaṃ veṣṭayiṣyati mānavāḥ ||9 ||
tadā śivāmavijñāya duḥkhasyāṃto bhaviṣyati |
ataeva śrutī prāhuḥ śvetāśvataraṃśākhinaḥ || 10 ||
te dhyānayogānugatā apaśyandevātmaśakti svaguṇānugūḍhām |
sarvaprayatnena janmasāphalya hetave ||11||
lajjayā vā bhayenāpi bhaktyā vā premayuktayā |
sarvasaṃgaṃ parityajya mano hṛdi nirudhya ca || 12 || tasmāt
tanniṣṭhastatparo bhūyāditi vedāntaḍiṃḍimaḥ |
yena kenamiṣeṇāpi svapaṃstiṣṭhantrajannapi || 13|| I |
kīrtayetsatataṃ devoṃ sa vai mucyeta vaṃdhanāt |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena bhaja rājanmaheśvarīm ||14||
birārūpāṃ sūtrarūpāṃ taprāṃtaryāmirūpiṇīm |
sopānakramataḥ pūrvaṃ tataḥ śuddhe tu cetasi || 15||
saccidānaṃda lakṣyārtharūpāṃ tāṃ brahmarūpiṇīm |
ārādhaya parāṃ śakti prapaṃcollāsavarjitām ||16||
tasyāṃ cittalayo yaḥ sa tasyā ārādhanaṃ smṛtam |
rājatrājñāṃ parāśaktibhaktānāṃ caritaṃ mayā || 17||
dhārmikāṇāṃ sūrya somavaṃśajānāṃ manastrinām |
pāvanaṃ kīrtidaṃ dharmabuddhidaṃ sadgatipradam ||18||
kathitaṃ puṇyadaṃ paścātkimanyacchrotumicchasi |
janamejaya uvāca
gaurīlakṣmī sarasvatyo dattāḥ pūrvaṃ parāṃbayā || 19 ||
tadvannābhipadmodbhavāya ca |
tuṣārādreśca dakṣasya gaurī kanyeti viśrutam ||20||
harāya haraye
kṣīrodadheśva kanyeti mahālakṣmīriti smṛtam |
mūladevyudbhavānāṃ ca kathaṃ kanyātvamanyayoḥ ||21||
asaṃbhāvyamidaṃ bhāti saṃśayo'tra mahāmune |
chidhi jñānāsinā taṃ tvaṃ saṃśayacchedatatparaḥ || 22||
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi rahasyaṃ paramādbhutam |
devībhaktasya te kiṃcidavācyaṃ na hi vidyate ||23||
devītrayaṃ yado devatrayāyādātparāṃbikā |
tadāprabhṛti te devāḥ sṛṣṭikāryāṇi cakrire ||24||
kasmiścitsamaye rājandaityā hālāhalābhighāḥ |
mahāparākramā jātāstrailokyaṃ taijitaṃ kṣaṇāt || 25||
brahmaṇo varadānena darpitā rajatācalam |
rurudhurnijasenābhistathā vaikuṇṭhameva ca || 26||
kāmāriḥ keṭāriśva yuddhodyogaṃ ca cakratuḥ |
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇāmabhūdyuddhaṃ mahotkaṭam ||27||
hāhākāro mahānāsīddevadānavasenayoḥ |
mahatā'tha prayatnena tābhyāṃ te dānavā hatāḥ || 28||
svasvasthāneṣu gatvā tāvabhimānaṃ ca cakratuḥ |
svaśaktyornikaṭe rājanyadvaśādeva te hatāḥ ||29||
abhimānaṃ tayorjñātvā chalahāsyaṃ ca cakratuḥ |
mahālakṣmīśva gaurī ca hāsyaṃ dṛṣṭvā tayostu tau || 30||
devāvatīva saṃkruddho mohitābādimāyayā |
duruttaraṃ ca dadaturavamānapuraḥsaram ||31||

tataste devate tasminkṣaṇe tyaktvā tu tau punaḥ |
aṃtarhite cābhavatāṃ hāhākārastadā hyabhūt ||32||
nistejaskau ca niḥśī vikṣiptau ca vicetanau |
avamānāttayoḥ śakyorjāto hariharau tadā ||33||
brahmā ciṃtāturo jāta kimetatsamupasthitam |
pradhānau devatāmadhye kathaṃ kāryākṣamāvam ||34||
akāṇḍe kiṃ nimittena saṃkaṭaṃ samupasthitam |
pralayo bhavitā kiṃ vā jagato'sya nirāgasaḥ ||35||
nimittaṃ naiva jāne'haṃ kathaṃ kāryā pratikriyā |
iti ciṃtāturo'tyathaṃ dadhyau mīlitalocanaḥ || 36||
parāśaktiprakopāttu jātametaditi sma ha |
jānaṃstadā sāvadhāna: padmajo'bhūnnṛpottama ||37||
tatastayośca yatkāryaṃ svayamevākarottadā |
svaśateśva prabhāveṇa kiyatkālaṃ taponidhiḥ ||38||
tatastayostu svastyarthaṃ manvādīnsvasutānatha |
āhvayāmāsa dharmātmā sanakādīṃśca satvaram || 39||
uvāca vacanaṃ tebhyaḥ sannatebhyastaponidhiḥ |
kāryāsakto'hamanunā tapaḥ kartuṃ na ca kṣamaḥ ||40||
parāśaktestu topārthaṃ jagadbhārayuto'smyaham |
śivaviṣṇū ca vikṣiptau parāśaktiprakopataḥ || 41 ||
tasmāttāṃ paramāṃ śakti yūyaṃ saṃtoṣayaṃtvatha |
atyadbhutaṃ tapaḥ kṛtvā bhaktyā paramayā yutāḥ || 42 || |
yutāḥ||42||
yathā to pūrvavṛttau ca syātāṃ śaktiyutāvapi |
tathā kuruta matputrā yaśovṛddhirbhaveddhi vaḥ || 43 ||
kule yasya bhavejjanma tayoḥ śaktyostu tatkulam |
pāvayejjagatīṃ sarvāṃ kṛtakṛtyaṃ svayaṃ bhavet || 44 ||
vyāsa uvāca
pitāmahavacaḥ śrutvā gatāḥ sarve vanāṃtare |
rirādhayiṣavaḥ sarve dakṣādyā vimalāṃtarāḥ || 45 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe ekonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 29 ||
atha triṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tataste tu vanoddeśe himācalataṭāśrayāḥ |
māyābījajapāsaṃktāstapaśceruḥ samāhitāḥ || 1 ||
dhyāyatāṃ paramāṃ śakti lakṣavarṣāṇyabhūnnṛpa |
tataḥ prasanmā devī sā pratyakṣaṃ darśanaṃ dadau ||2||
pāśāṃkuśavarābhīticaturbāhustrilocanā |
karuṇārasa sampūrṇā saccidānandarūpiṇī || 3 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ sarvajananīṃ tuṣṭuvurmunayo'malāḥ |
namaste viśvarūpāyai vaiśvānarasumūrtaye ||4||
namastejasarūpāyai sūtrātmavapuṣe namaḥ |
yasminsarve liṃgadehā otaprotā vyavasthitāḥ ||5||
namaḥ prājñasvarūpāyai namo vyākṛtamūrtaye |
namaḥ pratyaksvarūpāyai namaste brahmamūrtaye || 6 ||
namaste sarvarūpāyai sarva lakṣyātmamūrtaye |
iti stutvā jagaddhātrīṃ bhaktigadayā girā || 7 ||
praṇemuścaraṇāṃbhojaṃ dakṣādyā munayo'malāḥ |
tataḥ prasannā sā devī provāca pikabhāṣiṇī ||8||
varaṃ brūta mahābhāgā varadā'haṃ sadā matā |
tasyāstu vacanaṃ śrutvā hara viṣṇvostanoḥ samam ||9||

tayostacchaktilābhaṃ ca vatrire nṛpasattama |
dakṣo'tha punarapyāha janma devi kule mama || 10 ||
bhavettavāmba yenāhaṃ kṛtakṛtyo bhave iti |
japaṃ dhyānaṃ tathā pūjāṃ sthānāni vividhāni ca ||
vada me parameśāni svamukhenaiva kevalam |
devyuvāca
macchaktyoravamānācca jātā'vasthā tayordvayoḥ || 12 ||
me'parādhaḥ kadācana |
adhunā matkṛpāleśāccharīre svasthatā tayoḥ || 13||
naitādṛśa: prakartavyo
bhaviṣyati ca te śaktī tvadgṛhe kṣīrasāgare |
janiṣyatastatra tābhyāṃ prāpsyataḥ prerite mayā || 14 ||
māyābījaṃ hi mantro me mukhyaḥ priyakaraḥ sadā |
dhyānaṃ virāṭsvarūpaṃ ne'thavā tvatpurataḥ sthitam 15 ||
saccidānaṃdarūpaṃ vā sthānaṃ sarvaṃ jaganmama |
yuṣmābhiḥ sarvadā cāhaṃ pūjyā dhyeyāca sarvadā ||16||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvāṃtardadhe devī maṇidīpādhivāsinī |
dakṣādyā munayaḥ sarve brahmāṇaṃ punarāyayuḥ || 17 ||
brahmaṇe sarvavṛttāntaṃ kathayāmāsurādarāt |
haro hariśca svasyo tī svasvakāryakṣama nṛpa ||18||
jātī parāṃbākṛpayā garveṇa rahitau tadā |
kadācidatha kāle tu mahaḥ śāktamavātarat ||19||
dakṣagehe mahārāja trailokye'pyutsavo'bhavat |
devāḥ pramuditāḥ sarve puṣpadṛṣṭiṃ ca cakrire || 20 ||
nedurdundubhayaḥ svarge karakoṇāhatā nṛpa |
manāṃsyāsanprasannāni sādhūnāmamalātmanām ||21|
sarito mārgavāhinyaḥ suprabho'bhūddivākaraḥ |
maṃgalāyāṃ tu jātāyāṃ jātaṃ sarvatra maṃgalam ||22||
tasyā nāma satīṃ cakre satyatvātparasaṃvidaḥ |
dadau punaḥ śivāyātha tasya śaktistu yābhavat ||23||
sā punarjvalane dagdhā daivayogānmanornṛpa |
janamejaya uvāca
anarthakarametatte śrāvitaṃ vacanaṃ mune ||24||
hutāśane |
yannāmasmaraṇāntṝṇāṃ saṃsārāgnibhayaṃ na hi ||25||
etādṛśaṃ mahadvastu kathaṃ dagdhaṃ
kena karmavipākena manordagdhaṃ tadeva hi |
vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpurā vṛttaṃ satīdāhasya kāraṇam ||26||
kadācidatha durvāsā gato jāṃbūnadeśvarīm |
dadarśa devīṃ tatrāso māyābījaṃ jajāpa saḥ ||27||
makaraṃdamadākulām ||28||
tataḥ prasannā deveśī nijakaṃṭhagatāṃ srajam | bhramadbhramarasaṃsaktāṃ
dadau prasādabhūtāṃ tāṃ jagrāha śirasā muniḥ |
tato nirgatya tarasā vyomamārgeṇa tāpasaḥ ||29||
ājagāma sa yatrāste dakṣaḥ sākṣātsatīpitā |
saṃdarśanārthamaṃbāyā nanāma ca satīpade ||30||

pṛṣṭo dakṣeṇa sa munirmālā kasyāstyalokikī |
kathaṃ labdhā tvayā nātha durlabhā bhuvi mānavaiḥ ||31||
tacchrutvā vacanaṃ tasya covācāśruyutekṣaṇaḥ |
devyāḥ prasādamatulaṃ premagadgaditāṃtaraḥ ||32||
prārthayāmāsa tāṃ mālāṃ taṃ muniṃ sa satīpitā |
adeyaṃ śaktibhaktāya nāsti trailokya maṃḍale ||33||
iti buddhadhā tu tāṃ mālāṃ manave sa samarpayat |
gṛhītā śirasā mālā manunā nijamaṃdire || 34 ||
sthāpitā śayanaṃ yatra daṃpatyoratisundaram |
paśukarmarato rātrī mālāgaṃdhena moditaḥ || 35 ||
abhavatsa mahīpālastena pāpena śaṃkare |
śive dveṣamatirjāto devyāṃ satyāṃ tathā nṛpa || 36 ||
rājaṃstenāparādhena tajjanyo deha eva ca |
satyā yogāgninā dagdhaḥ satīdharmadidṛkṣayā || 37||
punaśca himavatpṛṣṭhe prādurāsīttu tanmahaḥ |
janamejaya uvāca
dahyamāne satīdehe jāte kimakarocchivaḥ ||38||
prāṇādhikā satī tasya tadviyogena kātaraḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
tataḥ paraṃ tu yajjātaṃ mayā vaktuṃ na śakyate || 39 ||
trailokyapralayo jātaḥ śivakopāgninā nṛpa |
vīrabhadraḥ samutpanno bhadrakālīgaṇānvitaḥ ||40||
trailokyanāśanodyukto vīrabhadro yadā'bhavat |
brahmādayastadā devāḥ śaṃkaraṃ śaraṇaṃ yayuḥ || 41 ||
jāte sarvasvanāśe'pi karuṇānidhirīśvaraḥ |
abhayaṃ dattavāṃstebhyo bastavaktreṇa taṃ manum ||42 ||
ajīvayanmahātmā'sau tataḥ khinno maheśvaraḥ |
yajñavāṭamupāgamya ruroda bhṛśaduḥkhitaḥ ||43||
apaśyattāṃ satīṃ vahno dahyamānāṃ tu citkalām |
skaṃdhe'pyāropayāmāsa hā satīti vadanmuhuḥ ||44 ||
babhrāma bhrāṃtacittaḥ sannānādeśeṣu śaṃkaraḥ |
tadā brahmādayo devāścitāmāpuranuttamām ||45||
viṣṇustu tvarayā tatra dhanurudyamya mārgaṇaiḥ |
cicchedāvayavānsatyāstattatsthāneṣu te'patan ||46||
tattatsthāneṣu tatrāsīnnānāmūrtidharo haraḥ |
uvāca ca tato devānsthāneṣyeteṣu yo śivām ||47|| .
bhajaṃti parayā bhaktyā teṣāṃ kiñcinna durlabham |
nityaṃ sannihitā tatra nijāṅgeṣu parāmbikā ||48 ||
sthāneṣveteṣu ye martyāḥ puraścaraṇakarmiṇaḥ |
teṣāṃ maṃtrāḥ prasiddhayanti māyāvījaṃ viśeṣataḥ || 49||
ityuktvā śaṃkarasteṣu sthāneṣu virahāturaḥ |
kālaṃ ninye nṛpaśreṣṭhaṃ japadhyānasamādhibhiḥ || 50||
janamejaya uvāca
kāni sthānāni tāni syuḥ siddhapīṭhāni cānagha |
kati saṃkhyāni nāmāni kāni teṣāṃ ca me vada ||51||
tatra sthitānāṃ devīnāṃ nāmāni ca kṛpākara| kṛtārtho'haṃ bhave yena tadvadāśu mahāmune ||52||

vyāsa uvāca
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi devīpīṭhāni sāṃpratam |
yeṣāṃ śravaṇamātreṇa pāpahīno bhavennaraḥ || 53 ||
yeṣu yeṣu ca pīṭheṣūpāsyeyaṃ siddhikāṃkṣibhiḥ |
bhūtikāmairabhidhyeyā tāni vakṣyāmi tattvataḥ || 54 ||
vārāṇasyāṃ viśālākṣī gaurī mukhanivāsinī |
kṣetre va naimiṣāraṇye proktā sā liṃgadhāriṇī || 55||
prayāge lalitā proktā kāmukī gaṃdhamādane |
mānase kumudā proktā dakṣiṇe cottare tathā || 56 ||
viśvakāmā bhagavatī viśvakāmaprapūraṇī |
gomante gomatī devī mandare kāmacāriṇī ||57||
madotkaṭā caitrarathe jayantī hastināpure |
gaurī proktā kānyakubje rambhā tu malayācale ||58||
ekāmrapīṭhe samproktā devī sā kortimatyapi |
viśve viśveśvarīṃ prāhuḥ puruhūtāṃ ca puṣkare || 59||
kedārapīṭhe samproktā devī sanmārgadāyinī |
mandā himavataḥ pṛṣṭhe gokarṇe bhadrakaṇikā || 60||
sthāneśvarī bhavānī tū bilvake bilvapatrikā |
śrīśaile mādhavī proktā bhadrā bhadreśvare tathā || 61 ||
vārāhaśaile tu jayā kamalā kamalālaye |
rudrāṇī rudrakoṭayāṃ tu kālī kālaṃjare tathā || 62 ||
śālagrāme mahādevī śivaliṃge jalapriyā |
mahāliṃge tu kapilā mākoṭe kuṭeśvarī || 63 ||
māyāpuryāṃ kumārī syātsaṃtāne lalitāṃbikā |
gayāyāṃ maṃgalā proktā vimalā puruṣottame ||64ḥ
utpalākṣī sahasrākṣe hiraṇyākṣe mahotpalā |
vipāśāyāmamoghākṣī pāḍalā puṃḍravardhane || 65 ||
nārāyaṇī supārśve tu trikūṭe rudrasundarī |
vipule vipulā devī kalyāṇī malayācale || 66 ||
sahyādrāvekavīrā tu hariścandre tu candrikā |
ramaṇā rāmatīrthe tu yamunāyāṃ mṛgāvatī || 67 ||
koṭavī koṭatīrthe tu sugandhā mādhave vane |
godāvaryāṃ trisandhyā tu gaṅgādvāre ratipriyā || 68 ||
śivakuḍe śubhānaṃdā naṃdinī devikātaṭe |
rukmiṇī dvāravatyāṃ tu rādhā vṛndāvane vane || 69 ||
devakī mathurāyāṃ tu pātāle parameśvarī |
citrakūṭe tathā sītā vidhye vidhyādhivāsinī || 70 ||
karavīre mahālakṣmīrumā devī vināyake |
ārogyā vaidyanāthe tu mahākāle maheśvarī || 71 ||
abhayetyuṣṇatīrtheṣu nitambā vidhyaparvate |
māṃḍavye māṇḍavī nāma svāhā māheśvarīpure || 72 ||
chagalaṇḍe pracaṇḍā tu caṃḍikā marakaṇṭake |
someśvare varārohā prabhāse puṣkarāvatī ||73||
devamātā sarasvatyāṃ pārāvārātaṭe smṛtā |
mahālaye mahābhāgā payoṣṇyāṃ piṃgaleśvarī ||74||
siṃhikā kṛtaśauce tu kārtike tvatiśāṃkarī |
utpalāvarta ke lolā subhadrā śoṇasaṅgame || 75 ||
mātā siddhavane lakṣmīranaṃgā bharatāśrame |
jālandhare viśvamukhī tārā kiṣkiṃdhaparvate ||76||
devadāruvane puṣṭirmedhā kāśmīramaṇḍale |
bhīmā devī himādrau tu tuṣṭiviśveśvarī tathā || 77 ||
kapālamocane śuddhirmātā kāyāvarohaṇe |
śaṃkhoddhāre dharā nāma dhṛtiḥ piṃḍārake tathā || 78||
kalā tu candrabhāgāyāmacchode śivadhāriṇī |
veṇāyāmamṛtā nāma badaryāmurvaśī tathā || 79 ||

auṣadhiścottarakurau kuśadvīpe kuśodakā |
manmathā hemakūṭe tu kumude satyavādinī || 80 ||
aśvatthe vaṃdanīyā tu nidhirvaiśravaṇālaye |
gāyatrī vedavadane pārvatī śivasannidhau ||81||
devaloke tathedrāṇī brahmāsyeṣu sarasvatī |
sūryabiṃbe prabhā nāma mātṝṇāṃ vaiṣṇavī matā || 82||
arundhatī satīnāṃ tu rāmānu ca tilottamā |
citte brahmakalā nāma śaktiḥ sarvaśarīriṇām || 83||
imānyaṣṭaśatāni syuḥ pīṭhāni janamejaya |
tatsaṃkhyākāstadīśānyo devyaśca parikīrtitāḥ || 84||
satīdevyaṃgabhūtāni pīṭāni kathitāni ca |
anyānyapi prasaṃgena yāni mukhyāni bhūtale || 85 ||
yaḥ smarecchṛṇuyāpi nāmāṣṭaśatamuttamam |
sarvapāpavinirmako devīlokaṃ paraṃ vrajet || 86||
eteṣu sarvapīṭheṣu gacchedyātrāvidhānataḥ |
santarpayecca pitrādīñchrāddhādīni vidhāya ca || 87 ||
kuryācca mahatī pūjāṃ bhagavatyā vidhānataḥ |
kṣamāpayejjagaddhātrīṃ jagadamvā muhurmuhuḥ || 88 ||
kṛtakṛtyaṃ svamātmānaṃ jānīyājjanamejaya |
bhakṣyabhojyādibhiḥ sarvānbrahmaṇānbhojayettataḥ 89 ||
suvāsinī kumārīśca baṭukādīṃstathā nṛpa |
tasminkṣetre sthitā ye tu cāṃḍālādyā api prabho ||
devīrūpāḥ smṛtāḥ sarve pūjanīyāstato hi te |
pratigrahādikaṃ sarvaṃ teṣu kṣetreṣu varjayet || 91 ||
yathāśakti puraścaryāṃ kuryānmaṃtrasya sattamaḥ |
māyāvījena deveśoṃ tattatpīṭhādhivāsinīm || 92||
pūjayedani rājanpuraścaraṇakṛdbhavet |
vittaśāṭhyaṃ na kurvīta devī bhaktiparo naraḥ || 93||
ya evaṃ kurute yātrāṃ śrīdevyāḥ prītamānasaḥ |
sahasrakalpaparyaṃtaṃ brahmaloke mahattare ||94||
saṃdi pitarastasya so'pi devīpure tathā |
aṃte labdhvā paraṃ jñānaṃ bhavenmukto bhavāṃbudheḥ || 95 ||
nāmāṣṭaśatajāpena bahavaḥ siddhatāṃ siddhatāṃ gatāḥ |
yatraitallikhitaṃ sākṣātpustake vāpi tiṣṭhati || 96 ||
grahamārī bhayādīni tatra naiva bhavaṃti hi |
saubhāgyaṃ vardhate nityaṃ yathā parvaṇi vāridhiḥ || 97 ||
na tasya durlabhaṃ kicinnāmāṣṭaśatajāpinaḥ |
kṛtakṛtyo bhavennūnaṃ devībhaktiparāyaṇaḥ ||98||
narmati devatāstaṃ vai devīrūpo hi sa smṛtaḥ |
sarvathā pūjyate devaiḥ kiṃ punarmanujottamaiḥ || 99||
śrāddhakāle paṭhedetannāmāṣṭaśatamuttamam |
tṛptāstatpitaraḥ sarve prayāṃti paramāṃ gatim || 100 ||
imāni muktikṣetrāṇi sākṣātsaṃvinmayāni ca |
siddhapīṭhāni rājeṃdra saṃśrayenmatimānnaraḥ || 101 ||
pṛṣṭaṃ yattattvayā rājannuktaṃ sarvaṃ maheśituḥ |
rahasyātirahasyaṃ ca kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 102 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe triṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 30 ||
atha ekatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
dharādharādhīśamaulāvāvirāsītparaṃ mahaḥ |
yaduktaṃ bhavatā pūrva vistarāttadvadasva me ||1||

ko virajyeta matimānpibañcchaktikathāmṛtam |
sudhāṃ tu pibatāṃ mṛtyuḥ sa naitacchṛṇvato bhavet ||2||
vyāsa uvāca
dhanyosi kṛtakṛtyo'si śikṣito'si mahātmabhiḥ |
bhāgyavānasi yaddevyāṃ nirvyājā bhaktirasti te || 3 ||
śṛṇu rājanpurāvṛttaṃ satī dehe'gnirbhājite |
bhrāṃtaḥ śivastu babhrāma kvacideśe sthiro'bhavat ||4||
prapañcamānarahitaḥ samādhigatamānasaḥ |
dhyāyandevīsvarūpaṃ tū kālaṃ ninye sa ātmavān || 5 ||
saubhāgyarahitaṃ jātaṃ trailokyaṃ sacarācaram |
śaktihīnaṃ jagatsarvaṃ sādhidrīpaṃ saparvatam || 6||
ānandaḥ śuṣkatāṃ yātaḥ sarveṣāṃ hṛdayāṃtare |
udāsīnāḥ sarvalokācitājarjaracetasaḥ ||7||
sadā duḥkhodadhau magnā roga prastāstadā'bhavan |
grahāṇāṃ devatānāṃ ca vaiparītyena vartanam ||85
adhibhūtādhidevānāṃ satyabhāvānnṛpābhavan |
athāsminneva kāle tu tārakākhyo mahāsuraḥ ||9||
brahmadattavaro daityo'bhavattrailokyanāyakaḥ |
śivīrasastu yaḥ putraḥ sa te haṃtā bhaviṣyati || 10 ||
iti |
kalpitamṛtyuḥ sa devadevairmahāsuraḥ |
śivaurasasutābhāvājjagarja ca nanāda ca ||11||
tena copadrutāḥ sarve svasthānātpracyutāḥ surāḥ |
śivīrasasutābhāvāccitāmāpuratyayām || 12 ||
nāṅganā śaṃkarasyāsti kathaṃ tatsutasambhavaḥ |
asmākaṃ bhāgyahīnānāṃ kathaṃ kārya bhaviṣyati ||13||
iti cintāturāḥ sarve jagmurvaikuṇṭhamaṇḍale |
śaśaṃsurharimekāṃte sa copāyaṃ jagāda ha || 14 ||
kutaścitāturāḥ sarve kāmakalpadrumā śivā |
jāgati bhuvaneśānī maṇidvīpādhivāsinī || 15 ||
asmākamanayādeva tadupekṣāsti nānyathā |
śikṣaiveyaṃ jaganmātrā kṛtā'smacchikṣaṇāya ca ||16||
lālane tāḍane māturnākāruṇyaṃ yathārbhake |
tadvadeva jaganmātuniyantrayā guṇadoṣayoḥ || 17||
aparādho bhavatyeva tanayasya pade pade |
ko'paraḥ sahate loke kevalaṃ mātaraṃ vinā ||18||
tasmādyūyaṃ parāmbāṃ tāṃ śaraṇaṃ yāta mā ciram |
nirvyājayā cittavṛttyā sā vaḥ kārya vidhāsyati ||
ityādiśya surānsarvānmahāviṣṇuḥ svajāyayā |
saṃyuto nirjagāmāśu devaiḥ saha surādhipaḥ || 20 ||
ājagāma mahāśailaṃ himavantaṃ nagādhipam |
abhavaṃśca surāḥ sarve puraścaraṇakarmiṇaḥ || 21 ||
ambāyajñavidhānajñā ambāyajñaṃ ca cakrire |
tṛtīyādivratānyāśu cakruḥ sarve surā nṛpa || 22 ||
kecitsamādhiniṣṇātāḥ kecinnāmaparāyaṇāḥ |
kecitsūktaparāḥ kecinnāmapārāyaṇotsukāḥ ||23||
maṃtrapārāyaṇaparā: kecitkṛcchrādikāriṇaḥ |
antaryāgaparāḥ kecitkecinnyāsaparāyaṇāḥ ||24||
hṛllekhayā parāśakteḥ pūjāṃ cakruratandritāḥ |
ityevaṃ bahuvarṣāṇi kālo'gājjanamejaya || 25 ||
akasmākaccaitramāsīyanavamyāṃ ca bhṛgodine |
prādurbabhūva puratastanmahaḥ śrutibodhitam ||26||
caturdikṣu caturvedairmūrtimadbhirabhiṣṭutam |
koṭisūryapratīkāśaṃ candrakoṭisuśītalam ||27||
vidyutkoṭisamānābhamaruṇaṃ tatparaṃ mahaḥ |
naiva cordhva na tiryakca na madhye parijagrabhat ||28||

ādyaṃtarahitaṃ tattu na hastādyaṃgasaṃyutam |
na ca strīrūpamathavā na puṃrūpamathobhayam ||29||
dīpalyā pidhānaṃ netrāṇāṃ teṣāmāsīnmahīpate |
punaśca dhairyamālaṃbya yāvatte dadṛśuḥ surāḥ || 30 ||
tāvattadeva strīrūpeṇābhāditryaṃ manoharam |
atīva ramaṇīyāṃgoṃ kumārī navayauvanām ||31||
udyatpīnakucaniṃditāṃbhojakuḍmalām |
raṇatkikiṇikā jālasiṃjanmaṃjīramekhalām ||32||
kanakāṃgada keyūragraiveyaka vibhūṣitām |
anarghya māṇasaṃ bhinnagalabaṃdha virājitām ||33||
tanuketakasaṃ rājannīlabhramarakuṃtalām |
nitambabisubhagā romarājivirājitām ||34||
karpūraśakalonmiśratāṃbūlapūritānanām |
kanatkanakatāṭaṃkaviṭaṃkabadanāmbujām ||35||
aṣṭamīcandravimbābhalalāṭāmāyatabhruvam |
raktāravindanayanāmunnasāṃ madhurādharām ||36||
kuṃdakuḍmaladaṃtāgrāṃ muktāhāravirājitām |
ratnasaṃbhinnamukuṭāṃ candrarekhāvataṃsinīm ||37|
mallikāmālatīmālākeśapāśavirājitām |
kāśmīrabinduniṭilāṃ netrayavilāsinīm || 38||
pāśāṃkuśavarābhīticaturbāhuṃ trilocanām |
raktavastraparīdhānāṃ dāḍimī kusumaprabhām || 39||
sarvaśṛṅgāraveṣāḍhyāṃ sarvadevanamaskṛtām |
srarbāśāpūrikāṃ sarvamātaraṃ sarvamohinīm ||40||
prasādasumukhamaṃtrāṃ mandasmitamukhāṃbujām |
avyājakaruṇāmūrti dadṛśuḥ purataḥ surāḥ || 41||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ karuṇāmūrti praṇemuḥ sādaraṃ surāḥ |
vaktuṃ nāśaknuvan kiṃcidvāṣpapūritalocanāḥ ||42||
kathaṃcitsthairyamālaṃbya bhaktyā cānatakandharāḥ |
premāśrupūrṇanayanāstuṣṭuvurjagadambikām ||43||
devā ūcuḥ
namo devyai mahādevyai śivāyai satataṃ namaḥ |
namaḥ prakṛtyai bhadrāyai niyatāḥ praṇatāḥ sma tām 44||
tāmagnivarṇāṃ tapasā jvalaṃtīṃ vairocanoṃ karmaphaleṣu juṣṭām |
durgā devīṃ śaraṇamahaṃ prapadye sutarasi tarase namaḥ ||45 ||
devīṃ vācamajanayaṃta devāstāṃ viśvarūpāḥ paśavo vadati |
sā no mandreṣamūrjaṃ duhānā ghenurvāgasmānupasuṣṭutaṃtu ||46 ||
kālarātri brahmastutāṃ vaiṣṇavīṃ skandamātaram i
sarasvatīmaditi dakṣatuhitaraṃ namāmaḥ pāvanāṃ śivām ||47 ||
mahālakṣmyai ca vidmahe sarvaśaktyai ca dhīmahi |
tanno devī pracodayāt ||48||
namo virāṭsvarūpiṇyai namaḥ sūtrātmamūrtaye |
namo vyākṛtarūpiṇyai namaḥ śrībrahmamūrtaye || 49 ||
yadajñānājjagadbhāti rajjusarpatragādivat |
yajjñānāllayamāpnoti numastāṃ bhuvaneśvarīm ||50||
cidekarasarūpiṇīm |
akhaṃḍānandarūpāṃ tāṃ vedatātparya bhūmikām ||51||
numastatpadalakṣyārthāṃ
pañcakośātiriktāṃ tāmavasthātrayasākṣiṇīm |
numastvaṃpadalakṣyārthāṃ pratyagātmasvarūpiṇīm ||52||

namaḥ praṇavarūpāyai namo hrīṃkāramūrtaye |
nānāmaṃtrātmikāyai te karuṇāyai namo namaḥ || 53 ||
iti stutā tadā devairmaṇidvīpādhivāsinī |
prāha vācā madhurayā mattakokilaniḥsvanā ||54||
śrīdevyuvāca
vadantu vibudhāḥ kāryaṃ yadarthamiha saṃgatāḥ |
varadā'haṃ sadā bhaktakāmakalpadramā'smi ca || 55 ||
tiṣṭaṃtyāṃ mayi kā citā yuṣmākaṃ bhaktiśālinām |
samuddharāmi madbhūtānduḥkhasaṃsārasāgarāt ||56||
iti pratijñāṃ me satyāṃ jānītha vibudhottamāḥ |
iti premākulāṃ vāṇīṃ śrutvā saṃtuṣṭamānasāḥ || 57 ||
nirbhayā nirjarā rājantūcurduḥkhaṃ svakīyakam |
devā ūcuḥ
nājñātaṃ kiṃcidapyatra bhavatyā'sti jagattraye || 58 ||
sarvajñayā sarvasākṣirūpiṇyā parameśvari |
tārakeṇāsurendreṇa pīḍitāḥ smo divāniśam ||59||
śivāṅgajādvadhastasya nirmito brahmaṇā śive |
śivāṅganā tu naivāsti jānāsi tvaṃ maheśvari || 60||
sarvajñapurataḥ kiṃ vā vaktatryaṃ pāmarairjanaiḥ |
etaduddeśataḥ proktamaparaṃ tarkayāmbike ||62||
sarvadā caraṇāṃbhoje bhaktiḥ syāttava niścalā |
prārthanīyamidaṃ mukhyamaparaṃ dehahetave || 62||
iti teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā provāca parameśvarī |
mama śaktistu yā gaurī bhaviṣyati himālaye || 63||
śivāya sā pradeyā syātsā vaḥ kāryaṃ vidhāsyati |
bhaktiryaccaraṇāṃbhoje bhūyādyuṣmākamādarāt || 64||
himālayo hi manasā māmupāste'tibhaktitaḥ |
tatastasya gṛhe janma mama priyakaraṃ matam || 65 ||
vyāsa uvāca
himālayo'pi tacchrutvā'tyanugrahakaraṃ vacaḥ |
bāṣpaiḥ saṃruddhakaṃṭhākṣo mahārājñī vaco'bravīt || 66 ||
mahattaraṃ taṃ kuruṣe yasyānugrahamicchasi |
nocetvāhaṃ jaḍaḥ sthāṇuḥ kva tvaṃ saccitsvarūpiṇī ||
asaṃbhāvyaṃ janmaśataistvatpitṛtvaṃ mamānaghe |
aśvamedhādipuṇyairvā puṇyairvā tatsamādhijaiḥ ||68||
adya prapaṃce kīrtiḥ syājjaganmātā sutā'bhavat |
aho himālayasyāsya dhanyo'sau bhāgyavāniti 69 ||
yasyāstu jaṭhare santi brahmāṃḍānāṃ ca koṭayaḥ |
saiva yasya sutā jātā ko vā syāttatsamo bhuvi ||
na jāne'smatpitṝṇāṃ kiṃ sthānaṃ syānnirmitaṃ param |
etādṛśānāṃ vāsāya yeṣāṃ vaṃśe'sti mādṛśaḥ || 71 ||
idaṃ yathā ca dattaṃ me kṛpayā premapūrṇayā |
sarvavedāntasiddhaṃ ca tvadrūpaṃ brūhi me tathā || 72 ||
yogaṃ ca bhaktisahitaṃ jñānaṃ ca śrutisammatam |
vadasva parameśāni tvamevāhaṃ yato bhaveḥ ||73 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā prasannamukhapaṃkajā |
vaktumārabhatāṃbā sā rahasyaṃ śrutigūhitam ||74 |
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe devīgītāyāmekatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 31 ||

atha dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīdevyuvāca
śravaṇamātreṇa madrapatvaṃ prapadyate ||1||
śṛṇvaṃtu nirjarāḥ sarve vyāharatyā vaco mama |
yasya citsaṃvitparabrahmekanāmakam || 2 ||
ahamevāsa pūrvaṃ tu tadyatkicinnagādhipa | tadātmarūpaṃ
tasya kācitsvataḥ siddhā śaktirmāyeti viśrutā 3 ||
apratarkyamanirdeśyamanaupamyamanāmayam
na satī sā nāsatī ca nobhayātmā virodhataḥ |
etadvilakṣaṇā kācidvastubhūtā'sti sarvadā || 4 ||
pāvakasyoṣṇyateveyamuṣṇāṃśoriva dīdhiti: |
candrasya candrikeveyaṃ mameyaṃ sahajā dhruvā ||5||
tasyāṃ karmāṇi jīvānāṃ jīvāḥ kālaśca saṃcare |
abhedena vilīnāḥ syuḥ suṣuptau vyavahāravat || 6 |
svaśakteśca samāyogādahaṃ bījātmatāṃ gatā |
svādhārāvaraṇāttasyā doṣatvaṃ ca samāgatam ||7||
samavāyitvamucyate || 8 ||
caitanyasya samāyogānnimittatvaṃ ca kathyate | prapañcapariṇāmācca
kecittāṃ tapa ityāhustamaḥ kecijjaḍaṃ pare |
jñānaṃ māyā pradhānaṃ ca prakṛti śaktimapyajām || 9 ||
prāhurvedatattvāryacitakāḥ || 10 ||
vimarśa iti tāṃ prāhuḥ śaivaśāstraviśāradāḥ | avidyāmitare
evaṃ nānāvidhāni syurnāmāni nigamādiṣu |
tasyā jaḍatvaṃ dṛśyatvājjñānanāśāttato'satī || 11 ||
caitanyasya na dṛśyatvaṃ dṛśyatvaṃ jaḍameva tat |
svaprakāśaṃ ca caitanyaṃ na pareṇa prakāśitam || 12||
anavasthādoṣasattvānna svenāpi prakāśitam |
karmakartrīvirodhaḥ syāttasmāttadopavatsvayam ||13||
prakāśamānamanyeṣāṃ bhāṃsakaṃ viddhi parvata |
ataeva ca nityatvaṃ siddhasaṃvittanormama || 14 ||
jāgratsvapna suṣuptyādī dṛśyasya vyabhicārataḥ |
saṃvido vyabhicāraśca nānubhūto'sti karhicit || 15 ||
jāgratsvapnasuṣuptyādau
yadi tasyāpyanubhavastarhyayaṃ yena sākṣiṇā |
anubhūtaḥ sa evātra śiṣṭaḥ saṃvidvapuḥ purā || 16 ||
ataeva ca nityatvaṃ proktaṃ sacchāstrakovidaiḥ |
ānandarūpatā cāsyāḥ parapremāspadatvataḥ || 17||
māna bhūvaṃ hi bhūyāsamiti premātmani sthitam |
sarvasyānyasya mithyātvādasaṃgatvaṃ sphuṭaṃ mama || 18 ||
aparicchinnatāpyevamata eva matā mama |
tacca jñānaṃ nātmadharmo dharmatve jaḍatātmanaḥ ||19||
jñānasya jaḍaśeṣatvaṃ na dṛṣṭaṃ na ca saṃbhavi |
ciddharmatvaṃ tathā nāsti citaścinna hi vidyate ||20||
sarvadā |
satyaḥ pūrṇo'pyasaṃgaśca dvaitajālavivarjitaḥ ||21||
tasmādātmajñānarūpaḥ sukharūpaśca kālakarmavipākataḥ ||22||
sa punaḥ kāmakarmādi yuktayā svīyamāyayā |
pūrvānubhūtasaṃskārāt kathitaste nagāvipa ||23||
āṃvavekācca tattvasya sisṛkṣāvānprajāyate | abuddhipūrvaḥ sargo'yaṃ
māyāśabalamityapi || 24 ||
etaddhi yanmayā proktaṃ mama rūpamalaukikam | avyākṛtaṃ tadavyaktaṃ
procyate sarvaśāstreṣu sarvakāraṇakāraṇam |
tattvanāmādibhūtaṃ ca saccidānandavigraham ||25||

sarva karmaghanībhūtamicchājñānakriyāśrayam |
hrīṃkāramantravācyaṃ tadāditattvaṃ yaducyate || 26 ||
tasmādākāśa utpannaḥ śabdatanmātrarūpakaḥ |
bhavetsparśātmako vāyustejorūpātmakaṃ punaḥ ||27||
jalaṃ rasātmakaṃ paścāttato gaṃdhātmikā dharā |
śabdaikaguṇa ākāśo vāyuḥ sparśaravānvitaḥ || 28 ||
śabdasparśarūpaguṇaṃ teja ityucyate budhaiḥ |
śabdasparśarūparasairāpo vedaguṇāḥ smṛtāḥ ||29||
śabdasparśarūparasagandhaiḥ pañcaguṇā dharā |
tebhyo'bhavanmahatsūtraṃ yalliṃgaṃ paricakṣate ||30||
sarvātmakaṃ tatsaṃproktaṃ sūkṣmadeho'yamātmanaḥ |
avyaktakāraṇī dehaḥ sa coktaḥ pūrvameva hi || 31 ||
yasmiñjagadvījarūpaṃ sthitaṃ liṃgodbhavo yataḥ |
tataḥ sthūlāni bhūtāni pañcīkaraṇamārgataḥ ||32||
pañcasaṃkhyāni jāyante tatprakārastvathocyate |
pūrvoktāni ca bhūtāmi pratyekaṃ vibhajedvidhā || 33||
ekaikaṃ bhāgamekasya caturdhā vibhajedgire |
svasvetaradvitīyāṃśe yojanātpañca pañca te ||34||
tatkārya ca virāḍdehaḥ sthūla deho'yamātmanaḥ |
pañcabhūtasthasattvāṃśaiḥ śrotrādīnāṃ samudbhavaḥ ||35||
jñānendriyāṇāṃ rājendra pratyekaṃ militaistu taiḥ |
antaḥkaraṇamekaṃ syādvṛttibhedāccaturvidham ||36|
yadā tu saṃkalpavikalpa kṛtyaṃ tadā bhavettanmana ityabhivyam |
syābuddhisaṃjñaṃ ca yadā pravetti suniścitaṃ saṃśayahīna rūpam ||37||
anusaṃdhānarūpaṃ taccittaṃ ca parikīrtitam |
ahaṃkṛtyātmavṛttyā tu tadāhaṃkāratāṃ gatam ||38||
teṣāṃ rajoṃśairjñātāni kramātkarmendriyāṇi ca |
pratyekaṃ militaistaistu prāṇo bhavati paṃcadhā ||39||
hṛdi prāṇo gude'pāno nābhisthastu samānakaḥ |
kaṃṭhadeśepyudānaḥ syādrdhānaḥ sarvaśarīragaḥ ||40||
jñānendriyāṇi paṃcaiva paṃca karmendriyāṇi ca |
prāṇādipaṃcakaṃ caiva dhiyā ca sahitaṃ manaḥ || 41||
etatsūkṣmaṃ śarīraṃ syānmama liṃgaṃ yaducyate |
tatra yā prakṛtiḥ proktā sā rājandvividhā smṛtā ||
sattvātmikā tu māyā syādavidyāguṇamiśritā |
svāśrayaṃ yā tu saṃrakṣetsā māyeti nigadyate ||43||
tasyā yatpratibimbaṃ syādvimbabhūtasya ceśituḥ |
sa īśvaraḥ samākhyātaḥ svāśrayajñānavānparaḥ ||44||
sarvajñaḥ sarvakartā ca sarvānugrahakārakaḥ |
avidyāyāṃ tu yatkicitprativimbaṃ nagādhipa ||45||
tadeva jīvasaṃjñaṃ syātsarvaduḥkhāśrayaṃ punaḥ |
dvayorapīha saṃproktaṃ dehatrayamavidyayā || 46 ||
dehatrayābhimānāccāpyabhūnnāmatrayaṃ punaḥ |
prājñastu kāraṇātmā syātsūkṣmadehī tu taijasaḥ 47 || tu
sthūladehī tu viśvākhyastrividhaḥ parikīrtitaḥ |
evamīśo'pi saṃprokta īśasūtra virāṭpadaiḥ ||48||
prathama vyaṣṭirūpastu samayātmā paraḥ smṛtaḥ |
sa hi sarveśvaraḥ sākṣājjīvānugrahakāmyayā || 49||
karoti vividhaṃ viśvaṃ nāmabhogāśrayaṃ punaḥ |
macchaktiprerito nityaṃ mayi rājanprakalpitaḥ ||50||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate saptamaskandhe devīgītāyāṃ dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 32||

atha trayastriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
devyuvāca
manmāyāśaktisaṃklṛptaṃ jagatsarvaṃ carācaram |
sāpi mattaḥ pṛthaṅmāyā nāstyeva paramārthataḥ || 1 ||
vyavahāradṛśā seyaṃ vidyā māyeti viśrutā |
tattvādṛṣṭyā tu nāstyeva tattvamevāsti kevalam ||2||
sāhaṃ sarvaṃ jagatsṛṣṭvā tadaṃtaḥ praviśāmyaham |
māyākarmādisahitā gire prāṇapuraḥsarā ||3||
lokāntaragatirno cetkathaṃ syāditi hetunā |
yathā yathā bhavatyeva māyābhedāstathā tathā || 4 ||
upādhibhedādbhinnā'haṃ ghaṭākāśādayo yathā |
uccanīcādivastūni bhāsayanbhāskaraḥ sadā || 5|| ||5||
na duṣyati tathaivāhaṃ doṣailiptā kadāpi na |
mayi buddhayādikartṛtvaṃ madhyasyaivāpare janāḥ ||6||
bhedatastathā ||7||
vadaṃti cātmā karmeti vimūढ़ā na subuddhayaḥ | ajñānabhedatastadvanmāyāyā
jīveśvaravibhāgaśca kalpito māyayaiva tu |
ghaṭākāśamahākāśavibhāgaḥ kalpito yathā || 8||
tathaiva kalpito bhedo jīvātmaparamātmanoḥ |
yathā jīvabahutvaṃ ca māyayaiva na ca svataḥ || 9 ||
tatheśvarabahutvaṃ ca māyayā na svabhāvataḥ | dehendriyasaṃghātavāsanā bhedabheditā 113011
avidyā jīvabhedasya heturnānyaḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
guṇānāṃ vāsanābhedabheditā yā ghara para || 11 |
māyā sā parabhedasya heturnānyaḥ kadācana |
mayi sarvamidaṃ protamotaṃ ca dharaṇīdhara || 12||
īśvaro'haṃ ca sūtrātmā virāḍātmāhamasmi ca |
brahmāhaṃ viṣṇurudroca gaurī brāhmī ca vaiṣṇavī ||13||
sūryo'haṃ tārakāścāhaṃ tārakeśastathā'smyaham |
paśupakṣisvarūpāhaṃ cāṃḍālo'haṃ ca taskaraḥ || 14 ||
vyāgho'haṃ krūrakarmāhaṃ satkarmāhaṃ mahājanaḥ |
strīpunnapuṃsakā kāro'pyahameva na saṃśayaḥ || 15 ||
yacca kiṃcitkvaci tu dṛśyate śrūyate'pi vā |
aṃtarbahiśca tatsarvaṃ vyāpyāhaṃ sarvadā sthitā || 16 ||
na tadasti mayā tyaktaṃ vastu kiṃciccarācaram |
yadyasti cettacchūnyaṃ syādvaṃdhyāputropamaṃ hi tat || 17||
rajjuryathā sarpamālābhedairekā vibhāti hi |
tathaiveśādirūpeṇa bhāmyahaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 18 ||
adhiṣṭhānātirekeṇa kalpitaṃ tanna bhāsate |
tasmānmatsattayaivaitatsattāvannānyathā bhavet || 19 ||
himālaya uvāca
yathā vadasi deveśi samaṣṭyātmavapustvidam |
tathaiva draṣṭumicchāmi yadi devi kṛpāmayī || 20 ||
vyāsa uvāca
tadvacaḥ ||21||
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā sarve devāḥ saviṣṇavaḥ | nanaṃdurmuditātmānaḥ pūjayaṃtaśca
atha devamataṃ jñātvā bhaktakāmadughā śivā |
adarśayannijaṃ rūpaṃ bhaktakāmaprapūraṇī ||22||
apaśyaṃste mahādevyā virārūpaṃ parātparam |
dyaurmastakaṃ bhavedyasya candrasūryau ca cakṣuṣī ||23||

śrīmadevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 33 513
diśaḥ śrotre vaco vedāḥ prāṇo vāyuḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
viśvaṃ hṛdayamityāhuḥ pṛthivī jaghanaṃ smṛtam ||24||
nabhastalaṃ nābhisaro jyotiścakramuraḥsthalam |
maharlokastu grīvā syājjanaloko mukhaṃ smṛtam ||25||
tapoloko rarāṭistu satyalokādadhaḥ sthitaḥ |
iṃdrādayo bāhavaḥ syuḥ śabdaḥ śrotraṃ maheśituḥ ||26||
nāsatyadasro nāse sto gandhaḥ prāṇaṃ smṛto vudhaiḥ |
mukhamagniḥ samākhyāto divārātrīca pakṣmaṇī ||27||
brahmasthānaṃ bhrūvijṛmbho'dhyāpastāluḥ prakīrtitāḥ |
raso jihvā samākhyātā yamā daṃṣṭrāḥ prakīrtitāḥ ||28||
daṃtā: snehakalā yasya hāso māyā prakīrtitā |
sargastvapāṃgamokṣaḥ syādvīḍordhvoṣṭho maheśituḥ 29 ||
lobhaḥ syādadharoṣṭho'syā dharmamārgastu pṛṣṭhabhūḥ |
prajāpatiśca meḍhūṃ syādyaḥ sraṣṭā jagatītale || 30 ||
kukṣiḥ samudrā girayossthīni devyā maheśituḥ | nadyo nāḍyaḥ samākhyātā vṛkṣāḥ keśāḥ prakīrtitāḥ 31
kaumārayovanaja rāva yo'syā gatiruttamā |
balāhakāstu keśāḥ syuḥ saṃdhye te vāsasī vibhoḥ 32 ||
rājañchrījagadaṃbāyāścaṃdramāstu manaḥ smṛtaḥ |
vijñānaśaktistu harī rudro'ntaḥkaraṇaṃ smṛtam ||33||
aśvādijātayaḥ sarvāḥ śroṇideśe sthitā vibhoḥ |
atalādimahālokāḥ kaṭayadhobhāgatāṃ gatāḥ ||34||
'etādṛśaṃ mahārūpaṃ dadṛśuḥ surapuṃgavāḥ |
jvālamālāsahasrāḍhyaṃ lelihānaṃ ca jihvayā || 35 ||
daṃṣṭrākaṭakaṭārāvaṃ jamataṃ bahnimakṣibhiḥ |
nāmāyudhadharaṃ vīraṃ brahmakṣatrodanaṃ ca yat ||36||
sahasraśīrṣanayanaṃ sahasracaraṇaṃ tathā |
koṭisūryapratīkāśaṃ vidyutkoṭisamaprabham ||37||
bhayaṃkaraṃ mahāghoraṃ hṛdakṣṇostrāsakārakam |
dadṛśuste surāḥ sarve hāhākāraṃ ca cakrire ||38||
vikaṃpamānahṛdayā mūrcchāmāpurduratyayām |
smaraṇaṃ ca gataṃ teṣāṃ jagadaṃbeyamityapi || 39 ||
aba te ye sthitā vedāścaturdikṣu mahāvibhoḥ |
bodhayāmāsuratyugraṃ mūrchāto mūcchitānsurān ||40||
ata te dhairyamālaṃvya labdhvā ca śrutimuttamām |
premāśrupūrṇanayanā ruddhakaṃṭhāstu nirjarāḥ || 41 ||
bāṣpagadgadayā bācā stotuṃ samupacakrire |
devā ūcuḥ
aparādhaṃ kṣamasvāṃba pāhi dīnāṃstvadudbhavān ||42||
kopaṃ saṃhara deveśi sabhayā rūpadarśanāt |
kā te stutiḥ prakartavyā pāmarainirjarairiha ||43||
svasyāpyajñeya evāsau yāvānyaśca svavikramaḥ |
tadarbāgjāyamānānāṃ kathaṃ sa viṣayo bhavet || 44||
namaste bhuvaneśāni namaste praṇavātmike |
sarvavedāntasiddhe namo hrīṃkāramūrtaye ||45||
yasmādagniḥ samutpanno yasmātsūryaśca caṃdramāḥ |
yasmādoṣadhayaḥ sarvāstasmai sarvātmane namaḥ || 46 ||
yasmācca devāḥ saṃbhūtāḥ sādhyāḥ pakṣiṇa eva ca |
paśavaśca manuṣyāśca tasmai sarvātmane namaḥ ||47||
prāṇāpānī vrīhiyavo tapaḥ śraddhā ṛtaṃ tathā |
brahmacaryaṃ vidhiśrava yasmāttasmai namo namaḥ || 48||

sapta prāṇāciṣo yasmātsamidhaḥ sapta eva ca |
homāḥ sapta tathā lokāstasmai sarvātmane namaḥ || 49 ||
yasmātsamudrā girayaḥ siṃghavaḥ pracaraṃti ca |
yasmādoṣadhayaḥ sarvā rasāstasmai namonamaḥ ||50||
yasmādyajñaḥ samudbhūto dīkṣā yūpaśca dakṣiṇā |
ṛco yajūṃṣi sāmāni tasmai sarvātmane namaḥ || 51 ||
namaḥ purastātpṛṣṭhe ca namaste pārśvayordvayoḥ |
adha ūrdhvaṃ caturdikṣu mātarbhūyo namonamaḥ || 52 ||
upasaṃhara deveśi rūpametadalokikam |
tadeva darśayāsmākaṃ rūpaṃ sundarasundaram ||53 ||
vyāsa uvāca
iti bhītānsurāndṛṣṭvā jagadaṃbā kṛpārṇatrā |
saṃhṛtya rūpaṃ ghoraṃ taddarśayāmāsa sundaram ||54 ||
pāśāṃkuśavarābhītidharaṃ sarvāṃgakomalam |
karuṇāpūrṇanayanaṃ maṃdasmitamūkhāṃbujam ||55||
dṛṣṭvā tatsundaraṃ rūpaṃ tadā bhītivivarjitāḥ |
śāṃtacittāḥ praṇemuste harṣagadgadaniḥsvanāḥ || 56 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe devīgītāyāṃ trayastriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 33 ||
atha catustriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
devyuvāca
kva yūyaṃ maṃdabhāgyā vai kvedaṃ rūpaṃ mahādbhutam |
tathāpi bhaktavātsalyādīdṛśaṃ darśitaṃ mayā ||1||
na vedādhyayanairyogerna dānaistapasejyayā |
rūpaṃ draṣṭumidaṃ śakyaṃ kevalaṃ matkṛpāṃ vinā ||2||
prakṛtaṃ śṛṇu rājeṃdra paramātmā'tra jīvatām |
upādhiyogātsaṃprāptaḥ kartṛtvādikamapyuta ||3||
kriyāḥ karoti vividhā dharmādharmaikahetavaḥ |
nānāyonīstataḥ prāpya sukhaduḥkhaiśca yujyate || 4 ||
punastatsaṃskṛtivaśātrānākarmarataḥ sadā |
nānādehānsamāpnoti sukhaduḥkhaiśca yujyate || 5 ||
ghaṭīyaṃtra vadetasya na virāmaḥ kadāpi hi |
ajñānameva mūlaṃ syāttataḥ kāmaḥ kriyāstataḥ ||6||
tasmādajñānanāśāya yateta niyataṃ naraḥ |
etaddhi janmasāphalyaṃ yadā'jñānasya nāśanam ||7||
puruṣārthasamāpti jīvanmuktadaśā'pi ca |
ajñānanāśane śaktā vidyaiva tu paṭīyasī ||8||
na karma tajjaṃ nopāstivirodhābhāvato gire |
pratyutāśā'jñānanāśe karmaṇā naiva bhāvyatām ||9||
anarthadāni karmāṇi punaḥ punaruśaṃti hi |
tato rāgastato dopastato'nartho mahānbhavet || 10 ||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena jñānaṃ saṃpādayennaraḥ |
kurvanneveha karmāṇītyataḥ karmāpyavaśyakam ||11||
jñānādeva hi kaivalyamataḥ syāttatsamuccayaḥ |
sahāyatāṃ vrajetkarma jñānasya hitakāri ca || 12 ||
iti kecidvadaṃtyatra tadvirodhānna saṃbhavet |
jñānāddhṛdgraṃthibhedaḥ syāddhṛdgraṃthau karmasaṃbhavaḥ ||13||
yogapadyaṃ na saṃbhāvyaṃ virodhāttu tatastayoḥ |
tamaḥ prakāśayoryadvadyogapadyaṃ na saṃbhavi || 14 ||

tasmātsarvāṇi karmāṇi vaidikāni mahāmate |
cittaśuddhayaṃtameva syustāni kuryātprayatnataḥ || 15 ||
śamo damastitikṣā ca vairāgyaṃ sattvasaṃbhavaḥ |
tāvatparyantameva syuḥ karmāṇi na tataḥ param ||16||
tadaṃte caiva saṃnyasya saṃśrayedgurumātmavān |
śrotriyaṃ brahmaniṣṭaṃ ca bhaktayā nirvyājayā punaḥ || 17 ||
vedāntaśravaṇaṃ kuryānnityamevamataṃdritaḥ |
tattvamasyādivākyasya nityamarthaṃ vicārayet || 18 ||
tattvamasyādivākyaṃ tu jīvabrahmaikyabodhakam |
aikye jñāte nirbhayastu madrūpo hi prajāyate || 19 ||
padārthāvagatiḥ pūrvaṃ vākyārthāvagatistataḥ |
tatpadasya ca vākyārtho gire'haṃ parikīrtitaḥ || 20 ||
tvapadasya ca vācyārthī jīva eva na saṃśayaḥ |
ubhayoraikyamasinā padena procyate budhaiḥ || 21 ||
vācyārthayorviruddhatvādaikyaṃ naiva ghaṭeta ha |
lakṣaṇātaḥ prakartavyā tattvamoḥ śrutisaṃsthayoḥ || 22||
cinmātraṃ tu tayorlakṣyaṃ tayoraikyasya saṃbhavaḥ |
tayoraikyaṃ tathā jñātvā svābhedenādvayo bhavet ||23||
devadattaḥ sa evāyamitivallakṣaṇā smṛtā |
sthūrādideharahito brahma saṃpadyate naraḥ ||24||
pañcīkṛta mahābhūtasaṃbhūtaḥ sthūladehakaḥ |
bhogālayo jarāvyādhisaṃyutaḥ sarvakarmaṇām ||25||
mithyābhūto'yamābhāti sphuṭaṃ māyāmayatvataḥ |
so'yaṃ sthūla upādhiḥ syādātmano me nageśvara || 26 ||
jñānakarmendriyayutaṃ prāṇapañcakasaṃyutam |
manobuddhiyutaṃ caṃtatsūkṣmaṃ tatkavayo viduḥ ||27||
apañcīkṛtabhūtotthaṃ sūkṣmadeho'yamātmanaḥ |
dvitīyo'yamupāviḥ syātsukhāderavabodhakaḥ || 28 ||
anādya nirvācyamidamajñānaṃ tu tṛtīyakaḥ |
deho'yamātmano bhāti kāraṇātmā nageśvara ||29||
upādhivilaye jāte kevalātmā'vaśiṣyate |
dehatraye pañcakośā antaḥsthāḥ santi sarvadā ||30||
taṃ ca kośaparityāge brahmapucchaṃ hi labhyate |
neti netītyādivākyairmama rūpaṃ yaducyate || 31 ||
na jāyate mriyate tatkadācinnāyaṃ bhūtvā na babhūva kaścit |
ajo nityaḥ śāśvato'yaṃ purāṇo na hanyate hanyamāne śarīre || 32||
hataṃ cenmanyate haṃturhataścenmanyate hatam |
ubhau tau na vijānoto nāyaṃ haṃti na hanyate || 33 ||
aṇoraṇīyānmahato mahīyānātmā'sya jaṃtornihito guhāyām |
tamaṛtuḥ paśyati vītaśoko dhātuḥ prasādānmahimānamasya ||34||
ātmānaṃ rathinaṃ viddhi śarīraṃ rayameva tu |
buddhi tu sārathiṃ viddhi manaḥpragrahameva ca ||35||
indriyāṇi hayānāhurviṣayāṃsteṣu gocarān |
ātmeṃdriyamanoyuktaṃ bhoktetyāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ || 36 ||
yastvavidvānbhavati cāmanaskaśca sadā'śuciḥ |
na talamavāpnoti saṃsāraṃ cādhigacchati || 37 ||
yastu vijñānavānbhavati samanaskaḥ sadā śuciḥ |
sa tu tatpadamāpnoti yasmādbhūyo na jāyate ||38||
vijñānasārathiryastu manaḥpragrahavānnaraḥ |
so'dhvanaḥ pāramāpnoti madīyaṃ yatparaṃ padam ||39||

itthaṃ śrutyā ca matyā ca niścityātmānagātmanā |
bhāvayenmāmātmarūpāṃ nididhyāsagato'pi ca ||40||
yogavṛtteḥ purā svasminbhāvayedakṣaratrayam |
devī praṇavasaṃjñasya dhyānārthaṃ mantravācyayoḥ || 41 ||
hakāraḥ sthūla dehaḥ syādrakāraḥ sūkṣmadehakaḥ |
īkāraḥ kāraṇātmāsau hrīṃkāro'haṃ turīyakam ||42||
evaṃ samaṣṭidehe'pi jñātvā bījatrayaṃ kramāt |
samadhvyiṣṭayoreva tvaṃ bhāvayenmatimātraraḥ ||43||
samādhikālātpūrvaṃ tu bhāvayitvaivamādṛtaḥ |
tato ghyāyennilīnākṣī devīṃ māṃ jagadīśvarīm 44||
prāṇāpānau samau kṛtvā nāsābhyaṃtaracāriṇī |
nivṛttaviṣayākāṃkṣo vītadoṣo vimatsaraḥ || 45 ||
bhaktayā nirvyājayā yukto guhāyāṃ niḥsvane sthale |
hakāraṃ viśvamātmānaṃ rakāre pravilāpayet ||46||
rakāraṃ taijasaṃ devamokāre pravilāpayet |
īkāraṃ prāśamātmānaṃ hokāre pravilāpayet ||47||
bādhyavācakatāhīnaṃ dvaitabhāvavivarjitam |
akhaṃḍaṃ saccidānandaṃ bhāvayetacchikhāṃtare ||48||
iti dhyānena māṃ rājansākṣātkṛtya narottamaḥ |
madrūpa eva bhavati dvayorapyekatā yataḥ || 49 ||
yogayuktathā'nayāṃ dṛṣṭvā māmātmānaṃ parātparam |
ajñānasya sa kāryasya tatkṣaṇe nāśako bhavet ||50||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe devīgītāyāṃ catustriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 34 ||
atha pañcatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
himālaya uvāca
yogaṃ vada maheśāni sāṃgaṃ saṃvitpradāyakam |
kṛtena yena yogyo'haṃ bhaveyaṃ tattvadarśane ||1||
śrīdevyuvāca
na yogo nabhasaḥ pṛṣṭhe na bhūmau na rasātale |
aikyaṃ jīvātmanorāhuryogaṃ yogaviśāradāḥ || 2||
tatpratyūhāḥ ṣaḍākhyātā yogavighnakarānagha |
kāmakrodho lobhamohau madamātsaryasaṃjñako ||3||
yogāṃġaireva bhittvā tānyogino yogamāpnuyuḥ |
yamaṃ niyamamāsanapraṇāyāmī tataḥ param ||4||
pratyāhāraṃ dhāraṇākhyaṃ dhyānaṃ sādhaṃ samādhinā |
aṣṭāṃgānyāhuretāni yogināṃ yogasādhane ||5||
ahiṃsā satyamasteyaṃ brahmacaryaṃ dayā''rjavam |
kṣamā dhṛtirmitāhāraḥ śaucaṃ ceti yamā daśa || 6||
tapaḥ saṃtoṣa āstikyaṃ dānaṃ devasya pūjanam |
siddhāṃtaśravaṇaṃ caiva hormatiśca japo hutam ||7||
daśaite niyamāḥ proktā mayā parvatanāyaka |
padmāsanaṃ svastikaṃ ca bhadraṃ vajrāsanaṃ tathā ||8||
vīrāsanamiti proktaṃ kramādāsanapaṃcakam |
ūrvorupari vinyasya samyakpādatale śubhe ||9||
aṃguṣṭhau ca nitranīyāstābhyāṃ vyutkramāttataḥ |
padmāsanamiti proktaṃ yogināṃ hṛdayaṅgamam ||10||
jānūvaraṃtare samyakkṛtvā pādatale śubhe |
ṛjukāyo viśedyogī svastikaṃ tatpracakṣate || 11 ||

sīvanyāḥ pārśvayornyasya gulphayugmaṃ suniścitam |
vṛṣaṇādhaḥ pāppāṣṇa pāṇibhyāṃ paribandhayet || 12||
bhadrāsanamiti proktaṃ yogibhiḥ paripūjitam |
ūrvoḥ pādau kramānnyasya jānvoḥ pratyaṅmukhāṃgulī ||
karau vidadhyādāsyātaṃ vajrāsanamanuttamam |
ekaṃ pādamadhaḥ kṛtvā vinyasyoruṃ tathottare || 14 ||
jukāyo viśedyogī bīrāsanamitīritam |
iḍayā''karṣayedvāyuṃ bāhyaṃ ṣoḍaśamātrayā || 15 ||
bārayetpūritaṃ yogī catuḥṣaṣṭhyā tu mātrayā |
suṣumnāmadhyagaṃ samyagdvātriṃśanmātrayā śanaiḥ || 16 ||
gāḍyā piṅgalayā caiva recayedyogavittamaḥ |
prāṇāyāmamimaṃ prāhuryogaśāstraviśāradāḥ ||17||
bhūyo bhūyaḥ kramāttasya bāhyamevaṃ samācaret |
mātrāvṛddhikrameṇaiva sanyagvādaśa ṣoḍaśa || 18 ||
japadhyānādibhiḥ sārdhaṃ sagarbha taṃ vidurbudhāḥ |
tadapetaṃ vigarbha ca prāṇāyāmaṃ pare viduḥ || 19||
kramādabhyasyataḥ puṃso dehe svedodgamo'dhamaḥ |
madhyamaḥ kaṃpasaṃyukto bhūmityāgaḥ paro mataḥ || 20 |
uttamasya guṇāvāptiryāvacchīlana miṣyate |
indriyāṇāṃ vicaratāṃ viṣayeṣu nirargalam ||21||
balādāharaṇaṃ tebhyaḥ pratyāhāro'bhidhīyate | aṅguṣṭhagulphajānūrumūlādhāraliṃganābhiṣu 117211
hṛdgrīvākaṃṭhadeśeṣu laṃbikāyāṃ tato nasi |
bhrūmadhye mastake mūni dvādaśāṃte yathāvidhi ||23||
dhāraṇaṃ prāṇamaruto dhāraṇeti nidyate |
samāhitena manasā caitanyāṃtaravartinā ||24||
mātmanmabhoṣṭadevānāṃ dhyānaṃ dhyānamihocyate |
sayatvabhāvanā nityaṃ jīvātmaparamātmanoḥ || 25 ||
samādhimāhurmunayaḥ proktamaṣṭāṃgalakṣaṇam |
idānīṃ kathaye te'haṃ maṃtrayogamanuttamam ||26||
viśva śarīramityuktaṃ pañcabhūtātmakaṃ naga | candrasūryāgnitejobhirjīvabrahmaikyarūpakam 112011
tisraḥ koṭyastadardhena śarīre nāḍayo matāḥ |
tāsu mukhyā daśa proktāstābhyastisro vyavasthitāḥ ||
pradhāmā merudaṇḍe'tra candrasūryāgnirūpiṇī |
iḍā vāme sthitā nāḍī śubhrā tu candrarūpiṇī || 29||
śaktirūpā tu sā nāḍī sākṣādamṛtavigrahā |
dakṣiṇe yā piṃgalākhyā pūṃrūpā sūryavigrahā ||30||
sarvatejomayī sā tu suṣumnā vahnirūpiṇī |
tasyā madhye vicitrākhye icchājñānakriyātmakam 31||
madhye svayaṃ bhūliṃgaṃ tu koṭisūryasamaprabham |
tadūrdhvaṃ māyābījaṃ tu harātmā bidunādakam ||32||
tadūrdhvaṃ tu śikhākārā kuṃḍalī raktavigrahā |
devyātmikā tu sā proktā madabhinnā nagādhipa || 33 ||
tadvāhye hemarūpābhaṃ vādiyāṃtacaturdalam |
drutamalasyaṃ padmaṃ tatra vicitayet || 34 ||
tadūdha tvanalaprakhyaṃ padalaṃ hīrakaprabham |
vādilāṃta paḍvarṇena svādhiṣṭhānamanuttamam ||35||
mūlamādhāraṣaṭkoṇaṃ mūlādhāraṃ tato viduḥ |
svaśabdena paraṃ liṃga svādhiṣṭhānaṃ tato viduḥ || 36 ||
tadūrdhvaṃ nābhideśe tu maṇipūraṃ mahāprabham |
mevābhaṃ vidyudābhaṃ ca bahutejomayaṃ tataḥ ||37||
maṇivadbhinaṃ tatpadmaṃ maṇipadmaṃ tathocyate |
daśabhiśca dalairyuktaṃ ḍādiphāṃtākṣarānvitam || 38||
viṣṇunādhiṣṭniṃ padmaṃ viṣṇvālokanakāraṇam |
tadūrdhvenāhataṃ padmamudyadādityasannibham || 39 ||

kādiṭhāṃtadalairekaṃ patraiśva samadhiṣṭitam |
tanmadhye bāṇaliṃgaṃ tu sūryāyutasamaprabham ||40||
śabdabrahmamayaṃ śabdānāhata tatra dṛśyate |
anāhatākhyaṃ tatpadyaṃ munibhiḥ parikīrtitam ||41||
ānandasadanaṃ tattu puruṣādhiṣṭhitaṃ param |
tadūrdhvaṃ tu viśudvākhyaṃ dalaṃ ṣoḍhaśapaṃkajam ||42||
svaraiḥ poḍaśabhiryuktaṃ dhūmravarṇaṃ mahāprabham |
viśuddhaṃ tanute yasmājjīvasya haṃsalokanāt ||43||
viśuddhaṃ padyamākhyātamākāśākhyaṃ mahādbhutam |
ājñācakraṃ tadūrdhvaṃ tu ātmanādhiṣṭhitaṃ param ||44 ||
ājñāsaṃkramaṇaṃ tatra tenājñeti prakīrtitam |
dilaṃ hṛkṣasaṃyuktaṃ padmaṃ tatsumanoharam ||45||
kailāsākhyaṃ tadūrdhvaṃ tu rodhinī tu tadūrdhvataḥ |
evaṃ tvādhāracakrāṇi proktāni tava suvrata ||46 ||
sahasrārayutaṃ biṃdusthānaṃ tadūrdhva moritam |
ityetatkathitaṃ sarvaṃ yogamārgamanuttamam ||47 ||
ādau pūraka yogenāpyādhāre yojayenmanaḥ |
gudameāṃtare śaktistāmākuṃcya pravodhayet ||48||
liṃgabhedakrameṇaiva viducakraṃ ca prāpayet |
śaṃbhunā tāṃ parāṃ śaktimekībhūtāṃ vicitayet ||49||
tatrotthitāmṛtaṃ yattu drutalākṣārasopamam |
pāyayitvā tu tāṃ śakti māyākhyāṃ yogasiddhidām ||
ṣaṭcakradevatāstatra saṃtarpyamṛtadhārayā |
ānayettena mārgeṇa mūlādhāraṃ tataḥ sudhīḥ || 51 ||
evamabhyasyamānasyāpyahanyahani niścitam |
pūrvokta dūṣitā maṃtrāḥ sarve siddhayanti nānyathā || 52 ||
jarāmaraṇaduḥkhādyairmucyate bhavabaṃdhanāt |
ye guṇāḥ saṃti devyā meṃ jaganmāturyathā tathā || 53 ||
te guṇā sāghakavare bhavatyeva na cānyathā |
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ tāta vāyudhāraṇamuttamam ||54||
idānīṃ dhāraṇākhyaṃ tu śṛṇuṣvāvahito mama |
dikpālādyanavacchidevyāṃ ceto vidhāya ca || 55 ||
tanmayo bhavati kṣipraṃ jīvabrahmaikyayojanāt |
athavā samalaṃ ceto yadi kṣipraṃ na śuddhayati || 56 ||
tadāvayavayogena yogī yogānsamabhyaset |
madīyahastapādādāvage tu madhure naga || 57 ||
trittaṃ saṃsthāpayenmaṃtrī sthānaṃ sthānajayātpunaḥ |
viśuddhacittaḥ sarvasminrūpe saṃsthāpayenmanaḥ || 58 ||
yāvanmano layaṃ yāti devyāṃ saṃvidi parvata |
tāvadiṣṭamanuṃ maṃtrī japahomaiḥ samabhyaset || 59 ||
maṃtrābhyāsena yogena jñeyajñānāya kalpate |
na yogena vinā maṃtro na maṃtreṇa vinā hi saḥ || 60 ||
dvayorabhyāsayogo hi brahmasaṃsiddhikāraṇam |
tamaḥ parivṛte gehe ghaṭo dīpena dṛśyate || 61 ||
evaṃ māyāvṛto hyātmā manunā gocarīkṛtaḥ |
iti yogavidhiḥ kṛtsnaḥ sāṃgaḥ prokto mayā'dhunā ||
gṛrūpadeśato jñeyo nānyathā śāstrakoṭibhiḥ || 62||!
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe pañcatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 35 ||

atha ṣaṭtriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīdevyuvāca
ityādiyogayuktātmā dhyāyenmāṃ brahmarūpiṇīm |
bhaktyā nirvyājayā rājannāsane samupasthitaḥ ||1||
āviḥ sannihitaṃ guhyacaraṃ nāma mahatpadam |
atraitatsarvamarpita mejatprāṇamiṣacca yat ||2||
etajjānatha sadasadvareṇyaṃ paraṃ vijñānādyadvariṣṭhaṃ prajānām |
yadacamadyadabhyo'ṇu ca yasmillokā nihitā lokinaśca ||3||
tadetadakṣaraṃ brahma sa prāṇastadu vāṅmanaḥ |
tadetatsatyamamṛtaṃ tadveddhavyaṃ saumya viddhi ||4||
dhanurgṛhītvaupaniṣadaṃ mahāstraṃ śaraṃ hyupāsāniśitaṃ saṃghayīta |
āyamya tadbhāvagatena cetasā lakṣyaṃ tadevākṣaraṃ saumya viddhi ||5||
praṇavo dhanuḥ śaro hyātmā brahma tallakṣyamucyate |
apramattena beddhavyaṃ śaravattanmayo bhavet ||6||
yasmindyauśca pṛthivī cāṃtarikṣamotaṃ manaḥ saha prāṇaiśca sarvaiḥ |
tamevaikaṃ jānathātmānamanyā vāco vimuṃcathāmṛtasyaiva setuḥ ||7||
arā iva rathanābhau saṃhatā yatra nāḍyaḥ |
sa eṣontaścarate bahudhā, bahudhā jāyamānaḥ ||8||
omityevaṃ dhyāyathātmānaṃ svasti vaḥ pārāya tamasaḥ parastāt |
divye brahmapure vyomni sa ātmā saṃpratiṣṭhitaḥ || 9 ||
manomaya: prāṇaśarīranetā pratiṣṭhito'nne hṛdayaṃ sannidhāya |
tadvijñānena paripaśyaṃti dhīrā ānandarūpamamṛtaṃ yadvibhāti || 10 ||
bhidyate hṛdayagraṃthiśchidyante sarvasaṃśayāḥ |
kṣīyante cāsya karmāṇi tasmindṛṣṭe parāvare ||11||
hiraṇmaye pare kośe virājaṃ brahma niṣkalam |
tacchubhraṃ jyotiṣāṃ jyotistadyadātmavido viduḥ 12 ||
na tatra sūryo bhāti na caṃdratārakaṃ nemā vidyuto bhānti kuto'yamagniḥ |
tameva bhāntamanubhāti sarvaṃ tasya bhāsā sarvamidaṃ vibhāti || 13 ||
dakṣiṇataścottareṇa |
brahmaivedamamṛtaṃ purastādbrahma paścādbrahma
adhaścordhvaṃ ca prasṛtaṃ brahmavedaṃ viśva variṣṭham ||14||
etādṛganubhavo yasya sa kṛtārtho narottama |
brahmabhūtaḥ prasannātmā na śocati na kāṃkṣati ||15||
dvitīyādvai bhayaṃ rājaṃstadabhāvādvibheti na |
natadviyogo me'pyasti madviyogopi tasya na || 16 ||

ahameva sa sā'haṃ vai niśvitaṃ viddhi parvata |
maddarśanaṃ tu tatra syādyatra jñānī sthito mama ||17||
nāhaṃ tīrthe na kailāse vaikuṃṭhe vā na karhicit |
vasāmi kiṃtu majjānihṛdayāmbhojamadhyame ||18||
matpūjākoṭiphaladaṃ sakṛnmajjñānino'rcanam |
kulaṃ pavitraṃ tasyāsti jananī kṛtakṛtyakā ||19||
viśvambharā puṇyavatī cillayo yasya cetasaḥ |
brahmajñānaṃ tu yatpṛṣṭaṃ tvaya parvatasattama ||20||
kathitaṃ tanmayā sarva nāto vaktavyamasti hi |
idaṃ jyeṣṭhāya putrāya bhaktiyuktāya śīline || 21||
śiṣyāya ca yathoktāya vaktavyaṃ nānyathā kvacit |
yasya deve parā bhaktiryathā deve tathā gurau || 22||
tasyaite kathitā hyarthā: prakāśate mahātmanaḥ |
yenopadiṣṭā vidyeyaṃ sa eva parameśvaraḥ ||23||
yasyāyaṃ sukṛtaṃ kartumasamarthastato ṛṇī |
