pitrorapyadhikaḥ prokto brahmajanma pradāyakaḥ ||24||
pitṛjātaṃ janma naṣṭaṃ netthaṃ jātaṃ kadācana |
tasmai na hyedityādi nigamo'pyavadannaga || 25 ||
tasmācchāstrasya siddhāṃto brahmadātā guruḥ paraḥ |
śive ruṣṭe gurustrātā guro ruṣṭe na śaṃkaraḥ || 26||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena śrīguruṃ topayennaga |
kāyena manasā vācā sarvadā tatparo bhavet ||27|| .
anyathā tu kṛtaghnaḥ syātkṛtaghne nāsti niṣkṛtiḥ |
idreṇātharvaṇāyoktā śiraśchedapratijñayā ||28||
aśvibhyāṃ kadhane tasya śirasṭinaṃ ca vajriṇā |
aśvīyaṃ tacchiro naṣṭaṃ dṛṣṭvā vaidyo surottamau || 29||
punaḥ saṃyojitaṃ svīyaṃ tābhyāṃ muniśirastadā |
iti saṃkaṭasaṃpādyā brahmavidyā nagādhipa ||
labdhā yena sa dhanyaḥ syātkṛtakṛtyaśca bhūdhara 30 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe devīgītāyāṃ ṣaṭtriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 36 ||
atha saptatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
himālaya uvāca
svīyāṃ bhakti vadasvāmva yena jñānaṃ sukhena hi |
jāyeta manujasyāsya madhyamasyā virāgiṇaḥ || 1 |
śrī devyuvāca
mārgāstrayo me vikhyātā mokṣaprāptau nagādhipa |
karmayogo jñānayogo bhaktiyogaśca sattama ||2||
trayāṇāmapyayaṃ yogaḥ kartuṃ śakyo'sti sarvathā |
sulabhatvānmānasatvātkāyacittādya pīḍanāt ||3||
guṇabhedānmanuṣyāṇāṃ sā bhaktistrividhā matā |
parapīḍāṃ samuddiśya daṃbhaṃ kṛtvā puraḥsaram ||4||
mātsarya krodhayukto yastasya bhaktistu tāmasī |
parapīḍādirahitaḥ svakalyāṇāvaṃmeva ca ||5||
nityaṃ sakāmo hṛdayaṃ yaśorthī bhogalolupaḥ |
tattatphalasamāvāptyai mānuṣāste'tibhaktitaḥ || 6||

bhedavṛddhayā tu māṃ svasmādanyāṃ jānāti pāmaraḥ |
tasya bhaktiḥ samākhyātā nagādhipa tu rājasī ||7||
parameśārpaṇa karma pāpakṣālanāya ca |
vedoktatvādavaśyaṃ tatkartavyaṃ tu mayā'niśam ||8||
iti niścitabuddhistu bhedabuddhimupāśritaḥ |
karoti prītaye karma bhaktiḥ sā naga sāttvikī ||9||
parābhakteḥ prāpikeyaṃ bhedabuddhayavalaṃbanāt |
pūrvaprokte hyubhe bhakto na paraprāpike mate || 10 ||
adhunā parābhakti tu procyamānāṃ nibodha me |
madguṇaśravaṇaṃ nityaṃ mama nāmānukīrtanam ||11||
kalyāṇaguṇaratnānāmākarāya mayi sthiram |
cetaso vartanaṃ caiva tailadhārāsamaṃ sadā || 12||
hetustu tatra ko vāpi na kadācidbhavedapi |
sāmīpyasāṣṭisāyujyasālokyānāṃ na caiṣaṇā || 13||
matsevāto'dhikaṃ kiṃcinnaiva jānāti karhicit |
sevyasevakatābhāvāttatra mokṣaṃ na vāṃchati || 14||
parānuraktyā māmeva citayedyo hyataṃdritaḥ |
svābhedenaiva māṃ nityaṃ jānāti na vibhedataḥ || 15||
madrūpatvena jīvānāṃ citanaṃ kurute tu yaḥ |
thathā svasyātmani prītistathaiva ca parātmani ||16||
caitanyasya samānatvānna bhedaṃ kurute tu yaḥ |
sarvatra vartamānānāṃ sarvarūpāṃ ca sarvadā || 17||
namate yajate caṃvāpyācāṃḍālāṃtamīśvara |
na kutrāpi drohabuddhi kurute bhedavarjanāt || 18||
matsthānadarśanaśraddhā madbhakadarśane tathā |
macchāśravaṇe śraddhā maṃtrataṃtrādiṣu prabho ||19||
mayi premākulamatī romāṃcitatanuḥ sadā |
premābhujalapūrṇākṣa : kaṃṭagadgadanisvanaḥ || 20||
ananyenaṃya bhāvena pūjameco nagādhipa |
māmīśvaroṃ jagadyoni sarvakāraṇakāraṇām ||21||
vratāni mama divyāni nityanaimittikānyapi |
nityaṃ yaḥ kurute bhaktyā vittaśāṭhadhavivarjitaḥ ||22||
madutsavadidṛkṣāca madutsavakṛtistathā |
jāyate yasya niyataṃ svabhāvādeva bhūṣara || 23||
gayiṃśca nāmāni mamaiva khalu nṛtyati |
ahaṃkārādirahito dehatādātmyajitaḥ ||24||
rathena yathā yakca kriyate tasthā bhavet |
na me vitāsti tatrāpi dehasaṃrakṣaṇādiṣu || 25 ||
tistu yā proktā parabhaktistu sā smṛtā |
yasyāṃ devyatiriktaṃ tu na kiṃcidapi bhāvyate || 26||
itthaṃ jātā parā bhaktiryasya bhūdhara tattvataḥ |
tadaiva tasya cinmātre madrūpe trilayo bhavet ||27||
bhaktestu yā parākāṣṭhā saiva jñānaṃ prakīrtitam |
vairāgyasya ca somā sā jñāne tadubhayaṃ yataḥ || 28 ||
bhaktau kṛtāyāṃ yasyāpi prārabdhavaśato naga |
na jāyate mama jñānaṃ maṇidvīpaṃ sa gacchati || 29 ||
tatra gatvā'khilānbhogānanicchannapi cacchati |
tadante mama vidrūpajñānaṃ samyagbhavennaga ||30||
tena muktaḥ sadaiva syājjñānānmuktirna cānyathā |
ihaiva yasya jñānaṃ syādgata pratyagātmanaḥ ||31||
mama saṃvitparatanostasya prāṇā vrajaṃti na |
brahmana saṃstadāpnoti brahmaiva brahma veda yaḥ || 32 ||
kaṇṭhaṃ cāmīkarasamamajñānāsu tirohitam |
jñānādajñānanāśena labdhameva hi labhyate ||33||
viditāviditādanyannagottama narmama |
yathādarśa tathātmani yathā jale tathā pitṛloke || 34||

chāyātapo yathā svacche vivikto tadvadeva hi |
mama loke bhavejjñānaṃ dvaitabhāvavivarjitam || 35||
yastu vairāgyavāneva jñānahīno mriyeta cet |
brahmaloke vasennityaṃ yāvatkalpaṃ tataḥ param ||36||
śucīnāṃ śrīmatāṃ gehe bhavettasya janiḥ punaḥ |
karoti sādhanaṃ paścāttato jñānaṃ hi jāyate ||37||
anekajanmabhī rājañjñānaṃ syānnaikajanmanā |
tataḥ sarvaprayatnena jñānārthaṃ yatnamāśrayet || 38 ||
nocenmahānvināśaḥ syājjanmaitadurlabhaṃ punaḥ |
tatrāpi prathame varge vedaprāpti durlabhā ||39||
śamādiṣaṭaka saṃpattiryogasiddhistathaiva ca |
tathottamaguruprāptiḥ sarvamevātra durlabham ||40||
tatheṃdriyāṇāṃ paṭutā saṃskṛtatvaṃ tanostathā |
anekajanmapuṣyaistu mokṣecchā jāyate tataḥ ||41||
sādhane saphale'pyevaṃ jāyamāne'pi yo naraḥ |
jñānārthaṃ naiva yatate tasya janma nirarthakam ||42 |
tasmādrājanyathāśaktyā jñānārthaṃ yatnamāśrayet |
pade pade'śvamedhasya phalamāpnoti niścitam ||43||
ghṛtamiva payasi nigūḍhaṃ bhūte bhūte ca vasati vijñānam |
satataṃ maṃthayitatryaṃ manasā maṃthānabhūtena || 44 ||
jñānaṃ labdhvā kṛtārthaḥ syāditi vedāṃtaḍiṃḍinaḥ |
sarvamuktaṃ samāsena kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 45 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe devīgītāyāṃ saptatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 37 ||
athāṣṭatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
himālaya uvāca
kati sthānāni devaśi draṣṭavyāni mahītale |
mukhyāni ca pavitrāṇi devīpriyatamāni ca || 1 ||
vratānyapi tathā yāni tuṣṭidānyutsavā api |
tatsarvaṃ vada me mātaḥ kṛtakṛtyo yato naraḥ ||2||
śrīdevyuvāca
sarva dṛśyaṃ mama sthānaṃ sarve kālā vratātmakāḥ |
utsavāḥ sarvakāleṣu yato'haṃ sarvarūpiṇī || 3 ||
tathāpi bhaktavātsalyātkicitkicidathocyate |
śṛṇuṣvāvahito bhūtvā nagarāja vaco mama ||4||
kolāpuraṃ mahāsthānaṃ yatra lakṣmīḥ sadā sthitā |
mātuḥ puraṃ dvitīyaṃ ca reṇukādhiṣṭhitaṃ param ||5||
tulajāpuraṃ tṛtīyaṃ syātsaptaśṛṅgaṃ tathaiva ca |
hiṃgulāyā mahāsthānaṃ jvālā mukhyāstathaiva ca || 6 ||
śākaṃbharyāḥ paraṃ sthānaṃ bhrāmaryāḥ sthānamuttamam |
śrīraktadantikāsthānaṃ durgāsthānaṃ tathaiva ca || 7||
vidhyācalanivāsinyāḥ sthānaṃ sarvottamottamam |
annapūrṇāmahāsthānaṃ kāñcīpuramanuttamam ||8||
bhīmādevyāḥ paraṃ sthānaṃ vimalāsthānameva ca |
śrīcandralāmahāsthānaṃ kauśikīsthānameva ca ||9||
nīlāmbāyāḥ paraṃ sthānaṃ nīlaparvatamastake |
jāṃbūnadeśvarīsthānaṃ tathā śrīnagaraṃ śubham || 10||
guhyakālyā mahāsthānaṃ nepāle yatpratiṣṭhitam |
mīnākṣyāḥ paramaṃ sthānaṃ yacca proktaṃ cidambare || 11|

vedāraṇyaṃ mahāsthānaṃ sundaryā samadhiṣṭhitam |
ekāṃbaraṃ mahāsthānaṃ parāśaktyā pratiṣṭhitam || 12 ||
madālasā paraṃ sthānaṃ yogeśvaryāstathaiva ca |
tathā nīlasarasvatyāḥ sthānaṃ cīneṣu viśrutam || 13 ||1.
vaidyanāthe tu bagalāsthānaṃ sarvottamaṃ matam |
śrīmacchrībhuvaneśvaryā maṇidvīpaṃ mama smṛtam ||14||
śrīmatripurabhairavyāḥ kāmākhyāyo nimaṇḍalam |
bhūmaṇḍale kṣetraratnaṃ mahāmāyādhivāsitam ||15||
sākṣādrajasvalā ||16||
nātaḥ parataraṃ sthānaṃ kvacidasti dharātale | pratimāsaṃ bhavedevo yatra
tatratyā devatāḥ sarvā parvatātmakatāṃ gatāḥ |
parvateṣu vasaṃtyeva mahatyo devatā api || 17 ||
tatratyā pṛthivī sarvā devīrūpā smṛtā budhaiḥ |
nātaḥ parataraṃ sthānaṃ kāmākhyāyoniṇḍāt || 18 ||
gāyatryāśca paraṃ sthānaṃ śrīmatpuṣkaramīritam |
amareśe caṇḍikā syānabhāse puṣkarekṣiṇo || 19||
nāmaṣe tu mahāsthāne devī sāliṃgacāriṇī |
puruhūtā puṣkarākṣe āpaḍhī ca ratistathā ||20||
caṇḍamuṃḍomahāsthāne daṇḍinī parameśvarī |
bhārabhūtau bhavabhūtirnākule nakuleśvarī ||21||
candrikā tu hariścandre śrīgirau śāṃkarī smṛtā |
japyeśvare triśūlā syātsūkṣmā cāmrātakedavare ||22||
śāṃkarī tu mahākāle śarvāṇī madhyamābhidhe |
kedārākhye mahākṣetre devī sā bhārgadāyinī ||23||
bhairavākhye bhairavī sā gayāyāṃ maṃgalā smṛtā |
sthāṇupriyā kurukṣetre svāyaṃbhuvyapi nākule ||24||
kanakhale bhavedugrā viśveśī vimaleśvare |
aṭṭahāse mahānandā mahendre tu mahāṃtakā ||25||
bhīme bhīmeśvarī proktā sthāne vastrāpathe punaḥ |
bhavānī śāṃkarī proktā rudrāṇī tvardhakoṭike ||26||
avimukte viśālākṣī mahābhāgā mahālaye |
gokarṇe bhadrakarṇī syādbhadrā syādbhadrakarṇake || 27||
utpalākṣī suvarṇākṣe sthāṇvīśā sthāṇusaṃjñike |
kamalālaye tu kamalā pracaṇḍā chagalaṃḍake ||28||
kuraṇḍale trisaṃdhyā syānmākoṭe mukuṭeśvarī |
maṃḍaleśe śāṃḍakī syātkālī kālaṃjare punaḥ ||29||
śaṃkukarṇe dhvaniḥ proktā sthūlā syātsthūla keśvare |
jñānināṃ hṛdayāṃbhoje hṛllekhā parameśvarī ||30||
proktānīmāni sthānāni devyāḥ priyatamāni ca |
tattatkṣetrasya māhātmyaṃ śrutvā pūrvaṃ nagottama ||31||
taduktena vidhānena paścāddevīṃ prapūjayet |
athavā sarvakṣetrāṇi kāśyāṃ saṃti nagottama ||32||
tatra caiva vasennityaṃ devī bhaktiparāyaṇaḥ |
tāni sthānāni saṃpaśyañjapandevīṃ nirantaram ||33||
ghyāyaṃstaccaraṇāṃbhojaṃ mukto bhavati baṃdhanāt |
imāni devīnāmāni prātarutthāya yaḥ paṭhet || 34 ||
bhasmībhavaṃti pāpāni tatkṣaṇānnaga satvaram |
śrāddhakāle paṭhedetānyamalāni dvijāgrataḥ ||35||
muktaḥ statpitaraḥ sarve prayāṃti paramāṃ gatim |
adhunā kathayiṣyāmi vratāni tava suvrata || 36 ||
nārībhiśca naraścaiva kartavyāni prayatnataḥ |
vratamanantatṛtīyākhyaṃ rasakalyāṇinovratam || 37 ||
ārdrānandakaraṃ nāmnā tṛtīyāyā vrataṃ ca yat |
śukravāraprataṃ caiva tathā kṛṣṇacaturdaśī ||38||
bhaumavāravrataṃ caiva pradoṣavratameva ca |
yatra devo mahādevo |
devīṃ saṃsthāpya viṣṭare || 39 ||

.4 śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 39
mṛtyaṃ karoti purataḥ sārdhaṃ devainiśāmukhe |
tatropopya rajanyādau pradoṣe pūjayecviām ||40||
pratipakṣaṃ viśeṣeṇa taddevīprītikārakam |
somavāravrataṃ caiva mamātipriyakṛnnaga || 41 ||
tatrāpi devīṃ saṃpūjya rātrī bhojanamācaret |
navarātradrayaṃ caiva vrataṃ prītikaraṃ mama || 42 ||
evamanyānyapi vibho nityanaimittikāni ca |
vratāni kurute yo vai matprītyartha vimatsaraḥ || 43|| .
prāpnoti mama sāyujyaṃ sa me bhaktaḥ sa me priyaḥ |
utsavānapi kurvīta dolotsavamukhānvibho ||44 ||
śayanotsavaṃ yathā kuryāttathā jāgaraṇotsavam |
rathotsavaṃ ca me kuryāddamanotsavameva ca || 45||
pavitrotsavamevāpi śrāvaṇe prītikārakam |
mama bhaktaḥ sadā kuryādevamanyānmahotsavān ||46 ||
madbhaktānbhojayetprītyā tathā caiva suvāsinīḥ |
kumārīrvaṭukāṃścāpi madbuddhaghā tadgatāṃtaraḥ || 47||
vittaśāṭhayena rahito. yajedetānsumādibhiḥ |
ya evaṃ kurute bhaktyā prativarṣamataṃdritaḥ || 48 ||
sa dhanyaḥ kṛtakṛtyo'sau matprīteḥ pātramaṃjasā |
sarvamuktaṃ samāsena mama prītipradāyakam ||
nāśiṣyāya pradātavyaṃ nābhaktāya kadācana || 49||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe devīgītāyāmaṣṭatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 38 ||
athaikonacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
himālaya uvāca
devadevi maheśāni karuṇāsāgare'mbike |
brūhi pūjāvidhi samyagyathāvadadhunā nijam || 1 ||
śrīdevyuvāca
vakṣye pūjāvidhi rājannaṃbikāyā yathā priyam |
atyaṃta śraddhayā sārdhaṃ śṛṇu parvatapuṃgava || 2 ||
dvividhā mama pūjā syādvāhyā cābhyaṃtarāpi ca |
bāhyā'pi dvividhā proktā vaidiko tāṃtrikī tathā 3 ||
vaidikayarcā'pi dvividhā mūrtibhedena bhūdhara |
vaidikī vaidikaiḥ kāryā vedadīkṣāsamanvitaiḥ || 4 ||
tantroktadīkṣāvadbhistu tāṃtrikī saṃśritā bhavet |
itthaṃ pūjārahasyaṃ ca na jñātvā viparītakam ||5||
karoti yo naro mahaḥ sa patatyeva sarvathā |
tatra yā vaidikī proktā prathamā tāṃ vadāmyaham ||6||
yanme sākṣātparaṃ rūpaṃ dṛṣṭavānasi bhūdhara |
anantaśīrṣanayanamanantacaraṇaṃ mahat ||7||
sarvaśaktisamāyuktaṃ prerakaṃ yatparātparam |
tadeva pūjayennityaṃ na meṃ dhyāyetsmaredapi ||8|| .
ityetatprathamārcāyāḥ svarūpaṃ kathitaṃ naga |
śāṃtaḥ samāhitamanā daṃbhāhaṃkāravarjitaḥ || 9 ||
tatparo bhava tadyājī tadeva śaraṇaṃ vraja |
tadeva cetasā paśya japa dhyāyasva sarvadā || 10 ||
ananyayā premayuktabhaktyā madbhāvamāśritaḥ |
yajñairyaja tapodānairmāmeva paritoṣaya || 11||
itthaṃ mamānugrahato mokṣyase bhavabandhanāt |
matparā ye madāsaktacittā bhaktavarā matāḥ || 12 ||

pratijāne bhavādasmāduddharābhyacireṇa tu ! dhyānena karmayuktena bhaktijñānena vā punaḥ ||13||
prāpyā'haṃ sarvathā rājanna tu kevalakarmabhiḥ |
dharmātsaṃjāyate bhaktirbhaktyā saṃjāyate param ||14||
śrutismṛtibhyāmuditaṃ yatsa dharmaḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
anyaśāstreṇa yaḥ prokto dharmābhāsaḥ sa ucyate || 15 ||
sarvajñātsarvaśakteśca matto vedaḥ samutthitaḥ |
ajñānasya mamābhāvādapramāṇā na ca śrutiḥ || 16||
smṛtayaśca śruterarthaṃ gṛhītvaiva ca nirgatāḥ |
manvādīnāṃ śrutīnāṃ ca tataḥ prāmāṇyamiṣyate || 17 ||
kvacitkadācittaṃ trārthakaṭākṣeṇa paroditam |
dharmaṃ vadaṃti soṃśastu naiva grāhyo'sti vaidikaiḥ ||18||
anyeṣāṃ śāstrakartṛṇāmajñānaṃ prabhavatvataḥ |
ajñānadoṣaduṣṭatvāttadukterna pramāṇatā || 19 ||
tasmānmumukṣurdharmārthaṃ sarvathā vedamāśrayet |
rājājñā ca yathā loke hanyate na kadācana || 20 ||
sarveśānyā mamājñā sā śrutistyājyā kathaṃ nṛbhiḥ |
madājñārakṣaṇārthaṃ tu brahmakṣatriyajātayaḥ || 21 ||
mayā sṛṣṭāstato jñeyaṃ rahasyaṃ me śrutervacaḥ |
yadā yadā hi dharmasya glānirbhavati bhūdhara ||22||
abhyutthānamadharmasya tadā veṣānbibharmyaham |
devadaityavibhāgaśvāpyata evābhavannṛpa || 23||
ye na kurvati taddharmaṃ tacchikṣārthaṃ mayā sadā |
saṃpāditāstu narakāstrāso yacchravaṇādbhavet ||24||
yo vedadharmamujjhitya dharmamanyaṃ samāśrayet |
rājā pravāsayeddeśānnijā detānadharmiṇaḥ ||25||
brāhmaṇairna ca saṃbhāṣyāḥ paṃktigrāhyā na ca dvijaiḥ |
anyāni yāni śāstrāṇi loke'sminvividhāni ca || 26 ||
śrutismṛtiviruddhāni tāmasānyeva sarvaśaḥ |
vāmaṃ kapālakaṃ caiva kaulakaṃ bhairavāgamaḥ ||27||
śivena mohanārthāya praṇīto nānyahetukaḥ |
dakṣaśāpādbhṛgoḥ śāpāddaddhīcasya ca śāpataḥ || 28 ||
dagdhā ye brāhmaṇavarā vedamārgabahiṣkṛtāḥ |
teṣāmuddharaṇārthāya sopānakramataḥ sadā ||29||
śaivāśca vaiṣṇavāścaiva saurāḥ śāktāstathaiva ca |
gāṇapatyā āgamāśca praṇītāḥ śaṃkareṇa tu ||30| tu
tatra vedāviruddha śo'pyukta eva kvacitkvacit |
vaidikaistadgrahe doṣo na bhavatyeva karhicit ||31||
sarvathā vedabhinnārthe nādhikārī dvijo bhavet |
vedādhikārahīnastu bhavettatrādhikāravān ||32||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena vaidiko vedamāśrayet |
dharmeṇa sahitaṃ jñānaṃ paraṃ brahma prakāśayet || 33 ||
sarvepaṇāḥ parityajya māmeva śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ |
sarvabhūtadayāvaṃto mānāhaṃkāravarjitāḥ ||34||
maccittā madgataprāṇā matsthānakathane ratāḥ |
saṃnyāsino vanasthāśca gṛhasthā brahmacāriṇaḥ ||35||
upāsate sadā bhaktyā yogamaiśvarasaṃjñitam |
teṣāṃ nityaviyuktānāmahamajñānajaṃ tamaḥ || 36 ||
jñānasūryaprakāśena nāśayāmi na saṃśayaḥ |
itthaṃ vaidikapūjāyāḥ prathamāyā nagādhipa ||37||
svarūpamuktaṃ saṃkṣepādvitīyāyā atho bruve |
mūrtī vā sthaṃḍile vāpi tathā sūryendumaṃḍale ||38||

jale'tha vā bāṇaliṃge maṃtre vā'pi mahāpaṭe |
tathā śrīhṛdayāṃbhoje dhyātvā devīṃ parātparām || 39||
taruṇīmaruṇāruṇām |
sauṃdaryasārasīmāṃ tāṃ sarvāvayavasuṃdarīm ||40||
saguṇāṃ karuṇāpūrṇāṃ sadā bhaktārtikātarām |
prasādasumukhīmaṃbāṃ caṃdrakhaṃḍaśikhaṃḍinīm ||41||
śṛṅgārarasa saṃpūrṇāṃ yathāvittānusārataḥ || 42||
pāśāṃkuśavarābhītidharāmānaṃdarūpiṇīm | pūjayedupacāraiśca
yāvadāṃtarapūjāyāmadhikāro bhavenna hi |
tāvadvāhyāmimāṃ pūjāṃ śrayejjāte tu tāṃ tyajet 43 ||
rūpamupādhirahitaṃ mama ||44||
abhyaṃtarā tu yā pūjā sā tu saṃvillayaḥ smṛtaḥ | saṃvideva paraṃ
ataḥ saṃvidi madrūpe cetaḥ sthāpyaṃ nirāśrayam |
saṃvidrūpātiriktaṃ tu mithyā māyāmayaṃ jagat ||45||
ataḥ saṃsāranāśāya sākṣiṇīmātmarūpiṇīm |
bhāvayennirmanaskena yogayuktena cetasā ||47||
ataḥ paraṃ bāhyapūjāvistāraḥ kathyate mayā |
sāvadhānena manasā śṛṇu parvatasattama ||48 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe devīgītāyāme konacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 39 ||
atha catvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
devyuvāca
prātarutthāya śirasi saṃsmaretpadmamujjvalam |
karpūrābhaṃ smaretatra śrīguruṃ nijarūpiṇam ||1||
suprasannaṃ lasadbhūṣābhūṣitaṃ śaktisaṃyutam |
namaskṛtya tato devīṃ kuṇḍalīṃ saṃsmaredbudhaḥ || 2 ||
prakāśamānāṃ prathame prayāṇe pratiprayāṇe'pyamṛtāyamānām |
aṃtaḥ padavyāmanu saṃcaraṃto mānaṃdarūpāmabalāṃ prapadye ||3||
vyātvaivaṃ tacchikhāmadhye saccidānaṃdarūpiṇīm |
māṃ dhyāyedatha śocāmi kriyāḥ sarvāḥ samāpayet || 4 ||
agnihotraṃ tato hutvā matprītyarthaṃ dvijottamaḥ |
homāṃte svāsane sthitvā pūjāsaṃkalpamācaret ||5||
bhūtaśuddhi purā kṛtvā mātṛkānyāsameva ca |
hullekhāmātṛkānyāsaṃ nityameva samācaret || 6 ||
mūlādhāre hakāraṃ ca hṛdaye ca rakārakam |
bhrūmadhye tadvadīkāraṃ hrīṃkāraṃ mastake nyaset ||7||
tattanmaṃtroditānanyānnyāsānsarvānsamācaret |
kalpayetsvātmano dehe pīṭhaṃ dharmādibhiḥ punaḥ ||8||
tato dhyāyenmahādevīṃ prāṇāyāmaivijṛmbhite |
hṛdaṃbhoje mama sthāne pañcapretāsane budhaḥ || 9 ||
brahmā viṣṇuśca rudraśca īśvaraśca sadāśivaḥ |
ete paṃca mahāpretāḥ pādamūle mama sthitāḥ || 10||
paṃcabhūtātmakā hyete pañcāvasthātmakā api |
ahaṃ tvavyaktacidrapā tadatītā'smi sarvathā || 11 ||
tato viṣṭaratāṃ yātāṃ śaktitaṃtreṣu sarvadā |
dhyātvaivaṃ mānasairbhogaiḥ pūjayenmāṃ japedapi ||12||
japaṃ samarpya śrīdevyai tato'rdhyasthāpanaṃ caret |
pātrāsādanakaṃ kṛtvā pūjādravyāṇi śodhayet || 13||

jalena tena manunā castramaṃtreṇa daihikaḥ |
digbaṃdhaṃ ca purā kṛtvā gurūnnatvā tataḥ param || 14 ||
tadanujñāṃ samādāya brāhmapīṭhaiḥ tataḥ param |
hṛdisthāṃ bhāvitāṃ mūrti mama divyāṃ manoharām ||15||
āvāhayettataḥ pīṭhe prāṇasthāpanavidyayā |
āsanāvāhane cādhyaṃ pādyādyācamanaṃ tathā || 16 ||
snānaṃ vāsodvayaṃ caiva bhūṣaṇāni ca sarvaśaḥ |
gaṃdhaṃ puṣpaṃ yathāyogyaṃ dattvā daivyai svabhaktitaḥ ||17||
yantrasthānāmāvṛtīnāṃ pūjanaṃ samyagācaret |
prativāramaśaktānāṃ śukravārī niyamyate || 18 ||
mūladevī prabhārūpāḥ smartavyā aṃgadevatāḥ |
tatprabhāpaṭalavyāptaṃ trailokyaṃ ca vicintayet || 19||
punarāvṛttisahitāṃ mūladevīṃ ca pūjayet |
gaṃdhādibhiḥ sugaṃdhastu tathā puṣpaiḥ suvāsitaiḥ || 20 || |
naivedyastarpaṇaiścaiva tāṃbūlairdakṣiṇādibhi: |
toṣayenmāṃ tvatkṛtena nāmnāṃ sāhasrakeṇa ca || 21 ||
kavacena ca sūktenāhaṃ rudrebhiriti prabho |
devyatharva śiro maṃtra rhallekhopaniṣadbhavaiḥ ||22||
mahāvidyāmahāmaṃtra stoṣayenmāṃ muhurmuhuḥ |
kṣamāpayejjagaddhātrīṃ premārdrahṛdayo naraḥ ||23||
pulakāṃkita sarvāgairbāṣpa ruddhākṣiniḥsvanaḥ |
nṛtyagītādighopeṇa toṣayenmāṃ muhurmuhuḥ ||24||
vedapārāyaṇaiścaiva purāṇaiḥ sakalairapi |
pratipādyā yato'haṃ vai tasmāttastoṣayettu mām || 25 ||
nijaṃ sarvasvamapi me sadehaṃ nityaśo'rpayet |
nityahomaṃ tataḥ kuryādbrāhmaṇāṃśca suvāsinīḥ ||26||
vaṭukānpāmarānanyāndevībuddhayā tu bhojayet |
natvā punaḥ svahṛdaye vyutkrameṇa visayet ||27||
sarva hṛllekhayā kuryātpūjanaṃ mama suvrata |
hṛllekhā sarvamaṃtrāṇāṃ nāyikā paramā smṛtā ||28||
hṛllekhādarpaṇe nityamahaṃ tatpratibiṃbitā |
tasmādvṛllekhayā dattaṃ sarvamaṃtraḥ samarpitam ||29||
guruṃ saṃpūjya bhūṣādyaiḥ kṛtakṛtyatvamāvahet |
ya evaṃ pūjayeddevīṃ śrīmadbhuvanasuṃdarīm ||30||
na tasya durlabhaṃ kiṃcitkadācitkvacidasti hi |
dehāṃte tu maṇidvīpaṃ gama yātyeva sarvathā ||31|
jñeyo devīsvarūpo'sau devā nityaṃ namati tam |
iti te kathitaṃ rājanmahādevyāḥ prapūjanam ||32||
vimṛśyaitadaśeṣeṇāpyadhikārānurūpataḥ |
kuru me pūjanaṃ tena kṛtārthastvaṃ bhaviṣyasi || 33||
idaṃ tu gītāśāstraṃ me nāśiṣyāya vadetkvacit |
nābhaktāya pradātavyaṃ na dhūrtāya ca durhṛde ||34||
etatprakāśana māturudghāṭana murojayoḥ |
tasmādavaśyaṃ yatnena gopanīyamidaṃ sadā ||35||
deyaṃ bhaktāyaṃ śiṣyāya jyeṣṭhaputrāya caiva hi |
suśīlāya suvepāya devabhaktiyutāya ca || 36||
śrāddhakāle paṭhedetadbrāhmaṇānāṃ samīpataḥ |
tṛptāstatpitaraḥ sarve prayāṃti paramaṃ padam ||37||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā sā bhagavatī tatraivāṃtaradhīyata |
devāśca muditāḥ sarve devīdarśanato'bhavan || 38 ||
tato himālaye jajñe devī haimavatī tu sā |
yā gaurīti prasiddhāsīddattā sā śaṃkarāya ca || 39||
tataḥ skaṃdaḥ samudbhūtastārakastena ghātitaḥ |
samudramaṃthane pūrvaṃ ratnānyā surnarādhipa ||40||

tatra devaḥ stutā devī lakṣmīprāptyarthamādarāt |
teṣāmanugrahārthāya nirgatā tu ramā tataḥ || 41 ||
vaikuṇṭhāya surairdatā tena tasya samo'bhavat |
iti te kathitaṃ rājandevīmāhātmyamuttamam || 42||
gaurīlakṣmyoḥ samudbhūtiviṣayaṃ sarvakāmadam |
na vācyaṃ tvetadanyasmai rahasyaṃ kathitaṃ yataḥ || 43 ||
gītā rahasyabhūteyaṃ gopanīyā prayatnataḥ |
sarvamuktaṃ samāsena yatpṛṣṭaṃ tattvayā'nagha ||
pavitraṃ pāvanaṃ divyaṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi ||44||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭādaśasāhasrayāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ saptamaskandhe
devīgītāyāṃ catvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 40 ||
khaśaradvayaśvi padyastu dvaipāyana mukhacyutaiḥ |
śrīmadbhāgavatasyāsya saptamaskandha īritaḥ ||1||
samāpto'yaṃ saptamaḥ skandhaḥ

śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ
śrīmaddevībhāgavatam
aṣṭamaḥ skandhaḥ
atha prathamo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
sūryacandrānvayotthānāṃ nṛpāṇāṃ satkathāśritam |
caritaṃ bhavatā proktaṃ śrutaṃ tadamṛtāspadam ||1||
adhunā śrotumicchāmi sā devī jagadaṃbikā |
manvaṃtareṣu sarveṣu yadyadrūpeṇa pūjyate ||2||
yasminyasmiśca vai sthāne yenaṃ yena ca karmaṇā |
" 'śarīreṇa ca deveṃśī pūjanīyā phalapradā ||
yenaiva maṃtrabījena yatra yatra ca pūjyate" ||
devyā virāṭsvarūpasya varṇanaṃ ca yathātatham ||3||
yena dhyānena tatsūkṣme svarūpe syānmatergatiḥ |
tatsarvaṃ vada viprarṣe yena śreyo'hamāpnuyām ||4||
vyāsa uvāca
devyārādhanamuttamam |
yatkṛtena śrutenāpi naraḥ śreyo'tra vidate ||5||
śṛṇu rājanpravakṣyāmi yaduktavāndevo yogacaryā pravartakaḥ || 6 ||
evametannāradena pṛṣṭo nārāyaṇaḥ purā | tasmai
ekadā nāradaḥ śrīmānparyaṭana pṛthivīmimām |
nārāyaṇāśramaṃ prāpto gatakhedaśca tasthivān ||7||
tasmai yāgātmane natvā brahmadevatanūdbhavaḥ |
paryapṛcchadimaṃ cārthaṃ yatpṛṣṭo bhavatā'nagha || 8 ||

nārada uvāca
devadeva mahādeva purāṇapuruṣottama |
jagadādhāra sarvajña ślāghanīyorusadguṇa || 9 ||
jagatastattvamādyaṃ yattanme vada yathepsitam |
jāyate kuta evedaṃ kutaścedaṃ pratiṣṭhitam ||10||
kuto'ntaṃ prāpnuyātkāle kutra sarvaphalodayaḥ |
kena jñātena māyaiṣā mohabhūrnāśamāpnuyāt ||11||
kayā'rcayā kiṃ japena kiṃ dhyānenātmahṛtkaje |
prakāśo jāyate deva tamasyarkodayo yathā || 12||
etatpraśnottaraṃ deva brūhi sarvamaśeṣataḥ |
yathā lokastaredaṃdhatamasaṃ tvaṃjasaiva hi || 13||
vyāsa uvāca
evaṃ devarṣiṇā pṛṣṭaḥ prācīno munisattamaḥ |
nārāyaṇo mahāyogī pratinaṃdya vaco'bravīt || 14||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
devarṣivaryātra jagatastattvamuttamam |
yena jñātena martyo hi jāyate na jagadbhrame || 15 ||
śṛṇu jagatastattvamityeva devī proktā mayāpi hi |
ṛṣibhirdevagandharvairanyaiśvāpi manīṣibhiḥ || 16 |
sā jagatsṛjate devī tayā ca pratipālyate |
tayā ca nāśyate sarvamiti proktaṃ guṇatrayāt ||17||
tasyāḥ svarūpaṃ vakṣyāmi devyāḥ siddharṣipūjitam |
smaratāṃ sarvapāpaghnaṃ kāmadaṃ mokṣadaṃ tathā || 18 |
manuḥ svāyaṃbhuvastvādyaḥ padmaputraḥ pratāpavān |
śatarūpāpatiḥ śrīmānsarvamanvaṃrādhipaḥ || 19||
manuḥ pitaraṃ devaṃ prajāpatimakalmaṣam |
bhaktyā paryacaratpūrvaṃ tāmuvācātmabhūḥ sutam ||20||
putra putra tvayā kāryaṃ devyārādhanamuttamam |
tatprasādena te tāta prajāsargaḥ prasiddhayati || 21 |
evamuktaḥ prajāsraṣṭā manuḥ svāyaṃbhuvo virāṭ ! jagadyoniṃ tadā devīṃ tapasā'tarpayadvibhuḥ ||22||
tuṣṭāva devoṃ deveśīṃ samāhitamatiḥ kila |
ādyāṃ māyāṃ sarvaśakti sarvakāraṇakāraṇam ||23||
manuruvāca
namo namaste deveśi jagatkāraṇakāraṇe |
śaṃkhacakragadāhaste nārāyaṇahṛdāśrite ||24||
vedamūrte jaganmātaḥ kāraṇasthānarūpiṇi |
vedatrayapramāṇajñe sarvadevanute śive || 25 ||
maheśvari : mahābhāge mahāmāye mahodaye |
mahādeva priyāvāse mahādevapriyaṃkari ||26|
gopendasya priye jyeṣṭhe mahānaṃde mahotsave |
mahāmārībhayahare namo devādipūjite ||27||
sarva maṃgala māṃgalye śive sarvārthasādhike |
śaraṇye tryaṃbake gauri nārāyaṇi namostu te || 28 ||
yataśvedaṃ yayā viśvamotaṃ protaṃ ca sarvathā |
caitanyamekamādyaṃtarahitaṃ tejasāṃ nidhim ||29||
brahmā yadīkṣaṇātsarvaṃ karoti ca hariḥ sadā |
pālayatyapi viśveśaḥ saṃhartā yadanugrahāt || 30 || .
madhukaiṭabhasaṃbhūtabhayārtaḥ padmasaṃbhavaḥ |
yasyāḥ stavena mumuce ghoradaityabhavāṃbudheḥ ||31||
tvaṃ hrīḥ kīrtiḥ smṛtiḥ kāṃtiḥ kamalā girijā satī |
dākṣāyaṇī vedagarbhā siddhidātrī sadā'bhayā || 32||

stoṣye tvāṃ ca namasyāmi pūjayāmi japāmi ca |
dhyāyāmi bhāvaye vīkṣe śroṣye devi prasīda me ||33||
brahmā vedanidhiḥ kṛṣṇo lakṣmyāvāsaḥ purandaraḥ |
trilokādhipatiḥ pāśī yādasāṃpatiruttamaḥ || 34 ||
kubero nidhinātho'bhūdyamo jātaḥ paretarāṭ |
nairṛto rakṣasāṃ nāthaḥ somo jāto hyapomayaḥ ||35||
trilokavaṃdyo lokeśa mahāmāṅgalyarūpiṇi |
namaste'stu punarbhūyo jaganmātarnamo namaḥ || 36 ||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
evaṃ stutā bhagavatī durgā nārāyaṇī parā |
prasannā prāha devarṣe brahmaputramidaṃ vacaḥ || 37 ||
śrīdevyuvāca
varaṃ varaya rājeṃdra brahmaputra yadicchasi |
prasannāhaṃ stavenātra bhaktyā cārādhanena ca || 38||
manuruvāca
yadi devi prasannāsi bhaktyā kāruṇikottame |
tadā nirvighnataḥ sṛṣṭiḥ prajāyāḥ syāttavājñayā || 39||
śrīdevyuvāca
prajāsargaḥ prabhavatu mamānugrahataḥ kila |
nirvighnena ca rājeṃdra vṛddhiśvāpyuttarottaram ||40||
yaḥ kaścitpate stotraṃ madbhaktyā tvatkṛtaṃ sadā |
teṣāṃ vidyā prajāsiddhiḥ kīrtiḥ kāṃtyudayaḥ khalu ||41||
jāyaṃte dhanadhānyāni śaktiraprahatā nṛṇām |
sarvatra vijayo rājansukhaṃ śatruparikṣayaḥ || 42 ||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
evaṃ dattvā varāndevī manave brahmasūnave |
antardhānaṃ gatā cāsītpaśyatastasya dhīmataḥ || 43 ||
atha labdhavaro rājā brahmaputraḥ pratāpavān |
brahmāṇamatravīttāta sthānaṃ me dīyatāṃ rahaḥ ||44||
yatrāhaṃ samadhiṣṭhāya prajāḥ srakṣyāmi puṣkalāḥ |
yakṣyāmi yajñaideveśaṃ tatsamādiśa māciram ||45 ||
iti putravacaḥ śrutvā prajāpatipatirvibhuḥ |
ciṃtayāmāsa suciraṃ kathaṃ kāryaṃ bhavedidam ||46 ||
sṛjato me gataḥ kālo vipulo'naṃtasaṃkhyakaḥ |
dharā vābhiḥ plutā magnā rasaṃ yātā'khilāśrayā 47 ||
idaṃ maccititaṃ kāryaṃ bhagavānādipūrupaḥ |
kariṣyati sahāyo me yadādeśe'hamāśritaḥ ||48 ||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇaṃ aṣṭamaskandhe bhuvanakośo nāma prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 ||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
nārāyaṇa uvāca
evaṃ mīmāṃsatastasya padmayonaḥ paraṃtapa |
manvādibhirmunivarairmarīcyādyaiḥ samantataḥ || 1 ||
dhyāyatastasya nāsāgrādviriceḥ sahasā'nagha |
varāhapoto niragādekāṃgulapramāṇataḥ || 2||
tasyaiva paśyataḥ svasthaḥ kṣaṇena kila nārada |
karimātraṃ pravavṛdhe tadadbhutatamaṃ hyabhūt ||3||

marīcimukhyaiviprendraḥ sanakādyaiśca nārada |
taddṛṣṭvā saukaraṃ rūpaṃ tarkayāmāsa padmabhūḥ ||4||
kimetatsaukaravyājaṃ divyaṃ sattvamavasthitam |
atyāścaryamidaṃ jātaṃ nāsikāyā viniḥsṛtam ||5||
dṛṣṭoṃguṣṭhaśiromātraḥ kṣaṇācchailendrasannibhaḥ |
āhosvidbhagavānki vā yajño me khedayanmanaḥ || 6 ||
iti tarkayatastasya brahmaṇaḥ paramātmanaḥ |
varāharūpī bhagavāñjagarjācalasannibhaḥ ||7||
virici harpayāmāsa saṃhatāṃśca dvijottamān |
svagarjaśabdamātreṇa dikprāṃtamanunādayan ||8||
te niśamya svakhedasya kṣayiṣṇuṃ ghurdhurasvanam |
janastapaḥ satyalokavāsino'maravaryakāḥ ||9||
chandomayaiḥ stotravarairṛksāmātharvasaṃbhavaḥ |
vacobhiḥ purupaṃ tvādyaṃ dvijeṃdrā : paryavākiran || 10 ||
teṣāṃ stotraṃ niśamyādyo bhagavānharirīśvaraḥ |
kṛpāvalokamātreṇānugṛhītvā'pa āviśat || 11 ||
tasyāṃtaviṃśataḥ krūrasaṭāghātaprapīḍitaḥ |
samudro'thābrajīheva rakṣa māṃ śaraṇārtihan || 12 |
ityākarṇya samudroktaṃ vacanaṃ harirīśvaraḥ |
vidārayañjalacarāñjagāmāṃtarjale vibhuḥ || 13 ||
itastato'bhidhāvansa vicinvanpṛthivīṃ dharām |
āghrāyāghrāya sarveśo dharāmāsādayacchanaiḥ ||14||
aṃtarjalagatāṃ bhūmi sarvasattvāśrayāṃ tadā |
bhūmi sa devadeveśo daṃṣṭrayodājahāra tām ||15||
tāṃ samuddhṛtya daṃṣṭrāgre yajñeśo yajñapūruṣaḥ |
śuśubhe diggajo yadvaduddhṛtyātha supadminīm ||16||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā devadeveśo viriciḥ sa manuḥ svarāṭ |
tuṣṭāva vāgbhirdeveśaṃ daṃṣṭroddhṛtavasuṃdharam ||17||
brahmovāca
jitaṃ te puṇḍarīkākṣa bhaktānāmārtināśana |
kharvīkṛtasurādhāra sarvakāmaphalaprada || 18 ||
iyaṃ ca dharaṇī deva śobhate vasudhā tava |
padminīva supatrāḍhyā mataṃgajakaroddhṛtā || 19 ||
idaṃ ca te śarīraṃ vaṃ śobhate bhūmisaṃgamāt | uddhṛtāṃbujaśuṃḍāgra karoṃdratanusannibham 112011
namo namaste deveśa sṛṣṭisaṃhārakāraka |
dānavānāṃ vināśāya kṛtanānākṛte prabho ||21||
agrataśca namasne'stu pṛṣṭhataśca namo namaḥ |
sarvāmarādhārabhūta vṛhaddhāma namo'stu te ||22||
tvayā'haṃ ca prajāsarge niyuktaḥ śaktivṛṃhitaḥ |
tvadājñāvaśataḥ sarga karomi vikaromi ca ||23||
tvatsahāyena deveśā amarāśca purā hare |
sudhāṃ vibhejire sarve yathākālaṃ yathābalam ||24||
iṃdrastrilokīsāmrājyaṃ labdhavāṃstvannideśataḥ |
bhunakti lakṣmīṃ bahulāṃ surasaṃghaprapūjitaḥ || 25 ||
vahniḥ pāvakatāṃ labdhvā jāṭharādivibhedataḥ |
devāsuramanuṣyāṇāṃ karotyāpyāyanaṃ tathā ||26||
dharmarājo'tha pitṝṇāmadhipaḥ pitṝṇāmadhipaḥ sarvakarmadṛk |
karmaṇāṃ phaladātā'sau tvanniyogādadhīśvaraḥ ||27||
nairṛto rakṣasāmīśo yajño vighnavināśanaḥ |
sarveṣāṃ prāṇināṃ karmasākṣī tvattaḥ prajāyate ||28||
varuṇo yādasāmīśo lokapālo jalādhipaḥ |
tvadājñāvalamāśritya lokapālatvamāgataḥ ||29||
vāyurgandhavahaḥ sarvabhūtaprāṇanakāraṇam |
jātastava nideśena lokapālo jagadguruḥ ||30||

kuberaḥ kinnarādīnāṃ yakṣāṇāṃ jīvanāśrayaḥ |
tvadājñāṃtargataḥ sarvalokapeṣu ca mānyabhūḥ ||31||
īśāna: sarva rudrāṇāmīśvarāṃtakaraḥ prabhuḥ |
jāto lokeśavaṃdyo'sau sarvadevādhipālakaḥ ||32||
namastubhyaṃ bhagavate jagadīśāya kurmahe |
yasyāṃśabhāgāḥ sarve hi jātā devāḥ sahasraśaḥ || 33||
nārada uvāca
evaṃ stuto viśvasṛjā bhagavānādipūruṣaḥ | līlāva lokamātreṇāpyanugrahamavāsṛjat 113811
tatraivābhyāgataṃ daityaṃ hiraṇyākṣaṃ mahāsuram |
raṃdhānamadhvano bhīmaṃ gadayā'tāḍayaddhariḥ || 35 ||
tadraktapaṃkadigdhāṃgo bhagavānādipūruṣaḥ |
uddhṛtya dharaṇīṃ devo daṃṣṭrayā līlayāpsu tām || 36 |
niveśya lokanātheśo jagāma sthānamātmanaḥ |
etadbhagavataścitraṃ dharaṇyuddharaṇaṃ param ||37||
śṛṇuyādyaḥ pumānyaśva paṭheccaritamuttamam |
sarvapāpavinirmukto vaiṣṇavīṃ gatimāpnuyāt || 38 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe aṣṭamaskandhe dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2||
atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
nārāyaṇa uvāca
mahīṃ devaḥ pratiṣṭhāpya yathāsthāne ca nārada |
vaikuṇṭhalokamagamadbrahmovāca stramātmajam ||1||
svāyaṃbhuva mahābāho putra tejasvināṃ vara |
sthāne mahīmaye tiṣṭha prajāḥ sṛja prathocitam ||2||
deśakālavibhāgena yajñeśaṃ puruṣaṃ yaja |
uccāvacapadārtheśca yajñasādhana kaivibho ||3||
dharmamācara śāstroktaṃ varṇāśramanibaṃdhanam |
etena kramayogena prajāvṛddhirbhaviṣyati ||4||
putrānutpādya guṇataḥ kīrtyā kāṃtyātmarūpiṇaḥ |
vidyāvinayasaṃpannānsadācāravatāṃ varān ||5||
kanyāśca dattvā guṇavadyaśovadbhayaḥ samāhitaḥ |
manaḥ samyaksamātrāya pradhānapuruṣe pare ||6||
bhaktisādhanayogena bhagavatparicaryayā |
gatimiṣṭāṃ sadā vaṃdyāṃ yogināṃ gamitā bhavān ||7||
ityāśvāsya manuṃ putraṃ padmayoniḥ prajāpatiḥ |
prajāsarge niyamyāmu svadhāma pratyapadyata ||8||
prajāḥ sṛjata putreti piturājñāṃ samādadhat |
' svāyaṃbhuvaḥ prajāsargamakarotpṛthivīpatiḥ || 9 ||
priyavratottānapādī manuputrau mahaujasau |
kanyāstisraḥ prasūtāca tāsāṃ nāmāni me śṛṇu || 10 ||
ākūtiḥ prathamā kanyā dvitīyā devahūtikā |
tṛtīyā ca prasūtirhi vikhyātā lokapāvanī || 11 ||
ākūti rucaye prādātkardamāya ca madhyamām |
dakṣāyādātprasūti ca yāsāṃ loka imāḥ prajāḥ || 12 ||
ruceḥ prajajñe bhagavānyajo nāmādipūruṣaḥ |
ākūtyāṃ devahūtyāṃ ca kapilo'sau ca kardamāt || 13 ||
sāṃkhyācāryaḥ sarvaloke vikhyātaḥ kapilo vibhuḥ |
dakṣātsūtyāṃ kanyāśca bahuśo jajñire prajāḥ || 14||
yāsāṃ saṃtānasaṃbhūtā devatiryaṅnarādayaḥ |
prasūtā lokavikhyātāḥ sarve savartakāḥ || 15 ||

yajñaśca bhagavānsvāyaṃbhuva manvaṃtare vibhuḥ |
manaṃ rarakṣa rakṣobhyo yāmyairdevagaṇairvṛtaḥ || 16 ||
kapilo'pi mahāyogī bhagavānsvāśrame sthitaḥ |
devahūtyai paraṃ jñānaṃ sarvāvidyā nivartakam || 17||
saviśeṣaṃ dhyānayoga madhyātmajñāna niścayam |
kāpilaṃ śāstramākhyātaṃ sarvājñānavināśanam ||18||
upadiśya mahāyogī saṃyayau pulahāśramam |
adyāpi vartate devaḥ sāṃkhyācāryo mahāyaśāḥ ||19||
yannāmasmaraṇenāpi sāṃkhyayogaśca siddhayati |
taṃ vaṃde kapilaṃ yogācāryaṃ sarvavarapradam ||20||
kanyāvaṃśavarṇanamuttamam |
paṭatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ cāpi sarvapāpavināśanam || 21||
evamuktaṃ manoḥ ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi manuputrānvayaṃ śubham |
yadākarṇanamātreṇa |
paraṃ padamavāpnuyāt || 22||
sarvabhūtasukhāptaye ||23||
dvīpavarpasamudrādivyavasthā yatsutaiḥ kṛtā | vyavahāraprasiddhayarthaṃ
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe bhuvanakośe tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
atha caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
nārāyaṇa uvāca
manoḥ svāyaṃbhuvasyāsījjyeṣṭhaḥ putraḥ priyavrataḥ |
pituḥ sevāparo nityaṃ satyadharmaparāyaṇaḥ || 1 ||
prajāpaterduhitaraṃ surūpāṃ viśvakarmaṇaḥ |
barhiṣmatī copayeme samānāṃ śolakarmamiḥ ||2||
putrāndaśaguṇairanvitānbhāvitātmanaḥ |
janayāmāsa kanyāṃ corjasvatīṃ ca yavīyasīm ||3||
tasyāṃ rukmaśutrakaḥ ||4||
āgnīdhraśredhmajihvaśva yajñabāhustṛtīyakaḥ | mahāvīraścaturthastu paṃcamo
dhṛtapṛṣṭhaśca savano medhātithirathāṣṭamaḥ |
vītihotraḥ kaviśceti darśate vahnināmakāḥ ||5||
eteṣāṃ daśaputrāṇāṃ trayo'pyāsanvirāgiṇaḥ |
kaviśva savanaścaiva mahāvīra iti trayaḥ ||6||
ātmavidyāpariṣṇātāḥ sarve te hyardhvaretasaḥ |
āśrame parahaṃsākhye niḥspṛhā hyabhavanmudā ||7||
aparasyāṃ ca jāyāyāṃ trayaḥ putrāśca jajñire |
uttamastāmasaṃścaiva raivataśceti viśrutāḥ || 8 ||
manvaṃtarādhipataya ete putrā mahaujasaḥ |
priyavrataḥ sa rājendro bubhuje jagatīmimām ||9|
ekādaśārbudābdānāmavyāhatabalendriyaḥ |
yadā sūryaḥ pṛthivyāśca vibhāge prathame'tapat || 10 ||
bhāge dvitīye tatrāsīdaṃdhakārodayaḥ kila |
evaṃ vyatikaraṃ rājā vilokya manasā ciram || 11||
praśāsati mayi bhūmyāṃ ca tamaḥ prādurbhavetkatham |
evaṃ nivārayiṣyāmi bhūmau yogabalena ca ||12||
evaṃ vyavasito rājā putraḥ svāyaṃbhuvasya saḥ |
rathenādityavarṇena saptakṛtvaḥ prakāśayan || 13 ||
tasyāpi gacchato rājño bhūmau yadrathanemayaḥ |
patitāste samudrākhyāṃ bhejire loka hetave || 14 ||
jātāḥ pradeśaste sapta dvīpā bhūmau vibhāgaśaḥ |
rathanemisamutthāste parikhāḥ sapta siṃdhavaḥ || 15||
yata āsaṃstataḥ saptabhuvo dvīpā hi te smṛtāḥ |
jaṃbudvīpa: plakṣadvīpaḥ śālmalīdvīpasaṃjñakaḥ ||16||

kuśadvīpaḥ krauṃcadvīpaḥ śākadvīpaśca puṣkaraḥ |
teṣāṃ ca parimāṇaṃ tu dviguppaṃ cottarottaram ||17||
samaṃtataścopaklṛptaṃ bahirbhāgakrameṇaṃ ca |
kṣārodekṣurasodau ca surodaśca ghṛtodakaḥ || 18 ||
kṣīrododadhimaṇḍodaḥ śuddhodaśceti te smṛtāḥ |
saptaite prativikhyātāḥ pṛthivyāṃ siṃdhavastadā ||19||
prathamo jambudvīpākhyo yaḥ kṣārodena veṣṭitaḥ |
tatpatiṃ vidadhe rājā putramāgnīdhrasaṃjñakam ||20||
plakṣadvīpe dvitīye'smindvī pekṣurasa saṃplute |
jātastadadhipaḥ prayavrata iṣmādijihnakaḥ ||21||
śālmalīdvīpa etasminsurodadhipariplute |
yajñabāhuṃ tadadhipaṃ karotisma priyavrataḥ || 22||
kuśadvīpe'tiramye ca ghṛtodeopaveṣṭite |
hiraṇyaretā rājā'bhūtpriyavratatanūjaniḥ || 23 ||
kauṃcadvīpe paṃcame tu kṣīrodaparisaṃplute |
prayatrato ghṛtapṛṣṭhaḥ patirāsīnmahābalaḥ || 24||
śākadvīpe cārutare dadhimaṇḍodasaṃkule |
medhātithirabhūdrājā priyavratasuto priyavratasuto varaḥ ||25||
puṣkaradvīpa śuddhodakasiṃdhusamākule |
vītihotro babhūvāsau rājā janakasaṃmataḥ ||26||
kanyāmūrjasvatīnāmnī dadāvuśana se vibhuḥ |
āsīttasyāṃ devayānī kanyā kāvyasya viśrutā ||27||
evaṃ vibhajya putrebhyaḥ saptadvīpānpriyavrataḥ |
vivekavaśago bhūtvā yogamārgāśrito'bhavat || 28||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe bhuvanakośe caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
devarṣe śṛṇu vistāraṃ vistāraṃ dvīpavarṣavibhedataḥ |
bhūmaṇḍalasya sarvasya yathā devaprakalpitam || 1||
samāsātsaṃpravakṣyāmi nālaṃ vistarataḥ kvacit |
jaṃbudvīpaḥ prathamataḥ pramāṇe lakṣayounaḥ || 2 ||
viśālo vartulākāro yathā'bjasya ca karṇikā |
navavarṣāṇi yasmiśca navasāhasra yojanaḥ || 3 ||
āyāmaiḥ parisaṃkhyā ni giribhiḥ paritaḥ kṣitau |
aṣṭabhirdīrgha rūpaiśca suvibhaktāni sarvataḥ || 4||
dhanurvatsaṃsthite jñeye dve varṣe dakṣiṇottare |
dīrghāṇi tatra catvāri caturasramilāvṛtam ||5||
ilāvṛtaṃ madhyavarṣa yantrābhyāṃ supratiṣṭhitaḥ |
sauvarṇo girirājo'yaṃ lakṣayojanamucchritaḥ || 6||
karṇikārūpa evāyaṃ bhūgolakamalasya ca |
mūrdhni dvātriṃśatsahasrayojanairvitatastvayam ||7||
mūle ṣoḍaśasāhasrastāvatā'ntargataḥ kṣitau |
ilāvṛtasyottarato nolaḥ śvetaśca śṛṅgavān ||8||
yo vai girayaḥ proktā maryādāvavayastriṣu |
ramyakākhye tathā varṣe dvitīye ca hiraṇmaye || 9 ||
kuruvarṣe tṛtīye tu maryādāṃ vyaṃjayaṃti te |
prāgāyatā ubhayataḥ kṣārodāvadhayastathā || 10 ||
dvisahasrapṛthutarāstathā ekaikaśaḥ kramāt |
pūrvātpūrvāccottarasyāṃ daśāṃśādadhikāṃśataḥ ||11||
dairdhya eva hasantīme nānānadanadīyutāḥ |
ilāvṛtāddakṣiṇato niṣadho hemakūṭakaḥ || 12 || |

himālayaśceti trayaḥ prāgvistīrṇāḥ suśobhanāḥ |
ayutotsedhabhājaste yojanaiḥ parikīrtitāḥ || 13 ||
harivarṣaṃ kiṃpuruṣaṃ bhārataṃ ca yathātatham |
vibhāgātkathayatyete maryādāgirayastrayaḥ || 14 ||
ilāvṛtātpaścimato mālyavānnāma parvataḥ |
pūrveṇa ca tataḥ śrīmāngandhamādanaparvataḥ ||15||
ānīlaniṣadhaṃ tvetau cāyato dvisahasrataḥ |
yojanaiḥ pṛthutāṃ yātau maryādākārakau girī || 16 |
ketumālākhyabhadrāśvavarṣayoḥ prathito ca to |
mandaraśca tathā merumandaraśca supārśvakaḥ ||17||
kumudaceti vikhyātā girayo merupādā |
yojanāyuta vistāronnāhā meroścaturdiśam || 18 ||
avaṣṭaṃbhakarāste tu sarvato'bhivirājitāḥ |
eteṣu giriṣu prāptāḥ pādapāśvatajaṃbunī || 19 ||
kadaṃbanyagrodha iti catvāraḥ parvatāḥ sthitāḥ |
ketavo girirājeṣu ekādaśaśatocchrayāḥ ||20||
tāvadviṭapavistārāḥ śatākhyapariṇāhinaḥ |
catvāraśva hṛdāsteṣu payomadhvikṣusajjalāḥ || 21||
yadupasparśino devā yogeśvaryāṇi viṃdate |
devodyānāni catvāri bhajanti lalanāsukhāḥ ||22||
naṃdanaṃ caitrarathakaṃ vaibhrājaṃ sarvabhadrakam |
yeṣu sthitvā'maragaṇā lalanāyūthasaṃyutāḥ || 23 ||
upadevagaṇairgītamahimāno mahāśayāḥ |
viharanti svataṃtrāste yathākāmaṃ yathāsukham ||24||
mandarotsaṃgasaṃsthasya devacūtasya mastakāt |
ekādaśaśatocchrāyātphalānyamṛtabhāṃti ca || 25 ||
girikūṭapramāṇāni susvādūni mṛdūni ca |
teṣāṃ viśīryamāṇānāṃ phalānāṃ surasena ca ||26||
aruṇodasavarṇena aruṇodā pravartate |
nadī ramyajalā devadaityarājaprapūjitā ||27||
aruṇākhyā mahārāja vartate pāpahāriṇī |
pūjayanti ca tāṃ devīṃ sarvakāmaphalapradām ||28||
nānopahārabalibhiḥ balmaṣaghnyabhayapradām |
tasyāḥ kṛpāvalokena kṣemārogyaṃ vrajanti te ||29||
ādyā māyā'tulā'naṃtā puṣṭirīśvaragālinī |
duṣṭanāśakarī kāṃtidāyinīti smṛtā bhuvi || 30||
asyāḥ pūjāprabhāveṇa jāṃbūnadamudāhṛt ||31||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe aṣṭamaskandhe bhuvanakośavarṇanaṃ nāma pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5 ||
atha ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
aruṇodā nadī yā tu mayā proktā ca nārada |
mandarānnipataṃtī sā pūrvelāvṛtaṃ plavet || 1||
yajjopaṇādbhavānyāścānucarīṇāṃ striyāmapi |
yakṣagandharva patnīnāṃ dehagaṃdhavaho'nilaḥ || 2 ||
vāsayatyabhito bhūmi daśayojanasaṃkhyayā |
evaṃ jambūphalānāṃ ca tuṅgadeśanipātanāt || 3 ||
viśīryatāmanasthīnāṃ vuñjarāṃgapramāṇinām |
rasena ca nadī jaṃbūnāmnī mervākhyamandarāt ||4||
pataṃtī bhūmibhāge ca dakṣiṇelāvṛtaṃ gatā |
devī jaṃbūphalāsvādatuṣṭā jaṃbvādanī smṛtā || 5 ||

tatratyānāṃ ca lokānāṃ devanāgarṣirakṣasām |
pūjanīyapadā mānyā sarvabhūtadayākarī || 6 ||
pāvanī pāpināṃ roganāśinī smaratāmapi |
kīrtitā vighnasaṃhartrī mānanīyā divaukasām ||7||
kokilākṣī kāmakalā karuṇā kāmapūjitā |
kaṭhoravigrahā dhanyā nākimānyā gabhastinī ||8||
ebhirnāmapadaiḥ kāmaṃ japanīyā sadā nṛṇām |
jambūnadīrodhasoryā mṛttikā tīravartinī || 9 ||
jaṃbūrasenānuviddhyamānā vāyvarkayogataḥ |
vidyādharāmarastrīṇāṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ vividhaṃ mahat || 10 ||
jaṃbūnadasuvarṇaṃ ca proktaṃ devavinirmitam |
yatsuvarṇaṃ ca vibudhā yoṣidbhiḥ kāmukāḥ sadā 11 ||
mukuṭaṃ kaṭisūtraṃ ca keyūrādīnprakurvate |
mahākadambaḥ saṃproktaḥ supārśva girisaṃsthitaḥ ||12||
tasya koṭaradeśemyaḥ paṃca dhārāśca yāḥ smṛtāḥ |
supārśva girimūrdhnāha pataṃtyetā bhuvaṃ gatāḥ || 13 ||
madhudhārāḥ paṃca tāstu paścimelāvṛtaṃ plutāḥ |
yāśvopabhujyamānānāṃ devānāṃ mukhagandhabhṛt || 14||
samaṃ tato'gacchacchata yojanavāsanaḥ |
dhāreśvarī mahādevī bhaktānāṃ kāryakāriṇī ||15||
devapūjyā mahotsāhā kālarūpā mahānanā |
vasate karmaphaladā kāṃtāragrahaṇeśvarī || 16||
karāladehā kālāṃgī kāmakoṭipravartinī |
ityetairnāmabhiḥ pūjyā devī sarvasureśvarī || 17||
evaṃ kumudarūḍho yo nāmnā śatabalo vaṭaḥ |
tatskandhebhyo'dhomukhāśca nadāḥ kumudamūrdhataḥ || 18 ||
payodadhimadhughṛtaguḍānnādyaṃ barādibhiḥ |
śayyāsanādyābharaṇaiḥ sarve kāmadughāśca te || 19||
uttareṇelāvṛtaṃ te plāvayaṃti samaṃtataḥ |
mīnākṣī tatsthale devī devāsuraniṣevitā || 20 ||
nīlāṃbarā raudramukhī nīlālakayutā ca sā |
nākināṃ devasaṃghānāṃ phaladā varadā ca sā ||21||
atimānyā'tipūjyā ca mattamātaṃgagāminī |
madanonmādinī mānapriyā mānapriyāṃtarā ||22||
māravegadharā mārapūjitā māramādinī |
mayūravaraśobhāḍhyā śikhivāhanagarbhabhūḥ || 23 ||
ebhirnāmapadairvadyā devī sā mīnalocanā |
japatāṃ smaratāṃ mānadātrī ceśvarasaṃginī || 24||
tepāṃ nadānāṃ pānīyapānānugatacetasām |
prajānāṃ na kadācitsyādvalīpalitalakṣaṇam ||25||
klamasvedādidaurgandhyaṃ jarāmayamṛtibhramāḥ | śītoṣṇavātavaivarṇya mukhopaplavasaṃcayāḥ 112511
nāpadaścaiva jāyaṃte yāvajjīvaṃ sukhaṃ bhavet |
nairantaryeṇa tatsyādvai sukhaṃ niratiśāyakam ||27||
tata ūrdhva pravakṣyāmi saṃniveśaṃ ca tadvireḥ |
suvarṇamayanāmno vai sumeroḥ parvatāḥ pṛthak || 28 ||
girayo viṃśatiparāḥ kaṇikāyā iveha te |
kesarībhūya sarve'pi merormūlavibhāgake || 29||
paritaścopaklṛptāste teṣāṃ nāmāni śṛṇvataḥ |
kuraṅgaḥ kuragaścaiva kusuṃbho'tho vikaṃkataḥ ||30||
trikūṭa : śiśiraścaiva pataṃgo rucakastathā |
niṣadhaśva śinīvāsa : kapila : śaṃkha eva ca || 31 ||
vaidūryacāruviścaiva haṃso ṛṣabha eva ca |
nāgaḥ kālaṃjaraścaiva nāradaśceti viśatiḥ || 32||
iti śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe ṣaṣṭo'dhyāyaḥ || 6 ||

atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
giriṃ meruṃ tu pūrveṇa dvau cāṣṭādaśayojanaiḥ |
sahasrairāyatī codadrisahasraṃ pṛthūccako ||1||
jaṭharo devakūṭaśca tāvetau girivaryako |
mero: paścimato'drī hī patramānastathāparaḥ ||2||
pāriyātraśca tau tāvadvikhyātau tuṅgavistarau |
merordakṣiṇataḥ khyātau kailāsakaravīrakau |
prāgāyatī pūrva vṛttau mahāparvatarājakoṃ |
evaṃ cottarato merostriśṛṃgamakaro girī ||4||
etaiścādrivarairaṣṭasaṃkhyaiḥ parivṛto giriḥ |
sumeru: kāṃcanagiriḥ paribhrājatraviryathā ||5||
merormūrdhani dhāturhi purī paṃkajajanmanaḥ |
madhyataścopaklṛpteyaṃ daśasāhasrayojanaiḥ ||6||
samānacaturasrāṃ ca śātakauṃbhamayoṃ purīm |
varṇayanti mahātmānaḥ parāvaravido budhāḥ ||7||
tāṃ purīmanulokānāmaṣṭānāmāśiṣāṃ parā: |
puryaḥ prakhyātasauvarṇarūpāstāśca yathādiśam ||8||
yathā rūpaṃ sārdhanetrasahasrapramitāḥ kṛtāḥ |
merornava purāṇi syurmanovatyamarāvatī ||9||
tejovatī saṃyamanī tathā kṛṣṇāṃganā'parā |
śraddhāvatī gaṃdhavatī tathā cānyā mahodayā || 10 ||
yaśovatī ca brahmendravahnyādīnāṃ yathākramam |
tatraiva yajñaliṃgasya viṣṇorbhagavato vibhoḥ ||11||
vāmapādāṃguṣṭhanakhanibhinnasya ca nārada |
aṃḍordhvabhāgaraṃdhrasya madhyātsaṃviśatī divaḥ || 12 ||
mūrdhanyavatatāreyaṃ gaṃgā saṃviśatī vibhoḥ |
lokānāmakhilānāṃ ca pāpahārijalākulā ||13||
iyaṃ ca sākṣādbhagavatpadī lokeṣu viśrutā |
kālena mahatā sā tu yugasāhasrakeṇa tu || 14 ||
divo mūrdhānamāgatya devo devanadīśvarī |
yattadviṣṇupadaṃ nāma sthānaṃ trailokyaviśrutam ||15||
auttānapādiryatrāste dhruvaḥ paramapāvanaḥ |
bhagavatpādayugalaṃ padmakoṣarajo dadhat ||16||
adyāpyāste sa rājarṣiḥ padavīmacalāṃ śritaḥ |
tatra saptarpayastsya prabhāvajñā mahāśayāḥ || 17||
pradakṣiṇaṃ prakramanti sarvalokahitepsavaḥ |
ātyaṃtikī siddhiriyaṃ tapatāṃ siddhidāyinī || 18||
ādriyaṃte ca śirasā jaṭājūṭopitena ca |
tato viṣṇupadāddevī nekasāhasrakoṭibhiḥ || 19 ||
vimānairākule devayāne'vataratī ca sā |
candramaṇḍalamāplāvya pataṃtī brahmasadmani ||20||
caturdhā bhidyamānā sā brahmaloke ca nārada |
caturbhirnāmabhirdevī caturdiśamabhisṛtā || 21||
saritāṃ ca nadīnāṃ ca patimevānvapadyata |
sītā cālakanaṃdā ca caturbhadreti nāmabhiḥ || 22||
sītā ca brahmasadanācchikharebhyaḥ kṣamābhṛtām |
kesarābhidhanāmnā ca prasravaṃtī ca svarṇadī ||23||
gaṃdhamādanamūrtīha patitā pāpahāriṇī |
antareṇa tu bhadrāśvavarṣaṃ prācyāṃ samāgatā || 24||
kṣārodadhiṃ gatā sā tu dyunado devapūjitā |
tato mālyavataḥ śṛṃgādvitīyā parinirgatā || 25||

tato vegavatī bhūtvā ketumālaṃ samāgatā |
cakṣurnāmnī devanadī pratīcyāṃ diśyupāgatā || 26 ||
saritāṃ patimāviṣṭā sā gaṅgā devavanditā |
tatastṛtīyā dhārā tu nāmnā khyātā ca nārada ||27||
puṇyā cālakanaṃdā vai dakṣiṇenābjabhūpadāt |
vanāni girikūṭāni samatikramya cāgatā ||28||
hemakūṭaṃ girivaraṃ prāptā'topīha nirgatā |
ativegavatī bhūtvā bhārataṃ cāgatā parā ||29||
dakṣiṇāṃ jaladhi prāptā tṛtīyā sā saridvarā |
yasyāḥ snānāya saratāṃ manujānāṃ pade pade ||30||
rājasūyāśvamedhādiphalaṃ tu na hi durlabham |
tataścaturthī dhārā tu śṛṃgavatparvatātpunaḥ || 31 ||
bhadrābhidhā saṃsravaṃtī kurūnsantarpya cottarān |
samudraṃ samanuprāptā gaṅgā trailokyapāvanī ||32||
anye nadāśca nadyaśca varṣe varṣe'pi saṃti hi |
bahuśo merumaṃdāraprasūtāścaiva nārada ||33||
tatrāpi bhārataṃ varṣaṃ karmakṣetramuśaṃti hi |
anyāni cāṣṭavarṣāṇi bhaumasvargapradāni ca ||34||
svargiṇāṃ puṇyaśeṣasya bhogasthānāni nārada |
puruṣāṇāṃ cāyutāyurvajrāṃgā devasannibhāḥ || 35!!
puruṣā nāgasāhasrairdaśabhiḥ parikalpitāḥ |
mahāsaurata saṃtuṣṭāḥ kalatrāḍhyāḥ sukhānvitāḥ || 36||
ekavarṣonake cāyuṣyāptagarbhāḥ striyo'pi hi |
tretāyugasamaḥ kālo vartate sarvadaiva hi || 37 || ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe aṣṭamaskaṃdhe saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 ||
atha aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
teṣu varṣeṣu deveśāḥ pūrvoktaḥ stavanaiḥ sadā |
pūjayaṃti mahādevīṃ japadhyānasamādhibhiḥ || 1 ||
sarvartukusumaśreṇīśobhitā vanarājayaḥ |
phalānāṃ pallavānāṃ ca yatra śobhā nirantaram ||2||
teṣu kānana varṣeṣu varṣaparvatasānuṣu |
giridroṇīṣu sarvāṣu nirmalodakarāśiṣu ||3||
vikacotpalamālā su haṃsasārasa saṃcayaiḥ |
vimiśriteṣu teṣveva pakṣibhiḥ kūjiteṣu ca ||4||
jalakrīḍādibhiśvitravinodaiḥ krīḍayanti ca |
sundaryo lalitabhrūṇāṃ vilāsāyataneṣu ca ||5||
tatratyā viharatyatra svairaṃ yuvatibhiḥ saha |
navasvapi ca varṣeṣu bhagavānādipūruṣaḥ || 6 ||
"nārāyaṇākhyo lokānāmanugraha ra saidṛk" |
devīmārādhayannāste sa ca sarveśca pūjyate ||
ātmavyūhenejyayā'sau sannidhatte samāhitaḥ ||7||
ilāvṛte tu bhagavānpadmajākṣisamudbhavaḥ |
eka eva bhavo devo nityaṃ vasati sāṃganaḥ ||8||
tatkṣetre nāpara: kaścitpraveśaṃ vitanoti ca |
bhavānyāḥ śāpatastatra pumānstrī bhavati sphuṭam || 9 ||
bhavānīnāthakaiḥ strīṇāmasaṃkhyairgaṇakoṭibhiḥ |
saṃrudhyamāno deveśo devaṃ saṃkarṣaṇaṃ bhajan ||10||
ātmanā dhyānayogena sarvabhūtahitecchayā |
tāṃ tāmasīṃ turīyāṃ ca mūrti prakṛtimātmanaḥ || 11 ||
upadhāvate caikāgramanasā bhagavānajaḥ |

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe aṣṭamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 8
śrībhagavānuvāca
oṃ namo bhagavate mahāpuruṣāya sarvaguṇasaṃkhyānāyānantāyāvyaktāya nama iti || 12 ||
bhaje bhajanyāraṇapādapaṃkajaṃ bhagasya kṛtsnasya paraṃ parāyaṇam |
bhakteṣvalaṃ bhāvitabhūtabhāvanaṃ bhavāvahaṃ tvāṃ bhavabhāvamīśvaram ||13||
na yasya māyāguṇakarmavṛttibhirnirīkṣito hyaṇvapi dṛṣṭirajyate |
īśe yathā no jitamanyuraṃhasā kastaṃ na manyeta jigīṣurātmanaḥ || 14||
asaddṛśo yaḥ pratibhāti māyayā dhīveva madhvāsavatāmralocanaḥ |
na nāgavadhtro'rhaṇa īśire hiyā yatpādayoḥ sparśanagharṣitendriyāḥ || 15 ||
yamāhurasya sthitijanmasaṃyamaṃ tribhirvihīnaṃ yamanaṃtamṛṣayaḥ |
na veda siddhārthamiva kvacitsthitaṃ bhūmaṇḍalaṃ mūrdhasahasradhāmasu ||16||
yasyādya āsīdguṇavigraho mahānvijñānadhiṣṇyo bhagavānajaḥ kila |
yatsaṃvṛto'haṃ trivṛtā svatejasā vaikārikaṃ tāmasamaindriyaṃ sṛje ||17||
ete vayaṃ yasya vaśe mahātmanaḥ sthitāḥ śakuntā iva sūtrayaṃtritāḥ |
mahānahaṃvakṛtatāmasendriyāḥ sṛjāma sarve yadanugrahādidam || 18 |
yanirmitāṃ karhyapi karmaparvaṇoṃ māyāṃ jano'yaṃ gurusargamohitaḥ |
na veda nistāraṇayogamañjasā tasmai namaste vilayodayātmane ||19||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
evaṃ sa bhagavācudro devaṃ saṃkarpaṇaṃ prabhum |
ilāvṛtamupāsīta devagaṇasamāhitaḥ ||20||
tathaiva dharmaputro'sau nāmnā bhadraśravā iti |
tatkulasyāpi patayaḥ puruṣā bhadrasevakāḥ || 21||
bhadrāvavarṣe tāṃ mūrti vāsudevasya viśrutām |
hayamūrtibhidā tāṃ tu hayagrīvapadāṅkitām || 22||
parameṇa samādhyanyavārakeṇa niyantritām |
evameva ca tāṃ mūrti gṛgaṃta upayāṃti ca ||23|
bhadraśravasa ūcuḥ
oṃ namo bhagavate dharmāyātmaviśodhanāya nama iti |
aho vicitraṃ bhagavadviceṣṭitaṃ dhanaṃtaṃ jano'yaṃ hi miṣanna paśyati |
dhyāyanna tadyahi vikarma sevituṃ nirhṛtya putraṃ pitaraṃ jijīviṣuḥ || 24||
vadanti viśvaṃ kavayaḥ sma naśvaraṃ paśyaṃti cādhyātmavido vipaścitaḥ |
tathāpi muhyaṃti tavāja māyayā suvismitaṃ kṛtyamajaṃ nato'smi tam || 25||
viśvodbhavasthānanirodhakarma te hyakarturaṃgīkṛtamapyapāvṛtaḥ |

yuktaṃ na citraṃ tvayi kāryakāraṇe sarvātmani vyatirikte ca vastutaḥ ||26||
vedānyugānte tamasā tiraskṛtātrasātalādyo nṛturaṃgavigrahaḥ |
pratyādade vai kavaye'bhiyācate tasmai namaste vitathehitāya te ||27||
evaṃ stuvaṃti deveśaṃ hayaśīṣaṃ hari ca te |
bhadraśravasanāmāno varṇayati ca tadguṇān ||28||
eṣāṃ caritametaddhi yaḥ paṭhecchrāvayecca yaḥ |
pāpakaṃcukamutsṛjya devīlokaṃ vrajecca saḥ || 29 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe'ṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||
atha navamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
harivarṣe ca bhagavānnṛhariḥ pāpanāśanaḥ |
vartate yogayuktātmā bhaktānugrahakārakaḥ || 1||
tasya tayitaṃ rūpaṃ mahābhāgavato'suraḥ |
paśyanbhaktisamāyuktaḥ stauti tadguṇatattvavit ||2||
grahlāda uvāca
oṃ namo bhagavate narasiṃhāya namastejase āvirāvirbhava vajradaṃṣṭra karmāśayān
raṃdhaya raṃdhaya tamo grasa grasa oṃ svāhā |
abhayaṃ mamātmani bhūyiṣṭhāḥ || oṃ kṣom ||
svastyastu viśvasya khalaḥ prasīdatāṃ dhyāyaṃtu bhūtāni śivaṃ mitho dhiyā |
manaśva bhadraṃ bhajatādadhokṣaje āveśyatāṃ no matirarapyahaitukī ||3||
māgāradārātmaja vittabandhuṣu saṃgo yadi syādbhagavatpriyeṣu naḥ |
yaḥ prāṇavṛttyā parituṣṭa ātmavānsiddhayatyadūrānnaṃ tathendriyapriyaḥ || 4 ||
yatsaṃga labdhaṃ nijavīryavaibhavaṃ tīrthaṃ muhuḥ saṃspṛśatāṃ hi mānasam |
haratyajo'ntaḥśrutinirgato'ṅgajaṃ ko vai na sevetaṃ mukuṃdavikramam ||5||
yasyāsti bhaktirbhagavatyakiṃcanā sarverguṇaistatra samāsate surāḥ |
harāvabhaktasya kuto mahadguṇā manorathenāsati dhāvato bahiḥ ||6||
harihi sākṣādbhagavāñcharīriṇāmātmā jhaṣāṇāmiva toyamīpsitam |
hitvā mahāṃstaṃ yadi sajjate gṛhe tadā mahattvaṃ vayasā daṃpatīnām ||7||
tasmādrajorāgaviṣādamanyumānaspṛhābhayadainyādhimūlam
hitvā gṛhaṃ saṃsṛticakravālaṃ nṛsiṃhapādaṃ bhajatāṃ kuto bhayam || 8||
evaṃ daityapatiḥ so'pi bhaktyā'nudina mīḍate |
nṛhari pāpamātaṃgahari hṛtpadmavāsinam ||9||
ketumāle ca varṣe hi bhagavānsmararūpadhṛk |
āste tadvarṣanāthānāṃ pūjanīyaśca sarvadā || 10 ||

etenopāsate stotrajālena ca ramābdhijā |
tadvarṣanāthā satataṃ mahatāṃ mānadāyikā || 11 ||
rāmovāca
oṃ hrāṃ hrīṃ hūṃ oṃ namo bhagavate hṛṣīkeśāya sarvaguṇaviśeṣaivilakṣitātmane ākūtīnāṃ
cittīnāṃ cetasāṃ viśeṣāṇāṃ cādhipataye ṣoḍaśakalāya chaṃdomayānnamayāyāmṛtamayāya sarvamayāya
mahase ojase balāya kāṃtāya namaste ubhayatra bhūyāt ||
striyo vrataistvāṃ hṛṣikeśvaraṃ svato hyārādhya loke patimāśāsate'nyam |
tāsāṃ na te vai paripāṃtyapatyaṃ priyaṃ dhanāyūṃṣi yato'svataṃtrāḥ ||12||
sa vai patiḥ syādakutobhayaḥ svataḥ samaṃtataḥ pāti bhayāturaṃ janam |
sa eka evetarathā mitho bhayaṃ naivātmalābhādadhi manyate param || 13||
yā tasya te pādasaroruhārhaṇaṃ na kāmayetsā'khilakāmalaṃpaṭā |
tadeva rāsīpsitamīpsito'citā yadbhagnayācyā bhagavanpratapyate || 14||
matprāptaye'jeśasurāsurādayastapyaṃta ugraṃ tapa aindriye dhiyaḥ |
ṛte bhavatpādaparāyaṇānna māṃ vidaṃtya haṃtvaddhṛdayā yato'jita || 15 ||
sa tvaṃ mamāpyacyuta śīṣṇi vaṃditaṃ karāṃbujaṃ yattvadadhāyi sātvatām |
bibharṣi māṃ lakṣmavareṇya māyayā ka īśvarasyehitamūhituṃ vibhuḥ || 16||
evaṃ kāmaṃ stuvatyeva lokabaṃdhusvarūpiṇam |
prajāpatimukhā varṣanāthāḥ kāmasya siddhaye || 17 ||
ramyake nāma varṣe ca mūrti bhagavataḥ parām |
mātsyāṃ devāsurairvadyāṃ manuḥ stauti niraṃtaram ||18||
manuruvāca
oṃ namo mukhyatamāya namaḥ sattvāya prāṇāyojame valāya mahāmatsyāya namaḥ ||
aṃtarbahiścākhilalokapālakairadṛṣṭarūpo vicarasyurusvanaḥ |
sa īśvarastvaṃ ya idaṃ vaśe nayannāmnā yathā dārumayīṃ naraḥ striyam ||19||
yaṃ lokapālāḥ kila matsarajvarā hitvā yatato'pi pṛthak sametya ca |
pātuṃ na śekudvipadaścatuṣpadaḥ sarīsṛpaṃ sthāṇuvadatra dṛśyate ||20||
bhavān yugāṃtārṇava ūrmimālini kṣoṇīmimāmoṣadhivīrudhāṃ nidhim |
mayā sahorukrama te'ja ojasā tasmai jagatprāṇagaṇātmane namaḥ || 21 ||
evaṃ stauti ca deveśaṃ manuḥ pārthivasattamaḥ |
matsyāvatāraṃ deveśaṃ saṃśayacchedakāraṇam ||22||
dhyānayogena devasya nirdhūtāśeṣakalmaṣaḥ |
āste paricaranbhaktyā mahābhāgavatottamaḥ ||23||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate aṣṭamaskandhe bhuvanakośavarṇane navamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 ||

atha daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
hiraṇmaye nāma varṣe bhagavānkūrmarūpadhṛk |
āste yogapatiḥ so'yamaryamṇā pūjya īḍyate ||1||
aryamovāca
oṃ namo bhagavate akūpārāya sarvasattvaguṇaviśeṣaṇāya sarvasattvaguṇaviśeṣaṇāya nopalakṣitasthānāya namo
varṣmaṇe namo dhūne namo'vasthānāya namaste ||
yadrūpametannijamāyayārpitamarthasvarūpaṃ bahurūparūpitam ||
saṃkhyā na yasyāstyayathopalaṃbhanāttasmai namaste'vyapadeśarūpiṇe || 2 ||
jarāyujaṃ svedajamaṇḍajodbhidaṃ carācaraṃ devarṣipitṛbhūtamaindriyam |
dyauḥ khaṃ kṣitiḥ śailasaritsamudraṃ dvīpagrahakṣetyabhidheya ekaḥ || 3 ||
yasminna saṃkhyeya viśeṣanāmarūpākṛtī kavibhiḥ kalpiteyam |
saṃkhyā yayā tattvadṛśā'panīyate tasmai namaḥ sāṃkhyanidarśanāya te || 4 ||
evaṃ stuvati deveśamaryamā saha varṣapaiḥ |
gīyate cāpi bhajate sarvabhūtabhavaṃ prabhum ||5||
tathottareṣu kuruṣu bhagavānyajñapūruṣaḥ |
ādivārāharūpo'sau dharaṇyā pūjyate sadā || 6 ||
saṃpūjya vidhivaddevaṃ tadbhaktyā''drahṛtkajā |
bhūmiḥ stauti hariṃ yajñavārāhaṃ daityamardanam ||7||
bhūruvāca
oṃ namo bhagavate maṃtratattvaliṃgāya yajñakratave mahādhvarāvayavāya
mahāvarāhāya namaḥ karmaśuklāya triyugāya namaste ||8||
yasya svarūpaṃ kavayo vipaścito guṇeṣu dāruṣviva jātavedasam |
mathnaṃti mathnā manasā didṛkṣavo gūḍhaṃ kriyārthernama īritātmane ||9|
dravyakriyā hetvayaneśa kartṛbhirmāyāguṇairvastubhirīkṣitātmane 1
anvīkṣayāṃgātiśayātmabuddhibhirnirastamāyākṛtaye namo'stu te ||10||
karoti viśvasthitisaṃyamodayaṃ yasyepsitaṃ nepsitumīkṣiturguṇaiḥ |
māyā yathā'yo bhramate tadāśrayaṃ grāṇo namaste guṇakarmasākṣiṇe || 11 |
pramathya daityaṃ prativāruṇaṃ mṛdhe yo māṃ rasāyā jagadādisūkaraḥ |
kṛtvā'gradaṃṣṭraṃ niragādudanvataḥ krīḍannivebhaḥ praṇatā'smi taṃ vibhum || 12 ||

kiṃpuruṣe varṣe'sminbhagavaṃtaṃ dāśarathiṃ ca sarveśam |
sītārāmaṃ devaṃ śrīhanumānādipūruṣaṃ stauti || 13 ||
hanumānuvāca
oṃ namo bhagavate uttamaślokāya nama iti | āryalakṣaṇaśīlavratāya nama
upaśikṣitātmane upāsitalokāya namaḥ | sādhuvādanikapaṇāya namo brahmaṇyadevāya mahāpuruṣāya
mahābhāgāya nama iti ||
yattadviśuddhānubhavātma me kaṃ svatejasā dhvasta guṇavyavastham |
pratyak praśāṃtaṃ sudhiyopalaṃbhanaṃ hyanāmarūpaṃ nirahaṃ prapadye || 14 ||
martyāvatārastviha martyaśikṣaṇaṃ rakṣovadhāyaiva na kevalaṃ vibhoḥ |
kuto'nyathā syādramataḥ sva ātmanaḥ sītākṛtāni vyasanānīśvarasya ||15||
na vai sa ātmātmavatāṃ suhṛttamaḥ saktastrilokyāṃ bhagavānvāsudevaḥ |
na strīkṛtaṃ kaśmalamaśnuvīta na lakṣmaṇaṃ cāpi vihātumarhati || 16||
na janma nūnaṃ mahato na saubhagaṃ na vāṅ na buddhirnākṛtistopa hetuḥ |
tairyadvisṛṣṭānapi no vanaukasaścakāra sakhye bata lakṣmaṇāgrajaḥ || 17||
suro'suro vāpyathavā naro'naraḥ sarvātmanā yaḥ sukṛtajñamuttamam |
bhajeta rāmaṃ manujākṛti hariṃ ya uttarānanayatkośalāndivam || 18||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
evaṃ kipuruṣe varṣe satyasaṃdhaṃ dṛḍhavratam |
rāmaṃ rājīvapatrākṣaṃ hanumānvānarottamaḥ ||19||
stauti gāyati bhaktyā ca saṃpūjayati sarvaśaḥ |
ya etacchṛṇuyāccitraṃ rāmacandrakathānakam ||
sarvapāpaviśuddhātmā yāti rāmasalokatām || 20||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ || 10 ||
atha ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
bhāratākhye ca varṣe'sminnahamādijapūruṣaḥ |
tiṣṭhāmi bhavatā caiva stavanaṃ kriyate'niśam ||1||
nārada uvāca
oṃ namo bhagavate upaśamaśīlāyoparatānātmyāya namo'kiṃcanavittāya ṛṣiṛṣabhāya
naranārāyaṇāya | paramahaṃsaparamagurave ātmārāmādhipataye namo nama iti |

kartā'sya sargādiṣu yo na baddhayate na hanyate dehagato'pi daihikaiḥ |
draṣṭunaṃ dṛśyasya guṇāvadūṣyate tasmai namo'saktaviviktasākṣiṇe ||2||
idaṃ hi yogeśvara yoganaipuṇaṃ hiraṇyagarbho bhagavāñjagāda yat |
yadaṃtakāle tvayi nirguṇe mano bhaktyā dadhītojjhitaduṣkalevara: ||3||
yathehikāmuṣmika kāmalaṃpaṭa : suteṣu dāreṣu dhaneṣu citayan |
śaṃketa vidvānkukale varātyayādyastasya yatnaḥ śrama eva kevalam ||4||
tannaḥ prabho tvaṃ kukalevarārpitāṃ tvaṃ māyayā'haṃmamatāmadhokṣaja |
bhidyāma yenāśu vayaṃ sudubhidāṃ vidhehi yogaṃ tvayi naḥ svabhāvajam ||5||
evaṃ stauti sadā devaṃ nārāyaṇamanāmayam |
nārado muniśārdūlaḥ prajātyakhilasāradṛk || 6 ||
asmin bhārate varṣe saricchelāstu saṃti hi |
tānpravakṣyāmi devarṣe śṛṇuṣvaikāgramānasaḥ ||7||
malayo maṃgalaprasyo mainākaśva trikūṭakaḥ |
ṛṣabhaḥ kuṭaka: kollaḥ sahyo devagiristathā ||8||
ṛṣyamūkaśca śrīśailo veṃkaṭādrirmaheṃdrakaḥ |
vārighāraśca vidhyaśca muktimānṛkṣaparvataḥ ||9||
pāriyātrastathā droṇaścitrakūṭagiristathā |
govardhano raivatakaḥ kakubho nīlaparvataḥ || 10 ||
gauramukha ceṃdrakīlo giriḥ kāmagiristathā |
ete cānye'pyasaṃkhyātā girayo bahupuṇyadāḥ || 11 ||
etadutpannasaritaḥ śataśo'tha sahasraśaḥ |
pānāvagāhakasnānadarśanotkīrtanairapi ||12||
nāśayaṃti ca pāpāni trividhāni śarīriṇām |
tāmraparṇī candravaśā kṛtamālā baṭodakā ||13||
baihāyasī va kāverī veṇā caiva payasvinī |
tuṅgabhadrā kṛṣṇaveṇā śarkarāvartakā tathā || 14 ||
godāvarī bhīmarathī nirvindhyā ca payoṣṇikā |
tāpī revā ca suramā narmadā ca sarasvatī || 15||
carmaṇvatī ca siṃdhuśca aṃdhaśoṇo mahānadī |
ṛṣikulyā trisāmā ca vedasmṛtimahānadī || 16||
kauśikī yamunā caiva maṃdākinī dṛṣadvatī |
gomaṃtī sarayū rodhavatī saptavatī tathā || 17||
supomā ca śatadruśca caṃdrabhāgā marudhā |
vitastā ca asiknī ca viśvā ceti prakīrtitāḥ 18 ||
asminvarṣe labdhajanmapuruṣaḥ svasvakarmabhiḥ |
śuklalohitakṛṣṇāsyaidivyamānuṣanārakāḥ ||19||
bhavaṃti vividhā bhogāḥ sarveṣāṃ ca nivāsinām |
yathāvarṇavidhānenāpavargo bhavati sphuṭam ||20||
etadeva ca varṣasya prādhānyaṃ kāryasiddhitaḥ |
vadaṃti munayo vedavādinaḥ svargavāsinaḥ ||21||
"aho amopāṃ kimakāri śobhanaṃ prasanna eṣāṃsvita svayaṃ hariḥ |
yairjanma labdhaṃ nṛpu bhāratājire mukuṃdasevaupayikaṃ spṛhā hi naḥ ||22||
ki duṣkarairnaḥ kratubhistapovratairdānādibhirvā dyujayena phalgunā |
na yatra nārāyaṇapādapaṅkajasmṛtiḥ pramuṣṭātiśayendriyotsavāt ||23||

kalpāyuṣāṃ sthānajayātpunarbhavātkṣaṇāyuṣāṃ bhāratabhūjayo varam |
kṣaṇena martyena kṛtaṃ manasvinaḥ saṃnyasya saṃyāṃtyabhayaṃ padaṃ hareḥ ||24||
na yatra vaikuṃṭhakathāsudhāpagā na sādhavo bhāgavatāstadāśrayāḥ |
na yatra yajñeśamakhā mahotsavāḥ sureśaloko'pi na vai sa sevyatām || 25||
prāptā nṛjāti tviha ye ca jaṃtavo jñānakriyādravyakalāpasaṃbhṛtām |
na vai yateranna punarbhavāya te bhūyo vanokā iva yāṃti baṃdhanam || 26||
thaiḥ śraddhayā barhiṣi bhāgaśo harviniruptamiṣṭaṃ vidhimaṃtravastuta: |
ekaḥ pṛthaṅnāmabhirāhato mudā gṛhṇāti pūrṇaḥ svayamāśiṣāṃ prabhuḥ ||27||
satyaṃ diśatyarthita mathito nṛṇāṃ naivārthado yatpunarathitā yataḥ |
svayaṃ vidhatte bhajatāmanicchatāmicchāpidhānaṃ nijapādapallavam ||28||
" yadyatra naḥ svargasukhāvaśeṣitaṃ sviṣṭasya pūrtasya kṛtasya śobhanam |
tenājanābhe smṛtimajjanma naḥ syādvarṣe haribhajatāṃ śaṃ tanoti || 1 || '
nārāyaṇa uvāca
evaṃ svargagatā devāḥ siddhāśca paramarṣayaḥ |
pravadaṃti ca māhātmyaṃ bhāratasya suśobhanam ||29||
jaṃbudvīpasya cāṣṭau hi upadvīpāḥ smṛtāḥ pare |
hayamārgānviśodhadbhiḥ sāgaraiḥ parikalpitāḥ || 30 ||
svarṇaprasthaścaṃdraśukra āvartanaramāṇakau |
maṃdaropākhyahariṇāḥ pāṃcajanyastathaiva ca || 31 ||
siṃhalaścaiva laṃketi upadvīpāṣṭakaṃ smṛtam |
jaṃbudvīpasya mānaṃ hi kīrtitaṃ vistareṇa ca ||32||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi plakṣādidvī paṭkakam ||33||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭhamaskandhe ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 51 ||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
jaṃbudvīpo yathā cāyaṃ yatpramāṇena kīrtitaḥ |
tāvatā sarvataḥ kṣārodadhinā pariveṣṭitaḥ || 1 ||
jaṃbvākhyena yathā merustathā kṣārodakena ca |
kṣārodadhistu dviguṇaḥ plakṣākhyenopaveṣṭitaḥ ||2||
yathaiva parikhābāhyopavanena hi veṣṭayate |
plakṣākhyaśca svayaṃ jaṃbupramāṇo dvīparūpadhṛk || 3 ||
hiraṇmayo'gnistatraiva tiṣṭhatīti viniścayaḥ |
priyavratātmajastatra saptajihna iti smṛtiḥ || 4 ||
āgnastadadhipastviddhamajihvaḥ svaṃ dvīpameva ca |
vibhajya sapta varṣāṇi svaputrebhyo dadau vibhuḥ || 5 ||
svayamātmavidāṃ mānyāṃ yogacaryāṃ samāśritaḥ |
tenaiva cātmayogena bhagavaṃtamupāgataḥ || 6 ||

śivaṃ ca yavasaṃ bhadraṃ śāntaṃ kṣemāmṛte tathā |
abhayaṃ ceti saptaṃ tadarṣāṇi sadekṣatām ||7|
teṣu proktā nadīḥ sapta girayaḥ sapta caiva hi |
aruṇā nṛmṇāṃgirasī sāvitrī suprabhātikā ||8||
ṛtaṃbharā satyaṃbharā iti nadyaḥ prakīrtitāḥ |
maṇikūṭo vajrakūṭa iṃdrasenastathaiva ca || 9||
jyotiṣmān suparṇaśca hiraṇyaṣṭhītra eva ca |
meghamāla iti khyātā: plakṣadvīpasya parvatāḥ || 10 ||
nadīnāṃ jalamātreṇa darśanasparśanādibhiḥ |
nirdhūtāśeṣarajaso nistamaskāḥ prajāstathā || 11 ||
haṃsaścaiva pataṃga ūrdhvāyana itīva ca |
satyāṃgasaṃjñāścatvāro varṇāḥ plakṣasya dvīpake ||12||
sahasrāyuḥ pramāṇāśva vividhopamadarśanāḥ |
svargadvāraṃ trayīvidyā vidhinārke yajati te ||13||
pratnasya viṣṇo rūpaṃ ca satyartasya ca brahmaṇaḥ |
amṛtasya ca mṛtyośca sūryamātmānamīmahi || 14 ||
plakṣādiṣu ca sarveṣu paṃcadvīpeṣu nārada |
āyuriṃdriya mojaśca balaṃ buddhiḥ so'pi ca || 15 ||
vikramaḥ sarvalokānāṃ siddhirautpattikī sadā |
plakṣadvīpāparaṃ cekṣurasodaḥ saritāṃ patiḥ || 16||
plakṣadvīpaṃ samagraṃ ca parivāryāvatiṣṭhate |
śālmalākhyastato dvāpaścāsmādviguṇavistaraḥ || 17 ||
samānena surodena siṃdhunā pariveṣṭitaḥ |
yatra vai śātmalīvṛkṣaḥ plakṣāyāmaḥ prakīrtitaḥ 18 ||
sthānaṃ tatpakṣirājasya maruḍasya mahātmanaḥ |
tasya dvīpasya nātho hi yajñabāhuḥ priyavratāt ||19||
jātaḥ sa eva saptabhyaḥ svaputrebhyo dadau dharām |
tadvarṣāṇāṃ ca nāmāni kathitāni nibodhata ||20||
surocanaṃ saumanasyaṃ ramaṇaṃ devavarṣakam |
pāribhadraṃ tathā cāpyāyanaṃ vijñātanāmakam || 21 ||
teṣu varṣādrayaḥ sapta saptaiva saritaḥ smṛtāḥ |
sarasaḥ śataśṛṃgaśca vāmadevaśca kaṃdakaḥ ||22||
kumudaḥ puṣpavarṣaśca sahasraśrutireva ca |
ete ca parvatāḥ sapta nadīnāmāni cocyate || 23||
anumatiḥ sinīvālī sarasvatī kuhūstathā |
rajanī caiva naṃdā ca rāketi parikīrtitā ||24||
tadvarpa puruṣāḥ sarve cāturvarṇyasamāhvayāḥ |
śrutadharo vīryadharo vasundhara iṣundharaḥ || 25 ||
bhagavaṃtaṃ vedamayaṃ yaja̭te somamīśvaram |
svagobhiḥ pitṛdevebhyo vibhajankṛṣṇaśuklayoḥ || 26||
sarvāsāṃ ca prajānāṃ ca rājā somaḥ prasīdatu |
evaṃ surodādviguṇaḥ svamānena prakīrtitaḥ ||27||
ghṛtodenāvṛtaḥ so'yaṃ kuśadvīpaḥ prakāśate |
yasminnāste kuśastaṃ vo dīpākhyākāraṇo jvalan 28||
svarāṣparocipā kāṣṭhā bhāsayanparitiṣṭhate |
hiraṇyaretāstadvīpapatiḥ prayatrataḥ svarāṭ || 29||
svaputrebhyaśca saptabhyastadvīpaṃ saptadhā'bhajat |
vasuśca vasudānaśca tathā dṛḍharuciḥ paraḥ || 30 ||
nābhigupta stutyavratī viviktanāmadeva kau |
teṣāṃ varṣeṣu saptaiva sīmāgirivarāḥ smṛtāḥ || 31 ||
nadya. saptaiva saṃtīha tannāmāni nibodhata |
cakrastayā catuḥśṛṃgaḥ kapilaścitrakūṭakaḥ ||32||
devānīścordhvaromā draviṇaḥ sapta parvatāḥ |
rasakulyā madhukulyā mitravidā tathaiva ca || 33 ||
śrutaviṃdā devagarbhā dhutacyunmaṃ damālike |
yatpayobhiḥ kuśadvīpavāsinaḥ sarva eva te ||34||

kuśalaḥ kovidaścaivāpyabhiyuktastathaiva ca |
kulakaśceti saṃjñābhiścaturvarṇāḥ prakīrtitāḥ || 35 ||
jātavedasa rūpaṃ taṃ devaṃ karmajakauśalaiḥ |
yajate devavaryābhāḥ sarva sarvavido janāḥ || 36 ||
parasya brahmaṇaḥ sākṣājjātavedo'si havyavāṭ |
devānāṃ puruṣāṃgānāṃ yajñena puruṣaṃ yaja ||
evaṃ yajate jvalanaṃ sarve dvopādhivāsinaḥ ||37||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12 ||
atha trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
śiṣṭadvīpapramāṇaṃ ca vada sarvārthadarśana |
yena vijñātamātreṇa parānaṃdamayo bhavet ||1||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
kuśadvīpasya parito ghṛtodāvaraṇaṃ mahat |
tato bahiḥ krauṃcadvīpo dviguṇaḥ syātsvamānataḥ || 2||
kṣīrodenāvṛto bhāti yasminkroṃcādrirasti ca |
nāmanirvartakaḥ so'yaṃ dvīpasya parivartate || 3||
yo'sau guhasya śaktyā ca bhinnakukṣiḥ purā'bhavat |
kṣīrodenāsicyamāno varuṇena ca rakṣitaḥ ||4||
ghṛtapṛṣṭho nāma yasya vibhāti kila nāyakaḥ |
priyavratātmajaḥ śrīmānsarvalokanamaskṛtaḥ ||5||
svadvīpaṃ vibhajyaiva saptadhā svātmajāndadau |
putranāmasu tu varṣeṣu varṣapānsanniveśayan || 6 ||
svayaṃ bhagavatastasya śaraṇaṃ saṃjagāma ha |
āmo madhuruhaścaiva mevapṛṣṭhaḥ sudhāmakaḥ ||7||
bhrājiṣṭho lohitāśva vanaspatiritīva ca |
nagā nadyaśca saptaiva vikhyātā bhuvi sarvataḥ || 8 ||
śuklo vai vardhamānaśca bhojanaścopabarhaṇaḥ |
naṃdaśca naṃdanaḥ sarvato bhadra iti kīrtitāḥ ||9||
abhayā amṛtaughācāryakā tīrthavatīti ca |
vṛttirūpavatī śuklā pavitravatikā tathā || 10 ||
etāsāmudakaṃ puṇyaṃ cāturvarṇena pīyate |
puruṣaṛṣabhau tadvadbhaviṇākhyaśca devakaḥ || 11 ||
ete caturvarṇajātāḥ puruṣā nivasaṃti hi |
tatratyāḥ puruṣā āpomayaṃ devamapāṃ patim ||12||
pūrṇenāṃjalinā bhaktyā yajate vividhakriyāḥ |
āpaḥ puruṣavīryāḥ stha punaṃ tīrbhūrbhuvaḥ svaraḥ ||13||
tānaḥ punītāmīvaghnīḥ spṛśatāmātmanā bhuvaḥ |
iti maṃtrajapāṃte ca stuvaṃti vividhaiḥ stavaiḥ || 14 ||
evaṃ parastātkṣīrodātparitaścopaveśitaḥ | dvātriṃśallakṣasaṃkhyāka yojanāyāmamāśritaḥ 113411
svamānena ca dvīpo'yaṃ dadhimaṃḍodakena ca |
śākadvīpoṃ viśiṣṭo'yaṃ yasmiñchāko mahīruhaḥ || 16 ||
svakṣatravyapadeśasya kāraṇaṃ sa hi nārada |
prayavrato'dhipastasya medhātithiriti smṛtaḥ || 17||
vibhajya sapta varṣāṇi putranāmāni teṣu ca |
sapta putrānnijānsthāpya svayaṃ yogagatiṃ gataḥ || 18||
purojavo manaḥ pūrvajavo'tha pavamānakaḥ |
dhūmrānīkaścitrarepho bahurūpo'tha viśvadhṛk || 19 ||

maryādāgirayaḥ sapta nadyaḥ saptaiva kīrtitāḥ |
īśāna uruśṛṃgo'tha balabhadraḥ śatakesaraḥ ||20||
sahasrasrotako devapālo'pyaṃte mahāśanaḥ |
ete'drayaḥ sapta coktāḥ sarināmāni sapta ca || 21 ||
anaghā prathamāyurdāmabhayaspṛṣṭireva ca |
aparājitā paṃcapadī sahasraśrutireva ca ||22||
tato nijadhṛtiśvoktāḥ sapta nadyo mahojjvalāḥ |
tadvarṣa puruṣāḥ sarve satyavratakratuvrato ||23||
dānavratānuvratau ca caturvarṇā udīritāḥ |
bhagavaṃtaṃ prāṇavāyuṃ prāṇāyāmena saṃyutāḥ || 24 ||
yaja̭ti nirdhūtarajastamasaḥ paramaṃ harim |
antaḥ praviśya bhūtāni yo vibhatrtyātmaketubhiḥ || 25 ||
antaryāmīśvaraḥ sākṣātpātu no yadvaśe idam |
parastāddadhimaṇḍodāttatastu bahuvistaraḥ || 26 ||
puṣkara dvīpanāmāyaṃ śākadvīpasiṃguṇa: |
svasamānena svādūdakenāyaṃ pariveṣṭitaḥ ||27|
yatrāste puṣkaraṃ bhrājadagnicaḍānibhāni ca |
patrāṇi viśadānīha svarṇapatrāyutāyutam ||28||
śrīmadbhagavataśvedamāsanaṃ parameṣṭhinaḥ |
kalpitaṃ lokaguruṇā sarvalokasisṛkṣayā || 29 ||
tadvīpa eka evāyaṃ mānasottaranāmakaḥ | arvācīnaparācīnavarṣayoravadhigiriḥ 113011
ucchrāyāyāmayoḥ saṃkhyāyutayojanasaṃmitā |
yatra dikṣu ca catvāri catasṛṣu purāṇi hi || 31 ||
indrādilokapālānāṃ yaduparyarkanirgamaḥ |
meruṃ pradakṣiṇīkurvanbhānuḥ paryeti yatra hi || 32 ||
saṃvatsarātmakaṃ cakraṃ devahotrābhivo bhraman |
prayavrato'dhipo vītihotraḥ svātmajakadvayam || 33||
varṣadvaye paristhāpya varṣanāmadharaṃ kramāt |
ramaṇo dhātakiścaiva tattadvarṣapatī ubhau || 34 ||
kṛtāḥ svayaṃ pūrvajavadbhagavadbhaktitatparāḥ |
tadvarṣapuruṣā brahmarūpiṇaṃ parameśvaram ||35||
sakarmakena yogena yajanti pariśīlitāḥ |
yattatkarmamayaṃ liṃgaṃ brahmaliṃgaṃ jano'rcayet ||
ekāṃtamadvayaṃ śāṃtaṃ tasmai bhagavate namaḥ || 36||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 13 ||
atha caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
tata: parastādacalo lokāloketi nāmakaḥ |
antarāle ca lokālokayoryaḥ parikalpitaḥ ||1||
māvadasti ca devarṣe hyantaraṃ mānasottarāt |
sumerostāvatī śuddhā kāṃcanī bhūmirasti hi ||2||
darpaṇodaratulyā sā sarvaprāṇivivarjitā |
yasyāṃ padārthaḥ prahito na kiṃcitpratyudīyate || 3 ||
ataḥ sarvaprāṇisaṃgha rahitā sā ca nārada |
lokāloka iti vyākhyā yadatra parikalpitā ||4||
lokālokāṃtare cāsya vartate sarvadā sthitiḥ |
īśvareṇa sa lokānāṃ trayāṇāmantagaḥ kṛtaḥ ||5||
sūryādīnāṃ dhruvatānāṃ raśmayo yadvaśādiha |
arvācīnāca trallokānā tanvānāḥ kadāpi hi ||6||

parācīnatvabhājī hi na bhavanti ca nārada |
tāvadunnahanāyāmaḥ parvatendro mahodayaḥ ||7||
etāvāṃllokavinyāso'yaṃ saṃsthāmānalakṣaṇaiḥ |
kavibhiḥ sa tu pañcāśatkoṭibhirgaṇitasya ca ||8||
bhūgolasya caturthāṃśo lokālokācalo mune |
tasyopari caturdikṣu brahmaṇā cātmayoninā || 9||
niveśitā diggajā ye tannāmāni nibodhata |
ṛṣabhaḥ puṣpacūḍo'tha vāmano'thāparājitaḥ ||10||
ete samastalokasya sthitihetava īritāḥ |
teṣāṃ ca svavibhūtīnāṃ bahuvīryopabṛṃhaṇam ||11||
viśuddhasattvaṃ caiśvaryaṃ vardhayanbhagavānhariḥ |
āste siddhaghaṭakopeto viṣvaksenādisaṃvṛtaḥ || 12 ||
nijāyudhaiḥ parivṛto bhujadaṇḍaiḥ samantataḥ |
āste sakalalokasya svastaye parameśvara: ||13||
ākalpamevaṃ veṣaṃ sa gato viṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ |
svamāyāracitasyāsya gopīthāyātmasādhanaḥ || 14 ||
yo'ntavistāra etena hyalokaparimāṇakam |
vyākhyātaṃ yadva hirlokālokācala itīraṇāt || 15 ||
tataḥ parastādyogeśagati śuddhāṃ vadanti hi |
aṇḍamadhyagataḥ sūryo dyāvābhūmyoryadantaram ||16||
sūryāṇḍagolayormadhye koṭayaḥ syuḥ pañcaviśatiḥ |
mṛtaॅḍa eṣa etasmiñjato mārtaṇḍaśabdadhāk || 17 ||
hiraṇyagarbha iti hiṇyāṃḍasamudbhavaḥ |
sūryeṇa hi vibhajyaṃte diśaḥ khaṃ dyaurmahībhidā || 18||
svargāpavargau narakā rasaukāṃsi ca sarvaśaḥ |
devatiryaṅmanuṣyāṇāṃ sarīsṛpasavīrudhām ||19||
sarvajīvanikāyānāṃ sūrya ātmā dṛgīśvaraḥ |
etāvānbhūmaṇḍalasya sanniveśa udāhṛtaḥ ||20||
etena hi divo mānaṃ varṇayanti ca taddhiyaḥ |
dvidalānāṃ ca niṣpāvādīnāṃ ca dalayoryathā || 21 ||
antareṇa tayorantarikṣaṃ tadubhayasaṃghitam |
yanmadhyagaśca bhagavānbhānurve tapatāṃ varaḥ ||22||
ātapena trilokīṃ ca pratapatyeva bhāsayan |
uttarāyaṇamāsādya gatimāṃdyaṃ vitanvate || 23||
ārohaṇasthānamaso gatvāhodairghyamācaret |
dakṣiṇāyanamāsādya gatiśaighrayaṃ vitanvate ||24||
avarohaṇasthānamaso gacchanhasvaṃ dinaṃ caret |
viṣuvatsaṃjñamāsādya gatisāmyaṃ vitanvate ||25||
samasthānamathāsādya dinasāmyaṃ karoti ca |
yaṃdā ca meṣatulayoḥ saṃcareddhi divākaraḥ ||26||
samānāni tvahorātrāṇyātanoti trayīmayaḥ |
vṛṣādipaṃcasu yadā rāśiṣvarko virocate ||27||
tadāhāni ca vardhante rātrayo'pi hasaṃti ca |
vṛścikādiṣu sūryo hi yadā sañcarate raviḥ || 28 ||
tadā'pīmānyahorātrāṇi bhavanti viparyayāt || 29||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe saptamaskandhe caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 14 ||
atha pañcadaśā'dhyāyaḥ
nārāyaṇa uvāca
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi bhānorgamanamuttamam |
śīghra mandādigatibhistrividhaṃ gamanaṃ raveḥ || 1 ||

sarvagrahāṇāṃ trīṇyeva sthānāni surasattama |
sthānaṃ jāradgavaṃ madhyaṃ tathairāvatamuttaram ||2||
vaiśvānara dakṣiṇato nirdiṣṭamiti tattvataḥ |
aśvinī kṛttikā yāmyā nāgavīthīti śabditā ||3||
rohiṇyārdrā mṛgaśiro gajavīthyabhidhīyate |
puṣyāśleṣā tathādityā vīthī carāvatī smṛtā ||4||
vothayastisra uttaro mārga ucyate |
tathā dve cāpi phalgunyo maghā caivārṣabhī matā || 5 ||
etāstu hastaścitrā tathā svātī govīthīti tu śabditā |
jyeṣṭhā viśākhānurādhā vīthī jāradravī matā || 6 ||
etāstu vīthayastisro madhyamo mārga ucyate |
mūlāpāḍhottarāṣāḍhā ajavīthyabhiśabditā ||7||
śravaṇaṃ ca dhaniṣṭhā ca mārgī śatabhiṣā tathā |
vaiśvānarī bhādrapade revatī caiva kīrtitā ||8||
etāstu vothayastisro dakṣiṇo mārga ucyate |
uttarāyaṇamāsādya yugākṣāṃtarnibaddhayoḥ ||9||
karṣaṇaṃ pāśayorvāyubaddhayo rohaṇaṃ smṛtam |
tadābhyaṃtaragānmaṇḍalādrathasya gaterbhavet ||10||
māṃdyaṃ divasavṛddhiśra jāyate surasattama |
rātrihāsaśva bhavati saumyāyanakramo hyayam || 11 ||
dakṣiṇāyana ke pāśe preraṇādavarohaṇam |
bahirmaṇḍalaveśena gatiśaitryaṃ tadā bhavet || 12 ||
tadā dinālpatā rātri vṛddhiśca parikīrtitā |
vaiṣuve pāśasāmyāttu samāvasthānato raveḥ || 13 ||
madhyamaṇḍalaveśaśca sāmyaṃ rātridinādike |
ākṛṣyete yadā tau tu dhruveṇa samadhiṣṭhita ||14||
tadābhyaṃtarataḥ sūryo bhramate maṃḍalāni ca |
dhruveṇa mucyamānena punā raśmiyugena tu || 15 ||
tathaiva bāhyataḥ sūryo bhramate maṇḍalāni ca |
tasmin mero pūrvabhāge puryendrī devadhānikā || 16 ||
dakṣiṇe vai saṃyamanī nāma yāmyā mahāpurī |
paścānnimlocano nāma dāruṇī vai mahāpurī || 17 |
taduttare purī saumyā proktā nāma vibhāvarī |
aindrapuryāṃ raveḥ prokta udayo brahmavādibhiḥ || 18 ||
saṃyamanyāṃ ca madhyāhne nimlocanyāṃ nimolanam |
vibhāvaryā niśīthaḥ syāttigmāṃśoḥ surapūjitaḥ || 19 ||
pravṛtteśca nimittāni bhūtānāṃ tāni sarvaśaḥ |
meroścaturdiśaṃ bhānoḥ kīrtitāni mayā mune ||20||
merusthānāṃ sadā madhyaṃ gata eva vibhāti hi |
savyaṃ gacchandakṣiṇena karoti svarṇaparvatam ||21||
udayāstamaye caiva sarvakālaṃ tu sammukhe |
diśāsvaśeṣāsu tathā surarṣe vidiśāsu ca || 22||
yairyatra dṛśyate bhāsvānsa teṣāmudayaḥ smṛtaḥ |
tirobhāvaṃ ca yatreti tatraivāstamanaṃ raveḥ || 23 ||
naivāstamanamarkasya nodayaḥ sarvadā sataḥ |
udayāstamanākhyaṃ hi darśanādarśanaṃ raveḥ ||24||
śakrādīnāṃ pure tiṣṭhanspṛśatyeṣa puratrayam |
vikarṇau dvau vikarṇasthastrī koṇān pure tathā ||25||
sarveṣāṃ dvīpavarṣāṇāṃ meruruttarataḥ sthitaḥ |
yairyatra dṛśyate bhānuḥ saiva prācīti cocyate ||26||
tadvāmabhāgato meruparvateti vinirṇayaḥ |
yadi caṃdrayāḥ pracalate ghaṭikā daśapañcabhiḥ || 27 ||
paṃcanetrasahasrakam ||28|
yāmyāṃ tadā yojanānāṃ sapādaṃ koṭiyugmakam | sārdhadvādaśalakṣāṇi
prakrāmati sahasrāṃśuḥ kālamārgapradarśakaḥ |
evaṃ tato vāruṇīṃ ca saumyādrī sahasradṛk ||22||

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe "
paryeti kālacakrātmā ghumaṇiḥ kālabuḍa me |
khayā bā brahāḥ somādayo ye divicāriṇaḥ 30 ||
nakṣatraḥ saha codyaṃti saha vāstaṃ vayaṃti te |
evaṃ muhūrtena ratho bhānoraṣṭaśatādhikam ||31||
yojanānāṃ catustriśallakṣāpi bhramati prabhuḥ |
trayīmayaśvaturdikṣu purīṣu ca samoraṇāt || 32||
pravahākhyātsadā kālacakraṃ payaṃti bhānumān |
yasya cakraṃ rathasyaikaṃ dvādaṇāraṃ trinābhikam ||33||
ṣaṇnemi kavayastacca na vatsarātmaka mūcire |
merumūrdhani tasyākṣo mānasottara parvate || 34||
krameta ravibhāgo yaḥ protaṃ tatra rathāṃgakam |
tailakārakayaṃtreṇa cakrasāmyaṃ paribhramat ||35||
mānasottaranāmnīha giro paryeti cāṃśumān |
tasminnakṣe kṛtaṃ mūlaṃ dvitīyo'kṣo dhruve kṛtaḥ || 36 ||
turyamānena tailasya yaṃtrākṣavaditīritaḥ |
kṛtoparitano bhāgaḥ sūryasya jagatāṃpateḥ || 37||
rathanīḍastu ṣaṭtriṃśallakṣa yojanamāyataḥ |
tatsurmabhāgataḥ so'yaṃ pariṇāhena kīrtitaḥ || 38||
tāvānarkarathasyātra yugastasminhayāḥ śubhāḥ |
saptacchaṃdobhidhānāśca sūrasūtena yojitāḥ ||39||
vahaṃti devamādityaṃ lokānāṃ sukhahetave |
purastātsavituḥ suto'ruṇaḥ paścānniyojitaḥ ||40||
sotye karmaṇi saṃyukto vartate garuḍāgrajaḥ |
tathaiva vālakhilyākhyā ṛṣayoṃguṣṭhaparvakāḥ || 41 ||
pramāṇena parikhyātāḥ paṣṭisāhasrasaṃkhyakāḥ |
stuti purataḥ sūryaṃ sūktavākyaiḥ suśobhanaḥ || 42 ||
tathā cānye ca ṛṣayo gaṃdharvā apsaroragāḥ |
grāmaṇyo yātudhānāśra devāḥ sarve pareśvaram ||43||
ekaikaśaḥ sapta sapta māsi māsi virocanam |
sārdhaṃrakṣottaraṃ koṭinavakaṃ bhūmimaṇḍalam ||44 ||
dvisahasraṃ yojanānāṃ sa gavyatyuttaraṃ kṣaṇāt |
paryeti devadeveśo viśvavyāpī nirantaram || 45 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe paṃcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 15 ||
atha ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
athātaḥ śrūyatāṃ citraṃ somādīnāṃ gamādikam |
tadgatyanusṛtā nṛṇāṃ śubhāśubhanidarśanā || 1 ||
yathā kulālacakreṇa bhramatā bhramatāṃ saha |
tadāśrayāṇāṃ ca gatiratyā koṭādināṃ bhavet ||2||
evaṃ hi rāśivṛndena kālacakreṇa tena ca |
meruṃ dhuraṃ ca saratāṃ prādakṣiṇyena sarvadā || 3 ||
grahāṇāṃ bhānumukhyānāṃ gatiranyaiva dṛśyate |
nakṣatrāṃtaragāmitvādbhāṃtare gamanaṃ tathā || 4 ||
gatidvayaṃ cāviruddhaṃ sarvatraiṣa vinirṇayaḥ |
sa eva bhagavānādipuruṣo lokabhāvanaḥ || 5 ||
nārāyaṇo'khilādhāro lokānāṃ svastaye bhraman |
karmaśuddhinimittaṃ tu ātmānaṃ vai trayīmayam || 6 ||
kavibhiścaiva vedena vijijñāsyo'rkadhā'bhavat |
ṣaṭsu krameṇa ṛtuṣu vasaṃtādiṣu ca svayam || 3 ||
yathopajoṣamṛtujānguṇānyaṃ vidadhāti ca |
tamenaṃ puruṣāḥ sarve trayyā ca vidyayā sadā ||8||

varṇāśramācārapathā tathā''snātaiśca karmabhiḥ |
uccāvacaḥ śraddhayā ca yogānāṃ ca vitānakaiḥ ||9||
aṃjaśā ca yaja̭te ye śreyo vindaṃti te mahat |
athaiva ātmā lokānāṃ dyāvābhūmyaṃtareṇa ca ||10||
kālacakragato bhuṃkte māsāndvādaśarāśibhiḥ |
saṃvatsarasyāvayavānmāsaḥ pakṣadvayaṃ divā || 11||
naktaṃ ceti sa pādarkṣadvayamityupadiśyate |
yāvatā ṣaṣṭhamaṃśaṃ sa bhuṃjīta ṛturucyate || 12||
kavibhiśvopavarṇitaḥ |
yāvatārdhena cākāśavīthyāṃ pracarate raviḥ || 13 ||
saṃvatsarasyāvayavaḥ
taṃ prāktanā varṇayaṃti ayanaṃ munipūjitāḥ |
atha yātranabhomaṃḍalaṃ saha pratigacchati || 14 ||
kārtsnyena saha bhuñjīta kālaṃ taṃ vatsaraṃ viduḥ |
saṃvatsaraṃ parivatsara miḍāvatsarameva ca || 15 ||
anuvatsaramidvatsaramiti paṃcakamīritam |
bhānormāṃdyaśaṃsamagatibhiḥ kālavittamaiḥ || 16 ||
evaṃ bhānorgatiḥ proktā candrādīnāṃ nibodhata |
evaṃ candro'rkaraśmibhyo lakṣayojanamūrdhvataḥ ||17||
upalabhyamāno mitrasya saṃvatsarabhuji ca saḥ |
pakṣāsyāṃ coṣadhīnātho bhuṃkte mānabhuji ca saḥ 18 ||
sapādamābhyāṃ divasabhuti pakṣabhujiṃ caret |
evaṃ śīghragatiḥ somo bhakte nūnaṃ bhacakrakam || 19||
pūryamāṇakalābhiścāmarāṇāṃ prītimāvahan |
kṣīyamāṇakalābhiśca pitṝṇāṃ cittaraṃjakaḥ ||20||
ahorātrāṇi tanvānaḥ pūrvāparasughasrakaiḥ |
sarvajīvanikāyasya prāṇī jīvaḥ sa eva hi || 21||
bhuṃkte caikaikanakṣatraṃ muhūrtatriṃśatā vibhuḥ |
sa eva ṣoḍaśakalaḥ puruṣo'nādiruttamaḥ ||22||
manomayo'pyannamayo'mṛtadhāmā sudhākaraḥ |
devarṣitṛmanuṣyādisarīsṛpasavīrudhām ||23||
prāṇāpyāyanaśīlatvātsa sarvamaya ucyate |
tato bhacakraṃ bhramati yojanānāṃ trilakṣataḥ ||24||
merupradakṣiṇenaiva yojitaṃ ceśvareṇa tu |
aṣṭāviśatisaṃkhyāni gaṇitāni sahābhijit ||25||
tataḥ śukro dvilakṣeṇa yojanānāmathopari |
puraḥ paścātsahaivāsāvarkasya parivartate || 26||
śīghramaṃdasamānābhirgatibhirvicaranvibhuḥ |
lokānāmanukūlo'yaṃ prāyaḥ proktaḥ śubhāvahaḥ || 27||
vṛṣṭiviṣṭaṃbhaśamano bhārgavaḥ sarvadā mune |
śukrādbuṣaḥ samākhyāto yojanānāṃ dvilakṣataḥ ||28||
śīghramaṃdasamānābhirgatibhiḥ śukravatsadā |
yadākayatiricyeta saumyaḥ prāyeṇa tatra tu || 29 ||
ativātābhrapātānāṃ vṛṣṭyādibhayasūcakaḥ |
upariṣṭāttato bhaumo yojanānāṃ dvilakṣataḥ || 30 ||
pakṣaistribhistribhiḥ so'yaṃ bhakta rāśīnathaikaśaḥ |
dvādaśāpi ca devarṣe yadi vakro na jāyate || 31 ||
prāyeṇāśubhakṛtso'yaṃ grahoghānāṃ ca sūcakaḥ |
tato dvilakṣamānena yojanānāṃ ca goṣpatiḥ || 32||
ekaikasminnatho rāśo bhuṃkta saṃvatsaraṃ caran |
yadi vakro bhavennaivānukūlo brahmavādinām ||33||
tataḥ śanaiśvaro dhoro lakṣadvayaparo mataḥ |
yojanaiḥ sūryaputro'yaṃ triṃśanmāsaiḥ paribhraman ||34|
ekaikarāśī paryeti sarvātrāśīnmahāgrahaḥ |
sarveṣāmaśubho mandaḥ proktaḥ kālavidāṃ varaiḥ || 35||
tata uttarataḥ proktamekādaśasulakṣakaiḥ |
yojanaiḥ parisaṃkhyātaṃ saptarṣīṇāṃ va maṇḍalam ||36|

lokānāṃ śaṃ bhāvayaṃto munayaḥ sapta te mune |
yattadviṣṇupadaṃ sthānaṃ dakṣiṇaṃ prakramanti te || 37||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe aṣṭamaskandhe ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ ||16||
atha saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
arthāṣamaṇḍalādūrdhva yojanānāṃ pramāṇataḥ |
lakṣaitrayodaśamitaiḥ paramaṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ padam ||1||
mahābhāgavataḥ śrīmānvartate lokavaṃditaḥ |
auttānapādiridreṇa vahninā kaśyapena ca ||2||
dharmeṇa saha caivāste samakālayujā dhruvaḥ |
bahumānaṃ dakṣiṇataḥ kurvadbhiḥ prekṣakaiḥ sadā || 3 ||
ājīvyaḥ kalpajīvināmupāste bhagavatpadam |
jyotirgaṇānāṃ sarveṣāṃ grahanakṣatrabhādinām ||4||
kālenānimiṣeṇāyaṃ bhrāmyatā tyaktaraṃhasā |
avaṣṭaṃbhasthāṇuriva vihitaśveśvareṇa saḥ || 5 ||
bhāsate bhāsayanmāsā svīyayā devapūjitaḥ |
meḍhistaṃbhe yathā yuktāḥ paśavaḥ karṣaṇārthakāḥ || 6 ||
maṇḍalāni caraṃtīme savanatritayena savanatritayena ca |
evaṃ grahādayaḥ sarve bhagaṇādyā yathākramam ||7||
antarbahirvibhāgena kālacakre niyojitāḥ |
dhruvamevāvalaṃbyāśu vāyunodīritāśca te || 8||
ākalpāṃtaṃ ca kramati khe śyenāyāḥ khagā iva |
karmasārathiyo vāyuvaśagāḥ sarva eva te || 9 ||
evaṃ jyotirgaṇāḥ sarve prakṛteḥ puruṣasya ca |
saṃyogānugṛhītāste bhūmau na nipataṃti ca || 10 ||
jyotiścakraṃ kecidetacchiśumārasvarūpakam |
sopayogaṃ bhagavatā yogadhāraṇakarmaṇi || 11||
yasyārvākśirasaḥ kuṃḍalītavapuṣo mune |
pucchāgre kalpito yo'yaṃ dhruva uttānapādajaḥ || 12||
lāṃgūle'sya ca saṃproktaḥ prajāpatirakalmaṣaḥ |
agniridraśca dharmaśca tiṣṭhate surapūjitāḥ || 13 ||
dhātā vidhātā pucchāṃte kaṭayāṃ saptarṣayastataḥ |
dakṣiṇāvartabhāgena kuṇḍalākāramīyuṣaḥ || 14||
uttarāyaṇabhānīha dakṣapāveṃ'pitāni ca |
dakṣiṇāyanabhānīha savye pārśve'pitāni ca || 15|| ||15||
kuṇḍalābhogaveśasya pārśvayorubhayorapi |
samasaṃkhyāścāvayavā bhavantiṃ kajanaṃdana || 16 ||
ajavīthī pṛṣṭhabhāge ākāśasaridaudare |
punarvasuśca puṣyaśca śroṇyo dakṣiṇavāmayoḥ || 17 ||
ārdrāśleṣe paścimayoḥ pādayordakṣavāmayoḥ |
abhijiccottarāṣāḍhā nāsayordakṣavāmayoḥ || 18 ||
yathāsaṃkhyaṃ ca devarṣe śrutiśra jalabhaṃ tathā |
kalpite kalpanāviddhirnotrayordakṣavāmayoḥ || 19||
dhaniṣṭhā caiva mūlaṃ ca karṇayordakṣavāmayoḥ |
maghādīnyaṣṭabhānīha dakṣiṇāyanagāni ca || 20 || I |
yuñjīta vāmapārśvīyavaṃkriṣu kramato mune |
tathaiva mṛgaśīrṣādīnyudagbhāni ca yāni hi || 21 ||
dakṣapārśve vaṃkrikeṣu prātilomyena yojayet |
śatatārā tathā jyeṣṭhāskaṃdha yordakṣavāmayoḥ || 22||
agastiścottarahanā vadharāyāṃ hano yamaḥ |
mukheṣvaṃgārakaḥ prokto maṃdaḥ prokta upasthake ||23||

bṛhaspatiśca kakudi vakṣasyarko grahādhipaḥ |
nārāyaṇaśca hṛdaye candro manasi tiṣṭhati || 24 ||
stanayoraśvinau nābhyāmuśanāḥ parikīrtitaḥ |
budhaḥ prāṇāpānayośca gale rāhuśca ketavaḥ || 25 ||
sarvāṃgeṣu tathā romakūpe tārāgaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ |
etadbhagavato viṣṇoḥ sarvadevamayaṃ vapuḥ ||26||
saṃdhyāyāṃ pratyahaṃ dhyāyetprayato vāgyato muniḥ |
nirīkṣamāṇaśrottiṣṭhetmatreṇānena dhodharaḥ ||27||
namo jyotirlokāya kālāyānimiyāṃ pataye mahāpuruṣāyābhidhīmahīti ||28||
graharkṣatārāmayamādhidaivikaṃ pāpāpahaṃ maṃtrakṛtāṃ trikālam |
namasyataḥ smarato vā trikālaṃ naśyeta tatkālajamāśu pāpam || 29||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ ||17 ||
athāṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
adhastātsavitu: proktamayutaṃ rāhumaṇḍalam |
nakṣatravaccarati ca saiṃhikeyo'tadarhaṇaḥ ||1||
sūryā caṃdramasoreva mardanaḥ siṃhikāsutaḥ |
amaratvaṃ ca kheṭatvaṃ lebhe yo viṣṇtranugrahāt ||2||
yadadasta raṇebimbaṃ tapato yojanāyutam |
tacchādako'suro jñeyo'pyarkasāhasravistaram ||3||
trayodaśasahasraṃ tu somasyācchādako grahaḥ |
yaḥ parvasamaye vairānubaṃdho chādako'bhavat ||4||
sūryācaṃdramasordūrādbhavecchādana kārakaḥ |
tanniśamyobhayatrāpi viṣṇunā preritaṃ svakam ||5||
cakraṃ sudarśanaṃ nāma jvālamālātibhīṣaṇam |
tattejasā duḥsahena samantātparivāritam ||6||
muhūrto dvijamānastu dūrāccakitamānasaḥ |
ārānnivartate so'yamuparāga itīva ha ||7||
