ucyate lokamadhye tu devarṣe avabudhyatām |
tato'dhastātsamākhyātā lokāḥ paramapāvanāḥ ||8||
siddhānāṃ cāraṇānāṃ ca vidyāghrāṇāṃ ca sattama |
yojanāyatavikhyātā lokāḥ puṇyā niṣevitāḥ || 9||
tato'pyadhastāddevarṣe yakṣāṇāṃ ca sarakṣasām |
piśācapretabhūtānāṃ vihārājiramuttamam ||10||
aṃtarikṣaṃ calatproktaṃ yāvadvāyuḥ pravāti hi |
yāvanmeghāstathodyati yatproktaṃ jñānakovidaiḥ || 11||
tato'dhastādyojanānāṃ śataṃ yāvadvijottama |
pṛthivī parisaṃkhyātā suparṇaśyenasārasāḥ || 12||
haṃsādayaḥ protpataṃti pārthivāḥ pṛthivībhavāḥ |
bhūsanniveśāvasthānaṃ yathāvadupavaṇitam ||13||
adhastādavaneḥ sapta devarṣe vivarāḥ smṛtāḥ |
ekaikaśo yojanānāmāyāmocchrāyataḥ punaḥ || 14 ||
ayutāṃtaravikhyātāḥ sarvartu sukhadāyakāḥ |
atalaṃ prathamaṃ proktaṃ dvitīyaṃ vitalaṃ tathā || 15 ||
tṛtīyaṃ sutalaṃ proktaṃ caturthaṃ vai talātalam |
mahātalaṃ pañcamaṃ ca ṣaṣṭhaṃ proktaṃ rasātalam || 16||
saptamaṃ vipraṃ pātālaṃ sapta te vivarāḥ smṛtāḥ |
eteṣu bilasvargeṣu divo'pyadhikameva ca || 17 ||

kāma bhaugeśvarya sukhasamṛddhabhuvaneṣu ca |
nityodyānavihāreṣu sukhāsvādaḥ pravartate || 18 ||
daityāśca kādraveyāśca dānavā balaśālinaḥ |
nityapramuditā raktāḥ kalatrāpatyabaṃbubhiḥ || 19||
suhṛdbhiranujīvāḥ saṃyutāśva gṛheśvarāḥ |
īśvarādapratihatakāmā māyāvinaśva te ||20||
nivasati sadā dṛśa: sarvasukhasaṃyutāḥ |
mayena māyāvibhunā yeṣu yeṣu ca nirmitāḥ || 21 ||
puraḥ prakāmaśo bhaktā maṇipravarathālinaḥ |
vicitrabhavanādālā gopurādyāḥ sahasraśaḥ ||22||
sabhācatvaracaityādiśonācāḥ suraturlabhāḥ |
nāgāsurāṇāṃ mithunaiḥ sapārāvatasārikaiḥ ||23|| ||23||
kī kṛtrimabhūmiśca vivareśagṛhottamaḥ |
alaṃkṛtāśvakāsaṃti udyānāni mahāṃti ca ||24||
manaḥ prasannakārīṇi phalapuṣpaviśālibhiḥ |
lalanānāṃ vilāsārhasthānaiḥ śobhitabhāṃti ca || 25||
nānāvihaṃmavrāta saṃyuktajalarāśibhiḥ |
svacchāpūrita hṛdaiḥ pāṭhīnasamalaṃkṛtaiḥ || 26||
jalajaṃtukṣudhanīranīrajātairanekaśaḥ |
kumudotpalakāranīlaraktotpalaistathā ||27||
teṣu kṛtaniketānāṃ trihāraiḥ saṃkulāni ca |
iṃdriyotsavakāraiśca tathaiva vividhaiḥ svaraiḥ ||28||
amarāṇāṃ ca paramāṃ śriyaṃ cātiśayaṃti ca |
yatra naiva bhayaṃ kvāpi kālāṃgaṃdinarātrimiḥ ||29||
yahivarāṇāṃ ca śiraḥsthairmaṇiraśmibhiḥ |
nityaṃ tamaḥ prabādhyeta sadā prasphuṭakāṃtibhiḥ || 30 ||
na vā eteṣu vasatāṃ divyauṣadhirasāyanaḥ |
rasānnapānasnānādyairnādhiyo na ca vyādhayaḥ ||31||
calīpalitajīrṇatvarvavarṇyasvedagaṃdhatāḥ |
anutsāhavayovasthā na bādhate kadācana || 32||
kalyāṇānāṃ tadā yeṣāṃ na ca mṛtyubhayaṃ kutaḥ |
bhagavatejaso'nyatra cakrāccaiva sudarśanāt || 33 ||
yasminpraviṣṭe daiteyavadhūnāṃ garbhaśayaḥ |
prāyo bhayātpataṃtyeva stravaṃti brahmaputraka ||34||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe'ṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 18 ||
athaikonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
prathame vivare dina atalākhye manorame |
mayaputro balo nāma vartate'kharvagarvakṛt || 1||
ṣaṣṇavatyo yena sṛṭā māyāḥ sarvārthasādhikāḥ |
māyāvino yāśva sadyo dhārayati ca kāścana || 2||
jumbhagāṇasya yasyaiva balasya balaśālinaḥ |
strīgaṇā upapadyate trayo lokavimohanāḥ || 3 ||
puṃścalyaścaiva svairiṇyaḥ kāmaminyaśceti viśrutāḥ |
yā vai vilāyanaṃ preṣṭhaṃ praviṣṭaṃ puruṣaṃ rahaḥ ||4||
rasena hāṭakākhyena sādhayitvā prayatnataḥ |
svavilāsāvalokānurāgasmitavigūhanaiḥ ||5||
saṃlāpavibhramādyaiśca ramayaṃtyapi tāḥ striyaḥ |
yasminnupayukto jano manute bahudhā svayam || 6 ||
īśvaro'hamahaṃ siddho nāgāyutabalo mahān |
ātmānaṃ manyamānaḥ sanmadāndha iva kathyate ||7||

evaṃ proktā sthitivātra atalasya ca nārada |
dvitīyavivarasyātra vitalasya nibodhata ||8||
bhūtalādhastale caiva vitale bhagavānbhavaḥ |
hāṭakeśvaranāmā'yaṃ svapārṣadagaṇairvṛtaḥ ||9||
prajāpatikṛtasyāpi sargasya bṛṃhaṇāya ca |
bhavānyā mithunībhūya āste devādhipūjitaḥ || 10 ||
bhavayorvīryasaṃbhūtā hāṭakī sariduttamā |
samiddho marutā vahnirojasā pivatīva hi ||11||
tanniṣṭhyataṃ hāṭakākhyaṃ suvarṇa daityavallabham |
daityāṃganābhūṣaṇāhaṃ sadā saṃdhārayaṃti hi || 12||
tadvilādhastalātproktaṃ sutalākhyaṃ vileśvaram |
puṇyaśloko balirnāmā āste vairocanirmune || 13||
maheṃdrasya ca devasya cikīrṣuḥ priyamuttamam |
trivikramo'pi bhagavānsutale balimānayat || 14||
trailokyalakṣmī mākṣipya sthāpitaḥ kila daityarāṭ |
iṃdrādiṣvapyalabdhā yā sā śrīstamanuvartate || 15 ||
tameva devadeveśamārādhayati bhaktitaḥ |
vyapetasādhvaso'dyāpi vartate sutalādhipaḥ || 16 ||
bhūmidānaphalaṃ hyetatpātrabhūte'khileśvare |
varṇayati mahātmāno naitadyuktaṃ ca nārada || 17||
vāmudeve bhagavati puruṣārthaprade harī |
etaddānaphalaṃ vipra sarvathā na hi yujyate || 18 ||
yasyaiva devadevasya nāmāpi divaśo guṇan |
svakīyakarmabaṃdhīya guṇānvidhunute'ñjasā ||19||
yatkleśabaṃghahānāya sāṃkhyayogādisādhanam |
kurvate yatayo nityaṃ bhagavatyakhileśvare ||20||
na cāyaṃ bhagavānasmānanujagrāha nārada |
māyāmayaṃ ca bhogānāmaiśvaryaṃ vyatanotparam ||21||
sarva kleśādhihetuṃ tadātmānusmṛtimoṣaṇam |
yaṃ sākṣādbhagavānviṣṇuḥ sarvopāyavidīśvaraḥ ||22||
yābāchalenāpahṛtaṃ sarvasvaṃ sarvasvaṃ devaśeṣakam |
aprāptānyopāya īśaḥ pāśairvāruṇasaṃbhavaḥ ||23||
baṃghayitvā'vamucyāpi giridaryāmivābravīt |
asāviṃdro mahāmūḍho yasya maṃtrī bṛhaspatiḥ ||24||
prasannamimamatyarthaṃ mayācallokasaṃpadam |
trailokyamidamaiśvaryaṃ kiyadevātitucchakam ||25||
āśiṣāṃ prabhavaṃ muktvā yo mūḍho lokasaṃpadi |
asmatpitāmahaḥ śrīmānprahlādo bhagavatpriyaḥ || 26 ||
dāsyaṃ vavre vibhostasya sarvalokopakārakaḥ |
pitryamaiśvaryamatulaṃ dīyamānaṃ ca viṣṇunā || 27||
pitaryuparate vīre naivacchadbhagavatpriyaḥ |
tasyātulānubhāvasya sarva lokopadhīmataḥ ||28||
asmadvigho nālpapakvetara doṣo'va gacchati |
evaṃ daityapatiḥ so'yaṃ valiḥ paramapūjitaḥ ||29||
sunale vartate yasya dvārapālo hariḥ svayam |
ekadā digvijaye rājā rāvaṇo lokarāvaṇaḥ || 30 ||
praviśansutale bhaktānugrahakāriṇā |
pādāṃguṣṭena prakṣipto yojanāyutamaṃtra hi || 31|| yena
evaṃ bhūtānubhāvo'yaṃ baliḥ sarva sukhaikabhuk |
āste sutalarājastho devadevaprasādataḥ ||32||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhaṃ ekonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||19||

atha viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
tato'dhastādvivarakaṃ talātalamudīritam |
dānaveṃdro mayo nāma tripurādhipatirmahān || 1 ||
trilokyāḥ śaṃkareṇā'yaṃ pālito dagdhapūstrayaḥ |
devadevaprasādāttu labdharājyasukhāspadaḥ ||2||
ācāryo māyināṃ so'yaṃ nānāmāyāviśāradaḥ |
pūjyate rākṣasairghoraiḥ sarvakārya samṛddhaye ||3||
tato'dhastātsuvikhyātaṃ mahātalamiti sphuṭam |
sarpāṇāṃ kādraveyāṇāṃ gaṇaḥ krodhavaśo mahān ||4||
anekaśirasāṃ vipra pradhānānkīrtayāmi te |
kuhakastakṣakaścaiva suṣeṇaḥ kāliyastathā || 5 ||
mahābhogā mahāsattvāḥ krūrāḥ krūrasvajātayaḥ |
patatrirājādhipaterudvignāḥ sarva eva te || 6 ||
svakalatrāpatyasuhṛtkuṭuṃbena ca saṃgatāḥ |
pramattā viharatyeva nānākrīḍāviśāradāḥ || 7 ||
tato'dhastācca vivare rasātalasamāhvaye |
daiteyā nivasaṃtyeva paṇayo dānavāśca ye |
nivātakavacā nāma hiraṇyapuravāsinaḥ |
kāleyā iti ca proktāḥ pratyanīkā havirbhujām || 9 ||
mahaujasaśvotpattyaiva mahāsāhasinastathā |
sakaleśasya ca harestejasā hatavikramāḥ || 10 ||
vileśayā iva sadā vivare nivasanti hi |
ye vai vāgbhiḥ saramayā śakradūtyā niraṃtaram || 11 ||
maṃtravarṇābhirasurāstāḍitā bibhyati sma ha |
tato'pyadhastātpātāle nāga lokādhipālakāḥ || 12 ||
vāsukipramukhāḥ |
śaṃkhaḥ kulikaḥ, śveta eva ca |
dhanaṃjayo mahāśaṃkho dhṛtarāṣṭrastathaiva ca || 13||
śaṃkhacūḍaḥ kaṃbalāśvataro devopadattakaḥ |
mahāmarṣā mahābhogā nivasaṃti viṣolbaṇāḥ ||14||
paṃcamastakavaṃtava phaṇāsa taka bhūpitāḥ |
keciddaśaphaṇāḥ kecicchataśīrṣāstathāpare || 15 |
sahasraśirasaḥ ke'pi rociṣṇumaṇidhārakāḥ |
pātālaraṃdhra timiranikaraṃ svamarīcibhiḥ || 163||
vidhamaṃti ca devarṣe sadāsaṃjātamanyatraḥ |
asya mūlapradeśe hi triṃśatsahasrakeṃtare ||17||
yojanaiḥ parisaṃkhyāte tāmasī bhagavatkalā |
anaṃtākhyā samāste hi sarvadevaprapūjitā || 18 ||
ahamityabhimānasya lakṣaṇaṃ yaṃ pracakṣate |
saṃkarṣaṇaṃ sātvatīyāḥ karpaṇaṃ draṣṭṛdṛśyayoḥ ||19||
idaṃ bhūmaṃḍalaṃ yasya sahasraśirasaḥ prabhoḥ |
anaṃtamūrteḥ śeṣasya dhriyamāṇaṃ ca śīrṣake !! 20 ||
pṛthvīgolamaśepaṃ hi siddhārtha iva lakṣyate |
yasya kālena devasya saṃjihīrṣoḥ samaṃ vibhoḥ || 21 ||
carācaraṃ bhruvoraṃtavivarādudapadyata |
sāṃkarṣaṇo nāma rudro vyūhaikādaśaśobhitaḥ ||22||
trilocanaśca triśikhaṃ śūlamuttaṃbhayansvayam |
udatiṣṭhanmahāsattvo mahābhūtakṣayaṃkaraḥ ||23||
yasyāṃghikamaladvaṃdvaśoṇācchanakhamaṃḍale |
virājanmaṇibiṃbeṣu mahāhipatayo'niśam ||24||
ekāṃtabhaktiyogena saha sāttvatapuṃgavaiḥ |
praṇamaṃtaḥ svamūrdhnā te svamukhāni samīkṣate ||25||

sphuratkuṇḍalamāṇikyaprabhāmaṃḍalabhāṃjyapi |
sukapolāni cārūṇi gaṃḍasthaladyumati ca || 26||
nāgarājakumāryo'pi cārvaṅga vilasattviṣaḥ |
viśadaivipulaistadvaddhavalaiḥ subhagastathā ||27||
rucirairbhujadaṃḍeśca śobhamānā itastataḥ |
caṃdanāgurukāśmīrapaṃkalepena bhūṣitāḥ || 28 ||
lalitasmita saṃyuktāḥ savrīḍaṃ lokayaṃti ca || 29||
tadabhimarṣasaṃjātakāmāveśasamāyutāḥ
karuṇāvalokanetraṃ ca āśāsānāstathāśiṣaḥ ||30||
anurāgamadonmattavighūrṇāruṇalocanam
so'naṃ to bhagavāndevo'naṃtasattvo mahāśayaḥ |
anaṃtaguṇavādhiśca ādidevo mahādyutiḥ ||31||
saṃhṛtāmarṣa roṣādivego lokaśubhāya ca |
āste mahāsattvanidhiḥ sarvadevaprapūjitaḥ ||32||
dhyāyamānaḥ suraiḥ siddhairasuraiśvoragaistathā |
vidyādharaiśca gaṃdharvairmunisaṃghaiśca nityaśaḥ ||33||
anāratamadonmattālokavihvalalocanaḥ |
vākyāmṛtena vibudhānsvapārṣadagaṇānapi ||34||
āpyāyamānaḥ sa vibhurvaijayaṃtī srajaṃ dadhat |
amlānābhinavaiḥ svacchaṃstulasīdalasaṃcayaiḥ || 35 ||
mādyanmadhukaravrātaghoṣaśrīsaṃyutāṃ sadā |
nīlavāsā devadeva ekakuṇḍalabhūṣitaḥ || 36 ||
halasya kakudi nyastasupīvarabhujo'vyayaḥ |
maheṃdra: kāṃcanoṃ yadvatrāṃ ca mataṃgamaḥ ||
udāralīlo deveśo varṇitaḥ sāttvatarṣabhaḥ ||37||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe triṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||20||
athaikaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārāyaṇa uvāca
tasyānubhāvaṃ bhagavānbrahmaputraḥ sanātanaḥ |
sabhāyāṃ brahmadevasya gāyamāna upāsate || 1 ||
utpattisthitilayahetavo'sya kalpāḥ sattvādyāḥ prakṛtiguṇā yadīkṣayā''san |
veda tasya vartma ||2||
kadrūpaṃ dhruvamakṛtaṃ yadekamātmannānādhātkathamuha
mūrti naḥ purukṛpayā babhāra sattvaṃ saṃśuddhaṃ sadasadidaṃ vibhāti yatra |
yallīlāṃ mṛgapatirādade'navadyāmādātuṃ svajanamanāṃsyudāravīryaḥ ||3||
yannāma śrutamanukīrtayedakasmādārtto vā yadi patitaḥ pralaṃbhanādvā |
haṃtyaṃhaḥ sapadi nṛṇāmaśeṣamanyaṃ kaṃ śeṣādbhagavata āśrayenmumukṣuḥ ||4||
mūrdhanyarpitamaṇuvatsahasra mūrdhno bhūgolaṃ sagirisarityasudrasattvam |
ānaṃtyādanamitavikramasya bhūmnaḥ ko vīryāṇyadhigaṇayetsahasrajihnaḥ ||5||
evaṃ prabhāvo bhagavānanaṃ to duraṃtavīryoruguṇānubhāvaḥ |
mūle rasāyāḥ sthita ātmataṃtro yo līlayā kṣmāṃ sthitaye birbhāta ||6||

etā hyeveha tu nṛbhirgatayo munisattama |
gantavyā bahuśo yadvadyathākarmavinirmitāḥ ||7||
yathopadeśaṃ ca kāmānsadā kāmayamānakaiḥ |
etāvatīhi rājeṃdra manuṣyamṛgapakṣiṣu ||8||
vipākagatayaḥ proktā dharmasya vaśagāstathā |
uccāvacca visadṛśā yathāpraśnaṃ nibodhata || 9 ||
nārada uvāca
vicitrametallokasya kathaṃ bhagavatā kṛtam |
samānatve karmaṇāṃ ca tano brūhi sa yathātatham || 10||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
kartuḥ śraddhāvaśādeva gatayo'pi pṛthagvidhāḥ |
triguṇatvātsadā tāsāṃ phalaṃ visadṛśaṃ tviha || 11||
sāttvikyā śraddhayā kartuḥ sukhitvaṃ jāyate sadā |
duḥkhitvaṃ ca tathā kartuṃ rājasyā śraddhayā bhavet || 12||
duḥkhitvaṃ caiva mūḍhatvaṃ tāmasyā śraddhayoditam |
tāratamyāttu śraddhānāṃ phalavaicitryamīritam ||13||
anādya vidyāvihitakarmaṇāṃ pariṇāmajāḥ |
sahasraśaḥ pravṛttāstu gatayo dvijapuṅgava ||14||
tadbhedānvarṇayiṣyāmi prācuryeṇa dvijottama |
trijagatyā antarāle dakṣiṇasyāṃ diśīha ve || 15|| i
bhūmeradhastādupari tvatalasya nārada |
agniṣvāttāḥ pitṛgaṇāḥ vartate pitaraśva hi || 16 || ca
saṃti yasyāṃ svīyānāṃ gotrāṇāṃ paramāśipaḥ |
satyāḥ samādhinā śīghraṃ tvāśāsānāḥ pareṇa vaṃ 17||
pitṛrājo'pi bhagavānsaṃpareteṣu jaṃtuṣu |
viṣayaṃ prāpiteṣveṣu svakīyaiḥ puruṣairiha || 18 |
sagaṇo bhagavatproktājñāparo damadhārakaḥ |
yathākarma yathādoṣaṃ vidadhāti vicāradṛk || 19 ||
svāngaṇāndharmatattvajñānsarvānājñāpravartakān |
sadā prerayati prājño yathādeśaniyojitān || 20 ||
narakānekaviṃśatyā saṃkhyayā varṇayanti hi |
aṣṭāviṃśamitānkecittānanukramato bruve ||21||
tāmila aṃdhatāmisro rauravo'pi tṛtīyakaḥ |
mahāroravanāmā ca kuṃbhīpāko'paro mataḥ || 22 ||
kālasūtraṃ tathā cāsipatrā raṇyamudāhṛtam |
sūkarasya mukhaṃ cāṃdhakūpo'tha kṛmibhojanaḥ ||23||
saṃdaṃśastaptamūrtiśva vajjakaṃṭaka eva ca |
śālmalī cātha devarṣe nāmnā vaitaraṇī tathā || 24 ||
buyodaḥ prāṇaroṣaśca tathā viśasanaṃ matam |
lālābhakṣaḥ sārameyādanamuktamataḥ param || 25 ||
avocirapyayaḥ pānaṃ kṣārakardama eva ca |
rakṣogaṇākhyasaṃbhojaḥ śūlaproto pyataḥ param ||26||
daṃdaśūko vaṭāroṣa: paryāvartanakaḥ param |
sūcīmukhamiti proktā aṣṭāviṃśatinārakāḥ ||27||
ityete nārakā nāma yātanābhūmayaḥ parāḥ |
karmabhiścāpi bhūtānāṃ gamyāḥ padmasaṃbhava || 28 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe aṣṭamaskandhe ekaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 21||
atha dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
karmabhedāḥ katividhāḥ sanātanamune mama |
śrotavyaṃ sarvathaivaite yātanāprāptibhūmayaḥ || 1 ||

śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
yo vai parasya vittāni dārāpatyāni caiva hi |
harate sa hi duṣṭātmā yamānucaragocaraḥ || 2 ||
kālapāśena saṃbaddho yāmyairatibhayānakaiḥ |
tāmisranāmni narake pātyate yātanāspade || 3 |
tāḍanaṃ daṃḍanaṃ caiva saṃtarjanamataḥ param |
yāmyāḥ kurvati pāśāḍhyā: kaśmalaṃ yāti caiva hi || 4 ||
mūrcchāmāyāti vivaśo nārakī padmabhūsuta |
yaḥ patiṃ vaṃcayitvā tu dārādīnupabhujyati || 5||
andhatāmisranarake pātyate yamakiṃkaraiḥ |
pātyamāno jaṃturvedanāparavānbhavet || 6|| yatra
naṣṭadṛṣṭirnaṣṭamatirbhavatyevāvilambataḥ |
vanaspatirbhajyamānamūlo yadbhavediha ||7||
tasmādapyaṃdhatāmisranāmnā proktaḥ purātanaiḥ |
etanmamāhamiti yo bhūtadroheṇa kevalam || 8 ||
puṣṇāti pratyahaṃ svīyaṃ kuṭumbaṃ kāryalaṃpaṭaḥ |
etadvihāya cātraiva svāśubhena patediha || 9 ||
rorave nāmni narake narakeṃ sarvasatvabhayāvahe |
iha loke'munā ye tu hiṃsitā jaṃtavaḥ purā || 10 ||
ta eva ruravo bhūtvā paratra pīḍayaṃti tam |
tasmādrauravamityāhuḥ purāṇajñā manoṣiṇaḥ || 11||
ruruḥ sarpādatikrūro jaṃturuktaḥ purātanaiḥ |
evaṃ mahāroravākhyo narako yatra pūruṣaḥ || 12 ||
yātanāṃ prāpyamāṇo hi yaḥ paraṃ dehasaṃbhavaḥ |
kravyādā nāma ruravastaṃ kravye ghātayaṃti ca ||13||
ya ugraḥ puruṣaḥ krūraḥ paśupakṣigaṇānapi |
uparaṃdhayate mūḍho yāmyāstaṃ raṃdhayaṃti ca || 14 ||
kuṃbhīpāke taptataile upayaṃpi ca nārada |
yāvanti paśuromāṇi tāvadrarṣasahasrakam ||15||
pitṛviprabrāhmaṇadhukkākasūtre sa nārake |
agnyarkābhyāṃ tapyamāne nārakī viniveśitaḥ || 46 ||
kṣutpipāsādahyamāno'ntaḥ śarīrastathā bahiḥ |
āste śete ceṣṭate cāvatiṣṭhati ca dhāvati ||17||
nijavedapathādyo vai pākhaṃḍaṃ copayāti ca |
anāpadyapi devarṣe taṃ pāpaṃ puruṣaṃ bhaṭāḥ || 18||
asipatravanaṃ nāma narakaṃ veśayanti ca |
karāyā: praharaṃtyeva nārakī tadgatastathā || 19 ||
itastato dhāvamāna uttālamativegitaḥ |
asipatraṃ śchidyamāna ubhayatra ca dhārakaiḥ ||20||
saṃchidyamāna sarvāṅgo hā hato'smīti mūcchitaḥ |
vedanāṃ paramāṃ prāptaḥ patatyeva pade pade ||21||
svadharmānugataṃ bhuṃkte pākhaṃḍaphalamalpadhīḥ |
yo rājā rājapuruṣo daṃḍayedvai tvadharmataḥ || 22||
dvije śarīradaṃḍaṃ ca pāpīyānnārakī ca saḥ |
narake sūkaramūkhe pātyate yamakiṅkaraiḥ || 23||
viniṣpiṣṭāvayavako balavadbhistathekṣutrat |
ārtasvareṇa svanayanmūcchitaḥ kaśmalaṃ gataḥ || 24 ||
sa pīḍyamāno bahudhā vedanāṃ yātyatīva hi |
viviktaparapīḍā yo'pyaviviktaparavyathām ||25||
īśvarāṃkitavṛttīnāṃ vyathāmācarate svayam |
sa cāṃdhakūpe patati tadabhidrohyaṃtrite ||26||
tatrāsau jaṃtubhiḥ krūraiḥ paśubhirmṛgapakṣibhiḥ |
sarīsṛpaiśca maśakairyakā matkuṇajātibhiḥ ||27||
makṣikābhiśca tamasi daṃdaśūkaiśca pīḍyate |
parikrāmati caivātra kuśarīre ca jaṃtuvat || 28||

yastu saṃvihitaiḥ paṃcayajñaḥ kākaiśca saṃstutaḥ |
aśnāti cāsaṃvibhajya yatkicidupapadyate ||29|
sa pāpapuruṣaḥ krūrairyāmyaiśca kṛmibhojane |
narakāghamake duṣṭakarmaṇā paripātyate ||30||
lakṣayojanavistīrṇe kṛmikuṇḍe kṛmikuṇḍe bhayaṃkare |
kṛmirūpaṃ samāsādya bhakṣyamāṇaśca taiḥ svayam ||31||
aprattāprahutādo yaḥ pātamāpnoti tatra vai |
yastu steyena ca balāddhiraṇyaṃ ratnameva ca || 32||
brāhmaṇasyāpaharati anyasyāpi ca kasyacit |
anāpadi ca devarṣe tamamutra yamānugāḥ ||33||
ayasmayairagnipiṃḍe : sadṛśai niṣkuṣaṃti ca |
yogamyāṃ yoṣitaṃ gacchedagamyaṃ puruṣaṃ ca yā || 34 ||
tāvamutrāpi kaśayā tāḍayaṃto yamānugāḥ |
tigmayā lohamayyā ca sūryāyāliṃgayaṃti tam 35 ||
tāṃ cāpi yoṣitaṃ sūrmyāliṃgayaṃti yamānugāḥ |
yastu sarvābhigamanaḥ puruṣaḥ pāpasaṃcayī ||36||
niraye'mutra taṃ yāmyāḥ śālmalī ropayaṃti tam |
vajrakaṃṭakasaṃyuktāṃ śālmalī tāmayasmayīm ||37||
rājanyā rājapuruṣā ye vā pākhaṃḍavartinaḥ |
dharmasetuṃ vibhidaṃti te paretya gatā narāḥ || 38 ||
vaitaraṇyāṃ pataṃtyeva bhinnamaryādapātakāḥ |
nadyāṃ nirayadurgasya parikhāyāṃ ca nārada || 39 ||
yādogaṇaiḥ samaṃtāttu bhakṣyamāṇā itastata: |
nātmanā viyujaṃtyeva nāsubhiśvāpi nārada ||40||
svīyena karmapākenopatapanti ca sarvataḥ |
viṇmūtrapūyaraktaśca keśāsthinakhamāṃsakaiḥ ||41||
medovasāsaṃyutāyāṃ nadyāmupapataṃti te |
vṛṣalīpatayo ye ca naṣṭaśaucā gatatrapāḥ ||42||
ācāraniyamastyaktāḥ paśucaryāparāyaṇāḥ |
te'trānukṛṣṭagatayo viṇmūtraśleṣmaraktakaiḥ ||43||
ileṣma malasamā pūrṇe nipataṃti durāgrahāḥ |
tadeva khādayaṃtyetānyamānucaravargakāḥ || 44 ||
ye śvāna gardabhādīnāṃ patayo vai dvijātayaḥ |
mṛgayārasikā nityamatīrthe mṛgaghātakāḥ || 45 ||
paretāṃstānyamabhaṭā lakṣyībhūtānnarādhamān |
ipubhiśca vibhidaṃti tāṃstāndurnayamāgatān ||46||
ye daṃbhā daṃbhayajñeṣu paśūnghnaṃti narādhamāḥ |
tānamuṣminyamabhaṭā narake vaiśase tadā || 47 ||
nipātya pīḍayaṃtyevaṃ kaśāghātairdurāsadaiḥ |
yo bhāryāṃ ca savarṇāṃ vai dvijo madanamohitaḥ || 48 ||
retaḥ pātayate mūḍho'mutra taṃ yamakiṃkarāḥ |
retaḥkuṇḍe pātayaṃti retaḥ pāyayati ca || 49 ||
ye dasyavo'gnidāścaiva garadā : sārthaghātakāḥ |
grāmānsārthānviluṃpati rājāno rājapuruṣāḥ ||50 ||
tānparetānyamabhaṭā nayaṃti śvānakādanam |
viśatyadhikasaṃkhyātāḥ sārameyā mahādbhutāḥ || 51 ||
saptaśatyā samākhyātā rabhasaṃ khādayaṃti te |
sārameyādanaṃ nāma narakaṃ dāruṇaṃ mune ||
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi avīcipramukhānmune || 52 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭamaskandhe dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 22 ||
—

atha trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
ye narāḥ sarvadā sākṣye anṛtaṃ bhāṣayaṃti ca |
dāne vinimaye'rthasya devarṣe pāpabuddhayaḥ || 1 ||
te tyāmutra narake avīcyārūye'tidāruṇe |
yojanānāṃ śatocchrāyādvirimūrdhnaḥ patanti hi || 2 || /
anākāśe'dhaḥ śirastadavīcītināma ke |
yaṃtra sthalaṃ dṛśyate ca jalavadvīcisaṃyutam ||3||
avīcimattatastatra tilaśarichannavigrahaḥ |
mriyate naiva devarṣe punarevāvaṃropyate ||4||
yo vā dvijo vā rājanyo vaiśyo vā brahmasaṃbhava |
somapīthastatkalatraṃ surāṃ vā pibatīha yaḥ || 5||
pramādatastu teṣāṃ vai niraye paripātanam |
kurvaṃti yamadūtāste pānaṃ kārṣṇāyaso mune || 6 ||
vahninā dravamāṇasya nitarāṃ brahmasaṃbhava |
saṃbhāvanena svasyaiva yo'dhamopi narādhamaḥ || 7 ||
vidyājanmatapovarṇāśramācāravato narān |
varīyaso'pi na bahu manyate puruṣādhamaḥ || 8||
nīyate yamabhaṭaiḥ kṣārakardamanāmake |
niraye'rvākśirā ghorā duraṃtayātanā'śnute ||9||
sa
ye vai narā yaja̭tyanyaṃ naramedhena mohitāḥ |
striyo'pi vā narapaśuṃ khādantyatra mahāmune || 10 ||
paśavo nihatāste tu yamasadmani saṃgatāḥ |
saunikā iva te sarve vidārya sitadhārayā ||11||
asṛkpivaṃti nṛtyaṃti gāyanti bahudhā mune |
yatheha māṃsabhoktāraḥ puruṣādā durāsadāḥ || 12 ||
anāgaso'pi ye'raṇye grāme vā brahmaputraka |
vaiśraṃbhakairupasṛtānviśraṃbhayya jijīviṣan ||13||
protānkrīḍanotkārakāniva |
pātayaṃti ca te pretya śūlapāte pataṃti ha || 14||
śūlasūtrādipa gūlādipu protadehāḥ kṣuttṛbhyāṃ cātipīḍitāḥ |
tigmatuṃḍaiḥ kaṃkavakairitaścetaśca tāḍitāḥ || 15 ||
pīḍitā ātmaśamalaṃ bahudhā saṃsmarati hi |
ye bhūtānudvejayanti narā ulbaṇavṛttayaḥ || 16 ||
yathā sarpādikāste'pi narake nipataṃti hi |
daṃdaśūkābhidhāne ca yatrottiṣṭhati sarvataḥ || 17||
paṃcānanāḥ saptamukhā grasaṃti narakāgatān |
yathā bileśayā vipra krūrabuddhisamanvitāḥ || 18 ||
ye'vaṭeṣu kusūlādiguhādiṣu nirundhate |
tānamutrodyatakarāḥ kīnāśaparisevakāḥ || 19||
teṣvevopaviśitvā ca sagareṇa ca vahninā |
dhūmena ca niruṃdhati pāpakarmaratānnarān ||20||
yo'tithīnsamayaprāptāndidhakṣuriva cakṣuṣā |
pāpenehālokayecca svayaṃ gṛhapatirdvijaḥ || 21 ||

tasyāpi pāpadṛṣṭehi niraye yamakiṃkarāḥ |
akṣiṇī vajratuṃḍā ye kaṃkāḥ kākavaṭādayaḥ ||22||
gṛdhrāḥ krūratarāścāpi prasahyotpāṭayaṃti hi |
ya āḍhyābhimatiryāti ahaṃkṛtyātigarvitaḥ ||23||
tiryakprekṣaṇa evātrābhiviśaṃkī narādhamaḥ |
citayā'rthasya sarvatrāyativyayastrarūpayā ||24||
śuṣyaddhṛdayavaktraśca nirvṛtiṃ naiva gacchati |
grahavadrakṣate cārthaṃ sa preto yamakiṃkaraiḥ || 25 |
sūcīmukhe ca narake pātyate nijakarmaṇā |
vittagrahaṃ ca puruṣaṃ vāyakā iva yāmyakāḥ ||26||

kiṃkarāḥ sarvato'ṅgeṣu sūtraḥ parivayaṃti hi |
ete bahuvidhā vitta narakāḥ pāpakarmaṇām ||27||
narāṇāṃ śataśaḥ saṃti yātanāsthānabhūmayaḥ |
sahasraśo'pi devarṣe uktānuktāstathāpi hi || 28||
viśaṃti narakānetā yātanāvahulānmune |
tathā dharmaparāścāpi lokānyāṃta sukhodgatān ||29||
svadharmo bahudhā |
gīto yathā tatra mahāmune |
devīpūjanarūpo hi devyārādhanalakṣaṇaḥ || 30 ||
yenānuṣṭhitamātreṇa na naro narakaṃ vrajet |
sā devī bhavapāthodheruddha pūjitā nṛṇām ||31||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe aṣṭamaskandhe devīgītāyāṃ trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 23 ||
atha caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
dharmaśva kīdṛśastāta devyārādhanalakṣaṇaḥ |
kathamārādhitā devī sā dadāti paraṃ padam ||1||
ārādhanavidhiḥ ko vā kathamārādhitā kadā |
kena sā durganarakāddurgā trāṇapradā bhavet ||2||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
devarṣe śṛṇu cittaikāgrayeṇa me viduṣāṃ vara |
yathā prasīdate devī dharmārādhanataḥ svayam ||3||
svadhamāṃ yādṛśaḥ proktastaṃ ca me śṛṇu nārada |
anādāviha saṃsāre devī saṃpūjitā svayam ||4||
paripālayate ghorasaṃkaṭādiṣu sā mune |
sā devī pūjyate lokairyathāvattadvidhiṃ śṛṇu ||5||
pratipattithimāsādya devīmājyena pūjayet |
ghṛtaṃ dadyād brāhmaṇāya rogahīno bhavetsadā ||6||
dvitīyāyāṃ śarkarayā pūjayejjagadaṃbikām |
śarkarāṃ pradadedvipre dīrghāyurjāyate naraḥ ||7||
tṛtīyādivase devyai dugdhaṃ pūjanakarmaṇi |
kṣīraṃ dattvā dvijāgraṃyāya sarvaduḥkhātigo bhavet ||8||
caturthyāṃ pūjane pūpā deyā devyai dvijāya ca |
apūpā eva dātavyā na vighnairabhibhūyate ||9||
paṃcabhyāṃ kadalījātaphalaṃ devyai nivedayet |
tadeva brāhmaṇe deyaṃ medhāvānṣuruṣo bhavet ||10||
ṣaṣṭhītithau madhu proktaṃ devīpūjanakarmaṇi |
brāhmaṇāya ca dātavyaṃ madhukāṃtiyaṃto bhavet || 11 ||
saptamyāṃ guḍanaivedyaṃ devyai dattvā dvijāya ca |
guḍaṃ dattvā śokahīno jāyate dvijasattama ||12||
nārikelamathāṣṭamyāṃ devyai naivedyamarpayet |
brāhmaṇāya pradātavyaṃ tāpahīno bhavennaraḥ || 13 ||
navamyāṃ lājamaṃbāyai cārpayitvā dvijāya ca |
dattvā sukhādhiko bhūyādiha loke paratra ca ||14||
daśamyāmarpayitvā tu devyai kṛṣṇatilānmune |
brāhmaṇāya pradattvā tu yamalokādbhayaṃ na hi || 15||
ekādaśyāṃ dadhi tathā devyai cārpayate tu yaḥ |
dadāti brāhmaṇāyaitaddevīpriyatamo bhavet || 16 ||
dvādaśyāṃ pṛthukāndevyai dattvācāryāya yo dadet |
tāneva ca muniśreṣṭha sa devīpriyatāṃ vrajet ||17||
trayodaśyāṃ ca durgāyai caṇakānpradadāti ca |
tāneva dattvā viprāya prajāsaṃtatimānbhavet ||18||
caturdaśyāṃ ca devarṣe devyai saktūnprayacchati |
tāneva dadyādviprāya śivasya dayito bhavet ||19||

pāyasaṃ pūrṇimā tithyāmaparṇāyai prayacchati |
dadāti ca dvijāgracāya pitṝnuddharate'khilān ||20||
tattitho havanaṃ proktaṃ devītrītyai mahāmune |
tattattithyuktavastūnāmaśeṣāriṣṭanāśanam ||21||
ravivāre pāyasaṃ ca naivedyaṃ parikīrtitam |
somavāre payaḥ proktaṃ bhoge ca kaṃdalīphalam ||22||
budhavāre ca saṃproktaṃ navanītaṃ navaṃ dvija |
guruvāre śarkarāṃ ca sitāṃ bhārgavavāsare ||23||
śanivāre ghṛtaṃ gavyaṃ naivedyaṃ parikīrtitam |
saptaviṃśatinakṣatranaivedyaṃ śrūyatāṃ mune ||24||
tilaṃ śarkarāṃ ca dadhi dugdhaṃ kilāṭakam |
dadhikūcīṃ modakaṃ ca pheṇikāṃ ghṛtamaṇḍakam || 25 ||
kaṃsāraṃ vaṭapatraṃ ca ghṛtapūramataḥ param |
vaṭakaṃ kokarasakaṃ pūraṇaṃ madhu sūraṇam ||26||
guḍaṃ pṛthukadrākṣe ca kharjūraṃ caiva cārakam |
apūpaṃ navanītaṃ ca mudgaṃ modakameva ca || 27||
mātuluṃgamiti proktaṃ bhanaivedyaṃ ca nārada |
viṣkaṃbhādiṣu yogeṣu pravakṣyāmi nivedanam || 28||
padārthānāṃ kṛteṣveṣu prīṇāti jagadambikā |
guḍaṃ madhu ghṛtaṃ dugdhaṃ dadhi takraṃ tvapūpakam || 29||
navanītaṃ karkaṭīṃ ca kūṣmāṃḍaṃ cāpi modakam |
panasaṃ kadalī jaṃbuphalamāmraphalaṃ tilam || 30 ||
nāraṃgaṃ dāḍimaṃ caiva badarīphalameva ca |
dhātrīphalaṃ pāyasaṃ ca pṛthukaṃ caṇakaṃ tathā || 31 ||
mārikelaṃ jaṃbhaphalaṃ kaseruṃ sūraṇaṃ tathā |
etāni kramaśo vipra naivedyāni śubhāni ca ||32||
viṣkaṃbhādiṣu yogeṣu nirṇītāni manīṣibhiḥ |
atha naivedyamākhyāsye karaṇānāṃ pṛthaṅmune ||33||
kaṃsāraṃ maṇḍakaṃ pheṇīṃ modakaṃ vaṭapatrakam |
laḍḍukaṃ ghṛtapūraṃ ca tilaṃ dadhi ghṛtaṃ madhu || 34 ||
karaṇānāmidaṃ proktaṃ devīnaivedyamādarāt |
athānyatsaṃpravakṣyāmi devīprītikaraṃ param ||35||
vidhānaṃ nārada mune śṛṇu tatsarvamādṛtaḥ |
caitraśuddha tṛtīyāyāṃ naro madhukavṛkṣakam ||36|
pūjayetpaṃcakhādyaṃ ca naivedyamupakalpayet |
evaṃ dvādaśamāseṣu tṛtīyā tithiṣu kamāt ||37||
śuddhapakṣe vidhānena naivedyamabhidadhmahe |
vaiśākhamāse naivedyaṃ guḍayuktaṃ ca nārada ||38||
jyeṣṭhamāse madhu proktaṃ devīprītyarthameva tu |
āṣār̤he navanītaṃ ca madhūkasya nivedanam ||39||
śrāvaṇe dadhi naivedyaṃ bhādramāse ca śarkarā |
āśvine pāyasaṃ proktaṃ kārtike paya uttamam ||40||
mārge pheṇyuttamā proktā pauṣe ca dadhikūcikā |
māghe māsi ca naivedyaṃ ghṛtaṃ gavyaṃ samāharet || 41||
nārikelaṃ ca naivedyaṃ phālgune parikīrtitam |
evaṃ dvādaśanaivedyairmāse ca kramato'rcayet ||42||
maṃgalā vaiṣṇavī māyā kālarātrirduratyayā |
mahāmāyā ca mātaṃgī kālī kamalavāsinī ||43||
śivā sahasracaraṇā sarvamaṃgalarūpiṇī |
ebhirnāmapadairdevī madhūke paripūjayet ||44||
tataḥ stuvīta deveśīṃ madhūkasthāṃ maheśvarīm |
sarvakāmasamṛddhyarthaṃ vratapūrṇatvasiddhaye ||45||
namaḥ puṣkaranetrāyai jagaddhātryai namo'stu te |
māheśvaya~ mahādevyai mahāmaṃgalamūrtaye || 46 ||
paramā pāpahaṃtrī ca paramārgapradāyinī |
parameśvarī prajotpattiḥ parabrahmasvarūpiṇī ||47||

madadātrī madonmattā mānagamyā madonnatā |
manasvinī munidhyeyā mārtaṇḍasahacāriṇī || 48 ||
jaya lokeśvari prājñe pralayāṃbudasannibhe |
mahāmohavināśārtha pūjitā'si surāsuraiḥ ||49||
yamalokābhāvakartrī yamapujyā māgrajā |
yamanigraharūpā ca yajanīye namo namaḥ || 50 ||
samasvabhāvā sarveśī sarva saṃgavivarjitā |
saṃganāśakarī kāmyarūpā kāruṇyavigrahā || 51 ||
kaṃkālakrūrā kāmākṣī mīnākṣī marmabhedinī |
mādhuryarūpaśīlā ca madhurasvarapūjitā || 52 ||
mahāmaṃtravatīṃ maṃtragamyā maṃtrapriyaṃkarī |
manuṣyamāna sagamā manmathāripriyaṃkarī ||53||
aśvatthavaniṃbāmrakapitthabadarīgate |
panamārkakarīrādikṣī rakṣasvarūpiṇi || 54||
dugdhavallī nivāsārha dayanīye dayādhike |
dākṣiṇyakaruṇārūpe jaya sarvajñaballabhe || 55||
evaṃ stavena deveśoṃ pūjanāṃte stuvīta tām |
vratasya sakalaṃ puṇyaṃ labhate sarvadā naraḥ || 56 ||
nityaṃ yaḥ paṭhate stotraṃ devīprītikaraṃ naraḥ |
ādhivyādhibhayaṃ nāsti ripubhītirna tasya hi || 57 ||
arthārthī cārthamāpnoti dharmārthī dharmamāpnuyāt ||58||
brāhmaṇo vedasampanno vijayī kṣatriyo bhavet |
vaiśyaśca dhanadhānyāḍhyo bhavecchradraḥ sukhādhikaḥ || 59||
stotrametacchrāddhakāle yaḥ paṭhetprayato naraḥ |
pitṝṇāmakṣayā tṛptirjāyate kalpavartinī || 60 ||
evamārādhanaṃ devyāḥ samuktaṃ surapūjitam |
yaḥ karoti naro bhaktayā sa devīlokabhāgbhavet 61 ||
devīpūjanato vipra sarve kāmā bhavaṃti hi |
sarvapāpahatiḥ śuddhā matiraṃte prajāyate || 62||
yatra tatra bhavetpūjyo mānyo mānadhaneṣu ca |
jāyate jagadaṃbāyāḥ prasādena viricija || 63 ||
narakāṇāṃ na tasyāsti bhayaṃ svapne'pi kutracit |
mahāmāyāprasādena putrapautrādivardhanaḥ || 64||
devībhakto bhavatyeva nātra kāryā vicāraṇā |
ityeva te samākhyātaṃ narakoddhāralakṣaṇam ||65||
pūjanaṃ hi mahādevyāḥ sarvamaṃgalakārakam |
madhūkapūjanaṃ tadvanmāsānāṃ kramato mune || 66 ||
sarva samācaredyastu pūjanaṃ madhukāhvayam |
na tasya rogabādhādibhayamudbhavate'nagha || 67 ||
athānyadapi vakṣyāmi prakṛteḥ paṃcakaṃ param |
nāmnā rūpeṇa cotpattyā jagadānaṃdadāyakam || 68||
sākhyānaṃ ca samāhātsyaṃ prakṛteḥ paṃcakaṃ mune |
kutūhalakaraṃ caiva śṛṇu muktividhāyakam || 69||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭādaśasāhasrayāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ vaiyāsikyāṃ samārādhanavidhāne'-
ṣṭamaskandhe devīpūjana nirūpaṇaṃ nāma caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 22 ||
naṃdāgnivasubhi: ( 839 ) padyadvaipāyanamukhacyutaiḥ |
devībhāgavatasyāsyāṣṭamaskaṃdha udīritaḥ || 1 ||
samāpto'yamaṣṭamaḥ skandhaḥ

śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ
śrīmaddevībhāgavatam
navamaḥ skandhaḥ
atha prathamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
gaṇeśajananī durgā rādhā lakṣmīḥ sarasvatī |
sāvitrī ca sṛṣṭividhau prakṛtiḥ paṃcadhā smṛtā ||1||
nārada uvāca
āvirbabhūva sā kena kā vā sā jñānināṃ vara |
kiṃ vā tallakṣaṇaṃ sādho babhūva paṃcadhā katham ||2||
sarvāsāṃ caritaṃ pūjāvidhānaṃ guṇa īpsitaḥ |
avatāraḥ kutra kasyāstanme vyākhyātumarhasi || 3 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
prakṛterlakṣaṇaṃ vatsa ko vā vaktuṃ kṣamo bhavet |
kiṃcittathāpi vakṣyāmi yacchrataṃ dharmavaktrataḥ || 4 ||
prakṛṣṭavācaka: praśca kṛtiśva sṛṣṭivācakaḥ |
sṛṣṭī prakṛṣṭā yā devī prakṛtiḥ sā prakīrtitā ||5||
guṇe sattve prakṛṣṭe ca praśabdo vartate śrutaḥ |
madhyame rajasi kṛśca tiśabdastamasi smṛtaḥ || 6 ||
prakṛtistena kathyate ||7||
triguṇātmaka svarūpā yā sā ca śaktisamanvitā | pradhānā sṛṣṭikaraṇe
prathame vartate praśca kṛtiśva sṛṣṭivācakaḥ |
sṛṣṭerādau ca yā devī prakṛtiḥ sā prakīrtitā ||8||
yogenātmā sṛṣṭividho dvidhārūpo babhūva sa |
pumāṃśca dakṣiṇārdhāṃgo vāmārdhā prakṛtiḥ smṛtā || 9 |
sā ca brahmasvarūpā ca nityā sā ca sanātanī |
yathātmā ca tathā śaktiryathāgno dāhikā sthitā || 10 ||
ataeva hi yogīṃdra : strīpuṃbhedo na manyate |
sarvaṃ brahmamayaṃ brahmañchaśvatsadapi nārada || 11 ||

svecchā mayasyecchayā ca śrīkṛṣṇasya sisṛkṣayā |
sā''virbabhūva sahasā mūlaprakṛtirīśvaro || 12||
tadājñayā paṃcavidhā sṛṣṭikarmavibhedikā |
atha bhaktānurodhādvā bhaktānugrahavigrahā || 13 ||
gaṇeśamātā durgā yā śivarūpā śivapriyā |
nārāyaṇī viṣṇumāyā pūrṇabrahmasvarūpiṇī || 14 ||
brahmādidevairmunibhirmanubhiḥ pūjitā stutā |
sarvādhiṣṭhātrī devī sā śarvarūpā sanātanī || 15 ||
dharma satyapuṇyakīrtiyaśomaṃgaladāyinī |
sukhamokṣaharṣadātrī śokārtiduḥ khanāśinī || 16||
śaraṇāgatadīnārtaparitrāṇaparāyaṇā |
tejaḥsvarūpā paramā tadadhiṣṭhātṛdevatā || 17 ||
sarvaśaktisvarūpā ca śaktirośasya saṃtatam |
siddheśvarī siddhirūpā siddhidā siddhirīśvarī || 18 ||
buddhinidrā kṣutpipāsā chāyā taṃdrā dayā smṛtiḥ |
jātiḥ kṣāṃtiśca bhrāṃtiśva śāṃtiḥ kāṃtiśca cetanā || 19||
tuṣṭiḥ puṣṭistathā lakṣmīrdhṛtirmāyā tathaiva ca |
sarvaśaktisvarūpā sā kṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ || 20||
uktaḥ śrutau śrutaguṇaścātisvalpo yathāgamam |
guṇo'styanaṃto'naṃtāyā aparāṃ ca niśāmaya || 21 ||
śuddhasattvasvarūpā yā padmā sā paramātmanaḥ |
sarva saṃpatsvarūpā sā tadadhiṣṭātṛdevatā || 22||
kāṃtā'tidāṃtā śāṃtā ca suśīlā sarvamaṃgalā |
lobhamohakāma roṣamadāhaṃkāravarjitā ||23||
bhaktānuraktā patyuśca sarvābhyaśca pativratā |
prāṇatulyā bhagavataḥ premapātraṃ priyaṃvadā ||24||
sarvasasyātmikā devī jīvanopāyarūpiṇī |
mahālakṣmīśca vaikuṃṭhe patisevāratā satī ||25||
svarge ca svargalakṣmīśca rājalakṣmīśca rājasu |
gṛheṣu gṛhalakṣmīśca martyānāṃ gṛhiṇāṃ tathā || 26 ||
sarvaprāṇiṣu dravyeṣu śobhārūpā manoharā |
kīrtirūpā puṇyavatāṃ prabhārūpā nṛpeṣu ca ||27||
vāṇijyarūpā vaṇijāṃ pāpināṃ kalahāṃkurā |
dayārūpā ca kathitā vedoktā sarvasaṃmatā || 28||
sarvapūjyā sarvavaṃdyā cānyāṃ matto niśāmaya |
vāgbuddhividyājñānādhiṣṭhātrī ca paramātmanaḥ ||29||
sarva vidyāsvarūpā yā sā ca devī sarasvatī |
sā buddhiḥ kavitā medhā pratibhā smṛtidā nṛṇām ||30|
nānāprakāra siddhāṃtabhedārthakalanā matā |
' byākhyābodhasvarūpā ca sarva saṃdehabhaṃjinī || 31 ||
vicārakāriṇī graṃthakāriṇī śaktirūpiṇī |
vyākhyābodhasvarūpā ca sarvasaṃdehabhaṃjinī || 32 ||
viṣayajñānavāgrūpā prativiśvopajīvinī |
vyākhyāvādakarī śāṃtā vīṇāpustakadhāriṇī || 33||
śuddhasattvasvarūpā ca suśīlā śrīharipriyā |
himacaṃdana kuṃdeṃdu kumudāṃbhoja sannibhā ||34||
yajaṃtī paramātmānaṃ śrīkṛṣṇaṃ ratnamālayā |
tapaḥsvarūpā tapasāṃ phaladātrī tapasvinām || 35 ||
siddhividyā svarūpā ca sarvasiddhipradā sadā |
yayā vinā tu viprogho mūko mṛtasamaḥ sadā || 36||
devī tṛtīyā gaditā śrutyuktā jagadaṃbikā |
yathāgamaṃ yathā kiṃcidaparāṃ tvaṃ nibodha me || 37||
mātā caturṇāṃ varṇānāṃ vedāṃgānāṃ ca chaṃdasām |
saṃdhyāvaṃdanamaṃtrāṇāṃ taṃtrāṇāṃ ca vicakṣaṇā || 38||
dvijātijātirūpā ca japarūpā tapasvinī |
brahmaṇyatejorūpā ca sarvasaṃskārarūpiṇī ||39||

pavitrarūpā sāvitrī gāyatrī brāhmaṇapriyā |
tīrthāni yasyāḥ saṃsparśaṃ vāṃchaṃti hyātmaśuddhaye || 40 ||
śuddhasattvasvarūpiṇī |
paramānaṃdarūpā ca paramā ca sanātanī || 41 ||
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśā śaktistadadhiṣṭhātṛdevatā ||42 ||
parabrahmasvarūpā ca nirvāṇapadadāyinī | brahmatejomayī
yatpādarajasā pūtaṃ jagatsarvaṃ ca nārada |
devī caturthī kathitā paṃcamīṃ varṇayāmi te ||43||
paṃcaprāṇādhidevī yā paṃcaprāṇasvarūpiṇī |
prāṇādhikapriyatamā sarvābhya: suṃdarī parā || 44 ||
sarvayuktā ca saubhāgyamāninī gauravānvitā |
vāmāṃgārdhasvarūpā ca guṇena tejasā samā ||45||
sanātanī |
paramānaṃdarūpā ca dhanyā mānyā ca pūjitā || 46 ||
parāvarā sārabhūtā paramādyā rāsamaṃḍalamaṃḍitā ||47||
rāsakrīḍādhidevī śrīkṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ | rāsamaṃḍalasaṃbhūtā
rāseśvarī surasikā rāsāvāsa nivāsinī |
golokavāsinī devī gopīveṣavidhāyikā ||48 ||
paramāhlādarūpā ca bhaktānugrahavigrahā |
vedānusāridhyānena vijñātā sā vicakṣaṇaḥ || 50 || saṃtoṣaharṣarūpiṇī |
nirguṇā ca nirākārā nirliptātmasvarūpiṇī ||49 |
nirīhā nirahaṃkārā nānālaṃkārabhūṣitā || 51 ||
dṛṣṭidṛṣṭā na sā keśaiḥ surendrairmunipuṃgavaḥ | vahniśuddhāṃśukadharā
śrīkṛṣṇabhaktidāsyaikakarā ca sarvasaṃpadām ||52||
koṭi caṃdrabhā puṣṭa sarvaśrīyuktavigrahā ca vasuṃdharā || 53 ||
avatāre ca vārāhe vṛṣabhānusutā ca yā | yatpādapadmasaṃsparśa pavitrā
brahmādibhiradṛṣṭā yā sarvairdṛṣṭā ca bhārate |
strīratnasārasaṃbhūtā kṛṣṇavakṣaḥsthale sthitā ||54 ||
yathāṃbare navaghane lolā saudāminī mune |
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi pratataṃ brahmaṇā purā || 55||
yatpādapadmanakharadṛṣṭaye cātmaśuddhaye |
na ca dṛṣṭaṃ ca svapnaṃ'pi pratyakṣasyāpi kā kathā || 56 ||
tenaiva tapasā dṛṣṭā bhuvi vṛṃdāvane vane |
kathitā paṃcamī devī sā rādhā ca prakīrtitā || 57 ||
aṃśarūpāḥ kalārūnā yāḥ kalāṃśāṃśasaṃbhavāḥ |
prakṛteḥ prativiśveṣu devyaśca sarvayoṣitaḥ || 58||
paripūrṇatamāḥ paṃca vidyādevyaḥ prakīrtitāḥ |
yā yā: pradhānāṃśarūpā varṇayāmi niśāmaya || 59 ||
pradhānāṃśasvarūpā sā gaṃgā bhuvanapāvanī |
viṣṇuvigrahasaṃbhūtā dravarūpā sanātanī || 60 ||
pāpipāpedhamadāhāya jvaladagnisvarūpiṇī |
sukhasparśā snānapānairnirvāṇapadadāyinī || 61 ||
golokasthānaprasthānasukhasopānarūpiṇī |
pavitrarūpā tīrthānāṃ saritāṃ ca parāvarā || 62 ||
śaṃbhumaulijaṭāmerumuktāpaṃktisvarūpiṇī |
tapaḥ saṃpādinī sadyo bhārateṣu tapasvinām ||63 ||
caṃdrapadmakṣīranibhā śuddhasattvasvarūpiṇī |
nirmalā nirahaṃkārā sādhvī nārāyaṇapriyā ||64||
pradhānāṃśasvarūpā ca tulasī viṣṇukāminī |
viṣṇubhūṣaṇarūpā ca viṣṇupādasthitā satī || 65 ||
tapaḥsaṃkalpa pūjādisaṃghasaṃpādinī mune |
sārabhūtā ca puṣpāṇāṃ pavitrā puṇyadā sadā || 66 ||
darśanasparśanābhyāṃ ca sadyo nirvāṇadāyinī |
kalau kaluṣaśuṣkedhmadahanāyāgnirūpiṇī || 67 ||

yatpādapadmasaṃsparśātsadya: pūtā vasundharā |
yatsparśadarśane caivecchati tīrthāni śuddhaye || 68 ||
yayā vinā ca viśveṣu sarvakarma ca niṣphalam |
mokṣadā yā mumukṣūṇāṃ kāminī sarvakāmadā || 69||
kalpavṛkṣasvarūpā yā bhārate vṛkṣarūpiṇī |
bhāratīnāṃ prīṇanāya jātā yā paradevatā || 70 ||
pradhānāṃśasvarūpā yā manasā kaśyapātmajā |
śaṃkarapriyaśiṣyā ca mahājñānaviśāradā || 71 ||
nāgeśvarasthānaṃ tasya bhaginī nāgapūjitā |
nāgeśvarī nāgamātā suṃdarī nāgavāhinī || 72 ||
nāgeṃdragaṇasaṃyuktā nāgabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā |
nāgeṃdravaṃditā siddhā yoginī nāgaśāyinī || 73 ||
viṣṇurūpā viṣṇubhaktā viṣṇupūjāparāyaṇā |
tapaḥsvarūpā tapasāṃ phaladātrī tapasvinī ||74||
divyaṃ trilakṣavarṣaṃ ca tapastaptvā ca yā hareḥ |
tapasvinīṣu pūjyā ca tapasviṣu ca bhārate || 75||
sarvamaṃtrādhidevī ca jvalaṃtī brahmatejasā |
brahmasvarūpā paramā brahmabhāvanatatparā || 76 ||
jaratkārumune: patnī kṛṣṇāṃśasya pativratā |
āstīkasya munermātā pravarasya tapasvinām ||77||
pradhānāṃśasvarūpā yā devasenā ca nārada |
mātṛkāsu pūjyatamāsā ṣaṣṭhī ca prakīrtitā || 78 ||
putrapautrādidātrī ca dhātrī trijagatāṃ satī |
ṣaṣṭhāṃśarūpā prakṛtestena ṣaṣṭhī prakīrtitā || 79 ||
sthāne śiśūnāṃ paramā vṛddharūpā ca yoginī |
pūjā dvādaśamāseṣu yasyā viśveṣu saṃtatam ||80||
pūjā ca mūtikāgāre purā paṣṭhadine śiśoḥ |
ekaviṃśatime caiva pūjā kalyāṇa hetukī || 81 ||
munibhirnamitā caṃpā nityakāmāpyataḥ parāḥ |
mātṛkā ca dayārūpā śaśvadrakṣaṇakāriṇī || 82 ||
jale sthale cāṃtarikṣe śiśūnāṃ sadmagocare |
pradhānāṃśasvarūpā ca devī maṃḍalacaṃḍikā || 83 ||
prakṛtermukhasaṃbhūtā sarvamaṃgaladā sadā |
sṛṣṭau maṃgalarūpā ca saṃhāre koparūpiṇī || 84 ||
tena maṃgalacaṃḍī sā paṃḍitaiḥ parikīrtitā |
pratimaṃgalavāreṣu prativiśveṣu pūjitā || 85 ||
putrapautradhanaiśvaryayaśomaṃgaladāyinī |
parituṣṭā sarvavāṃchāpradātrī sarvayoṣitām || 86 ||
ruṣṭā kṣaṇena saṃhartuṃ śaktā viśvaṃ maheśvarī |
pradhānāṃśasvarūpā sā kālī kamalalocanā || 87||
durgālalāṭasaṃbhūtā raṇe śuṃbhaniśubhayoḥ |
durgārdhāṃśasvarūpā sā guṇena tejasā samā ||88||
koṭisūryasamājuṣṭapuṣṭajājvalavigrahā |
pradhānā sarvaśaktīnāṃ balā balavatī parā || 89 ||
sarvasiddhipradā devī ṣaramā yogarūpiṇī |
kṛṣṇabhaktā kṛṣṇatulyāṃ tejasā vikramairguṇaiḥ ||90 ||
kṛṣṇabhāvanayā śaśvatkṛṣṇavarṇā sanātanī |
saṃhartuṃ sarvabrahmāṇḍaṃ śaktā niśvāsamātrataḥ || 91 ||
raṇaṃ daityaiḥ samaṃ tasyāḥ krīḍayā lokaśikṣayā |
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṃśca dātuṃ śaktā ca pūjitā || 92 ||
brahmādibhiḥ stūyamānā munibhirmanubhirnaraiḥ |
pradhānāṃśasvarūpā sā prakṛteśva vasuṃdharā ||93 ||
ādhārarūpā sarveṣāṃ sarvasasyā prakīrtitā |
ratnākarā ratnagarbhā sarvaratnākarāśrayā || 14 ||
prajābhiśca prajeśaiśca pūjitā vaṃditā sadā |
sarvopajīvyarūpā ca sarva saṃpadvidhāyinī || 95||

yayā vinā jagatsarvaṃ nirādhāraṃ carācaram |
prakṛteśva kalā yā yāstā nibodha munīśvara || 96 ||
yasya yasya ca yā patnī tatsarvaṃ varṇayāmi te |
svāhādevī vahnipatnī prativiśveṣu pūjitā ||97||
yayā vinā havirdānaṃ na grahītuṃ surāḥ kṣamāḥ |
dakṣiṇā yajñapatnī ca dīkṣā sarvatra pūjitā || 98 ||
yayā vinā hi viśveṣu sarvakarma hi niṣphalam |
svadhā pitṝṇāṃ patnī ca munibhirmanubhirnaraiḥ ||99 ||
pūjitā pitṛdānaṃ hi niṣphalaṃ ca yayā vinā |
svastidevī vāyupatnī prativiśveṣu pūjitā ||100 ||
ādānaṃ ca pradānaṃ ca niṣphalaṃ ca yayā vinā |
puṣṭirgaṇapateḥ patnī pūjitā jagatītale || 101 ||
yayā vinā kṣīṇāḥ pumāṃso yoṣito'pi ca |
anaṃtapatnī tuṣṭiśca pūjitā vaṃditā bhavet || 102 ||
yathā vinā na saṃtuṣṭāḥ sarvalokāśca sarvataḥ |
īśānapatnī saṃpattiḥ pūjitā ca surainaraiḥ || 103 ||
sarve lokā daridrāśca viśveṣu ca yayā vinā |
dhṛtiḥ kapilapatnī ca sarvaiḥ sarvatra pūjitā || 104 ||
sarve lokā adhairyāśva jagatsu ca yayā vinā |
satyapatnī satī muktaiḥ pūjitā ca jagatpriyā || 105 ||
yayā vinā bhavelloko baṃdhutārahitaḥ sadā |
mohapatnī dayā sādhvī pūjitā ca jagatpriyā || 106 ||
sarve lokāśca sarvatra niṣphalāśca yayā vinā |
puṇyapatnī pratiṣṭhā sā pūjitā puṇyadā sadā || 107 ||
yayā vinā jagatsarvaṃ jīvanmṛtasamaṃ mune |
sukarmapatnī saṃsiddhā kīrtirdhanyaiśca pūjitā || 108 ||
yayā vinā jagatsarvaṃ yaśohīnaṃ mṛtaṃ yathā |
kriyā tudyogapatnī ca pūjitā sarvasaṃmatā || 109 ||
yayā vinā jagatsarvaṃ vidhihīnaṃ ca nārada |
adharmapatnī mithyā sā sarvadhūrteśca pūjitā || 110 ||
yayā vinā jagatsarvamucchinnaṃ vidhinirmitam |
satye adarśanā yā ca tretāyāṃ sūkṣmarūpiṇī || 111 ||
ardhāvayavarūpā ca dvāpare caiva saṃvṛtā |
kalau mahāpragalbhā ca sarvatra vyāpikā balāt || 112 || ||
kapaṭena samaṃ bhrātrā bhramate ca gṛhe gṛhe |
śāṃtirlajjā ca bhārye dve suśīlasya ca pūjite || 113 ||
yābhyāṃ vinā jagatsarvamunmattamiva nārada |
jñānasya tisro bhāryāśca buddhirmedhādhṛtistathā || 114 ||
yābhirvinā jagatsarvaṃ mūḍhaṃ mattasamaṃ sadā |
mūrtiśca dharmapatnī sāṃ kāṃtirūpā manoharā || 115 ||
paramātmā ca viśvaugho nirādhāro yayā vinā |
sarvatra śobhārūpā ca lakṣmīrmūrtimatī satī || 116 ||
śrīrūpā mūrtirūpā ca mānyā dhanyā'tipūjitā | kālāgnī rudrapatnī ca nidrā sā siddhayoginī 1975
sarve lokāḥ samācchannā yayā yogena rātriṣu |
kālasya tisro bhāryāśva saṃdhyārātridināni ca 118 ||
yābhirvinā vidhātā ca saṃkhyāṃ kartuṃ na śakyate |
kṣutpipāse lobhabhārye dhanye mānye ca pūjite || 119 ||
yābhyāṃ vyāptaṃ jagatsarvaṃ nityaṃ ciṃtāturaṃ bhavet |
prabhā ca dāhikā caiva dve bhāyeṃ tejasastathā || 120 ||
yābhyāṃ vinā jagatsraṣṭuṃ vidhātuṃ ca nahīśvaraḥ |
kālakanye mṛtyujare prajvārasya priyāpriye || 121 ||
yābhyāṃ jagatsamucchinnaṃ vidhātrā nirmitaṃ vidhau |
nidrā kanyā ca taṃdrā sā prītiranyā sukhapriye 122 || ."
yābhyāṃ vyāptaṃ jagatsarvaṃ vidhiputra vidhevidho |
vairāgyasya ca dve bhārye śraddhā bhaktiśca pūjite || 123 ||

yābhyāṃ śaśvajjagatsarvaṃ yajjīvanmuktimanmune |
aditirdevamātā ca surabhī ca gavāṃ prasūḥ || 124||
ditiśca daityajananī kadraśva vinatā danuḥ |
upayuktā sṛṣṭividhau etāstu kīrtitāḥ kalāḥ || 125 || |
kalā anyāḥ saṃti bahvayastāsu kāści nibodha me |
rohiṇī caṃdrapatnī ca saṃjñā sūryasya kāminī || 126||
śatarūpā manorbhāryā śacīṃdrasya ca gehinī |
tārā bṛhaspaterbhāryā vasiṣṭhasyāpyaruṃdhatī || 127||
ahalyā gautamastrī sā'pyanasūyā'trikāminī |
devahūto kardamasya prasūtirdakṣakāminī || 128 ||
pitṝṇāṃ mānasī kanyā menakā sāṃbikāprasūḥ |
lopāmudrā tathā kuntī kuberakāminī tathā || 129 ||
varuṇānī prasiddhā ca balevindhyāvalistathā |
kāṃtā ca damayaṃtī ca yaśodā devakī tathā || 130 ||
gāṃdhārī draupadī śaivyā sā ca satyavatī priyā |
vṛṣabhānupriyā sādhvī rādhāmātā kulodvahā || 131 ||
maṃdodarī ca kausalyā subhadrā kauravī tathā |
revatī satyabhāmā ca kālindī lakṣmaṇā tathā || 132||
jāṃbavatī nāgnajitimitraviṃdā tathā'parā |
lakṣmaṇā rukmiṇī sītā svayaṃ lakṣmīḥ prakīrtitā ||
kālī yājanagaṃdhā ca vyāsamātā mahāsatī |
bāṇaputrī tathoṣā ca citralekhā ca tatsakhī || 134||
prabhāvatī bhānumatī tathā māyāvatī satī |
reṇukā ca bhṛgormātā rāmamātā ca rohiṇī 135 ||
ekanaṃdā ca durgā sā śrīkṛṣṇa bhaginī satī |
vahvayaḥ satyaḥ kalāścaiva prakṛtereva bhārate || 136||
yā yāśca grāmadevyaḥ syustāḥ sarvāḥ prakṛteḥ kalāḥ |
kalāṃśāṃśasamudbhūtāḥ prativiśveṣu yoṣitaḥ || 137||
yoṣitāmavamānena prakṛteśva parābhavaḥ |
brāhmaṇī pūjitā yena patiputravatī satī || 138 ||
prakṛtiḥ pūjitā tena vastrālaṃkāracaṃdanaiḥ |
kumārī cāṣṭavarṣā yā vastrālaṃkāracaṃdanaiḥ ||139||
pūjitā yena viprasya prakṛtistena pūjitā |
sarvāḥ prakṛtisaṃbhūtā uttamādhamamadhyamāḥ || 140||
sattvāṃśāścottamā jñeyāḥ suśīlāśca pativratāḥ |
madhyamā rajasaścāṃśāstāśca bhogyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ ||
sukhasaṃbhogavaśyāśca svakārye tatparāḥ sadā |
adhamāstamasaścāṃśā ajñātakulasaṃbhavāḥ || 142 ||
durmukhāḥ kulahā dhūrtā: svataṃtrā : kalahapriyāḥ |
pṛthivyāṃ kulaṭā yāśca svarge cāpsarasāṃ gaṇāḥ || 143||
prakṛtestamasaścāṃśāḥ puṃścalyaḥ parikīrtitāḥ |
evaṃ nigaditaṃ sarvaṃ prakṛte rūpavarṇanam || 144||
tāḥ sarvāḥ pūjitāḥ pṛthvyāṃ puṇyakṣetre ca bhārate |
pūjitā surathenādau durgā durgātināśinī || 145 ||
tataḥ śrīrāmacandreṇa rāvaṇasya vadhārthinā |
tatpaścājjagatāṃ mātā triṣu lokeṣu pūjitā || 146||
jātādau dakṣakanyā yā nihatya daityadānavān |
tato dehaṃ parityajya yajñe bhartuśca niṃdayā || 147||
jajñe himavataḥ patnyāṃ lebhe paśupati patim |
gaṇeśaśca svayaṃ kṛṣṇaḥ skaṃdo viṣṇukalodbhavaḥ 148|| |
babhūvatustau tanayo paścāttasyāśca nārada |
lakṣmī maṃgalabhūpena prathamaṃ paripūjitā || 149 ||
triṣu lokeṣu tatpaścāddevatāmunimānavaiḥ |
sāvitrī cāśvapatinā prathamaṃ paripūjitā || 150 ||
tatpaścāttriṣu lokeṣu devatāmunipuṃgavaḥ |
ādī sarasvato devī brahmaṇā paripūjitā || 151 ||

tatpaścāttriṣu lokeṣu devatāmunipuṅgavaiḥ |
prathamaṃ pūjitā rādhā goloke rāsamaṃḍale || 152 ||
paurṇamāsyāṃ kārtikasya kṛṣṇena paramātmanā |
gopikābhiśca gopaiśca bālikābhiśca bālakaiḥ 153 ||
gavāṃ gaṇaiḥ surabhyā ca tatpaścādājñayā hareḥ |
tadā brahmādibhirdevairmunibhiḥ parayā bhudā || 154 ||
puṣpadhūpādibhirbhaktyā pūjitā vaṃditā sadā |
pṛthivyāṃ prathamaṃ devī suyajñenaiva pūjitā || 155 ||
śaṃkareṇopadiṣṭena puṇyakṣetre ca bhārate |
triṣu lokeṣu tatpaścādājñayā paramātmanaḥ || 156 ||
puṣpadhūpādibhirbhaktyā pūjitā munibhiḥ sadā |
kalāyā yāḥ samudbhūtāḥ pūjitāstāśca bhārate 157 ||
pūjitā grāmadevyaśva grāme ca nagare mune |
evaṃ te kathitaṃ sarvaṃ prakṛteścaritaṃ śubham ||
yathāgamaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ ca kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 158 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 ||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
samāsena śrutaṃ sarvaṃ devīnāṃ caritaṃ prabho |
vibodhanāya bodhasya vyāsena vaktumarhasi || 1 ||
sṛṣṭerādyā sṛṣṭividhau kathamāvirbabhūva ha |
kathaṃ vā paṃcadhā bhūtā vada vedavidāṃvara || 2 ||
bhūtā yayāṃśakalayā tathā triguṇayā bhave |
vyāsena tāsāṃ caritaṃ śrotumicchāmi sāṃpratam ||3|
tāsāṃ janmānukathanaṃ pūjādhyānavidhi budha |
stotraṃ kavaca maiśvarya śaurya varṇaya maṃgalam ||4||
śrānārāyaṇa uvāca
nitya ātmā nabho nityaṃ kālo nityo diśo yathā |
viśvānāṃ golakaṃ nityaṃ nityo goloka eva ca ||
tadekadeśo vaikuṇṭho namrabhāgānusārakaḥ |
tathaiva prakṛtinityā brahmalīlā sanātanī ||6||
yathāgnau dāhikā caṃdre padma śobhā prabhā ravī |
śaśvadyuktā na bhinnā sā yathā prakṛtirātmani ||7||
vinā svarṇa svarṇakāra: kuṃḍalaṃ kartumakṣamaḥ |
vinā mṛdā ghaṭaṃ kaṃrtuṃ kulālo hi na hīśvaraḥ ||8||
na hi kṣamastathātmā ca sṛṣṭi sraṣṭuṃ tayā vinā |
sarvaśaktisvarūpā sā yayā ca śaktimānsadā ||9||
aiśvaryavacanaḥ śaśca ktiḥ parākrama eva ca |
tatsvarūpā tayordātrī sā śaktiḥ parikīrtitā || 10 ||
jñānaṃ samṛddhi: saṃpattiryaśaścaiva balaṃ bhagaḥ |
tena śaktirbhagavatī bhagarūpā ca sā sadā || 11 ||
tayā yuktaḥ sadātmā ca bhagavāṃstena kathyate |
sa ca svecchāmayo devaḥ sākāraśca nirākṛtiḥ || 12||
tejorūpaṃ nirākāraṃ dhyāyaṃte yoginaḥ sadā |
vadaṃti ca paraṃ brahma paramānaṃdamīśvaram ||13||
adṛśyaṃ sarvadraṣṭāraṃ sarvajñaṃ sarvakāraṇam |
sarvadaṃ sarvarūpaṃ taṃ vaiṣṇavāstanna manvate || 14 ||
vadanti caiva te kasya tejastejasvinā vinā |
tejomaṃḍalamadhyasthaṃ brahma tejasvinaṃ param ||15||
svecchāmayaṃ sarvarūpaṃ sarvakāraṇakāraṇam |
atīva sundaraṃ rūpaṃ vibhrataṃ sumanoharam ||16||

śyāmavigraham ||17||
kiśoravayasaṃ śāṃtaṃ sarvakāṃtaṃ parātparam | navīnanīradābhāsadhāmaikaṃ
śaranmadhyāhnapadmauṣaśobhāmocanalocanam |
muktācchavivinidyaikadaṃta paṃktimanoramam || 18 ||
mayūrapicchacūḍaṃ ca mālatīmālyamaṃḍitam |
sunasaṃ sasmitaṃ kāṃtaṃ bhaktānugrahakāraṇam ||19||
jvaladagniviśuddhakapītāṃśukasuśobhitam |
dvibhujaṃ muralīhastaṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitam ||20||
sarvādhāraṃ ca sarveśaṃ sarvaśaktiyutaṃ vibhum |
sarvaiśvaryapradaṃ sarvasvataṃtra sarvamaṃgalam ||21||
paripūrṇatamaṃ siddhaṃ siddheśaṃ siddhikārakam |
dhyāyaṃte vaiṣṇavā śaśvaddevadevaṃ sanātanam ||22||
janmamṛtyujarāvyādhiśokabhītiharaṃ param |
brahmaṇo vayasā yasya nimeṣa upacaryate ||23||
sa cātmā sa paraṃ brahma kṛṣṇa ityabhidhīyate |
kṛṣistadbhaktivacano naśca taddāsyavācakaḥ ||24||
bhaktidāsyapradātā yaḥ sa ca kṛṣṇaḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
kṛṣiśca sarvavacano nakāro bījameva ca || 25 ||
sa kṛṣṇaḥ sarvasraṣṭā''do sisṛkṣaneka eva ca |
sṛṣṭayunmukhastadaṃśena kālena preritaḥ prabhuḥ ||26||
svecchāmayaḥ svecchayā ca dvidhārūpo babhūva ha |
strīrūpo vāmabhāgāṃśo dakṣiṇāṃśaḥ pumānsmṛtaḥ ||27|
tāṃ dadarśa mahākāmī kāmādhārāṃ sanātanaḥ |
atīva kamanīyāṃ ca cārupaṃkajasannibhām ||28||
caṃdrabiṃba vinidyaka nitaṃbayugalāṃ parām | sucārukadalīstaṃbhaniditaśroṇisundarīm
yuktaśrīphalākārastanayugmamanoramām |
puṣpajuṣṭāṃ suvalitāṃ madhyakṣīṇāṃ manoharām ||30||
atīva suṃdarīṃ śāṃtāṃ sasmitāṃ vakralocanām |
vahniśuddhāṃ śukādhānāṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām ||31||
śaśvaccakṣuśca ko rābhyāṃ pivaṃtī satataṃ mudā |
kṛṣṇasya mukhacaṃdraṃ ca caṃdrakoṭiviniṃdatam ||32||
kastūrī vindunā vindunā sāīmadhaścaṃdanabiṃdunā |
samaṃ siṃdūra biddhuṃ ca bhālamadhye ca bibhratīm ||33||
vakramaṃ kavarībhāraṃ mālatīmālyabhūṣitam |
ratnedrasārahāraṃ ca dadhatīṃ kāṃtakāmukīm ||34||
koṭicaṃdraprabhāmṛṣṭapuṣṭaśobhāsamanvitām |
gamanena rājahaṃsagajagarvavināśinīm ||35||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ tu tayā sārdhaṃ rāseśo rāsamaṃḍale |
rāsollāme surasiko rāsakrīḍāṃ cakāra ha || 36 ||
nānāprakāraśṛṃgāraṃ śṛṅgāro mūrtimāniva |
cakāra sukhasaṃbhogaṃ yāvadvai brahmaṇo dinam ||37||
tataḥ sa ca pariśrāṃtastasyā yonau jagatpitā |
cakāra vīryādhānaṃ ca nityānaṃde śubhekṣaṇe ||38||
gātrato yoṣitastasyāḥ suratāṃte ca suvrata |
niḥsasāra śramajalaṃ śrāṃtāyāstejasā hareḥ ||39||
mahākramaṇa kliṣṭāyā niḥśvāsaśca babhūva ha |
tadābabre śramajalaṃ tatsarvaṃ viśvagolakam ||40 ||
sa ca niśvāsavāyuśca sarvādhāro babhūva ha |
niśvāsavāyuḥ sarveṣāṃ jīvināṃ ca bhaveṣu ca ||41 ||
vabhūva mūrtimadvāyorvāmāṃgātpramāṇavallabhā |
tatpatnī sā ca tatputrāḥ prāṇāḥ paṃca ca jīvinām 42 ||
prāṇo'pānaḥ samānaśvodānavyānau ca vāyavaḥ |
babhūvureva tatputrā adhaḥ prāṇāśca paṃca ca ||43||
dharmatoyādhidevaśca babhūva varuṇo mahān |
tadvāmāṅgācca tatpatnī varuṇānī babhūva sā ||44||

atha sā kṛṣṇacicchaktiḥ kṛṣṇagabhaṃ dadhāra ha |
śatamanvaṃtaraṃ yāvajjvalaṃtī brahmatejasā ||45||
kṛṣṇaprāṇādhidevī sā kṛṣṇaprāṇādhikapriyā |
kṛṣṇasya saṃginī śaśvat kṛṣṇavakṣaḥsthalasthitā ||46 ||
śatamanvaṃtarāṃte ca kāle'tīte tu suṃdarī |
suṣāva ḍimbhaṃ svarṇābhaṃ viśvādhārālayaṃ param ||47||
dṛṣṭā ḍibhaṃ ca sā devī hṛdayena vyadūyata |
utsasarja ca kopena brahmāṇḍagolake jale ||48||
dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇaśca tattyāgaṃ hāhākāraṃ cakāra ha |
śaśāpa devīṃ deveśastatkṣaṇaṃ ca yathocitam ||49||
yato'patyaṃ tvayā tyaktaṃ kopaśīle ca niṣṭhure |
bhava tvamanapatyā'pi cādyaprabhṛti niścitam || 50 ||
yā yāstvadaṃśarūpāśca bhaviṣyati surastriyaḥ |
anapatyāśca tāḥ sarvāstvatsamā nityayauvanāḥ ||51||
etasminnatare devī jihvāgrātsahasā tataḥ |
āvirbabhūva kanyaikā śuklavarṇā manoharā || 52 ||
śvetavastraparīdhānā vīṇāpustakadhāriṇī |
ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣāḍhyā sarvaśāstrādhidevatā || 53 ||
atha kātare sā ca dvidhārūpā vabhūva ha |
vāmārdhāṃgācca kamalā dakṣiṇārdhācca rādhikā 54 ||
etasminnaṃtare kṛṣṇo dvidhārūpo babhūva saḥ |
dakṣiṇārdhaśca dvibhujo vāmārdhaśca caturbhujaḥ ||55||
uvāca vāṇīṃ kṛṣṇastāṃ tvamasya kāminī bhava |
atraiva māninī rādhā tava bhadraṃ bhaviṣyati || 56 ||
evaṃ lakṣmī ca pradadau tuṣṭo nārāyaṇāya ca |
sa jagāma ca vaikuṃṭhe tābhyāṃ sārdhaṃ jagatpatiḥ || 57||
anapatye ca te dve ca jāte rātrāṃśasaṃbhave |
bhūtā nārāyaṇāṃgācca pārṣadāśca caturbhujāḥ || 58 ||
tejasā vayasā rūpaguṇābhyāṃ ca samā hareḥ |
babhūvuḥ kamalāṃgācca dāsīkoṭayaśca tatsamāḥ ||59 ||
atha golokanāthasya lomnāṃ vivarato mune |
bhūtāścāsaṃkhyagopāśca vayasā tejasā samāḥ || 60||
rūpeṇa ca guṇenaiva balena vikrameṇa ca |
prāṇatulyapriyāḥ sarve vabhūvuḥ pārṣadā vibhoḥ ||61||
rādhāṃgalomakūpebhyo babhūvurgopakanyakāḥ |
rādhātulyāśca tāḥ sarvā rādhādāsyaḥ priyaṃvadāḥ || 62 ||
ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣāḍhyāḥ śaśvatsu sthirayovanāḥ |
anapatyāśca tāḥ sarvāḥ puṃsaḥ śāpena saṃtatam ||63 ||
etasminnaṃtare vipra sahasā kṛṣṇadevatā |
āvirbabhūva durgā sā viṣṇumāyā sanātanī ||64 ||
devī nārāyaṇīśānā sarvaśaktisvarūpiṇī |
buddhyadhiṣṭātrī devī sā kṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ || 65 |
devīnāṃ bījarūpā ca mūlaprakṛtirīśvarī |
paripūrṇatamā teja: svarūpā triguṇātmikā || 66 ||
taptakāṃcanavarṇābhā koṭisūryasamaprabhā |
īṣaddhāsya prasannāsyā sahasrabhujasaṃyutā || 67 ||
nānāśastrāstranikaraṃ bibhratī sā trilocanā |
bahniśuddhāṃ śukādhānā ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā || 68 ||
yasyāścāṃśāṃśakalayā babhūvuḥ sarvayoṣitaḥ |
sarve viśvasthitā lokā mohitāḥ syuśca māyayā || 69||
sarvaśvaryapradātrī ca kāmināṃ gṛhavāsinām |
kṛṣṇa bhaktipradā yā ca vaiṣṇavānāṃ ca vaiṣṇavī || 70 ||
mumukṣūṇāṃ mokṣadātrī sukhināṃ sukhadāyinī |
svargeṣu svargalakṣmīśca gṛhalakṣmīrgṛheṣu ca || 71 || ||71||
tapasviṣu tapasyā ca śrīrūpā tu nṛpeṣu ca |
yā vahnau dāhikārūpā prabhārūpā ca bhāskare ||72||

śobhārūpā ca caṃdre ca sā padmeṣu ca śobhanā |
sarvaśaktisvarūpā yā śrīkṛṣṇe paramātmani ||73||
yayā ca śaktimānātmā yayā ca śakti majjagat |
yayā vinā jagatsarvaṃ jīvanmṛtamiva sthitam ||74||
yāca saṃsāravṛkṣasya bījarūpā sanātanī |
sthitirūpā buddhirūpā phalarūpā ca nārada || 75 ||
kṣutpipāsādayārūpā nidrā taṃdrā kṣamā matiḥ |
śāṃtilajjātuṣṭipuṣṭibhrāṃtikāṃtyādirūpiṇī ||76||
sā ca saṃstūya sarveśaṃ tatparaḥ samuvāsa ha |
ratnasiṃhāsanaṃ tasyai pradadau rādhikeśvara: || 77 ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra sastrīkaśca caturmukhaḥ |
padmanābhernābhipadmānniḥ sasāra mahāmune || 78 ||
kamaṃḍaludharaḥ śrīmāṃstapasvī jñānināṃ varaḥ |
caturmukhaistaṃ tuṣṭāva prajvalanbrahmatejasā ||79||
sā tadā suṃdarī sṛṣṭā śata caṃdrasamaprabhā |
vahniśuddhāṃ śukādhānā ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣaṇā || 80 ||
ratnasiṃhāsane ramye saṃstūya sarvakāraṇam |
utrāsa svāminā sārdhaṃ kṛṣṇasya purato mudā || 81 ||
etasminnaṃtare kṛṣṇo dvidhārūpo babhūva saḥ |
vāmārdhāṃgo mahādevo dakṣiṇe gopikāpatiḥ || 82||
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśaḥ śatakoṭiraviprabhaḥ |
triśūlapaṭṭiśadharo vyāghracarmāṃvaro haraḥ || 83 ||
taptakāṃcanavarṇābho . jaṭābhāradharaḥ paraḥ |
bhasmabhūṣitagātraśca sasmitaścaṃdraśekharaḥ ||84||
digaṃbaro nīlakaṃṭha : sarpabhūṣaṇabhūṣitaḥ |
bibhradakṣiṇahastena ratnamālāṃ susaṃskṛtām ||85||
prajapanpaṃcavaktreṇa brahmajyotiḥ sanātanam |
satyasvarūpaṃ śrīkṛṣṇaṃ paramātmānamīśvaram ||86||
kāraṇaṃ kāraṇānāṃ ca sarvamaṃgalamaṃgalam |
janmamṛtyurājavyādhiśokabhītiharaṃ param ||87||
saṃstūya mṛtyormṛtyuṃ taṃ yato mṛtyuṃjayābhidhaḥ |
ratnasiṃhāsane ramye samṛvāsa hareḥ puraḥ ||88||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
atha ḍiṃbho jale tiṣṭanyāvadvai brahmaṇo vayaḥ |
tataḥ sa kāle sahasā dvidhābhūtā babhūva ha || 1 ||
tanmadhye śiśu rekaśca śatakoṭiraviprabhaḥ |
kṣaṇaṃ rorūyamāṇaśca stanāṃdha : pīḍitaḥ kṣudhā ||2||
pitrā mātrā parityakto jalamadhye nirāśrayaḥ |
brahmāṃḍāsaṃkhyanātho yo dadarśordhvamanāthavat ||3||
sthūlātsthūlatamaḥ so'pi nāmnā devo mahāvirāṭ |
paramāṇuryathā sūkṣmātparaḥ sthūlāttathā'pyasau || 4 ||
tejasā ṣoḍaśāṃśo'yaṃ kṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ |
ādhāraḥ sarvaviśvānāṃ mahāviṣṇuśca prākṛtaḥ ||5||
pratyekaṃ lomakūpeṣu viśvāni nikhilāni ca |
asyāpi teṣāṃ saṃkhyāṃ ca kṛṣṇo vaktuṃ na hi kṣamaḥ || 6 ||
saṃkhyā cedrajasāmasti viśvānāṃ na kadācana |
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīnāṃ tathā saṃkhyā na vidyate ||7||
prativiśveṣu saṃtyevaṃ brahmaviṣṇuśivādayaḥ |
pātālādbrahmalokāṃtaṃ brahmāṃḍaṃ parikīrtitam ||8||

tata ūrdhvaṃ ca vaikuṃṭho brahmāṃḍādbahireva saḥ |
tata ūrdhvaṃ ca golokaḥ paṃcāśatkoṭiyojanaḥ ||9||
nityaḥ satyasvarūpaśca yathā kṛṣṇastathāpyayam |
saptadvīpamitā pṛthvī saptasārasaṃyutā || 10||
ūnapaṃcāśadupaṭṭīpāsaṃkhyaśailavanānvitā |
ūrdhvaṃ sapta svargalokā brahmalokasamanvitāḥ || 11||
pātālāni ca saptādhaścaivaṃ brahmāṃḍameva ca |
ūrdhvaṃ dharāyā bhūrloko bhuvarlokastataḥ param || 12||
tataḥ paraśca svarloko janalokastathāparaḥ |
tata: parastapolokaḥ satyalokastataḥ paraḥ ||13||
tataḥ paraṃ brahmalokastaptakāṃcanasannibhaḥ |
evaṃ sarvaṃ kṛtrimaṃ ca bāhyābhyaṃtarameva ca || 14 ||
tadvināśe vināśaśca sarveṣāmeva nārada |
jalabudbudavatsarvaṃ viśvasaṃghama nityakam || 15||
" nityo golokavaikuṃṭhau proktau śaśvadakṛtrimī |
pratyekaṃ lomakūpeṣu brahmāṃḍaṃ pariniścitam ||16||
eṣāṃ saṃkhyāṃ na jānāti kṛṣṇo'nyasyāpi kā kathā |
pratyekaṃ pratibṛhmāṃḍaṃ brahmaviṣṇuśivādayaḥ || 17||
tisraḥ koṭyaḥ surāṇāṃ ca saṃkhyā sarvatra putraka |
digīśāścaiva dikpālā nakṣatrāṇi grahādayaḥ || 18 ||
bhuvi varṇāśca catvāro'pyadho nāgāścarācarāḥ |
atha kālena sa virāḍūdhvaṃ dṛṣṭvā punaḥ punaḥ ||19||
ḍiṃbhāṃtare ca śūnyaṃ hi dvitīyaṃ ca na kiṃcana |
ciṃtāmavāpa kṣudyukto ruroda ca punaḥ punaḥ || 20 ||
jñānaṃ prāpya tadā dadhyo kṛṣṇaṃ paramapūruṣam |
tato dadarśa tatraiva brahmajyotiḥ sanātanam ||21||
navīna jaladaśyāmaṃ dvibhujaṃ pītavāsasam |
sasmitaṃ muralīhastaṃ bhaktānugrahakātaram ||22||
jahāsa bālakastuṣṭo dṛṣṭvā janakamīśvaram |
varaṃ tadā dadau tasmai vareśaḥ samayocitam ||23||
matsamo jñānayuktaśca kṣutpipāsādivarjitaḥ |
brahmāṃḍāsaṃkhyanilayo bhava vatsa layāvadhi || 24||
niṣkāmo nirbhayaścaiva sarveṣāṃ varado bhava |
jarāmṛtyurogaśoka pīḍādirvājato bhava || 25 ||
ityuktvā tasya karṇe sa mahāmaṃtraṃ ṣaḍakṣaram |
triḥ kṛtvaśca prajajāpa vedāṃgapravaraṃ param ||26||
praṇavādicaturthyataṃ kṛṣṇa ityakṣaradryam |
vahnijāṃ yāṃtamiṣṭaṃ ca sarvavighnaharaṃ param ||27||
maṃtraṃ dattvā tadāhāraṃ kalpayāmāsa vai vibhuḥ |
śrūyatāṃ tadbrahmaputra nibodha kathayāmi te || 28||
prativiśvaṃ yannaivedyaṃ dadāti vaiṣṇavo janaḥ |
tatṣoḍaśāṃśo viṣayo viṣṇoḥ paṃcadaśāsya vai ||29||
nirguṇasyātmanaścaiva paripūrṇatamasya ca |
traivedye caiva kṛṣṇasya na hi kicitprayojanam || 30 ||
yadyaddadāti naivedyaṃ tasmai devāya yo janaḥ |
sa ca khādati tatsarvaṃ lakṣmīnātho virāṭ tathā || 31 ||
taṃ ca maṃtravaraṃ dattvā tamuvāca punarvibhuḥ |
varamanya kimiṣṭaṃ te tanme brūhi dadāmi ca ||32||
kṛṣṇasya vacanaṃ śrutvā tamuvāca virāḍ vibhuḥ |
kṛṣṇaṃ taṃ bālakastāvadvacanaṃ samayocitam || 33 ||
bālaka uvāca
varo me tvatpadāṃbhoje bhaktirbhavatu niścalā |
satataṃ yāvadāyurme kṣaṇaṃ vā suciraṃ ca vā || 34 ||

tvadbhaktiyukta loke'smiñjīvanmuktaśva saṃtatam |
tvadbhaktihīno mūrkhaśca jīvannapi mṛto hi saḥ ||35||
kiṃ tajjapena tapasā yajñena pūjanena ca |
vratena copavāsena puṇyena tīrthasevayā || 36 ||
kṛṣṇabhaktivihīnasya mūrkhasya jīvanaṃ vṛthā |
yenātmanā jīvitaśca tameva na hi manyate ||37||
yāvadātmā śarīre'sti tāvatsa śaktisaṃyutaḥ |
paścādyāṃti gate tasminsvataṃtrāḥ sarvaśaktayaḥ ||38||
sa ca tvaṃ ca mahābhāga sarvātmā prakṛteḥ paraḥ |
svecchāmayaśca sarvādyo brahmajyotiḥ sanātanaḥ ||39||
ityuktvā bālakastatra virarāma ca nārada |
uvāca kṛṣṇaḥ pratyukti madhurāṃ śrutisundarīm ||40 ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
suciraṃ susthiraṃ tiṣṭha yathā'haṃ tvaṃ tathā bhava |
brahmaṇo'saṃkhyapāte ca pātaste na bhaviṣyati || 41||
aṃśena pratibrahmāṃḍe tvaṃ ca kṣudravirāḍ bhava |
tvannābhipadmādbrahmā ca viśvasraṣṭā bhaviṣyati || 42 ||
lalāṭe brahmaṇaścaiva rudrācaikādaśaiva te |
śivāṃśena bhaviṣyati sṛṣṭisaṃharaṇāya vai || 43||
kālāgnirudrasteṣveko viśvasaṃhārakārakaḥ |
pātā viṣṇuśca viṣayī rudrāṃśena bhaviṣyati || 44||
madbhaktiyuktaḥ satataṃ bhaviṣyati vareṇa me |
dhyānena kamanīyaṃ māṃ nityaṃ drakṣyasi niścitam 45||
mātaraṃ kamanīyāṃ ca mama vakṣaḥsthalasthitām |
yāmi lokaṃ tiṣṭha vatsetyuktvā soṃtaradhīyata ||46 ||
gatvā svalokaṃ brahmāṇaṃ śaṃkaraṃ samuvāca ha |
sraṣṭāraṃ sraṣṭumīśaṃ ca saṃhatuṃ caiva tatkṣaṇam ||47||
śrībhagavānuvāca
sṛṣṭi sraṣṭuṃ gaccha vatsa nābhipadmodbhavo bhava |
mahāvirāḍ lomakūpe kṣudrasya ca vidhe śṛṇu || 48 ||
gaccha vatsa mahādeva brahmabhālodbhavo bhava |
aṃśena ca mahābhāga svayaṃ ca suciraṃ tapa || 49 ||
ityuktvā jagatāṃ nātho virarāma vidheḥ sutaḥ |
jagāma brahmā taṃ natvā śivaśva śivadāyakaḥ || 50 ||
mahāvirāḍ lomakūpe brahmāṃḍagolake jale |
babhūva ca virāṭkṣudro virājaṃśena sāṃpratam ||51||
śyāmo yuvā pītavāsāḥ śayāno jalatalpake |
īṣaddhāsyaḥ prasannāsyo viśvavyāpī janārdanaḥ || 52 ||
tannābhikamale brahmā vabhūva kamalodbhavaḥ |
saṃbhūya padmadaṃḍe ca babhrāma yugalakṣakam ||53||
nāṃtaṃ jagāma daṃḍasya padmanālasya padmaja: |
nābhijasya ca padmasya citāmāpa pitā tava || 54||
svasthānaṃ punarāgatya dadhyau kṛṣṇapadāṃbujam |
tato dadarśa kṣudraṃ taṃ dhyānena divyacakṣupā || 55 ||
śayānaṃ jalatalpe ca brahmāṇḍagolakāplute |
yallomakūpe brahmāṃḍaṃ tatkṛtaṃ paramīśvaram ||56 ||
śrīkṛṣṇaṃ cāpi golokaṃ gopagopīsamanvitam |
taṃ saṃstūya varaṃ prāpa tataḥ sṛṣṭi cakāra saḥ ||57||
babhūvurbrahmaṇaḥ putrā mānasāḥ sanakādayaḥ |
tato rudrakalāścāpi śivasyaikādaśa smṛtāḥ || 58 ||
babhūva pātā viṣṇuśca kṣudrasya vāmapārśvataḥ |
caturbhujaśca bhagavān śvetadvīpe sa cāvasat ||59||
kṣudrasya nābhipadme ca brahmā viśvaṃ sasarja ha| svarga matyaṃ ca pātālaṃ trilokīṃ sacarācarām || 60||

evaṃ sarvalomakūpe viśvaṃ pratyekameva viśvaṃ pratyekameva ca |
prativiśve kṣudravirāḍbrahmaviṣṇuśivādayaḥ || 61 ||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ brahmakṛṣṇa saṃkīrtanaṃ śubham |
sukhadaṃ mokṣadaṃ brahmaki bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 62||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
atha caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
śrutaṃ sarvaṃ mayā pūrvaṃ tvatprasādātsudhopamam |
adhunā prakṛtīnāṃ ca vyastaṃ varṇaya pūjanam || 1 ||
kasyāḥ pūjā kṛtā kena kathaṃ martye pracāritā |
kena vā pūjitā kā vā kena kā vā stutā prabho ||2||
tāsāṃ stotraṃ ca dhyānaṃ ca prabhāvaṃ caritaṃ śubham |
kābhiḥ kebhyo varo dattastanme vyākhyātumarhasi ||3||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
gaṇeśajananī durgā rādhā lakṣmīḥ sarasvatī |
sāvitrī ca sṛṣṭividhau prakṛtiḥ pacadhā smṛtā ||4|
āsāṃ pūjā prasiddhā ca prabhāvaḥ paramādbhutaḥ |
sudhopamaṃ ca caritaṃ sarvamaṅgalakāraṇam ||5|
prakṛtyaṃśāḥ kalāśca tāsāṃ ca caritaṃ śubham |
sarvaṃ vakṣyāmi te brahmansāvadhāno niśāmaya || 6 |
kālī vasundharā gaṅgā ṣaṣṭhī maṅgalacaṇḍikā |
tulasī manasā nidrā svadhā svāhā ca dakṣiṇā ||7||
saṃkṣiptamāsāṃ caritaṃ puṇyadaṃ śrutisuṃdaram |
jīvakarmavipākaṃ ca tacca vakṣyāmi suṃdaram ||8||
durgāyāścaiva rādhāyā vistīrṇa caritaṃ mahat |
tadvatpaścātpravakṣyāmi saṃkṣepakramataḥ śṛṇu || 9 ||
bhādau sarasvatīpūjā śrīkṛṣṇena vinirmitā |
yatprasādānmuniśreṣṭha mūrkho bhavati paṃḍitaḥ || 10 ||
āvirbhūtā yathā devo vaktrataḥ kṛṣṇa yoṣitaḥ |
iyeṣa kṛṣṇaṃ kāmena kāmukī kāmarūpiṇī ||11||
sa ca vijñāya tadbhāvaṃ sarvajñaḥ sarvamātaram |
tāmuvāca hitaṃ satyaṃ pariṇāme sukhāvaham ||12||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
bhaja nārāyaṇaṃ sādhvi madaṃśaṃ ca caturbhujam |
yuvānaṃ suṃdaraṃ sarvaguṇayuktaṃ ca matsamam ||13||
kāmajñaṃ kāminīnāṃ ca tāsāṃ ca kāmapūrakam |
koṭikaṃdarpalāvaṇyaṃ līlālaṃkṛtamīśvaram ||14|
kāṃte kāṃtaṃ ca māṃ kṛtvā yadi sthātumihecchasi |
tvatto balavatī rādhā na bhadraṃ te bhaviṣyati || 15 |
yo yasmādbalavānvāṇi tato'nyaṃ rakṣituṃ kṣamaḥ |
kathaṃ parānsādhayati yadi svayamanīśvaraḥ || 16 ||
sarveśaḥ sarvaśāstā'haṃ rādhāṃ vādhitumakṣamaḥ |
tejasā matsamā sā ca rūpeṇa ca guṇena ca ||17|
prāṇādhiṣṭhātṛdevī sā prāṇāṃstyaktuṃ ca kaḥkṣamaḥ |
prāṇatopi priyaḥ putraḥ keṣāṃ vāsti ca kaścana || 18 |
tvaṃ bhadre gaccha vaikuṃṭhaṃ tava bhadraṃ bhaviṣyati |
pati tamīśvaraṃ kṛtvā modasva suciraṃ sukham ||19|
lobhamohakāmakrodhamānahiṃsāvivarjitā |
tejasā tvatsamā lakṣmī rūpeṇa ca guṇena ca ||20|
tayā sārdhaṃ tava prītyā śaśvatkālaṃ prayāyati |
gauravaṃ ca haristulyaṃ kariṣyati dvayorapi || 21 ||

prativiśveṣu tāṃ pūjāṃ mahatīṃ gauravānvitām |
māghasya śuklapañcamyāṃ vidyāraṃbhe ca suṃdari || 22 ||
mānavā manavo devā munīṃdrāśca mumukṣavaḥ |
vasavo yoginaḥ siddhā nāgā gaṃdharva rākṣasāḥ ||23||
madvareṇa kariṣyanti kalpe kalpe layāvadhi |
bhaktiyuktāśca dattvā vai copacārāṇi ṣoḍaśa ||24||
kaṇvaśākhoktavidhinā dhyānena stavanena ca |
jitendriyāḥ saṃyatāśca ghaṭe ca pustake'pi ca || 25 ||
kṛtvā suvarṇaguṭikāṃ gaṃdhacaṃdanacacitām |
kavacaṃ te grahīṣyanti kaṃṭhe vā dakṣiṇe bhuje ||26||
paṭhiṣyati ca vidvāṃsaḥ pūjākāle ca pūjite |
ityuktvā pūjayāmāsa tāṃ devīṃ sarvapūjitām || 27||
tatastatpūjanaṃ cakrurbrahmaviṣṇuśivādayaḥ |
anaṃtaścāpi dharmaśca munīṃdrāḥ sanakādayaḥ || 28||
sarve devāśca munayo nṛpāśva mānavādayaḥ |
babhūva pūjitā nityaṃ sarvalokaiḥ sarasvatī ||29||
nārada uvāca
pūjāvidhānaṃ kavacaṃ dhyānaṃ cāpi niraṃtaram |
pūjopayuktaṃ naivedyaṃ puṣpaṃ ca caṃdanādikam ||30||
vada vedavidāṃ śreṣṭha śrotuṃ kautūhalaṃ mama |
vartate hṛdaye śaśvatkimidaṃ śrutisuṃdaram ||31||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śṛṇu nārada vakṣyāmi kaṇvaśākhoktapaddhatim |
jaganmātuḥ sarasvatyāḥ pūjāvidhisamanvitam ||32||
māghasya śuklapañcabhyāṃ vidyāraṃbhadine'pi ca |
pūrvehni samayaṃ kṛtvā tatrāpi saṃyataḥ śuciḥ || 33 ||
snātvā nityakriyāḥ kṛtvā ghaṭaṃ saṃsthāpya bhaktitaḥ |
svaśākhoktavidhānena tāṃtrikeṇāthavā punaḥ ||34||
gaṇeśaṃ pūrvamabhyarcya tato'bhīṣṭāṃ prapūjayet |
dhyānena vakṣyamāṇena dhyātvā bāhyaghaṭe dhruvam ||35||
dhyātvā punaḥ ṣoḍaśopacāreṇa pūjayedvratī |
pūjopayukta naivedyaṃ yacca vedanirūpitam ||36||
vakṣyāmi saumya tatkicidyathādhītaṃ yathāgamam |
navanītaṃ dadhi kṣīraṃ lājāṃśca tilalaḍḍukam ||37|
ikṣumikṣurasaṃ śuklavarṇa pakvaguḍaṃ madhu |
svastikaṃ śarkarāṃ śukladhānyasyākṣatamakṣatam ||38||
acchinnaśukladhānyasya pṛthukaṃ śuklamodakam |
ghṛtasaiṃdhavasaṃyuktaṃ haviṣyānnaṃ yathoditam ||39||
yavagodhūmacūrṇānāṃ piṣṭakaṃ ghṛtasaṃyutam |
piṣṭakaṃ svastikasyāpi pakvaraṃbhāphalasya ca ||40||
paramānaṃ ca saghṛtaṃ miṣṭānnaṃ ca sudhopamam |
nārikelaṃ tadudakaṃ kaseruṃ mūlamārdrakam ||41||
pakvaraṃbhāphalaṃ cāru śrīphalaṃ vadarīphalam |
kāladeśodbhavaṃ cāruphalaṃ śuklaṃ ca saṃskṛtam ||42||
sugaṃdha śuklapuṣpaṃ ca sugaṃdhaṃ śuklacandanam |
navīnaṃ śuklavastraṃ ca śaṃkhaṃ ca sundaraṃ mune ||43||
mālyaṃ ca śuklapuppāṇāṃ śuklahāraṃ ca bhūṣaṇam |
yādṛśaṃ ca śrutau dhyānaṃ praśasyaṃ śrutisuṃdaram ||44 ||
tannibodha mahābhāga bhramabhaṃjanakāraṇam |
sarasvatīṃ śuklavarṇāṃ sasmitāṃ sumanoharām ||45||
koṭicandraprabhāmuṣṭapuṣṭaśrīyuktavigrahām |
vahniśuddhāṃ śukādhānāṃ vīṇāpustakadhāriṇīm || 46 ||

ratnasāreṃdranirmāṇanavabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām |
supūjitāṃ suragaṇairbrahmaviṣṇuśivādibhiḥ || 47||
baṃde bhaktyā vaṃditāṃ ca munīṃdramanumānavaiḥ |
evaṃ dhyātvā ca mūlena sarvaṃ dattvā vicakṣaṇaḥ || 48 ||
dhṛtvā praṇameddaṃḍavadbhuvi |
yeṣāṃ ceyamiṣṭadevī teṣāṃ nityakriyā mune || 49||
saṃstūya kavacaṃ
vidyāraṃbhe ca varṣānte sarveṣāṃ pañcamīdine |
sarvopayuktaṃ mūlaṃ ca vaidikāṣṭākṣaraḥ paraḥ ||50 ||
yeṣāṃ yenopadeśo vā teṣāṃ sa mūla eva ca |
sarasvatī catuthyaṃtaṃ vahnijāyāṃtameva ca ||51||
lakṣmīmāyādikaṃ caiva maṃtro'yaṃ kalpapādapaḥ |
purā nārāyaṇaścemaṃ vālmīkaye kṛpānidhiḥ || 52 ||
pradadau jāhnavītīre puṇyakṣetre ca bhārate |
bhṛgurdadau ca śukrāya puṣkare sūryaparvaṇi || 53 ||
caṃdraparvaṇi māroco dado vākpataye mudā |
bhṛgoścaiva dadau tuṣṭo brahmā vadarikāśrame ||14||
bhāstīkasya jaratkārurdadau kṣīrodasannidhau |
vibhāṃḍāko dadī mero ṛṣyaśṛṅgāya dhīmate || 55||
śiba: kaṇādamunaye gautamāya dadau mudā |
sūryaśca yājñavalkyāya tathā kātyāyanāya ca ||56||
śeṣaḥ pāṇinaye caiva bhāradvājāya dhīmate |
dadau śākaṭāyanāya sutale balisaṃsadi || 57||
caturlakṣajapenaiva maṃtra: siddho bhavennṛṇām |
yadi syānmaṃtra siddho hi bṛhaspatisamo bhavet || 58 ||
kavacaṃ śṛṇu vipreṃdra yaddattaṃ brahmaṇā purā |
viśvasraṣṭā viśvajayaṃ bhṛgave gaṃdhamādane || 59 ||
bhṛguruvāca
brahmanbrahmavidāṃ śreṣṭha brahmajñānaviśārada |
sarvajña sarvajanaka sarveśa, sarvapūjita || 60||
sarasvatyāśca kavacaṃ brūhi viśvajayaṃ prabho |
ayātayāmaṃ maṃtrāṇāṃ samūhasaṃyutaṃ param || 61 ||
brahmovāca
śṛṇu vatsa pravakṣyāmi kavacaṃ sarvakāmadam |
śrutisāraṃ śrutimukhaṃ śrutyuktaṃ śrutipūjitam ||62||
uktaṃ kṛṣṇena goloke mahyaṃ vṛndāvane vane |
rāseśvareṇa vibhunā rāse vai rāsamaṃḍale || 63 ||
atīva gopanīyaṃ ca kalpavṛkṣasamaṃ param |
aśrutādbhutamaṃtrāṇāṃ samūhaiśca samanvitam ||64 ||
yaddhṛtvā bhagavāñchukraḥ sarvadaityeṣu pūjitaḥ |
yaddhṛtvā paṭhanādbrahmanbuddhimāśca bṛhaspatiḥ || 65 ||
paṭhanāddhāraṇādvāgmau kavīṃdro vālmiko muniḥ |
svāyaṃbhuvo manuśceva yaddhṛtvā sarvapūjitaḥ || 66 ||
kaṇādo gautamaḥ kaṇvaḥ pāṇiniḥ śākaṭāyanaḥ |
graṃthaṃ cakāra yaddhṛtvā dakṣaḥ kātyāyanaḥ svayam ||67||
ghṛtvā vedavibhāgaṃ ca purāṇānyakhilāni ca |
cakāra līlāmātreṇa kṛṣṇa dvaipāyanaḥ svayam ||68||
śātātapaśca saṃvarto vasiṣṭhaśca parāśaraḥ |
yaddhṛtvā paṭhanādgranthaṃ yājñavalkyaścakāra saḥ ||69||
ṛṣyaśṛṃgo bharadvājaścāstiko devalastathā |
jaigīṣavyo yayātiśca dhṛtvā sarvatra pūjitaḥ || 70 ||
kavacasyāsya viprendra ṛṣireva prajāpatiḥ |
svayaṃ chaṃdaśva bṛhato devatā śāradāṃbikā || 71 ||
sarvatattvaparijñānasarvārtha sādhaneṣu ca |
kavitāsu ca sarvāsu viniyogaḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||72||

śrīṃ hrīṃ sarasvatyai svāhā śiro me pātu sarvataḥ |
śrīvāgdevatāyai svāhā bhālaṃ me sarvadā'vatu ||73 ||
oṃ hrīṃ sarasvatyai svāheti śrotre pātu niraṃtaram |
oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ bhagavatyai sarasvatyai svāhā netrayugmaṃ sadā'vatu ||74 ||
ai hrīṃ vāgvādinyai svāhā nāsāṃ me sarvadāvatu |
hrīṃ vidyādhiṣṭhātṛdevyai svāhā coṣṭaṃ sadā'vatu || 75 ||
oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ brāhmayai svāheti daṃtapaṃkti sadā'vatu |
aimityekākṣarī maṃtro mama kaṃṭhaṃ sadā'vatu || 76||
oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ pātu me grīvāṃ skaṃdhau me śrīṃ sadāvatu |
oṃ hrīṃ vidyādhiṣṭhātṛdevyai svāhā vakṣaḥsadāvatu 77 || !
oṃ hrīṃ vidyādhisvarūpā svāhā me pātu nābhikām |
oṃ hrīṃ klīṃ vāṇyai svāheti mama hastī sadā'vatu ||78||
oṃ sarvavarṇātmikāyai pādayugmaṃ sadā'vatu |
oṃ vāgadhiṣṭhātṛdevyai svāhā sarva sadāvatu || 79 ||
oṃ sarvakaṃṭhavāsinyai svāhā prācyāṃ sadā'vatu |
oṃ sarvajihvāgravāsinyai svāhāgnidiśi rakṣatu ||80||
oṃ aiṃ hrīṃ klīṃ sarasvatyai budhajananyai svāhā |
satataṃ maṃtrarājo'yaṃ dakṣiṇe māṃ sadā'vatu || 81 ||
aiṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ yakṣaro maṃtro nairṛtyāṃ sarvadā'vatu |
oṃ aiṃ jihvāgravāsinyai svāhā māṃ vāruṇe'vatu || 82 ||
oṃ sarvāmbikāyai svāhā vāyavye māṃ sadā'vatu |
oṃ aiṃ śrīṃ klīṃ gadyavāsinyai svāhā māmuttare'vatu ||
aiṃ sarvaśāstravāsinyai svāhesānyāṃ sadā'vatu |
oṃ hrīṃ sarvapūjitāyai svāhā covaṃ sadā'vatu || 84||
hrīṃ pustakavāsinyai svāhā'dho māṃ sadā'vatu |
oṃ graṃthabījasvarūpāyai svāhā māṃ sarvato'vatu || 85 ||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra brahmamaṃtraughavigraham |
idaṃ viśvajayaṃ nāma kavacaṃ brahmarūpakam ||86||
purā śrutaṃ dharmavaktrātparvate gaṃdhamādane |
tava snehānmayākhyātaṃ pravaktavyaṃ na kasyacit || 87 ||
gurumabhyarcya vidhivadvastrālaṃkāracandanaiḥ |
praṇamya daṃḍavadbhūmau kavacaṃ dhārayetsudhīḥ || 88 ||
pālakṣajapenaiva siddhaṃ tu kavacaṃ bhavet |
yadi syātsiddhakavaco bṛhaspatisamo bhavet ||89 ||
mahāvāgmī kavīṃdraśca trailokyavijayī bhavet |
śaknoti savaṃ jetuṃ ca kavacasya prasādataḥ || 90 ||
idaṃ ca kaṇvaśākhoktaṃ kavacaṃ kathitaṃ mune |
stotrapūjāvidhānaṃ ca dhyānaṃ ca vaṃdanaṃ śṛṇu || 91 || |
iti devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
vāgdevatāyāḥ stavanaṃ śrūyatāṃ sarvakāmadam |
mahāmuniyajñivalkyo yena suṣṭāva tāṃ purā ||1||
guruśāpācca sa munirhatavidyo babhūva ha |
tadā jagāma duḥkhārto ravisthānaṃ supuṇyadam || 2 ||
saṃprāpya tapasā sūryaṃ lolārke dṛṣṭigocare |
tuṣṭāva sūryaṃ śokena ruroda ca muhurmuhuḥ ||3||
sūryastaṃ pāṭhayāmāsa vedaṃ vedāṃgamīśvaraḥ |
uvāca stauhi vāgdevīṃ bhaktyāca smṛtihetave ||4||

tamityuktvā dīnanātho'pyaṃtarṣānaṃ cakāra saḥ |
muniḥ snātvā ca tuṣṭāva bhaktinamrātmakaṃdharaḥ ||5||
yājñavalkya uvāca
kṛpāṃ kuru jaganmātarmāmevaṃ hatatejasam |
guruśāpātsmṛtibhraṣṭaṃ vidyāhīnaṃ ca duḥkhitam || 6 ||
jñānaṃ dehi smṛti vidyāṃ śakti śiṣya prabodhinīm |
graṃthakartṛtvaśakti ca suśiṣyaṃ supratiṣṭhitam || 7||
pratibhāṃ satsabhāyāṃ ca vicārakṣamatāṃ śubhām |
luptaṃ sarvaṃ daivayogānnavībhūtaṃ daivayogānnavībhūtaṃ punaḥ kuru ||8||
yathāṃkuraṃ bhasmati ca karoti devatā punaḥ |
brahmasvarūpā paramā jyotīrūpā sanātanī || 9||
sarvavidyādhidevī yā tasyai vāṇyai namo namaḥ |
visargavidumātrāsu yadadhiṣṭhānameva ca || 10 ||
tadadhiṣṭhātrī yā devī tasyai nītyai namo namaḥ |
vyākhyā svarūpā sā devī vyākhyādhiṣṭātṛ rūpiṇī || 11 ||
yayā vinā prasaṃkhyāvānsaṃkhyāṃ kartuṃ na śakyate |
kālasaṃkhyāsvarūpā yā tasyai devyai namo namaḥ || 12||
bhramasiddhāṃtarūpā yā tasyai devyai namonamaḥ |
smṛtiśaktijñānaśakti buddhiśaktisvarūpiṇī || 13 ||
pratibhākalpanāśaktiryā ca tasyai namonamaḥ |
sanatkumāro brahmāṇaṃ jñānaṃ papraccha yatra vai || 14 ||
babhūva mūkavatso'pi siddhāṃtaṃ kartumakṣamaḥ |
tadājagāma bhagavānātmā śrīkṛṣṇa īśvaraḥ || 15||
uvāca sa ca tāṃ stauhi vāṇīmiṣṭāṃ prajāpate |
sa ca tuṣṭāva tāṃ brahmā cājñayā paramātmanaḥ || 16 ||
kāra tatprasādena tadā siddhāṃtamuttamam |
yadāpyanaṃtaṃ paraccha jñānamekaṃ vasuṃdharā || 17 ||
babhūva mukavatso'pi siddhāṃtaṃ kartumakṣamaḥ |
tadā tāṃ sa ca tuṣṭāva saṃtrastaḥ kaśyapājñayā || 18||
tataśvakāra siddhāntaṃ nirmalaṃ bhramabhaṃjanam |
vyāsaḥ purāṇasūtraṃ ca papraccha vālmiki yadā ||19||
maunībhūtaśca sasmāra tāmeva jagadaṃbikām |
tadā cakāra siddhāṃtaṃ tadvareṇa munīśvaraḥ ||20||
saṃprāpya nirmalaṃ jñānaṃ bhramāṃdhadhvaṃsadīpakam |
purāṇasūtraṃ śrutvā ca vyāsaḥ kṛṣṇakalodbhavaḥ ||21||
tāṃ śivāṃ veda dadhyau ca śatavarṣaṃ ca puṣkare |
tadā tvatto varaṃ prāpya satkavīṃdrā babhūva ha ||22||
tadā vedavibhāgaṃ ca purāṇaṃ ca cakāra saḥ |
yadā maheṃdraḥ paraccha tattvajñānaṃ sadāśivam ||23||
vaṇaṃ tāmeva saṃcitya tasmai jñānaṃ dadau vibhuḥ |
papraccha śabdaśāstraṃ ca mahendraśca bṛhaspatim ||24|
divyaṃ varṣasahasraṃ ca sa tvāṃ dadhyau ca puṣkare |
tadā tvatto varaṃ prāpya divyavarṣasahasram ||25||
uvāca śabdaśāstraṃ ca tadarthaṃ ca sureśvaram |
adhyāpitāśca ye śiṣyā yairadhītaṃ munīśvaraiḥ || 26||
te ca tāṃ parisaṃcitya pravartante sureśvarīm |
tvaṃ saṃstutā pūjitā ca munīndramanumānavaiḥ ||27||
daityeṃdraśca suraścāpi brahmaviṣṇuśivādibhiḥ |
jaḍībhūtaḥ sahasrāsyaḥ paṃcavaktraścaturmukhaḥ ||28||
yāṃ stotuṃ kimahaṃ staumi tāmekāsyena mānavaḥ |
ityuktvā yājñavalkyaśca bhaktinamrātmakaṃdharaḥ ||29||
praṇanāma nirāhāro ruroda ca muhurmuhuḥ |
jyotīrūpā mahāmāyā tena dṛṣṭā'tyuvāca tam || 30 ||
kavīṃdro bhavetyaktvā vaikaṃṭhaṃ ca jagāma ha |
yājñavalkyakṛtaṃ vāṇīstotrametattu yaḥ paṭhet || 31 ||

kavīṃdro mahāvāgmī |
bṛhaspatisamo bhavet |
mahāmūrkhaśca durbuddhirvarṣamekaṃ yadā paṭhet ||32||
sa paṃḍitaśca medhāvī sukavīṃdro bhaveddhruvam ||33||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe paṃcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5 ||
atha ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
sarasvatī tu vaikuṇṭhe svayaṃ nārāyaṇāṃtike |
gaṃgāśāpena kalahātkalayā bhārate sarit || 1||
puṇyadā puṇyarūpā ca puṇyatīrthasvarūpiṇī |
puṇyavadbhirniṣevyā ca sthitiḥ puṇyavatāṃ mune ||2||
tapasvināṃ taporūpā tapasaḥ phalarūpiṇī |
kṛtapāpedhmadāhāya jvaladagnisvarūpiṇī || 3 ||
jñānātsarasvatītoye mṛtā ye mānavā bhuvi |
teṣāṃ sthitiśca vaikuṇṭhe suciraṃ harisaṃsadi ||4||
bhārate kṛtapāpaśca snātvā tatra ca līlayā |
mucyate sarvapāpebhyo viṣṇuloke vasecciram ||5||
cāturmāsyāṃ paurṇamāsyāmakṣayāyāṃ dinakṣaye |
vyatīpāte ca grahaṇe'nyasminpuṇyadine'pica || 6||
anuṣaṃgeṇa yaḥ snāto hetunā śraddhayā'pi vā |
sārūpyaṃ labhate nūnaṃ vaikuṇṭhe sa harerapi ||7||
sarasvatīmanuṃ tatra māsamekaṃ ca yo japet |
mahāmūrsa: kavīṃdraśca sa bhavennātra saṃśayaḥ ||8||
nityaṃ sarasvatītoye yaḥ snāyānmuṃḍayannaraḥ |
na garbhavāsaṃ kurute punareva sa mānavaḥ || 9 ||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ kiṃcidbhārate guṇakīrtanam |
sukhadaṃ kāmadaṃ sāraṃ bhūyaḥ ki śrotumicchasi || 10 ||
sūta utrāca
nārāyaṇavacaḥ śrutvā nārado munisattamaḥ |
punaḥ papraccha saṃdehamimaṃ śaunaka satvaram || 11 ||
nārada uvāca
kathaṃ sarasvatī devī gaṃgāśāpena bhārate |
kalayā kalahenaiva babhūva puṇyadā sarit || 12||
śravaṇe śrutisārāṇāṃ vardhate kautukaṃ mama |
kathāmṛtena me tṛptiḥ kena śreyasi tṛpyate || 13||
kathaṃ śaśāpa sā gaṃgā pūjitāṃ tāṃ sarasvatīm |
sā tu sattvasvarūpā yā puṇyadā sukhadā sadā || 14||
tejasvinyordvayorvādakāraṇaṃ śruti sundaram |
sudurlabhaṃ purāṇeṣu tanme vyākhyātumarhasi || 15 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śṛṇu nārada vakṣyāmi kathāmetāṃ purātanīm |
yasyāḥ śravaṇamātreṇa sarvapāpātpramucyate || 16||
lakṣmī sarasvatī gaṃgā viṣṇoḥ sānnidhyagāḥ sadā |
premṇā samāstāstiṣṭhati satataṃ harisannidhau || 17 ||
cakāra saikadā gaṃgā viṣṇormukhanirīkṣaṇam |
sasmitā ca sakāmā ca sakaṭākṣaṃ punaḥ punaḥ || 18||
vibhurjahāsa tadvaktraṃ nirīkṣya ca kṣaṇaṃ tadā |
kṣamāṃ cakāra taddṛddṛṣṭvā lakṣmīnaॅva sarasvatī ||19||

bodhayāmāsa padmā tāṃ sattvarūpā ca sasmitā |
krodhāviṣṭā ca sā vāṇī na ca śāṃtā vabhūva ha ||20||
uvāca vāṇī bhartāraṃ raktāsyā raktalocanā |
kupitā kāmavegena śaśvatprasphuritādharā || 21||
sarasvatyuvāca
sarvatra samatābuddhiḥ sadbhartuḥ kāminīṃ prati |
dharmiṣṭhasya variṣṭhasya viparītā khalasya ca || 22||
jñātaṃ saubhāgyamadhikaṃ gaṃgāyāṃ te gadādhara |
kamalāyāṃ ca tattulyaṃ na ca kiṃcinmayi prabho ||23||
gaṃgāyāḥ padmayā sārdhaṃ prītiścāsti susaṃmatā |
kṣamāṃ cakāra tenedaṃ viparītaṃ haripriyā || 24||
kiṃ jīvanena me'traiva durbhagāyāśca sāṃpratam |
niṣphalaṃ jīvanaṃ tasyā yā patyuḥ premavaṃcitā || 25 ||
tvāṃ sarve sattvarūpaṃ ca ye vadaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ |
te ca mūrkhā na vedajñā na jānaṃti mati tava || 26 ||
sarasvatīvacaḥ śrutvā dṛṣṭvā tāṃ kopasaṃyutām |
manasā ca samālokya sa jagāma vahiḥsabhām ||27||
gate nārāyaṇe gaṃgāmuvāca nirbhayaṃ ruṣā |
vāgadhiṣṭhātṛdevī sā vākyaṃ śravaṇaduṣkaram ||28||
he nirlajje he sakāme svāmigarva karoṣi kim |
adhikaṃ svāmisaubhāgyaṃ vijñāpayitumicchasi || 29||
mānacūrṇaṃ kariṣyāmi tavādya harisannidho |
kiṃ kariṣyati te kānto mamaivaṃ kāṃtavallabhe ||30||
ityevamuktvā gaṃgāyāḥ keśaṃ grahītumudyatā |
vārayāmāsa tāṃ padmā madhyadeśaṃ samāśritā ||31||
śaśāpa vāṇī tāṃ padmāṃ mahābalavatī satī |
vṛkṣarūpā saridrūpā bhaviṣyasi na saṃśayaḥ || 32||
viparītaṃ tato dṛṣṭvā kiṃcinno vaktumarhasi |
saṃtiṣṭhati sabhāmadhye yathā vṛkṣo yathā sarit ||33||
śāpaṃ śrutvā tu sā devī n śaśāpa cukopa ha |
tatraiva duḥkhitā tasthau vāṇīṃ dhṛtvā kareṇa ca ||34||
asantuṣṭāṃ tu tāṃ dṛṣṭvā kopaprasphuritādharām |
uvāca gaṃgā tāṃ devīṃ padmāṃ cāraktalocanām ||35||
śrīgagovāca
tvamutsṛja mahogrāṃ ca padme kiṃ me kariṣyasi |
duḥśīlā mukharā naṣṭā nityaṃ vācālarūpiṇī || 36||
vāgadhiṣṭhātrī devīyaṃ satataṃ kalahapriyā |
yāvatī yogyatā cāsyā yāvatī śaktireva ca || 37||
tathā karotu vādaṃ ca mayā sārdhaṃ ca durmukhī |
svabalaṃ yanmama balaṃ vijñāpayitumicchati ||38||
jānantu sarve hyubhayoḥ prabhāvaṃ vikramaṃ sati |
ityevamuktvā sā devī vāṇyai śāpaṃ dadāviti ||39||
saritsvarūpā bhavatu sā yā tvāṃ ca śaśāpa ha |
adhomatyaṃ sā prayātu saṃti yatraiva pāpinaḥ || 40 ||
kalau teṣāṃ ca pāpāni grahīṣyati na saṃśayaḥ |
ityevaṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā tāṃ śaśāpa sarasvatī || 41 ||
tvameva yāsyasi mahīṃ pāpipāpaṃ labhiṣyati |
etasminnaṃtare tatra bhagavānājagāma ha ||42||
caturbhujaścatubhiśva pārṣadaiśva caturbhujaiḥ |
sarasvatīṃ kare dhṛtvā vāsayāmāsa vakṣasi || 43 ||
bodhayāmāsa sarvajñaḥ sarvaṃ jñānaṃ purātanam |
śrutvā rahasyaṃ tāsāṃ ca śāpasya kalahasya ca ||44 ||

uvāca duḥkhitāstāśca vācaṃ sāmayikī bibhuḥ |
śrībhagavānuvāca
lakṣmi tvaṃ kalayā gaccha dharmadhvajagṛhaṃ śubhe || 45 ||
ayonisaṃbhavā bhūmau tasya kanyā bhaviṣyasi |
tatraiva daivadoṣeṇa vṛkṣatvaṃ ca labhiṣyati |46||
madaṃśasyāmurasyaiva śaṃkhacūḍarapa kāminī |
bhūtvā pacācca matpatnī bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ || 47 ||
trailokyapāvatī nāmnā tulasīti ca mahābhārate |
kalayā ca saridbhāvaṃ śīghraṃ gaccha varānane || 48||
bhārataṃ bhāratīśāpānnāgnā padmāvatī bhava |
gaṃge yāsyasi paścāttvamaṃśena viśvapāvanī || 49 ||
bhārataṃ bhāratośāpātpāpavāhāya pāpinām |
bhagīrathasya tapasā tena notā sukalpite || 50||
nāmnā bhāgīrathī dūtā bhaviṣyasi mahītale |
madaṃśasya samudrasya jāyājāye mamājñayā || 51 ||
matkalāṃśasya bhūpasya śaṃtanośva sureśvari |
gaṃgāśāpena kalayā bhārataṃ gaccha bhārati || 52||
kalahasya phalaṃ bhuṃkṣva sapatnībhyāṃ sahācyute |
svayaṃ ca brahmasadane brahmaṇaḥ kāminī bhava || 53 ||
gaṃgā yātu śivasthānamatra padmaiva tiṣṭhatu |
śāṃtā ca krodharahitā madbhaktā sattvarūpiṇī || 54 ||
mahāsādhvī mahābhāgā suśīlā dharmacāriṇī |
yadaṃśakalayā sarvā dharmiṣṭhāśca pativratāḥ || 55 ||
śāṃtarūpā: suśīlāśca prativiśveṣu pūjitāḥ |
tisro bhāryāstriśīlāśva trayo bhṛtyāśva bāṃdhavāḥ 56||
dhruvaṃ vedaviruddhāśca na hyete maṃgalapradāḥ |
strīpuṃvacca gṛhe yeṣāṃ gṛhiṇāṃ strīvayaḥ pumān ||57||
niṣphalaṃ ca janma teṣāmaśubhaṃ ca pade pade |
mukhe duṣṭā yonidṛṣṭā yasya strī kalahapriyā || 58||
araṇyaṃ tena gaṃtavyaṃ mahāraṇyaṃ gṛhādvaram |
jalānāṃ ca sthalānāṃ ca phalānāṃ prāptireva ca ||59||
satataṃ sulabhā tatra na teṣāṃ gṛha eva ca |
varamagnau sthitihiṃsrajaṃtūnāṃ sannidhau sukham || 60||
tato'pi duḥkhaṃ puṃsāṃ ca duṣṭastrīsannidhī dhruvam |
vyābhijvālā viṣajvālā varaṃ puṃsāṃ varānane ||61 ||
duṣṭastrīṇāṃ mukhajvālā maraṇādatiricyate |
puṃsāṃ ca strījitāṃ caiva bhasmāṃtaṃ śaucamadhruvam ||62||
yadahni kurute karma na tasya phalabhāgbhavet |
nidito'ya paratraiva sarvathā narakaṃ vrajet || 63||
yaśaḥ kīrtivihīno yo jīvannapi mṛto hi saḥ |
bahvīnāṃ ca sapatnīnāṃ baikatra śreyase sthitiḥ || 64 ||
ekabhāryaḥ sukhī naiva bahubhāryaḥ kadācana |
gaccha gaṃge śivasthānaṃ brahmasthānaṃ sarasvati || 65||
atra tiṣṭhatu madgehe suśīlā kamalālayā |
susādhyā yasya patnī ca suśīlā ca pativratā || 66 ||
iha svarge sukhaṃ tasya dharmo mokṣaḥ paratra ca |
pativratā yasya patnī saca muktaḥ śuciḥ sukhī ||
jīvanmṛto'śucirduḥkhī duḥśīlāpatireva ca || 67||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ || 6 ||

atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
ityuktvā jagatāṃ nātho virarāma ca nārada |
atīva rurudurdevyaḥ samāliṃgya parasparam ||1||
krameṇocustadeśvaram |
kaṃpitāḥ sāśrunetrāśca śokena ca bhayena ca ||2||
f tāśca sarvāḥ samālokya
sarasvatyuvāca
viśāpaṃ dehi he nātha dṛṣṭamājanmaśocanam |
satsvāminā parityaktāḥ kuto jīvaṃti tāḥ striyaḥ || 3 ||
dehatyāgaṃ kariṣyāmi yogena bhārate dhruvam |
atyanato hi niyataṃ pātumarhati niścitam ||4||
gaṅgovāca
ahaṃ kenāparādhena tvayā tyaktā jagatpate |
dehatyāgaṃ kariṣyāmi nirdoṣāyā vadhaṃ labha ||5||
nirdoṣa kāminītyāgaṃ karoti yo naro bhuvi |
sa yāti narakaṃ ghoraṃ kiṃtu sarveśvaro'pi vā ||6||
padmovāca
nātha sattvasvarūpastvaṃ kopaḥ kathamaho tava |
prasādaṃ kuru bhārye dve sadīśasya kṣamā varā ||7||
bhārate bhāratīśāpādyāsyāmi kalayā hyaham |
kiyatkālaṃ sthitistana kadā drakṣyāmi te padam ||8||
dāsyaṃti pāpinaḥ pāpaṃ sadyaḥ snānāvagāhanāt |
kena tena vimuktā'hamāgamiṣyāmi te padam ||9||
kalayā tulasīrūpaṃ dharmadhvajasutā satī |
bhuktvā kadā labhiṣyāmi tvatpadāṃbujamacyuta || 10 ||
vṛkṣarūpā bhaviṣyāmi tvadadhiṣṭhātṛdevatā |
samuddhariṣyasi kadā tanme brūhi kṛpānidhe || 11 ||
gaṃgā sarasvatīśāpādyadi yāsyati bhārate |
śāpena muktā pāpācca kadā tvāṃ ca labhiṣyati || 12||
gaṃgāśāpena vā vāṇī yadi yāsyati bhāratam |
kadā śāpādvinirmucya labhiṣyati padaṃ tava ||13||
tāṃ vāṇī brahmasadanaṃ gaṃgāṃ vā śivamandiram |
gantuṃ vadasi he nātha tatkṣamasva ca te vacaḥ ||14||
ityuktvā kamalākāṃtapādaṃ dhutvā nanāma sā |
svakeśarveṣṭanaṃ kṛtvā ruroda ca punaḥ punaḥ || 15 ||
bhaktānugrahakātaraḥ || 1 |
' "
“uvāca padmanābhastāṃ padmāṃ kṛtvā svavakṣasi | īṣaddhāsya vasannāsyo
śrībhagavānuvāca
svadvākyamācariṣyāmi svavākyaṃ ca sureśvari |
mamatāṃ ca kariṣyāmi śṛṇu tvaṃ kamalekṣaṇe || 16||
bhāratī yātu kalayā saridrūpā ca bhārate |
ardhā sā brahmasadanaṃ svayaṃ tiṣṭatu madgṛhe || 17 ||
bhagīrathena sā nītā gaṃgā yāsyati bhārate |
pūtaṃ kartuṃ tribhuvanaṃ svayaṃ tiṣṭati madgṛhe ||18||
