tatraiva candramauleśca mauli prāpsyati durlabham |
tataḥ svabhāvataḥ patā'pyatipūtā bhaviṣyati || 19 ||
kalāṃśāśena gaccha tvaṃ bhārate vāmalocane |
padmāvatī saridrapā tulasīvṛkṣarūpiṇī ||20||
kaleḥ pañcasahastre ca gate varṣe ca mokṣaṇam |
yuṣmākaṃ saritāṃ caiva madgehaṃ ca gamiṣyatha || 21 ||

saṃpadāṃ hetubhūtā ca vipattiḥ sarvadehinām |
vinā vipattermahimā keṣāṃ padmabhave bhavet ||22||
manmaṃtropāsakānāṃ ca satāṃ snānāvagāhanāt |
yuṣmākaṃ mokṣaṇaṃ pāpāddarśanātsparśanāttathā ||23||
pṛthivyāṃ yāni tīrthāni saṃtya saṃkhyāni suṃdari |
bhaviṣyati ca pūtāni madbhaktasparśadarśanāt ||24||
manmaṃtropāsakā bhaktā viśramanti ca bhārate |
pūtaṃ kartuṃ tārituṃ ca supavitrāṃ vasuṃdharām ||25||
madbhaktā yatra tiṣṭaṃti pādaṃ prakṣālayaṃti ca |
tatsthānaṃ ca mahātīrtha supavitraṃ bhaveddhruvam ||26||
strīghno goghnaḥ kṛtaghnaśca brahmaghno gurutalpagaḥ |
jīvanmukto bhavetpūto madbhaktasparśa darśanāt ||27||
ekādaśīvihīnaśca sandhyāhono'tha nāstikaḥ |
naraghātī bhavetpūto madbhaktasparśadarśanāt || 28 ||
asijīvī masījīvī dhāvako grāmayācakaḥ |
vṛṣavāho bhavetpūto madbhaktasparśadarśanāt ||29||
viśvāsaghātī mitraghno mithyāsākṣyasya dāyaka: |
sthāpyāhārī bhavetpūto madbhaktasparśa darśanāt || 30 ||
atyugro vā puṃdūṣakaśca jārakaḥ puṃścalīpatiḥ |
pūtaśca vṛṣalīputro madbhaktasparśa darśanāt ||31||
śūdrāṇāṃ sūpakāraśca devalo grāmayājakaḥ |
adīkṣito bhavetpūto madbhaktasparśadarśanāt ||32||
pitaraṃ mātaraṃ bhāryāṃ bhrātaraṃ tanayaṃ sutām |
guroḥ kulaṃ ca bhaginīṃ cakṣurhīnaṃ ca bāṃdhavam ||33||
śvaśrūṃ ca śvaśuraṃ caiva yo na puṣṇāti suṃdari |
sa mahāpātakī pūto madbhaktasparśadarśanāt ||34||
aśvatthanāśakaścaiva madbhaktaniṃdakastathā |
śūdrānnabhojī vipraśca pūto madbhaktadarśanāt ||35||
devadravyāpahārī ca vipradravyāpahārakaḥ |
lākṣāloharasānāṃ ca vikretā duhitustathā || 36 ||
mahāpātakinaścaiva śūdrāṇāṃ śavadāhakāḥ |
bhaveyurete pūtāśca madbhaktasparśadarśanāt ||37||
śrīmahālakṣmīruvāca
bhaktānāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ brūhi bhaktānugrahakātara |
yeṣāṃ tu darśanasparśātsadyaḥ pūtā narādhamāḥ || 38 ||
haribhaktivihīnāśca mahāhaṅkārasaṃyutāḥ |
svapraśaṃsāratā dhūrtāḥ śaṭhāśca sādhuniṃdakāḥ ||39||
punaṃti sarvatīrthāni yeṣāṃ snānāvagāhanāt |
yeṣāṃ ca pādarajasā pūtā pādodakānmahī ||40||
yeṣāṃ saṃdarśanaṃ sparśaṃ ye vā vāṃchaṃti bhārate |
sarveṣāṃ paramo lābho vaiṣṇavānāṃ samāgamaḥ || 41 ||
na hyammayāni tīrthāni na devā mṛcchilāmayāḥ |
te punaṃtyurukālena viṣṇubhaktāḥ kṣaṇādaho || 42 ||
sūta uvāca
mahālakṣmīvacaḥ śrutvā lakṣmīkāṃtaśca sasmitaḥ |
nigūḍhatattvaṃ kāthatumapi śreṣṭhopacakrame ||43||
śrībhagavānuvāca
bhaktānāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ lakṣmi gūḍhaṃ śrutipurāṇayoḥ |
puṇyasvarūpaṃ pāpaghnaṃ sukhadaṃ bhuktimuktidam ||44 ||
sārabhūtaṃ gopanīyaṃ na vaktavyaṃ khaleṣu ca |
tvāṃ pavitrāṃ prāṇatulyāṃ kathayāmi niśāmaya ||45||
guruvaktrādviṣṇumaṃtro yasya karṇe patiṣyati |
vadati vedāstaṃ cāpi pavitraṃ ca narottamam ||46 ||

puruṣāṇāṃ śataṃ pūrvaṃ tathā tajjanmamātrataḥ |
svargasthaṃ narakasthaṃ vā muktimāpnoti tatkṣaṇāt||47||
yaiḥ kaścidyatra vā janma labdhaṃ yeṣu ca jaṃtuṣu |
jīvanmuktāstu te pūtā yāṃti kāle hareḥ padam ||48||
madbhaktiyukto martyaśca sa mukto madguṇānvitaḥ |
madguṇādhīnavṛttiryaḥ kathāviṣṭaśca saṃtatam ||49||
madguṇaśrutimātreṇa sānaṃda: pulakānvitaḥ |
sagadgadaḥ sāśrunetraḥ svātmavismṛta eva ca || 50 ||
na vāṃchati sukhaṃ mukti sālokyādicatuṣṭayam |
brahmatvamamaratvaṃ vā tadvāṃchā mama sevane || 51 ||
indratvaṃ ca manutvaṃ ca brahmatvaṃ ca sudurlabham |
svargarājyādibhogaṃ ca svapne'pi ca na vāṃchati || 52 ||
bhramati bhārate bhaktāstādṛgjanma sudurlabham |
madguṇaśravaṇā: śrāvyamāṇairnityaṃ mudānvitāḥ || 53||
te yāṃti ca mahīṃ pūtvā naraṃ tīrthaṃ mamālayam |
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ padme kuru yathocitam ||
tadājñayā tāstaccakrurharistasthau sukhāsane ||14||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskaṃdhe saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 ||
atha aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
sarasvatī puṇyakṣetramājagāma ca bhārate |
gaṃgāśapena kalayā svayaṃ tasthau hareḥ pade || 1 ||
bhāratī bhārataṃ gatvā brāhmī ca brahmaṇaḥ priyā |
vāṇyadhiṣṭhātṛdevī sā tena vāṇī prakīrtitā || 2 ||
sarovāpyāṃ ca srotaḥsu sarvatraiva hi dṛśyate |
hariḥ sarasvāṃstasyeyaṃ tena nāmnā sarasvatī ||3||
sarasvatī nadī sā ca tīrtharūpā ca pāvanī |
pāpināṃ pāpadāhāya jvaladagnisvarūpiṇī ||4||
paścādbhāgīrathī nītā mahīṃ bhāgīrathena ca |
sa vai jagāma kalayā vāṇīśāpena nārada || 5||
tatraiva samaye tāṃ ca dadhāra śirasā śivaḥ |
vegaṃ soḍhumayaṃ śakto bhuvaḥ prārthanayā vibhuḥ || 6 ||
padmā jagāma kalayā sā ca padmāvatī nadī |
bhārataṃ bhāratīśāpātsvayaṃ tasthau hareḥ pade ||7||
tato'nyā yā sā kalayā lebhe janma ca bhārate |
dharmadhvajasutā lakṣmīvikhyātā tulasīti ca ||8||
hariśāpataḥ |
babhūva vṛkṣarūpā sā kalayā viśvapāvanī ||9||
purā sarasvatīśāpātpaścācca
kaleḥ pañcasahasraṃ ca varṣaṃ sthitvā ca bhārate |
jagmustāśca saridrūpaṃ vihāya śrīhareḥ padam ||10||
yāni sarvāṇi tīrthāni kāśīvṛṃdāvanaṃ vinā |
yāsyati sārdhaṃ tābhiśca vaikuṇṭhamājñayā hareḥ ||11||
śālagrāmaḥ śaktiśivo jagannāthaśca bhāratam |
kalerdaśasahasrāṃte tyaktvā yāṃti nijaṃ padam ||12||
sādhavaśca purāṇāni śaṃkhāni śrāddhatarpaṇe |
vedoktāni ca karmāṇi yayustaiḥ sārdhameva ca ||13||
tatkīrtiguṇakīrtanam |
vedāṃgāni ca śāstrāṇi yayustaiḥ sārdhameva ca || 14 ||
devapūjā devanāma grāmadevatāḥ |
vrataṃ tapaścānaśanaṃ yayustaiḥ sārdhameva ca || 15 ||
saṃtaśca satyadharmaśca vedāśca
vāmācāraratāḥ sarve mithyā kapaṭasaṃyutāḥ |
tulasīrahitā pūjā bhaviṣyati tataḥ param || 16 || ,

śaṭhāḥ krūrā dāṃbhikāśca mahāhaṃkārasaṃyutāḥ |
corāśca hiṃsakāḥ sarve bhaviṣyaṃti tataḥ param || 17||
puṃso bhedaḥ strīvibhedo vivāho vā'pi nirbhayaḥ |
svasvāmibhedo vastūnāṃ bhaviṣyati tataḥ param || 18||
sarve strīvaśagāḥ puṃsaḥ puṃścalyaśva gṛhe gṛhe |
tarjanarbhartsanaiḥ śaśvatsvāminaṃ tāḍayaṃti ca || 19||
gṛheśvarī ca gṛhiṇī gṛhī bhūtyādhiko'dhamaḥ |
ceṭīdāsasamo vadhvāḥ śvaśrūśva śvaśurastathā ||20||
kartāro balino gehe yonisaṃbaṃdhibāṃdhavāḥ |
vidyāsaṃbaṃdhibhiḥ sārdhaṃ saṃbhāṣāpi na vidyate || 21 || |
tathā'paricitā lokāstathā puṃsaśva bāṃdhavāḥ |
sarvakarmākṣamāḥ puṃso yoṣitāmājñayā vinā ||22||
brahmakṣatraviśa: śūdrā jātyācāravivarjitāḥ |
saṃdhyā ca yajñasūtraṃ ca bhavelluptaṃ na saṃśayaḥ ||23||
mlecchācārā bhaviṣyaṃti varṇāścatvāra eva ca |
mlecchaśāstraṃ paṭhiṣyaṃti svaśāstrāṇi vihāya ca 24 ||
brahmakṣatraviśāṃ vaṃśāḥ śūdrāṇāṃ sevakāḥ kalau |
sūpakārā dhāvakāśca vṛṣavāhāśca sarvaśaḥ ||25||
satyahīnā janāḥ sarve sasyahīnā ca medinī |
phalahīnāśca taravo'patyahīnāśca yopitaḥ ||26||
kṣorahīnāstathā gāvaḥ kṣīraṃ sarpirvivajitam |
daṃpatī prītihīno ca gṛhiṇaḥ satyavarjitāḥ ||27||
pratāpahīnā bhūpāśca prajāśca karapīḍitāḥ |
jalahīnā mahānadyo dīrghikākaṃdarādayaḥ ||28||
dharmahīnāḥ puṇyahīnā varṇāścatvāra eva ca |
lakṣeṣu puṇyavānko'pi na tiṣṭhati tataḥ param ||29||
kutsitā vikṛtākārā narā nāryaśca bālakāḥ |
kuvārtā kutsitaḥ śabdo bhaviṣyati tataḥ param ||30||
kecidyāmāśca nagarā naraśūnyā bhayānakāḥ |
kecitsvalpakuṭīreṇa nareṇa ca samanvitāḥ || 31||
araṇyāni bhaviṣyati grāmeṣu nagareṣu ca |
araṇyavāsinaḥ sarve janāśca karapīḍitāḥ || 32||
sasyāni ca bhaviṣyati taḍāgeṣu nadīṣu ca |
prakṛṣṭavaṃśajā honā bhaviṣyaṃti kalau yuge || 33||
alīkavādino ghūrtāḥ śaṭhāścāsatyavādinaḥ |
prakṛṣṭāni ca kṣetrāṇi sasyahīnāni nārada || 34||
hīnāḥ prakṛṣṭā ghanino devabhaktāśca nāstikāḥ |
hiṃsakāśca dayāhīnāḥ porāśca naraghātinaḥ ||35||
vāmanā vyādhiyuktāśca narā nāryaśca sarvataḥ |
svalpāyuṣo gadāyuktā yauvana rahitāḥ kalau || 36||
palitāḥ ṣoḍaśe varṣe mahāvṛddhāśca viśatī |
aṣṭavarṣā ca yuvatī rajoyuktā ca garbhiṇī ||37|
vatsarāṃta prasūtā strī ṣoḍaśe ca jarānvitā |
patiputravatī kācitsarvā vadhyāḥ kalau yuge || 38||
kanyāvikrayiṇaḥ sarve varṇāścatvāra eva ca |
mātṛjāyāvadhūnāṃ ca jāropetānnabhakṣakāḥ ||39|
kanyānāṃ bhaginīnāṃ vā jāropāttānnajīvinaḥ |
harernāmnāṃ vikrayiṇo bhaviṣyati kalau yuge ||40||
svayamutsṛjya dānaṃ ca kīrtivardhana hetave |
tataḥ paścātsvadānaṃ ca svayamullaṃghayiṣyati ||41||
devavṛttiṃ brahmavṛtti vṛtti gurukulasya ca |
svadattāṃ paradattāṃ vā sarvamullaṃghayiṣyati || 42||
kanyakāgāminaḥ kecitkecicca śvaśrugāminaḥ |
kecidradhūgāminaśca kecidvai sarvagāminaḥ || 43 ||
bhaginīgāminaḥ kecitsapatnīmātṛgāminaḥ |
bhrātṛjāyāgāminaśca bhaviṣyaṃti kalau yuge || 44 ||

agamyāgamanaṃ caiva kariṣyaṃti gṛhe gṛhe |
mātṛyoni parityajya vihariṣyaṃti sarvataḥ || 45 ||
patnīnāṃ nirṇayo nāsti bhatṝṇāṃ ca kalau yuge |
prajānāṃ caiva grāmāṇāṃ vastūnāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ || 46||
alīkavādinaḥ sarve sarve corāśca laṃpaṭāḥ |
parasparaṃ hiṃsakāśca sarve ca naraghātinaḥ || 47 ||
brahmakṣatraviśāṃ vaṃśā bhaviṣyaṃti ca pāpinaḥ |
lākṣā loharasānāṃ ca vyāpāraṃ lavaṇasya ca || 48 ||
vṛṣavāhā vipravaṃśāḥ śūdrāṇāṃ śavadāhinaḥ |
śūdrānnabhojinaḥ sarve sarve ca vṛṣalīratāḥ || 49 ||
pañcayajñavihīnāśca kuhūrātrī ca bhojinaḥ |
yajñasūtravihīnāśca saṃdhyāśaucavihīnakāḥ || 50||
puṃścalī vārdhuṣājīvā kuṭṭanī ca rajasvalā |
viprāṇāṃ raṃdhanāgāre bhaviṣyati ca pācikā || 51 ||
annānāṃ niyamo nāsti yonīnāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ |
āśramāṇāṃ janānāṃ ca sarve mlecchāḥ kalau yuge 52||
evaṃ kalau saṃpravṛtte savaṃ mlecchamayaṃ bhavet |
hastapramāṇe vṛkṣe ca aṃguṣṭhe caiva mānave ||53||
viprasya viṣṇuyaśasaḥ putraḥ kalkirbhaviṣyati |
nārāyaṇakalāṃśaśca bhagavān balināṃ varaḥ || 54 ||
dīrgheṇa karabālena dīrghaghoṭakavāhanaḥ |
mlecchaśūnyāṃ ca pṛthivīṃ trirātreṇa kariṣyati || 55 ||
nimleṃcchāṃ vasudhāṃ kṛtvā cāṃtardhānaṃ kariṣyati |
arājakā ca vasudhā dasyu prastā bhaviṣyati ||56||
sthūṇāpramāṇā ṣaḍrātraṃ varṣadhārāplutā mahī |
lokaśūnyā vṛkṣaśūnyā gṛhaśūnyā bhaviṣyati || 57||
tataśva dvādaśādityāḥ kariṣyaṃtyudayaṃ mune |
prāpnoti śuṣkatāṃ pṛthvī samā teṣāṃ ca tejasā ||58||
kalau gate ca durdharṣe pravṛtte ca kṛte yuge |
tapaḥ sattvasamāyukto dharmaḥ pūrṇo bhaviṣyati || 59 ||
tapasvinaśva dharmiṣṭhā vedajñā brāhmaṇā bhuvi |
pativratāśca dharmiṣṭhā yoṣitaśca gṛhe gṛhe || 60||
rājānaḥ kṣatriyāḥ sarve viprabhaktā manasvinaḥ |
pratāpavato dharmiṣṭhāḥ puṇyakarma ratāḥ sadā || 61 ||
vaiśyā vāṇijyaniratā viprabhaktāśca dhārmikāḥ |
śūdrāśca puṇyaśīlāśva dharmiṣṭhā viprasevinaḥ || 62 ||
viprakṣatraviśāṃ vaṃśā devībhaktiparāyaṇāḥ |
devīmaṃtraratāḥ sarve devīdhyānaparāyaṇāḥ || 63 ||
śrutismṛtipurāṇajñāḥ puṃmāṃso ṛtugāminaḥ |
leśo nāsti hyadharmasya pūrṇo dharmaḥ kṛte yuge || 64 ||
dharmastripācca tretāyāṃ dvipācca dvāpare tataḥ |
kalau vṛtte caikapācca sarvaluptistataḥ param || 65 ||
vārāḥ sapta tathā vipra tithayaḥ ṣoḍaśa smṛtāḥ |
tathā dvādaśa māsāśca ṛtavaśca ṣaḍeva ca ||66||
dvau pakṣī cāyane dve ca catubhiḥ praharaidinam |
catubhiḥ praharaṃ rātrirmāsastriṃśaddinastathā || 67||
varṣaṃ pañcavidhaṃ jñeyaṃ kālasaṃkhyāvidhikrame |
yathā cāyāṃti yāṃtyeva tathā yugacatuṣṭayam ||68||
varṣe pūrṇe narāṇāṃ ca devānāṃ ca divāniśam |
śatatraye ṣaṣṭhayadhike narāṇāṃ ca yuge gave || 69||
devānāṃ ca yugaṃ jñeyaṃ kālasaṃkhyāvidāṃ matam |
manvaṃtaraṃ tu divyānāṃ yugānāmekasaptatiḥ ||70 ||
manvaṃtarasamaṃ jñeyamāyuṣyaṃ ca śacīpateḥ |
aṣṭāviṃśatime cendre gate brahmadivāniśam ||71||
aṣṭottaraśate varṣe gate pātaśca brahmaṇaḥ |
pralayaḥ prākṛto jñeyastatrādṛṣṭā vasuṃdharā || 72||

jalaplutāni viśvāni brahmaviṣṇuśivādayaḥ |
ṛṣayo jñāninaḥ sarve līnāḥ satye cidātmani 73 ||
tatraiva prakṛtirlonā tatra prākṛtiko layaḥ |
laye prākṛtike jāte pāte ca brahmaṇo mune || 74||
nimeṣamātra kālaśca śrīdevyāḥ procyate mune |
evaṃ naśyaṃti sarvāṇi brahmāṃḍānyakhilāni ca || 75 ||
nimeṣāṃtarakāle ca punaḥ sṛṣṭikrameṇa ca |
evaṃ katividhā sṛṣṭirlayaḥ katividho'pi vā ||76||
kati kalpā gatā yātāḥ saṃkhyāṃ jānātikaḥ pumān |
sṛṣṭīnāṃ ca layānāṃ ca brahmāṃḍānāṃ ca nārada || 77||
brahmādīnāṃ ca brahmāṇḍe saṃkhyāṃ jānāti kaḥ pumān |
brahmāṃḍānāṃ ca sarveṣāmīśvaraśka eva saḥ || 78 ||
sarveṣāṃ paramātmā ca saccidānandarūpadhṛk |
brahmādayaśca tasyāṃśāstasyāṃśaśca mahāvirāṭ || 79||
tasyāṃśaśca virāṭ kṣudraḥ saiveyaṃ prakṛtiḥ parā |
tasyāḥ sakāśātsaṃjāto'pyardhanārīśvarastataḥ || 80 ||
saiva kṛṣṇo dvidhābhūto dvibhujaśca caturbhujaḥ |
caturbhujaśca vaikuṃṭhe goloke dvibhujaḥ svayam ||81||
brahmāditṛṇaparyaṃtaṃ sarvaṃ prākṛtikaṃ bhavet |
yadyatprākṛtikaṃ sṛṣṭaṃ sarva naśvarameva ca || 82 ||
evaṃvidhaṃ sṛṣṭihetuṃ satyaṃ nityaṃ sanātanam |
svecchāmayaṃ paraṃ brahma nirguṇaṃ prakṛteḥ param ||83 ||
nirupādhi nirākāraṃ bhaktānugrahakātaram |
karoti brahmā brahmāṃḍaṃ yajjñānātkamalodbhavaḥ || 84||
śivo mṛtyuñjayaścaiva saṃhartā sarvatattvavit |
yajjñānādyasya tapasā sarveśastu tapo mahān ||85 ||
mahāvibhūtiyuktaśca sarvajñaḥ sarvadarśanaḥ |
sarvavyāpī sarvapātā pradātā sarvasaṃpadām ||86||
viṣṇuḥ sarveśvaraḥ śrīmānyadbhaktyā yasya sevayā |
mahāmāyā ca prakṛtiḥ sarvaśaktimayośvarī || 87 ||
saiva proktā bhagavatī saccidānaṃdarūpiṇī |
yajjñānādyasya tapasā yadbhaktyā yasya sevayā || 88 ||
sāvitrī devamātā ca vedādhiṣṭhātṛdevatā |
pūjyā dvijānāṃ vedajñā yajjñānādyasya sevayā || 89||
sarva vidyādhidevī sā pūjyā ca viduṣāṃ parā |
yatsevayā yattapasā sarvaviśveṣu pūjitā || 90 ||
sarvagrāmādhidevo sā sarvasampatpradāyinī |
sarveśvarī sarvavaṃdyā sarveṣāṃ putradāyinī ||91||
sarvastutā ca sarvajñā sarvadurgātināśinī |
kṛṣṇavāmāṃśasaṃbhūtā kṛṣṇaprāṇādhidevatā || 92||
kṛṣṇaprāṇādhikā premṇā rādhikā śaktisevayā |
sarvādhikaṃ ca rūpaṃ ca saubhāgyaṃ mānagaurave ||93||
kṛṣṇavakṣaḥsthalasthānaṃ patnītve prāpa sevayā |
tapaścakāra sā pūrvaṃ śataśṛṃge ca parvate ||94||
divyavarṣasahasraṃ ca patiprāptyarthameva ca |
jāte śaktiprasāde tu dṛṣṭrā caṃdrakalopamām || 95 ||
kṛṣṇovakṣaḥsthale kṛtvā ruroda kṛpayā vibhuḥ |
varaṃ tasyai dadau sāraṃ sarveṣāmapi durlabham || 96 ||
mama vakṣaḥsthale tiṣṭha mama bhaktā ca śāśvatī |
saubhāgyena ca mānena premṇātho gauraveṇa ca || 97 ||
tvaṃ me śreṣṭhā ca jyeṣṭhā ca preyasī sarvayoṣitām |
variṣṭhā ca gariṣṭhā ca saṃstutā pūjitā mayā || 98 ||
satataṃ tava sādhyo'yaṃ vaśyaśca prāṇavallabhe |
ityuktvā ca jagannāthaśvakāra lalanāṃ tataḥ || 99 ||
sapatnīrahitāṃ tāṃ ca cakāra prāṇavallabhām |
anyā yā yāśva tā devyaḥ pūjitāḥ śaktisevayā 100 ||

tapastu yādṛśaṃ yāsāṃ tādṛktādṛkphalaṃ mune |
divyaṃ varṣasahasraṃ ca tapastaptvā himācale || 101 ||
durgā ca tatpadaṃ dhyātvā sarvapūjyā babhūva ha |
sarasvatī tapastaptvā parvate gaṃdhamādane || 102 ||
lakṣavarṣaṃ ca divyaṃ ca sarvavaṃdyā babhūva sā |
lakṣmīryugaśataṃ divyaṃ tapastaptvā ca puṣkare || 103 ||
sarva saṃpatpradātrī ca jātā devīniṣevaṇāt |
sāvitrī malaye taptvā pūjyā vaṃdyā babhūva sā 104||
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasraṃ ca divyaṃ dhyātvā ca tatpadam |
śatamanvaṃtaraṃ taptaṃ śaṃkareṇa purā vibho || 105||
śatamanvaṃtaraṃ cedaṃ brahmā śakti jajāpa ha |
śatamanvaṃtaraṃ viṣṇustaptvā pātā babhūva ha || 106 |
daśamanvaṃtaraṃ taptvā śrīkṛṣṇaḥ paramaṃ tapaḥ |
golokaṃ prāptavāndivyaṃ modate'dyāpi yatra hi 107||
daśamanvaṃtaraṃ dharmastaptvā vai bhaktisaṃyutaḥ |
sarvaprāṇaḥ sarva pūjyaḥ sarvādhāro babhūva saḥ || 108 || .
evaṃ devyāśca tapasā sarve devāśca pūjitāḥ |
munayo manavo bhūpā brāhmaṇācaiva pūjitāḥ || 109 ||
evaṃ te kathitaṃ sarvaṃ purāṇaṃ sayathāgamam |
guruvaktrādyathā jñātaṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi 110 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate navamaskandhe śaktiprādurbhāve nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde'ṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
devyā nimeṣamātreṇa brahmaṇaḥ pāta eva ca |
tasya pātaḥ prākṛtika pralayaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 1 ||
pralaye prākṛte coktā tatrādṛṣṭā vasuṃdharā |
jalaluptāni viśvāni sarve līnāḥ parātmani ||2||
vasuṃdharā tirobhūtā kutrāvāsā ca tiṣṭhati |
sṛṣṭevidhānasamaye sā''virbhūtā kathaṃ punaḥ || 3 ||
kathaṃ babhūva sā dhanyā mānyā sarvāśrayā jayā |
tasyāśca janmakathanaṃ vada maṃgalakārakam ||4||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
sarvādisṛṣṭī sarveṣāṃ janma devyā iti śrutiḥ |
āvirbhāvastirobhāvaḥ sarveṣu pralayeṣu ca ||5||
śrūyatāṃ vasudhājanma sarvamaṃgalakāraṇam |
vighnanighnakaraṃ pāpanāśanaṃ puṇyavardhanam || 6 ||
aho kecidvadaṃtoti madhukaiṭabhamedasā |
vabhūva vasudhā dhanyā tadviruddhamataḥ śṛṇu ||7||
ūcatustau purā viṣṇuṃ tuṣṭo yuddhena tejasā |
āvāṃ vadho na yatrorvī pāthasā saṃvṛteti ca || 8
tayorjīvanakāle na pratyakṣā sā'bhavatsphuṭam |
tato babhūva medaśva maraṇānaṃtaraṃ tayoḥ || 9||
medinīti ca vikhyātetyuktametanmataṃ śṛṇu |
jaladhautā kṛtā pūrvaṃ vardhitā medasā yataḥ || 10 ||
kathayāmi te tajjanma sārthakaṃ sarvamaṃgalam |
purā śrutaṃ yacchrutyuktaṃ dharmavaktrācca puṣkare || 11||
mahāvirāṭśarīrasya jalasthasya ciraṃ sphuṭam |
mano babhūva kālena sarvāṃgavyāpakaṃ dhruvam || 12 ||
tacca praviṣṭaṃ sarveṣāṃ tallomnāṃ vivareṣu ca |
kālena mahatā paścādbabhūva vasudhā mune ||13||
pratyekaṃ pratilomnāṃ ca kūpeṣu saṃsthitā sadā |
āvirbhūtā tirobhūtā sajalā ca punaḥ punaḥ || 14 ||

āvirbhūtā sṛṣṭikāle tajjaloparyupasthitā |
pralaye ca tirobhūtā jalasyābhyaṃtare sthitā || 15 ||
prativiśveṣu vasudhā śailakānanasaṃyutā |
saptasāgarasaṃyuktā saptadvīpasamanvitā ||16||
hemādrime saṃyuktā grahacaṃdrārkasaṃyutā |
brahmaviṣṇuśivādyaiśca surairlokaistadājñayā || 17||
puṇyatīrthasamāyuktā puṇyā bhāratasaṃyutā |
kāṃcanībhūmisaṃyuktā saptasvargasamanvitā || 18 ||
pātālasaptaṃ tadadhastadūvaṃ brahmalokataḥ |
dhruvalokaśca tatraiva sarvaṃ viśvaṃ ca tatra vai || 19 ||
evaṃ sarvāṇi viśvāni pṛthivyāṃ nirmitāni ca |
naśvarāṇi ca viśvāni sarvāṇi kṛtrimāṇi vai 20||
pralaye prākṛte caiva brahmaṇaśca nipātane |
mahāvirāḍādisṛṣṭī sṛṣṭaḥ kṛṣṇena cātmanā ||21||
nityo ca sthitipralayo kākāleśvaraiḥ saha |
nityādhiṣṭhātṛdevī sā vārāhe pūjitā suraiḥ ||22||
munibhirmanubhirviprairgaṃdharvādibhireva ca |
viṣṇorvarāharūpasya patnī sā śrutisaṃmatā ||23||
tatputro maṃgalo jñeyo ghaṭeśo maṃgalātmajaḥ |
nārada uvāca
pūjitā kena rūpeṇa vārāhe ca surairmahī ||24||
vārāhe- caiva vārāhī sarvaiḥ sarvāśrayā satī |
mūlaprakṛtisaṃbhūtā paṃcīkaraṇamārgataḥ ||25||
tasyāḥ pūjāvidhānaṃ cāpyavaśvordhvamanekaśaḥ |
maṃgalaṃ maṃgalasyāpi janma vyāsa vada prabho ||26||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
vārāhe ca varāhaśca brahmaṇā saṃstutaḥ purā |
uddhāra mahīṃ hatvā hiraṇyākṣaṃ rasātalāt ||27||
jale tāṃ sthāpayāmāsa padmapatraṃ yathā hṛde |
tatraiva nirmame brahmā viśvaṃ sarvaṃ manoharam ||28||
dṛṣṭvā tadadhi devīṃ ca takāmāṃ kāmuko hariḥ |
vārāharūpī bhagavān koṭisūryasamaprabhaḥ ||29||
kṛtvā ratikalāṃ sarvāṃ mūrti ca sumanoharām |
krīḍāṃ cakāra rahasi divyavarṣamaharniśam || 30||
sukhasaṃbhoga saṃsparśānmūrchā sā prāpa suṃdarī |
vidagdhāyā vidagdhena saṃgamo'tisukhapradaḥ ||31||
viṣṇusta daṃga saṃślepābubudhe na divāniśam |
varṣāṃte cetanāṃ prāpya kāmī tatyāja kāmukīm 32 ||
pūrvarūpaṃ varāhaṃ ca dadhāra sa ca lolayā |
pūjāṃ cakāra tāṃ devīṃ dhyātvā ca dharaṇīṃ satīm ||
dhūpairdīpaiśca naivedyaḥ sidūrairanulepanaiḥ |
vastraḥ puṣpaiśca balibhiḥ saṃpūjyovāca tāṃ hariḥ 34 ||
śrībhagavānuvāca
sarvādhārā bhava śubhe sarveḥ saṃpūjitā mukham |
munibhirmanubhirdevaiḥ siddhaiśca dānavādibhiḥ || 35 ||
aṃbuvācītyāga dine gṛhāraṃbha praveśane |
vāpītaḍāgārambhe ca gṛhe ca kṛṣikarmaṇi ||36||
tava pūjāṃ kariṣyanti madvareṇa surādayaḥ |
mūḍhā ye na kariṣyaṃti yāsyaṃti narakaṃ ca te ||37||

vasudhovāca
vahāmi sarva vārāharūpeṇāhaṃ tatrājñayā |
lolāmātreṇa bhagavanviśvaṃ ca sacarācaram ||38||
muktāṃ śukti hareraca śivaliṃgaṃ śivāṃ tathā |
śaṃkhaṃ pradīpaṃ yaṃtraṃ ca māṇikyaṃ hīrakaṃ tathā || 39 ||
yajñasūtraṃ ca puṣpaṃ ca pustakaṃ tulasīdalam |
japamālāṃ puṣpamālāṃ karpūraṃ ca suvarṇakam ||40||
gorocanaṃ caṃdanaṃ ca śālagrāmajalaṃ tathā |
etānvoḍhumaśaktā'haṃ kliṣṭā ca bhagavañchṛṇu || 41 ||
śrībhagavānuvāca
dravyāṇyetāni ye mūḍhā arpayiṣyati suṃdari |
yāsyaṃti kālasūtraṃ te divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ tvayi || 42 ||
ityevamuktvā bhagavān virarāma ca nārada |
babhūva tena garveṇa tejasvī maṃgalagrahaḥ ||43||
pūjāṃ cakruḥ pṛthivyāśca te sarve cājñayā hareḥ |
kaṇvaśākhoktadhyānena tuṣṭuvuśva stavena te || 44 ||
dadurmūlena maṃtreṇa naivedyādikameva ca |
saṃstutā triṣu lokeṣu pūjitā sā babhūva ha ||45||
nārada uvāca
kiṃ dhyānaṃ stavanaṃ tasyā mūlamaṃtraṃ ca kiṃ vada |
gūḍhaṃ sarvapurāṇeṣu śrotuṃ kautūhalaṃ mama || 46 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
ādau ca pṛthivīṃ devo varāheṇa ca pūjitā |
tato hi brahmaṇā paścātpūjitā pṛthivo tadā || 47||
tataḥ sarvairmunīṃdreśva manubhirmānavādibhiḥ |
dhyānaṃ ca stavanaṃ maṃtraṃ śṛṇu vakṣyāmi nārada || 48 ||
oṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ klīṃ vasudhāyai svāhetyanena maṃtreṇa viṣṇunā pūjitā purā |
śvetapaṃkajavarṇābhāṃ śaraccaṃdranibhānanām ||49||
candanotkṣiptasarvāṃgī ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām |
ratnādhārāṃ ratnagarbhā ratnākarasamanvitām ||50||
vahniśuddhāṃ śukādhānāṃ sasmitāṃ vaṃditāṃ bhaje |
dhyānenānena sā devī sarveśva pūjitā'bhavat || 51 ||
stavanaṃ śṛṇu vipreṃdra kaṇvaśākhoktameva ca |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
zaye jaye jalādhāre jalaśīle jalaprade || 52 ||
yajñasūkarajāye tvaṃ jayaṃ dehi jayāvahe |
maṃgale maṃgalādhāre māṃgalye maṃgalaprade || 53 ||
maṃgalārthaṃ maṃgaleśe maṃgalaṃ dehi me bhave |
sarvādhāre ca sarvajñe sarvaśaktisamanvite || 54||
sarvakāmaprade devi sarveṣṭaṃ dehi me bhave |
puṇyasvarūpe puṇyānāṃ bojarūpe sanātani || 55 ||
puṇyāśraye puṇyavatāmālaye puṇyade bhave |
sarvasasyālaye sarvasasthāḍhye sarvasasyade ||56||
sarvasasyahare kāle sarvasasyātmike bhave |
bhūme bhūmipasarvasve bhūmipālaparāyaṇe ||57||
bhūmipānāṃ sukhakare bhūmi dehi ca bhūmide |
idaṃ stotraṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ prātarutthāya yaḥ paṭhet ||58||

koṭijanmasu sa bhavedbalavānbhūmipeśvaraḥ |
bhūmidānakṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ labhyate paṭhanājjanaiḥ || 59 ||
bhūmidāna harātpāpānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
aṃbuvācī bhūkaraṇapāpātsa mucyate dhruvam ||60 ||
anyakūpe kūpakhananapāpātsa mucyate dhruvam |
parabhūmiharātpāpānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 61 ||
bhūmau vīryatyāgapāpādbhūmau dīpādisthāpanāt |
pāpena mucyate so'pi stotrasya paṭhanānmune ||62||
aśvameghaśataṃ puṇyaṃ labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
bhūmidevyā mahāstotraṃ sarvakalyāṇakārakam ||63||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe navamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 ||
atha daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
bhūmidānakṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ pāpaṃ taddharaṇena ca |
parabhūharaṇātpāpaṃ parakūpe khanane tathā || 1 ||
aṃbuvācyāṃ bhūkhanane vīryasya tyāga eva ca |
dīpādisthāpanātpāpaṃ śrotumicchāmi yatnataḥ || 2 ||
anyaṭṭā pṛthivījanyaṃ pāpaṃ yatpṛcchayate param |
yadasti tatpratīkāraṃ vada vedavidāṃ vara || 3 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
vitastimātrabhūmi ca yo dadāti ca bhārate |
saṃdhyāpūtāya viprāya sa yāti śivamaṃdiram ||4||
bhūmi ca sarvasasyāḍhyāṃ brāhmaṇāya dadāti ca |
bhūmireṇupramāṇābdamaṃte viṣṇupade sthitiḥ || 5 ||
grāmaṃ bhūmi ca dhānyaṃ ca brāhmaṇāya dadāti yaḥ |
sarvapāpādvinirmukto cobhau devīpura : sthitau || 6||
bhūmidānaṃ ca tatkāle yaḥ sādhuścānumodate |
sa ca prayāti baikuṃṭhaṃ mitragotrasamanvitaḥ ||7||
svadattāṃ paradattāṃ vā brahmavṛtti harettu yaḥ |
sa tiṣṭhati kālasūtre yāvaccaṃdradivākarau ||8||
tatputrapautraprabhṛtirbhūmihīnaḥ śriyā hataḥ |
putrahīno daridraśca ghoraṃ yāti ca rauravam ||9||
gavāṃ māgaṃ viniṣkṛṣya yaśca sasyaṃ dadāti ca |
divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ caiva kumbhīpāke ca tiṣṭhati || 10 ||
goṣṭaṃ taḍāgaṃ niṣkṛṣya mārge sasyaṃ dadāti yaḥ |
sa tiṣṭhatya siṃpatre ca yāvadidrāścaturdaśa ||11||
paṃca piḍānanuddhṛtya parakūpe ca snāti yaḥ |
prāpnoti narakaṃ caiva snānaṃ niṣphalameva ca ||12||
kāmī bhūmau ca rahasi vīryatyāgaṃ karoti yaḥ |
bhūmiraṃṇupramāṇaṃ ca varṣa tiṣṭhati raurave ||13||
aṃbuvācyāṃ bhūkaraṇaṃ yaḥ karoti ca mānavaḥ |
sa yāti kṛmidaṃśaṃ ca sthitastatra caturyugam || 14||
parakīye luptavū. pe kūpaṃ mūḍhaḥ karoti yaḥ |
puṣkariṇyāṃ ca luptāyāṃ puṣkariṇīṃ dadāti yaḥ || 15 ||
sarvaṃ phalaṃ parasyaiva taptakuṃḍaṃ vrajecca saḥ |
tatra tiṣṭhati saṃtapto yāvadadrāścaturdaśa || 16 ||
parakīye taḍāge ca paṃkamuddhṛtya cogsṛjet |
reṇupramāṇavarṣaṃ ca brahmaloke vasennaraḥ ||17||
piḍaṃ pitre bhūmibharturna pradāya ca mānavaḥ |
śrāddhaṃ karoti yo mūḍho narakaṃ yāti niścitam || 18 ||
bhūmau dīpaṃ yo'rpayati sa cāṃdha: saptajanmasu |
bhūmau śaṃkhaṃ ca saṃsthāpyaṃ kuṣṭhaṃ janmāṃtare labhet || 19||

muktāṃ māṇikyahorau ca suvarṇaṃ ca maṇi tathā |
paṃca saṃsthāpayedbhūmau sa cāṃdhaḥ saptajanmasu || 20 ||
śivaliṃga śivāca ca yastvarpayati bhūtale |
śatamanvaṃtaraṃ yāvatkṛmibhakṣaḥ sa tiṣṭhati || 21 ||
śaṃkhaṃ yaṃtra śilātoyaṃ puṣpaṃ ca tulasīdalam |
yaścārpayati bhūmau ca sa tiṣṭhennara ke dhruvam ||22||
jāmālāṃ puṣpamālaṃ karpūraṃ rocanaṃ tathā |
yo mūḍhacārpayedbhūmau sa yāti narakaṃ dhruvam ||23||
bhūmau candanakāṣṭhaṃ ca rudrākṣaṃ kuśamūlakam |
saṃsthāpya bhūmo narake vasetmanvantarāvadhi ||24||
pustakaṃ yajñasūtraṃ ca bhūmau saṃsthāpayennaraḥ |
na bhavedviprayonau ca tasya janmāṃtare janiḥ ||25||
brahmahatyāsamaṃ pāpamiha vai dhruvam |
granthiyuktaṃ yajñasūtraṃ pūjyaṃ ca sarvavarṇakaiḥ ||26|| labhate
yajñaṃ kṛtvā tu yo bhūmi kṣoreṇa na hi siñcati |
sa yāti taptabhūmiṃ ca saṃtaptaḥ saptajanmasu ||27||
bhūkampe grahaṇe yo hi karoti khananaṃ bhuvaḥ |
janmāntare mahāpāpī hyaṃga hono bhaveddhruvam ||28||
bhavanaṃ yatra sarveṣāṃ bhūmistena prakīrtitā |
kāśyapī kaśyapasyeyamacalā sthirarūpataḥ ||29||
viśvaṃbharā dhāraṇāccānaṃtā'naṃtasvarūpiṇī |
pṛthivī pṛthukanyātvādvistṛtatvānmahāmune ||30||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ || 10 ||
atha ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
śrutaṃ |
pṛthivyupākhyānamatīva sumanoharam |
gaṃgopākhyānamadhunā vada vedavidāṃ vara || 1 ||
bhārate bhāratīśāpātsā jagāma sureśvarī |
viṣṇusvarūpā paramā svayaṃ viṣṇupadoti ca ||2||
kathaṃ kutra yuge kena prārthitā preritā purā |
tatkramaṃ śrotumicchāmi pāpaghnaṃ puṇyadaṃ śubham ||3||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
rājarājeśvaraḥ śrīmānsagaraḥ sūryavaṃśajaḥ |
tasya bhāryā ca vaidarbhī śaivyā ca dve manohare ||4||
tatpatnyāmekaputraśca babhūva sumanoharaḥ |
asamaṃja iti khyātaḥ śaitryāyāṃ kulavardhanaḥ ||5||
anyā cārādhayāmāsa śaṃkaraṃ putrakāmukī |
babhūva garbhastasyāśca harasya ca vareṇa ha || 6 ||
gate śatābde pūrṇe ca māṃsapiṃḍaṃ suṣāva sā |
taddṛṣṭvā sā śivaṃ dhyātvā ruro doccaḥ punaḥ punaḥ || 7 ||
śaṃbhurbrāhmaṇarūpeṇa tatsamīpaṃ jagāma ha |
cakāra saṃvibhajyaitatpiḍaṃ ṣaṣṭisahasradhā ||8||
sarve babhūvuḥ putrāśca mahābalaparākramāḥ |
grīṣmamadhyāhnamārtaṇḍaprabhāmuṣṭa kalevarāḥ ||9||
kapilasya muneḥ śāpādvabhūvurbhasmasācca te |
rājā ruroda tacchrutvā jagāma gahane vane ||10||
tapaścakārāsa maṃjo gaṃgānayanakāraṇāt |
lakṣavarṣaṃ tapastaptvā mamāra kālayogataḥ ||11||
aṃśumāṃstasya tanayo gaṃgānayanakāraṇāt |
tapaḥ kṛtvā lakṣavarṣaṃ mamāra kālayogataḥ ||12||
bhagīrathastasya putro mahābhāgavataḥ sutrīḥ |
vaiṣṇavo viṣṇubhaktabha guṇavānajarāmaraḥ || 13 || Į

tapaḥ kṛtvā lakṣavarṣaṃ gaṃgānayanakāraṇāt |
dadarśa kṛṣṇaṃ grīṣmasthaṃ sūryakoṭisamaprabham || 14 ||
dvimujaṃ muralīhastaṃ kiśoraṃ gopaveṣiṇam |
gopālasuṃdarī rūpaṃ bhaktānugraharūpiṇam ||15||
svecchāmayaṃ paraṃ brahma paripūrṇatamaṃ prabhum |
brahmaviṣṇuśivādyaiśca stutaṃ munigaṇairnutam ||16||
nirliptaṃ sākṣirūpaṃ ca nirguṇaṃ prakṛteḥ param |
īṣaddhāsyaprasannāsyaṃ bhaktānugrahakāraṇam ||17||
vahniśuddhāṃ śukādhānaṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitam |
tuṣṭāva dṛṣṭvā nṛpatiḥ praṇamya ca punaḥ punaḥ || 18 ||
līlayā ca varaṃ prāpa vāṃchitaṃ vaṃśatāraṇam |
kṛtvā ca stavanaṃ divyaṃ pulakāṃkita vigrahaḥ || 19 ||
śrībhagavānuvāca
bhārataṃ bhāratīśāpādgaccha śīghraṃ sureśvari |
sagarasya sutānsarvānpūtānkuru mamājñayā ||20||
tvatsparśa vāyunā pūtā yāsyanti mama mandiram |
bibhrato mama mūrtīśca divyasyandanagāminaḥ ||21||
matpārṣadā bhaviṣyanti sarvakālaṃ nirāmayāḥ |
samucchidya karmabhogānkṛtāñjanmani janmani ||22||
koṭijanmārjitaṃ pāpaṃ bhārate yatkṛtaṃ nṛbhiḥ |
gaṃgāyā vātasparśena naśyatīti śrutau śrutam ||23||
sparśanādarśanāddevyāḥ puṇyaṃ daśaguṇaṃ tataḥ |
mausalasnānamātreṇa sāmānyadivase nṛṇām ||24||
śatakoṭijanmapāpaṃ naśyatīti śrutau śrutam |
yāni kāni ca pāpāni brahmahatyādikāni ca || 25 ||
janmasaṃkhyājitānyeva kāmato'pi kṛtāni ca |
tāni sarvāṇi naśyanti mausalasnānato nṛṇām 26|| ☐
puṇyāhasnānataḥ puṇyaṃ vedā naiva vadanti ca |
kiñcidvadanti te vipra phalameva yathāgamam || 27||
brahmaviṣṇuśivādyāśva sarvaṃ naiva vadanti ca |
sāmānyadivasasnānasaṃkalpaṃ śṛṇu sundari || 28 ||
puṇyaṃ daśaguṇaṃ caiva mausalasnānataḥ param |
tatastriṃśadguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ ravisaṃkramaṇe dine || 29||
amāyāṃ cāpi tattulyaṃ dviguṇaṃ dakṣiṇāyane |
tato daśaguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ narāṇāmuttarāyaṇe ||30||
cāturmāsyāṃ paurṇamāsyāmanaṃtaṃ puṇyameva ca |
akṣayāyāṃ ca tattulyaṃ caitadvede nirūpitam || 31 ||
asaṃkhya puṇya phaladameteṣu snānadānakam |
sāmānya divasa snānāddānācchataguṇaṃ phalam ||32||
manvantarādyāyāṃ tithau yugādyāyāṃ tathaiva ca |
māghasya sitasaptamyāṃ bhīṣmāṣṭamyāṃ tathaiva ca ||33||
athāpyaśokāṣṭamyāṃ ca navamyāṃ ca tathā hareḥ |
tato'pi dviguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ nandāyāṃ naiva durlabham ||34||
daśaharā daśamyāṃ tu yugādyādisamaṃ phalam |
nandāsamaṃ ca vāruṇyāṃ mahatpūrve caturguṇam || 35 ||
tataścaturguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ dvimahatpūrvake sati |
puṇyaṃ koṭiguṇaṃ caiva sāmānyasnānato'pi yat || 36 ||
candroparāgasamaye sūrye daśaguṇaṃ tataḥ |
puṇyamardhodaye kāle tataḥ śataguṇaṃ phalam ||37||
ityevamuktvā deveśo virarāma tayoḥ puraḥ |
tamuvāca tato gaṃgā bhaktinamrātmakaṃdharā ||38||
gaṅgovāca
yāmi cedbhārataṃ nātha bhāratīśāpataḥ purā |
tavājñayā ca rājeṃdra tapasā caiva sāṃpratam ||39||

dāsyaṃti pāpino mahyaṃ pāpāni yāni kāni ca |
tāni me kena naśyaṃti tamupāyaṃ vada prabho ||40||
kati kālaparimitaṃ sthitimeṃ tatra bhārate |
kadā yāsyāmi deveśa tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam ||41||
mamānyadvāṃchitaṃ yadyatsarvaṃ jānāsi sarvavit |
sarvāntarātmansarvajña tadupāyaṃ vada prabho || 42 ||
śrībhagavānuvāca
jānāmi vāṃchitaṃ gaṃge tava sarvaṃ sureśvari |
patiste dravarūpāyā lavaṇodo bhaviṣyati ||43||
sa mamāṃśasvarūpaśca tvaṃ ca lakṣmīsvarūpiṇī |
vidagdhāyā vidagdhena saṃgamo guṇavānbhuvi || 44 ||
yāvatyaḥ saṃti nadyaśca bhāratyādyāśca bhārate |
saubhāgyā tvaṃ ca tāsveva lavaṇodasya saurate 45 ||
adyaprabhṛti deveśi kale: paṃcasahasrakam |
varṣa sthitiste bhāratyāḥ śāpena bhārate bhuvi 46 ||
nityaṃ tvamadhinā sārdhaṃ kariṣyasi raho ratim |
tvameva rasikā devi rasikeṃdreṇa saṃyutā || 47||
tvāṃ stoṣyaṃti ca stotreṇa bhagīrathakṛtena ca |
bhāratasthā janāḥ sarve pūjayiṣyaṃti bhaktitaḥ 48 ||
kaṇvaśākhoktadhyānena dhyātvā tvāṃ pūjayiṣyati |
yaḥ stauti praṇamennityaṃ so'śvamedhaphalaṃ labhet 49||
gaṃgā gaṃgeti yo brūyādyojanānāṃ śatairapi |
mucyate sarvapāpebhyo viṣṇulokaṃ sa gacchati 50 ||
sahasrapāpināṃ snānādyatpāpaṃ te bhaviṣyati |
prakṛterbhaktasaṃsparśādeva taddhi vinaṃkṣyati || 51 ||
pāpināṃ tu sahasrāṇāṃ śavasparśena yattvayi |
tanmaṃtropāsakasnānāttadadhaṃ ca vinaṃkṣyati ||52||
tatraiva tvamadhiṣṭhānaṃ kariṣyasyaghamocanam |
sārdhaṃ saridbhiḥ śreṣṭhābhiḥ sarasvatyādibhiḥ śubhe 53 ||
tattu tīrthaṃ bhavetsadyo yatra tvadguṇakīrtanam |
tvadreṇusparśamātreṇa pūto bhavati pātakī || 54 ||
reṇupramāṇavarṣaṃ ca devīloke, vaseddhruvam |
jñānena tvayi me bhaktyā mannāmasmṛtipūrvakam 55 ||
samutsṛjaṃti prāṇāṃśca te gacchaṃti hareḥ padam |
pārṣadapravarāste ca bhaviṣyati hareśvaram ||56 ||
layaṃ prākṛtikaṃ te ca drakṣyanti cāpyasaṃkhyakam |
mṛtasya bahupuṇyena tacchavaṃ tvayi vinyaset ||57||
prayāti sa ca vaikuṃṭhaṃ yāvadahnaḥ sthitistvayi |
kāyavyūhaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā . bhojayitvā svakarmakam 58 ||
tasmai dadāmi sārūpyaṃ karomi taṃ ca pārṣadam |
ajñānī tvajjalasparśādyadi prāṇānsamutsṛjet 59||
tasmai dadāmi sārūpyaṃ karomi taṃ ca pārṣadama |
anyatra vā tyajetprāṇāṃstvannāmasmṛtipūrvakam 60 ||
tasmai dadāmi sālokyaṃ yāvadvai brahmaṇo vayaḥ |
anyatra vā tyajetprāṇāṃstvannāmasmṛtipūrvakam 61 ||
tasmai dadāmi sārūpyamasaṃkhyaṃ prākṛtaṃ layam |
ratneṃdrasāranirmāṇayānena saha pārṣadaiḥ || 62 ||
sadyaḥ prayāti golokaṃ mama tulyo bhaveddhruvam |
tīrthe'pyatīrthe maraṇe viśeṣo nāsti kaścana ||63||
manmaṃtropāsakānāṃ tu nityaṃ naivedya bhojinām |
pūtaṃ kartuṃ saśakto hi līlayā bhuvanatrayam ||64||
ratneṃdrasārayānena golokaṃ saṃprayāṃti ca |
madbhuktā bāṃdhavā yeṣāṃ tepi paśvādayopi hi || 65 ||
prayāṃti ratnayānena golokaṃ cātidurlabham |
yatra yatra smṛtāste ca jñānena jñāninaḥ sati || 36 |

jīvanmuktāśca te pūtā madbhaktaḥ saṃvidhānataḥ |
ityuktvā śrīharistāṃ ca pratyuvāca bhagīratham 67||
stuhi gaṃgāmimāṃ bhaktyā pūjāṃ ca kuru sāṃpratam |
bhagīrathastāṃ tuṣṭāva pūjayāmāsa bhaktitaḥ || 68 ||
kauthumoktena dhyānena stotreṇāpi punaḥ punaḥ |
praṇanāma ca śrīkṛṣṇaṃ paramātmānamīśvarama ||69||
bhagīrathaśca gaṃgā ca so'ntardhānaṃ cakāra ha |
nārada uvāca
kena dhyānena stotreṇa kena pūjākrameṇa ca || 70 ||
pūjāṃ cakāra nṛpatirveda vedavidāṃ vara |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
snātvā nityakriyāṃ kṛtvā dhṛtvā dhaute ca vāsasī ||71||
saṃpūjya devaṣaṭukaṃ ca saṃyato bhaktipūrvakam |
gaṇeśaṃ ca dineśaṃ ca vahni viṣṇuṃ śivaṃ śivām 72 ||
saṃpūjya devaṣaṭkaṃ ca so'dhikārī ca pūjane |
gaṇeśaṃ vighnanāśāya ārogyāya divākaram || 73||
vahniśaucāya viṣṇuṃ ca lakṣmyarthaṃ pūjayennaraḥ |
śivaṃ jñānāya jñāneśaṃ śivāṃ ca muktisiddhaye ||74 ||
saṃpūjyaitāṃllabhetprājño viparīta mato'nyathā |
dadhyāvanena dhyānena tadvayānaṃ śṛṇu nārada || 75 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 11 ||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
dhyānaṃ ca kaṇvaśākhoktaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam |
śvetapaṃkajavarṇābhāṃ gaṃgāṃ pāpapraṇāśinīm || 1 ||
kṛṣṇa vigrahasaṃbhūtāṃ kṛṣṇatulyāṃ parāṃ satīm |
vahniśuddhāṃ śukādhānāṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām ||2||
śaratpūrṇenduśatakamṛṣṭaśobhākarāṃ varām |
īṣaddhāsyaprasannāsyāṃ śaśvatsusthirayauvanām || 3 ||
nārāyaṇapriyāṃ śāṃtāṃ satsaubhāgyasamanvitām |
bibhratīṃ kabarībhāraṃ mālatīmālyasaṃyutam ||4||
siṃdūrabiṃdulalitaṃ sārva caṃdana biṃdubhi: |
kastūrīpatrakaṃ gaṃḍe nānācitrasamanvitam ||5||
pakva biṃbavinidyācchacārvoṣṭhapuṭamuttamam |
muktāpaṃktiprabhāmuṣṭadaṃtapaṃktimanoramam ||6||
sucāruvaktranayanaṃ sakaṭākṣaṃ manoharam |
kaṭhinaṃ śrīphalākāraṃ stanayugmaṃ ca vibhratīm ||7||
bṛhacchroṇi sukaṭhināṃ raṃbhāstaṃbha viniditām |
sthalapadmaprabhāmuṣṭapādapadmayugaṃ varam ||8||
ratnapādukasaṃyuktaṃ kuṃkumātaṃ sayāvakam |
deveṃdramaulimaṃdāra makaraṃdakaṇāruṇam ||9|| .
surasiddhamunīṃdraiśva dattārghasaṃyutaṃ sadā |
tapasvimaulinikarabhramaraśreṇisaṃyutam 10
muktipradaṃ mumukṣaṇāṃ kāmināṃ sarvabhogadam |
varāṃ vareṇyāṃ varadāṃ bhaktānugrahakāriṇīm || 11||
śrīviṣṇoḥ padadātrī ca bhaje viṣṇupadoṃ satīm |
ityanenaiva dhyānena dhyātvā tripathagāṃ śubhām ||12||

ṣoḍaśa |
āsanaṃ pādyamadhaṃ ca snānīyaṃ cānulepanam ||13||
dattvā saṃpūjayedbrahmannupacārāṇi
dhūpaṃ dīpaṃ ca naivedyaṃ tāṃbūlaṃ śītalaṃ jalam |
vasanaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ mālyaṃ gaṃdhamācamanīyakam ||14||
manoharaṃ sutalpaṃ ca deyānyetāni ṣoḍaśa |
dattvā bhaktyā ca praṇametsaṃstūya saṃpuṭāṃjaliḥ || 15 ||
saṃpūjyaivaṃ prakāreṇa so'śvamedhaphalaṃ bhavet |
nārada uvāca
śrotumicchāmi deveśa lakṣmīkāṃta jagatpate || 16 ||
viṣṇorviṣṇupadīstotraṃ pāpaghnaṃ puṇyakārakam |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śṛṇu nārada vakṣyāmi pāpaghnaṃ puṇyakāraṇam || 17||
rādhāṃgadravasaṃyuktāṃ tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||18||
śivasaṃgītasaṃmugdhaśrīkṛṣṇāṃga samudbhavām yajjanma sṛṣṭerādau ca goloke rāsamaṃḍale |
sannidhāne śaṃkarasya tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham || 19 ||
gopairgopībhirākīrṇe śubhe śubhe rādhāmahotsave |
kārtikī pūrṇimāyāṃ ca tāṃ gaṃgā praṇamāmyaham ||20||
koṭiyojanavistīrṇā dairdhya lakṣaguṇā tataḥ |
samāvṛtā yā goloke tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||21||
ṣaṣṭilakṣayojanā yā tato dairghyaṃ caturguṇā |
samāvṛtā yā vaikuṇṭhe tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||22||
triśallakṣayojanā yā dvaiyeṃ paṃcaguṇā tataḥ |
āvṛtā brahmaloke yā tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||23||
triśallayojanā yā dairghya caturguṇā tataḥ |
āvṛtā śivaloke yā tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||24||
lakṣayojanavistīrṇā dairdhya saptaguṇā tataḥ |
āvṛtā dhruva loke yā tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham || 25||
lakṣayojanavistīrṇā deye pañcaguṇā tataḥ |
āvṛtā caṃdraloke yā tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||26|
ṣaṣṭisahasrayojanā yā dairdhya daśaguṇā tataḥ |
āvṛtā sūryaloke yā tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||27||
lakṣayojanavistīrṇā daighyeṃ paṃcaguṇā tataḥ |
āvṛtā yā tapoloke tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||28||
sahasrayojanāyāmā daiyeṃ daśaguṇā tataḥ |
āvṛtā janaloke yā tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham || 29 ||
daśalakṣayojanā yā dairghya paṃcaguṇā tataḥ |
āvṛtā yā mahaloṃke tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||30||
sahasra yojanāyāmā dairdhya daśaguṇā tataḥ |
āvṛtā yā ca kailāse tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||31||
śatayojanavistīrṇā dairdhya daśaguṇā tataḥ |
maṃdākinī ceṃdraloke tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||32||
pātāle bhagavatī ca vistīrṇā daśayojanā |
tato daśaguṇā dairghya tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||33||
krokamātravistīrṇā tataḥ kṣīṇā ca kutracit |
kṣitau cālakanaṃdā yā tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham || 34||
satye yā kṣīravarṇā ca tretāyāmidusannibhā |
dvāpare caṃdanābhā yā tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham ||35||
jalaprabhā kalo yā ca nānyatra pṛthivotale |
svarge ca nityaṃ kṣīrābhā tāṃ gaṃgāṃ praṇamāmyaham || 36 ||

yattoyakaṇikāsparśe pāpināṃ jñānasaṃbhavaḥ |
brahmahatyādikaṃ pāpaṃ koṭijanmārjitaṃ dahet ||37||
ityevaṃ kathitā brahmangaṃgāpadyakaviṃśatiḥ |
stotrarūpaṃ ca paramaṃ pāpaghnaṃ puṇyajīvanam ||38||
nityaṃ yo hi paṭhedbhaktyā saṃpūjya ca sureśvarīm |
so'śvamedhaphalaṃ nityaṃ labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 39 |
aputro labhate putraṃ bhāryāhīno labhetstriyam |
rogātpramucyate rogī bandhānmukto bhaveddhruvam 40 ||
aspaṣṭakīrtiḥ suyaśā mūrkho bhavati paṃḍitaḥ |
yaḥ paṭhetprātarutthāya gaṃgāstotramidaṃ śubham || 41||
śubhaṃ bhavecca duḥsvapno gaṃgāsnānaphalaṃ labhet |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
stotreṇānena gaṃgāṃ ca stutvā caiva bhagīrathaḥ ||42||
jagāma tāṃ gṛhītvā ca yatra naṣṭāśca sāgarāḥ |
vaikuṇṭhaṃ te yayustūrṇaṃ gaṃgāyāḥ sparśavāyunā ||43||
bhagīrathena sā''nītā tena bhāgīrathī smṛtā |
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ gaṅgopākhyānamuttamam ||44||
puṇyadaṃ mokṣadaṃ sāraṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi |
nārada uvāca
kathaṃ gaṅgā tripathagā jātā bhuvanapāvanī || 45 ||
kutra vā kena vidhinā tatsarvaṃ vada me prabho |
tatrasthāśca janā ye ye te ca kiṃ cakruruttamam ||46||
etatsarvaṃ tu vistīrṇaṃ kṛtvā vaktumihārhasi |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
kāttikyāṃ pūrṇimāyāṃ tu rādhāyāḥ sumahotsavaḥ ||47||
kṛṣṇaḥ saṃpūjya tāṃ rādhāmuvāsa rāsamaṃḍale |
kṛṣṇena pūjitāṃ tāṃ tu saṃpūjya hṛṣṭamānasāḥ || 48 ||
ūcurbrahmādayaḥ sarve ṛṣayaḥ śaunakādayaḥ |
etasminnaṃtare kṛṣṇa saṃgītā ca sarasvatī || 49 ||
jagī sundaratālena vīṇayā ca manoharam |
tuṣṭo brahmā dadau tasyai ratneṃdrasārahārakam ||50 ||
śivo maṇīṃdrasāraṃ tu sarva brahmāṇḍadurlabham |
kṛṣṇaḥ kaustubharatnaṃ ca sarvaratnātparaṃ varam ||51||
amūlya ratnanirmāṇaṃ hārasāraṃ ca rādhikā |
nārāyaṇaśca bhagavāndado mālāṃ manoharām || 52||
amūlyaratnanirmāṇaṃ lakṣmīḥ kanaka kuṃḍalam |
viṣṇumāyā bhagavatī mūlaprakṛtirīśvarī ||53||
durgā nārāyaṇīśānā brahmabhakti sudurlabhām |
dharmabuddhi ca dharmañca yaśaśca vipulaṃ bhave || 54 ||
vahniśuddhāṃśukaṃ vahnirvāyuśca maṇinūpurān |
etasminnaṃtare śaṃbhurbrahmaṇā prerito muhuḥ ||55 ||
jagau śrīkṛṣṇa saṃgītaṃ rāsollāsa samanvitam |
mūrcchānāpuḥ surāḥ sarve citraputtalikā yathā 56||
kaṣṭena cetanāṃ prāpya dadṛśū rāsamaṃḍale |
sthalaṃ sarvaṃ jalākīrṇa rādhākṛṣṇa vihīnakam 57 ||
atyuccai ruruduḥ sarve gopā gopyaḥ surā dvijāḥ |
dhyānena brahmā bubudhe sarve tīrthamabhīpsitam ||58||

gatañca rādhayā sārdhaṃ śrīkṛṣṇo dravatāmiti |
tato brahmādayaḥ sarve tuṣṭuvuḥ parameśvaram ||59||
svamūrti darśaya vibho vāṃchitaṃ varameva naḥ |
etasminnaṃtare tatra vāgbabhūvāśarīriṇī || 60 ||
tāmeva śuśruvuḥ sarve |
suvyaktāṃ madhurānvitām |
sarvātmā'hamiyaṃ śaktirbhaktānugrahavigrahā || 61 ||
mamāpyasyāśca dehena karttavyaṃ ca kimāvayoḥ |
manavo mānavāḥ sarve munayaścaiva vaiṣṇavāḥ || 62 ||
manmantrapūtā māṃ draṣṭumāgamiṣyaṃti matpadam |
mūrti draṣṭuṃ ca suvyaktāṃ yadīcchatha sureśvarāḥ ||63 ||
karotu śaṃbhustatraiva madīyaṃ vākyapālanam |
svayaṃ vidhātastvaṃ brahmannājñāṃ kuru jagadgurum || 64 ||
kartuṃ śāstraviśeṣaṃ ca vedāṃgaṃ sumanoharam |
apūrvamantra nikaraiḥ sarvābhīṣṭaphalapradaiḥ ||65||
stotraiśca nikaraidhya naiiryutaṃ pūjāvidhikramaiḥ |
manmaṃtrakavacastotraṃ kṛtvā yatnena gopanam ||66 ||
bhavaṃti vimukhā yena janā māṃ tatkariṣyati |
sahasreṣu śateṣveko manmaṃtropāsako bhavet || 67||
janā manmaṃtrapūtāśca gamiṣyaṃti ca matpadam |
anyathā na bhaviṣyaṃti sarve golokavāsinaḥ || 68||
niṣphalaṃ bhavitā sarvaṃ brahmāṃḍaṃ caiva brahmaṇaḥ |
janāḥ pañca prakārāśca yuktāḥ sraṣṭuṃ bhave bhave || 69||
pṛthivīvāsinaḥ kecitkecitsvarganivāsinaḥ |
idaṃ kartuṃ mahādevaḥ karoti devasaṃsadi || 70 ||
pratijñāṃ sudṛḍhāṃ sadyastato mūrti ca drakṣyati |
ityevamuktvā gagane virarāma sanātanaḥ || 71 ||
tacchrutvā jagatāṃ dhātā tamuvāja śivaṃ mudā |
brahmaṇo vacanaṃ śrutvā jñāneśo jñānināṃ varaḥ || 72 ||
gaṅgātoyaṃ kare kṛtvā svīkāraṃ ca cakāra saḥ |
saṃyuktaṃ viṣṇumāyāyā maṃtraughaiḥ śāstramuttamam ||73||
vedasāraṃ kariṣyāmi pratijñāpālanāya ca |
gaṃgātoyamupaspṛśya mithyā yadi vadejjanaḥ || 74||
sa yāti kālasūtraṃ ca yāvadvai brahmaṇo vayaḥ |
ityukte śaṃkare brahmangoloke surasaṃsadi || 75 ||
āvirbabhūva śrīkṛṣṇo rādhayā sahitastataḥ |
taṃ sudṛṣṭvā ca saṃhṛṣṭāstuṣṭuvuḥ puruṣottamam ||76||
paramānaṃdapūrṇāśca cakruśca punarutsavam |
kālena śaṃbhurbhagavānmuktidīpaṃ cakāra saḥ ||77 ||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ sugopyaṃ ca sudurlabham |
sa eva dravarūpā sā gaṅgā golokasaṃbhavā || 78 ||
rādhākṛṣṇāṃga saṃbhūtā bhuktimuktiphalapradā |
sthāne sthāne sthāpitā sā kṛṣṇena ca parātmanā ||
kṛṣṇasvarūpā paramā sarvabrahmāṃḍapūjitā || 79 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12||
atha trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
kale: pañcasahasrābde samatīte sureśvara |
kva gatā sā mahābhāga tanme vyākhyātumarhasi || 1 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
bhārataṃ bhāratīśāpātsamāgatyeśvarecchayā |
jagāma tatra vaikuṃṭhe śāpānte punareva sā ||2||

bhāratī bhārataṃ tyaktvā tajjagāma hareḥ padam |
padmāvatī ca śāpāṃte gaṃgā sā caiva nārada ||3||
gaṃgā sarasvatī lakṣmīrśvatāstisraḥ priyā hareḥ |
tulasīsahitā brahmaśvatasraḥ kīrtitāḥ śrutau ||4||
nārada uvāca
kenopāyena sā devī viṣṇupādābjasaṃbhavā |
brahmakamaṃḍalusthā ca śrutā śivapriyā ca sā || 5 ||
babhūva sā muniśreṣṭha gaṃgā nārāyaṇapriyā |
aho kena prakāreṇa tanme vyākhyātumarhasi || 6 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
purā babhūva goloke sā gaṃgā dravarūpiṇī |
rādhākṛṣṇāṅgasaṃbhūtā tadaṃśā tatsvarūpiṇī ||7||
dravādhiṣṭhātṛdevī yā rūpeṇāpratimā bhuvi |
navayauvanasaṃpannā sarvābharaṇabhūṣitā || 8 ||
śaranmadhyāhnapadmāsyā sasmitā sumanoharā |
taptakāñcanavarṇābhā śaraccaṃdrasamaprabhā || 9||
snigdhaprabhā'tisusnigdhā śuddhasattvasvarūpiṇī |
supīnakaṭhinaśroṇiḥ sunitaṃba yugaṃdharā || 10 ||
pīnonnataṃ sukaṭhinaṃ stanayugmaṃ suvartulam |
sucārunetrayugalaṃ sukaṭākṣaṃ suvaṃkrimam || 11 ||
krimaṃ kabarībhāraṃ mālatīmālyasaṃyutam |
siṃdūrabidulalitaṃ sārdhaṃ candanabiṃdubhiḥ || 12 ||
kastūrī patrikāyuktaṃ gaṃḍayugmaṃ manoramam |
baṃdhūkakusumākāramadharoṣṭhaṃ ca suṃdaram ||13||
pakvadāḍimabījābhadaṃtapaṃktisamujjvalam |
vāsasī vahniśuddhe ca nīvoyukte ca bibhratī || 14 ||
sā sakāmā kṛṣṇapārśve samuvāsa sulajjitā |
vāsasā mukhamācchādya locanābhyāṃ vibhormukham 15 ||
nimeṣarahitābhyāṃ ca pibaṃtī satataṃ mudā |
praphullavadanā harṣānnavasaṃgamalālasā || 16 ||
mūcchitā prabhurūpeṇa pulakāṃkitavigrahā |
etasminnaṃtare tatra vidyamānāca rādhikā || 17 ||
gopītriṃśatkoṭiyuktā koṭicandrasamaprabhā |
kopenāraktapadmāsyā raktapaṃkajalocanā || 18||
pītā caṃpakavarṇābhā gajendra maṃdagāminī |
amūlya ratna nirmāṇanānābhūṣaṇabhūṣitā ||19||
amūlyaratnakhacitamamūlyaṃ vahniśaucakam |
pītavastrasya yugalaṃ nīvīyuktaṃ ca vibhratī ||20||
sthalapadmaprabhāyuṣṭaṃ komalaṃ ca suraṃjitam |
kṛṣṇadattārghyasaṃyuktaṃ vinyasaṃtī padāṃbujam || 21 ||
ratnendrasāra nirmāṇa vimānādavaruhya sā |
sevyamānā ca ṛṣibhiḥ śvetacāmaravāyunā || 22 ||
kastūrībiṃdubhiryuktaṃ candanena samanvitam |
dīptadīpaprabhākāraṃ siṃdūraṃ biṃduśobhitam ||23||
dadhatī bhālamadhye ca sīmaṃtāghaḥ sthalojjvale |
pārijātaprasūnānāṃ mālāyuktaṃ suvaṃkrimam ||24||
sucārukavarībhāraṃ kaṃpayaṃtī sukaṃpitā |
sucārurāgasaṃyuktamoṣṭhaṃ kaṃpayatī ruṣā ||25||
gatvovāsa kṛṣṇapārśve ratnasiṃhāsane śubhe |
sakhīnāṃ ca samūhaśca paripūrṇā vibhoḥ priyā ||26||
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā ca samuttasthau kṛṣṇaḥ sādarapūrvakam |
saṃbhāṣya madhurālāpaiḥ sasmitaśca sasaṃbhramaḥ ||27||
praṇemuratisaṃtrastā gopā namrātmakaṃdharāḥ |
tuṣṭuvuste ca bhaktaghā ca tuṣṭāva parameśvaraḥ ||28||

utthāya gaṃgā sahasā stuti bahu cakāra sā |
kuśalaṃ paripapraccha bhītā'tivinayena ca || 29||
namrabhāgasthitā trastā śuṣkakaṇṭhoṣṭhatālukā |
dhyānena śaraṇāyattā śrīkṛṣṇacaraṇāṃbuje ||30||
tāṃ hṛtpadmasthitāṃ kṛṣṇo bhītāyai cābhayaṃ dadau |
babhūva sthiracittā sā sarveśvaravareṇa ca ||31||
ūrdhvasihāsanasthāṃ ca rādhāṃ gaṃgā dadarśa sā |
susnigdhāṃ sukhadṛśyāṃ ca jvalaṃtīṃ brahmatejasā ||32||
asaṃkhyabrahmaṇaḥ kartrīmādisṛṣṭeḥ sanātanīm |
sadā dvādaśavarṣīyāṃ kanyābhinavayauvanām ||33||
viśvavandyāṃ nirupamāṃ rūpeṇa ca guṇena ca |
śāṃtāṃ kāṃtāmanaṃtāṃtāmādyaṃtarahitāṃ satīm ||34||
śubhāṃ subhadrāṃ subhagāṃ svāmisaubhāgyasaṃyutām |
sauṃdarya suṃdarī śreṣṭhāṃ sarvāsu suṃdarīṣu ca || 35 ||
kṛṣṇācagāṃ kṛṣṇasamāṃ tejasā vayasā tviṣā |
pūjitāṃ ca mahālakṣmī lakṣmyā lakṣmīśvareṇa ca ||36||
pracchādyamānāṃ prabhayā samāmīśasya suprabhām |
sakhīdattaṃ ca tāṃbūlaṃ bhuktavaṃtoṃ ca durlabham ||37||
ajanyāṃ sarvajananīṃ dhanyāṃ mānyāṃ ca māninīm |
kṛṣṇaprāṇādhidevīṃ ca prāṇapriyatamāṃ ramām ||38||
dṛṣṭvā rāseśvarīṃ tṛptiṃ na jagāma sureśvarī |
nimeṣarahitābhyāṃ ca locanābhyāṃ papau ca tām 39 ||
etasminnaṃtare rādhā jagadīśamuvāca sā |
vācā madhurayā śāṃtā vinītā sasmitā mune 40 ||
rādhovāca
keyaṃ prāṇeśa kalyāṇī sasmitā tvanmukhāṃbujam |
paśyaṃtī sasmitaṃ pārśve sakāmā vakralocanā ||41||
mūrcchāṃ prāpnoti rūpeṇa pulakāṃkita vigrahā |
vastreṇa mukhamācchādya nirīkṣantī punaḥ punaḥ ||42||
tvaṃ cāpi tāṃ saṃnirīkṣya sakāmaḥ sasmitaḥ sadā |
mayi jīvati goloke bhūtā durvṛttirīdṛśī ||43||
tvameva caiva durvṛttaṃ vāraṃ vāraṃ karoṣi ca | kṣamāṃ karomi premṇā ca strī jātiḥ snigdhamānasā |
saṃgṛhyemāṃ priyāmiṣṭāṃ golokādgaccha laṃpaṭa |
anyathā na hi te bhadraṃ bhaviṣyati vrajeśvara || 45||
caṃdanakānane |
kṣamā kṛtā mayā pūrvaṃ sakhīnāṃ vacanādaho ||46 ||
dṛṣṭastvaṃ virajāyukto mayā
tvayā macchabdamātreṇa tirodhānaṃ kṛtaṃ purā |
dehaṃ tatyāja viraṃjā nadīrūpā babhūva sā ||47||
koṭiyojanavistīrṇā tato dairye caturguṇā |
adyāpi vidyamānā sā tava satkīrtirūpiṇī ||48 ||
gṛhaṃ mayi gatāyāṃ ca punargatvā tadaṃtike |
ucca ruroda viraje viraje ceti saṃsmaran || 49||
tadā toyātsamutthāya sā yogātsiddhayoginī |
sālaṃkārā mūrtimatī dadau tubhyaṃ ca darśanam ||50||
tatastāṃ ca samākṣipya vīryādhānaṃ kṛtaṃ tvayā |
tato babhūvustasyāṃ ca samudrāḥ sapta eva ca ||51||
dṛṣṭastvaṃ śobhayā gopyā yuktacaṃpakakānane |
sadyo macchandamātreṇa tirodhānaṃ kṛtaṃ tvayā || 52||
caṃdramaṃḍale |
tatastasyāḥ śarīraṃ ca snigdhaṃ tejo babhūva ha || 53 ||
śobhā dehaṃ parityajya jagāma
saṃvibhajya tvayā dattaṃ hṛdayena vidūyatā |
ratnāya kiṃcitsvarṇāya kiṃcinmaṇivarāya ca ||54||
kicitstrīṇāṃ mukhābjebhyaḥ kiṃcidrājñe ca kiṃcana |
kiṃcitkisalayebhyaśva puṣyebhyaśvāpi kiṃcana || 55||

kiṃcitphalebhyaḥ pakvebhyaḥ sasyebhyaścāpi kiṃcana |
nṛpadevagṛhebhyaśca saṃskṛtebhyaśca kicana || 56 ||
kiṃcinnūtanapatrebhyo dugdhebhyaścāpi kiṃcana |
dṛṣṭastvaṃ prabhayā gopyā yukto vṛndāvane vane || 57 ||
sadyo macchandamātreṇa tirodhānaṃ kṛtaṃ tvayā |
pramā dehaṃ parityajya jagāma sūryamaṃḍape || 58||
tatastasyāḥ śarīraṃ ca tīvraṃ tejo babhūva ha |
saṃvibhajya tvayā dattaṃ premṇā prarudatā purā || 59 ||
visṛṣṭaṃ cakṣuṣoḥ kṛṣṇa lajjayā madbhayena ca |
hutāśanāya kiṃcicca yakṣebhyaścāpi kiṃcana || 60 ||
kiṃcitpuruṣasiṃhebhyo devebhyaścāpi kiṃcana |
kicidviṣṇujanebhyaśca nāgebhyo'pi ca kiṃcana || 61||
brāhmaṇebhyo munibhyaśca tapasvibhyaśca kiṃcana |
strībhyaḥ saubhāgyayuktābhyo yaśasvibhyaśca kiṃcana ||
tattu dattvā ca sarvebhyaḥ pūrvaṃ praruditaṃ tvayā |
śāṃtigopyā yutastvaṃ ca dṛṣṭo'si rāsamaṃḍale ||63||
vasaṃte puṣpaśayyāyāṃ mālyavāṃścaṃdanokṣitaḥ |
ratnapradīpairyuktaṃ ca ratnanirmāṇa maṃdire || 64||
ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣāḍhyo ratnabhūṣitayā saha |
tayā dattaṃ ca tāṃbūlaṃ bhuktavāṃśca purā vibho || 65||
sadyo macchandamātreṇa tirodhānaṃ kṛtaṃ tvayā |
śāṃtirdehaṃ parityajya bhiyā līnā tvayi prabho || 66 ||
tatastasyāḥ śarīraṃ ca guṇaśreṣṭhaṃ babhūva ha |
saṃvibhajya tvayā dattaṃ premṇā prarudatā purā || 67||
viśve tu vipine kiṃcidbrahmaṇe ca mayi prabho |
śuddhasattvasvarūpāyai kiṃcillakṣmyai purā vibho || 68||
tvanmantropāsakebhyaśca śāktebhyaścāpi kiṃcana |
tapasvibhyaśca dharmāya dharmiṣṭhebhyaśca kiṃcana || 69 ||
mayā pūrvaṃ ca tvaṃ dṛṣṭo gopyā ca kṣamayā saha |
suveṣayukto mālāvāngaṃdhacaṃdana carcitaḥ || 70 ||
ratnabhūṣitayā gaṃdhacaṃdanakṣitayā saha |
sukhena mūcchitastalpe puṣpacaṃdana carcite ||71|| ||
rilaṣṭo nidritayā sadyaḥ sukhena navasaṃgamāt |
mayā prabodhitā sā ca bhavāṃśca smaraṇaṃ kuru ||72||
gṛhītaṃ pītavastraṃ ca muralī ca manoharā |
vanamālākaustubhaścāpyamūlyaṃ ratnakuṃḍalam || 73 ||
paścātpradattaṃ premṇā ca sakhīnāṃ vacanādaho |
lajjayā kṛṣṇavarṇo'bhūdbhavānpāpena yaḥ prabho ||74 ||
kṣamā dehaṃ parityajya lajjayā pṛthivīṃ gatā |
tatastasyāḥ śarīraṃ ca guṇa śreṣṭhaṃ babhūva ha || 75 ||
saṃvibhajya tvayā dattaṃ premṇā prarudatā punaḥ |
kiṃciddattaṃ viṣṇave ca vaiṣṇavebhyaśca kiṃcana || 76 ||
dhārmikebhyaśca dharmāya durbalebhyaśca kiṃcana |
tapasvibhyo'pi devebhyaḥ paṃḍitebhyaśca kiṃcana ||77 ||
etatte kathitaṃ sarvaṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi |
tvadguṇaṃ caiva bahuśo na jānāmi paraṃ prabho || 78 ||
ityevamuktvā sā rādhā raktapaṃkajalocanā |
gaṃgāṃ vaktuṃ samārebhe namrāsyāṃ lajjitāṃ satīm 79 ||
gaṃgā rahasyaṃ vijñāya yogena siddhayoginī |
tirobhūya sabhāmadhye svajalaṃ praviveśa sā ||80||
rādhā yogena vijñāya sarvatrāvasthitāṃ ca tām |
pānaṃ kartuṃ samārebhe gaṃḍūṣātsidvayoginī || 81 ||
gaṅgā rahasyaṃ vijñāya yogena siddhayoginī |
śrīkṛṣṇacaraṇāṃbhoje viveśa śaraṇaṃ yayau || 82||
goloke sā ca vaikuṇṭhe brahmalokādike tathā |
dadarśa rādhā sarvatra naiva gaṅgāṃ dadarśa sā || 83 ||

sarvatra jalaśūnyaṃ ca śuṣkapaṃkaṃ ca golakam |
jalajaṃtusamūhaiśva mṛtadehaiḥ samanvitam ||84||
brahmaviṣṇuśivānaṃtadharmendra divākarāḥ |
manavo munayaḥ sarve devasiddhatapasvinaḥ ||85||
golokaṃ ca samājagmuḥ śuṣkakaṇṭoṣṭatālukāḥ |
sarve praṇemurgoviṃdaṃ sarveśaṃ prakṛteḥ param ||86||
varaṃ vareṇyamvaradamvariṣṭhamvarakāraṇam |
gopikā gopavṛndānāṃ sarveṣāṃ pravaramprabhum || 87||
nirīhañca nirākāraṃ nirliptaṃ ca nirāśrayam |
nirguṇaṃ ca nirutsāhaṃ nirvikāraṃ nirañjanam ||88||
svecchāmayaṃ ca sākāraṃ bhaktānugrahakārakam |
sattvasvarūpaṃ satyeśaṃ sākṣirūpaṃ sanātanam || 89 ||
paraṃ pareśaṃ paramaṃ paramātmānamīśvaram |
praṇamya tuṣṭuvuḥ sarve bhaktinamrātmakandharāḥ ||90||
sagadgadāḥ sāśrunetrāḥ pulakāṃkitavigrahāḥ |
sarve saṃstūya sarveśaṃ bhagavaṃtaṃ parātparam ||91||
jyotirmayaṃ paraṃ brahma sarvakāraṇakāraṇam |
amūlya ratna nirmāṇacitra siṃhāsana sthitam ||92||
sevyamānaṃ ca gopālaḥ śvetacāmaravāyunā |
gopālikā nṛtyagītaṃ paśyataṃ sasmitaṃ mudā |
prāṇādhikapriyatamaṃ rādhāvakṣasthalasthitam |
tayā pradattaṃ tāṃbūlaṃ bhuktavaṃtaṃ suvāsitam || 94 ||
paripūrṇatamaṃ rāse dadṛśuśca sureśvaram |
munayo manavaḥ siddhāstāpasāśca tapasvinaḥ ||95||
prahṛṣṭamanasaḥ sarve jagmuḥ paramavismayam |
parasparaṃ samālokya procuste ca caturmukham ||96||
niveditaṃ jagannāthaṃ svābhiprāyamabhīpsitam |
brahmā tadvacanaṃ śrutvā viṣṇuṃ kṛtvā svadakṣiṇe ||97||
vāmato vāmadevaṃ ca jagāma kṛṣṇasannidhim |
paramānandayuktaṃ tra paramānandarūpiṇam ||98||
sarvaṃ kṛṣṇamayaṃ dhātā dadarśa rāsamaṃḍale |
sarvaṃ samāna veṣaṃ ca samānāsanasaṃsthitam ||99||
dvibhujaṃ muralīhastaṃ vanamālāvibhūṣitam |
mayūrapicchacūḍaṃ ca kaustubhena virājitam || 100 ||
atīva kamanīyaṃ ca sundaraṃ śāṃtavigraham |
guṇabhūṣaṇarūpeṇa tejasā vayasā tviṣā || 101 ||
paripūrṇatamaṃ sarvaṃ sarveśvaryasamanvitam |
kiṃ sevyaṃ sevakaṃ kiṃ vā dṛṣṭvā nirvaktumakṣamaḥ || 102 ||
kṣaṇaṃ tejaḥ svarūpaṃ ca rūpaṃ tatra sthitaṃ kṣaṇam |
nirākāraṃ ca sākāraṃ dadarśa dvividhaṃ kṣaṇam || 103 ||
ekameva kṣaṇaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ rādhayā rahitaṃ param |
pratyekāsanasaṃsthaṃ ca tayā sārdhaṃ ca tatkṣaṇam || 104||
rādhārūpadharaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ kṛṣṇarūpaṃ kalatrakam |
strīrūpaṃ ca puruṣaṃ vidhātā dhyātumakṣamaḥ || 105||
hṛtpadmasthaṃ ca śrīkṛṣṇaṃ dhyātvādhyānena cakṣuṣā |
cakāra stavanaṃ bhaktyā parihāramanekadhā || 106||
tataḥ svacakṣurunmīlya punaśca tadanujñayā |
dadarśa kṛṣṇa mekaṃ ca rādhāvakṣaḥsthalasthitam ||107||
svapārṣadaiḥ parivṛtaṃ gopīmaṃḍalamaṃḍitam |
punaḥ praṇemustaṃ dṛṣṭvā tuṣṭuvuḥ parameśvaram || 108||
tadabhiprāyamājñāya tānuvāca rameśvaraḥ |
sarvātmā sa ca sarvajñaḥ sarveśaḥ sarvabhāvanaḥ || 109 || l
śrībhagavānuvāca
āgaccha kuśalaṃ brahmannāgaccha kamalāpate |
ihāgaccha mahādeva śaśvatkuśalamastu vaḥ || 110 ||

āgatā hi mahābhāga gaṅgānayanakāraṇāt |
gaṅgā ca caraṇāmbhoje bhayena śaraṇaṃ gatā || 111||
rādhe māṃ pātumicchantīṃ dṛṣṭvā matsannidhānataḥ |
dāsyāmīmāṃ ca bhavatāṃ yūyaṃ kuruta nirbhayām || 112 ||
śrīkṛṣṇasya vacaḥ śrutvā sasmitaḥ kamalodbhavaḥ |
tuṣṭāva rādhāmārādhyāṃ śrīkṛṣṇaparipūjitām || 113 ||
vaktraiścatubhiḥ saṃstūya bhaktinamrātmakaṃdharaḥ |
dhātā caturṇā vedānāmuvāca caturānanaḥ || 114 ||
caturānana uvāca
gaṅgā tvadaṅgasambhūtā prabhośca rāsamaṇḍale |
yuvayordravarūpā sā mugdhayoḥ śaṅkarasvanāt ||115||
kṛṣṇāṃśāca tvadaṃśā ca tvatkanyāsadṛśī priyā |
tvanmaṃtragrahaṇaṃ kṛtvā karotu tava pūjanam || 116||
bhaviṣyati patistasyā vaikuṇṭheśaścaturbhujaḥ |
bhūsthāyāḥ kalayā tasyāḥ patirlavaṇavāridhiḥ || 117 ||
golokasthā ca yā gaṅgā sarvatrasthā tathāmbike |
tadaṃbikā tvaṃ deveśī sarvadā sā tvadātmajā || 118 ||
brahmaṇo vacanaṃ śrutvā svīcakāra ca sasmitā |
bahirbabhūva sā kṛṣṇapādāṅguṣṭanakhāgrataḥ || 119 ||
tatraiva satkṛtā śāntā tasthau teṣāṃ ca madhyataḥ |
uvāsa toyādutthāya tadadhiṣṭhātṛdevatā || 120 ||
tattoyaṃ brahmaṇā kiñcitsthāpitaṃ ca kamaṇḍalo |
kiñciddadhāra śirasi candrārdhakṛtaśekharaḥ || 121||
gaṅgāyai rādhikā mantraṃ pradadau kamalodbhavaḥ |
tatstotrakavacaṃ pūjāṃ vidhānaṃ dhyānameva ca ||122||
sarvaṃ tatsāmavedoktaṃ puraścaryākramaṃ tathā |
gaṅgā tāmeva saṃpūjya vaikuṃṭhaṃ prayayau saha || 123 ||
lakṣmīḥ sarasvatī gaṅgā tulasī viśvapāvanī |
etā nārāyaṇasyaiva catasro yoṣito mune || 124||
atha taṃ sasmitaḥ kṛṣṇo brahmāṇaṃ samuvāca saḥ |
sarvakālasya vṛttāṃtaṃ durbodhamavipaścitām || 125 ||
śrīkṛṣṇa uvāca
gṛhāṇa gaṅgāṃ he brahman he viṣṇo he maheśvara |
śṛṇu kālasya vṛttāṃtaṃ matto brahmanniśāmaya || 126 ||
yūyaṃ ca ye'nye devāśca munayo manavastathā |
siddhā yaśasvinaścaiva ye ye'traiva samāgatāḥ || 127 ||
ete jīvanti goloke kālacakravivarjite |
jalāplute sarvaviśvaṃ jātaṃ kalpakṣayo'dhunā || 128||
brahmādyā yenyaviśvasthāste vilīnādhunā mayi |
vaikuṇṭhaṃ ca vinā sarvaṃ jalamagnaṃ ca padmaja || 129 ||
gatvā sṛṣṭi kuru punarbrahmalokādikaṃ bhavam |
svaṃ brahmāṃḍaṃ viracaya paścādgaṅgā prayāsyati || 130 ||
evamanyeṣu viśveṣu sṛṣṭo brahmādikaṃ punaḥ |
karomyahaṃ punaḥ sṛṣṭiṃ gaccha śīghraṃ suraiḥ saha || 131 ||
gato bahutaraḥ kālo yuṣmākaṃ ca caturmukhāḥ |
gatāḥ katividhāste ca bhaviṣyanti ca vedhasaḥ || 132||
ityuktvā rādhikānātho jagāmāṃtaḥpure mune |
devā gatvā punaḥ sṛṣṭi cakrureva prayatnataḥ || 133||
goloke sā sthitā gaṅgā vaikuṇṭhe śivalokake |
brahmaloke sthitā'nyatra yatra yatra puraḥ sthitā || 134||
tatraiva sā gatā gaṅgā cājñayā paramātmanaḥ |
nirgatā viṣṇupādābjāttena viṣṇupadī smṛtā || 135||

ityevaṃ kathitaṃ brahmangaṃgopa |
khyānamuttamam |
sukhadaṃ mokṣadaṃ sāraṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi ||136||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe gaṃgopākhyāne trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12 ||
atha caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
lakṣmīḥ sarasvatī gaṃgā tulasī viśvapāvanī |
etā nārāyaṇasyaiva catasraśva priyā iti || 1||
gaṃgā jagāma vaikuṇṭhamidameva śrutaṃ mayā |
kathaṃ sā tasya patnī ca babhūveti ca na śrutam ||2||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
gaṃgā jagāma vaikuṇṭhaṃ tatpaścājjagatāṃ vidhiḥ |
gatvovāca tayā sārdhaṃ praṇamya jagadīśvaram || 3 ||
brahmovāca
rādhā kṛṣṇāṃgasaṃbhūtā yā devī dravarūpiṇī |
navayauvanasaṃpannā suśīlā suṃdarī varā ||4|
śuddhasattvasvarūpā ca krodhāhaṃkāravajitā |
tadaṃgasaṃbhavā nānyaṃ vṛṇotīyaṃ ca taṃ vinā || 5||
tatrātimāninī rādhā sā ca tejasvinī varā |
samudyuktā pātumimāṃ bhīteyaṃ buddhipūrvakam || 6 ||
viveśa caraṇāṃbhoje kṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ |
sarvatra golakaṃ śuṣkaṃ dṛṣṭā'hamagamaṃ tadā ||7||
goloke yatra kṛṣṇaśca sarvavṛttāṃta prāptaye |
sarvāṃtarātmā sarveṣāṃ jñātvā'bhiprāyameva ca || 8||
bahiśvakāra gaṃgāṃ ca pādāṃguṣṭanasvāgrataḥ |
dattvā'syai rādhikāmaṃtraṃ pūrayitvā ca golakarḥ ||
praṇamya tāṃ ca rādheśaṃ gṛhītvā'trāgamaṃ prabho |
gāṃdharveṇa vivāhena gṛhāṇemāṃ sureśvarīm ||10||
sureśvareṣu rasiko rasikeyaṃ samāgatā |
tvaṃ ratnaṃ puṃsu deveśa strīratnaṃ strīṣviyaṃ satī || 11 ||
vidagdhāyā vidagdhena saṃgamo guṇavānbhavet |
upasthitāṃ svayaṃ kanyāṃ na gṛhṇātīha yaḥ pumān ||
taṃ vihāya mahālakṣmī ruṣṭā yāti na saṃśayaḥ |
yo bhavetpaṃḍitaḥ so'pi prakṛtiṃ nāvamanyate || 13||
sarve prākṛtikāḥ puṃsaḥ kāminyaḥ prakṛteḥ kalāḥ |
tvameva bhagavānnāyo nirguṇaḥ prakṛteḥ paraḥ || 14 ||
ardhāṅgaṃ dvibhujaḥ kṛṣṇo yo'dhogena caturbhujaḥ |
kṛṣṇavāmāṃgasaṃbhūtā babhūva rādhikā purā || 15 || |
dakṣiṇāṃśaḥ svayaṃ sā ca vāmāṃśā kamalā tathā |
teneyaṃ tvāṃ vṛṇotyeva yatastvaddehasaṃbhavā || 16 ||
ekāṃgaṃ caitra strīpuṃsoryathā prakṛtipūruṣī |
ityevamuktvā dhātā tāṃ taṃ samarpya jagāma saḥ || 17||
gāṃdharveṇa vivāhena tāṃ jagrāha hariḥ svayam |
nārāyaṇaḥ karaṃ dhṛtvā puṣpacaṃdanacacitam ||18||
reme ramāpatistatra gaṃgayā sahito mudā |
gaṃgā pṛthvīṃ gatā yā sā svasthānaṃ punarāgatā ||
nirgatā viṣṇupādābjāttena viṣṇupadīti ca |
mūcchīṃ saṃprāpa sā devī navasaṃgamalīlayā || 20 ||
rasikā sukhasaṃbhogādrasikeśvarasaṃyutā |
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā duḥkhitā vāṇī padmayā varjitā'pi ca ||

nityamarṣyati tā vāṇī na ca gaṃgā sarasvatīm |
gaṃgā śaśāpa kopena bhārate ca haripriyā || 22 ||
gaṅgayā saha tasyaiva tisro bhāryā ramāpateḥ |
sārdhaṃ tulasyā paścācca catraścābhavanmune ||23||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskaṃdhe caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 18 ||
atha pañcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
nārāyaṇapriyā sādhvī kathaṃ sā ca babhava ha |
tulasī kutra saṃbhūtā kā vā sā pūrvajanmani || 1 ||
kasya vā sā kule jātā kasya kanyā kule satī |
kena vā tapasā sā ca saṃprāptā prakṛteḥ param ||2||
nirvikāraṃ nirīhaṃ ca sarvaviśvastrarūpakam |
nārāyaṇaṃ paraṃ brahma parameśvaramīśvaram ||3||
sarvārādhyaṃ ca sarveśaṃ sarvajñaṃ sarvakāraṇam |
sarvādhāraṃ sarvarūpaṃ sarveṣāṃ paripālakam ||4||
kathametādṛśī devī vṛkṣatvaṃ samavāpa ha |
kathaṃ sā'pyasuragrastā saṃvabhūva tapasvinī ||5||
susnigdhaṃ me mano lolaṃ prerayanmāṃ muhurmuhuḥ |
chettumarhasi saṃdehaṃ sarvaṃ saṃdehabhaṃjana || 6 ||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
manuśca dakṣasāvaṇiḥ puṇyavānvaiṣṇavaḥ śuciḥ |
yaśasvī kīrtimāṃścaiva viṣṇoraṃśasamudbhavaḥ ||7||
tatputrau brahmasāvaṇirdhamiṣṭo vaiṣṇavaḥ śuciḥ |
tatputro dharmasāvaṇivaiṣṇavaśva jitendriyaḥ ||8||
tatputro rudrasāvaṇirbhaktimānvijitendriyaḥ |
tatputro devasāvaṇiviṣṇuvrataparāyaṇaḥ || 9 ||
tatputra indrasāvarṇirmahāviṣṇuparāyaṇaḥ |
vṛpadhvajaśva tatputro vṛṣadhvajaparāyaṇaḥ || 10 ||
yasyāśrame svayaṃ śaṃbhurāsīddevayugatrayam |
putrādapi para: sneho nṛpe tasmiñchivasya ca || 11 ||
na ca nārāyaṇaṃ mene na lakṣmīṃ na sarasvatīm |
pṛjāṃca sarvadevānāṃ dūrībhūtāṃ cakāra saḥ || 12||
bhādre māsi mahālakṣmīpūjāṃ matto babhaṃja ha |
tathā māghīyapaṃcamyāṃ vistṛtāṃ sarvadaivataiḥ ||13||
pāpaḥ sarasvatīpūjāṃ dūrībhūtāṃ cakāra saḥ |
yajñaṃ ca viṣṇupūjāṃ ca nardataṃ taṃ divākaraḥ || 14 ||
cukopa devī bhūpeṃdraṃ śaśāpa śivakāraṇāt |
bhraṣṭaśrīstvaṃ ca bhaveti taṃ śāpa divākaraḥ || 15 ||
śūlaṃ gṛhītvā taṃ sūryamadhāvacchaṃkaraḥ svayam |
pitrā sārddha dineśa brahmāṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayau || 16 ||
śivastriśūlahastaśca brahmalokaṃ yayau krudhā |
brahmā sūryaṃ puraskṛtya vaikuṇyaṃ ca yayau bhiyā || 17 ||
brahmakaśyapamārtaṃḍāḥ saṃtrastāḥ śuṣkatālukāḥ |
nārāyaṇaṃ ca sarveśaṃ te yayuḥ śaraṇaṃ bhiyā || 18 ||
murdhnā praṇemuste gatvā tuṣṭuvuśca punaḥ punaḥ |
sarvaṃ nivedanaṃ cakrurbhayasya kāraṇaṃ harau || 19 ||
nārāyaṇaśca kṛpayā tebhyaśca hyabhayaṃ dadau |
sthirā bhavata he bhītā bhayaṃ kiṃ ca mayi sthite ||
smaraṃti ye yatra yatra māṃ vipattau bhayānvitāḥ |
tāṃstatra gatvā rakṣāmi cakrahastastvarānvitaḥ 21||
pātā'haṃ jagatāṃ devāḥ kartā ca satataṃ sadā |
sraṣṭā ca brahmarūpeṇa saṃhartā śivarūpataḥ || 22||

śivo'haṃ tvamahaṃ cāpi sūryo'haṃ triguṇātmakaḥ |
vidhāya nānārūpaṃ ca karomi sṛṣṭipālanam ||23||
yūyaṃ gacchata bhadraṃ vo bhaviṣyati bhayaṃ kutaḥ |
adyaprabhṛti madvareṇa bhayaṃ vo nāsti śaṃkarāt ||24||
sarveśo vai sa bhagavāñchaṃkaraca satāṃ gatiḥ |
bhaktādhīnaśca bhaktānāṃ bhaktātmā bhaktavatsalaḥ || 25 ||
sudarśanaḥ śivaścaiva mama prāṇādhikaḥ priyaḥ |
brahmāṇḍeṣu na tejasvī he brahmannanayoḥ paraḥ || 26 ||
śaktaḥ sraṣṭuṃ mahādevaḥ sūryakoṭiṃ ca līlayā |
koṭiṃ ca brahmagāmevaṃ nāsādhyaṃ śūlinaḥ prabhoḥ || 27 ||
bāhyajñānaṃ naiva kiṃciddhyāyate māṃ divāniśam |
manmaṃtrānmadguṇānbhaktayā paṃcavaktreṇa gāyati || 28 ||
ahamevaṃ citayāmi tatkalyāṇaṃ divāniśam |
ye yathā māṃ prapadyate tāṃstathaiva bhajāmyaham ||29||
śivasvarūpo bhagavāñchaviṣṭhātṛdevatā |
śivaṃ bhavati tasmācca śivaṃ tena vidurbudhāḥ || 30 ||
etasminaṃtare tatra jagāma śaṃkaraḥ śivaḥ |
śūlahasto vṛṣārūḍho raktapaṃkajalocanaḥ || 31 ||
avaruhya vṛpāttūrṇaṃ bhaktinamrātmakandharaḥ |
nanāma bhaktayā taṃ śāṃtaṃ lakṣmīkāṃtaṃ parātparam ||32||
ratnasiṃhāsanasthaṃ ca ratnālaṃkārabhūṣitam |
kirīṭinaṃ kuṇḍalinaṃ cakriṇaṃ vanamālinam ||33||
navonanoradaśyāmaṃ suṃdaraṃ ca caturbhujam |
caturbhujaiḥ sevitaṃ ca śvetacāmaravāyunā ||34||
caṃdanakṣitasarvāṅgaṃ bhūtiṃ pītavāsasam |
lakṣmotradattataṃbūlaṃ bhuktavaṃtaṃ ca nārada ||35||
vidyādharīnṛtyagītaṃ paśyaṃ taṃ sasmitaṃ sadā |
īśvaraṃ paramātmānaṃ bhaktānugrahavigraham || 36 ||
taṃ nanāma mahādevī brahmaṇā namitaśca saḥ |
nanāma sūryo bhaktayā ca saṃtrastaścaṃdraśekharam || 37||
kalyapaśca mahābhaktayā tuṣṭāva ca nanāma ca |
śivaḥ saṃstūya sarveśaṃ rāmuvāsa sukhāsane ||38||
sukhāsane sukhāsīnaṃ viśrāṃta caṃdraśekharam |
śvetacāmaravātena sevitaṃ viṣṇupārṣadaiḥ ||39||
pīyūṣatulyamadhuraṃ vacanaṃ sumanoharam |
viṣṇuruvāca
āgato'si kathaṃ cātra vada kopasya kāraṇam ||40||
mahādeva uvāca
vṛpadhvajaṃ ca madbhakaṃ mama prāṇādhikaṃ priyam |
sūryaḥ śaśāpa iti me prakopasya tu kāraṇam ||41||
putravatsalaśokena sūrya haṃtuṃ namudyataḥ |
sa brahmāṇaṃ prapannaśca sūryaśca savidhistvayi ||42||
svayi me śaraṇāpatrā vyānena vacasā'pi vā |
nirāpado viśaṃkāste jarā mṛtyuśva tairjitaḥ ||43||
pratyakṣaṃ śaraṇāpatrastatkalaṃ kiṃ vadāmi bhoḥ |
harismṛtiścābhayadā sarvamaṃgaladā sadā || 44 ||
ki me bhaktasya bhavitā tanme brūhi jagattrabho |
śrīhatasyāsya mūḍhasya sūryaśāpena hetunā ||45 ||
viṣṇuvāca
kālo'tiyāto devena yugānāmekaviṃśatiḥ |
vaikuṇṭhaṃ ghaṭikārdhena śīghraṃ gaccha tvamālayam ||46 ||

vṛṣadhvajo mṛtaḥ kālādurnivāryātsudāruṇāt |
rathadhvajaśva tatputro mṛtaḥ so'pi śriyā hataḥ ||47||
tatputrau ca mahābhāgo dharmadhvajakuśadhvajo |
hṛtaśriyo sūryaśāpātsmṛtī paramavaiṣṇavī ||48||
rājyabhraṣṭau śriyā bhraṣṭo kamalātapasā ratau |
tayośca bhāryayorlakṣmī: kalayā ca bhaviṣyati || 49||
saṃpadyukto tadā to ca nṛpaśreṣṭho bhaviṣyataḥ |
mṛtaste sevakaḥ śaṃbho gaccha yūyaṃ ca gacchata || 50 ||
ityuktvā ca salakṣmīkaḥ sabhāto'bhyaṃtaraṃ gataḥ |
devā jagmuḥ saṃprahṛṣṭāḥ svāśramaṃ paramā mudā ||
śivaśva tapase śīghraṃ paripūrṇatamo yayau || 51 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe nārāyaṇanāradasaṃvāde
śaktiprādurbhāve paṃcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 15 ||
atha ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
lakṣmīṃ tau ca samārādhya cogreṇa tapasā mune |
varamiṣṭaṃ ca pratyekaṃ saṃprāpaturabhīpsitam || 1 ||
mahālakṣmīvareṇaiva tau pṛthvīśī babhūvatuḥ |
puṇyavaṃtau putravaṃtau dharmadhvajakuśadhvajī || 2 ||
kuśadhvajasya patnī ca devī mālāvatī satī |
sā suṣāva ca kālena kamalāṃśāṃ sutāṃ satīm || 3 ||
sā ca bhūyiṣṭhakālena jñānayuktā babhūva ha |
kṛtvā vedadhvani spaṣṭamuttasthī sūtikāgṛhāt || 4||
vedadhvani sā cakāra jātamātreṇa kanyakāṃ |
tasmāttāṃ ca vedavatīṃ pravadaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ || 5 ||
jātamātreṇa susnātā jagāma tapase vanam |
sarvairniṣiddhā yatnena nārāyaṇaparāyaṇā || 6 ||
ekamanvaṃtaraṃ caiva puṣkare ca tapasvinī |
atyugrāṃ ca tapasyāṃ ca līlayā hi cakāra sā || 7 ||
tathāpi puṣṭā na kliṣṭā navayauvanasaṃyutā |
śuśrāva sā ca sahasā suvācamaśarīriṇīm || 8 ||
janmāṃtare ca te bhartā bhaviṣyati hariḥ svayam |
brahmādibhirdurārādhyaṃ pati lapsyasi suṃdari || 9 ||
iti śrutvā ca sā hṛṣṭā cakāra ha punastapaḥ |
atīva nirjanasthāne parvate gaṃdhamādane || 10 ||
tatraiva suciraṃ taptvā viśvasya samuvāsa sā |
dadarśa puratastatra rāvaṇaṃ durnivāraṇam ||11||
dṛṣṭvā sā'tithibhaktyā ca pādyaṃ tammaṃ dadau kila |
susvādubhūtaṃ ca phalaṃ jalaṃ cāpi suśītalam || 12 ||
tacca bhuktvā sa pāpiṣṭaśvovāsa tatsamīpataḥ |
cakāra praśnamiti tāṃ kā tvaṃ kalyāṇi vartase || 13||
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā sa varārohāṃ pīnaśroṇipayodharām |
śaratpadmotsavāsyāṃ ca sasmitāṃ sudatīṃ satīm || 14 ||
mūrcchāmavāpa kṛpaṇa: kāmavāṇaprapīḍitaḥ |
sa kareṇa samākṛṣya śrṛṃgāraṃ kartumudyataḥ || 15 ||
satī cukopa dṛṣṭvā taṃ stambhitaṃ ca cakāra ha |
sa jaḍo hastapādaiśca kiṃcidvaktuṃ na ca kṣamaḥ || 16 ||
tuṣṭāva manasā devīṃ prayayau padmalocanām |
sā tuṣṭā tasya stavanaṃ sukṛtaṃ ca cakāra ha ||17||
sā śaśāpa madarthe tvaṃ vinaṃkṣyasi sabāṃdhavaḥ |
spṛṣṭāhaṃ ca tvayā kāmādvalaṃ cāpyavalokaya || 18 ||

ityuktvā sā ca yogena dehatyāgaṃ cakāra ha |
gaṃgāyāṃ tāṃ ca saṃnyasya svagṛhaṃ rāvaṇo yayau || 19 ||
maho kimadbhutaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ kiṃ kṛtaṃ bānayā'dhunā |
iti saṃcitya saṃcitya vilalāpa punaḥ punaḥ ||20||
sāca kālāṃtare sādhvī babhūva janakātmajā |
sītādevīti vikhyātā yadarthe rāvaṇo hataḥ || 21 ||
mahātapasvinī sā ca tapasā pūrvajanmataḥ |
lebhe rāmaṃ ca bhartāraṃ paripūrṇatamaṃ harim ||22||
yaṃtrāpa tapasārādhyaṃ durārādhyaṃ jagatpatim |
sā rāmā suciraṃ reme rāmeṇa saha sundarī ||23||
jātismarā na smarati tapasaśca klamaṃ purā |
sukhena tajjaho sarvaṃ duḥkhaṃ cāpi sukhaṃ phale ||24|
mānāprakāravibhavaṃ cakāra suciraṃ satī |
saṃprāpya sukumāraṃ tamatīva navayauvanā || 25||
guṇinaṃ rasikaṃ śāṃtaṃ kāṃtaṃ devamanuttamam |
strīṇāṃ manojñaṃ ruciraṃ tathā lebhe yathepsitam ||26||
pituḥ satyapālanārthaṃ satyasaṃdho raghūdrahaḥ |
jagāma kānanaṃ paścātkālena ca balīyasā ||27||
tasthau samudranikaṭe sītayā lakṣmaṇena ca |
dadarśa tatra vahni ca viprarūpadharaṃ hariḥ ||28||
rāmaṃ ca duḥkhitaṃ dṛṣṭvā sa ca duḥkhī babhūva ha |
uvāca kiṃcitsatyeṣṭaṃ satyaṃ satyaparāyaṇaḥ ||29||
dvija uvāca
bhagavañchrayatāṃ rāma kālo'yaṃ yadupasthitaḥ |
sītāharaṇakālo'yaṃ tavaiva samupasthitaḥ || 30 ||
daivaṃ ca durnivāryaṃ ca na ca daivātparo balī |
jagatprasūṃ mayi nyasya chāyāṃ rakṣāṃtike'dhunā || 31 ||
dāsyāmi sītāṃ tubhyaṃ ca parīkṣāsamaye punaḥ |
devaḥ prasthāpito'haṃ ca na ca vipro hutāśanaḥ || 32 ||
rāmastadvacanaṃ śrutvā na prakāśya ca lakṣmaṇam |
svīkāraṃ vacasaścakre hṛdayena vidūyatā ||33||
vahniryogena sītāyā māyāsītāṃ cakāra ha |
tattulyaguṇa sarvāṃgāṃ dado rāmāya nārada ||34||
sītāṃ gṛhītvā sa yayau gopyaṃ vaktuṃ niṣidhya ca |
lakṣmaṇo naiva bubudhe gopyamanyasya kā kathā || 35 ||
etasminnaṃtare rāmo dadarśa kānakaṃ mṛgam |
sītā taṃ prerayāmāsa tadarthe yatnapūrvakam ||36||
saṃnyasya lakṣmaṇaṃ rāmo jānakyā rakṣaṇe vane |
svayaṃ jagāma tūrṇaṃ taṃ vivyādha sāyakena ca || 37||
lakṣmaṇeti ca śabdaṃ sa kṛtvā ca māyayā mṛgaḥ |
prāṇāṃstatyāja sahasā puro dṛṣṭvā hariṃ smaran || 38||
mṛgadehaṃ parityajya divyarūpaṃ vidhāya ca |
ratnanirmitayānena vaikuṃṭha sa jagāma ha ||39||
vaikuṇṭhalokadvāryāsītki karo dvārapālayoḥ |
punarjagāma taddvāramādeśādvārapālayoḥ || 40 ||
atha śabdaṃ ca sā śrutvā lakṣmaṇeti ca viklavam |
taṃ hi sā prerayāmāsa lakṣmaṇaṃ rāmantannidha ||41|
gate ca lakṣmaṇe rāme rāvaṇo durnivāraṇaḥ |
sītāṃ gṛhītvā prayayau laṃkāmeva svalīlayā ||42||
viṣasāda ca rāmaśca bane dṛṣṭvā ca lakṣmaṇam |
tūrṇaṃ ca svāśramaṃ gatvā sītāṃ naiva dadarśa saḥ || 43!"
mūrcchā saṃprāpa suciraṃ vilalāpa bhṛśaṃ punaḥ | punaḥ punaśca babhrāma tadanveṣaṇapūrvaka "
kālena prāpya tadvārtāṃ godāvarī nadītaṭe |
sahāyānvāna rānkṛtvā babaṃdha sāgaraṃ hariḥ || 45 ||

laṃkāṃ gatvā raghuśreṣṭho jaghāna sāyakana ca |
kālena prāpya taṃ hatvā rāvaṇaṃ bāṃdhavaiḥ saha ||46||
tāṃ ca vahniparīkṣāṃ ca kārayāmāsa satvaram |
hutāśastatra kāle tu vāstavī jānakīṃ dadau ||47||
uvāca chāyā vahni ca rāmaṃ ca vinayānvitā |
kariṣyāmīti kimahaṃ tadupāyaṃ vadasva me ||48||
śrīrāmāgnī ūcatuḥ
tvaṃ gaccha tapase devi puṣkaraṃ ca supuṇyadam |
kṛtvā tapasyāṃ tatraiva svargalakṣmīrbhaviṣyasi || 49 ||
sā ca tadvacanaṃ śrutvā pratapya puṣkare tapaḥ |
divyaṃ trilakṣavarṣaṃ ca svargalakṣmīrbabhūva ha || 50||
sā ca kālena tapasā yajñakuṇḍasamudbhavā |
kāminī pāṃḍavānāṃ ca draupadī drupadātmajā ||51||
kṛte yuge vedavatī kuśadhvajasutā śubhā |
hṛtāyāṃ rāmapatnī ca sīteti janakātmajā ||52||
tacchāyā draupadī devī dvāpare drupadātmajā |
trihāyaṇī ca sā proktā vidyamānā yugatraye || 53||
nārada uvāca
priyāḥ pañca kathaṃ tasyā babhūvurmunipuṅgava |
iti maccittasaṃdehaṃ bhaṃja saṃdehabhaṃjana || 54 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
laṃkāyāṃ vāstavī sītā rāmaṃ saṃprāpa nārada |
rūpayauvanasaṃpannā chāyā ca bahucitayā || 55||
rāmāgnyorājñayā taptamupāste śaṃkaraṃ param |
kāmāturā pativyagrā prārthayaṃtī punaḥ punaḥ || 56 ||
pati dehi patiṃ dehi pati dehi trilocana |
pati dehi patiṃ dehi pañcavāraṃ cakāra sā ||57||
śivastatprārthanāṃ śrutvā prahasya rasikeśvaraḥ |
priye tava priyāḥ pañca bhaviṣyaṃti varaṃ dadau || 58 ||
tena sā pāṃḍavānāṃ ca babhūva kāminī priyā |
iti te kathitaṃ sarvaṃ prastāvaṃ vāstavaṃ śṛṇu || 59 ||
atha saṃprāpya laṃkāyāṃ sītāṃ rāmo manoharām |
vibhīṣaṇāya tāṃ laṃkāṃ dattvā'yodhyāṃ yayau punaḥ ||
ekādaśasahasrābdaṃ kṛtvā rājyaṃ ca bhārate |
jagāma sarverlokaiśca sārdhaṃ vaikuṇṭhameva ca || 61 ||
kamalāṃśā vedavatī kamalāyāṃ viveśa sā |
kathitaṃ puṇyamākhyānaṃ puṇyadaṃ pāpanāśanam || 62||
satataṃ mūrtimantaśca vedāścatvāra eva ca |
saṃti yasyāśca jihvāgre sā ca vedavatī śrutā || 63 ||
dharmadhvajasutākhyānaṃ nibodha kathayāmi te || 64 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 16 ||
atha saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
dharmadhvajasya patnī ca mādhavīti ca viśrutā |
nṛpeṇa sārdhaṃ sā''rāme reme ca gandhamādane || 1 |
śayyāṃ ratikarīṃ kṛtvā puṣpacandanacacitām |
candanāliptasarvāṅgī puṣpacandanavāyunā ||2||
strīratnamaticārvaṅgī ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā |
kāmukī rasikā sṛṣṭā rasikena ca saṃyutā || 3 ||

surate viratirnāsti tayoḥ surativijñayoḥ |
gataṃ devavarṣaśataṃ na jñātaṃ ca divāniśam || 4 ||
tato rājā matiṃ prāpya suratādvirarāma ca |
kāmukī suṃdarī kiṃcinna ca tṛpti jagāma sā || 5 ||
dadhāra garbha sā sadyo daivādandaśataṃ sanī |
śrīgarbhā śrīyutā sā ca saṃbabhūva dine dine || 6 ||
śubhe kṣaṇe śubhadine śubhayoge ca saṃyute |
śubhalagne śubhāṃśe ca śubhasvāmigrahānvite || 7 ||
kārtikī pūrṇimāyāṃ tu sitavāre ca padmajā |
supāva sā ca padmāṃśāṃ padminoṃ tāṃ manoharām || 8 ||
śaratpārvaṇacaṃdrāsyāṃ śaratpaṃkajalocanām |
pakvabiṃbādharoṣṭhī ca paśyaṃtīṃ sasmitāṃ gṛham || 9 ||
hastapādatalāraktāṃ nimnanābhi manoramām |
tadadhastribalīyuktāṃ nitaṃba yugavartulām ||10||
śote sukhoṣṇasarvāgī grīṣme ca sukhaśītalām |
śyāmāṃ sukeśīṃ rucirāṃ nyagrodhaparimaṃḍalām ||11||
pītacaṃpakavarṇābhāṃ sundarīṣveva sundarīm |
narā nāryaśva tāṃ dṛṣṭvā tulanāṃ dātumakṣamāḥ || 12 ||
tena nāmnā ca tulasī tāṃ vadati manīṣiṇaḥ |
sā ca bhūyiṣṭhamānena yogyastrī prakṛtiryathā ||13||
sarveniṣiddhā tapase jagāma vadarīvanam |
tatra devābdalakṣaṃ ca cakāra paramaṃ tapaḥ || 14 ||
manasā nārāyaṇaḥ svāmī bhaviteti ca niścitā |
grīṣme paṃcatapā śīte toyavastrā ca prāvṛṣi || 15 ||
āsanasthā vṛṣṭidhārāḥ sahatīti divāniśam |
viśatsahasravarṣaṃ ca phalatoyāśanā ca sā || 16 ||
triṃśatsahasravarṣaṃ ca patrāhārā tapasvinī |
catvāriṃśatsahasrābdaṃ vāyvāhārā kṛśodarī || 17||
tato daśasahasrābdaṃ nirāhārā babhūva sā |
nirlakṣā caikapādasthā dṛṣṭvā tāṃ kamalodbhavaḥ || 18||
samāyayau varaṃ dātuṃ paraṃ badarikāśramam |
caturmukhaṃ ca sā dṛṣṭvā nanāma' haṃsavāhanam ||19||
tāmuvāca jagatkartā vidhātā jagatāmapi |
brahmovāca
varaṃ vṛṇīṣva tulasi yatte manasi vāṃchitam || 20 ||
haribhakti haredasyimajarāmaratāmapi |
tulasyuvāca
śṛṇu tāta pravakṣyāmi yanme manasi vāṃchitam ||21||
sarvajñasyāpi purataḥ kā lajjā mama sāṃpratam |
ahaṃ tu tulasī gopī goloke'haṃ sthitā purā ||22||
kṛṣṇapriyā kiṃkarī ca tadaṃśā tatsakhī priyā |
govindaratisaṃbhuktāmatṛmāṃ māṃ ca mūrchitām ||23||
dadarśa rāsamaṇḍale |
govidaṃ bhāsayāmāsa māṃ śaśāpa ruṣānvitā || 24||
rāseśvarī samāgatya
yāhi tvaṃ mānava yonimityevaṃ ca śaśāpa ha |
māmuvāca sa goviṃdo madaṃgaṃ ca caturbhujam || 25 ||
labhiṣyasi tapastaptvā bhārate brahmaṇo varāt |
ityevamuktvā deveśo'pyaṃtadhanaṃ cakāra saḥ ||26|
devyā bhiyā tanuṃ tyaktvā prāptaṃ janma guro bhuvi |
ahaṃ nārāyaṇaṃ kāṃtaṃ yātaṃ sundaravigraham || 27||

sāṃprataṃ taṃ patiṃ labdhuṃ baraye tvaṃ ca dehi me |
brahmadeva uvāca
sudāmā nāma gopaśca śrīkṛṣṇāṃga samudbhavaḥ || 28||
tadaṃśaścātitejasvī lebhe janma ca bhārate |
sāṃprataṃ rādhikāśāpāddanuvaṃśasamudbhavaḥ ||29||
śaṃkhacūḍeti vikhyātastrailokye na ca tatsamaḥ |
goloke tvāṃ purā dṛṣṭā kāmonmathitamānasaḥ ||30||
vilaṃbhituṃ na śaśāka rādhikāyāḥ prabhāvataḥ |
sa ca jātismarastasmātsudāmābhūcca sāgare || 31 ||
jātismarā tvamapi sā sarvaṃ jānāsi sundari |
adhunā tasya patnī tvaṃ saṃbhaviṣyasi śobhane || 32 ||
paścānnārāyaṇaṃ śāṃtaṃ kāṃtameva variṣyasi |
śāpānnārāyaṇasyaiba kalayā daivayogataḥ ||33||
bhaviṣyasi vṛkṣarūpā tvaṃ pūtā viśvapāvanī |
pradhānā sarvapuṣpeṣu viṣṇuprāṇādhikā bhave ||34||
tvayā binā ca sarveṣāṃ pūjā ca viphalā bhavet |
vṛndāvane bṛkṣarūpā nāmnā vṛṃdāvatīti ca || 35 ||
tvatpatrairgopigopāśca pūjayiṣyaṃti mādhavam |
vṛkṣādhidevīrūpeṇa sārdhaṃ kṛṣṇena saṃtatam ||36||
bihariṣyasi gopena svacchaṃdaṃ madvareṇa ca |
ityevaṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā sasmitā hṛṣṭamānasā ||37||
praṇanāma ca brahmāṇaṃ taṃ ca kiciduvāca sā |
tulasyubāca
yathā me dvibhuje kṛṣṇe bāṃchā ca śyāmasundare || 38 ||
satyaṃ bravīmi he tāta na tathā ca caturbhuje |
atṛptā'haṃ ca goviṃde daivācchṛṅgārabhaṃgataḥ ||39||
govindasyaiva vacanātprārthayāmi caturbhujam |
tvatprasādena govindaṃ punareva sudurlabham ||40||
dhruvameva labhiṣyāmi rādhābhīti pramocaya |
deva jyāca
gṛhāṇa rādhikā maṃtraṃ dadāmi ṣoḍaśākṣaram ||41||
tasyāśca prāṇatulyā tvaṃ madvareṇa maviṣyasi |
śṛṃgāraṃ yuvayorgopyaṃ na jñāsyati ca rādhikā ||42||
rādhāsamā tvaṃ subhage govindasya bhaviṣyasi |
ityevamuktvā dattvā ca devyā vai ṣoḍaśākṣaram ||43||
maṃtra caṃda jagaddhātā stotraṃ ca kavacaṃ param |
sarvaṃ pūjāvidhānaṃ ca puraścaryāvidhikramam ||44 ||
parāṃ śubhāśiṣaṃ caiva pūjāṃ caiva cakāra sā |
babhūva siddhā sā devī tatprasādādramā yathā ||45 ||
siddhaṃ maṃtreṇa- tulasī varaṃ prāpa yathoditam |
bubhuje ca mahābhogaṃ yadviśveṣu ca durlabham ||46 ||
prasannamanasā devī tatyāja tapasaḥ klamam |
siddhe phale narāṇāṃ ca duḥkhaṃ ca sukhamuttamam ||47||
bhuktvā pītvā ca saṃtuṣṭā śayanaṃ ca cakārakhā |
talpe manorame tatra puṣpacaṃdanacacate || 48||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate navamaskandhe nārāyaṇanāradasaṃvāde tulasyupākhyāne saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ ||17||

athāṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārāyaṇa ubāca
vṛṣadhvajavarāṃganā ||1||
tulasī parituṣṭā ca suṣvāpa hṛṣṭamānasā | navayauvanasaṃpannā
cikṣepa paṃcabāṇaśca pañca bāṇāṃśca tāṃ prati |
puṣpāyudhena sā dagdhā puṣpacaṃdanacarcitā ||2||
pulakāṃcitasarvāṅgī kaṃpitāraktalocanā |
kṣaṇaṃ sā śuṣkatāṃ prāpa kṣaṇaṃ mūrchāmavāpa ha || 3 ||
kṣaṇamudvignatāṃ prāpa kṣaṇaṃ taṃdrāṃ sukhāvahām |
kṣaṇaṃ ca dahanaṃ prāpa kṣaṇaṃ prāpa prasannatām ||4||
kṣaṇaṃ sā cetanāṃ prāpa kṣaṇaṃ prāpa viṣaṇṇatām |
uttiṣṭhaṃtī kṣaṇaṃ talpādgacchaṃtī nikaṭe kṣaṇam ||5||
bhramaṃtī kṣaṇamudvegānnivasaṃtī kṣaṇaṃ punaḥ |
kṣaṇameva samudvegātsuṣvāpa punareva sā ||6||
puṣpacaṃdana talpaṃ ca tadbabhūvātikaṃṭakam |
viṣahāri sukhaṃ divyaṃ suṃdaraṃ ca phalaṃ jalam ||7||
nilayaṃ ca bilākāraṃ sūkṣmavastraṃ hutāśanaḥ |
siṃdūrapatrakaṃ caiva vraṇatulyaṃ ca duḥkhadam ||8||
kṣaṇaṃ dadarśa taṃdrāyāṃ suveṣaṃ puruṣaṃ satī |
sundaraṃ ca yuvānaṃ ca sasmitaṃ rasikeśvaram ||9||
ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitam |
āgacchaṃtaṃ mālyavaṃtaṃ pibaṃtaṃ tanmukhāṃbujam ||10||
candanokṣitasarvāṅga
kathayataṃ ratikathāṃ bruvataṃ madhuraṃ muhuḥ |
saṃbhuktavaṃtaṃ talpe ca samāśliṣyaṃtamīpsitam ||11||
punareva tu gacchaṃtamāgacchaṃtaṃ ca sannidhau |
yāṃtaṃ kva yāsi prāṇeśa tiṣṭhetyevamuvāca sā || 12 ||
punaśca cetanāṃ prāpya vilalāpa punaḥ punaḥ |
evaṃ sā yauvanaṃ prāpya tasthau tatraiva nārada || 13||
śaṃkhacūḍo mahāyogī jaigīṣavyānmanoharam |
kṛṣṇa maṃtraṃ ca saṃprāpya kṛtvā siddhaṃ tu puṣkare || 14||
kavacaṃ ca gale baddhvā sarvamaṃgalamaṃgalam |
brahmaṇaśca varaṃ prāpya dadhe manasi vāṃchitam || 15||
ājñayā brahmaṇaḥ so'pi vadarīṃ ca samāyayau |
āgacchaṃtaṃ śaṃkhacūḍaṃ dadarśa tulasī mune || 16 ||
navayauvanasaṃpannaṃ kāmadevasamaprabham |
śvetacaṃpakavarṇābhaṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitam || 17 ||
śaratpārvaṇacandrāsyaṃ śaratpaṃkajalocanam |
ratnasāravinirmāṇa vimānasthaṃ manoharam || 18 ||
ratnakuṇḍalayugmena gaṃḍasthalavirājitam |
pārijātaprasūnānāṃ mālāvaṃtaṃ ca susmitam ||19||
kastūrī kuṃkumāyuktaṃ sugaṃdhicandanānvitam |
sā dṛṣṭvā sannidhāvenaṃ mukhamācchādya vāsasā || 20 ||
sasmitā taṃ nirīkṣaṃtī sakaṭākṣaṃ punaḥ punaḥ |
babhūvātinamramukhī navasaṃgamalajjitā ||21||
śaradiduvinidyekasvamukheṃduvirājitā |
amūlya ratna nirmāṇa yāvakāvalisaṃyutā ||22||
maṇīṃdrasāra nirmāṇakvaṇanmaṃjīraraṃjitā |
dadhatī kabarībhāraṃ mālatīmālyasaṃyutam || 23||
amūlyaratnanirmāṇa makarākṛtikuṃḍalā | citrakuṃḍalayugmena gaṃḍasthala virājitā 117811
ratneṃdra sārahāreṇa stanamadhyasthalojjvalā |
ratnakaṃkaṇa keyūraśaṃkhabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā ||25||
ratnāṃgulīyakai divya raṃgulyāvalirājitā |
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ lalitāṃ ramyāṃ suśīlāṃ suṃdarīṃ satīm 26 ||

uvāsa tatsamīpe tu madhuraṃ tāmuvāca saḥ |
śaṃkhacūr̤a uvāca
kā tvaṃ kasya ca kanyā ca dhanyā mānyā ca yoṣitām ||27||
kā tvaṃ mānini kalyāṇi sarvakalyāṇadāyini |
maunībhūte kiṃkare māṃ saṃbhāṣāṃ kuru sundari ||28||
ityevaṃ vacanaṃ śrutvā sakāmā vāmalocanā |
sasmitā namratradanā sakāmaṃ tamuvāca sā ||29||
tulasyuvāca
dharmadhvajasutā'haṃ ca tapasyāyāṃ tapovane |
tapasvinyahaṃ tiṣṭhāmi kastvaṃ gaccha yathāsukham ||30||
kāminīṃ kulajātāṃ ca rahasyekākinī satīm |
na pṛcchati kule jāta ityevaṃ me śrutau śrutam ||31||
laṃpaṭo'satkule jāto dharmaśāstrārdhavarjitaḥ |
yenāśrutaḥ śruterarthaḥ sa kāmīcchati kāminīm ||32||
āpātamadhurāṃ mattāmantakāṃ puruṣasya tām |
viṣakuṃbhākārarūpāmamṛtāsyāṃ ca santatam ||33||
hṛdaye kṣuradhārābhāṃ śaśvanmadhurabhāṣiṇīm |
svakāryapariniṣpattyai tatparāṃ satataṃ ca tām ||34||
kāryārtha svāmivaśagāmanyathaivāvaśāṃ sadā |
svāṃtarmalinarūpāṃ ca prasannavadanekṣaṇām ||35||
śrutau purāṇe yāsāṃ ca caritramatidūṣitam |
tāsu ko viśvasetprājñaḥ prajñāvāṃśca durāśayaḥ ||39||
tāsāṃ ko vā ripumitraṃ prārthayati navaṃ navam |
dṛṣṭvā suveṣaṃ puruṣamicchanti hṛdaye sadā ||37||
bāhye svārthe satītvaṃ ca jñāpayantī prayatnataḥ |
śaśvatkāmā ca rāmāca kāmādhārā manoharā ||38||
bāhye chalātkhedayantī svāṃtamaithunamānasā |
kāṃtaṃ hasaṃtī rahasi bāhye'tīva sulajjitā ||39||
māninī maithunābhāve kopanā kalahāṃkurā |. suprītā bhūrisaṃbhogātsvalpamaithunaduḥkhitā || 40 ||
sumiṣṭānnācchītatoyādākāṃkṣantī ca mānase |
sundaraṃ rasikaṃ kāṃtaṃ yuvānaṃ guṇinaṃ sadā || 41||
sutātparamabhisnehaṃ kurvantī rasikopari |
prāṇādhikaṃ priyatamaṃ saṃbhogakuśalaṃ priyam ||42||
paśyantī ritulyaṃ ca vṛddhaṃ vā maithunākṣamam |
kalahaṃ kurvatī śaśvattena sārdhaṃ sukopanā ||43||
vacasā bhakṣayaṃtī taṃ sarpa ākhumivolvaṇam |
duḥsāhasa svarūpā ca sarvadoṣāśrayā sadā ||44 ||
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīnāṃ duḥsādhyā moharūpiṇī |
tapomārgārgalā śaśvanmokṣadvārakapāṭikā ||45 ||
harerbhaktivyavahitā sarvamāyākaraṃḍikā |
saṃsārakārāgāre ca śaśvannigaḍarūpiṇī || 46 ||
indrajālasvarūpā ca mithyā ca svapnarūpiṇī |
bibhratī bāhyasauṃdarya madho'ṅgamatikutsitam ||47 || ||
nānāviṇmūtrapūyānāmādhāraṃ malasaṃyutam |
durgantridoṣasaṃyuktaṃ raktāraktamasaṃskṛtam ||48||
māyārūpā māyināṃ ca vidhinā nirmitā purā |
viṣarūpā mumukṣūṇāmadṛśyā'pyabhivāṃchatām ||49||
ityuktvā tulasī taṃ tu virarāma ca nārada |
sasmitaḥ śaṃkhacūḍaca pravaktamupacakrame || 50 ||

śaṃkhacūḍa uvāca
tvayā yatkathitaṃ devi na ca sarvamalīkakam |
kiṃcitsatyamalīkaṃ ca kiṃcinmatto niśāmaya || 51 ||
nirmitaṃ dvividhaṃ dhātrā strīrūpaṃ sarvamohanam |
kṛtvā rūpaṃ vāstavaṃ ca praśasyaṃ cāpraśaṃsitam 52||
lakṣmī sarasvatī durgā sāvitrī rādhikādikā |
sṛṣṭisūtrasvarūpā ca ādyā sṛṣṭivinirmitā || 53 ||
etāsāmaṃśarūpaṃ ca strīrūpaṃ vāstavaṃ smṛtam |
tatpraśasyaṃ yaśorūpaṃ sarvamaṃgalakārakam ||54||
śatarūpā devahūtī svadhā svāhā ca dakṣiṇā |
chāyāvatī rohiṇī ca varuṇānī śacī tathā || 55||
kuberasya ca patnī yā'pyaditiśca ditistathā |
lopāmudrā'nasūyā ca koṭabhī tulasī tathā || 56||
ahalyā'ruṃdhatī menā tārā maṃdodarī tathā |
damayaṃtī vedavatī gaṅgā ca manasā tathā || 57||
puṣṭistuṣṭiḥ smṛtirmedhā kālikā ca vasundharā |
ṣaṣṭhī maṃgalacaṃḍī ca mūrtiśva dharmakāminī || 58 ||
svastiḥ śraddhā ca śāṃtiśca kāṃtiḥ kṣāṃtistathāparā | nidrā taṃdrā kṣutpipāsā saṃdhyā rātridināni ca |
saṃpattirdhṛtikīrtī ca kriyā śobhā prabhā śivā |
yatstrīrūpaṃ ca saṃbhūtamuttamaṃ tu yuge yuge || 60||
kalākalāṃśarūpaṃ da svarveśyādikameva ca |
tadapraśasyaṃ viśveṣu puṃścalīrūpameva ca || 61 ||
sattvapradhānaṃ yadrūpaṃ yadyuktaṃ ca prabhāvataḥ |
taduttamaṃ ca viśveṣu sādhvīrūpaṃ praśaṃsitam || 62 ||
pravadati manīṣiṇaḥ |
rajorūpaṃ tamorūpaṃ kalāsu vividhaṃ smṛtam ||63||
tadvāstavaṃ ca vijñeyaṃ
madhyamā rajasaścāṃśāstāstu bhogeṣu lolupāḥ |
sukhasaṃbhogavaśyāśca svakārye niratāḥ sadā || 64||
kapaṭā mohakāriṇyo dharmārthavimukhāḥ sadā |
rajorūpasya sādhvītvamato naivopajāyate || 65||
idaṃ madhyamarūpaṃ ca pravadati manīṣiṇaḥ |
tamorūpaṃ manīṣiṇaḥ |
tamorūpaṃ durnivāryamadhamaṃ tadvidurbudhāḥ || 66 ||
na pṛcchati kule jātaḥ paṃḍitaśca parastriyam |
nirjane nirjale vā'pi rahasyapi parastriyam || 67 ||
āgacchāmi tvatsamīpamājñayā brahmaṇo'dhunā |
gāṃdharveṇa vivāhena tvāṃ grahīṣyāmi śobhane || 68 ||
ahameva śaṃkhacūḍo devavidrāvakārakaḥ |
danuvaṃśyo viśeṣeṇa sudāmā'haṃ hareḥ purā || 69 ||
ahamaṣṭasu gopeṣu gopo'pi pāpadeṣu ca |
adhunā dānaveṃdro'haṃ rādhikāyāśca śāpataḥ ||70 ||
jātismaro'haṃ jānāmi kṛṣṇamaṃtra prabhāvataḥ |
jātismarā tvaṃ tulasī saṃbhuktā hariṇā purā || 71 ||
tvameva rādhikākopājjātā'si bhārate bhuvi |
tvāṃ saṃbhoktumutsuko'haṃ nālaṃ rādhābhayāttataḥ 72||
ityevamuktvā sa pumānvirarāma mahāmune |
