sasmitaṃ tulasī tuṣṭā pravaktumupacakrame || 73 ||
tulasyuvāca
evaṃvidho budho nityaṃ viśveṣu ca praśaṃsitaḥ |
kāntamevaṃvidhaṃ kāṃtā śaśvadicchati kāmataḥ || 74||
tvayā'hamadhunā satyaṃ vicāreṇa parājitā |
sa niṃditaścāpyaśucirya: pumāṃśca striyā jitaḥ || 75 ||
nidaṃti pitaro devā bāṃdhavā strījitaṃ naram |
strījitaṃ manasā mātā pitā bhrātā ca niṃdati ||

śuddho vipro daśāhena jātake mṛtake yathā |
bhūmiṣo dvādaśāhena vaiśyaḥ pañcadaśāhataḥ || 77 ||
śūdro māsena vedeṣu mātṛvaddhīnasaṃkaraḥ |
aśuciḥ strojitaḥ śuddhayectiādahanakālataḥ ||78||
na gṛhṇantīcchayā tasya pitaraḥ piṇḍatarpaṇam |
na gṛhṇantyeva devāśva tasya puṣpajalādikam ||79 ||
kiṃ vā jñānena tapasā japahomaprapūjanaiḥ |
kiṃ vidyayā ca yaśasā strībhiryasya mano hṛtam 80 ||
vidyāprabhāvajñānārthaṃ mayā tvaṃ ca parīkṣitaḥ |
kṛtvā parīkṣāṃ kāntasya vṛṇoti kāminī baram ||
varāya guṇahīnāya vṛddhāyājñānine tathā |
daridrāya ca mūrkhāya rogiṇe kutsitāya ca ||82||
atyaṃta kopayuktāya bā'tyaṃta durmukhāya ca |
paṃgave cāṃgahīnāya bāṃdhāya badhirāya ca || 83 ||
jaḍāya caiva mūkāya klībatulyāya pāpine |
brahmahatyāṃ labhetsopi svakanyāṃ pradadāti yaḥ || 84 ||
śāṃtāṃya guṇine caiva yūne ca viduṣe'pi ca |
sādhave ca sutāṃ dattvā daśayajñaphalaṃ labhet || 85 ||
yaḥ kanyāpālanaṃ kṛtvā karoti yadi vikrayam |
vikretā dhanalobhena kumbhīpākaṃ sa gacchati || 86 ||
kanyāmūtraṃ purīṣaṃ ca tatra bhakṣati pātakī |
kṛmibhirdaṃśitaḥ kākairyāvadidrāścaturdaśa || 87||
tadaṃte vyādhisaṃyuktaḥ sa labhejjanma niścitam |
vikrīṇāti māṃsabhāraṃ vahatyeva divāniśam ||88||
ityevamuktvā tulasī virarāma taponidhe |
brahmovāca
kiṃ karoṣi śaṅkhacūḍa saṃvādamanayā saha || 89 ||
gāṃdharveṇa vivāhena tvaṃ cāsyā grahaṇaṃ kuru |
puruṣeṣvasi ratnaṃ tvaṃ strīṣu ratnaṃ tviyaṃ satī || 90 ||
vidagdhāyā vidagdhena saṃgamo guṇavānbhavet |
nirvirodha sukhaṃ rājanko vā tyajati durlabham || 91 ||
yo'virodhasukhatyāgī sa paśurnātra saṃśayaḥ |
ki parīkṣasi tvaṃ kāṃtamīdṛśaṃ guṇinaṃ sati || 92 ||
devānāmasurāṇāṃ ca dānavānāṃ vimardakam |
yathā lakṣmīśra lakṣmīśe yathā kṛṣṇe ca rādhikā 93 ||
yathā mayi ca sāvitrī bhavānī ca bhave yathā |
yathā dharā varāheca dakṣiṇā ca yathā'dhvare || 94 ||
yathā'treranasūyā ca damayaṃtī yathā nale |
rohiṇī ca yathā caṃdre yathā kāme ratiḥ satī ||15||
yathā'ditiḥ kaśyape ca vasiṣṭhe'ruṃdhatī satī |
yathā'halyā gautame ca devahūti kardame || 96||
yathā bṛhaspatī tārā śatarūpā mano yathā |
yathā ca dakṣiṇā yajñe yathā svāhā hutāśane || 97||
yathā śacī maheṃdre ca yathā puṣṭirgaṇeśvare |
devasenā yathā skandhe dharme mūrtiryathā satī || 98 ||
saubhāgyā supriyā tvaṃ ca śaṃkhacūḍe tathā bhava |
anena sārdhaṃ suciraṃ suṃdareṇa ca suṃdari || 99 ||
sthāne sthāne vihāraṃ ca yathecchaṃ kuru saṃtatam |
paścātprāpsyasi goloke śrīkṛṣṇaṃ punareva ca ||
caturbhujaṃ ca vaikuṃṭhe śaṃkhacūḍe mṛte sati ||100 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe'ṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 18 ||

atha ekonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
bicitramidamākhyānaṃ bhavatā samudāhṛtam |
śrutena yena me tṛptirna kadāpi hi jāyate || 1||
tataḥ paraṃ tu yajjātaṃ tattvaṃ bada mahāmate |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
ityevamāśiṣaṃ dattvā svālayaṃ ca yayo vidhiḥ ||2||
gāndharveṇa vivāhena jagṛhe tāṃ ca dānavaḥ |
svarge duṃdubhivādyaṃ ca puṣpavṛṣṭirbabhūva ha ||3||
sa reme rāmayā sārdhaṃ vāsogehe manorame |
mūrcchā sā prāpa tulasī navasaṃgamasaṃgatā ||4||
nimagnā nirjale sādhvī saṃbhoga sukhasāgare |
catuḥ ṣaṣṭikalāmānaṃ catuḥṣaṣṭividhaṃ sukham ||5||
kāmaśāstre yanniruktaṃ rasikānāṃ yathepsitam |
aṃgapratyaṃgasaṃśleṣapūrvakaṃ strī manoharam ||6||
tatsarvaṃ rasaśṛṅgāraṃ cakāra rasikeśvaraḥ |
atīva ramyadeśe ca sarva jaṃtuvivarjite ||7||
puṣpacandanatalpe ca puṣpacandanavāyunā |
puṣpodyāne nadītīre puṣpacandanacarcite ||8||
gṛhītvā rasiko rāse puṣpacandanacacitām |
bhūṣito bhūṣaṇenaiva ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām ||9||
surate viratirnāsti tayoḥ surativijñayoḥ |
jahāra mānasaṃ bharturlolayā līlayā satī || 10 ||
cetanāṃ rasikāyāśca jahāra rasabhāvavit |
vakṣasaścaṃdanaṃ rājñastilakaṃ vijahāra sā || 11 ||
jahāra sa ca tasyāśca siṃdūraṃ biṃdupatrakam |
sa tadvakṣasyuroje ca nakharekhāṃ dadau mudā ||12||
dadau tadvāmapārśve karabhūṣaṇalakṣaṇam |
rājā tadoṣṭhapuṭake dadau radanadaṃśanam ||13||
sā tadgaṃḍayugale sā ca pradadau taccaturguṇam |
āliṃganaṃ cumbanaṃ ca jaṃghādimardanaṃ tathā || 14||
evaṃ parasparaṃ krīḍāṃ cakratustau vijānato |
surate virate to ca samutthāya parasparam ||15||
suvepaṃ cakratustatra yadyanmanasi vāṃchitam |
caṃdanaiḥ kuṃkumāraktaḥ sā tasya tilakaṃ dadau || 16||
sarvāṃge sundare ramye cakāra cānulepanam |
suvāsaṃ caiva tāṃbūlaṃ vahniśuddhe ca vāsasī || 17 ||
pārijātasya kusumaṃ jarārogaharaṃ param | amūlya ratnanirmāṇamaṃgulīyakamuttamam
suṃdaraṃ ca maṇivaraṃ triṣu lokeṣu durlabham |
dāsī tavāhamityevaṃ samuccārya punaḥ punaḥ || 19|| 1 |
nanāma parayā bhaktyā svāminaṃ guṇaśālinam |
sasmitā tanmukhāṃbhojaṃ locanābhyāṃ punaḥ punaḥ || 20 ||
nimeṣarahitābhyāṃ cāpyapaśyatkāmasuṃdaram |
sa ca tāṃ ca samākṛṣya cakāra vakṣasi priyām ||
sasmitaṃ vāsasācchannaṃ dadarśa mukhapaṃkajam |
cucumba kaṭhine gaṃḍe viboṣṭau punareva ca ||22||
dadau tasyai vastrayugmaṃ varuṇādāhṛtaṃ ca yat |
tadāhṛtāṃ ratnamālāṃ triṣu lokeṣu durlabhām ||13||
dadau maṃjīrayugmaṃ ca svāhāyā āhṛtaṃ ca yat |
ke pūrayugmaṃ chāyāyā rohiṇyāścaiva kuṇḍalam ||24||

aṃgulīyakaratnāni ratyāśca karabhūṣaṇam |
śaṅkhaṃ ca ruciraṃ citraṃ yaddattaṃ viśvakarmaṇā ||25||
vicitra padmakaśreṇī śayyāṃ cāpi sudurlabhām |
bhūṣaṇāni ca dattvā ca bhūpo hāsaṃ cakāra ha || 26||
nirmame kabarībhāre tasthā māṃgalyabhūṣaṇam |
sucitraṃ patrakaṃ gaṃḍamaṃḍale'syāḥ samaṃ tathā ||27||
caṃdralekhātribhiryuktaṃ candanena sugandhinā |
parītaṃ paritaścitraiḥ sārdhaṃ kuṃkuma biṃdubhiḥ ||28||
jvalatpradīpākāraṃ ca siṃdūratilakaṃ dadau |
tatpādapadmayugale sthalapadmaviniṃdite ||29||
citrālaktakarāgaṃ ca nakhareṣu dadau mudā |
svavakṣasi muhurtyasya sarāgaṃ caraṇāṃbujam ||30||
he devi tava dāso'hamityuccārya punaḥ punaḥ |
ratnabhūṣitahastena tāṃ ca kṛtvā svavakṣasi || 31 ||
tapovanaṃ parityajya rājā sthānāṃtaraṃ yayau |
malaye devanilaye śaileśaile tapovane ||32||
sthāne sthāne'tiramye ca puṣpodyāne ca nirjane |
kandare kandare siṃdhutīre caivātisundare ||33||
puṣpabhadrānadītīre nīravātamanohare |
puline puline ninye nadyāṃ nadyāṃ nade nade ||34||
madho madhukarāṇāṃ ca madhuravvaninādite |
vispaṃdane surasane nandane gandhamādane || 35||
devodyāne nandane ca citracaṃdanakānane |
caṃpakānāṃ ketakīnāṃ mādhavīnāṃ vane vane || 36 ||
kuṃdānāṃ mālatīnāṃ ca kumudāṃbhojakānane |
kalpavṛkṣe kalpavṛkṣe pārijātavane vane || 37 ||
nirjane kāṃcane sthāne dhanye kāṃcanaparvate |
kāṃcīvane kiṃjalake kaṃcuke kāṃcanākare || 38||
puṣpacandanatalpeṣu puṃskokilarutaśrute |
puṣpacandana saṃyuktaḥ puṣpacandanavāyunā ||39||
kāmukyā kāmukaḥ kāmātsa reme rāmayā saha |
na hi tṛpto dānaveṃdrastṛpti naiva jagāma sā ||40||
haviṣā kṛṣṇavartmeva vavṛdhe madanastayoḥ |
tayā saha samāgatya svāśramaṃ dānavastutaḥ || 41||
ramyaṃ krīḍālayaṃ gatvā vijahāra punaḥ punaḥ |
evaṃ sa bubhuje rājyaṃ śaṅkhacūḍaḥ pratāpavān ||42||
ekamanvantaraṃ pūrṇaṃ rājarājeśvaro mahān |
devānāmasurāṇāṃ ca dānavānāṃ ca saṃtatam ||43||
gaṃdharvāṇāṃ kinnarāṇāṃ rākṣasānāṃ ca śāṃtidaḥ |
hṛtādhikārā devāścaraṃti bhikṣukā yathā || 44||
te sarve'tivipaṇṇāśca prajagmurbrahmaṇaḥ sabhām |
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsu ruruduśva bhṛgaṃ muhuḥ || 45 ||
tadā brahmā suraiḥ sārdhaṃ jagāma śaṃkarālayam |
sarveśaṃ kathayāmāsa vidhātā caṃdraśekharam ||46||
brahmā śivaśca taiḥ sārdhaṃ vaikuṃṭhaṃ ca jagāma ha |
durlabhaṃ paramaṃ dhāma jarāmṛtyuharaṃ param ||47||
saṃprāpa ca varaṃ dvāramāśramāṇāṃ hareraho |
dadarśa dvārapālāṃ rattavihānasthitān ||48||
śobhitānpītavastraiśva ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitān |
sasmitānsmeravasyāmpadyane manoharān 49||
śaṃkhacakragadāpadmadharāṃścaiva caturbhujān |
vanamālānvitānsarvāñśyāmasundara vigrahān ||50||
brahmā tānkathayāmāsa vṛttāṃtaṃ gamanārthakam |
te'nujñāṃ ca dadustasmai praviveśa tadājñayā || 51 ||
evaṃ ṣoḍaśa dvārāṇi nirīkṣya kamalodbhavaḥ |
daivaiḥ sārdhaṃ tānatītya praviveśa hareḥ sabhām || 52 ||

devarṣibhiḥ parivṛtāṃ parivṛtāṃ pārṣadaiśca caturbhujaiḥ |
nārāyaṇasvarūpaiśca sarve: kaustubhabhūṣitaiḥ ||53||
naveṃdumaṃḍalākārāṃ caturasrāṃ manoharām |
maṇīṃdrahāranirmāṇāṃ hīrāsārasuśobhitām || 54 ||
amūlya ratnakhacitāṃ racitāṃ svecchayā hareḥ |
māṇikyamālajālābhāṃ muktāpaṃktivibhūṣitām 55 ||
maṃḍitāṃ maṃḍalākāra ratnadarpaṇakoṭibhiḥ |
vicitraiścitrarekhābhirnānā citravicitritām ||56||
padmarāgeṃdraracitāṃ rucirāṃ maṇipaṃkajaiḥ |
sopānaśatakairyuktāṃ syamantakavinirmitaiḥ ||57||
paṭṭasūtra granthiyuktaṃścārucandanapallavaiḥ |
indranīlastaṃbhavaryairveṣṭitāṃ sumanoharām ||58 ||
tadratnapūrṇakumbhānāṃ samūhaiśca samanvitām |
pārijātaprasūnānāṃ mālājālaivirājitām ||59||
kastūrī kuṃkumāraktaiḥ sugaṃdhicandanadrumaiḥ |
susaṃskṛtāṃ tu sarvatra vāsitāṃ gaṃdhavāyunā || 60 ||
vidyādharīsamūhānāṃ nṛtyajālaivirājitām |
sahasrayojanāyāmāṃ paripūrṇāṃ ca krikaraiḥ ||61 ||
dadarśa śrīhari brahmā śaṃkaraśca suraiḥ saha |
vasaṃtaṃ tanmadhyadeśe yathenduṃ tārakāvṛtam || 32||
amūlya ratnanirmāṇacitra siṃhāsane sthitam |
kirīṭinaṃ kuṇḍalinaṃ vanamālāvibhūṣitam ||63||
candanokṣitasarvāṃgaṃ bibhrataṃ kelipaṃkajam |
purato nṛtyagītaṃ ca paśyaṃtaṃ sasmitaṃ mudā || 64||
yāṃtaṃ sarasvatīkāntaṃ lakṣmīdhṛtapadāmbujam |
lakṣmyā pradattaṃ tāṃbūlaṃ bhuktavaṃtaṃ suvāsitam || 65||
gaṃgayā parayā bhaktyā sevitaṃ śvetacāmaraiḥ |
sarveśva stūyamānaṃ ca bhaktinamrātmakaṃdharaiḥ || 66 ||
evaṃviśiṣṭaṃ taṃ dṛṣṭvā paripūrṇatamaṃ prabhum |
brahmādayaḥ surāḥ sarve praṇamya tuṣṭuvustadā || 67||
pulakāñcitasarvāṃgāḥ sāśrunetrāśca gadgadāḥ |
bhaktāśca parayā bhaktyā bhītā namrātmakaṃdharāḥ || 68 ||
kṛtāṃjalipuṭo bhūtvā vidhātā jagatāmapi |
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsa vinayena hareḥ puraḥ || 69 ||
haristadvacanaṃ śrutvā sarvajñaḥ sarvabhāvavit |
prahasyovāca brahmāṇaṃ rahasyaṃ ca manoharam || 70 ||
śrībhagavānuvāca
śaṃkhacūḍasya vṛttāṃtaṃ sarvaṃ jānāmi padmaja |
madbhaktasya ca gopasya mahātejasvinaḥ purā || 71 ||
śṛṇu tatsarvavṛttāṃtamitihāsaṃ purātanam |
golokasyaiva caritaṃ pāpaghnaṃ puṇyakārakam ||72||
sudāmā nāma gopaśca pārṣadapravaro mama |
sa prāpaṃ dānavīṃ yoniṃ rādhāśāpātsudāruṇāt || 73 ||
tatraikadā'hamagamaṃ svālayādrāsamaṃḍalam |
virajāmapi nītvā ca mama prāṇādhikā parā || 74||
sā māṃ vijayā sārdhaṃ vijñāya kiṃkarīmukhāt |
paścātkruddhā sā jagāma na dadarśa ca tatra tām || 75 ||
virajāṃ ca nadīrūpāṃ māṃ jñātvā ca tirohitam |
punarjagāma sā dṛṣṭvā svālayaṃ sakhibhiḥ saha || 76 ||
sāṃ dṛṣṭvā mandire devī sudāmnā sahitaṃ purā |
bhṛśaṃ sā bhartsayāmāsa maunībhūtaṃ ca susthiram ||77||
tacchrutvā'sahamānaśca sudāmā tāṃ cukopa ha |
sa catāṃ bhartsayāmāsa kopena mama sandhi || 78 ||
tacchrutvā kopayuktā sā raktapaṅkajalocanā |
vahiṣkatuṃ cakārājñāṃ saṃtrastaṃ mama saṃsadi ||79 ||

salīlakṣaṃ samuttastho durvāraṃ tejasolbaṇam |
bahiśvakāra taṃ tūrṇaṃ jalpantaṃ ca punaḥ punaḥ || 80 ||
sā ca tattāḍanaṃ tāsāṃ śrutvā ruṣṭā śaśāpa ha |
yāhi re dānavīṃ yonimityevaṃ dāruṇaṃ vacaḥ ||81||
taṃ gacchaṃtaṃ śataṃ ca rudantaṃ māṃ praṇamya ca |
vārayāmāsa tuṣṭā sā rudatī kṛpayā punaḥ ||82||
he batsa tiṣṭha mā gaccha kva yāsīti punaḥ punaḥ |
samuccārya ca tatpaścājjagāma sā ca viklavam || 83 ||
gopyaśca ruruduḥ sarvā goṣāśvāpi suduḥkhitāḥ |
te sarve rādhikā cāpi tatpaścādvoṣitā gayā || 84||
āyāsyati kṣaṇārdhena kṛtvā śāpasya pālanam |
sudāmaṃstvamihāgacchetyuktvā sā ca nivāritā || 85 ||
golokasya kṣaṇārdhena caikaṃ manvaṃtaraṃ bhavet |
pṛthivyāṃ jagatāṃ dhātarityeva vacanaṃ dhruvam ||86 |
ityevaṃ śaṃkhacūḍaśca punastatraiva yāsyati |
mahābaliṣṭho yogeśaḥ sarvamāyāviśāradaḥ || 87 |
mama śūlaṃ gṛhītvā ca śīghraṃ gacchatu bhāratam |
śivaḥ karotu saṃhāraṃ mama śūlena rakṣasaḥ || 88 ||
mamaiva kavacaṃ kaṃṭhe sarvamaṃgalakārakam |
vibhatti dānavaḥ śaśvatsaṃsāre vijayī tataḥ || 89 ||
tasminbrahmasthite caiva na ko'pi hiṃsituṃ kṣamaḥ |
tadyācanāṃ kariṣyāmi viprarūpo'hameva ca ||9||
satītvahānistatpatnyā yatra kāle bhaviṣyati |
tatraiva kāle tanmṛtyuriti datto varastvayā || 91 ||
tatpatnyāśvodare vīryamarpayiṣyāmi niścitam |
tatkṣaṇe caiva tanmṛtyurbhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ || 92 ||
paścātsā dehamutsṛjya bhaviṣyati mama priyā |
ityuktvā jagatāṃ nātho dadau śūlaṃ harāya ca || 93||
śūlaṃ dattvā yayau śīghraṃ harirabhyantare mudā |
bhārataṃ ca yayurdevā brahmarudrapurogamāḥ ||94 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ekonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 19||
atha viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
brahmā śivaṃ saṃniyojya saṃhāre dānavasya ca |
jagāma svālayaṃ tūrṇaṃ yathāsthānaṃ surottamāḥ || 1||
candrabhāgānadītīre vaṭamūle manohare |
tatra tasthau mahādevo devavistārahetave ||2||
dūtaṃ kṛtvā citrarathaṃ gandharveśvaramīpsitam |
śīghraṃ prasthāpayāmāsa śaṃkhacūḍāntikaṃ mudā || 3 ||
sarveśvarājñayā śīghraṃ yayau tannagaraṃ param |
maheṃdranagarotkṛṣṭaṃ kuberabhavanādhikam ||4||
pañcayojanavistīrṇe dairdhya tadviguṇaṃ bhavet |
sphaṭikākāramaṇibhirnirmitaṃ yānaveṣṭitam ||5||
saptabhiḥ parikhābhiśca durgamābhiḥ samanvitam |
jvaladagninibhaiḥ śaśvatkalpitaṃ ratnakoṭibhiḥ || 6 ||
yuktaṃ ca vīthīśatakairmaṇivedivicitritaiḥ |
parito vaṇijāṃ saudhairnānāvastuvirājitaiḥ ||7||
siṃdūrākāramaṇibhirnimitaiśva vicitritaiḥ |
bhūṣitaṃ bhūpitairdivyairāśramaiḥ śatakoṭibhiḥ || 8||
gatvā dadarśa tanmadhye śaṃkhacūḍālayaṃ param |
atīva balayākāraṃ cathā pūrṇendumaṇḍalam ||9||
jvaladagniśikhāktābhiḥ parikhābhiścatasṛbhiḥ |
taddurgamaṃ ca śatrūṇāmanyeṣāṃ sugamaṃ sukham || 10 ||

rājitaṃ dvādaśadvārairdvārapālasamanvitam ||11||
atyuccairgaganasparśimaṇiśṛṅga virājitam
maṇīndrasāranirmāṇaḥ śobhitaṃ lakṣamandiraiḥ |
śobhitaṃ ratnasopāna ratnastambhavirājitam ||12||
taddṛṣṭavā puṣpadaṃto'pi varaṃ dvāraṃ dadarśa saḥ |
dvāre niyuktaṃ puruṣaṃ śūlahastaṃ ca sasmitam || 13||
tiṣṭhantaṃ piṃgalākṣaṃ ca tāmravarṇaṃ bhayaṃkaram |
kathayāmāsa vṛttāntaṃ jagāma tadanujñayā || 14||
atikramya ca taddvāraṃ jagāmābhyantaraṃ punaḥ |
na ko'pi rakṣati śrutvā dūtarūpaṃ raṇasya ca || 15||
gatvā so'bhyaṃtaradvāraṃ dvārapālamuvāca ha |
raṇasya sarvavṛttāṃta vijñāpayata māciram || 16 ||
sa ca taṃ kathayitvā ca dūto gaṃtumuvāca ha |
sa gatvā śaṃkhacūḍaṃ taṃ dadarśa sumanoharam ||17||
rājamaṇḍalamadhyasthaṃ svarṇasiṃhāsane sthitam |
maṇīndraracitaṃ divyaṃ ratnadaṇḍasamanvitam ||18|| |
ratnakutrimapuṣpaiśca praśastaiḥ śobhitaṃ sadā |
bhṛtyena mastakanyastaṃ svarṇacchatraṃ manoharam ||19||
sevitaṃ pārṣadagaṇai ruciraiḥ śvetacāmaraḥ |
subeṣaṃ sundaraṃ ramyaṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitam || 20 || ||20||
mālyena lepanaṃ sūkṣmaṃ subastraṃ dadhataṃ mune |
dānaveṃdraḥ parivṛtaṃ subeṣaiśva trikoṭibhiḥ || 21 ||
śatakoṭibhiranyaiśva bhramadbhirakhapāṇibhiḥ |
evaṃbhūtaṃ ca taṃ dṛṣṭvā puṣpadantaḥ savismayaḥ || 22 ||
ugāca sa ca vṛttāṃtaṃ yaduktaṃ śaṃkareṇa ca |
puṣpadanta ubāca
rājendra śivabhṛtyo'haṃ punadantābhiṣaḥ prabho ||23||
taduktaṃ śaṃkareṇaiva tadbravīmi tadbravīmi niśāmaya |
rājyaṃ dehi ca devānāmadhikāraṃ ca sāṃpratam ||24||
devāśva śaraṇāpannā deveśaṃ śrīhari param |
haridattvā'sya śūlaṃ ca tena prasthāpitaḥ śivaḥ || 25 ||
puṣpabhadrānadītīre vaṭamūle trilocanaḥ |
viṣayaṃ dehi teṣāṃ ca yuddhaṃ vā kuru niścitam || 26 ||
gatvā vakṣyāmi kiṃ śaṃbhumatha tadvada māmapi |
dūtasya vacanaṃ śrutvā śaṃkhacūḍaḥ prahasya ca ||27||
prabhāte'haṃ gamiṣyāmi tvaṃ ca gacchetyuvāca ha |
sa gatvovāca taṃ tūrṇaṃ vaṭamūlasthamīśvaram ||28||
śaṃkhacūḍasya vacanaṃ tadīyaṃ tanmukhoditam |
etasminnaṃtare skaṃda ājagāma śivāṃtikam ||29||
vīrabhadraśca naṃdī ca mahākāla : subhadrakaḥ |
viśālākṣaśca brāhmaśca piṃgalākṣo vikaṃpanaḥ ||30 ||
virūpo vikṛtiścaiva maṇibhadraśva bāpkalaḥ |
kapilākhyo dīrghadaṃṣṭro vikaṭastāmralocanaḥ ||31||
kālakaṃṭho balobhadraḥ kālajihvaḥ kuṭīcaraḥ |
balonmatto galāgho durjayo durgamastathā ||32||
aṣṭau ca bhairavā raudrā rudrācaikādaśa smṛtāḥ |
vasavo'ṣṭau vasavaśca ādityā dvādaśa smṛtāḥ ||33||
hutāśanaśca candraśca viśvakarmāśvinau ca tāṃ |
kuberaśca yamaścaiva jayanto nalakūbaraḥ ||34||
vāyuśva varuṇaścaiva va maṃgalastathā |
dharmaśca śanirīśānaḥ kāmadevaśca vīryavān ||35||
ugradaṃṣṭrā cogracaṃḍā koṭarā kaiṭabhī tathā |
svayaṃ cāṣṭabhujā devī bhadrakālī bhayaṃkarī || 36 ||

ratnendrasāranirmāṇavimānopari saṃsthitā |
raktavastraparīdhānā raktamālyānulepanā || 37||
nṛtyantī ca hasaṃtī ca gāyantī susvaraṃ mudā |
abhayaṃ dadāti bhaktebhyo'bhayāṃ sā ca bhayaṃ ripum || 38 ||
vibhratī vikaṭāṃ jihvāṃ sulolāṃ yojanāyatām |
śaṃkhacakragadāpadmakhaṅgacarmadhanuḥ śarān ||39||
kharparaṃ vartulākāraṃ gaṃbhīraṃ yojanāyatam |
triśūlaṃ gaganasparśi śaktica yojanāyatām ||40||
mudgaraṃ musalaṃ vajraṃ kheṭaṃ phalakamujjvalam |
vaiṣṇavāstraṃ vāruṇāstraṃ vāhṇeyaṃ nāgapāśakam ||41||
nārāyaṇāstraṃ gāndhavaṃ brahmāstraṃ gāruḍaṃ tathā |
parjanyāstraṃ pāśupataṃ jṛmbhaṇāstraṃ ca pārvatam ||42||
māheśvarāstraṃ vāyavyaṃ daṃḍaṃ saṃmohanaṃ tathā |
avyarthamastrakaṃ divyaṃ divyāstraśatakaṃ param ||43||
āgatya tatra tasthau ca yoginīnāṃ trikoṭibhiḥ |
sādhaṃ ca ḍākinīnāṃ ca vikaṭānāṃ trikoṭibhiḥ ||44||
bhūtapretapiśācāśca kūṣmāṃḍā brahmarākṣasāḥ |
vetālā rākṣasāścaiva yakṣāścaiva tu kinnarāḥ || 45 ||
tābhiścaiva saha skaṃdaḥ praṇamya candraśekharam |
pituḥ pārśve sahāyārthaṃ samuvāsa tadājñayā || 46||
atha dūte gate tatra śaṃkhacūḍaḥ pratāpavān |
uvāca tulasī vārtāṃ gatvā'bhyaṃtarameva ca ||47||
raṇavārtā ca sā śrutvā śuṣkakaṃṭhoṣṭhatālukā |
uvāca madhuraṃ sādhvī hṛdayena vidūyatā || 48 ||
tulasyuvāca
he prāṇabaṃdhā he nātha tiṣṭha me vakṣasi kṣaṇam |
he prāṇādhiṣṭhātṛdeva rakṣa me jīvitaṃ kṣaṇam ||49 ||
bhuṃkṣva janma samāsādya yanme manasi vāṃchitam |
paśyāmi tvāṃ kṣaṇaṃ kicillocanābhyāṃ ca sādaram ||
āndolayaṃte prāṇā me mano dagdhaṃ ca saṃtatam |
duḥsvapnaśca mayā dṛṣṭaśvādyaiva carame niśi || 51 ||
tulasīvacanaṃ śrutvā bhuṃktvā pītvā nṛpeśvaraḥ |
uvāca vacanaṃ prājño hitaṃ satyaṃ yathocitam ||52||
śaṅkhacūḍa uvāca
kālena yojitaṃ sarvaṃ karma bhoganibandhanam |
śubhaṃ harṣaḥ sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ bhayaṃ śokaśca maṃgalam ||53||
kāṃle bhavaṃti vṛkṣāśca skaṃdhavaṃtaśca kālataḥ |
krameṇa puṣpavaṃtaśca phalavaṃtaśca kālataḥ || 54|| .
teṣāṃ phalāni pakvāni prabhavatyeva kālataḥ |
te sarve phalitāḥ kāle pātaṃ yāṃti ca kālataḥ || 55 ||
kāle bhavaṃti viśvāni kāle naśyaṃti sundari |
kālātsraṣṭā ca sṛjati pātā pāti ca kālataḥ ||56||
saṃhartā saṃharetkāle krameṇa krameṇa saṃcaraṃti te |
brahmaviṣṇuśivāda nāmīśvaraḥ prakṛtiḥ parā || 57 ||
sraṣṭā pātā ca saṃhartā sa cātmā kālanartakaḥ |
kāle sa eva prakṛti svābhinnāṃ svecchayā prabhuḥ || 58 ||
nirmāya kṛtavānsarvānviśvasthāṃśca carācarān |
sarveśa: sarvarūpaśca sarvātmā parameśvaraḥ || 59 ||
janaṃ janena janitā janaṃ pāṃti janena yaḥ |
janaṃ janena harate taṃ devaṃ bhaja sāṃpratam || 60 ||
yasyājñayā vāti vātaḥ śīghrīca sāṃpratam |
yasyājñayā ca tapanastapatyeva yathākṣaṇam || 61||
yathākṣaṇa varṣatīṃdro mṛtyuścarati jatuṣu |
yathākṣaṇaṃ dahatyagniśvandro bhramati śotavān || 22|| ||

mṛtyormṛtyuṃ kālakālaṃ yamabhya ca yamaṃ param |
vibhuṃ sraṣṭuśva sraṣṭāraṃ mātuśca mātṛkaṃ bhave || 63 ||
saṃhartāraṃ ca saṃhartustaṃ devaṃ śaraṇa vraja |
ko vā baṃdhuśca keṣāṃ vā sarvabaṃdhuṃ bhaja priye || 64 ||
ahaṃ ko vā ca tvaṃ kā vā vidhinā yojitaḥ purā |
tvayā sāṃrdhaṃ karmaṇā ca punastena viyojitaḥ || 65||
ajñānī kātaraḥ śoke vipattau na ca paṃḍitaḥ |
sukhe duḥkhe bhramaṃtyeva kālanemikrameṇa ca || 66 ||
nārāyaṇa taṃ sarveśaṃ kāṃtaṃ yāsyasi niścitam |
tapaḥ kṛtaṃ yadathaṃ ca purā badarikāśrame || 67 ||
mayā tvaṃ tapasā labdhā brahmaṇastu vareṇa ca |
haryayeṃ yattatra tapo hari prāpsyasi kāmini ||68 ||
vṛṃdāvane ca govindaṃ goloke tvaṃ lamiṣyasi |
ahaṃ yāsyāmi tallokaṃ tanuṃ tyaktvā ca dānavīm ||
taṃtra drakṣyasi māṃ tvaṃ ca drakṣyāmi tvāṃ ca sāṃpratam |
agamaṃ rādhikāśāpādbhārataṃ ca sudurlabham ||70 ||
punaryāsyāmi tatraiva kaḥ śoko me śṛṇu priye |
tvaṃ ca dehaṃ parityajya divyarūpaṃ vidhāya ca || 71 ||
tatkālaṃ prāpsyasi hari māṃ kati kātarā bhava |
ityuktvā ca dināṃte ca tayā sārdhaṃ manoharam 72 ||
suṣvāpa śobhane talpe puṣpacaṃdanacacate |
nānāprakāravibhavaṃ cakāra ratnamaṃdire ||73||
ratnapradīpasaṃyukte strīratnaṃ prāpya sundarīm |
nināya rajanīṃ rājā krīḍākautukamaṃgala ḥ ||74||
kṛtvā vakṣasi tāṃ kāṃtāṃ rudatīmatiduḥkhitām |
kṛśodarīṃ nirāhārāṃ nimagnāṃ śokasāgare ||75||
punastāṃ bodhayāmāsa divyajñānena jñānavit |
purā kṛṣṇena yaddattaṃ bhāḍore tattvamuttamam ||76||
sa ca tasyai dadau sarvaṃ sarvaśokaharaṃ param |
jñānaṃ saṃprāpya sā devī prasannavadanekṣaṇā || 77||
krīḍāṃ cakāra harṣeṇa sarvaṃ matveti naśvaram |
to daṃpatī ca krīḍato nimagno sukhasāgare ||78||r
pulakāṃcitasarvāṃgo mūrcchitoṃ nirjane mune |
aṃgapratyaṃgasaṃyukto suprīto suratotsukau ||79||
ekāṃgī ca tathā to dvo cārdhanārīśvaro yathā |
prāṇeśvaraṃ ca tulasī mene prāṇādhikaṃ param ||80 ||
prāṇādhikāṃ ca tāṃ mene rājā prāṇeśvarī satīm |
to sthito mṛāvasupto ca taṃdritau sundaro samo 81 ||
suvepo sukhasaṃbhogādaceṣṭau sumanoharī |
kṣaṇaṃ sucetano tau ca kathayaṃtau rasāśrayāt || 82||
kathāṃ manoramāṃ divyāṃ hasaṃto ca kṣaṇaṃ punaḥ |
kṣaṇaṃ ca kelisaṃyuktau rasabhāvasamanvitau || 83||
surate viratirnāsti to tadviṣayapaṃḍito |
satataṃ jayayuktau dvo kṣaṇaṃ naiva parājito ||84||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate navamaskandhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde śaktiprādurbhāve viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 20 ||
atha ekaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śrīkṛṣṇaṃ manasā dhyātvā rakṣaḥ kṛṣṇaparāyaṇaḥ |
brāhme muhūrta utthāya puṣpatalpānmanoharāt ||1||
rātrivāsaḥ parityajya snātvā maṃgalavāriṇā |
dhote ca vāsasī dhṛtvā kṛtvā tilakamujjvalam ||2||
dadhyājyamadhulāmāṃśca dadarśa vastu maṃgalam ||3||
cakārāhnikamāvaśyamabhīṣṭadevavaṃdanam

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandha adhyāyaḥ 21
ratnaśreṣṭhaṃ maṇiśreṣṭhaṃ vastraśreṣṭhaṃ ca kāñcanam |
brāhmaṇebhyo dadau bhaktyā yathā nityaṃ ca nārada ||4||
amūlyaratnaṃ yatkicinmuktāmāṇikyahīrakam |
dadau viprāya gurave yātrāmaṅgalahetave ||5||
gajaratnamaśvaratnaṃ dhanaratnaṃ manoharam |
dadau sarvaṃ daridrāya viprāya maṃgalāya ca ||6||
bhāṃḍārāṇāṃ sahasrāṇi nagarāṇāṃ dvilakṣakam |
grāmāṇāṃ śatakoṭi ca brāhmaṇāya dadau mudā ||7||
putraṃ kṛtvā tu rājendraṃ sarveṣu dānaveṣu ca |
putre samarpya bhāryāṃ tāṃ rājyaṃ ca sarvasaṃpadam || 8||
prajānucarasaṃgha ca bhāṃḍāraṃ vāhanādikam |
svayaṃ sannāhayuktaśca dhanuṣpāṇirbabhūva ha || 9 ||
bhṛtyadvārā krameṇaiva cakā sainyasañcayam |
aśvānāṃ ca trilakṣeṇa lakṣeṇa varahastinām || 10 ||
rathānāmayutenaiva dhānuṣkāṇāṃ trikoṭibhiḥ |
trikoṭibhirvarmiṇāṃ ca śūlināṃ ca trikoṭibhiḥ ||
kṛtā senā parimitā dānavendreṇa nārada |
tasyāṃ senāpatiścaiva yuddhaśāstraviśāradaḥ || 12||
mahārathaḥ sa vijñeyo rathināṃ pravaro raṇe |
trilakṣā'kṣauhiṇī senā pati kṛtvā narādhipaḥ || 13||
triśadakṣauhiṇībādhaṃ bhāṃḍaughaṃ ca cakāra ha |
bahirbabhūva śibirānmanasā śrīhari smaran || 14||
ratnendrasāra nirmāṇavimānamāruroha saḥ |
guruvargānpuraskṛtya prayayau śaṃkarāṃtikam || 15||
puṣpabhadrānadītīre yatrākṣayavaṭaḥ śubhaḥ |
siddhāśramaṃ ca siddhānāṃ siddhikṣetraṃ ca nārada || 16 ||
kapilasya tapaḥ sthānaṃ puṇyakṣetre ca bhārate |
paśvimodadhipūrve ca malayasya ca paścime || 17 ||
śrīśailottarabhāge ca gandhamādanadakṣiṇe |
pañcayojanavistīrṇā dairye śataguṇā tathā || 18 ||
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśā bhārate ca supuṇyadā |
śāśvatī jalapūrṇā ca puṣpabhadrā nadī śubhā ||19||
lavaṇābdhipriyā bhāryā śaśvatsobhāgyasaṃyutā |
śarāvatīmiśritā ca nirgatā sā himālayāt 20 ||
gomatīṃ vāmataḥ kṛtvā praviṣṭā paścimodadhau |
tatra gatvā śaṅkhacūḍo dadarśa caṃdraśekharam || 21 ||
baṭamūle samāsīnaṃ sūryakoṭisamaprabham |
kṛtvā yogāsanaṃ dṛṣṭvā mudrāyuktaṃ ca sasmitam || 22||
śuddhasphaṭika saṃkāśaṃ jvalaṃtaṃ brahmatejasā |
triśūlapaṭṭiśadharaṃ vyāghracarmāmbaraṃ varam ||23||
bhaktamṛtyuharaṃ śāntaṃ gaurīkāṃtaṃ manoharam |
tapasāṃ phaladātāraṃ dātāraṃ sarvasaṃpadām ||24||
āśutoṣaṃ prasannāsyaṃ bhaktānugrahakātaram |
viśvanāthaṃ viśvabījaṃ viśvarūpaṃ ca viśvajam ||25||
viśvambharaṃ viśvavaraṃ viśvasaṃhārakārakam |
kāraṇaṃ kāraṇānāṃ ca narakārṇavatāraṇam || 26 ||
jñānapradaṃ jñānabījaṃ jñānānandaṃ sanātanam |
avaruhya vimānācca taṃ dṛṣṭvā dānaveśvaraḥ ||27||
sarvaiḥ sārdhaṃ bhaktiyuktaḥ śirasā praṇanāma saḥ |
vāmato bhadrakālī caskaṃdaṃ ca tatpuraḥ sthitam ||28||
āśiṣaṃ ca dadau tasmai kālī skaṃdaśca śaṃkaraḥ |
uttasthurāgataṃ dṛṣṭvā sarve naṃdāśvarādayaḥ ||29||
parasparaṃ ca bhāṣante cakrustatra ca sāṃpratam |
rājā kṛtvā ca saṃbhāṣāmuvāsa śivasaṃnidhau || 30 || ||
prasannātmā mahādevo bhagavāstamavāca ha |

mahādeva uvāca
vidhātā jagatāṃ brahmā pitā dharmasya dharmavit ||31||
marīcistasya putraśca vaiṣṇavaścāpi dhārmikaḥ |
kaśyapaścāpi tatputro dharmiṣṭhaśca prajāpatiḥ || 32 ||
dakṣaḥ prītyā dadau tasmai bhaktayā kanyāstrayodaśa |
tāsvekā ca danuḥ sādhvī tatsaubhāgyavivardhitā || 33 ||
catvāriṃśahanoḥ putrā dānavāstejasolbaṇāḥ |
teṣveko vipracittiśca mahābalaparākramaḥ ||34||
tatputro dhārmiko daṃbho viṣṇubhaktako jitendriyaḥ |
jajāpa paramaṃ mantraṃ puṣkare lakṣavatsaram || 35 ||
śukrācārya guruṃ kṛtvā kṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ |
tadā tvāṃ tanayaṃ prāpa paraṃ kṛṣṇaparāyaṇam || 36 ||
purā tvaṃ pārṣado gopo gopeṣvapi sudhārmikaḥ |
adhunā rādhikāśāpādbhārate dānaveśvaraḥ ||37||
ābrahmastaṃbaparyantaṃ tucchaṃ mene ca vaiṣṇavaḥ |
sālokyasāṣṭisāyujyasāmīpyaṃ ca harerapi || 38 ||
dīyamānaṃ na gṛhṇanti vaiṣṇavāḥ sevanaṃ vinā |
brahmatvamamaratvaṃ vā tucchaṃ mene ca vaiṣṇavaḥ || 39 || !
indratvaṃ vāmanatvaṃ vā na mene gaṇanāsu ca |
kṛṣṇa bhaktasya te kiṃ vā devānāṃ viṣaye bhramaḥ || 40 ||
dehi rājyaṃ ca devānāṃ matprīti rakṣa bhūmipa |
sukhaṃ svarājye tvaṃ tiṣṭha devāstiṣṭhaṃtu vai pade || 41 ||
alaṃ bhūtavirodhena sarve kaśyapavaṃśajāḥ |
yāni kāni ca pāpāni brahmahatyādikāni ca ||42||
jñātidrohasya pāpāni kalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm |
svasaṃpadāṃ ca hāniṃ ca yadi rājeṃdra manyase ||43||
sarvāvasthā ca samatāṃ keṣāṃ yāti ca sarvadā |
brahmaṇaśca tirobhāvo ye prākṛtike sadā || 44||
āvirbhāvaḥ punastasya prabhavādovvarecchayā |
jñānavṛddhiśca tapasā smṛtilopaśca niścitam ||45||
karoti sṛṣṭi jñānena sraṣṭā so'pi krameṇa ca |
paripūrṇatamo dharmaḥ satye satyāśraye sadā ||46 ||
tribhāgaḥ so'pi tretāyāṃ dvibhāgo drāpare smṛtaḥ |
ekabhāgaḥ kalau pūrvaṃ tadaṃśaśca krameṇa ca || 47||
kalāmātraṃ kaleḥ śeṣe kuhvāṃ candrakalā yathā |
yādṛktejo rakhegraṣme na tādṛkśiśire punaḥ || 48 ||
dineṣu yādṛṅmadhyāhne sāyaṃ prātarna tatsamam |
udayaṃ yāti kālena bālatāṃ ca krameṇa ca || 49||
prakāṃḍatāṃ ca tatpaścātkāle'staṃ punareti saḥ |
dine pracchannatāṃ yāti kālena durdine ghane || 50||
rāhugraste kaṃpitaśca punareva prasannatām |
paripūrṇatamaścandraḥ pūrṇimāyāṃ ca jāyate || 51 ||
tādṛśo na bhavennityaṃ kṣayaṃ yāti dine dine |
punaśca puṣṭimāyāti paraṃ kruddhā dine dine ||52||
saṃpadyuktaḥ śuklapakṣe kṛṣṇe mlānaśca yakṣmaṇā |
rāhugraste dine mlāno durdine na virocate ||53||
kāle candro bhavecchuklo bhraṣṭaśrīḥ kālabhedataḥ |
bhaviṣyati baliśvendro bhraṣṭaśrīḥ sutale'dhunā || 54||
kālena pṛthvī sasyāḍhyā sarvādhārā vasundharā |
kāle jale nimagnā sā tirobhūtāṃbuviplutā ||55||
kāle naśyaṃti viśvāni prabhavatyeva kālataḥ |
carācarāśca kālena naśyaṃti prabhavaṃti ca ||56||
īśvarasyaiva samatā brahmaṇaḥ paramātmanaḥ |
ahaṃ mṛtyuṃjayo yasmādasaṃkhyaṃ prākṛtaṃ layam ||57||

adarśa cāpi drakṣyāmi vāraṃ vāraṃ punaḥ punaḥ |
sa ca prakṛtirūpaśca sa eva puruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ || 58 ||
sa cātmā sa ca jīvaśca nānārūpadharaḥ paraḥ |
karoti satataṃ yo hi tannāmaguṇakīrtanam ||59||
kāle mṛtyuṃ sa jayati janmarogabhayaṃ jarām |
sraṣṭā kṛto vidhistena pātā viṣṇuḥ kṛto bhavet || 60 ||
ahaṃkṛtaśca saṃhartā vayaṃ viṣayiṇaḥ kṛtāḥ |
kālāgnirudraṃ saṃhāre niyojya viṣaye nṛpa || 61 ||
ahaṃ karomi satataṃ tannāmaguṇakīrtanam |
tena mṛtyuṃjayo'haṃ ca jñānenānena nirbhayaḥ || 62 ||
mṛtyumṛtyubhayādyāti vainateyādivoragāḥ |
ityuktvā sa ca sarveśaḥ sarvabhāvena tatparaḥ || 63 ||
virarāma ca śaṃbhuśca sabhāmadhye ca nārada |
rājā tadvavacanaṃ śrutvā praśaśaṃsa punaḥ punaḥ || 64||
uvāca madhuraṃ devaṃ paraṃ vinayapūrvakam |
śaṃkhacūḍa uvāca
tvayā yatkathitaṃ deva nānyathā vacanaṃ smṛtam ||65||
tathāpi kiñcidyāthāthyaṃ śrūyatāṃ manivedanam |
jñātidrohe mahatpāpaṃ tvayoktamadhunā ca yat ||66 ||
gṛhītvā tasya sarvasvaṃ kutaḥ prasthāpito baliḥ |
mayā samuddhṛtaṃ sarvamūrdhvamaiśvaryamīśvara || 67 || ||67||
putalācca samuddhartuṃ nālaṃ tatra gadādharaḥ |
sabhrātṛko hiraṇyākṣaḥ kathaṃ devaiśva hiṃsitaḥ || 68 ||
śumbhādayaścāsurāśca kathaṃ devanipātitāḥ |
purā samudramathane pīyūṣaṃ bhakṣitaṃ suraiḥ || 69 ||
kleśabhājo vayaṃ tatra te sa phalabhoginaḥ |
krīḍābhāṃḍamidaṃ viśvaṃ prakṛteḥ paramātmanaḥ || 70 ||
yasmai yatra sa dadāti tasyaiśvaryaṃ bhavettadā |
devadānavayorvādaḥ śaśvannaimittikaḥ sadā || 71 ||
parājayo jayasteṣāṃ kāle'smākaṃ krameṇa ca |
tadā''vayorvirodhe vā gamanaṃ niṣphalaṃ param ||72||
samasambandhino bandhorīśvarasya mahātmanaḥ |
iyaṃ te mahatī lajjā yuddhe'smābhiḥ sahādhunā || 73 ||
jaye tato'dhikā kīrtirhāniścaiva parājaye |
ityetadvavacanaṃ śrutvā prahasya ca trilocanaḥ ||74 ||
yathocitamuttaraṃ tamuvāca dānaveśvaram |
mahādeva uvāca
yuṣmābhiḥ saha yuddhe me brahmavaṃśasamudbhavaiḥ || 75 ||
kā lajjā mahatī rājannakīrtirvā parājaye |
yuddhamādo harereva madhunā kaiṭabhena ca ||76||
hiraṇyakaśipoścaiva saha tenātmanā nṛpa |
hiraṇyākṣasya yuddhaṃ ca punastena gadābhṛtā || 77||
tripuraiḥ saha yuddhaṃ ca mayā'pi ca purā kṛtam |
sarveśvaryāḥ sarvamātuḥ prakṛteśca babhūva ha || 78 ||
saha śumbhādibhiḥ pūrvaṃ samaraḥ paramādbhutaḥ |
pādapravarastvaṃ ca kṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ ||79||
ye ye hatāśva daiteyā nahi ke'pi tvayā samāḥ |
kā lajjā mahatī rājanmama yuddhe tvayā saha ||80||
surāṇāṃ śaraṇasyaiva preṣitaśra hare raho |
dehi rājyaṃ ca devānāmiti me niścitaṃ vacaḥ || 81 ||

yuddhaṃ vā kuru matsādhaṃ vāgvyaye ki prayojanam |
ityuktvā śaṃkarastatra virarāma ca nārada ||
uttasthau śaṅkhacūḍaśva hyamātyaiḥ saha satvaram || 82 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ekaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 21 ||
atha dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śivaṃ praṇamya śirasā dānaveṃdraḥ pratāpavān |
samāruroha yānaṃ ca sahāmātyaḥ sa satvaraḥ ||1||
śivaḥ svasainyaṃ devāṃśca prerayāmāsa satvaram |
dānaveṃdraḥ sasainyaśva yuddhāraṃbhe babhūva ha ||2||
svayaṃ mahendro yuyudhe sādhaṃ ca vṛṣaparvaṇā |
bhāskaro yuyudhe vipracittinā saha satvaraḥ || 3 ||
daṃbhena saha caṃdraśca cakāra paramaṃ raṇam |
kālasvareṇa kālaśca gokarṇena hutāśanaḥ || 4 ||
kuberaḥ kālakeyena viśvakarmā mayena ca |
bhayaṅkareṇa mṛtyuśca saṃhāreṇa yamastathā ||5||
vikaṃkaṇena varuṇacaṃca lena samīraṇaḥ |
budhaśca ghṛtapṛṣṭhena raktākṣeṇa śanaiśvaraḥ ||6||
jayaṃto ratnasāreṇa vasavo varcasāṃ gaṇaiḥ |
aśvino ca dīptimatā dhūmreṇa nalakūbaraḥ ||7|
dhuraṃdhareṇa dharmaśca uṣākṣeṇa ca maṃgalaḥ |
śobhākareṇa vai bhānuḥ piṭhareṇa ca manmathaḥ ||8||
godhāmukhena cūrṇana khaṅgena ca dhvajena ca |
kāṃcīmukhena piṃḍena dhūmreṇa saha naṃdinā || 9 || ||
viśvena ca palāśenādityādyā yuyudhuḥ pare |
ekādaśa ca rudrā vai ekādaśa bhayaṃkaraiḥ || 10 ||
mahāmārī ca yuyudhe copracaṃḍādibhiḥ saha |
nandīśvarādayaḥ sarve dānavānāṃ gaṇaiḥ saha ||11||
yuyudhuśca mahāyuddhe pralaye'pi bhayaṃkare |
vaṭamūle ca śaṃbhuśca tasthau kālyāḥ sutena ca || 12 ||
sarve ca yuyudhuḥ sainyasamūhāḥ satataṃ mune |
ratnasiṃhāsane ramye koṭibhirdānavaiḥ saha || 13 ||
uvāsa śaṅkhacūḍaśca ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitaḥ |
śaṅkarasya ca ye yodhā dānavaiśca parājitāḥ || 14 ||
devāśca dudruvuḥ sarve bhītāśca kṣatavigrahāḥ |
cakāra kopaṃ skaṃdaśva devebhyaścābhayaṃ dadau || 15||
balaṃ ca svagaṇānāṃ ca vardhayāmāsa tejasā |
so'yamekaśca yuyudhe dānavānāṃ gaṇaiḥ saha || 16 ||
akṣauhiṇīnāṃ śatakaṃ samare ca jaghāna saḥ |
asurānpātayāmāsa kālī kamalalocanā || 17||
papau raktaṃ dānavānāmatikruddhā tataḥ param |
daśalakṣagajeṃdrāṇāṃ śatalakṣaṃ ca koṭiśaḥ || 18 |
samādāyaikahastena mukhe cikṣepa līlayā |
kadaṃbānāṃ sahasraṃ ca nanarta samare mune ||19||
skaṃdasya śarajālena dānavāḥ kṣatavigrahāḥ |
bhotāśva dudruvuḥ sarve mahāraṇaparākramāḥ ||20||
vṛṣaparvā vipracittirdambhaśvāpi vikaṃkaṇaḥ |
skaṃdena sārdhaṃ yuyudhuste sarve vikrameṇa ca || 21 ||
mahāmārī ca yuyudhe na babhūva parāṅmukhī | babhūvuste ca saṃkṣubdhāḥ skandasya śaktipīḍitāḥ 22 |
na dudruvurbhayātsvarge puṣpavṛṣṭirbabhūva ha |
skaṃdasya samaraṃ dṛṣṭā mahāraudraṃ samulbaṇam ||23||

śrīmadevī mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 22
dānavānāṃ kṣayakaraṃ yathā prākṛtiko laba: |
rājā vimānamāruhya cakāra bāgavarṣaṇam ||24||
nṛpasya śaravṛṣṭiśca dhanasya varṣaṇaṃ yathā |
mahaghorāṃdhakāraśca vahnayutthānaṃ babhūva ca ||25||
devāḥ pradudruvuḥ sarve'pyanye naṃdīśvarādayaḥ |
eka eva kārttikeyastasthau samaramūrdhani ||26||
parvatānāṃ ca sarpāṇāṃ śilānāṃ śākhināṃ tathā |
nṛpaścakāra vṛṣṭi ca durvārāṃ ca bhayaṃkarīm ||27||
nṛpasya śaravṛṣṭyā ca prahitaḥ śivanandanaḥ |
nīhāreṇa ca sāṃdreṇa prahito bhāskaro yathā ||28||
dhanuściccheda skandasya durvahaṃ ca bhayaṅkaraḥ |
babhaṃja ca rathaṃ divyaṃ ciccheda rathapīṭhakān ||29||
mayūraṃ jarjarībhūtaṃ divyāstreṇa khakāra saḥ |
śakti vikṣepa sūryābhāṃ tasya yakṣasya ghātinīm 30||
kṣaṇaṃ mūrcchā ca saṃprāpa babhūva cetanaḥ punaḥ |
gṛhītvā taddhanurdivyaṃ yaddattaṃ viṣṇunā purā ||31||
ratnendrasāranirmāṇayānamāruhya kāttikaḥ |
śastrāstraṃ ca gṛhītvā sa cakāra raṇamulbaṇam 32||
sarpāśca parvatāṃścaiva vṛkṣāṃśca prastarāṃstathā |
sarvāściccheda kopena divyāstreṇa śivātmajaḥ 33 ||
vahni nirvāpayāmāsa pārjanyena pratāpavān |
rathaṃ dhanuśva ciccheda śaṃkhacūḍasya līlayā ||34||
sannāhaṃ sārathi caiva kirīṭaṃ mukuṭojjvalam |
cikṣepa śakti śuklābhāṃ dānavendrasya vakṣasi || 35 ||
mūrcchā saṃprāpya rājā ca cetanaśca babhūva ha |
āruroha yānamanyaddhanurjagrāha satvaraḥ || 36 ||
cakāra śarajālaṃ ca bāyabā māyināṃ varaḥ |
guhaṃ cacchāda samare śarajālena nārada ||37||
jagrāha śaktimavyāṃ śavasūryasamaprabhām |
pralayāgniśikhārūpāṃ viṣṇośca tejasāvṛtām ||38||
cikṣepa tāṃ ca kopeya mahāvegena kārtike |
papāta śaktistaddvātre vahnirāśirivojjvalā ||39||
mūḻa saṃprāpa śaktyā va kārtikeyo mahābalaḥ |
kālī gṛhītvā taṃ kroḍe nināya śivasannidhau 40 ||
śivastaṃ cāpi jñānena jīvayāmāsa līlayā |
dadau balamanaṃtaṃ ca samuttasthau pratāpavān ||41||
kālo jagāma samaraṃ rakṣituṃ kāttikasya yā |
vīrāstāmanujagmuśca te ca naṃdīśvarādayaḥ ||42||
sarva devāśra gaṃdharvā yakṣarākṣasa kinnarāḥ |
vādyabhāṃḍāca bahuśaḥ śataśo madhuvāhakāḥ || 43 ||
sā ca gatvā'tha saṃgrāmaṃ siṃhanādaṃ cakāra ca | devyāśca siṃhanādena prāpuccha ca dānavāḥ |
aṭṭāṭṭahāsamaśivaṃ cakāra ca punaḥ punaḥ |
dṛṣṭvā papau ca mādhvīkaṃ nanarta raṇamūrdhani || 45 ||
ugradaṃṣṭrā cogradaṃḍā koṭakī ca papo madhu |
yoginīḍākinīnāṃ ca gaṇāḥ suragaṇādayaḥ || 46 ||
' dṛṣṭvā kālīṃ śaṅkhacūḍaḥ śīghramājo samāyaryo |
dānavāśca bhayaṃ prāpū rājā tebhyo'bhayaṃ dadau || 47||
kālī cikṣepa vahnica pralayāgniśikhopamam |
rājā nirvāpayāmāsa pārjanyena ca līlayā || 48 ||
cikṣepa vāruṇaṃ sā ca tīvraṃ ca mahadadbhutam |
gāṃdharveṇa ca ciccheda dānaveṃdraśva līlayā || 49||
māheśvaraṃ pracikṣepa kālo vahniśikhopamam |
rājā jadhāna taṃ śīghraṃ vaiṣṇavena ca līlayā || 50 ||
nārāyaṇāstraṃ sā devī. cikṣepa maṃtrapūrvakam |
rājā nanāma taddṛṣṭvā cāvaruhya rathādasau || 51 ||

ūṣvaṃ jagāma taccāstraṃ pralayāgniśikhopamam |
papāta śaṃkhacūḍaśca bhaktyā taṃ daṃḍavadbhuvi || 52 ||
brahmāstraṃ sā cikṣepa yatnato maṃtrapūrvakam |
brahmāstreṇa mahārājo nirvāpaṃ cakāra saḥ || 53 ||
tadā cikṣepa divyāstraṃ sā devī maṃtrapūrvakam |
rājā divyāstrajālena tannirvāṇaṃ cakāra ca || 54 ||
devī cikṣepa śakti ca yatnato yojanāyatām |
rājā divyāstrajālena śatakhaṃḍāṃ ca cakāra ha || 55||
jagrāha maṃtrapūtaṃ ca devī pāśupataṃ ruṣā |
nikṣepaṇaṃ niroddhuṃ ca vāgbabhūvāśarīriṇī || 56 ||
mṛtyuḥ pāśupate nāsti nṛpasya ca mahātmanaḥ |
yāvadasti ca maṃtrasya kavacaṃ ca hareriti ||57||
yāvatsatītvamastyeva satyāśca navayoṣitaḥ |
tāvadasya jarāmṛtyurnāstīti brahmaṇo vacaḥ || 58 ||
ityākarṇya bhadrakālī na taccikṣepa śastrakam |
śatalakṣaṃ dānavānāṃ jagrāsa līlayā kṣuvā || 59 ||
grastuṃ jagāma vegena śaṃkhacūḍaṃ bhayaṃkarī |
divyāstreṇa sutīkṣṇena vārayāmāsa dānavaḥ || 60 ||
khaṅgaṃ cikṣepa sā devī grīṣmasūryopamaṃ tathā |
divyāstreṇa dānaveṃdra: śatakhaṃḍaṃ cakāra saḥ || 61 ||
punargrastuṃ mahādevī vegena ca jagāma tam |
sarvasiddheśvaraḥ śrīmānvavṛdhe dānaveśvaraḥ ||62|| !
veyena muṣṭinā kālī kopayuktā bhayaṃkarī |
babhaṃja ca rathaṃ tasya jadhāna sārayi satī ||63||
sā ca śūlaṃ ca cikṣepa pralayāgniśikhopamam |
vāmahastena jagrāha śaṅkhacūḍaḥ svalīlayā || 64||
bhuṣṭyā jaghāna taṃ devī mahākopena vegataḥ |
babhrāma ca tathā daityaḥ dhaṇaṃ mūrcchāmadāca || 65 ||
kṣaṇena cetanāṃ prāpya samuttasthau pratāpavān |
na cakāra bāhuyuddhaṃ devyā saha nanāma tām || 66||
devyāśvāstraṃ sa ciccheda jagrāha ca svatejasā |
nāstraṃ cikṣepa tāṃ bhakto mātṛbhaktyā tu vaiṣṇavaḥ 67 ||
gṛhītvā dānavaṃ devī bhrāmayitvā punaḥ punaḥ |
ūrdhvaṃ ca prāpayāmāsa mahāvegena kopilā || 68||
ūrdhvātpapāta vegena śaṅkhacūḍaḥ pratāpavān |
nipatya ca samuttasthau praṇamya bhadrakālikām || 69 ||
ratneṃdrasāra nirmāṇaṃ vimānaṃ sumanoharam |
āruroha harṣayukto na viśrāṃto mahāraṇe || 70 ||
dānavānāṃ ca kṣatajaṃ sā devī ca papa kṣudhā |
pītvā bhuktvā bhadrakālī jagāma śaṃkarāṃtikam 71 ||
uvāca raṇavṛttāṃtaṃ paurvāparyaṃ yathākramam |
śrutvā jahāsa śaṃbhuśca dānavānāṃ vināśanam || 72 ||
lakṣaṃ ca vānaveṃdrāṇāmavaśiṣṭaṃ raṇe'dhunā |
bhuñjantyā nirgataṃ vaktrāttadanyaṃ bhuktamīśvara || 73 || |
saṃgrāme dānaveṃdraṃ ca haṃtuṃ . ca haṃtuṃ pāśupatena vai |
avadhyastava rājeti vāgbabhūvāśarīriṇī ||74 |
rājeṃdraśca mahājñānī mahābalaparākramaḥ |
na ca cikṣepa mayyastraṃ ciccheda mama sāyakam || 75 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 22 ||
atha trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śivatattvaṃ samākarṇya tattvajñānaviśāradaḥ |
yayau svayaṃ ca samare svagaṇaiḥ saha nārada || 1||

śaṅkhacūḍa: śivaṃ dṛṣṭvā vimānādavaruhya ca |
nanāma parayā bhaktyā śirasā daṃḍavadbhuvi ||2||
taṃ praṇamya ca vegena vimānamāruroha saḥ |
tūrṇaṃ cakāra sannāhaṃ dhanurjagrāha durvaham ||3|| 3||
śivadānavayoryuddhaṃ pūrṇamabdaśataṃ purā |
na babhūvaturanyonyaṃ brahmañjayaparājayau ||4||
nyastaśastraśca bhagavānnyastaśastraśva dānavaḥ |
rathasthaḥ śaṃkhacūḍaśva vṛṣastho vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ || 5 ||
dānavānāṃ ca śatakamuddhṛtaṃ ca babhūva ha |
raṇe ye ye mṛtāḥ śaṃbhurjīvayāmāsa tānvibhuḥ || 6 ||
etasminnaṃtare vṛddhabrāhmaṇaḥ paramāturaḥ |
āgatya ca raṇasthānamuvāca dānaveśvaram ||7||
vṛddhabrāhmaṇa uvāca
dehi bhikṣāṃ ca rājeṃdra mahyaṃ viprāya sāṃpratam |
tvaṃ sarvasampadāṃ dātā yanme manasi vāṃchitam || 8||
nirīhāya ca vṛddhāya tṛṣitāya ca sāṃpratam |
paśvāttvāṃ kathayiṣyāmi puraḥ satyaṃ ca kurviti 9 ||
omityuvāca rājeṃdra: prasannavadanekṣaṇaḥ |
kavacārthī janaśvāhamityuvācātimāyayā || 10 ||
tacchrutvā kavacaṃ divyaṃ jagrāha harireva ca |
śaṅkhacūḍasya rūpeṇa jagāma tulasīṃ prati || 11 ||
gatvā tasyāṃ māyayā ca vīryādhānaṃ cakāra ca |
atha śaṃbhurhareḥ śūlaṃ jagrāha dānavaṃ prati || 12||
grīṣmamadhyāhnamārtaṇḍapralayāgniśikhopamam |
durnivāryaṃ ca durdharṣamavyarthaṃ vairighātakam || 13 |
tejasā cakratulyaṃ ca sarvaśastrāstrasārakam |
śivakeśavayoranyadurvahaṃ ca bhayaṃkaram ||14|
dhanuḥ sahasraṃ dairyeṇa prasthena śatahastakam |
sajīvaṃ brahmarūpaṃ ca nityarūpamanidiśam ||15||
saṃhatuṃ sarvabrahmāṃḍamalaṃ yatsvīyalīlayā |
cikṣepa tolanaṃ kṛtvā śakhacūḍe ca nārada ||16||
rājā cāpaṃ parityajya śrī kṛṣṇacaraṇāmbujam |
dhyānaṃ cakāra bhaktyā ca kṛtvā yogāsanaṃ dhiyā ||
śūlaṃ ca bhramaṇaṃ kṛtvā papāta dānavopari |
cakāra bhasmasāttaṃ ca sarathaṃ cātha lolayā || 18 ||
rājā ghṛtvā divyarūpaṃ kiśoraṃ gopaveṣakam |
dvibhujaṃ muralīhastaṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitam || 19 ||
ratnendrasāranirmāṇaṃ veṣṭitaṃ gopakoṭibhiḥ |
golokādāgataṃ yānamāruroha puraṃ yayo || 20 ||
gatvā nanāma śirasā sa rādhākṛṣṇayormune |
bhaktyā ca caraṇāṃbhojaṃ rāse vṛndāvane vane ||21||
sudāmānaṃ ca tau dṛṣṭvā prasannavadanekṣaṇau |
kroḍe cakraturatyaṃtaṃ premṇā'tiparisaṃyutau ||22||
atha śūlaṃ ca vegena prayayau taṃ ca sādaram |
asthibhiḥ śaṃkhacūḍasya śaṃkhajātirbabhūva ha || 23 ||
nānāprakārarūpeṇa śaśvatpūtā surārcane |
praśastaṃ śaṃkhatoyaṃ ca devānāṃ prītidaṃ param ||24||
tīrthatoyasvarūpaṃ ca pavitraṃ śaṃbhunā binā |
śaṃkhaśabdo bhavedyatra tatra lakṣmīḥ susaṃsthirā ||25||
sa snātaḥ sarvatīrtheṣu yaḥ snātaḥ śaṃkhavāriṇā |
śaṃkho hareradhiṣṭhānaṃ yatra śaṃkhastato hariḥ || 26||
tatraiva vasate lakṣmīrdūrībhūtamamaṅgalam |
strīṇāṃ ca śakhadhvanibhiḥ śūdrāṇāṃ ca viśeṣata: 27||
bhotā ruṣṭā yāti lakṣmīstatsthalādanyadeśataḥ |
śiva'pi dānavaṃ hatvā śivolokaṃ jagāma ha || 28||

svargaṇaiśca samāvṛtaḥ |
surāḥ svaviṣayaṃ prāpuḥ paramānaṃdasaṃyutāḥ || 29 ||
prahṛṣṭo vṛṣabhārūḍhaḥ
nedurdundubhayaḥ svarge jagurgandharvakinnarāḥ |
babhūva puṣpavṛṣṭiśca śivasyopari saṃtatam ||
praśaśaṃsuḥ surāstaṃ ca munīndrapravarādayaḥ ||30||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||23||
atha caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
nārāyaṇaśca bhagavānvīryādhānaṃ cakāra ha |
tulasyāṃ kena rūpeṇa tanme byākhyātumarhasi || 1 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
nārāyaṇaśca bhagavāndevānāṃ sādhaneṣu ca |
śaṃkhacūḍasya kavacaṃ gṛhītvā viṣṇumāyayā || 2 ||
punarvidhāya tadrūpaṃ jagāma tatsatīgṛham |
pātivratyasya nāśena śaṅkhacaḍajighāṃsayā || 3 ||
dundubhi vādayāmāsa tulasīdvārasannidhau |
jayaśabdaṃ ca tadddvāre bodhayāmāsa sundarīm || 4 ||
tacchrutvā ca rathaṃ sādhvī paramānandasaṃyutā |
rājamārge gavākṣeṇa dadarśa paramādarāt || 5 ||
brāhmaṇebhyo dhanaṃ dattvā kārayāmāsa maṃgalam |
vaṃdibhyo bhikṣukebhyaśca vācibhyaśca dhanaṃ dadau || 6 ||
avaruhya rathāddevo devyāśca bhavanaṃ yayau |
amūlyaratnanirmāṇaṃ sundaraṃ sumanoharam || 7 ||
dṛṣṭvā ca purataḥ kāntaṃ sā taṃ kāntaṃ mudānvitā |
tatpādaṃ kṣālayāmāsa nanāma ca ruroda ca || 8 ||
ratnasiṃhāsane ramye vāsayāmāsa kāmukī |
tāṃbūlaṃ ca dadau tasmai karpūrādisuvāsitam || 9 || |
adya me saphalaṃ janma jīvanaṃ ca babhūva ha |
raṇe gataṃ ca prāṇeśaṃ paśyaṃtyāca punargṛhe || 10 ||
sasmitā sakaṭākṣaṃ ca sakāmā pulakāṅkitā |
papraccha raṇavṛttāṃtaṃ kāntaṃ madhurayā girā || 11||
tulasyuvāca
asaṃkhyaviśva saṃhartrā sārdhamājī tava prabho |
kathaṃ babhūva vijayastanme brūhi kṛpānidhe || 12 ||
tulasīvacanaṃ śrutvā prahasya kamalāpatiḥ |
śaṃkhacūḍasya rūpeṇa tāmuvācāmṛtaṃ vacaḥ ||13||
śrībhagavānuvāca
āvayoḥ samaraḥ kānte pūrṇamabdaṃ vabhūva ha |
nāśo vabhūva sarveṣāṃ dānavānāṃ ca kāmini || 14 ||
prītiṃ ca kārayāmāsa brahmā ca svayamāvayoḥ |
devānāmadhikāraśca pradatto brāhmaṇājñayā || 15 ||
mayā'yataṃ svabhavanaṃ śivalokaṃ śivo gataḥ |
ityuktvā jagatāṃ nāthaḥ śayanaṃ ca cakāra ha ||16||
reme ramāpatistatra rāmayā saha nārada |
sā sādhvīṃ sukhasaṃbhogādākarṣaṇavyatikramāt || 17||
sarva vitarkayāmāsa kastvamevetyuvāca sā |

tulasyubāca
ko vā tvaṃ vada māyeśa bhuktā'haṃ māyayā tvayā || 1.8 ||
dūrīkṛtaṃ matsatītvaṃ yadatastvāṃ śapāmi hai |
tulasīvacanaṃ śrutvā hariḥ śāpabhayena ca || 19 ||
davāra līlayā brahmansumūrti sumanoharām |
dadarśa purato devī devadevaṃ sanātanam ||20||
navīnanīradaśyāmaṃ śaratpaṅkajalocanam |
koṭikandarpalīlābhaṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitam ||21||
īṣaddhāsyaṃ prasannāsyaṃ śobhitaṃ pītavāsasam |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā kāminī kāmaṃ mūrcchā saṃprāpa līlayā || 22||
punaśca cetanāṃ prāpya punaḥ sā tamuvāca ha |
tulasyuvāca
he nātha te dayā nāsti pāṣāṇasadṛśasya ca || 23||
chalena dharmabhaṃgena mama svāmī tvayā hataḥ |
pāpāṇahṛdayastvaṃ hi dayāhīno yataḥ prabho ||24||
tasmātpāpāṇarūpastvaṃ bhave deva bhavādhunā |
ye vadanti ca sādhuṃ tvāṃ te bhrāṃtā hi na saṃśayaḥ || 25||
bhakto vināparādhena parārthe ca kathaṃ hṛtaḥ |
bhṛśaṃ ruroda śokārtā bilalāpa muhurmuhuḥ || 26||
tataśca karuṇāṃ dṛṣṭā karuṇārasasāgaraḥ |
nayena tāṃ vodhayitumuvāca kamalāpatiḥ ||27||
śrībhagavānuvāca
tapastvayā kṛtaṃ bhadre madarthe bhārate ciram |
tvadarthe śaṃkhacūḍaca cakāra suciraṃ tapaḥ ||28||
kṛtvā tvāṃ kāminīṃ so'pi vijahāraṃ ca tatkṣaṇāt |
adhunā dātumucitaṃ tavaiva tapasaḥ phalam ||29||
idaṃ śarīraṃ tvaktvā ca divyadehaṃ vidhāya ca |
rāme rama mayā sārdhaṃ tvaṃ ramāsadṛśī bhava ||30||
iyaṃ tanurnadīrūpā gaṃḍakīti ca viśrutā |
pūtā supuṇyadā nṛṇāṃ puṇye bhavatu bhārate || 31||
tava keśasamūhaśca puṇyadṛkṣo bhaviṣyati |
tulasīkeśasaṃbhūtā tulasīti ca viśrutā || 32 ||
triṣu lokeṣu puṣpāṇāṃ patrāṇāṃ devapūjane |
pradhānarūpā tulasī bhaviṣyati varānane || 33 ||
svarge martye ca pātāle goloke mama sannidhau |
bhava tvaṃ tulasī vṛkṣavarā puṣpeṣu sundarī ||34||
goloke virajātīre rāse vṛndāvane vane |
bhāṃḍīre campakavane ramye candanakānane ||35||
mādhavī ketakīkundamallikāmālatīvane |
vāsaste'traiva bhavatu puṇyasthāneṣu puṇyadaḥ || 36 ||
tulasītarumūleṣu puṇyadeśeṣu puṇyadam |
adhiṣṭhānaṃ ca tīrthānāṃ sarveṣāṃ ca bhaviṣyati ||37||
tatra ca sarvadevānāṃ mamādhiṣṭhānameva ca |
tulasīpatra patanaprāptaye ca varānane ||38||
sa snātaḥ sarvatīrtheṣu sarvayajñeṣu dīkṣitaḥ |
tulasīpatratoyena yo'bhiṣekaṃ samācaret || 39 || ||39||
sudhāghaṭasahasrāṇāṃ yā tuṣṭistu bhaveddhareḥ |
sā ca tuṣṭirbhavennūnaṃ tulasīpatradānataḥ ||40||
gavāmayutadānena yatphalaṃ tatphalaṃ bhavet |
tulasīpatradānena tatphalaṃ kārttike satī || 41 ||

tulīpatratoyaṃ ca mṛtyukāle ca yo labhet |
mucyate sarvapāpebhyo viṣṇuloke mahīyate || 42 ||
nityaṃ yastulasītoyaṃ bhuṃkte bhaktyā ca mānavaḥ |
lakṣāśvameghajaṃ puṇyaṃ saṃprāpnoti sa mānavaḥ || 43 || -
tulasīṃ svakare kṛtvā ghṛtvā dehe ca mānavaḥ |
prāṇāṃstyajati tīrtheṣu viṣṇulokaṃ sa gacchati 44 ||
tulasīkāṣṭhanirmāṇamālāṃ gṛhṇāti yo naraḥ |
pade pade'śvamedhasya labhate niścitaṃ phalam ||45||
tulasīṃ svakare kṛtvā svīkāraṃ yo na rakṣati |
sa yāti kālasūtraṃ ca yāvaccaṃdradivākarī ||46 ||
karoti mithyāśapathaṃ tulasyāṃ yo'tra mānavaḥ |
sa yāti kuṃbhīpākaṃ ca yāvadidrāścaturdaśa |
tulasītoyakaṇikāṃ mṛtyukāle ca yo labhet |
ratnayānaṃ samāruhya vaikuṃṭhaṃ prāpyate dhruvam ||48||
pūrṇimāyāmamāyāṃ ca dvādaśyāṃ ravisaṃkrame |
tailābhyaṃgaṃ ca kṛtvā ca mādhyāhne niśi saṃdhyayoḥ ||
aśauce'śucikāle ye rātrivāsonvitā narāḥ |
tulasīṃ ye vicinvaṃti te chidaṃti hareḥ śiraḥ || 50 ||
trirātraṃ tulasīpatraṃ śuddhaṃ paryuṣitaṃ sati |
śrāddhe vrate ca dāne ca pratiṣṭhāyāṃ surārcane || 51 ||
bhūgataṃ toyapatitaṃ yaddattaṃ viṣṇave sati |
śuddhaṃ ca tulasīpatraṃ kṣālanādanyakarmaṇi || 52 ||
vṛkṣāṣiṣṭhātṛdevī yā goloke ca nirāmaye |
kṛṣṇena sārdhaṃ nityaṃ ca nityakrīḍāṃ kariṣyasi53 ||
nadyadhiṣṭhātṛdevī yā goloke sā supuṇyadā |
lavaṇodasya sā patnī madaṃśasya ca bhaviṣyati 54 ||
tvaṃ ca svayaṃ mahāsādhvī vaikuṇṭhe mama sannidhau |
ramāsamā ca rāmā ca bhaviṣyasi na saṃśayaḥ || 55||
gaṃḍakītīrasannidhau |
adhiṣṭhānaṃ kariṣyāmi bhārate tava śāpataḥ || 56 ||
ahaṃ ca śailarūpeṇa
koṭisaṃkhyāstatra kīṭāstīkṣṇadaṃṣṭrāvarāyudhaiḥ |
yacchilākuhare cakraṃ kariṣyaṃti madīyakam || 57||
ekadvāra catuścakraṃ navīnanīradopamam |
navīnanīradākāraṃ lakṣmīnārāyaṇābhidham ||58||
ekadvāraṃ catuścakraṃ nabīnanīradopamam |
lakṣmījanārdano jñeyo rahito vanamālayā || 59||
virājitam |
raghunāthābhidhaṃ jñeyaṃ rahitaṃ vanamālayā || 60 ||
dvāradvaye catuścakraṃ goṣpadena
atikṣudraṃ dvicakraṃ ca goṣpadena virājitam |
tadvāmanābhidhaṃ jñeyaṃ rahitaṃ vanamālayā || 61 ||
atikṣudraṃ dvicakraṃ ca navīnajaladaprabham |
vijñeyaṃ śrīdharaṃ rūpaṃ śrīpradaṃ gṛhiṇāṃ sadā || 62 ||
sthūlaṃ ca vartulākāraṃ rahitaṃ vanamālayā |
dvicakraṃ sphuṭamatyantaṃ jñeyaṃ dāmodarābhidham ||63||
madhyamaṃ saptacakraṃ ca chatrabhūṣaṇabhūṣitam |
raṇarāmābhidhaṃ jñeyaṃ śaratūṇasamanvitam || 64 ||
madhyamaṃ saptacakraṃ ca chatracāmarabhūṣitam |
rājarājeśvaraṃ jñeyaṃ rājasaṃpatpradaṃ nṛṇām || 65 ||
dvisaptacakraṃ sthūlaṃ ca navanīradasuprabham |
anaṃtākhyaṃ ca vijñeyaṃ caturvargaphalapradam ||66||
cakrākāraṃ dvicakraṃ ca saśrīkaṃ jaladaprabham |
sagoṣpadaṃ madhyamaṃ ca vijñeyaṃ madhusūdanam ||67 ||
gadādharam |
dvicakraṃ hayavaktrābhaṃ hayagrīvaṃ prakīrtitam ||68 ||
sudarśanaṃ caikacakraṃ guptacakraṃ
atība vistṛtāsyaṃ ca dvicakraṃ vikaṭaṃ sati |
narasiṃhaṃ suvijñeyaṃ sadyo vairāgyadaṃ nṛṇām || 69||

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe. adhyāyaḥ 24
dvicakraṃ vistṛtāsyaṃ ca vanamālāsamanvitam |
lakṣmīnṛsiṃhaṃ vijñeyaṃ gṛhiṇāṃ ca sukhapradam ||70 ||
dvāradeśe dvicakraṃ ca saśrīkaṃ ca samaṃ sphuṭam |
vāsudevaṃ tu vijñeyaṃ sarvakāmaphalapradam || 71 ||
pradyumnaṃ sūkṣmacakraṃ ca navīnanīradaprabham |
suṣiracchridrabahulaṃ gṛhiṇāṃ ca sukhapradam ||72 ||
dve cakre cakalagne ca pṛṣṭhaṃ yatra tu puṣkalam |
saṃkarṣaṇaṃ suvijñeyaṃ sukhadaṃ gṛhiṇāṃ sadā || 73 ||
aniruddhaṃ tu pītābhaṃ vartulaṃ cātiśobhanam |
sukhapradaṃ gṛhasthānāṃ pravadaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ ||74 ||
śālagrāmaśilā yatra tatra sannihito hariḥ |
tatraiva lakṣmīrvasati sarvatīrthasamanvitā || 75 ||
yāni kāni ca pāpāni brahmahatyādikāni ca |
tāni sarvāṇi naśyaṃti śālagrāmaśilārcanāt 76 ||
chatrākāre bhavedrājyaṃ vartule ca mahāśriyaḥ |
duḥkhaṃ ca śakaṭākāre śūlāgre maraṇaṃ dhruvam ||77||
vikṛtāsye ca dāridryaṃ piṃgale hānireva ca |
bhagnacakre bhavedvayādhividīrṇe maraṇaṃ dhruvam || 78 ||
vrataṃ snānaṃ pratiṣṭhāṃ ca śrāddhaṃ ca devapūjanam |
śālagrāmasya sānnidhyātpraśastaṃ tadbhavediti || 79 ||
sa snātaḥ sarvatīrtheṣu sarvayajñeṣu dīkṣitaḥ |
sarvayajñeṣu tīrtheṣu vrateṣu ca tapaḥsu ca || 80 ||
pāṭhe caturṇāṃ vedānāṃ tapasāṃ karaṇe sati |
tatpuṇyaṃ labhate nūnaṃ śālagrāmaśilārcanāt ||81||
“śālagrāma śilātoyairyo'bhiṣekaṃ sadā''caret |
sarvadāneṣu yatpuṇyaṃ pradakṣiṇaṃ bhuvo yathā || |
|| ” "
śālagrāmaśilātoyaṃ nityaṃ bhuṃkte ca yo naraḥ |
surepsitaṃ prasādaṃ ca labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 82 ||
yasya sparśaṃ ca vāñchaṃti tīrthāni nikhilāni ca |
jīvanmukto mahāpūto'pyante yāti hareḥ padam 83 ||
tatraiva hariṇā sārdhamasaṃkhyaṃ prākṛtaṃ layam |
yāsyatyeva hi dāsye ca niyukto dāsyakarmaṇi84 ||
yāni kāni ca pāpāni brahmahatyāsamāni ca |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā ca palāyaṃte vainateyādivoragāḥ || 85 ||
tatpādarajasā devī sadyaḥ pūtā vasuṃdharā |
puṃsāṃ lakṣaṃ tatpitṝṇāṃ nistarettastha janmataḥ ||86||
śālagrāmaśilātoyaṃ mṛtyukāle ca yo labhet |
sarvapāpavinirmukto viṣṇulokaṃ sa gacchati || 87 ||
nirvāṇamukti labhate karmabhogātpramucyate |
viṣṇoḥ pade pralīnaśca bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ || 88 ||
śālagrāmaśilāṃ dhṛtvā mithvāvākyaṃ vadettu yaḥ |
sa yāti kumbhīpāke ca yāvadvai brahmaṇo vayaḥ 89 ||
śālagrāmaśilāṃ dhṛtvā svīkāraṃ yo na pālayet |
sa prayātyasipatraṃ caṃ lakṣamanvaṃtarāvadhi || 90 ||
tulasīpatravicchedaṃ śālagrāme karoti yaḥ |
tasya jamāṃtare kāṃte strīvicchedo bhaviṣyati || 91 ||
śālagrāmaṃ ca tulasī śaṃkhaṃ yo hi karoti ca |
bhāryāhīno bhavetso'pi rogī ca saptajanmasu || 92 ||
śālagrāmaṃ ca tulasī śaṃkhaṃ caikatra eva ca |
yo rakṣati mahājñānī sa bhavecchrīhareḥ priyaḥ || 93 ||
sakṛdeva hi yo yasyāṃ vīryādhānaṃ karoti ca |
tadricchede tasya duḥkhaṃ bhavedeva parasparam || 94||
tvaṃ priyā śaṅkhacūḍasya cakamanvaṃtarāvadhi |
śaṃkhena sārdhaṃ tvadbhedaḥ kevalaṃ duḥkhadastathā || 95 || .
ityuktvā śrīharistāṃ ca virarāma ca nārada |
sā ca dehaṃ parityajya divyarūpaṃ vidhāya ca ||96||

yathā śrīśva tathā sā cāpyuvāsa harivakṣasi |
sa jagāma tayā sārdhaṃ vaikuṇṭhaṃ kamalāpatiḥ ||97||
lakṣmīḥ saṃrasvatī gaṃgā tulasī cāpi nārada |
hareḥ priyāścatasraśca babhūvurīśvarasya ca || 98 ||
sadyastaddehajātā ca ca babhūva gaṃḍakī nadī |
īśvaraḥ so'pi śailaśca tattīre puṇyado nṛṇām ||99||
kurvaṃti tatra koṭāśca śilāṃ bahuvidhāṃ mune |
jale pataṃti yā yāśca phaladāstāśca niścitam||100||
sthalasthāḥ piṃgalā jñeyāścopatāpādraveriti |
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 101 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe nārāyaṇa nāradasaṃvāde caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 14 ||
atha pañcaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
tulasī ca yadā pūjyā kṛtā nārāyaṇapriyā |
asyāḥ pūjyāvidhānaṃ ca stotraṃ ca vada sāṃpratam || 1 ||
kena pūjā kṛtā kena stutā prathamato mune |
tatra pūjyā sā babhūva kena vā vada māmaho || 2 ||
sūta uvāca
nāradasya vacaḥ śrutvā prahasya munipuṅgavaḥ |
kathāṃ kathitumārebhe puṇyāṃ pāpaharāṃ parām || 3 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
hariḥ saṃpūjya tulasīṃ reme ca ramayā saha |
ramāsamānasobhāgyāṃ cakāra gauraveṇa ca || 4 ||
gehe ca lakṣmīgaṃgā ca tasyāśca navasaṃgamam |
saubhāgyagauravaṃ kopāttanna sehe sarasvatī || 5 ||
sātāṃ jaghāna kalahe māninī harisannidhau |
vroḍayā cāpamānena sāṃtardhānaṃ cakāra ha || 6 ||
sarvasiddheśvarī devī jñānināṃ siddhayoginī |
jagāmādarśanaṃ kopātsarvatra ca hareraho || 7 ||
harirna dṛṣṭvā tulasīṃ bodhayitvā sarasvatīm |
tadanujñāṃ gṛhītvā ca jagāma tulasīvanam || 8 ||
tatra datvā ca susnāto hariḥ sa tulasīṃ satīm | pūjayāmāsa tāṃ dhyātvā stotraṃ bhaktyā cakāra ha |
lakṣmī māyā kāmavāṇī bījapūrvaṃ daśākṣaram |
vṛndāvanīti ṅentaṃ ca vahnijāyāṃtameva ca || 10 ||
anena kalpataruṇā mantrarājena nārada |
pūjayedyo vidhānena sarvasiddhi labheddhruvam || 11 ||
ghṛtadīpena dhūpena siṃdūracandanena ca |
naivedyena ca puṣpeṇa copacāreṇa nārada ||12||
haristotreṇa tuṣṭā sā cāvirbhūtā mahīruhāt |
prasannā caraṇāṃbhoje jagāma śaraṇaṃ śubhā || 13 |
varaṃ tasyai dadau viṣṇuḥ sarvapūjyā bhaveriti |
ahaṃ tvāṃ dhārayiṣyāmi surūpāṃ mūni vakṣasi || 14 ||
sarve tvāṃ dhārayiṣyaṃti svamūni ca surādayaḥ |
ityuktvā tāṃ gṛhītvā ca prayayau svālayaṃ vibhuḥ ||
nārada uvāca
ki dhyānaṃ stavanaṃ ki vā ki pūjāvidhānakam |
tulasyāśca mahābhāga tanme vyākhyātumarhasi || 16 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
antarhitāyāṃ tasyāṃ ca harirvṛndāvane tadā |
tasyāścakre stutiṃ gatvā tulasīṃ virahāturaḥ || 17||

śrībhagavānuvāca
vṛkṣāśca yadaikatra bhavanti ca |
vidurbudhāstena vṛndāṃ matpriyāṃ yāṃ bhajāmyaham || 18 ||
vṛndarūpāśca
purā vabhūva yā devī tvādo vṛndāvane vane |
tena vṛndāvanī khyātāṃ saubhāgyāṃ tāṃ bhajāmyaham 19 ||
asaṃkhyeṣu ca viśveṣu pūjitā yā nirantaram |
tena viśvapūjitākhyāṃ pūjitāṃ ca bhajāmyaham 20||
asaṃkhyāni ca viśvāni pavitrāṇi tvayā sadā |
tāṃ viśvapāvanoṃ devīṃ viraheṇa smarāmyaham || 21 ||
devā na tuṣṭāḥ puṣpāṇāṃ samūhena yayā vinā |
tāṃ puṣpasārāṃ śuddhāṃ ca draṣṭumicchāmi śokataḥ || 22||
viśve yatprāptimātreṇa bhaktānaṃdo bhaveddhruvam |
naṃdinī tena vikhyātā sā prītā bhavatādiha || 23 ||
yasyā devyāstulā nāsti viśveṣu nikhileṣu ca |
tulasī tena vikhyātā tāṃ yāmi śaraṇaṃ priyām || 24 ||
kṛṣṇajīvanarūpā sā śaśvatpriyatamā satī |
tena kṛṣṇajīvanī sā sā me rakṣatu jīvanam || 25||
ityevaṃ stavanaṃ kṛtvā tasthau tatra ramāpatiḥ |
dadarśa tulasīṃ sākṣātpādapadyanatāṃ satīm ||26|
rudatīmavamānena māninīṃ mānapūjitām |
priyāṃ dṛṣṭvā priyaḥ śīghraṃ vāsayāmāsa vakṣasi ||20|
bhāratyājñāṃ gṛhītvā ca svālayaṃ ca yayau hariḥ |
bhāratyā saha tatprīti kārayāmāsa satvaram ||28||
baraṃ viṣṇurdadau tasyai sarvapūjyā bhaveriti |
śirodhāryā ca sarveṣāṃ baṃdyā mānyā mameti ca || 29 ||
viṣṇorbareṇa sā devī parituṣṭā babhūva ca |
sarasvatī tāmākṛṣṇa bāsayāmāsa sannidhau || 30 ||
lakṣmīgaṃgā sasmitā ca tāṃ samākṛṣya nārada |
gṛhaṃ praveśayāmāsa vinayena satīṃ tadā || 31||
vṛndā vṛndāvanī viśvapūjitā viśvapāvanī |
puṣpatārā naṃdinī ca tulasī kṛṣṇajīvanī || 32||
etannāmāṣṭakaṃ caiva stotraṃ nāmārthasaṃyutam |
yaḥ paṭhettāṃ ca saṃpūjya so'śvameṣaphalaṃ labhet ||33||
kāttikyaḥ pūrṇimāyāṃ ca tulasyā janmamaṃgalam |
tatra tasyāśca pūjā ca vihitā hariṇā purā || 34 ||
tasyāṃ yaḥ pūjayettāṃ ca bhaktyā ca viśvapāvanīm |
sarvapāpādvinirmukto viṣṇulokaṃ sa gacchati ||35||
kāttike tulasīpatraṃ yo dadāti ca vaiṣṇave |
gavāmayutadānasyaṃ phalaṃ prāpnoti niścitam || 36 ||
aputro labhate putraṃ priyāhīno labhetpriyām |
bandhuhīno labhedvaṃdhūnstotra śravaṇamātrataḥ ||37|
rogī pramudhyate rogādvaddho mucyeta baṃdhanāt |
bhayānmucyeta bhītastu pāpānmucyeta pātakī || 38||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ stotraṃ dhyānaṃ pūjā vidhi śṛṇu |
tvameva vede jānāsi kaṇvaśākhoktameva ca ||39||
tadvṛkṣe pūjayettāṃ ca bhaktayā cāvāhanaṃ vinā |
tāṃ dhyātvā copacāreṇa dhyānaṃ pātakanāśanam || 40 ||
tulasīṃ puṣpasārāṃ ca satīṃ pūtāṃ manoharām |
kṛtapāpeṣmadāhāya jvaladagniśikhopamām ||41||
puṣpeṣu tulanā yasyā nāsti vedeṣu bhāṣitamṃ |
pavitrarūpā sarvāsu tulasī sā ca kīrtitā ||42||
śirodhāryā ca sarveṣāmīpsitā viśvapāvanī |
jīvanmuktāṃ muktidāṃ ca bhaje tāṃ haribhaktidām ||43|

iti dhyātvā ca saṃpūjya stutvā ca praṇametsudhīḥ |
uktaṃ tulasnupākhyānaṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 44 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe pañcaviṃśā'dhyāyaḥ || 25||
atha paḍviṃśodhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
tulasyupākhyānamidaṃ śrutaṃ cātisudhopamam |
tataḥ sāvitryupākhyānaṃ tanme vyākhyātumarhasi || 1 ||
kena samudbhūtā sā śrutā ca śruteḥ prasūḥ |
kena vā pūjitā loke prathame kaiśca vā pare ||2||
purā
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
brahmaṇā vedajananī prathame pūjitā mune |
dvitīye ca vedagaṇaistatpaśvādiduṣāṃ gaṇaiḥ ||3||
bhārate |
tatpaścātpūjayāmāsurvaṇaścitvāra eva ca ||4||
tadā cāśvapatirbhūpaḥ pūjayāmāsa
nārada uvāca
ko vā so'śvapatirbrahmankena vā tena pūjitā |
sarvapūjyā ca sā devī prathame kaiśca vā pare || 5||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
madradeśe mahārājī babhūvāśvapatirmune |
vairiṇāṃ valaharttā ca mitrāṇāṃ duḥkhanāśanaḥ |
āsīttasya mahārājñī mahiṣī dharmacāriṇī |
mālatīti samākhyātā yathā lakṣmīrgadābhṛtaḥ ||7||
sā ca rājñī ca vandhyā ca vasiṣṭhasyopadeśata: |
cakārārādhanaṃ bhaktyā sāvitryācaiva nārada || 8||
pratyādeśa na sā prāptā mahiṣī na dadarśa tām |
gṛhaṃ jagāma duḥkhārtā hṛdayena vidūyatā || 9 ||
rājā tāṃ duḥkhitāṃ dṛṣṭvā bodhayitvā nayena vai |
sāvitryāstapase bhaktyā jagāma puṣkaraṃ tadā || 10 ||
tapaścakāra tatraiva saṃyataḥ śatavatsaram |
na dadarśa ca sāvitryāḥ pratyādeśo vabhūva ca || 11 ||
śuśrāvākāśavāṇīṃ ca nṛpeṃdraśvāśarīriṇīm |
gāyatryā daśalakṣaṃ ca japaṃ tvaṃ kuru nārada || 12 ||
etasminnaṃtare tatra ājagāma parāśaraḥ |
praṇanāma tatastaṃ ca munirnṛpamuvāca ca || 13 ||
muniruvāca
sakṛjjapaśca gāyatryāḥ pāpaṃ dinabhavaṃ haret |
daśavāraṃ japenaiva naśyetpāpaṃ divāniśam ||14||
śatavāraṃ japaścaiva pāpaṃ māsājitaṃ haret |
sahasradhā japañcaiva kalmaṣaṃ vatsarājitam ||15||
lakṣo janmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ daśalakṣo'nyajanmajam |
sarvajanmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ śatalakṣādvinaśyati || 16 ||
karoti mukti viprāṇāṃ japo daśaguṇastataḥ |
karaṃ sarpaphagākāraṃ kṛtvā tadrdhamudritam ||17||
ānamramūrdhamacalaṃ prajapetprāṅmukho dvijaḥ |
anāmikāmadhyadeśādayo vāmakrameṇa ca || 18 ||
tarjanīmūlaparyantaṃ japasyaivaṃ kramaḥ kare |
śvetapaṃkajabījānāṃ sphaṭikānāṃ ca saṃskṛtām || 19 ||
kṛtvā vai mālikāṃ rājañjapettīrthe surālaye |
saṃsthāpya mālāmaśvatthapatre padme ca saṃyataḥ || 20 ||

kṛtvā gorocanāktāṃ ca gāyatryā snāpayetsusīḥ |
gāyatrīśatakaṃ tasyāṃ japecca vidhipūrvakam ||21||
athavā paṃcagavyena snātvā mālāṃ susaṃskṛtām |
atha gaṃgodakenaiva snātvā vā'tisusaṃskṛtām 22 ||
evaṃ krameṇa rājarṣe daśalakṣaṃ japaṃ kuru |
sākṣādrakṣyasi sāvitrīṃ trijanmapātakakṣayāt 23||
nityaṃ saṃdhyāṃ ca he rājankariṣyami dine dine |
madhyāhne cāpi sāyāhne prātareva śuciḥ sadā 24||
saṃdhyāhono'śuci nityamanarhaḥ sarvakarmasu |
yadahnā kurute karma na tasya phalabhāgbhavet || 25 ||
nopatiṣṭhati ya pūrvī nopāste yastu paścimām |
sa śūdravadvahiṣkāryaḥ sarvasmādvijakarmaṇaḥ ||26||
yāvajjīvanaparyataṃ triḥ saṃdhyāṃ yaḥ karoti ca |
sa ca sūryasamo viprastejasā tapasā sadā ||27||
tatpādapadma rajasā sadya pūtā vasuṃdharā |
jīvanmuktaḥ sa tejasvī saṃdhyāvṛtāṃ hi yo dvijaḥ 28 ||
tīrthāni ca pavitrāṇi tasya saṃsparśamātrataḥ |
tataḥ pāpāni yāṃtyeva vainateyādivoragāḥ ||29||
na gṛhṇati surāḥ pūjāṃ pitaraḥ piṃḍatarpaṇam |
svecchayā ca dvijāteśva trisaṃdhyārahitamya ca || 30 ||
mūlaprakṛtyabhakto yastanmaṃtrasyāpyanarcakaḥ |
tadutsavavihonaśca viṣahīno yathoragaḥ ||31||
viṣṇumaṃtravihīnaśca trisaṃdhyārahito dvijaḥ |
ekādaśīvihīnaśca viṣahīno yathoragaḥ || 32 ||
hareranaivedyabhojī ca dhāvako vṛṣavāhakaḥ |
śudrānnabhojī yo vipro viṣahīno yathoragaḥ ||33||
śūdrāṇāṃ śavadāhī yaḥ sa vipro vṛṣalīpatiḥ |
śūdrāṇāṃ sūpakāraśca vipahīno yathoragaḥ || 34 ||
śūdāṇāṃ ca pratigrāhī śūdrayājī ca yo dvijaḥ |
masijīvī asījīvī viṣahīno yathoraṃgaḥ ||35||
yaḥ kanyāvikrayī vipro yo harernāmavikrayī |
yo vipro'vīrānnabhojī ṛtusnātāntrabhojakaḥ 36 ||
bhagajīvo vārdhupiko viṣahīno yathāragaḥ |
yo vidyāvikrayī vipro vipahīno yathoragaḥ || 37 ||
sūryodaye svapedyo hi matsyabhojī ca yo dvijaḥ |
śivāpūjādirahito viṣahono yathoragaḥ ||38||
ityuktvā ca muniśreṣṭhaḥ sarvapūjāvidhikramam |
tamuvāca ca sāvitryā dhyānādikramabhīpsitam 39 ||
dattvā sarva nṛpeṃdrāya yayau ca svāśrame mune |
rājā saṃpūjya sāvitrīṃ dadarśa varamāpa ca ||40||
nārada uvāca
kiṃ vā dhyānaṃ ca sāvitryāḥ kiṃ vā pūjāvidhikramam |
stotraṃ maṃtraṃ ca kiṃ dattvā prayayau sa parāśaraḥ 41 ||
nṛpaḥ kena vidhānena saṃpūjya śrutimātaram |
varaṃ ca kaṃ vā saṃprāpa saṃpūjya tu vidhānataḥ || 42 ||
tatsarvaṃ śrotumicchāmi sāvitryāḥ paramaṃ mahat |
rahasyātirahasyaṃ ca śrutisiddhaṃ samāsataḥ ||43||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
jyeṣṭha kṛṣṇatrayodaśyāṃ śuddhakāle ca yatnataḥ |
vratamevaṃ caturdaśyāṃ vratī bhaktyā samācaret ||44||
vrataṃ caturdaśābdaṃ ca dvisaptaphalasaṃyutam |
dattvā dvisaptanaivedyaṃ puṣpadhūpādikaṃ caret ||45||
vastraṃ yajñopavītaṃ ca bhojanaṃ vidhipūrvakam |
saṃsthāpya maṃgalaghaṭaṃ phalaśākhāsamanvitam ||46 ||

gaṇeśaṃ ca dineśaṃ ca vahni viṣṇuṃ śivaṃ śivām |
saṃpūjya pūjayediṣṭaṃ ghaṭe āvāhite dvijaḥ || 47/
śṛṇu dhyānaṃ ca sāvitryāśvoktaṃ mādhyaṃdine ca yat |
stotraṃ pūjāvidhānaṃ ca maṃtraṃ ca sarvakāmadam ||48
taptakāṃcanavarṇābhāṃ jvalaṃtīṃ brahmatejasā |
geṣmamadhyāhnamārtaṇḍasahasrasaṃmitaprabhām || 49:
īṣaddhāsya prasannāsyāṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām |
bahniśuddhāṃ śukādhānāṃ bhaktānugrahavigrahām ||50 1
sukhadāṃ muktidāṃ śāntāṃ kāṃtāṃ ca jagatāṃ vidheḥ |
sarvasaṃpatsvarūpāṃ ca pradātrī sarvasaṃpadām ||51||
vedādhiṣṭhātṛdevīṃ ca vedaśāstrasvarūpiṇīm |
vedabījasvarūpāṃ ca bhaje tāṃ vedamātaram ||52||
dhyātvā dhyānena naivedyaṃ dattvā pāṇi svamūrdhani |
punardhyātvā ghaṭe bhaktyā devo māvāhayedvatī ||53||
dattvā poḍaśopacāraṃ vedoktaṃ mantrapūrvakam |
saṃpūjya stutvā praṇameddevadevīṃ vidhānataḥ ||54 ||
āsanaṃ pādyamadhyaṃ ca snānīyaṃ cānulepanam |
dhūpa dopaṃ ca naivedyaṃ tāṃbūlaṃ śītalaṃ jalam ||55||
vasanaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ mālyaṃ gaṃvamācayanīyakam |
manoharaṃ sutalpaṃ ca deyānyetāni ṣoḍaśa || 56 ||
dārusāravikāraṃ ca hemādinirmitaṃ ca vā |
devādhāraṃ puṇyadaṃ ca mayā tubhyaṃ niveditam ||57||
tīrthodakaṃ ca pādyaṃ ca puṇyadaṃ prītidaṃ mahat |
pūjāṃgabhūtaṃ śuddhaṃ ca mayā tubhyaṃ niveditam ||58 ||
pavitrarūpama ca dūrvā puṣpadalānvitam |
puṇyadaṃ śaṃkhatoyāktaṃ mayā tubhyaṃ niveditam || 59 ||
sugaṃdha gaṃdhatoyaṃ ca snehaṃ saugandhakārakam |
mayā niveditaṃ bhastyā snānīyaṃ pratigṛhyatām ||60||
gaṃdhadravyodbhavaṃ puṇyaṃ prītidaṃ divyagaṃdhadam |
mayā niveditaṃ bhaktayā gaṃdhatoyaṃ tavāmbike || 61 ||
sarvamaṃgalarūpaṃ ca ca maṃgalapradam |
puṇyadaṃ ca sudhūpaṃ taṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvari || 62 || sarva .
sugaṃdhayuktaṃ sukhadaṃ mayā tubhyaṃ niveditam |
jagatāṃ darśanārthāya pradīpaṃ dīptikārakam || 63 ||
andhakāradhvaṃsavījaṃ mayā tubhyaṃ niveditam |
tuṣṭidaṃ puṣṭidaṃ caiva protidaṃ kṣudvināśanam ||64||
puṇyadaṃ svādurūpaṃ ca naivedyaṃ pratigṛhyatām |
tāṃbūlapravaraṃ ramyaṃ karpūrādisuvāsitam || 65 ||
tuṣṭidaṃ puṣṭidaṃ caiva mayā tubhyaṃ niveditam |
suśītalaṃ vāri śītaṃ pināsānāśakārakam ||66||
jagatāṃ jīvarūpaṃ ca jīvanaṃ pratigṛhyatām |
dehaśobhāsvarūpaṃ ca sabhāśobhāvivardhanam || 67||
kāpasijaṃ ca kṛmijaṃ vasanaṃ pratigṛhyatām |
kāṃcanādivinirmāṇaṃ śrīkaraṃ śrīyutaṃ sadā || 68 ||
mukhadaṃ puṇyadaṃ ratnabhūpaṇaṃ pratigṛhyatām |
nānāvṛkṣasamudbhūtaṃ nānārūpasamanvitam ||69||
phalasvarūpaṃ phaladaṃ phalaṃ ca pratigṛhyatām |
sarvamaṃgalarūpaṃ ca sarvamaṃgalamaṃgalam || 70 ||
nānāpuṣpavinirmāṇa bahuśobhāsamanvitam |
prītida puṣpadaṃ caiva mālyaṃ ca pratigṛhyatām ||71||
puṇyadaṃ ca sugaṃdhāḍhyaṃ gaṃdhaṃ ca devi gṛhyatām |
siṃdūra ca varaṃ ramyaṃ bhālaśobhā vivardhanam ||72||
bhūpaṇānāṃ ca pravaraṃ siduraṃ pratigṛhyatām |
viśuddhagraṃthi saṃyuktaṃ puṇyasūtra vinirmitam ||73 ||
pavitraṃ vedamaṃtreṇa yajñasūtraṃ ca gṛhyatām |
dravyāṇyetāni mūlena dattvā stotraṃ paṭhetsudhīḥ ||74||

tato viprāya bhaktyā ca vratī dadyācca dakṣiṇām |
sāvitrīti catuthyaṃtaṃ vahnijāyāntameva ca || 75||
lakṣmīmāyākāmapūrvaṃ maṃtramaṣṭākṣaraṃ viduḥ |
mādhyaṃdinoktaṃ stotraṃ ca sarvakāmaphalapradam || 76 ||
viprajīvanarūpaṃ ca nibodha kathayāmi te |
kṛṣṇena dattāṃ sāvitrīṃ goloke brahmaṇe purā || 77 ||
nāyāti sā tena sārdhaṃ brahmaloke ca nārada |
brahmā kṛṣṇājñayā bhaktayā tuṣṭāva vedamātaram ||78||
tadā sā parituṣṭā ca brahmāṇaṃ cakame patim |
brahmovāca
saccidānaṃdarūpe tvaṃ mūlaprakṛtirūpiṇi || 79 ||
hiraṇyagarbhapa evaṃ prasannā bhava suṃdari |
tejaḥ svarūpe parame paramānaṃdarūpiṇi || 80 ||
dvijātīnāṃ jātirūpe prasannā bhava suṃdari |
nityaṃ nityapriye devi nityānaṃdasvarūpiṇi || 81 ||
sarva maṃgalarūpa ca prasannā bhava suṃdari |
sarvasvarūpe viprāṇāṃ maṃtrasāre parātpare ||82||
sukhade mokṣade devi prasannā bhava suṃdari |
viprapāpedhamadāhāya jvaladagniśikhopame || 83 ||
brahmatejaḥ prade devi prasannā bhava suṃdari |
kāyena manasā vācā yatpāpaṃ kurute naraḥ ||84||
tattvatsmaraṇamātreṇa bhasmībhūtaṃ bhaviṣyati |
ityuktvā jagatāṃ dhātā tasthau tatra ca saṃsadi || 85 ||
sāvitrī brahmaṇā sārdhaṃ brahmalokaṃ jagāma sā |
anena stavarājena saṃstūyā patirnṛpaḥ || 86||
dadarśa tāṃ ca sāvitrīṃ varaṃ prāpa manogatam |
stavarājamimaṃ puṇyaṃ saṃdhyāṃ kṛtvā ca yaḥ paṭhet ||
pāṭhe caturṇā vedānāṃ tatphalaṃ labhate ca tat ||87||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ṣaḍaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 26 ||
atha saptaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
stutvā'nana so'śvapatiḥ saṃpūjya vidhipūrvakam |
dadarśa tatra tāṃ devīṃ sahasrārkasamaprabhām || 1||
svāca sā ca rājānaṃ prasannā sasmitā satī |
yathā mātā svaputraṃ ca dyotayaṃtī diśastviṣā || 2||
sāvitryuvāca
jānāmyahaṃ mahārāja yatte manasi vāṃchitam |
vāṃchitaṃ tava palyāśca sarva dāsyāmi niścitam || 3 ||
sādhvī kanyābhilāpaṃ ca karoti tava kāminī |
tvaṃ prārthayasi putraṃ ca bhaviṣyati krameṇa ca |
ityuktvā sā tadā devī brahmalokaṃ jagāma ha |
rājā jagāma svagṛhaṃ tatkanyā''dau babhūva ha || 5||
ārādhanācca sāvitryā va va kamalā parā |
sāvitrīti sa tannāma cakārāśvapatirnṛpaḥ || 6||
kālena sā vardhamānā babhūva ca dine dine |
rūpayauvanasaṃpannā śukle caṃdrakalā yathā || 7||
sā baraṃ varayāmāsa dyumatsenātmajaṃ tadā |
satyavaṃtaṃ satyaśīlaṃ nānāguṇasamanvitam ||8||

rājā tasmai dado tāṃ ca ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām |
so'pi sārtha kotukena tāṃ gṛhītvā gṛhaṃ yayau || 9 ||
sa ca samvatsare'tīte satyavānsatyavikramaḥ |
jagāma phalakāṣṭārthaṃ saharṣaṃ piturājñayā || 10||
jagāma sādhvī tatpaścātsāvitrī daivayogataḥ |
nipatya vṛkṣāttatraiva prāṇāṃstatyāja satyavān ||11||
yamastaṃ puruṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā baddhāṅguṣṭhasamaṃ mune |
gṛhītvā gamanaṃ cakre tatpaścātprayayī satī || 12 ||
paścāttāṃ sudatīṃ dṛvā yamaḥ saṃyamanīpatiḥ |
uvāca madhuraṃ sādhvīṃ mādhūnāṃ pravaro mahān || 13||
dharmarāja uvāca
aho va yāsi sāvitri gṛhītvā mānuṣoṃ tanum |
yadi yāsyasi kāṃtena sārdhaṃ dehaṃ tadātyaja || 14||
gantuṃ martyo na śaknoti gṛhotvā pāṃcabhautikam |
dehaṃ ca mama lokaṃ ca naśvaraṃ naśvaraḥ sadā ||15||
bhartuste pūrṇakālo vai babhūva bhārate sati |
svakarmaphalabhogārthaṃ satyavānyāti madgṛham ||16||
karmaṇā jāyate jantuḥ karmaṇaiva pralīyate |
sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ bhayaṃ śokaḥ karmaṇaiva praṇoyate || 17||
karmaṇendro bhavejjīvo brahmaputraḥ svakarmaṇā |
svakarmaṇā harerdāso janmādirahito bhavet || 18||
svakarmaṇā sarvasiddhimamaratvaṃ labheddhruvam |
labhetsvakarmaṇā viṣṇoḥ sālokyaḥ dicatuṣṭayam 19 ||
suratvaṃ ca manutvaṃ ca rājendratvaṃ labhennaraḥ |
svakarmaṇā śivatvaṃ ca gaṇeśatvaṃ tathaiva ca || 20 |
/
karmaṇā ca munīṃdratvaṃ tapasvitvaṃ svakarmaṇā |
svakarmaṇākṣatriyatvaṃ vaiśyatvaṃ ca svakarmaṇā || 21 ||
karmaṇaiva ca mlecchatvaṃ labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
svakarma gā jaṅga matvaṃ śailatvaṃ na svakarmaṇā || 22 ||
karmaṇā rākṣasatvaṃ ca kinnaratvaṃ svakarmaṇā |
karmaṇaivādhipatyaṃ ca vṛkṣatvaṃ ca svakarmaṇā || 23||
karmaṇaiva paśutvaṃ ca vanajīvī svakarmaṇā |
karmaṇā kṣudrajantutvaṃ kṛmitvaṃ ca svakarmaṇā ||24||
daiteyatvaṃ dānavatvamasuratvaṃ svakarmaṇā |
ityetaduktvā sāvitrī virarāma sa vai yamaḥ ||25||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe saptaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||27||
atha aṣṭāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
yamasya vacanaṃ śrutvā sāvitrī ca pativratā |
tuṣṭāva parayā bhaktyā tamuvāca manasvino || 1 ||
sāvitryuvāca
kiṃ karma tadbhavetkena ko vā taddhetureva ca |
ko vā dehī ca dehaḥ kaḥ ko vā karmakārakaḥ ||2||
kiṃ vā jñānaṃ ca buddhiḥ kā ko vā prāṇaḥ śarīriṇām| kānīṃdriyāṇi kiṃ tepāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ devatāśva kāḥ ||3||
bhoktā bhojayitā ko vā ko vā bhogaśca niṣkṛtiḥ |
ko jīvaḥ paramātmā kastanme vyākhyātumarhasi ||4||
dhama uvāca
vedapraṇihito dharmaḥ karma yanmaṅgalaṃ param |
avaidikaṃ tu yatkarma tadevāśubhameva ca ||5||

ahaitukī devasevā saṃkalparahitā satī |
karmanirmūlarūpā ca sā eva parabhaktidā || 6 ||
ko vā karmaphalaṃ bhuṃkte ko vā nirlipta eva ca |
brahmabhakto yo naraśca sa ca muktaḥ śrutaḥ śrutau || 7 ||
janmamṛtyujarāvyādhiśokabhotivivarjitaḥ ! bhaktiśca dvividhā sādhvi śrutyuktā sarvasaṃmatā || 8 ||
nirvāṇapadadātrī ca ca harirūpapradā nṛṇām |
harirūpasvarūpāṃ na bhakti nāṃchaṃti vaiṣṇavāḥ || 2 ||
anye nirvāṇamicchati yogino brahmavittamāḥ |
karmaṇo bījarūpaśca satataṃ tatphalapradaḥ || 106
karma rūpaśca bhagavānparātmā prakṛtiḥ parā |
so'pi taddheturūpaśca deho naśvara eva ca || 11 ||
pṛthivī vāyurākāśo jalaṃ tejastathaiva ca |
etāni sūtrarūpāṇi sṛṣṭirūpavidhau sataḥ || 12 ||
karma kartā ca dehī ca ātmā bhojayitā sadā |
bhogo vibhavabhedaśca niṣkṛtirmuktireva ca || 13||
sadasadbhedabījaṃ ca jñānaṃ nānāvidhaṃ bhavet |
viṣayāṇāṃ vibhāgānāṃ bhedi bījaṃ ca kīrtitam || 14 ||
buddhivivecanā sā ca jñānabījaṃ śrutau śrutam |
vāyubhedāśca prāṇāśca balarūpāśca dehinām || 15 ||
indriyāṇāṃ ca pravaramīśvarāṃśasamūhakam |
prerakaṃ karmaṇāṃ caiva durnivārya ca dehinām || 16||
agnirūpyamadṛśyaṃ ca jñānabhedo manaḥ smṛtam |
locanaṃ śravaṇaṃ ghrāṇaṃ tvakca ra namindriyam ||17||
aṃgināmaṃgarūpaṃ ca prerakaṃ sarvakarmaṇām |
ripurūpaṃ mitrarūpaṃ sukharūpaṃ ca duḥkhadam || 18 ||
sūryo vāyuśca pṛthivī brahmādyā devatāḥ smṛtāḥ |
prāṇadehādibhṛdyo hi sa jīvaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 19 ||
paramaṃ vyāpakaṃ brahma nirguṇaḥ prakṛte paraḥ |
kāraṇa kāraṇānāṃ ca paramātmā sa ucyate || 20 ||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ sarva tvayā pṛṣṭaṃ yathāgamam |
jñānināṃ jñānarūpaṃ ca gaccha vatse yathāsukham || 21 ||
sāvitryuvāca
tyaktvā kva yāmi kāṃtaṃ vā tvāṃ vā jñānārṇavaṃ dhruvam |
yadyatkaromi praśnaṃ ca tadbhavānvaktumarhati ||22||
kāṃ kāṃ yoni yāti jīvaḥ karmaṇā kena vā punaḥ |
kena vā karmaṇā svargaṃ kena vā narakaṃ pitaḥ || 23||
kena vā karmaṇā muktiḥ kena bhaktirbhavedguro |
kena vā karmaṇā yogī rogī vā kena karmaṇā ||24||
kena vā dīrghajīvī ca kenālpāyuśca karmaṇā |
kena vā karmaṇā duḥkhī sukhī vā kena karmaṇā ||25||
aṃgahīnaśca kāṇaśca badhiraḥ kena karmaṇā |
aṃdho vā paṃgurapi ca pramattaḥ kena karmaṇā ||26||
kṣipto'tilubdhakacauraḥ kena vā karmaṇā bhavet |
kena siddhimavāpnoti sālokyādicatuṣṭayam || 27||
kena vā brāhmaṇatvaṃ ca tapasvitvaṃ ca kena vā |
svargabhogādikaṃ kena vaikuṇṭaṃ kena karmaṇā || 28 ||
golovaḥ kena vā brahmansarvotkṛṣṭaṃ nirāmayam | narako vā katividhaḥ kiṃsaṃkhyo nāma kiṃ ca vā29 |
ko vā kaṃ narakaṃ yāti kiyaṃta teṣu tiṣṭhati |
pāpināṃ karmaṇā kena ko vā vyādhiḥ prajāyate ||
yadyatpriyaṃ mayā pṛṣṭaṃ tanme vyākhyātumarhasi ||30||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate navamaskandhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde sāvitryupākhyāne'ṣṭāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 28 ||

athaikonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
sāvitrīvacanaṃ śrutvā jagāma vismayaṃ yamaḥ |
prahasya vaktumārebhe karmapākaṃ tu jīvinām || 1||
dharma uvāca
kanyā dvādaśavarṣīyā vatse tvaṃ vayasā'dhunā |
jñānaṃ te pūrvaviduṣāṃ jñānināṃ yogināṃ param ||2||
sāvitrīvaradānena tvaṃ sāvitrī kalā satī |
prāptā purā bhūbhṛtā ca tapasā tatsamā sute ||3||
yathā śrīḥ śrīpateḥ kroḍe bhavānī ca bhavorasi |
yathā'ditiḥ kaśyape ca yathā'halyā ca gautame ||4||
yathā śacī mahendre ca yathā candre ca rohiṇī |
yathā ratiḥ kāmadeve yathā svāhā hutāśane || 5 ||
yathā svadhā ca pitṛṣu yathā saṃdhyā divākareṃ |
varuṇānī ca varuṇe yajñe ca dakṣiṇā yathā || 6 ||
yathā varāhe pṛthivī devasenā ca kārtike |
saubhāgyāsu priyā tvaṃ ca tathā satyavataḥ priye || 7 |
ayaṃ tubhyaṃ varo datto'pyaparaṃ ca yathepsitam |
vṛṇu devi mahābhāge dadāmi sakalepsitam || 8||
sāvitryuvāca
satyavrata aurasānāṃ putrāṇāṃ śatakaṃ mama |
bhaviṣyati mahābhāga varametanmadīpsitam ||9||
matpituḥ putraśatakaṃ śvaśurasya ca cakṣuṣī |
rājyalābho bhavatvevaṃ varametanmadīpsitam ||10||
aṃte satyavatā sārdhaṃ yāsyāmi harimaṃdiram |
samatīte lakṣavarṣe dehīdaṃ me jagatprabho || 11 ||
jīvakarmavipākaṃ ca śrātuṃ kautūhalaṃ mama |
viśvanistārabījaṃ ca tanme vyākhyātumarhasi || 12 ||
dharmarāja uvāca
bhaviṣyati mahāsādhvi sarvaṃ mānasikaṃ tava |
jīvakarmavipākaṃ ca kathayāmi niśāmaya || 13 ||
śubhānāmaśubhānāṃ ca karmaṇāṃ janma bhārate |
puṇyakṣetre ca nānyatra sarvaṃ ca bhuṃjate janāḥ ||14||
surā daityā dānavāśca gandharvā rākṣasādayaḥ |
narāśva sarvajanakā naṃ sarve jīvinaḥ sati || 15 ||
viśiṣṭajīvinaḥ karma bhujate sarvayoniṣu |
śubhāśubhaṃ ca sarvatra svargeṣu narakeṣu ca || 16 ||
viśeṣato jīvinaśva bhramaṃte sarvayoniṣu |
śubhāśubhaṃ bhuṃjate ca karma pūrvājitaṃ param || 17 |
śubhena karmaṇā yāti svarlokādikameva ca |
karmaṇā cāśubhenaiva bhramaṃti narakeṣu ca || 18||
karmanirmūlane bhaktiḥ sā coktā dvividhā sati |
nirvāṇarūpā bhaktiśca brahmaṇaḥ prakṛteriha ||19||
rogī kukarmaṇā jīvaścārogī śubhakarmaṇā |
dīrghajīvī ca kṣīṇāyuḥ sukhī duḥkhī ca karmaṇā2 ||
andhādayaśvāṃgahīnāḥ karmaṇā kutsitena ca |
siddhayādikamavāpnoti sarvotkṛṣṭena karmaṇā || 21||
sāmānyaṃ kathitaṃ devi viśeṣaṃ śṛṇu suṃdari |
sudurlabhaṃ sugopyaṃ ca purāṇeṣu smṛtiṣvapi |
durlabhā mānuṣī jāti: sarvajātiṣu bhārate |
sarvebhyo brāhmaṇaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ praśastaḥ sarvakarmasu || 23 ||

★ savābhāgavata mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 29
brahmaniṣṭho dvijacaiva garīyān bhārate sati |
niṣkāmaśca sakāmaśca brāhmaṇo dvividhaḥ sati || 24||
sakāmācca pradhānaśca niṣkāmo bhakta eva ca |
karmabhogī sakāmaśca niṣkāmo nirupadravaḥ ||25||
sa yāti dehaṃ tyaktvā ca padaṃ yattannirāmayam |
punarāgamanaṃ nāsti teṣāṃ niṣkāmināṃ sati || 26 ||
sevaṃte dvibhujaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ paramātmānamīśvaram |
golokaṃ prati te bhaktā divyarūpavidhāriṇaḥ || 27||
sakāmino vaiṣṇavāśva gatvā vaikuṇṭhameva ca |
bhārataṃ punarāyāṃti teṣāṃ janma dvijātiṣu |28||
kāle gate ca niṣkāmā bhavatyeva krameṇa ca |
bhakti ca nirmalāṃ tebhyo dāsyāmi niścitaṃ punaḥ ||
brāhmaṇā vaiṣṇavācaiva sakāmāḥ sarvajanmasu |
na teṣāṃ nirmalā buddhirviṣṇubhaktivivarjitā ||30||
tīrthāśritādvijā ye ca tapasyāniratāḥ sati |
te yāṃti brahmalokaṃ ca punarāyāṃti bhārate || 31 ||
svadharmaniratā ye ca ye ca tīrthanivāsinaḥ |
vrajati te satyalokaṃ punarāyāṃti bhārate || 35
svadharmaniratā viprāḥ sūryabhaktāśca bhārate |
vrajaṃti te sūryalokaṃ punarāyāṃti bhārate ||33||
mūlaprakṛtibhaktā ye niṣkāmā dharmacāriṇaḥ |
maṇidvīpaṃ prayotyeva punarāvṛttivarjitam ||34||
svadharme niratā bhaktāḥ śaivāḥ śāktāśva gāṇapāḥ |
te yāṃti śivalokaṃ ca punarāyāṃti bhārate || 35||
ye viprā anyadevejyāḥ svadharmaniratāḥ sati |
te yāṃti sarpalokaṃ ca punarāyāṃti bhārate || 36||
haribhaktāśca niṣkāmāḥ svadharmaniratā dvijāḥ |
te yāṃti ca harerlokaṃ kramādbhaktibalādaho || 37||
svadharmarahitā viprā devānyasevanāḥ sadā |
bhraṣṭācārāśca kāmāśca te yāṃti narakaṃ dhruvam ||38||
svadharmaniratā eva varṇāścatvāra eva ca |
bhavatyeva śubhasyaiva karmaṇaḥ phalabhoginaḥ ||39||
svakarmarahitā ye ca narakaṃ yāṃti te dhruvam |
bhārate na bhavatyeva karmaṇaḥ phalabhoginaḥ |

svadharmaniratā eva varṇāścatvāra eva ca |
svadharmaniratā viprāḥ svadharmaniratāya ca || 41 ||
kanyāṃ dadati viprāya caṃdralokaṃ prayāṃti te |
vasaṃti tatra te sādhvi yāvadidrāśvaturdaśa || 42 ||
sālaṃkṛtāyā dānena dviguṇaṃ phalamucyate |
sakāmā yāṃti tallokaṃ nai niṣkāmāśca sādhavaḥ ||
te prayāṃti viṣṇulokaṃ phalasaṃghātavarjitāḥ |
gavyaṃ ca rajataṃ svaṇaṃ vastraṃ sarpiḥ phalaṃ jalam 44 ||
ye dadatyeva viprebhyaścaṃdralokaṃ prayāṃti te |
vasaṃti te ca talloke yāvanmanvaṃtaraṃ sati || 45 ||
sucirātsuciraṃ vāsaṃ kurvanti tena te janāḥ |
ye dadati suvarṇāśca gāśva tāmrādikaṃ sati || 46 ||
te yāṃti sūryalokaṃ ca śucaye brāhmaṇāya ca |
vasaṃti te tatra loke varṣāṇāmayutaṃ sati || 47||
vipule suciraṃ vāsaṃ kurvanti ca nirāmayāḥ |
dadāti bhūmiṃ viprebhyo dhanāni vipulāni ca || 48 ||
sa yāti viṣṇulokaṃ ca śvetadvīpaṃ manoharam |
tatraiva nivasatyeva bhāvaccaṃdra divākarau ||49|| 1 |
vipule vipulaṃ vāsaṃ karāta puṇyavānmune |
gṛhaṃ dadati viprāya ye janā bhaktipūrvakam ||50||
te yāṃti viṣṇulokaṃ ca suciraṃ sukhadāyakam |
gṛhareṇupramāṇaṃ ca viṣṇuloke mahattame || 51 ||

vipule vipulaṃ vāsaṃ kurvanti mānavāḥ sati |
yasmai yasmai ca devāya yo dadāti gṛhaṃ naraḥ || 52 ||
sa yāti tasya lokaṃ ca reṇumānāndameva ca |
saudhe caturguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ deśe śataguṇaṃ phalam ||53||
prakṛṣṭe dviguṇaṃ tasmādityāha kamalodbhavaḥ |
yo dadāti taḍāgaṃ ca sarvapāpāpanuttaye || 54 ||
sa yāti janalokaṃ ca reṇumānābdameva ca |
vāpyāṃ phalaṃ daśaguṇaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ sadā || 55 ||
sa tu vāpīpradānena taḍāgasya phalaṃ labhet |
dhanuścatuḥ sahasreṇa dairghyamānena niścitam || 56 ||
nyūnā vā tāvatī prasthe sā vāpī parikīrtitā |
daśavāpīsamā kanyā yadi pātre pradīyate ||57||
phalaṃ dadāti dviguṇaṃ yadi sā'laṃkṛtā bhavet |
yatphalaṃ ca taḍāge ca taduddhāre ca tatphalam ||58||
vāpyāśca paṃkoddharaṇe vāpītulyaphalaṃ labhet |
aśvatthavṛkṣamāropya pratiṣṭhāṃ yaḥ karoti ca || 59 ||
sa prayāti tapolokaṃ varṣāṇāmayutaṃ sati |
puṣpodyānaṃ yo dadāti sāvitri sarvabhūtaye || 60||
sa vaseddhruvaloke ca varṣāṇāmayutaṃ dhruvam |
yo dadāti vimānaṃ ca viṣṇave bhārate sati || 61 ||
viṣṇuloke vasetso'pi yāvanmanvaṃtaraṃ param |
citrayukte ca vipule phalaṃ tasya caturguṇam ||62||
tasyārdhaṃ śibikādāne phalameva labheddhruvam |
yo dadāti bhaktiyukto haraye dolamandiram || 63||
viṣṇuloke vasetso'pi yāvanmanvantaraṃ śatam |
rājamārga maudhayuktaṃ yaḥ karoti pativrate ||64 ||
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ so'pi śakraloke mahīyate |
brāhmaṇebhyo'tha devebhyo dāne samaphalaṃ labhet || 65||
yaddhi dattaṃ ca tadbhute na dattaṃ nopatiṣṭhate |
bhuktvā svargādijaṃ saukhyaṃ puṇyavāñjanma bhārate ||
labhedviprakuleṣveva krameṇaivottamādiṣu |
bhārate puṇyavānvipro bhuktvā svargādikaṃ phalam ||
punaḥ so'pi bhavedvipraścaivaṃ ca kṣatriyādaya: |
kṣatriyo vātha vaiśyo vā kalpakoṭiśatena ca || 68||
tapasā brāhmaṇatvaṃ ca na prāpnoti śrutau śrutam |
nābhuktaṃ kṣīyate karma kalpakoṭiśatairapi || 69 ||
etatte kathitaṃ kiṃcitki bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 70 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde sāvitryupākhyāne
ekonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 29 ||
atha triṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
sāvitryuvāca
prayāṃti svargamanyaṃ ca yenaiva karmaṇā yama |
mānavāḥ puṇyavaṃtaśca tanme vyākhyātumarhasi || 1||
dharmarāja uvāca
annadānaṃ ca viprāya yaḥ karoti ca bhārate |
annapramāṇavarṣaṃ ca 2 śivaloke mahoyate ||2||
annadānaṃ mahādāna manyebhyo'pi karoti yaḥ |
annadānapramāṇaṃ ca śivaloke mahīyate ||3||

annadānātparaṃ dānaṃ na bhūtaṃ na bhaviṣyati |
nātra pātraparīkṣā syānna kālaniyamaḥ kvacit ||4||1
devebhyo brāhmaṇebhyo vā dadāti cāsanaṃ yadi |
mahīyate viṣṇuloke varṣāṇāmayutaṃ sati || 5||
yo dadāti ca viprāya divyāṃ dhenuṃ payasvinīm |
tallāmamānavarṣa ca viṣṇuloke mahīyate ||6||
caturguṇaṃ puṇyadine tīrthe śataguṇaṃ phalam |
dānaṃ nārāyaṇakṣetre phalaṃ koṭiguṇaṃ bhavet ||7||
gāṃ yo dadāti viprāya bhārate bhaktipūrvakam |
varṣāṇāmayataṃ caiva candra loke mahīyate ||8||
yacobhayamukhīdānaṃ karoti brāhmaṇāya ca |
tallomamānavarṣaṃ ca viṣṇuloke mahīyate ||9||
yo dadāti brāhmaṇāya śvetacchatraṃ manoharam |
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ so'pi modate varuṇālaye || 10 |
viprāya pīḍitāṃgāya vastrayugmaṃ dadāti ca |
mahāyate vāyulāṃke varṣāṇāmayutaṃ sati || 11 ||
yo dadāti brāhmaṇāya śālagrāmaṃ savastrakam |
mahoyataṃ sa vaikuṃṭhe yāvaccaṃdradivākarau || 12 ||
yo dadāti brāhmaṇāya divyāṃ śayyāṃ manoharām |
mahoyate candraloke yāvaccaṃdra divākarau || 13 || .
yo dadāti pradīpaṃ ca devebhyo brāhmaṇāya ca |
yāvanmanvaṃtaraṃ so'pi vahniloke mahīyate || 14 ||
karāṃti gajadānaṃ ca yadi virāya bhārate |
yāvadidro narastāvadidrasyāsane vaset ||15||
bhārate yo'śvadānaṃ ca karoti brāhmaṇāya ca |
modate vāruṇe loke yāvanmanvantaraṃ sati || 16 ||
prakṛṣṭāṃ śivikāṃ yo hi dadāti brāhmaṇāya ca |
modate vāruṇe loke yāvadidrāścaturdaśa || 17 |
prakṛṣṭāṃ vāṭikāṃ yo hi dadāti brāhmaṇāya ca |
mahīyate vāyuloke yāvanmanvantaraṃ sati || 18 ||
yo dadāti ca viprāya vyajanaṃ śvetacāmaram |
mahīyate vāyuloke varṣāṇāmayutaṃ dhruvam ||19||
dhānyaṃ ratnaṃ yo dadāti ciraṃjīvī bhavetsudhīḥ |
dātā grahītā tau dvau ca dhruvaṃ vaikuṇṭhagāmino 20 ||
satataṃ śrīharetama bhārate yo japennaraḥ |
sa eva cirajīvī ca tato mṛtyuḥ palāyate || 21 ||
yo naro bhārate varṣe dolanaṃ kārayetsudhīḥ |
pūrṇimārajanīśeṣe jīvanmukto bhavennaraḥ ||22||
iha loke sukhaṃ bhuktvā yātyaṃte viṣṇumandiram |
niścitaṃ nivasettatra śatamanvantarāvadhi || 23 ||
phalamuttaraphalgunyāṃ tato'pi dviguṇaṃ bhavet |
kalpāṃtajīvī sa bhavedityāha kamalodbhavaḥ ||24||
tiladānaṃ brāhmaṇāya yaḥ karoti ca bhārate |
tilapramāṇavarṣaṃ ca modate śivamandire ||25||
tataḥ suyoniṃ saṃprāpya ciraṃjīvī bhavetsukhī |
tāmrapātrasya dānena dviguṇaṃ ca phalaṃ labhet ||26||
sālaṃkṛtāṃ ca bhogyāṃ ca savastrāṃ sundarīṃ priyām |
yo dadāti brāhmaṇāya bhārate ca pativratām ||27||
mahīyate caṃdraloke yāvadidrācaturdaśa |
tatra svarveśyayā sārdhaṃ modate ca divāniśam ||28||
tato gaṃdharvaloke ca varṣāṇāmayutaṃ dhruvam |
divāniśaṃ kautukena corvaśyā saha modate ||22||
tato janmasahasraṃ ca prāpnoti sundarīṃ niyām |
satīṃ saubhāgyayuktāṃ ca komalāṃ priyavādinom ||
pradadāti phalaṃ cāru brāhmaṇāya ca yo naraḥ |
phalatramāṇavarṣaṃ ca śakraloke mahīyate ||31||

punaḥ suyoniṃ saṃprāpya labhate sutamuttamam |
saphalānāṃ ca vṛkṣāṇāṃ sahasraṃ ca praśaṃsitam 32 ||
kevalaṃ phaladānaṃ vā brāhmaṇāya dadāti ca |
suciraṃ svargavāsaṃ ca kṛtvā yāti sa bhārate ||33||
nānādravyasamāyuktaṃ nānāsasyasamanvitam |
dadāti yaśva viprāya bhārate vipulaṃ gṛham ||34||
suraloke vasetso'pi yāvanmanvantaraṃ śatam |
tataḥ suyoniṃ saṃprāpya sa mahādhanavānbhavet || 35 ||
yo naraḥ sasyasaṃyuktāṃ bhūmiṃ ca rucirāṃ sati |
dadāti bhaktyā viprāya puṇyakṣetre ca bhārate ||36|
mahīyate ca vaikuṇṭhe manvantaraśataṃ dhruvam |
