punaḥ suyoniṃ saṃprāpya mahāṃśca bhūmipo bhavet ||37||
taṃ na tyajati bhūmiśra janmanāṃ śatakaṃ param |
śrīmāṃśca dhanatrāṃścaiva putravaśca prajeśvaraḥ ||38|
yo vrajaṃ prakṛṣṭaṃ ca grāmaṃ dadyānnijāya ca |
lakṣamanvantaraṃ caiva vaikuṇṭhe sa mahīyate ||39||
punaḥ suyoniṃ saṃprāpya grāmalakṣasamanvitama ! na jahāti ca taṃ pṛthvī janmanāṃ lakṣameva ca || 40||
suprajaṃ ca prakṛṣṭaṃ ca pakvasasyasamanvitam | nānāpuṣkariṇīvṛkṣaphalavallīsa mantritam 118211
nagaraṃ yaśva viprāya dadāti bhārate bhuvi |
mahīyate sa kailāse daśalakṣendrakālakam ||42||
punaḥ suyoniṃ saṃprāpya rājendra bhārate bhavet |
nagarāṇāṃ ca niyutaṃ sa labhennātra saṃśayaḥ || 43 ||
dharā taṃ na jahātyeva janmanāmayutaṃ dhruvam |
paramaiśvaryasaṃyukto bhavedeva mahītale ||44 ||
nagarāṇāṃ ca śatakaṃ deśaṃ yo hi dvijātaye |
suprakṛṣṭaṃ madhyakruṣṭaṃ prajāyuktaṃ dadāti ca ||45||

punaḥ suyoni saṃprāpya jaṃbudvīpapatirbhavet |

mahī saṃna jahātyeva janmanāṃ koṭimeva ca |

jaṃbuṭṭīpaṃ yo dadāti brāhmaṇāya tapasvine |

sarveṣāṃ tapasāṃ kartuḥ sarveṣāṃ vāsakāriṇaḥ || 51||

astyeva punarāvṛttirna bhaktasya maheśituḥ || 52||

naśyati devāḥ siddhāśva vihāya mānavīṃ tanum |
vibhūtiṃ divyarūpāṃ ca janmamṛtyujarāharām ||56||
kāttikaṃ tulasīdānaṃ karoti haraye ca yaḥ |

yo vakti vā dadātyeva harernāmāni bhārata 105 ||

viṣṇubhakta labhetso'pi viṣṇusārūpyamāpnuyāt ||
śivaṃ yaḥ pūjayennityaṃ kṛtvā liṃgaṃ ca pārthivam |

śilāṃ ca pūjayennityaṃ śilātoyaṃ ca bhakṣati |

tato labdhvā punarjanma haribhakta ca durlabhām |
mahīyate viṣṇuloke na tasya patanaṃ bhavet ||113||
tapāṃsi caiva sarvāṇi vratāni nikhilāni ca |
kṛtvā tiṣṭhati vaikuṇṭhe yāvadidrāścaturdaśa || 114||
tato labdhvā punarjanma rājeṃdro bhārate bhavet |
tato mukto bhavetpaścātpunarjanma na vidyate || 115 ||

yaḥ snātvā sarvatīrtheṣu bhuvaḥ kṛtvā pradakṣiṇām |
sa tu nirvāṇatāṃ yāti na tajjanma bhavedbhuvi || 116||
puṇyakṣetre bhārate ca yo'śvamedhaṃ karāti ca |
aśvalomamitābdaṃ ca śakrasyārthāsanaṃ bhajet 117 ||
caturguṇaṃ rājasūyaphalamāpnoti mānavaḥ |
sarvebhyo'pi makhebhyo hi paro devīmakhaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
viṣṇunā ca kṛtaḥ pūrvaṃ brahmaṇā ca varānane |
śaṃkareṇa maheśena tripurāsuranāśane || 119 || ||
śaktiyajñaḥ pradhānaśca sarvayajñeṣu sarvayajñeṣu sundari |
nānena sadṛśo yajastriṣu lokeṣu vidyate || 120 ||
dakṣeṇa ca kṛtaḥ pūrvaṃ mahānsaṃbhārasaṃyutaḥ |
babhūva kalaho yatra dakṣaśaṃkarayāḥ sati |
śeśva naṃdinaṃ viprā naṃdī viprāṃśva kopataḥ |
yaddhetordakṣayajaṃ ca vabhaṃja candraśekharaḥ || 122||
cakāra devīyajñaṃ sa purā dakṣaḥ pramāpatiḥ |
dharmaśca yaścaiva śeṣaśvāpi ca kardanaḥ || 123||
svāyaṃbhuvo manucaiva tatputraśca priyavrataḥ |
śivaḥ sanatkumāraśra kapilaśva dhruvastathā || 124 ||
rājasūyasahasrāṇāṃ phalamāpnoti niścitam |
devīyajñātparo yajño nāsti vede phalapradaḥ || 125 || /
varṣāṇāṃ śatajīvī ca jīvanmukto bhaveddhruvam |
jñānena tejasā caiva viṣṇutulyo bhavediha || 126||
devānāṃ ca yathā viṣṇurveṣṇavānāṃ ca nāradaḥ |
śāstrāṇāṃ ca yathā vedā varṇānāṃ brāhmaṇo yathā 127||
tīrthānāṃ ca yathā gaṃgā pavitrāṇāṃ śivo yathā |
ekādaśī vratānāṃ ca puṣpāṇāṃ tulasī yathā 128 ||
nakṣatrāṇāṃ yathā caṃdraḥ pakṣiṇāṃ garuḍo yathā |
yathā strīṇāṃ ca prakṛtī rādhā vāṇī vasuvarā129||
śīghrāṇāṃ ceṃdriyāṇāṃ ca caṃcalānāṃ mano yathā |
prajāpatīnāṃ brahmā ca prajānāṃ ca prajāpatiḥ || 130 ||
vṛndāvanaṃ banānāṃ ca yarpāṇāṃ bhārataṃ yathā |
śrīmatāṃ ca yathā śrīśca viduṣāṃ ca sarasvatī || 131 ||
'pativratānāṃ durgā ca saubhāgyānāṃ ca rādhikā |
devīyajñastathā vatse sarvayajñeṣu bhāmini || 132||
aśvamenaśatenaiva śakratvaṃ ca labheddhruvam |
sahasreṇa viṣṇupadaṃ saṃprāptaḥ pṛthureva ca || 133 ||
snānaṃ ca sarvatīrthānāṃ sarvayajñeṣu dokṣaṇam |
sarveṣāṃ ca vratānāṃ ca tapasāṃ phalameva ca ||334||
pāṭhe caturṇāṃ vedānāṃ prādakṣiṇyaṃ bhuvastathā |
kalabhūtamidaṃ sarvaṃ muktidaṃ śaktivanam || 135 ||
purāṇeṣu ca vedeṣu cetihāseṣu sarvataḥ |
nirūpitaṃ sārabhūtaṃ devāpādāṃbujāsanam ||136||
tadvarṇanaṃ ca taddhyānaṃ tannāmaguṇakīrtanam |
tatstotrasmaraṇaṃ caiva vaṃdanaṃ japameva ca || 137||
tatpādodaka naivedya bhakṣaṇaṃ nityameva ca |
sarvasammatamityevaṃ sarvepsitamidaṃ sati || 138 ||
bhaja nityaṃ paraṃ brahma nirguṇaṃ prakṛti parām |
gṛhāṇa svāminaṃ vatse sukhaṃ vasa ca maṃdire || 139 ||
ayaṃ te kathitaḥ karmavipāko maṃgalo nṛṇām |
sarvepsitaḥ sarvamatastattvajñānapradaḥ paraḥ || 140 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe triṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 30 ||

athaikatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śakterutkīrtanaṃ śrutvā sāvitrī yamavaktrataḥ |
sāśrunetrā sapulakā yamaṃ punaruvāca sā || 1 ||
sāvitryuvāca
śakterutkīrtanaṃ dharma : sakaloddhārakāraṇam |
śrotṝṇāṃ caiva vaktṝṇāṃ janmamṛtyujarāharam ||2||
dānavānāṃ ca siddhānāṃ tapasāṃ ca paraṃ padam |
yogānāṃ caiva vedānāṃ kīrtanaṃ sevanaṃ vibhoḥ ||3||
muktitvamamaratvaṃ ca sarvasiddhitvameva ca |
śrīśaktisevakasyaiva kalāṃ nārhati ṣoḍaśīm ||4||
bhajāmi kena vidhinā vada vedavidāṃ vara |
śubhakarmavipākaṃ ca śrutaṃ nṛṇāṃ manoharam ||5||
karmāśubhavipākaṃ ca tanme vyākhyātumarhasi |
ityuktvā ca satī brahmanbhaktinamrātmakaṃdharā || 6 ||
tuṣṭāva dharmarājaṃ ca vedoktena stavena ca |
sāvitryuvāca
tapasā dharmamārādhya puṣkare bhāskaraḥ purā || 7||
dharma sūryaḥ sutaṃ prāpa dharmarājaṃ namāmyaham |
samatā sarvabhūteṣu yasya sarvasya sākṣiṇaḥ ||8||
ato yannāmaśamanamiti taṃ praṇamāmyaham |
yenāṃtaśca kṛto viśve sarveṣāṃ jīvināṃ param ||9||
kāmānurūpaṃ kālena taṃ kṛtāṃtaṃ namāmyaham |
bibharti daṃḍa daṃḍāya pāpināṃ śuddhi ||10||
namāmi taṃ daṃḍadharaṃ yaḥ śāstā sarvajīvinām |
viśvaṃ ca kalayatyeva yaḥ sarveṣu ca saṃtatam || 11 ||
atīva durnivārya ca taṃ kālaṃ praṇamāmyaham |
tapasvī brahmaniṣṭho yaḥ saṃyamī saṃjitendriyaḥ || 12||
jīvānāṃ karmaphaladastaṃ yamaṃ praṇamāmyaham |
svātmārāmaśca sarvajño mitraṃ puṇyakṛtāṃ bhavet ||13||
pāpināṃ kleśado yastaṃ puṇyaṃ mitraṃ namāmyaham |
yajjanma brahmaṇo'śena jvalaṃtaṃ brahmatejasā || 14||
yo dhyāyati paraṃ brahma tamīśaṃ praṇamāmyaham |
ityuktvā sā ca sāvitrī praṇanāma yamaṃ mune || 15 ||
yamastāṃ śakti bhajanaṃ karmapākamuvāca ha |
idaṃ yamāṣṭakaṃ nityaṃ prātarutthāya yaḥ paṭhet || 16||
yamāttasya bhayaṃ nāsti sarvapāpātpramucyate |
mahāpāpī yadi paṭhennityaṃ bhaktisamanvitaḥ ||
yamaḥ karoti saṃśuddhaṃ kāyavyūhena niścitam || 17||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ekatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||31||
atha dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
māyāvījaṃ mahāmantraṃ pradattvā vidhipūrvakam |
karmāśubhavipākaṃ ca tāmuvāca raveḥ sutaḥ || 1 ||

dharmarāja uvāca
śubhakarmavipākānna narakaṃ yāti mānavaḥ |
karmāśubhavipākaṃ ca kathayāmi niśāmaya || 2 ||
nānāpurāṇabhedena nāmabhedena bhāmini |
nānāprakāraṃ svargaṃ ca yāti jīvaḥ svakarmabhiḥ ||3||
śubhakarma vipākāna narakaṃ yāti karmabhiḥ |
kukarmaṇā ca narakaṃ yāti nānāvidhaṃ naraḥ || 4 ||
narakāṇāṃ ca kuṇḍāni saṃti nānāvidhāni ca |
nānāśāstrapramāṇena karmabhedena yāni ca ||5||
vistṛtāni ca matāni kleśadāni ca duḥkhinām |
bhayaṃkarāṇi ghorāṇi he vatse kutsitāni ca ||6||
ṣaḍaśīti ca kuṇḍāni evamanyāni saṃti ca |
nibodha teṣāṃ nāmāni prasiddhāni śrutau sati || 7 ||
vahnikuṇḍaṃ taptakuṇḍaṃ kṣārakuṇḍaṃ bhayānakam viṭkuṇḍaṃ mūtra kuṇḍaṃ ca śleṣmakuṇḍaṃ ca duḥsaham ||8||
garakuṇḍaṃ dūṣikuṇḍaṃ vasākuṇḍaṃ tathaiva ca |
śukrakuṇḍamasṛkkuṃḍamaśrakuṇḍaṃ ca kutsitam || 9 ||
vu.ṇḍaṃ gātramalānāṃ ca karṇadikuṇḍameva ca |
majjākuṇḍaṃ māṃsakuṃḍaṃ nakrakuṃḍa ca dustaram ||10||
lomakuṇḍaṃ keśakuṇḍamasthikuṇḍaṃ ca dustaram |
tāmrakuṃḍa lohakuṇḍaṃ prataptaṃ kleśadaṃ mahat || 11 ||
carmakuṇḍaṃ taptasurākuṇḍaṃ ca parikīrtitam |
tīkṣṇa kaṭakakuṇḍaṃ ca viṣodaṃ vipakuṇḍakam ||12||
prataptakuṃḍaṃ tailasya kuntakuṇḍaṃ ca durvaham |
kṛmikuṇḍaṃ pṛyakuṃḍaṃ sarpakuṇḍaṃ durantakam ||13||
maśakuṇḍaṃ daṃśakuṇḍaṃ bhīmaṃ garalakuṇḍakam |
kuṇḍaṃ ca vajradaṃṣṭrāṇāṃ vṛścikānāṃ ca suvate || 14 ||
śarakuṇḍaṃ śūlakuṇḍaṃ khaḍgakuṇḍaṃ ca bhīṣaṇam |
golakuṇḍaṃ nakrakuṇḍaṃ kākakuṃḍaṃ śucāspadam ||15||
manthānakuṇḍaṃ bījakuṇḍaṃ vajrakuṇḍaṃ ca duḥsaham |
taptapāṣāṇakuṇḍaṃ ca tīkṣṇapāṣāṇa kuṇḍakam ||16||
lālā kuṇḍaṃ masīkuṇḍaṃ cūrṇa kuṇḍe tathaiva ca |
cakrakuṇḍaṃ vakrakuṇḍaṃ kūrmakuḍaṃ maholbaṇam || 17 ||
jvālākuṃḍaṃ bhasmakuṇḍaṃ dagdhakuṇḍaṃ śucismite |
taptasūcīmasipatraṃ kṣuradhaṃ sūcikāmukham ||18||
gokāmukhaṃ nakramukhaṃ gajadaṃśaṃ ca gomukham |
kumbhīpākaṃ kālasūtraṃ matsyodaṃ kṛmitantukam || 19 ||
pāṃsubhojyaṃ pāśaveṣṭaṃ śūlaprotaṃ prakampanam |
ulkāmukhamaṃdhakūpaṃ vedhanaṃ tāḍanaṃ tathā || 20 ||
jālaraṃdhraṃ dehacūrṇaṃ dalanaṃ śoṣaṇaṃ kaṣam |
śūrpaṃ jvālāmukhaṃ caiva dhūmāṃdhaṃ nāgaveṣṭanam ||21||
kuṇḍānyetāni sāvitri pāpināṃ kleśadāni ca |
niyutaiḥ kiṃkaragaṇaṃ rakṣitāni ca saṃtatam ||22||
daṇḍahastai: pāśahastairmadamattairbhayaṃkaraiḥ |
śaktihastairgadāhastairasihastaiḥ sudāruṇaiḥ || 23||
tamoyukta dayā hī nairanivāryaiśca na sarvataḥ |
tejasvibhiśva niḥśaṃkairātāmrapiṃgalocanaiḥ ||24||
yogayaktaḥ siddhiyuktairnānārūpadharairbharṭa: |
āsanna mṛtyubhirdṛṣṭeḥ pāpibhiḥ sarvajīvibhiḥ ||25||
svakarmanirataiḥ sarvaiḥ śāktaiḥ sauraiśca gāṇapaiḥ |
adṛśyaiḥ puṇyakṛdbhiśca siddheryogibhireva ca || 26||
svadharmaniratairvāpi vitatairvā svatantrakaiḥ |
balavadbhiśca niḥśaṃkaiḥ svapnadṛṣṭaiśva vaiṣṇavaiḥ ||27|!
etatte kathitaṃ sādhvi kuṇḍasaṃkhyā nirūpaṇam |
yeṣāṃ nivāso yatkuṇḍe nibodha kathayāmi te ||28|
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 32||

atha trayastriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
dharmarāja uvāca
harisevārataḥ śuddho yogasiddho vratī sati |
tapasvī brahmacārī ca na yāti narakaṃ dhruvam || 1 ||
kaṭuvācā bāṃdhavāṃśva balalepena yo naraḥ |
dagdhānkaroti balavānvahnikuṃḍaṃ prayāti saḥ || 2 ||
svagātra lomamānāvyaṃ tatra sthitvā hutāśane |
paśuyonimavāpnoti raudradagdhāṃ trijanmani || 3 ||
brāhmaṇaṃ tṛṣitaṃ tasaṃ kṣudhitaṃ gṛhamāgatam |
na bhojayati yo mūḍhastaptakuṇḍaṃ prayāti saḥ || 4 ||
tatra tallomamānaṃ ca varṣa sthitvā ca duḥkhade |
taptasthale vahnikalpe pakṣī ca saptajanmasu || 5 ||
ravivāre ca saṃkrāṃtyāmamāyāṃ śrāddhavāsare |
vastrāṇāṃ kṣārasaṃyogaṃ karoti kevalaṃ naraḥ || 6 ||
sa yāti kṣārakuṃḍaṃ ca sūtramānāvyameva ca |
sa vrajedrajakoṃ yoniṃ saptajanmasu bhārate || 7 ||
mūlaprakṛtiniṃdāṃ yaḥ kurute mānavādhamaḥ |
vedanindāṃ śāstraniṃdāṃ purāṇānāṃ tathaiva ca || 8 ||
brahmaviṣṇuśivādīnāṃ tathā nidāparo janaḥ |
gaurīvāṇyādidevīnāṃ sadā nidāparo janaḥ || 9 ||
sarve te niraye yāṃti tasminkuṃḍe bhayānake |
nātaḥ parataraṃ kuṇḍaṃ duḥkhadaṃ tu bhaviṣyati || 10 ||
tatra sthitvā'nekakalpaṃ sarpayoniṃ vrajetpunaḥ |
devīniṃdāparādhasya prāyaścittaṃ na vidyate || 11 ||
svadattāṃ paradattāṃ vā vṛtti ca suraviprayoḥ |
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṭkuṇḍaṃ ca prayāti saḥ || 12 ||
tāvatyeva ca varṣāṇi viḍbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati |
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṭkamiva punarbhuvi || 13 ||
parakīyataḍāge ca taḍāgaṃ yaḥ karoti ca |
utsṛjeddevadoṣeṇa mūtrakuṇḍaṃ prayāti saḥ || 14 ||
tadreṇumānavarṣaṃ ca tadbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati |
punaḥ pūrṇaśatābdaṃ ca sa vṛṣo bhārate bhavet ||15||
ekākī miṣṭamaśnāti śleṣma kuṇḍaṃ prayāti ca |
pūrṇamabdaśataṃ caiva tadbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati || 16 ||
tataḥ pūrṇaśatābdaṃ ca sa preto bhārate bhavet |
śleṣmamūtraparaṃ caiva nūyaṃ bhuṃkte tataḥ śuciḥ || 17 ||
pitaraṃ mātaraṃ caiva guruṃ bhāryāṃ sutaṃ sutām |
yo na puṣṇātyanāthaṃ ca garakuṃḍaṃ prayāti saḥ || 18 ||
pūrṇamabdaśataṃ caṃda tadbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati |
tato vrajedbhūtayoni śatavarṣaṃ tataḥ śuciḥ || 19 ||
dṛṣṭvā'tithi vakracakṣuḥ karoti yo hi mānavaḥ |
pitṛdevāstasya jalaṃ na gṛhṇanti ca pāpinaḥ || 20 ||
yāni kāni ca pāpāni brahmahatyādikāni ca |
ihaiva labhate cāṃte dūṣikākuṃḍamāvrajet || 21 ||
pūrṇamabdaśataṃ caiva tadbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati |
tato vrajedbhūtayoni śatavarṣaṃ tataḥ śuciḥ ||22||
dattvā dravyaṃ ca viprāya cānyasmai dīyate yadi |
sa tiṣṭhati vasākuṃḍe tadbhojī śatavatsaram ||23||
kṛkalāso bhavetso'pi bhārate saptajanmasu |
tato bhavenmahāraudro daridro'lpāyureva ca || 24 ||
pumāṃsaṃ kāminī vāpi kāminīṃ vā pumānatha |
yaḥ śukraṃ pāyayatyeva śukrakuṃḍaṃ prayāti saḥ || 25 ||
pūrṇamavdaśataṃ caiva dadbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati |
kṛmiyoni śatābdaṃ ca vrajedbhūtvā tataḥ śuciḥ || 26 ||

saṃtāḍya ca guruṃ vipraṃ raktapātaṃ ca kārayet |
sa ca tiṣṭhatyasṛkkuṇḍe tadbhojī śatavatsaram ||27||
tato labhedvadyāghrajanma saptajanmasu bhārate |
tataḥ śuddhimavāpnoti mānavaśva krameṇa ha || 28||
yo'śru tyajantaṃ gāyaṃtaṃ bhaktaṃ dṛṣṭvā sagadgadam |
śrīkṛṣṇaguṇasaṃgīte hasatyeva hi yo naraḥ ||29||
sa vasedaśrukuṇḍe ca tadbhojī śatavarṣakam |
tato bhavecca cāṃḍālastrijanmani tataḥ śuciḥ || 30 ||
karoti śaṭhatāṃ tadvannityaṃ suhṛdi yo naraḥ |
kuṇḍaṃ gātramalānāṃ ca sa prayāti śatābdakam ||31||
tataḥ sā gārdabhīṃ yonimavāpnoti trijanmani |
trijanmani ca śārgālīṃ tataḥ śuddho bhaveddhruvam ||32||
badhiraṃ yo hasatyeva nidatyevābhimānataḥ |
sa vasetkarṇa viṭkuṇḍe tadbhojī śatavatsaram ||33||
sato bhavetsa vadhiro daridraḥ saptajanmasu |
saptajanmanyaṃgahīnastataḥ śuddhiṃ labheddhruvam || 34||
lobhātsvabharaṇārthāya jīvitaṃ haṃti yo naraḥ |
majjākuṃḍe vasetso'pi tadbhojī lakṣavatsaram ||35||
tato bhavecca śaśako mīnaśca saptajanmasu |
trijanmani varāhaśca kukkuṭa : saptajanmasu ||36||
eṇādayaśva karmabhyastataḥ śuddhi labheddhruvam |
svakanyāpālanaṃ kṛtvā vikrīṇāti ca yo naraḥ || 37 ||
artha lobhānmahāmūḍho māṃsakuṇḍaṃ prayāti saḥ |
kanyālomapramāṇāndaṃ tadbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati ||38||
tasya daṇḍaprahāraṃ ca kurvanti yamakikarāḥ |
māṃsabhāraṃ mṛdhni kṛtvā raktabhāraṃ lihetkṣudhā ||39||
tato hi bhārate pāpī kanyāvikṛmigo bhavet |
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi vyādhaśca saptajanmasu ||40||
trijanmani varāhaśca kukkuṭa : saptajanmasu |
maṃḍūko hi jalokāśca saptajanmasu bhārate || 41 ||
labheddhruvam |
vratānāmupavāsānāṃ śrāddhādīnāṃ ca saṃgame || 42 ||
saptajanmasu kākaśca tataḥ śuddhi
karoti yaḥ kṣaurakarma so'śuciḥ sarvakarmasu |
sa ca tiṣṭhati kuṇḍaṃ ca nakhādīnāṃ ca suṃdari ||43||
daṃḍatāḍitaḥ |
sakeśaṃ pārthivaṃ liṃgaṃ yo vā'rccayati bhāra ||44||
tava dinamānābdaṃ tadbhojī
sa tiṣṭhati keśakuṇḍe mṛdreṇumānavardhakam |
tadante yāvanīṃ yoni prayāti harakopataḥ || 45 ||
śatābdācchuddhimāpnoti rākṣasaḥ sa bhaveddhruvam |
pitṝṇāṃ yo viṣṇupade piṃḍaṃ naiva dadāti ca ||46 ||
sa ca tiṣṭhatyasthikuṇḍe svalomābdaṃ maholvaṇe |
tataḥ suyoni saṃprāpya kukhaṃjaḥ saptajanmasu ||47||
bhavenmahādaridraśca tataḥ śuddho hi dehataḥ |
yaḥ sevate mahāmūḍho gurviṇīṃ ca svakāminīm ||48||
pratapte tāmrakuṇḍe ca śatavarṣaṃ sa tiṣṭati |
atrīrānnaṃ ca yo bhuṃkte ṛtusnātānnameva ca || 49 ||
lohakuṇḍe śatābdaṃ ca sa ca tiṣṭhati taptake |
sa vrajedrajakī yoni kākānāṃ saptajanmasu || 50 ||
mahāvraṇī daridraśca tataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ |
yo hi carmāntahastena devadravyamupaspṛśet || 51||
śatavarṣapramāṇaṃ ca carmakuṇḍe sa tiṣṭhati |
yaḥ śūdreṇābhyanujñāto bhuṃkte śūdrānnameva ca || 52 ||
sa ca sapta surākuṃḍe śatābdaṃ tiṣṭhati dvijaḥ |
tato bhavecchradrayājī brāhmaṇaḥ saptajanmasu || 53 ||
śūdraśrāddhānnabhojī ca tataḥ śuddho bhaveddhruvam |
vāgduṣṭaḥ kaṭuko vācā tāḍayetsvāminaṃ sadā || 54 ||

tīkṣṇakaṃṭakakuṇḍe sa tadbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati |
tāḍito yamadūtena daṇḍena ca caturguṇam ||55||
tata uccaiḥśravā saptajanmasveva tataḥ śuciḥ |
viṣeṇa jīvanaṃ haṃti nirdayo yo hi mānavaḥ || 56 ||
viṣakuṇḍe ca tadbhojī sahasrābdaṃ ca tiṣṭhati |
tato bhaventṛghāto va vraṇo ca śatajanmasu ||57||
saptajanmasu kuṣṭho ca tataḥ śuddho bhavedbhutram |
daṇḍena tāḍayedgāṃ hi vṛṣaṃ ca vṛṣavāhakaḥ || 58 ||
bhṛtyadvārā svatantro vā puṇyakṣetre ca bhārate |
pratapte tailakuṃḍe'gnau sa tiṣṭhati caturyugam ||59||
gavāṃ lomapramāṇābdaṃ vṛṣo bhavati tatparam |
kuntena haṃti yo jīvaṃ vahnilohena helayā || 60 ||
kuntakuṃḍe vasetso'pi varṣāṇāmayutaṃ sati |
tataḥ suyoni saṃprāpya codare vyādhisaṃyutaḥ || 61 ||
janmanaikena kleśena tataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ |
yo bhuṃkte ca vṛyā māṃsaṃ māṃsalobhī dvijārṣamaḥ || 62||
hare saṃvedya bhojī kṛmikuṇḍaṃ prayāti saḥ |
svalomamānavarṣaṃ ca tadbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati || 63 ||
tato bhavenslecḍajātistrijanmani tato dvijaḥ |
brāhmaṇaḥ śūdrayājī ca śūdraśrāddhānta bhojakaḥ || 64 ||
śūdrāṇāṃ śavadāhī ca pūyakuṇḍe vaseddhruvam |
yāvallomapramāṇābdaṃ yamadaṇḍena suvrate || 65 ||
tāḍito yamadūtena tadbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati |
tato bhāratamāgatya sa śūdraḥ saptajanmasu ||66 ||
mahārogī daridraśca vadhiro mūka eva ca |
kṛṣṇaṃ padmaṃ ca ke yasya taṃ sarpa haṃti yo naraḥ || 67||
svalomamānavarṣaṃ ca sarpakuṇḍaṃ prayāti saḥ |
sarpaṇa bhakṣitaḥ so'tha yamadūtena tāḍitaḥ || 68 ||
vasecca sarpaviṅbhojī tataḥ sarpo bhaveddhruvam |
tato bhavenmānavaśva svalpāyurdadusaṃyutaḥ || 69 ||
mahāklaiśena tanmṛtyuḥ sarpeṇa bhakṣitāddhruvam |
vidhipradatta jīvyāṃśca kṣudrajaṃtūṃśca haṃti yaḥ || 70 ||
sa daṃśamaśayoḥ kuṇḍe jantumānāndameva ca |
divāniśaṃ bhakṣitastairanāhāraśca śabdavān || 71 ||
hastapādādivadvaśva yamadūtena tāḍitaḥ |
tato bhavetkṣudrajanturjātiśca yāvanī bhavet ||72||
tano bhavenmāstraśca so'ṅgahīnastanaḥ śuciḥ |
yo mūḍho madhumaśnāti hatvā ca madhumakṣikāḥ || 73 ||
sa evaṃ gārale kuṇḍe jīvamānābdakaṃ vaset |
bhakṣito garalaṃrdagdho mama dūtena tāḍitaḥ ||74||
tato hi makṣikājātistataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ |
daṃḍaṃ karotyadaṃḍaghe ca vipre daṃḍaṃ karoti ca || 75 ||
sa kuṃḍaṃ vajradaṃṣṭrāṇāṃ koṭānāṃ yāti satvaram |
sa tallomapramāṇābdaṃ tatra tiṣṭhatyaharniśam ||76||
śabdakṛdbhakṣitastaistu mama dūtena tāḍitaḥ |
karoti rodanaṃ bhadre hāhākāraṃ kṣaṇe kṣaṇe ||77||
punaḥ sūkarayonau ca jāyate satajanmasu |
trijanmani kākayonau tataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ || 78 ||
arthalobhena yo mūḍhaḥ prajādaḍaṃ karoti saḥ |vṛścikānāṃ ca kuṃḍaṃ ca tallāmābdaṃ vasedbhutram ||79||
tato vṛśvikajātiśca saptajanmasu bhārate |
tato naraścāṃgahīno vyādhiśuddho bhaveddhruvam || 80 ||
brāhmaṇaḥ śastradhārī yo hyanyeṣāṃ dhāvako bhavet |
saṃdhyāhona yo vidho haribhaktivihonakaḥ || 81 ||
sa viṣṭhati svalomābdaṃ kuṃḍeṣu ca śarādiṣu |
viddhaḥ śarādibhiḥ śaśvattataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ || 82||

kārāgāre sāṃdhakāre praṇihaṃti prajāśca yaḥ |
pramattaḥ svasya doṣeṇa golakuṃḍaṃ prayāti saḥ ||83||
sa paṃkata tatoyāta sāṃdhakāraṃ bhayaṃkaram |
tīkṣṇadaṃṣṭraśca kīṭaiśca saṃyuktaṃ golakuṃḍakam ||84||
kīṭaividdho vasettatra prajālomābdameva ca |
tato bhavetprajābhṛtyastataḥ śuddho bhavetkramāt || 85||
sarovarādutthitaśca nakrādīnhaṃdi yo naraḥ |
nakrakaṃṭaka mānāda nakrakaḍaṃ prayāti saḥ || 86||
tato nakrādijātīyo bhavennakrādiṣu dhvam |
tataḥ sadyo viśuddha hi daṃḍenaiva punaḥ punaḥ || 87 ||
vakṣaḥśroṇīstanāsyaṃ ca yaḥ paśyati parastriyāḥ |
kāmena kāmuko yo hi puṇyakṣetre ca bhārate ||88||
sa vasetkākatuṃḍe ca kākaiḥ saṃcūrṇalocanaḥ |
tataḥ svalomamānābdaṃ bhaveddagdhastrijanmani || 89 ||
svarṇasteyī ca yo mūḍho bhārate surapriyaḥ |
sa ca maṃthānakaḍe vai svalomābdaṃ vaseddhruvam ||10||
tāḍito yamadūtena maṃthānaṃschannalocanaḥ |
tadvibhojī ca tatraiva tataścāṃ strijanmani || 91 ||
saptajanma daridraśva mahāhāraśca pātakī |
bhārate svarṇakāra sa ca svarṇavaṇitataḥ ||92||
yo bhārate tāmracauro lohacauraśva suṃdari |
sa ca svalomamānābdaṃ bījakuṃḍaṃ prayāti saḥ || 93 ||
tatraiva bījaviḍbhojī bījeśca hannalocanaḥ |
tāḍito yamadūtena tataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ || 94 ||
bhārate devacoraśva revadravyāpahārakaḥ |
sa dumtare vajrakuṃḍe svalomābdaṃ vaseddhruvam ||95||
dehadagdho'pi tadvajjairanāhāraśva śabdakṛt |
tāḍito yamadūtaśca tataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ ||16||
raupyagavyāṃśukānāṃ ca yaraḥ suraviprayoḥ |
taptapāṣāṇakuṃḍe ru svalomāndaṃ vaseddhruvam || 97||
trijanmani ca kṛṣṇo'pi śvetarūpatrijanmani |
janmakaṃ cetacihnaśca tato'nye śvetapakṣiṇaḥ || 98||
tato raktavikārī ca śūlī tai mānavo bhavet |
saptajanmasu cālpāyustataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ || 99 ||
raitaṃ kāṃsyamayaṃ pātraṃ yo hareddevaviprayoḥ |
tīkṣṇa pāṣāṇakuṃḍe sa svalomābdaṃ vasennaraḥ || 100 ||
puṃścalyannaṃ ca yo bhuṃkte puṃścalījīvyajīvanaḥ |
svalomamānavaryaṃ sa lālākuṃḍe vaseddhruvam || 101 ||
sa bhavedaśvajātiñca bhārate saptajanmasu |
tato'dhikāṃgajātiśca pādarogī tataḥ śuciḥ || 102 ||
tāḍito yamadūtena tadbhojī tatra duḥkhitaḥ |
tataścakṣuḥ śūlarogī tataḥ śuddhaḥ krameṇa saḥ || 103 ||
mlecchasevī masījīvī yo vipro bhārate bhuvi |
vasetssvalomamānābdaṃ masīkuṃḍe sa duḥkhabhāk 104||
tāḍito yamadūtena tadbhojī tatra tiṣṭhati |
tatastrijanmani bhavetkṛṣṇa varṇaḥ paśuḥ sati || 105||
trijanmani bhavecchāgaḥ kṛṣṇavarṇa trijanmani |
tataḥ sa tālavṛkṣaśca tataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ || 106 ||
dhānyādi śasyaṃ tāṃbūlaṃ yo haretsūraviprayoḥ |
āsanaṃ ca tathā talpaṃ cūrṇakuṃḍe prayātisaḥ || 107 ||
śatābdaṃ tatra nivasedyamadūtena tāḍitaḥ |
tato bhavenmepajātiḥ dukkuṭaśca trijanmani || 108 ||
tato bhavedvānaraśca kāsavyādhiyuto bhuvi |
vaṃśahīno daridra alpāyuśca tataḥ śuciḥ || 109 ||
karoti cakraṃ viprāṇāṃ hṛtvā dravyaṃ ca yo janaḥ |
sa vaseccakrakuṃḍe ca śatābdaṃ daṃḍatāḍitaḥ || 110 ||

tato bhavenmānavaśva tailakārastrijanmani |
vyādhiyukto bhavedrogī vaṃśahīnastataḥ śuciḥ 111 ||
godhaneṣu ca vipreṣu karoti cakratāṃ pumān |
prayāti vakrakuṇḍaṃ sa tiṣṭhedyugaśataṃ sati || 112 ||
tato bhavetsa vakrāṃgo hīnāṃgaḥ saptajanmani |
daridro vaṃśahīnaśca bhāryāhīnastataḥ śuciḥ || 113 ||
tato bhavedgṛdhrajanmā trijanmani ca sūkaraḥ |
trijanmani viḍālaśca mayūraśca trijanmani || 114 ||
niṣiddhaṃ kūrmamāṃsaṃ ca brāhmaṇo yo hi bhakṣati |
kūrmakuḍe vasetso'pi śatābdaṃ kūrma bhakṣitaḥ || 115 ||
tato bhavetkūrmajanma vijanmani ca sūkaraḥ |
trijanmani viḍālaśva mayuraśca tataḥ śuciḥ 116 ||
ghṛtaṃ tailādikaṃ caitra yo haretsuraviprayoḥ |
sa yāti jvālākuṃḍaṃ ca bhasmakuṃḍaṃ ca pātako ||
tatra sthitvā śatābdaṃ ca sa bhavetailapācitaḥ |
saptajanmani matsyaśca mūpakaśca tataḥ śuciḥ 118||
sugaṃdhitailaṃ dhātroṃ vā gaṃdhadravyānyadeva vā |
bhārate puṇyavarṣe ca yo haretsuraviprayoḥ || 119 ||
sa vaseddagdhakuṃḍe ca bhavedgyo divāniyam |
svalomamānavarṣaṃ ca tato durgaṃdhiko bhavet || 120 ||
durgaṃdhika: sata janma mṛganābhistrijanmani |
saptajanmasu maṃthānastato hi mānavo bhavet 129 ||
balenaiva chalenaiva hiṃsārūpeṇa vā sati |
baliṣṭhaśca haredbhūmiṃ bhārate parapaitṛkīm ||122||
sa vasettaptasūci ca bhavettāpī divāniśam |
taptataile yathā jīvo dagvo bhavati saṃtatam || 123||
bhasmānna bhavatyeva bhoge dehī na naśyati |
saptamanvaṃtaraṃ pāpī saṃtaptastatra tiṣṭhati || 124||
śabdaṃ karotyanāhāro yamadūtena tāḍitaḥ |
paṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi vikṛmiśra bhavettataḥ || 125 ||
tato bhavedbhūmihīna daridraśca tataḥ śuciḥ |
tataḥ svayoni saṃprāpya śubhaṃ karmācaretpunaḥ || 126 ||
iti śrīdevīne mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe trayastriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 33 ||
atha catustriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
yama uvāca
chinatti jīvaṃ khaṅgena dayāhīnaḥ sudāruṇaḥ |
naravātī haṃti naramaryalobhena bhārate ||1|
asipatre vasetso'pi yāvadiṃdrāścaturdaśa |
teṣu yo brāhmaṇānhati catamanvaṃtaraṃ vaset ||2||
chinnāṃgaḥ saṃvasetso'pi khaṅgadhārega saṃtatam |
anāhāraḥ śabdamuccairyamadūtena tāḍitaḥ ||3||
maṃthāna: śatajanmāni śatajanmāni sūkaraḥ |
kukkuṭa : sata janmāni śṛgālaḥ saptajanmasu ||4||
vyāghraśca sapta janmāni vṛkaścaiva trijanmasu |
saptajanmasu maṃḍūko yamadūtena tāḍitaḥ ||5||
sa bhavedbhārate varṣe mahiṣaraca tataḥ śuciḥ |
prāmāṇāṃ nagarāṇāṃ vā dahanaṃ yaḥ karoti ca ||6||
kṣuradhāre vasetso'pi chinnāṃgastriyugaṃ sati |
tataḥ preto bhavetsadyo vahnivaktro bhramanmahīm ||7||
saptajanmāmedhya bhojī kapotaḥ saptajanmasu |
tato bhavenmahāśūlī mānavaḥ saptajanmani ||8||
satajanmagalatkuṣṭhī tataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ |
parakarṇe mukhaṃ dattvā paraniṃdāṃ karoti yaḥ || 9||

paradoṣa mahāślāghī devabrāhmaṇaniṃdaka: |
sūcīmukhe vasetso'pi sūcīviddho yugatrayam ||10||
tato bhavedvṛścikaśca sarpaśca saptajanmasu |
vajrakīṭaḥ saptajanma bhasmakīṭastataḥ param ||11||
tato bhavenmānavaśca mahāvyādhistataḥ śuciḥ |
gṛhiṇāṃ hi gṛhaṃ bhitvā vastusteyaṃ karoti yaḥ || 12 ||
gāva cha|gāṃva meṣāṃśva yāti gokāmukhe ca saḥ |
tāḍito yamadūtena vasettatra yugatrayam || 13 ||
tato bhavetsaptajanma gojātirvyādhisaṃyutaḥ |
trijanmani meṣajātiśchāgajātikhijanmani || 14 ||
tato bhavenmānavaśca nityarogī daridrakaḥ |
bhāryāhīno baṃdhuhīnaḥ saṃtāpī ca tataḥ śuciḥ || 15 ||
sāmānyadravyacauraśca yāti nakramukhaṃ ca saḥ |
tāḍito yamadūtena vasettatrādakatrayam ||16||
tato bhavetsaptajanma gopatirvyādhisaṃyutaḥ |
tato bhavenmānavavaca mahārogī tataḥ śuciḥ || 17||
haṃti gāśca gajāṃścaiva turagāṃśca nagāṃstathā |
sa yāti gajadaṃśaṃ ca mahāpāpī yugatrayam || 18||
tāḍito yamadūtena nāgadaṃtena saṃtatam |
sa bhavedgajajātiśca turagaśca trijanmani || 19||
gojātimlecchajātiśca tataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ |
jalaṃ pibṛṃtīṃ tṛṣitāṃgāṃ vārayati yaḥ pumān || 20||
narakaṃ gomukhākāraṃ kṛmitaptodakānvitam |
tatra tiṣṭhati saṃtapto yāvanmanvaṃtarādhi || 21 ||
tato naro'pi gohīnā mahārogī daridrakaḥ |
saptajanmāṃtyajātiśca tataḥ śuddho bhavennaraḥ ||22||
gohatyāṃ brahmahatyāṃ ca karoti hā tadeśikām |
yo hi gacchatyagabhyāṃ ca yaḥ strīhatyāṃ karoti ca ||
bhikṣuhatyāṃ mahāpāpī bhrūṇahatyāṃ ca bhārate |
kuṃbhīpāke vasetso'pi yāvadicaturdaśa ||24||
tāḍito yamadūtena cūrṇyamānaśca saṃtatam |
kṣaṇaṃ patati vahnau ca kṣaṇaṃ pati kaṃṭake ||25||
kṣaṇaṃ patettaptataile tapto yena kṣaṇaṃ kṣaṇam |
kṣaṇaṃ ca taptalohe ca kṣaṇaṃ ca taptatāmra ||26|
gṛdhro janmasahasrāṇi śatajanmāni sūkaraḥ |
kākaśca sapta janmāni sarpaśca saptajanmasu || 27||
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṃ jāyate kṛmiḥ |
nānājanmasu sa vṛṣastataḥ kuṣṭhī daridrakaḥ ||28||
sāvitryuvāca
viprahatyā ca gohatyā kividhā cātidaiśikī |
kā vā nṛṇāmagabhyā ca ko vā saṃdhyāvihīnakaḥ ||
pradīkṣitaḥ pumānko vā ko vā tīrthapratigrahī |
dvijaḥ ko vā grāmayājī ko vā vipro'tha devalaḥ ||
śūdrāṇāṃ sūpakāraśca pramatto vṛṣalīpatiḥ |
eteṣāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ sarva vada vedavidāṃ vara || 31 ||
dharmarāja uvāca
śrīkṛṣṇe ca tadarcāyāmanyeṣāṃ prakṛtau sati |
śive ca śivaliṃge ca sūrye sūryamaṇī tathā || 32||
gaṇeśe vātha durgāyāmevaṃ sarvatra suṃdari |
yaḥ karoti bhedabuddhi brahmahatyāṃ labhettu saḥ ||33||
svagurau sveṣṭadeve ca janmadātari mātari |
karoti bhedabuddhi yo brahmahatyāṃ labhet saḥ || 34 ||
vaiṣṇaveṣu ca bhakteṣu brahmaṇeṣvitareṣu ca |
karoti bhedabuddhiyo brāhmahatyāṃ labhettu saḥ || 35 ||
viprapādodake caiva śālagrāmodake tathā |
karoti bhedabuddhi yo brahmahatyāṃ labhettu saḥ || 36 ||

śivanaivedyake caiva harinaivedya ke tathā |
karoti bhedabuddhi yo brahmahatyāṃ labhettu saḥ || 37 ||
sarvakāraṇakāraṇe |
sarvādye sarvadevānāṃ sevye sarvāntarātmani || 38||
sarveśvareśvare kṛṣṇe
māyayā'nekarūpe vāpyeka eva hi nirguṇe |
karotīśena bhedaṃ yo brahmahatyāṃ labhettu saḥ ||39||
śakti dveṣabuddhi śaktiśāstre tathaiva ca |
dveṣaṃ yaḥ kurute martyo brahmahatyāṃ labhettu saḥ ||40||
pitṛdevārcanaṃ yo vā tyajedvedanirūpitam |
yaḥ karoti niṣiddhaṃ ca brahmahatyāṃ labhettu saḥ || 41 ||
yo nidate hṛṣīkeśaṃ tanmantropāsakaṃ tathā |
pavitrāṇāṃ pavitraṃ ca jñānānandaṃ sanātanam ||42||
pradhānaṃ kaṇavānāṃ ca devānāṃ sevyamīśvaram |
ye nārcayanti nidanti brahmahatyāṃ bhaṃti te || 43||
ye nindanti mahādevīṃ kāraṇabrahmarūpiṇīm |
sarvaśaktisvarūpāṃ ca prakṛti sarvamātaram ||44||
sarvadevasvarūpāṃ ca sarveṣāṃ vanditāṃ sadā |
sarvakāraṇarūpāṃ ca brahmahatyāṃ labhanti te ||45|| |
kṛṣṇajanmāṣṭamīṃ rāmanavamīṃ ca supuṇyadām |
śivarātri tathā caikādaśīṃ vāraṃ ravestathā ||46 ||
pañca parvāṇi puṇyāni ye na kurvīta mānavāḥ |
labhanti brahmahatyāṃ te cāṃḍālādhikapāvinaḥ ||47||
aṃbuvācyāṃ bhūkhananaṃ jalaśocādikaṃ ca ye |
kurvati bhārate varṣe brahmahatyā labhanti te || 48||
guruṃ ca mātaraṃ tātaṃ sādhvīṃ bhāryāṃ sutaṃ sutām |
anidyāṃ yo na puṣṇāti brahmahatyāṃ labhettu saḥ ||49||
vivāho yasa na bhavenna paśyati sutaṃ tu yaḥ |
haribhaktivihīno yo brahmahatyāṃ labhettu saḥ || 50 ||
hareranaivedyabhaṃjī nityaṃ viṣṇuṃ na pūjayet |
puṇyaṃ pārthivaliṃgaṃ ca brahmā'sau prakīrtitaḥ || 51 ||
goprahāraṃ prakurvataṃ dṛṣṭvā yo na nivārayet |
yāti goviprayormadhye gohatyāṃ ca labhettu saḥ || 52|| 1 |
daṃḍergāstāḍayaṃnmūḍho yo vipro vṛṣavāhanaḥ |
dine dine govadhaṃ ca labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 53 ||
dadāti gobhya ucchiṣṭaṃ bhojayedvṛṣavāhakam |
bhunakti vṛṣavāhānaṃ sa gohatyāṃ labheddhruvam || 54 ||
vṛṣalīpati parājayedyo bhuṃkte'nnaṃ tasya yo naraḥ |
gohatyāśatakaṃ so'pi labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 55 ||
pādaṃ dadāti vahno yogāśca pādena tāḍayet |
gehaṃ viśedadhautāṃghriḥ snātvā govadhamāpnuyāt ||56||
yo bhuṃkte sigdhapādena śete snigdhāṃghrireva ca |
sūryodaye ca yo bhuṃkte sa gohatyāṃ labheddhruvam ||57||
avīrānaṃ ca yo bhuṃkte yonijīvyasya ca dvijaḥ |
yastrisandhyāvihīnaśca gohatyāṃ labhate tu saḥ || 58||
svabhartari ca deve vā bhedabuddhi karoti yā |
kaṭūktyā tāḍayetkāṃtaṃ sā gohatyāṃ labheddhruvam 59||
gomārgavarjanaṃ kṛtvā dadāti sasyameva vā |
taḍāge vā tu durge vā sa gohatyāṃ labheddhruvam ||60||
prāyaścitte govadhasya yaḥ karoti vyatikramam |
putralobhādathājñānātsa gohatyāṃ labheddhruvam || 61||
rājake daivake yatnādgosvāmī gāṃ na rakṣati |
duḥkhaṃ dadāti yo mūḍho gohatyāṃ sa labheddhruvam || 62||
prāṇine laṃghayedyo hi devārcāmanalaṃ jalam |
naivedyaṃ puṣpamannaṃ ca sa gohatyāṃ labheddhruvam || 63||
śaśvannāstīti yo vādī mithyāvādī pratārakaḥ |
devadveṣī gurudvepī sa gohatyāṃ labheddhruvam ||64||

devatāpratimāṃ dṛṣṭvā guruṃ vā brāhmaṇaṃ sati |
saṃbhramānna namedyo hi sa gohatyāṃ labheddhruvam ||65||
na dadātyāśiṣaṃ kopātpraṇatāya ca yo dvijaḥ |
vidyārthine ca vidyāṃ ca sa gohatyāṃ labheddhruvam || 66 ||
gohatyā viprahatyā ca kathitā cātideśikī |
gamyāṃ striyaṃ nṛṇāmeva nibodha kathayāmi te || 67||
svastrī gamyā ca sarveṣāmiti vedānuśāsanam |
agamyā ca tadanyā yā ceti vedavido viduḥ || 18 ||
sāmānyaṃ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ viśeṣaṃ śṛṇu sundari |
atyagamyā hi yā yāśca nibodha kathayāmi tāḥ |
śūdrāṇāṃ viprapatnī ca viprāṇāṃ śūdrakāminī |
atyagamyā ca nindyā ca loke vede pativrate ||70 ||
śūdraśva brāhmaṇīṃ gatvā brahmahatyāśataṃ labhet |
tatsamaṃ brāhmaṇī cāpi kumbhīpākaṃ labheddhruvam 71 ||
śūdrāṇāṃ viprapatnī ca viprāṇāṃ śūdrakāminī |
yadi śūdrāṃ vrajedvipro vṛṣalīpatireva saḥ || 72 ||
sa bhraṣṭo viprajāteśva cāṃḍālātso'dhamaḥ smṛtaḥ |
viṣṭhāsamaśca tatpiḍo mūtraṃ tasyaca tarpaṇam ||73||
na pitṝṇāṃ surāṇāṃ ca taddattamupatiṣṭhati |
koṭijanmārjitaṃ puṇyaṃ tasyāca tapasā'rjitā 74 ||
dvijasya vṛṣalīlobhānnaśyatyeva na saṃśayaḥ |
brāhmaṇaśva surāpītirviḍbhojī vṛṣalīpatiḥ || 75 ||
taptamudrādagdhadehastaptaśūlāṃkitastathā |
harivāsarabhojī ca kumbhīpākaṃ vrajedvijaḥ || 76||
gurupatnīṃ rājapatnīṃ sapatnīmātaraṃ dhruvam |
sutāṃ putravadhūṃ śvaśrūṃ sagarbhā bhaginīṃ satīm ||77||
sahodarabhrātṛjāyāṃ mātulānīṃ pituḥ prasūm |
mātuḥ prasūṃ tatsvasāraṃ bhaginīṃ bhrātṛkanyakām ||78||
śiṣyāṃ śiṣyasya patnīṃ ca bhāgineyasya kāminīm |
bhrātuḥ putrapriyāṃ caivātyagamyā āhe padmanaḥ ||79||
etāḥ kāmena kāṃtā yo braje mānavāthamaḥ |
sa mātṛgāmī vedeṣu brahmahatyāśataṃ vrajet || 80 ||
akarmārho'pyasaṃspṛśyo loke vede ca niditaḥ |
sa yāti kumbhīpāke ca mahāpāpī suduṣkare || 81 ||
karotyaśuddhāṃ saṃdhyāṃ vā na saṃdhyā vā karoti ca |
trisaṃdhyaṃ varjayedyo vā saṃdhyāhīnaśca sa dviṣaḥ || 82 ||
vaiṣṇavaṃ ca tathā śaivaṃ. śāktaṃ sauraṃ ca gāṇapam |
yo'haṃkārāna gṛhṇāti maṃtraṃ so'dīkṣitaḥ smṛtaḥ || 83 ||
pravāhamavadhi kṛtvā yāvaddhastacatuṣṭayam |
tatra nārāyaṇaḥ svāmī gaṅgāgarbhāta re vaset || 84||
tatra nārāyaṇakṣetre mṛto yāti hareḥ padam |
vārāṇasyāṃ vadaryāṃ ca gaṅgāsāgarasaṅgame ||85||
puṣkare. hariharakṣetre prabhāse kāmarūsthale |
'haridvāre ca kedāre tathā mātṛpure'pica || 86 ||
sarasvatīnadītīre puṇye vṛndāvane vane |
godāvaryāṃ ca kauśikyāṃ triveṇyāṃ ca himācale||87||
eṣu tīrtheṣu yo dānaṃ pratigṛhṇāti kāmataḥ |
sa catīrthapratigrāhī kumbhīpāke prayāti saḥ || 88 ||
śūdrasevī śūdrayājī grāmayājīti kīrtitaḥ |
tathā devopajīvī ca devalaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 89 ||
śūdrapākopajīvī yaḥ sūpakāra iti smṛtaḥ |
saṃdhyā pūjanahīnaśca pramattaḥ patitaḥ smṛtaḥ ||10||
uktaṃ sarvaṃ mayā bhadre lakṣaṇaṃ vṛṣalīpateḥ |
ete mahāpātakinaḥ kumbhīpākaṃ prayānti vai || 91 ||

kuṇḍānyanyāni ye yāṃti nibodha kathayāmi te || 92 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate navamaskaṃdhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde sāvitryupākhyāne catustriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 34 ||
atha pañcatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
dharmarāja uvāca
devasevāṃ dinā sādhvi na bhavetkarmakṛtanam |
śuddhakarma śuddhabījaṃ narakaśca kukarmaṇā || 1 ||
puṃścalyanaṃ ca yo bhukte yo'syāṃ gacchetpativrate |
sa dvijaḥ kālasūtraṃ ca mṛto yāti sudurgamam || 2||
śatavarṣaṃ kālasūtra sthirībhūto bhaveddhruvam |
anyajanmani rogī ca tataḥ śuddho bhavedvijaḥ || 3 ||
pativratā caikapato dvitīye kulaṭā smṛtā |
tṛtīye dharṣiṇī jñeyā caturthe puṃścalītyapi || 4||
veśyā ca pañcame paṣṭe puṅgī ca saptame'ṣṭame |
tata ūrdhvaṃ mahāveśyā sāspṛśyā sarvajātiṣu ||5||
yo dvijaḥ kulaṭāṃ gaccheddhapiṇīṃ puṃścalomapi |
puṅgīṃ veśyāṃ mahāveśyāṃ matsyode yāti niścitam ||
śatābdaṃ kulaṭāgāmī dhṛṣṭāgāmī caturguṇam |
ṣaḍguṇaṃ puṃścalīgāmī veśyāgāmī guṇāṣṭakam || 7 ||
puṅgīgāmī daśaguṇaṃ vasettatra na saṃśayaḥ |
mahāveśyākāmukaśca tato daśaguṇaṃ vaset || 8||
tatraiva yātanāṃ bhuṃkte yamadūtena tāḍitaḥ |
tittiraḥ kulaṭāgāmī dhṛṣṭāgāmī ca vāyasaḥ || 9 ||
kokilaḥ puṃścalīgāmī veśyāgāmī vṛkaḥ smṛtaḥ |
puṅgīgāmo sūkaraśca saptajanmani bhārate || 10 ||
mahāveśyāpragāmī ca jāyate śālmalītaruḥ |
yo bhuṃkte jñānahīnaśca grahaṇe candrasūryayoḥ || 11 ||
aruntudaṃ sa yātyevāpyannamānābdameva ca |
tato bhavenmānavaśvāpyudare rogapīḍitaḥ ||12||
śuciḥ |
vāttāṃ svakanyāṃ ca yo'nyasmai pradadāti ca13 ||
gulmayuktaśca kāṇaśca daṃtahīnastataḥ
sa vasetpāṃsukuṇḍe ca tadbhojī śatavatsaram |
tadravyahārī yaḥ sādhvi pāṃsuveṣṭe śatābdakam 14||
nivaseccharaśayyāyāṃ mama dūtena tāḍitaḥ |
bhaktyā na pūjayedvipraḥ śivaligaṃ ca pārthivam 15 ||
sa yāti śūlina: pāpācchūlaprotaṃ sudāruṇam |
sthitvā śatābdaṃ tatraiva śvāpadaḥ satajanmasu || 16 ||
tato bhaveddevalaśca saptajanma tataḥ śuciḥ |
karoti kuṃṭhitaṃ vipraṃ yadbhiyā kaṃpate dvijaḥ ||17||
prakaṃpane vasetso'pi vipalomābdameva ca |
prakopavadanā kopātsvāminaṃ yā ca paśyati ||18||
kaṭūkti taṃ pravadati solmukaṃ saṃprayāti hi |
ulkāṃ dadāti tadvaktre satataṃ mama krikaraḥ || 19 || .
daṃḍena tāḍayenmūni tallomābdapramāṇakam |
tato bhavenmānavī ca vidhavā saptajanmasu || 20 ||
sā bhuktvā caiva vaidhavyaṃ vyādhiyuktā tataḥ śuciḥ| yā brāhmaṇī śūdrabhogyā cāṃdhakūpe prayāti sā21 ||
taptaśaucodake dhvāṃte tadāhārī divāniśam |
nivasedatiptataptā mama dūtena tāḍitā ||2||
śaucodake nimagnā sā yāvadidrāścaturdaśa |
kākī janmasahasrāṇi śatajanmāni sūkarī ||23||
śṛgālī śatajanmāni śatajanmāni kukkuṭī |
pārāvatī saptajanma vānaro saptajanmasu ||24||

tato bhavetsā cāṃḍālī sarvabhogyā ca bhārate |
tato bhavecca rajakī yakṣmagrastā ca puṃścalī || 25 ||
tataḥ kuṣṭhayutā tailakārī śuddhā bhavettataḥ |
nivasedvedhane veśyā puṃgī ca daṃḍatāḍane || 26 ||
jalaraṃdhre vaseddheśyā kulaṭā dehacūrṇake |
svairiṇo dalane caiva dhṛṣṭā ca śoṣaṇe tathā ||27|
nivameghātanāyuktā mama dūtena tāḍitā |
viṇmūtrabhakṣā satataṃ yāvanmanvaṃtaraṃ sati || 28 ||
tato bhavedviṭkumiśra lakṣavarṣaṃ tataḥ śuciḥ |
brāhmaṇo brāhmaṇīṃ gacche kṣatriyāṃ vā'pi kṣatriyaḥ ||
vaiśyo vaiśyāṃ ca śūdrāṃ vā śūdraścāpi vrajedyadi |
savarṇaparadāraiśca kaṣāyaṃ yāṃti te janāḥ ||30||
bhuktvā kapāyaṃ taptodaṃ nivasedvā śatābdakam |
tato vipro bhavecchuddhastato vai kṣatriyādayaḥ ||31 ||
yopitaśvāpi śuddhayaṃtītyevamāha pitāmahaḥ |
kṣatriyo brāhmaṇīṃ gacchedvaiśyo vā'pi pativrate || 32 ||
mātṛgāmī bhavetso'pi śūrpe ca narake vaset |
śūrpākāraiśca kṛmibhirbrāhmaṇyā saha bhakṣitaḥ || 33 ||
prataptamūtrabhojī ca mama dūtena tāḍitaḥ |
tatraiva yātanāṃ bhuṃkte yāvadidrāścaturdaśa || 34 ||
saptajanma varāhaśca chāgalaśca tataḥ śuciḥ |
kare dhṛtvā tu tulasīṃ pratijñāṃ yo na pālayet || 35 ||
mithyā vā śapathaṃ kuryātsa ca jvālāmukhaṃ vrajet |
dattvā dakṣiṇahastaṃ ca pratijñāṃ yo na pālayet 36 ||
śilāṃ vā devapratimāṃ sa ca jvālāmukhaṃ vrajet |
gaṃgātoyaṃ kare kṛtvā pratijñāṃ yo na pālayet 37 ||
sthitvā devagṛhe vā'pi sa ca jvālāmukhaṃ vrajet |
āspṛśya brāhmaṇaṃ gāṃ ca jvālāvahni nivedya ca 38 ||
na pālayetpratijñāṃ ca sa ca jvālāmukhaṃ vrajet |
mitradrohī kṛtaghnaśca yaśva viśvāsaghātakaḥ ||39||
mithyāsākṣyapradacaiva sa ca jvālāmukhaṃ vrajet |
ete tatra vasaṃtyeva yāvadidrāścaturdaśa ||40||
prathāṃgārapradagdhāśca yamadūtena tāḍitā: |
cāṃḍālastulasī spṛṣṭvā saptajanma tataḥ śuciḥ ||41||
mlecchī gaṃgājalasparśī paṃcajanma tataḥ śuciḥ |
śilāsparśī vikṛmiśca saptajanmasu suṃdari || 42 ||
asparśī brahmakṛmi: saptajanma tataḥ śuciḥ |
dakṣahastapradātā ca sarpaśca saptajanmasu ||43||
tato bhavedbrahmahīna mānavaśca tataḥ śuciḥ |
mithyāvādī devagṛhe devalaḥ saptajanmasu || 44 ||
viprādisparśakārī ca vyāghrajātirbhaveddhruvam |
tato bhavecca mūkaḥ sa badhira trijanmani || 45||
bhāryāhīno baṃdhuhīno vaṃśahīnastataḥ śuciḥ |
mitradrohī ca nakulaḥ kṛtaghnaśvāpi khaṃḍakaḥ || 46||
viśvāsaghātī vyāghraśca saptajanmasu bhārate |
mithyāsākṣī ca vaktavye maṃḍūka: saptajanmasu || 47 |
pūrvānsasā parānsapta puruṣānhaṃti cātmanaḥ |
nityakriyāvihīnaśca jaḍatvena yuto dvijaḥ || 48 ||
yasyānāsthā vedavākye mandaṃ hasati saṃtatam |
vratopavāsahīnaśca sadvākyaparaniṃdakaḥ || 49||
dhūmrāṃdhe ca vasetso'pi śatābdaṃ dhūmrabhakṣakaḥ |
jalajaṃturbhavetso'pi śatajanmakrameṇa ca || 50 ||
tato nānāprakāraśca matsyajātistataḥ śuciḥ |
yaḥ karotyupahāsaṃ ca devabrāhmaṇayodhane || 51 ||
pātayitvā sa puruṣāndaśa pūrvāndaśāparān |
so'yaṃ yāti tu dhūmrāndhaṃ dhūmadhvāṃtasamanvitam 52 ||

dhūmrakliṣṭo dhūmrabhojī vasettatra caturguṇam |
tato mūṣakajātiśca saptajanmasu bhārate || 53 ||
tato nānāvidhāḥ pakṣijātayaḥ kṛmijātibhiḥ |
tato nānāvidhā vṛkṣāḥ paśavaśca tato naraḥ ||54||
vipro daivajñajīvī ca vaidyajīvī cikitsakaḥ |
lākṣālaudivyahāāpārī rasādivikrayī ca yaḥ ||55||
sa yāti nāgaveṣṭaṃ ca nāgarveṣṭitameva ca |
vasetsa lomamānābdaṃ tatraiva nāgapāśitaḥ || 56 ||
tato nānāvidhāḥ pakṣijātayaśca tato naraḥ |
tato bhavetsa gaṇako vaidyaśca saptajanmasu || 57 ||
gopaśca karmakāraśca raṃgakārastataḥ śuciḥ |
prasiddhāni ca kuṃḍāni kathitāni pativrate || 58||
pātakinasteṣu svakarmaphalabhoginaḥ ||
anyāni cāprasiddhāni kṣudrāṇi santi tatra vai | saṃti
bhramaṃti nānāyoni ca kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 59 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe paṃcāśo'dhyāyaḥ || 35 ||
atha ṣaṭtriśo'dhyāyaḥ
sāvitryuvāca
vedavedāṅgapāraga |
nānāpurāṇetihāse yatsāraṃ tatpradarśaya || 1||
dharmarāja mahābhāga
sarveṣu sārabhūtaṃ yatsarveṣṭaṃ sarvasaṃmatam |
karmacchedavījarūpaṃ praśastaṃ sukhadaṃ nṛṇām ||2||
sarvapradaṃ ca sarveṣāṃ sarvamaṃgalakārakam |
bhayaṃ duḥkhaṃ na paśyaṃti yena vai sarvamānavāḥ || 3||
kuṃḍāni te na paśyaṃti teṣu naiva patanti ca |
na bhavedyena janmādi tatkarma vada sāṃpratam ||4||
kimākārāṇi kuṃḍāni tāni vā nirmitāni ca |
ke ca kenaiva rūpeṇa tatra tiṣṭhati pāpinaḥ ||5||
svadehe bhasmasādbhūte yāti lokāṃtaraṃ naraḥ |
kena dehena vā bhogaṃ karoti ca śubhāśubham || 6||
suciraṃ kleśabhogena kathaṃ deho na naśyati |
deho vā kiṃvidho brahmaṃstanme vyākhyātumarhasi ||7||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
sāvitrīvacanaṃ śrutvā dharmarājo hari smaran |
kathāṃ kathitumārebhe karmabandhanikṛṃtanīm ||8||
dharmarāja uvāca
pāṃcarātrādikeṣu ca ||9||
vatse caturṣu vedeṣu dharmeṣu saṃhitāsu ca |
purāṇeṣvitihāseṣu pañca devānusevanam ||10||
anyeṣu dharmaśāstreṣu vedāṃgeṣu ca suvrate | sarveṣṭaṃ sārabhūtaṃ ca
sarvamaṅgalarūpaṃ ca paramānaṃdakāraṇam || 11 ||
janmamṛtyujarāvyādhiśokasaṃtāpanāśanam karmavṛkṣanikṛṃtanam ||12||
kāraṇaṃ sarvasiddhīnāṃ narakārṇavatāraṇam |
bhaktivṛkṣāṃkurakaraṃ smṛtam |
sālokyasāṣṭisārūpyasāmīpyādipradaṃ śubham || 13||
vimokṣasopānamidamavināśapadaṃ
kuṃḍāni yamadūtaiśca rakṣitāni sadā śubhe |
na hi paśyaṃti svapne ca pañcadevārcakā narāḥ || 14||
devībhaktivihīnā ye te paśyaṃti mamālayam |
yāṃti ye haritīrthaṃ vā śrayaṃti harivāsaram || 15 ||

praṇamati hari nityaṃ haryaca kalpayaṃti ca |
na yāṃti te'pi dhorāṃ ca mama saṃyamanī purīm 16 ||
trisaṃdhipūtā viprāśva śuddhācārasamanvitāḥ |
nivṛtti naiva lapsyaṃti devīsevāṃ vinā narāḥ || 17 ||
svadharmaniratācārāḥ svadharmaniratāstathā |
gacchaṃto mṛtyulokaṃ ca durdaśā mama kiṃkarāḥ || 18 ||
bhītāḥ śivopāsakebhyo vainateyādivoragā |
svadutaṃ pāśahastaṃ ca gacchaṃtaṃ vārayāmyaham || 19 ||
yāsyati te ca sarvatra haridāsāśrayaṃ vinā |
kṛṣṇamantropāsakācca vainateyādiva ragāḥ ||20||
devīmantropāsakānāṃ nāmnāṃ caiva nikṛtanam |
karoti nakhalekhanyā citraguptaśva bhītavat ||21||
madhuparkādikaṃ teṣāṃ kurate ca punaḥ punaḥ |
vilaṃghya brahmalokaṃ ca lokaṃ gacchati te sati || 22 ||
duritāni ca nayaṃti yeṣāṃ saṃsvargamātrata |
te mahābhāgyavaṃto hi sahasrakulapāvanāḥ || 23||
yathā ca prajvaladvahrau śuṣkāni ca tṛṇāni ca |
prāpnoti mohaḥ saṃmohaṃ tāṃśca dṛṣṭvā ca bhītavat 24 ||
kāmaśca kāminaṃ yāti lobhakroghau tataḥ sati |
mṛtyuḥ pralīyate rogo jarā śoko bhayaṃ tathā 25 ||
kālaḥ śubhāśubhaṃ karma harṣo bhogastathaiva ca |
ye ye na yāṃti tāṃ pīḍāṃ kathitāste mayā sati 26||
śṛṇu dehavivaraṇaṃ kathayāni yathāgamam |
pṛthivī vāyurākāśastejastoyamita sphuṭam ||27||
dehināṃ dehavījaṃ ca sraṣṭṛsṛṣṭividhau ram |
pṛthivyādipaṃcabhūtairyo deho nirmito bhavet ||28||
sa kṛtrimo naśvaraśca bhasmācca bhavediha |
baddho'ṅguṣṭhapramāṇaśca yo jīvaḥ puruṣaḥ kṛtaḥ ||29||
virbhāta sūkṣmaṃ dehaṃ tadrūpaṃ bhogahetave |
sa deho na bhavedbhasma jvaladagnau mamālaye ||30|| taṃ
jalena na dehī vā prahāre suciraṃ kṛte |
na śastreṇa na vā'streṇa sutīkṣṇakaṃṭake tathā || 31 ||
taptadrave taptalohe taptapāpāṇa eva ca |
prataptapratimāśleṣe yatpūrvapatane'pi ca || 32||
na dagdho na ca bhagnaḥ sa bhuṃkte saṃtāpameva ca |
kathito dehavṛttāṃtaḥ kāraṇaṃ ca yathāgamam ||
kuṇḍānāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ sarva bodhāya kathayāmi te || 33||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ṣaṭūtriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 36 ||
atha saptatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
dhamarāja uvāca
pūrṇandumaṃḍalākāraṃ sarvaṃ kuṇḍa vartulam |
nimnaṃ pāṣāṇabhedaiśca pācitaṃ bahubhiḥ sati || 1 ||
na naśvaraṃ ca pralayaṃ nirmitaṃ ceśvarecchayā |
kleśadaṃ pātakānāṃ ca nānārūpaṃ tadālayam ||2||
jvaladaṃgārarūpaṃ ca śatahastaśikhaḥ śvitam |
paritaḥ krośamānaṃ ca vahnikuṇḍaṃ prakīrtitam || 3||
maha śabdaṃ prakurvadbhiḥ pāpibhiḥ paripūritam |
rakṣitaṃ mama dūtaiśca tāḍitaiścāpi saṃtatam ||4||
prataptodakapūrṇa ca hiṃsra jaṃtusamanvitam |
mahāghoraṃ kākuśabdaṃ prahāreṇa dṛḍhena ca || 5 ||
krośārdhamānaṃ tatasta |
ḍirtarmama pārṣadaiḥ |
taptakṣārodakaiḥ pūrṇaṃ punaḥ kākaiśca saṃkulam || 6|| tadvataistāḍitairmama |

saṃkulaṃ pāpibhiścaiva krośamānaṃ bhayānam |
trāhīti śabdaṃ kurvadbhirmama dūtaiśca tāḍitaiḥ ||7||
pracaladbhiranāhāraiḥ śuṣkakaṃṭhoṣṭhatālukaiḥ |
bibhireva kṛtaṃ pūrṇaṃ krośamānaṃ ca kutsitam || 8||
ati durgandhisaṃsaktavyātaṃ pāpibhiranvaham |
tāḍitairmama dūtaiśca tadāhāraiḥ sudāruṇaḥ || 9 ||
rakṣeti śabdaṃ kurvadbhistatkīṭaireva bhakṣitaiḥ |
taptamūtradravaiḥ pūrṇa mūtrakoṭeśca saṃkulam ||10||
yuktaṃ mahāpātakibhistatkīṭairbhakṣitaiḥ sadā |
gavyūtimānaṃ dhvāṃtāktaṃ śabdakṛdbhiśva saṃtatam || 11 ||
maddataistāḍitaivaraiḥ śuṣkakaṃṭhoṣṭhatālukaiḥ |
śleṣmapūrṇa praśamitaṃ tatkoṭaiḥ paritaṃ tadā || 12 ||
tadbhojibhiḥ pāpibhiśca veṣṭitaṃ veṣṭitaiḥ sadā |
krośādhaṃ garakuṃḍaṃ na garabhojibhiranvitam || 13 ||
garakoṭairbhakṣitaiśca pāpibhiḥ pūrṇameva ca |
tāḍitairmama dūtaiśca śabdakṛdbhiśca kaṃpitaiḥ || 14 ||
sarpākārairvajradaṃṣṭraiḥ śuṣkakaṃṭhaiḥ sudāruṇaiḥ |
netrayolapūrṇa ca krośā kīṭasaṃyutam ||15||
pāpibhiḥ saṃkulaṃ śaśvadbhūmadbhiḥ kīṭabhakṣitaiḥ |
vasārasena saṃpūrṇa krośatuyaṃ suduḥsaham ||16||
tadbhojibhiḥ pātakibhirmama dūtaiśca tāḍitai |
śukrakuṃḍaṃ krośamitaṃ śukrakīṭaiśca saṃyutam ||17||
pāpibhiḥ saṃkulaṃ śaśvadravadbhiḥ kīṭabhakṣitaiḥ |
durgaṃdhirakapūrṇaṃ ca vāpimānaṃ gabhorakam || 18||
tadbhojibhiḥ pāpibhiśca saṃkulaṃ kīṭabhakṣitam |
pūrṇa netrāśrubhistaptaṃ bahupāṣibhiranvitam ||19||
vāpīturya ca rudadbhiḥ kīṭabhakṣitaiḥ |
nṛṇāṃ gātramaryuktaṃ tadbhakṣaiḥ pāpibhiryutam || 20 ||
tāḍitairmama dūtaṃśca vyagreśca kīṭabhakṣitaiḥ |
karṇaviparipūrṇaṃ ca tadbhakṣaḥ pāpibhiryutam || 21 ||
vāpīturya pramāṇaṃ ca bruvadbhi: kīṭabhakṣitaiḥ |
majjāpūrṇa narāṇāṃ ca mahādurgaṃdhisaṃyutam ||22||
mahāpātakibhiryuktaṃ vāpīturya pramāṇakam |
paripūrṇa snigdha māṃsamama dūtaiśca tāḍitaiḥ ||23||
pāpibhiḥ saṃkulaṃ caiva vāpīmānaṃ bhayānakaḥ |
kanyāvikrayibhiścaiva tadbhakṣyaiḥ kīṭabhakṣitaiḥ ||24||
pāhīti śabdaṃ kurvadbhistrāsitaiśca bhayānakaiḥ |
vāpīturya pramāṇaṃ ca nakhādikacatuṣṭayam ||25||
pāpibhiḥ saṃyutaṃ śaśvanmama dūtaiśca tāḍitaiḥ |
prataptatāmrakuṃḍaṃ ca tāmroparyulmukānvitam ||26||
tātrāṇāṃ pratimālakṣaḥ prataptairvyāpṛtaṃ sadā |
pratyekaṃ pratimāśliṣṭaiḥ rudadbhiḥ pāpibhiryutam || 27 ||
gavyūtimānaṃ vistīrṇaṃ mama dūtaiśca tāḍitaiḥ |
prataptalohadhāraṃ ca jvaladaṃgārasaṃyutam ||28||
lohānāṃ pratimāśliṣṭa rudadbhiḥ pāpibhiryutam |
pratṣekaṃ pratimāśliṣṭaiḥ śaśvatprajvalitairbhiyā ||29|
rakṣa rakṣeti śabda ca kurvadbhirdvatatāḍitaiḥ |
mahāpātakibhiryuktaṃ dvigavyūtipramāṇakam ||30||
bhayānakaṃ dhvāṃtayuktaṃ lohakuṃḍaṃ prakīrtitam |
carmakuṃḍaṃ taptasurākuṃḍe vāpyardhameva ca || 31 ||
tadbhojipāpibhirvyāptaṃ mama dūtaiśca tāḍitaiḥ |
ataḥ śālmalikuṃḍaṃ ca vṛkṣakaṃṭakaśobhitam ||32||
lakṣapauruṣamānaṃ ca krośamānaṃ ca duḥkhadam |
dhanurmānaiḥ kaṃṭakaiśca sutīkṣṇaiḥ pariveṣṭitam ||33||
pratyekaṃ viddhagātraiśca mahāpātakibhiryutam |
vṛkṣāgrānnipatadbhiśca mama dūtaiśca pātitaiḥ ||34||

jalaṃ dehīti śabdaṃ ca kurvadbhiḥ śuṣkatālukaiḥ |
mahābhiyā'tivyagraiśca daṇḍaiḥ saṃbhagnamastakaiḥ || 35 ||
pracaladbhiryathā taptatailajīvibhireva 'ca |
viṣodaistakṣakāṇāṃ ca pūrvaṃ ca krośamānakam 36 ||
tadbhakṣaiḥ pāpibhiryuktaṃ mama dūtaiśva tāḍitaiḥ |
prataptatailapūrṇa ca kīṭādiparivarjitam ||37||
mahāpātakibhiryuktaṃ dagghāṃgāraiśca veṣṭitam |
kākuśabdaṃ prakurvadbhiścaladbhirdvapīḍitaiḥ ||38||
dhvāṃtayuktaṃ krośamānaṃ kleśadaṃ ca bhayānakam |
śūlākāraiḥ sutīkṣṇāgrairloha śastraṃśca veṣṭitam || 39||
śastratalpasvarūpaṃ ca krośaturya pramāṇakam |
veṣṭitaṃ yatpātakibhiḥ kuṃtaviddheśva veṣṭitaiḥ ||40||
tāḍitairmama dūtaiśva śuṣkakaṃṭhoṣṭhatālukaiḥ |
kīṭaiśva śaṃkupramitaiḥ sarpamānairbhayaṃkaraiḥ || 41 ||
tīkṣṇadaṃtaśca vikṛtairvyāptaṃ dhvāṃtayutaṃ sati |
mahāpātakibhiryuktaṃ mama dūtaiśca tāḍitaiḥ ||42 ||
dvigavyūtipramāṇaṃ ca pūyakuṃḍaṃ pracakṣate |
tadbhakṣyaiḥ prāṇibhiryuktaṃ mama dūtaiśca tāḍitaiḥ || 43 ||
tālavṛkṣapramāṇaiśca sarpakoṭibhirāvṛtam |
sarpaveṣṭitagātraiśca pāpibhiḥ sarpabhakṣitaiḥ || 44 ||
saṃkulaṃ śabdakṛdbhiśca mama dūtaiśva tāḍitaiḥ |
kuṇḍatrayaṃ maśādīnāṃ pūrṇaṃ ca maśakādibhiḥ || 45 ||
sarvaṃ krośārdhamānaṃ ca mahāpātakibhiryutam |
hastapādādibarddhana kṣatajīvena lohitaiḥ || 46 ||
hāheti śabdaṃ kurvadbhistāḍitairmama pārṣadaiḥ |
vajravṛścikayoḥ kuṇḍaṃ tābhyāṃ ca paripūritam 47 ||
vāpyadhaṃ pāpibhiryuktaṃ vajravṛścikadaṃśitaiḥ |
kuṇḍatrayaṃ maśādīnāṃ taireva paripūritam ||48||
taividdhaḥ pāpibhiryuktaṃ vāpyardhaṃ raktalohitaiḥ |
taptatoyodakaiḥ pūrṇaṃ sadhvāṃtaṃ golakuṇḍakam ||49||
kīṭai: śaṃkusamānaiśca bhakṣitaiḥ pāpibhiryutam |
vāpyardhamānaṃ bhītaiśca pāpibhiḥ kīṭabhakṣitaiḥ ||50 ||
rudadbhiḥ krośamānaṃśca mama dūtaiśva tāḍitaiḥ |
atidurgaṃdhisaṃyuktaṃ duḥkhadaṃ pāpināṃ sadā || 51 ||
dāruṇaivikṛtākārairbhakṣitaṃ pāpibhiryutam |
vāpyadhaṃ paripūrṇaṃ ca jalasthairnakrakoṭibhiḥ || 52 ||
viṇmūtraśleṣmabhakṣaiśca saṃyutaṃ śatakoṭibhiḥ |
kākaiśca vikṛtākārairbhakṣitaiḥ pāpibhiryutam || 53 ||
mathānakuṇḍaṃ bījakuṇḍaṃ tābhyāṃ pūrṇaṃ dhanuḥśatam |
bhakṣitaiḥ pāpibhiryuktaṃ śabdakṛdbhiśca saṃtatam ||54||
dhanuḥ śataṃ jīvayuktaṃ pāpibhiḥ saṃkulaṃ sadā |
śabdakṛdbhirvajradaṃṣṭraiḥ sāṃdradhvāṃtamayaṃ param || 55 ||
vāpīdviguṇamānaṃ ca taptaprastaranirmitam |
jvaladaṃgārasadṛśaṃ caladbhiḥ pāpibhiryutam || 26 ||
kṣuradhāropamaistīkṣṇaiḥ pāṣāṇanirmitaṃ param |
mahāpātakibhiryuktaṃ lālākuṇḍaṃ ca lohitaiḥ || 57||
krośamātraṃ ca gaṃbhīraṃ mama dūtaiśva tāḍitaiḥ |
taptāṃjanācalākāraiḥ paripūrṇaṃ dhanuḥśatam ||58||
caladbhiḥ pāpibhiryuktaṃ mama dūtaiśva tāḍitaiḥ |
pūrṇaṃ cūrṇadravaiḥ krośamānaṃ pāpibhiranvitam ||59||
tadbhojibhiḥ pradagdhaiśca mama dūtaiśca tāḍitaiḥ |
kuṇḍaṃ kulālacakraṃ ca ghūrṇamānaṃ ca saṃtatam ||60 ||
sutīkṣṇaṃ ṣoḍaśāra ca cūrṇitaiḥ pāpibhiryutam |
atīva vakraṃ nimnaṃ ca dvigavyūtipramāṇakam 61 ||
kaṃdarākāranirmāṇaṃ taptodaiśca samanvitam |
mahāpātakibhiryuktaṃ bhakṣitajaṃlajaṃtubhiḥ || 62 ||

jvaladbhiḥ śabdakṛdbhiśca dhvāṃtayuktaṃ bhayānakam |
koṭibhirvikṛtākāraiḥ kacchapaiśca sudāruṇaiḥ ||63 ||
jalasthaḥ saṃyutaṃ taiśca bhakṣitaiḥ pāpibhiryutam |
jvālākalāpaistejobhirnirmitaiḥ krośamānakam 64||
śabdakṛdbhiḥ pātakibhiḥ saṃyutaṃ kleśadaṃ sadā |
krośamānaṃ ca gambhīraṃ taptabhasmabhiranvitam ||65||
śaśvajjvaladbhiḥ saṃyuktaṃ pāpibhirbhasmabhakṣitaiḥ |
taptapāṣāṇa lohānāṃ samūhaiḥ paripūritaiḥ || 66 ||
pāpibhirdagdhagātraiśca yuktaṃ ca śuṣkatālukaiḥ |
trośamānaṃ dhvāṃtayuktaṃ gambhīramatidāruṇam ||67||
tāḍitaiśca pradagdhaiśva dagdhakuṃḍaṃ prakortitam |
atīvomiyutaṃ toyaṃ prataptakṣārasaṃyutam ||68||
nānāprakāraivirutairjalajaṃtubhiranvitam |
dvigavyūtipramāṇaṃ ca gambhīraṃ dhvāṃtasaṃyutam || 69||
tadbhakṣyaiḥ pāpibhiryuktaṃ daṃśitairjalajaṃtubhiḥ |
jvaladbhiḥ śabdakṛdbhiśca na paśyadbhiḥ parasparam 70 ||
prataptasūcīkuṇḍaṃ ca kīrtitaṃ ca bhayānakam |
asīva dhārāpatrasyāpyuccaistālata roradhaḥ || 71 ||
krośārdhamānaṃ kuṃḍaṃ ca patatpatrasamanvitam |
pāpināṃ raktapūrṇa ca vṛkṣāgrātpatatāṃ dhruvam ||72||
paritrāhīti śabdaṃ ca kurvatāmasatāmapi |
gambhīraṃ dhvāṃtayuktaṃ ca rakta kīṭasamanvitam ||73||
tadasopatra kuṃḍaṃ ca kīrtitaṃ ca bhayānakam |
dhanuḥ śatapramāṇaṃ ca kṣuradhārāstrasaṃyutam ||74 ||
pāpināṃ raktapūrṇaṃ ca kṣuradhāraṃ bhayānakam |
sūcīmukhāstrasaṃyuktaṃ pāpiraktapūritam ||75||
pañcāśaddhanurāyāmaṃ kleśada sūcikāmukham |
kasyacijjaṃtubhedasya gokākhyasya mukhākṛti || 76 ||
kūparūpaṃ ca gambhīraṃ dhanuviśatpramāṇakam |
mahāpātakināṃ caitra mahatvaleśapradaṃ param ||77||
tatkīṭabhakṣitānāṃ ca namrāsyānāṃ ca saṃtatam |
kuṇḍaṃ nakramukhākāraṃ dhanuḥ ṣoḍaśamānakam ||78||
gambhīraṃ pāparūpaṃ ca pāpibhiḥ saṃkulaṃ sadā |
dhanuḥ śatapramāṇaṃ ca kīrtitaṃ gajadaṃśanam || 79 ||
dhanustriṃśatpramāṇaṃ ca kuṃḍaṃ ca gomukhākṛti |
pāpināṃ kleśadaṃ śaśvadgomukhaṃ parikīrtitam 80 ||
kālacakreṇa saṃyuktaṃ bhramamāṇaṃ bhayānakam |
kumbhākāraṃ dhvāṃtayuktaṃ dvigavyūtipramāṇakam || 81 ||
lakṣapauruṣamānaṃ ca gambhīraṃ vistṛtaṃ sati |
kutracittaptatailaṃ ca tāmrādikuṃḍameva ca || 82 ||
pāpināṃ ca pradhānaiśca mūrcchitaiḥ kumibhiryutam |
parasparaṃ ca naśyadbhiḥ śabdakṛdbhiśva saṃtatam 83 ||
tāḍitairyamadūtaiśva musalairmudgaraistathā |
ghūrṇamānaiḥ patadbhiśva mūrcchitaiśca kṣaṇaṃ kṣaṇam ||84||
pātitairyamadūtaiśva rudantyasmātkṣaṇaṃ punaḥ |
yāvantaḥ pāpinaḥ saṃti sarvakuṃḍeṣu suṃdara ||85||
tataścaturguṇāḥ santi kumbhīpāke ca duḥkhade |
suciraṃ vadhyamānāste bhogadehā na naśvarāḥ || 86||
sarvakuṃḍapradhānaṃ ca kumbhīpākaṃ prakīrtitam |
kālanirmitasūtreṇa nivaddhā yatra pāpinaḥ || 87 ||
utthāpitāśca dūtaiśca kṣaṇameva nimajjitāḥ |
niśvāsabaddhāḥ suciraṃ tathā mohaṃ gatāḥ punaḥ || 88 ||
atīva kleśasaṃyuktā dehabhogena suṃdari |
prataptatoyayuktaṃ ca kālasūtraṃ prakīrtitam ||89 ||
avaṭa: kūpabhedaśca matsyodaḥ sa udāhṛtaḥ |
prataptatoyapūrṇa ca catuviśatpramāṇakam || 90 ||

vyāptaṃ mahāpāpibhirvyādigdhāṃgaiśca saṃtatam |
madūtaistāḍitaiḥ śaśvadavaṭodaṃ prakīrtitam || 91 ||
yatrodasparśamātreṇa sarvavyādhiśca pāpinām |
bhavedakasmātpatatāṃ yasminkuṃḍe dhanuḥśate || 92 ||
araṃtu dairbhakṣitaistu prāṇibhiryacca saṃkulam |
hāheti śabdaṃ kurvadbhistadevāstudaṃ viduḥ ||93 ||
taptapāṃsubhirākīrṇa jvaladbhistupadagdhakaiḥ |
tadbhaḥ pāpibhiryuktaṃ pāṃsubhojairdhanuḥśatam ||14||
pātamātreṇa pāpī ca pāśena veṣṭito bhavet |
krośamātreṇa kuṃḍaṃ ca tatpāśaveṣṭanaṃ viduḥ || 95 ||
pāpamātreṇa pāpī ca śūlena veṣṭito bhavet |
dhanurviśatpramāṇaṃ ca śūlaprotaṃ prakīrtitam || 96 ||
patatāṃ pāpināṃ yatra bhavedeva prakaṃpanam |
atīva himatoyāktaṃ krośārthaṃ ca prakaṃpanam || 97||
dadatyeva hi me dūtā yatrolkāḥ pāpināṃ mukhe |
dhanurviśatpramāṇaṃ tadulkābhiśca susaṃkulam ||18||
lakṣapauruṣamānaṃ ca gaṃbhīraṃ ca dhanuḥśatam |
nānāprakāraiḥ kṛmibhiḥ saṃyuktaṃ ca bhayānakam 99 ||
atyaṃdhakāravyāptaṃ ca kūpākāra ca vartulam |
tadbhakṣyaṃḥ pāpibhiryuktaṃ praṇaśyadbhiḥ parasparam 100 ||
taptatoyapradagdhaiśva jvaladbhiḥ kīṭabhakṣitaiḥ |
dhvāṃtena cakṣuṣā cāṃraṃdhakūpaḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 101 ||
nānāprakāraśastraughaṃyaṃtra viddhāśca pāpinaḥ |
dhanurviśatpramāṇaṃ ca vedhanaṃ tatprakīrtitam || 102 ||
daṃḍena tāḍitā yatra mama dūrtaśca pāpinaḥ |
dhanuḥ ṣoḍaśamānaṃ ca tatkuṃḍaṃ daṃḍatāḍanam ||103||
niruddhāśva mahājālairyathā mīnāśca pāpinaḥ |
dhanurviśatpramāṇaṃ ca jālaraṃdhraṃ prakīrtitam || 104||
patatāṃ pāpināṃ kuṃḍe dahaśrarṇo bhavediha |
lohabaṃdī nibaddhānāṃ koṭipauruṣamānakam ||105||
gaṃbhīraṃ dhvāṃtasaṃyuktaṃ dhanurviśatpramāṇakam |
mūrcchitānāṃ jaḍānāṃ ca dehacṇaṃ prakīrtitam || 106 ||
dalitāḥ pāpino yatra mama dūtaiśca tāḍitā: |
dhanuḥ ṣoḍaśamānaṃ ca tatkuṃḍaṃ dalanaṃ smṛtam || 107||
patanenaiva pāpī ca śuṣkakaṃ ṭhoṣṭatālukaḥ |
bālukāsu ca taptāsu dhanustriṃśatpramāṇakam || 108||
śatapauruṣamānaṃ ca gaṃbhīraṃ dhvāṃtasaṃyutam |
śoṣaṇaṃ kuṃḍametaddhi pāpināṃ paraduḥkhadam ||109||
nānāca maṃ kaṣāyodaparipūrṇa dhanuḥ śatas |
durgaṃdhiyuktaṃ tadbhakṣyaiḥ prāṇibhiḥ saṃkulaṃ kaṣam 110 ||
śūrpākāra mukhaṃ kuṃḍa dhanurdvādaśamānakam |
tataloha bālukābhiḥ pūrṇa pāta kisaṃyutam || 111 ||
durgaṃdhiyuktaṃ tadbhakṣyaiḥ pāpibhiḥ saṃkulaṃ sati |
śūrpākāramukhaṃ kuṃḍaṃ dhanurdvādaśamānakam || 112 ||
prataptavālukāpūrṇaṃ mahāpātakabhiryutam |
aṃtaragniśikhānāṃ ca jvālāvyātamukhaṃ sadā 113 ||
dhanuviśatimānaṃ ca pramāṇaṃ yasya suṃdari |
jvālābhirdagdhagātraiśca pāpibhirvyāptameva ca || 114||
tanmahākleśadaṃ śaśvatkuṃḍaṃ jvālāmukhaṃ smṛtam |
pātamātrācatra pāpī mūhito vai naro bhavet || 115 ||
tapteṣṭakābhyaṃtaritaṃ vāpyardhaṃ jihmakuṇḍakam |
dhūmrāṃdhakārasaṃyuktaṃ dhūmrāṃ pāpibhiryutam ||116||
ghnuḥ śataṃ śvāsa raṃdhredhūmrāṃdhaṃ parikīrtitam |
pātamātrādyatra pāpī nāgaiśca veṣṭito bhavet || 117 ||
dhanuḥ śataṃ nāgapūrṇa tannāgairveṣṭitaṃ bhavet |

ૐ
ṣaḍaśīti ca kuṃḍāni mayoktāni niśāmaya |
lakṣaṇaṃ cāpi teṣāṃ ca kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 118 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe sāvitryupākhyāne saptatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 28 ||
athāṣṭatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
sāvitryuvāca
devībhakti dehi mahyaṃ sārāṇāṃ caiva sārakam |
puṃsāṃ muktidvārabījaṃ narakārṇavatārakam ||1||
kāraṇaṃ muktisārāṇāṃ sarvāśubhavināśanam |
dārakaṃ karmavṛkṣāṇāṃ kṛtapāpaughadāraṇam ||2||
muktiśca katidhāpyasti kiṃvā tāsāṃ ca lakṣaṇam |
devībhakta bhaktibhedaṃ niṣekasyāpi khaṃḍanam ||3||
tattvajñānavihīnā ca strījātividhinirmitā |
kiṃcijjñānaṃ sārabhūtaṃ vada vedavidāṃ vara ||4||
sarva dānaṃ ca yajñaśva tīrthaṃ snānaṃ vrataṃ tapaḥ |
ajñānijñānadānasya kalāṃ nārhati ṣoḍaśīm ||5||
pituḥ śataguṇā mātā gaurave ceti niścitam |
mātuḥ śataguṇaḥ pūjyo jñānadātā guruḥ prabho || 6 ||
dharmarāja uvāca
pūrvaṃ sarvo varo datto yaste manasi vāṃchitaḥ |
adhunā śaktibhaktiste vatse bhavatu madvarāt ||7||
śrotumicchasi kalyāṇi śrīdevīguṇakīrtanam |
vaktṛṇāṃ pṛcchakānāṃ ca śrotṝṇāṃ kulatāraṇam ||8||
śeṣo vaktrasahasreṇa na hi yadvaktumīśvaraḥ |
mṛtyuṃjayo na kṣamaśca vaktuṃ pañcamukhena ca ||9||
dhātā caturṇāṃ vedānāṃ vidhātā jagatāmapi |
brahmā caturmukhenaiva nālaṃ viṣṇuśca sarvavit || 10 ||
kārtikeyaḥ ṣaṇmukhena nāpi vaktumalaṃ dhruvam |
na gaṇeśaḥ samarthaśca yogīṃdrāṇāṃ gurorguruḥ || 11 ||
sārabhūtāśca śāstrāṇāṃ vedāścatvāra eva ce kalāmātraṃ yadguṇānāṃ na vidaṃti budhāśca ye || 12||
sarasvatī jaḍībhūtā nālaṃ tadguṇavarṇane |
sanatkumāro dharmaśca sanaṃdanaḥ sanātanaḥ ||13||
sanaka: kapilaḥ sūryo ye'nye ca brahmaṇaḥ sutāḥ |
vicakṣaṇā na yadvaktuṃ kiṃ cānye jaḍabuddhayaḥ || 14||
na yadvaktuṃ kṣamāḥ siddhā munīṃdrā yoginastathā |
ke vā cānye vayaṃ ke vā śrīdevyā guṇavarṇane || 15 ||
dhyāyaṃte yatpadāṃbhojaṃ brahmaviṣṇuśivādayaḥ |
atisādhyaṃ svabhaktānāṃ tadanyeṣāṃ sudurlabham || 16 ||
kaścitkicidvijānāti tadguṇotkīrtanaṃ śubham |
atiriktaṃ vijānāti brahmā brahmaviśāradaḥ || 17 ||
tato'tiriktaṃ jānāti gaṇeśo jñānināṃ guruḥ |
sarvātiriktaṃ jānāti sarvajñaḥ śaṃbhureva saḥ || 18 ||
tasmai dattaṃ purā jñānaṃ kṛṣṇena paramātmanā |
atīva nirjane'raṇye golo ke rāsamaṃḍale ||19||
tatraiva kathitaṃ kiṃcittadguṇotkīrtanaṃ śubham |
dharmaṃ ca kathayāmāsa śivaloke śitraḥ svayam ||20||
dharmastu kathayāmāsa bhāsvate pṛcchate tathā |
yāmārādhya matpitā'pi saṃprāpa tapasā sati || 21 ||

pūrvaṃ tvaṃ viṣayaṃ cāhaṃ na gṛhṇāmi prayatnataḥ |
vairāgyayuktastapase gaṃtumicchati suvrate ||22||
tadā māṃ kathayāmāsa pitā tadguṇakīrtanam |
yathāgamaṃ tadvadāmi nibodhātīva durgamam ||23||
tadguṇaṃ sā na jānāti tadanyasya ca kā kathā |
yathākāśo na jānāti svāṃtameva varānane ||24||
sarvātmā sarva bhagavānsarvakāraṇakāraṇaḥ |
sarveśvaraśca sarvādyaḥ sarvavitparipālakaḥ || 25 ||
nityarūpī nityadehī nityānando nirākṛtiḥ |
niraṃkuśo nirāśaṃko nirguṇaśca nirāmayaḥ ||26||
nirlipta: sarvasākṣī ca sarvādhāraḥ parātparaḥ |
māyāviśiṣṭaḥ prakṛtistadvikārāśca prākṛtāḥ || 27||
svayaṃ pumāṃśca prakṛtistāvabhinnau parasparam |
yathā vahnestasya śaktirna bhinnā'styeva kutracit ||
seyaṃ śaktirmahāmāyā saccidānandarūpiṇī |
rūpaṃ vibhartyarūpā ca bhaktānugrahahetave || 29 ||
gopālasundarī rūpaṃ prathamaṃ sā sasarja ha| atīva kamanīyaṃ ca sundaraṃ sumanoharam || 30||
navīnanīradaśyāmaṃ kiśoraṃ gopaveṣakam |
kaṃdarpakoṭilāvaṇyaṃ līlādhāma manoharam ||31||
śaranmadhyāhnapadmānāṃ śobhāmocanalocanam |
śaratpārvaṇa koṭīṃduśobhā pracchādanānanam ||32||
amūlya ratna nirmāṇa nānābhūṣaṇabhūṣitam |
sasmitaṃ śobhitaṃ śaśvadamūlyapītavāsasā || 33||
parabrahmasvarūpaṃ ca jvalaṃtaṃ brahmatejasā |
sukhadṛśyaṃ ca śāṃtaṃ ca rādhākāṃtamanaṃtakam ||34||
gopībhirvīkṣyamāṇaṃ ca sasmitābhiśva saṃtatam |
rāsamaṃḍalamadhyasthaṃ ratnasiṃhāsana sthitam ||35||
vaṃśīṃ kvataṃ dvibhujaṃ vanamālāvibhūṣitam |
kaustubheṃdramaṇīṃdreṇa śaśvadvakṣaḥsthalojjvalam ||36||
kuṃkumā gurukastūrī candana carcitavigraham |
cārucaṃpakamālāktaṃ mālatīmālya maṃḍitam ||37||
cārucaṃdrakaśobhāḍhyaṃ cūḍāvaṃ krimarājitam |
evaṃbhūtaṃ ca dhyāyaṃti bhaktā bhaktipariplutāḥ ||38||
yadbhayājjagatāṃ dhātā vidhatte sṛṣṭimeva ca |
karmānusārāllikhitaṃ karoti sarvakarmaṇām ||39||
tapasāṃ phaladātā ca karmaṇāṃ ca yadājñayā viṣṇuḥ pātā ca sarveṣāṃ yadbhayātpāti saṃtatam ||40||
kālāgnirudraḥ saṃhartā sardaviśveṣu yadbhayāt |
śivo mṛtyuṃjayaścaiva jñānināṃ ca gurorguruḥ ||41||
yajjñānājjñānavānasti yogīśo jñānavitprabhuḥ |
paramānandayuktaśca bhaktivairāgyasaṃyutaḥ ||42||
yadbhayādvāti pavanaḥ pravaraḥ śīghragāminām |
tapanaśca pratapati yadbhayātsaṃtataṃ sati || 43||
yadājñayā varpatīṃdro mutyuśvarati jantuṣu |
yadājñayā dahedvahnirjalamevaṃ suśītalam ||44 ||
diśo rakṣati dikpālā mahābhītā yadājñayā |
bhramaṃti rāśicakrāṇi grahāśca yadbhayena ca ||45||
bhayātphalaṃti vṛkṣāśca pupyaṃtyapi ca yadbhayāt |
yadājñāṃ tu puraskṛtya kālaḥ kāle haredbhayāt ||46||
tayā jalasthalasthāśca na jīvaṃti yadājñayā |
akālenāharedviddhaṃ raṇeṣu viṣameṣu ca || 47 ||
dhatte vāyustoyarāśi toyaṃ kūmaṃ tadājñayā |
kūrmo'naṃtaṃ ca kṣoṇīṃ ca samudrānsā ca parvatān ||
sarvā caiva kṣamārūpā nānāratnaṃ birbhāta yā |
yataḥ sarvāṇi bhūtāni sthīyaṃte haṃti tatra hi 49 ||

indrāyuścaiva divyānāṃ yugānāmekasaptatiḥ |
aṣṭāviṃśe śakrarāte brahmagaśca divāniśam ||50 ||
evaṃ triśaddinairmāsodvābhyāmābhyāmṛtuḥ smṛtaḥ |
ṛtubhiḥ ṣaḍbhirevābdaṃ brahmaṇo hai vayaḥ smṛtam ||
brahmaṇaśca nipāte ca cakṣurunmīlanaṃ hareḥ |
cakṣurunmīlane tasya layaṃ prākṛtikaṃ viduḥ ||52|| 4
pralaye prākṛte sarve devādyāśva carācarāḥ |
līnā dhātā vidhātā ca śrīkṛṣṇanābhipaṃkaje 53 ||
viṣṇuḥ kṣīrodaśāyī ca vaikuṃṭhe yaścaturbhujaḥ |
vilīnā vāmapārśve ca kṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ || 54 ||
yasya jñāne śivo līno jñānātrīśaḥ sanātanaḥ |
durgāyāṃ viṣṇumāyāyāṃ vilīnāḥ sarvaśaktaya: 55 ||
sā ca kṛṣṇasya buddho ca buddhyadhiṣṭhātṛdevatā |
nārāyaṇāṃśa: skaṃndaśca lono vakṣasi tasya ca 56 ||
śrīkṛṣṇāṃśaśca tadvāhau devādhīśo gaṇeśvaraḥ |
padmāṃśācaiva padmāyāṃ sā rādhāyāṃ ca sutrate ||57||
gopyaśvāpi ca tasyāṃ ca sarvāśca devayoṣitaḥ |
kṛṣṇaprāṇādhidevī sā tasya prāṇeṣu saṃsthitā 58 ||
sāvitrī ca sarasvatyāṃ vedāḥ śāstrāṇi yāni ca |
sthitā vāṇī ca jihvāyāṃ yasya ca paramātmanaḥ||
golokasya ca gopāśca vilonāstasya lomasu |
tattrāṇeṣu ca sarveṣāṃ prāṇā vātā hutāśanāḥ 60 ||
jaṭharāgnī vilītāśca jalaṃ tadrasanāgrataḥ |
vaiṣṇavāśva raṇāṃbhoje paramānandasaṃyutāḥ || 61||
sārātsāratarābhaktirasapīyūpapāyinaḥ |
virāḍaṃśāśva mahati līnāḥ kṛṣṇe mahāvirāṭ 62 ||
yasyaiva lomakūpeṣu viśvāni nikhilāni ca |
yasya cakṣuṣa unmeṣe prākṛtaḥ pralayo bhavet ||63||
cakṣurunmīlane sṛṣṭiryasyaiva punareva sa: |
yāvatkālo nimiṣeṇa tāvadunmīlanena ca || 64||
brahmaṇaśca śatābde ca sṛṣṭeḥ sūtralayaḥ punaḥ |
brahmasṛṣṭilayānāṃ ca saṃkhyā nāstyeva sute ||65 ||
yathā bhūrajasāṃ caṃtra saṃkhyānaṃ naiva vidyate |
cakṣurnimeṣe pralayo yasya sarvāntarātmanaḥ ||66 ||
unmīlane punaḥ sṛṣṭirbhavedeveśvarecchayā |
sa kṛṣṇaḥ pralaye tasyāṃ prakṛtau lona eva hi 67 ||
ekaiva ca parā śaktirnirguṇaḥ paramaḥ pumān |
sa evedamagra āsīditi vedavido viduḥ ||68 ||
mūlaprativyaktā'pyavyākṛtapadābhidhā |
cidabhinnatvamāpannā pralaye seva tiṣṭhati || 69 ||
tadguṇotkīrtanaṃ vaktuṃ brahmāṇḍeṣu ca kaḥ kṣamaḥ |
muktayaśca caturvedainiruktāśca caturvidhāḥ || 70 ||
tatpradhānādeva bhaktirmukterapi garīyasī |
sālokyadā bhavedeṣā tathā sārūpyadā parā || 71 ||
sāmīpyadājya nirvāṇapradā muktiścatuvidhā |
bhaktāstāṃ na hi vāṃchaṃti vinā tatsevanaṃ vibhoḥ ||
śivatvamamaratvaṃ ca brahmatvaṃ cāvahelayā |
janmamṛtyujarāvyātribhayaśokādikaṃ dhanam ||73||
divyarūpavāraṇaṃ ca nirvāṇaṃ mokṣaṇaṃ viduḥ |
muktiśca sevārahitā bhaktiḥ seāvivardhinī || 74 ||
bhaktimuktyorayaṃ bhedo niṣekakhaṃḍanaṃ śṛṇu |
vidurbudhā niṣekaṃ ca bhogaṃ ca kṛtakarmaṇām ||75||
tatkhaṇḍanaṃ ca śubhadaṃ śrovibhoḥ sevanaṃ param |
tattvajñānamidaṃ sādhvi sthiraṃ ca lokavedayoḥ || 76 ||
nirvighnaṃ śubhadaṃ coktaṃ gaccha vatse yathāsukham |
ityuktvā sūryaputraśca jīvayitvā ca tatpatim 77 ||

tasya śubhāśipaṃ dattvā gamanaṃ kartumudyataḥ |
dṛṣṭvā yamaṃ ca gacchaṃtaṃ sā sāvitrī praṇamya ca 78||
ruroda caraṇa dhṛtvā sādhucchedena duḥkhitā |
sāvitrīrodanaṃ śrutvā yamaścaiva kṛpānidhiḥ || 79 ||
tāmityuvāca saṃtuṣṭaḥ svayaṃ caiva ruroda ha |
dharmarāja uvāca
lakṣavarṣaṃ sukhaṃ bhuktvā puṇyakṣetre ca bhārate || 80 ||
ante yāsyasi tallokaṃ yatra devī virājate |
gatvā ca svagṛhaṃ bhadre sāvitryāśca vrataṃ kuru || 81 ||
dvisaptavarṣaparyantaṃ nārīṇāṃ mokṣakāraṇam |
jyedṛśuvalacaturdaśyāṃ sāvitryāśca vrataṃ śubham 82 ||
śuklāpṭamyāṃ bhādrapade mahālakṣmyā yathā vratam |
dvaghaṣṭavarṣaṃ vrataṃ caiva pratyādeyaṃ śucismite || 83 ||
karoti bhaktyā yā nārī sā yāti ca vibhoḥ padam |
pratimaṅgalavāre ca devīṃ maṅgaladāyinīm 84||
pratimāsaṃ śuvalapāyāṃ ṣaṣṭoṃ maṅgaladāyinīm |
tathā cāṣāḍhasaṃkrāṃtyāṃ manasāṃ sarvasiddhidām ||85||
rādhārāse ca kāttikyāṃ kṛṣṇaprāṇādhikapriyām |
upopya śuklāṣṭamyāṃ ca pratimāsaṃ varapradām || 86 ||
viṣṇumāyāṃ bhagavatīṃ durgā durgatināśinīm |
prakṛti jagadaṃbāṃ ca pratimāsaṃ varapradām || 87 ||
pativratāsu śuddhāsu yantreṣu pratimāsu ca |
yā nārī pūjayedbhaktyā dhanasaṃtānahetave || 88 ||
iha loke sukhaṃ bhuktvā yātyaṃte śrīvibhoḥ padam |
evaṃ devyā vibhūtīśca pūjayetsādhako'niśam || 89 ||
sarvakālaṃ sarvarūpā saṃsevyā parameśvarī |
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiṃcitkṛtakṛtyatvadāyakam || 90 ||
ityuktvā tāṃ dharmarājo jagāma nijamaṃdiram |
gṛhītvā svāminaṃ sā ca sāvitrī ca nijālayam ||
sāvitrī satyavāṃcaiva prayayau ca yathāgatam |
anyāṃśca kathayāmāsa svavṛttāṃtaṃ hi nārada ||92||
sāvitrījanakaḥ putrānsaṃprāptaḥ prakrameṇa ca |
śvaśuraścakṣuṣī rājyaṃ sā ca putrānvareṇa ca ||93||
lakṣavarṣaṃ sukhaṃ bhuktvā puṇyakṣetre ca bhārate |
jagāma svāminā sārdhaṃ devīlokaṃ pativratā || 94||
savituvādhidevī yā maṃtrādhiṣṭhātṛdevatā |
sāvitrī hyapi vedānāṃ sāvitrī tena kīrtitā 95 ||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ vatsa sāvitryākhyānamuttamam |
jīvakarmavipākaṃ ca kiṃ punaḥ śrotumicchasi 96 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate navamaskaṃdhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde sāvitryupākhyāne'ṣṭatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 38 ||
athaikonacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
śrīmūlapravṛterdevyā gāyatryāstu nirākṛteḥ |
sāvitrīya masaṃvāde śrutaṃ vai nirmalaṃ yaśaḥ || 1 ||
tadguṇotkīrtanaṃ satyaṃ maṃgalānāṃ ca maṃgalam |
adhunā śrotumicchāmi lakṣmyupākhyānamīśvara || 2 ||
kenādo pūjitā sā'pi kiṃbhūtā kena vā purā |
tadguṇotkīrtanaṃ mahyaṃ vada vedavidāṃ vara || 3||

śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
sṛṣṭerādī purā brahmakṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ |
devī vāmāṃsa saṃbhūtā babhūva rāsamaṃḍale ||4||
atīva sundarī śyāmā nyagrodhaparimaṇḍitā |
yathā dvādaśavarṣīyā śaśvatsusthirayovanā ||5||
śveta caṃpakavarṇābhā sukhadṛśyā manoharā | śaratpārvaṇakoṭoṃ duprabhātracchādanānanā 11911
śaranmadhyāhnapadmānāṃ śobhāmocanalocanā |
sā devī dvividhā bhūtā saha sarveśvarecchayā ||7||
svoyarūpeṇa varṇena tejasā vayasā tviṣā |
yaśasā vāsasā kṛtvā bhūpaṇena guṇena ca || 8 ||
smitena vīkṣaṇenaiva premṇā vā'nunayena ca |
tāmāṃsānmahālakṣmīrdakṣiṇāṃsācca rādhikā || 9 ||
rātrā''dī varayāmāsa dvibhujaṃ ca parātparam |
mahālakṣmīśca tatpaścāccakame kamanīyakam ||10||
kṛṣṇastadgauraveṇaiva dvidhārūpo vabhūva ha |
dakṣiṇāṃśca dvibhujī vāmāṃsaśva caturbhujaḥ ||11||
caturbhujāya dvibhujo mahālakṣmī dadau purā |
lakṣyate dṛśyate viśvaṃ snigdhadṛṣṭyā yathā'niśam ||
devībhūtā ca mahatī mahālakṣmīśca sā smṛtā |
rādhākāṃtaśca dvibhujo lakṣmīkāṃtaścaturbhujaḥ || 13||
śuddhasattvasvarūpā gopairgopībhirāvṛtā |
caturbhujaśca vaikuṇṭhaṃ prayayau padmayā saha || 14 || ca
sarvāṃśena sama to dvokṛṣṇanārāyaṇī varau |
mahālakṣmīśca yogena nānārūpā babhūva sā || 15 ||
vaikuṇṭhe ca mahālakṣmīḥ paripūrṇatamā ramā |
śuddhasattvasvarūpā ca sarvasaubhāgyasaṃyutā || 16 ||
premṇā sā ca pradhānā ca sarvāsu ramaṇīṣu ca |
svargeṣu svargalakṣmīśca śakrasaṃpatsvarūpiṇī || 17||
pātāle nāgalakṣmīśca rājalakṣmīśca rājasu |
gṛhalakṣmī gṛheṣveva gṛhiṇāṃ ca ' kalāṃśataḥ || 18 ||
saṃpatsvarūpā gṛhiṇāṃ sarvamaṃgalamaṃgalā |
gavāṃ prasūtiḥ surabhirdakṣiṇā yajñakāminī || 19 ||
kṣīrodrāsadhukanyā sā śrīrūpā padminīṣu ca |
śobhāsvarūpā candre ca sūryamaṃḍalamaṃḍitā || 20 ||
vibhūṣaṇapu ratneṣu phaleṣu ca jaleṣu ca |
nṛpeṣu nṛpapatnīṣu dibhyastrīṣu gṛheṣu ca || 21 ||
sarvasasyapu vastreṣu sthāneṣu saṃskṛteṣu ca |
pratimāsu ca devānāṃ maṃgaleṣu dhaṭeṣu ca ||22||
māṇikyeṣu ca muktāsu mālyeṣu ca manoharā |
maṇīndreṣu ca hariṣu kṣīreṣu candaneṣu ca || 23||
vṛnaśākhāsu ramyāsu navamedhepu vastuṣu |
vaikuṇṭhaṃ pūjitā sāudī devī nārāyaṇena ca || 24 || |
dvitīye brahmaṇā bhaktayā tṛtīye śaṃkareṇa ca |
viṣṇunā pūjitā sā ca kṣīrode bhārate mune ||25||
svāyaṃbhuvena manunā mānavendraśca sarvataḥ |
ṛṣondraśca munīndraiśca sadbhiśva gṛhibhirbhave ||26||
gandharvaiścaiva nāgādyaiḥ pātāleṣu ca pūjitā |
śuklāṣṭamyāṃ bhādrapade kṛtā pūjā ca brahmagā ||27||
bhaktyā ca pakṣaparyantaṃ tripu la nārada |
caitre paudhe ca bhādre ca puṇye maṃgalavāsare || 28 ||
viṣṇunā pūjitā sā ca triṣu lākaṣu bhaktitaḥ |
varṣānta pauṣa saṃkrāṃtyāṃ mādhyāmāvāhya maṃgale ||29||
manustā pūjayāmāsa sā bhūtā sā bhūtā bhuvanatraye |
pūjitā sā mahendrega maṃgalenaitra maṃgalā || 30 ||

śrīmaddevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 40
kedāreṇaiva nīlena subalena nalena ca |
dhruveṇottānapādena śakreṇa balinā tathā || 31 ||
kaśyapena ca dakṣeṇa kardamena vivasvatā |
priyavratena candreṇa kuvereṇaiva vāyunā ||32||
yamena vahninā caiva varuṇainaiva pūjitā |
evaṃ sarvatra sarveṣu pūjitā vanditā sadā ||
sarvaiśvaryādhidevī sā sarvasaṃpatsvarūpiṇī || 33 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ekonacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 39 ||
atha catvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
nārāyaṇapriyā sā ca varā vaikuṇṭhavāsinī |
vaikuṇṭā dhiṣṭātṛdevī mahālakṣmī sanātanī || 1 ||
kathaṃ babhūva sā devī pṛthivyāṃ sindhukanyakā |
purā kena stutā''dausā tanme vyākhyātumarhasi ||2||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
purā durvāsasaḥ śāpādudbhraṣṭaśrīśca puraṃdaraḥ |
babhūva devasaṃghaśca martyaloke ca nārada ||3||
lakṣmīḥ svargādikaṃ tyaktvā ruṣṭā paramaduḥkhitā |
gatvāṃ līnā ca vaikuṇṭhe mahālakṣmī nārada || 4 ||
tadā śokādyayuḥ sarve duḥkhitā brahmaṇaḥ sabhām |
brahmāṇaṃ ca puraskṛtya yayurvaikuṇṭhameva ca ||5||
vaikuṇṭhe śaraṇāpannā devā nārāyaṇe pare |
atīva dainyayuktāśca śuṣkakaṇṭhoṣṭhatālukā: || 6||
tadā lakṣmīśca kalayā purāṇapuruṣājñayā |
babhūva sindhukanyā sā sarvasaṃpatsvarūpiṇī ||7||
tathā mathitvā kṣīrodaṃ devā detyagaṇaiḥ saha |
saṃprāptāśca mahālakṣmī viṣṇustāṃ ca dadarśa ha ||8||
surādibhyo varaṃ dattvā vanamālāṃ ca viṣṇave |
dadau prasannavadanā tuṣṭā kṣīrodaśāyine || |
devāśvāpyasuragrastaṃ rājyaṃ prāpuśva nārada |
tāṃ saṃpūjya ca saṃbhūya sarvatra ca nirāpadaḥ || 10 ||
nārada uvāca
kathaṃ śaśāpa durvāsā muniśreṣṭhaḥ kadācana |
kena dopeṇa vā brahman brahmastattvavitpurā ||11||
mamaṃthuḥ kena rūpeṇa jaladhi te surādayaḥ |
kena stotreṇa vā devī sākṣādabhūva sā ||12||
ko vā tayośca saṃprāpto babhūva tadrada prabho |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
madhupānapramattaśca trailokpādhipatiḥ purā || 13||
krīḍāṃ cakāra rahasi raṃbhayā saha kāmukaḥ |
kṛtvā krīḍāṃ tayā sārdhaṃ kāmukyā hṛtamānasaḥ || 14 ||
tasthau tatra mahāraṇye kāmonmathitamānasaḥ |
kailāsaśikhare yāṃtaṃ vaikuṇṭhādṛṣisattamam ||15||
durvāsasaṃ dadarśendro jvalaṃtaṃ brahmatejasā |
grīṣmamadhyāhnamārtaṇḍasahasraprabhamīśvaram ||16||

prateptakāṃcanākāraṃ jaṭābhāramahojjvalam |
śuklayajñopavītaṃ ca coradaṇḍo kamaṇḍalum || 17 ||
mahojjvalaṃ ca tilakaṃ bibhrataṃ cendusannibham |
samanvitaṃ śiṣya lakṣairvedavedāṅgapāragaiḥ ||18||
dṛṣṭā nanāma śirasā saṃpramattaḥ puraṃdaraḥ |
śiṣyavargaṃ tadā bhaktyā tuṣṭāva ca mudānvitam |
muninā ca saśiṣyeṇa dattāstasmai śubhāśiṣaḥ |
viṣṇudattaṃ pārijātapuṣpaṃ sa sumanoharam ||20||
tajjarārogamṛtyughnaṃ śokaghnaṃ mokṣakārakam |
śakraḥ puṣpaṃ gṛhītvā ca pramatto rājyasaṃpadā ||21||
puṣpaṃ sa nyastayāmāsa tadaiva karimastake |
hastī tatsparśamātreṇa rūpeṇa ca guṇena ca || 22 ||
tejasā vayasā'kasmādviṣṇutulyo babhūva ha |
tyaktvā śakraṃ gajendraśca jagāma ghorakānanam ||23||
na śaśāka mahendrastaṃ rakṣituṃ tejasā mune |
tatpuṣpaṃ tyaktavaṃtaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā śakraṃ munīśvaraḥ || 24||
tamuvāca mahāruṣṭaḥ śaśāpa ca ruṣānvitaḥ |
muniruvāca
are śriyā pramattastvaṃ kathaṃ māmavamanyase ||25||
maddattapuṣpaṃ dattaṃ ca garveṇa karimastake |
viṣṇoniveditaṃ caiva naivedyaṃ vā phalaṃ jalam ||26||
prāptimātreṇa bhoktavyaṃ tyāgena brahmā bhavet |
bhraṣṭaśrīṣṭabuddhiśva purabhraṣṭā bhavettu saḥ || 27||
yastyajedviṣṇunaivedyaṃ bhāgyenopasthitaṃ śubham |
prāptimātreṇa yo bhuṃkte bhakto viṣṇu niveditam ||28||
puṃsāṃ śataṃ samuddhṛtya jīvanmuktaḥ svayaṃ bhavet |
naivedyaṃ bhojanaṃ kṛtvā nityaṃ yaḥ praṇameddharim ||29||
pūjayetstīti vā bhaktyā sa viṣṇusadṛśo bhavet |
tatsparśatrāyunā sadyastīrthaṃ viśudhyati ||30||
pūtā vasundharā |
puṃścalyannamavīrānaṃ śūdraśrāddhānnameva ca || 31 ||
tatpādarajasā mūḍha sadyaḥ
yaddharera nivedyaṃ ca vṛyā māṃsasya bhakṣaṇam |
śivaliṃgapradānaṃ ca yaddattaṃ śudrayājinā || 32 ||
cikitsakadvijānaṃ ca devalānnaṃ tathaiva ca |
kanyādikrayiṇāmannaṃ yadannaṃ yonijīvinām ||33|
ucchiṣṭhānnaṃ paryuṣitaṃ sarvabhakṣāvaśepitam |
agamyāgāmināṃ caiva dvijānāmannameva ca ||34||
adīkṣitadvijānāṃ ca yadannaṃ śavadāhinām |
agamyāgāmināṃ caiva dvijānāmannameva ca ||35||
mitrahāṃ kṛtaghnānāmannaṃ viśvāsaghātinām |
mithyā sākṣyapradānnaṃ ca brāhmaṇānnaṃ tathaiva ca || 36 ||
ete sarve viśudhyanti viṣṇornevedya bhakṣaṇāt |
śvapacaścedviṣṇusevī vaṃśāṃnāṃ koṭimuddharet ||37||
harerabhakto manujaḥ svaṃ ca rakṣitumakṣamaḥ |
ajñānādyadi gṛhṇāti viṣṇornaivedyameva ca ||38||
saptajanmārjitātpāpānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
jñātvā bhaktyā ca gṛhṇāti viṣṇonaॅ vedyameva ca || 39||
koṭijanmārjitātpāpānmucyate niścitaṃ hare |
yasmātsaṃsthāpitaṃ puṣpaṃ garveṇa karimastake ||40 ||
tasmādyuṣmānparityajya yātu lakṣmīrhareḥ padam |
nārāyaṇasya bhakto'ha na vibhemi surādvidheḥ || 41 ||
kālānmṛtyorjarātaśca kānanyāngaṇayāmi ca |
kiṃ kariṣyati te tātaḥ kaśyapaśca prajāpatiḥ || 42 ||

nṛhaspatirguruścaiva niḥśaṃkasya ca me hare |
idaṃ puṣpaṃ yasya mūrdhni tasyaiva pūjanaṃ param ||43||
iti śrutvā mahendrava dhṛtvā sa caraṇaṃ mune |
ucca ruroda śokārtastamuvāca bhayākulaḥ || 44||
mahendra uvāca
dattaḥ samucitaḥ śāpo mahyaṃ māyāpaha prabho |
hṛtāṃ na yāce saṃpatti kicijjñānaṃ ca dehi me || 45||
aiśvaryaṃ vipadāṃ bījaṃ jñānapracchannakāraṇam |
muktimārgakuṭhārañca bhavateśva vyavadhāyakam ||46 ||
muniruvāca
janmamṛtyu jarāśoka rogabījāṃkuraṃ param |
saṃpattitimirāṃdhava muktimārga na paśyati || 47 ||
saṃpanmatto vimūdaśca surāmattaḥ sa eva ca |
bāṃdhavairveṣṭitaḥ so'pi baṃdhutvenaiva he hare ||48 ||
saṃpattimadamattaśva viṣayāṃdhaśva vihvala: |
mahākāmī rājasikaḥ sattvamārga na paśyati || 49 ||
dvividho viṣayāṃdhaca rājasastāmasaḥ smṛtaḥ |
aśāstrajñastāmasaśva śāstrajño rājasaḥ smṛtaḥ || 50 ||
śāstraṃ ca dvividhaṃ mārga darśayetsurapuṃgava |
pravṛttibījamekaṃ ca nivṛtteḥ kāraṇaṃ param || 51 ||
caranti jīvinaścādau pravṛtterduḥ khavartmani |
svachandaṃ ca prasannaṃ ca nirvirodhaṃ ca saṃtatam || 52 ||
āyāti madhuno lobhātkleśena sukhamānitaḥ |
pariṇāmenāṃśabīje janmamṛtyujarākare ||53||
anekajanmaparyantaṃ kṛtvā ca bhramaṇaṃ mudā |
svakarmavihitāyāṃ ca nānāyonyāṃ krameṇa ca ||54||
tataśveśānugrahācca satsaṃgaṃ labhate ca saḥ |
sahasreṣu śateṣveko bhavāndheḥ pārakāraṇam ||55||
sādhustattva pradīpena muktimārga pradarśayet |
tadā karoti yatnaṃ ca jīvo baṃdhanakhaṃḍane || 56 ||
anekajanmayogena tapasā'naśanena ca |
tadā labhenmuktimārga nirvighnaṃ sukhadaṃ param ||57||
idaṃ śrutaṃ gurorvaktrādyatpṛcchasi purandara |
munestadvacanaṃ śrutvā vītarāgo babhūva saḥ || 58 ||
vairāgyaṃ vardhayāmāsa tasya brahmandine dine |
muneḥ sthānādgṛhaṃ gatvā sa dadarśāmagavatīm 59 ||
daityairasurasaṃdhaiśca samākīrṇāṃ bhayākulām |
viṣamopaplavāṃ putrabandhuhīnāṃ ca kutracit ||60 ||
pitṛmātṛkalatrādivihīnāmaticaṃcalām |
śatrugrastāṃ ca tāṃ dṛṣṭvā jagāma vākpati prati || 61||
śakro mandākinītīre dadarśa gurumīśvaram |
dhyāyamānaṃ paraṃ brahma gaṃgātoye sthitaṃ param ||62 ||
sūryābhisaṃmukhaṃ pūrvamukhaṃ ca viśvatomukham |
sāśrunetraṃ pulakitaṃ paramānandasaṃyutam || 63 ||
variṣṭhaṃ ca gariṣṭhaṃ ca dharmiṣṭaṃ śreṣṭhasevitam |
preṣṭhaṃ ca vandhuvargāṇāmatiśreṣṭhaṃ ca jñāninām || 64 ||
jyeṣṭhaṃ ca bhrātṛvargāṇāmaniṣṭaṃ suravairiṇām |
dṛṣṭvā guruṃ japantaṃ ca tatra tasthau sureśvaraḥ || 65||
praharāṃte guruṃ dṛṣṭvā cotthita praṇanāma saḥ |
praṇamya caraṇāṃbhoje rurodoccairmuhurmuhuḥ || 66 ||
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsa brahmaśāpādikaṃ tathā |
punarvaropalabdhi ca jñānaprāptiṃ sudurlabhām || 67|
vairigrastāṃ ca svapurīṃ krameṇaiva sureśvaraḥ |
śiṣyasya vacanaṃ śrutvā subuddhirvadatāṃ varaḥ || 68 ||

bṛhaspatiruvācedaṃ kopasaṃraktalocanaḥ |
gururuvāca
śrutaṃ sarvaṃ suraśreṣṭha mārodīrvacanaṃ śṛṇu || 69 ||
na kātaro hi nītijño vipattau ca kadācana |
saṃpattirvā vipattirvā naśvarā śramarūpiṇī || 70 ||
tayorapi |
sarveṣāṃ ca bhavatyeva śaśvajjanmani janmani || 71 ||
pūrvasya karmāyattā ca svayaṃ karttā paridevanā |
uktaṃ hi svakṛtaṃ karma bhujyate'khilabhārate ||72||
cakranemikrameṇaiva śubhāśubhaṃ ca yatkicitsvakarmaphalabhukpumān |
nābhuktaṃ kṣīyate karma kalpakoṭiśatairapi ||73|| tatra kā
avaśyameva bhoktavyaṃ kṛtaṃ karma śubhāśubham |
ityevamuktaṃ vede ca kṛṣṇena paramātmanā ||74 ||
sāmavedoktaśākhāyāṃ saṃbodhya kamalodbhavam |
janmabhogāvaśepe ca sarveṣāṃ kṛtakarmaṇām ||75||
anurūpaṃ hi teṣāṃ ca bhārate'nyatra caiva hi |
karmaṇā brahmaśāpaṃ ca karmaṇā ca śubhāśiṣam || 76||
karmaṇā ca mahālakṣmīṃ labheddenyaṃ ca karmaṇā |
koṭijanmārjitaṃ karma jīvināmanugacchati ||77 ||
na hi tyajedvinā bhogaṃ tacchāyeva puraṃdara |
kālabhede deśabhede pātrabhede ca karmaṇām || 78 ||
nyūnatādhikabhāvo'pi bhavedeva hi karmaṇā |
vastudānena vastūnāṃ samaṃ puṇyaṃ dine dine || 79 ||
dinabhede koṭiguṇamasaṃkhyaṃ vā tato'dhikam |
same deśe ca vastūnāṃ dāne puṇyaṃ samaṃ sura ||80||
deśabhede koṭiguṇakasaṃkhyaṃ vā tato'dhikam |
same pātre samaṃ puṇyaṃ vastūnāṃ kartureva ca || 81 ||
pātrabhede śataguṇamasaṃkhyaṃ vāṃ tato'dhikam |
yathā phalaṃti sasyāni nyūnānyapyadhikāni ca || 82 ||
karṣakāṇāṃ kṣetrabhede pātrabhede phalaṃ tathā |
sāmānyadivase vipra dānaṃ samaphalaṃ bhavet || 83||
amāyāṃ ravisaṃkrāṃtyāṃ phalaṃ śataguṇaṃ bhavet |
cāturmāsyāṃ paurṇamāsyāmanaṃtaṃ phalameva ca || 84 ||
grahaṇe śaśinaḥ koṭiguṇaṃ ca phalamucyate |
sūryasya grahaṇe vā'pi tato daśaguṇaṃ bhavet ||85 ||
akṣayāyāmakṣayaṃ yadasaṃkhyaṃ phannamucyate |
evamanyatra puṇyāhe phalādhikyaṃ bhavediti || 86 ||
snāne jape'nya puṇyakarmasu |
evaṃ sarvatra boddhavyaṃ narāṇāṃ karmaṇāṃ phalam ||87 ||
yathā dāne tathā yathā daṇḍena cakreṇa śarāveṇa bhrameṇa ca |
kumbhaṃ nirmāti nirmātā kumbhakāro mṛdā bhuvi ||
tathaiva karmasūtreṇa phalaṃ dhātā dadāti ca |
yasyājñayā sṛṣṭamidaṃ taṃ ca nārāyaṇaṃ bhaja || 89 ||
sa vidhātā vidhātuśca pātuḥ pātā jagattraye |
sraṣṭuḥ sraṣṭā ca saṃhartuḥ saṃhartā kālakālakaḥ ||10||
mahāvipatto saṃsāre yaḥ smarenmadhusūdanam |
vipattau tasya saṃpattirbhavedityāha śaṃkaraḥ ||91||
ityevamuktvā tattvajñaḥ samāligya sureśvaram |
dattvā śubhāśiṣaṃ ceṣṭaṃ bodhayāmāsa nārada ||12||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe catvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 40 ||

athaikacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
hari dhyātvā harirbrahmañjagāma brahmaṇaḥ sabhām |
bṛhaspati puraskṛtya sarvaiḥ suragaṇaiḥ saha ||1||
śīghraṃ gatvā brahmalokaṃ dṛṣṭvā ca kamalodbhavam |
praṇemurdevatāḥ sarve saheṃdrā guruṇā saha ||2||
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsa surācāryo vidhi prati |
prahasyovāca tacchrutvā mahendraṃ kamalāsanaḥ ||3||
brahmovāca
vatsa madvaṃśajāto'si prapotro me vicakṣaṇaḥ |
bṛhaspateśca śiṣyastvaṃ surāṇāmadhipaḥ svayam ||4||
mātāmahaśca dakṣaste viṣṇubhaktaḥ pratāpavān |
kulatrayaṃ yasya śuddhaṃ kathaṃ so'haṃkṛto bhavet ||5||
mātā pativratā yasya pitā śuddhī jitendriyaḥ |
mātāmaho mātulaśca kathaṃ so'haṃkṛto bhavet || 3 ||
janaḥ paitṛkadopeṇa doṣānmātāmahasya ca |
gurudoṣāttribhirdoṣairharidoṣī bhaveddhruvam ||7||
sarvāntarātmā bhagavān sarvadeheṣvavasthitaḥ |
yasya dehātsa prayāti sa śavastakṣaṇo bhavet ||8||
mano'hamidriyeśaṃ ca jñānarūpo hi śaṃkaraḥ |
viṣṇuprāṇā ca prakṛtirbuddhirbhagavatī satī ||9||
nidrādayaḥ śaktayaśca tāḥ sarvāḥ prakṛteḥ kalāḥ |
ātmanaḥ pratibimbaśva jīvo bhogaśarīrabhṛt 10 ||
ātmanīśe gate dehātsarve yāṃti sasaṃbhramāḥ |
yathā vartmani gacchantaṃ naradevamivānugāḥ || 11||
ahaṃ śivaśca śepaśca viṣṇurdharmo mahāvirāṭ |
yūyaṃ yadaṃśā bhaktāśca tatpuṣpaṃ nyakkṛtaṃ tvayā 12||
śivena pūjitaṃ pādapadmaṃ puṣpeṇa yena ca |
tatra durvāsasā dattaṃ daivena nyakkṛtaṃ tvayā || 13 |
tatpuṣpaṃ mastakaṃ yasya kṛṣṇapādābjapracyutam |
sarveṣāṃ ca surāṇāṃ ca tatpūjā purato bhavet ||14|
daivena vaṃcitastvaṃ hi daivaṃ ca balavattaram |
bhāgyahīnaṃ janaṃ mūḍhaṃ ko vā rakṣitumīśvaraḥ || 15 |
sā śrīrgatādhunā kopātkṛṣṇa nirmālyavarjanāt |
adhunā gaccha vaikuṇṭhaṃ mayā ca guruṇā saha || 16 ||
niṣevya tatra śrīnāthaṃ śriyaṃ prāpsyasi maharāt |
evamuktvā ca sa brahmā sarvaiḥ suragaṇaiḥ saha || 17 ||
tatra gatvā parabrahma bhagavaṃtaṃ sanātanam |
dṛṣṭvā tejaḥ svarūpaṃ taṃ prajvalaṃtaṃ svatejasā || 18 ||
grīṣmamadhyāhnamārtaḍaśatakoṭisamaprabham |
śāṃtaṃ cānādimadhyāṃtaṃ lakṣmīkāṃta manantakam ||19||
caturbhujaiḥ pādaiśca sarasvatyā yutaṃ prabhum |
bhaktyā catubhirvedaiśca gaṃgayā pariveṣṭitam ||20||
taṃ praṇemuḥ surāḥ sarve mūrdhnā brahmapurogamāḥ |
bhaktinamrāḥ sāśrunetrāstuṣṭuvuḥ parameśvaram ||21||
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsa svayaṃ brahmā kṛtāṃjaliḥ |
rurudurdevatāḥ sarvāḥ svādhikārāccyutāśca tāḥ 22||
sa dadarśa suragaṇaṃ vipadgrastaṃ bhayākulam |
ratnabhūṣaṇaśūnyaṃ ca vāhanādivivarjitam ||23||
śobhāśūnyaṃ hataśrīkaṃ niṣprabhaṃ sabhayaṃ param |
uvāca kātaraṃ dṛṣṭvā bhavabhītivibhaṃjanaḥ || 24 ||

śrībhagavānuvāca
mābhairbrahman he surāśca bhayaṃ ki vo mayi sthite |
dāsyāmi lakṣmīmacalāṃ paramaiśvaryavardhinīm ||25||
kiṃ ca madvacanaṃ kiṃcicchrayatāṃ samayocitam |
hitaṃ satyaṃ sārabhūtaṃ pariṇāmasukhāvaham ||26||
janāśvāsaṃkhyaviśvasthā madadhīnāśca saṃtatam |
yathā tathā'haṃ madbhaktaparādhīno'svataṃtrakaḥ ||27||
yaṃ yaṃ ruṣṭo hi madbhakto matparo hi niraṃkuśaḥ |
tadgṛhe'haṃ na tiṣṭhāmi padmayā saha niścitam 28||
durvāsā : śaṃkarāṃśaśca vaiṣṇavo matparāyaṇaḥ |
tacchāpādāgato'haṃ ca salakṣmīko hi vo gṛhāt ||
yatra śaṃkhadhvanirnāsti tulasī na śivārcanam |
na bhojanaṃ ca viprāṇāṃ na padmā tatra tiṣṭhati 30 ||
madbhaktānāṃ ca me niṃdā yatra brahman bhavetsurāḥ |
mahāruṣṭā mahālakṣmīstato yāti parābhavam || 31 ||
madbhaktihīno yo mūḍho bhuṃkte yo harivāsare |
mama janmadine vāpi yāti śrīstadgṛhādapi || 32 ||
mannāmavikrayī yaśca vikrīṇāti svakanyakām |
yatrātithirna bhuṃkte ca matpriyā yāti tadgṛhāt ||
yo vipraḥ puṃścalīputro mahāpāpī ca tatpatiḥ |
pāpino yo gṛhaṃ yāti śūdra śrāddhānnabhojakaḥ ||34||
mahāruṣṭā tato yāti maṃdirātkamalālayā |
śūdrāṇāṃ śavadāhī ca bhāgyahīno dvijādhamaḥ || 35||
yāti ruṣṭā tadgṛhācca devāḥ kamalavāsinī |
śūdrāṇāṃ sūpakārī yo brāhmaṇo vṛṣavāhakaḥ || 36 ||
tattoyapānabhītā ca kamalā yāti tadgṛhāt |
aśuddha hṛdayaḥ krūro hiṃsako niṃdako dvijaḥ ||37||
brāhmaṇaḥ śūdrayājī ca yāti devī ca tadgṛhāt |
avīrānaṃ ca yo bhuṃkte tasmādyāti jagatprasūḥ 38 ||
tṛṇaṃ chinatti nakharestairvā yo vilikhenmahīm |
nirāśobrāhmaṇo yatra tadgṛhādyāti matpriyā 39 ||
sūryodaye dvijo bhuṃkte divāsvāpo ca brāhmaṇaḥ |
divā maithunakārī ca yastasmādyāti matpriyā 40||
ācārahīno vipro yo yaśca śūdrapratigrahī |
adīkṣito hi yo mūḍhastasmādvai yāti matpriyā ||
snigdhapādaśca nagno hi yaḥ śete jñānadurbalaḥ |
śaśvadvadati vācālo yāti sā tadgṛhātsatī 42 ||
śiraḥ snātastu tailena yo'nyāṃgaṃ samupaspṛśet |
svāṃge ca vādayeṃdvādyaṃ ruṣṭā sā yāti tadgṛhāt 43 ||
vratopavāsahīno yaḥ saṃdhyā hono'śucidvijaḥ |
viṣṇubhaktivihīnastu tasmādyāti ca matpriyā 44 ||
brāhmaṇaṃ nidayedyo hi taṃ ca yo dveṣṭi saṃtatam |
jovahiṃsro dayāhīno yāti sarvaprasūtataḥ || 45 ||
yatra yatra harerarcā harerutkīrtanaṃ tathā |
tatra tiṣṭhati sā devī sarvamaṃgalamaṃgalā ||46 ||
yatra praśaṃsā kṛṣṇasya tadbhaktasya pitāmaha |
sā ca kṛṣṇapriyā devī tatra tiṣṭhati saṃtatam ||47
yatra śaṅkhadhvaniḥ śaṃkhaḥ śilā ca tulasīdalam |
tatsevāvaṃdanaṃ dhyānaṃ tatra sā paritiṣṭhati || 48 ||
śivaliṃgārcanaṃ yatra tasya cotkīrtanaṃ śubham |
durgārcanaṃ tadguṇāśca tatra padmanivāsinī || 49 ||
viprāṇāṃ sevanaṃ yatra teṣāṃ ca bhojanaṃ śubham |
arcanaṃ sarvadevānāṃ tatra padmamukhī satī || 50 ||
ityuktvā ca surānsarvānmāmāha sa ramāpatiḥ |
