kṣīrodasāgare janma kalayā kalayeti ca ||51||

ityuktvā tāṃ jagannātho brahmāṇaṃ punarāha ca |
mathitvā sāgaraṃ lakṣmīṃ devebhyo dehi padmaja ||52||
ityuktvā kamalakāṃto jagāmāṃtaḥpuraṃ mune |
devāśvireṇa kālena yayuḥ kṣīrodasāgaram ||53||
maṃthānaṃ maṃdaraṃ kṛtvā kūrmaṃ kṛtvā ca bhājanam |
kṛtvā śeṣaṃ maṃthapāśaṃ mamaṃthurasurāḥ surāḥ || 54||
dhanvaṃtari ca pīyūṣamuccaiḥśravasamīpsitam |
nānāratnaṃ hastiratnaṃ prāpurlakṣmoṃ sudarśanam ||55 ||
vanamālāṃ dadau sā ca kṣīrodaśāyine mune |
sarveśvarāya ramyāya viṣṇave vaiṣṇavo satī || 56 ||
devaiḥ stutā pūjitā ca brahmaṇā śaṃkareṇa ca |
dado dṛṣṭi suragṛhe brahmaśāpavimocanāt ||57||
prāpurdevā: svaviṣayaṃ daityagrastaṃ bhayaṃkaram |
mahālakṣmīprasādena varadānena nārada ||58||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ lakṣmyupākhyānamuttamam |
sukhadaṃ sārabhūtaṃ ca kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 59 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ekacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||41"
atha dvicatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
harerutkīrtana bhadra śrutaṃ tajjñānamuttamam |
īpsitaṃ lakṣmyupākhyānaṃ dhyānaṃ stotraṃ vada prabho 1 ||
nārada uvāca
snātvā tīrthe purā śakro dhṛtvā dhaute ca vāsasī |
ghaṭaṃ saṃsthāpya kṣīrode ṣaḍdevānparyapūjayat || 2 ||
gaṇeśaṃ ca dineśaṃ ca vahni viṣṇuṃ śivaṃ śivām |
etān bhaktyā samabhyarcya puṣpagaṃdhādibhistadā || 3 ||
āvāhya ca mahālakṣmīṃ paraṃmaiśvaryarūpiṇīm |
pūjāṃ cakāra deveśī brahmaṇā ca purodhasā ||4|
pura sthiteṣu muniṣu brāhmaṇeṣu gurau harī |
devādiṣu sudeśe ca jñānānaṃde śive mune ||5||
pārijātasya puṣpaṃ ca gṛhītvā caṃdanokṣitam |
dhyātvā devīṃ mahālakṣmī pūjayāmāsa nārada || 6 ||
dhyānaṃ ca sāmavedoktaṃ yaddattaṃ brahmaṇe purā |
hariṇā tena dhyānena tannibodha vadāmi te ||7||
sahasradalapadmasthakarṇikāvāsinīṃ parām |
śaratpārvaṇakoṭīṃduprabhāmuṣṭikarāṃ parām || 8||
svatejasā prajvalaṃtīṃ sukhadṛśyāṃ manoharām |
prataptakāṃcananibhaśobhāṃ mūrtimatī satīm || 9||
ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣāḍhyāṃ śobhitāṃ pītavāsasā |
īṣaddhāsyaprasannāsyāṃ śaśvatsusthira yauvanām ||10||
sarva saṃpatpradātrī ca mahālakṣmīṃ bhaje śubhām |
dhyānenānena tāṃ dhyātvā nānāguṇasamanvitām 11 ||
saṃpūjya brahmavākyena copacārāṇi ṣoḍaśa |
dadī bhaktyā vidhānena pratyekaṃ maṃtrapūrvakam || 12||
praśastāni prakṛṣṭāni varāṇi vividhāni ca |
amūlyaratnasāraṃ ca nirmitaṃ viśvakarmaṇā ||13||
āsanaṃ ca vicitraṃ ca mahālakṣmi pragṛhyatām |
śuddhaṃ gaṃgodakamidaṃ sarvavaṃditamīpsitam ||14||
'pāpedhmavahnirūpaṃ ca gṛhyatāṃ kamalālaye |
puṣpacaṃdanadūrvādisaṃyutaṃ jāhnavī jalam ||15||

śaṅkhagarbhasthitaṃ svaryaṃ gṛhyatāṃ padmavāsini |
sugaṃdhipuṣpatailaṃ ca sugaṃdhāmalakīphalam ||16||
dehasauṃdaryabījaṃ ca gṛhyatāṃ śrīhareḥ priye |
kārpāsajaṃ ca kṛmijaṃ vasanaṃ devi gṛhyatām || 17 || -▸
ratnasvarṇavikāraṃ ca dehabhūṣāvivardhanam |
śobhāyai śrīkaraṃ ratnaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ devi gṛhyatām || 18||
sarvasauṃdaryabījaṃ ca sadyaḥ śobhākaraṃ param |
vṛkṣaniryāsarūpaṃ ca gandhadravyādisaṃyutam ||19||
śrīkṛṣṇakāṃte dhūpaṃ ca pavitraṃ pratigṛhyatām |
sugadhiyuktaṃ sukhadaṃ caṃdanaṃ devi gṛhyatām ||20||
jagaccakṣuḥ svarūpaṃ ca pavitraṃ timirāpaham |
pradīpaṃ sukharūpaṃ ca gṛhyatāṃ ca sureśvari ||21||
nānopahārarūpaṃ ca nānārasa samanvitam |
atisvādukaraṃ caiva naivedyaṃ pratigṛhyatām ||22||
annaṃ brahmasvarūpaṃ ca prāṇarakṣaṇakāraṇam |
tuṣṭidaṃ puṣṭidaṃ caitra devyannaṃ pratigṛhyatām || 23||
śālyannajaṃ supakvaṃ caṃ śarkarāgavyasaṃyutam |
svāduyuktaṃ mahālakṣmi paramānnaṃ pragṛhyatām ||24||
śarkarāgavyapakvaṃ ca susvādu sumanoharam ||25||
nānāvidhāni ramyāṇi pakvānnāni phalāni ca |
surabhistanasaṃtyaktaṃ susvādu sumanoharam || 26||
martyāmṛtaṃ sugavyaṃ ca gṛhyatāmayutapriye |
susvādurasa saṃyuktamikṣuvṛkṣa samudbhavam ||27||
cūrṇareṇusamudbhavam ||28|
agnipakvamatisvādu guḍaṃ ca pratigṛhyatām | yavagodhūmasasyānāṃ
supakvaṃ guḍagavyāktaṃ miṣṭānnaṃ devi gṛhyatām |
sasyacūrṇodbhavaṃ pakvaṃ svastikādisamanvitam|| 29 ||
mayā niveditaṃ bhaktyā naivedyaṃ pratigṛhyatām |
śītavāyupradaṃ caiva dāhe ca sukhadaṃ param ||30||
kamale gṛhyatāṃ cedaṃ vyajanaṃ śvetacāmaram |
tāṃbūlaṃ ca varaṃ ramyaṃ karpūrādisuvāsitam || 31 ||
jihvājāḍayacchedakaraṃ 'tāṃbūlaṃ pratigṛhyatām |
suvāsitaṃ suśītaṃ ca pipāsānāśakārakam ||32||
jagajjīvanarūpaṃ ca jīvanaṃ devi gṛhyatām |
devasauṃdaryabījaṃ ca sadāśobhāvivardhanam ||33|| ||33||
kārpāsajaṃ ca kṛmijaṃ vasanaṃ devi gṛhyatām |
raktasvarṇavikāraṃ ca dehabhūṣāvivardhanam ||34||
śobhādhāraṃ śrīkaraṃ ca bhūṣaṇaṃ devi gṛhyatām |
nānāṛtuṣu nirmāṇaṃ bahuśobhāśrayaṃ param ||35||
surabhūpapriyaṃ śuddhaṃ mālyaṃ devi pragṛhyatām |
śuddhidaṃ śuddharūpaṃ ca sarvamaṃgalamaṃgalam ||36||
gaṃdhavastūdbhavaṃ ramyaṃ gaṃdhaṃ devi pragṛhyatām |
puṇyatīrthodakaṃ caiva viśuddhaṃ śuddhidaṃ sadā ||37||
gṛhyatāṃ kṛṣṇakānte tvaṃ ramyamācamanīyakam |
ratnasārādinirmāṇaṃ puṣpacandanacarcitam ||38||
vastrabhūṣaṇabhūṣāḍhyaṃ sutalpaṃ devi gṛhyatām |
yadyaddravyamapūrvaṃ ca pṛthivyāmapi durlabham ||39||
devabhūṣārhabhogyaṃ ca taddravyaṃ devi gṛhyatām |
dravyāṇyetāni dattvā ca bhūtena devapuṃgavaḥ ||40||
daśalakṣeṇa maṃtrasiddhirbabhūva ha ||41||
mūlaṃ jajāpa bhaktyā ca daśalakṣaṃ vidhānataḥ | japena
maṃtraśca brahmaṇā dattaḥ kalpavṛkṣaśca sarvataḥ |
lakṣmīrmāyā kāmavāṇī ṅantā kamalavāsinī 42||
vaidiko maṃtrarājo'yaṃ prasiddhaḥ svāhayā'nvitaḥ |
kubero'nena maṃtreṇa paramaiśvaryamāptavān ||43||

rājarājeśvaro dakṣaḥ sāvaṇirma nureva ca |
maṃgalo'nena maṃtreṇa saptadvīpe'vanīpatiḥ || 44 ||
priyavratottānapādau kedāro nṛpa eva ca |
ete siddhāśca rājeṃdrā maṃtreṇānena nārada || 45 ||
siddhe maṃtre mahālakṣmīḥ śakrāya darśanaṃ dadau |
ratneṃdrasāra nirmāṇavimānasthā varapradā ||46 ||
saptadvīpavatīṃ pṛthvīṃ chādayaṃtī tviṣā ca sā |
śveta caṃpakavarṇābhā ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitā || 47||
īṣaddhāsya prasannāsyā bhaktānugrahakātarā |
bibhratī ratnamālāṃ ca koṭicandrasamaprabhām ||48||
dṛṣṭvā jagatprasūṃ śāṃtāṃ tuṣṭāvaitāṃ puraṃdaraḥ |
pulakāṃcitasarvāṃgaḥ sāśrunetraḥ kṛtāṃjaliḥ || 49||
brahmaṇā ca pradattena stotrarājena saṃyutaḥ |
sarvābhīṣṭapradenaiva vaidikenaiva tatra ca || 50 ||
puraṃdara uvāca
namaḥ kamalavāsinyai nārāyaṇyai namo namaḥ |
kṛṣṇapriyāyai satataṃ mahālakṣmyai namo namaḥ || 51||
padmapatrekṣaṇāyai ca padmākhyāyai namo namaḥ |
padmāsanāyai padminyaṃ vaiṣṇavyaṃ ca namonamaḥ || 52 ||
sarva saṃpatsvarūpiṇyai sarvārādhyai namo namaḥ |
haribhaktipradātryai ca harṣadātryai namo namaḥ || 53||
kṛṣṇavakṣaḥ sthitāyai ca kṛṣṇeśāya namo namaḥ |
caṃdraśobhāsvarūpāyai ratnapadme ca śobhane ||54||
saṃpattyadhiṣṭhātṛdevyai mahādevyai namo namaḥ |
namo vṛddhisvarūpāyai vṛddhidāyai namo namaḥ || 55 ||
vaikuṇṭhe yā mahālakṣmīryā lakṣmīḥ kṣīrasāgare |
svargalakṣmīridragehe rājalakṣmīrnṛpālaye ||56||
gṛhalakṣmīśca gṛhiṇāṃ gehe ca gṛhadevatā |
surabhiḥ sāgare jātā dakṣiṇā yajñakāminī 57 ||
aditirdevamātā tvaṃ kamalā kamalālayā |
svāhā tvaṃ ca havirdāne kavyadāne svadhā smṛtā ||
tvaṃ hi viṣṇusvarūpā ca sarvādhārā vasuṃdharā |
śuddhasattvasvarūpā tvaṃ nārāyaṇaparāyaṇā ||59 ||
krodhahiṃsāvajitā ca varadā śāradā śubhā |
paramārthapradā tvaṃ ca haridāsyapradā parā ||60 ||
yayā vinā jagatsarvaṃ bhasmībhūtamasārakam |
jīvanmṛtaṃ ca viśvaṃ ca śaśvatsarvaṃ yayā vinā61 ||
sarveṣāṃ ca parā mātā sarva bāṃdhavarūpiṇī |
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ tvaṃ ca kāraṇarūpiṇī || 62||
yathā mātā stanāṃdhānāṃ śiśūnāṃ śaiśave sadā |
tathā tvaṃ sarvadā mātā sarveṣāṃ sarvarūpataḥ || 63||
mātṛhīnaḥ stanāṃdhastu sa ca jīvati daivataḥ |
tvayā hīno janaḥ ko'pi na jīvatyeva niścitam ||
suprasannasvarūpā tvaṃ māṃ prasannā bhavāṃbike |
vairigrastaṃ ca viṣayaṃ dehi mahyaṃ sanātanī ||65||
ahaṃ yāvattvayā hīno vaṃdhuhīnaśca bhikṣukaḥ |
sarva saṃpavihīnaśca tāvadeva haripriye || 66||||
jñānaṃ dehi ca dharmaṃ ca sarvasaubhāgyamīpsitam |
prabhāvaṃ ca pratāpaṃ ca sarvādhikārameva ca || 67 ||
jayaṃ parākramaṃ yuddhe paramaiśvaryameva ca |
ityuktvā ca mahendraśca sarvaiḥ suragaṇaiḥ saha ||68 ||
praṇanāma sādhunetro mūrdhnā caiva punaḥ punaḥ |
brahmā ca śaṃkaraścaiva śepo dharmaśca keśavaḥ || 62 ||
sarve cakraḥ parīhāraṃ surārthe ca punaḥ punaḥ |
devebhyaśca varaṃ dattvā puṣpamālāṃ manoharām || 70 ||

keśavāya dadau lakṣmīḥ santuṣṭā surasaṃsadi |
yayurdevāśca santuṣṭāḥ svaṃ sva sthānaṃ ca nārada || 71 ||
devī yayau hareḥ sthānaṃ dṛṣṭvā kṣīrodaśāyinaḥ |
yayuścaiva svagṛhaṃ brahmeśānī ca nārada || 72 ||
dattvā śubhāśiṣaṃ tau ca devebhyaḥ prītipūrvakam |
idaṃ stotraṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ trisaṃdhyaṃ ca paṭhennaraḥ || 73||
kuveratulyaḥ sa bhavedrājarājeśvaro mahān |
pañcalakṣajapenaiva stotrasiddhirbhavennṛṇām ||74||
siddhastotraṃ yadi paṭhenmāsamekaṃ tu saṃtatam |
mahāsukhī ca rājendro bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ || 75 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe dvicatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 42 ||
atha tricatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
nārāyaṇa mahābhāga devadeva mama prabho |
rūpeṇaiva guṇenaiva mahasā tejasā tviṣā ||1||
tvameva jñānināṃ śreṣṭhaḥ siddhānāṃ yogināṃ mune |
tapasvināṃ munīnāṃ ca paro vedavidāṃ varaḥ || 2 ||
mahālakṣmyā upākhyānaṃ vijñātaṃ mahadadbhutam |
anyatkicidupākhyānaṃ nigūḍhaṃ vada sāṃpratam ||3||
atīva gopanīyaṃ yadupayuktaṃ ca sarvataḥ |
aprakāśyaṃ purāṇeṣu vedoktaṃ dharmasaṃyutam ||4||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
nānāprakāramākhyānamaprakāśyaṃ purāṇataḥ |
śrutaṃ katividhaṃ gūḍhamāste brahmansudurlabham ||5||
teṣu yatsārabhūtaṃ ca śrotuṃ kiṃ vā tvamicchasi |
tanme brūhi mahābhāga paścādvakṣyāmi tatpunaḥ || 6 ||
nārada uvāca
svāhā devī havirdāne praśastā sarvakarmasu |
pitṛdāne svadhā śastā dakṣiṇā sarvato varā || 7 ||
etāsāṃ caritaṃ janmaphalaṃ prādhānyameva ca |
śrotumicchāmi tvadvaktrādvada vedavidāṃ vara ||8||
sūta uvāca
nāradasya vacaḥ śrutvā prahasya munisattama |
kathāṃ kathitumārebhe purāṇoktāṃ purātanīm ||9||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
sṛṣṭeḥ prathamato devā: svāhārārthaṃ yayuḥ purā |
brahmalokaṃ brahmasabhāmājagmuḥ sumanoharām || 10 ||
gatvā nivedanaṃ cakrurāhārahetukaṃ mune |
brahmā śrutvā pratijñāya niṣeve śrīhari param ||11||
nārada uvāca
yajñarūpo hi bhagavānkalayā ca babhūva ha |
yajñe yadyaddhavirdānaṃ dattaṃ tebhyaśca brāhmaṇaiḥ || 12 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
havirdadati viprāśca anye ye kṣatriyādayaḥ |
surā naiva prāpnuvaṃti taddānaṃ munipuṅgava || 13 ||

devā viṣaṇṇāste sarve tatsabhāṃ ca yayuḥ punaḥ |
gatvā nivedanaṃ cakrurāhārābhāvahetukam || 14 ||
brahmā śrutvā tu dhyānena śrīkṛṣṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayo |
pūjāṃ cakāra prakṛterdhyānenaiva tadājñayā || 15 ||
prakṛteḥ kalayā caiva sarvaśaktisvarūpiṇī |
atīva sundarī śyāmā ramaṇīyā manoharā || 16 ||
īṣaddhāsyaprasannāsyā bhaktānugrahakātarā |
uvāceti vidheragre padmayone varaṃ śṛṇu || 17 ||
vidhistadvacanaṃ śrutvā saṃbhramātsamuvāca tām |
prajāpatiruvāca
tvamagnehikā śaktirbhava yā'tīva sundarī || 18 |
dagdhuṃ na śaktaḥ prakṛtīhutāśaśca tvayā vinā |
tvannāmoccārya maṃtrāṃte yo dāsyati havirnaraḥ ||19||
surebhyastatprāpnuvanti surāḥ sānandapūrvakam |
agneḥ saṃpatsvarūpā ca śrīrūpā sā gṛheśvarī ||20||
devānāṃ pūjitā śaśvannarādīnāṃ bhavāṃbike |
brahmaṇaśca vacaḥ śrutvā sā viṣaṇṇā babhūva ha || 21 ||
tamuvāca tato devī svābhiprāyaṃ svayaṃbhuvam |
svāhovāca
ahaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ bhajiṣyāmi tapasā sucireṇa ca || 22 ||
brahmaṃstadanyaṃ yatkicitsvapnavadbhramameva ca |
vidhātā jagatastvaṃ ca śaṃbhumṛtyuñjayo vibhuḥ || 23||
virbhāta śeṣo viśvaṃ ca dharmaḥ sākṣī ca dharmiṇām |
sarvādyapūjyo devānāṃ gaṇeṣu ca gaṇeśvaraḥ || 24 ||
prakṛtiḥ sarvasaṃpūjyā yatprasādātpurā'bhavat |
ṛṣayo munayaścaiva pūjitā yanniṣevayā || 25 ||
taṃtpādapadmaṃ niyataṃ bhāvena citayāmyaham |
padmāsyā pādmamityuktvā padmanābhānusārataḥ || 26 ||
jagāma tapase devī dhyātvā kṛṣṇaṃ nirāmayam |
tapastepe varṣalakṣamekapādena padmajā ||27||
tadā dadarśa śrīkṛṣṇaṃ nirguṇaṃ prakṛteḥ param |
atīva kamanīyaṃ ca rūpaṃ dṛṣṭvā ca rūpiṇī || 28 ||
mūrcchā saṃprāpa kālena kāmeśasya ca kāmukī |
vijñāya tadabhiprāyaṃ sarvajñastāmuvāca ha ||29||
samutthāpya ca tāṃ kroḍe kṣīṇāṃgīṃ tapasā ciram |
śrībhagavānuvāca
vārāhe vai tvamaṃśena mama patnī bhaviṣyasi ||30||
nāmnā nāgnajitī kanyā kāṃte nagnajitasya ca |
adhunā'gnerdāhikā tvaṃ bhavapatnī ca bhāminī || 31 ||
mantrāṃgarūpā pūjyā ca matprasādādbhaviṣyasi |
vahnistvāṃ bhaktibhāvena saṃpūjya ca gṛheśvarīm ||32||
ramiṣyati tvayā sārdhaṃ rāmayā ramaṇīyayā |
ityuktvāṃtardadhe devo devī saṃbhāṣya nārada || 33||
tatrājagāma saṃtrasto vahnirbrahmanideśataḥ |
sāmavedoktadhyānena dhyātvā tāṃ jagadaṃbikām || 34 ||
sampūjya parituṣṭa vā pāṇi jagrāha maṃtrataḥ |
tadā divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ sa reme ramayā saha ||35|

atīva nirjane deśe saṃbhogasukhade sadā |
babhūva garbhastasyāṃ tu hutāśasya ca tejasā || 36 ||
taṃ dadhāra ca sā devī divyaṃ dvādaśavatsaram |
tataḥ suṣāva putrāṃśca ramaṇīyānmanaṃ harān ||37||
dakṣiṇāgni gārhapatyāhavanīyān krameṇa ca |
ṛṣayo munayaścaiva brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyādayaḥ ||38||
svāhāṃtaṃ maṃtramuccārya havirdānaṃ ca cakrire |
svāhāyuktaṃ ca maṃtraṃ ca yā gṛhṇāti praśastakam ||39||
sarvasiddhirbhavettasya mantragrahaṇamātrataḥ |
viṣahīno vṛthā sarpo vedahīno yathā dvijaḥ || 40 ||
patisevāvihīnā strī vidyāhīno yathā pumān |
phalaśākhāvihīnaśca yathā vṛkṣo hi niditaḥ || 49 ||
svāgahīnastathā mantro na hutaḥ phaladāyakaḥ |
parituṣṭā dvijāḥ sarve devāḥ saṃprāpurāhutīḥ || 42||
svāhāṃtenaiva ṃ mantreṇa saphalaṃ sarvameva ca |
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ svāhopākhyānamuttamam ||43||
sukhadaṃ mokṣadaṃ sāraṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi |
nārada uvāca
svāhāpūjāvidhānaṃ ca dhyānaṃ stotraṃ munīśvara ||44||
saṃpūjya vahnistuāva yena tadvada me prabho |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
dhyānaṃ ca sāmavedoktaṃ stotrapūjāvidhānakam ||45||
vadāmi śrūyatāṃ brahmansāvaghāno munīśvara |
sarvayajñāraṃbhakāle śālagrāme ghaṭe'thavā ||46 ||
svāhāṃ saṃpūjya yatnena yajñaṃ kuryātphalāptaye |
svāhā mantrāṃgayuktāṃ ca mantrasiddhisvarūpiṇīm ||
siddhāṃ ca siddhidāṃ nṛṇāṃ karmaṇāṃ phaladāṃ śubhām |
iti dhyātvā ca mūlena dattvā pādyādikaṃ naraḥ ||48||
sarvasiddhi labhetstutvā mūlamantraṃ mune śṛṇu |
oṃ hrīṃ vahnijāyāyai devyai svāhetyanena ca || 49 ||
yaḥ pūjayecca tāṃ bhaktayā sarveṣṭaṃ saṃbhaveddhruvam |
vahniruvāca
svāhā vahnipriyā vahnijāyā saṃtoṣakāriṇī ||50||
śaktiḥ kriyā kāladātrī paripākakarī dhruvā |
gatiḥ sadā narāṇāṃ ca dāhikā dahanakṣamā || 51 ||
saṃsārasārarūpā ca ghorā saṃsāratāriṇī |
devajīvanarūpā ca dehapoṣaṇakāriṇī || 52||
poḍaśaitāni nāmāni yaḥ paṭhedbhaktisaṃyutaḥ |
sarvasiddhirbhavettasya iha loke paratra ca || 53 ||
nāṃgahīnaṃ bhavettasya sarvaṃ karma suśobhanam |
aputro labhate putraṃ bhāryāhīno labhetpriyām ||
rambhopamāṃ svakāṃtāṃ ca saṃprāpya sukhamāpnuyāt || 54||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate navamaskandhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde svāhopākhyāne
tricatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 43 ||

atha catuścatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śṛṇu nārada vakṣyāyi svadhopākhyānamuttamam |
pitṝṇāṃ ca tṛptikaraṃ śrāddhānnaphalavardhanam ||1||
sṛṣṭerādau pitṛgaṇānsasarja jagatāṃ vidhiḥ |
caturaśca mūrtimatastrīṃśca tejaḥ svarūpiṇaḥ ||2||
dṛṣṭvā saptapitṛgaṇān sukharūpānmanoharān |
āhāraṃ sasṛje teṣāṃ śrāddhaṃ tarpaṇapūrvakam || 3 ||
snānaṃ tarpaṇaparyaṃtaṃ śrāddhaṃ tu devapūjanam |
āhnikaṃ ca trisaṃdhyāntaṃ viprāṇāṃ ca śrutau śrutam ||
nityaṃ na kuryādyo viprastrisaṃdhyaṃ śrāddhatarpaṇam |
baliṃ vedadhvaniṃ so'pi viṣahīno yathoragaḥ ||5||
devī sevāvihīnaśca śrīhareranivedyabhuk |
bhasmāṃtaṃ sūtakaṃ tasya na kamarhaśca nārada || 6 ||
brahmā śrāddhādikaṃ sṛṣṭvā jagāma pitṛhetave |
na prāpnuvaṃti pitaro dadati brāhmaṇādayaḥ ||7||
sarve ca jagmuḥ kṣudhitāḥ khinnāstu brahmaṇaḥ sabhām |
sarvaṃ nivedanaṃ cakrustameva jagatāṃ vidhim ||8||
brahmā ca mānasīṃ kanyāṃ sasṛje tu manoharām |
rūpayauvanasaṃpannāṃ śatacaṃdranibhānanām ||9||
vidyāvatī guṇavatīmatirūpavatīṃ satīm |
śvetacaṃpakavarṇābhāṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām || 10 ||
viśuddhāṃ prakṛteraṃśāṃ masmitāṃ varadāṃ śubhām |
svadhābhidhāṃ ca sudatīṃ lakṣmīlakṣaṇasaṃyutām ||11||
śatapadmapadanyastapādapadmaṃ ca bibhratīm |
patnīṃ pitṝṇāṃ padmāsyāṃ padmajāṃ padmalocanām ||12||
pitṛbhyaśca dadau brahmā tuṣṭebhyastuṣṭirūpiṇīm |
brāhmaṇānāṃ copadeśaṃ cakāra gopanīyakam || 13 ||
svadhāṃtaṃ maṃtramuccārya pitṛbhyo deyamityapi |
krameṇa tena viprāśca pitre dānaṃ daduḥ purā || 14 ||
svāhā śastā devadāne pitṛdāne svadhā smṛtā |
sarvatra dakṣiṇā śastā hataṃ yajñamadakṣiṇam ||15||
pitaro devatā viprā munayo manavastathā |
pūjāṃ cakruḥ svadhāṃ śāṃtāṃ tuṣṭuvuḥ paramādarāt || 16||
devādayaśva saṃtuṣṭāḥ paripūrṇa manorathāḥ |
viprādayaśca pitaraḥ svadhādevovareṇa ca ||17||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ svadhopākhyānameva ca |
sarveṣāṃ ca tuṣṭikaraṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi || 18 ||
śrīnārada uvāca
svadhāpūjāvidhānaṃ ca dhyānaṃ stotraṃ mahāmune |
śrocchāmi yatnena vada vedavidāṃ vara || 19||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
dhyānaṃ ca stathanaṃ brahmanvedonaṃ sarvamaṃgalam |
sarvaṃ jānāsi ca kathaṃ jñātumicchasi vṛddhaye ||20||
śaratkṛṣṇa trayodaśyāṃ maghāyāṃ śrāddhavāsare |
svadhāṃ saṃpūjya gatnena tataḥ śrāddhaṃ samācaret || 21 ||
svaṣāṃ nābhyarcya yo vipraḥ śrāddhaṃ kuryādahaṃmatiḥ |
na bhavetphala bhāksatyaṃ śrāddhasya tarpaṇasya ca ||22|
brahmaṇo mānasīṃ kanyāṃ śaśvatsusthirayauvanām |
pūjyā vai pitṛdevānāṃ śrāddhānāṃ phaladāṃ bhaje || 23||
iti dhyātvā śilāyāṃ vā hyathavā maṃgale ghaṭe |
dadyātpādyādikaṃ tasyai mūleneti śrutau śrutam || 24 ||

oṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ klīṃ svadhādevyai svāheti ca mahāmune |
samuccārya ca saṃpūjya stutvā tāṃ praṇamedvijaḥ || 25 ||
viśārada |
sarvavāṃchāpradaṃ nṛṇāṃ brahmaṇā yatkṛtaṃ purā ||26||
stotraṃ śṛṇu muniśreṣṭha brahmaputra
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
svadhoccāraṇamātreṇa tīrthasnāyī bhavennaraḥ |
mucyate sarvapāpebhyo vājapeyaphalaṃ labhet ||27||
svadhā svadhā svadhetyevaṃ yadi vāratrayaṃ smaret |
śrāddhasya phalamāpnoti baleśva tarpaṇasya ca ||28||
śrāddhakāle svadhāstotraṃ yaḥ śṛṇoti samāhitaḥ |
sa labhecchrāddha saṃbhūtaṃ phalameva na saṃśayaḥ || 29 ||
svadhā svadhā svadhetyevaṃ trisaṃdhyaṃ yaḥ paṭhennaraḥ |
priyāṃ tritotāṃ sa labhetsāntroṃ putraguṇānvitām 30 ||
pitṝṇāṃ prāṇatulyā tvaṃ dvijajīvanarūpiṇī |
śrāddhādhiṣṭhātṛdevī ca śrāddhādīnāṃ phalapradā || 31 ||
nityā tvaṃ satyarūpā'si puṇyarūpā'si suvrate |
āvirbhāvatirobhāvau sṛṣṭau ca pralaye tava ||32||
oṃ svastiśca namaḥ svāhā svadhā tvaṃ dakṣiṇā tathā |
nirūpitāścaturvedaiḥ praśastāḥ karmiṇāṃ punaḥ ||33||
karma pūrtyarthamevaitā īśvareṇa vinirmitāḥ |
ityevamuktvā sa brahmā brahmaloke svasaṃsadi || 34 ||
tasthau ca sahasā sadyaḥ svadhā sā'virbabhūva ha |
tadā pitṛbhyaḥ pradadau tāmeva kamalānanām ||35||
tāṃ saṃprāpya yayuste ca pitaraśca praharṣitāḥ |
svadhāstotramidaṃ puṇyaṃ yaḥ śṛṇoti samāhitaḥ ||
sa snātaḥ sarvatīrtheṣu vāṃchitaṃ phalamāpnuyāt ||36||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde svadhopākhyāne
catuścatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 44 ||
atha paṃcacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
uktaṃ svāhāsvadhākhyānaṃ praśastaṃ madhuraṃ param |
vakṣyāmi dākṣa gākhyānaṃ sāvadhāno niśāmaya || 1||
gopī suśīlā goloke purā''sītpreyasī hareḥ |
rādhā pradhānā sadhrīcī dhanyā mānyā manoharā || 2 ||
atīva suṃdarī rāmā subhagā sudano pato |
vidyāvatī guṇavatī cātirūpavatī satī ||3||
kalāvatī komalāṃgī kāṃtā kamalalocanā |
suśroṇī sustānī hayāmā nyagrodhaparimaṃḍitā || 4||
ratnālaṃkārabhūṣitā |
śvetacaṃpakavarṇābhā vivoṣṭhī mṛgalocanā ||5||
īpadvāsyaprasannāsyā kṛṣṇasya vibhāminī || 6||
kāmaśāstreṣu nipuṇā kāmino haṃsagāmino | bhāvānurakā bhāvajā
rādhāyāḥ purataḥ purā ||7|
rasajā rasikā rāme rāmeśamya rasotsukā | uvāsādakṣiṇe kroḍe
bhayena madhusūdanaḥ |
dṛṣṭvā rāvāṃ ca purato gopīnāṃ pravarottamām ||8||
saṃbabhūvānamramukhī rakta kajalocanām |
kopena kaṃpitāgoṃ ca kopena sphuritādharām ||9||
kāminīṃ raktavadanāṃ

vegena tāṃ tu gacchaṃtoṃ vijñāya tadanantaram |
virodhabhīto bhagavānaṃtardhānaṃ cakāra saḥ || 10 ||
palāyaṃtaṃ ca kāṃtaṃ ca śāṃtaṃ sattvaṃ suvigraham |
vilokya kaṃpitā gopyaḥ suśīlādyāstato bhiyā 19 ||
vilokya laṃpaṭaṃ tatra gopīnāṃ lakṣakoṭayaḥ |
puṭāṃjaliyutā bhītā bhaktinamrātmakaṃdharāḥ || 12 ||
rakṣa rakṣetyuktavatyo devīmiti punaḥ punaḥ |
yayurbhayena śaraṇaṃ tasyāścaraṇapaṃkaje || 13||
trilakṣakoṭayo gopāḥ sudāmādaya eva ca |
yayurbhayena śaraṇaṃ tatpādābje ca nārada || 14 ||
palāyaṃtaṃ ca kāṃtaṃ ca vijñāya parameśvarī |
palāyaṃtoṃ sahacarīṃ suśīlāṃ ca śaśāpa sā || 15||
bhasmasācca bhaviṣyati || 16 ||
adyaprabhṛti golokaṃ sā cedāyāti gopikā | sadyo gamanamātreṇa
ityevamuktvā tatraiva devadeveśvarī ruṣā |
rāseśvarī rāsamadhye rāseśamājuhāva ha || 17||
nālokya purataḥ kṛṣṇaṃ rādhā virahakātarā |
yugakoṭisamaṃ mene kṣaṇabhedena suvratā || 18 ||
he kṛṣṇa prāṇanātheśāgaccha prāṇādhikapriya |
prāṇādhiṣṭhātṛdeveśa prāṇā yāṃti tvayā vinā || 19 ||
strīgarvaḥ patisaubhāgyādvardhate ca dine dine |
sukhaṃ ca vipulaṃ yasmāttaṃ seveddharmataḥ sadā || 20 ||
patirbaṃdhuḥ kulastrīṇāmadhidevaḥ sadā gatiḥ |
parasaṃpatsvarūpaśca mūrtimānbhogadaḥ sadā || 21 ||
mānado mānakhaṃḍanaḥ ||22||
dharmadaḥ sukhadaḥ śaśvatprītida: śāṃtidaḥ sadā | sammānairdīpyamānaśca
sārātsārataraḥ svāmī baṃdhūnāṃ baṃdhuvardhanaḥ |
na ca bhartuḥ samo baṃdhubaṃdhobaṃdhuṣu dṛśyate ||23||
bharaṇādeva bhartā ca pālanātpatirucyate |
śarīreśācca sa svāmī kāmadaḥ kāṃta ucyate ||24||
prāṇeśātprāṇanāyakaḥ || 25 ||
baṃghuśca sukhavṛddhayā ca prītidānātpriyaḥ smṛtaḥ | aiśvaryadāna dīśaśca
ratidānācca ramaṇaḥ priyo nāsti priyātparaḥ |
putrastu svāminaḥ śukrājjāyate tena sa priyaḥ || 26||
śataputrātparaḥ svāmī kulajānāṃ priyaḥ sadā |
asatkulaprasūtā yā kāṃtaṃ vijñātumakṣamā ||27||
snānaṃ ca sarvatīrtheṣu sarvayajñeṣu dakṣiṇā |
prādakṣiṇyaṃ pṛthivyāśca sarvāṇi ca tapāṃsi ca || 28 ||
sarvāṇyeva vratādīni mahādānāni yāni ca |
upoṣaṇāni puṇyāni yāni yāni tāni ca || 29||
gurusevā viprasevā vedasevādikaṃ ca yat |
svāminaḥ pādasevāyāḥ kalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm ||
guru viprendradeveṣu sarvebhyaśva patirguruḥ |
vidyādātā yathā puṃsāṃ kulajānāṃ tathā priyaḥ ||31||
gopīnāṃ lakṣakoṭīnāṃ gopānāṃ ca tathaiva ca |
brahmāṃḍānāmasaṃkhyānāṃ tatrasthānāṃ tathaiva ca ||32||
viśvādigolakāṃtānāmīśvaro yatprasādataḥ |
ahaṃ na jāne taṃ kāṃtaṃ strīsvabhāvo duratyayaḥ || 33 ||
ityukā rādhikā kṛṣṇaṃ tatra dadhyau svabhaktitaḥ |
ruroda premṇā sā rādhānāthanātheti cābravīt ||34||
darśanaṃ dehi ramaṇa dīnā virahaduḥkhitā |
atha sā dakṣiṇā devī dhvastā golokato mune || 35||
suciraṃ ca tapastaptvā viveśa kamalātanī |
atha devādayaḥ sarve yajñaṃ kṛtvā suduṣkaram ||36||
nālabhaṃste phalaṃ teṣāṃ viṣaṇṇāḥ prayayuvidhim |
vidhinivedanaṃ śrutvā devādīnāṃ jagatpatim ||37||

dadhyau ca suciraṃ bhaktyā pratyādeśamavāpa saḥ |
nārāyaṇaśca bhagavānmahālakṣmyāśca dehataḥ ||38||
viniṣkṛṣya martyalakṣmī brahmaṇe dakṣiṇāṃ dadau |
brahmā dadau tāṃ yajñāya pūraṇārthaṃ ca karmaṇām || 39||
candrakoṭisamaprabhām ||40||
yajñaḥ saṃpūjya vidhivattāṃ tuṣṭāva tadā mudā | taptakāṃcanavarṇābhāṃ
atīva kamanīyāṃ ca sundarīṃ sumanoharām |
kamalāsyāṃ komalāṃgoṃ kamalāyatalocanām ||41||
kamalāṃgasamudbhavām |
vahniśuddhāṃ śukādhānāṃ viboṣṭī sudatīṃ satīm || 42 ||
kamalāsanapūjyāṃ ca mālatīmālyasaṃyutam |
īṣaddhāsyaprasannāsyāṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām ||43||
bibhratī kabarībhāraṃ
suveṣāḍhyāṃ ca susnātāṃ munimānasa mohinīm |
kastūrīvidubhiḥ sārdhaṃ sugandhi candanendubhiḥ || 44 ||
siṃdūra biṃdu nālpenāpyalakādhaḥ sthalojjvalām |
supraśastanitaṃbāḍhyāṃ bṛhacchroṇipayodharām ||45||
kāmabāṇaprapīḍitām |
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā ramaṇīyāṃ ca yajño mūrcchāmavāpa ha || 46 ||
kāmadevādhārarūpāṃ patnīṃ tāṃmeva jagrāha vidhibodhitapūrvakam |
divyaṃ varṣaśataṃ caiva tāṃ gṛhītvā tu nirjane ||47||
yajño reme mudā yukto rāmeśo ramayā saha |
garbha dadhāra sā devī divyaṃ dvādaśavarṣakam || 48 ||
tataḥ suṣāva putraṃ ca phalaṃ vai sarvakarmaṇām |
paripūrṇe karmaṇi ca tatputraḥ phaladāyakaḥ || 49 ||
yajño dakṣiṇayā sārdhaṃ putreṇa ca phalena ca |
karmiṇāṃ phaladātā cetyevaṃ vedavido viduḥ ||50||
yajñaśca dakṣiṇāṃ prāpya putraṃ ca phaladāyakam |
phalaṃ dadau ca sarvebhyaḥ karmiṇāṃ caiva nārada || 51||
tadā devādayastuṣṭāḥ paripūrṇa manorathāḥ |
svasthāne te yayuḥ sarve dharmavaktrādidaṃ śrutam ||52||
kṛtvā karma ca kartā ca tūrṇaṃ dadyācca dakṣiṇām |
tatkṣaṇaṃ phalamāpnoti vedairuktamidaṃ mune || 53 ||
karmī karmaṇi pūrṇe ca tatkṣaṇe yadi dakṣiṇām |
na dadyādvāhmaṇebhyaśca devenājñānato'thavā || 54 ||
mūhūrte samatīte tu dviguṇā sā bhaveddhruvam |
ekarātre vyatīte tu sā trikoṭiguṇā casā || 55||
trirātre tacchataguṇā saptāhe dviguṇā tataḥ |
māse lakṣaguṇā proktā brāhmaṇānāṃ ca vardhate ||56||
saṃvatsare vyatīte tu sā trikoṭiguṇā bhavet |
karma tadyajamānānāṃ sarvaṃ vai niṣphalaṃ bhavet ||57||
sa ca brahmasvahārī ca na karmārho'śucirnaraḥ |
daridro vyādhiyuktaśca tena pāpena pātakī || 58 ||
tadgṛhādyāti lakṣmīśca śāpaṃ dattvā sudāruṇam |
pitaro naiva gṛhṇanti taddattaṃ śrāddhatarpaṇam ||59||
evaṃ surāśca tatpūjāṃ taddattāmagnirāhutim |
dattaṃ na dīyate dānaṃ gṛhītā naitra yācate ||60||
ubhau tau narake yātarichannarajjau yathā ghaṭaḥ |
nāpayedyajamānaśvedya citaśvāpi dakṣiṇām || 61 ||
bhavedbrahmasvāpahārī kumbhīkaṃ vrajeddhruvam |
varṣalakṣaṃ vasettatra yamadūtena tāḍitaḥ || 62 ||
tato bhavetsa cāṃḍālo vyādhiyukto daridrakaḥ |
pātayetpuruṣānsapta pūrvāṃśca sapta janmataḥ || 63||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ vipra kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi |
nārada uvāca
yatkarma dakṣiṇāhīnaṃ ko bhuṃkte tatphalaṃ mune ||65||

pūjāvidhi dakṣiṇāyāḥ purā yajñakṛtaṃ vada |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
karmaṇo'dakṣiṇasyaiva kuta eva phalaṃ mune || 65 ||
sadakṣiṇe karmaṇi ca phalameva pravartate |
adakṣiṇaṃ ca yatkarma taddbhukte ca balirmune || 66 ||
balaye tatpradattaṃ ca vāmanena purā mune |
aśrotriyaḥ śrāddhadravyamaśraddhādānameva ca || 67 ||
vṛṣalīpativiprāṇāṃ pūjā dravyādikaṃ ca yat |
asadvijaiḥ kṛtaṃ yajñamaśuceḥ pūjanaṃ ca yat || 68 ||
gurāvabhaktasya karma balirbhukte na saṃśayaḥ |
dakṣiṇāyāśca yadvayānaṃ stotraṃ pūjāvidhikramam || 69 ||
tatsarvaṃ kaṇvaśākhoktaṃ pravakṣyāmi niśāmaya |
purā saṃprāpya tāṃ yajñaḥ karmadakṣāṃ ca dakṣiṇām || 70 ||
mumohāsyāḥ svarūpeṇa tuṣṭāva kāmakātaraḥ |
yajña uvāca
purā golokagopī tvaṃ gopīnāṃ pravarā varā || 71 ||
rādhāsamā tatsakhī va śrīkṛṣṇapreyasī priyā |
kārtikī pūrṇimāyāṃ tu rāse rādhāmahotsave ||72||
āvirbhūtā dakṣiṇāṃ sāllakṣmyāśca tena dakṣiṇā |
purā tvaṃ ca suśīlākhyā khyātā śīlena śobhane 73 ||
lakṣmīdāṃsa bhāgāttvaṃ rādhāśāpācca dakṣiṇā |
golokāttvaṃ paribhraṣṭā mama bhāgyādupasthitā ||74 ||
kṛpāṃ kuru mahābhāge māmeva svāminaṃ kuru |
karmiṇāṃ karmaṇāṃ devi tvameva phaladā sadā || 75||
tvayā vinā ca sarveṣāṃ sarvaṃ karma ca niṣphalam |
tvayā vinā tathā karma karmiṇāṃ ca na śobhate ||76||
brahmaviṣṇumaheśāśca dikpālādaya eva ca |
karmaṇaśca phala dātuṃ na śaktāśca tvayā vinā || 77 ||
karmarūpī svayaṃ brahmā phalarūpī maheśvaraḥ |
yajñarūpo viṣṇurahaṃ tvameṣāṃ sārarūpiṇo || 78 ||
phaladātṛ paraṃ brahma nirguṇā prakṛtiḥ parā |
svayaṃ kṛṣṇaśca bhagavānsa ca śaktastvayā saha || 79 ||
tvameva śaktiḥ kāṃte me śaśvajjanmani janmani |
sarvakarmaṇi śakto'haṃ tvayā saha varānane ||80||
ityuktvā ca purastastho yajñādhiṣṭhātṛdevatā |
tuṣṭā babhūva sā devī bheje taṃ kamalākalā || 81 || 7
idaṃ ca dakṣiṇāstotraṃ yajña kāle ca yaḥ paṭhet |
phalaṃ ca sarvayajñānāṃ prāpnoti nātra saṃśayaḥ || 82 ||
rājasūye vājapeye gomedhanaramedhake |
aśvamedhe lāṃgale ca viṣṇuyajñe yaśaskare ||83||
dhanade bhūmide pūrte phalade gajamedhake |
lohayajñe svarṇayajñe ratnayajñe'tha tāmrake || 84 ||
śivayajñe rudrayajñe rudrayajñe śakrayajñe ca baṃdhuke |
vṛṣṭī varuṇayāge ca kaṃḍake vairimardane ||85||
śuciyajñe dharmayajñe'dhvare ghaṃ pāpamocane |
brahmāṇī karmayoge ca yoniyāge ca bhadrake || 86||
eteṣāṃ ca samāraṃbhe idaṃ stotraṃ ca yaḥ paṭhet |
nirvighnena ca tatkarma sarvaṃ bhavati niścitam 87||
idaṃ stotraṃ ca kathitaṃ dhyānaṃ pūjāvidhi śṛṇu |
śālagrāme ghaṃṭe vāpi dakṣiṇāṃ pūjayetsughauṃḥ || 88||

phaladāṃ sarvakarmaṇām ||89 ||
lakṣmīdakṣāṃsa saṃbhūtāṃ dakṣiṇāṃ kamalākalān | sarvakarmasu
viṣṇoḥ śaktisvarūpāṃ ca pūjitāṃ vaṃditāṃ śubhām |
śuddhidāṃ śuci suśīlāṃ śubhadāṃ bhaje ||90||
dhyātvā'nenaiva varadāṃ mṛlena pūjayetsudhīḥ |
davā pācādikaṃ devyai vedoktenaiva nārada ||91 ||
oṃ śrīṃ klīṃ hrīṃ dakṣiṇāyai svāheti ca vicakṣaṇaḥ |
pūjayedvidhivaktyā dakṣiṇāṃ sarvapūjitām ||92||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ brahmandakṣiṇākhyānameva ca |
sukhadaṃ prītidaṃ caiva phaladaṃ sarvakarmaṇām || 93||
idaṃ ca dakṣiṇākhyānaṃ yaḥ śṛṇoti samāhitaḥ |
aṃgahīnaṃ ca tatkarma na bhavedbhārate bhuvi || 94 ||
aputro labhate putraṃ niścitaṃ ca guṇānvitam |
bhāryāhono labhedbhāryāṃ suśīlāṃ suṃdarīṃ parām ||95||
varārohāṃ putravatīṃ vinītāṃ priyavādinīm |
pativratāṃ ca śuddhāṃ ca kulajāṃ ca vadhūṃ varām ||96||
vidyā hono labhedvidyāṃ dhanahīno labheddhanam |
bhūmihīno labhedbhūmiṃ prajāhīno labhetprajām ||97||
saṃkaṭaṃ baṃdhuvicchede vipattī baṃdhane tathā |
māsamekamidaṃ śrutvā mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 98||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde paṃcacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 45||
atha ṣaṭcatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
anekānāṃ ca devīnāṃ śrutamākhyānamuttamam |
anyāsāṃ caritaṃ brahmanvad vedavidāṃ vara || 1 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
sarvāsāṃ caritaṃ vipra deveṣu ca pṛthakpṛthak |
pūrvoktānāṃ ca devīnāṃ tāsāṃ śrotumihecchasi ||2||
nārada uvāca
ṣaṣṭhī maṃgalacaṃḍī ca manasā prakṛteḥ kalā |
utpattimāsāṃ caritaṃ śrotumicchāmi tattvataḥ || 3||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
ṣaṣṭhāṃśā prakṛteryā ca sā ca ṣaṣṭhī prakīrtitā |
bālakānāmadhiṣṭhātrī viṣṇumāyā ca bāladā ||4|
mātṛkāsu ca vikhyātā devasenābhidhā ca yā |
prāṇādhikapriyā sādhvī skaṃdabhāryā ca suvratā ||5||
āyuḥ pradā ca bālānāṃ dhātrī rakṣaṇa kāriṇo |
satataṃ śiśupārśvasthā yogena siddhayoginī || 6 ||
tasyāḥ pūjāvidhiṃ brahmannitihāsamidaṃ śṛṇu |
yacchrataṃ dharmavaktreṇa sukhadaṃ putradaṃ param ||7||
rājā priyavrataśvāsītsvāyaṃbhuvamanoḥ sutaḥ |
yogīndro noihadbhāryāṃ tapasyāsu rataḥ sadā || 8 |
brahmājñayā ca yatnena kṛtadāro babhūva ha |
suciraṃ kṛtadāraśca na lebhe tanayaṃ mune || 9||
putreṣṭiyajñaṃ taṃ cāpi kārayāmāsa kaśyapaḥ |
mālinyaṃ tasya kāṃtāyai muniryajñacaruṃ dadau || 10 ||
bhuktvā ca taṃ caruṃ tasyāḥ sadyo garbho babhūva ha |
dadhāra taṃ ca sā devī devaṃ dvādaśavatsaram || 11 ||
tataḥ suṣāva sā brahmankumāraṃ kanakaprabham |
sarvāvayavasampannaṃ mṛtamuttāralocanam ||12||

taṃ dṛṣṭvā ruruduḥ sarvā nāyaṃśva bāṃdhavastriyaḥ |
mūrcchāmavāpa tanmātā putraśokena bhūyasā || 13 ||
śmaśānaṃ ca yayau rājā gṛhītvā bālakaṃ mune |
ruroda tatra kāṃtāre putraṃ kṛtvā svavakṣasi || 14 ||
notsṛjadvālakaṃ rājā prāṇāṃstyaktuṃ samudyataḥ |
jñānayogaṃ visasmāra putraśokātsudāruṇāt ||15||
etasminnantare tatra vimānaṃ ca dadarśa saḥ |
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśaṃ maṇirājavinirmitam ||16||
tejasā jvalitaṃ daśaśvacchobhitaṃ kṣomavāsasā |
nānācitravicitrāḍhyaṃ puṣpamālāvirājitam || 17 ||
dadarśa tatra devīṃ ca kamanīyāṃ manoharām |
śvetacakabhavarṇābhāṃ śaśvatsu sthirayovanām ||18||
īṣaddhāsyaprasannāsyāṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām |
kṛpāmayīṃ yogasiddhāṃ bhaktānugrahakātarām || 19 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ purato rājā tuṣṭāva paramādarāt |
cakāra pūjanaṃ tasyā vihāya bālakaṃ bhuvi || 20 ||
papraccha rājā tāṃ tuṣṭāṃ grīṣmasūryasamaprabhām |
tejasā jvalitāṃ śāṃtāṃ kāṃtāṃ skaṃdasya nārada |
rājovāca
kā tvaṃ suśobhane kānte kasya kāntāsi suvrate |
kasya kanyā varārohe dhanyā mānyā ca yoṣitām ||
nṛpendrasya vacaḥ śrutvā jaganmaṃgalacaṇḍikā |
uvāca devasenā sā devānāṃ raṇakāriṇī ||23 ||
devānāṃ daityagrastānāṃ purā senā babhūva sā |
jayaṃ dadau sā tebhyaśca devasenā ca tena sā ||24||
śrīdevasenovāca
brahmaṇo mānasī kanyā devasenāhamīśvarī |
sṛṣṭvā māṃ manasā dhātā dadau skaṃdāya bhūmipa || 25 ||
mātṛkāsu ca vikhyātā skaṃdabhāryā ca suvratā |
viśve ṣaṣṭhīti vikhyātā ṣaṣṭāṃśā prakṛteḥ parā || 26 ||
aputrāya putradā'haṃ priyadātrī priyāya ca |
ghanadā'ha daridrebhyaḥ karmibhyaśca svakarmadā ||27||'
sukhaṃ duḥkhaṃ bhayaṃ śoko harṣo maṃgalameva ca |
sampattiśca vipattiśca sarvaṃ bhavati karmaṇā ||28 ||
karmaṇā bahuputraśca vaṃśahīnaḥ svakarmaṇā |
karmaṇā mṛtaputraśca karmaṇā cirajīvanaḥ ||29||
karmaṇā guṇavāṃścaiva karmaṇā cāṃgahīnakaḥ |
karmaṇā bahubhāryaśca bhāryāhīnaśca karmaṇā ||30||
karmaṇā rūpavāndharmī rogī śaśvatsvakarmaṇā |
karmaṇā ca bhavedvayādhiḥ karmaṇā''rogyameva ca || 31 ||
tasmātkarmaparaṃ rājansarvebhyaśca śrutau śrutam |
ityevamuktvā sā devī gṛhītvā bālakaṃ mune ||32||
mahājñānena sā devī jīvayāmāsa lālayā |
rājā dadarśa taṃ bālaṃ sasmitaṃ kanakaprabham || 33 ||
devasenā ca paśyaṃtaṃ nṛpamāpṛcchya sā tadā |
gṛhītvā vālakaṃ devī gaganaṃ gantumudyatā |
punastuṣṭāva tāṃ rājā śuṣkakaṇṭhoṣṭhatālukaḥ |
nṛpastotreṇa sā devī parituṣṭā babhūva ha ||35||
uvāca taṃ nṛpaṃ brahman vedoktaṃ karma nirmitam |
devyuvāca
triṣu lokeṣu tvaṃ rājā svāyaṃbhuvamanoḥ sutaḥ ||36||

śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 46 697
mama pūjāṃ ca sarvatra kārayitvā svayaṃ kuru |
tadā dāsyāmi putraṃ te kulapadmaṃ manoharam || 37||
suvrataṃ nāma vikhyātaṃ guṇavaṃtaṃ supaṃḍitam |
jātismaraṃ ca yogīṃdra nārāyaṇakalātmakam ||38||
śatakratukaraṃ śreṣṭhaṃ kṣatriyāṇāṃ ca vanditam |
mattamātaṃgalakṣāṇāṃ dhṛtavaṃtaṃ balaṃ śubham |
dhaninaṃ guṇinaṃ śuddhaṃ viduṣāṃ priyameva ca |
yogināṃ jñānināṃ caiva siddhirūpaṃ tapasvinām 40 ||
yaśasvinaṃ ca lokeṣu dātāraṃ sarvasampadām |
ityevamuktvā sā devī tasmai taṃ bālakaṃ dadau 41 ||
rājā cakāra svīkāraṃ pūjārthaṃ ca priyavrataḥ |
jagāma devī svargaṃ ca dattvā tasmai śubhaṃ varam 42 ||
ājagāma sahāmātyaḥ svagṛhaṃ hṛṣṭamānasaḥ |
āgatya kathayāmāsa vṛttāṃtaṃ putrahetukam ||43||
śrutvā babhūvuḥ saṃtuṣṭā varā nāryaśca nārada |
maṃgalaṃ kārayāmāsa sarvatra putrahetukam ||44||
devīṃ ca pūjayāmāsa brāhmaṇebhyo dhanaṃ dadau |
rājā ca pratimāseṣu śuklāṣaṣṭhayāṃ mahotsavam 45 ||
ṣaṣṭhyā devyāśca yatnena kārayāmāsa sarvataḥ |
bālānāṃ sūtikāgāre ṣaṣṭhāhe yatnapūrvakam ||46||
caikaviṃśativāsare |
bālānāṃ śubhakārye ca śubhānnaprāśane tathā ||47 ||
tatpūjāṃ kārayāmāsa cakāra ha |
dhyānaṃ pūjāvidhānaṃ ca stotraṃ matto niśāmaya 48 ||
sarvatra vardhayāmāsa svayameva
yacchrutaṃ dharmavaktreṇa kauthumoktaṃ ca suvrataḥ |
śālagrāme ghaṭe vā'tha vaṭamūle'thavā sune || 49||
bhittyāṃ puttalikāṃ kṛtvā pūjayedvā vicakṣaṇaḥ |
ṣaṣṭhāṃśāṃ prakṛteḥ śuddhāṃ pratiṣṭhāpya ca suprabhām 50||
dayārūpāṃ jagatprasūm |
śveta caṃpakavarṇābhāṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām || 51||
suputradāṃ ca śubhadāṃ parāṃ bhaje |
iti dhyātvā svaśirasi puṣpa dattvā vicakṣaṇaḥ ||
pavitrarūpāṃ paramāṃ devasenāṃ
punardhyātvā ca mūlena pūjayetsuvratāṃ satīm |
pādyārthyācamanīyaiśca gaṃdhapuṣpaṃ pradīpakaḥ || 53 ||
naivedya vividhaiśvāpi phalena śobhanena ca |
oṃ hrīṃ ṣaṣṭhīdevyai svāheti vidhipūrvakam ||54||
aṣṭākṣaraṃ mahāmantraṃ yathāśakti japennaraḥ |
tataḥ stutvā ca praṇamedbhaktiyuktaḥ samāhitaḥ || 55||
stotraṃ ca sāmavedoktaṃ varaṃ putraphalapradam |
aṣṭākṣaraṃ mahāmantraṃ lakṣadhā yo japettataḥ || 56 ||
suputraṃ sa labhennūnamityāha kamalodbhavaḥ |
stotraṃ śṛṇu muniśreṣṭha sarvakāmaśubhāvaham ||57 ||
vāṃchāpradaṃ ca sarveṣāṃ gūḍhaṃ vedeṣu nārada |
namo devyai mahādevyai siddhaye śāṃtyai namo namaḥ 58||
śubhāyai devasenāyai ṣaṣṭhyai deyaṃ namo namaḥ |
varadāyai putradāyai dhanadāyai namo namaḥ || 59 ||
sukhadāyai mokṣadāyai ṣaṣṭhyaṃ devyaṃ namo namaḥ |
sṛṣṭyaṃ ṣaṣṭhāśarūpāya siddhāyai ca namo namaḥ || 60 ||
māyāyai siddhayoginyai ṣaṣṭhīdevyai namo namaḥ |
sārāya sāradāyai ca parādevyai namo namaḥ || 61 ||
ca karmaṇām 62 ||
bālādhiṣṭhātṛdevyai ca ṣaṣṭhīdevyai namo namaḥ | kalyāṇadāyai kalyāṇyai phaladāyai
pratyakṣāyai svabhaktānāṃ ṣaṣṭye devyaṃ namonamaḥ |
pūjyāya skaṃdakāṃtāyai sarveṣāṃ sarvakarmasu || 63 ||
devarakṣaṇakāriṇyai ṣaṣṭhīdevyai namo namaḥ |
śuddhasatttrasvarūpāyai vanditāyaṃ nṛṇāṃ sadā || 64 ||

hiṃsākodhavarjitāyai ṣaṣṭhīdevyai namo namaḥ |
dhanaṃ dehi priyāṃ dehi putraṃ dehi sureśvari || 65||
mānaṃ dehi jayaṃ dehi dviṣo jahi maheśvari |
dharmaṃ dehi yaśo dehi ṣaṣṭhīdevyaṃ namo namaḥ || 66 ||
dehi bhūmi prajāṃ dehi vidyāṃ dehi supūjite |
kalyāṇaṃ ca jayaṃ dehi ṣaṣṭhīdevyai namo namaḥ || 67||
iti devīṃ ca saṃstūya lebhe putraṃ priyavrataḥ |
yaśasvinaṃ ca rājendraḥ ṣaṣṭhīdevyāḥ prasādataḥ || 68||
ṣaṣṭhīstotramidaṃ brahman yaḥ śṛgoti tu vatsaram |
aputro labhate putraṃ paraṃ sucirajīvinam ||69||
varṣamekaṃ ca yo bhaktyā saṃpūjyedaṃ śṛṇoti ca |
sarvapāpādvinirmukto mahāvandhyā prasūyate || 70 ||
vīraṃ putraṃ ca guṇinaṃ vidyāvaṃtaṃ yaśasvinam |
sucirāyuṣyavaṃtaṃ ca sūte devīprasādataḥ || 71 ||
kākavaṃdhyā ca yā nārī mṛtavatsā ca yā bhavet |
varṣaṃ śrutvā labhetputraṃ ṣaṣṭhīdevī prasādataḥ || 72||
rogayukte ca bāle ca pitā mātā śṛṇoti cet |
māsena mucyate bālaḥ ṣaṣṭīdevīprasādataḥ || 73 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe ṣaṣṭhyupākhyāne ṣaṭcatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 49 ||
atha saptacatvāriśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
kathitaṃ ṣaṣṭhyupākhyānaṃ brahmaputra yathāgamam |
devī maṃgalacaṃḍī ca tadākhyānaṃ niśāmaya || 1||
tasyāḥ pūjādikaṃ sarvaṃ dharmavaktreṇa yacchratam |
śrutisaṃmatameveṣṭaṃ sarveṣāṃ viduṣāmapi ||2||
dakṣā yā vartate caṃḍī kalyāṇeṣu ca maṃgalā |
maṃgaleṣu ca yā dakṣā sā ca maṃgalacaṃḍikā || 3||
pūjyā yā vartate caṃḍī maṃgalo'pi mahīsutaḥ |
maṃgalābhoṣṭadevī yā sā vai maṃgalacaṃḍikā || 4 ||
maṃgalo manuvaṃśyaśca saptopadharāpatiḥ |
tasya pūjyā'bhīṣṭadevī tena maṃgalacaṃḍikā ||5||
mūrtibhedena sā durgā mūla kṛtirīśvarī |
kṛpārūpā'tipratyakṣā yoṣitāmiṣṭadevatā || 6||
prathame pūjitā sā ca śaṃkareṇa parātparā |
tripurasya vadhe dhore viṣṇunā preritena ca ||7||
brahmanbrahmopadeśena durgatena ca saṃkaṭe |
ākāśātpatite yāne daityena pātite ruṣā || 8 ||
brahmaviṣṇūpadiṣṭaśca durgāṃ tuṣṭāva śaṃkaraḥ |
sā ca maṃgalacaṃhī yā babhūva rūpabhedataḥ || 9 ||
uvāca purataḥ śaṃbhorbhayaṃ nāstīti te prabho |
bhagavānvṛṣarūpaśca sarveśaste bhaviṣyati ||10|
śuddha śaktisvarūpā'haṃ bhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ |
māyātmanā ca hariṇā sahāyena vṛṣadhvaja || 11 ||
jahi daityaṃ svaśatruṃ ca surāṇāṃ padaghātakam |
ityuktvāṃtarhitā devī śaṃbho: śaktirbabhūva sa 12 ||
viṣṇudattena śastreṇa javāna tamumāpatiḥ |
munīṃdra patite daitye sarve devā maharṣayaḥ || 13 ||
tuṣṭuvuḥ śaṃkaraṃ devaṃ bhakti namrātmakaṃdharāḥ |
sadyaḥ śirasi śaṃbhośca puṣpavṛṣṭirbabhūva ha || 14 ||
brahmā viṣṇuśca saṃtuṣṭo dado tasmai śubhāśipam |
brahma padiṣṭaśca susnātaḥ śaṃkarastathā || 15 ||

pūjā kī yā devīṃ maṃgalacaṃḍikām |
pādyārthyācamanīyaiśva vastra~śva vividhairapi ||16||
vidhairmune| chāpeśva mahiṣairgavayaiḥ pakṣibhistathā || 17 ||
valakāramātyaica pāyasaiḥ piṣṭacairapi |
madhubhiśva sudhābhiśva phalairnānāvidhairapi || 18 ||
dhyātvā mādhyaṃdinoktena dhyānena bhaktipūrvakam || 19 ||
saṃgīna savairnāmikīrtanaḥ
sī dravyāṇi mūlena maṃtreṇaiva ca nārada |
oṃ hrīṃ klīṃ sarvapūjye devi maṃgalacaṇḍike || 20 ||
manuḥ |
pūjyaḥ kalpataruścaiva bhaktānāṃ sarvakāmadaḥ ||21||
phaṭ svāhāpyekaviṃśākṣaro
penaiva maṃtra siddhirbhaveddhruvam |
dhyānaṃ ca śrūyatāṃ brahmanvedoktaṃ sarvasaṃmatam ||22||
deva saarṣīyā śaśvatsusthirayauvanām |
bitroṣṭhoṃ sudatīṃ śuddhāṃ śaratpadmanibhānanām || 23||
sunīlotpalalocanām |

devyāśca dhyānamityevaṃ stavanaṃ śrūyatāṃ mune || 25 ||
mahādeva uvāca
jaganmātardevi maṃgalacaṇḍike |
hārike vipadāṃ rāśe maṃgalakārike || 26 ||
rakṣa rakṣa harṣamaṃgaladāyike |
śubhe maṃgaladakṣe ca śubhe maṃgalacaṇḍike ||27||

pūjye maṃgalabhūpasya manuvaṃśasya saṃtatam || 29 ||
pūjye maṃgalavāre ca mokṣamaṃgaladāyini || 30||
maṃgalādhiṣṭhātṛdevi maṃgalānāṃ ca maṃgale | saṃsāra maṃgalādhāre
ca pūjye śubhasakhaprade ||31||
sāre ca maṅgalādhāre pāre ca sarvakarmaṇām | pratimaṅgalavāre
stotreṇānena śaṃbhuśca stutvā maṅgalacaṃḍikām |
pratimaṅgalavāre ca pūjāṃ dattvā gataḥ śivaḥ || 32 ||
prathame pūjitā devī śivena sarvamaṅgalā |
dvitīye pūjitā sā ca maṅgalena graheṇa ca || 33 ||
tṛtīye pūjitā bhadrā maṅgalena nṛpeṇa ca |
caturthe maṅgale vāre sundarobhiḥ prapūjitā ||34||
paṃcame maṅgalākāṃkṣina raimaṃgala caṃḍikā |
pūjitā prativiśveṣu viśveśapūjitā sadā || 35||
mānavairmanubhirmune || 36 ||
tataḥ sarvatra saṃpūjyā babhūva parameśvarī | devaiśva murtibhiścaiva
devyāśca maṅgalastotraṃ yaḥ śṛṇoti samāhitaḥ |
tanmaṅgalaṃ bhavettasya na bhavettadamaṅgalam ||
vardhate putrapautraiśca maṅgalaṃ ca dine dine || 37 |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
uktaṃ dvayorupākhyānaṃ brahmaputra yathāgamam |
śrūyatāṃ manasākhyānaṃ yacchutaṃ dharmavaktrataḥ || 38 ||
sā ca kanyā bhagavatī kaśyapasya ca mānasī |
tenaiva manasā devī manasā yā ca dīvyati ||39||
manasā dhyāyate yā ca paramātmānamīśvaram |
tena sā manasādevī tena yogena dīvyati || 40 ||

ātmārāmā ca sā devī vaiṣṇavī siddhayoginī |
triyugaṃ ca tapastaptvā kṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ || 41 ||
jaratkāruśarīraṃ ca dṛṣṭvā yatkṣīṇamīśvaraḥ |
gopīpatirnāma cakre jaratkāruriti prabhuḥ ||42||
vāṃchitaṃ ca dadau tasyai kṛpayā ca kṛpānidhi |
pūjāṃ ca kārayāmāsa cakāra ca svayaṃ prabhuḥ ||43||
svarge ca nāgaloke ca pṛthivyāṃ brahmalokataḥ |
bhṛśaṃ jagatsu gaurī sā sundarī ca manoharā || 44||
jagadgaurīti vikhyātā tena sā pūjitā satī |
śivaśiṣyā ca sā devī tena śaivī prakīrtitā ||
viṣṇubhaktātīva śaśvadvaiṣṇavī tena kīrtitā |
nāgānāṃ prāṇarakṣitrī yajñe pārīkṣitasya ca || 46 ||
nāgeśvarīti vikhyātā sā nāgabhaginīti ca |
viṣaṃ saṃhartumīśā yā tena viṣaharī smṛtā || 47 ||
siddhiyogaṃ harātprāpa tena sā siddhayoginī |
mahājñānaṃ ca yogaṃ ca mṛtasaṃjīvanī parām ||48||
mahājñānayutāṃ tāṃ ca pravadaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ |
āstīkasya munīṃdrasya mātā sā'pi tapasvinī ||
āstīkamātā vijñātā jagatyāṃ supratiṣṭhitā |
priyā munerjaratkārormunīṃdrasya mahātmanaḥ || 50 ||
yoginī viśvapūjyasya jaratkāpriyā tataḥ |
jaratkārurjagadgaurī manasā siddhayoginī || 51 ||
vaiṣṇavī nāgabhaginī śaivī nāgeśvarī tathā |
jaratkārupriyāstīkamātā viṣahareti ca || 52 ||
mahājñānayutā caiva sā devī viśvapūjitā |
dvādaśaitāni nāmāni pūjākāle tu yaḥ paṭhet ||53||
tasya nāgabhayaṃ nāsti tasya vaṃśodbhavasya ca |
nāgabhīte ca śayane nāgagraste ca maṃdire || 54 ||
nāgaśobhe mahādurge nāgaveṣṭitavihe |
idaṃ stotraṃ paṭhitvā tu mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 55 ||
nityaṃ paṭhedyastaṃ dṛṣṭvā nāgavargaḥ palāyate |
daśalakṣajapenava stotrasiddhirbhavennṛṇām ||56||
stotra siddhirbhavedyasya sa viṣaṃ bhoktumīśvaraḥ |
nāgeśva bhūṣaṇaṃ kṛtvā sa bhavennāgavāhanaḥ ||57 ||
nāgāsano nāgatalpo mahāsiddho bhavennaraḥ |
ate ca viṣṇunā sādhaṃ krīḍatyeva divāniśam 58||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe navamaskaṃdhe nāradanārāyaṇasaṃvāde saptacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||47||
atha aṣṭacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
mattaḥ pūjāvidhānaṃ ca śrūyatāṃ munipuṃgava |
dhyānaṃ ca sāmavedoktaṃ proktaṃ devīvidhānakam || 1 ||
śveta caṃpakavarṇābhāṃ -ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām |
vahniśuddhāṃ śukādhānāṃ nāgayajñopavītinīm ||2||
mahājñānayutāṃ tāṃ ca pravarajñānināṃ varām |
siddhādhiṣṭhātṛdevīṃ ca siddhāṃ siddhipradāṃ bhaje || 3 |
iti dhyātvā ca tāṃ devīṃ mūlenaiva prapūjayet |
naivedya vividhairdhūpaiḥ puṣpagaṃdhānulepanaiḥ ||4||
mūlamaṃtraiśca vedoktairbhaktānāṃ vāṃchitapradaḥ |
mune kalpatarurnāma susiddho dvādaśākṣaraḥ ||5||
oṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ klīṃ aiṃ manasā devyai svāheti kīrtitaḥ |
pañcalakṣajapenaiva mantrasiddhirbhavennṛṇām ||6||

mantrasiddhirbhavedyasya sa siddho jagatītale |
sudhāsamaṃ viṣaṃ tasya dhanvaṃtarisamo bhavet ||7||
brahmansnātvā tu saṃkrāṃtyāṃ gūḍhaśālāsu yatnataḥ |
āvāhya devīmīśānāṃ pūjayedyo'tibhaktitaḥ || 8 ||
pañcamyāṃ manasāṃ dhyāyan devyai dadyācca yo balim |
dhanavānputravāṃścaiva kīrtimānsa bhaveddhruvam ||9||
pūjāvidhānaṃ kathitaṃ tadākhyānaṃ niśāmaya |
kathayāmi mahābhāga yacchrutaṃ dharmavaktrataḥ || 10 ||
nāgabhayākrāṃtā babhūvurmānavā bhuvi |
gatāste śaraṇaṃ sarve kaśyapaṃ munipuṃgavam || 11 ||
purā brahmaṇaḥ || 12 ||
maṃtrāṃśca sasṛje bhītaḥ kaśyapo brahmaṇānvitaḥ | vedabījānusāreṇa copadeśena
mantrādhiṣṭhātṛdevīṃ tāṃ manasāṃ sasṛje tadā |
tapasā manasā tena babhūva manasā ca sā || 13 ||
kumārī sā ca saṃbhūtā jagāma śaṃkarālayam |
bhaktyā saṃpūjya kailāse tuṣṭāva caṃdraśekharam ||14||
divyavarṣasahasraṃ taṃ siṣeve ca muneḥ sutā |
āśutoṣo maheśaśca tāṃ ca tuṣṭo babhūva ha || 15 ||
mahājñānaṃ dadau tasyai pāṭhayāmāsa sāma ca |
kṛṣṇamaṃtra kalpataruṃ dadāvaṣṭākṣaraṃ mune || 16 ||
lakṣmīmāyākāmabījaṃ ṅentaṃ kṛṣṇapadaṃ tataḥ |
trailokya maṅgalaṃ nāma kavacaṃ pūjanakramam || 17||
vedoktaṃ sarvasaṃmatam |
prāpya mṛtyuṃjayānmaṃtraṃ sā satī ca muneḥ sutā 18 ||
puraścaryākramaṃ cāpi
jagāma tapase sādhvī puṣkaraṃ śaṃkarājñayā |
triyugaṃ ca tapastaptvā kṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ || 19 ||
siddhā babhūva sā devī dadarśa purataḥ prabhum |
dṛṣṭvā kṛśāṃgoṃ bālāṃ kṛpayā ca kṛpānidhiḥ || 20 ||
pūjāṃ ca kārayāmāsa cakāra ca svayaṃ hariḥ |
varaṃ ca pradadau tasyai pūjitā tvaṃ bhave bhava || 21 ||
varaṃ dattvā ca kalyāṇyai tataścāṃtardadhe hariḥ |
prathame pūjitā sā ca kṛṣṇena paramātmanā || 22||
dvitīye śaṅkareṇaiva kaśyapena sureṇa ca |
muninā manunā caiva nāgena mānavādibhiḥ ||23|
babhūva pūjitā sā ca triṣu lokeṣu suvratā |
jaratkārumunīṃdrāya kaśyapastāṃ dadau purā ||24||
ayācito muniśreṣṭho jagrāha brāhmaṇājñayā |
kṛtvodvā homahāyogī viśrāṃtastapasā ciram ||25||
suṣvāpa devyā jaghane vaṭamūle ca puṣkare |
nidrāṃ jagāma sa muniḥ smṛtvā nidreśamīśvaram 26 ||
jagāmāstaṃ dinakara : sāyaṃkāla upasthite |
saṃcitya manasā sādhvī manasā sā pativratā 27 ||
satī |
akṛtvā paścimāṃ saṃdhyāṃ nityāṃ caiva dvijanmanām ||
dharmalopabhayenaiva cakārālocanaṃ
patirmama |
nopatiṣṭhati yaḥ pūrvī nopāste yastu paścimām 29 ||
brahmahatyādikaṃ pāpaṃ labhiṣyati
sa sarvatrāśucinityaṃ brahmahatyādikaṃ labhet |
vedoktamiti saṃcitya bodhayāmāsa suṃdarī ||30||
sa ca buddho muniśreṣṭhastāṃ cukopa bhṛśaṃ mune |
muniruvāca
kathaṃ me sukhinaḥ sādhvi nidrābhaṃgaḥ kṛtastvayā ||31||
yā bhartuśvāpakāriṇī |
tapaścānaśanaṃ caiva vrataṃ dānādikaṃ ca yat || 32 ||
vyathaṃ vratādikaṃ tasyā

bharturapriyakāriṇyāḥ sarvaṃ bhavati niṣphalam |
yaḥ preyaḥ pūjita śrīkṛṣṇaḥ pūjitastayā || 33||
pativratāvratārthaṃ ca patirūpo hariḥ svayam |
sarvadānaṃ sarvayajñaḥ sarvatīrtha niṣevaṇam ||34||
sarvavrataṃ tapaḥ sarvamupavāsādikaṃ ca yat |
sarvadharmaśva satyaṃ ca sarvadevaprapūjanam ||35||
tatsavaṃ svāmisevāyāḥ kalāṃ nārhati ṣoḍaśīm |
puṇye ca bhārate varṣe patisevāṃ karoti yā || 36 ||
vaikuṃṭhe svāminā sārdhaṃ sā yāti brahmaṇaḥ padam |
vipriyaṃ kurute bhartuvipriyaṃ vadati priyam ||37||
asatkule prasūtā hi tatphalaṃ śrūyatāṃ sati |
kumbhīpākaṃ vrajetsā ca yāvaccaṃdra divākarī ||38||
tato bhavati cāṃḍālī patiputravivarjitā |
ityuktvā ca muniśreṣṭho babhūva sphuritādharaḥ || 39||
cakaṃpe tena sā sādhvī bhayenovāca taṃ patim |
sādhvyuvāca
saṃdhyālopabhayenaiva nidrābhaṃga: kṛtastava ||40||
mama suvrata |
śṛṃgārāhāranidrāṇāṃ yaśca bhaṃgaṃ karoti hi ||41 ||
kuru śāṃti mahābhāga duṣṭāyā
sa vrajetkālasūtraṃ vai yāvaccaṃdradivākarau |
ityuktvā manasā devī svāminaścaraṇāṃbuje ||42||
papāta bhaktyā bhītā sā ruroda ca punaḥ punaḥ |
kupitaṃ ca muniṃ dṛṣṭvā śrīsūryaṃ śatrumudyatam ||43||
tatrājagāma bhagavānsaṃdhyayā saha nārada |
tatrāgatya muniṃ samyaguvāca bhāskaraḥ svayam 44||
vinayena ca bhītaśva tayā saha yathocitam |
bhāskara uvāca
sūryāstasamayaṃ dṛṣṭvā sādhvī dharmabhayena ca || 45 ||
nodhayāmāsa tvāṃ vipra śaraṇaṃ tvāmahaṃ gataḥ |
kṣamasva bhagavanbrahmanmāṃ śaptuṃ nocitaṃ mune ||46||
brāhmaṇānāṃ ca hṛdayaṃ navanītasamaṃ sadā |
teṣāṃ kṣaṇādhaṃ krodhaśva tato bhasma bhavejjagat 47||
punaḥ sraṣṭuṃ dvijaḥ śakto na tejasvī dvijātparaḥ |
brāhmaṇo brahmaṇo vaṃśaḥ prajvalanbrahmatejasā || 48 ||
śrīkṛṣṇaṃ bhāvayennityaṃ brahmajyātiḥ sanātanam |
sūryasya vacanaṃ śrutvā dvijastuṣṭo babhūva ha || 49|| .
sūryo jagāma svasthānaṃ gṛhītvā brāhmaṇāśiṣam |
tatyāja manasāṃ vipraḥ pratijñāpālanāya ca ||50||
rudatīṃ śokasaṃyuktāṃ hṛdayena vidūyatā |
sā sasmāra guruṃ śaṃbhumiṣṭadevaṃ vidhi harim ||51||
kaśyapaṃ janmadātāraṃ vipattau bhayakaśitā |
tatrājagāma gopośo bhagavāñchaṃbhareva ca ||52||
vidhiśva kaśyapaścaiva manasā paricititaḥ |
dṛṣṭā vipro'bhīṣṭadevaṃ nirguṇaṃ prakṛteḥ param ||53||
tuṣṭāva parayā bhakyā praṇanāma muhurmuhu: |
namaścakāra śaṃbhuṃ ca brahmāṇaṃ kaśyapaṃ tathā || 54 ||
kathamāgamanaṃ devā iti praśnaṃ cakāra saḥ |
brahmā tadracanaṃ śrutvā sahasā samayocitam ||55 ||
pratyuvāca namaskṛtya hṛṣīkeśapadāṃbujam |
yadi tyaktā dharmapatnī dharmiṣṭhā manamā satī || 56 ||

kuruṣvāsyāṃ sṛtotpatti strodharmapālanāya vai |
jāyāyāṃ ca sutotpatti kṛtvā paścāttyajenmune ||57||
akṛtvā tu sutotpatti virāgī yastyajetpriyām |
sravate tasya puṇyaṃ ca cālanyā ca yathā jalam ||58||
brahmaṇo vacanaṃ śrutvā jaratkārurmunīśvaraḥ |
cakāra nābhisaṃsparāṃ yogena maṃtrapūrvakam ||59||
manasāyā muniśreṣṭho mutriśreṣṭha uvāca tām |
jarutkāruruvāca
garbheṇānena manase tava putro bhaviṣyati || 60 ||
jitendriyāṇāṃ pravaro dhārmiko brāhmaṇāgraṇīḥ |
tejasvī ca tapasvī ca yaśasvī ca guṇānvitaḥ || 61 ||
varo vedavidāṃ caiva jñānināṃ yogināṃ tathā |
sa ca putro viṣṇusakto dhārmikaḥ kulamuddharet || 62 ||
nṛtyanti pitaraḥ sarve janmamātreṇa vai mudā |
pativratā suśīlā yā sā priyā priyavādino || 63 ||
dharmiṣṭhā putramātā ca kulastrī kulapālikā |
haribhaktiprado baṃdhurna cābhīṣṭasukhadaḥ ||64 ||
yo baṃdhuścetsa ca pitā harivartmapradarśakaḥ |
sā garbhadhāriṇī yā ca garbhāvāsa vimocanī || 65 ||
dayārūpā ca bhagino yamabhītivimocanī |
viṣṇumaṃtrapradātā ca sa guruviṣṇubhatidaḥ || 66 ||
guruśca jñānado yo hi yajjñānaṃ kṛṣṇabhāvanam |
ābrahmastaṃbaparyantaṃ yato viśvaṃ carācaram ||67 ||
āvirbhūtaṃ tirobhūtaṃ kiṃ vā jñānaṃ tadanyataḥ |
vedajaṃ yajñajaṃ yadyattatsāraṃ harisevanam || 68 ||
tattvānāṃ sārabhūtaṃ ca hareranyadviḍaṃbanam |
dattaṃ jñānaṃ mayā tubhyaṃ sa svāmī jñānado hi yaḥ || 69 ||
jñānātpramucyate bandhātsa ripuryo hi bandhadaḥ |
viṣṇu bhaktiyutaṃ jñānaṃ no dadāti hi yo guruḥ || 70 ||
sa ripuḥ śiṣyaghātī ca yato baṃdhānna mocayet |
jananīṃ garbhajakleśādyamayātanayā tathā || 71 ||
na mocayedyaḥ sa kathaṃ gurustāto hi bāṃdhavaḥ |
paramānandarūpaṃ ca kṛṣṇamārgamanaśvaram ||72||
na darśayedyaḥ satataṃ kīdṛśo bāṃdhavo nṛṇām |
bhaja sādhvi paraṃ brahmācyutaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ ca nirguṇam ||73||
nirmūlaṃ ca bhavetpuṃsāṃ karma vai tasya sevayā |
mayā chalena tvaṃ tyaktā kṣamasvaitanmama priye || 74 || ||
kṣamāśrutānāṃ sādhvīnāṃ sattvātkrodho na vidyate |
puṣkaraṃ tapase yāmi gaccha devi yathāsukham ||75 ||
śrīkṛṣṇacaraṇāṃbhoje niḥspṛhāṇāṃ manorathāḥ |
jaratkāruvacaḥ śrutvā manasā śokakātarā ||76||
sāśrunetrā ca vinayāduvāca prāṇavallabham |
manasovāca
doṣo nāstyeva me tyaktuṃ nidrābhaṃgena te prabho || 77 ||
yatra smarāmi tvāṃ nityaṃ tatra māmāgamiṣyasi |
bandhubhedaḥ kleśatamaḥ putrabhedastataḥ param ||78||
prāṇeśabhedaḥ prāṇānāṃ vicchedātsarvataḥ paraḥ |
patiḥ pativratānāṃ tu śataputrādhikaṃ priyaḥ || 79||
sarvasmāttu priyaḥ strīṇāṃ priyastenocyate budhaiḥ |
putre yathaikaputrāṇāṃ vaiṣṇavānāṃ yathā harī || 80 ||

netre yathaikanetrāṇāṃ tṛṣitānāṃ yathā jale |
kṣudhitānāṃ yathā'nne ca kāmukānāṃ ca maithune 81 ||
yathā parasve corāṇāṃ yathā jāre kuyoṣitām |
viduṣāṃ ca yathā śāstre vāṇijye vaṇijāṃ yathā82 ||
tathā śaśvanmanaḥ kānte sādhvīnāṃ yoṣitāṃ prabhau |
ityuktvā manasā devī papāta svāminaḥ pade || 83 ||
kṣaṇaṃ cakāra kroḍe tāṃ kṛpayā ca kṛpānidhiḥ |
netrodakena manasāṃ snāpayāmāsa tāṃ muniḥ ||84||
sāśrunetrā muneḥ kroḍaṃ siṣeca bhedakātarā |
tadā jñānena tau dvau ca viśoko saṃbabhūvatuḥ || 85 ||
smāraṃ smāraṃ padāṃbhojaṃ kṛṣṇasya paramātmanaḥ |
jagāma tapase vipraḥ svakāṃtāṃ saṃprabodhya ca || 86 ||
jagāma manasā śaṃbho: kailāsaṃ maṃdiraṃ guroḥ |
pārvatī bodhayāmāsa manasāṃ śokakarśitām || 87||
śivaśvātīva jñānena śivena ca śivālayaḥ |
supraśaste dine sādhvī suṣuve maṅgalakṣaṇe ||88||
nārāyaṇāṃśaṃ putraṃ taṃ yogināṃ jñānināṃ gurum |
garbhasthito mahājñānaṃ śrutvā śaṃkaravaktrataḥ || 89||
saṃbabhūva ca yogīṃdro yogināṃ jñānināṃ guruḥ |
jātakaṃ kārayāmāsa vācayāmāsa maṅgalam ||10||
vedāṃśca pāṭhayāmāsa śivāya ca śivaḥ śiśoḥ |
maṇiratnakirīṭāṃśca brāhmaṇebhyo dadau śivaḥ || 91 ||
pārvatī ca gavāṃ lakṣaṃ ratnāni vividhāni ca |
śaṃbhuśca caturo vedānvedāṃgānitarāṃstathā || 92||
bālakaṃ pāṭhayāmāsa jñānaṃ mṛtyuñjayaṃ param |
bhaktirastyadhikā kānte'bhīṣṭadeve gurau tathā || 93||
yasyāstena ca tatputro babhūvāstīka eva ca |
jagāma tapase viṣṇoḥ puṣkaraṃ śaṃkarājñayā ||94||
saṃprāpya ca mahāmantraṃ tataśca paramātmanaḥ |
divyaṃ varṣatrilakṣaṃ ca tapastaptvā tapodhanaḥ || 95 ||
ājagāma mahāyogī namaskatuṃ śivaṃ prabhum |
śaṃkaraṃ ca namaskṛtya sthitvā tatraiva bālakaḥ || 96 ||
sā cājagāma manasā kaśyapasyāśramaṃ pituḥ |
tāṃ saputrāṃ sutāṃ dṛṣṭvā mudaṃ prāpa prajāpatiḥ || 97 ||
śatalakṣaṃ ca ratnānāṃ brāhmaṇebhyo dadī mune |
brāhmaṇānbhojayāmāsa so'saṃkhyān śreyase śiśoḥ ||
aditiśca ditiścānyā mudaṃ prāpa parantapa |
sā saputrā ca suciraṃ tasthau tātālaye tadā || 99 ||
tadīyaṃ punarākhyānaṃ vakṣyāmi tanniśāmaya |
athābhimanyutanaye brahmaśāpaḥ parīkṣite || 100 || |
babhūva sahasā brahman daivadoṣeṇa karmaṇā |
saptāhe samatīte tu takṣakastvāṃ cadhakṣyati || 101 ||
śaśāpa śṛṅgī tatraiva kauśikyāśca jalena vai |
rājā śrutvā tatpravṛtti nirvātasthānamāgataḥ || 102 ||
tatra tasthau ca saptāhaṃ deharakṣaṇatatparaḥ |
saptāhe samatāte tu gacchataṃ takṣakaṃ pathi || 103||
dhanvaṃtarirnṛpaṃ bhoktuṃ dadarśa gāmukaḥ pathi |
tayorbabhūva saṃvāda: suprītiśca parasparam ||104||
dhanvaṃtarirmaṇi prāpa takṣakaḥ svecchayā dadau |
sa yayau taṃ gṛhītvā tu saṃtuṣṭo hṛṣṭamānasaḥ || 105 ||
takṣako bhakṣayāmāsa nṛpaṃ taṃ mañcake sthitam |
rājā jagāma tarasā dehaṃ tyaktvā paratra ca || 106||
saṃskāraṃ kārayāmāsa piturve janamejayaḥ |
rājā cakāra yajñaṃ ca sarpasatraṃ tato mune || 107 ||
prāṇāṃstatyāja sarpāṇāṃ samūho brahmatejasā |
sa takṣako vai bhītastu maheṃdraṃ śaraṇaṃ yayau || 108 ||

seṃdraṃ ca takṣakaṃ haṃtuṃ vipravargaḥ samudyataḥ |
atha devāśca seṃdrāśca saṃjagmurmanasāṃtikam ||109 ||
tāṃ tuṣṭāva mahendraśca bhayakātaravihvalaḥ |
tata āstīka āgatya yajñaṃ ca mānurājñayā || 110 ||
maheṃdratakṣakaprāṇānyayāce bhūmipaṃ param |
dadau varaṃ nṛpaśreṣṭhaḥ kṛpayā brāhmaṇājñayā || 111 ||
yajñaṃ samāpya viprebhyo dakṣiṇāṃ ca dadau mudā |
viprāśca munayo devā gatvā ca manasāṃtikam 112 ||
mananāṃ pūjayāmāsustuṣṭuvuśca pṛthak pṛthak |
śakraḥ saṃbhṛtasaṃbhāro bhaktiyuktaḥ sadā śuciḥ || 113 ||
tuṣṭāva paramādarāt |
natvā ṣoḍaśopacāraṃ baliṃ ca tatpriyaṃ tadā || 114 ||
manasāṃ pūjayāmāsa
pradadau parituṣṭaśca brahmaviṣṇuśivājñayā |
saṃpūjya manasāṃ devīṃ prayayuḥ svālayaṃ ca te || 115 ||
ityevaṃ kathitaṃ sarvaṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ śrotumicchasi |
nārada uvāca
kena stotreṇa tuṣṭāva maheṃdro manasāṃ satīm || 116||
pūjāvidhikramaṃ tasyāḥ śrotumicchāmi tattvataḥ |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
susnātaḥ śucirācāṃto dhṛtvā dhaute ca vāsasī ||117||
ratnasiṃhāsane devīṃ vāsayāmāsa bhaktitaḥ |
svagaṃgāyā jalenaiva ratnakuṃbhasthitena ca || 118 ||
snāpayāmāsa manasāṃ mahendro vedamaṃtrataḥ |
vāsavī vāsayāmāsa vahniśuddhe manohare || 119||
sarvāṅge caṃdanaṃ kṛtvā pādābhyaṃ bhaktisaṃyutaḥ |
gaṇeśaṃ ca dineśaṃ ca vahni. viṣṇuṃ śivaṃ śivām || 120||
saṃpūjyādau devaṣaṭkaṃ pūjayāmāsa tāṃ satīm |
oṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ manasā devyai svāhetyevaṃ ca maṃtrataḥ || 121 ||
daśākṣareṇa mūlena dadau savaṃ yathocitam |
dattvā ṣoḍaśopacārāndurlabhāndevanāyakaḥ || 122||
pūjayāmāsa bhaktayā ca viṣṇunā prerito mudā |
vādyaṃ nānāprakāraṃ ca vādayāmāsa tatra vai || 123||
puṣpavṛṣṭiśca nabhaso manasopari |
devapriyājñayā tatra brahmaviṣṇuśivājñayā || 124||
babhūva
tuṣṭāva sāśrunetraiśca pulakāṃkitavigrahaḥ |
puraṃdara uvāca
devi tvāṃ stotumicchāmi sādhvīnāṃ pravarāṃ barām || 125 ||
parātparāṃ ca paramāṃ na hi stotuṃ kṣamo'dhunā |

Wo śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 48
stotrāṇāṃ lakṣaṇaṃ vede svabhāvākhyānatatparam || 126 ||
na kṣamaḥ prakṛte vaktuṃ guṇānāṃ gaṇanāṃ tava |
śuddhasattvasvarūpā tvaṃ kopahiṃsādivarjitā || 127||
na ca śakto munistena tyaktuṃ yācñā kṛtā yataḥ |
tvaṃ mayā pūjitā sādhvī jananī me yathā'ditiḥ || 128||
dayārūpā ca bhaginī kṣamārūpā yathā prasūḥ |
tvayā meṃ rakṣitāḥ prāṇāḥ putradārāḥ sureśvari || 129 ||
ahaṃ karomi tvatpūjāṃ prītiśca vardhatāṃ sadā |
nityā yadyapi pūjyā tvaṃ sarvatra jagadaṃbike 130 ||
tathāpi tava pūjāṃ ca vardhayāmi sureśvari |
ye tvāmāṣāḍhasaṃkrāṃtyāṃ pūjayiṣyaṃti bhaktitaḥ 131 ||
paṃcamyāṃ manasākhyāyāṃ māsānte vā dine dine |
putrapautrādayasteṣāṃ vardhante ca dhanāni vai || 132||
yaśasvinaḥ kīrtimaṃto vidyāvanto guṇānvitāḥ |
ye tvāṃ na pūjayiṣyati nidaṃtyajñānato janāḥ 133 ||
lakṣmīhīnā bhaviṣyanti teṣāṃ nāgabhayaṃ sadā |
tvaṃ svayaṃ sarvalakṣmīśca vaikuṃṭhe kamalālayā || 134||
nārāyaṇāṃśo bhagavāñjaratkārurmunīśvaraḥ |
tapasā tejasā tvāṃ ca manasā sasṛje pitā || 135 ||
asmākaṃ rakṣaṇāyaiva tena tvaṃ manasābhidhā |
manasādevi śaktathā tvaṃ svātmanā siddhayoginī || 136 ||
tena tvaṃ manasādevī pūjitā vaṃditā bhava |
ye bhaktayā manasāṃ devāḥ pūjayantyaniśaṃ bhṛśam ||137||
tena tvāṃ manasāṃ devīṃ pravadaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ |
satyasvarūpā devi tvaṃ dāśvatsatya niṣevaṇāt || 138 ||
yo hi tvāṃ bhāvayennityaṃ sa tvāṃ prāpnoti tatparaḥ |
indraśca manasāṃ stutvā gṛhītvā bhaginīvaram ||139||
prajagāma svabhavanaṃ bhūṣayā saparicchadam |
putreṇa sārdhaṃ sā devī ciraṃ tasthau piturgṛhe || 140 ||
bhrātṛbhiḥ pūjitā śaravanmānyā vaṃdyā ca sarvataḥ |
golokātsurabhirbrahman tatrāgatya supūjitām || 141 ||
tāṃ snāpayitvā kṣīreṇa pūjayāmāsa sādaram |
jñānaṃ ca kathayāmāsa gopyaṃ sarvaṃ sudurlabham || 142 ||
tathā devaḥ pūjitā sā svarlokaṃ ca punaryayau |
indrastotraṃ puṇyabījaṃ manasāṃ pūjayetpaṭhet || 143 ||

tasya nāgabhayaṃ nāsti tasya vaṃśodbhavasya ca |
viṣaṃ bhavetsudhātulyaṃ siddhastotro yadā bhavet || 144 ||
paṃcalakṣajapenaiva siddhastotrī bhavennaraḥ |
sarpaśāyī bhavetso'pi niścitaṃ sarpavāhanaḥ || 145 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe'ṣṭacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 48 ||
atha ekonapaṃcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
kā vā sā surabhirdevī golokādāgatā ca yā |
tajanmacaritaṃ brahmañchrotumicchāmi yatnataḥ || 1 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
gavāmadhiṣṭhātṛdevī gavāmādyā gavāṃ prasūḥ |
gavāṃ pradhānā surabhirgoloke sā samudbhavā || 2 ||
sarvādisṛṣṭeśvaritaṃ kayāma niśāmaya |
babhūva yena tajjanma purā vṛndāvane vane || 3 ||
ekadā rātrikānātha cavayā saha kautukī |
gopāṃganāparivṛto puṇyaṃ vṛndāvanaṃ yayau || 4 ||
sahasā tatra rahasi vijahāra sa kautukāt |
vabhūva kṣīrapānecchā tasya svecchāmayasya ca || 5 ||
sasṛje surabhi devīṃ līlayā vāmapārśvataḥ |
vatsayuktāṃ dugdhavatīṃ vatso nāma manorathaḥ || 6 ||
dṛṣṭvā savatsāṃ śrīdāmā navabhāṇḍe dudoha ca |
kṣoraṃ sudhātiriktaṃ ca janmamṛtyujarāharam || 7 ||
tadutthaṃ ca payaḥ svādu papī gopīpatiḥ svayam |
saro babhūva payasāṃ bhāṇḍavisraṃsanena ca || 8 ||
dīrgha ca vistṛtaṃ caiva paritaḥ śatayojanam |
goloke'yaṃ prasiddhaśca so'pi kṣīrasarovaraḥ || 9 ||
gopikānāṃ ca rādhāyāḥ krīḍānāpī babhūva sā |
ratnedraracitā pūrṇaṃ bhūtā cāpīśvareśchayā || 10 ||
babhūva kāmadhenūnāṃ sahasā lakṣa koṭayaḥ |
yāvaṃtastatra gopāśca suramyā lomakūpataḥ || 11||
tāsāṃ putrāśca bahavaḥ saṃbabhūvurasaṃkhyakāḥ |
kathitā ca gavāṃ sṛṣṭistayā ca pūritaṃ jagat || 12||
pūjāṃ cakāra bhagavān surabhyāśca purā mune |
tato babhūva tatpūjā triṣu lokeṣu durlabhā ||13||
do pānvitā'paradine śrīkṛṣṇasyājñayā hareḥ |
babhūva surabhiḥ pūjyā dharmavaktrādidaṃ śrutam || 14||
dhyānaṃ stotraṃ mūlamaṃtraṃ yadyatpūjāvidhikramam |
vedoktaṃ ca mahābhā~ga nibodha kathayāmi te || 15 ||
oṃ surabhyai nabha iti maṃtrastasyāḥ paḍakṣaraḥ |
siddho lakṣajapenaiva bhaktānāṃ kalpapādapaḥ || 16 ||
vyānaṃ yajurvedagītaṃ tasyāḥ pūjā ca sarvataḥ |
ṛddhidā vṛddhidā caiva muktidā sarvakāmadā || 17 ||
lakṣmīsvarūpāṃ paramāṃ rādhāsahacarī parām |
gavāmadhiṣṭhātṛdevoṃ gavāmādyāṃ gavāṃ prasūm ||18||
pavitrarūpāṃ pūtāṃ ca bhaktānāṃ sarvakāmadām |
yayā pūtaṃ sarvaviśvaṃ tāṃ devīṃ surabhiṃ bhaje ||19||
ghaṭe vā dhenuśirasi baṃdhastaṃbhe gavāmapi |
śālagrāme jalāgnau vā surabhi pūjayedvijaḥ ||20||
dīpānvitāparadine pūrvāhe bhaktisaṃyutaḥ |
yaḥ pūjayaicca surabhi sa ca pūjyo bhavedbhuvi ||21||

ekadā triṣu lokeṣu varāhe viṣṇumāyayā |
kṣīraṃ jahāra surabhiścititāśca surādayaḥ ||22||
ne gatvā brahmaloke ca brahmāṇaṃ tuṣṭuvustadā |
tadājñayā ca surabhi tuṣṭāva pākaśāsanaḥ ||23||
purandara uvāca
namo devyai mahādevyai surabhya ca namo namaḥ |
gavāṃ bījasvarūpāyai namaste jagadaṃbike || 24 ||
namo rādhāpriyāyai ca padmāśāyai namo namaḥ |
namaḥ kṛṣṇapriyāyai ca gavāṃ mātre namo namaḥ ||25||
kalpavṛkṣasvarūpāyai sarveṣāṃ satataṃ pare |
kṣīradāyai dhanadāyai buddhidāyai namo namaḥ || 26 |
śubhāyai ca subhadrāyai gopradāyai namo namaḥ |
yaśodāyai kīrtidāyai dharmadāyai namo namaḥ ||27||
stotraśravaṇamātreṇa tu hṛṣṭā jagatprasūḥ |
āvirbabhūva tatraiva brahmaloke sanātanī || 28 ||
maheṃdrāya varaṃ dattvā vāṃchitaṃ cāpi durlabham |
jagāma sā ca golokaṃ yayurdevādayo gṛham || 29 ||
babhūva viśvaṃ sahasā sahasā dugdhapūrṇaṃ ca nārada |
dugdhaṃ ghṛtaṃ tato yajñastataḥ prītiḥ surasya ca ||30||
idaṃ stotraṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ bhaniyuktaśca yaḥ paṭhet |
sa gomān dhanavāṃścaiva kīrtimānputravāṃstathā ||31|
sa snātaḥ sarvatīrtheṣu sarvayajñeṣu dīkṣitaḥ |
iha loke sukhaṃ bhuktvā yātyaṃte kṛṣṇamandire ||32||
suciraṃ nivasettatra karoti kṛṣṇasevanam |
na punarbhavanaṃ tatra brahmaputro bhavettataḥ || 33 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskam ekonapaṃcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 49 ||
atha paṃcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
śrutaṃ sarvamupākhyānaṃ prakṛtīnāṃ yathātatham |
yacchrutvā mucyate jaṃturjanmasaṃsārabaṃdhanāt || 1||
adhunā śrotumicchāmi rahasyaṃ vedagopitam |
rādhāyāścaiva durgāyā vidhānaṃ śruticoditam || 2 ||
mahimā varṇito'tīva bhavatā parayordvayoḥ |
śrutvā taṃ gataṃ cetona kasya syānmunīśvara || 3 ||
babhoraṃśo jagatsarvaṃ yanniyamyaṃ carācaram |
yayorbhavatyā bhavenmuktistadvidhānaṃ vadādhunā || 4 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śraṇu nārada vakṣyāmi rahasyaṃ śruticoditam |
yanna kasyāpi cākhyātaṃ sārātsāraṃ parātparam ||5
śrutvā parasmai no vācyaṃ yato'tīva rahasyakam |
mūlaprakṛtirūpiṇyāḥ saṃvido jagadudbhave ||6||
prādurbhūtaṃ śaktiyugmaṃ prāṇabuddhayadhidaivatam |
jīvānāṃ caiva sarveṣāṃ niyantu prerakaṃ sadā ||st
tadadhīnaṃ jagatsarvaṃ virāḍādicarācaram |
yāvattayoḥ prasādona tāvanmokṣo hi durlabhaḥ ||8||

tatastayoḥ prasādārthaṃ nityaṃ seveta tadvayam |
tatrādī rādhikāmaṃtraṃ śṛṇu nārada bhaktitaḥ || 9||
brahmaviṣṇvādibhinityaṃ sevito yaḥ parātparam |
śrīrādheti caturthyataṃ vahnerjāyā tataḥ param ||10||
ṣaḍakṣaro mahāmantrī dharmādyartha prakāśakaḥ |
māyābījādikaścāyaṃ vāṃchācitāmaṇiḥ smṛtaḥ || 11||
vaktrakoṭisahasraṃstu jihvākoṭiśatairapi |
etanmantrasya māhātmyaṃ varṇituṃ naiva śakyate || 12||
jagrāha prathamaṃ mantraṃ śrīkṛṣṇo bhaktitatparaḥ |
upadeśānmūladevyā goloke rāsamaṇḍale ||13||
viṣṇustenopadiṣṭastu tena brahmā virāṭ tathā |
tena dharmastena cāhamityeṣā hi paramparā || 14 ||
ahaṃ japāmi taṃ mantraṃ tenāhamṛṣirīḍitaḥ |
brahmādyāḥ sakalā devā nityaṃ dhyāyaṃti tāṃ mudā ||15||
kṛṣṇārcāyāṃ nādhikāro yato rādhārcanaṃ vinā |
vaiṣṇavaiḥ sakalaistasmātkartavyaṃ rādhikācanam ||16||
kṛṣṇāṇādhidevī sā tadadhīno vibhuryataḥ |
rāseśvarī tasya nityaṃ tayā hono na tiṣṭhati ||17||
rāghnāti sakalānkāmāṃstasmādrādheti kīrtitā |
atroktānāṃ manūnāṃ ca ṛṣirasmyahameva ca ||18||
chaṃdacaṃ devī gāyatrī devatā'tra ca rādhikā |
tāro bījaṃ śaktibījaṃ śaktistu parikīrtitā || 19||
kartavyānītaratra ca |
atha dhyāyenmahādevīṃ rādhikāṃ rāsanāyikām || 20 ||
mūla vṛttyā ṣaḍaṃgāni
pūrvoktarītyā tu mune sāmavede vigītayā |
śvetacaṃpakavarṇābhāṃ śaradiṃdusamānanām ||21||
koṭicandrapratīkāśāṃ śaradambhojalocanām |
vibādharāṃ pṛthuśroṇīṃ kāñcīyutanitaṃbinīm ||22||
kuṃdapaṃktisamānābhadaṃta paṃktivirājitām |
kṣaumāṃbaraparīdhānāṃ vahniśuddhāṃ śukānvitām ||23||
īṣaddhāsyaprasannāsyāṃ karikumbhayugastanīm |
sadā dvādaśavarṣīyāṃ ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitām ||24||
śṛṅgāra siṃdhulaharīṃ bhaktānugrahakātarām |
mallikāmālatīmālā keśapāśavirājitām || 25 ||
sukumārāṃ galatikāṃ rāsamaṇḍalamadhyagām |
varābhayakarāṃ śāntāṃ śaśvatsusthirayauvanām ||26||
ratnasiṃhāsanāsīnāṃ gopīmaṃḍalanāyikām |
kṛṣṇaprāṇādhikāṃ vedaṃbodhitāṃ parameśvarīm ||27||
evaṃ dhyātvā tato bāhye śālagrāme ghaṭe'thavā |
yantre vā'ṣṭadale devīṃ pūjayettu vidhānataḥ || 28 ||
āvāhya devīṃ tatpaścādāsanādi pradīyatām |
mūlamantraṃ samuccārya cāsanādīni kalpayet ||29||
pādyaṃ tu pādayordadyānmastake'rdhya samīritam |
mukhe tvācamanīyaṃ syāttrivāraṃ mūlavidyayā ||30||
madhuparkaṃ tato dadyādekāṃ gāṃ ca payasvinīm |
tato nayetsnānaśālāṃ tāṃ ca tatraiva bhāvayet ||31||
abhyaṅgādisnānavidhiṃ kalpayitvā'tha vāsasī |
tataśca candanaṃ dadyānnānālaṃkārapūrvakam ||32||
pārijātaprasūnāni śatapatrādikāni ca || 33||
puṣpamālā bahuvidhāstulasī mañjarīyutāḥ
tataḥ kuryātpavitraṃ tatparivārārcanaṃ vibhoḥ | agnīśāsu ra vāyavyamadhyadivaṃgapūjanam 113811
paścādaṣṭadale dakṣiṇāvartato'grataḥ |
mālāvatīmagradale vahnikoṇe ca mādhavīm || 35||
kṛtvā

ratnamālāṃ dakṣiṇe ca nairṛtye tu suśīlakām |
paścāddale śaśikalāṃ pūjayenmatimānnaraḥ || 36 ||
mārute pārijātāṃ cāpyuttare ca parāvatīm |
īśānakoṇe saṃpūjyā suṃdarī priyakāriṇī || 37||
brāhmacādayastu tadvāhye'pyāśāpālāṃstu bhūpure |
vajrādikānyāyudhāni devīmitthaṃ prapūjayet || 38||
tato devīṃ sāvaraṇāṃ ganvādyairupacārakaiḥ |
rājopacārasahitaiḥ pūjayenmatimānnaraḥ ||39|
tataḥ stuvīta deveśīṃ stotrairnāmasahasrakaiḥ |
sahasrasaṃkhyaṃ ca japaṃ nityaṃ kuryātprayatnataḥ ||40||
ya evaṃ pūjayeddevoṃ rādhāṃ rāseśvarīṃ parām |
sa bhavedviṣṇutulyastu golokaṃ yāti saṃtatam || 41 ||
yaḥ kārtikyāṃ paurṇamāsyāṃ rādhājanmotsavaṃ budhaḥ |
kurute tasya sānnidhyaṃ dadyādrāseśvarī parā || 42 ||
kenacitkāraṇenaiva rādhā vṛndāvane vane |
vṛṣabhānusutā jātā golokasthāyinī sadā 43 ||
atroktānāṃ tu maṃtrāṇāṃ varṇasaṃkhyāvidhānataḥ |
puraścaraṇakarmoktaṃ daśāṃśaṃ homamācaret ||44 ||
tilaistrisvādusaṃyuktaṃrjuhuyādbhaktibhāvataḥ |
nārada uvāca
stotraṃ vada mune samyagyena devī prasīdati ||45 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
namaste parameśāni rāsamaṇḍalavāsini |
rāseśvari namaste'stu kṛṣṇaprāṇādhikapriye || 46 ||
namastrailokyajanani prasīda karuṇārṇave |
brahmaviṣṇvādibhirdevavaṃdyamānapadāṃbuje ||47|| 1
namaḥ sarasvatīrūpe namaḥ sāvitri śaṃkari |
gaṃgāpadmāvatīrūpe ṣaṣṭhi maṃgalacaṃḍike ||48 ||
namaste tulasīrūpe namo lakṣmīsvarūpiṇi |
namo durge bhagavati namaste sarvarūpiṇi || 49 ||
mūlaprakṛtirūpāṃ tvāṃ bhajāmaḥ karuṇārṇavām |
saṃsārasāgarādasmānuddharāṃba dayāṃ kuru ||50||
idaṃ stotraṃ trisandhyaṃ yaḥ paṭhedrāghāṃ smarannaraḥ |
na tasya durlabhaṃ kiñcitkadācicca bhaviṣyati || 51 ||
dehānte ca vasennityaṃ goloke rāsamaṇḍale |
idaṃ rahasyaṃ paramaṃ na cākhyeyaṃ tu kasyacit || 52 ||
adhunā śṛṇu vipreṃdra durgādevyā vidhānakam |
yasyāḥ smaraṇamātreṇa palāyante mahāpadaḥ || 53 ||
enāṃ na bhajate yo hi tādṛṅnāstyeva kutracit |
sarvopāsyā sarvamātā śaivī śaktirmahādbhutā ||14||
sarvabuddhayadhidevīyamantaryāmisvarūpiṇī |
durgasaṃkaṭa haitrīti durgeti prathitā bhuvi || 55 ||
vaiṣṇavānāṃ ca śaivānāmupāsyeyaṃ ca nityaśaḥ |
mūlaprakṛtirūpā sā sṛṣṭisthityantakāriṇī || 56 ||
tasyā navākṣaraṃ maṃtraṃ vakṣye maṃtrottamottamam |
vāgbhavaṃ śaṃbhuvanitā kāmabījaṃ tataḥ param ||57||
cāmuṇḍāyai padaṃ paścādvicce ityakṣaradrayam |
navākṣaro manuḥ prokto bhajatāṃ kalpapādapaḥ || 58 ||
brahmaviṣṇumaheśānā ṛṣayo'sya prakīrtitāḥ |
chandāsyuktāni satataṃ gāyatryuṣṇiganuṣṭubhaḥ || 59 ||

mahākālī mahālakṣmīḥ sarasvatyapi devatāḥ |
syādraktadaṃtikābījaṃ durgā ca bhrāmarī tathā || 60||
naṃdāśākaṃbharīdevyau bhīmā ca śaktayaḥ smṛtāḥ |
dharmārthakāmamokṣeṣu viniyoga udāhṛtaḥ || 61||
ṛṣicchaṃdo daivatāni maulau vaktre hṛdi nyaset |
stanayoḥ śaktibījāni nyasetsarvārthasiddhaye || 62||
vījatrayaṃścatubhiśca dvābhyāṃ sarveṇa caiva hi |
ṣaḍaṃgāni manoḥ kuryājjātiyuktāni deśikāḥ || 63 ||
śikhāyāṃ locanadvandve śrutināsānaneṣu ca |
gude nyasen mantravarṇānsarveṇa vyāpakaṃ caret || 64 ||
khaḍgacakragadābāṇacāpāni parighaṃ tathā |
śūlaṃ bhuśuṃḍīṃ ca śiraḥ śaṅkhaṃ saṃdadhatīṃ karaiḥ || 65 ||
mahākālīṃ trinayanāṃ nānābhūṣaṇabhūṣitām |
nīlāṃjanasamaprakhyāṃ daśapādānanāṃ bhaje || 66 ||
madhukaiṭabhanāśārthaṃ yāṃ tuṣṭāvāmbujāsanaḥ |
evaṃ dhyāyenmahākāloṃ kāmabījasvarūpiṇīm ||67||
akṣamālāṃ ca paraśuṃ gadeṣukuliśāni ca |
padmaṃ dhanuṣkuṇḍikāṃ ca daṃḍaśaktirmāsa tathā || 68 ||
carmāṃbujaṃ tathā ghaṇṭāṃ surāpātraṃ ca śūlakam |
pāśaṃ sudarśanaṃ caiva dadhatīmaruṇaprabhām ||69||
raktāmbujāsanagatāṃ māyābījasvarūpiṇīm |
mahālakṣmīṃ bhajedevaṃ mahiṣāsuramardinīm || 70 ||
ghaṇṭāśūle halaṃ śaṃkhaṃ musalaṃ ca sudarśanam |
dhanurbāṇānhastapadyairdadhānāṃ kundasannibhām ||71||
vāṇavījasvarūpiṇīm |
mahāsarasvatīṃ dhyāyetsaccidānandavigrahām ||72||
śumbhādidaitya saṃhartrī
yaṃtramasyāḥ śṛṇu prājña tryanaṃ ṣaṭkoṇasaṃyutam |
tato'ṣṭadalapadmaṃ ca caturviṃśatipatrakam ||73||
bhūgṛheṇa samāyuktaṃ yantramevaṃ vicintayet |
śālagrāme ghaṭe vā'pi yantre vā pratimāsu vā || 74 ||
yajeddevīmananyadhīḥ |
jayādiśakti saṃyukte pīṭhe devīṃ prapūjayet || 75 ||
bāṇaliṃge'thavā sūrye
pūrvakoṇe sarasvatyā sahitaṃ padmajaṃ yajet |
śriyā saha hari tatra nairṛte koṇake yajet ||76||
pārvatyā sahitaṃ śambhuṃ vāyukoṇe samarcayet |
devyā uttarataḥ pūjyaḥ siṃho vāme mahāsuram ||77||
mahiṣaṃ pūjayedante paṭkoṇeṣu yajetkramāt |
naṃdajāṃ raktadaṃtāṃ caṃ tathā śākaṃbharīṃ śivām || 78||
durgā bhīmāṃ bhrāmarī ca tato vasudaleṣu ca |
brāhmīṃ māheśvaroṃ caiva kaumārī vaiṣṇavīṃ tathā || 79 ||
vārāhīṃ nārasiṃhīṃ ca aindrī cāmuṃḍakāṃ tathā |
pūjayecca tataḥ paścāttatvapatreṣu pūrvataḥ || 80 ||
viṣṇumāyāṃ cetanāṃ ca buddhi nidrāṃ kṣudhāṃ tathā |
chāyātiparāṃ tṛṣṇāṃ śāṃti jāti ca lajjayā81 ||
śāṃti bhadrāṃ kīrtilakṣmyau dhṛtiṃ vṛttiṃ śruti smṛtim |
dayāṃ tuṣṭi tataḥ puṣṭimātṛbhrāṃtī iti kramāt || 82 ||
tato bhūpurakoṇeṣu gaṇeśaṃ kṣetrapālakam |
vaṭukaṃ yoginīśvāpi pūjayenmatimānnaraḥ || 83 ||
indrādyānapi tadvāhme vajrādyāyudhasaṃyutān |
pūjayedanayā rītyā devīṃ sāvaraṇāṃ tataḥ || 84 ||
rājopacārānvividhāndadyādamvā pratuṣṭaye |
tato japennavārṇaṃ ca mantraṃ mantrārthaṃ pūrvakam ||85 ||
tataḥ saptaśatī stotraṃ devyā agre tu saṃpaṭhet |
nānena sadṛśaṃ stotraṃ vidyate bhuvanatraye !! 86 ||

tataścānena deveśoṃ toṣayetpratyahaṃ naraḥ |
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāmālayaṃ jāyate naraḥ || 87||
iti te kathitaṃ vipra śrīdurgāyā vidhānakam |
kṛtārthatā yena bhavettadetatkathitaṃ tava || 88 ||
saveṃ devā haribrahmaprasukhā manavastathā |
munayo jñānaniṣṭhāśca yoginaścāśramāstathā || 89 ||
lakṣmyādayastathā devyaḥ sarve dhyāyanti tāṃ śivām |
tadava janmasāphalyaṃ durgāsmaraṇamasti cet || 90 ||
caturdaśāpi manavo dhyātvā caraṇapaṅkajam |
manutvaṃ prāvantaśca devāḥ svaṃ svaṃ padaṃ tathā || 91 ||
tadetatsarvamākhyātaṃ rahasyātirahasyakam |
prakṛtīnāṃ pañcakasya tadaṃśānāṃ ca varṇanam || 92 ||
śrutvaṃ tanmanujo nitya puruṣārthacatuṣṭayam |
labhate nātra sandehaḥ satyaṃ satyaṃ mayoditam || 93 ||
aputrī labhate putraṃ vidyārthī prāpnuyācca tām |
yaṃ yaṃ kāmaṃ smaredrāpi taṃ taṃ śrutvā samāpnuyāt || 94 ||
navarātre paṭhedetaddevyagre tu samāhitaḥ |
parituṣṭā jagaddhātrī bhavatyeva hi niścitam ||15||
nityamekaikamadhyāyaṃ paṭhedyaḥ pratyahaṃ naraḥ |
tasya vaśyā bhaveddevī devīpriyakaro hi saḥ || 96||
śakunāṃśca parīkṣeta nityamasminyathāvidhi |
kumārīdivyahastena yadvā baṭukarāmbujāt ||17||
manorathaṃ tu saṅkalpya pustakaṃ pūjayettataḥ |
devīṃ ca jagadīśānāṃ praṇamecca punaḥ punaḥ || 98||
susvātāṃ kanyakāṃ tatrānīyābhyarcya yathāvidhi |
śalākāṃ ropayenmadhye tathā svarṇena nirmitām || 99||
śubhaṃ vā'pyaśubhaṃ tatra yadāyāti ca tadbhavet |
udāsīne'pyudāsīnaṃ kāryaṃ bhavati niścitam || 100 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe navamaskandhe paṃcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 50 ||
bāṇā kṣirasarāmaistu sādhai: ( 3625 || ) ślokaḥ suvistaraiḥ |
devībhāgavatasyāsya navamaḥ skandha īritaḥ ||
samāpto'yaṃ navamaḥ skandhaḥ |

śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ
śrīmaddevībhāgavatam
daśamaḥ skandhaḥ
atha prathamo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
sarvapālanakāraṇa |
bhavatodīritaṃ devīcaritaṃ pāpanāśanam || 1 ||
nārāyaṇa dharādhāra
manvaṃtareṣu sarveṣu sā devī yatsvarūpiṇī |
yadākāreṇa kurute prādurbhāva maheśvarī || 2 ||
tānnaḥ sarvānsamākhyāhi devī māhātmyamiśritān |
yathā ca yena yeneha pūjitā saṃstutāpi hi || 3 ||
bhaktavatsalā |
tannaḥ śuśrūṣamāṇānāṃ devīcaritamunamam || 4 ||
manorathānpūrayati bhaktānāṃ
varṇayasva kṛpāsindho yenāpnoti sukhaṃ mahat |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
ākarṇaya maharṣe tvaṃ caritaṃ pāpanāśanam || 5 ||
bhaktānāṃ bhaktijananaṃ mahāsaṃpattikārakam |
jagadyonirmahātejā brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ || 6 ||
āvirāsīnnābhipadmāddevadevasya cakriṇaḥ |
sa caturmukha āsādya prādurbhāvaṃ mahāmate || 7 ||
manuṃ svāyaṃbhuvaṃ nāma janayāmāsa mānasāt |
sa mānaso manuḥ putro brahmaṇaḥ parameṣṭhinaḥ || 8 ||
śatarūpā ca tatpatnī jajñe dharmasvarūpiṇīm |
sa manuḥ kṣīrasiṃdhośva tīre paramapāvane || 9 ||
devīmārādhayāmāsa mahābhāgyaphalapradām |
mūrti ca mṛnmayīṃ tasyā vidhāya pṛthivīpatiḥ || 10||
upāsatesma tāṃ devīṃ vāgbhavaṃ sa japan rahaḥ |
nirāhāro jitaśvāso niyamavratakaśitaḥ || 11 ||
ekapādena saṃtiṣṭhan dharāyāmaniśaṃ sthiraḥ |
śatavarṣaṃ jitaḥ kāmaḥ krodhastena mahātmanā || 12||

bhaje sthāvaratāṃ devyāścaraṇau ciṃtayan hṛdi |
tasya tattapasā devī prādurbhūtā jaganmayī ||13||
uvāca vacanaṃ divyaṃ varaṃ varaya bhūmipa |
tata ānaṃdajanakaṃ śrutvā vākyaṃ mahīpatiḥ || 14 ||
varayāmāsa tān hṛtsthān varānamaradurlabhān |
manuruvāca
jaya devi viśālākṣi jaya sarvāntarasthite || 15 ||
mānye pūjye jagaddhātri sarvamaṃgalamaṃgale |
tvatkaṭākṣāvalokena padmabhūḥ sṛjate jagat ||16||
baikuṃṭhaḥ pālayatyeva haraḥ saṃharate kṣaṇāt |
śacīpatistrilokyāśca śāsako bhavadājñayā || 17 ||
prāṇinaḥ śikṣayatyeva daṃḍena ca paretarāṭ |
yādasāmadhipaḥ pāśī pālanaṃ mādṛśāmapi || 18 ||
kurute sa kubero'pi nidhīnāṃ patiravyayaḥ |
hutabhuṅ nairṛto vāyurīśānaḥ śeṣa eva ca || 19 ||
tvadaṃśasaṃbhavā eva tvacchatiparibṛṃhitāḥ |
athāpi yadi me devi varo deyo'sti sāṃpratam || 20 ||
tadā prahvāḥ sargakāyeṃ vightā naśyaṃtu me śive |
vāgbhavasyāpi maṃtrasya ye kecidupasevinaḥ ||21||
teṣāṃ siddhiḥ satvarāpi kāryāṇāṃ jāyatāmapi |
ye saṃvādamimaṃ devi paṭhaṃti śrāvayanti ca ||22||
teṣāṃ loke bhuktimuktī sulabhe bhavatāṃ śive |
jātismaratvaṃ bhavatu vaktṛtvaṃ sauṣṭhavaṃ tathā || 23|| I |
jñāna siddhiḥ karmamārgasaṃsiddhirapi cāstu hi |
putrapautrasamṛddhiśva jāyedityeva me vacaḥ ||24||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskandhe prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 ||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīdevyuvāca
bhūmipāla mahābāho sarvametadbhaviṣyati |
yattvayā prārthitaṃ tatte dadāmi manujādhipa || 1 ||
ahaṃ prasannā detyendranāśanā'moghavikramā |
vāgbhavasya jaṃpenaiva tapasā te suniścitam ||2||
rājyaṃ niṣkaṃṭakaṃ te'stu putrā vaṃśakarā api |
mayi bhaktirdṛḍhā vatsa mokṣāṃta matpade bhavet ||3||
evaṃ varānmahādevī tasmai dattvā mahātmane |
paśyatastu manoreva jagāma viṃdhyaparvatam ||4||
yo'sau viṣyācalo ruddhaḥ kuṃbhodbhavamaharṣiṇā |
bhānumārgāvarodhārtha pravṛtto gaganaṃ spṛśan || 5 ||
sā vindhyavāsinī viṣṇoranujā varadeśvarī |
babhūva pūjyā lokānāṃ sarveṣāṃ munisattama || 6 ||
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
ko'sau viṃdhyācalaḥ sūta kimarthaṃ gaganaṃ spṛśan |
bhānumārgākrodhaṃ ca kimarthaṃ kṛtavānasī ||7||
kathaṃ ca maitrāvaruṇiḥ parvataṃ taṃ mahonnatam |
prakṛtisthaṃ cakāreti sarvaṃ vistarato vada ||8|| '
na hi tṛpyāmahe sādho tvadāsyagalitāmṛtam |
devyāśvaritrarūpākhyaṃ pītvā tṛṣṇā pravardhate ||9||

sūta uvāca
āsīdvindhyācalo nāma mānyaḥ sarvadharābhṛtām |
mahāvanasamūhāḍhyo mahāpādapasaṃvṛtaḥ || 10||
supuṣpitairanekaiśca latāgulmaistu saṃvṛtaḥ |
mṛgā varāhā mahiṣā vyāghrāḥ śārdūlakā api || 11 ||
vānarāḥ śaśakā ṛkṣāḥ śṛgālāśca samaṃtataḥ |
vicaraṃti sadā hṛṣṭā puṣṭā eva mahodyamāḥ || 12 ||
nadīnadajalākrāṃto devagaṃdharvakinnaraiḥ |
apsarobhiḥ kiṃpuruṣaiḥ sarvakāmaphaladrumaiḥ || 13||
etādṛśe vighyanage kadācitparyaṭanmahīm |
devarṣiḥ paramaprīto jagāma svecchayā muniḥ || 14 ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā sa nago maṃkṣu tūrṇamutthāya saṃbhramāt |
pādyamarghyaṃ tathā dattvā varāsanamathārpayat || 15 ||
sukhopaviṣṭaṃ devapi sannaṃ naga ūcivān |
vindhya uvāca
devarṣe kathyatāṃ jāta āgamaḥ kuta uttamaḥ || 16 ||
tavāgamanato jātamanayaṃ mama maṃdiram |
tava caṃkramaṇaṃ devābhayārthaṃ hi yathā raveḥ ||17||
apūrvaṃ yanmanovṛttaṃ tadbrūhi mama nārada |
nārada uvāca
samāgamanamidvāre jātaṃ svarṇagireratha || 18 |
tatra dṛṣṭā mayā lokāḥ śakrāgniyamapāśinām |
sarveṣāṃ lokapālānāṃ bhavanāni samaṃtataḥ || 19 ||
mayā dṛṣṭāni vidhyāga nānābhogapradāni ca |
iti coktvā brahmayoniḥ punarucchvāsamāviśat ||
ucchvasaṃtaṃ muniṃ dṛṣṭvā punaḥ papraccha śailarāṭ |
ucchvāsakāraṇaṃ kiṃ tadbrūhi devaṛṣe mamaṃ || 21 ||
ityākarṇya nagasyoktaṃ devarṣiramitadyutiḥ |
abravīcchrayatāṃ vatsa mamocchvāsasya kāraṇam 22 ||
gaurīgurustu himavāñchivasya śvaśuraḥ kila |
saṃbaṃdhitvātpaśupateḥ pūjya āsītkṣamābhṛtām ||23||
evameva ca kailāsaḥ śivasyāvasathaḥ prabhuḥ |
pūjyaḥ pṛthvībhṛtāṃ jāto loke pāpaughadāraṇaḥ || 24 ||
niṣadhaḥ parvato nīlo gaṃdhamādana eva ca |
pūjyāḥ svasthānamāsādya sarva eva kṣamābhṛtaḥ || 25 ||
yaṃ paryeti ca viśvātmā sahasrakiraṇaḥ svarāṭ |
sagrahagaṇopetaḥ so'yaṃ kanakaparvataḥ || 26 ||
ātmānaṃ manute śreṣṭhaṃ variṣṭaṃ ca dharābhṛtām |
sarveṣāmahamevāgragho nāsti lokeṣu matsamaḥ ||27||
evaṃ mānābhimānaṃ taṃ smṛtvocchvāso mayojjhitaḥ |
astu naitāvatā kṛtyaṃ tapobalavatāṃ naga ||
prasaṃgato mayoktaṃ te gamiṣyāmi nijaṃ gṛham ||28||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskaṃdhe dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||

atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
evaṃ samupadiśyāyaṃ devarṣiḥ paramaḥ svarāṭ |
jagāma brahmaṇo lokaṃ svairacārī mahāmuniḥ || 1||
gate munivare vidhyaścitāṃ lebhenapāyinīm |
naiva śāṃti sa lebhe ca sadāntaḥ kṛtaśocanaḥ || 2 ||
kathaṃ kiṃ tvatra me kārya kathaṃ meruṃ jayāmyaham |
naiva śāṃtiṃ labhe nāpi svāsthyaṃ me mānase bhavet 3 ||
" ghigutsāhaṃ ca mānaṃ ca dhiṅme kīrti ca dhikkulam |"
dhigbalaṃ me pauruṣaṃ dhik smṛtaṃ pūrvairmahātmabhiḥ ||
evaṃ citayamānasya vidhyastha manasi sphuṭam ||4||
prādurbhūtā matiḥ kārye kartavye doṣakāriṇī |
merupradakṣiṇāṃ kurvannityameva divākaraḥ ||5||
sagraharkṣagaṇopetaḥ sadā dṛpyatyayaṃ nagaḥ |
tasyā mārgasya saṃrodhaṃ kariṣyābhi nijaiḥ karaiḥ || 6 ||
tadā niruddho maṇiḥ parikrāmetkathaṃ nagam |
evaṃ mārge niruddhe tu mayā dinakarasya ca || 7 |
bhagnadarpo divyanago bhaviṣyati viniśvitam |
evaṃ niścitya vidhyādriḥ khaṃ spṛśanvavṛdhe bhujaiḥ || 8||
mahonnataiḥ śṛṅgavaraiḥ sarvaṃ vyāpya vyavasthitaḥ |
kadodeṣyati bhāsvāṃstaṃ rodhayiṣyāmyahaṃ kadā || 9 ||
evaṃ saṃcitamānasya sā vyatīyāya śarvarī |
prabhātaṃ vimalaṃ jajñe diśo vitimirāḥ karaiḥ || 10 ||
kurvansa nirgato bhānurudayāyodaye girau |
prakāśatesma vimalaṃ nabho bhānukaraiḥ śubhaiḥ || 11 ||
vikāsa nalinī bheje mīlanaṃ ca kumudvatī |
svāni kāryāṇi sarve ca lokāḥ samupatasthire || 12 ||
havyaṃ kavyaṃ bhūtabaliṃ devānāṃ ca pravardhayan |
prāhṇāparāmadhyāhnavibhāgena tviṣāṃ patiḥ || 13||
evaṃ prācīṃ tathāgneyīṃ samāśvāsya viyoginīm |
jvalaṃtīṃ cirakālīnavirahādiva kāminīm || 14 ||
bhāskaro'tha kṛśānośca diśaṃ nūnaṃ vihāya ca |
yāmyāṃ gaṃtuṃ tatastūrṇaṃ pratasthe kamalākaraḥ |
na śaśākāgrato gaṃtuṃ tato'nūrurvyajijñapat |
anūruruvāca
bhāno mānonnato vidhyo nirudhya gaganaṃ sthitaḥ || 16 ||
spardhate meruṇā prepsustvaddattāṃ ca pradakṣiṇām |
sūta uvāca
anūruvākyamākarṇya savitā hyāsa citayan || 17||
aho gagana mārgo'pi rudhyate cātivismayaḥ |
prāyaḥ śūrona kiṃ kuryādutpathe vartmani sthitaḥ 18 ||
niruddho no vājimārgo daivaṃ hi balavattaram |
rāhubāhugrahavyagro yaḥ kṣaṇaṃ nāvatiṣṭhate ||19||
saciraṃ ruddhamārgo'pi kiṃ karoti vidhirbalī |
evaṃ ca mārge saṃruddhe lokāḥ sarve ca seśvarāḥ ||20||

nānvavidanta śaraṇaṃ kartavyaṃ nānvapadyata |
citraguptādayaḥ sarve kālaṃ jānanti sūryataḥ || 21 ||
naruddho vidhyagiriṇā aho daivaviparyayaḥ |
yadā niruddhaḥ savitā giriṇā spardhayā tadā ||22||
naṣṭaḥ svāhāsvadhākāro naṣṭaprāyamabhūjjagat |
evaṃ ca paścimā lokā dākṣiṇātyāstathaiva ca || 23||
niśāmeva prapedire |
prāṃcastathottarāhāśca tīkṣṇatāpapratāpitāḥ || 24||
nidrāmīlitacakṣuṣkā
mṛtā naṣṭāśca bhagnāśca vināśamabhajanprajāḥ |
hāhābhūtaṃ jagatsarva svavākavyavivarjitam ||
devāḥ seṃdrāḥ samudvignāḥ kiṃ kurma itivādinaḥ ||25||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskandhe devīmāhātmye tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 3 ||
atha caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
mahendrapramukhāstadā |
padmayāni puraskṛtya rudraṃ śaraṇamanvayuḥ || 1||
tataḥ sarve suragaṇā giriśayaṃ śaśilālitaśekharam ||2||
upatasthuḥ praṇatibhiḥ stotraiścāruvibhūtibhiḥ | devadevaṃ
devā ūcuḥ
umā lalitapatkaza |
aṣṭasiddhivibhūtīnāṃ dātre bhaktajanāya te ||3||
jaya deva gaṇādhyakṣa kailāsa sthitiśāline ||4||
mahāmāyāvilasitasthānāya pavanātmane | vṛṣāṃkāyāmareśāya
ahirbudhnyāya mānyāya manave mānadāyine |
ajāya bahurūpāya svātmārāmāya śaṃbhave ||5||
mahāviṣṇustutāya ca || 6 ||
gaṇanāthāya devāya giriśāya namo'stu te |
mahāvibhūtidātre te yogināṃ pataye namaḥ ||7||
mahāyogaratāya ca | yogagamyāya yogāya
viṣṇuhṛtkaṃjavāsāya dayāsāgaramūrtaye ||8||
yogīśāya namastubhyaṃ yogānāṃ phaladāyine | dīnadānaparāyāpi
guṇamūrtaye |
vṛṣadhvajāya kālāya kālakālāya te namaḥ ||9||
ātipraśamanāyogravīryāya
sūta uvāca
deveśo yajñabhugbhirvṛṣadhvajaḥ |
prāha gaṃbhīrayā vācā prahasanvibudharṣabhān || 10 ||
evaṃ stutaḥ sa
śrībhagavānuvāca
stotreṇottamapūruṣāḥ |
manorathaṃ pūrayāmi sarveṣāṃ devatarṣabhāḥ || 11||
prasanno'haṃ diviṣadaḥ
devā ūcuḥ
śaśimaulivirājita |
ārtānāṃ śaṅkarastvaṃ ca śaṃ vidhehi mahābala || 12 ||
sarvadeveśa giriśa parvato vidhyanāmā'sti merudveṣṭā mahonnataḥ |
bhānumārga niroddhā hi sarveṣāṃ duḥkhado'nagha ||13||
sarvakalyāṇakṛdbhava |
bhānusaṃcārarodhena kālajñānaṃ kathaṃ bhavet || 14 ||
tadvṛddhi staṃbhayeśāna

naṣṭe svāhāsvadhākāre loke kaḥ śaraṇaṃ bhavet |
asmākaṃ ca bhayārtānāṃ bhavāneva hi dṛśyate || 15||
duḥkhanāśakaro deva prasīda girijāpate |
śiva uvāca
nāsmākaṃ śaktirastīha tadbuddhistaṃbhane surāḥ || 16||
imamevaṃ vadiṣyāmo bhagavaṃtaṃ ramādhavam |
so'smākaṃ prabhurātmā ca pūjyaḥ kāraṇarūpadhṛk 17||
goviṃdo bhagavānviṣṇuḥ sarvakāraṇakāraṇaḥ |
taṃ gatvā kathayiṣyāmaḥ sa duḥkhāṃto bhaviṣyati 18 ||
ityevamākarṇya girīśabhāṣitaṃ devāśca sendrāḥ sapayojasaṃbhavāḥ |
rudraṃ puraskṛtya ca vepamānā vaikuṇṭhalokaṃ pratijagmuraṃjamā || 19 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe daśamaskandhe caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
te gatvā devadeveśaṃ ramānāthaṃ jagadgurum |
viṣṇuṃ kamalapatrākṣaṃ dadṛśuḥ prabhayānvitam || 1 ||
stotreṇa tuṣṭuvurbhaktyā gadgadasvarasatkṛtāḥ |
devā ūcuḥ
jaya viṣṇo rameśādya mahāpuruṣa pūrvaja || 2 ||
datyāre kāmajanaka sarvakāmaphalaprada |
mahāvarāha goviṃda mahāyajñasvarūpacak ||3||
mahāviṣṇo dhruveśādya dhruveśādya jagadutpattikāraṇa |
matsyāvatāre bhedānāmuddhārādhārarūpaka ||4||
satyavratadharādhīśa matsyarūpāya te namaḥ |
jayākūpāra daityāre surakāryasamarpaka || 2 ||
amṛtāptikareśāna kūrmarūpāya te namaḥ |
