jayādidaityanāśārthamā disūkararūpadhṛk ||3||
mahyadvārakṛtodyoga kolarūpāya te namaḥ |
nārasiṃhaṃ vapuḥ kṛtvā mahādaityaṃ dadāra yaḥ || 7 ||
karajairvaradṛptāṃgaṃ tasmai nṛharaye namaḥ |
vāmanaṃ rūpamāsthāya trailokyaiśvaryamohitam ||8||
bali saṃchalayāmāsa tasmai vāmanarūpiṇe |
duṣṭakṣatravināśāya sahasrakaraśave ||9|
reṇukā garbhajātabhya jāmadagnyāya te namaḥ |
duṣṭarākṣasapaulastyaśiracchedapaṭīya se || 10 ||
śrīmaddāśarathe tubhyaṃ namo'takramāya ca |
kaṃsaduryodhanādyaiśva daityaiḥ pṛthvīlāṃchanaiḥ || 11 ||
bhārākrāṃtāṃ mahīṃ yo'sāvujjahāra mahāvibhuḥ |
dharma saṃsthāpayāmāsa pāpaṃ kṛtvā sudūrataḥ || 12 ||
tasmai kṛṣṇāya devāya namo'stu bahudhā vibho |
duṣṭayajñavidhātāya paśuhiṃsā nivṛttaye || 13||
bauddharūpaṃ dadhau yo'sau tasmai devāya te namaḥ |
mlecchanāye'khile loke duṣṭarājanyapīḍite || 14 ||
kalkirūpaṃ samādadhyau devadevāya te namaḥ |
daśāvatārāste deva bhaktānāṃ rakṣaṇāya vai || 15 ||

duṣṭadaitya vidhātāya tasmāttvaṃ sarvaduḥ khahṛt |
jaya bhaktārtināśāya dhṛtaṃ nārījalātmasu || 16 ||
rūpaṃ yena tvayā deva ko'nyastvatto dayānidhiḥ |
ityevaṃ devadeveśaṃ stutvā śrīpītavāsasam || 17 ||
praṇemurbhaktisahitāḥ sāṣṭāṃgaṃ vibudharṣabhāḥ |
teṣāṃ stavaṃ samākarṇya devaḥ śrīpuruṣottamaḥ || 18 ||
uvāca vibudhānsarvān harṣayañchrī gadādharaḥ |
śrībhagavānuvāca
prasanno'smi stavenāhaṃ devāstāpaṃ vimuñcatha || 19||
bhavatāṃ nāśayiṣyāmi duḥkhaṃ paramaduḥsaham |
vṛṇudhvaṃ ca varaṃ matto devāḥ paramadurlabham || 20 ||
dadāmi paramaprītaḥ stavasyāsya prasādataḥ |
ya etatpaṭhate stotraṃ kalya utthāya mānavaḥ || 21 ||
mayi bhakti parāṃ kṛtvā na taṃ śokaḥ spṛśetkadā |
alakṣmīḥ kālakarṇī ca nākrāmettadgṛhaṃ surāḥ 22 ||
nopasargā na vetālā na grahā brahmamānavāḥ |
na rogā vātikāḥ paittāḥ śleṣma saṃbhavinastathā 93||
nākālamaraṇaṃ tasya kadāpi ca bhaviṣyati |
saṃtatiśvirakālasthā bhogāḥ sarve sukhādayaḥ ||24||
saṃbhaviṣyati tanmartyagṛhe yaḥ stotrapāṭhakaḥ |
kiṃ punarvahunoktena stotraṃ sarvārthasādhakam || 25 || |
etasya paṭhanānnṛṇāṃ bhuktimuktī na dūrataḥ |
devā bhavatsu yaduḥkhaṃ kathyatāṃ tadasaṃśayam || 26 ||
nāśayāmi na saṃdehaścātra kāryo'ṇureva ca |
evaṃ śrībhagavadvākyaṃ śrutvā sarve divaukasaḥ ||
prasannamanasaḥ sarve punarūcurvṛṣākapim ||27||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskaṃdhe pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5||
atha ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
śrīśasya vacanāddevāḥ saṃtuṣṭāḥ sarva eva hi |
prasannamanaso bhūtvā punarenaṃ samūcire ||1|| |
bhūtvā punarenaṃ
devā ūcuḥ
devadeva mahāviṣṇo sṛṣṭisthityaṃtakāraṇa |
viṣṇo vindhyanago'rkasya mārgarodhaṃ karoti hi 2 ||
tena bhānuvirodhena sarva eva mahāvibho |
alabdhabhogabhāgā hi kiṃ kurmaḥ kutra yāma hi 3 ||
śrībhagavānuvāca
yā kartrī sarvajagatāmādyā ca kulavardhanī |
devī bhagavatī tasyāḥ pūjakaḥ paramadyutiḥ || 4 ||
agastyo munivaryo'sau vārāṇasyāṃ samāsate |
tattejovaṃca ko'gastyo bhaviṣyati surottamāḥ || 5 ||
prasādya dvijavaramagastyaṃ paramaujasam |
yācadhvaṃ vibudhāḥ kāśīṃ gatvā niḥśreyasaḥ padīm ||
taṃ
sata uvāca
evaṃ samupadiṣṭāste viṣṇunā vibudhottamāḥ |
pratītāḥ praṇatāḥ sarve jagmurvārāṇasī purīm ||7||

kṣaṇena vibudhaśreṣṭhā gatvā kāśīpurīṃ śubhām |
maṇikarṇī samāplutya sacailaṃ bhaktisaṃyutāḥ || 8 ||
saṃtarpya devāṃśva pitṝndattvā dānaṃ vidhānataḥ |
āgatya munivaryasya cāśramaṃ paramaṃ mahat || 9 ||
praśāṃtaśvāpadākīrṇaṃ nānāpādapasaṃkulam |
mayūraiḥ sārasaha saiścakravākairupāśritam ||10||
mahāvarāhaiḥ kolaiśca vyāghraḥ śārdūlakairapi |
mṛgai rurubhiratyarthaṃ khaṅgaḥ śarabhakairapi || 11 ||
samāśritaṃ paramayā lakṣmyā munivaraṃ tadā |
daṇḍavatpatitāḥ sarve praṇemuśca punaḥ punaḥ || 12|| |
devā ūcuḥ
jaya dvijagaṇādhīśa mānya pūjya dharāsura |
vātāpībalanāśāya namaste kumbhayonaye ||13 ||
lopāmudrāpate śrīmanmitrāvaruṇasambhava |
sarvavidyānidhe'gastya śāstrayone namo'stu te || 14 ||
yasyodaye prasannāni bhavantyujjvalabhāṃjyapi |
toyāni toyarāśīnāṃ tasmai tubhyaṃ namo'stu te ||
kāśapuṣpa vikāsāya laṃkāvāsapriyāya ca |
jaṭāmaṇḍalayuktāya saśiṣyāya namo'stu te || 16 ||
jaya sarvāmarastavya guṇarāśe guṇarāśe mahāmune |
variṣṭhāya ca pūjyāya sastrīkāya namo'stu te || 17 ||
prasādaḥ kriyatāṃ svāmitvayaṃ tvāṃ śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ |
dustarācchailajādu khātpīḍitāḥ paramadyute || 18 ||
ityevaṃ saṃstuto'gastyo muniḥ paramadhārmikaḥ |
prāha prasannayā vācā vihasan dvijasattamaḥ ||19||
muniruvāca
bhavantaḥ paramaśreṣṭhā devāstribhuvaneśvarāḥ |
lokapālā mahātmāno nigrahānugrahakṣamāḥ ||20||
yo'marāvatyadhīśānaḥ kuliśaṃ yasya cāyudham |
siddhyaṣṭakaṃ ca yadvāri sa śakro marutāṃ patiḥ || 21 ||
vaiśvānaraḥ kṛśānuhi havyakavyavaho'niśam |
mukha sarvāmarāṇāṃ hi so'gniḥ kiṃ tasya duṣkaram ||
rakṣogaṇādhipo bhīmaḥ sarveṣāṃ karmasākṣikaḥ |
daṇḍavyagra karo devaḥ kiṃ tasyāsukaraṃ surāḥ || 23||
tathāpi yadi deveśāḥ kāryaṃ macchaktisiddhibhṛt |
asti ceducyatāṃ devāḥ kariṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ 24||
evaṃ munivareṇoktaṃ niśamya vibudharṣabhāḥ |
pratītāḥ praṇayodvignāḥ kāryaṃ nijagadurnijam ||25||
maharṣe vidhyagiriṇā niruddho'rkavinirgamaḥ |
trailokyaṃ tena saṃviṣṭaṃ hāhābhūtamacetanam ||26||
tadbuddhi stambhaya mune nijayā tapasaḥ śriyā |
bhavatastejasā'gastya nūnaṃ namro bhaviṣyati ||
etadevāsmadīyaṃ ca kārya kartavyamasti hi ||27||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskandhe ṣaṣṭo'dhyāyaḥ || 6 ||
atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
iti vākyaṃ samākarṇya vibudhānāṃ dvijottamaḥ |
kariṣye kāryametadvai pratyuvāca tato muniḥ || 1 ||
aṃgīkṛte tadā kārye muninā kumbhajanmanā |
devāḥ pramudritāḥ sarve babhūvurdvijasattamāḥ ||2||

te devā: svāni dhiṣṇyāni bhejire munivākyataḥ |
patnī munivaraḥ śrīmānuvāca nṛpakanyakām ||3||
aye nṛpasute prāpto vighno'narthasya kārakaḥ |
bhānumārganirodhena kṛto viṣyamahībhṛtā ||4||
ājñātaṃ kāraṇaṃ tacca smṛtaṃ vākyaṃ purātanam |
kāśīmuddiśya yadgītaṃ munibhistattvadarśibhiḥ ||5||
avimuktaṃ na moktavyaṃ sarvathaiva mumukṣubhiḥ |
kintu vighnā bhaviṣyati kāśyāṃ nivasatāṃ satām ||
so'ntarāyo mayā prāptaḥ kāśyāṃ nivasatā priye |
ityevamuktvā bhāryāṃ tāṃ muniḥ paramatāpanaḥ ||7||
maṇikayoṃ samāplutya dṛṣṭvā viśveśvaraṃ vibhum |
daṃḍapāṇi samabhyarcya kālarājaṃ samāgataḥ ||8||
kālarāja mahābāho bhaktānāṃ bhayahāraka |
kathaṃ dūrayase puryāḥ kāśīpuryāstvamīśvaraḥ ||9||
tvaṃ kāśīvāsavighnānāṃ nāśako bhaktarakṣakaḥ |
māṃ ki dūrayase svāmin bhaktārtivinivāraka ||10||
parāpavādo nokto me na paiśunyaṃ na cānṛtam |
kena karmavipākena kāśyā dūraṃ karoṣi mām || 11 ||
evaṃ prārthyaṃ ca taṃ kālanārthaṃ kumbhodbhavo muniḥ |
jagāma sākṣivighneśaṃ sarvavighnanivāraṇam ||12||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā'bhyarcya saṃprārthyaṃ tataḥ puryo vinirgataḥ |
lopāmudrāpatiḥ śrīmānagastyo dakṣiṇāṃ diśam 13 ||
kāśīviraha saṃtapto mahābhāgyanidhirmuniḥ |
saṃsmṛtyānukṣaṇaṃ kāśīṃ jagāma saha bhāryayā || 14 ||
tapoyānamivāruhya nimiṣārdhena vai muniḥ |
agre dadarśa taṃ vidhyaṃ ruddhāṃbaramathonnatam ||15||
cakaṃpe cācalastūrṇaṃ dṛṣṭvaivāgre sthitaṃ munim |
giriḥ kharvataro bhūtvā vivakṣuravanīmiva || 16 ||
daṃḍavatpatito bhūmau sāṣṭāṃgaṃ bhaktibhāvataḥ |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā namraśikharaṃ viṣyaṃ nāma mahāgirim ||17||
prasannavadano'gastyo munivindhyamathābravīt |
vatsaṃvaṃ tiṣṭha tāvatvaṃ yāvadāgamyate mayā || 18 ||
aśakto'haṃ gaṃḍaśailārohaṇe taba putraka |
evamuktvā muniryāmyadiśaṃ prati gamotsukaḥ || 19||
āruhya tasya śikharāṇyavāruhadanukramāt |
gato yāmyadiśaṃ cāpi śrīśailaṃ prekṣya vartmani || 20 ||
malayācalamāsādya tatrāśramaparo'bhavat |
sā'pi devī tatra vidhyamāgatā manupūjitā || 21 ||
lokeṣu prathitā vinyavāsinīti ca śaunaka |
sūta uvāca
etaccaritra paramaṃ śatrunāśanamuttamam ||22||
agastyavidhyanagayo rākhyānaṃ pāpanāśanam |
rājñāṃ vijayadaṃ tacca dvijānāṃ jñānavardhanam ||23||
vaiśyānāṃ dhānyadhanadaṃ śūdrāṇāṃ sukhadaṃ tathā |
dharmārthī dharmamāpnoti dhanārthī dhanamāpnuyāt || 24||
kāmānavāpnuyātkāmī bhaktyā cāsya sakṛcchravāt |
evaṃ svāyaṃbhuva manurdevomārādhya bhaktitaḥ || 25 ||
lebhe rājyaṃ dharāyāśca nijamanvaṃtarāśrayam |
ityetadveṇitaṃ saumya mayā manvaṃtarāśritam ||
ādyaṃ caritra śrīdevyāḥ kiṃ punaḥ kathayāmi te ||26||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskandhe saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 ||

atha aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
śonaka uvāca
ādyo manvantaraḥ prokto bhavatā cāyamuttamaḥ |
anyeṣāmudbhavaṃ brūhi manūnāṃ divyatejasām ||1||
sūta uvāca
evamādyasya cotpatti śrutvā svāyaṃbhuvasya hi |
anyeṣāṃ kramaśasteṣāṃ saṃbhūti paripṛcchati ||2||
nāradaḥ paramo jñānī devītattvārthakovidaḥ |
nārada uvāca
mananāṃ me samākhyāhi sūtpattiṃ ca sanātana || 3 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
prathamo'yaṃ manuḥ svāyaṃbhuva ukto mahāmune |
devyārāvanato yena prāptaṃ rājyamakaṃṭakam ||4||
priyavratottānapādau manuputrau mahaujasau |
rājyapālanakarttārau vikhyāto vasudhātale ||5||
dvitīyaśca manuḥ svārocipa ukto manīṣibhiḥ |
priyavratasutaḥ śrīmānaprameyaparākramaḥ || 6 ||
sa svārocipanāmāpi kāliṃdīkūlato manuḥ |
nivāsaṃ kalpayāmāsa sarvasattvapriyaṃkaraḥ ||7||
jīrṇapatrāśano bhūtvā tapaḥ bhūtvā tapaḥ kartumanuvrataḥ |
devyā mūrti mṛnmayīṃ ca pūjayāmāsa bhaktitaḥ ||8||
evaṃ dvādaśa varṣāṇi vanasyasya tapasyataḥ |
devī prādurabhūttāta sahasrārkasamadyutiḥ || 9 ||
tataḥ prasannā deveśī stavarājena sutratā |
dadau svārociṣāyaiva sarvamanvaṃtarāśrayam || 10 ||
ādhipatyaṃ jagaddhātrī tāriṇīti prathāmagāt |
evaṃ svārocipamanustāriṇyārādhanāttataḥ ||11||
ādhipatyaṃ ca lebhe sa sarvārātivivarjitam |
dharma saṃsthāpya vidhivadrājyaṃ putraiḥ samaṃ vibhuḥ || 12 ||
bhuktvā jagāma tvarlokaṃ nijamanvantarāśrayāt |
tṛtīya uttamo nāma priyavratasuto manuḥ || 13 |
gaṃgākūle tapastaptvā vāgbhavaṃ saṃjapagrahaḥ |
varṣāṇi śrīnyupavasandevyanugrahamāviśat || 14 ||
stutvā devī stotravarabhaktibhāvitamānasaḥ |
rājyaṃ niṣkaṃṭaka lebhe saṃtati cirakālikīm ||15||
rājyotthānyāni saukhyāni muktvā dharmānugasya ca | so'pyājagāma padavīṃ rājapivara bhāvitām 16 | |
caturthastāmano nāma priyatratato manuḥ |
narmadādakṣiṇe kūle samārādhya jaganmayīm || 17 ||
maheśvarī kāmarāja kuṭajāparāyaṇaḥ |
vāsaṃte śārade kāle navarātrā ||18||
topayāmāsa deveśī jalajātīmanupamām |
tasyāḥ prasādamāsādya natvā stotrairanuttamaiḥ ||19||
akaṃṭakaṃ mahadrājyaṃ bubhuje gatasādhvasaḥ |
putrānjaloḍhatāñchūrāndaśa vīryaniketanān ||20||
utpādya nijabhāryāyā jagāmāmvaramuttamam |
paṃcamo manurākhyāto raivatastāmasānujaḥ ||21||

sādhakāśrayam ||22||
kāliṃdīkūlamāśritya jajāpa kāmasaṃjñakam | bījaṃ paramavāndarpadāyakaṃ
svārājyaddhimanuttamām |
balama prahataṃ loke sarvasiddhidhāyakam || 23 ||
etadārādhanādāpa saṃtati cirakālīnāṃ putrapautramayīṃ śubhām |
dharmāntryasya vyavasthāya viṣayānupabhujya ca ||
jagāmāpratimaḥ śūro maheṃdrālayamuttamam ||24||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskandhe'ṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||
atha navamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
athātaḥ śrūyatāṃ citraṃ devīmāhātmyamuttamam |
aṃgaputreṇa manunā yathā''saṃ rājyamuttamam || 1||
aṃgasya rājñaḥ putro'bhūccākṣuṣo manuruttamaḥ |
ṣaṣṭhaḥ supulahaṃ nāma brahmarṣi śaraṇaṃ gataḥ || 2||
brahmarṣe tvāmahaṃ prāptaḥ śaraṇaṃ praṇatārtihan |
śādhi māṃ kiṃkaraṃ svāmin yenāhaṃ prāpnuyāṃ śriyam ||
medinyāścādhipatyaṃ me syādyathāvadakhaṃḍitam |
avyāhataṃ bhujabalaṃ śastrāstranipuṇaṃ kṣamam ||4|| syāttayopadiśādya me ||5||
saṃtatiścirakālīnā'pyakhaṃḍaṃ vaya uttamam | aṃte'pavargalābhaśca
ityevaṃ vacanaṃ tasya manoḥ karṇapathe'bhavat |
pratyuvāca muniḥ śrīmāndevyāḥ saṃrādhanaṃ param || 6 ||
rājannākarṇaya vaco mama śrotrasukhaṃ mahat |
śivāmārādhayādya tvaṃ tatprasādādidaṃ bhavet ||7||
cākṣuṣa uvāca
kīdṛgārādhanaṃ devyāstusyāḥ paramapāvanam |
kenākāreṇa kartavyaṃ kāruṇyādvaktumarhasi ||8||
muniruvāca
rājannākarṇyatāṃ devyāḥ pūjanaṃ paramavyayam |
vāgbhavaṃ bījamavyaktaṃ sañjapyamaniśaṃ tathā || 9||
trikālaṃ sañjapanmartyo bhuktimukto labhettu hi |
na bījaṃ vāgnavādanyadasti rājanyanandana || 10 ||
japātsiddhikaraṃ vīryabalavṛddhikaraṃ param |
etasya jāpātpādyo'pi sṛṣṭikartā mahābalaḥ || 11 ||
viṣṇuryajjapataḥ sṛṣṭipālakaḥ parikīrtitaḥ |
maheśvaro'pi saṃhartā yajjapādabhavannṛpa || 12 ||
balavīryamadoddhatāḥ || 13 ||
lokapālāstathānye'pi nigrahānugrahakṣamāḥ | yadāśrayādabhūvaṃste
evaṃ tvamapi rājanya maheśī jagadambikām |
samārādhya maharṣi ca lapsyase'cirakālataḥ || 14||
evaṃ sa munivaryeṇa pulahena prabodhitaḥ |
aṃgaputrastapastaptuṃ jagāma virajāṃ nadīm ||15||
sa ca tepe tapastīvraṃ vāgbhavasya jape rataḥ |
bojasya pṛthivīpālaḥ śīrṇaparṇāśino vibhuḥ || 16 ||
prathame'bde pallavāśo dvitīye toyabhakṣaṇaḥ |
tṛtīye'nde pavanabhuktasthau sthāṇurivācalaḥ || 17 ||
evaṃ dvādaśa varṣāṇi tyaktāhārasya bhūbhujaḥ |
vāgbhavaṃ japato nityaṃ matirāsīcchubhānvitā || 18 ||

tathā ca devyāḥ paramaṃ mantraṃ saṃjapato rahaḥ |
prādurāsījjaganmātā sākṣācchrīparameśvarī ||19||
tejomayī durādharṣā sarvadevamayīśvarī |
uvācāṃgatanūjaṃ taṃ prasannā lalitākṣaram ||20||
devyuvāca
pṛthivīpāla te yatsyāccititaṃ paramaṃ varam |
tadbrūhi saṃpradāsyāmi tapasā te sutoṣitā ||21||
cākṣuṣa uvāca
jānāsi devadeveśi yatprāthyaṃ manasepsitam |
antaryāmisvarūpeṇa tatsarvaṃ devapūjite || 22|| ||
tathāpi mama bhāgyena jātaṃ yattava darśanam |
bravīmi deva me dehi rājyaṃ rājanyasattamam ||23||
śrīdevyuvāca
dattaṃ manvantarasyāsya rājyaṃ rājanyasattama |
putrā mahābalāste ca bhaviṣyanti guṇādhikāḥ || 24||
rājyaṃ niṣkaṇṭakaṃ bhāvi mokṣo'nte cāpi niścitaḥ |
evaṃ dattvā varaṃ devī manave varamuttamam ||25||
jagāmādarśanaṃ sadyastena bhaktyā ca saṃstutā |
so'pi rājā manuḥ ṣaḍaḥ prasādāttu tadāśrayāt ||
babhūva manumānyo'so sārvabhaumasukhairvṛtaḥ |
putrāstasya balodyuktāḥ kāryabhārasahādṛtāḥ ||27||
devībhaktāśca śūrāśca mahābalaparākramāḥ |
anyatra mānanīyāśca mahārājyasukhāspadāḥ ||28||
evaṃ ca cākṣuṣamanurdevyārādhanataḥ prabhuḥ |
babhūva manuvaryo'so jagāmāṃte śivāpadam || 29 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskandhe devīcaritre navamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 ||
atha daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
saptamo manurākhyāto manurvaivasvataḥ prabhuḥ |
śrāddhadevaḥ parānandabhoktā mānyastu bhūbhujām || 1||
ca vaivasvatamanuḥ paradevyāḥ prasādataḥ |
tathā tattapasā caiva jāto manvantarādhipaḥ ||2||
mo manurākhyātaḥ sāvaṇiḥ prathitaḥ kṣitau |
sa janmāṃtara ārādhya devīṃ tadvaralābhataḥ ||3||
'jāto manvantara patiḥ sarvarājanyapūjitaḥ |
mahāparākramī dhīro devībhakti parāyaṇaḥ ||4||
nārada uvāca
kathaṃ janmātare tena manunā''rādhanaṃ kṛtam |
devyāḥ pṛthivyudbhavāyāstanmamākhyātumarhasi ||5||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
caitra vaṃśasamudbhūto rājā svārociṣe'ntare |
suratho nāma vikhyāto mahābalaparākramaḥ || 6 ||
guṇagrāhī dhanurdhārī mānyaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ kaviḥ kṛtī |
dhanasaṃgrahakartā ca dātā yācakamaṇḍale ||7||

arīṇāṃ mardano mānī sarvāstrakuśalo balī |
tasyaikadā babhūvuste kolāvidhvaṃsino nṛpāḥ ||8||
śatravaḥ sainyasahitāḥ parivāryainamūrjitāḥ |
rurudhurnagarīṃ tasya rājño mānadhanasya hi ||9||
tadā sa suratho nāma rājā sainyasamāvṛtaḥ |
niryayau nagarātsvīyātsarvaśatrunibarhaṇaḥ || 10 ||
tadā sa samare rājā surathaḥ śatrubhirjitaḥ |
amātyaimaṃtribhiścaiva tasya kośagataṃ dhanam ||11||
hṛtaṃ sarvamaśeṣeṇa tadā'tapyata bhūmipaḥ |
niṣkāśitaśca nagarātsa rājā paramadyutiḥ || 12 ||
jagāmāśvamathāruhya mṛgayāmiṣato vanam |
ekākī vijane'raṇye babhrāmodbhrāṃtamānasaḥ || 13||
muneḥ kasyacidāgatya svāśramaṃ śāṃtamānasaḥ |
praśāṃta jaṃtusaṃyuktaṃ muni śiṣyagaṇairyutam || 14||
uvāsa kaṃcitkālaṃ sa rājā paramaśobhane |
āśrame munivaryasya dīrghadṛṣṭeḥ sumedhasaḥ || 15 ||
ekadā sa mahīpālo muni pūjāvasānake |
kāle gatvā praṇamyāśu papraccha vinayānvitaḥ || 16 ||
mune mama manoduḥkhaṃ bāghate cādhisaṃbhavam |
jñātatattvasya bhūdeva niṣprajñasya ca saṃtatam ||17||
śatrubhirnirjitasyāpi hṛtarājyasya sarvaśaḥ |
tathāpi teṣāṃ manasi mamatvaṃ jāyate sphuṭam ||18||
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi kathaṃ śarma labhe mune |
tvadanugrahamāśāse vada vedavidāṃ vara || 19||
muniruvāca
ākarṇaya mahīpāla mahāścaryakaraṃ param |
devīmāhātmyamatulaṃ sarvakāmapradaṃ param ||20||
jaganmayī mahāmāyā viṣṇubrahmaharodbhavā |
sā balādapahṛtyaiva jaṃtūnāṃ mānasāni hi ||21||
mohāya pratisaṃyacchediti jānīhi bhūmipa |
sā sṛjatyakhilaṃ viśvaṃ sā pālayati sarvadā ||22||
saṃhāre hararūpeṇa saṃharatyeva bhūmipa |
kāmadātrī mahāmāyā kālarātrirduratyayā || 23 ||
viśvasaṃhāriṇī kālī kamalā kamalālayā |
tasyāṃ sarvaṃ jagajjātaṃ tasyāṃ viśvaṃ pratiṣṭhitam || 24||
layameṣyati tasyāṃ ca tasmātsaiva parātparā |
tasyā devyāḥ prasādaśca yasyopari bhavennṛma ||
sa eva mohamatyeti nānyathā gharaṇīpate ||25||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskandhe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ || 10 ||
atha ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
rājovāca
kā sā devī tvayā proktā brūhi kālavidāṃ vara |
kā mohayati satvāni kāraṇaṃ kiṃ bhavedvija || 1||
kasmādutpadyate devī kirūpā sā kimātmikā |
sarvamākhyāhi bhūdeva kṛpayā mama sarvataḥ ||2||

muniruvāca
rājandevyāḥ svarūpaṃ te varṇayāmi niśāmaya |
yathā cotpatitā devī yena vā sā jaganmayī ||3||
yadā nārāyaṇo devo viśvaṃ saṃhṛtya yogarāṭ |
āstīrya śeṣaṃ bhagavānsamudre nidrito'bhavat ||4||
tadā prasvāpavaśago devadevo janārdanaḥ |
tatkarṇamalasaṃjāto dānavau madhukaiṭabho ||5||
brahmāṇaṃ haṃtumudyuktau dānavī ghorarūpiṇau |
tadā kamalajo devo dṛṣṭvā to madhukaiṭabho || 6 ||
nidritaṃ devadeveśaṃ cintāmāpa duratyayām |
nidrito bhagavānīśo dānavo ca durāsadau ||7||
kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi kathaṃ śarma labhe hyaham |
evaṃ ciṃtayajñastasya padmayo nermahātmanaḥ ||8|
buddhiḥ prādūrabhūttāta tadā kāryaprasādhinī |
yasyā vaśaṃgato devo nidrito bhagavānhariḥ ||9||
tāṃ devīṃ śaraṇaṃ yāmi nidrāṃ sarvaprasūtikām |
brahmovāca
devi devi jagaddhātri bhaktābhīṣṭaphalaprade ||10||
jaganmāye mahāmāye samudraśayane śive |
tvadājñāvaśagāḥ sarve svasvakāryavidhāyinaḥ || 11||
kālarātrirmahārātrirmoharātrirmadotkaṭā |
vyāpinī vaśagā mānyā mahānaṃdaikaśevadhiḥ ||12||
mahanīyā mahārādhyā māyā madhumatī mahī |
parāparāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ paramā tvaṃ prakīrtitā ||13|| .
lajjā puṣṭiḥ kṣamā kīrtiḥ kāntiḥ kāruṇyavigrahā |
kamanīyā jagadvaṃdhā jāgradādisvarūpiṇī ||14||
paramā parameśānī parānaṃdaparāyaṇā |
ekā'pyekasvarūpā ca sadvitīyā dvayātmikā || 15||
trayī trivarganilayā turyā turyapadātmikā |
paṃcamī paṃcabhūteśī ṣaṣṭhī ṣaṣṭheśvarīti ca || 16 ||
saptamī saptavāreśī saptasaptavarapradā |
aṣṭamī vasunāthā ca navagrahamayīśvarī || 17 ||
navarāgakalā ramyā navasaṃkhyā naveśvarī |
daśamī daśadikpūjyā daśāśāvyāpinī ramā || 18 ||
ekādaśātmikā caikādaśarudraniṣevitā |
ekādaśītithiprītā ekādaśagaṇādhipā || 19 ||
dvādaśī dvādaśabhujā dvādaśādityajanmabhūḥ |
trayodaśātmikā devī trayodaśagaṇapriyā || 20 ||
trayodaśābhidhā bhinnā viśvedevādhidevatā |
caturdaśeṃdravaradā caturdaśamanuprasūḥ ||21||
paṃcādhikadaśī vedyā paṃcādhikadaśī tithiḥ |
ṣoḍaśī ṣoḍaśabhujā ṣoḍaśendukalāmayī || 22 ||
ṣoḍaśātmakacaṃdrāṃśuvyāpta divyakalevarā |
evaṃrūpā'si deveśi nirguṇe tāmasodaye || 23||
tvayā gṛhīto bhagavāndevadevo ramāpatiḥ |
etau durāsado daityo vikrāṃtī madhukaiṭabho ||24||
etayośca vadhārthāya deveśaṃ pratibodhaya |
muniruvāca
evaṃ stutā bhagavatī tāmasī bhagavatpriyā ||25||

devadevaṃ tadā tyaktvā mohayāmāsa dānavī |
tadaiva bhagavānviṣṇuḥ paramātmā jagatpatiḥ || 26 ||
prabodhamāpa deveśo dadṛśe dānavottamau |
tadā to dānavo ghoro dṛṣṭvā taṃ madhusūdanam ||27||
yuddhāya kṛtasaṃkalpo jagmatuḥ sannidhiṃ hareḥ |
yuyudhe ca tatastābhyāṃ bhagavānmadhusūdanaḥ ||28||
bāhupraharaṇo vibhuḥ |
tau tadā'tibalonmattau jaganmāyāvimohito ||29||
pañcavarṣasahasrāṇi ityevamūcatuḥ parameśvaram |
evaṃ tayorvacaḥ śrutvā bhagavānādipūruṣaḥ ||30||
triyatāṃ vara punarevocaturharim ||31||
bane vadhyāvubhau me'dya bhavatāmiti niścitam | tau tadā'tibalau devaṃ
jāvāṃ jahi na yatrorvī payasā ca pariplutā |
tathetyuktvā bhagavatā gadāśaṃkhabhṛtā nṛpa || 32||
kṛtvā cakreṇa vai chinne jaghane śirasī tayoḥ |
evaṃ devī samutpannā brahmaṇā saṃstutā nṛpa ||33 ||
mahākālī mahārāja sarvayogeśvareśvarī |
mahālakṣmyāstathotpatti niśāmaya mahīpate ||34||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskandhe devīmāhātmye ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 11 ||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
muniruvāca
mahiṣī garbhasaṃbhūto mahābalaparākramaḥ |
devānsarvānparājitya mahiṣo'bhūjjagatprabhuḥ || 1 ||
sarveṣāṃ lokapālānāmadhikārānmahāsuraḥ |
balānnirjitya bubhuje trailokyaiśvaryamadbhūtam ||2||
tataḥ parājitāḥ sarve devā: svargaparicyutāḥ |
brahmāṇaṃ ca puraskṛtya te jagmurlokamuttamam ||3||
yatrottamau devadevo saṃsthito śaṃkarācyutau |
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsurmahiṣasya durātmanaḥ || 4 ||
devānāṃ caiva sarveṣāṃ sthānāni tarasā'suraḥ |
vinirjitya svayaṃ bhuṃkte balavīryamadoddhataḥ ||5||
mahiṣāsuranāmā'sau duṣṭa daityo'mareśvarau |
vadhopāyaśca tasyāśu cityatāmasurārdanī || 6 ||
evaṃ śrutvā sa bhagavāndevānāmārtiyugvacaḥ |
cakāra kopaṃ subahu tathā śaṃkarapadmajī ||7||
evaṃ kopayutasyāsya harerāsyānmahīpate |
tejaḥ prādurabhūddivyaṃ sahasrārkasamadyuti ||8||
athānukramatastejaḥ |
sarveṣāṃ tridivaukasām |
śarīrādudbhavaṃ prāpa harṣayadvibudhādhipāt || 9 ||
yadabhūcchaṃbhujaṃ tejo mukhamasyodapadyata |
keśā babhūvuryāmyena vaiṣṇavena ca bāhavaḥ || 10 ||
saumyena ca stanau jātau māheṃdreṇa ca madhyamaḥ |
vāruṇena tato bhūpa jaṃdhorū saṃvabhūvatuḥ ||11|
nitaṃbī tejasā bhūmeḥ pādau brāhmeṇa tejasā |
pādāṃgulyo bhānavena vāsavena karāṃgulī ||12||
kaubereṇa tathā nāsā daṃtā: saṃjajñire tadā |
prājāpatyenottamena tejasā vasudhādhipa || 13 ||
pāvakena ca sañjataṃ locanatritayaṃ śubham |
sāṃdhyena tejasā jāte bhrukuṭī tejasāṃ nidhī || 24 ||
karṇau vāyavyato jātau tejaso manujādhipa |
sarveṣāṃ tejasā devī jātā mahiṣamadinī ||15||

śūlaṃ dadau śivo viṣṇuścakraṃ śaṃkhaṃ ca pāśabhṛt |
hutāśano dadau śakti mārutaścāpasāyako || 16 |
vajraṃ maheṃdraḥ pradadau ghaṃṭāṃ cairāvatādvajāt |
kāladaṃḍaṃ yamo brahmā cākṣamālākamaṃḍalū || 17||
divākaro raśmimālāṃ romakūpeṣu saṃdadī |
kālaḥ khaḍgaṃ tathā carma nirmalaṃ vasudhādhipa || 18||
samudro nirmalaṃ hāramajare cāṃbare nṛpa |
cūḍāmaṇi kuṃḍale ca kaṭakāni tathāṃgade || 19||
ardhacaṃdraṃ nirmalaṃ ca nūpurāṇi tathā dadau |
graiveyakaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ ca tasyai devyai mudānvitaḥ || 20 ||
viśvakarmā cormikāśca dadau tasyai dharāpate |
himavānvāhanaṃ siṃhaṃ ratnāni vividhāni ca || 21 ||
pānapātraṃ surāpūrṇaṃ dadau tasyai dhanādhipaḥ |
śeṣaśca bhagavāndevo nāgahāraṃ dadau vibhuḥ ||22||
anyairaśeṣavibudhairmānitā sā jaganmayī |
tāṃ tuṣṭuvurmahādevīṃ devā mahiṣapīḍitāḥ ||23||
nānāstotra maheśānī jagadudbhavakāriṇīm |
teṣāṃ niśamya deveśī stotraṃ vibudhapūjitā || 24 ||
mahiṣasya vadhārthāya mahānādaṃ cakāra ha |
tena nādena mahiṣacakito'bhūddharāpate || 25 ||
āsasāda jagaddhātrīṃ sarvasainyasamāvṛtaḥ |
tataḥ sa yuyudhe devyā mahiṣākhyo mahāsuraḥ ||26||
śastrāstrabahudhā kṣiptaiḥ pūrayantrambarāṃtaram |
cikṣuro grāmaṇīḥ senāpatirdurdhara durmukhī ||27||
bāṣkalastāmrakaścaiva fastoarcisparaḥ |
etaiścānyairasaṃkhyātaiḥ saṃgrāmāṃtakasannibhaiḥ ||28||
yoḥ parivṛto vīro mahiṣo dānavottamaḥ |
tataḥ sā kopatāmrākṣī devī lokavimohinī || 29 ||
jaghāna yodhānsamare devī mahiṣamāśritān |
tatasteṣu hateṣveva sa daityo roṣamūrcchitaḥ || 30||
āsasāda tadā devīṃ tūrṇaṃ māyāviśāradaḥ |
rūpāṃtarāṇi saṃbheje māyayā dānaveśvaraḥ ||31||
tāni tānyasya rūpāṇi nāśayāmāsa sā tadā |
tato'nte mahiṣaṃ rūpaṃ vibhrāṇamamarārdanam || 32||
pāśena baddhvā sudṛḍhaṃ chitvā khaḍgena tacchiraḥ |
pātayāmāsa mahiṣaṃ devī devagaṇāṃtakam || 33||
hāhākṛtaṃ tataḥ śeṣaṃ sainyaṃ bhagnaṃ diśo daśa |
tuṣṭuvurdevadeveśīṃ sarve devā: pramoditāḥ || 34 ||
evaṃ lakṣmīḥ samutpatrā mahiṣāsuramardinī |
rājañchṛṇu sarasvatyāḥ prādurbhāvo yathā'bhavat 35 ||
ekadā śubhanāmā''sīddaityo madabalotkaṭaḥ |
niśuṃbhaścāpi tadbhrātā mahābalaparākramaḥ ||36||
tena saṃpīḍitā devāḥ sarve bhraṣṭaśriyo nṛpa |
himavaṃtamathāsādya devīṃ tuṣṭuvurādarāt || 37||
devā ūcuḥ
jaya deveśa bhaktānāmārtināśanakovide |
dānavāṃtakarūpe tvamajarāmaraṇe'naghe ||38||
deveśi bhaktisulabhe mahābalaparākrame |
viṣṇu śaṃkara brahmādisvarūpe'naṃ tavikrame ||39||
sṛṣṭisthitikare nāśakārike kāṃtidāyini |
mahātāṃḍavasuprīte modadāyini mādhavi ||40||
prasīda devadeveśi prasīda karuṇānidhe | niśuṃbhaśuṃbhasaṃbhūtabhayāpārāṃbuvāridheḥ 118211
uddharāsmānprapannārtināśike śaraṇāgatān |
evaṃ saṃstuvatāṃ teṣāṃ tridaśānāṃ dharāpate ||42 ||

prasannā girijā prāha brūta stavanakāraṇam |
etasminnaṃtare tasyāḥ kośarūpātsamutthitā ||43||
kauśikī sā jagatpūjyā devānprītyedamabravīt |
prasannā'haṃ suraśreṣṭhāḥ stavenottamarūpiṇī ||44 ||
triyatāṃ vara ityukte devāḥ saṃvavire varam |
śuṃbhanāmā'varo bhrātā niśuṃbhastasya viśrutaḥ || 45||
trailokyamojasā''krāṃtaṃ daityena balaśālinā |
tadvadhaścityatāṃ devi durātmā dānaveśvaraḥ || 46 ||
bāghate satataṃ devi tiraskṛtya nijījasā |
śrīdevyuvāca
devaśatruṃ pātayiṣye niśuṃbhaṃ śuṃbhameva ca || 47|| ||
svasthāstiṣṭhatu bhadraṃ vaḥ kaṃṭakaṃ nāśayāmi vaḥ |
ityuktvā devadeveśī devānseṃdrāndayāmayī ||48 ||
jagāmādarśanaṃ sadyo miṣatāṃ tridivaukasām |
devāḥ samāgatā hṛṣṭā suvarṇādriguhāṃ śubhām ||49||
caṃḍamuṃḍī paśyataḥsma bhṛtyo śuṃbhaniśuṃbhayoḥ |
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ cārusarvāṅgīṃ devīṃ lokavimohinīm ||50||
kathayāmāsatu rājñe bhṛtyo to caṃḍamuṃḍakau |
deva sarvāsuraśreṣṭha ratnabhogārha mānada || 51 ||
apūrvā kāminī dṛṣṭā cāvābhyāṃ ripumardana |
tasyāḥ saṃbhogayogyatvamastyeva taba sāṃpratam ||52||
tāṃ samānaya cārvagī bhuṃkṣva saukhyasamanvitaḥ |
tādṛśī nāsurī nārī na gaṃdharvī na dānavī ||53||
na mānavī nāpi devī yādṛśī sā manoharā |
evaṃ bhṛtyavacaḥ śrutvā śumbhaḥ parabalārdanaḥ || 54 ||
dūtaṃ saṃpreṣayāmāsa sugrīvaṃ nāma dānavam |
sa dūtastvaritaṃ gatvā devyāḥ savidhamādarāt || 55 ||
vṛttāṃtaṃ kathayāmāsa devyai śumbhasya yadvacaḥ |
devi śuṃbhāsuro nāma trailokyavijayī prabhuḥ || 56 ||
sarveṣāṃ ratnavastūnāṃ bhoktā mānyau divaukasām |
taduktaṃ śṛṇu me devi ratnabhoktā'hamavyayaḥ || 57 ||
tvaṃ cāpi ratnabhūtā bhaja māṃ cārulocane |
sarveṣu yāni ratnāni devāsuranareṣu ca || 58||
tāni mayyeva subhage bhaja māṃ kāmajai rasaiḥ |
devyuvāca
satyaṃ vadasi he dūta daityarājapriyaṃkara || 59||
pratijñā yā mayā pūrvaṃ kṛtā sāpyanṛtā katham |
bhavettāṃ śṛṇu me dūta yā pratijñā yathā kṛtā || 60 ||
yo me dapaṃ vidhunute yo me balamapohati |
yo me pratibalo bhūyātsa eva mama bhogabhāk || 61 ||
tata enāṃ pratijñāṃ me satyāṃ kṛtvā'sureśvaraḥ |
gṛhṇātu pāṇi tarasā tasyāśakyaṃ kimatra hi || 62 ||
tasmādgaccha mahādūta svāminaṃ brūhi cādṛtaḥ |
pratijñāṃ cāpi me satyāṃ vidhāsyati balādhikaḥ || 63 ||
evaṃ vākyaṃ mahādevyāḥ samākarṇya sa dānavaḥ |
kathayāmāsa śumbhāya devyā vṛttāṃtamāditaḥ || 64||
tadapriyaṃ dūtavākyaṃ śumbhaḥ śrutvā mahābalaḥ |
kopamāhārayāmāsa mahāṃtaṃ danujādhipaḥ || 65 ||
tato dhūmrākṣanāmānaṃ daityaṃ daityapatiḥ prabhuḥ |
ādideśa śṛṇu vaco dhūmrākṣa mama cādṛtaḥ || 66 ||

tāṃ duṣṭāṃ keśapāśeṣu dhṛtvā'pyānītāṃ mama |
samīpamavilambena śīghraṃ gacchasva me puraḥ || 67||
ityādeśaṃ samāsādya daityeśo dhūmralocanaḥ |
ṣaṣṭyā'surāṇāṃ sahitaḥ sahasrāṇāṃ mahābalaḥ || 68 ||
tuhinācalamāsādya devyāḥ savidhameva saḥ |
uccairdevīṃ jagādāśu bhaja daityapati śubhe || 69 ||
śuṃbhaṃ nāma mahāvīryaṃ sarvabhogānavāpnuhi |
nocetkeśāngṛhītvā tvāṃ neṣye daityapati prati || 70 ||
ityuktā sā tato devo daityena tridaśāriṇā |
uvāca daitya yadrūṣe tatsatyaṃ te mahābala || 71 ||
rājā śuṃbhāsurastvaṃ ca kiṃ kariṣyasi tadvada |
ityukto daityapo'dhāvattūrṇaṃ śastrasamanvitaḥ || 72 ||
bhasmasāttaṃ cakārāśu huṅkāreṇa maheśvarī |
tataḥ sainyaṃ vāhanena devyā bhagnaṃ mahīpate || 73 ||
diśo daśābhajacchrīnaṃ hāhābhūtamacetanam |
tadvṛttāṃtaṃ samāśrutya sa śuṃbho daityarāḍvibhuḥ ||74 ||
cukopa ca mahākopābhrukuṭīkuṭilānanaḥ |
tataḥ kopaparītātmā daityarājaḥ pratāpavān ||75||
caṃḍaṃ muṃḍaṃ raktavījaṃ kramataḥ preṣayadvibhuḥ |
te ca gatvā trayo daityā vikrāṃtā bahuvikramāḥ || 76 ||
devī grahītumārabdhayatnāste hyabhavanbalāt |
tānāpatata evāsau jagaddhātrī madotkaṭā || 77 ||
śūlaṃ gṛhītvā vegena pātayāmāsa bhūtale |
sasainyānnihatāñchrutvā daityāṃstrīndānaveśvarau ||78||
śuṃbhaścaiva niśuṃbhaśca samājanmaturojasā |
niśuṃbhaścaiva śuṃbhaśca kṛtvā yuddhaṃ mahotkaṭam ||79||
devyāśca vaśagau jātau nihatau ca tayā'suro |
iti daityavaraṃ śubhaṃ ghātayitvā jaganmayī || 80 ||
vibudhaiḥ saṃstutā yadvatsākṣādvāgīśvarī parā |
evaṃ te varṇito rājanprādurbhāvo'tiramyakaḥ || 81 ||
kālyāścaiva mahālakṣmyāḥ sarasvatyāḥ krameṇa ca |
parā pareśvarī devī jagatsagaṃ karoti ca || 82||
pālanaṃ caiva saṃhāraṃ saiva devī dadhāti hi |
tāṃ samāśraya deveśīṃ jaganmohanivāriṇīm ||83 ||
mahāmāyāṃ pūjyatamāṃ sā kāryaṃ te vidhāsyati |
nārāyaṇa uvāca
iti rājā vacaḥ śrutvā muneḥ paramaśobhanam ||84||
devoṃ jagāma śaraṇaṃ sarvakāmaphalapradām |
nirāhāro yatātmā ca tanmanāśca samāhitaḥ || 85 ||
devī mūrti mṛnmayoṃ ca pūjayāmāsa bhaktitaḥ |
pūjanānte bali tasyai nijagātrāsṛjaṃ dadat || 86 ||
tadā prasannā deveśī jagadyoniḥ kṛpāvatī |
prādurbabhūva purato varaṃ brūhīti bhāṣiṇī || 87 ||
sa rājā nijamohasya nāśanaṃ jñānamuttamam |
rājyaṃ niṣkaṃṭakaṃ caiva yācatisma maheśvarīm || 88 ||
śrīdevyuvāca
rājanniṣkaṃṭakaṃ rājyaṃ jñānaṃ vai mohanāśanam |
bhaviṣyati mayā dattamasminneva bhave tava || 89||
anyacca śṛṇu bhūpāla janmāṃtaraviceṣṭitam |
bhānorjanma samāsādya sāvaṇirbhavitā bhavān || 90 ||
tatra manvaṃtarasyāpi patitvaṃ bahuvikramam |
santati bahulāṃ cāpi prāpyasyate madvarādbhavān||91||

evaṃ dattvā varaṃ devī jagāmādarśanaṃ tadā |
so'pi devyāḥ prasādena jāto manvaṃtarādhipaḥ || 92 ||
evaṃ te varṇitaṃ sādho sāvarṇerjanma karma ca |
etatpaṭhastathā śṛṇvandevyanugrahamāpnuyāt ||93||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskandhe devīmāhātmye dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ ||12||
atha trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
nārāyaṇa uvāca
athātaḥ śrūyatāṃ śeṣamanūnāṃ citramudbhavam |
yasya smaraṇamātreṇa devībhaktiḥ prajāyate || 1||
āsanvaivasvatamanoḥ putrāḥ ṣaḍ vimalodayāḥ |
karūṣaśca pṛṣaghraśca nābhāgo diṣṭa eva ca || 2||
śaryātiśca triśaṃkuśca sarva eva mahābalāḥ |
tataḥ ṣaḍeva te gatvā kāliṃdyāstīramuttamam ||3||
nirāhārā jitaśvāsāḥ pūjāṃ cakrustataḥ sthitāḥ |
devyā mahīmayīṃ mūrti vinirmāya pṛthakpṛthak ||4||
pūjayāmāsurādṛtāḥ |
tataśca sarva evaite tapaḥ sārā mahābalāḥ || 5 ||
vividhairupacā rastāṃ vāyubhakṣaṇāstoyajīvanāḥ |
dhūmrapānā raśmipānāḥ kramaśaśca bahuśramāḥ ||6||
jīrṇaparṇāśanā sadā |
vimalā matirutpannā sarvamohavināśinī ||7||
tatasteṣāmādareṇārādhanaṃ kurvatāṃ devīpādaikacintanāḥ |
matyā vimalayā teṣāmātmanyevākhilaṃ jagat || 8||
babhūvurmanuputrāste tadadbhutamivābhavat |
evaṃ dvādaśavarṣāte tapasā jagadīśvarī ||9||
darśanaṃ saṃjagāmāśu sahasrārkasamadyutiḥ |
tāṃ dṛṣṭvā vimalātmāno rājaputrāḥ ṣaḍeva te || 10 ||
prādurbabhūva deveśī
tuṣṭuvurbhaktinamrāṃtaḥkaraṇā bhāvasaṃyutāḥ |
rājaputrā ūcuḥ
maheśvari jayeśāni parame karuṇālaye || 11 ||
vāgbhavapratipādite |
klīṃkāravigrahe devi kloṃkāraprītidāyini || 12||
vāgbhavārādhanaprīte |
mahāmāye modapare mahāsāmrājyadāyini || 13||
kāmarājamanomodadāyinīśvaratoṣiṇi
viṣṇvarkaharaśakrādisvarūpe bhogavardhani |
evaṃ stutā bhagavatī rājaputrairmahātmabhiḥ || 14 ||
prasādasumukhī devī provāca vacanaṃ śubham |
śrīdevyuvāca
rājaputrā mahātmāno bhavatastapasā yutāḥ || 15 ||
niṣkalmaṣāḥ śuddhadhiyo jātā vai madupāsanāt |
varaṃ manogataṃ sarvaṃ yācadhvamavilambitam ||16||
prasannā'haṃ pradāsyāmi yuṣmākaṃ manasi sthitam |

rājaputrā ūcuḥ
devi niṣkaṃṭakaṃ rājyaṃ saṃtatiśvirajīvinī || 17||
bhogā avyāhatāḥ kāmaṃ yaśastejo matiśca ha |
akuṃṭhitatvaṃ sarveṣāmeṣa eva varo hitaḥ || 18||
śrīdevyuvāca
evamastu ca sarveṣāṃ bhavatāṃ yanmanogatam |
athānyadapi me vākyaṃ śrūyatāmādarādidam ||19||
bhavantaṃ sarva evaite manvantarapatīśvarāḥ |
saṃtatyā dīrghayā bhogairanekairapi saṅgamaḥ ||20||
akhaṇḍitabalaiśvaryaṃ yaśastejovibhūtayaḥ |
bhavitāro matprasādādrājaputrāḥ krameṇa tu || 21 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
evaṃ tebhyo varāndattvā bhrāmarī jagadaṃbikā |
aṃtardhānaṃ jagāmāśu bhaktyā taiḥ saṃstutā satī 22 ||
te rājaputrāḥ sarve'pi tasmiñjanmanyanuttamam |
rājyaṃ mahīgatānbhogānbubhujuśca mahaujasaḥ ||23||
saṃtati cākhaṃḍitāṃ te samutpādya mahītale |
vaṃśaṃ saṃsthāpya sarve'pi manūnāṃ patayo'bhavan ||24||
bhavāntare krameṇaiva sāvarṇipadabhāginaḥ |
prathamo dakṣasāvarṇirnavamo manurīritaḥ || 25 ||
avyāhatabalo devyāḥ prasādādabhavadvibhuḥ |
dvitīyo merusāvaṇirdaśamo bhānureva ca || 26||
babhūva manvantarapo mahādevīprasādataḥ |
tṛtīyo manurākhyātaḥ sūryasāvarṇināmakaḥ ||27||
ekādaśī mahotsāhastapasā svena bhāvitaḥ |
caturthaścaṃdrasāvaṇirdvādaśo manurāḍ vibhuḥ ||28||
devīsamārādhanena jāto manvantareśvaraḥ |
pañcamo rudrasāvaṇistrayodaśa manuḥ smṛtaḥ || 29 ||
mahābalo mahāsattvo vaibhūva jagadīśvaraḥ |
ṣaṣṭhaśca viṣṇusārvāṇaścaturdaśamanuḥ kṛtī || 30 ||
babhūva devīvarato jagatāṃ prathitaḥ prabhuḥ |
caturdaśaite manavo manavo mahātejobalairyutāḥ ||31||
devyārāghanataḥ pūjyā vaṃdyā lokeṣu nityaśaḥ |
mahāpratāpinaḥ sarve bhrāmaryāstu prasādataḥ ||32||
nārada uvāca
keyaṃ sā bhrāmarī devī kathaṃ jātā kimātmikā |
tadākhyānaṃ vada prājña vicitraṃ śokanāśakam ||33||
na tṛptimadhigacchāmi pibandevī kathāmṛtam |
amṛtaṃ pibatāṃ mṛtyurnāsya śravaṇato yataḥ ||34||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śṛṇu nārada vakṣyāmi jaganmāturviceṣṭitam |
acityāvyaktarūpāyā vicitraṃ mokṣadāyakam || 35 ||
yadyaccaritra śrīdevyāstatsarvaṃ lokahetave |
nirvyājayā karuṇayā putre māturyathā tathā ||36||
pūrvaṃ daityo mahānāsīdaruṇākhyo mahābalaḥ |
pātāle daityasaṃsthāne devadveṣī mahākhalaḥ ||37||
sa devāñjetukāmaśca cakāra paramaṃ tapaḥ |
padmasaṃbhavamuddiśya sa nastrātā bhaviṣyati ||38||
gatvā himavataḥ pārśve gaṅgājalasuśītale |
pakvaparṇāśano yogī saṃnirudhya marudgaṇam || 39||

gāyatrī japasaṃsaktaḥ sakāmastamasā yutaḥ |
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi tato vārikaṇāśanaḥ || 40 ||
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi tataḥ pavanabhojanaḥ |
daśavarṣasahasrāṇi nirāhāro'bhavattataḥ ||41||
evaṃ tapasyatastasya śarīrādutthito'nalaḥ |
dadāha jagatīṃ sarvāṃ tadadbhutamivābhavat ||42 ||
kimidaṃ kimidaṃ ceti devāḥ sarve cakampire |
saṃtrastāḥ sakalā lokā brahmāṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ yayuḥ ||43||
vijñāpitaṃ devavaraiḥ śrutvā tatra caturmukhaḥ |
gāyatrī sahito haṃsasamārūḍho yayau mudā || 44 ||
prāṇamātrāvaśiṣṭaṃ taṃ dhamanīśatasaṃkulam |
śuṣkodaraṃ kṣāmagātraṃ dhyānamīlitalocanam ||45||
dadarśa tejayā vīmaṃ dvitīyamiva pāvakam |
varaṃ varaya bhadraṃ te vatsa yanmanasi sthitam ||46 ||
śrutimātreṇa saṃtoṣakārakaṃ vākyamūtrivān |
śrutvā brahmamukhādvāṇīṃ sudhādhārābhivāruṇaḥ ||47 ||
unmīlitākṣaḥ purato dadarśa jalajodbhavam |
gāyatrīsahitaṃ devaṃ caturvedasamanvitam ||48||
akṣasrakkuṃḍikāhastaṃ japantaṃ brahma śāśvatam |
dṛṣṭvotthāya nanāmātha stutvā ca vividhaiḥ stavaiḥ || 49 ||
varaṃ vavre svabuddhistho mā bhavenmṛtyurityapi |
śrutvā'ruṇavaco brahmā bodhayāmāsa sādaram ||50 ||
brahmaviṣṇumaheśādyā mṛtyunā kavalīkṛtāḥ |
tadā'nyeṣāṃ tu kā vārtā maraṇe dānavottama || 51 ||
varaṃ yogyaṃ tato brūhi dātuṃ yaḥ śakyate mayā |
nātrāgrahaṃ prakurvanti buddhimanto janāḥ kvacit ||52||
iti brahmavacaḥ śrutvā punaḥ provāca sādaram |
na yuddhena ca śastrāstrānna puṃbhyo nāpi yoṣitaḥ || 53||
dvipādbhyo vā catuṣpāddbhyo nobhayākāratastathā |
bhavenme mṛtyurityeva deva dehi varaṃ prabho || 54 ||
balaṃ ca vipulaṃ dehi yena devajayo bhavet |
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā tathāstviti vaco'bravīt ||
dattvā varaṃ jagāmāśu padmajaḥ svaṃ niketanam |
tato'ruṇākhyo daityastu pātālātsvāśrayasthitān ||
daityānākārayāmāsa brahmaṇo varadarpitaḥ |
āgatya te'surāḥ sarve daityeśaṃ taṃ pracakrire ||57||
dūtaṃ ca preṣayāmāsuryuddhārthamamarāvatīm |
dūtavākyaṃ tadā śrutvā devarāḍ bhayakampitaḥ || 58||
devaḥ sārdhaṃ jagāmāśu brahmaṇaḥ sadanaṃ prati |
brahmaviṣṇū puraskṛtya jagmuste śaṃkarālayam ||59 |
vicāraṃ cakrire tatra vadhārthaṃ te suradruhām |
etasminsamaye tatra daityasenāsamāvṛtaḥ || 60 ||
aruṇākhyo daityarājo jagāmāśu triviṣṭapam |
sūryenduyanavahnīnāmadhikārānpṛthak pṛthak || 61 ||
svayaṃ cakāra tapasā nānārūpadharo mune |
svasvasthānacyutāḥ sarve jagmuḥ kailāsamaṇḍalam 62||
śaśaṃsuḥ śaṃkaraṃ devā: svasvaduḥkhaṃ pṛthak pṛthak |
mahānvicārastatrāsītki kartavyamataḥ param || 63 ||
na yuddhena ca śastrāstrairna puṃbhyo nāpi yoṣitaḥ |
dvipāddbhyo vā catuṣpāddbhyo nobhayākārato'pi vā ||
mṛtyurbhavediti brahmā provāca vacanaṃ yataḥ |
iti ciṃtāturāḥ sarve kartu kiṃcinna ca kṣamāḥ 65 ||
etasminsamaye tatra vāgabhūdaśarīriṇī |
bhajadhvaṃ bhuvaneśānīṃ sā vaḥ kāryaṃ vidhāsa 66||
gāyatrījapasaṃsakto daityarāḍayadi tāṃ tyajet |
mṛtyu yogyastadā bhūyādityuccaistoṣakāriṇī ||67 ||

śrutvā daivīṃ tathā vāṇīṃ mantrayāmāsurādṛtāḥ |
bṛhaspati samāhūya vacanaṃ prāha devarāṭ || 68 || .
guro gaccha surāṇāṃ tu kāryārthamasuraṃ prati |
yathā bhavecca gāyatrītyāgastasya tathā kuru || 69 ||
asmābhiḥ parameśānī sevyate dhyānayogataḥ |
prasannā sā bhagavatī sāhāyyaṃ te kariṣyati || 70 ||
ityādiśya guruṃ sarve jagmurjāṃbūnadeśvarīm |
sāsmāndaityabhayatrastānpālayiṣyati śobhanā || 71 ||
tatra gatvā tapaścaryāṃ cakruḥ sarve suniṣṭhitāḥ |
māyābījajapāsaktā devīmakhaparāyaṇāḥ ||72||
bṛhaspatistadā śīghraṃ jagāmāsurasannidhau |
āgataṃ munivayaṃ taṃ papracchātha sa daityarāṭ || 73 ||
mune kutrāgamaḥ kasmātkimarthamiti me vada |
nāhaṃ yuṣmatpakṣapātī pratyutārātireva ca || 74 ||
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā provāca munināyaka: |
asmatsevyā ca yā devī sā tvayā pūjyate'niśam ||
tasmādasmatpakṣapātī na bhavestvaṃ kathaṃ vada |
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā mohito devamāyayā || 76||
tatyāja paramaṃ mantramabhimānana sattama |
gāyatrītyāgato daityo nistejasko babhūva ha || 77||
、
kṛtakāryo gurustasmātsthānānnirgatavānpunaḥ |
tato vṛttāṃtamakhilaṃ kathayāmāsa vajriṇe || 78 ||
saṃtuṣṭāste surāḥ sarve bhejire parameśvarīm |
evaṃ bahugate kāle kasmiścitsamaye mune || 79 ||
prādurāsījjaganmātā jaganmaṃgalakāriṇī |
koṭisūryapratīkāśā koṭikandarpasundarā ||80||
citrānulepanā devī citravāsoyugānvitā |
vicitramālyābharaṇā citrabhramaramuṣṭikā || 81 ||
varābhayakarā śāṃtā karuṇāmṛtasāgarā |
nānābhramarasaṃyuktapuṣpamālā virājitā ||82||
bhrāmarībhirvicitrābhirasaṃkhyābhiḥ samāvṛtā |
bhramarairgāyamānaiśca hrīṃkāramanumanvaham ||83||
samantataḥ parivṛtā koṭikoṭibhirambikā |
sarvaśṛṃgāraveṣāḍhayā sarvevedapraśaṃsitā || 84||
sarvātmikā sarvamayī sarvamaṃgalarūpiṇī |
sarvajñā sarvajananī sarvā sarveśvarī śivā || 85 ||
dṛṣṭvā tāṃ taralātmano devā brahmapurogamāḥ |
tuṣṭuvurhṛṣṭamanaso viṣṭaraśravasaṃ śivām ||86 ||
devā ūcuḥ
namo devi mahāvidye sṛṣṭisthityaṃtakāriṇi |
namaḥ kamalapatrākṣi sarvādhāre namo'stu te || 87||
saviśvataijasa prājñavirāṭsūtrātmike namaḥ |
namo vyākṛtarūpāyai kūṭasthāyai namonamaḥ ||88||
durge sargādirahite duṣṭasaṃrodhanārgale |
nirargalapremagamye bharge devi namo'stute ||89||
namaḥ śrīkālike mātarnamo nīlasarasvati |
ugratāre mahogre te nityameva namo namaḥ ||90||
namaḥ pītāṃbare devi namastripurasundari |
namo bhairavi mātaṃgi dhūmāvati namo namaḥ || 91 ||
chinnamaste namaste'stu kṣīrasāgarakanyake |
namaḥ śākambhari śive namaste raktadantike || 92||
niśumbhaśumbhadalani raktabījavināśini |
dhūmralocananirṇāśe vṛtrāsuranibarhaṇa || 93 ||
caṇḍamuṇḍapramathini dānavāṃtakare śive |
namaste vijaye gaṃge śārade vikacānane ||94||

pṛthvīrūpe dayārūpe tejorūpe namo namaḥ |
prāṇarūpe mahārūpe bhūtarūpe namo'stu te || 95 ||
viśvamūrte dayāmūteṃ dharmamūrte namo namaḥ |
devamūrte jyotimūrte jñānamūrte namo'stu te || 96 ||
gāyatri varade devi sāvitri ca sarasvati |
namaḥ svāhe svadhe mātardakṣiṇe te namo namaḥ ||97||
neti netīti vākyairyā bodhyate sakalāgamaiḥ |
sarve pratyaksvarūpāṃ tāṃ bhajāmaḥ paradevatām ||98||
bhramarairveṣṭitā yasmādbhrāmarī sā tataḥ smṛtā |
tasyai devyai namo nityaṃ nityameva namo namaḥ || 99||
namaste pārśvayoḥ pṛṣṭhe namaste puratombike |
nama ūrdhvaṃ namaśvādhaḥ sarvatraiva namo namaḥ || 100 ||
kṛpāṃ kuru mahādevi maṇidvipādhivāsini |
anantakoṭibrahmāṃḍanāyike jagadambike || 101 ||
jaya devi jaganmātarjaya devi parātpare |
jaya śrībhuvaneśāni jaya. sarvottamottame || 102 ||
kalyāṇaguṇaratnānāmākare bhuvaneśvari |
prasīda parameśāni prasīda jagatoraṇe ||103||
nārāyaṇa uvāca
iti devavacaḥ śrutvā pragalbhaṃ madhuraṃ vacaḥ |
uvāca jagadamvā sā mattakokilabhāpiṇī || 104||
devyuvāca
prasannā'haṃ sadā devā varadeśaśikhāmaṇiḥ |
bruvaṃtu vibudhāḥ sarve yadeva syāccikīrṣitam 105 ||
devīvākyaṃ surāḥ śrutvā procurduḥkhasya kāraṇam |
duṣṭadaityasya caritaṃ jagadvādhākaraṃ param || 106 ||
devabrāhmaṇavedānāṃ helanaṃ nāśanaṃ tathā |
sthānabhraṃśaṃ surāṇāṃ ca kathayāmāsurāvṛtāḥ || 107||
brahmaṇo varadānaṃ ca yathāvatte samūcire |
śrutvā devamukhāhāṇīṃ mahābhagavatī tadā || 108||
prerayāmāsa hastasthānbhramarānbhrāmarī tadā |
pārśvasthānagrabhāgasthānnānārūpadharāṃstadā || 109 ||
janayāmāsa bahuśo yairyāsaṃ bhuvanatrayam |
maṭacī yūthavatteṣāṃ samudāyastu nirgataḥ || 110 ||
tadāṃtarikṣaṃ taivyaptimaṃdhakāraḥ kṣitāvabhūt |
divi parvataśṛṃgeṣu tumeṣu tripaneṣyapi || 111 ||
bhramarā eva saṃjātāstadadbhutamivābhavat |
te sarve daityavakṣāṃsi dārayāmāsurudgatāḥ ||112||
naraṃ madhuharaṃ yadvanmakṣikāḥ kopasaṃyutāḥ |
upāya na ca śastrāṇāṃ yātrāṇāṃ tadā'bhavat ||
na yuddhaṃ na ca saṃbhāṣā kevalaṃ maraṇaṃ khalu |
yasminyasminsthale ye ye sthitā daityā yathā yathā ||
tatraiva ca tathā sarve maraṇaṃ prāpuratanayāḥ |
parasparaṃ samācāroṃ na kasyāpyabhavattadā ||1
kṣaṇamātreṇa te sarve vinaṣṭā daityapuṃgavāḥ |
kṛtvetthaṃ bhramarāḥ kārya devoniḥ || 116 ||
āścaryametadāścaryamiti lokāḥ samūcire |
kiṃ citraṃ jagadambāyā yasyā māyeyamīdṛśī 117||
tato devagaṇāḥ sarve brahmaviṣṇupurogamāḥ |
nimagnā harṣajaladhī pūjayāmāsuraṃbikām || 118 ||
nānopacārairvividhairnānopāyanapāṇayaḥ |
jayaśabdaṃ prakurvāṇā mumucuḥ sumanāṃsi ca || 119 ||

divi duṃdubhayo nedurnanṛtuścāpsarogaṇāḥ |
peṭhurvedānmuniśreṣṭhā gaṃdharvādyā jagustathā ||120||
mṛdaṃgamurajābīṇāḍhakkāḍamaru niḥsvanaiḥ |
ghaṃṭāśaṃkhaninādaiśva vyāptamāsījjagattrayam || 121 ||
nāmāstotrastadā stutvā mūryādhāyāṃjalīṃstadā |
jaya mātarjayeśānītyevaṃ sarve samūcire || 122 ||
tatastuṣṭā mahādevī varāndattvā pṛthakpṛthak |
svasmiśca vipulāṃ bhakti prārthitā tairdadau ca tām ||
paśyatāmeva devānāmaṃtarghānaṃ gatā tataḥ |
iti te sarvamākhyātaṃ bhrāmaryāścaritaṃ mahat || 124||
paṭhatāṃ śṛṇvatāṃ caiva sarvaṇapapraṇāśanam |
śrutamāścaryajanakaṃ saṃsārārṇavatārakam || 125||
evaṃ manūnāṃ sarveṣāṃ caritaṃ pāpanāśanam |
devīmāhātmyasaṃyuktaṃ paṭhañśṛṇvaśubhapradam || 126||
yacaitatpaṭhate nityaṃ śṛṇuyādyo'niśaṃ naraḥ |
sarvapāpavinirmukto devīsāyujyamāpnuyāt ||127||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe daśamaskaṃdhe trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ ||13||
sārdharudraḥ paṃcaśata 511 || ślokairvyāsakṛtaiḥ śubhaiḥ |
devībhāgavatasyāsya daśamaskandha īritaḥ ||1||
samāto'yaṃ daśamaḥ skandhaḥ

śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ
śrīmaddevībhāgavatam
ekādaśaḥ skandhaḥ
atha prathamo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
bhagavan bhūtabhavyeśa nārāyaṇa sanātana |
ākhyātaṃ paramāścarya devīcāritramuttamam || 1||
prādurbhāvaḥ paro mātuḥ kāryārthamasuradruhām |
adhikārātiruktā'tra devopūrṇakṛpāvaśāt ||2||
adhunā śrotumicchāmi yena prīṇāti sarvadā |
svabhaktānparipuṣṇāti tamācāraṃ vada prabho ||3||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śṛṇu nārada tattvajña sadācāravidhikramam |
yadanuṣṭhānamātreṇa devī prīṇāti sarvadā ||4||
prātarutthāya kartavyaṃ yadvijena dine dine |
tadahaṃ saṃpravakṣyāmi dvijānāmupakārakam ||5||
udayāstamayaṃ yāvadvijaḥ satkarmakṛdbhavet |
nityanaimittikairyuktaḥ kāmyaiścānyairagarhitaiḥ ||6|| 6||
ātmanaśca sahāyārthaṃ pitā mātā ne tiṣṭhati |
na putradārā na jñātirdharmaṃstiṣṭhati kevalam ||7|| 4
tasmāddharmaṃ sahāyārthaṃ nityaṃ saṃcinu sādhanaiḥ |
dharmeṇaiva sahāyāttu tamastarati dustaram || 8||
ācāraḥ prathamo dharmaḥ śrutyuktaḥ smārta eva ca |
tasmādasminsamāyukto nityaṃ syādātmano dvijaḥ || 9 ||
ācārāllabhate cāyurācārāllabhate prajāḥ |
ācārādannamakṣayyamācāro haṃti pālakam || 10 ||
ācāraḥ paramo dharmo nṛṇāṃ kalyāṇakārakaḥ |
iha loke sukhī bhūtvā paratra labhate sukham ||11||
ajñānāṃdhajanānāṃ tu mohitai bhramitātmanām |
dharmarūpo mahādīpo muktimārgapradarśakaḥ ||12||
ācārātprāpyate śreṣṭhaghamācārātkarma labhyate |
karmaṇo jāyate jñānamiti vākyaṃ manoḥ smṛtam ||

sarvadharmavariṣṭho'yamācāraḥ paramaṃ tapaḥ |
tadeva jñānamuddiṣṭaṃ tena sarva prasādhyate || 14 ||
yastvācāravihīno'tra vartate dvijasattama |
sa śūdravadbahiṣkāryo yathā śūdrastathaiva saḥ || 15 ||
ācāro dvividhaḥ proktaḥ śāstrīyo laukikastathā |
ubhāvapi prakartavyo na tyājyo śubhamicchatā || 13 ||
grāmagharmā jātidharmā deśadharmāḥ kulodbhavāḥ |
parigrāhyā nṛbhiḥ sarvairnaiva tāṃllaṃghayenmune || 17 ||
durācāro hi puruṣo loke bhavati niditaḥ |
duḥkhabhāgī ca satataṃ vyādhinā vyāpta eva ca 18 ||
parityajedarthaṃ kāmo yo syātāṃ dharmavajito |
dharmamapyasukhodakaṃ lokavidviṣṭameva ca || 19||
nārada uvāca
vahutvādiha śāstrāṇāṃ niścayaḥ syātkathaṃ mune |
kiyatpramāṇaṃ tadbrūhi dharmamārgavinirṇayam ||20||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śrutismṛtī ubhe netre purāṇaṃ hṛdayaṃ smṛtam |
etattrayokta eva syāddharmo nānyatra kutracit || 21 ||
virodho yatra tu bhavettrayāṇāṃ ca parasparam |
śrutistatra pramāṇaṃ syādddvayordvaidhe smṛtirvarā ||22||
tidvaidhaṃ bhavedyatra tatra dharmāvubhau smṛtau |
smṛtidvaidhaṃ tu yatra syādviṣayaḥ kalpyatāṃ pṛthak ||23||
purāṇeṣu kvacicaiva taṃtradṛṣṭaṃ yathātatham |
dharma vadaṃti taṃ dharmaṃ gṛhṇīyānna kathaṃcana ||24||
vedāvirodhi cettaṃtraṃ tatpramāṇaṃ na saṃśayaḥ |
pratyakṣaśrutiruddhaṃ yattatpramāṇaṃ bhavenna ca ||25||
sarvathā veda ebāsī dharmamārgapramāṇakaḥ |
tenāviruddhaṃ yatkicittatpramāṇaṃ na cānyathā || 26||
yo vedadharmamujjhitya vartate'nyapramāṇataḥ |
kuṇḍāni tasya śikṣārthaṃ yamaloke vasaṃti hi ||27||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena vedoktaṃ dharmamāśrayet |
smṛtiḥ purāṇamanyadvā taṃtraṃ vā śāstrameva ca ||28||
tanmūlatve pramāṇaṃ syānnānyathā tu kadācana |
ye kuśāstrābhiyogena vartayaṃtīhaṃ mānavān ||29||
adhomukhordhvapādāste yāsyati narakārṇavam |
kāmacārāḥ pāśupatāstathā vai liṃgadhāriṇaḥ || 30 ||
rutamudrāṃkitā ye ca vaikhānasamatānugāḥ |
te sarve nirayaṃ yāṃti vedamārga vahiṣkṛtāḥ ||31||
vedoktameva saddharmaṃ tasmātkuryānnaraḥ sadā |
utthāyotthāya voddhavyaṃ kiṃ mayā'dya kṛtaṃ kṛtam ||
taṃ vā dāpitaṃ vāpi vākyenāpi ca bhāṣitam |
upapāpeṣu sarveṣu pātakepu mahatsvapi || 33||
avāpya rajanīyāmaṃ brahmadhyānaṃ samācaret |
ūrusyottāna caraṇaḥ savye corī tathottaram || 34||
ujñānaṃ kiciduttānaṃ mukhamavaṣṭabhya corasā |
nimīlitākṣaḥ sattvastho dantairdatānna saṃspṛśet || 35||
tāsthācalajihvaśva saṃvṛtāsyaḥ suniścalaḥ |
sanniruddhedriyagrāmo nātinimnasthitāsanaḥ || 36 ||
dviguṇaṃ triguṇaṃ vāpi prāṇāyāmamupakramet |
tato dhyeyaḥ sthito yo'sau hṛdaye dīpavatprabhuḥ ||37||
dhārayettatra cātmānaṃ dhāraṇāṃ dhārayedudhaḥ |
sadhūmaśca vidhūmaśca sagarbhaścāpyagarbhakaḥ || 38 || >
salakṣyaścāpyalakṣyaśca prāṇāyāmastu ṣaḍvidhaḥ |
prāṇāyāmasamo yogaḥ prāṇāyāma itīritaḥ ||39||

prāṇāyāma iti prokto revapūrakakumbhakaiḥ |
vargatrayātmakā hyete recapūrakakumbhakāḥ ||40||
sa eva praṇavaḥ proktaḥ prāṇāyāmaśca tanmayaḥ |
iḍayā vāyumāropya pūrayitvodare sthitam || 41 ||
śanaiḥ ṣoḍaśamātrābhiranyayā taṃ virecayet |
evaṃ sadhūmaḥ prāṇānāmāyāmaḥ kathito mune ||42||
ādhāre liṃganābhiprakaṭitahṛdaye tālumūle lalāṭe
dve patre ṣoḍaśāre dvidaśadaśadaladvādaśārdhe catuṣke |
vāsānte bālamavye ḍaphakaṭhasahite kaṇṭhadeśe svarāṇāṃ
haṃkṣaṃtattvārthayuktaṃ sakaladalagataṃ varṇarūpaṃ namāmi ||43||
aruṇakamalasaṃsthā tadrajaḥpuṃjavarṇā haraniyamitacihnā padmataṃtusvarūpā |
ravihutavaharākānāyakāsyastanāḍhyā sakṛdapi yadi citte saṃvasetsyātsa muktaḥ || 44||
sthitiḥ saivāgatiryātrā matiścitā stutirvacaḥ |
ahaṃ sarvātmako devaḥ stutiḥ sarvaṃ tvadarcanam ||
ahaṃ devī na cānyo'smi brahmaivāhaṃ na śokabhāk |
saccidānandarūpo'haṃ svātmānamiti ciṃtayet ||
prakāśamānāṃ prathame prayāṇe pratiprayāṇe'pyamṛtāyamānām |
aṃtaḥ padavyāmanusaṃcaraṃtīmānaṃdarūpāmabalāṃ prapadye ||47 ||
tato nijabrahmaraṃdhre dhyāyettaṃ gurumīśvaram |
upacārairmānasaiśca pūjayettaṃ yathāvidhi || 48 ||
stuvītānena maṃtreṇa sāthako niyatātmavān |
gururbrahmā gururviṣṇurgururdevo maheśvaraḥ ||
gurureva paraṃ brahma tasmai śrīgurave namaḥ || 49||
iti śrīdevī bhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe prātaściṃtanaṃ nāma prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
ācārahīnaṃ na punanti vedā yadapyadhītāḥ saha ṣaḍbhiraṃgaiḥ |
chaṃdāṃsyenaṃ mṛtyukāle tyajaṃti noḍaṃ śakuntā iva jātapakṣāḥ || 1||
brāhme muhūrte cotyāya tatsarvaṃ samyagācaret |
rātreraṃtimayāme tu vedābhyāsaṃ caredbudhaḥ ||2|
kiṃcitkālaṃ tataḥ kuryādiṣṭadevānucitanam |
yogī tu pūrvamārgeṇa brahmadhyānaṃ samācāret || 3 ||
jīva brahmaikyatā yena jāyate tu niraṃtaram |
jīvanmuktaśca bhavati tatkṣaṇādeva nārada ||4||
paṃcapaṃca upaḥ kālaḥ saptapaṃcāruṇodayaḥ |
aṣṭapaṃca bhavetprātaḥ śeṣaḥ sūryodayaḥ smṛtaḥ || 5 ||
prātarutthāya yaḥ kuryādviṇmūtraṃ dvijasattamaḥ |
nairṛtyāmiṣuvikṣepamatītyābhyadhikaṃ bhuvaḥ || 6 ||
viṇmūtre'pi ca karṇastha āśrame prathame dvija: |
nivītaṃ pṛṣṭhataḥ kuryādvānaprasthagṛhasthayoḥ ||7||

kṛtvā yajñopavītaṃ tu pṛṣṭataḥ kaṭhalaṃbitam |
viṇmūtraṃ tu gṛhī kuryātkarṇasthaṃ prathamāśramī || 8 ||
antarṣāya tṛṇabhūmi śiraḥ prāvṛtya vāsasā |
vācaṃ niyamya yatnena hīnaśvāsavarjitaḥ ||9||
na phālakṛṣṭe na jale na citāyāṃ na parvate |
jīrṇadevālaye kuryānna valmīke na śādale || 10 ||
na sasatveṣu garteṣu na gacchanna pathi sthitaḥ |
saṃdhyayorubhayorjapye bhojane daṃtadhāvane || 11 ||
pitṛkārye ca daive ca tathā mūtrapurīṣayoḥ |
utsāhe maithune vāpi tathā vai gurusannidhau || 12 ||
yāge dāne brahmayaje dvijo maunaṃ samācaret |
devatā ṛṣayaḥ sarve piśācoragarākṣasāḥ || 13 ||
ito gacchaṃtu bhūtāni bahirbhūmi karomyaham |
iti saṃprārthya paścāttu kuryācchaucaṃ yathāvidhi 14 ||
vāyvagnī vipramādityamāpaḥ paśyaṃstathaiva gāḥ |
na kadācana kurvīta viṇmūtrasya visarjanam || 15 ||
udaṅmukho divā kuryādrātro ceddakṣiṇāmukhaḥ |
tata ācchādya viṇmūtraṃ loṣṭhaparṇatṛṇādibhiḥ || 16 ||
gṛhītaliṃga utthāya sa gacchedvārisannidhau |
pātre jalaṃ gṛhītvā tu gacchedanyatra caiva hi 17 ||
gṛhītvā mṛttikāṃ kūlācchvetāṃ brāhmaṇasattamaḥ |
raktāṃ pītāṃ tathā kṛṣṇāṃ gṛhṇīyuścānyavarṇakāḥ 18 ||
athavā yā yatra deśe saiva grāhyā dvijottamaiḥ |
aṃtarjalāddeva gṛhādvalmīkānmūṣakotkarāt || 19 || ||
kṛtaśaucāvaśiṣṭācca na grāhyāḥ sapta mṛttikāḥ |
mūtrāttu dviguṇaṃ śauce maithune triguṇaṃ smṛtam ||20||
ekā liṃge kare tisra ubhayormṛdddvayaṃ smṛtam |
mūtraśaucaṃ samākhyātaṃ śauce tadviguṇaṃ smṛtam 21||
viṭśauce liṃgadeśe tu pradadyānmṛttikādvayam |
paṃcāpāne darśakasminnubhayoḥ sapta mṛttikāḥ ||22||
vāmapādaṃ puraskṛtya paścāddakṣiṇameva ca |
pratyekaṃ ca caturvāraṃ mṛttikāṃ lepayetsudhīḥ || 23||
evaṃ śaucaṃ gṛhasthasya dviguṇaṃ brahmacāriṇaḥ |
triguṇaṃ vānaprasthasya yatīnāṃ ca caturguṇam || 24 ||
ārdrāmalakamānā tu mṛttikā śaucakarmaṇi |
pratyekaṃ tu sadā grāhyo nāto nyūnā kadācana 25 ||
etaddivā syādviśocaṃ tadadhaṃ niśi kīrtitam |
āturasya tadadhaṃ tu mārgasthasya tadardhakam || 26||
strīśūdrāṇāmaśaktānāṃ bālānāṃ śaucakarmaṇi |
yathā gaṃdhakṣayaḥ syāttu tathā kuryādasaṃkhyakam ||27||
gaṃdhalepakṣayo yāvattāvacchocaṃ vidhīyate |
sarveṣāmeva varṇānāmityāha bhagavānmanuḥ || 28 ||
vāmahastena śaucaṃ tu kuryāṭṭai dakṣiṇena na |
nābheradho vāmahasto nābherūrdhvaṃ tu dakṣiṇaḥ || 29||
śodhakarmaṇi vijñeyo nānyathā dvijapuṃgavaḥ |
jalapātraṃ na gṛhṇīyādviṇmūtrotsarjane budhaḥ || 30 ||
gṛhṇīyādyadi mohena prāyaścittaṃ carettataḥ |
mohādvāpyathavā''lasyānna kuryācchaucamātmanaḥ 31 ||
jalāhārastrirātraḥ syāttato jāpācca śudhyati |
deśakāladravyaśaktisvopapattīśca sarvaśaḥ ||32||
jhātyā śaucaṃ prakartavyamālasyaṃ nātra dhārayet |
purīṣotsarjane kuryādgaṃḍūṣāndvādaśaiva tu || 33||
caturo mūtravikṣepe nāto nyūnānkadācana |
adhomukhaṃ naraḥ kṛtvā tyajettaṃ vāmataḥ śanaiḥ ||34||
ācamya ca tataḥ kurtāddaṃtadhāvanamādarāt |
kaṃṭaṃkikṣīravṛkṣotthaṃ dvādaśāṃgulamavraṇam ||35||

kaniṣṭhikāgravatsthūlaṃ pūrvārdhe kṛtakūrcakam |
karaṃjodumbarau cūtaḥ kadambo lodhracampakau ||36||
badarīti drumāśceti proktā daṃtapradhāvane |
rājā yamāgamat |
sa me mukhaṃ prakṣālyeta tejasā ca bhagena ca ||37||
annādyā vyūhadhvaṃse somo paśu vasūni ca |
brahmaprajñāṃ ca medhāṃ ca tvanno dehi vanaspate || 38 ||
āyurbalaṃ yaśo varcaḥ prajāḥ dvādaśagaṃḍūṣairvidadhyāddaṃtadhāvanam ||39||
abhāve daṃtakāṣṭasya pratiṣiddhadineṣu ca | apāṃ
ravedine yaḥ kurute prāṇo dantasya dhāvanam |
savitā bhakṣitastena svakulaṃ tena ghātitam ||40||
navamyekādaśīravau |
dantānāṃ kāṣṭhasaṃyogāddahatyāsaptamaṃ kulam || 41 ||
pratipadarśaṣaṣṭhīpu kṛtvā'laṃ pādaśīcaṃ hyamalamatha jalaṃ ciḥ pibedvirvisṛjya
tarjanyāṃguṣṭhavatyā sajalamabhimṛśennāsikāraṃdhrayugmam |
aṃguṣṭhānāmikābhyāṃ nayanayugayutaṃ karṇayugmaṃ kaniṣṭhāṃ-

iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
“śuddhaṃ snātaṃ cācamanaṃ paurāṇaṃ vaidikaṃ tathā |
tāṃtrikaṃ śrītamityāhuḥ ṣaḍvidhaṃ śruticoditam ||1||
viṇmūtrādikaśaucaṃ ca śuddhaṃ ca parikīrtitam |
smārtaṃ paurāṇikaṃ karma ācāṃte vidhipūrvakam ||2||
vaidikaṃ śrītamityādi brahmayajñādipūrvakam |
astravidyādikaṃ karma tāṃtriko vidhirucyate" ||3||
smṛtvā coṃkāragāyatroṃ nibadhnīyācchikhāṃ tathā |
punarācaṃmya hṛdayaṃ vāhū skaṃdhau ca saṃspṛśet || 1 ||
śravaṇaṃ spṛśet ||2||
kṣute niṣṭhīvane caiva daṃtocchiṣṭe tathā'nṛte |
patitānāṃ ca saṃbhāṣeṃ dakṣiṇaṃ tiṣṭhanti dakṣiṇe ||3||
agnirāpaśca vedāśca somaḥ sūryo'nalastathā |
sarve nārada viprasya karṇe dehasaṃśuddhihetave ||4||
tatastu gatvā nadyādī prātaḥ snānaṃ viśodhanam | samācarenmuniśreṣṭha
atyaṃta malino deho navadvārairmalaṃ vahan |
sadā''ste tacchodhanāya prātaḥ snānaṃ vidhīyate || 5 ||
agamyāgamanātpāpaṃ yacca pāpaṃ pratigrahāt |
rahasyācaritaṃ pāpaṃ mucyate snāna karmaṇā || 6 ||
asnātasya kriyāḥ sarvā bhavaṃti viphalā yataḥ |
tasmātprātaścaretsnānaṃ nityameva dine dine ||7||
darbha yuktaścaretsnānaṃ tathā saṃdhyābhivaṃdanam |
saptāhaṃ prātarastāyī saṃdhyāhīna stribhirdinaiḥ ||8|
dvādaśāhamanagniḥ sandvijaḥ śūdratvamāpnuyāt |
alpatvāddhomakālasya bahutvātsnāna karmaṇaḥ ||9||
prātarna tu tathā snāyāddhomakāle vigarhitaḥ |
gāyatryāstu paraṃ nāsti iha loke paratra ca || 10 || .

gāyaṃtaṃ trāyate yasmādgāyatrītyabhidhīyate |
praṇavena tu saṃyuktāṃ vyāhṛtitrayasaṃyutām || 11 ||
vāyuṃ vāyo jayedvipraḥ prāṇasaṃyamanatrayāt |

sa vaidikaṃ japenmaṃtraṃ laukikaṃ na kadācana |
gośṛṃge sarṣapo yāvat tāvadyeṣāṃ na sa sthiraḥ || 13||
na tārayaṃtyubho pakṣo pitṛnekottaraṃ śatam |
sagarbho japasaṃyuktastvagarbho dhyānamātrakaḥ || 14 ||
snānāṃgatarpaṇaṃ kṛtvā devarṣipitṛtoṣakam |
śuddhe vastre parīdhāya jalādvahirupāgataḥ ||15||
vibhūtidhāraṇaṃ kāryaṃ rudrākṣāṇāṃ ca dhāraṇam |
kramayogena kartavyaṃ sarvadā japasādhakaiḥ || 16 |
rudrākṣānkaṃṭhadeśe daśanaparimitānmastake viṃśatī dve
ṣaṭ ṣaṭ karṇapradeśe karayugalakṛte dvādaśa dvādaśaiva |
bāhvoriṃdoḥ kalābhirnayanayugakṛte tvekamekaṃ śikhāyāṃ
vakṣasyaṣṭādhikaṃ yaḥ kalayati śatakaṃ sa svayaṃ nīlakaṃṭhaḥ || 17 ||
baddhvā svarṇena rudrākṣaṃ rajatenāthavā mune |
śikhāyāṃ dhārayennityaṃ karṇayorvā samāhitaḥ || 18 ||
yajñopavīte haste vā kaṃṭhe tuṃde'thavā naraḥ |
śrīmatpaṃcākṣareṇaiva praṇavena tathāpi vā || 19 ||
nirvyājabhaktyā medhāvī rudrākṣaṃ dhārayenmudā |

kurvannapi sadā gacchanvisṛjannapi mānavaḥ || 25 || ||
rudrākṣadhāraṇādeva sarvapāpairna lipyate |
amena yuktaṃ devena bhuktaṃ yattu tathā bhavet ||26||
pītaṃ rudreṇa tatpītaṃ ghrātaṃ prātaṃ śivena tat |
rudrākṣadhāraṇe lajjā yeṣāmasti mahāmune ||27||
teṣāṃ nāsti vinirmokṣa: saṃsārājjanmakoṭibhiḥ |
rudrākṣadhāriṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā parivādaṃ karoti yaḥ ||28||
utpattau tasya sāṃkaryamastyeveti viniścayaḥ |
rudrākṣadhāraṇādeva rudro rudratvamāpnuyāt ||29||
munaya. satyasaṃkalpā brahmā brahmatvamāgataḥ |
rudrākṣadhāraṇācchreṣṭhaṃ na kiṃcidapi vidyate ||30||
rudrākṣadhāriṇe bhaktvā vastraṃ dhānyaṃ dadāti yaḥ |
sarvapāpavinirmukta: śivalokaṃ sa gacchati || 31 ||
rudrākṣadhāriṇaṃ śrāddhe bhojayeta vimodataḥ |
pitṛlokamavāpnoti nātra kāryā vicāraṇā ||32||
rudrākṣadhāriṇaḥ pādau prakṣālyādbhiḥ pibennaraḥ |
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ śivaloke mahīyate || 33||
hāraṃ vā kaṭakaṃ vāpi suvarṇa vā dvijottamaḥ |
rudrākṣasahitaṃ bhaktyā dhārayanudratāmiyāt ||34||
rudrākṣaṃ ' kevalaṃ vāpi yatra kutra mahāmate |
samaṃtrakaṃ vā maṃtreṇa rahitaṃ bhāvavarjitam || 35 ||

yo vā ko vā naro bhaktyā dhārayellajjayā'pi vā |

evaṃbhūtānubhāvo'yaṃ rudrākṣo bhavatā'nagha |

tripuro nāma daityastu purā''sītsarvadurjayaḥ || 3 || || 3||

kṣātro raktastathā miśro vaiśyaḥ kṛṣṇastu śūdrakaḥ ||

brahmahatyādibhiḥ pāpairmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
saptavaktro mahābhāgo hyanaṃgo nāma nāmataḥ || 16 ||

aṣṭavaktro mahāsena sākṣāddevo vināyakaḥ ||17||
alakūṭaṃ tūlakūṭaṃ svarṇakūṭaṃ tathaiva ca |

bhuktimuktipradaḥ prokto mama tulyabalo bhavet |

tatphalaṃ labhate śīghraṃ vaktraikādaśadhāraṇāt |

ādityāstoṣitā nityaṃ dvādaśāsye vyavasthitāḥ |
gomedhe cāśvamedhe ca yatphalaṃ tadavāpnuyāt ||27||
śrṛṃgiṇāṃ śastriṇāṃ caiva vyāghrādīnāṃ bhayaṃ na hi |
na ca vyādhibhayaṃ tasya naiva cādhiḥ prakīrtitaḥ 28||

na kutaścidbhayaṃ tasya sukhī caṃveśvaro bhavet || 29 ||

vaktratrayodaśo vatsa rudrākṣo yadi labhyate ||31||
kārtikeyasamo jñeyaḥ sarvakāmārthasiddhidaḥ |
raso rasāyanaṃ caiva tasya sarvaṃ prasidhyati ||32||
tasyaiva sarvabhogyāni nātra kāryā vicāraṇā |
mātaraṃ pitaraṃ caiva bhrātaraṃ vā nihanti yaḥ ||33||
mucyate sarvapāpebhyo dhāraṇāttasya ṣaṇmukha |
caturdaśāsyo rudrākṣo yadi labhyeta putraka ||34||
ghārayetsatataṃ mūrdhni tasya piṃḍa : śivasya tu |
kiṃ mune bahunoktena varṇanena punaḥ punaḥ ||35||
pūjyate saṃtataṃ devaḥ prāpyate ca parā gatiḥ |
rudrākṣa ekaḥ śirasā dhāryo bhaktyā dvijottamaiḥ || 1 |
ṣaḍviṃśadbhiḥ śiromālā paṃcāśaddhṛdayena tu |
kalākṣairbāhuvalaye arkākṣairmaṇibaṃdhanam ||37||
aṣṭottaraśatenāpi paṃcāśadbhiḥ ṣaḍānana |
athavā saptaviṃśatyā kṛtvā rudrākṣamālikām 38 ||

iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4||
atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
īśvara uvāca
lakṣaṇaṃ japamālāyāḥ śṛṇu vakṣyāmi paṇmukha |
rudrākṣasya mukhaṃ brahmā biṃdū rudra itīritaḥ || 1 ||
viṣṇuḥ pucchaṃ bhaveccaiva bhogamokṣaphalapradam |
paṃcaviṃśatibhiścākṣaiḥ paṃcavaktraiḥ sakaṃṭakaiḥ ||2||
raktavarṇa: sitamiśraḥ kṛtareghravidarbhitaiḥ |
akṣasūtraṃ prakartavyaṃ gopucchavalayākṛti || 3||
vaktraṃ vaktreṇa saṃyojya pucchaṃ pucchena yojayet |
merumūrdhvamukhaṃ kuryāttadūrdhvaṃ nāgapāśakam ||4||

evaṃ saṃgrathitāṃ mālāṃ mantrasiddhipradāyinīm |
prakṣālya gandhatoyena paṃcagavyena copari ||5||
tataḥ śivāṃbhasā kṣālya tato mantragaṇānnyaset |

sarvakāmaphalapradā |
yasya devasya yo mantrastāṃ tenaivābhipūjayet || 9 ||
pratiṣṭhitā bhavenmālā

rudrākṣaṃ dhārayenmūni kaṇṭhe sūtre kare'thavā |
