puruṣāṇāṃ yathā viṣṇurbrahāṇāṃ ca yathā raviḥ |
nadīnāṃ tu yathā gaṃgā munīnāṃ kaśyapo yathā ||2||
uccaiḥ śravā yathā'śvānāṃ devānāmīśvaro yathā |
devīnāṃ tu yathā gaurī tadvacchreṣṭhamidaṃ bhavet || ||
nātaḥ parataraṃ stotraṃ nātaḥ parataraṃ vratam |
akṣayyeṣu ca dāneṣu rudrākṣastu viśiṣyate ||4||
śivabhaktāya śāṃtāya dadyādrudrākṣamuttamam |
tasya puṇyaphalasyāṃtaṃ na cāhaṃ vaktumutsahe ||5||
dhṛta rudrākṣakaṇṭhāya yastvannaṃ saṃprayacchati |
triḥsaptakulamuddhṛtya rudralokaṃ sa gacchati || 6 ||
yasya bhāle vibhūtirna nāge rudrākṣadhāraṇam |
na śaṃbhorbhavane pūjā sa vipraḥ śvapacādhamaḥ || 7 ||
khādanmāṃsaṃ pibanmadyaṃ saṃgacchannaṃtyajānapi |
pātakebhyo vimucyeta rudrākṣe śirasi sthite || 8 ||
sarvayajñatapodānavedābhyāsairana yatphalam |
tatphalaṃ labhate sadyo rudrākṣasya tu dhāraṇāt ||9||
vedaiścaturbhiryatpuṇyaṃ purāṇapaṭanena ca |
yattīrthasevanenaiva sarva vidyādibhistathā || 10 ||
tatpuṇyaṃ labhate sadyo rudrākṣasya tu dhāraṇāt |
prayāṇakāle rudrākṣaṃ vaṃghayitvā mriyedyadi || 11 ||
sa rudratvamavāpnoti punarjanma na vidyate |
rudrākṣaṃ dhārayetkaṃṭhe bāhvorvā mriyate yadi || 12 ||
kulaikaviṃśamuttārya rudraloke vasennaraḥ | brāhmaṇo vāpi cāṃḍālo nirguṇaḥ saguṇopi ca 13 |
bhasmarudrākṣadhārī yaḥ sa devatvaṃ śivaṃ vrajet |
śucirvāpyaśucirvāpi tathā'bhakṣyasya bhakṣakaḥ 14 ||
mleccho vāpyatha cāṃḍālo muto vā sarvapātakaiḥ |
rudrākṣadhāraṇādeva sa rudro nātra saṃśayaḥ || 15 ||
śirasā dhārite koṭiḥ karṇayordaśa koṭayaḥ |
śatakoṭirgale baddho mūrdhni koṭisahasrakam ||16||
anutaṃ copavīte tu lakṣa koṭirbhuje sthite |
maṇibandhe tu rudrākṣo mokṣasādhanakaḥ paraḥ || 17 ||
rudrākṣadhārako bhūtvā yatkicitkarma vaidikam |
kurvanvipraḥ sadā bhaktyā mahadāpnoti tatphalam 18||
rudrākṣamālikāṃ kaṇṭhe dhārayedbhaktivarjitaḥ |
pāpakarmā tu yo nityaṃ sa muktaḥ sarvabandhanāt 19||
rudrākṣārpitacetā yo rudrākṣastena vai dhṛtaḥ |
asī māheśvaro loke namasyaḥ sa tu liṃgavat 20 ||

avidyo vā savidyo vā rudrākṣasya tu dhāraṇāt |
śivalokaṃ prapadyeta kīkaṭe gardabho yathā || 21||
skanda uvāca
rudrākṣānsandadhe deva gardabhaḥ kena hetunā |
kīkaṭe kena vā dattastadbrūhi parameśvara || 22 |
śrībhagavānuvāca
śṛṇu putra purāvṛttaṃ gardabho vidhyamavaṃte |
dhatle rudrākṣabhāraṃ tu vāhitaḥ pathikena tu || 23 ||
śrāṃto'samarthastadbhāraṃ voḍhuṃ patitavānbhuvi |
prāsyastrinetrastu śūlapāṇirmaheśvaraḥ ||24||
matprasādānmahāsena madantikamupāgataḥ |
yāvadvaktrāsyasaṃkhyānaṃ rudrāṇākṣāṃ sudurlabham ||25|
tāvadyugasahasrāṇi śivaloke mahīyate |
svaśiṣyebhyastu vaktavyaṃ nāśiṣyebhyaḥ kadācana 26 || |
abhaktebhyo'pi mūrkhebhyaḥ kadācinna prakāśayet |
abhakto vā'stu bhakto vā nīcī nīpataro'pi vā ||
rudrākṣāndhārayedyastu mucyate sarvapātakaiḥ |
rudrākṣadhāraṇaṃ puṇyaṃ kena vā sadṛśaṃ bhavet ||28||
mahābratamidaṃ prāhurmunayastattvadarśinaḥ |
sahasraṃ dhārayedyastu rudrākṣāṇāṃ dhṛtavrataḥ || 29 ||
taṃ namanti surāḥ sarve yathā rudrastathaiva saḥ |
abhāve tu sahasrasya bāhvoḥ ṣoḍaśa ṣoḍaśa || 30 ||
ekaṃ śikhāyāṃ karayordvādaśa dvādaśaiva tu |
dvātriṃśatkaṃṭhadeśe tu catvāriṃśacca mastake || 31 ||
ekaikaṃ karṇayoḥ ṭ ṣaṭ vakṣasyaṣṭottaraṃ śatam |
yo dhārayati rudrākṣānrudravatsa tu pūjyate || 32 ||
muktāpravālasphaṭika raupyavaiḍūrya kāñcanaiḥ |
sametāndhārayedyastu rudrākṣānsa śivo bhavet || 33||
kevalānapi rudrākṣānyadyālasyādvibharti yaḥ |
taṃ na spṛśaṃti pāpāni tamāṃsīva vibhāvasumu 34||
rudrākṣamālayā mantro japto'nantaphalapradaḥ |
yasyāṃge nāsti rudrākṣa eko'pi bahupuṇyadaḥ 35 ||
tasya janma nirarthaṃ syāttripuṇḍrarahitaṃ yathā |
rudrākṣaṃ mastake dhṛtvā śiraḥsnānaṃ karoti yaḥ 36 ||
gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ tasya jāyate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
ekavaktraḥ pañcavaktra ekādaśamukhāḥ vare || 37 ||
caturdaśamukhāḥ kecidrudrākṣā lokapūjitāḥ |
bhaktyā saṃpūjyate nityaṃ rudrākṣaḥ śaṃkarātmakaḥ 38 ||
daridraṃ vāpi puruṣaṃ rājānaṃ kurute bhuvi |
atra te kathayiṣyāmi purāṇaṃ matamuttamam || 39||
kosaleṣu dvijaḥ kaścidvirinātha iti śrutaḥ |
mahādhanī ca dharmātmā vedavedāṃgapāragaḥ ||40||
yajñakṛddīkṣitastasya tanayaḥ sundarākṛtiḥ |
nānāguṇanidhiḥ khyātastaruṇaḥ kāmasundaraḥ || 41 ||
guroḥ sudhiṣaṇasyātha patnī muktāvalīmaya |
mohayāmāsa rūmeṇa yauvanena madena ca || 42 ||
saṃgatastu tayā sārdhaṃ kiñcitkālaṃ tato bhiyā |
viṣaṃ dadau ca gurave yethe paścāttu nirbhayaḥ || 43 ||
yadā mātā pitā karma kiñcijjānāti yatkṣaṇe |
mātaraṃ pitaraṃ cāpi mārayāmāsa tadviṣāt || 44||
nānāvilāsa bhogaiśca jāte dravyavyaye tataḥ |
brāhmaṇānāṃ gṛhe coryaṃ cakāra sa tadā khalaḥ || 45 ||
surāpānamadonmattastadā jñātibahiṣkṛtaḥ |
grāmānniṣkāsitaḥ sarvaistadā so'bhūdvanecaraḥ || 46 ||

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 7
muktāvalyā tayā sārdhaṃ jagāma gahanaṃ vanam |
mārge sthito dravyalobhājjaghāna brāhmaṇānbahūn 47 ||
evaṃ bahugate kāle mamāra sa tadā'dhamaḥ |
netuṃ taṃ yamadūtāśca samājagmuḥ sahasraśaḥ || 48 ||
śivalokācchivagaṇāstathaiva ca samāgatāḥ |
tayoḥ parasparaṃ vādo babhūva girijāsuta || 49||
yamadutāstadā procuḥ puṇyamasya kimasti hi |
bruvatu sevakāḥ śaṃbhoryadyenaṃ netumicchatha ||50 ||
śivadūtāstadā procurayaṃ yasminsthale mṛtaḥ |
daśahastādadho bhūme rudrākṣastatra cāsti hi || 51 ||
tatprabhāvena he dūtā neṣyāmaḥ śivasannidhim |
tato vimānamāruhya divyarūpadharo dvijaḥ ||52||
gato guṇanidhirdṛtaiḥ sahitaḥ śaṃkarālayam |
iti rudrākṣamāhātmyaṃ kathitaṃ tava suvrata || 53||
evaṃ rudrākṣamahimā samāsātkathito mayā |
sarvapāpakṣayakaro mahāpuṇyaphalapradaḥ || 54 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ || 6 ||
atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
evaṃ nārada ṣaḍvaktro giriśena vivodhitaḥ |
rudrākṣamahimānaṃ ca jñātvā''sītsa kṛtārthakaḥ || 1||
itthaṃbhūtānubhāvo'yaṃ rudrākṣo varṇito mayā |
sadācāraprasaṃgena śṛṇu cānyatsamāhitaḥ || 2 ||
yathā rudrākṣamahimā varṇito'nantapuṇyadaḥ |
lakṣaṇaṃ mantravinyāsaṃ tathā'haṃ varṇayāmi te || 3||
lakṣaṃ tu darśanātpuṇyaṃ koṭistatsparśanādbhavet |
tasya koṭiguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ labhate dhāraṇānnaraḥ || 4 ||
lakṣa koṭisahasrāṇi lakṣa koṭiśatāni ca |
tajjapāllabhate puṇyaṃ naro rudrākṣadhāraṇāt ||5||
rudrākṣāṇāṃ tu bhadrākṣadhāraṇātsyānmahāphalam |
dhātrīphalapramāṇaṃ yacchreṣṭametadudāhṛtam ||6||
badarīphalamātraṃ tu procyate madhyamaṃ budhaiḥ |
adhamaṃ caṇamātraṃ syātpratijñeṣā mayoditā ||7||
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāḥ śūdrāśreti śivājñayā |
vṛkṣājjātāḥ pṛthivyāṃ tu tajjātīyāḥ śubhākṣakā ||
śvetāstu brāhmaṇā jñeyāḥ kṣatriyā raktavarṇakāḥ |
pītā vaiśyāstu vijñeyāḥ kṛṣṇāḥ śūdrāḥ prakīrtitāḥ ||
brāhmaṇo bibhṛyācchvetānrattātrājā tu dhārayet |
pītānvaiśyastu bibhṛyātkṛṣṇāñchūdrastu dhārayet ||
samāḥ snigdhā dṛḍhāstadṛtkaṃṭakaiḥ saṃyutāḥ śubhāḥ |
kṛmidaṣṭāñchinnabhinnānkaṃṭakai rahitāṃstathā || 11 ||
vraṇayuktānāvṛtāṃśca parudrākṣāṃstu varjayet |
svayameva kṛtadvāro rudrākṣaḥ syādihottamaḥ || 12||
yattu pauruṣayatnena kṛtaṃ tanmadhyamaṃ bhavet |
samānsnigdhāndṛḍhānvṛttānkṣaumasūtreṇa dhārayet ||13||
sarvagātreṣu sāmyena samānā'tivilakṣaṇā |
nigharṣe hemalekhābhā yatra lekhā pradṛśyate || 14 ||
tadakṣamuttamaṃ vidyātsa dhāryaḥ śivapūjakaiḥ |
śikhāyāmekarudrākṣaṃ triśa śirasā vahet || 15|| |
`ṭtriṃśacca gale dhāryā bāhvoḥ poḍaśa poḍaśa |
maṇibaṃdhe dvādaśākṣānmakaṃdhe pañcāśataṃ bhavet || 16 ||

aṣṭottaraśatairmālopavītaṃ ca prakalpayet |
dvisaraṃ trisaraṃ vāpi bibhṛyātkaṇṭhadeśataḥ || 17 ||7
kuṇḍale mukuṭe caiva kaṇikāhārakeṣu ca |
keyūre kaṭake caiva kukṣivaṃśe tathaiva ca ||18||
mupte pīte sarvakālaṃ rudrākṣaṃ dhārayennaraḥ |
triśataṃ tvamaṃ pañcaśataṃ madhyamamucyate || 19||
sahasramuttamaṃ proktaṃ caivaṃ bhedena dhārayet |
śirasīśānamantreṇa karṇe tatpuruṣeṇa ca || 20||
karayordhārayetpunaḥ || 21 ||
adhoreṇa lalāṭe tu tenaiva hṛdaye'pi ca | aghorabījamantreṇa
pañcāśadakṣagrathitāṃ vāmadevena codare |
pañcabrahmabhiraṃgaiśvāpyevaṃ rudrākṣadhāraṇam ||22||
prathitānmūlamantreṇa sarvānakṣāṃstu dhārayet |
ekavaktrastu rudrākṣaḥ paratattvaprakāśakaḥ ||23||
jāyate tatprakāśanam |
dvivaktrastu muniśreṣṭha ardhanārīśvaro bhavet || 24||
paratattvadhāraṇācca
dhāraṇādardhanārīśaḥ prīyate tasya nityaśaḥ |
trivaktrastvanalaḥ sākṣātstrīhatyāṃ dahati kṣaṇāt 25||
trimukhaścaiva rudrākṣo'pyagnitrayasvarūpakaḥ |
taddhāraṇācca hutabhuktasya tuṣyati nityaśaḥ || 26 ||
caturmukhastu rudrākṣaḥ pitāmaha eva rūpakaḥ |
taddhāraṇānmahāśrīmānmahadārogyamuttamam rudrākṣaḥ pañcabrahmasvarūpakaḥ ||28||
mahatī jñānasaṃpattiḥ śuddhaye dhārayennaraḥ | pañcamukhastu
tasya dhāraṇamātreṇa saṃtuṣyati maheśvaraḥ |
ṣaḍvaktraścaiva rudrākṣaḥ kārtikeyādhidaivataḥ ||29||
saptagātrādhidaivataḥ || 30||
vināyakaṃ cāpi devaṃ pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ | saptavaktrastu rudrākṣaḥ
munisaptaka daivataḥ |
taddhāraṇānmahāśroḥ syānmahadārogyamuttamam ||31||
saptāśvadaivataścaiva rudrākṣo'pyaṣṭamātrādhidaivataḥ ||32||
mahatī jñānasaṃpattiḥ śucirve dhārayennaraḥ | aṣṭavaktrastu
vasvaṣṭakaprītikaro gaṅgāprītikaraḥ śubhaḥ |
taddhāraṇādime prītā bhaveyuḥ satyavādinaḥ ||33||
navavaktrastu rudrākṣo yamadeva udāhṛtaḥ |
taddhāraṇādyamabhayaṃ na bhavatyeva sarvathā || 34 ||
daśavaktrastu rudrākṣo daśāśādavataḥ smṛtaḥ |
kśāśāprītijanako dhāraṇe nātra saṃśayaḥ ||35||
rudraikādaśadaivataḥ |
tamidradaivataṃ cāhuḥ sadā saukhyavivardhanam || 36 ||
ekādaśamukhastvakṣo rudrākṣo dvādaśamukho mahāviṣṇusvarūpakaḥ |
dvādaśādityadevaśca bibhartyeda hi tatparaḥ || 37||
kāmadevaḥ prasīdati ||38||
trayodaśamukhaśvākṣaḥ kāmadaḥ siddhidaḥ śubhaḥ | tasya dhāraṇamātreṇa
ruvārogya pradāyakaḥ ||32||
caturdaśamukhaścākṣo rudranetrasamudbhavaḥ | sarvavyādhiharaścaiva
madyaṃ māṃsaṃ ca laśunaṃ palāṃḍuṃ śigrumeva ca |
śleṣmātakaṃ viḍvarāhaṃ bhakṣaṇe varjayettata: ||40||
grahaṇe viṣuve caiva saṃkrame ayane tathā |
darśe ca paurṇamāse ca puṇyeṣu divaseṣvapi ||
rudrākṣadhāraṇātsadyaḥ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||41||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe saptamo'dhyāyaḥ ||7||

atha aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
bhūtaśuddhiprakāraṃ ca kathayāmi mahāmune |
mūlādhārātsamutthāya kuṇḍalīṃ paradevatām ||1||
suṣumnāmārgamāśritya brahmaraṃdhragatāṃ smaret |
jīvaṃ brahmaṇi saṃyojya haṃsamaṃtreṇa sādhakaḥ ||2||
pādādi jānuparyaṃtaṃ catuṣkoṇaṃ savajrakam |
laṃbījāḍhyaṃ svarṇavaṇaṃ smaredavanimaṇḍalam ||3||
jānvādyaṃ nābhicaṃdrārdhanibhaṃ padmadrayāṃkitam |
vaṃbījayutaṃ śvetābhamaṃbhaso maṃḍalaṃ smaret ||4||
nābherhṛdayaparyaṃtaṃ trikoṇaṃ svastikānvitam |
raṃbījena yutaṃ raktaṃ smaretpāvakamaṇḍalam ||5||
hṛdo bhrūmadhyaparyantaṃ vṛtaṃ parvidulāṃchitam |
yaṃbījayuktaṃ dhūmrābhaṃ nabhasvanmaṃḍalaṃ smaret || 6 ||
ābrahmaraṃdhrabhūmadhyādvṛtaṃ svacchaṃ manoharam |
haṃbījayuktamākāśamaṃḍalaṃ ca vicitayet ||7||
evaṃbhūtāni saṃcitya pratyekaṃ saṃvilāpayet |
bhuvaṃ jale jalaṃ bahnau vahni vāyau nabhasyamum ||8||
vilāpya khamahaṃkāre mahattatve'pyahaṃkṛtim |
mahāṃtaṃ prakṛtau māyāmātmani pravilāpayet || 9 ||
śuddhasaṃvinmayo bhūtvā citayetpāpapūruṣam |
vāmakukṣisthitaṃ kṛṣṇamaṃguṣṭhaparimāṇa kam ||10||
brahmahatyāśiroyuktaṃ kanakasteyavāhukam |
madirāpānahṛdayaṃ gurutalpakaṭīyutam ||11||
tatsaṃsargipadadvaṃdvamupapātakamastakam |
khaṅgacarmadharaṃ kṛṣṇa madhovaktraṃ suduḥsaham || 12||
vāyubījaṃ smaranvāyuṃ saṃpūryainaṃ viśopayet |
svaśarīrayutaṃ maṃtro vahnibījena nirdahet || 13 ||
kuṃbhake parijaptena tataḥ pāpanarodbhavam |
bahirbhasma samutsārya vāyuṃ bījena recayet ||14||
sudhābījena dehotthaṃ bhasma saṃplāvayetsudhīḥ |
bhūbījena ghanīkṛtya bhasma tatkanakāṃḍavat ||15||
viśuddhamukurākāraṃ japanbījaṃ vihāyasaḥ |
mūrdhādipādaparyaṃtānyaṃgāni racayetsudhīḥ || 16 ||
ākāśādīni bhūtāni punarutpādayeccitaḥ |
so'haṃmaṃtreṇa cātmānamānayeddhṛdayāṃbuje ||17||
kuṇḍalījīvamādāya parasaṃgātsudhāmayam |
saṃsthāpya hṛdayāṃbhoje mūlādhāragatāṃ smaret |
raktāṃ bhodhisthapotollae daruṇa sarojādhi rūḍhā karābjaiḥ
śūlaṃ kodaṇḍamiadbhavamaṇiguṇamapyaṃkuśaṃ paṃcavāṇān
bibhrāṇāsūna kapālaṃ trinayanalasitā pīnavakṣoruhāḍhayā
devī vālārkavarṇā bhavatu sukhakarī prāṇaśaktiḥ parā naḥ | 19 | |
`evaṃ dhyātvā prāṇaśakti paramātmasvarūpiṇīm |
vibhūtidhāraṇaṃ kāryaṃ sarvādhikṛtisiddhaye || 20 ||
vibhūtevistaraṃ vakṣye dhāraṇe ca mahāphalam |
śrutismṛtipramāṇoktaṃ bhasmadhāraṇamuttamam ||21||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe'ṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||

atha navamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
idaṃ śirovrataṃ cīṇaṃ vidhivadyadvijātibhiḥ |
teṣāmeva parāṃ vidyāṃ vadedajñānabādhikām || 1 ||
vidhivacchraddhayā sārdhaṃ na cīrṇaṃ yaiḥ śirovratam |
śrautasmārta samācārasteṣāmanupakārakaḥ ||2||
śirovratasamācārādeva brahmādidevatāḥ |
devatā abhavanvidvan khalu nānyena hetunā || 3||
śirovratasya māhātmyaṃ pūrvaiḥ pūrvataraṃ kṛtam |
brahmā viṣṇuśva rudraśca devatāḥ sakalā api ||4||
sarvapātakayukto'pi mucyate sarvapātakaiḥ |
śirotratamidaṃ yena caritaṃ vidhivadbudha ||5||
śirovratamidaṃ nāma śirasyātharvaṇaśruteḥ |
yaduktaṃ taddhi naivānyattattu puṇyena labhyate || 3 ||
śākhābhedeṣu nāmāni vratasyāsya vibhedataḥ |
paṭhyate muniśārdūla śākhāsvekavrataṃ hi tat ||7||
sarvaśākhāsu vastvekaṃ śivākhyaṃ satyaciddhanam |
tathā tadviṣayaṃ jñānaṃ tathaiva ca śirovratam || 8||
śirovratavihīnastu sarvadharmavivarjitaḥ |
api sarvāsu vidyāsu so'dhikārī na saṃśayaḥ || 9 ||
śirovratamidaṃ kārya pāpakāṃtāradāhakam |
sādhanaṃ sarvavidyānāṃ yatastatsamyagācaret || 10 ||
śrutirātharvaṇī sūkṣmā sūkṣmārthasya prakāśinī |
yaduvāca vrataṃ prītyā tannityaṃ samyagācaret || 11 ||
agnirityādibhirmaṃtraiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ śuddhena bhasmanā |
sarvāṅgodbhūlanaṃ kuryāccharovratasamāhvayam ||12||
etacchirovrataṃ kuryātsaṃdhyākāleṣu sādaram |
yāvadvidyodayastāvattasya vidyā khalūttamā ||13||
dvādaśābdamathābdaṃ vā tadardhaṃ ca tadardhakam |
prakuryādvādaśāhaṃ vā saṃkalpena śirovratam || 14 ||
śirāvratena yaḥ snātastaṃ tu mopadiśettu yaḥ |
tasya vidyā vinaṣṭā syānnirghṛṇaḥ sa guruḥ khalu ||
brahmavidyāguruḥ sākṣānmuniḥ kāruṇikaḥ khalu |
yathā sarveśvaraḥ śrīmānmṛduḥ kāruṇikaḥ khalu || 16 ||
janmāṃtara sahasreṣu narā ye dharmacāriṇaḥ |
teṣāmeva khalu śraddhā jāyate na kadācana || 17 ||
pratyutājñānabāhulyādveṣa eva vijāyate |
ataḥ pradveṣayuktasya na bhavedātmavedanam ||18||
brahmavidyopadeśasya sākṣādevādhikāriṇa: |
ta eva netare vidvan ye tu snātāḥ śirovrataiḥ 19 ||
vrataṃ pāśupataṃ cīrṇaṃ yaidvijairādareṇa tu |
teṣāmevopadeṣṭavyamiti vedānuśāsanam ||20||
yaḥ paśustatpaśutvaṃ ca vratenānena saṃtyajet |
sa tānhatvā na pāpīyānbhavedvedāṃtaniścayaḥ || 21||
tripuṃḍradhāraṇaṃ proktaṃ jābālairādareṇa tu |
triyaṃbakena maṃtreṇa satāreṇa śivena ca || 22 ||
tripuṃḍū dhārayennityaṃ gṛhasthāśramamāśritaḥ |
oṃkāreṇa triruktena sahasena tripuṃḍrakam || 23||
dhārayedbhikṣuko nityamiti jābālikī śrutiḥ |
triyaṃbakena maṃtreṇa praṇavena śivena ca ||24||
gṛhasthaśca vanasthaśca dhārayecca tripuṃḍrakam |
medhāvītyādinā vā'pi brahmacārī dine dine 25||
bhasmanā sajalenāpi dhārayecva tripuṃḍrakam |
brāhmaṇo vidhinotpannastripuṃḍra bhasmanaiva tu || 26||

lalāṭe dhārayennityaṃ tiryagbhasmāvaguṃṭhanam |
" mahādevasya saṃbaṃdhāttaddharme'pyasti saṃgatiḥ |"
samyak tripuṃḍradhamaṃ ca brāhmaṇo nityamācaret ||27||
ādibrāhmaṇabhūtena tripuṃḍraṃ bhasmanā dhṛtam |
yato'ta eva viprastu tripuṃḍraṃ dhārayetsadā || 28 ||
bhasmanā vedasiddhena tripuṃḍradehaguṃṭhanam |
rudraliṃgārcanaṃ vā'pi mohato'pi ca na tyajet 29 ||
triyaṃbakena maṃtreṇa satāreṇa tathaiva ca |
paṃcākṣareṇa maṃtreṇa praṇavena tathaiva ca || 30 ||
lalāṭe hṛdaye caiva dodvaṃdve ca mahāmune |
tripuṃḍraṃ dhārayennityaṃ saṃnyāsāśramamāśritaḥ || 31 ||
triyāyuṣeṇa maṃtreṇa medhāvītyādinā'thavā |
gauṇena bhasmanā dhāryaṃ tripuṇḍraṃ brahmacāriṇā ||32||
namo'ntena śivenaiva śūdraḥ śuśrūṣaṇe rataḥ |
uddhalanaṃ tripuṇḍre ca nityaṃ bhaktyā samācaret 33 ||
anyeṣāmapi sarveṣāṃ vinā mantreṇa suvrata |
uddhalanaṃ tripuṇḍraṃ ca kartavyaṃ bhaktito mune ||34||
bhūtyaivoddhalanaṃ tiryak tripuṃḍrasya ca dhāraṇam |
vareṇyaṃ sarvadharmebhyastasmānnityaṃ samācaret ||35||
bhasmāgnihotrajaṃ vā'tha virajāgnisamudbhavam |
ādareṇa samādāya śuddhe pātre nidhāya tat || 36||
prakṣālya pādī hastau ca dvirācamya samāhitaḥ |
gṛhītvā bhasma tatpaṃcabrahmamantraḥ śanaiḥ śanaiḥ ||37||
prāṇāyāmatrayaṃ kṛtvā agnirityādimaṃtritam |
taireva saptabhirmatraistrivāramabhimaṃtrayet ||38||
omāpojyotirityuktvā dhyātvā maṃtrānudīrayet |
sitena bhasmanā pūrva samudbhūlya śarīrakam ||39||
vipāpo virajo martyo jāyate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
tato dhyātvā mahāviṣṇuṃ jagannāthaṃ jalādhipam ||
saṃyojya bhasmanā toyamagnirityādibhiḥ punaḥ |
vimṛjya sāmbaṃ dhyātvā ca samuddha lyordhvaṃ mastakam ||
te ca bhāvanayā brāhmabhūtena sitabhasmanā |
lalāṭavakṣa: skaṃdheṣu svāśramocitamantrataḥ ||42||
madhyamānāmi kāṃguṣṭhairanulomavilomataḥ |
tripuṃḍraṃ dhārayennityaṃ trikāleṣvapi bhaktitaḥ ||43||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskaṃdhe navamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 ||
atha daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
āgneyaṃ gauṇa majñānadhvaṃsakaṃ jñānasādhakam |
gauṇaṃ nānāvidhaṃ viddhi brahmanbrahmavidāṃ vara || 1 ||
agnihotrāgnijaṃ tadvadvirajānalajaṃ mune |
aupāsanasamutpannaṃ samidagnisamudbhavam ||2||
pacanāgnisamutpannaṃ dāvānalasamudbhavam |
traivarṇikānāṃ sarveṣāmagnihotrasamudbhavam || 3||
virajānalajaṃ caiva dhārya bhasma mahāmune |
aupāsanasamutpannaṃ gṛhasthānāṃ viśeṣataḥ || 4 ||
samidagnisamutpannaṃ dhāryaṃ vai brahmacāriṇā |
śūdrāṇāṃ śrotriyāgārapaca nāgnisamudbhavam ||5||

anyeṣāmapi sarveṣāṃ dhāryaṃ dāvānalodbhavam |
kālavitrā paurṇamāsī deśaḥ svīyaḥ parigrahaḥ ||6||
kṣetrārāmādyaraṇyaṃ vā praśastaḥ śubhalakṣaṇaḥ |
tatra pūrvatrayodaśyāṃ susnātaḥ sukṛtāgnikaḥ ||7|| .
anujñāpya svamācāryaṃ saṃpūjya praṇipatya ca |
pūjāṃ vaiśeṣikīṃ kṛtvā śuklāṃbaradharaḥ svayam ||8||
śuddhayajñopavītī ca śuklamālyānulepanaḥ |
darbhāsane samāsīno darbhamuṣṭi pragṛhya ca || 9||
prāṇāyāmatrayaṃ kṛtvā prāṅmukho vāpyudaṅmukhaḥ |
dhyātvā devaṃ ca devīṃ ca tadvijñāpanavartmanā || 10 ||
bhavetsaṃkalpadīkṣitaḥ |
yāvaccharīrapātaṃ vā dvādaśābdamathā'pi vā || 11 ||
vratametatkaromīti
tadarthaṃ vā tadarthaṃ vā māsadvādaśakaṃ tu vā |
tadardhaṃ vā tadarthaṃ vā māsamekamathāpi vā || 12 ||
dinadvādaśakaṃ vā'pi dinaṣaṭkamayāpi vā |
tadardhaṃ dinamekaṃ vā vratasaṃkalpanāvadhi || 13 ||
agnimādhāya vividhadvirajāhomakāraṇāt |
hutvā''jyena samidbhiśca caruṇā ca yathāvidhi || 14||
pūtāhātpurato bhūyastattvānāṃ śuddhimuddiśan |
juhuyānmūlamaṃtreṇa taireva samidādibhiḥ || 15 ||
tattvānyetāni me dehe śudhyantāmityanusmaran |
paścādbhūtāditanmātraḥ paṃcakarmendriyāṇi ca || 16 ||
jñānakarma vibhedena paṃca paṃca vibhāgaśaḥ |
tvagādi dhātavaḥ sapta paṃca prāṇādivāyavaḥ || 17|| #
manobuddhirahaṃkāro guṇāḥ prakṛtipuruṣau |
rāgo vidyā kalā caṃva niyatiḥ kāla eva ca || 18||
māyā ca śuddhavidyā ca maheśvarasadāśivo |
śaktiśca śivatattvaṃ ca tattvāni kramaśo viduḥ || 19||
maṃtrastu virajairhatvā hotā'sau virajo bhavet |
atha gomayamādāya piṃḍīkṛtyābhimaṃtrya ca || 20 ||
nyasyāgnau taṃ ca saṃrakṣya dine tasminhaviṣyabhuk |
prabhāte ca caturdaśyāṃ kṛtvā sarva puroditam ||21||
tasmindine nirāhāraḥ kālaśeṣaṃ samāpayet |
prātaḥ parvaṇi cāpyevaṃ kṛtvā homāvasānataḥ ||22||
upasaṃhṛtya rudrāgniṃ gṛhītvā bhasma ya nataḥ |
tataśca jaṭilo muṇḍaḥ śikhaikajaṭa eva ca ||23||
bhūtvā snātvā punarvītalajjaścetsyāddigambaraḥ |
anyaḥ kāyāyavasanaścarmavīrāṃbaro'ya vā || 24 ||
ekāṃbaro valkalavānbhaveddaṃḍī ca mevalī ! prakṣālya caraṇau paśvādvirācamyā manastanum ||25||
saṃkalīkṛtya taddhasma viraja nalasambhavam |
agnirityādibhirmantraiḥ ṣaḍbhirāthavaṃgaiḥ kramāt 26||
vimṛjyāṃgāni mūrbhādivaraṇāṃtaṃ ca taiḥ spṛśet |
tatastena krameṇaiva samuddhṛtya ca bhasmanā ||27||
sarvāṅgolanaṃ kuryātpraṇavena śivena vā |
tataśca puṃḍra rajayetryiāyuṣasamāhvayam ||28||
śivabhāvaṃ samāgamya śivabhāvamayācaret |
kuryāttrisaṃdhyamapyevametatpāśupataṃ vratam || 29 ||
bhuktimuktipradaṃ caiva paśutvaṃ vinivartayet |
tatpaśutvaṃ parityajya kṛtvā pāśupataṃ vratam ||30||
pūjanīyo mahādevo liṃgamūrti: sadāśiva: |
bhasmasnānaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ sarvasaukhyakaraṃ param ||31||
āyuṣyaṃ balamārogyaṃ śrīpuṣṭivardhanaṃ yataḥ |
rakṣārthaṃ maṃgalārthaṃ ca sarva saṃpatsaṃmṛddhaye ||32||
bhasmasnigdhamanuṣyāṇāṃ mahāmārībhayaṃ na ca |
śāṃtikaṃ pauṣṭikaṃ bhasma kāmadaṃ ca triśrā bhavet ||33||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ || 10 ||

atha ekādaśodhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
trividhatvaṃ kathaṃ cāsya bhasmanaḥ parikīrtitam |
etatkathaya me deva mahatkautūhalaṃ mama || 1 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
trividhatvaṃ pravakṣyāmi devarṣe bhasmanaḥ śṛṇu |
mahāpāpakṣayakaraṃ mahākīrtikaraṃ param ||2||
gomayaṃ yonisaṃbaddha taddhastenaiva gṛhyate |
brāhmamaṃtrastu saṃdagdhaṃ tacchāṃtikṛdihocyate || 3 ||
sāvadhānastu gṛhṇīyānnaro vai gomayaṃ tu yat |
aṃtarikṣe gṛhītvā tatvaḍaṃgena dahedataḥ || 4 ||
pauṣṭikaṃ tatsamākhyātaṃ kāmadaṃ ca tataḥ śṛṇu |
prasādena dahedetatkāmadaṃ bhasma kīrtitam ||5||
prātarutthāya devarṣe bhasmavrataparaḥ śuciḥ |
gavāṃ goṣṭheṣu gatvā tu namaskṛtvā tu gokulam ||6||
gavāṃ varṇānurūpāṇāṃ gṛhṇīyādgomayaṃ śubham |
brāhmaṇasya ca gauḥ śvetā raktā gauḥ kṣatriyasya ca 7 ||
pītavarṇā tu vaiśyasya kṛṣṇā śūdrasya kathyate |
paurṇamāsyāmamāvāsyāmaṣṭamyāṃ vā viśuddhadhīḥ || 8||
prasādena tu maṃtreṇa gṛhītvā gomayaṃ śubham |
hṛdayena tu maṃtreṇa piṃḍīkṛtya tu gomayam ||9||
raviraśmisu saṃtaptaṃ śucau deśe manohare |
tuṣeṇa vā busairvāpi prāsāde na tu nikṣipet || 10 ||
araṇyudbhavamagni vā śrotriyāgārajaṃ tu vā |
tadagno vinyasettaṃ ca śivabījena maṃtrataḥ || 11 ||
gṛhṇīyādatha tatrāgnikuṇḍādbhasma vicakṣaṇaḥ |
navaṃ pātraṃ samādāya prasādena tu nikṣipet || 12|| tu
ketakī pāṭalī tadvaduśarīraṃ caṃdanaṃ tathā |
nānāsugaṃdhidravyāṇi kāśmīraprabhṛtīni ca || 13||
nikṣipettatra pātre tu sadyomaṃtreṇa śuddhadhīḥ |
jalasnānaṃ purā kṛtvā bhasmasnānamataḥ param ||14||
jalasnāne tvaśataśca bhasmasnānaṃ samācaret |
prakṣālya pādau hastau ca śiraveśānamaṃtrataḥ || 15||
samudbhūlya tataḥ paścānmukhaṃ tatpurupeṇa tu |
aghoreṇa tu hṛdayaṃ nābhi vāmena tatparam || 16 ||
sadyomaṃtreṇa sarvāṅgaṃ samuddhalya vicakṣaṇaḥ |
pūrvavastraṃ parityajya śuddhavastraṃ parigrahet ||17||
prakṣālya pādī hastau ca paścādācamanaṃ caret |
bhasmanolanābhāve tripuṇḍraṃ tu vidhīyate || 18 ||
madhyāhnātprāgjalairyuktaṃ parato jalavajitam |
tarjanyanāmikāmadhyaistripuṇḍraṃ ca samācaret ||19||
mūrdhni caiva lalāṭe ca karṇe kaṃṭhe tathaiva ca |
hṛdaye caiva bāhvocca nyāsasthānaṃ hi cocyate || 20 ||
paṃcāṃgulī se mūni prasādena tu maṃtrataḥ |
tryaṃgulaivinyasedbhāle śiromaṃtreṇa deśikaḥ ||21||
savyena dakṣiṇe karṇe vāmadevena vāmataḥ |
aghoreṇa tu kaṇṭhe ca madhyāṅgulyā spṛśedgudam ||22||
hṛdayaṃ hṛdayenaiva tribhiraṃgulibhiḥ spṛśet |
vinyase dakṣiṇe bāhau śikhāmaṃtreṇa deśikaḥ ||23||
bāmabāho' nyaseddhīmānkavacena triyaṃgulaiḥ |
madhyena saṃspṛśennābhyāmīśāna iti mantrataḥ || 24 ||
brahmaviṣṇumaheśānāstisro rekhā iti smṛtāḥ |
ādyo brahmā tato viṣṇustadṛṣvaṃ tu maheśvaraḥ || 25 ||

ekāṃgulena nyastaṃ yadīśvarastatra devatā |
śiromadhye svayaṃ brahmā īśvarastu lalāṭake ||26||
karṇayoraśvinau devo gaṇeśastu gale tathā |
kṣatriyaśca tathā vaiśyaḥ śūdraścoddhūlanaṃ tyajet ||27||
sarveṣāmaṃtyajātīnāṃ maṃtreṇa rahitaṃ bhavet |
"adīkṣitaṃ manuṣyāṇāmapi maṃtra binā bhavet || 28 ||
śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 11 ||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
devarṣe śṛṇu tatsarvaṃ bhasmoddhalanajaṃ phalam |
sarahasyavidhānaṃ ca sarvakāmaphalapradam || 1||
kamimāḥ kṛtsvacchaṃ gṛhītvā gagane patat |
na klinnaṃ nāpi kaṭhinaṃ na durgaṃdhaṃ na coṣitam ||2||
uparyughaḥ parityajya gṛhṇīyātpatitaṃ yadi |
piṃḍīkṛtya śivāmnyādau tatkṣipenmūlamantritam || 3 ||
ādāya vārasācchādya bhasmādhāne vinikṣipet |
sukṛte sudṛr̤he śuddhe kṣālite prokṣite śubhe || 4 ||
vinyasya maṃtrī mantreṇa pātre bhasma vinikṣipet |
taijasaṃ dāravaṃ cātha mṛnmayaṃ cailameva ca ||5||
anyadvā śobhanaṃ śuddhaṃ bhasmādhāraṃ prakalpayet |
kṣaume caivātiśuddhe vā ghanavadbhasma nikṣipet ||6||
prasthito bhasma gṛhṇīyātsvayaṃ cānucaropi vā |
na cāyuktakare dadyānna cāśucitale kṣipet || 7||
na saṃspṛśettu nocāṃgaṃrna kṣipena ca laṃghayet |
tasmādbhasitamādāya viniyuñjīta maṃtritam ||8||
vibhūtidhāraṇa vidhiḥ smṛtiprokto mayeritaḥ |
yadīyācaraṇenaiva śivatulyo na saṃśayaḥ || 9 ||
śaiva saṃpāditaṃ bhasma vedikaiḥ śivasannibho |
bhaktyā paramayā grāhyaṃ prārthayitvā tupūjayet || 10 ||
taṃtrota vartmanā siddhaṃ bhasma tāṃtrikapūjakaiḥ |
yatra kutrāpi dattaṃ cettadgrāhyaṃ naiva vaidikaiḥ ||11||
śūdraiḥ kāpālikairvātha pākhaṇḍairaparaistu tat |
tripuṇḍraṃ dhārayedbhaktyā manasā'pi na laṃghayet ||12||
śrutyā vidhīyate yasmāttattyāgī patito bhavet |
tripuṇḍradhāraṇaṃ bhaktyā tathā dehāvaguṃṭhanam ||13||
dvijaḥ kuryāddhi maṃtreṇa tattyāgī patito bhavet |
udbhūlanaṃ tripuṇḍraṃ ca bhaktyā naivācaranti ye || 14 ||
teṣāṃ nāsti vinirmokṣaḥ saṃsārājjanmakoṭibhiḥ |
yena bhasmoktamārgeṇa dhṛtaṃ na munipuṅgava || 15 ||
tasya viddhi mune janma niṣphalaṃ saukaraṃ yathā |
yeṣāṃ vapurmanuṣyāṇāṃ tripuṇḍreṇa trināsthitam ||16||
śmaśānasadṛśaṃ tatsyānna prekṣyaṃ puṇyakṛjjanaiḥ |
vigbhasmarahitaṃ bhālaṃ dhiggrāmamaśivālayam || 17||
dhiganīśārcanaṃ janma dhigvidyāmaśivāśrayām |
tripuṇḍraṃ ye vinindanti nidaṃti śivametra te || 18||
dhārayanti ca ye bhaktyā dhārayanti tameva te |
yathā kṛśānurahito bhūdharo na virājate ||19||
aśeṣasādhane'pyevaṃ bhasmahīnaṃ śivārcanam |
udbhūlanaṃ tripuṇḍraṃ ca śraddhayā nācaranti ye ||20||
taiḥ pūrvācaritaṃ sarvaṃ viparītaṃ bhavedapi |
bhasmanā vedamaṃtreṇa tripuṇḍrasya ca vāraṇam ||21||

vinā vedocitācāraṃ smārtasyānarthakāraṇam |
kṛtaṃ syādakṛtaṃ tena śrutamapyaśrutaṃ bhavet ||22||
adhītamanadhītaṃ ca tripuṇḍraṃ yo na dhārayet |
vṛthā vedā vṛthā yajñā vṛthā dānaṃ vṛthā tapaḥ || 23 ||
vṛthā vratopavāsena tripuṇḍraṃ yo na dhārayet |
bhasmadhāraṇakaṃ tyaktvā muktimicchati yaḥ pumān 24 ||
viṣapānena nityatvaṃ kurute hyātmano hi saḥ |
sraṣṭā sṛṣṭicchalenāha tripuṇḍrasya ca dhāraṇam ||25||
sasarja sa lalāṭaṃ hi tiryagūrdhvaṃ na vartulam |
tiryagrekhāḥ pradṛśyante lalāṭe sarvadehinām ||26||
tathāpi mānavā mūrkhā na kurvati tripuṇḍakam |
na taddhyānaṃ na tanmokṣaṃ na tajjñānaṃ na tattapaḥ || 27||
vinā tiryaktrapuṇḍraṃ ca vipreṇa yadanuṣṭitam |
vedasyādhyayane śūdro nādhikārī yathā bhavet ||28|
tripuṇḍreṇa vinā vipro nādhikārī śivārcane |
prāṅmukhañcaraṇī hastī prakṣālyācamya pūrvavat ||29||
prāṇānāyamya saṃkalpya bhasmasnānaṃ samācaret |
ādāya bhasitaṃ śuddhamagnihotrasamudbhavam ||30||
īśānena tu maṃtreṇa svamūrdhani vinikṣipet |
tata ādāya tadbhasma mukhe ca puruṣeṇa tu || 31 ||
aghorākhyena hṛdaye guhye vāmāhvayena ca |
sadyojātābhidhānena bhasma pādadvaye kṣipet || 32 ||
sarvāṅga praṇavenaiva maṃtreṇodbalanaṃ tataḥ |
etadāgneyakaṃ snānamuditaṃ paramarṣibhiḥ ||33||
sarvakarma samṛddhayarthaṃ kuryādādāvidaṃ budhaḥ |
tataḥ prakṣālya hastādīnupaspṛśya yathāvidhi ||34||
tiryavipuṇḍraṃ vidhinā lalāṭe hṛdaye gale |
paṃcabhirbrahmabhirvāpi kṛtena bhasitena ca ||35||
ghṛtametattripuṇḍraṃ syātsarvakarmasu pāvanam |
śūdrairaṃtyajahastasthaṃ na dhāryaṃ bhasma ca kvacit 36 ||
bhasmanā sāgnihotreṇa liptaḥ karma samācaret |
anyathā sarvakarmāṇi na phalati kadācana ||37||
satyaṃ śaucaṃ japo homastīrthaṃ devādipūjanam |
tasya vyarthamidaṃ savaṃ yastripuṇḍraṃ na dhārayet ||38||
tripuṇḍadhṛgvipravaro yo rudrākṣadharaḥ śuciḥ |
sa haṃni roga ritavyādhidurbhikṣataskarān ||39||
samāpnoti paraṃ brahma yato nāvartate punaḥ |
sa paṃktipāvanaḥ śrāddhe pūjyo vipraiḥ surairapi ||40||
śrāddhe yajñe jape home vaiśvadeve surārcane |
dhṛtatripuṇḍa : pūtātmā mṛtyuñjayati mānavaḥ ||
bhasmadhāraṇamāhātmyaṃ bhūyo'pi kathayāmi te || 41 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12||
atha trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
mahāpa takasaṃghāśca pātakānyaparāṇyapi |
naśyanti muniśārdūla satyaṃ satyaṃ na cānyathā || 1 ||
ekaṃ bhasma dhṛtaṃ yena tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu |
yatīnāṃ jñānadaṃ proktaṃ vanasthānāṃ viraktidam ||2||
gṛhasthānāṃ mune tadvaddharmavṛddhikaraṃ tathā |
brahmacaryāśramasthānāṃ svādhyāyapradameva ca || 3 ||

śūdrāṇāṃ puṇyadaṃ nityamanyeṣāṃ pāpanāśanam |
bhasmanoddūlanaṃ caiva tathā tiryak tripuṃḍrakam ||4||
rakṣārthaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ vidhatte vaidikī śrutiḥ |
bhasmanoddūlanaṃ caiva tathā tiryak tripuṇḍrakan ||5||
yajñatvenaiva sarveṣāṃ vidhatte vaidikī śrutiḥ |
bhasmanoddūlanaṃ caiva tathā tiryak tripuṃḍrakam || 6 ||
sarvadharmatayā teṣāṃ vidhatte vaidikī śrutiḥ |
bhasmanoddūlanaṃ caiva tathā tiryak tripuṃḍrakam ||7||
māheśvarāṇāṃ liṃgārthaṃ vidhatte vaidikī śrutiḥ |
bhasmanoddūlanaṃ caiva tathā tiryuk tripuṃḍrakam ||8||
vijñānārthaṃ ca sarveṣāṃ vidhatte vaidikī śrutiḥ |
bhasmanoddūlanaṃ caiva tathā tiryak tripuṃḍrakam ||9||
hiraṇyagarbheṇa tadavatārairvaruṇādibhiḥ |
devatābhirdhṛtaṃ bhasma tripuṃḍrodbhūlanātmakam ||10||
umādevyā ca lakṣmyā ca vācā cānyābhirāstikaiḥ |
sarva strībhirdhṛtaṃ bhasma tripuṃḍroddūlanātmanā || 11||
munibhiśca dhṛtaṃ bhasma tripuṃḍroddūlanātmanā || 12 ||
yakṣarākṣamagaṃdharva siddha vidyādharādibhiḥ
brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyairvaiśyaiḥ śūdrairapi ca saṃkaraiḥ |
apabhraṃśaṃrdhṛtaṃ bhasma tripuṃḍroddhūlanātmanā || 13||
uddūlanaṃ tripuṇḍraṃ ca yaiḥ samācaritaṃ mudā |
ta eva śiṣṭā vidvāṃso netare munipuṃgava || 14 ||
śivaliṃgaṃ maṇiḥ saṃkhyaṃ maṃtra: paṃcākṣarastathā |
vibhūtiroṣadhaṃ puṃsāṃ mukti strīvaśyakarmaṇi || 15 ||
bhunaktiyatra bhasmāṃgo mūrkho vā paṃḍito'pi vā |
tatra bhuṃkte mahādevaḥ sapatnīko vṛṣadhvajaḥ || 16||
yaḥ pumān |
sarvapātakayukto'pi pūjito mānavo'cirāt ||17||
bhasma saṃchanna sarvāṃga manugacchati bhasmasachannasarvāṃgaṃ yaḥ stauti śraddhayā saha |
sarvapātakayukto'pi pūjyate mānavo'cirāt || 18 ||
tripuṃḍradhāriṇe bhikṣāpradānena hi kevalam |
tenādhītaṃ śrutaṃ tena tena sarvamanuṣṭhitam ||19|| ་ ཀ
yena vipreṇa śirasi tripuṇḍra bhasmanā kṛtam |
kīkaṭeṣvapi deśeṣu yatra bhūtivibhūṣaṇaḥ ||20||
mānavastu vasennityaṃ kāśīkṣetrasamaṃ hi tat |
duḥśīla. śolayukto vā yogayukto'pyalakṣaṇaḥ || 21 ||
bhūtiśāsanayukta vā sa pūjyo mama putravat |
chadmanāpi caredyo hi bhūtiśāsanamaiśvaram ||22||
so'pi yāṃ gatimāpnoti na tāṃ yajñaśatairapi |
saṃparkāllīlayā vāpi bhayādvā dhārayettu yaḥ ||23||
vidhiyuktā vibhūti tu sa ca pūjyo yathā hyaham |
śivasya viṣṇādavānāṃ brahmaṇastṛptikāraṇam ||24||
pārvatyāśca mahālakṣmyā bhāratyāstṛptikāraṇam |
na dānena na yajñena na tapobhiḥ sudurlabhaḥ ||25||
na tīrthayātrayā puṇyaṃ tripuṇḍra eṇa ca labhyate |
dānaṃ yajñāśva dharmāśca tīrthayātrāśca nārada ||26||
dhyānaṃ tarpāstrapuṃḍrasya kalāṃ nārhati ṣoḍaśīm |
yathā rājā svacihnāṃkaṃ svajanaṃ manyate sadā ||27|
tathā śivastripuṃḍrākaṃ rudrastena vaśīkṛtaḥ |
dvijātirvā'nyajātirvā śuddhavitena bhasmanā || 28 ||
svakīyamiva manyate |
tyaktasarvāśramācāroṃ luptasavakriyo'pi saḥ ||29||
dhārayedyastripuṃḍrāṃka sakṛttiryatripuṃḍrāṃkaṃ dhārayetso'pi mucyane |
nāsya jñānaṃ parīkṣeta na kulaṃ na vrataṃ tathā || 30 ||
tripuṃḍrāṃkita bhālena pūjya eva hi nārada |
śivamantrātparo maṃtro nāsti tulyaṃ śivātparam || 31 ||

śivārcanātparaṃ puṇyaṃ na hi tīrthaṃ ca bhasmanā |
rudrāgneryatparaṃ tīrthaṃ tadbhasma parikīrtitam ||32||
dhvaṃsanaṃ sarvaduḥkhānāṃ sarvapāpaviśodhanam |
aṃtyajo vā'dhamo bāpi mūrkho vā paṃḍito'pi vā ||
yasmindeśe vasennityaṃ bhūtiśāsanasaṃyutaḥ |
tasminsadāśivaḥ somaḥ sarvabhūtagaṇairvṛtaḥ ||
sarvatīrtheśca saṃyuktaḥ sānnidhyaṃ kurute sadā ||34||
etāni paṃcaśivamaṃtra pavitritāni bhasmāni kāmadahanāṃgavibhūṣitāni |
puṃḍrakāṇi racitāni lalāṭapaṭṭe luṃpaṃti daivalikhitāni durakṣarāṇi ||35||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skaṃdhe trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 ||
atha caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
bhasmadigdhaśarīrāya yo dadāti dhanaṃ mudā |
tasya sarvāṇi pāpāni vinaśyati na saṃśayaḥ || 1 ||
śrutayaḥ smṛtayaḥ sarvāḥ purāṇānyakhilānyapi |
badaṃti bhūtimāhātmyaṃ tattasmāttaddhārayed dvijaḥ ||2||
sitena bhasmanā kuryāttrisaṃdhyaṃ yakhipuṃḍrakam |
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ śiba loke mahīyate ||3||
yogī sarvāṅgakaṃ snānamāpādatalamastakam |
trisaṃdhyamācarennityamāśu yogamavāpnuyāt ||4||
bhasmasnānena puruṣa: kulasyoddhārako bhavet |
bhasmasnānaṃ jalasnānādasaṃkhyeyaguṇānvitam ||5||
sarvatīrtheṣu yatpuṇyaṃ sarvatīrtheṣu yatphalam |
tatphalaṃ labhate sarvaṃ bhasmasnānātra saṃśayaḥ || 6 ||
mahāpātakayukto vā yukto vāpyupapātakaiḥ |
bhasmasnānena tatsarvaṃ dahatyagniribaṃdhanam ||7||
bhasmasnānātparaṃ snānaṃ pavitraṃ naiva vidyate |
evamuktaṃ śibenādau tadā snātaḥ svayaṃ śivaḥ ||8||
tadā prabhṛti brahmādyā munayaśca śivājinaḥ |
sarvakarmasu yatnena bhasmasnānaṃ pracakrire ||9||
tasmādetacchiraḥ snānamāgneyaṃ ya: samācaret |
anenaiva śarīreṇa sa hi rudro na saṃśayaḥ || 1
ye bhasmadhāriṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā paritṛptā bhavanti te |
devāsuramunīṃdraśca pūjyā nityaṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 11 ||
bhasmasaṃchannasarvāṃgaṃ dṛṣṭavottiṣṭhati yaḥ pumān |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā devarājo'pi daṃḍavatpraṇamiṣyati || 12 ||
abhakṣyabhakṣaṇaṃ yeṣāṃ bhasmadhāraṇapūrvakam |
teṣāṃ tadbhakṣyameva syānmune nātra vicāraṇā || 13 ||
yaḥ snāti bhasmanā nityaṃ jale snātvā tataḥ param |
brahmacārī gṛhastho vā vānaprastho'yavādarāt || 14 ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ sa yāti paramāṃ gatim |
āgneyaṃ bhasmanā snānaṃ yatīnāṃ ca viśiṣyate 15 ||
ārdrasnānādvaraṃ bhasmasnānamārdravadho dhruvaḥ |
ārdra tu prakṛtiṃ vidyātprakṛti baṃdhanaṃ viduḥ || 16||
prakṛtestu prahāṇāya bhasmanā snānamiṣyate |
bhasmanā sadṛśaṃ brahmannāsti lokatrayeṣvapi || 17||
rakṣārthaṃ maṃgalārthaṃ ca pavitrārthaṃ purā suraiḥ |
bhasma dṛṣṭvā mune pūrvaṃ dattaṃ daivyai priyeṇa tu || 18 ||

tasmādetacchiraḥ snānamāgneyaṃ ya: samācaret |
bhavapāśavinirmuktaḥ śivaloke mahīyate || 19 ||
jvararakṣaḥ piśācāśva pūtanākuṣṭhagulmakāḥ |
bhagaṃdarāṇi sarvāṇi cāśītirvātarogakāḥ || 20 ||
catuḥṣaṣṭiḥ pitta rogāḥ śleṣmāḥ saptatripaṃcakāḥ |
vyāghracaurabhayaṃ caivāpyanye duṣṭagrahā api || 21 ||
bhasmasnānena naśyaṃti siṃheneva yathā gajāḥ |
śuddhaśītajalenaiva bhasmanā ca tripuṃḍrakam ||22||
yo dhārayetparaṃ brahma sa prāpnoti na saṃśayaḥ |
" bhasmanā ca tripuṇḍraṃ ca yaḥ ko'pi dhārayetparam ||
sa brahmalokamāpnoti muktapāpo na saṃśayaḥ || 1 || "
yathāvidhi lalāṭe vai vahnivīryapradhāraṇāt || 23||
nāśayellikhitāṃ yāmīṃ lalāṭasthāṃ lipi dhruvam |
kaṃṭhopari kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ nāśayettatpradhāraṇāt || 24||
kaṃṭhe ca dhāraṇātkaṃṭha bhogādikṛtapātakam |
bāhvorbāhukṛtaṃ pāpaṃ vakṣasā manasā kṛtam ||25||
nābhyāṃ śiśnakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ gude gudakṛtaṃ haret |
pārśvayordhāraṇādbrahmanparastryāliṃganādikam ||26||
tadbhasmadhāraṇaṃ śastaṃ sarvatraiva triliṃgakam |
brahmaviṣṇumaheśānāṃ trayyagnīnāṃ ca dhāraṇam ||27||
guṇalokatrayāṇāṃ ca dhāraṇaṃ tena vai kṛtam |
bhasmacchanno dvijo vidvānmahāpātakasaṃbhavaḥ ||28||
dorjīvayujyate sadyo mucyate ca na saṃśayaḥ |
bhasmaniṣṭhasya dahyaṃte doṣā bhasmāgnisaṃgamāt ||29||
bhasmasnānaviśuddhātmā ātmaniṣṭha iti smṛtaḥ |
bhasmanā digvasarvāṃgo bhasmī tripuṇḍrakaḥ ||30||
bhasmaśāyī ca puruṣo bhasmaniṣṭha iti smṛtaḥ |
bhūtapretapiśācādyā rogāśvātīva duḥsahāḥ ||31||
bhasmaniṣṭhasya sānnidhyādvidravaṃti na saṃśayaḥ |
bhāsanādbhasitaṃ proktaṃ bhasma kalmaṣabhakṣaṇāt ||32||
bhūtapretapuraḥsarāḥ ||33||
bhūtirbhūtikarī puṃsāṃ rakṣā rakṣākarī purā | tripuṇḍracāriṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā
bhītāḥ prakapitāḥ śīghraṃ naśyatyeva na saṃśayaḥ |
smaraṇādeva rudrasya yathā pāpaṃ praṇaśyati ||34||
ambakāryasahasrāṇi kṛtvā yaḥ snāti bhasmanā |
tatsarvaṃ dahate bhasma yathāgnistejasā vanam |
kṛtvāpi cātulaṃ pāpaṃ mṛtyukāle'pi yo dvijaḥ |
bhasmasnāyī bhavetkaścitkṣipraṃ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 36||
bhasmasnānādviśuddhātmā jitakromro jiteṃdriyaḥ |
matsamīpaṃ samāgatya na sa bhūyo'bhivartate || 37 ||
bṛhaspatigate some bhasmoddhūlitavigrahaḥ |
acitaṃ śaṃkaraṃ dṛṣṭvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||38||
āyuṣkāmo'thavā vidvānbhūtikāmo'thavā naraḥ |
nityaṃ vai dhārayedbhasma mokṣakāmī sa vai dvijaḥ || 39 ||
tripuṃḍraṃ paramaṃ puṇyaṃ brahmaviṣṇuśivātmakam |
ye ghorā rākṣasāḥ pretā ye cānye kṣudrajaṃtavaḥ || 40 ||
tipuṃḍradhāriṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā palāyaṃte na saṃśayaḥ |
kṛtvā śaucādikaṃ karma snātvā tu vimale jale ||41||
bhasmanoddhūlanaṃ kāryamāpādatalamastakam |
kevalaṃ vāruṇaṃ snānaṃ dehe bāhyamalāpaham ||42||
vibhūtistāna mana bāhyāṃtarama lāpaham |
tyaktva pivāruṇaṃ snānaṃ tatparaḥ syānna saṃśayaḥ 43 ||

kṛtamapyakṛtaṃ satyaṃ bhasmasnānaṃ vinā mune |
bhasmasnānaṃ śrutiproktamāgneyaṃ snānamucyate ||44 ||
aṃtarbahiśca saṃśuddhaṃ śivapūjāphalaṃ śivapūjāphalaṃ labhet |
yadvāhyamalamātrasya nāśakaṃ snānamasti tat ||45||
tadvivayati tīvreṇa prāṇibāhyāṃtaraṃ malam |
kṛtvā'pi koṭiyo nityaṃ vāruṇaṃ snānamādarāt ||
na bhavatyeva pūtātmā bhasmasnānaṃ vinā mune |
yadbhasmasnānamāhātmyaṃ tadeva veda tattvataḥ ||47||
yadvā veda mahādevaḥ sarvavedaśikhāmaṇiḥ |
bhasmasnānamakṛtyaiva yaḥ kukarma vaidikam ||48||
sa tatkarmakalārghārdhamapi nāpnoti vastutaḥ |
yaḥ kariṣyati yatnena bhasmasnānaṃ yathāvidhi || 49 ||
sa evaikaḥ sarvakarmasvadhikārī śrutiśrutaḥ |
pāvanaṃ pāvanānāṃ ca bhasmasnānaṃ śrutiśrutam || 50 ||
na kariṣyati yo mohātma mahāpātakī bhavet |
anaṃtairvāruṇaiḥ snānairyatpuṇyaṃ prāpyate dvijaiḥ || 51||
tato'naṃtaguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ bhasmasnānādavāpyate |
kālatraye'pi kartavyaṃ bhasmasnānaṃ prayatnataḥ || 52 ||
bhasmasnānaṃ smṛtaṃ śrota tattyāgo patito bhavet |
mūtrādyutsarjanāṃte tu bhasmasnānaṃ prayatnataḥ || 53 ||
kartavyamanyathā pūtā na bhaviṣyanti mānavāḥ |
vidhivatkṛtaśauco'pi bhasmasnānaṃ vinā dvijaḥ 54 ||
na bhaviṣyati pūtātmā nādhikāryapi karmaṇi |
apānavāyuniryāte jṛmbhaṇe skandane kṣute ||55||
śleṣmodgāre'pi kartavyaṃ bhasmasnānaṃ prayatnataḥ |
śrībhasmasnānamāhātmyasyaikadeśo'tra varṇitaḥ || 56 ||
punaśca saṃpravakṣyāmi bhasmasnānotthitaṃ phalam |
sāvadhānena manasā śrotavyaṃ munipuṅgava || 57 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 14 ||
atha pañcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāṇa uvāca
agnirityādibhirmatrairbhasma saṃśodhya sādaram |
dhāraṇīyaṃ lalāṭādau tripuṇḍraṃ kevalaṃ dvijaiḥ || 1 ||
brahmakṣatriyavaiśyāśca ete sarve dvijāḥ smṛtāḥ |
tasmādvijaiḥ prayatnena tripuṃḍraṃ dhāryamanvaham || 2 ||
yasyopanayanaṃ brahman sa eva hija ucyate | tasmācchrītaṃ dvijaiḥ kāryaṃ tripuṇḍrasya ca dhāraṇam 3|!
vibhūtidhāraṇaṃ tyaktvā yaḥ satkarma samācaret |
tatkṛtaṃ cākataprāyaṃ bhavatyeva na saṃśayaḥ || 4 ||
na gāyatrayupadeśo'pi bhasmano dhāraṇaṃ vinā |
tato dhṛtvaiva bhasmāṃge gāyatrojapamācaret ||5||
gāyatroṃ mūlamevāhubrahmaṇye munipuṅgava |
sā bhasmadhāraṇābhāve na kenāpyupadiśyate || 6 |
na tāvadadhikāro'sti gāyatrīgrahaṇe mune |
yāvanna bhasma bhālādau dhṛtamagnisamudbhavam ||7||
bhasmahīna lalāṭatvaṃ na brāhmaṇyānumāpakam |
evameva mayā brahmanheturuktaḥ supuṇyadaḥ || 8 ||
maṃtrapūtaṃ sitaṃ bhasma lalāṭe parivartate |
sa eva brāhmaṇo vidvānsatyaṃ satyaṃ mayocyate ||9||
masyāsti sahajā prītirmaṇivadbhasmasaṃgrahe |
sa eva brāhmaṇo brahmansatyaṃ satyaṃ mayocyate || 10 ||

na yasya |
sahajā prītirmaṇivadbhasmasaṃgrahe |
sa caṃḍāla iti jñeyo janmajanmāṃtare dhruvam || 111 ||
na yasya sahajā prītistripuṇḍroddūlanādiṣu |
sa cāṃḍāla iti jñeyaḥ satyaṃ satyaṃ mayocyate || 12 ||
ye bhasmadhāraṇaṃ tyaktvā bhuñjante ca phalādikam |
te sarve narakaṃ ghoraṃ prāpnuvanti na saṃśayaḥ || 13 ||
"vibhūtidhāraṇaṃ tyakvā yaḥ śivaṃ pūjayiṣyati |
sa durbhagaḥ śivadveṣṭā sadveṣo narakapradaḥ ||
sarvakarmabahirbhūto bhasmadhāraṇavarjitaḥ || 1 || "
vibhūtidhāraṇaṃ tyaktvā kurvan hematulāmapi |
na tatphalamavāpnoti patito vai bhaveddhisaḥ || 14 ||
yathopavīta rahitaiḥ saṃdhyā na kriyate dvijaiḥ |
tathā saṃdhyā na karttavyā vibhūti rahitairapi || 15 ||
gatopavītaiḥ saṃdhyāyāṃ kārya : pratinidhiḥ kvacit |
japādikaṃ tu sāvitryāstathaivopoṣaṇādikam || 13 ||
vibhūtidhāraṇe tvanyo nāsti pratinidhiḥ kvacit |
vibhūtidhāraṇaṃ tyaktvā yadi saṃdhyāṃ karoti yaḥ 17 ||
pratyavaityeva yenāso nādhikārī tadā dvijaḥ |
yathā śrutvāṃtyajo vedānpratyavaiti tathā dvijaḥ || 18 ||
pratyavaiti na sandehaḥ saṃdhyākṛdbhasmavarjitaḥ |
saṃpādanīyaṃ yatnena śrītaṃ bhasma sadā dvijaiḥ || 19||
smārtaṃ vā tadabhāve tu laukikaṃ vā samāhitaiḥ |
yādṛśaṃ tādṛśaṃ vā'stu pavitraṃ bhasma saṃtatam || 20 ||
dhāraṇīyaṃ prayatnena dvijaiḥ saṃdhyādikarmasu |
na saṃviśaṃti pāpāni bhasmaniṣṭhe tataḥ sadā || 21 ||
kartavyamapi yatnena brāhmaṇairbhasmadhāraṇam |
madhyāṃgulitrayeṇaiva svadakṣiṇakarasya tu || 22 ||
ṣaḍaṃgulāyataṃ mānamapi cādhikamānakam |
netrayugmapramāṇena bhāle dīptaṃ tripuṃḍrakam ||23||
kadācidbhasmanā kuryātsa rudro nātra saṃśayaḥ |
akāro'nāmikā prokta ukāro madhyamāṃguliḥ 24 ||
makārastarjanī tasmāttripuṇḍraṃ triguṇātmakam |
tripuṇḍraṃ madhyamātarjanyanāmābhiranulomataḥ ||25||
atra te kathayāmyenamitihāsaṃ purātanam |
kadācidatha durvāsāḥ pitṛlokaṃ gato'bhavat || 26 ||
bhasmasaṃdigdhasarvāṅgo rudrākṣābharaṇānvitaḥ |
śiva śaṃkara sarvātmañchrīmātarjagadambike ||27||
nāmānīti gṛṇannuccaistāpasānāṃ śikhāmaṇiḥ |
kavyavāḍādayaste tu pratyutthānābhivādanaiḥ ||28||
āsanādyupacāraiśca sammānaṃ bahu cakrire |
nānākathābhiranyonyasaṃbhāṣāṃ cakrire tadā ||29||
tasmiṃstu samaye kuṃbhīpākasthānāṃ tu pāpinām |
ghoraḥ samabhavacchando hā hatāḥ smetivādinām 3 0 ||
mṛtāḥ smeti vadantyeke dagdhāḥ smeti pare jaguḥ | chinnāḥ smeti vibhinnāḥ smetyevaṃ rodana kāriṇaḥ 31
śrutvā taṃ karuṇaṃ śabdaṃ duḥkhito munirāḍ hṛdi |
papraccha pitṛnāthāṃstānkeṣāṃ śabdo'yamityati ||32||
te samūcurmune'traiva purī saṃyamanī parā |
vartate yamarājatra pāpināṃ bhogadāyakaḥ ||33||
nānādūtaiḥ kālarūpaiḥ kṛṣṇavarṇairbhayaṃkaraiḥ |
sahito'traiva tatpuryā nāyako vidyate'nagha ||34||
tatra kuṇḍānyanekāni pāpināṃ bhogadāni ca |
ṣaḍaśītirghorarūpairdūtaiḥ parivṛtāni ca || 35||
tatra mukhyatamaṃ kuṇḍaṃ kuṃbhīpākābhidhaṃ mahat |
vartate tadgatānāṃ ca yātanānāṃ tu varṇanam ||36||

●62 śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe bhadhyāyaḥ 15
kartuṃ na śakyate kaiścidapi varṣaśatairapi |

iti teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā munirāṭ taddidṛkṣayā ||42||

niśamyaṃ dūtavāṇīṃ tāṃ dharmarāṭ śīghramutthitaḥ |

tāṃ vārtāṃ preṣayāmāsa dūtadvārā'marāvatīm |

apaśyaṃstadgatāñjīvānsvargādhikasukhānvitān 53 ||

tatra saukhyaṃ padā jātaṃ tadā pāpāttu kiṃ bhayam |
ucchinnā bedamaryādā parameśakṛtā katham ||55 ||

āścaryametadāśvaryametadityeva bhāṣiṇaḥ || 56 ||

pārvatyā sahitaṃ devaṃ koṭikaṃdarpasundaram ||58||
ramaṇīyatamāṃgaṃ taṃ lāvaṇyakhanimadbhutam |
sadā poḍaśavarṣīya nānālaṅkārabhūṣitam ||59 ||
nānāguṇaiḥ parivṛtaṃ lālayantaṃ parāṃ śivām |
dadarśa candramauli sa caturvedaṃ nanāma hai ||60 ||

etasya kāraṇaṃ deva na jānomaḥ kathaṃcana || 61 ||
vada tatkāraṇaṃ deva sarvajño'si yataḥ prabho |
viṣṇuvākyaṃ tadā śrutvā prasannamukhapaṃkajaḥ || 62 ||
uvāca madhuraṃ vākyaṃ meghagambhīrayā girā |

bhasmano mahimaivāyaṃ bhasmatā kiṃ bhavenna hi |
kumbhīpākaṃ gato draṣṭuṃ durbāsāḥ śaitramaṃmataḥ || 64 ||

abāṅmukho dadadhastadā dadadhastadā vāyuvaśāddhare |
bhālabhasmakaṇāstatra patitā devayogataḥ || 65||

nārāyaṇa uvāca
iti devavacaḥ śrutvā devaṃ mūrdhnā praṇamya ca |

pitaraścaiva surāḥ |

atha ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
athātaḥ śrūyatāṃ puṇyaṃ saṃdhyopāsanamuttamam |
bhasmavāraṇamāhātmyaṃ kathitaṃ caiva vistarāt ||1||
prātaḥ saṃdhyāvidhānaṃ ca kathayiṣyāmi te'nagha |
prātaḥsaṃdhyāṃ manakṣatrāṃ madhyāhne madhyabhāskarām || 2 ||
sasūryāṃ paścimāṃ saṃdhyāṃ tisraḥ saṃdhyā upāsate |
tadbhedāna pa vakṣyāmi śṛṇu devarṣisattama ||3||
uttamā tārakopetā madhyamā luptatārakā |
atramā sūryamahitā prātaḥsaṃdhyā tridhā matā ||4||
uttamā sūryasahitā madhyamā'stamite ravau |
athamā tārakopetā sāyaṃsaṃdhyā tridhā matā || 5||
vipro vṛkṣo mūlakānyatra saṃdhyā vedaḥ śākhā dharmakarmāṇi patram |
tasmānmūlaṃ yatnato rakṣaṇīyaṃ chinne mūle naiva vṛkṣo na śākhā || 6 ||
saṃdhyā yena na vijñātā saṃdhyā yenānupāsitā |
jīvamātā bhavecchūī mṛtaḥ śvā caiva jāyate ||7||
tasmānnityaṃ prakartavyaṃ saṃdhyopāsanamuttamam |
tadabhāve'nyakarmādāvadhikārī bhavenna hi || 8||
udayāstamayādūrdhvaṃ yāvatsyāddhaṭikātrayam |
tāvatsaṃdhyāmupāsīta prāyaścittaṃ tataḥ param ||9||
kālātikramaṇe jāte caturthārghyaṃ pradāpayet |
athavāṣṭagataṃ devīṃ japtvā''dau tāṃ samācaret || 10 ||
yasminkāle tu yatkarma tatkālādhīśvarīṃ ca tām |
saṃdhyāmupāsya paścāttu tatkālīnaṃ samācaret ||11||
gṛhe sādhāraṇā proktā goṣṭhe vai madhyamā bhavet |
nadītīre cottamā syāddevī gehe taduttamā ||12|
yato devyā upāseyaṃ tato devyāstu satridhau |
saṃdhyātrayaṃ prakartavyaṃ tadānaṃtyāya kalpate || 13 ||
etasyā aparaṃ devaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ na vidyate |
na viṣṇūraḥsanā nityā na śivopāsanā tathā || 14 ||
yathā bhavenmahādevyā gāyatryāḥ śruticoditā |
sarvavedasārabhūtā gāyatryāstu samarcanā || 15||
brahmādayo'pi saṃdhyāyāṃ tāṃ dhyāyeti japaṃti ca |
vedā japaṃti tāṃ nityaṃ vedopāsyā tataḥ smṛtā || 13||
tasmātsarve dvijāḥ śāktā na śaivā na ca vaiṣṇavāḥ |
ādiśaktinupāsate gāyatrī vedamātaram || 17||
ācāṃta: prāṇamāyabhya keśavādikanāmabhiḥ |
keśavaśca tathā nārāyaṇo mādhava eva ca || 18 ||
goviṃdo viṣṇurevātha madhusūdana eva ca |
trivikramo vāmanaśca śrīdharo'pi tataḥ param 19 ||
hṛṣīkeśaḥ padmanābho dāmodara ataḥ param |
saṃkarṣaṇo vāsudevaḥ pradyumno'pyaniruddhaḥ ||20||
puruṣottamādhokṣajī ca nārasiṃho'cyutastathā |
janārdana upendraśca hariḥ kṛṣṇo'ntamastathā || 21 ||
oṃkārapūrakaṃ nāma caturviṃśatisaṃkhyayā |
svāhāntaiḥ prāśayedvāri namontaḥ sparśayettathā || 22 ||
keśavāditribhiḥ pītvā dvābhyāṃ prakṣālayetkarau |
mukhaṃ prakṣālayedvābhyāṃ dvābhyāmunmārjanaṃ tathā || 23 ||
ekena pāṇī saṃprokṣya pādāvapi śiro'pi ca | saṃkarṣaṇādidevānāṃ dvādaśāṃgāni saṃspṛśet ! 611
dakṣiṇenodakaṃ pītvā vāmena saṃspṛśedbudhaḥ |
tāvanna śudhyate toyaṃ yāvadvāmena na spṛśet || 5 ||

gokarṇākṛtihastena māṣamātraṃ jalaṃ pibet |
tato nyūnādhikaṃ pītvā surāpāyī bhavedvijaḥ || 26||
saṃhatāṅgulinā toyaṃ pāṇinā dakṣiṇena tu |
muktāṃguṣṭhakaniṣṭhābhyāṃ śeṣeṇācamanaṃ viduḥ ||27||
prāṇāyāmaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā praṇavasmṛtipūrvakam |
gāyatrīṃ śirasā sārdhaṃturīyapadasaṃyutam ||28||
dakṣiṇe recaveāyuṃ vāmena pūritodaram |
kuṃbhena dhārayennityaṃ prāṇāyāmaṃ vidurbudhāḥ || 29 ||
pīḍayeddakṣiṇāṃ nāḍīmaṃguṣṭhena tathottarām |
kaniṣṭhānāmikābhyāṃ tu madhyamāṃ tarjanīṃ tyajet 30 ||
recaka: pūrakacaiva prāṇayāmo'tha kumbhakaḥ |
procyate sarvaśāstreṣu yogibhiryatamānasaiḥ ||31||
recakaḥ sṛjate vāyuṃ pūraka: pūrayettu tam |
sāmyena saṃsthitiryattatkuṃbhakaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 32 ||
nīlotpaladalaśyāmaṃ nābhimadhye pratiṣṭhitam |

prajāpati jagannāthaṃ caturvaktraṃ pitāmaham ||34||
