śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśaṃ nirmalaṃ pāpanāśanam ||35||
pūrake viṣṇu sāyujyaṃ kumbhake brahmaṇo gatim |
recakena tṛtīyaṃ tu prāpnuvādīśvaraṃ param || 36 ||
porāṇācamanādyaṃ ca proktaṃ devapisattama |
śrotamācamanādyaṃ ca śṛṇu pāpāpahaṃ mune ||37|
praṇavaṃ pūrvamuccārya gāyatrī tu tadityṛcam |
pādādau vyāhṛtīstisraḥ śrītācamanamucyate ||38||
gāyatrī sirasā sārdhaṃ japedvyāhṛtipūrvikām |
pratipraṇavasaṃyuktāṃ trirayaṃ prāṇasaṃyamaḥ || 39 ||
"salakṣaṇaṃ tu prāṇānāmāyāmaṃ kīrtyate'dhunā |
nānāpāyaikaśamanaṃ mahāpuṇyaphalapradam || 1 ||”
paṃcāṃgulībhirnāsāgraṃ pīḍayetpraṇavena tu |
sarvapāpaharā mudrā vānaprasthagṛhasvayoḥ || 40 ||
kaniṣṭhānāmikāṃguṣṭhairyateśva' brahmacāriṇaḥ |
āpohiṣṭheti tisṛbhiḥ prokṣaṇaṃ syātkuśodakaiḥ 41 ||
ṛte mārjanaṃ kuryātpādānte vā samāhitaḥ |
navapraṇavayuktena āpohiṣṭhetyanena tu || 42 ||
naśyedadhaṃ mārjanena saṃvatsarasamudbhavam |
tata ācamanaṃ kṛtvā sūryaceti pivedapaḥ || 43 ||
aṃtaḥkaraṇasaṃ bhinnaṃ pāpaṃ tasya vinaśyati |
praṇavena vyāhṛtibhirgāyatryā praṇavādyayā || 44||
āpohiṣṭheti sūktena mārjanaṃ caiva kārayet |
uddhṛtya dakṣiṇe haste jalaṃ gokarṇavatkṛte ||45||
gītvā taṃ nāsikāgraṃ tu vāmakukṣī smaredadham |
purupaṃ kṛṣṇavarṇaṃ ca ṛtaṃ ceti paṭhettataḥ ||46||
drupadāṃ vā ṛcaṃ patrākṣanāsāpuṭena ca |
śvāsamārgeṇa taṃ pāpamānayetkaravāriṇi ||47 ||
nāvalokyaiva tadvāri vāmabhāge'śmani kṣipet |
niṣpāpaṃ tu śarīraṃ me saṃjātamiti bhāvayet ||48||
utthāya tu tataḥ pādau dvau samau sanniyojayet |
jāṃjaliṃ gṛhītvā tu tarjanyaṃguṣṭhavarjitam ||49||
vīkṣya bhānuṃ kṣipedvāri gāyatryā cābhimaṃtritam |
trivāraṃ muniśārdūla vidhi repo'rdhya mocane || 50||
tataḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ kuryādasāvādityamaṃtrataḥ |
madhyāhne skṛdeva syātsaṃdhyayostu trivārataḥ || 51 ||
īṣannamraḥ prabhāte tu madhyāhne daṇḍavatsthitaḥ |
āsane copaviṣṭastu dvijaḥ sāyaṃ kṣipepaḥ || 52 ||

udakaṃ prakṣipedyasmāttatkāraṇamataḥ śṛṇu |
triṃśatkoṭayo mahāvīrā maṃdehā nāma rākṣasāḥ ||
kṛtaghnā dāruṇā ghorāḥ sūryamicchaṃti khāditum |
tato devagaṇāḥ sarve ṛṣayaśca tapodhanāḥ || 54 ||
upāsate mahāsaṃdhyāṃ prakṣipaṃtyudakāṃjalim |
dahyante tena daityāste vajrī bhūtena vāriṇā || 55 ||
etasmātkāraṇādviprāḥ saṃdhyāṃ nityamupāsate |
mahāpuṇyasya jananaṃ saṃdhyopāsanamīritam || 56 ||
ardhyāṅgabhūtamaṃtro'yaṃ procyate śṛṇu nārada |
yaduccāraṇamātreṇa sāṃgaṃ saṃdhyāphalaṃ bhavet ||57||
so'ha'smyahaṃ jyotirātmā jyotirahaṃ śivaḥ |
ātmajyotirahaṃ śuklaḥ sarvajyoti raso'smyaham ||
āgaccha varade devi gāyatra brahmarūpiṇi |
japānuṣṭhānasiddhayarthaṃ praviśya hṛdayaṃ mama || 59 ||
uttiṣṭha devi gaṃtavyaṃ punarāgamanāya ca |
ardhyeṣu devi gantavyaṃ praviśya hṛdayaṃ mama || 60 ||
tataḥ śuddhasthale naijamāsanaṃ sthāpayedbudhaḥ |
tatrāruhya japetpaścādgāyatrī vedamātaram || 61 ||
atraiva khecarī mudrā prāṇāyāmottaraṃ mune |
prātaḥ saṃdhyāvidhāne ca kīrtitā munipuṅgava ||62 ||
tannāmārthaṃ pravakṣyāmi sādaraṃ śṛṇu nārada |
cittaṃ carati khe yasmājjihvā carati khe gatā || 63 ||
bhruvoraṃtargatā dṛṣṭirmudrā bhavati khecarī |
na cāsanaṃ siddhasamaṃ na kumbhasadṛśo'nilaḥ || 64 ||
na khecarīsamā mudrā satyaṃ satyaṃ ca nārada |
ghaṃṭāvatpraṇavoccārādvāyuṃ nirjitya yatnataḥ || 65||
sthirāsane sthiro bhūtvā nirahaṃkāranirmamaḥ |
lakṣaṇaṃ nāradamune śṛṇu siddhāsanasya ca || 66 ||
yonisthānaka maṃtrimūlaghaṭitaṃ kṛtvā dṛḍhaṃ vinyase-
mer̤ha e pādamarthakameva hṛdaye kṛtvā samaṃ vigraham |
sthāṇuḥ saṃyamiteṃdriyo'caladṛśā paśyanbhruvoraṃtaraṃ
tiṣṭhatyetadatīva yogisukhadaṃ siddhāsanaṃ procyate ||67 ||
āyātu varadā devī akṣaraṃ brahmasaṃmitam |
gāyatrī chaṃdasāṃ mātaridaṃ brahma juṣasva me || 68 ||
yadahnā kurute pāpaṃ tadahnā pratimucyate |
yadrātryā kurute pāpaṃ tadrācyā pratimucyate || 69||
sarvavarṇe mahādevi saṃdhyāvidye sarasvati |
ajare amare devi sarvadevi namo'stu te || 70 ||
tejo'sītyādimaṃtreṇa devī māvāhayettataḥ |
yatkṛtaṃ tvadanuṣṭhānaṃ tatsarvaṃ pūrṇamastu me || 72 ||
tataḥ śāpavimokṣāya vidhānaṃ rāmyagācaret |
brahmaśāpastato viśvāmitrasya ca tathaiva ca || 72 ||
vasiṣṭhaśāpa ityetadvividhaṃ śāpalakṣaṇam |
brahmaṇaḥ smaraṇenaiva brahmaśāpo nivartate ||73 ||
viśvāmitrasmaraṇato viśvāmitrasya śāpataḥ |
vasiṣṭhasmaraṇādeva tasya śāpo vinaśyati ||74 ||
hṛtpadmamadhye puruṣaṃ purāṇaṃ satyātmakaṃ sarvajagatsvarūpam |
dhyāyāmi nityaṃ paramātmasaṃjñaṃ cidrapamekaṃ vacasāmagamyam || 75 ||
atha nyāsavidhi vakṣye saṃdhyāyā aṃgasaṃbhavam |
oṃkāraṃ pūrvavadyojya tato maṃtrānudīrayet || 76 ||

bhūrityuktvā ca pādābhyāṃ nama ityeva coccaret |
bhuvaḥ pūrvaṃ tu jānubhyāṃ svaḥ kaṭibhyāṃ namo vadet ||
maharnābhyai janaścaiva hṛdayāya tatastapaḥ |
kaṃṭhāya ca tataḥ satyaṃ lalāṭe parikīrtayet ||78||
aṃguṣṭhābhyāṃ tatsavitustarjanībhyāṃ vareṇyakam |
bhargodevasya madhyābhyāṃ ghomahotyeva kīrtayet || 79 ||
anāmābhyāṃ kaniṣṭhābhyāṃ dhiyo yo naḥ padaṃ vadet |
pracodayātka rapṛṣṭhatalayorvinyasetsudhīḥ ||80||
brahmātmane tatsaviturhṛdayāya namastathā |
viṣṇvātmane vareṇyaṃ ca śirase nama ityapi || 81 ||
bhargo devasya rudrātmane śikhāyai parikīrtitam |
śaktyātmane dhīmahīti kavacāya tataḥ param ||82||
kālātmane dhiyo yo no netratraya udīritam |
pracodayācca sarvātmane'strāya parikīrtitam || 82 ||
akṣaranyāsamevāgre kathayāmi mahāmune |
gāyatrīvarṇasaṃbhūto nyāsaḥ pāpaharaḥ paraḥ || 84||
praṇavaṃ pūrvamuccārya varṇanyāsaḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
tatkāramādāvuccārya pādāṃguṣṭhadraye nyaset || 85 ||
sakāraṃ gulphayostadvadvikāraṃ jaṃghayornyaset |
jānvostukāraṃ vinyasya ūrvoścaiva vakārakam ||86||
rekāraṃ ca gude nyasya ṇikāraṃ liṃga eva ca |
kaṭyāṃ yakāramevātra bhakāraṃ nābhimaṃḍale ||87||
gokāraṃ hṛdaye nyasyedekāraṃ stanayordvayoḥ |
vakāraṃ hṛdi vinyasya syakāraṃ kaṃṭhakūpake ||88 ||
dhokāraṃ mukhadeśe tu makāraṃ tāludeśake |
hikāraṃ nāsikāgre tu dhikāraṃ netramaṃḍale || 89 ||
bhrūmadhye caiva yokāra yokāraṃ ca lalāṭake |
nakāraṃ vai pūrvamukhe prakāraṃ dakṣiṇe mukhe || 90 ||
cokāraṃ paścimamukhe dakāraṃ cottare mukhe |
yākāraṃ mūrdhni vinyasya takāraṃ vyāpakaṃ nyaset ||
etannyāsavidhi kecinnecchati japatatparāḥ |
tato dhyāyenmahādevīṃ jaganmāṃtara maṃbikām || 92 ||
bhāsvajjapāprasūnābhāṃ kumārīṃ parameśvarīm |
raktāṃbujāsanārūḍhāṃ raktagaṃdhānulepanām ||93||
raktamālyāṃbaradharāṃ caturāsyāṃ caturbhujām |
dvinetrāṃ sukkhuvī mālāṃ kuṃḍikāṃ caiva vibhratīm ||
sarvābharaṇasaṃ dīptāmṛgvedādhyāyinīṃ parām |
haṃsapatrāmāhavanīyamadhyasthāṃ brahmadevatām || 95||
catuṣpadāmaṣṭakukṣi saptaśīrṣāṃ maheśvarīm |
agnivaktrāṃ rudraśikhāṃ viṣṇucittāṃ tu bhāvayet ||
brahmā tu kavacaṃ yasyā gotraṃ sāṃkhyāyanaṃ smṛtam |
ādityamaṃḍalāṃtaḥsthāṃ dhyāyeddevī maheśvarīm ||97||
evaṃ dhyātvā vidhānena gāyatrī vedamātaram |
tato mudrāḥ prakurvīta devyāḥ prītikarāḥ śubhāḥ ||
sukhaṃ saṃpuṭaṃ caiva vitataṃ vistṛtaṃ tathā |
dvimukhaṃ trimukhaṃ caiva catuṣkaṃ paṃcakaṃ tathā || 99||
pammukhādhomukhaṃ caiva vyāpakāṃjalikaṃ tathā |
śakaṭaṃ yamapāśaṃ ca grathitaṃ saṃmukhonmukham ||100 ||
vilaṃba muṣṭikaṃ caiva matsyaṃ kūrma varāhakam |
siṃhākrāṃtaṃ mahākrāṃta mudgaraṃ pallavaṃ tathā || 101 ||
caturviṃśatimudrāśva gāyatryāḥ saṃpradarśayet |
śatākṣarāṃ ca gāyatrī sakṛdāvartayetsudhīḥ 102 ||
caturviṃśatyakṣarāṇi gāyatryāḥ kīrtitāni hi |
jātavedasanāmnīṃ ca ṛcamuccārayettataḥ ||103 ||
tryaṃbakasyarcamāvṛtya gāyatrī śatavarṇakā |
bhavatīyaṃ mahāpuṇyā'sakṛjjapyā budhairiyam ||104 ||

oṃkāraṃ pūrvamuccārya bhūrbhuvaḥ svastathaiva ca |
caturviṃśatyakṣarāṃ ca gāyatrī proccarettataḥ || 105 ||
evaṃ nityaṃ japaṃ kuryādbrāhmaṇo viprapuṃgavaḥ |
sa samagraṃ phalaṃ prāpya saṃdhyāyāḥ sukhamedhate || 106 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskaṃdhe ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 16||
atha saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
bhinnapādā tu gāyatrī brahmahatyāpraṇāśinī |
abhinnapādā gāyatrī brahmahatyāṃ prayacchati || 1||
acchritrapādāgāyatrījapaṃ kurvanti ye dvijāḥ |
adhomukhāśca tiṣṭhati kalpakoṭiśatāni ca ||2||
saṃpuṭaikā paḍoṃkārā gāyatro trividhā matā |
dharmaśāstrapurāṇeṣu itihāseṣu suvrata || 3 || !
japedityanuśāsanam |
japasaṃkhyāṣṭabhāgānte pādo japyasturīyakaḥ || 4 ||
paṃtrapraṇavasaṃyuktāṃ
sa dvijaḥ paramo jñeyaḥ paraṃ sāyujyamāpnuyāt |
anyathā prajapedyastu sa japo viphalo bhavet ||5||
saṃpuṭakā ṣaḍoṃkārā bhavetsā ūrdhvaretasām |
gṛhastho brahmacārī vā mokṣārthī turiyāṃ japet || 6||
turīyapādo gāyatryāḥ parorajase sāvadām |
dhyānamasya pravakṣyāmi japaṃ sāṃgaphalapradam ||7||
hṛdi vikāsa padma sārkasomāgnivimbaṃ praṇavamayamacityaṃ yasya pīṭhaṃ prakalpyam |
acalaparamasūkṣmaṃ jyotirākāśasāraṃ bhavatu mama mude'so saccidānaṃdarūpaḥ ||8||
triśūlayoniṃ surabhimakṣamālāṃ ca ligakam |
aṃbujaṃ ca mahāmudrāmiti sapta pradarśayet || 9 ||
yā saṃkhyā saiva gāyatrī saccidānaṃdarūpiṇī |
bhaktyātāṃ brāhmaṇo nityaṃ pūjayecca namettataḥ 10 ||
dhyātasya pūjāṃ kurvīta paṃcabhiścopacārakaiḥ |
laṃ pṛthivyātmane gaṃdhamarpayāmi namo namaḥ || 11||
hamākāśātmane puṣpaṃ cārpayāmi namo namaḥ |
yaṃ ca vāyvātmane dhūpaṃ cārpayāmi tato vadet 12||
raṃ ca vahnātmane dīpamarpayāmi tato vadet |
vamamṛtātmane tasmai naivedyamapi cārpayet || 13 ||
yaṃ raṃ laṃ vaṃ hamiti ca puṣpāṃjalimathārpayet |
evaṃ pūjāṃ vidhāyāṃtha cānte mudrāḥ pradarśayet || 14||
dhyāyettu manasā devīṃ maṃtramuccārayecchanaiḥ |
na kaṃpayecchirogrīvāṃ daṃtānnaiva prakāśayet || 15 ||
vidhināṣṭottaraśatamaṣṭāviṃśatimeva vā |
daśavāramaśakto vā nāto yūnaṃ kadācana || 16 ||
udvāsayeddevīmuttametyanuvākataḥ |
na gāyatrī japedvidvāñjalamadhye kathaṃcana || 17 ||
tata
yataḥ sāgnimukhī proktetyāhuḥ kecinmaharṣayaḥ |
surabhirjñānaśūrpaṃ ca kūrmo yoniśca paṃkajam || 18 ||
liṃgaṃ nirvāṇakaṃ caiva japāṃte'ṣṭau pradarśayet |
yadakṣarapadabhraṣṭaṃ svaravyaṃjanavajitam || 19||
tatsarvaṃ kṣamyatāṃ devi kaśyapapriyavādini |
gāyatrītarpaṇaṃ cātaḥ karaṇīyaṃ mahāmune || 20 ||
gāyatrīchaṃda ākhyātaṃ viśvāmitraṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ |
savitā devatā proktā viniyogaśca tarpaṇe ||21||
bhūrityuktvā ca ṛgvedapuruṣaṃ tarpayāmi ca |
bhuva ityetaduktvā ca yajurvedamatho vadet || 22 ||

svarvyāhṛti samuktvā ca sāmavedaṃ samuccaret |
mama ityetaduktvāṃte'tharvavedaṃ ca tarpayet || 23||
jana: padāṃta itihāsapurāṇamitīrayet |
tataḥ sarvāgamaṃ caiva puruṣaṃ tarpayāmi ca ||24||
satyaṃ ca satyalokākhyaṃ puruṣaṃ tarpayāmi ca |
oṃ bhūrbhurlokapuruṣaṃ tarpayāmi tato vadet || 25 ||
bhuvaśceti bhuvarlokapuruṣaṃ tarpayāmi ca |
svaḥ svargalokapuruṣaṃ tarpayāmi tataḥ param ||26||
oṃ bhūrekapadāṃ nāma gāyatrī tarpayāmi ca |
bhuvo dvipadāṃ gāyatrī tarpayāmīti kīrtayet ||27||
svaśva tripadāṃ gāyatrīṃ tarpayāmi tato vadet |
oṃ bhūrbhuvaśca svaśceti gāyatra ca catuṣpadām 28||
uṣasīṃ caiva gāyatrī sāvitrīṃ ca sarasvatīm |
vedānāṃ mātaraṃ pṛthvīmajāṃ caiva tu kauśikī 29 ||
sāṃkṛti vai sārvajiti gāyatrī tarpaṇe vadet |
tarpaṇāṃte ca śantyarthaṃ jātavedasamīrayet ||30|
mānastoketi maṃtraṃ ca śāntyarthaṃ prajapetsudhīḥ |
tato'pi tryaṃbako maṃtra: śāṃtyarthaḥ parikīrtitaḥ 31||
tacchaṃyoriti maṃtraṃ ca japecchāṃtyarthameva tu |
ato devā iti dvābhyāṃ sarvāṃgasparśanaṃ caret ||32||
syonā pṛthivimaṃtreṇa bhūmyai kuryātpraṇāmakam |
yathāvidhi ca gotrādīnucca redvijasattamaḥ || 33 ||
evaṃ vighānaṃ saṃdhyāyāḥ prātaḥkāle prakīrtitam |
saṃdhyākarma samāppānte'pyagnihotraṃ svayaṃ hunet ||34||
paṃcāyatana pūjāṃ ca tataḥ kuryātsamāhitaḥ |
śivāṃ śivaṃ gaṇapatiṃ sūryaṃ viṣṇuṃ tathā'rcayet 35||
pauruṣeṇa tu sūktena vyāhṛtyā vā samāhitaḥ |
mūlamaṃtraṇa vā kuryāddhrīśca te iti maṃtrataḥ || 36 |
bhavānīṃ tu yajenmadhye tatheśānyāṃ tu mādhavam |
āgneyyāṃ girijānāthaṃ gaṇeśaṃ rakṣasāṃ diśi 37 ||
vāyavyāmarcayetsūryamiti devasthitikramaḥ |
ṣoḍaśānupacārāṃśca ṣoḍaśabhirharennaraḥ || 38||
devī mabhyarcya purato yajaṃdanyānanukramāt |
na devīpūjanātpuṇyamadhikaṃ kvacidīkṣyate || 39||
ataeva tu saṃdhyāsu saṃdhyopāstiḥ śrutīritā |
nākṣatairarcayedviṣṇuṃ na tulasyā gaṇeśvaram ||40||
dūrvābhirnārcayedurgā ketakairna maheśvaram |
mallikājātikusumaṃ kuṭajaṃ panasaṃ tathā || 41 ||
kiṃśukaṃ bakulaṃ kuṃdaṃ lodhraṃ tu karavīrakam |
śiśapā'parājitāpuṣpaṃ vaṃdhūkāgastyapuṣpake || 42||
madanaṃ siṃduvāraṃ ca pālāśakusumaṃ tathā |
durvāṃkuraṃ bilvadalaṃ kuśamaṃjarikā tathā || 43 ||
śallakīmādhavīpuṣpamarkamaṃdārapuṣpakam |
ketakīṃ kaṇikāraṃ ca kadaṃbakusumaṃ tathā || 44||
punnāgacaṃpakastadvadyathikātagarau tathā |
evamādīni puṣpāṇi devīpriyakarāṇi ca || 45 ||
guggulasya bhaveddhapo dīpaḥ syāttilatailataḥ |
kṛtvetthaṃ devatāpūjāṃ tato mūlamanuṃ japet || 46 ||
evaṃ pūjāṃ samāpyaiva vedābhyāsaṃ caredbudhaḥ |
tataḥ svavṛttyā kurvīta poṣyavargārthasādhanam ||
tṛtīyadina bhāge tu niyamena vicakṣaṇaḥ || 47 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskaṃdhe saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 17 ||

atha aṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārada uvāca
pūjāviśeṣaṃ śrīdevyāḥ śrotumicchāmi mānada |
yenāḥ śritena manujaḥ kṛtakṛtyatvamāvahet || 1|| ||1||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
sākṣātsamastāpannivāraṇam ||2||
devarṣe śṛṇu vakṣyāmi śrīmātuḥ pūjanakramam |
bhuktimuktipradaṃ ṣaḍaṃganyāsamācaret || 3||
ācamya maunī saṃkalpya bhūtaśuddhayādikaṃ caret | mātṛkānyāsapūrva tu
śaṃkhasya sthāpanaṃ kṛtvā sāmānyāvyaṃ vidhāya ca |
pūjādravyāṇi cāstreṇa prokṣayenmatimānnaraḥ || 4 ||
guroranujñāmādāya tataḥ pūjāṃ samārabhet |
pīṭhapūjāṃ purā kṛtvā devoṃ dhyāyettataḥ param ||5||
āsanādyupacāraiśca bhaktipremayutāṃ sadā |
snāpayetparadevīṃ tāṃ paṃcāmṛtarasādibhiḥ || 6 ||
pauṃḍrekṣurasapūrṇastu kalaśaṃḥ śatasaṃkhyakaiḥ |
snāpayedyo maheśānoṃ na sa bhūyo'bhijāyate ||7||
yaśca cūtarasairevaṃ snāpavejjagadaṃtrikām |
vedanārāyaṇaṃ kṛtvā vedapārāyaṇaṃ rasenekṣūdbhavena vā ||8|| caran || 9||
tadgehaṃ na tyajennityaṃ ramā caiva sarasvatī | yastu drākṣārasenaiva
abhipice maheśānī sakuṭuṃbo narottamaḥ |
rasareṇupramāṇaṃ ca devoloke mahīyate || 10 ||
karpū rāgurukāśmīra kastūrīpaṃka paṃkilaiḥ |
salilaiḥ snāpayeddevīṃ vedapārāyaṇaṃ caran || 11 ||
bhasmībhavaṃti pāpāni śatajanmārjitāni ca |
yo dugdha kalaśairdevīṃ snāpayedapāṭhataḥ ||12||
ākalpaṃ sa vasennityaṃ tasminvai kṣīrasāgare |
yastu daghnābhiṣicettāṃ dadhi kulyāpatirbhavet || 13||
madhunā ca ghṛtenaiva tathā śaṃkarayā'pi ca |
snāpayenmadhukulyādinadonāṃ sa patirbhavet ||14||
snāpayanbhaktitatparaḥ |
iha loke sukho bhūtvāpyanyaloke sukhī bhavet || 15||
sahasra phalaśairdevīṃ
kṣaumaṃ vastradrayaṃ dattvā vāyulokaṃ sa gacchati |
ratnanirmitabhūṣāṇāṃ dātā nidhipatirbhavet ||16||
kāśmīracaṃdanaṃ dattvā kastūrīvibhūṣitam |
tathā somaṃtasiṃdūraṃ caraṇe'laktakapatrakam ||17|| .
iṃdrāsane samārūḍho bhaveddevapatiḥ paraḥ |
puṣpāṇi vividhānyāhuḥ pūjākarmaṇi sādhavaḥ || 18 ||
tāni dattvā yathālābhaṃ kailāsaṃ labhate svayam |
bilvapatrāṇyamoghāni yo dadyātparaśaktaye || 19||
tasya duḥkhaṃ kadācicca kvacicca na bhaviṣyati |
bilvapatratraye raktacandanena tu saṃlikhet ||20||
māyābījatrayaṃ yatnātsusphuṭaṃ cātisuṃdaram |
māyābo jādikaṃ nāma caturthyataṃ samuccaret || 21 ||
namo'ntaṃ parayā bhaktyā devīcaraṇapaṃkaje |
samarpayenmahādevyai komalaṃ tacca patrakam ||22||
komalairatinirmalaiḥ ||23||
ya evaṃ kurute bhaktyā manutvaṃ labhate hi saḥ |
yastu koṭidalerevaṃ lulitairaṣṭagaṃdhataḥ ||24||
pūjayedbhuvaneśānīṃ brahmāṃḍādhipatirbhavet | kundapuṣpairnavanaistu
koṭisaṃkhyaiḥ pūjayettu prājāpatyaṃ labheddhruvam |
mallikā mālatī puṣpairaṣṭagaṃdhena lolitaiḥ ||25||

koṭisaṃkhyaiḥ pūjayā tu jāyate sa caturmukhaḥ |
daśakoṭibhirapyevaṃ taireva kusumairmuneṃ || 26 ||
viṣṇutvaṃ labhate martyo yatsureṣvapi durlabham |
viṣṇunaitadvrataṃ pūrva kṛtaṃ svapadalabdhaye ||27||
śatakoṭibhirapyeva sūtrātmatvaṃ vrajeddhruvam |
vratametatpurā samyakkṛtaṃ bhaktyā prayatnataḥ || 28 ||
tena vrataprabhāveṇa hiraṇyodaratāṃ vrajet |
japākusumapuṣpasya baṃdhūkakusumasya ca || 29 ||
dāḍimīkusumasyāpi vidhireṣa udīritaḥ |
evamanyāni puṣpāṇi śrīdevyai vidhinārpayet || 30 ||
tasya puṇyaphalasyāṃtaṃ na jānātīśvaro'pi saḥ |
tattadṛtadbhavaiḥ puṣpairnāmasāhasrasaṃkhyayā || 31 ||
samarpayenmahādevyai prativarṣamataṃdritaḥ |
ya evaṃ kurute bhaktyā mahāpātakasaṃyutaḥ ||32||
upapātakayukto'pi mucyate sarvapātakaiḥ |
dehāṃte śrīpadāṃbhojaṃ durlabhaṃ devasattamaiḥ ||33||
prāpnoti sādhakavaro mune nāstyatra saṃśayaḥ |
kṛṣṇāguru sakarpūraṃ caṃdanena samanvitam ||34||
silhakaṃ cājyasaṃyuktaṃ guggulena samanvitam |
dhūpaṃ dadyānmahādevyai yena syāddhūpitaṃ gṛham ||35||
tena prasannā deveśī dadāti bhuvanatrayam |
dīpakarpūra khaṃḍeśca dadyāddevyai niraṃtaram || 36||
sūryalokamavāpnoti nātra kāryā vicāraṇā |
śatadīpāṃstathā dadyātsahasrānvā samāhitaḥ ||37||
naivedyaṃ purato devyāḥ sthāpayetparvatākṛtim |
leīśvoyaistathā peyaiḥ ṣaḍrasaistu samāhitaiḥ || 38 ||
nānāṃ phalāni divyāni svādūni rasavaṃti ca |
svarṇapātra sthitānnāni dadyāddevyai niraṃtaram ||39||
tṛptāyāṃ śrīmahādevyāṃ bhavettṛptaṃ jagattrayam |
yatastadātmakaṃ sarvaṃ rajjo sarpo yathā tathā || 40 ||
tataḥ pānīyakaṃ dadyācchubhaṃ gaṃgājalaṃ mahat |
karpūravālāsaṃyuktaṃ śītalaṃ kalaśasthitam || 41 ||
tāmbūlaṃ ca tato devyai karpūraśakalānvitam |
elālabaṃgasaṃyuktaṃ mukhasaugaṃdhyadāyakam ||42||
dadyāddevyai mahābhaktyā yena devī prasīdati |
mṛdaṃgavīṇāmurajaḍhakkāduṃdubhiniḥsvanaiḥ ||43||
toṣayejjagatāṃ dhātrīṃ gāyanairatimohanaiḥ |
vedapārāyaṇaiḥ stotraiḥ purāṇādibhirapyuta ||44 ||
chatraṃ ca cāmare dve ca dadyāddevyai samāhitaḥ |
rājopacārān śrīdevyai nityameva samarpayet || 45||
pradakṣiṇāṃ namaskāraṃ kuryāddevyā anekadhā |
kṣamāpayejjagaddhātrīṃ jagadaṃbāṃ muhurmuhuḥ || 46 ||
sakṛtsmaraṇamātreṇa yatra devī prasīdati |
etādṛśopacāraiśca prasīdedatra kaḥ smayaḥ || 47||
svabhāvato bhavenmātā putre'tikaruṇāvatī |
tena bhaktau kṛtāyāṃ tu vaktavyaṃ kiṃ tataḥ param ||48||
atra te kathayiṣyāmi purāvṛttaṃ sanātanam |
bṛhadrathasya rājarṣeḥ priyaṃ bhaktipradāyakam ||49||
'cakravāko'bhavatpakṣī kvacideśe himālaye |
bhramannānāvidhāndeśānyayau kāśīpuraṃ prati || 50 ||
annapūrṇā mahāsthāne prārabdhavaśato dvijaḥ |
jagāma līlayā tatra kaṇalobhādanāthavat ||51||
kṛtvā pradakṣiṇāmekāṃ jagāma sa vihāyasā |
deśāṃtaraṃ vihāyaiva purī muktipradāyinīm ||52||
kālāṃtare mamārāso gataḥ svarṇapurīṃ prati |
bubhuje viṣayānsarvān divyarūpadharo yuvā || 53 ||

kalpadvayaṃ tathā bhuktvā punaḥ prāpa bhuvaṃ prati |
kṣatriyāṇāṃ kule janma prāpta sarvottamottamam ||54||
bṛhadratheti nāmnā'bhūtprasiddha: kṣitimaṃḍale |
mahāyajvā dhārmikaśca satyavādī jitendriyaḥ || 55||
trikālajñaḥ sārvabhaubho yamo parapuraṃjayaḥ |
pūrvajanmasmṛtistasya vartate durlabhā bhuvi || 56 ||
iti śrutvā kiṃvadaṃtī munayaḥ samupāgatāḥ |
kṛtātithyā viṣṭareṣūṣureva te ||57|| nṛpeṃdreṇa
papracchurmunayaḥ sarve saṃśayo'sti mahānnṛpa |
kena puṇyaprabhāveṇa pūrvajanmasmṛtistava || 58 || ||
trikālajñānamevāpi kasmāt puṇyaprabhāvataḥ |
jñānaṃ taveti tajjñātumāgatāḥ sma tavāṃtikam ||59||
vada nirvyājayā vṛttyā tadasmākaṃ yathātatham |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
iti teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā rājā paramadhārmikaḥ || 60||
uvāca sakalaṃ brahmaṃstrikālajñānakāraṇam |
śrūyatāṃ munayaḥ sarve mama jñānasya kāraṇam || 61 ||
cakravākaḥ sthitaḥ pūrvaṃ nocayonigato'pi vā |
ajñānato'pi kṛtavānannapūrṇāpradakṣiṇām ||62||
tena puṇyaprabhāveṇa svarge kalpadvayasthitiḥ |
trikālajñānatā'pyasminnabhūjjanmani suvratāḥ || 63||
ko veda jagadambāyāḥ padasmṛtiphalaṃ kiyat |
smṛtvā tanmahimānaṃ tu pataṃtya bhrūṇi me'niśam || 64 ||
dhigastu janma teṣāṃ vai kṛtaghnānātu pāpinām |
ye sarvamātaraṃ devīṃ svopāsyāṃ na bhajaṃti hi || 65 ||
na śivopāsanā nityā na viṣṇūpāsanā tathā |
nityopāstiḥ parādevyā nityā śrutyaiva coditā ||
kiṃ mayā bahu vaktavyaṃ sthāne saṃśayavajite |
sevanīyaṃ padāṃbhojaṃ bhagavatya niraṃtaram ||67||
nātaḥ parataraṃ kiṃcidadhikaṃ jagatītale |
sevanīyā parā devī nirguṇā saguṇā'thavā ||68||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā rājarṣerdhārmikasya ca |
prasanna hṛdayāḥ sarve gatāḥ svasvaniketanam || 69 ||
evaṃ prabhāvā sā devī tatpūjāyāḥ phalaṃ kiyat |
astīti ca na praṣṭavyaṃ vaktabhyaṃ vā na kenacit || 70 ||
yeṣāṃ tū janmasāphalyaṃ teṣāṃ śraddhā prajāyate |
yeṣāṃ tu janmāṃkaryaṃ teṣāṃ śraddhā na jāyate ||71||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe'ṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 18 ||
athaikonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
athātaḥ śrūyatāṃ brahman saṃdhyāṃ mādhyāhnikīṃ śubhām |
yadanuṣṭhānato'pūrvaṃ jāyate'tyuttamaṃ phalam ||1||
sāvitrīṃ yuvatīṃ śvetavarṇāṃ caiva trilocanām |
varadāṃ cākṣamālāḍhyāṃ triśūlābhayahastakām ||2||
vṛṣārūḍhāṃ yajurvedasaṃhitāṃ rudradevatām |
tato guṇayutāṃ caiva bhuvarlokavyavasthitām ||3||
ādityamārgasaṃcārakartrī māyāṃ namāmyaham |
ādidevīmaya dhyātvācamanādi ca pūrvavat ||4||

atha cārghyaprakaraṇaṃ puṣpāṇi cinuyāttataḥ |
tadalābhe bilvapatratoyena miśrayettataḥ || 5 ||
ūrdhvaṃ ca sūryābhimukhaṃ kṣiptvā'rghyaṃ pratipādayet | prātaḥ saṃdhyā divatsarvamupasaṃhārapūrvakam 11911
madhyāhne kecidicchati sāvitrīṃ tu tadityṛcam |
asaṃpradāyaṃ tatvara kāryahānistu jāyate || 7 || tu
kāraṇaṃ saṃdhyayoścātra maṃdehānāma rākṣasāḥ |
bhakṣituṃ sūryamicchaṃ kāraṇaṃ śruticoditam ||8||
atastu kāraṇādvipraḥ saṃdhyāṃ kuryātprayatnataḥ |
saṃdhyayorubhayo| natyaṃ gāyatryā praṇavena ca || 9 ||
aṃbhastu prakṣipettena nānyathā śrutighātakaḥ |
ākṛṣṇeneti maṃtreṇa puṣpairvā buvimiśritam ||10||
alābhe bilvadūrvādipatreṇoktena pūrvakam |
arghyaṃ dadyātprayatnena sāṃgaṃ saṃdhyāphalaṃ labhet ||11||
atraiva tarpaṇaṃ vakṣye śṛṇu devaṣisattama |
bhuvaḥ punaḥ pūrupaṃ tu tarpayāmi namo namaḥ || 12 ||
yajurvedaṃ tarpayāmi maṃḍalaṃ tarpayāmi ca |
hiraṇyagarbhaṃ ca tathāṃtarātmānaṃ tathaiva ca || 13 ||
sāvitrīṃ ca tato vedamātaraṃ sāṃkṛti tathā |
saṃdhyāṃ tathaiva yuvatīṃ rudrāṇī nīmṛjāṃ tathā || 14 ||
sarvārthānāṃ siddhikarīṃ sarvamaṃtrārthasididdhām |
bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ pūrupaṃ tu iti madhyāhṛtarpaṇam ||15||
udutyamiti sūktena sūryopasthānameva ca |
citraṃ devānāmiti ca sūryopasthānamācaret ||16||
tato japaṃ prakurvīta maṃtrasādhanatatparaḥ |
japasyāpi prakāraṃ tu vakṣyāmi śṛṇu nārada || 17 ||
kṛtvottānī karo prātaḥ sāyaṃ cāghaḥ karau tathā |
madhyāhne hṛdayasthau tu kṛtvā japamudīrayet ||18||
parvadvayamanāmikyā: kaniṣṭhādikrameṇa tu |
tarjanīmūlaparyantaṃ karamālā prakīrtitā || 19 ||
goṣnaḥ pitṛghno mātṛghno bhrūṇahā gurutalpagaḥ |
brahmasvakṣetrahārī ca yaśca vipraḥ surāṃ pivet ||20||
sa gāyatryāḥ sahasreṇa pūto bhavati mānavaḥ |
mānasaṃ vācikaṃ pāpaṃ viṣayendriyasaṃgajam || 21 || |
tatkilbiṣaṃ nāśayati trīṇi janmāni mānavaḥ |
gāyatrīṃ yo na jānāti vṛthā tasya pariśramaḥ || 22||
paṭhenca caturo vedān gāyatrī cakato japet |
vedānāṃ cāvṛtestadvadgāyatrījapa uttamaḥ || 23 ||
iti madhyāhnasaṃdhyāyāḥ prakāraḥ kīrtito mayā |
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi brahmayajñavidhikramam || 24 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe ekonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 19 ||
atha viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
trirācamya dvijaḥ pūrva dvirmārjanamathācaret |
upaspṛśetsavyapāṇi pādau ca prokṣayettataḥ || 1 ||
śirasi cakṣuṣi tathā nāsāyāṃ śrotradeśake |
hṛdaye ca tathā maulo prokṣaṇaṃ samyagācaret || 2||
deśakālau samuccārya brahmayajñamathācaret |
dvau darbhoṃ dakṣiṇe haste vāme śrīnāsane sakṛt ||3||
upavīte śikhāyāṃ ca pādamūle sakṛtsakṛt |
vimuktaye sarvapāpakṣayārthaṃ caivameva hi ||4||
sūtroktadevatāprītyai brāyajaṃ karomyaham |
gāyatrī trirjapetpūrvaṃ cāgnimīḍe tataḥ param ||5||

yadaṃgeti tataḥ procya agnirve iti kīrtayet |
atha mahāvrataṃ caiva paṃthā etacca kīrtayet ||6||
athātaḥ saṃhitāyāśca vidā maghavadityapi |
mahāvratasyeti tathā iṣetvorja itīva hi ||7||
agna āyāhi cetyevaṃ śannodevīritīti ca |
atha tasya samāmnāyo vṛddhirādaijitīva hi || 8||
atha śikṣāṃ pravakṣyāmi paṃcasaṃvatsareti ca |
mayarasatajabhanetyeva gaurmā ityeva kīrttayet || 9||
athāto dharmajijñāsā athāto brahma ityapi |
tacchaṃ yoriti ca procya brahmaṇe nama ityapi || 10 ||
tarpaṇaṃ caiva devānāṃ tataḥ kuryātpradakṣiṇam |
prajāpatiśca brahmā ca vedā devāstatharṣayaḥ || 11 ||
sarvāṇi caiva chaṃdāṃsi tathoṃkārastathaiva ca |
vaṣaṭkāro vyāhṛtayaḥ sāvitrī ca tataḥ param ||12||
gāyatrī caiva yajñāśca dyāvāpṛthivī ityapi |
aṃtarikṣaṃ tvahorātrāṇi ca sāṃkhyā ataḥ param ||13|
siddhāḥ samudrā nadyaśca girayaśca tataḥ param |
kṣetroṣadhivanaspatyo gaṃdharvāpsarasastathā || 14 ||
nāgā vayāṃsi gāvaśva sādhyā viprāstathaiva ca |
yakṣā rakṣāṃsi bhūtānītyevamantāni kīrtayet || 15 ||
atho nivotī bhūtvā ca ṛṣīnsaṃtarpayedapi |
śatacino mādhyamāśca gṛtsamadastathaiva ca || 16 ||
viśvāmitro vāmadevo'trirbharadvāja eva ca |
vasiṣṭhaśca pragāthaśca pāvamānyastataḥ param ||17||
kṣudrasūktā mahāsūktāḥ sanakaśca sanandanaḥ |
sanātanastathaivātra sanatkumāra eva ca || 18 ||
kapilāsurināmāno vohali: paṃcaśīrṣaka: |
prācīnāvītinā tacca kartavyamatha tarpaṇam || 19 ||.
sumaṃturje minivaiśampāyanaḥ pailasūtrayuk |
bhāṣyabhāratapūrvaṃ ca mahābhārata ityapi || 20 ||
dharmācāryā ime sarve tṛpyaṃtviti ca kīrtayet |
jānanti bāhavigārgyagautamāścaiva śākalaḥ || 21 ||
vābhravyamāṃḍavyayuto māṃḍūkeyastataḥ param |
gārgī vācaknavī caiva vaḍavā prātitheyikā || 22 ||
sulabhā yuktamaitreyī kaholaśca tataḥ param |
kauṣītakaṃ mahākauṣītakaṃ vai tarpayettataḥ || 23 ||
bhāradvājaṃ ca paiṃgyaṃ ca mahāpaigyaṃ suyajñakam |
sāṃkhyāyanamaitareyaṃ mahaitareyameva ca ||24||
bāṣkalaṃ śākalaṃ caiva sujātavakrameva ca |
audavāhica saujāmi śaunakaṃ cāśvalāyanam ||25||
ye cānye sarva ācāryāste sarve tṛptimāpnuyuḥ |
ye ke cāsmatkule jātā aputrā gotriṇo mṛtāḥ ||
te gṛhṇantu mayā dattaṃ vastraniṣpīḍanodakam |
evaṃ te brahmayajñasya vidhirukto mahāmune || 27||
yaśvāyaṃ kurute brahmayajñasya vidhimuttamam |
sarvavedāṃtapāṭhasya phalamāpnoti sādhakaḥ || 28||
vaiśvadevaṃ tataḥ kuryānnityaśrāddhaṃ tathaiva ca |
atithibhyo'nnadānaṃ ca nityameva samācaret || 29 ||
gogrāsaṃ ca tato dattvā bhuñjīta brāhmaṇaiḥ saha |
astu paṃcame bhāge prakuryādetaduttamam ||30||
itihāsapurāṇādyaḥ ṣaṣṭhasattamakau nayet |
aṣṭamā lokayātrā tu vahiḥ saṃdhyāṃ tataḥ punaḥ ||31||
atha sāyaṃtanoṃ saṃdhyāṃ pravakṣyāmi mahāmune |
yadanuṣṭhānamātreṇa mahāmāyā prasīdati ||32||
ācamya prāṇanāyamya sādhakaḥ sthiramānasaḥ |
baddhapadmāsano yogī sāyakāle sthiro bhavet || 33 ||

śrutismṛtyādikarmādau sagarbhaḥ prāṇasaṃyamaḥ |
agarbho dhyānamātraṃ tu sa cāmaṃtraḥ prakīrtitaḥ 34 ||
bhūtaśuddhayādikaṃ kṛtvā nānyathā karma kītitam |
salakṣo devatāṃ dhyātvā pūrakumbhakarecakaiḥ ||35||
dhyānaṃ prakuryātsaṃdhyāyāṃ sāyaṃkāle vicakṣaṇaḥ |
vṛddhāṃ sarasvatīṃ devīṃ kṛṣṇāṃgoṃ kṛṣṇavāsasam || 36||
śaṃkhacakragadāpadmahastāṃ garuḍavāhanām |
nānāratnalasadbhūṣāṃ kvaṇanmaṃjīramekhalām ||37||
anarghya ratnamukuṭāṃ tārahārāvalīyutām |
tāṭaṃkabaddhamāṇikyakāṃtiśobhikapolakām || 38 ||
pītāmbaradharāṃ devīṃ saṃccidānandarūpiṇīm |
sāmavedena sahitāṃ saṃyutāṃ sattvavartmanā || 39 ||
vyavasthitāṃ ca svarloke ādityapathagāminīm |
āvāhayāmyahaṃ devīmāyāṃtī sūryamaṃḍalāt ||40||
evaṃ dhyātvā ca tāṃ devīṃ saṃdhyāsaṃkalpamācaret |
āpohiṣṭeti maṃtreṇa agniveti tathaiva ca || 41 ||
vidadhyādācamanakaṃ śeṣaṃ pūrvavadīritam |
gāyatrī maṃtramuccārya śrīnārāyaṇaprītaye || 42 ||
arghyaṃ dadyācca sūryāya sādhakaḥ śuddhamānasaḥ |
ubhau pādau samau kṛtvā haste dhṛtvā jalāṃjalim ||
devaṃ dhyātvā maṃḍalasthaṃ kṣipedadhyaṃ tataḥ kramāt |
arghyaṃ dadyāttu yo nīre mūḍhātmā jñānavarjitaḥ || 44||
ullaṃdhya smṛti maṃtrāṃśca prāyaścittī bhavedvijaḥ |
tataḥ sūryamupasthāyāpyasāvādityamaṃtrataḥ ||45||
gāyatryāśca japaṃ kuryādupaviśya tato bṛsīm |
sahasraṃ vā tadardhaṃ vā śrīdevīdhyānapūrvakam ||46||
yathā prātaḥ punastadvadupasthānādikaṃ caret |
sāyaṃ saṃdhyātarpaṇe ca krameṇa parikīrtayet ||47 ||
vasiṣṭho ṛṣirevātra sarasvatyāḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
devatā viṣṇurūpā sā chandaścaiva sarasvatī || 48 ||
sāyaṃkālīna saṃdhyāyāstarpaṇe viniyogakaḥ |
svarityuktvā ca puruṣaṃ sāmavedaṃ tathaiva ca || 49||
maṃḍalaṃ ceti saṃprocya hiraṇyagarbhakaṃ tathā |
tathaiva paramātmānaṃ tato'pi ca sarasvatīm ||50||
vedamātaramevātra sāṃskṛti tadvadeva ca |
saṃdhyāṃ vṛddhāṃ tathā viṣṇurūpiṇīmupasīṃ tathā || 51 ||
nimṛjīṃ ca tathā sarvasiddhīnāṃ kāriṇīṃ tathā |
sarvamaṃtrādhipatikāṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaśca pūruṣam ||52||
ityevaṃ tarpaṇaṃ kāryaṃ saṃdhyāyāḥ śrutisaṃmatam |
sāyaṃ saṃtryāvidhānaṃ ca kathitaṃ pāpanāśanam ||53||
sarvaduḥkhahanaṃ vyādhināśakaṃ mokṣadaṃ tathā |
sadācāreṣu saṃdhyāyāḥ prādhānyaṃ munipuṃgava ||
saṃdhyācaraṇato devī bhaktābhīṣṭaṃ prayacchati || 54 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 20 ||
athaikaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
athātaḥ śrūyatāṃ brahman gāyatryāḥ pāpanāśanam |
puraścaraṇakaṃ puṇyaṃ yatheṣṭaphaladāyakam ||1||
parvatāgre nadītīre bilvamūle jalāśaye |
goṣṭhe devālaye'śvatthe udyāne tulasīvane ||2||
puṇyakṣetre guroḥ pārśve cittaikāgrayasthale'pi ca |
puraścaraṇakṛnmaṃtrī sidhyatyeva na saṃśayaḥ ||3||

yasya kasyāpi maṃtrasya puraścaraṇamārabhet |
vyāhṛtitrayasaṃyuktāṃ gāyatrī cāyutaṃ japet ||4||
nṛsiṃhāvarāhāṇāṃ tāṃtrikaṃ vaidikaṃ tathā |
vinā japtvā tu gāyatroṃ tatsarva niṣphalaṃ bhavet 5||
sarve śāktā dvijāḥ proktā na śaivā na ca vaiṣṇavāḥ |
ādiśaktimupāsate gāyatrī vedamātaram ||6||
maṃtra saṃśodhya yatnena puraścaraṇatatparaḥ |
maṃtra śodhanapūrvāṅgamātmaśodhanamuttamam ||7||
ātmatattvaśodhanāya trilakṣaṃ prajapedbudhaḥ |
athavā caikalakṣaṃ tu śrutiproktena vartmanā ||8||
ātmaśuddhi binā karturjapahomādikāḥ kriyāḥ |
niṣphalāstāstu vijñeyāḥ kāraṇaṃ śruticoditam 9 ||
tapasā tāpayeddehaṃ pitṛndevāṃśca tarpayet |
tapasā svargamāpnoti tapasā vidate mahat ||10||
kṣatriyo bāhuvīryeṇa taredāpada ātmana: |
dhanena vaiśyaḥ śūdrastu japahomai dvijottamaḥ || 11 ||
ataeva tu vipreṃdra tapaḥ kuryātprayatnataḥ |
śarīraśoṣaṇaṃ prāhustāpasāstapa uttamam ||12||
śodhayedvadhimārgeṇa kṛcchracāṃdrāyaṇādibhiḥ |
athānnaśuddhikaraṇaṃ vakṣyāmi śṛṇu nārada || 13 ||
ayācitoñchaśuklākhyabhikṣāvṛtticatuṣṭayam |
tāṃtrikairvedikaiścaiva proktānnasya viśuddhatā || 14 ||
bhikṣānaṃ śuddhamānīya kṛtvā bhāgacatuṣṭayam |
ekaṃ bhāgaṃ dvijebhyastu gogrāsastu dvitīyakaḥ 15 ||
atithibhyastṛtīyastu tadūrdhvaṃ tu svabhāryayoḥ |
āśramasya yayā yasya kṛtvā grāsavidhi kramāt 16 ||
ādau kṣiptvā tu gomūtraṃ yathāśakti yathākramam |
tadūrdhvaṃ grāsasaṃkhyā syādvānaprastha gṛhasthayoḥ || 17||
kukkuṭāṃḍapramāṇaṃ tu grāsamānaṃ vidhīyate |
aṣṭau grāsā gṛhasthasya vanasthasya tadardhakam ||18||
brahmacārī yatheṣṭaṃ ca gomūtraṃ vidhipūrvakam |
prokṣaṇaṃ navavāraṃ ca ṣaḍvāraṃ ca trivārakam ||19||
niśchidraṃ ca karaṃ kṛtvā sāvitrīṃ ca tadityṛcam |
maṃtramuccārya manasā prokṣaṇe vidhirucyate ||20||
cauro vā yadi cāṃḍālo vaiśyaḥ kṣatrastathaiva ca |
annaṃ dadyāttu yaḥ kaścidadhamo vidhirucyate || 21 ||
śūdrānnaṃ śūdrasaṃparka śūdreṇa ca sahāśanam |
te yāṃti narakaṃ ghoraṃ yāvaccaṃdradivākarau ||22||
gāyatrīcchaṃdo maṃtrasya yathāsaṃkhyākṣarāṇi ca |
tāvallakṣāṇi kartavyaṃ puraścaraṇakaṃ tathā ||23||
dvātriṃśallakṣamānaṃ tu viśvāmitramataṃ tathā |
jīvahīno yathā dehaḥ sarvakarmasu na kṣamaḥ || 24||
puraścaraṇahīnastu tathā maṃtraḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
jyeṣṭhāṣāḍho bhādrapadaṃ pauṣaṃ tu malamāsakam || 25 ||
aṃgāra śanivāraṃ ca vyatipātaṃ ca vaidhṛtim |
aṣṭamī navamīṃ ṣaṣṭhīṃ caturthī ca trayodaśīm || 26||
caturdaśīmamāvāsyāṃ pradoṣaṃ ca tathā niśām |
yamāgnirudra sarvendravasuśravaṇajanmabham ||27||
meṣakarka tulā kuṃbhānmakaraṃ caiva varjayet |
sarvāṇyetāni varjyāni puraścaraṇakarmaṇi || 28 ||
caṃdratārānukūle ca śuklapakṣe viśeṣataḥ |
puraścaraṇakaṃ kuryānmaṃtra siddhiḥ prajāyate ||29||
svastivācanakaṃ kuryānnāṃdīśrāddhaṃ yathāvidhi |
viprānsaṃtarpya yatnena bhojanācchādanādibhiḥ 30 ||
ārabhettu tataḥ paścādanujñānapuraḥsaram |
pratyaṅmukhaḥ śivasthāne dvijaścānyatame japet 31||

kāśīpurīca kedāro mahākālo'tha nāsikam |
tryaṃbakaṃ ca mahākṣetraṃ paṃca dīpā ime bhuvi || 32 ||
sarvatraiva hi dīpastu kūrmāsanamiti smṛtam |
prāraṃbhadinamārabhya samāptidivasāvadhi ||33||
na nyūnaṃ nātiriktaṃ ca japaṃ kuryāddine dine |
nairaṃtaryeṇa kurvanti puraścaryāṃ munīśvarāḥ ||34||
prātarārabhya vidhivajjapenmadhyaṃdināvadhi |
manaḥ saṃharaṇaṃ śaucaṃ dhyānaṃ maṃtrārthaciṃtanam ||35||
gāyatrīcchaṃdī maṃtrasya yathāsaṃkhyākṣarāṇi ca |
tāvallakṣāṇi kartavyaṃ puraścaraṇakaṃ tathā || 36||
juhuyāttaddaśāṃgena saghṛtena payo'ndhasā |
tilaiḥ patraḥ prasūnaiśca yavaiśva madhurānvitaiḥ || 37 ||
kuryāddaśāṃśato homaṃ tataḥ siddho bhavenmanuḥ |
gāyatrī caiva saṃsevyā dharmakāmārthamokṣadā ||38||
nitye naimittike kāmye tritaye tu parāyaṇaḥ |
gāyatryāstu paraṃ nāsti iha loke paratra ca ||39||
madhyāhne mitabhuṅa maunī triḥ snānārcanatatparaḥ ! jale lakṣatrayaṃ ghīmānnanyamāna sakriyaḥ ||40||
karmaṇā yo japetpaścātkarmabhiḥ svecchayā'pi vā |
yāvatkāryaṃ na siddhayettu tāvatkuryājjapādikam 41 ||
sāmānyakāmyakarmādī yathāvadvidhirucyate |
ādityasyodaye snātvā sahasraṃ pratyahaṃ japet || 42||
āyurārogyamaiśvaryaṃ dhanaṃ ca labhate dhruvam |
ṣaṇmāsaṃ vā trimāsaṃ vā varṣāṃta siddhimāpnuyāt ||
padmānāṃ lakṣahomena dhṛtāntānāṃ hatāśane |
prāpnoti nikhilaṃ mokṣaṃ sidhyatyeva na saṃśayaḥ || 44 ||
maṃtra siddhi vinā karturjapahomādikāḥ kriyāḥ |
kāmyaṃ vā yadi vā mokṣaḥ sarvaṃ tanniṣphalaṃ bhavet 45 ||
paṃcaviṃśatilakṣeṇa dadhnā kṣīreṇa vā hṛtāt |
svadehe sidhyate jaṃturmaharṣīṇāṃ mataṃ yathā ||46 ||
aṣṭāṃgayogasiddhyā ca naraḥ prāpnoti yatphalam |
tatphalaṃ siddhimāpnoti nātra kāryā vicāraṇā 47 || -
śakto vāpi tvaśakto vā āhāraṃ niyataṃ caret |
paṇmāsāttasya siddhiḥ syādgurubhaktirataḥ sadā 48 ||
ekāhaṃ paṃcagavyāśī kāhaṃ mārutāśanaḥ |
ekāhaṃ brāhmaṇānnāśī gāyatrī japakṛdbhavet ||49||
snātvā gaṃgāditīrtheṣu śatamaṃtarjale japet |
śatenāpastataḥ pītvā sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 50 ||
cāṃdrāyaṇādi kṛcchrasya phalaṃ prāpnoti niścitam |
rājā vā yadi vā viprastapaḥ kuryātsvake gṛhe ||
gṛhastho brahmacārī vā vānaprastho'thavāpi ca |
adhikāraparatvena phalaṃ yajñādipūrvakam || 52 ||
śrautasmārtādikaṃ karma kriyate mokṣakāṃkṣibhiḥ |
sāgnikaśca sadācāro vidvadbhiśca suśikṣitaḥ || 53||
tataḥ kuryātprayatnena phalamūlodakādibhiḥ |
bhikṣānnaṃ śuddhamaśnīyādaṣṭau grāsānsvayaṃ bhujet ||54||
evaṃ puraścaraṇakaṃ kṛtvā maṃtra siddhimavāpnuyāt |
devarṣe yadanuṣṭhānāddāridrayaṃ vilayaṃ vrajet ||
tacchrutvāpi ca puṇyānāṃ mahatīṃ siddhimāpnuyāt ||55||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe ekaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 21||

atha dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca mamāpi smṛtimāgatam || 1 || ||1||
devayajño brahmayajño bhūtayajñastathaiva ca |
pitṛyajño manuṣyasya yajñaścaiva tu paṃcamaḥ ||2|| athātaḥ śrūyatāṃ brahmanvaiśvadeva vidhānakam |
puraścaryāprasaṃgena
pāpasya śāṃtaye || 3 ||
paṃcasūnā gṛhasthasya cullo peṣaṇyupaskaraḥ |
kaṇḍaṇī codakuṃbhaśca teṣāṃ sthaṃḍile'pi vā || 4 ||
na cullayāṃ nāyase pātre na bhūmau na ca kharpare |
vaiśvadevaṃ prakurvīta kuṇḍe vā vyajāyata ||5||
na pāṇinā na śūrpeṇa na ca medhyājinādibhiḥ | mukhenopadhamedagni mukhādeva
puṭakena bhavedvayādhiḥ śūrpeṇa dhananāśanam |
pāṇinā mṛtyumāpnoti karmasiddhirmukhena tu || 6 ||
phalaṃrdadhighṛtaiḥ kuryānmūlaśākodakādibhiḥ |
alābhe yena kenāpi kāṣṭhamūlatṛṇādibhiḥ ||7||
juhuyātsarpiṣā'bhyaktaṃ tailakṣāravivarjitam |
dadhyāktaṃ vā pāyasāktaṃ tadabhāve'mbhasāpi vā ||8||
śuṣkaiḥ paryuṣitaiḥ kuṣṭhī ucchiṣṭena dviṣāṃ vaśī |
rukṣairdraridratāṃ yāti kṣāraṃ hutvā vrajatyadhaḥ || 9 ||
aṃgārānbhasmamiśrāṃstu nirhṛtyottarato'nalāt |
juhuyādvaiśvadevaṃ tu na kṣārādivimiśritam ||10||
akṛtvā vaiśvadevaṃ tu yo bhuṃkte mūḍhadhīdvijaḥ |
sa mūḍho narakaṃ yāti kālasūtramavākśirāḥ || 11 ||
śākaṃ vā yadi vā patraṃ mūlaṃ vā yadi vā phalam |
saṃkalpayedyadāhāraṃ tenāgnau juhuyādapi || 12 ||
akṛte vaiśvadeve tu bhikṣo bhikṣārthamāgate |
uddhṛtya vaiśvadevārthaṃ bhikṣāṃ dattvā visarjayet || 13 ||
vaiśvadevakṛtaṃ dopaṃ śakto bhikṣurvyapohitum |
na tu bhikṣukṛtaṃ doṣaṃ vaiśvadevo vyapohati || 14 ||
yatiśca brahmacārī ca pakvānnasvāmināvubhau |
tayorannamadattvā tu bhuktvā cāndrāyaṇaṃ caret || 15 ||
vaiśvādevānaṃtaraṃ ca gogrāsaṃ pratipādayet |
tadvidhānaṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu devarṣipūjita ||16||
surabhirveṣṇavī mātā nityaṃ viṣṇupade sthitā |
gogrāsaṃ ca mayā dattaṃ surabhe pratigṛhyatām ||17||
gobhyaśca nama ityeva pūjāṃ kṛtvā gave'rpayet |
gogrāsena tu gomātā surabhiḥ saṃprasīdati || 18 || tu
tato godohanaṃ kālaṃ tiṣṭheccaiva gṛhāṃgaṇe |
atithiryasya bhagnāśo gṛhātpratinivartate || 19 ||
sa tasmai duṣkṛtaṃ dattvā puṇyamādāya gacchati |
mātā pitā gururbhrātā prajā dāsaḥ samāśritaḥ || 20 ||
abhyāgato'tithiścāgnirete poṣyā udāhṛtāḥ |
evaṃ jñātvā tu yo mohānna karoti gṛhāśramam || 21 ||
tasya nāyaṃ na tu paro loko bhavati dharmataḥ |
yatphalaṃ somayāgena prāpnoti dhanavāndvijaḥ || 22||
samyak paṃcamahāyajñairdaridrastena cāpnuyāt |
atha prāṇāgnihotraṃ tu vakṣyāmi munipuṃgava || 23 ||
yajjñātvā mucyate jaṃturjanmamṛtyujarādibhiḥ |
parijñānena mucyaṃte narāḥ pātakakilbiṣaiḥ ||24||
vidhinā mucyate yena mucyeta sa ṛṇatrayāt |
kulānyuddharate vipro narakānekaviṃśatim || 25 || maṃthānasaṃjñakam ||26||
sarvayajñaphalaprāptiḥ sarvalokeṣu gacchati | hṛtpuṃḍarīkamaraṇino

cāyurajjvā mathedagni cakṣuradhvaryureva ca |
tarjanīmadhya māṃguṣṭhairudānasyāhuti kṣipet ||27||
madhyamānāmikāṃ guṣṭhairapānasyāhuti kṣipet |
kaniṣṭhānāmikāṃguṣṭhairvyānasya tadanaṃtaram ||28||
kaniṣṭhātarjanyaṃguṣṭhairudāna syāhuti kṣipet |
sarvāṃgulairgṛhītvānnaṃ samānasyāhuti kṣipet ||29||
svāhāṃtānpraṇavādyāṃśca nāmamaṃtrāṃśca vai paṭhet |
mukhe cāhavanīyastu hṛdayo gārhapatyakaḥ ||30||
nābhī ca dakṣiṇāgniḥ syādadhaḥ sabhyāvasathyako |
vāgghotā prāṇa udgātā cakṣuradhvaryureva ca || 31 ||
mano brahmā bhavecchrotra māgnīghrasthāna eva ca |
ahaṃkāra : paśuścātra praṇavaḥ paya īritam ||32||
buddhiśca patnī saṃproktā yadadhīno gṛhāśramī |
uro vedistu romāṇi darbhāḥ syuśca sruvau karau 33 ||
prāṇamaṃtrasya ca ṛṣī rukmavarṇa : kṣudhāgnikaḥ |
devatāditya evātra gāyatrīcchaṃda ucyate ||34||
prāṇāya ca tathā svāhā maṃtrāṃte kīrtayedapi |
idamādityadevāya na mameti vadedapi ||35||
apānamantrasya tathā gokṣīradhavalākṛtiḥ |
śraddhāgniṛṣirevātra somo vai devatā smṛtā || 36||
uṣṇikchaṃdastathā'pānāya svāhetyapi kīrtayet |
somāyedaṃ ca na mametyatrohaḥ parikīrtitaḥ ||37||
vyānamantrasya cākhyāto bujavarṇo hutāśanaḥ |
ṛṣiruto devatāgniranuṣṭup chaṃda īritam ||38||
vyānāya ca tathā svāhā'gnayedaṃ na mametyapi |
udānamantrasya tathā śakragopasavarṇakaḥ || 39 ||
ṛṣiragniḥ samākhyāto vāyurve devatā smṛtaḥ |
bṛhatīcchaṃda ākhyātamudānāya ca pūrvavat ||40||
vāyave cedaṃ na mama evaṃ caivocca redvijaḥ |
samānavāyumantrasya vidyudvarṇo virūpakaḥ ||41||
ṛṣiragniḥ samākhyātaḥ parjanyo devatā mataḥ |
paṃkti chadaḥ samākhyātaṃ samānāya ca pūrvavat ||42||
parjanyāyāyedamityuktvā ṣaṣṭhīṃ caivāhuti kṣipet |
vaiśvānaro mahānagnirṛṣi parikīrtitaḥ ||43 ||
gāyatrīcchaṃda ākhyātaṃ devastvātmā bhavedapi |
svāhāṃto mantra ākhyātaḥ paramātmana uccaret ||
idaṃ na mama cetyevaṃ jātaṃ prāṇāgnihotrakam |
etajjñātvā vidhi kṛtvā brahmabhūyāya kalpate ||
prāṇāgnihotravidyeyaṃ saṃkṣepātkathitā hi te || 45 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 21 ||
atha trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
amṛtāpidhānamityevamuccārya sādhakottamaḥ |
ucchiṣṭabhāgbhyaḥ pātrānaṃ dadyādate vicakṣaṇaḥ || 1 ||
ye ke cāsmatkule jātā dāsadāsyo'nnakāṃkṣiṇaḥ |
te sarve tṛptimāyāṃtu mayā dattena bhūtale ||2||
raurave'puṇyanilaye padmārbudanivāsinām |
arthināmudakaṃ dattamakṣayyamupatiṣṭhatu ||3||
pavitragranthimutsṛjya maṃḍale bhuvi nikṣipet |
pātre tu nikṣipedyastu sa vipraḥ paṃktidūṣakaḥ || 4 ||
ucchiṣṭastena saṃspṛṣṭaḥ śunā śūdreṇa ca dvijaḥ |
upoṣya rajanīmekāṃ paṃcagavyena śudhyati || 5 ||

anucchiṣṭena saṃspṛṣṭaḥ snānameva vidhīyate |
ekāhutipradānena koṭiyajñaphalaṃ labhet || 6 ||
paṃcabhiḥ paṃcakoṭīnāṃ tadanaṃtaphalaṃ smṛtam |
prāṇāgnihotre vetre yo hyannadānaṃ karoti ca || 7 ||
dātuścaiva tu yatpuṇyaṃ bhoktuścaiva tu yatphalam |
prāpnutastau tadeva dvāvubhau to svargagāminī || 8 ||
sapavitrakaro bhuṃkte yastu vipro vidhānataḥ |
grāse grāse phalaṃ tasya paṃcagavyasamaṃ bhavet || 9 ||
pūjākālatraye nityaṃ japastarpaṇameva ca |
homo brāhmaṇabhuktiśca puraścaraṇamucyate || 10 || -
adhaḥ śayāno dharmātmā jitakrodho jitendriyaḥ |
laghumiṣṭahitāśī ca vinītaḥ śāṃtacetasā || 11 ||
nityaṃ triṣavaṇasnāyī nityaṃ sa śubhabhāṣaṇaḥ |
strī śūdrapatitavrātyanāstikocchiṣṭabhāṣaṇam ||12||
cāṇḍālabhāṣaṇaṃ caiva na kuryānmunisattama |
natvā naiva ca bhāṣeta japahomārcanādiṣu || 13 ||
maithunasya tathālāpaṃ tadgoṣṭhīmapi varjayet |
karmaṇā manasā vācā sarvāvasthāsu sarvadā || 14 ||
sarvatra maithunatyāgo brahmacaryaṃ pracakṣate |
rājñaścaiva gṛhasthasya brahmacaryamudāhṛtam ||15||
ṛtusnāteṣu dāreṣu saṃgatiryā vidhānataḥ |
saṃskṛtāyāṃ savarṇāyāmṛtuṃ dṛṣṭvā prayatnataḥ || 16 ||
rātrī tu gamanaṃ kāryaṃ brahmacaryaṃ harenna tat |
ṛṇatrayamasaṃśodhya tvanutpādya sutānapi || 17 ||
tathā yajñānaniṣṭhā ca mokṣamicchannrajatyadhaḥ |
ajāgalasya yajjanma tajjanma śruticoditam ||18||
ataḥ kāryaṃ tu viprendra ṛṇatrayaviśodhanam |
te devānāmṛpīṇāṃ ca pitṝṇāmṛṇinastathā || 19||
ṛṣibhyo brahmacaryeṇa pitṛbhyastu tilodakaiḥ |
mucyedyajñena devebhyaḥ svāśramaṃ dharmamācaret ||20||
kṣīrāhārī phalāśī vā śākāśī vā haviṣyabhuk |
bhikṣāśī vā japedvidvānkṛcchracāṃdrāyaṇādikṛt 21||
lavaṇaṃ kṣāramamlaṃ ca guṃjana kāṃsya bhojanam |
tāṃbūlaṃ ca dvibhuktaṃ ca duṣṭavāsaḥ pramattanam ||22||
śrutismṛtivirodhaṃ ca japaṃ rātrau vivarjayet |
vṛthā na kālaṃ gamayedyūtastrīsvāpavādataḥ ||23||
gamayeddevatāpūjāstotrāgamavilokana: |
bhūi~yyābrahmacāritvaṃ monacaryāṃ tathaiva ca ||24||
nityaṃ triṣavaṇasnānaṃ śūdrakarmavivarjanam |
nityapūjā nityadānamānaṃdastuti kīrtanam ||25||
naimittikārcanaṃ caiva viśvāso gurudevayoḥ |
japaniṣṭhasya dharmā ye dvādaśaite susiddhidāḥ ||26||
nityaṃ sūryamupasthāya tasya cābhimukho japet |
devatāpratimādī vā vahno vā'bhyarcya tanmukhaḥ ||27||
snānapūjājapadhyānahomatarpaṇatatparaḥ |
niṣkāmo devatāyāṃ ca sarvakarmanivedakaḥ ||28||
evamādīṃśca niyamānpuraścaraṇakṛccaret |
tasmādvijaḥ prasannātmā japahomaparāyaṇaḥ ||29||
tapasyadhyayane yukto bhavedbhūtānukaṃpakaḥ |
tapasā svargamāpnoti tapasā vidate mahat ||30||
tapoyuktasya siddhayanti karmāṇi niyatātmanaḥ |
vidveṣaṇaṃ saṃharaṇaṃ māraṇaṃ roganāśanam ||31||
yena yenātha ṛṣiṇā yadarthaṃ devatāḥ stutāḥ |
sa sakāmaḥ samṛddhagheta teṣāṃ teṣāṃ tathā tathā || 32||
tāni karmāṇi vakṣyāmi vidhānāni ca karmaṇām |
puraścaraṇamādau ca karmaṇāṃ siddhikārakam ||33|

svādhyāyābhyamanasyādī prājāpatyaṃ caredvijaḥ |
keśaśmaśrulomanakhān vāpayitvā tataḥ śuciḥ ||34||
tiṣṭhedahani rātrau tu śucirāsīta vāgyataḥ |
satyavādī pavitrāṇi japedvayāhṛtayastathā ||35||
oṃkārādyāstu tā japtvā sāvitrīṃ ca tadityṛcam |
āpohiṣṭheti sūktaṃ ca pavitraṃ pāpanāśanam ||36||
purnatyaḥ svastimatyaśca pāvamānyastathaiva ca |
sarvatraitatprayoktavyamādāvaṃte ca karmaṇām ||37||
āsahasrādāśatādvāpyādaśādathavā japet |
oṃkāraṃ vyāhṛtīstisraḥ sāvitrīmathavā'yutam 38 ||
tarpayitvādbhirācāryānṛṣīṃśchaṃdāṃsi devatāḥ |
anāryeṇa na bhāṣeta śūdreṇāpi na garhitaiḥ ||39||
nāpi codakyayā vadhvā patitairnāntyajairnṛbhiḥ |
na devabrāhmaṇadviṣṭarnācārya guru nindakaḥ ||40||
na mātṛpitṛvidviṣṭena vimanyeta kañcana |
kṛcchrāṇāmeṣa sarveṣāṃ vidhirukto'nupūrvaśaḥ || 41 ||
prājāpatyasya kṛcchrasya tathā sāṃtapanasya ca |
parākasya ca kṛcchrasya vidhiśvāṃdrāyaṇasya ca ||42 ||
paṃcabhiḥ pātakaiḥ sarvairduṣkṛtaiśca pramucyate |
taptakṛcchreṇa sarvāṇi pāpāni dahati kṣaṇāt ||43||
tribhicāṃdrāyaṇaiḥ pūto brahmalokaṃ samaśnute |
aṣṭabhirdevatāḥ sākṣātpaśyeta varadāstadā || 44 ||
chaṃdāṃsi daśabhirjñātvā sarvānkāmānsamaśnute |
tryahaṃ prātastryahaṃ sāyaṃ tryahamadyādayācitam ||45 ||
tryahaṃ paraṃ ca nāśnīyātprājāpatyaṃ caredvijaḥ |
gomatraṃ gomayaṃ kṣīradadhisarpiḥ kuśodakam ||46||
ekarātropavāsaśca kṛnchaṃ sāṃtapanaṃ smṛtam |
ekaikaṃ grāsamaśnīyādahāni trīṇi pūrvavat ||47||
tryahaṃ copavasedityamatikṛcchra ṃ caredvijaḥ |
evameva tribhiryuktaṃ mahāsāṃtapanaṃ smṛtam ||48||
taptakṛcchre caranvipro jalakṣīraghṛtānilān |
pratitryahaṃ piveduṣṇānsakṛtsnāyo samāhitaḥ || 49||
niyatastu pibedāpaḥ prājāpatyavidhiḥ smṛtaḥ |
yatātmano'pramattasya dvādaśāhamabhojanam ||50||
parāko nāma kṛcchro'yaṃ sarvapāpapraṇodanaḥ |
ekaikaṃ tu grasepiḍaṃ kṛṣṇe śukle ca vardhayet || 51||
amāvāsyāṃ na bhuñjīta evaṃ cāṃdrāyaṇe vidhiḥ |
upaspṛśya triṣavaṇametaccāṃdrāyaṇaṃ smṛtam || 52 ||
caturaḥ prātaraśnīyādvipraḥ piṃḍānkṛtāhnikaḥ |
caturo'stamite sūrye śiśucāṃdrāyaṇaṃ smṛtam ||53||
aṣṭāvaṣṭau samaśnīyāpiṃḍānmadhyaṃ dine sthite |
niyatātmā haviṣyasya yaticāṃdrāyaṇaṃ vratam ||54 ||
etadrudrāstathādityā vasavaśca caraṃti hi |
sarve kuśalino devā marutaśca bhuvā saha ||55 ||
aikaikaṃ saptarātreṇa punāti vidhivatkṛtam |
tvagasṛkpiśitāsthīni medomajjāvasāstathā || 56 ||
aikaikaṃ saptarātreṇa śuddhayatyeva na saṃśayaḥ |
ebhirvartavipūtātmā karma kurvīta nityaśaḥ || 57||
evaṃ śuddhasya karmāṇi siddhayantyeva na saṃśayaḥ |
śuddhātmā karma kurvīta satyavādī jitendriyaḥ || 58||
iṣṭānkāmāṃstataḥ sarvānsaṃprāpnoti na saṃśayaḥ |
trirātramevopavasedrahitaḥ sarvakarmaṇā ||59||
trīṇi naktāni vā kuryāttataḥ karma samārabhet |
evaṃ vidhānaṃ kathitaṃ puraścaryāphalapradam || 60||
gāyatryāśva puraścaryā sarvakāmapradāyinī |
kathitā tava devarṣe mahāpāpavināśinī || 61 ||

ādau kuryātaṃ mantrī dehaśodhana kārakam |
puraścaryāṃ tataḥ kuryātsamastaphalabhāgbhavet ||62||
iti te kathitaṃ guhyaṃ puraścaryāvidhānakam |
etatparasmai no vācyaṃ śrutisāraṃ yataḥ smṛtam || 63 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 25 ||
atha caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārada uvāca
nārāyaṇa mahābhāga gāyatryāstu samāsataḥ |
śāṃtyādikānprayogāṃstu vadasva karuṇānidhe || 1 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
brahma tadbhava |
na kasyāpi ca vaktavyaṃ duṣṭāya piśunāya ca || 2 ||
atiguhyamidaṃ pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā athaśāṃtiḥ payoktābhiḥ samidbhirjuhuyādvijaḥ |
śamīsamidbhiḥ śāmyanti bhūta rogagrahādayaḥ || 3 ||
bhūta rogādiśāṃtaye ||4|
ārdrābhiḥ kṣīravṛkṣasya samidbhirjuhuyādvijaḥ | juhuyācchakalairvāpi
jalena tarpayetsūryaṃ pāṇibhyāṃ śāṃtimāpnuyāt |
jānudaghne jale japtvā sarvāndoṣāñmaṃ nayet ||5||
kaṃṭhadane jale japtvā mucyetprāṇāṃtikādbhayāt |
sarvebhyaḥ śāṃtikarmabhyo nimajjyāpsu japaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
sauvarṇe rājate vā'pi pātre tāmramaye'pi vā |
kṣīravṛkṣamaye vāpi nirvaṇe mṛnmaye'pi vā || 7 ||
sahasraṃ pañcagavyena hutvā sujvalite'nale |
kṣīravṛkṣamayaiḥ kāṣṭhaiḥ śeṣaṃ saṃpādayecchanaiḥ || 8||
taṃ prokṣayedeśaṃ kuśamaṃtramanusmaran || 9 ||
pratyāhuti spṛśañjaptvā sahasraṃ pātrasaṃsthitam |
tena bali kiraṃstatastasmindhyāyettu paradevatām |
abhicārasamutpannāṃ kṛtvā pāpaṃ ca naśyati || 10 ||
devabhūtapiśācādyā yadyevaṃ kurute vaśe |
gṛhyaṃ grāmaṃ puraṃ rāṣṭraṃ sarvaṃ tebhyo vimucyate || 11||
nikhane mucyate tebhyo likhane madhyato'pi ca |
maṃḍale śūlamālikhya pūrvokte ca krame'pi vā || 12||
abhimaṃtrya sahasraṃ tannikhanetsarvaśāṃtaye |
sauvarṇa rājataṃ vāpi kuṃbhaṃ tāmramayaṃ ca vā || 13 ||
mṛnmayaṃ vā navaṃ divyaṃ sūtraveṣṭitamavraṇam |
sthaṇḍile saikate sthāpya pūrayenmantravijjalaiḥ || 14 || ||15||
digbhya āhṛtya tīrthāni catasṛbhyo dvijottamaiḥ | elācaṃdana karpūra jātīpāṭalamallikāḥ
bilvapatraṃ tathākrāṃtāṃ devīṃ vrīhiyavāṃstilān |
sarṣapānkṣīravṛkṣāṇāṃ pravālāni ca nikṣiṣet || 16||
sarvāṇyabhividhāyaivaṃ kuśakūrcasamanvitam |
snātaḥ samāhito vipraḥ sahasraṃ maṃtrayedbudhaḥ ||17||
dikṣu saurānadhīyīranmaṃtrānviprāstrayīvidaḥ |
prokṣayetpāyayedenaṃ nīraṃ tenābhiṣiṃcayet ||18||
bhūta rogābhicārebhyaḥ sa nirmuktaḥ sukhī bhavet |
abhiṣekeṇa mucyeta mṛtyorāsyagato naraḥ || 19 ||
avaśyaṃ kārayedvidvānrājā dīghaṃ jijīviṣuḥ |
gāvo deyāśca ṛtvigbhya abhiṣeke śataṃ mune ||20||
dakṣiṇā yena vā puṣṭiryathāśaktyā'thavā bhavet |
japedaśvatthamālabhya mandavāre śataṃ dvijaḥ || 21 ||
bhūtarogābhicārebhyo mucyate mahato bhayāt |
guḍūcyāḥ parvavicchinnāḥ payoktā juhuyādvijaḥ 22||

evaṃ mṛtyuṃjayo homaḥ sarvavyādhivināśanaḥ |
āmrasya juhuyātpatraiḥ payoktarjvaraśāṃtaye ||23||
vacābhiḥ payasāktābhiḥ kṣayaṃ hutvā vināśayet |
madhutritayahomena rājayakṣmā vinaśyati || 24||
nivedya bhāskarāyānnaṃ pāyasaṃ homapūrvakam |
rājayakṣmābhibhūtaṃ ca prāśayecchāṃtimāpnuyāt ||25||
latā: parvasu vicchidya somasya juhuyādvijaḥ |
some sūryeṇa saṃyukte payoktāḥ kṣayaśāṃtaye || 26 ||
kusumaiḥ śaṃkhavṛkṣasya hutvā kuṣṭhaṃ vināśayet |
apasmāravināśaḥ syādapāmārgasya taṃḍulaḥ || 27||
kṣīravṛkṣasamiddhomādunmādo'pi vinaśyati |
auduṃvarasamiddhomādatimehaḥ kṣayaṃ vrajet || 28 ||
pramehaṃ śamayeddhṛtvā madhunekṣurasena vā |
madhutritayahomena nayecchāṃti masūrikām ||29||
kapilāsarpiṣā hutvā nayecchāṃti masūrikām |
uduṃbaravaṭāśvatthairgogajāśvāmayaṃ haret ||30||
pipīlimadhuvalmīke gṛhe jāte śataṃ śatam |
śamīsamidbhirannena sarpiṣā juhuyādvijaḥ || 31 ||
tadutthaṃ śāṃtimāyāti śeṣaistatra bali haret |
abhrastanitabhūkampa lakṣyādau vanavetasaḥ || 32||
saptāhaṃ juhuyādevaṃ rāṣṭra rājyaṃ sukhī bhavet |
yāṃ diśaṃ śatajaptena lopṭenābhipratāḍayet || 33 ||
tato'gnimārutādibhyo bhayaṃ tasya vinaśyati |
manasaiva japedenāṃ baddho mucyeta bandhanāt ||34||
bhūtaroga viṣādibhyaḥ spṛśañjaptvā vimocayet bhūmādibhyo vimucyeta jalaṃ pītvābhimaṃtritam ||35||
abhimaṃtrya śataṃ bhasma nyasedbhūtādiśāṃtaye |
śirasā dhārayedbhasma maṃtrayitvā tadityṛcā || 36||
sarvavyādhivinirmuktaḥ sukhī jīvecchataṃ samāḥ |
aśaktaḥ kārayecchāṃti vipraṃ dattvā tu dakṣiṇām 37||
atha puṣṭi śriyaṃ lakṣmī puṣpairhṛtvāpnuyādvijaḥ |
śrīkāmo juhuyātpadmaṃ raktaḥ śriyamavāpnuyāt || 38 ||
hutvā śriyamavāpnoti jātīpuṣpairnavaiḥ śubhaiḥ |
śālitaṃḍulahomena śriyamāpnoti puṣkalām ||39||
samidbhibilvavṛkṣasya hutvā śriyamavāpnuyāt |
bilvasya śakalairhṛtvā patraḥ puṣpaiḥ phalairapi ||40||
śriyamāpnoti paramāṃ mūlasya śakalairapi |
samidbhirvilvavṛkṣasya pāyasena ca sarpiṣā || 41 ||
śataṃ śataṃ ca saptāhaṃ hutvā śriyamavāpnuyāt |
lājaistrimadhuropetairhome kanyāmavāpnuyāt ||42||
anena vidhinā kanyā varamāpnoti vāṃchitam |
raktotpalaśataṃ hutvā saptāhaṃ hema cāpnuyāt ||43|
sūryabiṃbe jalaṃ hutvā jalasthaṃ hema cāpnuyāt |
annaṃ hutvāpnuyādanaṃ vrīhotrīhipatirbhavet || 44 ||
karīṣacūrṇairvatsasya hutvā paśumavāpnuyāt |
priyaṃgupāyasājyaiśca bhaveddhomādibhiḥ prajā || 45 ||
nivedya bhāskarāyānnaṃ pāyasaṃ homapūrvakam |
bhojayettadṛtusnātāṃ putraṃ paramavāpnuyāt ||46||
saprarohābhirārdrābhī raktābhirmadhuratrayaiḥ |
brīhīṇāṃ ca śataṃ hutvā hema cāyuravāpnuyāt ||47||
suvarṇakuḍmalaṃ hutvā śatamāyuravāpnuyāt |
dūrvābhiḥ payasā vāpi madhunā sarpipāpi vā || 48 ||
śataṃ śataṃ ca saptāhamapamṛtyuṃ vyapohati |
śamī samidbhirannena payasā vā ca sarpiṣā ||49||
śataṃ śataṃ ca saptāhamapamṛtyuṃ vyapohati |
nyagrodhasamidho hutvā pāyasaṃ homayettataḥ || 50 ||

śataṃ śataṃ ca saptāhamapamutyuṃ vyapohati |
kṣīrāhāro japenmṛtyoḥ saptāhādvijayī bhavet || 51 ||
anaśnanvāgyato japtvā trirātraṃ mucyate yamāt |
nimajjyāpsu japedeva sadyo - mṛtyorvimucyate || 52 ||
japedvitvaṃ samāśritya māsaṃ rājyamavāpnuyāt |
bilvaṃ hutvā''pnuyādrājyaṃ samūlaphalapallavam||53||
hutvā padmaśataṃ māsaṃ rājyamāpnotyakaṃṭakam |
yavāgūṃ grāmamāpnoti hutvā śālisamanvitam || 54 ||
aśvatthasamidho hutvā yuddhādo jayamāpnuyāt |
arkasya samidho hutvā sarvatra vijayī bhavet || 55 ||
saṃyuktaiḥ payasā patraḥ puṣpairvā vetasasya ca |
pāyasena śataṃ hutvā saptāhaṃ vṛṣṭimāpnuyāt ||56||
nābhidadhne jale jalvā saptāhaṃ dṛṣṭimāpnuyāt |
jale bhasma rātaṃ hutvā mahāvṛṣṭi nivārayet || 57||
pālāśībhiravāpnoti samidbhirbrahmavarcasam |
palāśakusumairhṛtvā sarvamiṣṭamavāpnuyāt || 58 ||
payo hunvā''pnuyānme dhāmājyaṃ buddhimavāpnuyāt |
abhimaṃtrya pivedbrāhmaṃ rasaṃ medhāmavāpnuyāt ||59||
puṣpa home bhavedvāsastaṃtubhistadvidhaṃ paṭam |
lavaṇaṃ madhusaṃmiśraṃ hutveṣṭaṃ vaśamānayet || 60 ||
nayediṣṭaṃ vaśaṃ hutbā lakṣmī puṣpairmadhuplutaiḥ |
nityamaṃjalinātmānamabhiṣicejjale sthitaḥ || 61 ||
matimārogyamāyuṣyamagracaṃ svāsthyamavāpnuyāt |
kuryādvipro'nyamuddiśya so'pi puṣṭimavāpnuyāt 62 ||
atha cāruvidhirmāsaṃ sahasraṃ pratyahaṃ japet |
āyuṣkāmaḥ śuco deśe prāpnuyādāyuruttamam || 63 ||
āyurārogyakāmastu jayenmāsadvayaṃ dvijaḥ |
bhavedāyuṣyamārogyaṃ śriyai sāmatrayaṃ japet || 64 ||
āyuḥ śrīputradārādyāścaturbhiśca yaśo japāt |
putradārāyurārogyaṃ śriyaṃ vidyāṃ ca pañcabhiḥ || 65||
evamevottarānkāmān māsairevottarairvrajet |
ekapādo japedūrdhvabāhuḥ sthitvā nirāśrayaḥ ||66 ||
māsaṃ śatatrayaṃ tisraḥ sarvānkāmānavāpnuyāt |
evaṃ śatottaraṃ japtvā sahasraṃ sarvamāpnuyāt || 67||
ruddhvā prāṇamapānaṃ ca japenmāsaṃ śatatrayam |
yadicchettadavāpnoti sahasrātparamāpnuyāt ||68||
ekapādo japedūrdhvabāhū ruddhvā'nilaṃ vaśī |
māsaṃ śatamavāpnoti yadicchediti kauśikaḥ || 69 ||
evaṃ śatatrayaṃ japtvā sahasraṃ sarvamāpnuyāt |
nimajjyāpsu japennāyaṃ śatamiṣṭamavāpnuyāt ||70||
eva śatatrayaṃ jalvā sahasraṃ sarvamāpnuyāt |
ekapādo japedūrdhvavāha ruddhvā nirāśrayaḥ || 71 ||
naktamaśnanhaviṣyānnaṃ vatsarādṛṣitāmiyāt |
goramodhā bhavedevaṃ japtvā saṃvatsarayam || 72 ||
trivatsaraṃ japedevaṃ bhavettraikāladarśanam |
āyāti bhagavāndavaścatuḥ saṃvatsaraṃ japet || 73 ||
pañcabhirvatsarairevamaṇimādiguṇo bhavet |
evaṃ ṣaḍvatsaraṃ jalvā kāmarūpitvamāpnuyāt ||74||
saptabhirvatsarairevamamaratvamavāpnuyāt |
manutvaṃ navabhi: niddhamitvaṃ daśabhibhavet ||75||
ekādaśabhirāpnoti prājāpatyaṃ suva saraiḥ |
brahmatvamāpnuyādevaṃ javādavatsarān ||76||
etenaiva jitā lokāstapasā nāradādibhiḥ |
śākamanye pare mūlaṃ phalamanye payaḥ pare || 77||
ghṛtamanye pare somamapare caruvṛttayaḥ |
ṛṣayaḥ pakṣamaśnaṃti kecidbhakṣyāvino'hani || 78 ||

haviṣyamapare 'śnantaḥ kurvanyeva paraṃ tapaḥ |
atha śuddhayai rahasyānāṃ trisahasraṃ japedvijaḥ ||79||
māsaṃ śuddho bhavetsteyānsuvarṇaisya dvijottamaḥ |
japenmāsaṃ trisāhasraṃ surāpaḥ śuddhimāpnuyāt ||80||
māsaṃ japettrisāhasraṃ śuciḥ syādgurutalpagaḥ |
trisahasraṃ japenmāsaṃ kuṭīṃ kṛtvā vane vasan ||81||
brahmahā mucyate pāpāditi kauśikabhāṣitam |
dvādaśāhaṃ nimajjyāpsu sahasraṃ pratyahaṃ japet || 82||
mucyerannaṃhasaḥ sarve mahāpātakino dvijāḥ |
trisāhasraṃ japenmāsaṃ prāṇānāyamya vāgyataḥ || 83 ||
mahāpātakayukto vā mucyate mahato bhayāt |
prāṇāyāmasahasreṇa brahmahā'pi viśudhyati || 84 ||
ṣaṭkaṃ tvabhyasedūrdhvaṃ prāṇāpānau samāhitaḥ |
prāṇāyāmo bhavedeṣa sarvapāpapraṇāśanaḥ || 85 ||
sahasramabhyasenmāsaṃ kṣitipaḥ śucitāmiyāt |
dvādaśāhaṃ trisāhasraṃ japeddhi govadhe dvijaḥ || 86||
agamyāgamanasteyahananābhakṣyabhakṣaṇe |
daśasāhasramabhyastā gāyatrī śodhayedvijam || 87||
prāṇāyāmaśataṃ kṛtvā mucyate sarvakilviṣāt |
sarveṣāmeva pāpānāṃ saṃkare sati śuddhaye ||88||
sahasramabhyasenmāsaṃ nityajāpī vane vasan |
upavāsasamaṃ japyaṃ trisahasraṃ tadityṛcam || 89 ||
caturviṃśatisāhasramabhyastā kṛcchrasaṃjñitā |
catuḥṣaṣṭisahasrāṇi cāṃdrāyaṇamamāni tu || 90 ||
śatakṛtvo'bhyasennityaṃ prāṇānāyamya sandhyayoḥ |
tadityṛcamavāpnoti sarvapāpakṣayaṃ param || 99 ||
nimajjyāpsu japennityaṃ śatakṛtvastadityṛcam |
dhyāyandevīṃ sūryarūpāṃ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 92||
iti te samyagākhyātāḥ śāṃti śuddhayādikalpanāḥ |
rahasyātirahasyāśca gopanīyāstvayā sadā ||93||
iti saṃkṣepataḥ proktaḥ sadācārasya saṃgrahaḥ |
vidhinācaraṇādasya māyā durgā prasīdati ||14||
naimittikaṃ ca nityaṃ ca kāmyakarma yathāvidhi |
ācarenmanujaḥ so'yaṃ bhuktimuktiphalāpti bhāk 95 ||
ācāraḥ prathamo dharmo dharmasya prabhurīśvarī |
ityuktaṃ sarvaśāstreṣu sadācāraphalaṃ mahat ||96||
ācāravānsadā pūtaḥ sadaivācāravānsukhī |
ācāravānsadā dhanyaḥ satyaṃ satyaṃ ca nārada || 97 ||
devīprasādajanakaṃ sadācāravidhānakam |
yadapi śṛṇuyānmartyo mahāsaṃpattisaukhyabhāk || 98||
sadācāreṇa siddhecca aihikāmuṣmikaṃ sukham |
tadeva te mayā proktaṃ kimanyacchrotumicchasi || 99 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśaskandhe sadācāranirūpaṇaṃ nāma caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 24||
sārdhe rāmābdhinetreṃdu 1243 || padyairvyāsakṛtaiḥ śubhaiḥ |
devībhāgavatasyāsyaikādaśaḥ skandha īritaḥ || 1 ||
samāpto'yamekādaśaḥ skandhaḥ

śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ
śrīmaddevībhāgavatam
dvādaśaḥ skandhaḥ
atha prathamo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
sadācāravidhideva bhavatā varṇitaḥ prabho |
tasyāpyatulamāhātmyaṃ sarvapāpavināśanam || 1||
śrutaṃ bhavanmukhāṃbhājacyutaṃ devākathāmṛtam |
vratāni yāni coktāni cāṃdrāyaṇamukhāni te ||2||
dukhasādhyāni jānīmaḥ kartrasādhyāni tāni ca |
tadasmātsāṃprataṃ yattu sukhasādhyaṃ śarīriṇām ||3||
devīprasādajanakaṃ śubhānuṣṭhānasiddhidam |
tatkarma vada me svāminkṛpāpūrvaṃ sureśvara ||4||
sadācāravidhau yaśva gāyatrīvidhirīritaḥ |
tasminmukhyatamaṃ kiṃ syātkinā puṇyādhikapradam ||5||
ye gāyatrīgatā varṇastittva sakhyāstvayeritāḥ |
tepāṃ ke ṛṣayaḥ proktāḥ kāni chandāṃsi te mune || 6 ||
teṣāṃ kā devatāḥ proktāḥ sarvaṃ kathaya me prabho |
mahatkautūhala me ca mānase parivartate ||7||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
kuryādanyanna vā kuryādanuṣṭhānādikaṃ tathā |
gāyatrīmātraniṣṭhastu kṛtakṛtyo bhavedvijaḥ || 8||
saṃdhyāsu cārghyadānaṃ ca gāyavījapameva ca |
sahasratritayaṃ kurvansuraiḥ pūjyo bhavenmūne || 9 ||
nyāsātkarotu vā mā vā gāyatrīmeva cābhyaset | dhyātvā nirvyājayā vṛttyā saccidānaṃdarūpiṇīm 10
yadakṣaraikasasiddheḥ spardhate brāhmaṇottamaḥ |
hariśaka 'kaṃjotthasūrya caṃdrahutāśanaiḥ || 11 ||
athātaḥ śrūyatāṃ brahmatvarṇānṛṣyādikāṃstathā |
chaṃdāṃsi devatāstadvatkramāttattvāni caiva hi ||12|| /
vāmadevo'trirvasiṣṭaḥ śukraḥ kaṇvaḥ parāśaraḥ |
viśvāmitro mahātejāḥ kapila: śaunako mahān 13 ||
yājñavalkyo bharadvājo jamadagnistaponidhiḥ |
gautamo mudgalaścaiva vedavyāsaśca lomaśaḥ || 14 ||

agastyaḥ kauśiko vatsaḥ pulastyo māṃḍukastathā |
durvāsāstapasāṃ śreṣṭho nāradaḥ kaśyapastathā ||15||
ityete ṛṣayaḥ proktā varṇānāṃ kramaśo mune |
gāyatrṣṇaganuṣṭup ca vṛhatī paṃktireva ca || 16 ||
triṣṭubhaṃ jagatī caiva tathā'tijagatī matā |
śakvatiśakvarī ca dhṛtiścātidhṛtistathā || 17 ||
virāṭ prastārapaṃktiśca kṛtiḥ prakṛtirākṛtiḥ |
vikṛti: saṃkṛtivākṣarapaṃktistathaiva ca || 18||
bhūrbhuva: svariti chaṃdastathā jyotiṣmatī smṛtam |
ityetāni ca chaṃdāṃsi kīrtitāni mahāmune ||19||
daivatāni śṛṇu prājña tepāmevānupūrvaśaḥ |
āgneyaṃ prathamaṃ proktaṃ prājāpatyaṃ dvitīyakam || 20 ||
tṛtīyaṃ ca tathā somyamīśānaṃ ca caturthakam |
sāvitraṃ pañcamaṃ proktaṃ paṣṭamādityadaivatam || 21||
bārhaspatyaṃ saptamaṃ tu maitrāvaruṇamaṣṭamam |
navamaṃ bhagadaivatyaṃ daśamaṃ cāryamaiśvaram ||22||
gaṇeśa mekādaśakaṃ tvāṣṭraṃ ca dvādaśaṃ smṛtam |
pauṣṇaṃ dayodaśaṃ proktamaiṃdrāgnaṃ ca caturdaśam ||23||
vāyavyaṃ paṃcadaśakaṃ vāmadevyaṃ ca ṣoḍaśam |
maitrāvaruṇidaivatyaṃ proktaṃ saptadaśākṣaram ||24|
aṣṭādaśaṃ vaiśvadaiva mūnaviśaṃtimātṛkam |
vaiṣṇavaṃ viṃśatitamaṃ vāsudaivatamīritam ||25||
ekaviṃśatisaṃkhyākaṃ hāviśaṃ rudradaivatam |
trayoviṃśaṃ ca kaviramāśvinaṃ tattvasaṃkhyakam ||26||
caturviṃśativarṇānāṃ devatānāṃ ca saṃgrahaḥ |
kathitaḥ paramaśreṣṭo mahāpāpaikaśodhanaḥ ||
yadākarṇanamātreṇa sāṃgaṃ jāpyaphalaṃ labhet || 27||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe gāyatraḥ vicāroṃ nāma prathamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 ||
atha dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
varṇānāṃ śaktayaḥ kāśca tāḥ śṛṇuṣva mahāmune |
vāmadevī priyā satyā viśvā bhadravilāsinī || 1 ||
prabhāvatī jayā śāṃtā kāṃtā durgā sarasvatī |
vidrumā ca viśāleśā vyāpinī vimalā tathā || 2||
tamo'pahāriṇī sūkṣmā viśvayonirjayā vaśā |
padmālayā parā śobhā bhadrā ca tripadā smṛtā || 3||
caturviṃśativarṇānāṃ śaktayaḥ samudāhṛtāḥ |
ataḥ paraṃ varṇavarṇānvyāhāmi yathātatham ||4||
capakaṃ atasīpuṣpasannibhaṃ vidrumaṃ tathā |
sphaṭikākārakaṃ caiva padmapuṣpasamaprabham ||5||
taruṇādityasaṃkāśaṃ śaṃkhakundendusannibham |
pravālapadmapatrābhaṃ padmarāgasamaprabham || 6 ||
indranīlamaṇiprakhyaṃ mauktika kuṃkumaprabham |
aṃjanābhaṃ ca raktaṃ ca vaidūryaṃ kṣodrasannibham || 7 ||
haridraṃ kundadugdhābhaṃ ravikāṃtasamaprabham |
śukapucchanibhaṃ tacchatapatranibhaṃ tathā || 8||
ketakīpuṣpa saṃkāśaṃ mallikākusumaprabham |
karavīraśca ityete krameṇa parikīrtitāḥ ||9||
varṇāḥ proktāśca varṇānāṃ mahāpāpaviśodhanāḥ |
pṛthivyāpastathā tejo vāyurākāśa eva ca || 10 ||

gaṃdho rasaśca rūpaṃ ca śabdaḥ sparśastathaiva ca |
upasthaṃ pāyupādaṃ ca pāṇī vāgapi ca kramāt || 11 ||
prāṇaṃ jihvā ca cakṣuśca tvakśrotraṃ ca tataḥ param |
prāṇo'pānastathā vyānaḥ samānaśca tataḥ param || 12||
tattvānyetāni varṇānāṃ kramaśa: kīrtitāni tu |
ataḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi varṇamudrāḥ krameṇa tu || 13 ||
sumukhaṃ saṃpuṭaṃ caiva vitataṃ vistṛtaṃ tathā |
dvimukhaṃ trimukhaṃ caiva catuḥ pañcamukhaṃ tathā || 14 ||
ṣaṇmukhādhomukhaṃ caiva vyāpakāṃjalikaṃ tathā |
śakaṭaṃ yamapāśaṃ ca grathitaṃ saṃmukhonmukham ||15||
vilaṃbaṃ muṣṭika caiva matsyaṃ kūrmaṃ varāhakam |
siṃhākrāṃtaṃ mahākrāṃtaṃ mudgaraṃ pallavaṃ tathā || 16 ||
triśūlayoniḥ surabhiścākṣamālā ca ligakam |
aṃbujaṃ ca mahāmudrāsturyarūpāḥ prakīrtitāḥ || 17 ||
ityetāḥ kīrtitā mudrā varṇānāṃ te mahāmune |
mahāpāpacayakarāḥ kīrtidāḥ kāṃtidā mune ||18||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 ||
atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
svāminsarvajagannātha saṃśayo'sti mana prabho |
catuḥṣaṣṭikalābhijña pātakādyogavira ||1||
mucyeta kena puṇyena brahmarūpaḥ kathaṃ bhavet |
dehaśca devatārūpo mantrarūpo viśeṣataḥ ||2||
karma tacchrotumicchāmi nyāsaṃ ca vidhipūrvakam |
ṛṣiśchaṃdodhidaivaṃ ca dhyānaṃ ca vidhivatprabho ||3||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
astyekaṃ paramaṃ guhyaṃ gāyatrīkavacaṃ tathā |
paṭhanāddhāraṇānmartyaḥ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate ||4||
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti devīrūpaśca jāyate |
gāyatrīkavacasyāsya brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ ||5||
ṛpayo ṛgyajuḥsāmātharvaśchaṃdāsi nārada |
brahmarūpā devatoktā gāyatrī paramā kalā || 6 ||
tadvījaṃ bharga ityeṣā śaktiruktā manoṣibhiḥ |
kīlakaṃ ca dhiyaḥ proktaṃ mokṣārthe viniyojanam ||7||
catubhirhṛdayaṃ proktaṃ tribhirvarṇaiḥ śiraḥ smṛtam |
caturbhiḥ syācchikhā paścāttribhistu kavacaṃ smṛtam ||
catubhitra muddiṣṭaṃ caturbhiḥ syāttadastrakam |
atha dhyānaṃ pravakṣyāmi sādhakābhoṣṭadāyakam ||9||
mukkāvidrumahema nīladhavalacchāyairmukhastrīkṣaṇa-
yuktāmidunibaddharatnamukuṭāṃ tattvārthavarṇātmikām |
gāyatrī varadābhayāṃkuśakaśāḥ śubhraṃ kapālaṃ guṇaṃ
śaṃkhaṃ cakramayāraviṃdayugalaṃ hastairvahatī bhaje ||10||
gāyatrī pūrvataḥ pātu sāvitrī pātu dakṣiṇe |
brahmasaṃdhyā tu me pacāduttarasyāṃ sarasvatī ||11||
pārvatī meṃ diśaṃ rakṣetpāvakī jalaśāyinī |
yātudhānī diśaṃ rakṣedyātudhānabhayaṃkarī ||12||

pāvamānī diśaṃ rakṣetpavamānavilāsinī |
diśaṃ raudrī ca me pātu rudrāṇī rudrarūpiṇī || 13 ||
ūdhvaṃ brahmāṇi me rakṣedadhastādvaiṣṇavī tathā |
evaṃ daśa diśo rakṣetsarvāṃgaṃ bhuvaneśvarī || 14 ||
tatpadaṃ pātu me pādī jaṃghe me savituḥ padam |
vareṇyaṃ kaṭideśe tu nābhi bhargastathaiva ca || 15 ||
devasya me taddhṛdayaṃ dhīmahīti ca gallayoḥ |
ghiyaḥ padaṃ ca me netre yaḥ padaṃ me lalāṭakam ||16||
naḥ pātu me padaṃ mūni śikhāyāṃ me pracodayāt |
tatpadaṃ pātu mūrdhānaṃ sakāraḥ pātu bhālakam ||17||
cakṣuṣī tu bikārārṇastukārastu kapolayoḥ |
nāsāpuṭaṃ vakārārṇo rekārastu mukhe tathā || 18 ||
ṇikāra ūrdhvamoṣṭhaṃ tu yakārastvadharoṣṭhakam |
āsyamadhye bhakārārṇo gakāraśvabuke tathā || 19 ||
dekāraḥ kaṇṭhadeśe tu vakāraḥ skandhadeśakam |
syakāro dakṣiṇaṃ hastaṃ dhīkāro vāmahastakam || 20 ||
makāro hṛdayaṃ rakṣeddhikāra udare tathā |
dhikāro nābhideśe tu yokārastu kaṭiṃ tathā || 21 ||
guhyaṃ rakṣatu yokāra ūrū dvau naḥpadākṣaram |
prakāro jānunī rakṣeccokāro jaṃghadeśakam ||22||
dakāraṃ gulphadeśe tu yakāra: padayugmakam |
takāro vyaṃjanaṃ caiva sarvāṃge me sadā'vatu ||23||
idaṃ tu kavacaṃ divyaṃ bādhāśatavināśanam |
catuḥṣaṣṭikalāvidyādāyakaṃ mokṣakārakam || 24 ||
mucyate sarvapāpebhyaḥ paraṃ brahmādhigacchati |
paṭhanācchravaṇādvāpi gosahasraphalaṃ labhet || 25||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe gāyatrīmantra kavacaṃ nāma tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 3 ||
atha caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
bhagavandevadeveśa bhūtabhavyajagatprabho |
kavacaṃ ca śrutaṃ divyaṃ gāyatrī mantra vigraham || 1||
adhunā śrotumicchāmi gāyatrīhṛdayaṃ param |
yaddhāraṇādbhavetpuṇyaṃ gāyatrījapato'khilam ||2||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
devyāśca hṛdayaṃ proktaṃ nāradātharvaṇe sphuṭam |
tadevāhaṃ pravakṣyāmi rahasyātirahasyakam ||
virārūpāṃ mahādevīṃ gāyatrī vedamātaram | dhyātvā tasyāstvathāṃgeṣu dhyāyedetāśva devatāḥ 4 li
piṃḍabrahmāṃḍayoraikyādbhāvayetsvatano tathā |
devīrūpe nije dehe tanmayatvāya sādhakaḥ ||5||
nādevo'bhyarcayeddevamiti vedavido viduḥ |
tato'bhedāya kāye sve bhāvayeddevatā imāḥ ||6||
atha tatsaṃpravakṣyāmi tanmayatvamayo bhavet |
gāyatrī hṛdayasyāsyāpyahameva ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ ||7||
gāyatrīcchanda uddiṣṭaṃ devatā parameśvarī |
pūrvoktena prakāreṇa kuryādaṃgāni paṭ kramāt ||
āsane vijane deśe dhyāyedekāgramānasaḥ ||8||

athārthanyāsaḥ || dyormūni daivatam || daṃtapaṃktāvaśvino || ubhe saṃdhye coṣṭhī || mukhamagniḥ ||
jihvā sarasvatī || grīvāyāṃ tu bṛhaspatiḥ || stanayorvasavo'ṣṭau || bāhvormarutaḥ || hṛdaye parjanyaḥ ||
ākāśamudaram || nābhāvaṃtarikṣam || kaṭyoridrāgnī || jaghane vijñānadhanaḥ prajāpatiḥ || kailā-
samalaye ūrū || viśvedevā jānvoḥ || jaṃghāyāṃ kauśikaḥ || guhyamayane || ūrū pitaraḥ || pādo
pṛthivī || vanaspatayoṃgulīṣu || ṛṣayo romāṇi || nakhāni muhūrtāni |
asthiṣu grahāḥ || asṛṅmāṃ-
samṛtavaḥ || saṃvatsarā vai nimiṣam || ahorātrāvādityaścandramāḥ || pravarāṃ divyāṃ gāyatrī sahasranetrāṃ
śaraṇamahaṃ prapadye |
oṃtatsaviturvareṇyāya namaḥ || oṃtatpūrvājayāya namaḥ || tatprātarādityāya
namaḥ || tatprātarādityapratiṣṭhāyai namaḥ || prātaradhīyāno rātrikṛtaṃ pāpaṃ nāśayati || sāyamadhīyāno
divasakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ nāśayati || sāyaṃprātaradhoyāna: apāpo bhavati || sarvatīrtheṣu snāto bhavati ||
sarvairdevairjñāto bhavati || avācyavacanātpūto bhavati || abhakṣyabhakṣaṇātpūto bhavati || abhojyabhoja-
nātpūto bhavati || acoṣyacoṣaṇātpūto bhavati || asādhyasādhanātpūto bhavati || duṣpratigrahaśa-
tasahasrātpūto bhavati || sarvapratigrahātpūto bhavati || paṃktidūṣaṇātpūto bhavati || amṛtavacanātpūto
bhavati || athābrahmacārī brahmacārī bhavati || anena hṛdayenādhītena kratusahasreṇeṣṭaṃ bhavati ||
ṣaṣṭiśatasahasragāyatryā japyāni phalāni bhavanti || aṣṭo brāhmaṇānsamyaggrāhayet || tasya siddhi -
bhavati || ya idaṃ nityamadhīyāno brāhmaṇaḥ prātaḥ śuciḥ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyata iti || brahmaloke
mahīyate || ityāha bhagavān śrīnārāyaṇaḥ ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe gāyatrīhṛdayaṃ nāma caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
atha paṃcamo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
bhaktānukaṃpinsarvajña hṛdayaṃ pāpanāśanam |
gāyatryāḥ kathitaṃ tasmādgāyatryāḥ stotramīraya || 1||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
ādiśakte jaganmātarbhaktānugrahakāriṇi |
sarvatra vyāpike'naṃte śrīsaṃdhye te namo'stu me ||2||
tvameva saṃdhyā gāyatrī sāvitrī ca sarasvatī |
brāhmī ca vaiṣṇavī raudrī raktā śvetā sitetarā ||3||
prātarbālā ca madhyāhne yauvanasthā bhavetpunaḥ |
brahmā sāyaṃ bhagavatī cityate munibhiḥ sadā ||4||
haṃsasthā garuḍārūḍhā tathā vṛṣabhavāhinī |
ṛgvedādhyāyinī bhūmau dṛśyate yā tapasvibhiḥ ||5||
yajurvedaṃ paṭhatī ca antarikṣe virājate |
sā sāmagāpi sarveṣu bhrāmyamāṇā tathā bhuvi || 6 ||
rudralokaṃ gatā tvaṃ hi viṣṇulokanivāsinī |
tvameva brahmaṇo loke'matyanugrahakāriṇī ||7|

saptarṣiprītijananī māyā vahuvarapradā |
śivayoḥ karanetrotthā hyaśrusvedasamudbhavā || 8 ||
ānandajananī durgā daśadhā paripaṭhyate |
vareṇyā varadā caitra variṣṭhā varavarṇinī || 9 ||
gariṣṭhā ca barāha ca varārohā ca saptamī |
nīlagaṅgā tathā saṃdhyā sarvadā bhogamokṣadā || 10 ||
bhāgīrathī martyaloke pātāle bhogavatyapi |
trilokavāhinī devī sthānatrayanivāsinī || 11 ||
bhūrlokasthā tvamevāsi dharitrī lokadhāriṇī |
bhuvo loke vāyuśaktiḥ svarloke tejasāṃ nidhiḥ || 12||
maharloke mahāsiddhirjanaloke janetyapi |
tapasvinī tapoloke satyaloke tu satyavāk || 13 ||
kamalā viṣṇuloke ca gāyatrī brahmalokadā |
rudraloke sthitā gaurī harārdhāṅganivāsinī || 14 ||
ahamo mahatacaiva prakṛtistvaṃ hi gīyase |
sāmyāvasthātmikā tvaṃ hi śabalabrahmarūpiṇī || 15 ||
tataḥ parā parā śaktiḥ paramā tvaṃ hi gīyase |
icchāśaktiḥ kriyāśaktirjñānaśaktistriśaktitā || 16 ||
gaṅgā ca yamunā caiva vipāśā ca sarasvatī |
sarayūrdevikā sindhurnarmadairāvatī tathā || 17 ||
godāvarī śatadruśca kāverī devalokagā| kauśikī candrabhāgā ca vitastā ca sarasvatī || 18 ||
gaṇḍakī tāpinī toyā gomatī vetravatyapi |
iḍā ca piṃgalā caiva suṣumnā ca tṛtīyakā || 19||
gāṃdhārī hastijihvā ca pūṣā'pūṣā tathaiva ca |
alambusā kuhūcaiva śaṅkhinī prāṇavāhinī ||20||
nāḍī ca tvaṃ śarīrasthā gīyase prāktanairbudhaḥ |
hṛtpadmasthā prāṇaśaktiḥ kaṇṭhasthā svapnanāyikā 21 ||
tālusthā tvaṃ sadādhārā biṃdusvā bindumālinī |
mūle tu kuṃḍalīśaktirvyāpinī keśamūlagā ||22||
śikhāmadhyāsanā tvaṃ hi śivāgre tu manonmanī |
kimanyadṛhunoktena yatkicijjagatītraye ||23||
tatsarvaṃ tvaṃ mahādevi śriye saṃdhye namostu te |
itīdaṃ kīrtitaṃ stotraṃ saṃdhyāyāṃ bahupuṇyadam ||24||
mahāpāpapraśamanaṃ mahāsiddhividhāyakam |
ya ida kīrtayetstotraṃ saṃdhyākāle samāhitaḥ || 25 ||
aputraḥ prāpnuyātpuraṃ dhanārthī dhanamāpnuyāt |
sarvatīrthata podānayajñayogaphalaṃ labhet ||26||
bhogānbhuktvā ciraṃ kālamte mokṣamavāpnuyāt |
tapasvibhiḥ kṛtaṃ stotraṃ snānakāle tu yaḥ paṭhet27||
yaṃtra jale magnaḥ saṃdhyāmajjanajaṃ phalam |
labhate nātra saṃdehaḥ satyaṃ satyaṃ ca nārada ||28|| kutra
śṛṇuyādyo'pi tadbhaktyā sa tu pāpātpramucyate |
pīyūpasadṛśaṃ vākyaṃ saṃproktaṃ nāraderitam ||29||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe gāyatrīstotraṃ nāma paṃcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5 ||
atha ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
bhagavansarvadharmajña sarvaśāstraviśārada |
śrutismṛtipurāṇānāṃ rahasyaṃ tvanmukhācchrutam || 1 ||
sarvapāpaharaṃ deva yena vidyā pravartate |
kena vā brahmavijñānaṃ kiṃ tu vā mokṣasādhanam ||2||

brāhmaṇānāṃ gatiḥ kena kena vā mṛtyunāśanam |
aihikāmuṣmikaphalaṃ kena vā padmalocana || 3||
vaktumarhasyaśeṣeṇa sarvaṃ nikhilamādita: |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
sādhu sādhu mahāprājña samyak pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā'nagha ||4||
śṛṇu vakṣyāmi yatnena gāyatryaṣṭasahasrakam |
nāmnāṃ śubhānāṃ divyānāṃ sarvapāpavināśanam ||5||
sṛṣṭyādau yadbhagavatā pūrvaṃ proktaṃ bravīmi te |
aṣṭottarasahasrasya ṛṣirbrahmā prakīrtitaḥ || 6 ||
chando'nuṣṭuptathā devī gāyatrī devatā smṛtā |
halo bījāni tasyāśca svarāḥ śaktaya īritāḥ || 7||
aṅganyāsakaranyāsāvucyete mātṛkākṣaraiḥ |
atha dhyānaṃ pravakṣyāmi sādhakānāṃ hitāya vai ||8||
raktaśveta hiraṇyanīladhavalairyuktāṃ trinetrojjvalāṃ raktāṃ raktanavasrajaṃ maṇigaṇairyuktāṃ kumārīmimām |
gāyatroṃ kamalāsanāṃ karatalavyānaddhakuṃḍāṃbujāṃ padmākṣīṃ ca varatrajaṃ ca dadhatīṃ haṃsāvirūḍhāṃ bhaje ||9||
acityalakṣaṇā'vyaktā'pyardha mātṛmaheśvarī |
amṛtārṇavamadhyasthā'pyajitā cāparājitā || 10||
aṇimādiguṇādhārā'pyarkamaṇḍalasaṃsthitā |
ajarājā'parā'gharmā akṣasūtravarā'dharā || 11 ||
akārādikṣakārāṃtāpyariṣaḍvargabhedinī |
aṃjanādipratīkāśā'pyaṃjanādvinivāsinī || 12 ||
aditiścājapā vidyā'pyaraviṃdanibhekṣaṇā |
aṃtarbahiḥ sthitā vidyā dhvaṃsinī cāṃtarātmikā 13 ||
ajā cājamukhā vāsā'pyaraviṃdanibhānanā | ardhamātrārthadānajñā'pyarimaṃḍalamadinī 113811
asuraghnī hyamāvāsyā'pyalakṣmīghnanyaṃtyajācitā |
ādilakṣmīśrādiśaktirākṛtiśvāyatānanā || 15 ||
ādityapadavīcārā'pyādityaparisevitā |
ācāryāvartanācārāpyādimūrti nivāsinī || 16||
āgneyī cāmarī cādyā cārāvyā cāsanasthitā |
ādhāranilayādhārā cākāśāṃtanivāsinī ||17||
ādyākṣarasamāyuktā cāṃtarākāśarūpiṇī |
ādityamaṃḍalagatā cāṃtaravyāṃtanāśinī || 18 ||
indirā ceṣṭadā ceṣṭā cendīvaranibhekṣaṇā |
irāvatī ceṃdrapadā caṃdrāṇī ceṃdurūpiṇī || 19 ||
ikṣukodaṃḍa saṃyuktā ceṣusaṃdhānakāriṇī |
indranīlasamākārā ceḍā piṃgalarūpiṇī ||20||
indrākṣī ceśvarī devo cehātrayavivarjitā |
umā copā hyuḍunibhā urvārukaphalānanā ||21||
uḍuprabhā coḍumatī hacuḍupā hacuḍumadhyagā |
ūrdhvaṃ cāpyūrdhvakeśī cāpyūrdhvādhogatibhedinī 22 ||
ūrdhva bāhupriyā cormimālāvāggranthadāyinī |
ṛtaṃ pitumatī ṛṣidevanamaskṛtā ||23||
ṛgvedā ṛṇahartrī ca ṛṣimaṇḍalavāriṇī |
ṛddhidā ṛjumārgasthā ṛjudharmā ṛjupradā 24||
ṛgvedanilayā ṛjvī luptadharmapravartinī |
lūtārivarasambhūtā lūtādivihāriṇī || 25||
ekākṣarā caikamātrā caikā caikaikaniṣṭhitā |
aindrī rāvatārūḍhā caihikāmuṣmikapradā || 26||
oṃkārā hyopadhī cotā cotaprotanivāsinī |
aurvā hyauṣadhasampannā aupāsana phalapradā ||27|

aṇḍamadhyasthitā devī cākāramanurūpiṇī |
