māyātītā madhumatī madhumāsā madhudravā || 123 ||
mānavī madhusaṃbhūtā mithilāpuravāsinī |
madhukaiṭabhasaṃhartrī bhedinī meghamālinī || 124 ||
maithilī masṛṇapriyā ! mahālakṣmīrmahākālī mahākalyā maheśvarī || 125 ||
maṃdodarī mahāmāyā māhedrī merutanayā maṃdārakusumārcitā |
maṃjumaṃjīravaraṇā mokṣadā maṃjubhāṣiṇī || 126 ||
malayānvitā |
mevā marakatasyānā māgadhī menakātmajā || 127||
madhuradrāviṇo mudrā malayā
mahāmārī mahāvīrā mahāśyāmā manustutā |
mātṛkā mihirābhāsā mukundapadavikramā || 128||
mūlādhārasthitā mugdhā maṇipūrakavāsinī |
mṛgākṣī mahiṣārūḍhā mahiṣāsuramardinī || 129 ||
yogāsanā yogagamyā yogā yauvanakāśrayā |
yauvanī yuddhamadhyasthā yamunā yugadhāriṇī || 130 ||
yakṣiṇī yogayuktā ca yakṣarājaprasūtinī |
yātrā yānavidhānajñā yaduvaṃśasamudbhavā || 131 ||
yakārādihakārāṃtā yājuṣī yajñarūpiṇī |
yāminī yoganiratā yātudhānabhayaṃkarī 4132 ||
rukmiṇī ramaṇī rāmā revatī reṇukā ratiḥ |
raudrī raudrapriyākārā rāmamātā ratipriyā || 133||
rohiṇī rājyadā revā ramā rājīvalocanā |
rākeśī rūpasaṃpannā ratnasiṃhāsanasthitā || 134||
raktamālyāṃvaradharā raktagadhānuledhanā |
rājahaṃsa māḍhā raṃbhā raktalipriyā || 135 ||
rājitākhilabhūtalā |
rurucarmaparīdhānā rathinī ratnamālikā || 136||
ramaṇīyayugādhārā rāvaṇī rāmaharṣiṇī |
rāmacandrapadākrāṃtā rāvagacchedakāriṇī || 137||
rogeśī rogaśamanī rukmabhūṣaṇā |
lajjādhidevatā lolā lalitā liṃgadhāri 38||
ratnavastraparicchannā rathasthā
lakṣmīrlolā luptaviṣā lokanī lokaviśrutaḥ |
lajjā laṃbodarī devī lalanā lokadhāriṇī 139||

varadā vaṃditā vidyā vaiṣṇavī vimalākṛtiḥ |
vārāhī virajā varṣā varalakṣmīvilāsinī 140 ||
vinatā vyomamadhyasthā vārijāsanasaṃsthitā |
vāruṇī veṇusaṃbhūtā vītihotrā virūpiṇī || 141 ||
vāyumaṇḍalamadhyasthā viṣṇurūpā vidhipriyā |
viṣṇupatnī viṣṇumatī viśālākṣī vasundharā 142 ||
vāmadevapriyā velā vajriṇī vasudohinī |
vedākṣaraparītāṃgī vājapeyaphalapradā || 143||
vāsavī vāmajananī vaikuṇṭhanilayā varā |
vyāsapriyā varmadharā vālmīkiparisevitā || 144 ||
śākaṃbharī śivā śāṃtā śāradā śaraṇāgatiḥ |
śātodarī śubhācārā śuṃbhāsuravimardanī || 145 ||
śobhāvatī śivākārā śaṃkarārdhaśarīriṇī |
śoṇā śubhāśayā śubhrā śiraḥsaṃdhānakāriṇī 146 ||
śarāvatī śarānandā śarajjyotsnā śubhānanā |
śarabhā śūlinī śūddhā śavarī śukavāhnā || 147||
śrīmatī śrīdharānandā śravaṇānandadāyinī |
śarvāṇī śarvarī vaṃdyā pabhāṣā ṣaḍṛtupriyā || 148 ||
ṣoḍhādhārasthitā devī paṇgukhapriyakāriṇī |
ṣaḍaṃgarūpasumatiḥ surāsuranamaskṛtā || 149 ||
sarasvatī sadādhārā sarvamagalakāriṇī |
sāmagānapriyā sūkṣmā sāvitrī sāmasaṃbhavā || 150 ||
sarvāvāsā sadānandā sustanī sāgarāṃbarā |
sarvaiśvaryapriyā siddhiḥ sādhubandhuparākramā || 151 ||
saptarṣimaṃḍalagatā somamaṃḍalavāsinī |
sarvajñā sāṃdrakaruṇā samānādhikavajitā || 152 ||
sarvottuṅgā saṃjñahonā sadguṇā sakaleṣṭadā |
saraghā sūryatanayā sukeśī sāmasaṃhatiḥ || 153 ||
hiraṇyavarṇā hariṇī hrīṃkārī haṃsavāhinī |
kṣaumavastraparītāṃgī kṣīrābdhitanayā kṣamā || 154 ||
gāyatrī caiva sāvitrī pārvatī ca sarasvatī vedagarbhā varārohā śrīgāyatrī parāṃvikā || 155 || }
iti sāhasrakaṃ nāmnāṃ gāyatryāścaiva nārada |
pṛṇyadaṃ sarvapāpaghnaṃ mahāsaṃpattidāyakam || 156||
evaṃ nāmāni gāyatryāstoṣotpattikarāṇi hi |
aṣṭamyāṃ ca viśeṣeṇa paṭhitavyaṃ dvijaiḥ saha || 157 ||
japaṃ kṛtvā homapūjādhyānaṃ kṛtvā viśeṣataḥ |
yasmai kasmai na dātavyaṃ gāyatryāstu viśeṣataḥ 158 ||
subhanāya suśiṣyāya vaktavyaṃ bhūsurāya vai |
bhraṣṭebhyaḥ sādhakebhyaśca bāṃdhavebhyo na darśayet || 159 ||
yadgṛhe likhitaṃ śāstraṃ bhayaṃ tasya na kasyacit |
cañcalāpi sthirā bhūtvā kamalā tatra tiṣṭhati 160 ||
idaṃ rahasyaṃ paramaṃ guhyādguhyataraṃ mahat |
puṇyapradaṃ manuṣyāṇāṃ daridrāṇāṃ nidhipradam || 161||
mokṣapradaṃ mumukṣūṇāṃ kāmināṃ sarvakāmadam |
rogādvai mucyate rogī baddho mucyeta bandhanāt 962 ||
brahmahatmāsurāpāna suvarṇasteyino narāḥ |
gurutalpagato vāpi pātakānmucyate sakṛt ||163||
asatpratigrahāccaivābhakṣyabhakṣādviśeṣataḥ |
pākhaṃḍānṛtamukhyebhyaḥ paṭhanādeva mucyate || 164||
idaṃ rahasyamamalaṃ mayoktaṃ padmodbhava |
brahmasāyujyada nṛṇāṃ satyaṃ satyaṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 165 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe dvādaśakandhe gāyatrīsahasranāmastotrakathanaṃ nāma ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ || 6 ||

atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
nārada uvāca
śrutaṃ sahasranāmākhyaṃ śrīgāyatryāḥ phalapradam |
stotraṃ mahonnatikaraṃ mahābhāgyakaraṃ param ||1||
adhunā śrotumicchāmi dīkṣālakṣaṇamuttamam |
vinā yena na sidhyeta devīmaṃtre'dhikāritā ||2||
brāhmaṇānāṃ kṣatriyāṇāṃ viśāṃ strīṇāṃ tathaiva ca |
sāmānyavidhinā sarvaṃ vistareṇa vada prabho || 3 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
śṛṇu dīkṣāṃ pravakṣyāmi śiṣyāṇāṃ bhāvitātmanām |
devāgnigurupūjādāvadhikāro yayā bhavet ||4||
divyaṃ jñānaṃ hi yā dadyātkuryātpāpakṣayaṃ tu yā |
saiva dīkṣeti saṃproktā vedataṃtraviśāradaiḥ ||5||
avaśyaṃ sā tu kartavyā yato bahuphalā matā |
guruśiṣyābubhāvatrāpyatiśuddhāvapekṣito ||6||
gurustu vidhivatprātaḥ kṛtyaṃ sarvaṃ vidhāya ca |
snānasaṃdhyādikaṃ sarva yathāvidhi vidhāya ca ||7||
kamaṇḍalukaro maunī gṛhaṃ yāyātsarittaṭāt |
yāgamaṇḍapamāsādya viśettatrāsane vare ||8||
ācamya prāṇānāyamya gaṃdhapuṣpavimiśritam |
saptavārāstramaṃtreṇa japtaṃ vāriṣu sādhayet ||9||
vāriṇā tena matimānastramaṃtraṃ samuccaran |
praukṣayedvāramakhilaṃ tataḥ pūjāṃ samācaret || 10 ||
ūrdhvoduṃbara ke devaṃ gaṇanāthaṃ tathā śriyam |
sarasvatīṃ nāmamaṃtraḥ pūjayedgaṃdhapuṣpakaiḥ || 11||
dvāradakṣiṇaśākhāyāṃ gaṃgāṃ vineśamarcayet |
dvārasya vāmaśākhāyāṃ kṣetrapālaṃ ca sūryajām ||12||
dehalyāṃ pūjayedastradevatāmastramaṃtrataḥ |
sarvaṃ devīmayaṃ dṛśyamiti saṃcitya sarvataḥ || 13 |
divyānutsārayedvighnānastramaṃtra japena tu |
antarikṣagatānvighnānpadāghātaistu bhūmigān ||14||
vāmaśākhāṃ spṛśanpaścātpraviśeddakṣiṇāṃtriṇā |
praviśya kumbhaṃ saṃsthāpya sāmānyādhyaṃ vidhāya ca ||
tena cārghyajalenāpi nairṛtyāṃ diśi pūjayet |
vāstunāthaṃ ṣadmayoniṃ gaṃdhapuṣpākṣatādibhi: || 16 ||
tataḥ kuryātpañcagavyaṃ tena cāryodakena ca |
toraṇastaṃbhaparyantaṃ prokṣayenmaṇḍapaṃ guruḥ || 17 ||
sarvaṃ devīmayaṃ cedaṃ bhāvayenmanasā kila |
mūlamaṃtra japanbhaktyā prokṣaṇaṃ syāccharāṇunā || 18||
śaramaṃtraṃ samuccārya tāḍayenmaṇḍapakṣamām |
mantraṃ tu samuccārya kuryādabhyukṣaṇaṃ tataḥ ||19||
dhūpaye daṃta raṃ dhūpairvikirānvikirettataḥ |
mārjayettāṃstu mārjanyā kuśanirmitayā punaḥ ||20||
īśānadiśi tatpuṃjaṃ kṛtvā saṃsthāpayenmune |
puṇyāhavācanaṃ kṛtvā dīnānāthāṃśca toṣayet || 21||
viśenmṛdvāsane paścānnamaskṛtya guruṃ nijam |
prāṅmukho vidhivaddhyātvā devamaṃtrasya devatām || 22||
bhūtaśuddhayādikaṃ kṛtvā pūrvoktenaiva vartmanā |
ṛṣyādinyāsakaṃ ca kuryāddevamaṃtrasya vai mune ||23||
nyasenmuniṃ tu śirasi mukhe chandaḥ samīritam |
devatāṃ hṛdayāṃbhoje guhye bījaṃ tu pādayoḥ || 24||

śakti vinyasya paścāttu tālatrayaravāttataḥ |
digbaṃdhaṃ kārayetpaścācchoṭikābhistribhirnaraḥ || 25||
prāṇāyāmaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā mūlamaṃtramanusmaran |
mātṛkāṃ vinyaseddehe tatprakārastuthocyate || 26 ||
oṃ aṃ nama iti procya nyasecchirasi maṃtravit |
evameva tu sarveṣu nyasetsthāneṣu vai mune ||27||
mūlamaṃtra ṣaḍaṃga ca nyarodaṃgeṣu sattamaḥ |
aṃguṣṭhādiṣvaṃgulīṣu hṛdayādipu ca kramāt || 28||
namaḥ svāhāvapaḍyukte vaṣaṭphaṭpadānvitaiḥ |
praṇavādiyutaṃntraḥ paṅbhiraṃvaṃ ṣaḍaṃgakam ||29||
varṇanyāsādikaṃ paścānmūlamaṃtrasya yojayet |
sthāneṣu tattatkalpokteṣviti nyāsavidhiḥ smṛtaḥ 30 ||
tato nije śarīre'smiścintayedāsanaṃ śubham |
dakṣāṃse ca nyaseddharma vāmāṃse jñānameva ca || 31 ||
bānorau cāpi vairāgyaṃ dakṣorāvatha vinyaset |
aiśvaryaṃ mukhadeśe tu mune dhyāyedadharmakam || 32 ||
vāmapārśve nābhideśe dakṣapātreṃ tathā punaḥ |
nañādīṃścāpi jñānādīnpūrvoktāneva vinyaset || 33||
pādā dharmādayaḥ proktāḥ pīṭhasya munisattama |
adharmādyāstu gātrāṇi smṛtāni munipuṃgavaiḥ ||34||
madhye'naṃtaṃ hṛdi sthāne nyasenmṛdvāsane sthale |
prapañcapadmaṃ vimala tasminsūryendupāpakān ||35||
nyasetkalāyutānmaṃtrī saṃkṣepāttā vadānyaham |
sūryasya dvādaśa kalāśtā indoḥ poḍaśa smṛtāḥ ||
daśa vahneḥ kalā proktāstābhiryuktāṃstu tānsmaret |
sattvaṃ rajastamacaṃda nyasetteṣāmayopari ||37||
ātmānamaṃtarātmānaṃ paramātmānameva ca |
jñānātmānaṃ nyasedvidvānittha poṭhasya kalpanā ||38||
amukāsanāya nama iti maṃtreṇa sādhakaḥ |
āsanaṃ pūjayitvā tu tasmindhyāyetparāmbikām || 39 ||
kalpoktavidhinā mantrī deyamaṃtrasya devatām |
mānasairupacāraiśca pūjayettāṃ yathāvidhi ||40||
mudrāḥ pradarśayedvidvānkalpoktā modakārikāḥ |
yābhiviracitābhistu modo devyāstu jāyate || 41 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
tataḥ svavāmabhāgāgre ṣaṭkoṇopari vartulam |
caturasrayutaṃ samyaṅmadhye maḍalamālikhet ||42||
madhye trikoṇa saṃlikhya śaṃkhamudrāṃ pradarśayet |
paḍaṃgāni ca ṣaṭkoṇeṣvarcayetkusumādibhiḥ ||43||
agnyādiṣu tu koṇeṣu paḍaṃgārcanamācaret |
ādhārapātramādāya śaṃkhasya munisattama || 44 ||
astramaṃtreṇa saṃprokṣya sthāpayettatra maṇḍale |
maṃtrimaṃḍalāyoktvā tato daśakalātmane ||45 ||
asukadevyā ardhyapātrasthānāya nama ityapi |
maṃtro'yamuktaḥ śaṃkhasyāpyādhārasthāpane budhaiḥ || 46 ||
ādhāre pūrvamārabhya pradakṣiṇakramaṇa tu |
daśa vahnikalāḥ pūjyā vahnimaṇḍalasaṃsthitāḥ || 47 ||
tato vai mūlamaṃtraṇa prokṣitaṃ śaṃkhamuttamam |
sthāpayettatra cādhāre mūlamantramanusmaran ||48||
asūryamaṃḍalāyoktvā dvādaśāṃte kalātmane |
amukadevyardhyapātrāya nama ityuccarettataḥ || 49 ||
śaṃkhāya padaṃ prokṣya nama ityetaduccaret |
prokṣayettena taṃ śaṃkhaṃ tasmindvādaśa pūjayet ||50 ||
sūryasya dvādaśa kalāstavinyādyā yathākramam |
vilomamātṛkāṃ prokṣya mulamaṃtraṃ vilomaṛm ||51||

jalairāpūrayecchaṃkhaṃ tatra cendoḥ kalāṃ nyaset |
oṃ somamaṃḍalāyoktvāṃte ṣoḍaśakalātmane ||52||
amukāyamṛtāyeti hṛnmaṃtrāṃto manuḥ smṛtaḥ |
pūjayenmanunā tena jalaṃ tu sṛṇimudrayā || 53 ||
tīrthānyāvāhya tatraivāpyaṣṭakṛtvo japenmanum |
ṣaḍaṃgāni jale nyasya hṛdāṃse pūjayedapaḥ || 54 ||
aṣṭakṛtvo japenmūlaṃ chādayenmatsyamudrayā |
tato dakṣiṇadigbhāge śaṃkhasya prokṣaṇīṃ nyaset ||55||
śaṃkhāṃbu kiṃcitrikṣipya prokṣayettena sarvataḥ |
pūjādravyaṃ nijātmānaṃ viśuddhaṃ bhāvayettataḥ || 56 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
tataḥ svapurato bedyāṃ sarvatobhadramaṃḍalam |
saṃlikhya kaṇikāmadhye pūrayecchālitaṃḍulaiḥ ||57||
āstīrya darbhāstatraiva nyasetkūcaṃ salakṣaṇam |
ādhāraśaktimārabhya pīṭhamanvaṃ tamarcayet ||58||
nirvraṇa kuṃbhamādāyāpyastrādbhiḥ kṣālitāṃtaram |
taṃtunā veṣṭayetaṃ tu triguṇenāruṇena ca || 59 ||
navaratnodaraṃ kūrcayutaṃ gaṃdhādipūjitam |
sthāpayettatra pīṭhe tu tārāmaṃtreṇa deśikaḥ || 60 ||
aikyaṃ kumbhasya pīṭhasya bhāvayetpūrayettataḥ |
mātṛkāṃ pratilomena japastīrthodakairmune || 61 ||
mūlamaṃtra ca saṃjapya pūrayeddevatādhiyā |
aśvatthapanasāmrāṇāṃ komalairnavapallavaiḥ || 62||
chādayetkuṃbhavadanaṃ caṣakaṃ saphalākṣatam |
saṃsthāpayeta matimānvastrayugmena veṣṭayeta || 63 ||
prāṇasthāpanamaṃtreṇa prāṇasthāpanamācaret |
āvāhanādimudrābhirmodayeddevatāṃ parām ||64 ||
dhyāyettāṃ parameśānoṃ kalpoktena prakārataḥ |
svāgataṃ kuśalapraśnaṃ devyā agre samuccaret || 65 ||
pādyaṃ dadyāttato'pyayaṃ tataścācamanīyakam |
madhuparkaṃ ca sābhyaṃgaṃ devyaṃ snānaṃ nivedayet || 66 ||
vāsasī ca tato dadyādrakke kṣome sunirmale |
nānāmaṇigaṇākīrṇānā kalpānkalpayettataḥ || 67 ||
manunā puṭitairvaṇairmātṛkāyā vidhānataḥ |
devyā aṃgeṣu vinyasya caṃdanādyaiḥ samarcayet || 68||
gaṃdha: kālāgurubhavaḥ karpūreṇa samanvitaḥ |
kāśmīraṃ caṃdanaṃ cāpi kastūrīsahitaṃ mune || 69 ||
kuṃdapuṣpādipuṣpāṇi paradevyaṃ samarpayet |
dhṛpo'gurupurutrātośīracaṃdana śarkarāḥ ||70||
madhu miśrāḥ smṛtā devyāḥ priyā dhūpātmanā sadā |
dīpānanekāndattvātha naivedyaṃ cāpayetsudhīḥ || 71 ||
pratidravyaṃ jalaṃ dadmātprokṣaṇīsthaṃ na cānyathā |
tataḥ kuryādaṃgapūjāṃ kalpoktapravaṇāni ca ||72||
sāṃgāṃ devīmathābhyacyaṃ vaiśvadevaṃ tataścaret |
dakṣiṇe sthaṃḍilaṃ kṛtvā tatrāvāya hutāśanam ||73||
mūrtisthāṃ devatāṃ tatrāvāhya sampūjya ca kramāt |
tāravyāhṛtibhirhatvā mūlamaṃtreṇa vai tataḥ ||14||
pañcaviṃśativāraṃ tu pāyasena sasarpiṣā |
hunetpaścādvayāhṛtibhiḥ punaśca juhuyānmune ||75||
gaṃdhādyairarcayitvā ca devī poṭhe tu yojayet |
bahni visṛjya haviṣā pavito vikireva lim ||76 ||
devatāyāḥ pārṣadebhyo gandhapuṣpādisaṃyutān |
pañcopacārāndattvātha tāṃbūlaṃ chatracāmare ||77 ||

dadyāddevyaṃ tato mantraṃ sahasrāvṛttito jaṣet |
japaṃ samarpya caṃśāngaṃ vikire diśi saṃsthite ||78 ||
karkarīṃ sthāpayettasyāṃ durgāmāvāhya pūjayet |
rakṣa rakṣeti coccārya nālamuktena vāriṇā || 79 ||
astramantraṃ japandeśaṃ secayettu pradakṣiṇam |
karkaroṃ sthāpayetsthāne pūjayeccāstradevatām ||80||
paśvādgurustu śiṣyeṇa saha bhuṃjīta vāgyataḥ |
tasyāṃ rātrau tu tadvedyāṃ nidrāṃ kuryātprayatnataḥ || 81 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
tataḥ kuṃḍasya saṃskāraṃ sthaṃḍilasya ca vā mune |
pravakṣyāmi samāsena yathāvidhi vidhānataḥ || 82||
mūlamantraṃ samuccārya vīkṣayedastramantrataḥ |
prokṣayettāḍanaṃ kuryāttenaiva kavacena tu || 83 ||
abhyukṣaṇaṃ samuddiṣṭaṃ tisrastisrastataḥ param |
prāgagrā udagagrāśca likhellekhāḥ samaṃtataḥ || 84||
praṇavena samabhyukṣya pīṭhaṃ devyāḥ samarcayet |
ādhāraśaktimārabhya pīṭhamaṃtrāvasānakam ||85||
tasminpīṭhe samāvāhya śivo paramakāraṇau |
gaṃdhādyairupacāraiva pūjayettau samāhitaḥ || 86||
devīṃ dhyāyedṛtusnātāṃ saṃsaktāṃ śaṃkareṇa tu |
kāmāturā tayoḥ krīḍāṃ kiṃcitkāla vibhāvayet ||
atha vahni samādāya pātreṇa purato nyaset |
kravyādāṃśaṃ parityajya pūrvoktarvīkṣaṇādibhiḥ || 88 ||
saṃskṛtya vahni raṃbījamuccāryaṃ tadanantaram |
caitanyaṃ yojayattasminpraṇavenābhimaṃtrayet || 89 ||
saptavāraṃ tato dhenumudrāṃ saṃdarśayedguruḥ |
śaraṇe rakṣitaṃ kṛtvā tanutreṇāvaguṭhayat || 90 ||
acinaṃ triḥ paribhrāmya prādakṣiṇyena sattamaḥ |
kuṇḍopari japastāraṃ jānuspṛṣṭamahotalaḥ || 91 ||
śivavījadhiyā devyā yonau vahni vinikṣipet |
ācāmayettano devaṃ devīṃ ca jagadambikām || 92 ||
citpiṃgala hana daha paca yugmaṃ tataḥ param |
sarvajñājñāpaya svāhā mantro'yaṃ vahnidīpane || 93||
agni prajvalitaṃ vande jātavedaṃ hutāśanam |
suvarṇavarṇamamala samiddhaṃ viśvatomukham ||14||
mantreṇānena taṃ vahni stutrīta paramādarāt |
tato nyamaṃtrahnimantraṃ ṣaḍaṃgaṃ deśikottamaḥ || 95 ||
sahasrātri: svastipūrṇa uttiṣṭhapuruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ |
dhūmavyāpī saptāhvo dhanurdhara iti kramāt || 96 ||
jātiyuktāḥ ṣaḍaṃgāḥ syuḥ pūrvasthāneṣu vinyaset |
dhyāye vahni hemavarṇaṃ trinetraṃ padmasasthitam ||17||
iṣṭaśaktisvastikābhirdhārakaṃ maṃgalaṃ param |
pariṣicettataḥ kuṇḍaṃ mekhalopari maṃtravit || 98||
darbhaḥ paristaretpaścātparighīnvinyasedatha |
trikoṇavṛttaṣaṭkoṇaṃ sāṣṭapatraṃ sabhūpuram ||99||
yantraṃ vibhāvayedvahneḥ pūrvaṃ vā saṃlikhedatha |
tanmadhye pūjayedvahni maṃtreṇānena vai mune || 100 || +
vaiśvānara tato jātavedaḥ jātavedaḥ paścādihāvaha |
lohitākṣapadaṃ proktvā sarvakarmāṇi sādhaya || 101 ||
vahnijāyāṃtako mantrastena vahni tu pūjayet |
madhye ṣaṭsvapi koṇeṣu hiraṇyā gaganā tathā || 102 ||
raktā kṛṣṇā suprabhā ca bahurūpātiriktikā |
pūjayetsaptajihvāstāḥ kesareṣvaṃgapūjanam || 103 || ||103||

daleṣu pūjayenmūrtī: śaktisvastikadhāriṇoḥ |
jātavedāḥ saptajihvo havyavāhana eva ca || 104 ||
aśvodarajasaṃjño'nyaḥ punarvaiśvānarāhvayaḥ |
komāratejāḥ syādviśvamukho devamukhaḥ smṛtaḥ 105||
tārāgnaye padādyāḥ syurnatyantā vahnimūrtayaḥ |
lokapālāṃścaturdikṣu vajrādyāyudhasaṃyutān || 106 ||
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
tataḥ sruksruvasaskārāvājyasaṃskāra eva ca |
kṛtvā homaṃ tataḥ kuryātsutreṇādāya vai ghṛtam ||107||
dakṣiṇāddhṛtabhāgāttu vahne dakṣiṇalocane |
juhuyādagnaye svāhetyevaṃ vai vāmato'nyataḥ || 108 ||
somāya svāheti madhyāhṛtamādāya sattama |
agnīṣomābhyāṃ svāheti madhya netre hunettataḥ || 109 ||
punardakṣiṇabhāgāttu ghṛtamādāya vai mukhe |
agnaye sviṣṭakṛte svāhetyanenaiva hunettataḥ || 110 ||
satārābhirvyāhṛtibhirjuhuyādatha sādhakaḥ |
juhuyādagnimaṃtreṇa trivāraṃ tu tataḥ param || 111 ||
tatastu praṇavenaivāpyaṣṭāvaṣṭo dhṛtāhutī: |
garbhādhānādisaṃskārakṛte tu juhuyānmune || 112 ||
garbhādhānaṃ puṃsavanaṃ sīmaṃtonayanaṃ tataḥ |
jātakarma nāmakarmāpnupaniṣkramaṇaṃ tathā || 113||
annāśanaṃ tathā cūḍā vratabaṃdhastathaiva ca |
mahānāmnyaṃ vrataṃ paścāttayopaniṣadaṃ vratam || 114 ||
godānodvāhakāḥ proktāḥ saṃskārāḥ śruticoditāḥ |
tataḥ śivaṃ pārvatoṃ ca pūjayitvā visarjayet || 115 ||
juhuyātpañca samidho vahnimuddiśya sādhakaḥ |
paścādāvaraṇānāṃ cāpyekai kāmāhuti hunet || 116 ||
ghṛtaṃ sruci samādāya caturvāraṃ sruveṇa ca |
pidhāya tāṃ tu tenaiva mune tiṣṭhannijāsane || 117 ||
vauṣaḍaṃtena manunā vahnestu juhuyāttataḥ |
mahāgaṇeśamantreṇa juhuyādāhṛtodaśa || 118 ||
vahnau pīṭhaṃ samabhyarcya yamaṃtrasya devatām |
vahnau dhyātvā tu tadvaktre pañcaviṃśati saṃkhyayā || 119 ||
mūlamantreṇa juhuyādvaktrakīkaraṇāya ca |
vahnidevatayoraikyaṃ bhāvayannātmanā saha || 120 ||
ekībhūtaṃ bhāvayettu tatastu sādhakottamaḥ |
paḍaṃgaṃ devatānāṃ ca juhuyādāhutīḥ pṛthak || 121 ||
ekādaśaiva juhuyādāhutīrmunisattama |
etena nāḍīsaṃdhānaṃ vahnidevatayormune || 122 ||
ekaika krama yogenāpyāvṛttīnāṃ tathaiva ca |
ekaikakramayogena ghṛtena juhuyānmune || 123||
tataḥ kalpoktadravyaistu juhuyādathavā tilaiḥ |
devatāmūlamaṃtreṇa gajāṃtaka sahasrakam || 124||
evaṃ hṛtvā tato devīṃ santuṣṭāṃ bhāvayanmune |
tathetrāvṛtidevīca vahnayādyā devatā api || 125 ||
tataḥ śiṣyaṃ ca susnātaṃ kṛtasaṃdhyādikakriyam |
bastradryayutaṃ svarṇābharaṇena samanvitam || 126||
kamaṃḍaluṃ karaśuddhayai kuṇḍasyāṃtikamānayet |
namaskṛtya tataḥ śiṣyo gurūnatha sabhāsadaḥ || 127 ||
kuladevaṃ namaskṛtya viśettanātha viṣṭare |
gurustatastu taṃ śiṣyaṃ kṛpādṛṣṭyā vilokayet 128 ||
taccaitanyaṃ nije dehe bhāvayetsaṃgataṃ tviti |
tataḥ śiṣyatanusthānāmadhvanāṃ pariśodhanam || 129||
kuryāttu homato vidvāndivyadṛṣṭayavalokanāt |
yena jāyeta śuddhātmā yogyo devādyanugrahe ||130 ||

śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
tanau dhyāyetta śiṣyasya ṣaḍadhvanaḥ krameṇa tu |
pādayostu kalādhvānasaṃghau tattvādhvakaṃ punaḥ 131 ||
nābhī tu bhuvanādhvānaṃ varṇādhvānaṃ tathā hṛdi |
padādhvānaṃ tathā bhāle maṃtrādhvānaṃ tu mūrdhani || 132 ||
śiṣyaṃ spṛśaṃstu kūrcena tilairājyaparilutaiḥ |
śodhayāmyamumadhvānaṃ svāheti manumuccaran||133||
tārāḍhyaṃ juhuyādā vāraṃ pratyadhvameva hi |
ṣaḍadhvanastatastāṃstu līnānbrahmaṇi bhāvayet || 134 ||
punarutpādayettasmāt ṣṭimātreṇa vai guruḥ |
ātmasthitaṃ taccaitanyaṃ punaḥ śiṣye tu yojayet ||
pūrṇāhuti tato hutvā devatāṃ kalaśe nayet |
punarvyāhṛtibhirhutvā bahneraṃgāhu tīstathā || 136 ||
ekaikaśo : gururdatvā visṛjedvahnimātmani |
tataḥ śiṣyasya netre tu badhnīyādvāsasā guruḥ || 137||
netramaṃtreṇa taṃ śiṣyaṃ dhuṃḍato maṃḍalaṃ nayet |
puṣpāṃjali mukhyadevyāṃ kārayecchiṣya hastataḥ || 138 ||
netrabaṃdhaṃ nirākṛtya deśayetku śaviṣṭare |
bhūtaśuddhi śiṣya dehe kuryātproktena vartmanā || 139
maṃtroditāṃstathā nyāsānvṛtvā śipyatano tataḥ |
maṃḍale veśayecchiṣyamanyasminkuṃbhasaṃsthitān|| 140 ||
pallavāñchiṣya śirasi vinyasenmātṛkāṃ japet |
kalaśasthajalaiḥ śiṣyaṃ snāpayeddevatātmakaiḥ || 141 ||
vardhanījalasekaṃ ca kuryādrakṣārtha majasā |
tataḥ śiṣyaḥ samutthāya vāsasī paridhāya ca || 142 ||
kṛtabhasmāvalepaśca saṃviśedgurusannidhau |
tato guruḥ svakīyāttu hṛdayānnirgatāṃ śivām 143 ||
praviṣṭāṃ śipyahṛdaye bhāvayetkaruṇānidhiḥ |
pūjayedgaṃdhapuṣpādya raivayaṃ vai bhāvayaṃstayoḥ || 144 ||
tatastriśo dakṣakarṇe śiṣyasyopadiśedguruḥ |
mahāmaṃtraṃ mahādevyāḥ svahastaṃ śirasi nyasan || 145||
aṣṭottaraśataṃ mantraṃ śiṣyo'pi prajapenmune |
daṃḍavatpraṇamedbhūmau taṃ guruṃ devatātmakam || 146||
sarvasvamarpayettasmai yāvajjīvamananyadhīḥ |
ṛtvigbhyo dakṣiṇāṃ dattvā brāhmaṇāṃścāpi bhojayet ||
suvāsinī: kumārīśca baṭukāṃcaiva sarvaśaḥ |
dīnānāthāndaridrāṃśca vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ|| 148||
kṛtārthatāṃ svasya buddhvā nityamārādhayenmanum |
iti te kathitaḥ samyagdīkṣāvidhiranuttamaḥ 149 ||
vimṛśyaitadaśeṣeṇa bhaja devīpadāṃbujam |
nānyastu paramo dharmo brāhmaṇasyātra vidyate 150 ||
vaidika: svasvagṛhyeokta vrameṇopadiśenmanum |
tāṃtrikastaṃtrarītyā tu sthitireṣā sanātanī 151||
tattaduktaprayogāṃste te te kuryurna cānyathā |
śrīnārāyaṇa uvāca
iti sarvaṃ mayā''khyātaṃ yatpṛṣṭaṃ nārada tvayā || 152 ||
bataḥ paraṃ parāṃbāyā bhaja nityaṃ padāṃbujam |
nityamārādhya taccāhaṃ nirvṛti paramāṃ gataḥ 153 ||

śrīdevābhāgavata mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 8 805
vyāsa uvāca
iti rājannāradāya proktvā sarvamanuttamam |
samādhimīlitākṣastu dadhyo devīpadāṃbujam || 154||
nārāyaṇastu bhagavānmunivaryaśikhāmaṇiḥ |
nārado'pi tato natvā guruṃ nārāyaṇaṃ param ||
jagāma sadyastapase devīdarśanalālasaḥ || 155||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7||
atha aṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
janamejaya uvāca
bhagavansarvadharmajña sarvaśāstravatāṃ vara |
dvijātīnāṃ tu sarveṣāṃ śaktyupāstiḥ śrutoritā 1 ||
saṃdhyākālatraye'nyasminkāle nityatayā vibho |
tāṃ vihāya dvijāḥ kasmādgṛlloyuścānyadevatāḥ 2 ||
dṛśyante vaiṣṇavāḥ kecidgāṇapatyāstathāpare |
kāpālikācīna mārgaratā valkaladhāriṇaḥ ||3||
digaṃbarāstathā bauddhāścārvākā evamādayaḥ |
dṛśyaṃte bahavo loke vedaśraddhāvivarjitāḥ || 4 ||
kimatra kāraṇaṃ brahmastadbhavānvaktumarhati |
buddhimaṃta paṃḍitāśca nānātarkavicakṣaṇāḥ ||5||
api saṃtyeva vedeṣu śraddhayā tu vivarjitāḥ |
na hi kaścitsva kalyāṇaṃ buddhyā hā numihecchati || 6 ||
kimatra kāraṇa tasmādvada vedavidāṃ vara |
maṇidvīpasya mahimā varṇito bhavatā purā ||7||
kīdṛktadasti yaddevyāḥ paraṃ sthānaṃ mahattaram |
taccāpi vada bhaktāya śraddadhānāya me'nagha || 8||
prasannāstu vadantyeva guravo guhyamapyuta |
sūta uvāca
iti rājño vacaḥ śrutvā bhagavānvādarāyaṇaḥ || 9 ||
nijagāda tataḥ sarvaṃ krameṇaiva munīśvarāḥ |
yacchrutvā tu dvijātīnāṃ vedaśraddhā vivardhate || 10 ||
vyāsa uvāca
samyakpṛṣṭaṃ tvayā rājansamaye samayocitam |
buddhimānasi vedeṣu śraddhāvāṃścaiva lakṣyase || 11 ||
pūrvaṃ madoddhatā daityā devairyuddhaṃ tu cakrire |
śatavarṣa devairyuddhaṃ tu cakrire |
śatavarṣa mahārāja mahāvismayakārakam ||12||
nānāśastrapraharaṇaṃ nānāmāyāvicitritam |
jagatkṣayakaraṃ nūnaṃ teṣāṃ yuddhamabhūnnṛpa ||13||
parāśaktikṛpāveśāddevairdaityā jitā yudhi |
bhuvaṃ svarga parityajya gatāḥ pātālaveśmani || 14 ||
tataḥ praharṣitā devā: svaparākramavarṇanam |
cakruḥ parasparaṃ mohātsābhimānāḥ samaṃtataḥ || 15 ||
jayo'smākaṃ kuto na syādasmākaṃ mahimā yataḥ |
sarvottamaḥ kutra daityāḥ pāmarā niṣparākramāḥ || 16 ||

śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 8
sṛṣṭisthitikṣayakarā vayaṃ sarve yaśasvinaḥ |
asmadagre pāmarāṇāṃ daityānāṃ caiva kā kathā || 17 ||
parāśaktiprabhāvaṃ te na jñātvā mohamāgatāḥ |
teṣāmanugrahaṃ kartuṃ tadaiva jagadaṃbikā || 18 ||
prādurāsītkṛpāpūrṇā yakṣarūpeṇa bhūmipa |
koṭisūryapratīkāśaṃ caṃdrakoṭiśītalam ||19||
vidyutkoṭisamānābhaṃ hastapādādivarjitam |
adṛṣṭapūrvaṃ taddṛṣṭvā tejaḥ paramasundaram ||20||
savismayāstadā procuḥ kimidaṃ kimidaṃ tviti |
daityānāṃ ceṣṭitaṃ kiṃ vā māyā kāpi mahīyasī ||
kenacinnirmitā vā'tha devānāṃ smayakāriṇī |
saṃbhūya te tadā sarve vicāraṃ cakruruttamam || 22 ||
yakṣasya nikaṭe gatvā praṣṭavyaṃ kastvamityapi |
balābalaṃ tato jñātvā kartavyā tu pratikriyā 23 ||
tato vahni samāhūya provāceṃdraḥ surādhipaḥ |
gaccha va tvamasmākaṃ yato'si mukhamuttamam ||24||
tato gatvā tu jānīhi kimidaṃ yakṣamityapi |
sahasrākṣavacaḥ śrutvā svaparākramagarbhitam || 25||
vegātsa nirgato vahniryayau yakṣasya saṃnidhau |
tadā provāca yakṣastaṃ tvaṃ ko'sīti hutāśanam ||
vīryaṃ ca tvayi kiṃ yattadvada savaṃ mamāgrataḥ |
agnirasmi tathā jātavedā asmīti so'bravīt ||
sarvasya dahane śaktirmayi viśvasya tiṣṭhati |
tadā yakṣaḥ paraṃ tejastadagre nidadhau tṛṇam ||28||
dahainaṃ yadi te śaktiviśvasya dahane'sti hi |
tadā sarvabalenaivākarodyatnaṃ hutāśanaḥ || 29 ||
na śaśāka tṛṇaṃ dagdhuṃ lajjito'gātsurānprati |
pṛṣṭe devaistu vṛttāṃte sarvaṃ provāca havyabhuk ||30|
vṛthā'bhimāno hyasmākaṃ sarveśatvādike surāḥ |
tatastu vṛtrahā vāyuṃ samāhūyedamabravīt ||31||
tvayi protaṃ jagatsarvaṃ tvacceṣṭābhistu ceṣṭitam |
tvaṃ prāṇarūpaḥ sarveṣāṃ sarvaśaktividhārakaḥ ||32||
tvameva gatvā jānīhi kimidaṃ yakṣamityapi |
nānyaḥ ko'pi samartho'sti jñātuṃ yakṣaṃ paraṃ mahaḥ ||
sahasrākṣavacaḥ śrutvā guṇagaurava guṃphitam |
sābhimāno jagāmāśu yatra yakṣaṃ virājate ||34||
yakṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā tato vāyuṃ provāca mṛdubhāṣayā |
ko'si tvaṃ tvayi kā śaktirvada sarvaṃ mamāgrataḥ ||
tato yakṣavacaḥ śrutvā garveṇa marudabravīt |
mātariśvā'hamasmīti vāyurasmīti cābravīt 36 ||
vīyaṃ tu mayi sarvasya cālane grahaṇe'sti hi |
macceṣṭayā jagatsarvaṃ sarvavyāpāravadbhavet ||37||
iti śrutvā vāyuvāṇīṃ nijagāda paraṃ mahaḥ |
tṛṇametattavāgre yattaccālaya yathepsitam ||38||
nocedgavaṃ vihāyainaṃ lajjito gaccha vāsavam |
śrutvā yakṣavaco vāyuḥ sarvaśaktisamanvitaḥ || 39 ||
udyogamakarottacca svasthānānna cacāla ha |
lajjito'gāddeva pārśve hitvā gavaṃ sa cānilaḥ40 ||
vṛttāṃtamavadatsarvaṃ garvanirvāpakāraṇam |
naitajjñātuṃ samarthāḥ sma mithyāgarvābhimāninaḥ 41 ||
alaukikaṃ bhāti yakṣaṃ tejaḥ paramadāruṇam |
tataḥ sarve suragaṇāḥ sahasrākṣaṃ samūcire || 42 ||
devarāssi yasmāttvaṃ yakṣaṃ jānīhi tattvataḥ |
tata indro mahāgarvāttadyakṣaṃ samupādravat ||43||
prādravacca paraṃ tejo yakṣarūpaṃ parātparam |
aṃtardhānaṃ tataḥ prāpa tadyakṣaṃ vāsavāyataḥ || 44 ||

atova lajjito jāto vāsavo devarāḍapi |
yakṣasaṃbhāṣaṇābhāvāllaghutvaṃ prāpa cetasi || 45 ||
ataḥ paraṃ na gaṃtavyaṃ mayā tu surasaṃsadi |
kiṃ mayā tatra vaktavyaṃ svalaghutvaṃ surānprati || 46 ||
dehatyāgo varastasmānmāno hi mahatāṃ dhanam |
māne naṣṭe jovitaṃ tu mṛtatulyaṃ na saṃśayaḥ ||47||
iti niścitya tatraiva gavaṃ hitvā sureśvaraḥ |
caritramīdṛśaṃ yasya tameva śaraṇaṃ gataḥ || 48 ||
tasminneva kṣaṇe jātā vyomavāṇī nabhastale |
māyābījaṃ sahasrākṣa japa tena sukhī bhava || 49 ||
tato jajāpa paramaṃ māyābījaṃ parātparam |
lakṣavarṣaṃ nirāhāro dhyānamīlitalocanaḥ || 50 ||
akasmāccaitramāsoyanavamyāṃ madhyage ravau |
tadevāvirabhūttejastasminneva sthale punaḥ || 51 ||
tejomaṃḍalamadhye tu kumāroṃ navayauvanām |
bhāsvajjapāprasūnābhāṃ bālakoṭiraviprabhām ||52||
bālaśītāṃśumukuṭāṃ vastrāṃtarvyañjitasvanīm |
catubhirvarahastaistu varapāśāṃkuśābhayān ||53||
dadhānāṃ ramaṇīyāṃgī komalāṃgalatāṃ śivām |
bhaktakalpadrumāmbāṃ nānābhūṣaṇabhūṣitām ||54 ||
trinetrāṃ mallikāmālākaba rojūṭaśobhitām |
caturdikṣu caturvedairmatimadbhirabhiṣṭutām ||55||
dantacchaṭābhirabhitaḥ padmarāgo kṛtakṣamām |
prasannasmeravadanāṃ koṭi kaṃdarpasundaram ||56||
raktāṃbaraparīdhānāṃ raktacandanacacitām |
umābhidhānāṃ purato devīṃ haimavatīṃ śivām ||57 ||
nirvyājakaruṇāmūrti sarvakāraṇakāraṇām |
dadarśa vāsavastatra premagadgaditāntaraḥ ||58||
premāśrupūrṇa nayano romāṃcitatanustataḥ |
daṃḍavat praṇanāmātha pādayorjagadīśituḥ || 59||
tuṣṭāva vividhaiḥ stotra bhaktisannatakandharaḥ |
uvāca paramaprītaḥ kimidaṃ yakṣamityapi || 60 ||
prādurbhūtaṃ ca kasmāttadvada sarvaṃ suśobhane |
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā provāca karuṇārṇavā || 61 ||
rūpaṃ madīyaṃ brahmatatsarvakāraṇakāraṇam |
mayādhiṣṭhānabhūtaṃ tu sarvasākṣi nirāmayam || 62 ||
sarve vedā yatpadamāmananti tarpāsi sarvāṇi ca yadvadanti |
yadicchaṃto brahmacayaṃ caranti tatte padaṃ saṃgraheṇa bravīmi || 63 ||
omityekākṣaraṃ brahma tadevāhuśca hoṃmayam |
dve boje mama maṃtrau sto mukhyatvena surottama || 64 ||
bhāgadvayavatī yasmātsṛjāmi sakalaṃ jagat |
tatraikabhāgaḥ saṃproktaḥ saccidānandanāmakaḥ || 65 ||
māyā prakṛtisaṃjñastu dvitīyo bhāga īritaḥ |
sāca māyā parā śakti śaktimatyahamīśvarī ||66||
candrasya candrikeveyaṃ mayā bhitratvamāgataḥ |
sāmyāvasthātmikā caiṣā māyā mama surottama|| 67||
pralaye sarvajagato madabhinnaiva tiṣṭhati |
prāṇikarmaparīpākavaśataḥ punareva hi || 68 ||
rūpaṃ tadevamavyaktaṃ vyaktibhāvamupaiti ca |
aṃtarmukhā tu yā'vasthā sā māyetyabhidhīyate || 69 ||
bahirmukhā tu yā māyā tamaḥ śabdena socyate |
bahirmukhāttamorūpājjāyate sattvasaṃbhavaḥ ||70 ||

rajoguṇastadaiva syātsargādau surasasattama |
guṇatrayātmakāḥ proktā brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ || 71 ||
rajoguṇādhiko brahmā viṣṇuḥ sattvādhiko bhavet |
tamoguṇādhiko rudraḥ sarvakāraṇarūpadhṛk || 72||
sthūladeho bhavedbrahmā liṃgadeho hariḥ smṛtaḥ |
rudrastu kāraṇo dehasturīyā tvahameva hi || 73 ||
sāmyāvasthā tu yā proktā sarvāṃtaryāmirūpiṇī |
ata ūrdhvaṃ parabrahma madrūpaṃ rūpavarjitam ||74||
nirguṇaṃ saguṇaṃ ceti dvidhā madrapamucyate |
nirguṇaṃ māyayā hīnaṃ saguṇaṃ māyayā yutam || 75 ||
sā'haṃ sarvaṃ jagatsṛṣṭvā tadantaḥ saṃpraviśya ca |
prerayāmyaniśaṃ jīvaṃ yathākarma yathāśrutam || 76 ||
sṛṣṭisthititirodhāne prerayāmyahameva hi |
brahmāṇaṃ ca tathā viṣṇuṃ rudraṃ vai kāraṇātmakam ||77||
manuyādvāti pavano bhītyā sūryaśca gacchati |
indrāgnimṛtyavastadvatsā'haṃ sarvottamā smṛtā || 78 ||
matprasādādbhavadbhistu jayo labdho'sti sarvadā |
yuṣmānahaṃ nartayāmi kāṣṭhaputalikopamān ||79 ||
kadāciddevavijayaṃ daityānāṃ vijayaṃ kvacit |
svataṃtrā svecchayā sarvaṃ kurve karmānurodhataḥ || 80 ||
tāṃ māṃ sarvātmikāṃ yūyaṃ vismṛtya nijagarvataḥ |
ahaṃkārāvṛtātmāno mohamātā duraṃtakam ||81||
anugrahaṃ tataḥ kartuṃ yuṣmaddehādanuttamam |
niḥsṛtaṃ sahasā tejo madīyaṃ yakṣamityapi || 82 ||
ataḥ paraṃ sarvabhāvahitvā garva tu dehajam |
māmeva śaraṇaṃ yāta saccidānandarūpiṇīm ||83 ||
vyāsa uvāca
ityuktvā ca mahādevī mūlaprakṛtirīśvarī |
antardhānaṃ gatā sadyo bhaktyā devairabhiṣṭutā || 84||
tataḥ sarve svagarvaṃ tu vihāya padapaṃkajam| samyagārādhyāmāsurbhagavatyāḥ parātparam || 85 ||
trisaṃdhyaṃ sarvadā sarve gāyatrī japatatparāḥ |
yajñabhāgādibhiḥ sarve devoṃ nityaṃ siṣevire || 86 ||
evaṃ satyayuge sarve gāyatrī japatatparāḥ |
tārahṛllekhayośvāpi jape niṣṇātamānasāḥ || 87 ||
na viṣṇūpāsanā nityā vede noktā tu kutracit |
na viṣṇudīkṣā nityāsti śivasyāpi tathaiva ca ||
gāyatryupāsanā nityā sarvavedaiḥ samīritā |
yayā vinā tvadhaḥpāto brāhmaṇasyāsti sarvadhā || 89||
tāvatā kṛtakṛtyatvaṃ nānyāpekṣā dvijasya hi |
gāyatrīmātra niṣṇāto dvijo mokṣamavāpnuyāt || 90 ||
kuryādanyanna vā kuryāditi prāh manuḥ svayam |
vihāya tāṃ tu gāyatrī viṣṇūpāstiparāyaṇāḥ || 91 ||
śivopāstirato vipro narakaṃ yāti sarvathā |
tasmādādyayuge rājangāyatrī japatatparāḥ ||
devīpadāmbujaratā āsansarve dvijottamāḥ || 92 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe'ṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||

atha navamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
kadācidatha kāle tu daśapaṃca samā vibho |
prāṇināṃ karmavaśato na vavarṣa śatakratuḥ || 1 ||
anāvṛṣṭyā'tidurbhikṣamabhavatkṣayakārakam |
gṛhe gṛhe śavānāṃ tu saṃkhyā kartuṃ na śakyate ||2||
kecidaśvānvarāhānvā bhakṣayaṃti kṣudhāditāḥ |
śavāni ca manuṣyāṇāṃ bhakṣayatyapare janāḥ ||3||
bālakaṃ bālajananī striyaṃ puruṣa eva ca |
bhakṣituṃ calitāḥ sarve kṣubhayā pīḍitā narāḥ ||4||
brāhmaṇā bahavastatra vicāraṃ cakruruttamam |
tapodhano gautamo'sti sa naḥ khedaṃ hariṣyati ||5||
sarve militvā gaṃtavyaṃ gautamasthāśrame'dhunā | gāyatrī japasaṃsakta gautamasthāśrame'cunā 11911
subhikṣaṃ śrūyate tatra prāṇino bahavo gatāḥ |
evaṃ vimṛśya bhūdevāḥ sāgnihotrā: kuṭuṃbinaḥ ||7||
sagodhanāḥ sadāsāśva gautamasyāśramaṃ yayuḥ |
pūrvadeśādyayuḥ kehikṣiṇadeśataḥ ||8||
pāścātyā auttarāhāśca nānādigbhyaḥ samāyayuḥ |
dṛṣṭvā samājaṃ vitrāṇāṃ praganāma sagautamaḥ || 9 ||
āsanādyupacāraiśca pūjayāmāsa vāḍavān |
cakāra kuśalānaṃ tataścāgamakāraṇam || 10 ||
te sarve svasvavṛttāṃta kathayāmāsurutsmayāḥ |
dṛṣṭvā tānduḥkhitānviprānabhayaṃ dattavānmuniḥ ||11||
yuṣmākametatsadanaṃ bhavaddāso'smi sarvathā |
kā citā bhavatā vinā mayi dāse virājati 12 ||
dhanyo'hamasminsamaye yūya sarve tapodhanāḥ |
yeṣāṃ darśanamātreṇa duṣkṛtaṃ sukṛtāyate || 13||
te sarve pādarajā pāṃvayaṃti gṛhaṃ mama |
ko madanyo bhaveddhanyo bhavatāṃ samanugrahāt ||14||
stheyaṃ sarvaiḥ sukhenaiva saṃdhyājapaparāyaṇaiḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
iti sarvānsamāśvāsya gautamo munirāṭ tataḥ ||15||
gāyatrī prārthayāmāsa bhaktisantatakaṃdhara: |
namo devi mahāvidye vedanātaḥ parātpare || 16 ||
vyāhṛtyādimahāmaṃtrarūpe praṇavarūpiṇi |
sāmyāvasthātmike mātarnamo hrīṃkārarūpiṇi 17||
svāhāsvadhāsvarūpe tvāṃ namāmi sakalārthadām |
bhaktakalpalatāṃ devīmavasthātraya sākṣiṇīm || 18||
turyātītasvarūpāṃ ca saccidānaṃdarūpiṇīm |
sarvavedāṃtasaṃvedyāṃ sūryamaṃḍalavāsinom || 19||
prātarbālāṃ raktavarṇā madhyāhne yuvatīṃ parām |
sāyāhne kṛṣṇavarṇātāṃ vṛddhāṃ nityaṃ namāmyaham 20||
sarvabhūtāraṇe devi kṣamasva parameśvari |
iti stutā jaganmātā pratyakṣaṃ darśanaṃ dadau || 21 ||
pūrṇapātraṃ dadau tasmai yena syātsarvapoṣaṇam |
uvāca munimaṃbā sāyaṃ yaṃ kāmaṃ tvamicchasi 22 ||

tasya pūrtikaraṃ pātraṃ mayā dattaṃ bhaviṣyati |
ityuktvāṃtardadhe devī gāyatrī paramā kalā ||23||
annānāṃ rāśayastasmānnirgatāḥ parvatopamāḥ |
ṣaḍrasā vividhā rājaṃstṛṇāni vividhāni ca || 24||
bhūṣaṇāni ca divyāni kṣaumāṇi vasanāni ca |
yajñānāṃ ca samāraṃbhāḥ pātrāṇi vividhāni ca 25 ||
yadyadiṣṭamabhūdrājanmunestasya mahātmanaḥ |
tatsarvaṃ nirgataṃ tasmādgāyatrīpūrṇapātrataḥ ||26||
athāhūya munīnsarvānmunirāṅgautamastadā |
dhanavānyabhūṣaṇāni vasanāni dadau mudā ||27||
gomahiṣyādipaśavo nirgatāḥ pūrṇapātrataḥ |
nirgatānyajñasaṃbhārānsruksruva prabhṛtīndadau ||28||
te sarve militā yajñāṃścakrire munivākyataḥ |
sthānaṃ tadeva bhūyiṣṭhamabhavatsvargasannibham || 29||
yatkicittriṣu lokeṣu suṃdaraṃ vastu dṛśyate |
tatsarvaṃ tatra niṣpannaṃ gāyatrīdattapātrataḥ ||30||
devāṃganāsamā dārāḥ śobhaṃte bhūṣaṇādibhiḥ |
munayo devasadṛśā vastra caṃdanabhūṣaṇaiḥ ||31||
nityotsavaḥ pravavate munerāśramamaṃḍale |
na rogādibhayaṃ kicinna ca dainyabhayaṃ kvacit 32 ||
sa munerāśramo jātaḥ samantācchatayojanaḥ |
anye ca prāṇino ye'pi te'pi tatra samāgatāḥ 33 ||
tāṃśca sarvānpupoṣāyaṃ dattvā'bhayamathātmavān |
nānāvidhairmahāyajñaividhivatkalpitaiḥ surāḥ || 34 ||
santoṣaṃ paramaṃ prāpurmuneścaiva jaguryaśaḥ |
sabhāyāṃ vṛtrahā bhūyo jagau ślokaṃ mahāyaśāḥ 35 ||
aho ayaṃ naḥ kila kalpapādapo manorathānpūrayati pratiṣṭhitaḥ |
nocedakāṇḍe kva havirvapā vā sudurlabhā yatra tu jīvanāśā || 36 ||
itthaṃ dvādaśa varṣāṇi pupoṣa munipuṃgavān |
putravanmunirāṅgarvagaṃdhena parivarjitaḥ || 37 ||
gāyatryāḥ paramaṃ sthānaṃ cakāra munisattamaḥ |
yatra sarvairmunivaraiḥ pūjyate jagadambikā || 38 ||
trikālaṃ parayā bhaktyā puraścaraṇakarmabhiḥ |
adyāpi yatra devī sā pratarbālā tu dṛśyate || 39 ||
madhyāhne yuvatī vṛddhā sāyaṃkāle tu dṛśyate |
tatraikadā samāyāto nārado munisattamaḥ || 40 ||
raṇayanmahatīṃ gāyangāyatryāḥ paramānguṇān |
niṣasāda sabhāmadhye munīnāṃ bhāvitātmanām 41 ||
gotamādibhiratyuccaiḥ pūjitaḥ śāṃtamānasaḥ |
kathāśvakāra vividhā yaśaso gautamasya ca || 42 ||
brahmarṣe devasadasi devarāṭ tava yadyaśaḥ |
jagau bahuvidhaṃ svacchaṃ munipoṣaṇajaṃ param ||43||
śrutvā śacīpatervāṇīṃ tvāṃ draṣṭumahamāgataḥ |
dhanyo'si tvaṃ muniśreṣṭha jagadambāprasādataḥ || 44||
ityuktvā munivayaṃ taṃ gāyatrīsadanaṃ yayau |
dadarśa jagadambāṃ tāṃ premotphullavilocanaḥ ||45||
tuṣṭāva vidhivaddevīṃ jagāma tridivaṃ punaḥ |
atha tatra sthitā ye te brāhmaṇā munipoṣitāḥ ||46||
utkarṣa tu muneḥ śrutvā'sūyayā khedamāgatāḥ |
yathā'sya na yaśo bhūyātkartavyaṃ sarvathaiva hi ||47 ||
kāle samāgate paścāditi sarvaistu niścitam |
tataḥ kālena kiyatā'pyabhūvṛṣṭirdharātale || 48||
subhikṣamabhavatsarvadeśeṣu nṛpasattama |
śrutvā vārtāṃ subhikṣasya militāḥ sarvavāḍavāḥ 49 ||

gautamaṃ śaptamudyogaṃ hā hā rājanpracakrire |
dhanyau teṣāṃ ca pitarau yayorutpattirīdṛśī || 50 ||
kālasya mahimā rājanvaktuṃ kena hi śakyate |
gornirmitā māyayaikā mumūrṣurjaratī nṛpa || 51 ||
jagāma sā ca śālāyāṃ homakāle munestadā |
huhuṃśabdairvāritā sā prāṇāṃstatyāja tatkṣaṇe ||52||
gorhatā'nena duṣṭenetyevaṃ te cakraśudvijāḥ |
homaṃ samāpya munirāj vismayaṃ paramaṃ gataḥ || 53 ||
samādhimīlitākṣaḥ saṃścitayāmāsa kāraṇam |
kṛtaṃ sarvaṃ dvijairetaditi jñātvā tadaiva saḥ || 54||
dadhāra kopaṃ paramaṃ pralaye rudrakopavat |
śaśāpa ca ṛṣīnsarvānkopasaṃraktalocanaḥ || 55 ||
vedamātari gāyatryāṃ taddhyāne tanmanorjape |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ ||56 ||
vede vedoktayajñeṣu tadvārtāsu tathaiva ca |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 57 ||
śive śivasya maṃtre ca śivaśāstre tathaiva ca |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 58 ||
mūlaprakṛtyāḥ śrīdevyāstaddhayāne tatkathāsu ca |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 59 ||
devīmaṃtre tathā devyāḥ sthāne'nuṣṭhānakarmaṇi |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 60 ||
devyu tsava didṛkṣāyāṃ devīnāmānukīrtane |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 61 ||
devībhaktasya sānnidhye devībhaktārcane tathā |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 62 ||
śivotsavadidṛkṣāyāṃ śivabhaktasya pūjane |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇāśramāḥ || 63 ||
rudrākṣe bilvapatre ca tathā śuddhe ca bhasmani |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 64 ||
śrautasmārta sadācāre jñānamārge tathaiva ca |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇāghamāḥ || 65 ||
advaitajñānaniṣṭhāyāṃ śāṃtidāntyādisādhane |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ ||66 ||
nityakarmādyanuṣṭhāne'pyagnihotrādisādhane |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ ||67||
svādhyāyādhyayane caiva tathā pravacane'pi ca |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 68 ||
godānādiṣu dāneṣu pitṛśrāddheṣu caiva hi |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ ||69 ||
kṛcchracāṃdrāyaṇe caiva prāyaścittaṃ tathaiva ca |
bhavatānunmukhā yūyaṃ sarvadā brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 70 ||
śrīdevī bhinnadeveṣu śraddhābhaktisamanvitāḥ |
śaṃkhacakrādyaṃ kitāśca bhavata brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 71 ||
kāpālika tāsaktā bauddhaśāstraratāḥ sadā |
pākhaṃḍācāraniratā bhavata brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 72 ||
pitṛmātṛsutabhrātṛkanyāvikrayiṇastathā |
bhāryāvikrayiṇastadvadbhavata brāhmaṇāghamāḥ || 73 ||
vedavikrayiṇastadvattīrthavikrayiṇastathā |
dharmavikrayiṇastadvadbhavata brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 74||
pāṃcarātre kāmaśāstre tathā kāpālike mate |
bauddhe śraddhāyutā yūyaṃ bhavata brāhmaṇāghamāḥ || 75 ||
mātṛkanyāgāminaśca bhaginīgāminastathā |
parastrīlaṃpaṭāḥ sarve bhavata brāhmaṇādhamāḥ || 76 ||
yuṣmākaṃ vaṃśajātāśca striyaśca puruṣāstathā |
maddattaśāpadagdhāste bhaviṣyaṃti bhavatsamāḥ || 77||

kiṃ mayā bahunoktena mūlaprakṛtirīśvarī |
gāyatrī paramā bhūyādyuṣmāsu khalu ko pitā || 78 ||
aṃdhakūpādikuṇḍeṣu yuṣmākaṃ syātsadā sthitiḥ |
vyāsa uvāca
vāgdaṃḍamīdṛśaṃ kṛtvā'pyupaspṛśya jalaṃ tataḥ || 79 ||
jagāma darśanārthaṃ ca gāyatryāḥ paramotsukaḥ |
praṇanāma mahādevīṃ sā'pi devī parātparā || 80 ||
brāhmaṇānāṃ kṛti dṛṣṭvā smayaṃ citte cakāra ha |
adyāpi tasyā vadanaṃ smayayuktaṃ ca dṛśyate || 81 ||
uvāca munivaryaṃ taṃ smayamānamukhāṃbujā |
bhujaṃgāyārpitaṃ dugdhaṃ viṣāyaivopajāyate || 82 ||
śāṃtiṃ kuru mahābhāga karmaṇo gatirodṛśī |
iti devīṃ praṇamyātha tato'gātsvāśramaṃ prati 83 ||
tato vipraḥ śāpadagdhaivismṛtā vedarāśayaḥ |
gāyatrī vismṛtā sarvestadadbhutamivābhavat || 84 ||
te sarve'tha militvā tu paścāttāpa putāstathā |
praṇermunivaryaṃ taṃ daṃḍavatpatitā bhuvi || 85 ||
nocuḥ kiṃcana vākyaṃ tu lajjayā dhomukhāḥ sthitāḥ |
prasīdeti prasīdeti prasīdeti punaḥ punaḥ || 86 ||
prārthayāmāsurabhitaḥ parivārya munīśvaram |
karuṇāpūrṇahṛdayo munistānsamuvāca ha || 87 ||
kṛṣṇāvatāraparyaṃta kuṃbhīpāke bhavetsthitiḥ |
na me vākyaṃ mṛṣā bhūyādidhi jānītha sarvathā 88 ||
tataḥ paraṃ kaliyuge bhuvi janma bhaveddhi vām |
maduktaṃ sarvametattu bhavedeva na cānyathā || 89 ||
macchāpasya vimokṣārthaṃ yuṣmākaṃ syādyadoṣaṇā |
tarhi sevyaṃ sadā sarvergāyatrīpadapaṃkajam ||90||
vyāsa uvāca
iti sarvānvisṛjyātha gautamo munisattamaḥ |
prārabdhamiti matvā tu citte śāṃti jagāma ha 91 ||
etasmātkāraṇādrājangate kṛṣṇe tu dhīmati |
kalau yuge pravṛtte tu kuṃbhīpākāttu nirgatāḥ || 92 || |
bhuvi jātā brāhmaṇāśca śapadagdhāḥ purā tu ye |
saṃdhyātrayavihīnāśca gāyatrī bhaktivacitāḥ || 93 ||
vedabhaktivihīnāśca pākhaṃḍamatagāminaḥ |
agnihotrādisatkarmasvadhāsvāhāvivarjitāḥ || 94 ||
mūlaprakṛtimavyaktāṃ naiva jānati karhicit |
taptamudrāṃkitāḥ kecitkāmācāraratāḥ pare ||95||
kāpālikā: kaulikāśca bauddhā jaināstathāpare |
paḍitā api te sarve durācārapravartakāḥ || 96||
laṃpaṭāḥ paradāreṣu durācāraparāyaṇāḥ |
kuṃbhīpākaṃ punaḥ sarve yāsyati nijakarmabhiḥ || 97||
tasmātsarvātmanā rājansaṃsevyā parameśvarī |
na viṣṇūpāsanā nityā na śivopāsanā tathā 98 ||
nityā copāsanā śakteryāṃ vinā tu patatyadhaḥ |
sarvamuktaṃ samāsena yatpṛṣṭaṃ tattvayā'nagha || 99 ||
ataḥ paraṃ maṇidvīpavarṇanaṃ śṛṇu sundaram |
yatparaṃ sthānamādyāyā bhuvaneśyā bhavāraṇeḥ 100 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe'ṣṭādaśasāhakhyāṃ saṃhitāyāṃ dvādaśaskandhe navamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9||

atha daśamo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
brahmalokādūrdhvabhāge sarba loko'sti yaḥ śrutaḥ |
maṇidvīpaḥ sa evāsti yatra devī virājate ||1||
sarvasmādadhiko yasmātsarvalokastataḥ smṛtaḥ |
purā parāmbayaivāyaṃ kalpito mānasecchayā ||2||
sarvādoṃ nijavāsārthaṃ prakṛtyā mūlabhūtayā |
kailāsādadhiko loko vaikuṇṭhādapi cottamaḥ ||3||
golokādapi sarvasmātsarvaloko'dhikaḥ smṛtaḥ |
naitatsamaṃ trilokyāṃ tu sundaraṃ vidyate kvacit ||4||
chatrībhūtaṃ trijagato bhavasaṃtāpanāśakam |
chāyābhūtaṃ tadevāsti brahmāṃḍānāṃ tu sattamaḥ ||5||
bahuyojanavistīrṇo gaṃbhīrastāvadeva hi |
maṇidvīpasya parito vartate tu sudhodadhiḥ || 6 ||
marutsaṃghaṭṭanotkīrṇata raṃgaśatasaṃkula: |
ratnācchavālukā5kto jhapaśaṃkhasamākulaḥ ||7||
vīsiṃgharṣasaṃjātalaharīkaṇaśītalaḥ |
nānādhvaja samāyuktanānāpotagatāgataiḥ ||8||
virājamānaḥ paritastīraratnadrumo mahān |
taduttaramayodhātunirmito gagane tataḥ ||1||
saptayojanavistīrṇaḥ prākāro vartate mahān |
nānāśastrapraharaṇā nānāyuddhaviśāradāḥ || 10 ||
rakṣakā nivasaṃtyatra modamānāḥ samaṃtataḥ |
caturdvārasamāyukto dvārapālaśatānvitaḥ || 11||
nānāgaṇaiḥ parivṛto devībhaktiyutairnṛpa |
darśanārthaṃ samāyāṃti ye devā jagadośituḥ ||12||
teṣāṃ gaṇā vasaṃtyatra vāhanāni ca tatra hi | vimānaśatasaṃgharṣaghaṃṭāsvanasamākula: 112311
haya he pākhurāghātabadhirīkṛtadiṅmukhaḥ |
gaṇaiḥ kilakilārāvairvetrahastaiśva tāḍitāḥ ||14||
sevakā devasaṃghānāṃ bhrājante tatra bhūmipa |
tasminkolāhale rājana śabda: kenacitkvacit ||
kasyacicchrayate'tyaṃtaṃ nānādhvani samākule |
pade pade miṣṭavāriparipūrṇasarāṃsi ca || 16 ||
vāṭikā vividhā rājan ratnadramavirājitāḥ |
taduttaraṃ mahāsāradhātunirmitamaṃḍalaḥ || 17 ||
śālo'paro mahānasti gaganasparśi yacchiraḥ |
tejasā syācchataguṇaḥ pūrvaśālādayaṃ paraḥ || 18 ||
gopuradvārasahito bahuvṛkṣasamanvitaḥ |
yā vṛkṣajātayaḥ saṃti sarvāstāstatra saṃti ca || 19 ||

niraṃtaraṃ puṣpayutāḥ sadāphalasamanvitāḥ |
navapallavasaṃyuktāḥ parasaurabha saṃkulāḥ ||20||
panasā vakulā lodhrā kaṇikārāśca śiśapāḥ |
devadārukāṃcanārā āmrāścaiva sumeravaḥ ||21||
likucā hiṃgulāścailā lavaṃgā : kaṭphalāstathā |
pāṭalā mucukuṃdāśca phalinyo jaghanephalāḥ ||22||
tālāstamālā: sālāca kaṃkolā nāgabhadrakāḥ |
punnāgāḥ pīlavaḥ sātvakā vai karpūraśākhinaḥ || 23 ||
aśvakarṇā hastikarṇāstālaparṇāśca dāḍimāḥ |
gaṇikā baṃdhujīvāśva jaṃbīrāśca kuraṃḍakāḥ ||24||
cāṃpeyā baṃdhujīvāśca tathā vai kanakadrumāḥ |
sālāgurudumāścaiva tathā caṃdanapādapāḥ ||25||
kharjūrā yūthikāstālaparṇyaścaiva tathekṣavaḥ |
śrīravṛkṣāśca khadirāścicā bhallātakāstathā ||26||

rucakāḥ kuṭajā vṛkṣā bilvavṛkṣāstathaiva ca |
tulasīnāṃ vanānyevaṃ mallikānāṃ tathaiva ca ||27||
ityāditarujātīnāṃ vanānyupavanāni ca |
nānāvāpīśatairyuktānyevaṃ saṃti dharādhipa ||28||
kokilārāvasaṃyuktā guṃjadbhramarabhūṣitāḥ |
niryāsasrāviṇaḥ sarve snigdhacchāyāstarūttamāḥ ||
nānāṛtubhavā vṛkṣā nānāpacisamākulāḥ |
nānārasasrāviṇībhirnadībhiratiśobhitāḥ ||30||
pārāvataśukavrātasārikāpakṣamārutaiḥ |
haṃsapakṣasamudbhūtavātatrātaiścaladrumam ||31||
sugaṃdhagrāhipavanapūritaṃ tadvanottamam |
sahitaṃ hariṇīyūrthadhavamānairitastataḥ || 32 ||
nṛtyadvahikadaṃbasya ke kārāva : sukhapradaiḥ |
nāditaṃ tadvanaṃ divyaṃ madhusrāvi samaṃtataḥ || 33 ||
kāṃsyaśālāduttare tu tāmraśālaḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
caturasrasamākāra unnatyā saptayojanaḥ || 34 ||
dvayostu śālayeormadhye saṃproktā kalpavāṭikā |
yeṣāṃ tarūṇāṃ puṣpāṇi kāṃcanābhāni bhūmipa ||35||
patrāṇi kāṃcanābhāni raktabījaphalāni ca |
daśayojanagaṃdho hi prasarpati samantataḥ ||36||
tadvanaṃ rakṣitaṃ rājanvatenartunā'niśam |
puṣpasiṃhāsanāsīnaḥ puṣpacchatravirājitaḥ ||37||
puṇrabhūṣābhūṣitaśca puṣpāsavavighūrṇitaḥ |
madhuśrīmadhivaśrīśva dve bhārye tasya saṃmate || 38 ||
krīḍataḥ smeravadane sumastabakakaṃdukaiḥ |
atīva ramyaṃ vipinaṃ madhusrāvi santataḥ || 39 ||
daśayojanaparyaṃta kusumāmodavāyunā |
pūritaṃ divyagaṃdharvaiḥ sāṃganairgānalolupaiḥ || 40 ||
śobhitaṃ tadvanaṃ divyaṃ matta kokilanāditam |
vasantalakṣmī saṃyuktaṃ kāmikāmapravardhanam ||41||
tāmraśālāduttaratra sīsaśālaḥ prakīrtitaḥ |
samucchrāyaḥ smṛto'pyasya saptayojanasaṃkhyayā || 42||
saṃtānavāṭikāmadhye śālayostu dvayornṛpa |
daśayojanagaṃdhastu prasūnānāṃ samaṃtataḥ || 43 ||
hiraṇyābhāni kusumānyutphullāni niraṃtaram |
amṛtadravasaṃyuktaphalāni madhurāṇi ca || 44 ||
grīṣmarturnāyakastasyā vāṭikāyā nṛpottama |
śukraśrīśca śuciśrīśca dve bhārye tasya mate ||45||
saṃtāpatrastalokāstu vṛkṣamūleṣu saṃsthitāḥ |
nānāsiddheḥ parivṛtā nānādevaiḥ samanvitāḥ || 46 ||
vilāsinīnāṃ vṛndaistu caṃdanadravapaṃkilaiḥ |
puṣpamālābhūṣitaistu tālavṛntakarāṃbujaiḥ ||47||
trākāraḥ śobhito rājañchītalā bunipevibhiḥ |
sīsaśālāduttaratrāpyārakūṭamayaḥ śubhaḥ || 48 ||
prākāro vartate rājanmuniyojanadairghyavān |
haricaṃdanavṛkṣāṇāṃ vāṭīmadhye tayoḥ smṛtaḥ || 49 ||
śālayoradhināthastu varṣatu meghavāhanaḥ |
vidyutpiṃgalanetraśca jīmūtakavacaḥ smṛtaḥ || 50 ||
vajranirghoṣamukharaścaṃdradhanvā samaṃtataḥ |
sahasraśo vāridhārā muṃcannāste gaṇāvṛtaḥ || 51 ||
nabhaḥ śrīśca nabhasyaśrīḥ svarasvārasyamālinī |
aṃbā dulā niratniścābhramaṃtī meghayatikā || 52||
varṣayaṃtī cibunikā vāridhārā ca saṃmatāḥ |
varṣartordvādaśa proktāḥ śaktayo madavilāḥ || 53 ||
navapallavavṛkṣāśca navīnalatikānvitāḥ |
haritāni tṛṇānyeva veṣṭitā yairdha rākhilā || 54 ||

nadīnadapravāhāśca pravahaṃti ca vegataḥ |
sarāṃsi kaluṣāṃbūni rāgicittasamāni ca || 55 ||
vasaṃti devā siddhāśca ye devī karmakāriṇaḥ |
vāpīkūpataḍāgāśca ye devyarthaṃ samarpitāḥ || 56 ||
te gaṇā nivasaṃtyatra savilāsāśca sāṃganāḥ |
ārakūṭamayādagre saptayojana dairghyavān || 57||
paṃcalohātmakaḥ śālo madhye maṃdāravāṭikā |
nānāpuṣpalatākīrṇā nānāpallavaśobhitā || 58 ||
adhiṣṭhātā'tra saṃproktaḥ śaradṛturanāmayaḥ |
iṣulakṣmīrūrjalakṣmī bhārye tasya saṃmate ||59||
nānāsiddhā vasaṃtyatra sāṃganāḥ saparicchadāḥ |
pañca lohamayādagre saptayojana dairghyavān ||60||
dīpyamāno mahāśṛṃgairvartate raupyaśālakaḥ |
pārijātāṭavo madhye prasūnastabakānvitā || 61 ||
daśayojanagaṃdhīni kusumāni samaṃtataḥ |
modayati gaṇānsarvān ye devīkarmakāriṇaḥ ||62||
tatrādhināthaḥ saṃprokto hemantarturmahojjvalaḥ |
sagaṇaḥ sāyudhaḥ sarvān rāgiṇo raṃjayannṛpaḥ || 63 ||
sahaśrīśca sahasyaśrī bhāyeṃ tasya saṃmate |
vasaṃti tatra siddhāśca ye devavratakāriṇaḥ ||64||
raupyaśālamayādagre saptayojanadairghyavān |
sauvarṇaśāla : saṃproktastaptahāṭakakalpitaḥ || 65 ||
madhye kadambavāṭī tu puṣpapallavaśobhitā |
kadambamadirādhārāḥ pravartante sahasraśaḥ || 66 ||
yābhinipītapītābhinijānaṃdo'nubhūyate |
tatrādhināthaḥ saṃproktaḥ śaiśirarturmahodayaḥ || 67||
tapaḥ śrīśca tapasyaśrī bhāyeṃ tasya saṃmate |
modamānaḥ sahaitābhyāṃ vartate śiśirākṛtiḥ || 68 ||
nānāvilāsa saṃyukto nānāgaṇasamāvṛtaḥ |
nivasati mahāsiddhā ye devīdānakāriṇaḥ ||69 ||
nānābhogasamutpannamahānandasamanvitāḥ |
sāṃganā parivāraistu saṃghaśaḥ parivāritāḥ || 70 ||
svarṇaśālamayādagre muniyojana dairghyavān |
puṣparāgamayaḥ śāla : kuṃkumāruṇavigrahaḥ || 71 ||
puṣparāgamayī bhūmirvanānyupavanāni ca |
- ratnavṛkṣālavālāśca puṣparāgamayāḥ smṛtāḥ ||72||
prākāro yasya ratnasya tadratnaracitā drumāḥ |
vanabhūḥ pakṣiṇaścaiva ratnavarṇajalāni ca || 73 ||
maṃḍapā maṃḍapastaṃbhāḥ sarāṃsi kamalāni ca |
prākāre tatra yadyatsyāttatsarvaṃ tatsamaṃ bhavet ||74 |
paribhāṣeyamuddiṣṭā ratnaśālādiṣu prabho |
tejasā syāllakṣaguṇaḥ pūrvaśālānparo nṛpa ||75||
dikpālā nivasaṃtyatra pratibrahmāṃḍavartinām |
dikpālānāṃ samaṣṭyātmarūpāḥ sphūrjadvarāyudhāḥ 76 || .
pūrvāśāyāṃ samuttuṃgaśṛṃgā pūramarāvatī |
nānopavanasaṃyuktā maheṃdrastatra rājate || 77 ||
svargaśobhā ca yā svarge yāvatī svāttato'dhikā |
samaṣṭiśatanetrasya sahasraguṇataḥ smṛtā || 78 ||
airāvatasamārūḍho vajrahastaḥ pratāpavān |
devasenāparivṛto rājate'tra śatakratuḥ ||79||
devāṃganāgaṇayutā śacī tatra virājate |
vahniko vahnipurī vahnipūḥ sadṛśī nṛpa || 80 ||
svāhāsvadhāsamāyukto vahnistatra virājate |
nijavāhanabhūṣāḍhayo nijadevagaṇairvṛtaḥ || 81 ||
yāmyāśāyāṃ yamapurī tatra daṃḍadharo mahān |
svabhaṭairveṣṭito rājan citragupta purogamaiḥ || 82 ||

nijaśaktiyuto bhāsvattanayo'sti yamo mahān |
nairṛtyāṃ diśi rākṣasyāṃ rākṣasaiḥ parivāritaḥ 83 ||1
khaḍgadhārī sphurannāste nirṛtinijaśaktiyuk |
vāruṇyāṃ varuṇo rājā pāśadhārī pratāpavān !! 84 ||
mahājharasamārūḍho vāruṇī madhuvihvalaḥ |
nijaśaktisamāyukto nijayādogaṇānvitaḥ || 85 ||
samāste vāruṇe loke varuṇānīratākulaḥ |
vāyukoṇe vāyuloko vāyustatrādhitiṣṭhati || 86 ||
vāyu sādhanasaṃsiddhayogibhiḥ parivāritaḥ |
dhvajahasto viśālākṣo mṛgavāhanasaṃsthitaḥ || 87 ||
marudgaṇaiḥ parivṛto nijaśaktisamanvitaḥ |
uttarasyāṃ diśi mahānyakṣaloko'sti bhūmipa 88||
yakṣādhirājastatrāste vṛddhi ṛddhayādiśaktibhiḥ |
navabhirnidhibhiryuktastuṃ dilo dhananāyakaḥ || 89 ||
maṇibhadraḥ pūrṇabhadro |
maṇimānmaṇikaṃdharaḥ |
maṇibhūṣo maṇisragvī maṇikārmukadhārakaḥ || 90 ||
ityādiyakṣasenānīsahito nijaśaktiyuk |
īśānakoṇe saṃprokto rudraloko mahattaraḥ || 91 ||
anarghyaṃ ratnakhacito yatra rudro'dhidaivatam |
manyumāndī tanayano baddhapṛṣṭha maheṣudhiḥ ||12||
sphūrjaddhanurvāmahasto'dhijyadhanvabhirāvṛtaḥ |
svasamānairasaṃkhyātarudraiḥ śūlavarāyudhaiḥ ||93||
vikṛtāsyaiḥ karālasyairvamadṛhnibhirāsyataḥ |
daśahastaiḥ śatakaraiḥ sahasrabhujasaṃyutaiḥ ||94||
daśapādairdaśagrīvaistrinetra rugramūrtibhiḥ |
aṃtarikṣacarā ye ca ye ca bhūmicarāḥ smṛtāḥ || 95 ||
rudrādhyāye smṛtā rudrāstaiḥ sarveśva samāvṛtaḥ |
rudrāṇīkoṭisahito bhadrakālyādimātṛbhiḥ || 96 ||
nānāśaktisamāviṣṭaḍā maryādigaṇāvṛtaḥ |
vīrabhadrādisahito rudro rājanvirājate || 97 ||
muṇḍamālādharo nāgadalayo nāgakaṃdharaḥ |
vyāghra maṃparīdhāno gajacarmottarīyakaḥ ||98||
citābhasmāṃgaliptāṃgaḥ pramathādigaṇāvṛtaḥ |
ninadaḍumarudhvā nairbaṃ ghirīkṛta diṅmukhaḥ || 99 ||
aṭṭahāsāsphoṭaśabdaiḥ saṃtrāstinabhastalaḥ |
bhūtasaṃghasamāviṣṭo bhūtāvāso maheśvaraḥ || 100 ||
īśānadikpatiḥ so'yaṃ nāmnā ceśāna eva ca || 101 ||
iti śrīdevībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe daśamo'dhyāyaḥ || 10 ||
atha ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
puṣparāgamayādagre kuṃkumāruṇavigrahaḥ |
padmarāgamayaḥ śālo madhye bhūścaiva tādṛśī ||1||
daśayojanavāndaighye gopuradvārasaṃyutaḥ |
tanmaṇistaṃbha saṃyuktā maṇḍapāḥ śataśo nṛpa ||2||
madhyaṃ bhuvi samāsīnāścatuḥ ṣaṣṭimitāḥ kalāḥ |
nānāyudhavarā vīrā ratnabhūṣaṇabhūṣitāḥ || 3 ||
pratyeka lokastāsāṃ tu tattallokasya nāyakāḥ |
samantātpadmarāgasya parivārya sthitāḥ sadā ||4||
svasvalokajanairjuṣṭāḥ svasvavāhana hetibhiḥ |
tāsāṃ nāmāni vakṣyāmi śṛṇu tvaṃ janamejaya || 5 ||

piṃgalākṣī viśālākṣī samṛddhirbuddhireva ca |
śraddhā svāhā svadhābhikhyā māyā saṃjñā vasundharā ||
trilokadhātrī sāvitrī gāyatrī tridaśeśvarī |
sukhyā bahurūpā ca skaṃdamātā'cyutapriyā || 7 ||
bimalā cāmalā tadvadaruṇī tunarāruṇī |
prakṛtivikṛtiḥ sṛṣṭiḥ sthitiḥ saṃhṛtireva ca || 8|| |
saṃdhyā mātā satī haṃsī mardikā vajrikā parā |
devamātā bhagavatī devakī kamalāsanā || 9 |
trimukhī saptamukhyanyā surāsuravimardanī |
laṃboṣṭī cordhvakeśī ca vahuśīrpā vṛkodarī || 10 ||
ratharekhāhvayā paścācchaśirekhā tathā parā |
gaganavegā pavanavegā vegā caiva tataḥ param ||11||
agre bhuvanapālā syāttatpaścānmadanāturā |
anaṃgānaṃgamathanā tathaivānaṃ gamekhalā || 12||
anaṃgakusunā paśvādviśvarūpā surādikā |
kṣayaṃkarī bhavecchaktirakṣomyā ca tataḥ param || 13 ||
satyavādinyatha proktā bahurūpā śucivratā |
udārākhyā ca vāgīśā catuḥṣaṣṭimitāḥ kṛtāḥ ||14||
jvalajjināḥ sarvā vatyo vahnimulbaṇam |
jalaṃ pivāmaḥ sakalaṃ saṃharāmo vibhāvasum || 15 ||
pavanaṃ staṃbhayāmo'dya bhakṣayāmo'khila jagat |
iti vācaṃ saṃgiraṃte krodhasaṃraktalocanāḥ || 16||
cāpabāṇadharāḥ sarvā yuddhāyaivotsukāḥ sadā |
daṃṣṭrākaṭakaṭāra vairbadhirīkṛta diṅmukhāḥ || 17||
piṃgordhvakeśyaḥ saṃproktāścāpabāṇakarāḥ sadā |
śatākṣauhiṇikā senāpyekaikasyāḥ prakīrtitā ||18||
ekaikaśakteḥ sāmarthyaṃ lakṣa brahmāṃḍanāśane |
śatākṣauhiṇīkā senā tādṛśī nṛpasattama || 19 ||
kiṃ na kuryājjagatyasminnaśakyaṃ vaktumeva tat |
sarvāpi yuddhasāmagrī tasminśāle sthitā mune || 20 ||
rathānāṃ gaṇanā nāsti hayānāṃ kariṇāṃ tathā |
śastrāṇāṃ gaṇanā tadvadguṇānāṃ gaṇanā tathā || 21 ||
padmarāgamayādagre gomedamaṇinirmitaḥ |
daśayojanaderyeṇa prākāro vartate mahān || 22||
bhāsvajjapāprasūnābho madhyabhūtasya tādṛśī |
gomeda kalpitānyeva tadvāsisadanā ca sā ||23||
pakṣiṇaḥ staṃbhavaryāśva vṛkṣā vāpyaḥ sarāṃsi ca |
gomaidakalpitā eva kuṃkumāruṇavigrahāḥ || 24 ||
tanmadhyasthā mahādevyo dvātriṃśacchaktayaḥ smṛtāḥ |
nānāśastrapraharaṇā gomedamaṇibhūṣitāḥ || 25||
pratyeka lokavāsinyaḥ parivārya samaṃtataḥ |
gomedaśāle sannaddhāḥ piśācavadanā nṛpa ||26||
svarlokavāsibhirnityaṃ pūjitāścakrabāhavaḥ |
krodharaktekṣaṇā bhidhi paca chidhi daheti ca || 27 ||
vadanti satataṃ vācaṃ yuddhotsukahṛdantarāḥ |
ekaikasyā mahāśakterdaśākṣauhiṇikā matā || 28||
senā tatrāpyekaśaktirlakṣabrahmāṃḍanāśinī |
tādṛśīnāṃ mahāsenā varṇanīyā kathaṃ nṛpa || 29 ||
rathānāṃ naiva gaṇanā vāhanānāṃ tathaiva ca |
sarvayuddhasamāraṃbhastatra devyā virājate ||30||
tāsāṃ nāmāni vakṣyāmi pāpanāśakarāṇi ca |
vidyāhīpuṣṭayaḥ prajñā sinīvālī kuhūstathā ||31||
rudrā vīryā prabhā naṃdā poṣiṇī ṛddhidā śubhā |
kālarātrirmahārātrirbhadrakālī karpādinī ||32||
vikṛtirdaḍimuṃḍinyo sendukhaṃḍā śikhaṃḍinī |
niśumbhaśumbhamathinī mahiṣāsuramardinī ||33||

indrāṇī caiva rudrāṇī śaṃkarārdhaśarīriṇī |
nārī nārāyaṇī caiva triśūlinyapi pālinī ||34||
aṃbikā hrādinī paścādityevaṃ śaktayaḥ smṛtāḥ |
yadyetāḥ kupitā devyastadā brahmāṇḍanāśanam ||35||
parājayo na caitāsāṃ kadācitkvacidasti hi |
gomedakamayādagre samaṇinirmitaḥ ||36||
daśayojanatuṃ go'sau gopuradvārasaṃyutaḥ |
kapāṭaśṛṃkhalābaddho navavṛkṣasamujjvalaḥ || 37||
śālastanmadhyabhūmyādi sarvaṃ hīramayaṃ smṛtam |
gṛhāṇi vīthayo rathyā mahāmārgāṃgaṇāni ca || 38 ||
vṛkṣālavālataravaḥ sāraṃgā api tādṛśāḥ |
dīrghikāśreṇayo vāpyastaḍāgāḥ kūpasaṃyutāḥ ||39||
tatra śrībhuvaneśvaryā vasanti paricārikāḥ |
ekaikā lakṣadāsībhiḥ sevitā madagarvitāḥ || 40 ||
tālavṛṃtagharā : kāściccaṣa kāḍhya karāṃbujāḥ |
kāścittāmbūlapātrāṇi dhārayaṃtyo'tigarvitāḥ || 41 ||
kaścittacchavadhāriṇyaśvāmarāṇāṃ vidhārikāḥ |
nānāvastradharāḥ kāścitkācitpuṣpakarāṃbujāḥ ||42||
nānādarśakarāḥ kāścitkaścitkuṃkumalepanam |
dhārayatyaḥ kajjalaṃ ca siṃdūracaṣakaṃ parāḥ ||43||
kāściccitraka nirmātryaḥ pādasaṃvāhane ratāḥ |
kāścittu bhūṣākāriṇyo nānābhūṣādharāḥ parāḥ || 44 ||
puṣpabhūṣaṇanirmātryaḥ puṣpaśṛṅgārakārikāḥ |
nānāvilāsacaturāhvaya evaṃvidhāḥ parā ||45 ||
nibaddhaparidhānīyā yuvatyaḥ sakalā api |
devī kṛpāleśavaśāttucchīkṛtajagattrayāḥ || 46 ||
etā dūtyaḥ smṛtā devyaḥ śṛṃgāramadagarvitāḥ |
tāsāṃ nāmāni vakṣyāmi śṛṇu me nṛpasattama ||47 |
anaṃgarūpā prathamāpyanaṃgamadanā parā |
tṛtīyā tu tataḥ proktā suṃdarī madanāturā ||48||
tato bhuvanavegā syāttathā bhuvanapālikā | syātsarvaśiśirānaṃ gavedanā'naṃgamekhalā 118911
vidyuddāmasamānāṃgya: kvaṇatkāṃcīguṇānvitāḥ |
raṇanmaṃjīracaraṇā bahiraṃtaritāstataḥ || 50 ||
dhāvamānāstu śobhate sarvā vidyullatopamāḥ |
kuśalāḥ sarvakāryeṣu vetrahastāḥ samaṃtataḥ || 51 ||
aṣṭadikṣu tathaitāsāṃ prākārādbahireva ca |
sadanāni virājante nānāvāhana hetibhiḥ || 52 ||
vajraśālādagrabhāge sālo vaidūryanirmitaḥ |
daśayojanatuṃgo'sau gopuradvārabhūṣitaḥ ||53||
vaidūryabhūmiḥ sarvāpi gṛhāṇi vividhāni ca |
vīthyo rathyā mahāmārgāḥ sarve vaidūryanimitāḥ || 54 ||
vāpīkūpataḍāgāśca sravaṃtīnā taṭāni ca |
bālukā caiva sarvā'pi vaidūryamaṇinirmitā || 55 ||
tatrāṣṭadikṣu parito brāhmaghādīnāṃ ca maṃḍalam |
nijairgaṇaiḥ parivṛtaṃ bhrājate nṛpasattama ||56 ||
pratibrahmāṃḍamātṝṇāṃ tāḥ samaṣṭaya īritāḥ |
brāhmī māheśvarī caiva kaumārī vaiṣṇavī tathā || 57 ||
vārāhī ca tatheṃdrāṇī cāmuṃḍā : sapta mātaraḥ |
aṣṭamī tu mahālakṣmīrnāmnā proktāstu mātaraḥ || 58 ||
brahmarudrādidevānāṃ samākārāstu tāḥ smṛtāḥ |
jagatkalyāṇakāriṇyaḥ svasvasenāsamāvṛtāḥ || 59 ||
tacchālasya caturdvārṣu vāhanāni maheśituḥ |
sajjāni nṛpate saṃti sālaṃkārāṇi nityaśaḥ || 60 ||
daṃtinaḥ koṭiśo vāhāḥ koṭiśaḥ śibikāstathā |
haṃsā siṃhāśca garuḍā mayūrā vṛṣabhāstathā || 61||

tairyuktāḥ syaṃdanāstadvatkoṭiśo nṛpanaṃdana |
pārṣṇigrāhasamāyuktā dhvajairākāśacuṃbinaḥ || 62 ||
koṭiśastu vimānāni nānācihnānvitāni |
nānāvāditrayuktāni mahādhvajayutāni ca ||63||
vaidūryamaṇiśālasyāpyagre śālaḥ paraḥ smṛtaḥ | daśayojanatuṃgo'sāviṃdranīlāśmanirmitaḥ 119811
tanmadhyabhūstathā vīthyo mahāmārgā gṛhāṇi ca |
vāpīkūpataḍāgāśca sarve tanmaṇinirmitāḥ || 65 ||
tatra padmaṃ tu saṃproktaṃ bahuyojanavistṛtam |
ṣoḍaśāraṃ dīpyamānaṃ sudarśanamivāparam ||66||
tatra ṣoḍaśaśaktīnāṃ sthānāni vividhāni ca |
sarvopaskarayuktāni samṛddhāni vasaṃti hi ||67||
tāsāṃ nāmāni vakṣyāmi śṛṇu me nṛpasattama |
karālī vikarālī ca tathomā ca sarasvatī || 68||
śrīdurgāṣā tathā lakṣmīḥ śrutiścaiva smṛtirdhṛtiḥ |
śraddhā medhā matiḥ kāṃtirāryā ṣoḍaśa śaktayaḥ || 69||
nīlajīmūtasaṃkāśāḥ karavālakarāṃbujāḥ ! samāḥ kheṭakacāriṇyo yuddhopakrāṃtamānasāḥ || 70 ||
senānyaḥ sakalā etāḥ śrīdevyā jagadīśituḥ |
pratitrahmāṃḍasaṃsthānāṃ śaktīnāṃ nāyikāḥ smṛtāḥ || 71 ||
brahmāṃḍakṣobhakāriṇyo devīśaktyupabṛṃhitāḥ |
nānārathasamārūḍhā nānāśaktibhiranvitāḥ || 72 ||
etatparākramaṃ vaktuṃ sahasrāsyo'pi na kṣamaḥ |
idranīlamahāśālādagre tu bahuvistṛtaḥ ||73 ||
muktāprākāra udito daśayo janadairghyavān |
madhyabhūḥ pūrvavatproktā tanmadhye'ṣṭadalāṃbujam ||74||
muktāmaṇigaṇākīrṇaṃ vistṛtaṃ tu sakeśaram |
tatra devīsamākārā divyāyudhadharāḥ sadā || 75 ||
saṃproktā aṣṭa maṃtriṇyo jagadvārtāprabodhikāḥ |
devīsa mānabhogāstā iṃgitajñāstu paṃḍitāḥ || 76 ||
kuśalāḥ sarvakāryeṣu svāmikāryaparāyaṇāḥ |
devyabhiprāyabāṃdhyastāścaturā atisuṃdara : || 77 ||
nānāśaktisamāyuktāḥ prati brahmāṃḍavartinām |
prāṇināṃ tāḥ samācāraṃ jñānaśaktyā vidaṃti ca ||78||
tāsāṃ nāmāni vakṣyami matta śṛṇu nṛpottama |
anaṃgakusumā proktā'pyanaṃga kusumāturā || 79 ||
anaṃgamadanā
tadvadanaṃga madanāturā |
bhuvanapālā gaganavegā caiva tataḥ param ||80|
śaśirekhā ca gaganarekhā caiva tataḥ param |
pāśāṃkuśavarābhītidharā aruṇavigrahāḥ || 81 ||
viśvasaṃbandhinī vārtāṃ bodhayaṃti pratikṣaṇam |
muktāśālādagrabhāge mahāmārakato'paraḥ ||82||
śālottamaḥ samuddiṣṭo daśayojanadairghyavān |
nānāsaubhāgyasaṃyukto nānābhogasamanvitaḥ ||83 ||
madhyabhūstādṛśī proktā sadanāni tathaiva ca |
ṣaṭkoṇa maṃcavistīrṇakoṇasthā devatāḥ śṛṇu ||84||
pūrvakoṇe caturvaktro gāyatrīsahito vithiḥ |
kuṇḍikākṣa gugābhotidaṃḍāyudhadharaḥ paraḥ || 85 ||
tadāyudhadharā devī gāyatrī paradevatā |
vedāḥ sarve mūrtimaṃtaḥ śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca || 86 ||
smṛtayaśca purāṇāni mūrtimaṃta vasaṃti hi |
ye brahmavigrahāḥ saṃti gāyatrīvigrahāśca ye || 87||
vyāhṛtīnāṃ vigrahāśva te nityaṃ tatra saṃti hi |
rakṣākoṇe śaṃkhacakragadāṃbujakarāṃbujā ||88 ||
sāvitrī vartate tatra mahāviṣṇuśva tādṛgaḥ |
ye viṣṇuvigrahāḥ saṃti matsyakūrmādayo'khilāḥ || 89 ||

. śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe adhyāvaḥ 12
sāvitrīvigrahā ye ca te sarve tatra saṃti hi |
vamukoṇe paraśvakṣamālābhaya varānvitaḥ || 90 ||
mahārudro vartate'tra sarasvatyapi tādṛśī |
ye ye tu rudrabhedāḥ syurdakṣiṇāsyādayo nṛpa || 91 ||
gaurībhedāśca ye sarve te tatra nivasanti hi |
catuḥ ṣaṣṭaghāgamā ye ca ye cānyepyācamāḥ smṛtāḥ 92 ||
te sarve mūrtimaṃtaśca tatra vai nivasanti hi |
agnikoṇe ratnakuṃbhaṃ tathā maṇikaraṃḍakam || 93||
dadhāno nijahastābhyāṃ kubero dhanadāyakaḥ |
nānāvīthīsamāyukto mahālakṣmī samanvitaḥ ||14||
devyā nidhipatistvāste svaguṇaiḥ pariveṣṭitaḥ |
vāruṇe tu mahākoṇe madano ratisaṃyutaḥ || 95 ||
pāśāṃkuśadhanurbāṇadharo nityaṃ virājate |
śṛṅgārā mūrtimaṃtastu tatra sannihitāḥ sadā || 96 ||
īśānakoṇe vighneśo nityaṃ puṣṭisamanvitaḥ |
pāśāṃkuśadharo vīro vighnahartā virājate || 97||
vibhūtayo gaṇeśasya yā yāḥ santi nṛpottama |
tāḥ sarvā nivasaṃtyatra mahaiśvaryasamanvitāḥ || 98||
pratibrahmāṇḍasaṃsthānāṃ brahmādīnāṃ samaṣṭayaḥ |
ete brahmādayaḥ proktāḥ sevate jagadīśvarīm || 99 ||
mahāmārakatasyāgre śatayojanadairghyavān |
pravālaśālo'styaparaḥ kuṃka māruṇavigrahaḥ || 100 ||
madhyabhūstādṛśī proktā sadanāni ca pūrvavat |
tanmadhye paṃcabhūtānāṃ svāminyaḥ paṃca saṃti ca || 101 ||
hṛllekhā gaganā raktā caturthī tu karālikā |
mahocchuṣmā paṃcamī ca paṃcabhūtasamaprabhā || 102||
pāśāṃkuśavarābhītidhāriṇyo'mitabhūṣaṇāḥ |
devīsamānaveṣāḍhyā navayauvanagarvitāḥ || 103||
prabālaśālādagre tu navaratna vinirmitaḥ |
bahuyojanavistīrṇo mahāśālo'sti bhūmipa || 104 ||
tatra cāmnāyadevīnāṃ sadanāni bahūnyapi |
navaratnamayānyeva taḍāgāśca sarāṃsi ca || 105 ||
śrīdevyā ye'vatārāḥ syuste tatra nivasati hi |
mahāvidyā mahābhedāḥ saṃti tatraiva bhūmipa || 106 ||
nijāvaraṇadevī bhinijabhūṣaṇavāhanaiḥ |
sarvadevyo virājante koṭisūryasamaprabhāḥ || 107||
saptakoṭimahāmaṃtradevatāḥ santi tatra hi |
navaratnamayādagre ciṃtāmaṇigṛhaṃ mahat || 108 ||
tatratyaṃ vastumātraṃ tu citāmaṇivinirmitam |
sūryoddvāropalaistadvaccandrodgāropalaistathā || 109 ||
vidyutprabhopala: staṃbhāḥ kalpitāstu sahasraśaḥ |
yeṣāṃ prabhābhiraṃtaḥsthaṃ vastu kiṃcinna dṛśyate || 110 ||
iti śrīdeva māgavata mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 11 ||
atha dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
tadeva devīsadanaṃ madhyabhāge virājate |
sahasrastambhasaṃyuktāścatvārasteṣu maṇḍapāḥ || 1 ||
śṛṅgāramaṃḍapaścaiko muktimaṃḍapa eva ca |
jñānamaṃḍapasaṃjñastu tṛtīyaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 2||
ekāṃta maṇḍapaścaiva caturthaḥ parikīrtitaḥ |
nānāvitānasaṃyuktā nānādhūpaistu dhūpitāḥ || 3 ||
koṭisūryasamāḥ kāṃtyā bhrājate maṃḍapāḥ śubhāḥ |
tanmaṇḍapānāṃ paritaḥ kāśmīravanikā smṛtā || 4 ||

mallikākuṃdavanikā yatra puṣkalakāḥ sthitāḥ |
asaṃkhyātā mṛgamadaiḥ pūritāstatsravā nṛpa || 5 ||
tadvadratnasopānanirmitā |
sudhārasena sampūrṇā guñjanmattamadhuvratā || 6||
mahāpadmāṭavī |
vanikānāṃ sugaṃdhastu maṇidvīpaṃ suvāsitam || 7 ||
haṃsakāraṇḍavākīrṇā gandhapūritadiktaṭā
śṛṅgāramaṇḍape devyo gāyaṃti vividhaḥ svaraiḥ |
sabhāsado devavarā madhye śrījagadambikā || 8 ||
mocayatyaniśaṃ śivā |
jñānopadeśaṃ kurute tṛtīye nṛpa maṇḍape || 9 ||
caturthamaṃḍape caiva jagadrakṣāvicintanam |
mantriṇīsahitā nityaṃ karoti jagadambikā || 10 || muktimaṃḍapamadhye tu
cintāmaṇigṛhe rājañchaktitattvātmakaḥ paraiḥ |
sopānairdaśabhiryukto maṃcako'pyadhirājate || 11 ||
brahmā viṣṇuśca rudraśca īśvaraśca sadāśivaḥ |
ete pañca khurāḥ proktāḥ phalakastu sadāśivaḥ || 12 ||
tasyopari mahādevī bhuvaneśī virājate |
yā devī nijalīlārthaṃ dvidhābhūtā babhūva ha || 13 ||

sṛṣṭyādau tu sa evāyaṃ tadarghāṅgo maheśvaraḥ | kandarpadarpa nāśodyankoṭikandarpasundaraḥ
paṃcavaktrastrinetraśca maṇibhūṣaṇabhūṣitaḥ |
hariṇābhītiparaśannaraṃ ca nijabāhubhiḥ || 15 ||
dadhānaḥ ṣoḍaśābdo'sau devaḥ sarveśvaro mahān | koṭisūrya tī kāśaścandrakoṭisuśītalaḥ 113911
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśastrinetra: śītaladyutiḥ |
vāmāṃke sannipaṇṇā'sya devī śrībhuvaneśvarī || 17 ||
navaratnagaṇākīrṇakāṃcīdāmavirājitā |
taptakāṃcanasannaddhavaidūryāṅgadabhūṣaṇā ||18||
lalāṭakāṃtivibhavavijitārdha sudhākarā ||19||
kanacchrīcakratāṭaṃkaviṭaṃ kavadanāṃbujā ||20||
biṃbakāṃtitiraskāriradacchadavirājitā |
lasatkuṃkumakastūrī tilakodbhāsitānanā ||21||
divyacūḍāmaṇisphāracaṃca ccaṃdra kasūryakā |
udyatkavisamasvacchanāsābharaṇabhāsurā ||22||
citākalaṃbita svacchamuktāgucchavirājitā |
pāṭīrapaṃkakarpūrakuṃkumālaṃkṛtastanī ||23||
vicitravividhākalpā kambusaṃkāśakaṃdharā |
dāḍimīphala bījābhadaṃtapaṃktivirājitā |
mattālimālāvila-dala kāḍhya mukhāṃbujā ||24||
anarghya ratnaghaṭitamukuṭāṃcitamastakā |
jāhnavīsa liṃlāvartaśobhinābhivibhūṣitā ||25||
kalaṃkakārśya nirmuktaśaraccandranibhānanā ||26||
māṇikyaśakalābaddhamudrikāṃgulibhūṣitā |
puṇḍarīkadalākāranayanatrayasundarī ||27||
kalpitācchamahārāgapadmarāgojjvalaprabhā | ratnakiṃkiṇikāyuktaratnakaṃkaṇaśobhitā
maṇimuktāsa rāpāralasatpadaka saṃtatiḥ |
ratnāṃgulipravitataprabhājālalasatkarā ||28||
mallikā modidhammillamallikā lisarāvṛtā ||29||
kaṃcukī guṃphitāpāranānāratnatatidyutiḥ ||30||
suvṛttaniviḍottuṅgakucabhārālasā śivā | varapāśāṃkuśābhītilasadvāhucatuṣṭayā
sarvaśṛṅgāraveṣāḍhaghā sukumārāṃgavallarī |
sauṃdaryadhārāsarvasvā nirvyājakaruṇāmayī || 31 ||
koṭikoṭiravīṃdūnāṃ kāṃti yā bibhratī parā || 32||
nijasaṃlāpamādhuryaṃ vinirbhatsita kacchapī

nānāsakhībhirdāsībhistathā devāṃganādibhiḥ |
sarvābhirdevatābhistu samaṃtātpariveṣṭitā ||33||
icchāśaktyā jñānaśaktyā kriyāśaktyā samanvitā |
lajjā tuṣṭistathā puṣṭiḥ kīrtiḥ kāṃti kṣamā dayā ||
buddhirmedhā smṛtirlakṣmīmūrtimatyo'ṅganāḥ smṛtāḥ |
jayā ca vijayā caṃvāpyajitā cāparājitā 35 ||
nityā vilāsino dogdhrī tvaghorā maṃgalā navā |
pīṭhaśaktaya etāstu sevate yāṃ parāṃbikām ||36||
yasyāstu pārśvabhāge sto nidhī to śaṃkhapadmau |
navaratnavahā nadyastathā vai kāṃcanasravāḥ || 37||
saptadhātuvahā nadyo nidhibhyāṃ tu vinirgatāḥ |
sudhāsindhvaṃtagāminyastāḥ sarvā nṛpasattama ||38||
sā devī bhuvaneśānī tadvāmāṃke virājate |
sarveśatvaṃ maheśasya yatsaṃgādeva nānyathā || 39||
ciṃtāmaṇigṛhasyāsya pramāṇaṃ śṛṇu bhūmipa |
sahasrayojanāyāmaṃ mahāṃtastattracakṣate ||40||
taduttare mahāśālāḥ pūrvasmādviguṇāḥ smṛtāḥ |
antarikṣagataṃ tvetannirādhāraṃ virājate || 41 ||
saṃkocaśca vikāsaśca jāyate'sya nirantaram |
paṭavatkāryavaśataḥ pralaye sarjane tathā ||42 ||
śālānāṃ caiva sarveṣāṃ sarvakāntiparāvadhi |
cintāmaṇigṛhaṃ proktaṃ yatra devī mahomayī || 43||
ye ye upāsakāḥ santi pratibrahmāṃḍavartinaḥ |
deveṣu nāgalokeṣu manuṣyeṣvitareṣu ca ||44||
śrīdevyāste ca sarve'pi vrajaṃtyatraiva bhūmipa |
devīkṣetre ye tyajanti prāṇāndevyarcane ratāḥ || 45 ||
te sarve yāṃti tatraiva yatra devī mahotsavā |
ghṛtakulyā dugdhakulyā dadhikulyā madhusravāḥ || 46||
syandanti saritaḥ sarvāstathāmṛtavahāḥ parāḥ |
drākṣārasavahāḥ kāścijjambūrasavahāḥ parāḥ || 47||
āmrekṣurasavāhinyo nadyastāstu sahasraśaḥ |
manorathaphalā vṛkṣā vāpyaḥ kūpāstathaiva ca || 48||
yatheṣṭapānaphaladā na nyūnaṃ kiṃcidasti hi |
na rogapalitaṃ vāpi jarā vāpi kadācana || 49 ||
na cintā na ca mātsaryaṃ kāmakrodhādikaṃ tathā |
sarve yuvānaḥ sastrīkāḥ sahasrādityavarcasaḥ || 50 ||
bhajaṃti satataṃ devīṃ tatra śrībhuvaneśvarīm |
kecitsa lokatāpannāḥ kecitsāmīpyatāṃ gatāḥ 51||
sarūpatāṃ gatāḥ kecitsāṣṭi tāṃ ca pare gatāḥ |
yā yāstu devatāstatra pratibrahmāṇḍavartinām ||52||
samaṣṭayaḥ sthitāstāstu sevate jagadīśvarīm |
saptakoṭimahāmantrā mūrtimanta upāsate || 53 ||
mahāvidyāśca sakalāḥ sāmyāvasthātmikāṃ śivām |
kāraṇabrahmarūpāṃ tāṃ māyāśabalavigrahām ||54||
itthaṃ rājanmayā proktaṃ maṇidvīpaṃ mahattaram |
na sūryacaṃdrau no vidyutkoṭayo'gnistathaiva ca || 55 ||
etasya bhāsā koṭyaṃśakoṭyaṃśenāpi te samāḥ |
kvacidvidumasaṃkāśaṃ kvacinmarakatacchavi || 56 ||
vidyudbhānusamacchāyaṃ madhyasūryasamaṃ kvacit |
vidyutkoṭimahādhārā sārakāṃtitataṃ kvacit ||57||
kvacitsi dūranīlendramāṇikyasadṛśacchavi |
hīrasāramahāgarbhadhagaddha gita diktaṭam ||58||
kāṃtyā dāvānalasamaṃ taptakāṃcanasannibham |
kvaciccaṃdropalodgāraṃ sūryodgāraṃ ca kutracit ||59||
ratnaśṛṃgisamāyuktaṃ ratnaprākāragopuram |
ratnapatra ratnaphalairbṛkṣaiśca parimaṃḍitam ||60||

nṛtyanmayūrasaṃgheśva kapotaraṇitojjvalam |
kokilā kākalīlāpaiḥ śukalāpaiśca śobhitam || 61 ||
suramyaramaṇīyāṃbulakṣāvadhisarovṛtam |
tanmadhyabhāgavilasadvikacadratnapaṅkajaiḥ ||62||
sugandhibhiḥ samantāttu vāsitaṃ śatayojanam | mandamārutasambhinna caladrumasamākulam 119311
cintāmaṇisamūhānāṃ jyotiṣā vitatāmbaram |
ratnaprabhābhirabhito dhagaddhagitadiktaṭam || 64||
vṛkṣavrātamahāgandhavāta vrātasupūritam |
dhūpadhūpāyitaṃ rājanmaṇidīpāyutojjvalam ||65||
makṣijālakasa cchidrataralodara kāntibhiḥ |
diṅmohajanakaṃ caitaddarpaṇodarasaṃyutam || 66||
aiśvaryasya samagrasya śṛṅgārasyākhilasya ca |
sarvajñatāyāḥ sarvāyāstejasaścākhilasya ca || 67 ||
parākramasya sarvasya sarvottamaguṇasya ca |
sakalāyā dayāyāśca samāptiriha bhūpate || 68 ||
rājña ānandamārabhya brahmalokāṃtabhūmiṣu |
ānaṃdā ye sthitāḥ sarve te'traivāṃtarbhavati hi || 69 ||
iti te varṇitaṃ rājanmaṇidvīpaṃ mahattaram |
mahādevyāḥ paraṃ sthānaṃ sarvalokāttamottamam || 70 ||
etasya smaraṇātsadyaḥ sarvapāpaṃ vinaśyati |
prāṇotkramaṇasandho tu smṛtvā tatraiva gacchati || 71 ||
adhyāya pañcakaṃ tvetatpaṭhennityaṃ samāhitaḥ |
bhūtapretapiśācādivādhā tatra bhavenna hi || 72 ||

iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe dvādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 12||
atha trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ
vyāsa uvāca
iti te kathitaṃ bhūpa yadyatpṛṣṭaṃ tvayā'nagha |
nārāyaṇena yatproktaṃ nāradāya mahātmane || 1 ||
śrutvaitattu mahādevyāḥ purāṇaṃ paramādbhutam |
kṛtakṛtyo bhavenmartyo devyāḥ priyatamo hi saḥ || 2 ||
kuru cāmbāmakhaṃ rājansvapitruddharaṇāya vai |
khinno'si yena rājendra piturjñātvā tu durgatim ||3||
gṛhāṇa tvaṃ mahādevyā mantraṃ sarvottamottamam |
yathāvidhi vidhānena janmasāphalyadāyakam ||4||
sūta uvāca
tacchrutvā nṛpaśārdūlaḥ prārthayitvā munīśvaram |
tasmādeva mahāmantraṃ devīpraṇavasaṃjñakam ||5||
dīkṣāvidhi vidhānena jagrāha nṛpasattamaḥ |
tata āhūya dhaumyādīnnavarātrasamāgame || 6 ||
ambāyajñaṃ cakārāśu vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ |
brāhmaṇaiḥ pāṭhayāmāsa purāṇaṃ tvetaduttamam ||7||
śrīdevyagre'mvikāprītyai devībhāgavataṃ param |
brāhmaṇānbhojayāmāsādhyasaṃkhyātāḥ suvāsinīḥ ||8||
kumārīrbaṭukādīṃśca dīnānāthāṃstathaiva ca |
dravyapradānaṃstānsarvānsaṃtoṣya vasudhādhipaḥ || 9 ||

śrīmaddevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe adhyāyaḥ 13
samāpya yajñaṃ saṃsthāne saṃsthito yāvadeva hi |
tāvadeva hi cākāśānnāradaḥ samavātarat || 10||
raṇayanmahatīṃ vīṇāṃ jvaladagniśikhopamaḥ |
sasambhramaḥ samutthāya dṛṣṭvā taṃ nāradaṃ munim ||11||
āsanādyupacāraiśca pūjayāmāsa bhūmipaḥ |
kṛtvā tu kuśalapraśnaṃ papracchāgamakāraṇam ||12||
rājovāca
kuta āgamanaṃ sādho brūhi kiṃ karavāṇi te |
sanātho'haṃ kṛtārtho'haṃ tvadāgamanakāraṇāt ||13||
iti rājño vacaḥ śrutvā provāca munisattamaḥ |
adyāśvayaṃ mayā dṛṣṭaṃ devaloke nṛpottama ||14||
tannivedayituṃ prāptastvatsakāśe suvismitaḥ |
pitā te durgati prāpto nijakarmaviparyayāt || 15 ||
sa evāyaṃ divyarūpavapurbhūtvā'dhunaiva hi |
devadevaḥ stutaḥ samyagapsarobhiḥ samantataḥ || 16 ||
gato'bhavat |
devībhāgavatasyāsya śravaṇotthaphalena ca || 17 ||
vimānavaramāruhya maṇidvīpaṃ
ambāmakhaphalenāpi pitā te sugatiṃ gataḥ |
dhanyo'si kṛtakṛtyo'si jīvitaṃ saphalaṃ tava ||18||
tu kulabhūṣaṇa |
devaloke sphītakīrtistavādya vipulā'bhavat ||19||
narakāduddhṛtastātastvayā
sūta uvāca
nāradoktaṃ samākarṇya premagadgaditāntaraḥ |
papāta pādāmbujayorvyāsasyādbhutakarmaṇaḥ || 20 ||
tavānugrahato deva kṛtārtho'haṃ mahāmune |
kiṃ mayā pratikartavyaṃ namaskārādṛte tava || 21||
tvayā mune |
iti rājño vacaḥ śrutvāpyāśīrbhirabhinaṃdya ca || 22 ||
anugrāhyaḥ sadaivāhamevameva
uvāca vacanaṃ ślakṣṇaṃ bhagavānvādarāyaṇaḥ |
rājansarvaṃ parityajya bhaja devīpadāmbujam ||23|
devībhāgavataṃ caiva paṭha nityaṃ samāhitaḥ |
aṃbāmakhaṃ sadā bhaktyā karu nityamataṃdritaḥ ||24||
anāyāsena tena tvaṃ mokṣyase bhavabandhanāt |
santyanyāni purāṇāni harirudramukhāni ca ||25||
devībhāgavatasyāsya kalāṃ nārhati ṣoḍaśīm |
sārametatpurāṇānāṃ vedānāṃ caiva sarvaśaḥ ||26||
mūlaprakṛti revaiṣā yatra tu pratipādyate |
samaṃ tena purāṇaṃ syātkathamanyannṛpottama ||27||
pāṭhe vedasamaṃ puṇyaṃ yasya syājjanamejaya |
paṭhitavyaṃ prayatnena tadeva vibudhottamaḥ || 28||
ityuktvā nṛpavayaṃ taṃ jagāma munirāṭ tataḥ |
jagmuścaiva yathāsthānaṃ dhaumyādimunayo'malāḥ ||29||
devībhāgavatasyaiva praśaṃsāṃ cakruruttamām |
rājā śaśāsa dharaṇīṃ tataḥ santuṣṭamānasaḥ ||
devībhāgavataṃ caiva pañchṛṇvannirantaram ||30||
iti śrīdevībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśaskandhe trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 13||

atha caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca
ardhaśkokātmakaṃ yattu devīvaktrābjanirgatam |
śrīmadbhāgavataṃ nāma vedasiddhāṃtabodhakam ||1||
upadiṣṭaṃ viṣṇave yadvapatranivāsine |
śatakoṭipravistīrṇaṃ tatkṛtaṃ brahmaṇā purā ||2||
tatsāramekataḥ kṛtvā vyāsena śukahetave |
aṣṭādaśasahasraṃ tu dvādaśaskaṃdhasaṃyutam ||3||
devībhāgavataṃ nāma purāṇaṃ grathitaṃ purā |
adyāpi devaloke tadbahuvistīrṇamasti hi ||4||
nānena sadṛśaṃ puṇyaṃ pavitraṃ pāpanāśanam |
pade pade'śvamedhasya phalamāpnoti mānavaḥ ||5||
paurāṇikaṃ pūjayitvā vastrādyābharaṇādibhiḥ |
vyāsabuddhayā tanmukhāttu śrutvetatsamupoṣitaḥ || 6 ||
likhitvā nijahastena lekhakenāthavā mune |
proṣṭhapadyāṃ paurṇamāsyāṃ hemasiṃhasamanvitam ||7||
dadyātpaurāṇikāyātha dakṣiṇāṃ ca payasvinīm |
sālaṃkṛtāṃ savatsāṃ ca kapilāṃ hemamālinīm ||8|
bhojayedbrāhmaṇānaṃte'pyadhyāyaparisaṃmitān |
suvāsinīstāvatīśca kumārīrbaṭukaiḥ saha ||9||
devībuddhyā pūjayettānvasanābharaṇādibhiḥ |
pāyasānnāvareṇāpi gaṃdhasrakkusumādibhiḥ ||10||
purāṇadānenaitena bhūdānasya phalaṃ labhet |
iha loke sukhī bhūtvā'pyate devīpuraṃ vrajet ||11||
nityaṃ yaḥ śṛṇuyādbhaktyā devībhāgavataṃ param |
na tasya durlabhaṃ kicitkadācitkvacidasti hi 12 || |
aputro labhate putrāndhanārthī dhanamāpnuyāt |
vidyārthī prāpnuyādvidyāṃ kīrtimaṃḍitabhūtalaḥ || 13 |
vaṃdhyā vā kākavaṃdhyā vā mṛtavaṃdhyā ca yāṃganā |
śravaṇādasya taddoṣānnivarteta na saṃśayaḥ || 14||
yadgehe pustakaṃ caitatpūjitaṃ yadi tiṣṭhati |
tadgehaṃ na tyajennityaṃ ramā caiva sarasvatī ||15||
nekṣaṃte tatra vetālaḍākinīrākṣasādayaḥ |
jvaritaṃ tu naraṃ spṛṣṭvā paṭhedetatsamāhitaḥ || 16 ||
maṃḍalānnāśamāpnoti jvaro dāhasamanvitaḥ |
śatāvṛttyā'sya paṭhanātkṣayarogo vinaśyati || 17 ||
pratisaṃdhyaṃ paṭhedyastu saṃdhyāṃ kṛtvā samāhitaḥ |
ekaikamasya cādhyāyaṃ sa naro jñānavānbhavet ||18||
śakunāṃścaiva vīkṣeta kāryākāryeṣu caiva hi |
tatprakāraḥ purastāttu kathito'sti mayā mune || 19 ||
navarātre paṭhennityaṃ śāradīye'tibhaktitaḥ |
tasyāṃbikā tu saṃtuṣṭā dadatīcchādhikaṃ phalam 20||
vaiṣṇavaiścaiva śaivaiśva ramomā prīyate sadā |
saurava gāṇapatyaiśca sveṣṭaśakteśca tuṣṭaye ||21||
paṭhitavyaṃ prayatnena navarātracatuṣṭaye |
vaidikainijagāyatrīprītaye nityaśo mune ||22||
paṭhitavyaṃ pratyanena virodho nātra kasyacit |
upāsanā tu sarveṣāṃ śaktiyuktā'sti sarvadā ||23| tu
tacchaktereva toṣārthaṃ paṭhitavyaṃ sadā dvijaiḥ |
strīśūdro na paṭhedetatkadāpi ca vimohitaḥ ||24||
śṛṇuyādvijavaktrāttu nityameveti ca sthitiḥ |
kiṃ punarbahunoktena sāraṃ vakṣyāmi tattvataḥ || 25 ||

h.is.M.

vedasāramidaṃ puṇyaṃ purāṇaṃ dvijasattamāḥ |
vedapāṭhasamaṃ pāṭhe śravaṇe ca tathaiva hi || 26 ||
saccidānaṃdarūpāṃ tāṃ gāyatrīpratipāditām |
namāmi hrīṃmatīṃ devīṃ dhiyo yo naḥ pracodayāt ||
iti sūtavacaḥ śrutvā naimiṣīyāstapodhanāḥ |
pūjayāmāsuratyuccaiḥ sūtaṃ paurāṇikottamam ||28||
prasannahṛdayāḥ sarve devīpādāṃbujārcakā: |
nirvṛti paramāṃ prāptāḥ purāṇasya prabhāvataḥ ||29||
namaścakruḥ punaḥ sūtaṃ kṣamāpya ca muhurmuhuḥ |
saṃsāravāridhestāta plavo'smākaṃ tvameva hi ||30||
iti sa munivarāṇāmagrataḥ śrāvayitvā sakalanigamaguhyaṃ dorgametatpurāṇam |
